Genesis37:35 A tapate le a tanute khempeuh in amah hehnem uh a, ahih hangin amah hehnep zawhin om lo a, “Hi lo hi. A kapsa-in ka tapa kiang Leinuai-ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin ama hangin a pa kap hi." 
Genesis37:36 Tua kikal sungin Midian mite in Egypt gam sunga inncing mang, Faro’ nuai-ah ulian ahi Potifar’ tungah Josef na zuak uh hi." 
Genesis38:1 Tua hun laitakin Judah a sanggamte kiang panin paisukin, Adullam mi Hirah min nei mi khat tawh omkhawm hi." 
Genesis38:2 Tua lai-ah Judah in Kanaan mi Shua’ tanu mu hi. Amah in tua nu tenpihin luppih a," 
Genesis38:3 tua nu gai-in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Er a phuak hi." 
Genesis38:4 Tua nu gai leuleu-in tapa khat nei a, tua nu in a min Onan a phuak hi." 
Genesis38:5 Tua nu in tapa khat nei leuleu-in a min Shelah a phuak hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Shelah a neih laitakin Khezib-ah amah a om hi. 
Genesis38:6 Judah in a tapa masa Er a dingin zi khat la a, tua nu’ min Tamar ahi hi." 
Genesis38:7 Ahih hangin Judah’ ta masa Er pen Topa’ muhna-ah hoih lo a, Topa in amah that hi." 
Genesis38:8 Tua ciangin Judah in Onan kiangah, “Na sanggampa’ zi tawh lumkhawm inla, tua nu’ tungah pasal’ sanggamte’ tavuan sem inla, na sanggampa a dingin ta nei in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:9 Ahih hangin Onan in tate pen ama a’ ahih loh ding thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampa’ zi tawh a lupkhawm ciangin a sanggampa’ tungah ta pia kha ding ahih manin a natui leilakah buasak hi. 
Genesis38:10 Ama gamtatna Topa’ muhna-ah lungkimhuai lo a, Topa in amah zong a that hi." 
Genesis38:11 Tua ciangin Judah in a monu Tamar’ tungah, “Ka tapa Shelah a gol mateng na pa’ inn-ah meigongnu-in va om in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggamte mah bangin amah zong si kha ding ci-in lau hi. Tua ahih ciangin Tamar pai-in a pa’ inn-ah a om hi." 
Genesis38:12 Tua hun sungin Judah’ zi, Shua’ tanu si hi. Judah a dahna hun a ven’ ciangin a lawm Hirah tawh Timnah-a ama tuumul a mette kiangah paito hi." 
Genesis38:13 “Na teekpa a tuute mul met dingin Timnah-ah paito hi,” ci-in Tamar’ kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
Genesis38:14 a meigong numei puan suahkhia-in, a kituamna silhin amah kituam a, Timnah paina lampi gei-a Enaim paina munah na tu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Shelah a khang cing khin ahihna amah in thei a, ahi zongin amah tawh kitengsak nai lo hi." 
Genesis38:15 Judah in tua nu a muh ciangin amah in a mai tuam ahih manin numei paktat dingin ngaihsun hi. 
Genesis38:16 Lampi gei-a tua nu’ kiangah amah pai a, “Hong pai in, lumkhawm ni,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu pen a monu ahihlam thei lo hi. Tua nu in, “I lupkhop man dingin kei bang hong pia ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:17 Amah in dawngin, “Keelhon panin keelno khat hong puak ning,” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Nong puak mateng khapna khat nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:18 Amah in, “Bang khapna nang hong pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in dawngin, “Na min gelhna le na khauhual le na khutsunga om na ciangkhut,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua nu tungah tuate pia-in, amah luppih a, amah tawh tua nu a gai hi." 
Genesis38:19 Tua ciangin amah dingin paikhia a, a kikhuhna puan suahkhia-in meigong numei ahihna puan a silh hi." 
Genesis38:20 Numei’ khutsung panin a khapna a lakik dingin Judah in Adullam mi a lawmpa a ganno tawh a sawl ciangin, amah in tua nu mu zo lo hi." 
Genesis38:21 Amah in tua lai mun mite dong a, “Lam gei Enaim a om numei paktat nu koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Hih lai-ah numei paktat om ngei lo hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Genesis38:22 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kiangah amah ciahkikin, “Amah ka mu kei hi. Tua lai mun mite in, ‘Hih lai-ah numei paktat om ngei lo hi,’ zong hong ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:23 Judah in dawngin, “Eite hong kinuihsan kha ding ahih ciangin a nate ama a dingin kem mai hen. Hih ganno ka puak a, nang in tua nu na muh lohna na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:24 Tua zawh kha thum ciangin Judah tungah, “Na monu Tamar paktatin gamta hi. Tua tham loin paktatna tawh naupaii hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Judah in, “Amah paikhiatpih un; amah kihaltum hen,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:25 Amah a kipaikhiatpih laitakin amah in a teekpa kiangah kam khak a, “Hih nate a nei pa tawh nau ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Ciamteh in, hong thum ing, min gelhna le khauhual le ciangkhut, hih nate kua-a’ ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:26 Tua ciangin Judah in tua nate thei a, “Ka tapa Shelah tawh gawm lo ka hih ciangin, tua numei, kei sangin thuman zaw hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu tawh amah lumkhawm kik nawn lo hi." 
Genesis38:27 Tua nu a suah hun a tun ciangin a naubu sungah nih om hi. 
Genesis38:28 Nausuak dingin a nat ciangin, khat in a khut dawksak hi. Naudom nu in khausan khat la-in a khut tungah khih a, “Hih pen hong pai masa,” ci pah hi." 
Genesis38:29 Ahih hangin a khut a dawh tum kik laitakin, en in, a sanggampa hong suakkhia hi. Amah in, “Nang a dingin a vang nangmahmah in bawltawm!” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Perez kiphuak hi." 
Genesis38:30 Tua khit ciangin a khut tunga khausan tawh a sanggampa hong suakkhia a, ama min Zerah kiphuak hi." 
Genesis39:1 Tu-in Egypt-ah Josef kipaipih suk a, tua lai-a a paipih Ishmael mite tung panin Egypt mi, inncing mangpa, Faro’ nuai-a mangpa Potifar in amah na lei hi." 
Genesis39:2 Topa in Josef ompih a, amah nasep a zo mi khat suak hi. Amah, Egypt mi a topa’ inn sungah om a," 
Genesis39:3 Topa in amah a ompihna le Topa in ama khut sungah a hih khempeuh a mavansakna a topa in mu hi. 
Genesis39:4 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in ama mai-ah maipha ngahin ama na sem a, amah in a innsung ukpa-in bawlin a neih khempeuh a uk dingin a koih hi." 
Genesis39:5 Amah in a innsung uk leh a neih khempeuh a ukin a bawl a kipan Topa in Josef’ hangin Egypt mipa’ innkuan thupha pia hi. Innsung hitaleh lo sung hitaleh a neih khempeuh tungah Topa’ thupha om hi. 
Genesis39:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a neih khempeuh Josef’ khut sungah ap hi. Josef nei khin ahih manin amau nupa sungthu lobuang thudangte lunghihmawh dingin ngaihsun lo hi. Tu-in Josef ngaihbaangin a mel hoih hi. 
Genesis39:7 Tawlkhat khit ciangin a topa’ zi in Josef zawl mit a, “Kei tawh hong lumkhawm in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:8 Ahih hangin amah in nialin a topa’ zi kiangah, “En in, kei hong nei ahih manin ka topa in inn sungah bangmah lunghihmawhna nei lo a, ama neih khempeuh ka khut sungah hong koih khin hi." 
Genesis39:9 Hih inn sungah kei sangin amah lianzaw lo hi. Nang, ama zi na hih manin, nang lobuang kei kiang panin amah in a kep tuam bangmah om lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in hih gitlohna lianpi bawlin Pasian’ tungah khial ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:10 Amah in ni khat khit ni khat Josef a zol hangin, amah tawh lupkhop ding hitaleh omkhop ding hitaleh amah in tua nu’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Genesis39:11 Ahih hangin ni khat, amah a nasep sem dingin inn sungah pai a, inn sungah innsung mite khat zong a om loh laitakin," 
Genesis39:12 tua nu in a puan-in amah man a, “Kei tawh hong lumkhawm hoh in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in tua nu’ khut sungah a puan nusia-in tai-in tua inn panin a paikhia hi." 
Genesis39:13 Tua nu in, amah in a khut sungah puan nusia-in inn panin a taikhiatna a muh ciangin," 
Genesis39:14 ama innsung mite samin amaute kiangah, “En un, amah in eite hong no dingin Hebru mi khat eite’ lakah hong paipih hi. Kei tawh a lumkhawm dingin amah hong sungtang a, nakpitakin kei ka kiko hi." 
Genesis39:15 Ka aw sangsakin ka kikona a zak ciangin amah in ka kiangah a puan nusia a, tai-in inn panin paikhia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:16 Tua ciangin Josef’ topa inn-ah hong ciah mateng amah in a kiangah a puan koih hi. 
Genesis39:17 Tua nu in ama kiangah tua thu mah gen a, “Kote kianga nong paipih Hebru mi nasempa keimah a no dingin hong sungtang hi." 
Genesis39:18 Ahih hangin ka aw sangsakin ka kiko phetin amah in a puan kei kiangah nusia-in inn panin taikhia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:19 “Na nasempa in kei hong bawlna dan hih bang hi,” ci-in a zi in ama kianga a genna a topa in a zak ciangin nak heh mahmah hi." 
Genesis39:20 Josef’ topa in amah manin kumpipa’ thongkiate a kikhumna thong sungah amah koih a, tua thong sungah amah om hi." 
Genesis39:21 Ahih hangin Topa in Josef ompihin ama tungah itna kip lak a, thong kem pa’ muhna-ah amah maipha a pia hi." 
Genesis39:22 Thong kem pa in thong sunga thongkia mi khempeuh Josef’ et dingin ap a, tua lai-a a kisem khempeuh ama hih ahi hi." 
Genesis39:23 Topa in amah ompih ahih manin Josef’ etna sunga om peuhmah thong kem pa in don lo hi. Ama hih peuhmah Topa in daupaisak hi. 
Genesis40:1 Tua zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin, Egypt kumpipa’ an piapa le a anhuan pa in Egypt kumpipa ahi amau’ topa hehsak uh hi." 
Genesis40:2 An piapi pa le anhuan pipa ahi, ama nuai-a mangte nih tungah Faro heh a," 
Genesis40:3 Josef a kikhumna thong sung, inncing mangpa’ inn sungah amah in amaute a koih hi." 
Genesis40:4 Inncing mangpa in amaute Josef kemsak a, amah in amaute’ na sem hi. Kikhumna sungah amaute tawlkhat om uh hi." 
Genesis40:5 Zan khat amau tegel in mang man uh hi. Thong sunga a om an piapa le anhuan pa, amau’ mang a tuam tuak, a mang khiatna zong a tuam tuak mah ahi hi." 
Genesis40:6 Zingsang ciangin amaute kiangah Josef pai-in amaute a muh ciangin, amaute na lungkham uh hi." 
Genesis40:7 Tua ahih ciangin a topa’ inn sunga amah tawh a kikhumin a om Faro’ nuai-a mangte amah in dong a, “Bang hangin tuni-in maimial na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:8 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Mang ka man uh a, tuate a khiathei ding om lo hi,” na ci uh hi. Josef in amaute kiangah, “Mang khiat theihnate Pasian’ hong piak hi lo ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong gen un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:9 Tua ahih ciangin an piapi pa in Josef kiangah a mang gen a, “Ka mangin ka mai-ah leenggui khat om a," 
Genesis40:10 tua leenggui tungah hiang thum om hi. A sel phetin pakkhia pah a, a bomte leenggah suakin min pah hi." 
Genesis40:11 Ka khut sungah Faro’ hai ka tawi hi. Keimah in leenggahte loin Faro’ hai sungah ka suk a, Faro’ khut tungah a hai ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:12 Tua ciangin Josef in ama kiangah, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi. Hiang thumte, ni thum ahi hi." 
Genesis40:13 Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong khah ding a, na za-ah nang hong koih kik ding hi. Ama an piapa na hih lai-a mah bangin ama khut tungah Faro’ hai na pia ding hi." 
Genesis40:14 Ahih hangin kei hong phawk in. Nang tungah thu hong hoih ciangin kei tungah hehpihna hong bawl in, kong thum hi. Faro’ tungah kei’ thu genin, hih inn panin kei hong lakhia in." 
Genesis40:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Hebru mite’ gam panin kei hong kigukhia a, hih lai-ah zong amaute in thong mial sungah kei hong koih nadingin bangmah ka gamta kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:16 An huanpipa in a khiatna a hoihlam hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, amah in Josef kiangah, “Kei zong mang khat ka man hi: Ka lu tungah mohlawh thum om a," 
Genesis40:17 a lawh tungnung pen sungah an huansa namkim Faro a dingin om hi. Ahih hangin ka lu tunga lawh sung panin vasate in ne uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:18 Josef in dawngin, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi: Lawh thumte, ni thum ahi hi." 
Genesis40:19 Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong lakhia-in na lu hong tan ding a, sing tung khatah nang hong khai ding hi. Vasate in na sa ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:20 A ni thum ni, Faro’ suah ni hunin, amah in a nasemte khempeuh a dingin pawi khat kham a, an piapi pa le an huanpipa lakhia hi." 
Genesis40:21 Amah in an piapi pa an piak nasepah koihkik a, amah in Faro’ khut sungah a hai pia hi." 
Genesis40:22 Ahih hangin Josef’ khiat mah bangin an huanpipa a khailum hi. 
Genesis40:23 Ahi zongin an piapi pa in Josef phawk nawn lo a, amah mangngilh ta hi." 
Genesis41:1 Tua zawh kum nih bit khit ciangin Faro in mang man a, amah Nail gun gei-ah ding hi." 
Genesis41:2 Nail gun sung panin bawngpi a zol a thau sagih hong paikhia a, amaute in phai lopate ne uh hi." 
Genesis41:3 Amaute’ khit ciangin Nail gun sung pan mahin a gulhgawng a gawng bawngpi dang sagih hong paikhia a, Nail gun gei-a bawngpi dangte kiangah ding uh hi." 
Genesis41:4 Tua ciangin a gulhgawng bawngpi gawng sagihte in a zol a thau bawngpi sagihte netum uh hi. Tua ciangin Faro khang lo hi. 
Genesis41:5 Tua ciangin ihmu-in a nih veina mang man hi. A taksa a hoih buhvui sagih kung khat tungah vui hi. 
Genesis41:6 Tuate’ khit ciangin nisuahna huih in a theemsak a hawm vui sagih hong pokhia hi. 
Genesis41:7 A vui hawmte in a taksa a dim vui sagihte valhtum uh hi. Tua ciangin Faro khang lo a, tua pen a mang na hi hi." 
Genesis41:8 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin a lungkham hi. Amah in mi sawlin Egypt mitphial siamte khempeuh le a mipil khempeuh samsak hi. Faro in amaute’ kiangah a mang gen a, ahih hangin Faro’ tungah a khiatna a gen thei kuamah om lo hi." 
Genesis41:9 Tua ciangin an piapi pa in Faro’ kiangah, “Tuni-in ka khialhnate ka phawkkik hi." 
Genesis41:10 Faro, ama nasemte tungah heh a, kei le an huanpipa, inncing mangpa’ inn sungah hong khum lai-in" 
Genesis41:11 amah le keimah in zan khat sungin mang ka man uh a, a mangte in a khiatna tuam ciat nei hi." 
Genesis41:12 Inncing mangpa’ nasem ahi Hebru mi tangval khat tua lai-ah kote tawh om hi. Ama kiangah ka gen uh ciangin, amah in ka mangte uh hong khiatsak a, ka mang uh tawh a kizui tuakin a khiatna hong gen hi." 
Genesis41:13 Amah in kote tungah a khiatna hong gen bangin hong tung hi. Kei pen ka za-ah hong kikoih kik a, anhuan pa kikhailum hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:14 Tua ciangin Faro in mi sawlin Josef samsak a, amaute in manlang takin thongmial sung panin amah a paikhiatpih uh hi. Amah in a mul kiatin a puan a khek khit ciangin, Faro’ mai-ah hong pai hi." 
Genesis41:15 Faro in Josef kiangah, “Mang khat ka man a, a khiatna a gen thei kuamah om lo hi. Nang in mang na zak ciangin a khiatna gen thei, ci-in hong kigenna ka za hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:16 Josef in Faro dawngin, “Kei’ pilna tawh mang a khiathei ka hi kei hi. Pasian in Faro’ tungah a hoihlamin dawnna hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:17 Tua ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Ka mangin Nail gun gei-ah ka ding hi." 
Genesis41:18 A thau a zol bawngpi sagih Nail gun panin hong paikhia a, phai lopate ne uh hi." 
Genesis41:19 Tuate’ khit ciangin a hehpihhuai a gulhgawng, Egypt gam sung khempeuhah tua bang ka muh ngei loh bawngpi dang sagih hong pai hi." 
Genesis41:20 A gawng a gulhgawng bawngpite in a masa a thau bawngpi sagihte netum uh hi. 
Genesis41:21 Ahih hangin amaute in tuate a nek khit uh ciangin, a nek khitlam uh kuamah in thei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen a tunga mah bangin gulhgawng lai veve uh hi. Tua ciangin ka khang lo hi." 
Genesis41:22 Tua ciangin ka mang mahin kung khat tungah a dim a hoih buhvui sagih a vuikhia zong ka mu hi. 
Genesis41:23 Tuate’ khit ciangin nisuahna huihpi in a keusak a hawm, a theem vui sagih hong po a," 
Genesis41:24 a vui hawmte in a vui hoih sagihte valhtum uh hi. Mitphial siamte kiangah ka gen a, ahih hangin kei kiangah hong gentel thei khat beek om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:25 Tua ciangin Josef in Faro’ kiangah, “Faro’ mang tegel pen khat ahi hi. Pasian in ama bawl ding, Faro’ tungah hong kilangsak khin hi." 
Genesis41:26 A hoih bawngpi sagihte, kum sagih hi a, a hoih buhvui sagihte zong kum sagih mah ahi hi. A mang khiatna a kibang ahi hi." 
Genesis41:27 Tuate’ khit ciangin a hong paikhia, a gawng a gulhgawng bawngpi sagihte, kum sagih hi a, nisuahna huihpi in a theemsak buhvui sagihte zong kialpi kum sagih mah ahi hi." 
Genesis41:28 Faro’ kianga kong gen bangin Pasian in ama hih ding, Faro’ tungah hong lak khin ahi hi." 
Genesis41:29 Egypt gam sung khempeuhah kum sagih sung hauhna hong tung ding a," 
Genesis41:30 ahih hangin tua khit ciangin kialpi kum sagih sung hong tungin, hauhna ngeisa khempeuh Egypt gam sungah kimangngilh ding hi. Kialpi in gam sung netum ding a," 
Genesis41:31 nasia mahmah ding ahih manin, tua hong tung ding kialpi’ huhau-in gam sungah hauhna kithei lo ding hi." 
Genesis41:32 Faro’ mang nih a phakna pen tua thu Pasian’ sehsa hi, a cihnopna hi a, Pasian in tomno sungin hong tungsak ding hi." 
Genesis41:33 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Faro in thu ngaihsun siam mipil khat tengkhia inla, Egypt gam sung a uk dingin amah koih in." 
Genesis41:34 Faro in gam sungah vaihawm ulian seh inla, a kihauh kum sagih sungin Egypt gam leitang pana piang sung panin nga-ah khat la in." 
Genesis41:35 Hong tung ding kum hoih sunga an khempeuh amaute khawmsak inla, khuapite sungah an nek dingin Faro’ ukna nuai-ah antangte kholin, amaute kemsak in." 
Genesis41:36 Kialpi hangin gam sung a siatloh nadingin Egypt gam sungah a hong tung ding kum sagih kialpi dal nadingin a kikoihcing an hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:37 Hih a thugen pen Faro le a nasemte khempeuh in hoihsa uh hi. 
Genesis41:38 Faro in a nasemte kiangah, “Ama sungah Pasian Kha a omna, hih bang midang mu ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:39 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Pasian in hihte khempeuh nang hong lak khin ahih manin, nang bangin thu ngaihsun siam le a pil midang om lo hi." 
Genesis41:40 Nang pen ka inn sungah ulian na hi ding a, nangma thupiak bangin ka mite khempeuh gamta ding uh hi. Kumpi tokhom tawh kisai-in kei pen nang sangin ka lian zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:41 Faro in Josef’ kiangah, “Egypt gam khempeuh a uk dingin nang kong koih khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:42 Tua ciangin Faro in a min gelhna zungbuh ama khut tung panin suahkhia-in Josef’ khutah bulh a, puan hoih mahmah tawh amah zemin, a ngawngah kham khainiang khat oksak hi." 
Genesis41:43 Ama leeng nihna tungah Josef tuangsak a, ama mai-ah uliante kiko a, “Khukdin’ un!” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam khempeuh a ukin amah koih hi." 
Genesis41:44 Tua tham loin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Kei pen Faro ka hi hi. Nangma thukim lohin Egypt gam sung khempeuhah kuamah in a khut a khe nangawn uh liik lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:45 Faro in Josef’ min Zafenath-paneah a phuak hi. Amah in On khua siampipa Potifera’ tanu Asenath tawh kitengsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam sungah Josef zin kawikawi hi. 
Genesis41:46 Egypt kumpipa Faro’ nasemin a tum hunin Josef kum sawmthum pha hi. Faro’ omna panin Josef paikhia a, Egypt gam sung khempeuhah zin hi." 
Genesis41:47 A kihauh kum sagih sungin leitang in tampi piangsak a," 
Genesis41:48 Egypt gamah tampi a om laitakin amah in tua kum sagih sunga ante khempeuh khawm a, khuapite sungah an khol hi. A kiima lote panin khuapi simah amah in an khol hi." 
Genesis41:49 A teh ding a khawl dong zahin Josef in tuipi gei sehnel zahin antang tampi khol hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kiteh khin zo lo hi. 
Genesis41:50 Kialpi kum hong tun ma-in Josef in On khua siampipa Potifera’ tanu Asenath tawh tapa nih nei hi. 
Genesis41:51 Josef in a ta masa Manasseh a phuak hi. Amah in, “Pasian in ka haksatna khempeuh le ka pa’ innkuan khempeuh a mangngilhin hong bawl hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:52 A nihna pen amah in Efraim a phuak hi. “Ka thuakna gam sungah kei a pungin hong bawl hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:53 Egypt gam sunga a om kum sagih sung hauhna hun bei ta hi. 
Genesis41:54 Josef’ gensa bangin kum sagih kialpi hong kipan hi. Gamdang khempeuhah kialpi tung a, ahih hangin Egypt gam sung tengah an om hi." 
Genesis41:55 Egypt gam khempeuh a kial ciangin, an ngenin mite Faro’ tungah kiko uh hi. Faro in Egypt mite khempeuh tungah, “Josef’ kiangah pai un. Note’ tunga ama hong cih bangin gamta un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:56 Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuhah kialpi a tunkim ciangin Josef in ankholna innte khempeuh hongin, Egypt mite tungah a zuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gamah kialpi nasia mahmah hi." 
Genesis41:57 Tua tham loin, leitung khempeuhah kialpi nasia ahih manin, antang lei dingin Josef’ kiangah leitung mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi." 
Genesis42:1 Egypt-ah an a omna thu Jakob in a theih ciangin a tate kiangah, “Bang hangin khatlekhat ki-enen mawk na hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis42:2 Egypt-ah an om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Eite si loin i nuntak nadingin paisuk unla, ei a’ ding an va lei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:3 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt-ah an lei dingin Josef’ sanggamte sawm paisuk uh hi. 
Genesis42:4 Ahih hangin Jakob in Josef’ sanggampa Benjamin, a sanggamte tawh paisak lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tungah siatna tung kha ding, ci-in lau hi." 
Genesis42:5 Kanaan gam sungah kial tung ahih manin a hong pai dangte tawh Israel’ tapate an lei dingin hong paikhawm uh hi. 
Genesis42:6 Tu-in Josef pen tua gam a ukpa hi a, gammi khempeuh tungah an a zuakpa amah ahi hi. Josef’ sanggamte hong pai-in, a maitang uh leilam ngatin ama mai-ah hong kun uh hi." 
Genesis42:7 Josef in a sanggamte a muh ciangin thei a, ahih hangin amah in midang bangin bawlin amaute tungah khauh pau hi. “Koi pana hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “An lei dingin Kanaan gam panin hong pai hi ung,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:8 Josef in a sanggamte thei a, ahih hangin a sanggamte in amah thei lo uh hi." 
Genesis42:9 Josef in a mangin amaute a mat khitna a phawk hi. Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note, thukan na hi uh a, hih gam thaneemna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:10 Amaute in Josef kiangah, “Hi lo hi, topa aw; an lei dingin na nasemte a hong pai hi ung." 
Genesis42:11 Kote khempeuh mi khat’ ta ka hi uh hi. Kote, a thutak ka hi uh a, na nasemte thukan hi lo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:12 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Hi lo hi, hih gam ginat lohna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:13 Amaute in, “Ko, nangma nasemte, sanggam pasal sawm le nih ka hi uh a, Kanaan gam sungah mi khat’ ta ka hi uh hi. A moi pen tu laitakin ka pa uh tawh om a, khat pen om nawn lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:14 Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Note’ tunga kong gen bangin a man mah ahi hi. Note, thukan na hi uh hi." 
Genesis42:15 Hih thu tawh note hong kithei ding hi: Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin na sanggam moi pen uh hih lai-ah hong pai kei leh hih lai mun panin note na paikhia thei nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Genesis42:16 Note’ sungah thuman om hiam, ci-in a kimuh nading, na thugente uh a kitel nadingin note thong sungah na om laitakun note khat kisawl unla, na sanggampa uh hong paipihsak un. Tua ahih kei leh Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin note, thukan na hi taktak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:17 Amah in thong sungah ni thum sung amaute a koih hi. 
Genesis42:18 A ni thum ni-in Josef in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in Pasian zahtak ka hih manin hih bangin gamta un. Tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi." 
Genesis42:19 Note, thuman mi na hih uhleh thong sungah na sanggamte uh khat omsak lai unla, a dangte pai-in na innkuan uh a gilkialte a dingin an pua unla," 
Genesis42:20 na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua ciangin na kam gente uh kitel ding a, note na si kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute tua bangmahin gamta uh hi." 
Genesis42:21 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “A taktakin i sanggampa tawh kisai-in eite i mawh hi. Amah in eite kiangah hong thum napi-in eite in a thu i ngaih loh ciangin amah a lungkhamna i mu hi. Tua thu hangin hih bang lungkhamna eite tungah hong tung hi,” kici uh hi." 
Genesis42:22 Reuben in amaute dawng a, “Tangvalpa tungah khial kei un, ci-in note tungah hong gen hi lo ka hi hiam? Ahih hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ama sihna thaman eite’ tungah hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:23 Amaute’ kikalah kamphen khat om ahih manin Josef in amau’ paute a tellam amaute in thei lo uh hi. 
Genesis42:24 Tua ciangin amaute’ kiang panin Josef kihei-in a kap sim hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah hong paikikin amaute hopih hi. Amah in amau’ kiang panin Simeon la-in amau’ muhna-ah amah a hen hi. 
Genesis42:25 Amau’ ipte antang tawh dipsakin, a van sung uhah amau’ sum ciat koih kikin, lampi-a a nek ding uh an a piak nading Josef in thu a pia hi. Tua bangmahin amau a dingin kihihsak hi." 
Genesis42:26 Tua ciangin amaute in a late uh antang suanin a paikhia uh hi. 
Genesis42:27 Amaute khat in a giahna panun a la gan-an pia dingin a van a suah le, a van gongah a sum mu hi." 
Genesis42:28 Amah in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka sum kikoih kik hi. Hih lai-ah ka van gongah na om!” a ci hi. Hih thu hangin amaute lungsi uh a, lingin amaute khatlekhat ki-en uh a, “Pasian in eite hih bangin hong bawl a bangci thu ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:29 Kanaan gamah a pa uh Jakob kiang a tun uh ciangin, amaute’ tunga thupiang khempeuh gen uh a," 
Genesis42:30 “Mipa, tua gam topa kote’ tungah hong khauh pau-in, tua gam thukanin kote hong ngaihsun hi." 
Genesis42:31 Ahih hangin kote in ama kiangah, ‘Kote thuman mi ka hi uh a, kote thukan ka hi kei uh hi." 
Genesis42:32 Kote pen ka pa uh’ tapa, sanggam pasal sawm le nih ka hi uh hi. Khat pen om nawn lo a, tu laitakin a moipen Kanaan gamah ka pa uh tawh om hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:33 Tua ciangin tua gam topa in kote kiangah, ‘Note thuman mi na hihna uh hih tawh ka thei ding hi: Na sanggamte uh khat kei kiangah nusia unla, na innkuan gilkialte a dingin antang la unla, ciahkik un." 
Genesis42:34 Na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua hileh note thukan hi loin thuman mi na hihna uh ka thei ding a, note kiangah na sanggampa uh hong khahin, hih gam sungah omin na na sem thei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Genesis42:35 Amau’ vante a suah ciangun, a milipun a sumte uh a van sung ciat uhah na om hi. Amaute le a pa un amaute’ sum kihente a muh uh ciangin, lungkham uh hi." 
Genesis42:36 A pa uh Jakob in amaute kiangah, “Ka tate tawh kei nong kikhensak zo uh hi: Josef om nawn lo, Simeon om nawn lo, tu-in note in Benjamin na la ding uh hi. Hihte khempeuh kei’ tungah hong tung khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:37 Tua ciangin Reuben in a pa kiangah, “Na kiangah amah kong paipih kik kei leh ka tapa nihte that in. Kei hong ap in, nang kiangah amah kong ciahpih kik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:38 Ahih hangin amah in, “A sanggampa si a, amah bek om ahih manin ka tapa in note hong zuisuk lo ding hi. Note’ pai nading na khualzinna uhah ama tungah siatna tung kha zenzen le, khangham khit nungin dahlua-in ka si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:1 Tu-in gam sungah kialpi hong nasia semsem hi. 
Genesis43:2 Egypt gam panin a puak uh antang amaute in a gaih khit uh ciangin, a pa un amaute kiangah, “Paikik unla, eite a’ ding an tawmkhat va lei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:3 Ahih hangin Judah in ama kiangah, “Mipa in thupi takin kote hong hilhkhol a, ‘Na sanggampa uh tawh nong ton kei uhleh ka mai na mu kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis43:4 Ka sanggampa uh hong zuisak lecin kote paisukin nang a’ ding an ka va lei ding uh hi. 
Genesis43:5 Ahih hangin amah nong zuihsak kei leh kote ka paisuk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mipa in kote kiangah, ‘Na sanggampa uh tawh nong ton kei uhleh ka mai na mu kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:6 Israel in, “Mipa kiangah sanggam dang khat nei ung, ci-in genin bang hangin kei hong hici bawlsiat na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:7 Amaute in dawngin, “Mipa in kote’ thu le ka sanggamte uh thu limtakin hong dong a, ‘Na pa uh a nungta lai hiam? Sanggam dang na nei uh hiam?’ hong ci hi. Hong dotnate ka dawnna-un ama kiangah a gen ka hi uh hi. ‘Na sanggampa uh hong tonpih suk un,’ amah in hong cih ding lam kote in bangci theihkholh ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:8 Judah in a pa Israel kiangah, “Tangvalpa hong zuisak in; nang le kote le i tate si loin i nuntak theih nadingin kote ka va pai ding uh hi." 
Genesis43:9 Kei pen ama a dingin a kikham ka hi ding a, kei’ khutsung panin amah nong kal ding hi. Keimah in nang kiangah amah hong ciahpihkik loin na mai-ah kong koihkik kei leh, tua mawhna kei hong thuaksak tawntung in." 
Genesis43:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh zekai lo hi lehang tu-in nihvei i tungkik khinta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:11 Tua ciangin a pa uh Israel in amaute kiangah, “A tuaci bang ding ahihleh hih bangin gamta un: Gam sunga singgah limci pente pua unla, mipa’ tungah letsongin lingsi tawm, khuaizu tawm, singnai, myrrh paknamtui, pistakhio gah, le almond gahte puak suk un." 
Genesis43:12 Na sum uh a zah nih pua un. Na van gong uhah a kikoihkik sumte puakik un, a kikhial hi kha ding hi." 
Genesis43:13 Na sanggampa uh zong samin ding unla, mipa kiangah paikik un." 
Genesis43:14 Amah in na sanggampa uh le Benjamin hong ciahsakkik theihna dingin Vanglian Pasian in mipa’ mai-ah note hehpihna hong pia tahen. Ka tate tawh ka kikhen leh a kikhen ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:15 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in letsong la-in, sum a zah nih pua-in, Benjamin zong tonpih uh hi. Amaute dingin Egypt-ah paisuk uh a, Josef’ mai-ah a ding uh hi." 
Genesis43:16 Josef in amaute tawh Benjamin a muh ciangin, amah in a innsung nasempa’ kiangah, “Mite inn sungah paipih inla, gan khat go-in bawl in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite in sun ciangin kei tawh an ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:17 Josef’ sawl bangin mipa in sem a, Josef’ inn-ah mite paipih hi." 
Genesis43:18 Josef’ inn-ah kipaipih ahih manin lau uh a, amaute in, “Eite sila-in hong bawlin i late a mat theih nading, eite’ tungah thu hong zongin eite hong hih theih nadingin, a masa lai-a i van sunga sum kikoihte’ hangin eite hong kipaipih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:19 Tua ahih ciangin Josef’ innsung nasempa’ kiangah amaute paito uh a, inn kongkhakah amah tawh kiho-in," 
Genesis43:20 “Aw, topa aw, an lei dingin khatvei kong pai uh hi." 
Genesis43:21 Ka giahna mun uh ka tun uh ciangin ka vante uh ka hong uh a, ka sumte uh a cingin ka van sung ciat uhah na omkik hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote in tua sumte kong puakik uh a," 
Genesis43:22 an lei nadingin sum dang zong kong pua thuah uh hi. Ka van sung uhah kua in sum koih ahi hiam ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:23 Amah in dawng a, “Nuam takin om unla lau kei un. Na Pasian uh, note’ pa’ Pasian in note a dingin na van sung uhah sum koih hi ding hi. Keimah in note’ sum a cingin ka ngah khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute’ kiangah Simeon paikhiatpih hi." 
Genesis43:24 Mipa in Josef’ inn-ah amaute paipihin, amaute tui pia-in, amaute in a khe uh sil khinin, amah in amaute’ late gan-an a piak khit ciangin," 
Genesis43:25 amaute in tua lai-ah Josef tawh an ne ding uh ci-in za uh ahih manin sunin Josef hong pai ciangin a piak ding uh letsong bawlkhol uh hi. 
Genesis43:26 Inn-ah Josef hong pai ciangin amau’ puak letsongte innsung ama kiangah paipih uh a, ama mai leilakah kun uh hi." 
Genesis43:27 Amah in amau’ omzia dong a, “Na gen uh puteek, na pa uh a dam hiam? Amah a nungta lai hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:28 Amaute in, “Nangma nasem ka pa uh dam hi. Amah nungta lai hi,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in a lu uh kun uh a, zahtakna a bawl uh hi." 
Genesis43:29 Amah khuadak to a, a nu’ tapa Benjamin mu a, “Hih pa, kei kianga nong gen uh na sanggam moi pen uh ahi hiam? Pasian in nang hong hehpih hen, ka ta!” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:30 Tua ciangin a lungsimah a sanggampa ngai lua ahih manin Josef manlangin paikhia a, a kah nading mun a zong hi. Amah a inndei sungah pai-in tua lai-ah va kap sim hi." 
Genesis43:31 Tua ciangin amah in a mai phiatin hong paikhia hi. Amah ki-ip tawmin, “An hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:32 Amaute in Josef amah guakin nesakin, amaute a tuam mahin nesak a, amah tawh a ne Egypt mite in a tuam mahin ne uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih le Egypt mite in Hebru mite tawh an nekhawm lo uh hi. Tua banga nekkhawm ding pen Egypt mite a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Genesis43:33 Ama mai-ah amaute a suakmasa a suah hun tawh kizui leh a moipen a khangnona tawh kizui-in tu uh hi. Lamdangsakna tawh amaute khatlekhat ki-en uh hi. 
Genesis43:34 Josef’ sabuai tung panin amau’ tanh ciat kipia-in, ahih hangin Benjamin’ tanh pen amaute-a’ zah nga pha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne tui dawnin amah tawh lungdam uh hi." 
Genesis44:1 Tua ciangin amah in a innsung nasempa thu pia a, “Hih mite’ van sungah amau’ puakzawh zahzah an guang inla, amau’ sum ciat a van gong ciat uhah koih in." 
Genesis44:2 Ka ngun hai pen an lei nadinga a sum tawh a moipen’ van gongah koihsak in,” a ci hi. Amah in Josef’ gen bangin a hih hi." 
Genesis44:3 Zingsang khuavak phetin a late uh tawh mite kisawlkhia hi. 
Genesis44:4 Amaute a pai khit, ahih hangin khuapi panin a nai lai-in, Josef in ama innsung nasempa kiangah, “Kithawi inla, mite va delh in. Amaute na phak ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Bang hangin a hoih pen a sia tawh hong thuk na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin ka topa’ ngun hai gu na hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis44:5 Ka topa in hih hai sung panin dawnin, hih tawh amah in thu thei hi lo ahi hiam? Hih bangin na gamtat manun na khial uh hi,’ va ci in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:6 Amah in amaute a phak ciangin amaute kiangah hih thute a gen hi. 
Genesis44:7 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin ka topa in thu hih bang hong gen na hi hiam? Na nasemte, tua banga gamta ding hi dek peuhmah lo hi." 
Genesis44:8 En in, ka van gong uha ka muh uh sumte, Kanaan gam panin nang kiangah kong puak kik uh hi. Tua ahih teh na topa’ inn panin ngun hitaleh kham hitaleh bangci guk ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis44:9 Na nasemte’ sung pan tua hai a kimuhna penpen kithat hen; kote zong ka topa’ sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:10 Amah in, “Na cih bang uh hi ta hen: A kimuhna penpen pa ka sila hi ding a, no a dangteng mawh na baang kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:11 Tua ciangin a milipin a van uh leilakah ngasuk uh a, a milipin a van uh suah hi." 
Genesis44:12 Amah in zong a, a hampen panin kipanin a moipen tawh tawp a, Benjamin’ van sungah a hai kimu hi." 
Genesis44:13 Tua ciangin amaute in a puan uh balkekin, a late uh a van suan ciatin, khuapi-ah hong kileh kik uh hi." 
Genesis44:14 Judah le a sanggamte, Josef’ inn-ah a tun ciangin, amah tua lai mahah na omlai hi. Ama mai leilakah amaute kun uh hi." 
Genesis44:15 Josef in amaute kiangah, “Note’ gamtatna a bangci gamtat ahi hiam? Kei bang ahi mi in thu ka theihna thei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:16 Judah in, “Ka topa tungah hong bangci gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang thu gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh ko bangci kiphel theih ding ka hi uh hiam? Pasian in na nasemte’ mawhna mukhia hi. En in, kote le hai a kimuhna pa zong, ka topa’ sila ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:17 Ahih hangin amah in, “Tua bangin hi dek lo ding hi. Hai a kimuhna mipa bek ka sila hi ding hi. No a dangte ahihleh, na pa’ kiang uhah nuamtakin ciah un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:18 Tua ciangin ama kiangah Judah hong paito-in, “Ka topa aw, hong thum ing. Na nasempa, nang tungah kam khat thu hong gensak inla, na nasempa tungah na hehna hong sosak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Faro mahmah tawh a kibang na hi hi." 
Genesis44:19 Ka topa in a nasemte nong dong a, ‘Pa hitaleh sanggam pasal dang hitaleh na nei uh hiam?’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:20 Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Kote in a teek pa khat le a teek zawhin a neih sanggam pasal moilai khat ka nei uh hi. Ama sanggampa si a, a nu’ tate sung pan amah bek omlai hi. A pa in amah it mahmah hi,’ kong ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:21 Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Ka mit tawh amah ka muh theih nadingin kei kiangah amah hong tonpih suk un,’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:22 Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Tangvalpa in a pa nusia thei lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa nusia leh a pa si ding hi,’ kong ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:23 Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Note tawh na sanggam uh a moipen hong paisuk khop kei leh ka mai nong mu nawn kei ding uh hi,’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:24 “Tua ahih ciangin na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciahkik uh ciangin ka topa’ thugente ama kiangah ka gen uh hi. 
Genesis44:25 Ka pa un, ‘Paikikin eite a’ ding an tawm va lei un,’ hong cih ciangin" 
Genesis44:26 kote in, ‘Ka paisuk kei ding uh hi. Ka sanggam moipen uh ko tawh hong paikhawm leh ka paisuk bek ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sanggam moipen uh ko tawh hong pai kei leh mipa’ mai ka mu kei ding uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:27 Tua ciangin na nasem ka pa un kote kiangah, ‘Ka zi in kei tawh tapa nih a neih na thei uh hi." 
Genesis44:28 Khat in kei hong nusia khin a, amah kibalzan khin taktak hi, ka ci hi. Tua hun a kipan amah ka mu nawn kei hi." 
Genesis44:29 Hih a khat zong kei kiang panin na lak uh a, ama tungah siatna a tun leh, dahna tawh ka sam kangte Leinuai-ah na paipih suk ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis44:30 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciah uh ciangin, tangvalpa kote tawh hong ciah kei leh, ama lungsim khempeuh tangvalpa’ tungah om ahih manin," 
Genesis44:31 kote tawh tangvalpa a ciah lohna a muh ciangin amah si ding hi. Na nasemte in na nasem ka pa uh’ sam kangte dahna tawh Leinuai-ah ka paipih ding uh hi. 
Genesis44:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem keimah pen tangvalpa a dingin ka pa’ tungah a kikham ka hi a, ‘Nang kiangah amah kong ciahpih kik kei leh tua mawhsakna nangma muhna-ah ka nuntak tawntungin ka thuak ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis44:33 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi. Ka topa’ sila dingin tangvalpa’ tangin na nasempa hong omsak inla, a sanggamte tawh tangvalpa ciahkiksak in." 
Genesis44:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh tangvalpa kei tawh hong ton kei leh ka pa kiangah bangci ciahkik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ka pa’ tungah a tung ding siatna ka thuakzo kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:1 Tua ciangin ama kianga dingte khempeuh’ mai-ah Josef ki-ipzo nawn lo a, “Ka kiang panin mi khempeuh paikhia un,” ci-in a kiko hi. Tua ahih manin Josef a sanggamte tungah amah a kipulak ciangin kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Genesis45:2 Amah a gingin kapkhia ahih manin Egypt mite in za a, Faro’ innkuante in zong za uh hi." 
Genesis45:3 Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei, Josef ka hi hi. I pa a nungta lai hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sanggamte maizum uh ahih manin amah dawng thei lo uh hi." 
Genesis45:4 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka nai-ah hong pai un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi. Amaute a nai-ah hong pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei pen Egypt-ah nong zuak uh na sanggampa uh Josef ka hi hi." 
Genesis45:5 Hih lai-ah kei nong zuak manun tu-in lungkham kei un. Nomau tungah kiheh tawm kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna a hu dingin note’ mai-ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. 
Genesis45:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah kum nih sung kialpi tungzo hi. Lo khawh loh, an lak loh ding kum nga omlai hi." 
Genesis45:7 Note a dingin leitungah a omlai mi a hingsak ding le note a dingin a suakta mi tampi a kem dingin note’ mai-ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. 
Genesis45:8 Tua ahih ciangin hih lai-ah a hong sawl mi pen note na hi kei uh a, Pasian ahi hi. Amah in Faro’ khutnuai-ah a ulian penin kei hong bawlin, ama innsung khempeuh’ topa le Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa-in kei hong bawlkhin hi." 
Genesis45:9 “Manlangin i pa kiangah va ciahto unla ama kiangah, ‘Na tapa Josef in hih bangin ci hi: Pasian in Egypt gam khempeuh’ topa-in kei hong bawl khin hi. Ka kiangah hong paisuk hen, zekai kei hen." 
Genesis45:10 Goshen leitangah na teng ding a, nang le na tate’ tate le na tuuhonte le na bawnghonte le na neih khempeuh tawh, nang pen kei tawh a kinai-in na om ding hi." 
Genesis45:11 Hong tung ding kialpi kum nga omlai ahih manin tua lai-ah nang kong vak ding hi. Tua hi kei le nang le na innkuanpihte le na neih khempeuh in zawnna na ngah ding uh hi, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Genesis45:12 “Note’ kianga thu hong gen pen keima kam ahihna tu-in note’ mitin nong mu uh a, ka sanggampa Benjamin’ mit in zong hong mu hi." 
Genesis45:13 Egypt-ah keima liatna khempeuh le note’ muhsa khempeuh, i pa’ kiangah na gen ding uh hi. Manlang unla, hih lai-ah i pa hong paisukpih un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:14 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Benjamin ngawng kawi-in a kap hi. Benjamin in zong amah ngawng kawi-in a kap hi. 
Genesis45:15 Tua ciangin a kah kawmin a sanggamte khempeuh ngawng kawi-in a nam hi. Tua khit ciangin a sanggamte in amah hopih uh hi. 
Genesis45:16 “Josef’ sanggamte hong pai,” cihna thu Faro’ inn sungah a kizak ciangin, tua thu in Faro le a nasemte lungdamsak mahmah hi." 
Genesis45:17 Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamte kiangah, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na ganhingte uh van suan unla, Kanaan gamah ciahkik un." 
Genesis45:18 I pa le na innkuanpihte uh va la unla, kei kiangah hong pai un. Egypt gam a hoihpen mun note kong pia ding a, note in gam hoih sunga piangte na ne ding uh hi,’ ci in." 
Genesis45:19 Amaute zong thu pia inla, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na tate le na zite uh a dingin Egypt panin leeng la unla, i pa hong paipih un." 
Genesis45:20 Egypt gam khempeuh a hoih penna nomau-a’ ahih ciangin na vante uh ngaihsutin nei kei un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:21 Israel’ tapate tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. Josef in Faro’ thupiak mah bangin amaute leeng pia a, lampi-a a nek ding uh an zong a pia hi." 
Genesis45:22 Amah in amaute khempeuh tungah puan hoih silh khat ciat a pia hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin’ tungah ngun shekel zathum le puan hoih silh nga a pia hi. 
Genesis45:23 Amah in a pa kiangah a nuai-ate a khak hi: Egypt na hoihte a pua la sawm; antang, anlum, le lampi-a a pa’ nek ding an a pua lapi sawm a puak hi." 
Genesis45:24 Tua ciangin amah in a sanggamte sawlkhia a, amaute a paikhiat ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Lampi-ah kitawng kei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:25 Tua ahih ciangin amaute Egypt panin paito uh a, a pa uh Jakob kiang Kanaan gamah ciah uh hi." 
Genesis45:26 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Josef nungta lai a, amah pen Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa na hi hi,” hong ci uh hi. Amah in amaute’ thugen um lo ahih ciangin a lung si hi." 
Genesis45:27 Ahih hangin amaute’ tunga Josef’ gen kammalte ama kiangah a gen ciang leh Josef in amah puak nadinga a khak leengte a muh ciangin, a pa uh Jakob’ lungsim hingkik hi." 
Genesis45:28 Israel in, “Phazo hi. Ka tapa Josef nungta lai hi. Ka sih ma-in pai-in amah ka mu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:1 Tua ahih ciangin Israel, a neih khempeuh tawh a khualzin kipanin Beersheba tung a, a pa Isaac’ Pasian tungah biakpiakna a bawl hi." 
Genesis46:2 Pasian in Israel tungah zanin thu gen a, “Jakob, Jakob,” ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” ci hi." 
Genesis46:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na pa’ Pasian ahi, Pasian ka hi hi. Egypt-ah paisuk ding lau kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam lian khatin tua lai-ah nang kong bawl ding hi." 
Genesis46:4 Egypt-ah nang tawh kong paisuk ding a, tua ciangin zong keimah in nang kong paipihto kik ding hi. Josef’ khut sungah na si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:5 Tua ciangin Beersheba panin Jakob ding khia hi. Israel’ tapate in a pa uh Jakob, a tate uh, le a zite uh, amah puak nadinga Faro in a khak leeng sungah a pua uh hi." 
Genesis46:6 Amaute in zong Kanaan gam sunga a lam uh a ganhingte uh le a nate uh la-in, Jakob le ama suanlekhakte ahi," 
Genesis46:7 a tapate, ama tapate’ tapate, a tanute, a tapate’ tanute tawh Egypt-ah a pai uh hi. Amah in a suanlekhakte khempeuh Egypt-ah a paipih hi." 
Genesis46:8 Tu-in hihte pen Israel’ suanlekhak, Egypt-ah a pai Jakob le a tate’ min ahi hi. Jakob’ ta u pen Reuben" 
Genesis46:9 le Reuben’ tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, le Karmi ahi hi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeon’ tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar, le Kanaan numei’ tapa Shaul ahi hi." 
Genesis46:11 Levi’ tapate: Gershon, Kohath, le Merari ahi hi." 
Genesis46:12 Judah’ tapate: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez, le Zerah ahi hi. (Ahih hangin Er le Onan Kanaan gamah si hi.) Perez’ tapate: Hezron le Hamul ahi hi." 
Genesis46:13 Issakhar’ tapate: Tola, Puvah, Job, le Shimron ahi hi." 
Genesis46:13 Issakhar’ tapate: Tola, Puvah, Job, le Shimron ahi hi." 
Genesis46:14 Zebulun’ tapate: Sered, Elon, le Jahleel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:15 (Hihte pen Paddanaram-ah Leah tawh a neih Jakob’ suante hi a, a tanu Dinah tawh zong ahi hi. Numei le pasal a vekpi-in sawmthum le thum ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:16 Gad’ tapate: Zifion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi, le Areli ahi hi." 
Genesis46:17 Asher’ tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, le a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi. Beriah’ tapate: Heber le Malkhiel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:18 (Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Leah tungah a piak Zilpah’ tapate ahi hi. Amah in Jakob tawh hihte nei a, mi sawm le guk ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:19 Jakob’ zi Rachel’ tapate: Josef le Benjamin ahi hi. 
Genesis46:20 Josef in Egypt gamah On khua siampipa Potifera’ tanu Asenath tawh Manasseh le Efraim nei hi. 
Genesis46:21 Benjamin’ tapate: Bela, Bekher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim, le Ard ahi hi." 
Genesis46:22 (Hihte pen Rachel tawh a neih Jakob’ suante hi a, a vekpi-in mi sawm le li ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:23 Dan’ tapa Hushim ahi hi. 
Genesis46:24 Naftali’ tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer, le Shillem ahi hi." 
Genesis46:25 (Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Rachel’ tungah a piak Bilhah in Jakob tawh a neih tapate hi a, a vekpi-in mi sagih ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:26 Egypt gamah a pai Jakob-a’ ahi ama suanlekhak, Jakob’ tate’ zite a kisim loin, a vekpi-in mi sawmguk le guk ahi hi." 
Genesis46:27 Josef in Egypt gamah a neih a tapate nih ahi hi. Egypt gamah a pai Jakob’ innkuan khempeuh sawmsagih ahi hi. 
Genesis46:28 Jakob in ama mai Goshen-ah amah lam a lak dingin Josef kiangah Judah ma sawl hi. Amaute Goshen gamah hong pai uh hi. 
Genesis46:29 Tua ciangin Josef in a leengte kithawisakin Goshen-ah a pa Israel a dawn dingin a paito hi. A pa a muh phetin ngawng kawi-in tawlkhat sung a kap hi. 
Genesis46:30 Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang mu khinin nang na nuntak lai thei ka hih manin tu-in ka si zongin phamawh nawn lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:31 Josef in a sanggamte le a pa’ innkuanpihte kiangah, “Kei paito-in Faro’ kiangah ka va gen ding a, ama tungah, ‘Kanaan gam a om ka sanggamte le ka pa’ innkuanpihte kei kiangah hong pai hi." 
Genesis46:32 Amaute pen tuucing ahih manin gan kemte ahi uh hi. Amaute in a tuuhonte uh le a bawnghonte uh le a neih khempeuh uh hong paipih uh hi,’ ka va ci ding hi." 
Genesis46:33 Faro in note hong samin note kiangah, ‘Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin," 
Genesis46:34 Goshen leitangah na ten theih nadingun note in, ‘Kote hitaleh ka pate uh hitaleh ko na nasemte pen ka neu lai uh a kipan tuhun dongin gankemte ka hi uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite a dingin tuucing peuhmah a kihhuai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:1 Tua ahih ciangin Josef pai-in Faro’ kiangah, “Ka pa le ka sanggamte a tuuhon uh le a bawnghon uh le a neih khempeuh uh tawh Kanaan gam panin hong pai uh a, amaute tu-in Goshen gamah om uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Genesis47:2 A sanggamte’ lak panin amah in mi nga la-in Faro’ kiangah va paipih hi. 
Genesis47:3 Faro in a sanggamte kiangah, “Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in Faro’ kiangah, “Ka pate uh mah bangin na nasem kote pen gankemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:4 Amaute in Faro kiangah, “Hih gamah tawlkhat a om dingin kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan gamah kialpi nasia lua ahih manin tua lai-ah na nasemte’ tuuhonte a’ ding lonona om nawn lo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi. Goshen gamah na nasemte hong tengsak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:5 Tua ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na pa le na sanggamte na kiangah hong tung khin hi." 
Genesis47:6 Egypt leitang khempeuh nangma thu ahi hi. Na pa le na sanggamte lei hoihna penah tengsak in. Goshen leitangah amaute tengsak in. Amaute’ lakah a hih thei mi na muh leh ka ganhingte a kem dingin koih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:7 Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob tumpihin Faro’ mai-ah koih a, Jakob in Faro thupha a pia hi." 
Genesis47:8 Faro in Jakob kiangah, “Na nuntak kum bangzah pha ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:9 Jakob in Faro kiangah, “Tawlkhat sung ka nuntak hun pen kum za le kum sawmthum ahi hi. Ka nuntak hun tom sungah siatna bekbek om a, ka pate tawlkhat a omsung uh a nuntak hunte ban nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:10 Jakob in Faro thupha pia-in tua lai panin a paikhia hi. 
Genesis47:11 Tua ciangin Faro’ thupiaksa bangin Josef in leitang a hoihpen, Rameses leitang, Egypt gam sungah neihsa pia-in a pa le a sanggamte a tengsak hi." 
Genesis47:12 Josef in a pa, a sanggamte, le a pa’ innkuante khempeuh a ne ding zah tawh kizui-in an a pia hi." 
Genesis47:13 Tu-in kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuhah an om nawn lo a, kialpi hangin Egypt mite le Kanaan mite vulgawp uh hi." 
Genesis47:14 Amaute in antang a leina hangin, Egypt gam sung le Kanaan gam sunga sum khempeuh Josef in ngah khin hi. Josef in Faro’ inn-ah tua sumte paipih hi." 
Genesis47:15 Egypt gam sung le Kanaan gam sunga sum a bei khit ciangin Egypt mite khempeuh Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Kote an hong pia in. Bang hangin na muhna-ah si ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sum uh beita hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:16 Josef in dawngin, “Na ganhingte uh hong pia un. Na sum uh bei ahihleh na ganhingte uh khekna-in an kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:17 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah a ganhingte uh paipih uh hi. Josef in sakolte, tuuhonte, bawnghonte, le late a khekna-in amaute an a pia hi. A ganhingte uh khekna-in Josef in tua kum sung amaute an a pia hi." 
Genesis47:18 Tua kum a bei, a kum kik ciangin amaute Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Ka sum uh a bei khitna ka topa uh tungah kong im kei ding uh hi. Ganhing honte ka topa a’ ahi hi. Ka pumpi uh le ka leitang uh cih simloh ka topa’ muhna-ah bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Genesis47:19 Bang hangin kote si-in ka leitang uh nangma muhna-ah maimawk ding ahi hiam? Kote le ka leitang uh an tawh hong lei in. Kote, Faro’ sila ka hi ding uh a, ka leitang uh zong ama a’ hi ding hi. Leitang mawkval loin, kote si loin ka hin theih nadingun khaici hong pia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:20 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in Egypt gam khempeuh Faro a dingin a lei hi. Kialpi nasia lua ahih manin Egypt mi khempeuh in a lote uh a zuak uh hi. Leitang khempeuh Faro-a’ suak khin hi. 
Genesis47:21 Mihingte ahihleh, Egypt mongkhat panin a mongkhat dongin amah in sila-in bawl hi." 
Genesis47:22 Siampite’ leitang bek amah in lei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Faro’ tung panin a kiciangtan zah an ngah uh a, amaute tungah Faro in a piak tawh amaute nungtazo uh ahih ciangin amaute in a leitang uh zuak lo uh hi." 
Genesis47:23 Tua ciangin Josef in mite kiangah, “En un, tuni-in note le na leitang uh Faro a dingin kong lei hi. Tu-in hih lai-ah no a dingin khaici om a, note in leitang tungah na vawh ding uh hi." 
Genesis47:24 Anlak ciangin Faro’ tungah nga-ah khat na pia ding uh a, nga-ah li pen lo-ah khaici ding, note le na innkuanpihte uh le na tate uh’ an dingin na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:25 Amaute in, “Nang in ka nuntakna uh nong honkhia khinzo hi. Ka topa uh lungdam hen; kote pen Faro’ sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:26 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in nga-ah khat nei ding hi cihna, tuni donga a om, Egypt leitang tawh kisai-in Josef in ngeina kip khatin a bawl hi. Siampite’ leitang bek Faro-a’ suak lo hi." 
Genesis47:27 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam sung Goshen leitangah Israel-te teng uh hi. Tua lai-ah amaute in neihsa ngah uh a, pungin tampi tak pha uh hi." 
Genesis47:28 Egypt gamah Jakob kum sawm le sagih nungta lai ahih manin ama khan kum za le kum sawmli le sagih ahi hi. 
Genesis47:29 Israel a sih ding hun a nai ciangin, amah in a tapa Josef samin ama kiangah, “Tu-in na muhna-ah maipha ka ngah leh, ka phei nuai-ah na khut hong koih inla, thumantak le citakin kei nong bawl ding thu hong ciam in. Egypt-ah kei hong vui kei inla," 
Genesis47:30 ka pate tawh hong sial khawm in. Egypt panin kei hong puakhia in la, amau’ kivuina munah kei hong vui in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Na gen bangin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:31 Amah in, “Kei’ tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi. Amah zong a pa’ tungah a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Israel lungdamin a lupna lukhungah amahmah a kunsuk hi." 
Genesis48:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin, “Na pa a ci na hi,” ci-in Josef kiangah kigen ahih ciangin amah in a tapa nihte Manasseh le Efraim a paipih hi." 
Genesis48:2 Jakob kiangah, “Na tapa Josef na kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ciangin Israel in a tha sanin a lupna tungah a tu hi." 
Genesis48:3 Jakob in Josef kiangah, “Kanaan gam Luz-ah Vanglian Pasian kei tungah hong kilangin kei thupha hong pia a," 
Genesis48:4 kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang hong pungsakin, mihing hon khatin hong bawlin, nang’ khit cianga na suanlekhakte’ tungah a neih tawntung dingun hih leitang ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis48:5 “Tu-in, Egypt-ah nang kiangah kong pai ma-in Egypt gam sungah nang’ sung panin a suak na tapa nihte keima-a’ ahi hi. Reuben le Simeon-te mah bangin Efraim le Manasseh zong keima a’ hi ding hi." 
Genesis48:6 Amaute’ khit cianga nang sung panin a suak tate pen nangma a’ hi ding hi. Amau’ gamh luahna-ah amau’ sanggamte’ min tawh amaute ki lo khawm ding hi. 
Genesis48:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Paddan panin ka pai lai-in, Efrath tun ma diak, Kanaan gam lamkalah ka dah nadingin ka zi Rachel hong si hi. Efrath (Bethlehem) paina lampi-ah amah ka vui hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:8 Israel in Josef’ tapate a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:9 Josef in a pa’ kiangah, “Pasian in hih lai-ah kei hong piak ka tapate ahi hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Kong thum hi; amaute thupha ka piak theih nadingin ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:10 Tu-in Israel’ mitte a khanghamna hangin maang a, amah in khua mu thei lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Josef in ama kiangah amaute paipih hi. Amah in amaute namin a kawi hi." 
Genesis48:11 Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang a hong mu kik dingin ka kingaihsun kei hi. Tua hi napi, Pasian in na tate zong kei hong musak hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:12 Tua ciangin Josef in amaute a khuk panin lakhia-in amahmah lei lam nga-in a kun hi. 
Genesis48:13 Josef in amau tegel la-in, Efraim’ taklam khut, Israel’ veilam khutah, Manasseh’ veilam khut, Israel’ taklam khutah a paipih hi." 
Genesis48:14 Israel in a taklam khut zanin a nauzaw Efraim’ lu tungah nga a, Manasseh a ta upa ahih manin, a khut kipaihpehsakin Manasseh’ lu tungah a veilam khut a nga hi." 
Genesis48:15 Amah in Josef thupha pia-in, “Ka pate Abraham le Isaac in a na a sep Pasian, tuni dongin ka nuntak tawntung ah lam hong pi Pasian," 
Genesis48:16 siatna khempeuh panin kei hong tankhia vantungmi in hih tangvalte thupha pia hen la, amaute sungah keima min le ka pa Abraham le Isaac’ min kizomsak hen la, leitungah amaute mi honpi khatin khangsak ta hen!” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:17 A pa in a taklam khut Efraim’ lu tungah a koih Josef in a muh ciangin, tua in amah lungkim lo sak hi. Efraim’ lu panin Manasseh’ lu tungah koih dingin amah in a pa’ khut a la hi." 
Genesis48:18 Josef in a pa kiangah, “Hi lo hi, pa aw; hih pen a suak masa ahi hi. Na taklam khut ama lu tungah koih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:19 Ahih hangin a pa in nial a, “Ka thei hi, ka ta aw; ka thei hi. Amah zong mi khat suak ding a, amah zong lian ding hi. Ahi zongin amah sangin a naupa lianzaw ding a, a suanlekhakte, minam lianpi khat suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:20 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua ni-in amaute thupha pia a, “Note, Israel sungah thupha na hi ding uh a, ‘Pasian in Efraim le Manasseh bangin note hong bawl hen,’ kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin Jakob in Manasseh’ mai-ah Efraim a koih hi." 
Genesis48:21 Tua ciangin Israel in Josef kiangah, “En in, kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in nang hong ompih ding a, na pate’ leitangah nang hong paipih kik ding hi." 
Genesis48:22 Tua tham loin, ka namsau le ka thal tawh Amor mite’ khut tung panin ka lak mualpang khat, na sanggamte’ tung sangin nang’ tungah kong piazaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:1 Tua ciangin Jakob in a tapate sam a, “A hong tung ding hunte-ah note’ tunga hong tung ding thu kong gen theih nadingin note hong kikhawm un." 
Genesis49:2 “Jakob’ tapate aw, hong kikhawmin za unla, na pa Israel’ thugen ngai un." 
Genesis49:3 “Reuben, nang pen ka ta upa, ka vangliatna le ka tacil na hi a, a kiphasak pen, a vanglian pen na hi hi." 
Genesis49:4 Tuihual bangin na kip kei ding a, na tungtuang kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka zi na luppih a, ka lupna na mindaisak hi." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeon le Levi, unau hi a, a hiam uh ngongtat nadingin a zang uh hi." 
Genesis49:6 Amau’ kikhopna-ah ka kihel kei ding a, amau’ pawl tawh ka kizom kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a heh manun mi that uh a, kiphatsakna lungsim tawh amaute in mawlpih dingin bawngtalte’ zagui a sattat uh hi." 
Genesis49:7 Amau’ sinsona lauhuai a, amau’ hehna kihtakhuai hi. Samsiatna ngah ta uh hen! Jakob suante sungah amaute ka khenthang ding a, Israel sungah amaute ka thehthang ding hi." 
Genesis49:8 “Judah aw, na sanggamte in nang hong phat ding hi. Na galte’ gawl na meek ding a, na sanggamte na mai-ah hong kun ding uh hi." 
Genesis49:9 Judah pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a sa matsa a nek khit ciangin a kua-ah a ciahkik tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai bangin kizia-in a lumsuk hi. Kua in amah phawng ngam ding hiam?" 
Genesis49:10 Judah in kumpi ciangkhut len tawntung ding a, a suan a khakte in zong ukna aana nei tawntung ding hi. Minam dangte in ama tungah siah puak ding a, zahtakna tawh ama mai-ah kun ding uh hi." 
Genesis49:11 A sakolno leenggui-ah khih a, a lano leenggui limci penah khih hi. Amah in a puante leenggahzu sungah sawp a, a puansilhte leenggahtui san sungah a sawp hi." 
Genesis49:12 Leenggahzu a neknekna-in a mit san gega a, bawngnawi a neknekna-in a ha pak hi." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebulun, tuipi gei-ah teng ding hi. Amah, teembaw khawlna mun suak ding a, Sidon ciang dongah a gamgi om ding hi." 
Genesis49:14 “Issakhar, a hat la tawh kibang a, vangik nih kikalah a lum hi." 
Genesis49:15 A tawlngakna mun hoihsa a, a leitang noptuak sa hi. Tua ahih ciangin van pua dingin a liangko niamsak a, sila bangin na kisemsak hi." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan in Israel minam dangte mah bangin a mite thu khen ding hi. 
Genesis49:17 Dan pen lampi-ah gulpi hi ding a, sul gei-ah gulgu nei hi ding hi. Sakol’ khetul petin a tuang pa a nungkiat hi." 
Genesis49:18 “Nong hotkhiat ding ka ngak hi, Topa." 
Genesis49:19 “Gad pen a buluhte in buluh ding a, ahih hangin amah in amaute sulzuih kik ding hi." 
Genesis49:20 “Asher’ lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, amah in kumpi anlimte bawl ding hi." 
Genesis49:21 “Naftali, a kikhah sakhipi hi a, sakhino suakkhiasak hi." 
Genesis49:22 “Josef, a gah pha hiang ahi hi. Ciktui gei-a om a gah pha hiang hi a, a hiangte kulh tungah zaam hi." 
Genesis49:23 Thal tawite in nakpitakin amah simin, amah thal tawh kap uh a, nasia takin gimsak uh hi." 
Genesis49:24 Ahih hangin ama thal ling loin om a, a khutte kizaptelsak hi. Jakob’ Vanglian Pa’ khut (Israel Suangpi, Tuucingpa’ min)," 
Genesis49:25 nang hong huh ding na pa’ Pasian in tunga om vantung thuphate, nuai-a tuithukna sunga om thuphate, khawilevulh le tuletate, nangma tungah hong pia hi." 
Genesis49:26 Na pa’ thuphate pen tawntung mual liante’ thupha, tawntung mual neute sangin vanglian zaw hi. Tua thuphate Josef’ lu tungah hong tung hen la, a sanggamte’ kiang panin a kituam koihpa’ tungah hong tung tahen." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin, a ne bakbak keivom hi a, zingsangin a sa matsa ne-in, nitakin a ngahsa teng hawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:28 Hihte khempeuh pen Israel minam sawm le nihte ahi hi. Hih thute pen amau tawh a kituak ciatin a pa in amaute thupha pia-in a gente ahi hi. 
Genesis49:29 Tua ciangin Jakob in a tate thuhilhin amaute kiangah, “Kei, ka mipihte kiangah a kigawm ding ka hita hi. Kivui nading munin neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efron’ tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Kanaan gam, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo-a leihawm, Hit mi Efron’ lo-a leihawm han sungah ka pate tawh hong vuikhawm un." 
Genesis49:30  
Genesis49:31 Tua lai munah amaute in Abraham le a zi Sarah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah amaute in Isaac le a zi Rebekah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah keimah in Leah ka vui hi. 
Genesis49:32 Lo le tua sunga om leihawm Hit mite’ tung panin a kilei ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:33 Jakob in a tapate thuhilh a man khit ciangin, a lupna tungah laitat a, a nunung pen a hu sang-in ama mipihte kiang a zuan ta hi." 
Genesis50:1 Tua ciangin Josef a pa’ tungah pukin, ama tungah kap a, amah a nam hi." 
Genesis50:2 A pa a muat loh nadingin a bawl dingin Josef in a nasem zatui siamte thu pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin zatui siamte in zatui tawh Israel a bawl uh hi. 
Genesis50:3 Zatui tawh bawlna nasep hun tampi kisam a, ni sawmli sung sep ding kisam hi. Egypt mite ama hangin ni sawmsagih sung a kap uh hi." 
Genesis50:4 Ama hangin kahna hun a bei ciangin Josef in Faro’ innkuante kiangah, “Tu-in note’ mai-ah maipha ka ngah leh Faro’ kiangah thu nong va gensak ding uh kong thum hi." 
Genesis50:5 Ka pa in kei hong kiciamsak a, ‘Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Kanaan leitangah kei a dingin ka khuatsa han sungah kei nong vui ding hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kei hong paitosak inla, ka pa hong vuisak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Tua ciangin kei kong ciahkik ding hi, ci hi, va cihsak un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:6 Faro in dawngin, “Paito inla, nang hong kiciamsak bangin na pa va vui in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:7 Tua ahih ciangin a pa a vui dingin Josef paito hi. Amah tawh Faro’ nasemte khempeuh, a innsung upate, Egypt gam upate khempeuh zong," 
Genesis50:8 Josef’ innkuante khempeuh, a sanggamte, a pa’ innkuante bangmahin paito uh hi. A tate uh, a tuuhonte uh le a ganhing honte bek uh Goshen gamah kinusia hi." 
Genesis50:9 Tua lai munah amah tawh leengte le sakol tuangte zong paikhawm to uh hi. Tua lai-a paite tam mahmah hi. 
Genesis50:10 Amaute Jordan gun galkhat, Atad’ buhcilna phual a tun uh ciangin, nakpitakin dahna tawh a thuum uh hi. Amah in a pa’ hangin ni sagih sung dahna hun a bawl hi." 
Genesis50:11 Tua gam a teng Kanaan mite in, Atad’ buhcilna-ah tua banga kahna a muh ciangin amaute in, “Hih pen Egypt mite a dingin a nasia mahmah thuumna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Abelmizraim, kici hi. Tua mun pen Jordan gun galkhat ahi hi." 
Genesis50:12 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute a thupiak bangin ama tapate in ama a dingin bawlsak uh hi. 
Genesis50:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tapate in Kanaan gamah amah pua-in, kivui nading mun a neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efron’ tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, Makpelah mun lo sunga leihawm sungah a vui uh hi." 
Genesis50:14 Josef in a pa a vui khit ciangin, a sanggamte le a pa a vui dingin amah a zui khempeuhte tawh Egypt-ah a ciahkik hi." 
Genesis50:15 Josef’ sanggamte in a pa uh a sih khit ciangin, “Josef in eite hong mudahin ama tunga siatna i bawl khempeuh hong thukkik kha ding hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah thu puak uh a, “I pa in a sih ma-in thu hong pia a," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Josef kiangah hih bangin ci un: Na sanggamte’ thupalsatna le a khialhna na maisak in, kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang’ tungah amaute in siatna hong bawl uh hi,’ ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang’ tungah kong thum uh hi. I pa’ Pasian’ nasemte’ thupalsatna hong maisak in,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in ama kiangah tua bangin thu a gen ciangun Josef a kap hi." 
Genesis50:18 A sanggamte zong pai-in ama mai-ah puk uh a, “En in, kote, nangma nasemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:19 Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Kei, Pasian’ za-ah om ka hi hiam?" 
Genesis50:20 Note in ahihleh, kei’ tungah a sia dingin na ngaihsun uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in tuhuna mah bangin mi tampite a nuntak theihna a pian nadingin a hoih dingin a ngaihsut ahi hi." 
Genesis50:21 Tua ahih ciangin lau kei un. Note le na tate uh a dingin an kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in tua bangin kip gen pha kikin amaute a hehnem hi." 
Genesis50:22 Tua ahih ciangin Josef, amah le a pa’ innkuante tawh Egypt-ah teng uh a, Josef kum za le kum sawm nungta hi." 
Genesis50:23 Josef in khang thumna ahi Efraim’ tate mu hi. Manasseh’ tapa Makhir’ tate zong Josef’ innsung mahah suak uh hi. 
Genesis50:24 Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in note hong kem ding a, hih leitang panin amah in Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tunga a ciamsa leitangah note hong paikhiatpih to ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:25 Tua ciangin Josef in Israel tapate’ kiciamna bawlin, “Pasian in note hong kem ding a, note in hih lai panin ka guhte na pua to ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:26 Tua ahih ciangin kum za le kum sawm a pha-in Josef a si hi. Amaute in a muat loh nadingin zatui tawh amah bawl uh a, Egypt-ah hankuang sung khatah amah kikoih hi." 
Exodus1:1 Jakob tawh Egypt-ah a hong pai, amau’ innkuan ciat tawh ahi Israel’ tapate’ minte:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simeon, Levi, le Judah," 
Exodus1:3 Issakhar, Zebulun, le Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan le Naftali, Gad le Asher ahi hi." 
Exodus1:5 Jakob’ suanlekhakte khempeuh mi sawmsagih hi a, Josef pen Egypt-ah na om khinzo hi." 
Exodus1:6 Tua ciangin Josef le a sanggamte le tua khangmi khempeuh si uh hi. 
Exodus1:7 Ahih hangin Israel’ suanlekhakte pungin nakpitakin khang uh hi. Amaute tampi pha-in nakpitakin khang uh ahih manin Egypt gamah dim uh hi. 
Exodus1:8 Tu-in Josef a thei lo kumpi thak khat Egypt gamah hong khang hi. 
Exodus1:9 Amah in a mipihte kiangah, “En un, Israel mite eite a dingin tam lua-in thahat lua uh hi." 
Exodus1:10 Amaute hong tam kha ding uh ahih manin ngaihsut siamna tawh amaute hih ni. Eite tungah gal hong om leh amaute in i galte pawlin eite hong do-in hih gam panin taikhia kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:11 Tua ahih ciangin nasepna tawh amaute a gimsak dingin amaute tungah nasem ukte koih uh hi. Israel mite in Faro a dingin van koihna Pithom le Rameses khuapite lam uh hi. 
Exodus1:12 Ahih hangin amaute a kinenniam ciangin amaute tampi phazaw-in kizelthang zaw uh hi. Egypt mite in Israel mite kihta uh hi. 
Exodus1:13 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel mite a gim mahmahin na semsak uh a," 
Exodus1:14 buan le leiseek tawh nasepna le lo sungah nasep namkim khempeuh tawh amau’ nuntakna haksasak uh hi. Israel mite’ sepna khempeuhah amaute in a gim mahmahin semsak uh hi. 
Exodus1:15 Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipa in Hebru mi nau a domsakte, khat’ min Shifrah, adang khat’ min Puah a kicite kiangah," 
Exodus1:16 “Hebru numeite nau domin, nausuahna tutphah tungah a tut ciangun, tapa ahihleh a naungek na that ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu ahih leh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:17 Ahih hangin naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh hi. Egypt kumpipa in amaute a thupiak bangin gamta lo uh a, nau pasalte nungtasak uh hi." 
Exodus1:18 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt kumpipa in naudomte samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin gamta a, nau pasalte nungtasak na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:19 Naudomte in Faro’ kiangah, “Hebru numeite le Egypt numeite a kibatlohna hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadim uh a, amau’ kiangah naudomte a tun ma-in amaute na suak khin pahpah uh hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Exodus1:20 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in naudomte limbawl hi. Mite khangin pawlcing semsem uh hi. 
Exodus1:21 Naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh ahih manin amah in amaute tungah suanlekhak a pia hi. 
Exodus1:22 Tua ciangin Faro in a mipihte khempeuh thu pia a, “Hebru mite sung panin tapa a suak khempeuh Nail gun sungah na khia ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu khempeuh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:1 Tu-in Levi’ suante khat in Levi numei khat mah zi-in la hi. 
Exodus2:2 Tua numei gai-in tapa khat nei a, nau hoih khat hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, kha thum sung a seel hi." 
Exodus2:3 Amah in naungek a seel zawh nawn loh ciangin ama a dingin pumpeeng tawh kibawl lawh khat phansak a, tua lawh pen buan le kultal tui tawh a zut hi. Tua sungah naungek sialin gun gei-a phaikungte lakah a koih hi." 
Exodus2:4 Amah bang a kicih hiam cih a thei dingin a gamla panin mun khatah a sanggamnu a ding hi. 
Exodus2:5 Tu-in Faro’ tanu a kisil dingin gun-ah hong pai a, a nasem numeite gun gei-ah a vak lai takun amah in phaikungte lakah a lawh mu a, tua lawh a la dingin a nasem numei khat a sawl hi." 
Exodus2:6 Amah in a hon ciangin naungek mu hi. Naungek kap ahih manin tua nu in hehpihhuai sa a, “Hih naungek, Hebru mite’ ta khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:7 Tua ciangin a sanggamnu in Faro tanu kiangah, “Keimah pai-in Hebru numeite lak panin nang a dingin naupang hong khoisak dingin naucing khat ka va sapsak ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:8 Faro’ tanu in ama kiangah, “Va pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin numeino pai-in naupang’ nu va sam hi." 
Exodus2:9 Faro’ tanu in ama kiangah, “Hih naupang la inla, kei a dingin hong khoisak in; na thaman kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi in naupang la-in a khoi hi." 
Exodus2:10 Naupang khang a, amah in Faro tanu’ kiangah paipih a, amah pen tua nu’ tapa a suak hi. Amah in a min Moses a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Tui sung panin amah ka kai khia hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:11 Ni khat, Moses a khan khit ciangin, ama mipihte kiangah pai-in amau’ gimnate va mu hi. Egypt mi khat in ama mipih Hebru mi khat a sat zong a mu hi." 
Exodus2:12 Amah khuadak kawikawi a, kuamah mu lo ahih manin Egypt mipa thatin sehnel sungah a seel hi." 
Exodus2:13 A zing ciangin amah paikik a, Hebru mi nih na kilai uh hi. Amah in a gamta khial mipa kiangah, “Bang hangin na lawm sat na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:14 Amah in dawngin, “Kote’ tungah ulian ding le thukhen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam? Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei thah ding hong sawm na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses lau a, “A thu hong kithei taktak hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
Exodus2:15 Faro in tua thu a zak ciangin Moses thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Faro kiang panin Moses tai-in Midian gam a tung hi. Ni khat amah tuikhuk gei khatah tu hi. 
Exodus2:16 Tua laitakin Midian siampi Jethro in tanu sagih nei hi. Amaute hong pai-in tui tawi uh a, a pa uh’ tuuhonte tui pia dingin kuangzawn dim uh hi." 
Exodus2:17 Tuucing dangte hong pai-in amaute hawlkhia hi. Ahih hangin Moses dingto-in amaute huh a, a tuuhonte uh tui piaksak hi." 
Exodus2:18 A pa uh kiangah amaute a tun ciangun amah in, “A bangci-a tuni-a hong hici ciah baih na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:19 Amaute in, “Egypt mi khat in tuucing dangte’ khutsung panin kote hong honkhia a, ko a dingin tui nangawn hong tawisakin tuuhonte tui pia hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus2:20 Amah in a tanute kiangah, “Amah koi lai-ah om ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua mipa nusia na hi uh hiam? Amah in an hong nek theih nadingin va sam un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:21 Moses zong tua mipa kiangah om ding lungkim a, amah in Moses tungah a tanu Zipporah a pia hi." 
Exodus2:22 Tua nu in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Gershom a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:23 Tua zawh kum tampi khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa si hi. Israel mite a salsuahna sung uhah amau’ kikona Pasian kiang tung hi. 
Exodus2:24 Pasian in amau’ thumna za hi. Pasian in Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tawh a thuciamna a phawk hi." 
Exodus2:25 Pasian in Israel mite mu a, amaute’ omzia zong a thei hi." 
Exodus3:1 Tu-in Moses in Midian siampi ahi, a sungpa Jethro’ tuuhon kem hi. Amah in gamlak nisuahna lamah a tuuhon paipih a, Pasian’ mual ahi Horeb a tung hi." 
Exodus3:2 Topa’ vantungmi sawlpang kawm, meikuang sung panin ama tungah hong kilang hi. Amah khuadak a, sawlpang a kuang a mu hi. Ahi zongin kangtum lo hi." 
Exodus3:3 Moses in, “Bang hangin sawlpang kangtum lo hiam, kei pai-in hih a lamdang ka muh va en dih ning,” ci hi." 
Exodus3:4 Tua thu a thei dingin amah a paina Topa in a muh ciangin, sawlpang kawm panin Pasian in amah sam a, “Moses, Moses!” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” ci hi." 
Exodus3:5 Tua ciangin amah in, “A nai-ah hong pai kei in. Na khe panin na khedapte suahkhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma dinna mun, leitang siangtho ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na pa’ Pasian, Abraham’ Pasian, Isaac’ Pasian, le Jakob’ Pasian ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses in Pasian a muh ding lau ahih manin a maitang a hum hi." 
Exodus3:7 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Egypt-ah a om ka mite’ gimna mu khinin, amaute a uk nasem ukte’ hangin amau’ kikona ka za khin hi. Amau’ thuaknate ka thei a," 
Exodus3:8 Egypt mite’ khutsung panin amaute khahkhia-in, tua leitang panin amaute la khia-in a hoih a tanzau leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite’ omna-ah amaute a paipih dingin kong paisuk hi." 
Exodus3:9 Tu-in, en in, Israel mite’ kikona kei kiang hong tung khin a, Egypt mite in amaute a netniamna ka mu khin hi." 
Exodus3:10 Hong pai in, nang in Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te na paikhiatpih theih nadingin Faro’ kiangah nang kong sawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:11 Ahih hangin Moses in Pasian kiangah, “Faro’ kiangah pai-in Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin kei, kua ka hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Exodus3:12 Amah in, “Nang tawh kong om taktak ding hi. Hih pen nangma a dingin nangmah kong sawlna lim hi ding hi: Nangmah in Egypt panin mihingte na paikhiatpih khit ciangin, nang in hih mualtungah Pasian na bia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:13 Tua ciangin Moses in Pasian kiangah, “Israel mite kiangah kei va pai-in amaute kiangah, ‘Na pate uh’ Pasian in note’ kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ va ci leng, amaute in, ‘Ama min bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dong leh, amaute’ tungah bang ci ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:14 Pasian in Moses kiangah, “ Keimah ka hi hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Israel mite tungah hih thu genin, ‘ Keimah a kici pa in note kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:15 Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Hih thu Israel mite tungah gen in: ‘ Topa, na pate uh’ Pasian, Abraham’ Pasian, Isaac’ Pasian, le Jakob’ Pasian in note kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ ci in. Hih pen keima min hi tawntung ahih manin kei pen khang tawntungin phawk ding ka hi hi." 
Exodus3:16 Pai in, Israel upate kaikhawmin amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa, na pate uh’ Pasian, Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob’ Pasian keima tungah hong kilang khinin, “Note le Egypt gam sungah note’ tungah hong kibawlna ka mu khin hi." 
Exodus3:17 Egypt gam panin note hong lakhia-in Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite’ leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitangah note kong paipih ding ka kiciam hi,” ci hi,’ va ci in." 
Exodus3:18 “Amaute in nangma thu hong ngai ding uh hi. Nang le Israel upate, Egypt kumpipa kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘ Topa ahi Hebru mite’ Pasian, kote’ kiangah hong kilangzo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi, Topa ka Pasian uh’ tungah biakna ka piak theih nadingun ni thum paina gamlakah kote hong paisak in,’ va ci un." 
Exodus3:19 Thatanghat thu tawh a kisawlgawp kei buang leh Egypt kumpipa in note hong paisak loh ding zong ka thei hi. 
Exodus3:20 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in ka khut zanin na lamdangte tawh Egypt ka vatgawp ding hi. 
Exodus3:21 “Keimah in Egypt mite’ muhna-ah hih mihingte maipha ka pia ding hi. Note na paikhiat uh ciangin, a hawm guakin na pai kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus3:22 Numei peuhmah in a vengte le ama inn sunga ompak mite’ kiang panin ngun le kham tawh kibawl kizepnate leh puante ngen ding uh a, na tapate uh le na tanute uh tungah tuate na koih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note in Egypt mite’ na na sut ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:1 Tua ciangin Moses in dawngin, “Ahih hangin amaute in kei hong um loin ka thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Nang tungah Topa hong kilang lo hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:2 Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khut sungah bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ciangkhut,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Lei-ah lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in leilakah lawn a, gulpi khat a suak hi. Tua gulpi kiang panin Moses tai hi." 
Exodus4:4 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Na khut zan inla a mei-in man in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut zanin man a, ama khut sungah ciangkhut a suakkik hi." 
Exodus4:5 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute in a up theih nadingun Topa, amaute’ Pasian, Abraham’ Pasian, Isaac’ Pasian, le Jakob’ Pasian, nang’ tungah hong kilang khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:6 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khut, na ang sungah koih in,” ci kik hi. Amah in a khut a ang sungah koih hi. Amah in a lak khiat kik ciangin, a khut phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi." 
Exodus4:7 Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Na khut na ang sungah koih kik in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut a ang sungah koih kik hi. Amah in a lak khiat kik ciangin ama cilesa dangte mah bangin dam kik hi." 
Exodus4:8 Pasian in, “Amaute in nang hong up kei a, lim masa a thudon kei uhleh zong, amaute in lim nunung um kha ding uh hi." 
Exodus4:9 Amaute in hih lim nihte nangawn um loin na thu hong thudon kei le, nangmah in Nail gun panin tui pawlkhat la-in lei keu tungah na sung ding a, Nail gun panin na lak tui pen lei keu tungah sisan suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:10 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “Oh, ka Topa aw, tumasiah hitaleh na nasempa tungah thu na gen a kipan hitaleh, kei thugen a siam ka hi kei hi. Ka kam pau ol-in, ka pau awk hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:11 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Kua in mipa’ kam bawl ahi hiam? Kua in amah pau thei losak, bilngongsak, musak, mittawsak ahi hiam? Topa ahi keimah hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Exodus4:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in pai in. Keimah in na thugenna-ah kong huh ding a, na thugen ding nang kong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:13 Ahih hangin amah in, “Oh, ka Topa aw, hong thum ing; midang khat sawl zaw in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:14 Tua ciangin Moses tungah Topa heh a, amah in, “Levi mi na sanggampa Aaron om hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in hoihtakin thu a gen theihna ka cian theih hi. En in, nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong paikhia a, amah in nang hong muh ciangin a lungsim sungah amah kipak ding hi." 
Exodus4:15 Nangmah in ama kiangah thu na gen ding a, thute amah na theisak ding hi. Keimah in na thugenna uhah kong huh ding a, na hih ding uh kong hilh ding hi." 
Exodus4:16 Amah in nang’ tangin mite tungah thu gen ding hi. Amah in nang a dingin thu hong gensak ding a, nang in Pasian bangin na gen ding teng amah na sawl ding hi." 
Exodus4:17 Nangmah in limte na bawl nading ahi hih ciangkhut na khut sungah na tawi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:18 Tua ciangin a sungpa Jethro’ kiangah Moses pai-in ama kiangah, “Hong thum ing; Egypt-ah ka sanggamte kiangah kei hong ciahkiksakin amaute a nungta lai uh hiam hong musak in,” a ci hi. Jethro in Moses kiangah, “Cidam takin va ciahkik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:19 Midian gam sungah Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah ciahkik in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang a hong that nuam mi khempeuh si khinta uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:20 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a zi le a tapate la a, la khat tungah amaute tuangsakin, Egypt gamah ciah kik hi. Pasian in a tawi dingin a gen ciangkhut, Moses in ama khut sungah a tawi hi." 
Exodus4:21 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah na ciahkik ciangin, nangma hih theih dingin vangliatna kong piaksa na lamdangte khempeuh Faro’ mai-ah na hih ding thei in. Ahih hangin keimah in ama lungsim ka khauhsak ding a, amah in mite paisak lo ding hi." 
Exodus4:22 Nangmah in Faro’ kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel pen ka tapa a suak masa hi a," 
Exodus4:23 nangma kiangah, “Amah in kei hong biak theih nadingin ka tapa paisak in,” kong ci hi. Amah paisak ding na nial leh, en in, na tapa a suak masa ka that ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:24 Lampi-ah a giahna khatah Topa in Moses dawntuahin thah a sawm hi. 
Exodus4:25 Tua ciangin Zipporah in meisuang khat la-in a tapa’ vun dawn at khiatsak a, tua tawh Moses lawngin, “Nang pen kei’ tungah sisan tawh ka pasal na hi taktak hi!” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:26 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses that lo hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, vun atna hangin “Sisan tawh ka pasal na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:27 Tua laitakin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Moses a dawn dingin sehnel gamah pai in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in, Pasian’ mualah Moses dawnin a nam hi." 
Exodus4:28 Topa in amah a sawlna thute khempeuh le ama sep dinga a sawl limte khempeuh Moses in Aaron’ tungah a gen hi. 
Exodus4:29 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron pai-in Israel upate khempeuh a kaikhawm uh hi. 
Exodus4:30 Topa in Moses kianga a gensa thute khempeuh Aaron in gen a, Moses in mite’ muhna-ah na lamdangte a lak hi." 
Exodus4:31 Mite in um uh hi. Israel mite kiangah Topa hawhin, amau’ thuaknate amah in a muh khitna thu amaute in a zak uh ciangin, amaute in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Exodus5:1 Tua khit ciangin Faro’ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in, “Israel Pasian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute in sehnel gamah kei a dingin pawi khat a kham theih nadingun ka mite paisak in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi."
