Exodus5:2 Ahih hangin Faro in, “Ama thu mangin Israel mite ka paisakna dingin Topa na cih uh kua ahi hiam? Topa na cih uh ka thei kei hi. Tua tham loin Israel-te ka paisak kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:3 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hebru-te’ Pasian ko kiangah hong kilangzo hi. Hong thum ung; amah in natna ahih kei leh namsau tawh kote hong hihkha ding ahih manin, ni thum paina sehnel gamah kote hong paisakin, Topa ka Pasian uh’ tungah biakna hong piasak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:4 Ahih hangin Egypt kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Moses le Aaron aw, bang hangin amau’ nasepna panin mite paikhiasak ding na hi uh hiam? Na nasepnate uhah pai un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:5 Tua ciangin Faro in, “En un, tu-in hih mite tam mahmah a, amau’ nasepnate panin amaute na tawlngasak uh hi,” ci lai hi." 
Exodus5:6 Tua ni mahin Faro in nasem ukte le a nasem mapite thu pia a," 
Exodus5:7 “Tumasiah-a bangin, leiseek bawl nadingin mite tungah buhtu na pia nawn kei ding uh hi. Amaute paisak unla, amau mah buhtu khawmsak tawm un." 
Exodus5:8 Ahih hangin tumasiah-a a leiseek bawlzah mah uh amaute na bawlsak ding uh hi. Bangbang hitaleh na khiam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadah uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute kiko-in, ‘Kote hong paisakin ka Pasian uh tungah biakna hong piasak un’ ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:9 Amaute in na semin zuau thute a don loh nadingin mihingte tungah nasep haksa zaw suan un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:10 Tua ahih ciangin nasem ukte le nasem mapite paikhia-in mite tungah, “Faro in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note buhtu kong pia kei ding hi." 
Exodus5:11 Note pai unla, na muhna peuhpeuh uhah na buhtu ding uh va zong tawm un. Ahih hangin na nasep ngeizah uh themkhat zong hong kikhiam lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:12 Tua ahih ciangin a buhtu dingun buhkung a kaikhawm dingin Egypt gam khempeuhah mite kikhenthang uh hi. 
Exodus5:13 Nasem ukte in kin ngaihsut uh a, “Buhtu hong kipiak hun mah bangin na nisim nasep zah uh zo un,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:14 Israel mi nasem mapi, Faro’ nasem ukte in amaute a uk dingin a koih sawn mite kisatin, “Bang hangin tu ciang dong, leiseek bawl ding na nasep khempeuh uh hih khin nai lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in kidong hi." 
Exodus5:15 Tua ciangin Israel mi nasem mapite hong pai-in Faro’ kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasemte hih bangin hong bawl na hi hiam?" 
Exodus5:16 Na nasemte tungah buhtu hong kipia lo hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ko tungah, ‘Leiseek bawl un!’ hong ci hi. En in, na nasem kote hong kisat hi. Hih thu-ah nangma mite khialzaw hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:17 Ahih hangin amah in, “Note na thadah uh hi, note na thadah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in, ‘Hong paisak unla, Topa’ tungah biakna hong piasak un,’ na ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:18 Tu-in pai unla na sem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note buhtu hong kipia lo ding a, ahi zongin leiseek a mal ngeina zah mah na piakhia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:19 Amaute in, “Bangbang hitaleh nisimin leiseek na seek zah uh khiam lo ding,” a cih ciangin, amaute thu haksapi sungah om ahihlam uh Israel mi nasem mapite in mu uh hi." 
Exodus5:20 Amaute Faro kiang panin a paikhiat ciangun, amaute a na ngak Moses le Aaron tawh kituak uh hi." 
Exodus5:21 Amaute in, “ Topa in note hong enin thu hong khen hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro le a nasemte’ muhna-ah kote a khial nong suaksak uh a, kote hong kithah theih nadingin thu a zong na hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:22 Tua ciangin Topa’ lamah Moses kihei kikin, “ Topa aw, bang hangin nangmah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei hong sawl peuhmah na hi hiam?" 
Exodus5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma min suangin Faro’ kiangah thugen dingin ka pai khit a kipan, amah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl napi-in nangmah in na mite na honkhia het kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:1 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tu-in Faro’ tungah ka bawl ding na mu ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ut lopipi-in amaute sawlkhia ding hi. Amah in ut lopipi-in ama leitang panin amaute hawlkhia taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:2 Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus6:3 Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob-te’ tungah Vanglian Pasian-in ka kilang a, ahih hangin Topa ahi keima min tawh amaute’ tungah kei ka kitheisak kei hi." 
Exodus6:4 Amaute tawlkhat sung a tenna leitang ahi Kanaan gam amaute’ tungah piak dingin amaute tawh ka thuciamna zong ka kipsak hi. 
Exodus6:5 Tua tham loin Egypt mite in salin a neih Israel mite’ thumna ka zazo a, ka thuciamna ka phawkzo hi." 
Exodus6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite’ tungah, ‘Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Egypt mite’ na na sepna uh panin note kong paikhiatpih ding hi. Amau’ sal hihna panin note kong khahkhia ding a, a thahat ka khut zanin thukhenna nasep lian tawh note kong honkhia ding hi." 
Exodus6:7 Keima mi dingin note kong la ding a, kei pen note’ Pasian ka hi ding hi. Egypt mite’ sila hihna panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa, Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna note in na thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus6:8 Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob-te’ tunga ka ciam leitangah note kong paipih ding hi. Tua leitang na neih dingun note’ tungah kong pia ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:9 Moses in tua bangmahin Israel mite tungah a gen hi. Ahih hangin amau’ lungsim kitapna le a salsuahna sung uhah a gimna uh hangin amaute in Moses’ thu ngai lo uh hi. 
Exodus6:10 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus6:11 “Pai-in va tum inla, ama leitang panin Israel mite a paikhiatsak nading Egypt kumpipa Faro’ kiangah va gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:12 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, Israel mite nangawn in ka thu hong ngai lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in thugen siam lo keima thu, Faro in hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:13 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah thu gen a, Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin note ka hong sawlna thu, Israel mite le Egypt kumpipa Faro’ tungah va gen un, ci-in a hanthawn hi." 
Exodus6:14 Hihte pen amau’ beh lutangte ahi hi: Israel’ ta a suak masa Reuben’ tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, le Karmi ahi hi. Hihte pen Reuben-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:15 Simeon’ tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar, le Kanaan numei’ tapa Shaul ahi hi. Hihte pen Simeon-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:16 Hihte pen amau’ khang tawh kizui-in Levi’ tapate’ min ahi hi: Gershon, Kohath, le Merari hi a, Levi kum za le kum sawmthum le sagih nungta hi." 
Exodus6:17 Gershon’ tapate: Amau’ innkuan tawh kizui-in Libni le Shimei ahi hi. 
Exodus6:18 Kohath’ tapate: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, le Uzziel hi a, Kohath kum za le kum sawmthum le thum nungta hi." 
Exodus6:19 Merari’ tapate: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hihte pen amau’ khang tawh kizui-in Levi-te beh ahi hi. 
Exodus6:20 Amram in ama pa’ sanggamnu Jokhebed zi-in la a, tua nu in amah tawh Aaron le Moses nei hi. Amram kum za le kum sawmthum le sagih nungta hi." 
Exodus6:21 Izhar’ tapate: Korah, Nefeg, le Zikri ahi hi." 
Exodus6:22 Uzziel’ tapate: Mishael, Elzafan, le Sithri ahi hi." 
Exodus6:23 Aaron in Amminadab’ tanu, Nahshon’ sanggamnu Elisheba zi-in la hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, le Ithamar nei hi." 
Exodus6:24 Korah’ tapate: Assir, Elkanah, le Abiasaf hi a, hihte pen Korah-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:25 Aaron’ tapa Eleazer in Putiel’ tanute khat zi-in la hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Finehas nei hi. Hihte pen a innkuan kuanin Levi mite’ beh lutangte ahi hi. 
Exodus6:26 “Egypt gam panin Israel mite a honpi-in paikhiatpih in,” Topa in a cihna mite pen hih Aaron le Moses ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:27 Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpih nading thu Egypt kumpipa Faro’ tunga thu a gente pen hih Moses le Aaron ahi uh hi. 
Exodus6:28 Egypt gamah Moses kiangah Topa in thu a gen ni-in," 
Exodus6:29 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Na tunga kong gen khempeuh Egypt kumpipa Faro’ tungah gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:30 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, kei pen thugen a siam lo mi ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in Faro in ka thu hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thei in, Faro’ tungah Pasian bangin nang kong bawl hi. Na sanggampa Aaron pen na kamsangpa hi ding hi." 
Exodus7:2 Nang kong thupiak khempeuh na gen ding hi. Ama leitang panin Israel mite a paikhiatsak nadingin Faro’ tungah na sanggampa Aaron in gen ding hi. 
Exodus7:3 Ahih hangin keimah in Faro’ lungsim ka khauhsak ding a, Egypt gamah ka limte le ka na lamdangte tampi ka bawl khit hangin" 
Exodus7:4 Faro in nang’ thu hong ngai lo ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Egypt tungah gimna ka tungsak ding a, thukhen nasepna lianpite tawh Egypt gam panin Israel mi ahi ka mihonte ka paikhiatpih ding hi." 
Exodus7:5 Keimah in Egypt tungah gimna tungsakin amaute’ lak panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih ciangin Egypt mite in Topa ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:6 Moses le Aaron zong Topa’ sawl bangmahin gamta uh a, Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in sem uh hi." 
Exodus7:7 Tu-in amaute in Faro’ tungah thu a gen laitakun Moses kum sawmgiat pha a, Aaron kum sawmgiat le thum a pha hi." 
Exodus7:8 Topa in Moses le Aaron’ kiangah," 
Exodus7:9 “Faro in note kiangah, ‘Note a thutak na hihna uh nalamdang khat tawh hong lak un,’ hong cih ciangin nangmah in Aaron kiangah, ‘Gulpi khat a suah theih nadingin na ciangkhut la inla, Faro’ mai-ah khia suk in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:10 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in Topa’ thupiak bangin gamta uh hi. Aaron in Faro le a uliante’ mai-ah a ciangkhut lawn suk a, gulpi khat a suak hi." 
Exodus7:11 Tua ciangin Faro in a mipilte le a aisan siamte a sam hi. Egypt mitphial siamte in zong amau’ siamna tawh tua bang teek mahin a bawl thei uh hi. 
Exodus7:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a milip in a ciangkhut uh khia suk ciat uh a, tuate gulpi vive a suak hi. Ahih hangin Aaron’ ciangkhut in amau’ ciangkhutte a valhtum hi." 
Exodus7:13 Topa’ gensa bangin Faro’ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in amaute’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus7:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faro’ lungsim khauh mahmah a, amah in mite paisak nuam lo hi." 
Exodus7:15 Tua ahih manin zingsangin Nail gun-ah a pai ciangin amah tawh a kimu dingin nang zong pai in. Gulpi a suak na ciangkhut pen mah tawi in la, gun gei-ah amah ngak in." 
Exodus7:16 Amah tawh na kimuh ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Sehnel gam sungah ama mite in amah a biak theih nadingin a mite na paisak nading a gen dingin Hebru-te’ Pasian, Topa in nang’ kiangah kei hong sawl khin hi. Ahi zongin tu ciang dong ama thu na mang kei hi." 
Exodus7:17 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Keima sep ding thute a muh ciangin kei kua ka hi hiam cih hong thei ding hi,” ci hi. En in, hih ka ciangkhut tawh gun tui ka sat ding a, tuite, sisan hong suak ding hi." 
Exodus7:18 Ngasate si ding a, gun tui uihgawp ding ahih manin Egypt mite in dawn thei lo ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:19 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Na ciangkhut la inla, sisan a suah theih nadingin Egypt tuite, amau’ gunte, amau’ luite, amau’ bualte’ tung le amau’ tuili khempeuhte’ tungah na khut zan in. Egypt gam sunga sing beel le suang beel khempeuh sung nangawnah sisan om ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:20 Moses le Aaron in Topa’ thupiak bangin hih uh hi. Faro le ama uliante’ muhin amah in ciangkhut vik to-in Nail gun sunga om tui sat a, Nail gun sunga om tui khempeuh sisan a suak hi." 
Exodus7:21 Nail gun sunga ngasate si hi. Nail gun uih a, Egypt mite in Nail gun pana tui dawn thei lo uh hi. Egypt gam sung khempeuhah sisan om hi." 
Exodus7:22 Ahih hangin Egypt mitphial siamte in amau’ siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ lungsim a khauh ngei mahin khauh a, Topa’ gensa bangin amah in amaute’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus7:23 Faro kihei-in a inn sungah pai a, amah in a lungsim nangawnah tua thu ngaihsutin nei nawn lo hi." 
Exodus7:24 Amaute in Nail gun tui dawn thei lo uh ahih manin Egypt mite khempeuh in Nail gun kiim tengah tui dawn ding a to uh hi. 
Exodus7:25 Topa in gun a sat zawh ni sagih pha ta hi. 
Exodus8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro’ kiangah pai-in ama tungah, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus8:2 Ahih hangin amaute na paisak kei leh, en in, na gam khempeuh uiphukte tawh ka gimsak ding hi." 
Exodus8:3 Nail gun pen uiphukte tawh kidim ding a, tuate pen na innsung, na lupna inndei sung, na lupna tung, na nasemte le na mipihte’ innsung, na meikhukte le na annel mekna kuang sung uhah hong pai ding uh hi." 
Exodus8:4 Uiphukte, nang’ tung le na nasemte khempeuh tungah hong pai ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:5 Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Gunte, luite, le tuilite tungah na ciangkhut zan inla, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte paisak in,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:6 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in Egypt tuite tungah a khut zan a, uiphukte hong pai-in Egypt leitang a tuam hi." 
Exodus8:7 Ahih hangin mitphial siamte in amau’ siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh a, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte omsak uh hi." 
Exodus8:8 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron samin, “Kei le ka mite’ kiang panin uiphukte a lakkhiat nadingin Topa’ tungah thum in. Topa’ tungah biakna a pia dingin mite ka paisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:9 Tua ciangin Moses in Faro’ kiangah, “Nail gun sung cih simloh, nangma kiang le na innte panin uiphukte a bei nadingin nang le na nasemte le na mite a dingin ka thum theih nadingin a hun khat seh in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:10 Amah in, “Zing ciang,” ci hi. Moses in, “ Topa ahi kote’ Pasian tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi, ci-in na theih nadingin nangma cih bang hi tahen." 
Exodus8:11 Nang le na innte le na nasemte le na mite’ kiang panin uiphukte paikhia ding uh a, Nail gun sung bekah omlai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:12 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ kiang panin Moses le Aaron a paikhia uh hi. Faro’ tungah a tunsak uiphukte a beisak nadingin Topa’ tungah Moses in thu a ngen hi. 
Exodus8:13 Topa in Moses’ nget bangin hih a, innte le huang sung le lote panin uiphukte a si hi." 
Exodus8:14 Amaute in a lomlomin tuate khawm uh a, gam sung teng uih hi." 
Exodus8:15 Ahih hangin nopna a omkik lam Faro in a muh ciangin, amah in a lungsim khauhsak a, Topa’ gensa bangin amau’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus8:16 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron’ kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Egypt gam sung khempeuhah thokang a om nadingin na ciangkhut zanin leivui sat in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:17 Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh hi. Aaron in a ciangkhut tawh leivui sat a, mihing tung le ganhing tungah thokang hong om hi. Egypt gam sung khempeuhah leivui teng thokang suak hi." 
Exodus8:18 Mitphial siamte in amau’ siamna tawh thokang piansak ding sin uh a, ahih hangin amaute in hih thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing le ganhing tungah thokangte om hi." 
Exodus8:19 Mitphial siamte in Faro’ kiangah, “Hih pen Pasian’ nasepna ahi hi,” ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Faro’ lungsim khauh a, Topa’ gensa bangin amah in amaute’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus8:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baihin gun-ah Faro hong pai ding ngakin ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingun ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus8:21 Tua bang hi loin, ka mite na paisak kei leh, en in, nang le na nasemte le na mite’ tung le na innte sungah tho honpite kong sawl ding hi. Egypt mite’ innte le tuate’ dinna leitang zong tho honpite tawh kidim ding hi." 
Exodus8:22 Ahih hangin tua ni ciangin kei pen hih leitang tungah Topa ka hihna na theih nadingin tho honpite a om loh nadingin ka mite a tenna Goshen leitang keimah in ka tuam koih ding hi. 
Exodus8:23 Tua bangin keima mite le nangma mite a kilamdanna khat ka bawl ding hi. Zing ciangin hih lim hong om ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:24 Topa in tua bangmahin hih ahih manin Faro’ innsung le ama nasemte’ inn sungah tho honpi hong pai a, thote’ hangin Egypt gam sung khempeuh leitang kisia hi." 
Exodus8:25 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron sam a, “Pai un; hih gam sungah na Pasian tung uhah biakna pia un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:26 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tua bangin hih ding kituak lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite a dingin a deihhuai lo biaknate kote in Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka pia ding uh hi. Egypt mite a dingin a deihhuai lo biaknate amau’ muhna-ah pia le ung, amaute in suang tawh kote hong deng ding uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Exodus8:27 Kote, ni thum paina sehnel gamah pai-in ama hong thupiak ding bangin Topa ka Pasian uh tungah biakna ka va pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in, “Sehnel gamah Topa na Pasian uh tungah biakna a pia dingin note kong paisak ding hi. Ahi zongin gamlapi-ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Kei a dingin zong hong thumsak un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:29 Tua ciangin Moses in, “En in, nang kiang panin kei paikhia-in Faro’ kiang pan, a nasemte’ kiang pan, le a mite’ kiang panin tho honpite zing ciangin a paikhiat theih nadingin Topa’ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Ahi zongin Topa’ tungah biakna a pia dingin mite paisak lohna tawh Faro hong zuautat kik nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:30 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ kiang panin Moses paikhia-in Topa’ tungah thu a ngen hi. 
Exodus8:31 Topa in Moses’ nget bangin pia a, Faro’ kiang, a nasemte’ kiang, le a mite’ kiang panin tho honpite lakhia a, khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus8:32 Ahi zongin Faro in hih hunin zong a lungsim khauhsak lai a, mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus9:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro’ kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa, Hebru-te’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus9:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in amaute paisak ding nialin amaute na let lai leh," 
Exodus9:3 lo sunga om ganhing, sakolte, late, kalaohte, bawnghonte, le tuuhonte tungah a nasia mahmah gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Exodus9:4 Israel mite a’ khempeuh khat beek a sih loh nadingin Israel-te’ ganhingte le Egypt-te’ ganhingte’ kikalah Topa in a kilamdanna khat ka bawl ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:5 Topa in a hun khat seh a, “Zing ciangin Topa in hih gam sungah hih na hong sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:6 A zing ciangin Topa in hih na sem hi. Egypt mite’ ganhing khempeuh si a, ahih hangin Israel mite’ ganhing khat zong si lo hi." 
Exodus9:7 Faro in a en dingin mi sawl a, Israel-te’ ganhing khat zong na si lo hi. Ahih hangin Faro’ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus9:8 Topa in Moses le Aaron’ kiangah, “Meiphualpi panin khut dimin vut la unla, Faro’ muhin vantung lamah Moses in lawn hen." 
Exodus9:9 Tua vutte, Egypt gam khempeuhah leivui neel bangin kithehthang ding a, Egypt gam sung khempeuhah mihing le ganhing tungah meimatum suakin kilawhgawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in meiphualpi panin vutte la-in Faro’ mai-ah ding uh a, Moses in vantung lamah tuate lawn a, tuate in mihing le ganhing tungah meimatum piangsakin kilawhgawp hi." 
Exodus9:11 Mitphial siamte in meimatum veina hangin Moses demzo nawn lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mitphial siamte le Egypt mite khempeuh in meimatum vei uh hi. 
Exodus9:12 Ahih hangin Topa in Faro’ lungsim khauhsak a, Topa in Moses’ tunga a gensa bangin amah in amaute’ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus9:13 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baih inla, Faro’ mai-ah dingin ama kiangah, ‘Hebru mite’ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingun ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus9:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuhah kei tawh a kibang khat beek om lo hi, ci-in na theih nadingin hih hunin na inn sungtawng dong le na nasemte le na mite’ tungah ka gimnate khempeuh kong tungsak ding hi." 
Exodus9:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in keimah in ka khut zanin natna tawh nang le na mite hong vatgawpin, leitung panin note hong kibeisak thei hi." 
Exodus9:16 Ahi zongin leitung khempeuhah keima min a kipulak theih nadingin note tungah ka vangliatna lah ding deihna-in kong nungtasak lai hi. 
Exodus9:17 Ka mite tungah nang kiliansak lai-in amaute na paisak kei hi. 
Exodus9:18 En in, zing ciang tubang hunin Egypt gam a kisat a kipanin tuhun dongin tua bang a kimu ngei lo, a tam mahmah gialpi ka kiasak ding hi." 
Exodus9:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mi sawl inla, na ganhingte le gamlak a na neihte khempeuh a muanhuai bukna-ah koih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh inn-ah a kipaipih lo, gamlak a om mihing le ganhing tungah gialpi kia ding a, amaute si ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:20 Tua ciangin Faro’ nasemte’ lak panin Topa’ thu a zahtak mi in ama silate le a ganhingte inn-ah taisak hi. 
Exodus9:21 Ahi zongin Topa’ thu a don lo mi in ama silate le a ganhingte gamlakah nusia hi. 
Exodus9:22 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt gam sung khempeuh a mihing le ganhing le gamlak kungte khempeuh tungah gialpi a kiat theih nadingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:23 Tua ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a ciangkhut a zan hi. Topa in van gingsakin gialpi kiasak a, leitungah keek kia suk hi. Topa in Egypt gam sungah gialpi zusak hi." 
Exodus9:24 Egypt gam minam khat a suah khit a kipanin tua bang a om ngei lo, a tam mahmah gialpi le gialpi lakah khua phia-in keek ging om tawntung hi." 
Exodus9:25 Gialpi in Egypt gam sunga a om mihing le ganhing, na khempeuh denggawp hi. Gialpi in gamlak kung khempeuh denggawp a, gamlak singkung khempeuh dengtan hi." 
Exodus9:26 Israel mite a omna Goshen gam bekah gialpi kia lo hi. 
Exodus9:27 Tua ciangin Faro in mi sawlin Moses le Aaron samsakin amaute kiangah, “Tutungin ka khial hi. Topa man hi. Kei le ka mite ka khial uh hi." 
Exodus9:28 Topa’ tungah thum un. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih vanging le gialpi kicingzo hi. Note kong paisak ding a, note na khawl nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:29 Moses in ama kiangah, “Khuapi panin ka paikhiat khit phetin Topa’ lamah ka khut ka zan ding hi. Leitung pen Topa a’ hi, ci-in na theih nadingin vanging tawpin gialpi om nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus9:30 Ahih hangin nang le na nasemte in ahihleh, Topa Pasian na zahtak nai lohna uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:31 (Anthul kungte le mangbuhham kisia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mangbuhhamte a vuih laitak hi a, anthul kungte a pak laitak ahi hi." 
Exodus9:32 Ahih hangin mangbuh le mangbuhmante sia lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate khangham nai lo hi.) 
Exodus9:33 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ kiang pan khuapi pualamah Moses paikhia a, Topa’ lamah a khut zanin thu a ngen hi. Vanging le gialpi tawp pah a, leitungah guah bua nawn lo hi." 
Exodus9:34 Ahih hangin guah le gialpi le vanging a khawlna Faro in a muh ciangin amah khial lai a, amah le a nasemte in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh hi." 
Exodus9:35 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses tungtawnin a gensa bangin Faro’ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in Israel mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro’ kiangah pai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ lakah hih keima limte ka lah theih nading le keimah in Egypt mite ka mawlpihna le amaute’ lakah bang limte bawl khin cihna thu na tate le na tute’ zakna-ah na gen theih nading le, Topa ka hihna na theih nadingin ama lungsim le a nasemte’ lungsim ka khauhsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:2  
Exodus10:3 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in ama kiangah, “Hebru mite’ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Ka mai-ah nang na kiniamkhiat nading bang tanvei nial ding na hi hiam? Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus10:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite paisak ding na nial leh, zing ciangin na gam sungah kauphete kong paipih ding a," 
Exodus10:5 kuamah in leitang a muh theih loh nadingin tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam ding uh hi. Gialpi khit cianga nang a’ dinga a omlai sunte amaute in ne ding uh hi. Tuate in gamlak a a po nangma singkung khempeuh ne ding uh a," 
Exodus10:6 nangma innte le na nasemte khempeuh le Egypt mite’ inn khempeuhah dim ding uh hi. Na pu na pate uh leitang tungah a pian’ uh a kipan tuni donga tua bang a muh ngei lohte uh hi ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin amah kihei-in Faro’ kiang panin a paikhia hi." 
Exodus10:7 Faro’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Eite tungah hih mipa bang tanvei thangzak hong hi niloh ding ahi hiam? Amaute in amau’ Pasian, Topa a biak theih nadingun mite paisak in. Egypt a siatna theitel nai lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus10:8 Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiangah Moses le Aaron kipaipih kik hi. Faro in amaute kiangah, “Pai un; Topa, na Pasian uh va bia un. Ahi zongin kua teng pai ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:9 Moses in, “Ka khangnote uh le ka khanghamte uh tawh ka paikhawm ding uh hi. Ka tapate uh, ka tanute uh, ka tuuhonte uh, le ka bawnghonte uh tawh ka pai ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a dingin pawi khat ka kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:10 Faro in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh na naupangte uh kong paisak taak leh note tawh Topa hong om ta ve! En un, note in ngimna hoih lo na nei uh hi." 
Exodus10:11 Tua bang hi lo ding! Note’ lak panin pasalte pai unla, Topa va bia un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen nomau’ ut ahi hi,” a ci hi. Faro’ omna panin amaute kihawlkhia hi." 
Exodus10:12 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt leitang tungah amaute hong omin, gialpi in a den baang kung khempeuh a ne ding kauphete sapna-in Egypt leitang tungah na khut zan khia in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:13 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Egypt leitang tungah a ciangkhut zan a, Topa in tua sun tawntung le tua zan tawntung leitang tungah nisuahna huih a nungsak hi. Zingsang ciangin nisuahna huih in kauphete hong tun khin hi." 
Exodus10:14 Tua masiah kauphe hon tua banga a tam a om ngei lo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngei lo ding, Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah kauphe hong om a, Egypt gam buppi-ah a dim uh hi." 
Exodus10:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam uh a, leitang mial hi. Tuate in leitang tunga kung khempeuh le gialpi’ den baang singkung gah khempeuh ne uh hi. Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah gamlak singkung hitaleh kungno hitaleh a hing khat beek om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus10:16 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron nawh sap a, “ Topa na Pasian’ tung le nangma tungah ka khial khin hi." 
Exodus10:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka khialhna hong maisak in. Tu-a khatvei bek, kong thum hi; keima tung panin hih sihna a lakkhiat ding Topa na Pasian’ tungah thum in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:18 Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiang panin amah paikhia-in Topa’ tungah a thum hi. 
Exodus10:19 Topa in nitumna huihpi hat mahmah khat nungsak a, tua huih in kauphete laamto-in San Tuipi sung a denna hi. Egypt gam sungah kauphe khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus10:20 Ahih hangin Topa in Faro’ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite in khuamial sung a zawt nading, Egypt leitang tungah khuamial a om theih nadingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:22 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a khut zan a, Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ni thum sung khua mial bikbek hi." 
Exodus10:23 Ni thum sung amau khatlekhat kimu thei lo uh a, ama omna panin kuamah paikhia thei lo hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in amau’ tenna-ah khuavak nei uh hi." 
Exodus10:24 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses samin, “Pai un, Topa va bia un; na tate uh zong note tawh hong pai thei ding hi. Na tuuhonte uh le na bawnghonte uh omsak lai un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:25 Ahih hangin Moses in, “ Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka piak theih nadingun biakpiakna le meihal biakna kote nong neihsak kul hi." 
Exodus10:26 Ka ganhingte uh zong kote tawh a pai kul hi. Ganno khat zong kinusia lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ka Pasian uh ka biak nadingun tuate ka paipih ding uh hi. A mun ka tun matengun bang pen tawh Topa bia ding cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:27 Ahih hangin Topa in Faro’ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in amaute paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:28 Tua ciangin Faro in ama kiangah, “Kei kiang panin kihem in. Nang kidawm in. Ka maitang hong mu kik nawn kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka maitang nong muh ni-in nang na si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:29 Moses in, “Na cih bang hita hen! Na maitang kong mu kik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faro le Egypt tungah gimna khat ka tungsak lai ding a, tua khit ciangin hih lai mun panin amah in note hong paisak ding hi. Amah in note hong paisak ciangin note hong hawlkhia mang khin ding hi." 
Exodus11:2 Pasal peuhmah in a vengte kiang pan, numei peuhmah in zong a vengte’ kiang mah panin ngun le kham kizepnate a nget theih nadingun mite’ zakin thu gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:3 Topa in Egypt mite’ muhna-ah mite maipha pia hi. Tua tham loin, mipa Moses pen Egypt leitang tung, Faro’ nasemte’ muhna, le mite’ muhna-ah lian mahmah hi." 
Exodus11:4 Moses in Faro’ kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Zankim pawlin Egypt mite’ lakah ka pai ding hi." 
Exodus11:5 Kumpi tokhom tunga tu Faro’ tacil a kipanin an gawina nunga a om nasem numei tacil dong le ganhing tacil khempeuh, Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh si ding hi." 
Exodus11:6 Cikmahin tua bang a om ngei lo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngei lo ding kahna lianpi Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah om ding hi." 
Exodus11:7 Ahih hangin Egypt mite le Israel mite a kilamdangin Topa in bawl hi, ci-in na theih nadingun Israel mite, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, ui khat nangawn zong tau lo ding hi, ci hi” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:8 Tua ciangin Moses in Faro’ kiangah, “Na uliante khempeuh keima kiangah hong paisukin, keima kiangah hong kun ding uh a, ‘Nang le nangmah hong zui khempeuh paikhia un,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin kei ka paikhia ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi. Tua ciangin Faro’ kiang panin amah a heh mahmahsa-in a paikhia hi." 
Exodus11:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt tungah nalamdang tam ka bawl theih nadingin Faro in na thu hong ngai lo lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:10 Moses le Aaron in hih na lamdangte khempeuh Faro’ mai-ah a bawl uh hi. Topa in Faro’ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite a leitang panin paikhiasak lo hi." 
Exodus12:1 Egypt gam sungah Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Exodus12:2 “Tu kha pen note a dingin kum kipatna hi ding a, note a dingin kum khat sungah a kha masa hi ding hi." 
Exodus12:3 Israel mihon khempeuhte tungah gen in. Tu kha ni sawm ni-in innkuan khat a dingin tuuno ahih kei leh keelno khat, amau’ innkuan phazah tawh kituakin amaute in ganno khat ciat go ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:4 Ganno khat a ne ding innkuanmi a tawmluat leh amau’ innzom a vengte tawh a mi tawh kituakin a sa hawm ding uh hi. A mi tamna le a nekzah uh tawh kizui-in ganno man pia ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:5 Na ganno uh a sitbaang lo hi ding a, kum khat a pha a pa hi ding hi. Tua pen tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin, khat peuhpeuh hi thei ding hi." 
Exodus12:6 Tua gannote pen Israel mihonte khempeuh in a gawh ding hun nitak khuamui, tua kha ni sawm le li dong na kem ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:7 Tua ciangin amaute in a si kimkhat la-in a nekna uh inn kongkhak khuam nihte le a bangtungzawl nuh ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:8 Amaute in tua zanin a sa hangkeu-in ne ding uh a, silngo sawh loh anlum le a kha mehteh tawh amaute in ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:9 A sate mun khat peuhpeuh a sial ahi a, tui tawh huanin ahi zongin ne loin, a lu le a khete le a sungkuate tawh hangkeu-in, na ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:10 Zingsang dong a khing na omsak kei ding uh a, zingsang cianga a khing omlai peuhmah na haltum ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:11 Hih bang zia-in na ne ding uh hi: Na kawng uh gakin, na khedap uh na khe uhah bulhin, na ciangkhut uh na khut uhah na tawi ding uh a, na nawh nek ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa’ Paisan Pawi ahi hi." 
Exodus12:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in tua zanin Egypt gam ka nawk ding a, Egypt leitang tungah mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh tacil khempeuh ka vatlum ding a, Egypt pasian-te khempeuh tungah thu ka khen ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus12:13 Note’ omna inn tunga sisan pen note a dingin lim hi ding hi. Sisan ka muh ciangin note kong paisan ding a, Egypt leitang ka vatgawp ciangin note hong susia ding gimna note’ tungah hong tung lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:14 “Hih pen note a dingin phawkna ni hi ding a, note in Topa’ tungah pawi bawlna ni-in na nei ding uh hi. Na khang tawntungun note in biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:15 Topa in, “Note in ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. A ni masa ni-in note in na inn panun silngo na hemkhia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatpeuh in a ni masa ni panin a ni sagih ni dong silngo sawh a nek leh, Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:16 A ni masa ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siangtho biak kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni nih sung na bangmah na sem kei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na milipun an huanin na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:17 Note in silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin na mihonte uh ka paikhiatpih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in na khan tawntungun hih ni pen biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:18 Kha masa, tua kha sawm le li nitakin note in silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh a, tua kha ni sawmnih le khat nitak dong na ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh ni sagih sung na innsung uhah silngo kimu lo ding hi. Mi khatpeuh, peemta hitaleh gammi hitaleh in silngo sawh a nek leh Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:20 Silngo a kisawh peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. Na omna khempeuh uhah silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:21 Tua ciangin Moses in Israel upate khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Nomau a dingin na innkuan uh tawh a kituakin tuunote teel unla, Paisan Pawi bawl nading tuuno go un." 
Exodus12:22 Puknah lomkhat la unla, kuang sunga om sisan sungah diahin, kuang sunga om sisan tawh bangtungzawl le kongkhak khuam nihte nuh un. Zingsang matengin a inn kongkhak pua-ah kuamah paikhia lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite a that dingin Topa in hong nawk ding hi. Bangtungzawl le kongkhak khuam nih tunga sisan a muh ciangin Topa in kongkhak paisan ding a, a susia dingte pen note that dingin na innsung uhah tumsak lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:24 Note le na tapate un hih pen biakna ngeina kipin na nei tawntung ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:25 Amah in hong ciamsa bangin Topa in note hong piak ding leitang na tun uh ciangin hih ngeina na zui ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:26 Na tate un note kiangah, ‘Hih banga hihna pen bang a cih nopna ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin," 
Exodus12:27 note in, ‘ Topa’ Paisanna hangin biakpiakna ahi hi. Amah in eite’ innkuante hong khawi-in Egypt mite a thah lai-in Egypt gam sungah Israel innkuante paisan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Mite in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Exodus12:28 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses le Aaron a thupiak bangin mite a gamta uh hi. 
Exodus12:29 Ama kumpi tokhom tunga a tu Faro’ tacil a kipanin thongmial sunga a om a kiman mite’ tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh, zankim laitakin Topa in vatgawp hi." 
Exodus12:30 Tua zanin Faro le a nasemte khempeuh le Egypt mite khempeuh tho uh a, Egypt gam sungah kahna lianpi a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khat beek a sihlohna inn khat zong om lo hi." 
Exodus12:31 Faro in Moses le Aaron zan sap a, “Ding un; keima mite’ lak panin note le Israel mite paikhia unla, na gensa bangun Topa va bia un." 
Exodus12:32 Na gensa bangun na tuuhonte uh le na bawnghonte uh la unla, pai un. Kei zong thupha hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:33 Tua gam panin mite manlangin a sawlkhiat nading uhah Egypt mite nawh tat mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Eite khempeuh i si khin ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus12:34 Tua ahih ciangin mite in silngo sawh nai loh a annel lom uh la-in, annel mekna amau’ kuangte puan tawh tunin a liangko uhah pua uh hi." 
Exodus12:35 Moses in amaute tunga a gen bangin Israel mite zong gamta uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Egypt mite’ tung panin ngun le kham kizepnate le puante ngen uh hi. 
Exodus12:36 Amau’ ngette a piak nadingun Topa in Egypt mite’ muhna-ah Israel mite maipha a pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Egypt mite’ na a sut uh hi. 
Exodus12:37 Israel mite numei le naupang kisim loin pasal tul zaguk Rameses panin Sukkoth-ah khe-in pai uh hi. 
Exodus12:38 Minamdang tampi le tuuhon le bawnghon, ganhing tampi zong amau tawh pai uh hi." 
Exodus12:39 Egypt panin a ken uh annel lom panin amaute in silngo sawh loh moh em uh hi. Tuate silngo a kisawh lohna pen Egypt gam panin amaute kinotkhia a, ze-ol tat thei loin amau’ annek ding zong kiging man lo uh hi." 
Exodus12:40 Israel mite Egypt-ah kum zali le kum sawmthum sung om uh hi. 
Exodus12:41 Kum zali le kum sawmthum a cin ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin Topa’ mihonpite paikhia uh hi. 
Exodus12:42 Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih nadingin hih pen Topa’ zan vilna ahi hi. Tua mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in zong amau’ khang tawntungin Topa a dingin hih zan mah zan vilna-in a nei uh hi. 
Exodus12:43 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah, “Hih Paisan Pawi pen biakna ngeina kip khat hi ding a, gamdangmi kuamah in ne lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:44 Ahih hangin sum tawh a kilei sila peuhmah in a vun na at khit uh ciangin ne thei ding hi. 
Exodus12:45 Peemta hitaleh a kicial nasem hitaleh in ne thei lo ding hi. 
Exodus12:46 Inn sungah kine ding a, inn pua-ah a sa na paikhiatpih kei ding uh hi. A guh na kuaitan kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:47 Israel mihon khempeuh in hih ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:48 Khualmi khat note kiangah hong peem a, Topa a dingin Paisan Pawi a bawl leh, ama mipih pasal khempeuh a vun ki-atsak un. Tua khit ciangin amah a nai-ah hong pai-in bawl thei ding a, amah pen gammi khat tawh kibang ding hi. Ahih hangin vun ki-at lo mi kuamah in ne lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:49 Gammi le note’ lakah hong peem khualmi a dingin ngeina khat bek om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:50 Tua bangin Israel mite khempeuh gamta uh a, Topa in Moses le Aaron a thupiak bangin amaute in hih uh hi." 
Exodus12:51 Tua ni teekteekin Topa in Israel mite a honpi-un Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih hi. 
Exodus13:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus13:2 “Keima tungah tacil khempeuh hong ap in. Israel mite’ lakah, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, naubu a hong masa pen peuhpeuh keima-a’ ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:3 Moses in mite tungah, “Salsuahna Egypt gam panin na paikhiat uh hih ni phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in vangliatna tawh hih mun panin note hong paikhiatpih hi. Silngo sawh anlum kine lo ding hi." 
Exodus13:4 Abib kha, tuni-in note a paikhia na hi uh hi." 
Exodus13:5 Amah in note tungah piak dinga na pate’ tungah a ciam, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite’ leitangah Topa in note hong paipih ciangin hih kha sungin hih bangin na hih ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:6 Note in silngo sawh loh anlum ni sagih sung na ne ding uh a, a ni sagih ni-in Topa pahtawina pawi khat om ding hi." 
Exodus13:7 Silngo sawh loh anlum ni sagih sung kine ding hi. Note’ tungah silngo sawh anlum kimu lo ding a, note’ huang sung khempeuhah silngo kimu lo ding hi." 
Exodus13:8 Tua ni-in na tate uh kiangah, ‘Egypt panin ka paikhiat lai-un Topa in ko a’ dinga hong hihsakna hang hi,’ ci-in na gen ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:9 Na kam un Topa’ Thukham a gen tawntung theih nadingin hih pen na khut tung uhah lim, na taltang tung uhah phawkna khat hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a vangliatna tawh hih mun panin note hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Exodus13:10 Tua ahih ciangin note in a kiseh hunin kum khat pan kum khat, hih biakna ngeina kip na zui ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:11 “Amah in note le na pate uh tungah a ciam bangin, Topa in Kanaan leitangah note hong paipih hun ciang le note tungah tua gam hong piak ciangin," 
Exodus13:12 note in naubu a hong masa khempeuh Topa a dingin na tuam koih ding uh hi. Na ganhing uh a tacil a pa khempeuh zong Topa a’ hi ding hi. 
Exodus13:13 La a tacil peuhmah tuuno khat tawh na tanh ding uh hi. Na tat kei ding uhleh a ngawng na kuaitan ding uh hi. Note’ tapate’ lak panin tacil peuhmah na tanh ding uh hi. 
Exodus13:14 Hong pai ding hunah na tapa in, ‘Hih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in nang hong dot ciangin, nangmah in ama kiangah, ‘Salsuahna, Egypt panin Topa in vangliatna tawh kote hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Exodus13:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in kote paisak ding a nial tentan ciangin Egypt gam sunga tacil khempeuh, mihing tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh Topa in that hi. Tua ahih ciangin naubu a hong masa a pa khempeuh Topa’ tungah biakna-in ka pia uh hi. Ahih hangin ka tapate uh sung pan tacil khempeuh ka tanh uh hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Exodus13:16 Tua pen na khut tunga om ciaptehna lim ahih kei leh na mitte’ kikal-a talsuante bang hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a vangliatna tawh Egypt panin eite hong paikhiatpih hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:17 Faro in mite a paisak ciangin, lampi tom pen hitaseleh, Pasian in Filistia gam tawnin amaute paipih lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “Amaute in gal a tuah ciangin mite kisikin Egypt-ah ciahkik kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:18 Ahih hangin Pasian in San Tuipi lam manawhin sehnel gam lamah mite kot paipih hi. Israel mite gal a do dingin a kithawisa-in Egypt leitang panin a paito uh ahi hi. 
Exodus13:19 Moses in Josef’ guhte paipih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama guhte a puak ding uh Josef in Israel mite thupi takin kiciamna bawlsak khin hi. “Pasian in note hong hotkhiat ciangin note in hih lai panin keima guhte na pua ding uh hi,” na ci khin hi." 
Exodus13:20 Sukkoth panin amaute pai lai uh a, sehnel gam nawl, Etham-ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Exodus13:21 Amaute, sun hitaleh zan hitaleh khualzinin a pai theih nadingun sunin amaute lam a lak dingin meii khuam khat tawh, zanin amaute khuavak a pia dingin mei khuam khat tawh, amaute’ mai-ah Topa a pai hi." 
Exodus13:22 Sunin meii khuam le zanin mei khuamte, mite’ mai-ah om tawntung hi." 
Exodus14:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus14:2 “Israel mite kihei kikin Migdol le tuipi kikal, Pihahiroth mai, Baalzefon nisuahna lamah giahphual a sat ding gen in. Tuipi gei, tua galkhatah giahphual na sat ding uh hi." 
Exodus14:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in Israel mite’ thu tawh kisai genin, ‘Sehnel gam sungah amaute tangciak uh hi. Sehnel gam in amaute khuhcip khin hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Exodus14:4 Keimah in Faro’ lungsim khauhsakin, amah in Israel-te hong delh ding a, Faro le a mihonpite khempeuh ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah ding hi. Kei, Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute zong tua bangmahin gamta uh hi." 
Exodus14:5 Mite tai khinzo hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah a kigen ciangin, Faro le ama nasemte’ ngaihsutna kikheel a, amaute in, “Eite’ na hong sep nading panin Israel mite i paikhiatsak, hih banga i gamtat bang hi mawk ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng kithawisakin ama galkapte la-in," 
Exodus14:7 a kitengkhia leeng zaguk le Egypt leeng khempeuh a ukte tawh kuan khawm hi. 
Exodus14:8 Topa in Egypt kumpipa Faro’ lungsim khauhsak a, Israel mite kithamuanna tawh a paikhiat lai takun a delh hi." 
Exodus14:9 Egypt mite ahi, Faro’ sakolte, leengte, ama sakol tung tuangte le a galkapte in amaute delh uh a, amaute giahphual satin tuipi gei-a a omna uh, Pihahiroth gei, Baalzefon nisuahna lam munah a pha uh hi." 
Exodus14:10 Faro hong nai ciangin Israel mite khuadak to uh hi. En in, amaute’ nungah Egypt mite hong kuan hi. Amaute lau mahmah uh hi. Topa’ tungah Israel mite kiko uh hi." 
Exodus14:11 Amaute in Moses kiangah, “Egypt-ah han a om loh manin sehnel gam sungah a si dingin kote hong paikhiatpih na hi hiam? Egypt panin paikhiatpihna tawh kote’ tungah bang hong bawl na hi hiam?" 
Exodus14:12 ‘Kote hong hici omsak inla, Egypt mite’ na hong semsak in,’ ci-in Egypt-ah nang’ tungah hong gen hi lo ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh sehnel gamah sih sangin Egypt mite’ na sep ding kote a dingin hoihzaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:13 Moses in mite tungah, “Lau kei un, kiptakin om un. Note-a’ dingin tuni-a hong sep ding Topa’ hotkhiatna mu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-a na muh uh Egypt mite, note in na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus14:14 Topa in note a dingin hong dosak ding a, note ahihleh na om hithiat ding uh hi bek hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:15 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Bang hangin kei’ tungah hong kiko na hi uh hiam? Israel mite mai nawtin a pai ding uh gen in." 
Exodus14:16 Israel mite in lei keu tungtawnin tuipi a kantan theih nadingin na ciangkhut laamto inla, tuipi tungah na khut zanin tuipi khenkham in." 
Exodus14:17 Amau’ nungah Egypt mite hong pai-in, keimah in Faro le a mihonpite khempeuh, a leengte, le a sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah nadingin keimah in Egypt mite’ lungsim ka khauhsak ding hi." 
Exodus14:18 Faro le ama leengte le ama sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah khit ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:19 Tua ciangin Israel mihonpite’ mai-ah a pai Pasian’ vantungmi kikhinin amaute’ nungah a pai hi. Amaute’ mai panin meii khuam kikhinin amaute’ nungah ding a," 
Exodus14:20 Egypt honpite le Israel honpite’ kikalah a pai hi. Tua lai-ah meii le khuamial om a, zan tawntung khatlekhat kinai kha loin zingsang khua hong vak hi." 
Exodus14:21 Tua ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan hi. Topa in zan tawntung nisuahna huihpi hat tawh tuipi mutgawpin, tuipi pen lei keu-in bawl a, tuite a kikhen hi." 
Exodus14:22 Israel mite, tuipi laizang lei keu tungah pai uh a, amau’ taklam le veilamah kawm bangin tuite om hi." 
Exodus14:23 Egypt mite ahi, Faro’ sakol khempeuh, ama leengte, le ama sakol tung tuangte in delhin tuipi laizang amaute’ nungah pai uh hi." 
Exodus14:24 Zingsang ciangin Topa in mei le meii khuam sung panin Egypt mihonpite en sukin, Egypt mihonpite phialgawp a," 
Exodus14:25 amau’ leengpeite gumsak ahih manin man bekbakin hawl uh hi. Egypt mite in, “Israel mite’ kiang panin tai ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite hong langpangin Topa in amau a dingin hong do hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:26 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt mite’ tung, amau’ leengte tung, le amau’ sakol tung tuangte’ tungah tui hong luankik theih nadingin tuipi tungah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:27 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, a zingsang khuavak ciangin a luan ngei bangin tuipi hong luangkik hi. Tua tui sung panin Egypt mite taikhiat sawm uh a, ahi zongin Topa in tuipi laizangah Egypt mite zogawp hi." 
Exodus14:28 Tui hong paikikin leengte le sakol tung tuangte le tuipi sungah amaute a delh Faro’ mihonpite khempeuh tuum a, amaute khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Exodus14:29 Ahih hangin tuipi kantanin lei keu tungah Israel mite pai uh a, amau’ taklam le veilamah kawm bangin tuite a om hi." 
Exodus14:30 Topa in tua bangin Egypt mite’ khutsung panin tua ni-in Israel-te honkhia a, tuipi gei-ah Egypt mi a site, Israel mite in mu uh hi." 
Exodus14:31 Israel mite in Egypt mite’ tungah Topa’ bawl nasepna lianpi mu uh a, mite in Topa a zahtak uh hi. Amaute in Topa le ama nasem Moses a um uh hi." 
Exodus15:1 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel mite in Topa’ tungah hih la sa uh a, “ Topa phatna la ka sa ding hi. Amah in minthangin zo khin a, amah in sakol le a tuang pa tuipi sungah a lawn hi." 
Exodus15:2 Topa, kei a hong hupa hi a, keimah hong honkhia pa ahi hi. Amah, keima Pasian hi a, amah ka phat ding hi. Ka pa’ Pasian hi a, amah ka liansak ding hi." 
Exodus15:3 Topa, galhang pa hi a, Topa, ama min ahi hi." 
Exodus15:4 “Faro’ leengte le a mihonpite tuipi sungah lawn a, a kitengkhia ama uliante San Tuipi sungah tum hi." 
Exodus15:5 Tui in amaute tuum a, suangtum bangin a thukna sungah amaute kia suk uh hi." 
Exodus15:6 “ Topa aw, na taklam khut, thahatin minthang a, Topa aw, na taklam khut in galte a thehthang hi." 
Exodus15:7 Na vangliatna tawh nangmah in na langte na lawnthal hi. Na hehna na khahkhia a, tua in amaute buhkung bangin a kangtum hi." 
Exodus15:8 Na nak ging tawh tuite kiciangto-in, tuite a lomin dingto a, tuipi sungah tui thukpi a khal hi." 
Exodus15:9 Galte in, ‘Ka delh ding a, ka pha ding hi. A nate uh ka hawm ding a, ka deih zahzahin, tuate ka tang ding hi. Ka namsau ka dok ding a, ka khut in amaute susia ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Exodus15:10 Nang in na huih tawh na mut a, tuipi in amaute tuum hi. A kihtakhuai tui sungah haknaw bangin amaute tum uh hi." 
Exodus15:11 “ Topa aw, pasian-te’ lakah kua, nang tawh kibang ahi hiam? Kua, nang tawh kibangin, sianthona-ah lianin, minthang nasepna-ah kihtakhuai-in, nalamdang sem ahi hiam?" 
Exodus15:12 Na taklam khut na zan a, leitung in amaute nawmvalh hi." 
Exodus15:13 Nangmah in na ciamsa zui-in na tatkhiatsa mite na paipih a, na hatna tawh a siangtho na omna-ah amaute lam na lak hi." 
Exodus15:14 Midangte in hih thu za khin uh a, amaute ling uh hi. Filistia-ah a teng mite lau-in lingcip uh hi." 
Exodus15:15 Tu-in Edom ukpite lungkia uh a, Moab makaite, lingcip uh hi. Kanaan-ah a teng mi khempeuh a hanna uh beita hi." 
Exodus15:16 Launa le kihtakna amaute’ tungah tung a, a thahat na vangliatna hangin amaute suangtum bangin taang loin om uh hi. Topa aw, nangma mite in a khen’ mateng, na leisa mite in a khen’ mateng amaute khikcip uh hi." 
Exodus15:17 Nang in amaute hong paipihin nangma mual tungah amaute na suan ding hi. Topa aw, na om nading munin na bawlsa munah, Topa aw, na khutte in a phuhsa na biakinn-ah na koih ding hi." 
Exodus15:18 Topa in uk tawntung ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus15:19 Faro’ sakolte ama leengte tawh, a sakol tung tuangte tuipi sungah a pai ciangin, Topa in tuipi tuite amaute tuumsakkik a, ahi zongin Israel mite tuipi laizang lei keu tungah a pai uh hi." 
Exodus15:20 Tua ahih manin Aaron’ sanggamnu Miriam in a khutah khuang khat tawi hi. Ama nungah numeite khempeuh laamin khuang tawh a zui uh hi. 
Exodus15:21 Miriam in amaute lasak hi: “ Topa la sak un. Amah in minthangin zo khin a, amah in sakol le a tung tuangte, tuipi sungah a lawn hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus15:22 Tua ciangin Moses in San Tuipi panin Israel mite paipih suak a, Shur sehnel gamah a pai uh hi. Sehnel gamah ni thum sung pai uh a, tui mu lo uh hi." 
Exodus15:23 Marah a tun uh ciangin a tui kha ahih manin Marah tui dawn thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Marah ci-in min kiphuak hi. 
Exodus15:24 Moses tungah mite phun uh a, “Bang dawn ding ihi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus15:25 Topa’ tungah amah kiko hi. Topa in singkung khat amah lak a, amah in tui sungah tua sing lawn a, tui lim hong suak pah hi. Topa in tua lai munah amaute a dingin thukham khat le ngeina kip khat bawl a, tua lai munah amah in amaute’ tungah laktel a," 
Exodus15:26 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh thu limtakin na ngaih uh a, ama mai-ah a man nate hihin, ama thupiakte don a, ama ngeina kipte khempeuh na zuih uhleh, Egypt mite’ tungah ka tunsak natnate khat beek note’ tungah kong tungsak kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa, note hong damsak pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus15:27 Tua ciangin amaute ciktui sawm le nih le nisuh kung sawmsagih a omna mun Elim tung uh a, tui gei tua munah amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Exodus16:1 Elim panin amaute ding khia uh a, Egypt leitang panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kha nihna ni sawm le nga ni-in Elim le Sinai kikal-a om Sin sehnel gamah Israel mihonte khempeuh tung uh hi." 
Exodus16:2 Sehnel gamah Moses le Aaron’ tungah Israel mihon buppi phun uh a," 
Exodus16:3 amaute tungah, “Kote, sabeel phungah tu-in ka kham takun an ka nek lai-un Egypt leitangah Topa in hong that khin hizaw taleh maw! Bang hang hiam cih leh mihon buppi a puksisak dingin note in sehnel gamah nong paikhiatpih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus16:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, note a dingin vantung panin an kong zusak ding hi. Keima thu a zuih uhleh a zuih loh uh ka theihtel nadingin mite paikhia-in nisimin ni khat khamkhop ding kaikhawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:5 A ni guk ni-in mite in ni simin a khop ngei zah nih uh khawmin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses le Aaron in Israel mite tungah, “Nitak ciangin, Egypt gam panin note hong pai khiatpih pa pen Topa ahihna na thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:7 Topa’ tungah na phunna uh amah in za khin ahih manin zingsang ciangin Topa’ vangliatna na mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote’ tungah na phun uh, kote a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:8 Moses in, “Ama tungah na phunnate uh Topa in a zakna hangin, Topa in note’ tungah nitak an nek ding sa, zingsangin na kham tak uha na nek ding uh an hong piak ciangin - kote pen a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam? Note’ phunnate pen kote’ tung hi loin Topa’ tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:9 Moses in Aaron’ kiangah, “Israel mihon buppi tungah, ‘Amah in note’ phunnate za khin ahih manin Topa’ mai a nai-ah hong pai un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:10 Israel mihon buppi tungah Aaron in thu a gen laitakin, amaute in sehnel gam lam en uh a, tua laitakin meii sungah Topa’ vangliatna hong kilang hi." 
Exodus16:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus16:12 “Israel mite’ phunnate ka za khin hi. Amaute kiangah, ‘Khuamui ciangin note in sa na ne ding uh a, zingsang ciangin an na kham ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:13 Nitak ciangin vamimte hong leengin giahphual hong tuam hi. Zingsang ciangin giahphual kiimah daitui kia hi. 
Exodus16:14 Daitui a kap ciangin gamlak lei maitang tungah a pum ciltel, a khal, vukkhal bangin a pak dikdek leitungah om hi." 
Exodus16:15 Israel mite in a muh uh ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “Bang ahi hiam?” kici uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tua pen bang hiam cih thei lo uh hi. Moses in amaute’ kiangah, “ Topa in nek dinga note’ tungah hong piak an ahi hi." 
Exodus16:16 Topa’ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Note in na milipun na khamzah ding uh khawm un. Na puanbuk sung uhah mi omzah tawh kituakin mi khat lawhta khat ciat na la ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:17 Tua mah bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Amaute in kaikhawm uh a, pawlkhat in tam, pawlkhat in tawm, kaikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:18 Ahih hangin amaute in lawhta khat tawh a teh uh ciangin a tam a kaikhawmte-a’ dimval lo a, a tawm a kaikhawmte-a’ dimlah tuan lo hi. A milipin a khamzah ding khawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:19 Moses in amaute’ kiangah, “Kuamah in zingsang dong koih kei un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:20 Ahih hangin amaute in Moses’ thu ngai lo uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in zingsang dong koih uh a, than omin ning hi. Amaute tungah Moses heh hi." 
Exodus16:21 Zingsang simin amaute in a khamzah ding ciat uh khawm uh hi. Ahi zongin ni a sat ciangin leilak a omte tuisuak hi. 
Exodus16:22 A ni guk ni-in amaute in an a zah nih, lawhta nih ciat, khawm uh hi. Mihon makaite khempeuh hong pai-in Moses kiangah a gen uh ciangin" 
Exodus16:23 amah in amaute kiangah, “ Topa’ hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Zing ciang pen a thupi-a tawlngak ni, Topa a dingin sabbath siangtho ni ahi hi. Na em dingte uh emin, na huan dingte uh huan unla, a omlai teng zingsang ciang dong koih un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:24 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Moses’ sawl bangin zingsang dong koih uh hi. Ning lo a, than zong tu lo hi." 
Exodus16:25 Moses in, “Tuni-in ne un; tuni pen Topa a dingin Sabbath ahi hi. Tuni-in a pualamah na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:26 Note in ni guk sung na khawm ding uh a, ahi zongin sabbath ni ahi a ni sagih ni-in bangmah om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:27 A ni sagih ni-in a kaikhawm dingin mi pawlkhat kuankhia uh a, ahi zongin amaute in bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Exodus16:28 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Ka thupiakte le ka thute zuih ding bang tanvei nial ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Exodus16:29 Thei un! Topa in note’ tungah sabbath hong piazo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ni guk ni-in amah in note tungah ni nih khom ding an hong pia hi. Note na milipun nomau’ omna ciatah om un. A ni sagih ni-in ama omna panin kuamah paikhia kei hen,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:30 Tua ahih ciangin a ni sagih ni-in mite tawlnga uh hi. 
Exodus16:31 Tu-in Israel mite in a min manna ci uh hi. Tua pen nannan tang tawh kibangin a mel kang a, a limna pen khuaizu tawh a kibawl mohpheng tawh kibang hi." 
Exodus16:32 Moses in, “ Topa’ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Egypt leitang panin note kong paikhiatpih lai-in sehnel gamah note kong vakna an na suanlekhakte un a muh theih nadingun na khang tawntungun lawhta dim khat kem un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:33 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Beel khat la inla, tua sungah manna lawhta dim khat koih inla, na khang tawntungun a kikem dingin Topa’ mai-ah koih in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:34 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Aaron in kep dingin Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a koih hi. 
Exodus16:35 Amaute a ten theih nading uh leitang a tun mateng, kum sawmli sung Israel mite in manna ne uh a, Kanaan gamgi a tun matengun manna bek a ne uh ahi hi." 
Exodus16:36 (Lawhta khat pen seu khat seh sawm suah seh khat ahi hi.) 
Exodus17:1 Topa’ thupiak bangin Israel mihon khempeuh Sin sehnel gam panin giahphual a ban banin sat uh a, Refidim-ah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin mite’ dawn ding tui om lo hi." 
Exodus17:2 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Moses’ tungah mawhna zong uh a, “Tui dawn ding hong pia in,” ci uh hi. Moses in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kei’ tungah mawhna hong zong na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin Topa ze-et na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:3 Ahi zongin tua munah tui duhin mite dangtak uh a, Moses’ tungah mite phunin, “Kote le ka tate uh le ka ganhingte uh dangtakin a si dingin bang hangin Egypt panin hong paipih to na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus17:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ tungah Moses kiko a, “Hih mite bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Suang tawh kei hong deng dingin amaute kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:5 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel upate pawlkhat samin mite’ mai-ah pai in. Nail na satna ciangkhut na khutin tawi-in pai in." 
Exodus17:6 En in, Horeb-a suangpi-ah nangma mai-ah ka ding ding hi. Nang in suangpi na sat ding a, mite in tui a dawn theih nadingin tua suang sung panin tui hong phulkhia ding hi,” a ci hi. Israel upate’ muhna-ah tua bangmahin Moses gamta hi." 
Exodus17:7 Israel mite’ mawhzonna le amaute in Topa ze-etin, “Eite’ lakah Topa a om mah ahi hiam?” a cihna hangun, tua mun pen Massah le Meribah, ci-in min kiphuak hi." 
Exodus17:8 Tua ciangin Amalek mite hong pai-in Israel mite tawh Refidim-ah kido uh hi. 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua kiangah, “Eite a dingin mi teel inla, pai-in Amalek mite tawh kido in. Zing ciangin, Pasian in ka tawi dingin a hong sawl ciangkhut tawi-in mual dawnah ka ding ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua kiangah, “Eite a dingin mi teel inla, pai-in Amalek mite tawh kido in. Zing ciangin, Pasian in ka tawi dingin a hong sawl ciangkhut tawi-in mual dawnah ka ding ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:10 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua gamta a, Amalek mite tawh kido uh hi. Moses, Aaron, le Hur-te mual dawnah paito uh hi." 
Exodus17:10 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua gamta a, Amalek mite tawh kido uh hi. Moses, Aaron, le Hur-te mual dawnah paito uh hi." 
Exodus17:11 Moses in a khut a sansak lai teng Israel mite in neh a, a khut a niamsak ciangin Amalek mite in neh hi." 
Exodus17:12 Ahih hangin Moses a khut kham hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in suangtum khat la-in ama nuai-ah koih uh a, tua suang tungah amah tu a, Aaron le Hur in a pang khat tuak panin ama khutte len uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin nitum mateng ama khutte kip hi." 
Exodus17:13 Joshua in Amalek le ama mite namsau tawh vatmai hi. 
Exodus17:13 Joshua in Amalek le ama mite namsau tawh vatmai hi. 
Exodus17:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite ka phiat siangtho nading thu phawk nadingin hih thu laibu sung khatah gelh inla, Joshua kiangah hih thu gen kik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite ka phiat siangtho nading thu phawk nadingin hih thu laibu sung khatah gelh inla, Joshua kiangah hih thu gen kik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:15 Moses in biakna tau khat lamin a min dingin, “ Topa, keima zawhna lim ahi hi,” ci-in phuak a," 
Exodus17:16 “ Topa’ dial sang tawi un! Topa in a khang khangin Amalek mite do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:1 Moses’ sungpa, Midian siampi Jethro in Moses le ama mi Israel-te a dingin Pasian’ sepna, Topa in Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiatpihna thu khempeuh a za hi." 
Exodus18:2 Tu-in Moses’ sungpa Jethro in, Moses a sawl khit a kipanin Moses’ zi Zipporah le ama tapa nihte kem a, a khat min Gershom ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” ci hi.)" 
Exodus18:3  
Exodus18:4 Adang khat min Eliezer ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka pa’ Pasian pen keimah hong huhpa hi a, Faro’ thah nading panin kei hong honkhia hi,” ci hi.)" 
Exodus18:5 Pasian’ mual tungah giahphual a satna sehnel gam Moses kiangah Jethro in Moses’ tapate le a zi hong puak hi. 
Exodus18:6 Mi khat in Moses kiangah, “En in, na zi le a tapa nihte tawh nang kiangah na sungpa Jethro hong pai hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Exodus18:7 Moses zong a sungpa a dawn dingin paikhia a, zahtakna pia-in amah a nam hi. Amaute khatlekhat omzia kidong tuak uh a, puanbuk sungah a pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:8 Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa kiangah Topa in Israel mite’ hangin Faro’ tung le Egypt mite’ tungah a bawlte khempeuh, lampi-ah amau’ tungah a tung haksatna khempeuh le Topa in amaute a hotkhiatna thu a gen hi." 
Exodus18:9 Egypt mite’ khutsung panin amah in amaute a khahkhiatna, Israel mite tungah Topa in a hoih a bawlte khempeuh hangin Jethro lungdam hi." 
Exodus18:10 Jethro in, “Egypt mite le Faro’ khutsung panin note hong khahkhia Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Exodus18:11 Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a liatzawkna tu-in ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite tungah kiphatsakna tawh Egypt mite a gamtat lai takin amah in Egypt mite’ khutnuai panin mite khahkhia hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:12 Moses’ sungpa Jethro in Pasian’ tungah meihal biakna le biakpiakna a bawl hi. Pasian’ mai-ah Moses’ sungpa tawh an a ne khawm dingin Israel upate khempeuh le Aaron hong pai uh hi. 
Exodus18:13 A zing ciangin mite’ thu a khen dingin Moses tu a, zingsang a kipan nitak dongin Moses’ kiimah mite a ding uh hi." 
Exodus18:14 Mite a dingin ama hihte khempeuh Moses’ sungpa in a muh ciangin amah in, “Mite a’ dinga nang’ sep hih pen a bangci ahi hiam? Bang hangin nang bek tu a, zingsang a kipan nitak dongin na kiimah mite khempeuh ding ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:15 Moses in a sungpa kiangah, “Pasian’ thu a kan dingin kei’ kiangah mite hong pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:16 Amaute in thu a neih uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai uh a, mi khat le a vengpa’ kikalah thu ka khen a, Pasian’ ngeina kipte le ama thukhennate amaute ka theisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:17 Tua ciangin Moses’ sungpa Jethro in ama kiangah, “Nangma hihzia hoih lo hi." 
Exodus18:18 Nang le na kianga om mite in na zawngkhal lawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nasep nang a dingin gik lua hi. Nang bek in na sem khinzo kei hi. 
Exodus18:19 Tu-in ka thu hong ngai in; thu kong lak ding hi. Pasian in nang hong ompih tahen. Nang pen Pasian’ mai-ah mite’ tangin pai-in, amau’ thute Pasian’ kiangah na gen ding hi." 
Exodus18:20 Nangmah in ngeina kipte le thukhennate amaute na hilh ding a, amau’ lam pai nading le amau’ sep dingte amaute na theisak ding hi." 
Exodus18:21 Tua tham loin, mi khempeuh lak panin Pasian a zahtak mi, a muanhuai mi le sumgolh a mudah mi, mi siamte na teelkhia ding hi. Tua bang mite pen a tul, a za, a sawmnga, a sawmte tungah a uk dingin na koih ding hi." 
Exodus18:22 Mite’ thu amaute khensak tawntung in. Amaute in thu liante bek nang kiangah hong puak ding uh a, ahi zongin thu neute amau mah in khen tawm ding uh hi. Tua hileh nang a dingin baih zaw ding a, amaute in na vangik hong puakpih ding uh hi." 
Exodus18:23 Hih bangin hih lecin Pasian in thahatna hong pia ding a, nangmah in na sem paisuakzo ding hi. Tua tham loin hih mite khempeuh zong amau’ omna-ah lungnuam takin ciah thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a sungpa’ thu ngai-in ama gen khempeuh a hih hi. 
Exodus18:25 Israel mi khempeuh sung panin Moses in mipil mi siamte teel a, mite a tul, a za, a sawmnga, a sawmte tungah a ukin mite’ lutangin amaute a bawl hi." 
Exodus18:26 Amaute in mite tungah a tawntungin thu khen uh hi. Amaute in thu haksate bek Moses tungah puak uh a, ahi zongin thuneute amaute in khen tawm uh hi." 
Exodus18:27 Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa ciahkhiasak a, Jethro zong ama gamah a ciahkik hi." 
Exodus19:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kha thumna a ni masa ni-in amaute Sinai sehnel gam tung uh hi. 
Exodus19:2 Refidim panin amaute ding khia-in Sinai gam a tun uh ciangin, amaute in sehnel gam tua mual mai-ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Exodus19:3 Pasian kiangah Moses paito hi. Topa in mual panin amah sam a, “Jakob’ suanlekhak Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi:" 
Exodus19:4 Egypt mite tungah ka bawlna le muvanlai in a kha tawh a note a puak bangin note hong pua-in keima kiangah kong paipihna na mu khin uh hi. 
Exodus19:5 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in ka thu mangin ka thuciamna na zuih uhleh mite khempeuh lak panin note pen keima mi na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuh keima a’ hi a," 
Exodus19:6 note pen keima siampi nasep a sem minam, le minam siangtho na hi ding uh hi. Israel mite tungah hih thute na gen ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:7 Tua ahih ciangin Moses hong pai-in upate sam a, Topa in amah a thupiak hih thute khempeuh amaute’ mai-ah a sung hi." 
Exodus19:8 Mi khempeuh in, “ Topa’ gensa khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” ci-in dawng khawm uh hi. Moses in mite’ thugente Topa’ tungah a gen hi." 
Exodus19:9 Topa in Moses tungah, “En in, nang kong hopih ciangin mite in a zak theih nading le nang zong hong up theih nadingun meii sahpi sungah nang kiangah kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses in mite’ thugente Topa’ tungah a gen hi." 
Exodus19:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite kiangah pai inla, tuni le zingciang sungteng amaute siangthosakin, amau’ puante amau mah sawpsakin," 
Exodus19:11 a ni thum ni-in a baihsa-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni thum ni-in Sinai Mual tungah mite khempeuh’ muhna-ah Topa hong paisuk ding hi. 
Exodus19:12 Nangmah in mite a dingin dalna khat a kimkotah na koih ding a, ‘Mualtungah pai loin, a gamgi na lawnkhak loh nadingun kidawm un; mual a lawng peuhpeuh kithat ding hi." 
Exodus19:13 Khut peuhmah in tua mi kithat ding pa lawngkha lo ding a, suang tawh kidenglum ahih kei leh kikaplum ding hi. Ganhing hitaleh mihing hitaleh kihing khawi lo ding hi,’ na ci ding hi. Peengkul sauveipi hong kitum ciangin amaute mualtungah hong paito ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:14 Tua ahih ciangin mualtung panin mite kiangah Moses paisuk a, mite siangthosak hi. Amaute in a puante uh sawp uh hi." 
Exodus19:15 Amah in mite kiangah, “Ni thum ni ciangin a baihsa-in om un; numei tawh lumkhawm kei un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:16 A ni thum ni zingsang ciangin van gingin khua phia a, mualtungah meii sahpi kai a, nakpitakin a ging peengkul kitum ahih manin giahphual a om mi khempeuh ling uh hi." 
Exodus19:17 Tua ciangin Moses in giahphual panin Pasian a dawn dingin mite paikhiatpih a, amaute a om nading mual bulah om uh hi." 
Exodus19:18 Meikhu in Sinai Mual tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei sung tua mualtungah Topa a kumsuk hi. A khu, meiphualpi khu bangin kahto a, a mual buppi nakpitakin kiling hi." 
Exodus19:19 Peengkul aw a nak gin’ semsem laitakin Moses pau a, Pasian in vanging sungah amah dawng hi." 
Exodus19:20 Sinai Mual dawnah Topa hong paisuk hi. Topa in tua mual dawnah Moses sam a, Moses zong paito hi." 
Exodus19:21 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute in Topa a en dingin hong kantanin amaute tampi tak si kha ding uh ahih manin paisuk inla, mite hilhkhol in." 
Exodus19:22 Amaute’ tungah Topa hehlua kha ding ahih manin, Topa’ kiangah hong pai siampite zong amau mah kisiangthosak tawm hen,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:23 Moses in Topa’ tungah, “Sinai Mual dongah mite hong pai thei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmahmah in kote nong thuhilh a, ‘Mual kimkotah dalnate bawl inla, siangthosak in,’ nong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:24 Topa in ama kiangah, “Paisuk inla, Aaron hong paipihto in. Ahih hangin amaute’ tungah amah hehlua kha ding ahih manin Topa kiang dongah a pai dingin siampite le mite paisuaksak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:25 Tua ahih ciangin mite kiangah Moses paisukin amaute kiangah a gen hi. 
Exodus20:1 Pasian in hih thute khempeuh gen a," 
Exodus20:2 “Kei pen salsuahna Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Exodus20:3 “Keimah longal pasian dang na bia kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:4 “A kiseek milim hitaleh, tunga vantung hitaleh, nuai-a leisung hitaleh, leinuai-a om tui sungah hitaleh a om na khat peuhpeuh a sun khat peuhpeuh note a dingin na bawl kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus20:5 Tuate’ mai-ah na kun kei ding uh a, tuate na bia kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah note’ Topa Pasian, a aam Pasian ka hi a, kei hong mudahte’ tungah pate’ mawhna tate’ tungah khang thum khang lina dongin thuk-in," 
Exodus20:6 ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite tungah itna kip a lak pa ka hi hi. 
Exodus20:7 “ Topa note’ Pasian’ min a sia lamin na zang kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama min a zang khialte gim pia ding hi. 
Exodus20:8 “Sabbath ni a siangtho-a zat ding phawk un. 
Exodus20:9 Ni guk sung nomau’ na semin na nasep ding khempeuh uh na hih ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:10 Ahi zongin a ni sagih ni pen Topa note’ Pasian’ Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-in note, na tapate, na tanute, na nasempate, na nasemnute, na ganhing uh ahi a, peemtate in ahi zongin na bangmah na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus20:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni guk sung tengin Topa in van le lei, tuipi le tuate sunga om khempeuh bawl a, a ni sagih ni tawlnga hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Sabbath ni thupha pia-in siangthosak hi." 
Exodus20:12 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang tungah na khan uh a sau theih nadingin na nu le na pa uh zahtak un. 
Exodus20:13 “Mi na that kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:14 “Nulepa mawhna na bawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:15 “Na na gu kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:16 “Na vengte uh langkhatah a man loin teci na pang kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:17 “Na vengte uh inn na deihgawh kei ding uh hi. Na vengte uh zi hitaleh, ama nasempa hitaleh, ama nasemnu hitaleh, ama bawngtal hitaleh, ama la hitaleh, na vengte a’ ahi na khat peuhpeuh na deihgawh kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus20:18 Tu-in mite khempeuh in vangingte, peengkul aw, le mual meikhu thu a theihtel uh ciangin, lau-in a ling uh hi. Amaute a gamla-ah ding uh a," 
Exodus20:19 Moses kiangah, “Nangmah in kote kiangah thu hong gen in; kote in ka ngai ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kote si kha ding ka hih uh ciangin ko tungah Pasian hong gensak kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus20:20 Moses in mite kiangah, “Lau kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh note khialkha loin amah na kihtak theih nadingun note’ tungah a laktel dingin Pasian hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus20:21 Pasian’ omna meii sah nai-ah Moses a pai laitakin mite a gamla-ah a ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:22 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nangmah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: ‘Vantung panin note kong hopihna note mahmah in na thei khin uh hi." 
Exodus20:23 Note in kei tawh nong biakkhop dingun ngun pasian-te le kham pasian-te na bawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:24 Note in keima a dingin lei tawh biakna tau khat bawl unla, tua tungah na meihal biaknate uh le thunuama na biaknate uh, na tuute uh le na bawngtalte uh pia un. Keima min a kiphawk nading munin ka bawlna peuhmahah note kiangah keimah hong pai-in note thupha kong pia ding hi." 
Exodus20:25 Note in keima a dingin suang tawh biakna tau na bawl uhleh, a kiseek suang tawh na bawl kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nazatte uh tawh na va suk uhleh a ninsak na hi uh hi." 
Exodus20:26 Tua tungah na seelsim uh a kidawk khak loh nadingin ka biakna tau tung kahtoh nading kahlei a kulin na sang bawl kei ding uh hi,’ ci in." 
Exodus21:1 “Tu-in hihte pen amaute’ tungah na piak ding biakna ngeina kipte ahi hi. 
Exodus21:2 Hebru mi sila khat na lei uh ciangin, amah in kum guk sung na hong sepsak ding a, a kum sagihna ciangin bangmah hong pia loin a suakta-in paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:3 Amah guakin hong pai ahihleh amah guak mahin paikhia ding a, zi neisa-in hong pai ahihleh amah tawh a zi zong paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:4 A topa in amah zi guan a, tua nu in amah tawh tapate ahi a, tanute ahi zongin a neih leh, a zi le a tate pen a topa a’ hi ding a, amah guakin paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:5 Ahih hangin sila in a kitel takin genin, ‘Ka topa, ka zi, le ka tate ka it hi; a suakta-in ka paikhia kei ding hi,’ a cih leh," 
Exodus21:6 tua ciangin a topa in thukhente kiangah amah paipih ding hi. Amah in kongkhakah ahi a, kongkhak khuam-ah ahi zongin amah paipih ding hi. A topa in phimpi khat tawh ama bil vuhsak ding a, amah in a nuntak tawntung ama na sepsak ding hi." 
Exodus21:7 “Mi khat in a tanu sila-in a zuak ciangin, tua nu pen sila pasalte bangin paikhia lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:8 A topa in ama zi dingin a sehsa tua numei in amah a lungkimsak kei leh, amah in tua nu a pa kiang mahah zuakkik ding hi. Amah, tua nu tungah citakin gamta lo ahih manin, gamdang mi khat tungah tua nu a zuak theih nading thu nei lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:9 Mi khat in a tapa a dingin sila numei a lei leh, amah in tanu bangin tua nu bawl ding hi." 
Exodus21:10 Amah in zi dang khat a lakthuah leh, a zi masa’ annek, a puansilh, ahih kei leh lupkhop nading thuneihna khiam lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:11 Amah in hih thu thumte tuanu a dingin a bawl kei leh, sum hong piak kul lo, bangmah a kul loin tua nu paikhia thei ding hi." 
Exodus21:12 “Mi khat satin a sisak mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:13 Ahih hangin amah in a thah sawm hi lo a, a thah khak ahihleh, amah a tai theih nadingin note a’ ding mun khat ka seh ding hi." 
Exodus21:14 Ahih hangin mi khat in midang khat thah ding tumin a thah leh, amah na thah theih nadingun note in ka biakna tau a belhna nangawn panin amah na la teitei ding uh hi." 
Exodus21:15 “Ama pa hitaleh ama nu hitaleh a sat peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:16 “Zuak ding ahi a, sila-in neih ding ahi zongin mi a gu mi peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus21:17 “Ama pa hitaleh ama nu hitaleh a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:18 “Mite kitawng a, a khat in adang khat suangtum khat tawh ahi a, ama khuttum tawh ahi zongin tumin, mipa a sih loh hangin lupna ngakin," 
Exodus21:19 tua ciangin mipa thozo-in ama ciangkhut tawh a vakkhiatkik zawh nakleh, amah a tum pa siang ding hi. Amah in ama hun bei sungteng tang ding bek ama tungah loh ding a, amah damsiangsak ding hi." 
Exodus21:20 “Mi khat in molhtum khat tawh ama sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh satin a phualah a sih pah leh, amah gim kipia ding hi." 
Exodus21:21 Ahih hangin ni khat ahi a, ni nih ahi zongin sila a nuntak leh, amah gim piak ding hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sila pen ama neihsa ahih manin sila a sih ciangin amah a sumh khin ahi hi." 
Exodus21:22 “Mite kitawngin numei naupaii khat liamsak a, tatolhin; ahi zongin siatna in a zuihbeh kei nakleh, tua nu’ pasal in ama tunga a cihzah tawh kituakin tua numei a liamsak mi kigam ding a, thukhente’ khenna bangin amah liau ding hi." 
Exodus21:23 Siatna khatpeuh in a zuihbeh leh, tua ciangin nuntakna tang ding nuntakna," 
Exodus21:24 mit tang ding mit, ha tang ding ha, khut tang ding khut, khe tang ding khe," 
Exodus21:25 meikang tang ding meikang, liamna tang ding liamna, siatna tang ding siatna pia ding hi." 
Exodus21:26 “Mi khat in ama sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a mit satin a suksiatkhak leh amah in tua mit’ hangin sila suaktasakin paikhiasak ding hi. 
Exodus21:27 Amah in a sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a ha a tupkhiat leh, amah in tua ha’ hangin sila suaktasakin paikhiasak ding hi." 
Exodus21:28 “Bawngtal khat in pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a ki tawh a piklup ciangin, a bawngtal kidenglum ding a, a sa kine lo ding hi. Ahih hangin bawngtal nei pa siang ding hi." 
Exodus21:29 Ahih hangin a hun beisa-ah bawngtal in mi si thei a, a nei pa kihilh napi-in a khumcip kei a, tua bawngtal in pasal ahi a, numei ahi zongin a thah leh, bawngtal kidenglum ding a, a nei pa zong kithat ding hi." 
Exodus21:30 Ama tung pan tatkhiatna sum a kinget leh, ama nuntakna tatkhiat nadingin ama tungah a kingen zahzah amah in pia ding hi." 
Exodus21:31 Tua bawngtal in mi’ tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin a ki tawh a pik leh hih ngeina tawh kizui-in kigamta ding hi." 
Exodus21:32 Bawngtal in sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh khat peuhpeuh a ki tawh a pik leh, a nei pa in amau’ topa’ tungah ngun shekel sawmthum pia ding a, bawngtal kidenglum ding hi." 
Exodus21:33 “Mi khat in dum honsa-in a nusia ahi a, mi khat in dum a tawh ciangin siin loin om ahi zongin, bawngtal hitaleh la hitaleh dum sungah a kiat leh," 
Exodus21:34 dum nei pa in loh ding hi. Amah in a nei pa tungah sum pia ding a, ganhing luang pen ama a’ hi pah ding hi." 
Exodus21:35 “Mi khat’ bawngtal in adang khat’ bawngtal liamsakin a sih leh, amaute in a hing pen zuak ding uh a, tua man hawm ding uh hi. A ganhing si pen zong amaute in hawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus21:36 Tua bang hi lo a, bawngtal in mi si ngei hi, ci-in kithei napi a nei pa in a khumcip kei leh, amah in bawngtal tang ding bawngtal pia ding a, a si ganhing pen amah in tang ding hi." 
Exodus22:1 “Mi khat in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin gu a, a that a, a zuak zongin, amah in bawngtal khat tang dingin bawngtal nga, tuu khat tang dingin tuu li pia ding hi. Amah in ditkikna bawl ding hi. Amah in bangmah a neih kei leh, ama guktakna hangin amah kizuak ding hi. A kigu ganhing, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi zongin a hingin ama khut sungah a kimuh leh, amah in a zah nih pia ding hi. “Guta khat in inn vutlet a, kisatin amah a sih leh, tua sihna hangin mawhna om lo ding hi. Ahih hangin nisuah khit ahihleh tua sihna hangin mawhna om ding hi." 
Exodus22:2  
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Mi khat in lo khatah ahi a, leenggui lo-ah ahi zongin gan tasak a, a ganhing khahin midang khat’ lo-ah a tat leh, amah in ama lo le ama leenggah lo panin a piangte tawh loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:6 “Mei kuangin gam kang a, a kikhol an ahi a, a ding lai an ahi a, lo ahi zongin a kat leh, mei a kangsak pa in a cing takin loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:7 “Mi khat in a vengte kiangah sum ahi a, van ahi zongin kep ding ap a, tua mipa’ inn panin a kiguk leh, a gu pa a kimuh leh amah in a zah nih pia ding hi." 
Exodus22:8 A gu pa a kimuh kei leh a vengpa’ vante amah in gu hiam, gu lo hiam cih a kitel nadingin thukhente kiangah inn nei pa in kiciamna bawl ding hi." 
Exodus22:9 “Thu neihna khat peuhpeuh, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi a, puansilh ahi zongin, a mang na khat peuhpeuh, mi khat in, ‘Hih pen kei a’ hi,’ a cihna thu-ah, alang nihte’ thu pen thukhente’ mai-ah tung ding hi. Thukhente in a mawhsak mipa in a vengpa tungah a zah nih pia ding hi." 
Exodus22:10 “Mi khat in ama vengte tungah la ahi a, bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin, ganhing khat peuhpeuh kep dingin a piak a, kuama muh lohin tua ganhing a si a, a liam a, a kihawlkhia ahi zongin ahihleh," 
Exodus22:11 amah in a veng pa’ neihsa a gu kha hiam cih a kitheih nadingin amau tegel’ kikalah Topa tawh kiciamna om ding hi. A nei pa in tua kiciamna sang ding a, amah in loh lo ding hi." 
Exodus22:12 Ahih hangin ama tung panin a kigu ahihleh, a nei pa tungah amah in loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:13 Gamsa in a balzan ahihleh, lahtel nadingin tua ganhing paipihsak in. A kibalzan ganhing amah in loh lo ding hi." 
Exodus22:14 “Mi khat in a vengte’ gan khat peuhpeuh kawm a, a nei pa om loin a liam a, a si zongin, amah in a kicingin loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:15 A nei pa tawh a omkhawm ahihleh amah in loh lo ding hi. A kikawm ahihleh a kikawm bangin pai ding hi. 
Exodus22:16 “Mi khat in a kidong nai lo nungak khat zolin amah tawh a lupkhop leh, amah in tua nu’ man ding moman letsong pia ding a, ama zi suak ding hi." 
Exodus22:17 A numei’ pa in ama tungah tua nu a piak nop kei leh zong, tua mipa in nungak moman letsong zah numei’ pa’ tungah sum pia veve ding hi." 
Exodus22:18 “Numei aisan nu na hingkhawi kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus22:19 “Ganhing tawh a mawh peuhmah kithat ding hi.
