Exodus22:20 “ Topa bek simloh pasian dang khat peuhpeuh tungah biakna a pia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus22:21 “Khualmi khatpeuh na bawlsia kei ding uh a, na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt leitangah khual mite na hi ngei uh hi." 
Exodus22:22 Meigong numei ahi a, tagah ahi zongin na gimsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:23 Note in amaute na gimsak uh a, amaute keima tungah hong kiko leh, keimah in amau’ kikona ka za taktak ding hi." 
Exodus22:24 Ka hehna so-in namsau tawh note kong that ding a, na zite uh meigong suakin, na tate uh tagah suak ding hi." 
Exodus22:25 “Note tawh a om, a zawng keima mite khat peuhpeuh tungah sum leitawi na piak uhleh, ama tungah sum leitawi a piapa bangin na om kei ding uh a, ama tung panin a meet na dok kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:26 Khapna ahi na vengpa’ puan silh lai na lak ngei khak leh nitum ma-in ama tungah na pia kik ding hi. 
Exodus22:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama silh ding tua bek hi a, tua pen ama pumpi a dingin a puan neihsun ahi hi. Amah bang dang tawh lum ding ahi hiam? Amah kei tungah hong kiko leh ke’n ka za ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in hehpihna ka nei hi." 
Exodus22:28 “Thukhente na simmawh kei ding uh a, na mite uh a ukpa zong na samsia kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:29 “Na anlakna pan uh le sathau le leenggah na suknate uh panin a leetkhiate piak khiat ding na zekai kei ding uh hi. “Na tapa cilte uh keima tungah nong pia ding uh hi. 
Exodus22:30 Na bawngtalte uh le na tuute uh panin zong tua bangmahin nong pia ding uh hi. Ni sagih sung a pi tawh om ding a, a ni giat ni-in kei tungah nong pia ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:31 “Note pen kei’ tungah hong ki-ap mite na hi ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin gamlakah gamsate in a balzan sa peuhmah note in na ne kei ding uh a, tua bang sate uite na lot ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:1 “Thuman lo na genkhia kei ding uh hi. Elna tawh teci pang dingin migilo pa tawh na kipawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:2 Siatna a bawl dingin mihon na zui kei ding uh hi. Thutang a hei khia dingin mihonpi nung zui-in thu neihna-ah teci na pang kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:3 Ama thu neihna-ah mizawng pa na langneih kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:4 “Na langneih mite’ bawngtal ahi a, a la ahi zongin a gammang na tuah uhleh ama kiangah na hawlkik ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:5 Nangmah a hong mudah pa’ la a van tawh a puk na muh leh a la tawh amah na nusia kei ding a, tua la phot toh ding na huh ding hi." 
Exodus23:6 “Ama thu neihna-ah mizawng pa a thutang kimlai na lelsak kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:7 A man lopi a mi mawhsak ding panin kikem unla, a dikpa le thuman pa that kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gilo mi ka khah kei ding hi." 
Exodus23:8 Sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumgolh in uliante’ mit tawsak a, thuman mite’ thu heikhiatsak hi." 
Exodus23:9 “Khualmi na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Khualmi’ lungsim na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi. 
Exodus23:10 “Note in na leitang uhah kum guk sung khai tuhin a piangte na kaikhawm ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:11 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ciangin, nomau’ mi a zawngte in a nek theih nadingin leitang tawlngasakin, lokhulin na omsak ding uh a, gamlak ganhingte in mizawngte’ nek loh teng ne thei ding uh hi. Na leenggui lote uh le na oliv lote uh zong tua bangmahin na hih ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:12 “Ni guk sung na nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na bawngtal le na la in tawlngakna a neih theih nading le, na nasem numei’ tapa le khual mite in thathak a ngah theih nadingin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:13 Note’ tunga kong gente khempeuh thudon un; pasian dangte’ min genin nei kei unla, na kam sung panun zong tua bangte kizasak kei un." 
Exodus23:14 “Kum khatin thumvei, keima a dingin pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:15 Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Keimah in note kong thupiak bangin Abib kha sung a kisehsa hun ciangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi. Khut hawmguak tawh keima mai-ah kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi. 
Exodus23:16 “Note in lo-a na tuh uh, na nasepna uh a gah masa, anlak pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Note in lo panin na nasepna uh a gah na kaihkhop uh kum bei ciangin an kaihkhopna pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:17 Topa Pasian ’ mai-ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thumvei kilaak ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:18 “Note in silngo sawh anlum tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, a ganhing thau zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:19 “Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh inn-ah na paipih ding uh hi. “Note in a pi’ nawizu tawh keelno na huan kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:20 “En un, keimah in ka bawlsa munah note hong paipih ding le lamkalah note hong cing dingin note’ mai-ah vantungmi khat ka sawl hi." 
Exodus23:21 Amah thudonin ama aw ngai unla, amah lehdo kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in note’ thu palsatna hong maisak lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima min tawh nasem ahi hi." 
Exodus23:22 “Ahih hangin note in ama aw limtakin ngai-in keima gen bangin na gamtat uhleh na galte uh’ tungah gal ka hi ding a, na langte uh’ tungah lang ka hi ding hi." 
Exodus23:23 “Note’ mai-ah ka vantungmi pai-in Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite kiangah note hong paipihin, keimah in amaute ka phiat khiat ciangin," 
Exodus23:24 amau’ pasian-te’ mai-ah note kun loin, tuate bia loin, amau’ gamtat bangin na gamta kei ding uh a, note in amaute lawnthal mang kiuhkeuhin amau’ milim suang khuampite na satnen gawp ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:25 Note in Topa na Pasian uh nong bia ding uh a, keimah in na an uh le na tui uh thupha ka pia ding hi. Keimah in note’ lak panin cinatna ka la khia ding hi." 
Exodus23:26 Note’ leitangah kuamah nausia om lo ding a, a ciing zong om lo ding hi. Note kong teeksihsak ding hi." 
Exodus23:27 “Keimah hong kikihtakna note’ mai-ah paisakin note’ phutkhak ding mi khempeuh ka kitokgawpsak ding a, na galte khempeuh uh lehhei-in note’ kiang panin ka taisak ding hi." 
Exodus23:28 Note’ mai panin Hiv mite, Kanaan mite, le Hit mite a hawlkhia dingin note’ mai-ah tunpi ka sawlkhia ding hi." 
Exodus23:29 Leitung gamkhing suakin gamlak ganhingte note’ langkhatah tampi pha kha ding ahih manin note’ mai panin kum khat sungin amaute ka hawlkhia kei ding hi. 
Exodus23:30 Note khangin tampi pha-in leitang na luah matengun note’ mai panin tawm tawmin amaute ka hawlkhia ding hi. 
Exodus23:31 Keimah in San Tuipi panin Filistia mite’ tuipi ciang le sehnel gam panin Eufratis gun ciang dongah na gamgite uh ka phut ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua gam a teng mite note’ khut sungah kong pia ding a, note in na mai uh panin amaute na hawlkhia ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:32 Amaute ahi a, amau’ pasian-te tawh ahi zongin thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:33 Amaute in kei’ tungah note hong khialsak kha ding ahih ciangin note’ leitang tungah amaute teng lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in amau’ pasian-te na biak uhleh note’ tungah thangzak khat hong hi taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nang le Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel upate sung pan sawmsagih tawh keima kiangah hong paito unla, a gamla panin kunin hong bia un." 
Exodus24:2 Topa’ nai-ah Moses bek hong pai ding hi. A dangte a nai-ah hong pai lo ding a, mihonte in mual ciang dong hong neh lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:3 Moses hong pai-in Topa’ thugente khempeuh le biakna ngeinate khempeuh mite kiangah a gen hi. Mi khempeuh in aw kikhatin dawng uh a, “ Topa’ gensa thute khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus24:4 Moses in Topa’ thugente khempeuh a gelh hi. Zingsangin amah tho baih a, mual bulah biakna tau khat lamin, Israel minam sawm le nihte tawh kituakin khuam sawm le nih a phut hi." 
Exodus24:5 Amah in Israel mi tangvalte sawlin, tuate in meihal biakna le thunuama biakna bawngtalte Topa’ tungah pia uh hi." 
Exodus24:6 Moses in a sisan kimkhat la-in, kuangte sungah koih a, sisan kimkhat biakna tau tungah a theh hi." 
Exodus24:7 Tua ciangin amah in thuciamna laibu la-in, mite’ zakin tua laibu a sim hi. Amaute in, “ Topa’ gensa khempeuh kote in ka hih ding uh a, kote ka thumang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus24:8 Tua ciangin Moses in sisan la-in mite’ tungah theh a, “Hih thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topa in note tawh a bawlsa thuciamna sisan en un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:9 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel upate sung pan sawmsagih paito uh a," 
Exodus24:10 amaute in Israel Pasian mu uh hi. Ama khe nuai-ah a sianthona van mel tawh a kibang, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl suangphahpek bangpian om hi." 
Exodus24:11 Amah in Israel mi makaite gimna ngahsak lo hi. Amaute in Pasian mu uh a, tua ciangin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi." 
Exodus24:12 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keima kiang mualtungah hong paito inla, tua lai-ah ngak in. Amaute a kihilh nadingin keima gelhsa, thukham le thupiakna tawh, suangpek nang tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama nasempa Joshua tawh Moses kithawi uh a, Pasian’ mual tungah paito uh hi." 
Exodus24:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama nasempa Joshua tawh Moses kithawi uh a, Pasian’ mual tungah paito uh hi." 
Exodus24:14 Amah in upate kiangah, “Note’ kiangah kong paikik matengun hih lai-ah kote hong ngak un. En un, note tawh Aaron le Hur om hi. Thu nei peuhpeuh amaute’ kiangah paisak un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:15 Tua ciangin mualtungah Moses paito a, meii in mual a tuam hi." 
Exodus24:16 Topa’ minthanna vang pen Sinai Mual tungah kinga a, meii in ni guk sung tua mual a tuam hi. A ni sagih ni-in amah in meii lak panin Moses a sam hi." 
Exodus24:17 Tu-in Topa’ vangliatna vang pen Israel mite’ muhna-ah mualvum dawn a kangtum meikuang tawh kibang hi. 
Exodus24:18 Meii sungah Moses tum a, mualtungah paito hi. Moses sun sawmli le zan sawmli sung mualtungah a om hi." 
Exodus25:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus25:2 “Amaute in kei a dingin biakna hong paipih nadingin Israel mite’ kiangah gen in. A pia nuam mi peuhmah tung panin kei a dingin biakna na sang ding hi. 
Exodus25:3 Amaute’ tung panin na san ding biakna hih bang ahi hi: Kham, ngun, sumngo," 
Exodus25:4 a dum, a dupsan, a ausan puante le a kopin a kikhuk khau tawh a kigan puan hoih, keelmul," 
Exodus25:5 a kisansak tuutal vunte, keelvunte, singkha sing," 
Exodus25:6 meivakte a’ ding sathau, nilh sathau ding le paknamtui dingin a namtui nate," 
Exodus25:7 siampipuan le awmdal a bulh dingin onik suangte ahi hi. 
Exodus25:8 Amaute’ lakah kei ka om theih nadingin kei a dingin biakbuk khat amaute bawlsak in. 
Exodus25:9 Biakbuk le a nazatte’ lim ding tawh kisai-in nang’ tungah kong lahte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus25:10 “Amaute in singkha sing tawh singkuang khat bawl ding uh hi. A dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:11 Nangmah in kham citak tawh tua singkuang na zut ding a, a sung le a pua na zut ding hi. A tung kimkotah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:12 Nangmah in tua singkuang a dingin kham kual li sungin a singkuang khe li tungah tuate na bulh ding a, a pang khatah kual nih, a pang langkhatah a kual nih mah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus25:13 Nangmah in singkha singzawl na sui ding a, tuate kham tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus25:14 Singkuang puak nadingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte na khum ding hi. 
Exodus25:15 Singkuang’ kualte sungah a zawlte omsuak ding a, tuate kilakhia lo ding hi." 
Exodus25:16 Nang’ tunga kong piak ding thuciamna nangmah in singkuang sungah na koih ding hi. 
Exodus25:17 “Tua ciangin kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat na bawl ding a, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:18 Nangmah in kham tawh kherub nih na bawl ding a, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a kiseek tua kherub-te na omsak ding hi." 
Exodus25:19 Mong khatah kherub khat, a mong langkhatah kherub khat mah bawl in. Hehpihna tokhom tawh a kizomin a mong tuakah kherub na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:20 Kherub-te in a khate uh a tungah zal ding uh a, amau’ khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsunin amaute khatlekhat kimaingat ding uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-te’ mai nga ding uh hi." 
Exodus25:21 Singkuang tungah hehpihna tokhom na koih ding a, singkuang sungah nang kong piak ding thuciamna na koih ding hi." 
Exodus25:22 Hehpihna tokhom tung, thuciamna singkuang tunga om kherub nihte kikal panin nang kong hopih ding a, Israel mite a dingin nang’ tungah kong piak ding thute khempeuh nang’ tungah kong gen ding hi." 
Exodus25:23 “Nangmah in singkha sing tawh sabuai khat na bawl ding a, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat le alang, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:24 Kham citak tawh na zut ding a, a kimkotah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:25 Nangmah in khutpeek cia a zai zawl peek khat a kimkotah na bawl ding a, tua zawl peek kimkotah a geihual na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:26 Nangmah in tua sabuai a dingin kham kual li na bawl ding a, tuate pen a kiu li, a khe lite-ah na gak ding hi." 
Exodus25:27 Sabuai puak nading zawlte a len dingin a zawl peek gei-ah a kualte om ding hi. 
Exodus25:28 Nangmah in singkha sing zawlte bawlin kham tawh na zut ding a, hihte tawh sabuai kipua ding hi." 
Exodus25:29 Paknamtui a dingin a kuangdaite le a pakante, tui phih nadingin a thawl gongbakte, le a kuang-ukte na bawl ding hi. Kham citak tawh tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:30 Keima mai sabuai tungah Ompihna Anlum na koih tawntung ding hi. 
Exodus25:31 “Kham citak tawh meivakkhuam khat na bawl ding hi. Meivakkhuam bul leh a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl ding hi. A haite, a nunte le a paakte, tua tawh sakhat hi khawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus25:32 A pang panin hiang guk meengkhia ding a, a pang khatah meivakkhuam hiang thum meengkhia-in, a pang langkhatah meivakkhuam hiang thum mah meengkhia ding hi." 
Exodus25:33 Hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum le adang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin hiang gukte meivakkhuam panin meengkhia ding hi." 
Exodus25:34 A meivakkhuam tung mahmahah a nunte le a paakte tawh a om, almond bangin a kibawl hai li omin," 
Exodus25:35 meivakkhuam panin hiang guk a kopte’ bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om ding hi. 
Exodus25:36 Amau’ nunte le a hiangte, sakhat hi ding a, a vekpi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:37 Nangmah in ama a dingin meivak sagihte na bawl ding a, ama omna mai teng khua a vaksak dingin meivakte kikoih ding hi." 
Exodus25:38 A taitehte le a kuangte kham citak hi ding hi. 
Exodus25:39 Kham citak tawi sawmnih le tawi khat val a gik tawh hih nazatte khempeuh kibawl ding hi. 
Exodus25:40 Mualtungah nang’ tunga hong kilak hih nate pen amau’ lim ding bangin na bawl ding thei in. 
Exodus26:1 “Tua tham loin a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan dalna puan sawm le a dum, a dupsan, le a ausan khau a kigan puan tawh biakbuk na bawl ding hi. Hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:2 Dalna puan a dung pi sawmli le pi nih hi ding a, dalna puan a vai pi guk hi ding hi. Dalna puan khempeuh kikim ciat ding hi." 
Exodus26:3 Dalna puan ngate khatlekhat kikhuituah ding hi. 
Exodus26:4 A kikhuituah a masa dalna puan a nawlnung pen’ nawl dung sukah khaudum tawh a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. Tua bangmahin a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan a nawlnung pen’ nawl dung suk mahah a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:5 Dalna puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan nawlah bilvang sawmnga mah na bawl ding a, a bilvangte khatlekhat kitang ding uh hi." 
Exodus26:6 Biakbuk pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in kham kilhna sawmnga bawlin, tua kilhnate tawh dalna puan khatlekhat na kimatsak ding hi." 
Exodus26:7 “Biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keelmul tawh puante zong na bawl ding a, puan sawm le khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:8 Tua puan a dung pi sawmli le nga, a vai pi guk ciat hi ding a, puan sawm le khatte kikim ding hi." 
Exodus26:9 Tua puan ngate amau le amau khuituahin, puan gukte zong amau le amau mah na khuituah ding a, a gukna puan pen puanbuk mai-ah na khep ding hi." 
Exodus26:10 A kikhuituah puan khat nawlah a bilvang sawmnga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna puan nawlnung pen nawlah a bilvang sawmnga mah na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:11 Tua pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in sumngo kilhna sawmnga bawlin, a bilvangte’ sungah tua kilhnate guangin, puanbuk na kimatsak ding hi." 
Exodus26:12 Puanbuk puan a val khia, puan alang a val pen, biakbuk nungah kaisuk ding hi." 
Exodus26:13 Puanbuk puan a dunglam, pangkhatah pi khat le alang, a pang langkhatah pi khat le alang a val pen biakbuk a khuh dingin hih lampang le hua lampangte-ah kaisuk ding hi." 
Exodus26:14 “A kisansak tuutal vunte le keelvunte tawh puanbuk khuhna khat na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:15 “Biakbuk a dingin a po to ding khuampeekte singkha sing na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:16 A khuampeek khat a tun pi sawm le nga hi ding a, a vai pi nih le letmat thum vive hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:17 A bulh nadingin a khuampeek khatah a zang nih ciat om ding hi. Biakbuk khuampeek khempeuh tua bangin na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:18 Biakbuk khuampeekte na bawl ding hi: Leitaw lam panga dingin khuampeek sawmnih hi ding hi. 
Exodus26:19 A khuampeek sawmnihte’ bulah bullen sawmli ngun tawh na bawl ding a, a zang nihte a dingin khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, a khuampeek dang khat bulah adang nihte a dingin bullen nih mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:20 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam, leilu lam panga a khuampeek sawmnihte le" 
Exodus26:21 ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawmlite a dingin, khuampeek khatah bullen nih, adang khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:22 Nitumna lam, biakbuk nung lama dingin khuampeek guk na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:23 Biakbuk nunglam kiute a dingin khuampeek nih na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:24 Tuate a bul lamah kikak ding a, ahih hangin a kual masa ah a dawn kimat ding hi. A nihin tua bang hi ding a, tuate in a kiu nihte piangsak ding uh hi." 
Exodus26:25 Ngun tawh kibawl amau’ bullen sawm le gukte a’ ding a khuampeek giat pha ding a, khuampeek khatah bullen nih ciat om ding hi." 
Exodus26:26 “Singkha sing, zawlin na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:27 Biakbuk pangkhat a khuampeek a’ ding zawl nga, biakbuk a pang langkhat a khuampeek a dingin zawl nga, nitumna lam biakbuk nung lam panga a khuampeekte a dingin zawl nga hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:28 A zawl laita, a khuampeek kimciang a banto pen mong khat pan mong khat paisuak ding hi." 
Exodus26:29 A khuampeekte kham tawh zutin, a zawlte a len dingin amau’ kualte kham tawh na bawl ding a, a zawlte kham tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus26:30 A lim ding geelna, mualtungah nang tungah hong kilak mah tawh kizui-in biakbuk na lam ding hi." 
Exodus26:31 “A dum, a dupsan, a ausan, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih kigan tawh dalna puan khat na bawl ding a, hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh kizem ding hi." 
Exodus26:32 Ngun tawh kibawl bullen lite tungah a om, kham kibawl vankhaina nei-in, kham tawh a kizut singkha khuampi lite tungah na khai ding hi." 
Exodus26:33 A kilhnate-ah dalna puan khai sukin, dalna puan sung tua lai munah thuciamna singkuang na koih ding a, dalna puan in siangtho pen mun panin siangtho mun khen ding hi." 
Exodus26:34 Siangtho pen mun sunga om thuciamna singkuang tungah hehpihna tokhom na koih ding hi. 
Exodus26:35 Dalna puan pualamah sabuai koihin, sabuai tawh a kisan biakbuk leitaw lampangah meivakkhuam na koih ding a, leilu lampangah sabuai na koih ding hi." 
Exodus26:36 “Puanbuk kongkhak dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem kongpuankhai khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:37 Kongpuankhai a dingin singkha khuampi nga bawlin kham tawh na zut ding hi. A vankhainate kham hi ding a, tuate a dingin sumngo bullen nga na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:1 “Biakna tau ding singkha sing tawh bawl in. Pi sagih le alang sau-in pi sagih le alang mah na zaisak ding hi. Biakna tau a ning kikim ding a, a tun pi li le alang hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:2 A kiu lite-ah ki na bawl ding hi. A kite pen a biakna tau tawh sakhat hi ding a, sumngo tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus27:3 Ama a dingin vut koih nading beelte le kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate le vutluahna peekte na bawl ding a, a nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:4 Ama a dingin siklen, a vang simsiam zong sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi. Siklen tung, a kiu lite-ah sumngo kual li na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:5 Siklen in biakna tau kimciang a batsuk theih nadingin biakna tau zawl nuai panin na bulh ding hi. 
Exodus27:6 Biakna tau a dingin singkha sing zawlte bawlin sumngo tawh tuate na zut ding hi. 
Exodus27:7 A kipuak ciangin biakna tau pang nihte-ah a zawlte a om theihna dingin a kualte’ vang sungah a zawlte kikhum ding hi. 
Exodus27:8 Singpekte tawh kuak nei-in biakna tau na bawl ding a, mualtung a nang tungah hong kilaksa bangin kibawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:9 “Biakbuk tual na bawl ding hi. A tual in leitaw lam pangah pang khat a dingin pi za le sawmnga a sau, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhai suk dalna puan nei ding hi." 
Exodus27:10 A khuam sawmnih le a bullen sawmnih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding a, ahih hangin khuampi tunga vankhainate le a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:11 Leilu lampang a ding zong a sauna tua bangmah hi-in, a kikhai suk dalna puan pi za le sawmnga sau ding a, a khuam sawmnih le a bullen sawmnih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi. Ahi zongin khuampi tunga vankhainate le a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:12 Nitumna lam pangah buktual a vailam a dingin khuampi sawm le bullen sawmte tawh pi sawmsagih le nga a sau a kikhai suk dalna puan om ding hi. 
Exodus27:13 A mailam, nisuahna lam buktual a vailam pi sawmsagih le nga hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:14 Kongpi pang khat-a ding a kikhaisuk dalna puan pi sawmnih le nih le alang hi ding a, khuampi thum le bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:15 A pang langkhatah a kikhaisuk dalna puan pen pi sawmnih le nih le alang hi ding a, khuampi thum le bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:16 Buktual a kongpi dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khau a kopin a kikhuk khau hoihte tawh a kigan, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, pi sawmthum a sau kongpuankhai khat om ding a, tua in khuampi li le bullen li nei ding hi." 
Exodus27:17 Buktual kiima khuampi khempeuh ngun tawh kibawl gakna tawh kigak ding a, a vankhainate ngun hi-in a bullente sumngo hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:18 Buktual a dung pi za le sawmnga, a vai pi sawmsagih le nga, a sanna pi sagih le alang hi-in, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhaisuk dalna puan le sumngo bullente tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:19 Biakbuk nazat ding peuhmahte le a khetphimte khempeuh le buktual a khetphimte khempeuh sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi. 
Exodus27:20 “Meivak a kuangin a om tawntung theih nadingin mei a vak ding oliv gah a kisuzan, sathau siangtho, Israel mite in nang kiangah hong paipih nadingun thu na pia ding hi." 
Exodus27:21 Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang mai-a dalna puan pualamah, Aaron le ama tapate in nitak a kipan zingsang dong Topa’ mai-ah vil ding uh hi. Tua pen Israel mite in amau’ khang tawntungin a zuih ding uh ngeina kip khat hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:1 “Tua ciangin keima tungah siampi na a sem dingin Israel mite lak panin na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate Nadab le Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar, nangma kiangah la in." 
Exodus28:2 Minthanna le hoihna tawh a kidim nadingin na sanggampa Aaron a’ ding biakna puan siangtho na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus28:3 Keima siampi nasepna-ah amah a ap theih nadingun amaute in Aaron’ puante a bawl nading, hih theihna lungsim ka guatsa, siamna a nei mite khempeuh tungah gen in." 
Exodus28:4 Amaute’ bawl ding puante: Awmdal khat, siampipuan khat, puantualpi khat, sikli nei-a a gial puantungsilh khat, dialpi khat le kawnggak khat ahi hi. Keima tungah siampi na a sem ding na sanggampa Aaron le ama tapate a dingin amaute in biakna puan siangthote bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus28:5 Amaute in kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk tawh a kigan puan hoihte sang ding uh hi." 
Exodus28:6 “Amaute in siampipuan pen, kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh bawl ding uh a, hoihtakin a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:7 A kizop khawm theih nadingin a mong nihte-ah a kimat liangkaihna puan nih nei ding hi. 
Exodus28:8 Amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen, kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoihte tawh kibawlin, a sepna zia le a nate a kibang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:9 Nangmah in onik suang nih la-in tuate’ tungah Israel tapate’ min na gelh ding a," 
Exodus28:10 amau’ suahna tawh kizui-in amau’ min gukte suang khat tungah gelhin, a omlai gukte’ min a suang dang khat tungah na gelh ding hi." 
Exodus28:11 Kizepna a bawlpa in min gelhna a bawl bangin Israel tapa sawm le nihte’ minte suang nihte tungah na gelh ding hi. Tuate pen kham a zepna tawh na um ding hi. 
Exodus28:12 Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampipuan’ liangkaih puan tungah tua suang nihte na bulh ding hi. Aaron in ama liangko nihte tungah phawkphawk dingin Topa’ mai-ah amaute’ min pua ding hi. 
Exodus28:13 Kham tawh kibawl a kiphut kizepna le 
Exodus28:14 khau bangin a kihual, kham citak khainiang nih na bawl ding a, a kihual khainiangte pen a kiphutte’ tungah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:15 “Hoihtakin a kibawl thukhenna awmdal khat na bawl ding hi. Siampipuan a kibawl bangmahin na bawl ding hi. Kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoih tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:16 A ning kikimin thuap nih hi ding a, a dung letmat kua, a vai letmat kua mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:17 Tua sungah suang gual li-in na bulh ding hi. Sardis suang, topaz suang, le karbankal suang gual khat pen a gual masa hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:18 A gual nihna-ah emerald suang, sapfaia suang, le diamond suang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:19 A gual thumna-ah jakinth suang, agate suang, le amethyst suang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:20 A gual lina-ah beryl suang, onik suang, le jasper suang hi ding a, kham tawh zepna sungah tuate kibulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:21 Israel tapate’ min tawh kituakin amaute’ min a omna suang sawm le nih om ding hi. Tuate pen minam sawm le nihte a dingin amau’ min ciat kigelhin, min gelhna tawh kibang ding hi." 
Exodus28:22 Awmdal a dingin khau tawh a kibang, a kihual kham citak khainiang na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:23 Awmdal a dingin kham kual nih na bawl ding a, awmdal mongah tua kualte na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:24 Awmdal mong a kual nihte sungah kham khau nihte na khum ding hi. 
Exodus28:25 Khau mong nihte zepna tawh na zom ding a, siampipuan’ liangkaih puan mai lamah tua bangin na zom ding hi." 
Exodus28:26 Kham kual nih na bawl ding a, awmdal mong nih, siampipuan tawh a kizom a sunglamah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:27 Kham kual nih na bawl ding a, siampipuan liangkaih nihte’ nuai a mailam, hoihtakin a kigan siampi puankhau a kizopna tung sanah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:28 Hoihtakin a kigan siampipuan’ khau tungah a om theih nading le siampipuan tung panin awmdal a kol theih loh nadingin amaute in siampipuan’ kualah khaudum khatin a kual tawh gakkhawm ding uh hi. 
Exodus28:29 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ mai-ah phawk tawntung nadingin amaute a paipih dingin siangtho munah amah a pai ciangin, Aaron in ama lungtang tunga om thukhenna awmdal sungah Israel tapate’ min pua ding hi." 
Exodus28:30 Thukhenna awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim na koih ding a, Topa’ mai-ah a pai ciangin Aaron’ lungtang tungah tuate om ding hi. Tua bangin Aaron in ama lungtang tungah Israel mite’ thukhenna Topa’ mai-ah pua tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus28:31 “Siampi puantualpi, puan dum bek tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:32 Puan ngawng bangin a kikeek loh nadingin a ngawng kimkotah a kigan tawh a kizim, lutang thawl a vang nei ding hi." 
Exodus28:33 A mongah a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh a kizem mang kawlsing gah bawlin, a mong kiimah amaute’ kikalah kham siklong bawlin," 
Exodus28:34 puantualpi mong kimkotah kham long le mang kawlsing gah, kham long le mang kawlsing gah cih bangin na kihelhsak ding hi." 
Exodus28:35 Aaron in biakna na a sep ciangin tua puan silh ding a, amah a sih khak loh nadingin Topa’ mai a siangtho munah a tum ciang le a pusuah ciangin a gingte kiza ding hi." 
Exodus28:36 “Nangmah in kham citak tawh a peek khat na bawl ding a, min gelhna a kibawlte mah bangin tua tungah, ‘ Topa a’ ding siangtho,’ ci-in na gelh ding hi." 
Exodus28:37 Tua pen, khaudum khat tawh dialpi tungah na gak ding a, dialpi mai lamah om ding hi." 
Exodus28:38 Tua pen Aaron’ taltangah om ding a, Israel mite in letsong siangtho a piakna uh ahi, a siangtho biakpiakna-ah mawhna a om peuhmah Aaron in ama tungah pua ding hi. Topa’ mai-ah amaute a kisan’ theih nadingin ama taltang tungah tua a peek om tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus28:39 “A puantungsilh ding pen khau hoih tawh siik li nei, a gialin na gan ding hi. Khau hoih tawh dialpi khat na bawl ding a, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem kawnggak khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:40 “Aaron’ tapate a dingin puantungsilhte, kawnggakte, le lukhute na bawl ding a, minthanna le hoihna tawh a kidim nadingin tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:41 Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate na silhsak ding a, amaute sathau nilhin, nasem dingin kipsakin, na siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus28:42 A ci guakin a omna uh a tuam dingin amau a dingin puan hoihte tawh pheituamte na bawlsak ding a, tuate in kawng panin phei ciang ban ding hi." 
Exodus28:43 Kikhopna bukah amaute a pai ciang uh ahi a, siangtho munah nasem dingin biakna tau nai-ah a pai ciang uh ahi zongin, Aaron le ama tapate in tuate a silh ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in amau tung mahah mawhna a kisuan tawm suakin si ding uh hi. Hih pen amah le ama khit ciangin a suanlekhakte a dingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi." 
Exodus29:1 “Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute na sianthosak nadingin amaute’ tungah na hih ding thute: Bawngtalno khat le a sitbaang lo tuutal nih," 
Exodus29:2 le silngo sawh loh anlum, sathau a kihel silngo sawh loh mohte, sathau tawh a kizut silngo sawh loh mohphengte la in. Tuate pen mangbuhnel tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus29:3 Lawh khat sungah tuate koihin tuate a lawhin paipihin, a bawngtal le a tuutal nih zong na paipih ding hi." 
Exodus29:4 “Kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron le a tapate na paipih ding a, tui tawh amaute na sil ding hi." 
Exodus29:5 Nangmah in puante la-in, puantungsilh le siampi puantualpi, siampipuan le awmdal, Aaron silhsakin, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuan gakna tawh amah na gak ding hi." 
Exodus29:6 Ama lu tungah dialpi khim sakin, dialpi tungah kumpi lukhu siangtho na khusak ding hi." 
Exodus29:7 Nangmah in nilh sathau la-in, ama lu tungah sungin amah na nilh ding hi." 
Exodus29:8 “Tua ciangin nangmah in ama tapate paipihin, amaute, puantungsilh na silhsak ding a," 
Exodus29:9 kawnggakte tawh amaute gakin, amau’ lu tungah a lukhute uh na gak ding hi. Siampi nasepna pen a kip tawntung ngeina ahih manin amau a’ hi ding hi. Tua bangin Aaron le a tapate na kipsak ding hi." 
Exodus29:10 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk mai-ah bawngtal na paipih ding hi. Aaron le a tapate in bawngtal lu tungah amau’ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:11 Topa’ mai, kikhopna buk kongkhakah nangmah in a bawngtal na go ding hi." 
Exodus29:12 Bawngtal sisan tawmkhat la-in na khutme tawh biakna tau kite na nuh ding a, si a omlai teng biakna tau bulah na sungkhia ding hi." 
Exodus29:13 A gilpi tuam a thau khempeuh le a sin tunga a utok le a kal nihte le a kal tuam a thau na la ding a, biakna tau tungah tuate na hal ding hi." 
Exodus29:14 Ahih hangin bawngtal sa le a vun le a ekte, giahphual pua lamah mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:15 “Tua ciangin nangmah in tuutalte khat la-in, Aaron le a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau’ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:16 nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si la-in biakna tau kimkotah na theh ding hi." 
Exodus29:17 Tua ciangin tuutal semnenin, a sungkua le a khete silin, a sabakte le a lu tawh tuate koihin," 
Exodus29:18 biakna tau tungah tuutal a bupin na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah meihal biakna hi a, a gim namtui, Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:19 “Nangmah in tuutal adang khat na la ding hi. Aaron le a tapate in tua tuutal lu tungah amau’ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:20 nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si tawmkhat la-in Aaron’ taklam bil dawn le ama tapate’ taklam bil dawnte le amau’ taklam khutpi dawnte le amau’ taklam khepi dawnte nuhin, si a omlai teng biakna tau kiimah na theh ding hi." 
Exodus29:21 Tua ciangin biakna tau tunga a om si tawmkhat le nilh sathau la-in Aaron le ama puante tung le a tapate le a puante tungah na theh ding hi. Tua ciangin amah le a puante le a tapate le a puante a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:22 “Nangmah in tuutal thau, a mei, a gilpi tuam a thau, a sin pan a utok, a kal nihte, a kal tuam a thau, le a taklam phei (bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen kipsakna tuutal ahi hi)" 
Exodus29:23 le Topa’ mai-ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin anlum khat, sathau tawh a kibawl anlum bek khat, le moh pheng khat na la ding hi." 
Exodus29:24 Hihte khempeuh Aaron’ khutsung le a tapate’ khut sungah na koih ding a, Topa’ mai-ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi." 
Exodus29:25 Tua ciangin amau’ khutsung panin tuate na la ding a, Topa’ mai-ah a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah mei tawh kihal biakna banah na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:26 “Nangmah in Aaron a kikipsakna tuutal sa-iik la-in Topa’ mai-ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi. Tua pen nangma tanh hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:27 “Kipsakna sa pen Aaron le ama tapate a’ ding ahih ciangin, kipsakna tuutal panin a kipia, a kivei siampite’ tanh a phei le vei-a piak sa-iikte na siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:28 Tua pen Aaron le ama tapate a dingin Israel mite’ tung panin a kaih tawntung ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thunuama amau’ biakna panin Israel mite in a piak ding siampite’ tanh ahi hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah amau’ piak ahi hi. 
Exodus29:29 “Aaron’ biakna puan siangthote pen ama sih khit ciangin a tapate’ tungah kipia ding a, amaute sathau kinilhin a kikipsak nading ahi hi." 
Exodus29:30 Ama za luahin siampi na a sem a tapa in siangtho munah nasem dingin kikhopna bukah a pai ciangin ni sagih sung tuate silh ding hi. 
Exodus29:31 “Nangmah in kipsakna tuutal la-in a siangtho biakna mun khatah a sa na huan ding hi. 
Exodus29:32 Aaron le a tapate in kikhopna buk kongkhakah tuutal sa le lawh sunga om anlum ne ding uh hi. 
Exodus29:33 Amaute in amaute a kikipsak nading le a siangthosak dingin kilemna a kibawlna tua ante ne ding uh a, ahih hangin a pualam mi in tuate ne thei lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a siangtho biakna an ahi hi." 
Exodus29:34 Kipsakna sate khat peuhpeuh ahi a, anlum ahi zongin, zingsang ciang dong a omlai leh nangmah in a omlaite mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tuate pen biakna an siangtho ahih manin kine lo ding hi." 
Exodus29:35 “Tua bangin nang kong thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin Aaron le ama tapate’ tungah na hih ding a, ni sagih sung tawntung amaute ki-apna na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus29:36 Kilem nadingin mawhna hanga biakna-in ni simin bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. Siangthosak nadingin sathau na nilh ciang le kilemna na bawl ciangin biakna tau a dingin khialhna hanga biakna khat zong na pia ding hi. 
Exodus29:37 Biakna tau a dingin ni sagih sung kilemna bawlin na siangthosak ding hi. Tua ciangin biakna tau a siangtho pen suak ding a, tua biakna tau a lawng peuhpeuh a siangtho suak ding hi." 
Exodus29:38 “Tu-in biakna tau tungah na piak tawntung dingte hih bang ahi hi: Nisimin a kizomin kum khat a pha tuuno nihta hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:39 Tuuno khat zingsang lamin na pia ding a, adang tuuno khat nitak lamin na pia ding hi." 
Exodus29:40 Tuuno a masa tawh annel lawh khat le a oliv thau hai khat tawh a kihel leh tuibuah dingin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:41 Tuuno adang khat nitakin na pia ding a, zingsang a mah bangin a gim namtui ding, Topa’ mai-ah mei tawh kihal biakna-in an tawh biakna le tuibuah tawh na pia khawm ding hi." 
Exodus29:42 Nang tunga thu kong gen nading, nang tawh ka kituah nading mun, Topa’ mai kikhopna buk kongkhakah na khang tawntungun a kipia tawntung ding meihal biakna hi ding hi." 
Exodus29:43 Tua lai-ah Israel mite tawh ka kituah ding a, keima vang in tua mun siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:44 Keimah in kikhopna buk le biakna tau ka siangthosak ding a, keima siampi na a sem dingin Aaron le a tapate zong ka siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:45 Israel mite lakah keimah tengin amau’ Pasian ka hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:46 Amaute’ lakah keimah ka tenna hangin Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih Topa amau’ Pasian ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa amau’ Pasian ka hi hi. 
Exodus30:1 “Nangmah in paknamtui hal nading biakna tau khat, singkha sing tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus30:2 A dung pi khat le alang, a vai zong pi khat le alang mah hi ding hi. A kikim sikli nei hi ding a, a sanna pi thum hi ding hi. A kite a tak tawh sakhat hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:3 Nangmah in kham citak tawh a tung le a pang kimkot le a kite na zut ding a, a kimkotah kham tawh a geihual na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus30:4 Tua biakna tau a dingin kham kual nih na bawl ding hi. A geihual nuai a kigal sai a pang tuakah tuate na bawl ding a, a puak nading zawlte a khum nading hi ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:5 Nangmah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte na bawl ding a, kham tawh tuate na zut ding hi." 
Exodus30:6 Nangmah tawh ka kituah nading mun, thuciamna tunga a om hehpihna tokhom mai, thuciamna singkuang kiangah a om dalna puan mai-ah biakna tau na koih ding hi." 
Exodus30:7 Aaron in tua tungah a namtui paknamtui hal ding hi. Amah in zingsang simin meivakte a puah ciangin hal ding hi. 
Exodus30:8 Aaron in nitakin zong meivakte a koih ciangin tuate hal ding a, na khang tawntungun Topa’ mai-ah a namtui hi tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus30:9 Tua tungah a siangtho lo paknamtui hitaleh, meihal biakna hitaleh, an tawh biakna hitaleh na pia kei ding hi. Tua tungah tuibuah na sung kei ding hi." 
Exodus30:10 Aaron in kilem nadingin khialhna hanga biakna si a kite tungah kum khatin khatvei zut ding hi. Amah in na khang tawntungun kum khatin khatvei kilemna bawl ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah a siangtho pen ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:12 “Israel mite a phazah na sim ciangin amau’ lakah gimna a tun loh nadingin, a milip in a kitatkhiatna uh Topa’ tungah pia ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:13 Mi simna-ah a kihel mi peuhmah in biakinn shekel tawh kituakin shekel lang (shekel khatah gerah sawmnih om hi), Topa’ tungah biakna-in pia ding hi." 
Exodus30:14 Mi simna-ah a kihel, kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah peuhmah in Topa’ tungah biakna pia ding hi." 
Exodus30:15 Note a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin Topa biakna na piak uh ciangin a haute in shekel lang sangin a tamzaw pia lo ding a, a zawngte in a tawmzaw pia lo ding hi." 
Exodus30:16 Nomau a dingin kilemna bawl nading, Topa’ mai-ah Israel mite ka phawkna a hisak dingin Israel mite tung panin kilemna sum na la ding a, kikhopna buk nasep nadingin na zang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:18 “Kisil nadingin sumngo kuang khat, le a ngak nading zong sumngo mah tawh bawl in. Nangmah in kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah na koih ding a, tua sungah tui na koih ding hi." 
Exodus30:19 Aaron le a tapate in a khut uh le a khe uh tua tui tawh sil ding uh hi. 
Exodus30:20 Kikhopna bukah amaute a pai ciang uh ahi a, Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna hal dingin biakna tau nai-ah a pai ciang uh ahi zongin, amaute a sih loh nadingun amaute tui tawh kisil ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:21 A sih khak loh nadingun a khut uh le a khe uh sil ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun amaute tung a kipanin amau’ suanlekhakte tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:22 Tua tham loin, Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:23 “A hoihpen a namtui nate la in. Myrrh paknamtui shekel zanga le a namtui thaksing tuazah lang, shekel zanih le sawmnga a gik, le a khum a namtui paknamtui zanih le sawmnga," 
Exodus30:24 biakinn shekel tawh kituakin thaksing nam khat zanga, le oliv thau bung khat," 
Exodus30:25 nangmah in paknamtui bawlte’ bawl mah bangin a siangtho sathau nilh dingin hihte na gawm ding a, tua pen a siangtho sathau nilh hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:26 Nangmah in tua tawh kikhopna buk le thuciamna singkuang," 
Exodus30:27 sabuai le a nazat khempeuh, meivakkhuam le a nazatte le paknamtui biakna tau," 
Exodus30:28 meihal biakna tau a nazat khempeuh tawh, kuang le a ngakna na zut ding hi." 
Exodus30:29 Tuate a siangtho pen ahih theih nadingin na siangthosak ding a, tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi." 
Exodus30:30 Amaute in keima tungah siampi na hong sep theih nadingun Aaron le a tapate nangmah in sathau nilhin amaute na siangthosak ding hi. 
Exodus30:31 Nangmah in Israel mite kiangah, ‘Hih pen na khang tawntungun a siangtho keima sathau nilh hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:32 Mi mawkmawkte’ pumpi tungah tua sathau kisung lo ding a, tua bangin a kigawm sathau dang na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a siangtho hi a, note a dingin a siangtho hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:33 Tua tawh a kibangin a bawl mi peuhmah ahi a, a pualam mi khatpeuh tuate a nilhsak mi peuhmah ahi zongin ama mite’ kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi, Topa in ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:34 Topa in Moses kiangah, “A namtui nate, stakte, onikha, le galbanum, paknamtui citak tawh a namtui nate (a tamna a kikim ciatin) la inla," 
Exodus30:35 paknamtui bawlte’ hih bangin ci sawhin a nin baang lo, biakna paknamtui bawl in." 
Exodus30:36 Nangmah in kimkhat a neu mahmahin na satnen ding a, nang tawh ka kituah nading kikhopna buk sunga thuciamna mai-ah pawlkhat na koih ding hi. Tua pen nangma a dingin a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:37 A kigawmpih ngei teng tawh na bawl ding paknamtui pen note a dingin na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note a dingin Topa’ tungah a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Exodus30:38 Tua tawh a kibangin paknamtui a bawl mi peuhmah ama mite’ kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus31:2 “Thei in; Judah minam Hur’ tapa ahi Uri’ tapa Bezalel a minin ka sam khin hi. 
Exodus31:3 Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuhah nasep nading; bulh ding suangte seekna le singzep nasep a sem dingin vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna, le khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah ka kidimsak hi." 
Exodus31:4  
Exodus31:5  
Exodus31:6 En in, amah tawh, Dan minam, Ahisamak’ tapa Oholiab ka seh khinzo hi. Amaute in nang kong thupiak khempeuh a bawl theih nadingun a hih thei mi khempeuh tungah siamna ka pia khinzo hi." 
Exodus31:7 Amau’ sep dingte hih bang ahi hi: Kikhopna buk, le thuciamna singkuang le a tunga om hehpihna tokhom le buk sung na khempeuh," 
Exodus31:8 sabuai le a nazatte le a siangtho meivakkhuam le a nazatte khempeuh, paknamtui biakna tau," 
Exodus31:9 le meihal biakna tau a nazatte khempeuh tawh, kuang le a ngakna," 
Exodus31:10 le amau’ siampi nasep nadingin siampi Aaron’ puan siangthote le ama tapate’ puante ahi, hoihtakin a kigan puante," 
Exodus31:11 le siangtho mun a dingin nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui ahi hi. Ka thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:12 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus31:13 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Keima Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen Topa ahi keimah in note a hong siangthosak ka hihna na theih nadingun na khang tawntungun keimah le note’ kikalah lim khat hi ding hi. 
Exodus31:14 Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note a dingin a siangtho ahi hi. Tua ni-in a tawlnga lo mi peuhmah kithat ding a, tua ni-in na a sem mi peuhmah ama mite’ kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi." 
Exodus31:15 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi-a tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi a, Topa’ tungah siangtho hi. Sabbath ni-in nasep khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus31:16 Tua ahih ciangin a tawntung thuciamna-in amau’ khang tawntungin Sabbath tangin, Israel mite in Sabbath kem ding uh hi." 
Exodus31:17 Ni guk sung teng Topa in van le lei bawlin, a ni sagih ni-in amah tawlnga a, a tha dimsakkik hi. Keimah le Israel mite’ kikalah hih Sabbath ni pen lim khat hi tawntung ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:18 Sinai Mual tungah thugenna a man khit ciangin Pasian’ khut tawh a kigelh suangpek ahi thuciamna suangpek nihte, amah in Moses a pia hi." 
Exodus32:1 Mualtung panin Moses hong tunsuk hakna mite in a theih uh ciangin, Aaron kiangah mite amau mah kikaikhawm tawmin ama kiangah, “Kithawi in; kote’ mai-ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahihleh bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:2 Aaron in amaute kiangah, “Na zite, na tapate, le na tanute uh bil tungah a om kham bilbahte sutkhia unla, kei kiangah tuate hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:3 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in amau’ bil-a om kham bilbahte sutkhia-in Aaron’ kiangah tuate a paipih uh hi. 
Exodus32:4 Amah in amaute’ tung panin kham saangin, sumtui sunna sungah sungin, a kisung bawngno khat bawlsak a, tua ciangin mite in, “Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh!” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:5 Aaron in hih thu a muh ciangin, amah in tua mai-ah biakna tau khat lam a, “Zing ciang pen Topa a’ ding pawi bawl ni hi ding hi,” ci-in zaksakna a bawl hi." 
Exodus32:6 Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, meihal biakna pia-in thunuama biakna zong a paipih uh hi. Pawi an ne-in mite tu uh a, zu khamin numei pasal kisawk ngeingai uh hi." 
Exodus32:7 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Paisuk in; bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt leitang panin nangmah in na paikhiatpih toh mite amau kisiasak uh hi." 
Exodus32:8 Ka thupiakna lampi panin amaute kiheikhia pak uh hi. Amau a dingin amaute in a kisung bawngno khat bawlin, tua bia-in a tungah biakna pia uh a, ‘Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh ahi hi!’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:9 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite ka mu zo hi. En in, a lungkhauh mite ahi uh hi." 
Exodus32:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amaute tungah ka sinso-in amaute ka beisak theih nadingin kei guak hong omsak in. Ahi zongin nang ahihleh minam lian khatin kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:11 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa ama Pasian tungah thum a, “ Topa aw, na vangliatna le na thahatna tawh Egypt leitang panin na paikhiatpih ahi nangma mite tungah bang hangin sinso ding na hi hiam?" 
Exodus32:12 Bang hangin Egypt mite in, ‘Mualtungah amaute a that ding le leitung panin amaute a beisak dingin siatna ngaihsutna tawh amah in amaute paikhiatpih hi,’ ci ding uh ahi hiam? A kihtakhuai na hehna daisak inla, na lungsim kheelin na mite tungah hih siatna tungsak kei in." 
Exodus32:13 Amaute’ tungah nangmahmah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh vantung aksi bangin tamsakin, keimah in ka ciamsa hih leitang khempeuh na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding a, amaute in luah tawntung ding uh hi,’ na cihna na nasemte Abraham, Isaac, le Israel phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:14 Tua ciangin Topa in a lungsim kheel a, ama mite’ tungah a tunsak ding siatna tungsak nawn lo hi." 
Exodus32:15 Tua ciangin Moses kihei-in, a khutsunga om thuciamna suangpek nih, a pang langnih tuakah a kigelh suangpeekte tawh mualtung panin a paisuk hi." 
Exodus32:16 A peekte pen Pasian’ bawl hi a, a kigelh thute pen suangpek tungah Pasian’ gelh ahi hi." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua in amaute’ kiko gamlumna a zak ciangin Moses kiangah, “Giahphual ah kido-a gamlumna om hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua in amaute’ kiko gamlumna a zak ciangin Moses kiangah, “Giahphual ah kido-a gamlumna om hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:18 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tu-a gamlumna pen zawhna kikona aw ahi a, lelhna kikona aw ahi zongin, tua bang pawl hi lo hi. Ahih hangin tu-a ka zak pen lasakna awging ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:19 Giahphual nai-ah amah tungin bawngno le lamna a muh phetin, Moses heh mahmah a, amah in ama khutsung panin suangpeekte lawn a, mual bulah tuate a sukham hi." 
Exodus32:20 Amah in amaute’ bawlsa bawngno la-in mei tawh hal a, gawivui-in tui tungah theh a, Israel mite a tui dawnsak hi." 
Exodus32:21 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Amaute’ tungah khialhna lianpi khat na tunpih nadingin hih mite in nang’ tungah bang hong gen uh ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:22 Aaron in, “Ka topa aw, heh lua kei in. Mite’ lungsim na theihsa ahih mah bangin amaute in siatna ngaihsun uh hi." 
Exodus32:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima kiangah, ‘Kote’ mai-ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahihleh, bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:24 Keimah in amaute kiangah, ‘Kham a nei peuhpeuh in sutkhia un,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in kei’ tungah hong pia uh a, keimah in mei sungah tuate ka lawn a, hih bawngno hong suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:25 Mite a tatkhialhna Moses in a muh ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Aaron in amau’ maizum nadingin amau’ galte’ lakah amaute takhialsak hi)," 
Exodus32:26 giahphual kongpi sungah Moses ding a, “ Topa’ lamah kua teng om na hi uh hiam? Kei’ kiangah hong pai un,” a ci hi. Levi mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus32:27 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel-te’ Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘A milip in a namsau a pangah tawi-in kongpi khat pan kongpi khat, giahphual khempeuhah pai kawikawi-in, a milip in a sanggampa, a milip in a kikholhpih pa, a milip in a vengpa that hen,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus32:28 Moses’ thugen bangin Levi mite gamta uh a, tua ni-in mihing tulthum bang si hi." 
Exodus32:29 Moses in, “Note’ tungah thupha hong tun theih nadingin ama tapa le a sanggamte ciat supna thuakin Topa’ na sep nadingah tuni-in note na kikipsak tawm uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:30 A zingsang ciangin Moses in mite kiangah, “Note in khialhna lianpi khat na bawl khin uh hi. Tu-in Topa’ kiangah kei ka pai ding a, note’ khialhna thu-ah kilemna ka va bawl thei kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:31 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ kiangah Moses paikikin, “Ala, hih mite in khialhna lianpi khat bawl khin uh a, amaute in amau a dingin kham pasian khat bawl khin uh hi." 
Exodus32:32 Ahih hangin nangmah in tu-in amau’ khialhna maisak in. Na maisak kei ding leh, hong thum ing, nangma gelhsa laibu panin keimah hong phiatmai in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:33 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Kei’ tungah hong khial peuhmah, ka laibu panin ka phiat ding hi." 
Exodus32:34 Ahih hangin tu-in pai in; nang’ tunga kong gensa munah mite paipih in. En in, na mai-ah ka vantungmi pai ding hi. Ahi zongin ka thukkik ni ciangin amau’ khialhna amau’ tungah ka thuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:35 Amaute in Aaron’ bawlsa bawngno bia uh ahih manin Topa in mite’ tungah gimna a tungsak hi. 
Exodus33:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mun nusia un; Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tungah, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding hi,’ ci-a ka ciam leitangah nangmah le Egypt leitang panin na paikhiatpih toh mite tawh hih lai panin paito un." 
Exodus33:2 Note’ mai-ah vantungmi khat ka sawl ding a, Kanaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite ka hawlkhia ding hi." 
Exodus33:3 Bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitangah paito un. Ahi zongin note hong sisak kha ding ka hih ciangin note’ lakah kei kong paito kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note mi lungkhauh na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:4 Mite in hih thusiate a zak uh ciangin amaute thuum uh a, kuamah kizem lo uh hi." 
Exodus33:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel mite’ tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Note mi lungkhauh na hi uh hi. Note’ lakah tomno khat sung hong paito leng, note kong beisak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin note kong bawl nading ka theih nadingin note’ tung panin na kizepnate uh suahkhia un,’ ci in,” ci-in gen khinzo hi." 
Exodus33:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in Horeb Mual pan a kipanin amau’ kizepnate suahkhia uh hi. 
Exodus33:7 Israel mite in giahphual a sat simin Moses in puanbuk la-in giahphual panin a gamla pekah lam thei zel hi. Amah in tua pen kikhopna buk, ci hi. Topa’ tungah thu a dong nuam mi peuhmah giahphual pualama om kikhopna bukah paikhia uh hi." 
Exodus33:8 Puanbukah Moses a pai peuhpeuh ciangin mi khempeuh ding to-in, a milipin a puanbuk kong ciat uhah ding uh a, puanbuk sungah a tum khit mateng Moses’ nung en uh hi." 
Exodus33:9 Puanbukah Moses a tum ciangin meii khuam hong kum sukin puanbuk kongkhakah ding a, Topa in Moses hopih hi." 
Exodus33:10 Puanbuk kongkhakah meii khuam a ding a muh uh ciangin a milipin a puanbuk kong ciat uhah mi khempeuh dingto-in kun uh hi. 
Exodus33:11 Tua bangin, mi khat in a lawmpa a hopih bangin maitang kituahin Topa in Moses hopih zel hi. Giahphual ah Moses a ciahkik ciangin, Nun’ tapa, ama nasem tangval Joshua, puanbukah omlai hi." 
Exodus33:11 Tua bangin, mi khat in a lawmpa a hopih bangin maitang kituahin Topa in Moses hopih zel hi. Giahphual ah Moses a ciahkik ciangin, Nun’ tapa, ama nasem tangval Joshua, puanbukah omlai hi." 
Exodus33:12 Moses in Topa’ kiangah, “Thei in; nangmah in keima kiangah, ‘Hih mite paipihto in,’ nong ci hi. Ahih hangin kei tawh nong sawlkhop ding mi kei nong theisak nai kei hi. Ahi zongin nangmah in, ‘Na minin nang kong thei a, ka mai-ah maipha zong na mu khin hi,’ nong ci khin hi." 
Exodus33:13 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong thum hi; na muhna-ah maipha ka ngah leh keimah in nang hong thei-in, na muhna-ah maipha ka ngah theih nadingin tu-in nangma geelnate kei hong lak in. Hih minam pen nangma mite ahihna zong ngaihsun in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nang tawh kong pai ding a, lungsim tawlngakna hun nang kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:15 Moses in ama kiangah, “Nang nong paipih kei ding leh, hih lai panin kote hong paikhiatosak kei in." 
Exodus33:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah le nangma mite in nangma muhna-ah maipha ka ngahna uh bang ci-in kithei ding ahi hiam? Leitung a om mi khempeuh tungah keimah le nangma mite ka tungnunna uh pen kote tawh nang nong paikhopna hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Exodus33:17 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nangma gensa hih thu mahmah keimah in ka hih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka muhna-ah nang in maipha na ngahzo a, na minin nang kong thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:18 Moses in, “Kong thum hi; na vangliatna kei hong lak in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:19 Amah in, “Keima hoihna khempeuh na mai-ah ka paisak ding a, na mai-ah keima min, ‘ Topa ’ cihna ka pulak ding hi. Ka diknopna mite tungah ka dik ding a, ka hehpihnop mite ka hehpih ding hi." 
Exodus33:20 Ahih hangin nangmah in ka maitang na mu thei kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi in kei hong mu leh tuami nungta lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:21 Tua banah Topa in, “En in; suang tungah na din nading keima kiangah mun khat om hi." 
Exodus33:22 Keima minthanna vang a pai laitakin suanghawm sungah nang kong koih ding a, kei ka paikhiat mateng ka khut tawh nang kong hum ding hi." 
Exodus33:23 Tua ciangin keimah in ka khut ka lakhia ding hi. Nangmah in ka nung na mu ding a, ahih hangin ka maitang na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “A masa tawh a kibangin suangpek nih sui in. Na sukkhap a masa suangpeekte sunga om thute tuate tungah ka gelh kik ding hi." 
Exodus34:2 Kithawi-in Sinai Mual tungah zingsangin hong paito inla, mual dawn tua munah keima kiangah hong kilak in." 
Exodus34:3 Nang tawh kuamah hong paito khawmsak kei inla, mualtung tengah kuamah omsak kei in. Tua mual mai-ah tuuhon ahi a, bawnghon ahi zongin gamtasak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:4 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a masa bangin suangpek nih a sui hi. Zingsang ciangin amah tho baihin, Topa in amah a thupiaksa bangin Sinai Mual tungah paito a, a khut sungah suangpek nih a tawi hi." 
Exodus34:5 Meii sungah Topa kum sukin tua lai-ah Moses tawh ding a, Topa in ama min a pulak hi." 
Exodus34:6 Ama mai-ah Topa pai-in, “Topa, Topa, hehpihna nei-in a dik Pasian; lungduai-in itna kip le thutakna tawh a dim;" 
Exodus34:7 mi tul tampite a dingin itna kip a nei; mawhna, thu palsatna le khialhna maisakin; ahih hangin bangbang hitaleh mawhna a khahkhong ngei lo; pate’ mawhna tate’ tung le tute’ tung, khang thum khang lina dongin a thukpa,” ci-in a pulak hi." 
Exodus34:8 Moses in leilak lamah a lu kunin a bia hi. 
Exodus34:9 Amah in, “Tu-in na muhna-ah maipha ka muh leh, Topa aw, kong thum hi; lungkhauh mite ka hita uh zongin kote’ kiangah Topa hong pai in. Kote’ mawhna le kote’ khialhna hong maisak inla, nangma mi dingin kote hong sang in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, keimah in thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Nangma mi khempeuh’ muhna-ah, leitung khempeuh hitaleh minam khatpeuh sungah hitaleh cikmahin tua bang a kibawl ngei lo na lamdangte ka bawl ding a, note’ lakah a om mite khempeuh in Topa’ nasepna mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ tungah kong bawl ding na pen a kihtakhuai thu ahi hi." 
Exodus34:11 “Tuni-a kong thupiak zui in. En in, na mai-ah Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite ka hawlkhia ding hi." 
Exodus34:12 Na paina leitangah a teng mite tawh thuciamna bawlkha kei inla, tua pen note a dingin thangzak a suahkhak loh nadingin nangmahmah kidawm in." 
Exodus34:13 Nangmah in amau’ biakna taute phelin, amau’ biakna khuamte kuaitanin, amau’ Asherah milimte na phukpai ding hi." 
Exodus34:14 ”(Pasian dang na bia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, ama min Aam a hi pa pen a aam Pasian ahi hi.)" 
Exodus34:15 Nangmah in tua leitangah a teng mite tawh thuciamna bawlkha kei in. Amaute in amau’ pasian-te tawh paktatna bawlin amau’ pasian-te’ tungah biakna pia-in, khatpeuh in note hong sap ciangin, note in ama biakpiakna na ne kha ding uh a," 
Exodus34:16 note in amau’ tanute na tapate uh a dingin la-in, amau’ pasian-te tawh paktatna a bawl a tanute in amau’ pasian-te tawh na tapate uh paktatsak kha ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:17 “A kisung pasian-te note a dingin bawlin na bia kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus34:18 “Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Abib kha, a kisehsa hun sungteng, nang kong thupiak mah bangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abib kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi." 
Exodus34:19 “Mihing le ganhing tacil a pa khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi. 
Exodus34:20 La a tacilte tuuno khat tawh na tanh ding uh hi. Na tat kei uhleh a ngawng na kuaitan ding uh hi. Na tapa cilte khempeuh uh na tanh ding uh hi. Keima mai-ah a guakin kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi. 
Exodus34:21 “Ni guk sung na na sem ding uh a, ahi zongin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi. Lokhawh hun le anlak hun sungin zong na tawlnga ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:22 “Nipikalte’ pawi, mangbuh a tung masa pawi, le kum bei ciangin an kaihkhop pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:23 “Pasal khempeuh Israel Pasian, Topa Pasian’ mai-ah kum khatin thumvei kilak ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ mai-ah minam dangte ka hawlkhia ding a, na gamgite uh nomau a dingin ka keek ding hi. Topa na Pasian uh’ mai-ah kum khatin thumvei a kilak dingin na paitoh sungun na leitang uh mi khat peuhpeuh in a hong deihgawh khak ding lunghihmawhna om lo ding hi." 
Exodus34:25 “Note in silngo tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, Paisan Pawi biakpiakna zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:26 “Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh’ inn-ah na paipih ding uh hi. “Note in keelno a pi’ nawizu tawh na huan kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:27 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih thute gelh in. Hih thute tawh kizui-in nang le Israel tawh thuciamna khat ka bawlzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:28 Tua lai-ah sun sawmli le zan sawmli sung Topa tawh Moses om a, tua hun sungteng anletui a ne kei hi. Amah in suangpek tungah thuciamna kammalte ahi thupiak sawmte a gelh hi." 
Exodus34:29 A khut sungah thuciamna suangpek nih tawh Sinai Mual tung panin Moses hong paisuk ciangin, Pasian tawh amah kiho khin ahih manin a maitang vun a taan lamtak Moses in thei lo hi." 
Exodus34:30 Aaron le Israel mite khempeuh in Moses a muh ciangin, a maitang vun na taang a, ama mai-ah a pai ding uh amaute lau uh hi." 
Exodus34:31 Ahih hangin amaute kiangah Moses pai hi. Aaron le mihon makaite khempeuh ama kiangah hong paikik uh a, Moses in amaute hopih hi." 
Exodus34:32 Tua khit ciangin Israel mi khempeuh a nai-ah hong pai uh a, Topa in Sinai Mual-ah ama tunga a gen khempeuh thupiakna-in amaute tungah a pia hi." 
Exodus34:33 Moses in amaute tawh thugen a man khit ciangin, amah in a maitangah kiliahna puan khat a koih hi." 
Exodus34:34 Ahih hangin Topa tawh a kiho dingin ama mai-ah Moses a tum peuhpeuh ciangin, amah a pusuah kik mateng a kiliahna puan la khia hi. Amah hong paikhia-in ama tungah a kipia thute Israel mite kiangah a gen ciangin," 
Exodus34:35 Israel mite in Moses’ maitang vun a taang mu uh hi. Amah tawh a kiho dingin a pai matengin Moses in kiliahna puan tawh a maitang a khuh kik hi. 
Exodus35:1 Moses in Israel mihonpi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Hihte pen note’ hih ding Topa’ hong thupiak ahi hi." 
Exodus35:2 Ni guk sungin nasep kiman ding a, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni-in thupi-a tawlngakna Sabbath siangtho Topa’ tungah na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus35:3 Sabbath ni-in na tenna khempeuh uhah mei na cih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus35:4 Moses in Israel mihonpite khempeuh tungah, “ Topa’ hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi:" 
Exodus35:5 Note in Topa’ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. A pia nuam peuhmah in Topa’ tungah biakna paipih un. Tuate in: Kham, ngun le sumngo," 
Exodus35:6 a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoihte, keelmul," 
Exodus35:7 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savunte; singkha sing," 
Exodus35:8 meivak a’ ding sathau, nilh sathau le a paknamtui dingin a namtui nate," 
Exodus35:9 siampipuan le awmdalah bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte ahi hi. 
Exodus35:10 “Note’ lak panin siamna a nei mi peuhmah hong paisak unla, Topa’ thupiaksa khempeuh bawlsak un. Tua a bawl dingte pen biakbuk," 
Exodus35:11 a puanbuk le a khuhna, a vankhainate le a khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, a bullente;" 
Exodus35:12 singkuang a zawlte tawh, hehpihna tokhom le kongkhak dalna puan;" 
Exodus35:13 sabuai a zawlte le a nazatte khempeuh tawh, Ompihna Anlum;" 
Exodus35:14 khuavak dingin meivakkhuam zong, a nazatte le a meivakte tawh, meivak dingin sathau;" 
Exodus35:15 paknamtui biakna tau, a zawlte tawh, nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui le biakbuk kongah kongkhak a’ ding puankhai;" 
Exodus35:16 meihal biakna tau, a sumngo siklen, a zawlte, a nazatte khempeuh, kuang le a ngakna tawh;" 
Exodus35:17 buktual a a puankhaite, a khuampite le a bullente tawh, tual kongpi a’ ding puankhai;" 
Exodus35:18 biakbuk khetphimte le huang khetphimte, le a khaute;" 
Exodus35:19 siangtho munah zat dingin limtakin a kigan puante, amau’ siampi nasep nadingin siampi Aaron a’ ding puan siangtho le ama tapate’ puante ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus35:20 Tua ciangin Israel mihonpi khempeuh Moses’ omna panin paikhia uh hi. 
Exodus35:21 Piak nopna lungsim a nei mi peuhmah hong pai tawm uh a, kikhopna buk le a nasep nading khempeuh le puan siangthote a zat dingin Topa a’ ding a piakte uh hong puak uh hi." 
Exodus35:22 Tua ahih ciangin numei, pasal hong pai uh hi. Piak nopna lungsim a neite khempeuh in tukkilhte, bilbahte, min gelhna zungbuhte, le banbulhte ahi kham tawh a kibawl na namkim hong paipih uh a, a milip in Topa’ tungah kham tawh piakna ap uh hi." 
Exodus35:23 A dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute, puan hoih, keelmul, a kisansak tuutal vunte, ahih kei leh savun hoihte ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah in tuate hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:24 Ngun ahi a, sumngo ahi zongin a pia thei peuhmah in Topa’ tungah tua nate paipih uh a, nasep nadinga kimang thei ding singkha sing a nei mi peuhmah in zong hong paipih hi." 
Exodus35:25 A hih thei numei khempeuh in a khut uh tawh khau khuk uh a, amau’ khuksa a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk khaute hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:26 Hih theih siamna a nei numei khempeuh in zong keelmul khuk uh hi. 
Exodus35:27 Makaite in siampipuan le awmdal a bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte," 
Exodus35:28 meivak ding, nilh sathau ding, le paknamtui dingin a namtui nate le sathau hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:29 Topa in Moses tunga a thupiaksa nasep nadingin na khat peuhpeuh a pia nuam numei pasal Israel mi khempeuh in utthu-a biakna-in Topa’ tungah hong paipih uh hi. 
Exodus35:30 Moses in Israel mite kiangah, “Thei un; Topa in a minin Judah minam, Hur’ tapa Uri, Uri’ tapa Bezalel sam khin hi." 
Exodus35:31 Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuh nasep nading, bulh ding suang seekna, le singzep nasep a sem dingin amah in vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna, le khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah kidimsak hi." 
Exodus35:32  
Exodus35:33  
Exodus35:34 Topa in amah le Dan minam Ahisamak’ tapa Oholiab tungah midangte hilh siamna pia khin hi. 
Exodus35:35 Amah in khutsiam nasep, geelsiam nasep; a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puanzep siam nasep; siamgat siamna, le geelsiam nasep ahi zongin nasep namkim a sem dingin amaute tungah siamna a guan hi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalel le Oholiab le biakbuk lamna-ah nasep khat peuhpeuh sep nading zia a thei dingin Topa in siamna le pilna a guat mi peuhmah in Topa’ thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus36:2 Moses in Bezalel le Oholiab le Topa in nasep siamna a guat mi, nasem a pai dingin a ut mi peuhmah a sam hi." 
Exodus36:3 Israel mite in biakbuk sep nadingin utthu-a a piak uh nate a paipih khempeuh uh amaute in Moses’ tung panin a sang uh hi. Amaute in zingsang simin utthu-a piakna ama tungah paipih uh ahih manin," 
Exodus36:4 biakbuk nasep a namkim a sem mi khempeuh amau’ nasepna ciat panin hong pai uh a," 
Exodus36:5 Moses kiangah, “ Topa in eite’ sep dingin a hong sawl nasep nadingin a kicing ding zahval, mite in tampi hong paipih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in thu pia-in giahphual khempeuhah thu kizasak a, “Numei hitaleh pasal hitaleh kuamah in biakbuk-a dingin pia thuah nawn kei un,” kici hi. Tua ahih ciangin a piak ding uh mite kikho hi." 
Exodus36:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ piaksa nate pen nasepna khempeuh hih nadingin kicing a, valzaw lai hi." 
Exodus36:8 Nasem mite’ lak panin a hih thei mi khempeuh in puan dal sawm tawh biakbuk bawl uh hi. Tuate pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih le a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh kibawlin hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh zem uh hi." 
Exodus36:9 Tua puan a dung pi sawmli le nih, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, a puan khempeuh kikim hi." 
Exodus36:10 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin, puan adang ngate zong khatlekhat mah khuituah uh hi." 
Exodus36:11 Amaute in a kikhuituah masa puan a nawlnung pen nawl dung sukah khau dum tawh a bilvangte bawl uh a, tua mah bangin a kikhuituah nihna puan a nawlnung pen nawl dung sukah zong tuate mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:12 Amaute in puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna puan nawlah bilvang sawmnga mah bawl uh a, a bilvangte khatlekhat kitang hi." 
Exodus36:13 Amaute in kham kilhna sawmnga bawlin, tua kilhnate tawh a puan khatlekhat kimatsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakbuk puan bupkhat a suak hi." 
Exodus36:14 Amaute in biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keelmul tawh puan dal sawm le khat a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:15 Tua puante a dung pi sawmli le nga, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, tua puan sawm le khatte kikim hi." 
Exodus36:16 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin, a puan dang gukte zong khatlekhat mah a khuituah uh hi." 
Exodus36:17 Amaute in a kikhuituah puan khat a nawlnung pen nawlah a bilvang sawmnga bawlin, puan dal a zom nawlah a bilvang sawmnga mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:18 Tuate bup khat a suah theih nading, puanbuk a kimatsak dingin amaute in kilhna sawmnga sumngo tawh a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:19 Amaute in puanbuk-a dingin a kisansak tuutal vunte le keel vunte tawh khuhna khat a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:20 Tua ciangin amaute in biakbuk-a dingin singkha sing tawh a po to khawm ding khuampeekte a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:21 A khuampeekte khat a tun pi sawm le pi nga hi a, a vai pi nih le letmat thum ciat ahi hi." 
Exodus36:22 A bulh nadingin khuampeek khat in zang nih ciat nei a, amaute in biakbuk khuam khempeuh a dingin a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:23 Amaute in biakbuk-a dingin khuampeekte hih bangin bawl uh hi: Leitaw lampang a dingin khuam sawmnih; 
Exodus36:24 a khuampeek sawmnihte’ bulah bullen sawmli ngun tawh, a zang nihte a dingin khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, le a khuampeek dang khat bulah a zang nihte a dingin bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:25 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam, leilu lampang a dingin amaute in khuampeek sawmnih" 
Exodus36:26 le ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawmli, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, adang khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:27 Nitumna lam, biakbuk nung lama dingin amaute in khuampeek guk a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:28 Biakbuk nung lam kiute a dingin a khuampeek nih zong a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:29 Tuate a bul lamah kikak a, ahih hangin a kual masa ah a dawn kimat hi. A kiu nihte-a dingin tua bangin nih a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:30 Ngun tawh kibawl amau’ bullente tawh khuampeek giat om hi: Bullen sawm le guk om a, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih ciat a om hi." 
Exodus36:31 Amaute in singkha singzawl, biakbuk pang khat-a khuampeekte-a’ dingin nga," 
Exodus36:32 biakbuk a pang langkhat a khuampeekte a dingin zawl nga, nitumna lam biakbuk nung lampang a khuampeekte a dingin zawl nga mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:33 A khuampeekte’ kimciang takah mong khat panin mong khat dongin a zawl laita paisuaksak uh hi. 
Exodus36:34 Amaute in kham tawh khuampeekte zutin, zawlte a len dingin kham tawh a kualte bawl uh a, kham tawh a zawlte a zut uh hi." 
Exodus36:35 Amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh dalna puan a bawl uh hi. Hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh amaute in tua dalna puan a zem uh hi." 
Exodus36:36 Tua puan a dingin amaute in singkha khuampi li bawl uh a, kham tawh tua khuampite a zut uh hi. A vankhainate pen kham hi a, tua khuamte a dingin ngun bullen li a sung uh hi." 
Exodus36:37 Amaute in puanbuk kongkhak-a dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh kongpuankhai khat le," 
Exodus36:38 a khuampi ngate a vankhainate tawh a bawl uh hi. Amaute in tuate’ luzepnate kham tawh zutin, a gaknate kham hi a, ahih hangin a bullen ngate pen sumngo ahi hi." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalel in singkha sing tawh singkuang bawl a, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum mah ahi hi." 
Exodus37:2 Kham citak tawh a sung le a pua zutin, a kimkotah kham geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:3 A kiu lite a dingin kham kual li, a pang khatah kual nih, a pang langkhat a dingin kual nih mah a sung hi." 
Exodus37:4 Singkha singzawlte zong bawl a, kham tawh tuate zutin," 
Exodus37:5 singkuang puak nadingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte a khum hi. 
Exodus37:6 Kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat bawl a, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
Exodus37:7 Amah in sek tawh a kiseek kham tawh kherub nih, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:8 Kherub khat mong khatah, kherub khat a mong langkhatah om a, a mong nihte-ah hehpihna tokhom tawh sakhatin kherub-te a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:9 Kherub-te in a khate uh tua tokhom tungah zalin, amau’ khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh a, amaute khatlekhat kimaingat uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-te’ mai a nga hi." 
Exodus37:10 Amah in singkha sing tawh sabuai zong bawl a, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat le alang, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
Exodus37:11 Kham citak tawh zut a, a kimkotah kham tawh a geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:12 Khut peek cia a pha zawl khat a kimkotah bawl a, a zawl kimkotah kham geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:13 Tua sabuai a dingin kham kual li sungin, a kiu li, a khe lite-ah a kualte a gak hi." 
Exodus37:14 Sabuai puak nading zawlte a len dingin a zawl gei-ah a kualte om hi. 
Exodus37:15 Sabuai puak nadingin singkha singzawlte bawl a, kham tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus37:16 Amah in sabuai tunga om ding beellekuangte, paknamtui a dingin kuangdaite le pakante, tui buah nadingin kuang-ukte le thawl gongbakte, kham citak tawh a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:17 Amah in kham citak tawh meivakkhuam zong a bawl hi. Meivakkhuam a bul le a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl hi. A haite, a nunte, le a paakte, meivakkhuam tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:18 A pangte panin hiang guk meengkhia a, a pang khatah meivakkhuam hiang thum omin, a pang langkhatah meivakkhuam hiang thum mah a om hi." 
Exodus37:19 Hiang khat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum, le adang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin meivakkhuam panin a hiang gukte a meengkhia ahi hi." 
Exodus37:20 A meivakkhuam tung mahmahah a nun le a pak tawh a om, almond gah bangin a kibawl hai li omin," 
Exodus37:21 meivakkhuam panin hiang guk a kopte’ bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om hi. 
Exodus37:22 Amau’ nunte le a hiangte pen tua tawh sakhat hi a, a buppi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:23 A meivak sagihte le a taitehte le a kuangte kham citak a bawl ahi hi. 
Exodus37:24 Amah in kham citak tawi sawmnih le tawi khat a gik tawh tua meivakkhuam le a nazatte khempeuh a bawl hi. 
Exodus37:25 Amah in singkha sing tawh paknamtui biakna tau bawl a, a dung pi khat le alang, a vai pi khat le alang mah ahi hi. Tua pen a ning kikim a, a sanna pi thum hi a, a kite pen tua biakna tau tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:26 Amah in a tungzang, a kimkota a pangte le a kite kham citak tawh a zut hi. A kimkotah kham geihual khat" 
Exodus37:27 le a puak nading zawlte a len dingin a pang tuak a geihual nuai takah kham kual nih a bawl hi. 
Exodus37:28 Amah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawlin, kham tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus37:29 Amah in paknamtui bawlte’ gawm bangin a siangtho nilh sathau le a siangtho a namtui paknamtui zong a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:1 Amah in meihal biakna tau zong singkha sing tawh bawl a, a dung pi sagih le alang, a vai pi sagih le alang mah ahi hi. A ning kikim a, a sanna pi li le alang ahi hi." 
Exodus38:2 Amah in tua tau a dingin a kiu lite-ah a kite a bawl hi. A kite, a tau tawh sakhat hi a, sumngo tawh a zut hi." 
Exodus38:3 Biakna tau nazat khempeuh, beelte, kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate le vutluahna peekte a bawl hi. A nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:4 Biakna tau a dingin a zawl nuai-ah, a kimciang a ban suk, a vang simsiam, sumngo siklen khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:5 A zawlte a len dingin sumngo siklen kiu lite’ tunga ding a kual li a sung hi. 
Exodus38:6 Singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawl a, sumngo tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus38:7 A puak nadingin biakna tau pangte a om a kualte sungah a zawlte khum a, singpekte tawh biakna tau a kuakin a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:8 Amah in kikhopna buk kongkhakah na a sem numeite’ limlangte panin sumngo tawh kisilna kuang le a ngakna a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:9 Amah in buktual a bawl hi. Leitaw lampang buktual a puan kikhaite pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih hi a, pi za le pi sawmnga a sau hi." 
Exodus38:10 A khuampite sawmnih hi a, a bullente zong sawmnih mah ahi hi. Sumngo tawh kibawl a, ahih hangin a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi." 
Exodus38:11 Leilu lampang a ding zong tua bangmah ahi hi. 
Exodus38:12 Nitumna lampang a dingin puan kikhai sukte pi sawmsagih le pi nga hi a, a khuampite sawm hi-in, a bullente sawm mah hi a, a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi." 
Exodus38:13 A mailam, nisuahna lama dingin pi sawmsagih le pi nga mah ahi hi." 
Exodus38:14 Kongpi pang khat-a ding puan kikhai sukte pen pi sawmnih le nih le alang hi a, khuampi thum le bullen thum tawh ahi hi." 
Exodus38:15 A pang langkhat ading zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Buktual kongpi hih lam le hua lamah khuampi thum le bullen thum tawh a puan khaisukte pi sawmnih le nih le alang ahi hi. 
Exodus38:16 Buktual kimkota puan kikhai sukte khempeuh pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih ahi hi. 
Exodus38:17 Khuampite a’ ding a bullente pen sumngo hi a, ahih hangin a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi. A khuamluzepnate a kizutna zong ngun hi a, buktual a khuamte khempeuh ngun kibawl gakna tawh kigak hi." 
Exodus38:18 Buktual kongpi puankhai pen a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem ahi hi. Buktual a kikhai sukte tawh kizui-in pi sawmthum sau-in, a vailam pi sagih le alang sang hi." 
Exodus38:19 A khuampite li hi a, a bullen lite sumngo hi a, a vankhainate ngun hi a, a khuamluzepnate le a gaknate a kizutna ngun mah ahi hi." 
Exodus38:20 Biakbuk le buktual kimkota ding khetphimte khempeuh sumngo ahi hi. 
Exodus38:21 Hihte pen siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ vaihawmna nuai-ah Levi mite’ sep ding Topa’ omna ahi biakbuk-a dingin Moses’ thupiakna tawh a kisim van malte ahi hi. 
Exodus38:22 Judah minam Hur’ tapa ahi Uri’ tapa Bezalel in Topa in Moses a thupiak khempeuh a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:23 A khut siam, a geel siam, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte a zem, Dan minam, Ahisamak’ tapa Oholiab in zong amah a huh hi." 
Exodus38:24 Nasep nadinga a kizang kham khempeuh, biakbuk lamna-a a kizang, a kipia khamte, biakinn shekel-in talen sawmnih le kua le shekel zasagih sawmthum ahi hi." 
Exodus38:25 Mi simna sungah a kihel mihonte tung panin a kingah ngunte, biakinn shekel-in talen zakhat le shekel tulkhat zasagih sawmsagih le nga ahi hi." 
Exodus38:26 Mi khat ciangin beka khat (biakinn shekel-in shekel lang) pai pia a, a pia mi, kum sawmnih a pha panin a tungsiah mi kisimna a a kisim peuhmah tul zaguk le tulthum le zanga le sawmnga ahi hi." 
Exodus38:27 Ngun talen za khatte pen biakbuk khuam bullente le dalna puan khuam bullente dingin sun’ ding ahi hi. Talen za khatte bullen zakhat, bullen khat ciangin talen khat ahi hi." 
Exodus38:28 Amah in shekel tulkhat zasagih sawmsagih le nga pen khuampi tunga vankhai nadingin bawl a, a khuamluzepnate zutin tuate a’ ding gakna a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:29 A kipia sumngo khempeuh, talen sawmsagih le shekel tulnih le zali ahi hi." 
Exodus38:30 Amah in tua tawh kikhopna buk kongkhakte a dingin khuam bullente, sumngo biakna tau le a sumngo siklen le biaknatau nazat khempeuh," 
Exodus38:31 buktual kimkota khuam bullente, buktual kongpi khuam bullente, biakbuk khetphimte khempeuh le buktual kimkota khetphim khempeuh a bawl hi." 
Exodus39:1 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, siangtho munah nasep nadingin amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh limtakin a kigan puan a bawl uh hi. Amaute in Aaron a dingin biakna puan siangtho a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:2 Amaute in siampipuan pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:3 Hoihtakin a kigeel, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte-ah zat dingin kham peek kiseekin khau-in kizen hi." 
Exodus39:4 Amaute in siampipuan a dingin liangkaih puan bawl uh a, a mong nih tegel ah zom uh hi." 
Exodus39:5 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh kibawlin, a nate le a sepna zia a kibang ahi hi."
