Exodus39:6 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kizui-in, onik suangte kitat a, kham tawh a kizepna sungah a minte kigelhin, min gelh siamte’ gelh bangin kibawl hi." 
Exodus39:7 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampipuan’ liangkaih puan tungah a bulh uh hi. 
Exodus39:8 Amaute in kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh, siampipuan a kibawl puan bangin hoihtakin awmdal a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:9 Tua awmdal a ning kikim a, thuap nihin kibawl a, a kikhep ciangin a dung letmat kua, a vai letmat kua mah a pha hi." 
Exodus39:10 Amaute in tua sungah suang gual li bulh uh a, Sardis suang, topaz suang, le karbankal suang gual khat pen a gual masa ahi hi." 
Exodus39:11 A gual nihna-ah emerald suang, sapfaia suang, le diamond suang ahi hi." 
Exodus39:12 A gual thumna-ah jakinth suang, agate suang, le amethyst suang ahi hi." 
Exodus39:13 A gual lina-ah beryl suang, onik suang, le jasper suang ahi hi. Kham tawh zepna sungah tua suangte khempeuh kikoih hi." 
Exodus39:14 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kituakin amaute’ min a kigelhna suang sawm le nih om hi. Tua min gelhnate pen minam sawm le nih a huamin a kigelh ahi hi. 
Exodus39:15 Amaute in awmdal tungah khau tawh a kibang, a kihual kham citak khainiang a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:16 Kham tawh a kibawl zepna nih le kham kual nih bawl uh a, awmdal mong nihte-ah kham kual nihte a koih uh hi." 
Exodus39:17 Amaute in awmdal mongte-ah a om kual nihte pen kham khau nihte tawh a khih uh hi. 
Exodus39:18 Amaute in zepna nihte tungah khau mong nihte zom uh a, tua bangin amaute in siampipuan’ liangkaih puan tung a mai lamah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:19 Tua ciangin amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampipuan tawh a kizom a sunglam nawl, awmdal mong nihte-ah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:20 Amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampipuan’ liangkaih puan nihte’ nuai a mailam, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuante’ puankhau a kizopna tung takah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:21 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuan khau tungah a om theih nading le siampipuan tung panin awmdal a kol theih loh nadingin amaute in siampipuan’ kualte-ah khau dum khatin a kualte tawh awmdal a gak uh hi." 
Exodus39:22 Amaute in khau dum bek tawh a kigan siampi puantualpi zong a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus39:23 A kikeek loh nadingin puantualpi ngawng pen puan ngawng vang bangin a ngawng kimkotah a zimna om hi. 
Exodus39:24 Puantualpi mongte-ah amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh mang kawlsing gahte a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:25 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in kham citak siklongte zong bawl uh a, puantualpi mong kimkot tunga mang kawlsing gahte’ kikalah siklongte a koih uh hi." 
Exodus39:26 Biak nasep nadinga puantualpi mong kimkot tungah siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, cih bangin kihelh hi." 
Exodus39:27 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in Aaron le a tapate a dingin khau hoih tawh a kigan puantungsilhte" 
Exodus39:28 le khau hoih tawh a kigan dialpi le khau hoih tawh a kigan lukhute, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl pheituam hoihte," 
Exodus39:29 le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl puan kawnggak le phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul puante zong a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:30 Amaute in kham citak tawh a siangtho kizepna peek khat bawl uh a, min gelhna a kibawl mah bangin tua tungah thu gelhin, “ Topa’ tungah siangtho,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus39:31 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amaute in a tunga dialpi tungah a gak dingin tua tungah khau dum khat a vawh uh hi." 
Exodus39:32 Tua bangin kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasep khempeuh kiman hi. Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh bangin Israel mite in sem khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute man khin uh hi. 
Exodus39:33 Amaute in biakbuk, a puanbuk le a nazat khempeuh, a vankhainate, khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite le a bullente;" 
Exodus39:34 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savun dangte tawh a kibawl khuhna le kong puankhai dalna puan; 
Exodus39:35 thuciamna singkuang, a zawlte le hehpihna tokhom tawh;" 
Exodus39:36 sabuai le a nazat khempeuhte le Ompihna Anlum; 
Exodus39:37 kham citak meivakkhuam le meivak a kibulhsa tawh a meivakte le a nazatte khempeuh le meivak a ding sathau; 
Exodus39:38 kham biakna tau, nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui le puanbuk kongkhak-a ding kongpuankhai;" 
Exodus39:39 sumngo biakna tau le a sumngo siklen, a zawlte le a nazat khempeuh; kisilna kuang le a ngakna;" 
Exodus39:40 buktual a puan kikhaite, a khuampite, a bullente le buktual kongpi-a ding kongpuankhai, a khaute le a khetphimte; le kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasepna-ah a nazat khempeuh;" 
Exodus39:41 siampi nasep nadingin siangtho mun a zat ding hoihtakin a kibawl puante, siampi Aaron a’ ding biakna puan siangthote le ama tapate’ puante, Moses kiangah a paipih uh hi." 
Exodus39:42 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin Israel mite in nasep khempeuh hih uh hi. 
Exodus39:43 Moses in nasep khempeuh vel a, amaute in Topa’ thupiaksa bangin a bawl khitna a mu hi. Tua ciangin Moses in amaute thupha a pia hi." 
Exodus40:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus40:2 “Kha masa a ni masa ni-in nangmah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk na lam ding hi. 
Exodus40:3 Tua buk sungah thuciamna singkuang na koih ding a, dalna puan tawh singkuang na dal ding hi." 
Exodus40:4 Tua ciangin sabuai tumpihin a om ding bangin na koih ding hi. Meivakkhuam zong tumpihin a meivakte na bulh ding hi. 
Exodus40:5 Thuciamna singkuang mai-ah paknamtui hal nadingin kham biakna tau na koih ding a, biakbuk kongkhak dingin kongpuankhai na khai ding hi." 
Exodus40:6 Kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhak mai-ah meihal biakna tau koihin," 
Exodus40:7 kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang na koih ding a, a sungah tui zong na koih ding hi." 
Exodus40:8 A kimkotah buktual na bawl ding a, buktual kongpi dingin kongpuankhai na khaito ding hi." 
Exodus40:9 “Tua ciangin sathau la-in, biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh na nuh ding a, biakbuk le a inn sungvan khempeuh na ap ding hi. Tua ciangin a siangtho biakna van a suak ding hi." 
Exodus40:10 Nangmah in meihal biakna tau le a nazat khempeuh zong sathau nuhin biakna tau na ap ding a, tua biakna tau a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Exodus40:11 Kisilna kuang le a ngakna zong sathau nuhin na ap ding hi. 
Exodus40:12 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron le ama tapate paipihin, tui tawh amaute na sil ding a," 
Exodus40:13 amah in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingin puan siangthote Aaron silhsakin, amah sathau nilhin na ap ding hi." 
Exodus40:14 Tua ciangin ama tapate zong paipihin puantungsilhte na silhsak ding a," 
Exodus40:15 amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute’ pa sathau na nilh bangin amaute zong sathau na nilh ding hi. Amau’ sathau kinilhna in amau’ khang tawntungin siampi hi paisuaksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus40:16 Moses in zong Topa in amah a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin a hih hi. 
Exodus40:17 A kum nihna a kha masa, a ni masa ni-in biakbuk kilam hi." 
Exodus40:18 Moses in biakbuk lam hi. Amah in a bullente koihin, a khuampeekte phut a, a zawlte khumin, a khuampite a phut hi." 
Exodus40:19 Biakbuk tungah a tungkhuhna zal a, Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin puanbuk a tung a khuh hi." 
Exodus40:20 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in thuciamna suangpek la-in singkuang sungah koih a, singkuang tungah a zawlte koihin, singkuang tung sanah hehpihna tokhom a nga hi." 
Exodus40:21 Biakbuk sungah singkuang paipihin, kongpuankhai dalna puan khai a, thuciamna singkuang a dal hi." 
Exodus40:22 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in biakbuk leilu lam pang, dalna puan pualam, kikhopna buk sungah sabuai koih a," 
Exodus40:23 Topa’ mai tua sabuai tungah a om ding bangin anlum a koih hi. 
Exodus40:24 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in biakbuk leitaw lam pang, sabuai tawh a kigalsai-in, kikhopna buk sungah meivakkhuam koih a," 
Exodus40:25 Topa’ mai-ah meivakte a koih hi. 
Exodus40:26 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in kikhopna buk sung, dalna puan mai-ah kham biakna tau koih a," 
Exodus40:27 tua tungah a namtui paknamtui a hal hi. 
Exodus40:28 Amah in biakbuk kongkhak ding kongpuankhai a mun dingah a khai hi. 
Exodus40:29 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhakah meihal biakna tau koih a, tua tungah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna a pia hi." 
Exodus40:30 Kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang koih a, tua sungah kisil nading tui zong a koih hi." 
Exodus40:31 Moses le Aaron le a tapate in amau’ khut le a khete uh tua tui tawh a sil uh hi. 
Exodus40:32 Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, kikhopna bukah amaute a pai ciang le biakna tau nai-ah a pai uh ciangin amaute kisil uh hi." 
Exodus40:33 Amah in biakbuk le biakna tau kiimah a buktual bawl a, buktual kongpi kongpuankhai a khai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a nasep a man ta hi." 
Exodus40:34 Tua ciangin meii in kikhopna buk tuam a, biakbuk sungah Topa’ minthanna vang a dim hi." 
Exodus40:35 Tua ahih manin kikhopna buk sungah Moses tum thei lo hi. 
Exodus40:36 A khualzin sung tawntung uh biakbuk tung panin meii a kilakkhiat toh peuhpeuh ciangin Israel mite mailam nawtin pai uh a," 
Exodus40:37 ahih hangin meii a kilakkhiat kei leh a kilakkhiat ni mateng amaute paikhia lo uh hi. 
Exodus40:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh a khualzin sung tawntung uh Israel mi khempeuh’ muhna-ah biakbuk tungah sunin Topa’ meii om a, zanin mei a om hi." 
Leviticus1:1 Topa in Moses sam a, kikhopna buk panin amah hopihin hih bangin ci hi:" 
Leviticus1:2 “Israel mite tungah gen inla, amaute tungah hih bangin ci in: Note khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah biakna na paipih uh ciangin, ganhing tawh na biakna pen bawnghon panin hitaleh tuuhon panin hitaleh na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus1:3 “Ama biakna pen bawnghon panin meihal biakna ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo a pa khat pia ding a, Topa’ mai-ah a kisan’ theih nadingin kikhopna bukkongah pia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:4 Amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga ding a, ama a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin kisang ding hi." 
Leviticus1:5 Tua ciangin amah in Topa’ mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi. Aaron’ suan siampite in a si hong paipihin, kikhopna buk kong-a biakna tau kimkotah a si theh ding hi." 
Leviticus1:6 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawkin semnen ding a," 
Leviticus1:7 Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin, mei tungah a ngeina bangin sing koih ding hi." 
Leviticus1:8 Tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in a sanente, a lutang le a thaute, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin koih ding a," 
Leviticus1:9 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna, Topa a dingin a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah a vekpi-in hal ding hi." 
Leviticus1:10 “Meihal biak nadingin ama letsong pen tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh a hon lak panin ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo a pa khat pia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:11 Amah in Topa’ mai biakna tau tung leilu lampangah go ding a, Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau tung kimkotah a si theh ding hi." 
Leviticus1:12 Tua ciangin amah in semnen ding a, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin siampipa in a lutang le a thau tawh koih khawm ding a," 
Leviticus1:13 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete amah in tui tawh sil ding hi. Siampipa in a vekpi-in pia-in, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa a dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus1:14 “ Topa’ tungah ama biakna pen vasa tawh meihal biakna ahihleh, amah in vakhu tawh ahi zongin, kawl vakhuno tawh ahi zongin, a biakna hong paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus1:15 Tua ciangin siampipa in biakna tau-ah paipihin a lu heektat ding a, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Biakna tau pangah a si taakkhiasak ding hi." 
Leviticus1:16 Amah in a tangkhai le a multe bot khia-in, vut koihna, biakna tau pang nisuahna lamah lawnkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:17 Amah in a khate-in balkek ding a, ahih hangin baltat lo ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tunga om sing tung, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa a dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus2:1 “Mi khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah an tawh biakna hong paipih le, ama biakpiakna pen annel hi ding hi. Amah in tua annel tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui koihin," 
Leviticus2:2 tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in annel khutdim le sathau, a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la ding a, siampipa in hih pen Topa a dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus2:3 An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron le a tapate a’ ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:4 “Nangmah in biak nadingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin, silngo sawh loh, sathau tawh a kizut mohpheng hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:5 “Na biakna pen beelpei daii tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahihleh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:6 Balnenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:7 “Na biakna pen sikbeel daii sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahihleh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:8 Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna, Topa’ kiangah na paipih ding a, siampipa kiangah a kipaipih ciangin amah in biakna tau-ah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus2:9 Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in, Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus2:10 An tawh biakna a valteng pen Aaron le a tapate a’ ding hi ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangthopen ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:11 “ Topa’ tungah na paipih an tawh biakna pen silngo tawh kibawl lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh silngo hitaleh khuaizu hitaleh khat peuhpeuh Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi. 
Leviticus2:12 Anpal tawh biakna ahihleh Topa’ kiangah na paipih thei ding hi. Ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi. 
Leviticus2:13 An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi. An tawh na biakna-ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci sawh loin na om kei ding a, na biakna khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi." 
Leviticus2:14 “Anpal tawh Topa’ tungah biakna na piak leh, anpal tawh na biak nadingin a vui thak panin kila-in a kigawivui, mei-ah a kihangkeu na pia ding hi." 
Leviticus2:15 Nang in a tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui na buak ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus2:16 Siampipa in phawk nadingin a kigawivui an pawlkhat le a sathau leh a paknamtui khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ahi hi. 
Leviticus3:1 “Mi khat’ biakna pen thunuama biakna ahih a, amah in a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh bawnghon lak panin a piak leh, amah in Topa’ mai-ah a sitbaang lo pia ding hi." 
Leviticus3:2 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go ding a, tua ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:3 Thunuama biakna panin Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuate’ tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau le a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:5 Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in mei tunga om sing tunga meihal biakpiakna tau tung mahah hal ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa a dingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus3:6 “ Topa’ tungah thunuama a piak ding ama biakna pen tuu le keel honte sung panin a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh ganhing khat ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo pia ding hi." 
Leviticus3:7 Amah in biak nadingin tuuno khat a piak leh, Topa’ mai-ah pia ding a," 
Leviticus3:8 a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:9 Tua ciangin thunuama biakna panin Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a thau, a nungguh ciangah a ki-attan a mei thau buppi le a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:10 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:11 Tua ciangin siampipa in Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. 
Leviticus3:12 “Ama biakna keel ahihleh, amah in Topa’ mai-ah pia ding a," 
Leviticus3:13 a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai-ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaron’ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:14 Tua ciangin Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:15 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:16 Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa -a’ ahi hi. 
Leviticus3:17 Tua pen na khang tawntungun na tenna khempeuh uhah note in a thau le sisan na nek loh nadingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus4:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih lo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin khial a, tuate khatpeuh a hihkhak leh," 
Leviticus4:3 a khial pa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a, mite tungah tua bangin mawhna hong tut leh, ama gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin a sitbaang lo bawngtalno khat Topa’ mai-ah khialhna hanga biakna-in amah piasak un." 
Leviticus4:4 Amah in Topa’ mai kikhopna buk kongah a bawngtal paipihin, bawngtal lu tungah a khut nga ding a, Topa’ mai-ah a bawngtal go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:5 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in a bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in, kikhopna bukah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus4:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in a si sungah a khutme diahin, biakbuk dalna puan mai Topa’ mai-ah a si kimkhat sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus4:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topa’ mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite a si kimkhat nuhin, kikhopna bukkongah a om meihal biakna tau bulah bawngtal si a omlai teng sungkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus4:8 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus4:9 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding a sintuamte" 
Leviticus4:10 (thunuama biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la ding a, siampipa in meihal biakna tau tungah tuate hal ding hi." 
Leviticus4:11 Ahih hangin bawngtal vun le a sa khempeuh, a lutang, a khete, a sungkuate, le a ek tawh," 
Leviticus4:12 a bawngtal buppi puakhia-in vut kibuakna, giahphual pualam mun siangtho khatah sing a kicih mei tungah amah in hal ding a, vut a kibuakna munah kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus4:13 “Israel mihonte khempeuh in theih lohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a, hih lo ding, ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh amaute in hihin a mawh uhleh," 
Leviticus4:14 amau’ gamtatnasa khialhna a kitheih ciangin, khialhna hanga biak nadingin mihonte in bawngtalno khat pia-in kikhopna buk mai-ah paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus4:15 Tua ciangin mihonte’ upate in Topa’ mai, bawngtal lu tungah amau’ khut nga ding uh a, Topa’ mai-ah tua bawngtal kigo ding hi." 
Leviticus4:16 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna bukah bawngtal si kimkhat paipih ding a," 
Leviticus4:17 a si sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topa’ mai-ah sagih vei theh ding hi. 
Leviticus4:18 Tua ciangin amah in Topa’ mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a si kimkhat zut ding a, kikhopna bukkongah a om biakna tau bulah si a omlai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. 
Leviticus4:20 Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi. Amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal a hihsa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi. Siampipa in amau a’ dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amaute kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:21 Amah in giahphual pua-ah bawngtal puakhia ding a, a masa bawngtal a hal mah bangin a hal ding hi. Tua pen mihonpi a dingin khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:22 “Ukpa khat khialin, hih lo ding, ci-in Topa ama Pasian in a thupiakte khempeuh lakah khat peuhpeuh theih lohna hangin hihkha-in a mawh ciangin," 
Leviticus4:23 ama gamtatnasa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh, amah in biakna-in a sitbaang lo keel pa khat paipih ding a," 
Leviticus4:24 keel lu tungah a khut nga-in, Topa’ mai, meihal biakna a kigawh nading munah go ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:25 Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuhin meihal biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng sung ding hi. 
Leviticus4:26 Thunuama biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:27 “Hih lo ding, ci-in Topa’ thupiakte khat peuhpeuh mi mawkmawk khat in theih lohna hangin hihin a khialh a, a mawh leh," 
Leviticus4:28 ama gamtatnasa a khialhna ama tungah a kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin biak nading a sitbaang lo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus4:29 Amah in a khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna munah khialhna hanga biakna go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:30 Siampipa in a khutme tawh si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a, biakna tau bulah si a omlai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:31 Thunuama biakna panin a thaute a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a, Topa a’ ding a gim namtui dingin siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:32 “Amah in khialhna hanga biakna-in a piak dingin tuuno khat a paipih leh, a sitbaang lo a nu khat hi ding a," 
Leviticus4:33 khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna a kigawhna munah khialhna hanga biak nadingin go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:34 Tua ciangin siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat a khutme tawh la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh ding a, biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:35 Thunuama biakpiakna panin tuuno thau a kilak khiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh lakhia ding a, Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah siampipa in hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:1 “Mi khatpeuh teci pang dingin a kisap ciangin a muhsa a theihsa thute gen loin a ip leh, amah in tua mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus5:2 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in gamlak ganhing nin a sisa hitaleh inn ganhing nin a sisa hitaleh a bokvak a nin ganhing a sisa hitaleh, a muh lohin a nin khat peuhpeuh lawngkha-in amah a nin a suah leh, a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:3 “Tua ahih kei leh amah in mihing nitna hitaleh, mu loin a lawnkhak leh, a theih ciangin a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:4 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in a sia bawl ding hitaleh a pha bawl ding hitaleh mite a kiciam theih ngei kiciamna nam khat peuhpeuh ama kam tawh a theih lohin a kiciampak khak leh, a theih ciangin hihte khat peuhpeuhah a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:5 “Hihte khat peuhpeuhah mi khat a mawh ciangin, amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding a," 
Leviticus5:6 mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuhon pan ahi a, keelhon pan ahi zongin a nu khat peuhpeuh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh, a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin Topa’ tungah biakna paipih ding a, siampipa in a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:7 “Ahih hangin amah in tuuno khat a piak zawh kei leh a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin Topa’ tungah biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin, khat khialhna hanga biakna, a khat meihal biak nadingin paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus5:8 Amah in siampipa tungah tuate paipih ding a, siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nading pen pia masa ding hi. Amah in a ngawng panin a lu heek ding a, ahih hangin heeksat lo ding hi." 
Leviticus5:9 Amah in khialhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat biakna tau pangah theh ding a, biakna tau bulah a si omlai teng taaksak ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:10 Tua ciangin amah in ngeina kip om bangin meihal biak nadingin a khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ahih hangin amah in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin a piak zawh kei leh, amah in a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin a biakna-in annel lawh khat, khialhna hanga biak nadingin paipih ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahih manin amah in tua sungah sathau khah lo ding a, paknamtui zong hel lo ding hi." 
Leviticus5:12 Amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding a, siampipa in phawkna-in khutdim khat la-in Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:13 Tua bangin siampipa in hihte khat peuhpeuh a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi. An tawh biakna-a mah bangin a omlai teng siampipa a’ ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus5:15 “Mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin thu palsatin Topa’ na a siangtho khat peuhpeuhah a khialh leh, a mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuhon sung panin a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel-in nangmah in a man sehin, amah in Topa’ kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:16 Amah in a siangtho na a hih khialhna-ah lohkikna zong bawl ding a, seh nga-ah khat gawm behin siampipa tungah pia ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:17 “Hih lo ding, ci-in Topa’ thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in hihin a khialh leh, a theih lohna hang hitaleh zong, amah a mawh hi veve-in, ama mawhna mah pua ding hi." 
Leviticus5:18 Tuuhon lak pan a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, a manzah ding nangmah in seh inla, amah in mawhna hanga biak nadingin siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi. Theihlohna hanga ama gamtatnasa khialhna hangin siampipa in ama a’ ding kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:19 Tua pen Topa’ tungah khial ahih manin mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:2 “Mi khatpeuh khialin, Topa’ thu palsatin, na kepsakna thu-ah ahi zongin, khapna nate’ thu-ah ahi zongin a vengpa khemin, ahih kei leh a na sutin, a vengpa nengniamin," 
Leviticus6:3 tua ahih kei leh a mang na khat mu-in tua thu-ah zuau-in a man loin kiciam a, mite a khialh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuhah" 
Leviticus6:4 khialin a mawh ciangin amah in a suhte hitaleh, a netniamna tawh a ngahte hitaleh, amah a kikemsak na hitaleh, a mang na a muh hitaleh," 
Leviticus6:5 a man loin a kiciamnasa na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh loh ding hi. Amah in a cingin lohin seh nga-ah khat piak beh ding a, a mawhna hanga biakna a piak ni-in a nei pa tungah pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:6 Tua ciangin a mawhna hanga a biak nading, tuuhon lak pan a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, Topa’ tungah a piak ding, a man ding nangma sehzah, amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus6:7 Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah ama a’ ding kilemna bawlsak ding a, mi khat a mawh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuhte-ah amah kimaisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:9 “Aaron le a tapate thu pia inla, hih bangin ci in: Hih pen meihal biakna ngeina ahi hi. Meihal biakna pen biakna tau tunga meikhuk tungah zingsang mateng zan tawntung om ding a, tua biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak den ding hi." 
Leviticus6:10 Siampipa in a saihadial puan silhin, a saihadial pheituam tengin, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna mei in a kattum vutte la-in biakna tau pangah koih ding hi." 
Leviticus6:11 Tua ciangin amah in a puante suahin puan dang silh ding a, giahphual pualam a siangtho mun khatah a vutte puakhia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:12 Biakna tau tunga mei kikuangsak den ding a, kimitsak lo ding hi. Siampipa in zingsang simin a tungah sing cihin, meihal biakna a ngeina bangin a tungah koihin, thunuama biakna thau a tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:13 Biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak tawntung ding a, kimitsak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus6:14 “Tua ciangin an tawh biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Aaron’ suante in biakna tau mai, Topa’ mai-ah pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus6:15 Mi khat in, biakna tau tungah a om an tawh biakna annel khutdim khat, a sathau le a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la-in, Topa a dingin a gim namtui, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:16 Aaron le a tapate in a omlai teng ne ding uh hi. A siangtho mun khatah silngo sawh loh in ne ding uh a, kikhopna buktual sung mun khat hi ding hi." 
Leviticus6:17 Tua pen silngo sawhin a ki-em hi lo ding hi. Meihal biakna hong kipiakna sung panin amau’ tanh dingin ka piaksa ahi hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna le mawhna hanga biakna bangin a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus6:18 Na khang tawntung uha dingin thu hong kipiak mah bangin, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna a kipiakna panin Aaron’ suante lakah pasal peuhmah in tuate ne thei ding hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:20 “Aaron le a suante sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa’ tungah hih bangin biakna kipia ding hi: An tawh biakna ngeina bangin annel lawh khat, alang zingsangin, alang nitakin pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:21 Tua pen beelpei tung khatah sathau tawh kibawl ding hi. An tawh biakna mah bangin limtakin helsa leh balnensa-in na paipih ding a, Topa a’ ding a gim namtui dingin na pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:22 Aaron’ suante sung panin amah a laih dingin sathau a kinilh siampipa in, thu a kipiaksa mah bangin Topa’ tungah pia ding a, a vekpi-in kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:23 Siampipa in an tawh a biakna peuhmah a vekpi-in kihal ding a, kine lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:25 “Aaron le a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Khialhna hanga biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Meihal biakna a kigawhna mun Topa’ mai-ah khialhna hanga biakna kigo ding a, tua pen a siangtho pen ahi hi." 
Leviticus6:26 Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khatah ne ding hi. 
Leviticus6:27 A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi. Puan tungah a si a kithehkhak ciangin, a siangtho mun khatah tua si a kithehkha pen kisawp ding hi." 
Leviticus6:28 Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi. Ahih hangin taaubeelin a kihuan ahihleh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi. 
Leviticus6:29 Siampite’ lak panin pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding uh hi. Tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus6:30 Ahih hangin siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin kikhopna buk sungah a kipaipih si a kilak khiatna, khialhna hanga biakna sa kine lo ding a, mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus7:1 “Mawhna hanga biakna ngeina, a siangtho pen hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:2 Amaute in meihal biakna a gawhna mun uhah mawhna hanga biakna go ding uh a, biakna tau kimkotah a si kitheh ding hi." 
Leviticus7:3 Tua ciangin a thau khempeuh, a meithau, a gilpi tuam a thau," 
Leviticus7:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sin tuamte kipia ding hi." 
Leviticus7:5 Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding a, tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:6 Siampite lakah pasal peuhmah in a siangtho mun khatah ne thei ding uh hi; tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:7 “Mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a, tuate a’ ding a ngeina a kibang hi ding a, kilemna a bawlsak siampipa in tua biakna sa ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:8 Mi khatpeuh’ meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna a vun ngah ding hi. 
Leviticus7:9 Mei bung sunga a ki-em an tawh biakna peuhmah leh sikbeel daii ahi a, beelpei tungah ahi zongin a kibawl khempeuhte, a pia siampipa in ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:10 An tawh biakna khempeuh, sathau a kihel hitaleh a kihel lo hita leh, Aaron’ suan khempeuh in a kikimin hawm ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:11 “Mi khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah a piak theih ding, thunuama biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:12 Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh, silngo sawh loh sathau tawh a kihel moh, silngo sawh loh mohpheng sathau tawh a kizut, annel moh sathau limtakin a kihelte, lungdam biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus7:13 Amah in lungdam koh nadingin thunuama ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi. 
Leviticus7:14 Amah in Topa biak nadingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding a, thunuama biakna si a theh siampipa in tua moh ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:15 Lungdam kohna-in thunuama ama biakpiakna a sa pen a piak ni-in kine ding a, a zingsang dong bangmah kisit lo ding hi." 
Leviticus7:16 “Ahih hangin ama biakpiakna pen thuciamna hanga biakpiakna ahi a, utthu-a biakpiakna ahi zongin ahihleh, amah in a biakpiakna a piak ni-in kine ding a, a omlai teng a zing ciangin kine ding hi." 
Leviticus7:17 Ahih hangin a ni thum ni-in biakpiakna sa a omlai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi. 
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni-in thunuama ama biakpiakna sa khat peuhpeuh a kinek leh, tua biakpiakna a piapa kisang lo ding a, tua pen ama a’ in zong kiciamteh lo ding hi. Tua sa a nin hi ding a, a ne pa in ama mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus7:19 “A nin na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kisawhkha sa kine lo ding a, mei tawh kihal ding hi. Ahi zongin a siang mi khempeuh in a sa ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:20 A nin hi napi-in thunuama Topa’ tungah biakpiakna sa a ne pa ama mipihte’ lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi. 
Leviticus7:21 Mi khatpeuh in mihing nin hitaleh ganhing nin hitaleh a kihhuai a nin khat peuhpeuh hitaleh lawng a, tua khit ciangin thunuama Topa’ tungah biakpiakna sa a nek leh, ama mipihte’ lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus7:23 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin a thau na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:24 A mawk sih ganhing thau leh gamsate in a balgawp ganhing thaute, nadangin kizang thei ding a, ahih hangin bangbang hileh na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ganhing thau a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihte’ lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi. 
Leviticus7:26 Tua tham loin note in na tenna uh mun khat peuhpeuhah vasa sisan hitaleh ganhing sisan hitaleh si peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus7:27 Si khat peuhpeuh a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihte’ lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus7:29 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa’ tungah thunuama ama biakpiakna a piapa in Topa’ kiangah ama biakna paipih ding hi. Thunuama ama biakpiakna panin 
Leviticus7:30 amah in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna a khutin paipih ding hi. Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biak nadingin a iik a kivei theih nadingin amah in a thau a iik tawh paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus7:31 Siampipa in biakna tau tungah a thau hal ding a, ahih hangin a iik pen Aaron le a suante a’ ding hi ding hi." 
Leviticus7:32 Thunuama na biakpiakna panin biakna-in siampipa tungah a taklam phei na pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus7:33 Aaron’ suante sung panin thunuama biakna si le a thau a piapa in a taklam phei a ngah ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kivei a iik le a kipia a phei pen keimah in Israel mite’ tung panin thunuama amau’ biakpiakna sung panin lakhia-in, Israel mite’ tung panin a tawntungin a ngah dingun siampi Aaron le a suante’ tungah ka pia khinzo hi." 
Leviticus7:35 Hih pen, Topa’ siampi na a sem dingin amaute a kipiak ni-in, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna sung panin amau’ tungah a kipia, Aaron leh a suante’ tanh ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:36 Israel mite in amaute tungah a piak nadingin amaute sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa in hih thu pia a, tua pen a khang tawntungun amau’ kaih ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:37 Hihte pen amau’ biaknate Topa’ tungah a piak nadingun amah in Israel mite Sinai sehnel gamah a thupiak ni-in Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses a thupiak, meihal biakna, an tawh biakna, khialhna hanga biakna, mawhna hanga biakna, ki-apna le thunuama biakna ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:38  
Leviticus8:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus8:2 “Aaron le amah tawh a om a tapate, a puante, a nilh sathau, khialhna hanga biakna a bawngtal, a tuutal nihte le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh la inla," 
Leviticus8:3 kikhopna bukkongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:4 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses in hih a, kikhopna bukkongah mihonte kikhawm hi." 
Leviticus8:5 Moses in mihonte kiangah, “Tu-a ka hih dingte pen Topa in hih dingin a thupiak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi. 
Leviticus8:7 Amah in a puantungsilh amah silhsak a, a kawnggak tawh gakin, a puantualpi silhsak a, a siampipuan silhsakin, siampipuan’ khau, hoihtakin a kigan tawh gak a, tua tawh ama tungah a khih hi." 
Leviticus8:8 Amah in ama tungah a awmdal bulhin, a awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim a koih hi." 
Leviticus8:9 Amah in Aaron’ lu tungah a dialpi khimsakin, a dialpi tung a mai lamah, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amah in kham peek, a siangtho kumpi lukhu a khusak hi." 
Leviticus8:10 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau la-in, biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh nuhin tuate a ap hi." 
Leviticus8:11 Amah in biakna tau tungah tuate kimkhat sagihvei thehin, biakna tau le a nazat khempeuh le kuang le a ngaknate, ap dingin sathau a nuh hi." 
Leviticus8:12 Amah in nilh sathau kimkhat Aaron’ tungah sung a, ap dingin amah a sathau a nilh hi." 
Leviticus8:13 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, Moses in Aaron’ tapate paipih a, puantungsilhte silhsakin, kawnggak tawh amaute gak a, amau’ lu tungah lukhute a khih hi." 
Leviticus8:14 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal paipih a, Aaron le a tapate in tua bawngtal lu tungah amau’ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:15 Kilemna bawl nadingin Moses in a bawngtal go a, a si la-in a kiima biakna tau kite a khutme tawh nuhin, biakna tau siangthosak a, biakna tau bulah a site sungkhia-in a ap hi." 
Leviticus8:16 A sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte le a kal nihte a thau tawh la-in, biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:17 Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a omlai a vun, a sa le a ek, amah in giahphual pualamah mei tawh a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:18 Tua ciangin Moses in meihal biakna tuutal pia a, Aaron le a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau’ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:19 Moses in tua tuutal go-in, biakna tau tung kimkotah a si theh hi." 
Leviticus8:20 Tuutal a kisemnen ciangin, Moses in a lu le a ki-atnente le a thau a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:21 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh a kisawp khit ciangin, Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in Moses in biakna tau tungah tuutal buppi a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:22 Tua ciangin Moses in a tuutal dang, kipsakna tuutal pia a, Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau’ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:23 Moses in tuutal go a, a si tawmkhat la-in Aaron’ taklam bilteep leh a taklam khutpi le a taklam khepi nuh hi." 
Leviticus8:24 Aaron’ tapate hong kipaipih a, Moses in amau’ taklam bilteepte le amau’ taklam khutpite le amau’ taklam khepite a si tawmkhat nuh a, a si a val laite, biakna tau tung kimkotah a theh hi." 
Leviticus8:25 Tua ciangin amah in a thau, a mei thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte, a kal nihte le a thau, le a taklam phei a la hi." 
Leviticus8:26 Topa’ mai-ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin amah in silngo sawh loh moh khat le sathau sawh anlum moh khat le mohpheng khat la-in, a thau tung le a taklam phei tungah tuate a koih hi." 
Leviticus8:27 Amah in hihte khempeuh, Aaron le a tapate’ khut sungah koih a, amaute in vei-a biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah tuate a vei uh hi." 
Leviticus8:28 Tua ciangin Moses in amaute’ khutsung panin tuate la-in, Topa’ tungah meihal biakpiakna, a gim namtui, kipsakna biakna-in biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a hal khawm hi." 
Leviticus8:29 Moses in a iik la-in vei-a biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah a vei hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin tua pen kipsakna tuutal panin Moses’ tanh ahi hi. 
Leviticus8:30 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau kimkhat le biakna tau tunga om a si la-in, Aaron le ama tapate le amau’ puante tungah a theh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le ama tapate, a puante uh tawh a apkhawm hi." 
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron le a tapate kiangah, “Keimah in thu hong pia-in, ‘Aaron le a tapate in ne ding uh hi,’ ka cih mah bangin, kikhopna buk kongah a sa huan unla, tua lai munah tua sa le kipsakna biakna lawh sungah a om anlum ne unla," 
Leviticus8:32 a sa le anlum na khamvalte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. 
Leviticus8:33 Note hong kikipsak nading hun ni sagih sung hi ding ahih manin, note hong kikipsakna hun a cin mateng, kikhopna bukkong pua-ah ni sagih sung na paikhia kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus8:34 Tuni-a kibawl bangin, note a dingin kilemna bawl ding, Topa in thu hong pia khin hi." 
Leviticus8:35 Kikhopna bukkongah ni sagih sung sun le zan na om ding uh a, Topa’ hong sawlte na hih ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh note na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang dingin keima tungah thu hong kipia hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:36 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron le a tapate in zong, Topa in Moses’ tungtawnin a thupiakte khempeuh a hih uh hi." 
Leviticus9:1 A ni giat ni-in Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel upate a sam hi. 
Leviticus9:2 Amah in Aaron’ kiangah, “Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawng pano khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat, a nih tuakin a sitbaang lo, la inla, Topa’ mai-ah tuate pia in." 
Leviticus9:3 Israel mite kiangah, ‘Khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat, le meihal biak nadingin bawngno khat le tuuno khat, a nih tuakin kum khat pha-in a sitbaang lo," 
Leviticus9:4 le thunuama biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah piak dingin bawngtal khat le tuutal khat, le sathau tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna la un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in note tungah Topa hong kilang ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus9:5 Amaute in zong kikhopna buk mai-ah Moses’ thupiak teng hong paipih uh a, mihonpite khempeuh a nai-ah hong pai-in Topa’ mai-ah ding uh hi." 
Leviticus9:6 Moses in, “Note tungah Topa’ minthanna vang hong kilat theih nadingin Topa in hih bangin thu hong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Leviticus9:7 Aaron’ kiangah, “ Topa’ thupiaksa bangin biakna tau mai-ah pai-in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna pia inla, nangma a’ ding le mite a dingin kilemna bawl in. Mite’ biakna paipih inla, amaute a dingin kilemna bawlsak in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus9:8 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in biakna tau naihin, ama a’ mahmah ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna bawngno a go hi." 
Leviticus9:9 Aaron’ tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in a si sungah a khutme diahin biakna tau kite nuh a, biakna tau bulah a si vallai teng a sungkhia hi." 
Leviticus9:10 Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin khialhna hanga biakna panin a thau le a kalte le a sintuamte biakna tau tungah a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:11 A sa le a vunte ahihleh giahphual pualamah mei tawh a hal hi. 
Leviticus9:12 Tua ciangin a meihal biakna a go hi. A tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tung kimkotah a theh hi." 
Leviticus9:13 Amaute in meihal biakna ama tungah a nen nenin a lutang tawh pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:14 Tua ciangin amah in a sungkuate le a khete sawp a, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a halkhawm hi." 
Leviticus9:15 Tua ciangin a masa-a khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin amah in mite’ biakna pia-in, mite a’ ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel la-in go a, khialhna hanga biak nadingin a pia hi." 
Leviticus9:16 Tua ciangin meihal biakna paipihin ngeina kip omsa bangin a pia hi. 
Leviticus9:17 Amah in zingsang a meihal biakna banah biakna paipihin, tua sung panin a khutdim la-in, biakna tau tungah a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:18 Moses’ thupiak bangin amah in mite a dingin thunuama biakna bawngtal le tuutal zong a go hi. A tapate in ama kiangah a si paipih uh a, amah in biakna tau kimkotah theh a," 
Leviticus9:19 bawngtal le tuutal thau, a mei thau, a gilpi tuam, a kalte, a sintuamte" 
Leviticus9:20 le a thau, amaute in a iikte tungah koihin, amah in biakna tau tungah a thau a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:21 Ahih hangin Aaron in a iikte le a taklam pheite, Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in a vei hi." 
Leviticus9:22 Tua ciangin Aaron in mite’ lamah a khutte laamto-in thupha a piak khit ciangin khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna le thunuama biakna a piakna panin hong paisuk hi. 
Leviticus9:23 Kikhopna buk sungah Moses le Aaron hong tum uh a, hong pusuah khiat ciangun mite thupha pia a, mi khempeuh tungah Topa’ minthanna vang hong kilang hi." 
Leviticus9:24 Topa’ mai panin mei hong piangkhia-in meihal biakna le biakna tau tunga om sathau a kang hi. Mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin awng uh a, lei maingatin a kunsuk uh hi." 
Leviticus10:1 Tu-in Aaron’ tapate Nadab le Abihu in amau’ paknamtui beel tuak la-in, a sungah mei koih uh a, a tungah paknamtui koihin, Topa in amau’ tungah tua banga thu a piak ngei loh a siang lo mei, Topa’ mai-ah a pia uh hi." 
Leviticus10:2 Topa’ omna mun panin mei hong paikhia-in amaute kang a, Topa’ mai-ah a si uh hi." 
Leviticus10:3 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron’ kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Ka kiang nai-a a omte kiangah keimah a siangtho-in ka kilak ding a, mi khempeuh’ mai-ah keimah hong kiminthangsak ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Aaron pau loin a om hi." 
Leviticus10:4 Moses in Aaron’ pa’ sanggampa Uzziel’ tapate Mishael le Elizafan samin amaute kiangah, “Hong pai unla biakbuk panin giahphual pualamah na sanggamte uh puakhia un,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:5 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hong naihin, Moses’ sawl bangin giahphual pualamah amau’ puantungsilh mah uh tawh amaute a puakhia uh hi." 
Leviticus10:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah, “Na lu uha na sam uh phiahsak kei unla, na puante uh balkek kei un. Tua bangin na hih uhleh note si-in, mihon khempeuh tungah Topa’ hehna hong tung ding hi. Ahih hangin na mipih uh, Israel mihon buppi pen, Topa’ mei in a katlup mite’ hangin dahin kap thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus10:7 Kikhopna buk kong panin a pualamah paikhia kei un. Na pai uhleh na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ nilh sathau note’ tungah om hi,” a ci hi. Moses’ gen bangin amaute a gamta uh hi." 
Leviticus10:8 Topa in Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus10:9 “Nang hitaleh na tapate hitaleh kikhopna bukah na pai uh ciangin leenggahzu hitaleh khamtheih zu hitaleh ne kei un. Na nek uhleh na si ding uh hi. Tua pen na suan na khakte uh tungah khang tawntungin ngeina kip khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus10:10 Note in a siangtho le a mawkmawk, le a nin le a siang na khen ding uh hi." 
Leviticus10:11 Topa in Moses tungtawnin amaute’ tunga a gensa thukhamte khempeuh note in Israel mite a hilh ding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:12 Moses in Aaron le a omlai a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah, “ Topa’ tungah meihal biakna sung panin a vallai ahi an tawh biakna la unla, tua pen a siangtho pen ahih manin silngo sawh lohin biakna tau gei-ah ne un." 
Leviticus10:13 Tua an pen Topa’ tungah meihal biaknate lak panin nang le na tapate’ kaih ding ahih manin a siangtho mun khatah na ne ding uh hi. Tua bang ding mahin kei’ tungah thu hong kipia hi. 
Leviticus10:14 Ahih hangin a kivei a iik le a kipia a pheite pen nang le na tapate le na tanute in a siangtho mun khatpeuhah ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Israel mite in thunuama a biakpiakna panun nang le na tapate’ kaih dinga hong kipia ahi hi. 
Leviticus10:15 Topa in a thupiaksa bangin a kipia a phei le a kivei a iikte ahihleh Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in vei dingin amaute in meihal biakna sathau tawh hong paipih ding uh a, tua pen nang le na tapate in a tawntungin na kaih ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:16 Tu-in Moses in khialhna hanga biakna keel tawh kisai thu limtakin kan a, na kihal khin mawk hi. Aaron’ tapa a omlai Eleazar le Ithamar-te’ tungah amah heh a," 
Leviticus10:17 “Note in mihonte a dingin Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlin, amau’ mawhna a kilakkhiat theih nadingin note’ tungah hong kipiasa a siangtho sa pen khialhna hanga biakna hi napi, bang hangin a siangtho mun khatah ne lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Leviticus10:18 En un, biakbuk sungah a sisan kipaipih lo hi. Ka thupiaksa bangin note in biakbuk sungah na nek dingun a kilawm ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:19 Tua ciangin Aaron in Moses kiangah, “En in, tuni-in amaute in Topa’ mai-ah amau’ khialhna hanga biakna le amau’ meihal biakna pia khinzo uh hi. Tua bang hinapi hih bang thute kei’ tungah hong tung veve hi. Khialhna hanga biakna tuni-in a ne hi leng, Topa’ muhna-ah sanhuai ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:20 Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin a lungkim hi. 
Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte pen leitung a om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:3 Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:4 Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hitaleh khecin kate lak pan hitaleh, note in na nek theih loh dingte uh: Kalaoh in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:5 Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:6 Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:7 Vok pen khecin ka ahih hangin eknel hai lo ahih ciangin note a dingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:8 Note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a, a sisate zong na lawng kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen note a dingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:9 “Tui sunga omte sung panin nek theih dingte: Tuipi sung hitaleh gun sung hitaleh tui sungah a om phe le lip a neite peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus11:10 Ahih hangin tuipi sung, gun sunga om phe le lip a nei lo, tui sunga a hontat ganhingte le tui sunga a nungta ganhingte pen note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:11 Tuate pen note a dingin a kihhuai hi ding hi. Note in tuate’ sa na ne kei ding uh a, a sisate zong na kih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:12 Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe le lip a nei lo peuhmah note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:13 “Vasate lak panin note in na kih ding uh, a kine lo ding, a kihhuaite: Muvanlai, mupi, luimu," 
Leviticus11:14 mumeika, musan nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:15 va-ak nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:16 vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:17 keising, tuimu, gun vakang," 
Leviticus11:18 gam vatawt, tui vatawt, musane," 
Leviticus11:19 gun vapi, gun vazonei nam khempeuh, huihtun, le bak ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:20 “Khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhing khempeuhte, note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:21 Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhingte khempeuh lak panin leitungah a tuan nadingun a khepek uh tawh kizom ngaltak tawn a neite na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:22 Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte uh: Kauphe kitom nam khempeuh, kauphe zol nam khempeuh, khuangbai nam khempeuh, le kauphe kisau nam khempeuh ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:23 Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:24 “Hihte tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi. A sisa a lawng peuhmahte a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a," 
Leviticus11:25 a sisa themkhat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:26 A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hai lo ganhing peuhmah note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:27 Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amau’ khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawngkha peuhmahte a nitak dong a nin hi ding a," 
Leviticus11:28 a sisa a puapa in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tuate note a dingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:29 “Leitungah a vak kawikawi, a pai thei ganhingte lak panin note a dingin a ninte: Savokphual, zusa, innhikpi nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:30 tawlbawkpi, tang, tangteuh, le sehnel gam thankik ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:31 A hontat ganhing khempeuhte lak panin hihte pen note a dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:32 Tuate a sisa khat peuhpeuh a tukna nate, sing nazat, puan, savun, ippi le na khat peuhpeuhin a kizang beel khat peuhpeuh hitaleh a nin hi ding hi. Tuate pen tui sungah kidiah ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:33 Tuate khat peuhpeuh lei beel khat peuhpeuh sungah a kiat leh, tua sunga om khempeuh a nin hi ding a, note in tua beel na sukham ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:34 Tua lei beel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:35 Tua bang a sisa themkhat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. Meibung hitaleh beelpei hitaleh kisuzan ding hi. Tuate a nin hi a, note a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:36 Ahi zongin tuinak le tuibeem ahihleh a siang hi ding a, ahih hangin a sisate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:37 A kivawh ding khaici tungah tua a sisate themkhat a tuk leh, tua khaici a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:38 Ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a, tua a sisate themkhat tua khaici tungah a tuk leh, note a dingin tua khaici a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:39 “Note’ nek theih ding ganhing khat peuhpeuh a sih leh a sisa a lawng pa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a," 
Leviticus11:40 a sisa a ne pa in ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. A sisa a puapa in zong ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:41 “Leitungah a hontat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai hi a, tuate kine lo ding hi." 
Leviticus11:42 A awmtal peuhmah leh khe li-a a pai peuhmah, ahih kei leh khe tampi a nei, leitungah a pai a hontat ganhing khempeuh, note in na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:43 A hontat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawltawm kei ding uh a, tuate tawh nomau na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi. Na kinitsak tawm uhleh a nin na suak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:44 Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla, kei siangtho ka hih manin note zong siangtho un. Leitungah a bokvak a hontat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh note na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong pai khiatpih pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus11:46 Hih pen a nin le a siang, a nungta ganhing nek theih ding le nek theih loh ding khen nadingin ganhing le vasa, tui sunga a pai a nungta ganhing khempeuh, le leitungah a hontat ganhing khempeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:47  
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus12:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Nupi khat gai-in ta pasal a neih leh ni sagih sung tua nu a nin hi ding a, a nin neih huna mah bangin amah a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus12:3 A ni giat ni-in a naungek vun dawn ki-at ding hi. 
Leviticus12:4 Tua ciangin nupi in ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawmthum le ni thum sung omlai ding hi. Amah in kisiansuahna ni a cin mateng a siangtho na khat peuhpeuh lawng loin, biakbuk sungah zong tum lo ding hi." 
Leviticus12:5 “Ahih hangin amah in ta numei a neih leh, ama nin neih huna mah bangin nipikal nih sung a nin hi ding hi. Ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawmguk le ni guk sung omlai ding hi." 
Leviticus12:6 “Amah a kisiansuahna hun a cin ciangin tapa a’ ding hitaleh tanu a’ ding hitaleh, amah in kikhopna bukkong a siampipa kiangah meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha tuuno khat, le khialhna hanga biak nadingin kawl vakhuno khat ahi a, vakhu khat ahi zongin pia ding a," 
Leviticus12:7 siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah pia-in, ama a’ ding kilemna bawlsak ding hi. Tua ciangin ama si luanna panin tua nu a siang hi ding hi. Hih pen ta pasal hitaleh ta numei hitaleh a nei nu a dingin ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus12:8 “Tua nu in tuuno a piak zawh kei leh vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin paipih ding a, khat pen meihal biak nading, adang khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading ahi hi. Siampipa in ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, tua nu a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus13:2 “Mi khat in ama pumpi vun tungah a bawk ahi a, meima ahi a, a mel tuampian ahi zongin a neih a, tua pen ama pumpi vun tungah phaknatna a suah leh, tua pa pen siampipa kiang ahi a, ama tapa siampi khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin kipaipih ding hi." 
Leviticus13:3 Siampipa in ama pumpi vun tunga natna mun vel ding hi. A natna munah a om a multe kangin ama vun sangin a natna thuktum zaw-in a kimuh leh, tua pen phaknatna hi a, siampipa in a vel khit ciangin amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:4 Ahih hangin ama pumpi vun sungah a natna mun kang napi-in, a vun sangin a thuk lozaw bangin omin, tua sungah a multe kang loin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cina pa khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:5 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding a, a natna noptuamin, a natna in a vun sung lawh lo hi ci-in a muh leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung mah khumcip lai ding hi." 
Leviticus13:6 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel kik ding a, a natna mun mualin, a vun sung a lawh kei leh, siang hi, ci-in siampipa in gen ding hi. Tua pen meima mawkmawk hi lel a, amah in a puante sawpin a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:7 Ahih hangin amah a sian nadingin siampipa kiangah a kilah khit ciangin a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh siampipa mai-ah kilak kik ding hi. 
Leviticus13:8 Siampipa in vel ding a, a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:9 “Mi khat in meima a neih ciangin siampipa kiangah kipaipih ding hi. 
Leviticus13:10 Siampipa in vel ding a, a vun sungah a bawk kang omin, tua in a multe kangsakin a bawk sungah ma thak a om leh," 
Leviticus13:11 tua pen ama pumpi vun sungah a om luisa phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin khumcip lo ding hi." 
Leviticus13:12 Siampipa’ muh theihna ciangah tua natna in a vun phukhamin, tua natna a veipa’ vun khempeuh a lutang panin a khe dongin a lawh khit leh," 
Leviticus13:13 siampipa in vel ding a, a natna in a pumpi khempeuh a lawh khit leh siampipa in tua natna tawh kisai-in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. A pumpi-in kang khin ahih manin amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:14 Ahih hangin ama tungah ma thak a kilat ciangin amah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus13:15 Siampipa in a ma thak velin, amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ma thak pen phaknatna ahih manin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:16 Ahih hangin a ma thak pen kikheel kikin a kang a suah leh, siampipa kiangah pai ding a," 
Leviticus13:17 siampipa in amah velin a natna pen a kang a suah leh, siampipa in natna a veipa siang hi, ci-in gen ding a, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:18 “Mi khatpeuh’ pumpi vun sungah a damsa meimatum khat om a," 
Leviticus13:19 a meimatum munah a bawk kang ahi a, a san kang mun ahi zongin a om leh, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi." 
Leviticus13:20 Siampipa in vel ding a, tua pen a vun sangin thukzaw-in a multe a kang a suah leh, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen phaknatna hi a, meimatum sung tawnin hong phukhia ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:21 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua tunga a multe kang loin a vun sangin a thukzawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:22 Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:23 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a kilawh kei leh meimatum pawn hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:24 “Tua ahih kei leh, pumpi in a vun tungah meikangma khat nei-in tua meikangma a thak mun pen a san kang ahi a, a kang ahi zongin hong suah leh," 
Leviticus13:25 siampipa in vel ding hi. Tua mun a om a multe kangin a vun sangin a natna a thukzawk leh, tua pen phaknatna ahi hi. Tua pen meikangma tawnin hong phukhia hi a, phaknatna ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:26 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua mun a multe kang loin a vun sangin a thukzawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:27 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding hi. Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phaknatna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:28 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a vun sung lawh loin mualin a om leh, tua pen meikangma pana bawk hi a, meikangma pawn ahih manin siampipa in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:29 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin a lutang tung ahih kei leh a kha-ah meima khatpeuh a neih ciangin," 
Leviticus13:30 siampipa in tua natna vel ding hi. Tua natna pen a vun sangin thukzaw-in a kimuh a, a sunga a multe eng-in a mal a neu leh, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen cithak ahi, lu-phak ahih kei leh kha-phak natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:31 Siampipa in cithak natna velin, a vun sangin thukzaw lo bangin kimu-in tua sungah mul vom a om kei leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cithak natna tawh tua pa khumcip ding a," 
Leviticus13:32 a ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a natna vel ding hi. A cithak kilawh loin, a sungah mul eng om loin, a cithak pen a vun sangin thukzaw loin a kimuh leh," 
Leviticus13:33 amah le amah a mul kikiat ding a, ahih hangin a cithak san kiat lo ding hi. Siampipa in adang ni sagih sung mah cithak natna tawh tua pa khum ding hi." 
Leviticus13:34 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a cithak vel ding a, a cithak in a vun sung lawh loin, a vun sangin a thuk lo zaw-in a kimuh leh, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah in ama puante sawp ding a, a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:35 Ahih hangin amah a kisiansak khit ciangin a cithak in a vun sung a lawh leh," 
Leviticus13:36 siampipa in vel ding a, a cithak in a vun sung a lawh takpi leh, siampipa in mul eng a zon ding kisam lo hi; amah a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:37 Ahih hangin ama mitah, cithak noptuam zo hi, ci-in mu a, a sungah mul vom po-in a cithak a dam leh, amah a siang hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:38 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, a pumpi vun tungah a mel tuampian a kang mun a neih leh," 
Leviticus13:39 siampipa in vel ding a, a pumpi vun tunga om a tuampian munte pen a kang milmial ahihleh, tua pen vun a phukham meima hi a, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:40 “Mi khat a sam pulh a, a lu a tol hangin amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:41 Mi khat a taltang le a paang panin a sam le a mul a pulh leh, amah a talkolh hi lel a, amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:42 Ahih hangin a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh ah a san kang meima a om leh, tua pen a lutol tung ahih kei leh a talkolh tunga a suakkhia phaknatna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:43 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah vel ding a, a bawk natna pen a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh ah, pumpi vun tunga phak om tawh kibangin a san kang ahihleh," 
Leviticus13:44 amah pen miphak hi a, a nin ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in a gen kul hi; a lutang tungah ama natna a om ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:45 “Tua natna a nei mi phakpa in puankekte silhin a sam phiahsak ding a, amah in a muk humin, ‘Nin, nin!,’ ci-in kiko ding hi." 
Leviticus13:46 Amah in a natna a neih laiteng a nin hi ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin giahphual pualam mun khatah amah guak teng ding hi. 
Leviticus13:47 “Samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh, puan khat peuhpeuh tungah phaknatna a om ciang," 
Leviticus13:48 tua saihadial puan, samul puante, a tung le a pheite’ tung hitaleh, savun le savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin," 
Leviticus13:49 tua natna pen a hing melin ahi a, a san melin ahi zongin puan tungah a kilat ciang, puan a tung a phei tung hitaleh savun le savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin, tua pen phaknatna hi a, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi." 
Leviticus13:50 Siampipa in a natna vel ding a, tua natna a banna na pen ni sagih sung koihcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:51 Tua ciangin amah in a ni sagih ni-in a natna velkik ding hi. A natna pen puan tungah kizelin, puan a tung a phei-ah hitaleh, savun le savun a kizatna na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh, tua natna pen a lauhuai phaknatna hi a, a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:52 Amah in a puan hal ding hi. Tua natna pen puan a tung a phei-ah hitaleh, samul puan saihadial puan hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh hal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen a lauhuai phaknatna ahih manin mei sungah kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus13:53 “Siampipa in velin, a natna pen puan tung, a tung a phei-ah hitaleh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kizelh kei leh," 
Leviticus13:54 siampipa in tua natna a banna pen amaute in a sawp ding uh thu pia ding a, amah in adang ni sagih sung mah tua na koihcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:55 Siampipa in tua natna a banna pen a kisawp khit ciangin vel ding hi. Tua natna a banna mun a mel a kikheel kei leh, a natna a kizelh loh hangin tua pen a nin mah ahi hi. Tua natna pen a sunglamah ahi a, a pualamah ahi zongin a baan leh mei sungah tua puan na hal ding uh hi." 
Leviticus13:56 Ahih hangin siampipa in vel a, a kisawp khit ciangin a meima a mualh leh, amah in a puan tung pan hitaleh savun tung pan hitaleh a puan a tung a phei tung pan hitaleh natna a banna mun balkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus13:57 Tua ciangin a puan tung hitaleh puan a tung a phei tungah hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kilatkik leh, tua natna a kizel ahih manin natna a banna pen mei tawh na hal ding uh hi." 
Leviticus13:58 Ahih hangin a puan hitaleh puan a tung a phei hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh a kisawp khit ciangin tua natna a paikhiatna na pen, a nih veina kisawp kikin a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus13:59 Hih pen samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh puan a tung hitaleh a phei hitaleh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om phaknatna tawh kisai-in siang hiam, nin hiam, ci-in khen nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus14:2 “Hih pen amah a kisiansak ni-in mi phakpa’ zuih ding ngeina hi ding hi. Siampipa kiangah amah kipaipih ding a," 
Leviticus14:3 giahphual pualamah siampipa paikhia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phaknatna pen a phakpa’ tung pan a dam leh," 
Leviticus14:4 a kisiangsak ding mipa a dingin a hing vasa siang nih le taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi. 
Leviticus14:5 Amaute in lei beel khat sunga kikoih tuiluang tungah a vasa khat a gawh ding uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi. 
Leviticus14:6 Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah tawh la khawmin, tuate le a hing lai vasa pen tuiluang tunga kithat vasa’ si sungah diah ding hi." 
Leviticus14:7 Amah in phaknatna panin a kisiangsak ding pa’ tungah sagihvei theh ding a, tua ciangin amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding a, a hing vasa pen gamlakah khah ding hi." 
Leviticus14:8 A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin, a mul khempeuh metkhia-in, tui sungah amahmah kisilin, amah a siang hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah giahphual ah hong ciah ding a, ahih hangin ama puanbuk pualamah ni sagih sung om ding hi." 
Leviticus14:9 A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam, a khamul le a mitkhu mul, le a pum tungah a om a mul khempeuh metkhia ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi silin, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus14:10 “A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa nih, le a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a nu khat, le an tawh biakna ahi sathau tawh annel lawh thum le sathau biingta khat la ding hi." 
Leviticus14:11 Amah a siangsak ding siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa le hih nate, kikhopna bukkong a Topa’ mai-ah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:12 Siampipa in tuuno a pa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in, vei-a biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah tuate vei ding hi." 
Leviticus14:13 Amaute in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna, siangtho mun sunga a gawhna mun uhah amah in tuuno go ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin siampipa a’ hi a, tua pen a siangthopen ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:14 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in, tua si pen a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, le a taklam khepi nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:15 Tua ciangin sathau biingta panin kimkhat la-in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah sungin," 
Leviticus14:16 a veilam khutsunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin, a khutme tawh a sathau kimkhatte Topa’ mai-ah sagihvei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:17 Ama khut sungah a omlai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, le a taklam khepi nuhin, mawhna hanga biakna si tungah koih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:18 Siampipa in a khutsunga sathau omlai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama a dingin Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi. 
Leviticus14:19 “A nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin siampipa in a khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go ding a," 
Leviticus14:20 meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate, biakna tau tungah pia ding hi. Tua bangin siampipa in ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus14:21 “Ahih hangin amah zawngin tuazah a piakzawh kei leh, ama a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin a kivei ding, mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuno a pa khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat le sathau biingta khat pia ding a," 
Leviticus14:22 vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin, a piakzawh bangbang pia ding hi. Khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading hi a, a khat pen meihal biak nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:23 A ni giat ni-in amah in Topa’ mai, kikhopna bukkong, siampipa kiangah ama kisianthosak nadingin tuate paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:24 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno, le a sathau biingta khat la-in, vei-a biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah tuate vei ding hi." 
Leviticus14:25 Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in, a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, le a taklam khepi nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:26 Siampipa in amahmah’ veilam khut sungah a sathau kimkhat sung ding a," 
Leviticus14:27 a veilam khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a taklam khutme tawh Topa’ mai-ah sagihvei theh ding hi. 
Leviticus14:28 Siampipa in ama khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a kisiangthosak ding mipa’ taklam bilteep, taklam khutpi, le a taklam khepite, mawhna hanga biakna si a kikoihna munah va nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:29 Siampipa in a khutsunga a omlai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa a’ ding Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawl nadingin a lu nilhsak ding hi. 
Leviticus14:30 Amah in vakhu hitaleh kawl vakhuno hitaleh, a piakzawh bangbang pia-in," 
Leviticus14:31 khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading, a khat pen meihal biak nadingin an-a biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi. Siampipa in a kisiangthosak pa a dingin Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus14:32 Hih pen phaknatna a vei, a kisianthosak nadingin biakna a pia zo lopa a dingin ngeina ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus14:34 “Note a dingin kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun note’ leitang a inn khat sungah phaknatna kong tunsak ciangin," 
Leviticus14:35 inn nei pa pai-in siampipa kiangah, ‘Ka inn sungah natna nam khat a om ding tawh kibang,’ ci ding hi." 
Leviticus14:36 Tua ciangin, inn sunga om na khempeuh a nin hi, a kicih khak loh nadingin a natna a vel dingin siampipa a pai ma-in amaute in tua inn a na hawmsak nading uh thu pia ding a, tua khit ciangin inn vel dingin siampipa pai ding hi." 
Leviticus14:37 Amah in a natna vel ding hi. A natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin, a hing mel ahih kei leh a san mel na pua-in, tua natna kawm maitang sangin a thuk zawk tuak leh," 
Leviticus14:38 innsung panin innkongah siampipa paikhia ding a, ni sagih sung inn khakcip ding hi." 
Leviticus14:39 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong paikikin en ding hi. Tua inn kawm tungah a natna a kizelh leh," 
Leviticus14:40 natna a banna suang lakhia-in khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah a paipih nadingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi. 
Leviticus14:41 Amah in a innsung kimkot kiatsakin, amaute in a kiatkhiat, a kizutna themte, khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah bua ding uh hi." 
Leviticus14:42 Tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in, tua suangte’ omna munah koihin, amah in zutna dang la-in tua inn zut ding hi." 
Leviticus14:43 “Amah in a suangte lakhia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah natna hong suahkik leh," 
Leviticus14:44 siampipa pai-in en ding hi. Inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh, tua pen inn sunga om a lauhuai phaknatna hi a, tua inn a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:45 Amah in tua inn, a sing a suang le inn a kizutnate khempeuh phel ding a, khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah tuate puakhia ding hi." 
Leviticus14:46 Tua tham loin tua inn a kikhakcip sungteng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus14:47 Tua inn sungah a lum mipa le an a ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi. 
Leviticus14:48 “Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a, a inn a kizut khit ciangin inn sungah natna a kizelh kei leh, tua ciangin a natna dam ahih manin siampipa in tua inn siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus14:49 Tua inn siangthosak nadingin amah in vasa neu nih, taamtak sing le a ausan khau le puknah tawh la khawmin," 
Leviticus14:50 beel sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat go ding a," 
Leviticus14:51 taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin, tua pen a kigo vasa’ si le tuiluang sungah diahin, tua inn sagihvei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:52 Tua bangin amah in vasa si tawh, tuiluang tawh, a hing vasa tawh, taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau tawh a inn siangsak ding a," 
Leviticus14:53 vasa hing pen khuapi pualam gamlakah khahkhia ding hi. Tua bangin amah in tua inn a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, tua inn a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus14:54 Hih pen phaknatna khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: Cithak tawh kisai," 
Leviticus14:55 puan tung hitaleh innsung hitaleh ah a om phaknatna tawh kisai," 
Leviticus14:56 a bawk hitaleh meima hitaleh a tuampian’ khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in," 
Leviticus14:57 bang hunin nin a, bang hunin siang hiam, ci-in lah nading ahi hi. Hih pen phaknatna tawh kisai ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh, a natui a paikhiat ciangin tua a paikhia a natui pen a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus15:3 Amah a ninsak a natui paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: A natui a paipai a, a khawl zongin, ama sungah nitna mah hi veve hi." 
Leviticus15:4 A natui a paikhia mipa’ lupna le a tutna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:5 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:6 A natui a paikhia mipa’ tutnasa na khat peuhpeuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:7 A natui a paikhia mipa’ pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:8 A natui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipa’ tungah cil a siat leh, tua pa in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:9 A natui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphah khat peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:10 Ama nuai-ah a om na khat peuhpeuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang na a pua mipa in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:11 A natui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sil lopi-in a lawn’ mi peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:12 A natui a paikhia mipa in a lawn’ lei tawh kibawl umlebeelte kisukham ding a, sing tawh kibawl kuanglekeute ahihleh tui sungah kisawp ding hi." 
Leviticus15:13 “A natui a paikhia mipa a natui a kan ciangin a kisiansak nadingin amah in ni sagih sung ngak ding a, tua ciangin a puante sawpin, tuiluang sungah a pumpi sil ding a, a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:14 A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in, Topa’ mai kikhopna bukkongah pai-in, siampipa tungah tuate pia ding hi." 
Leviticus15:15 Siampipa in tuate, khat khialhna hanga biak nading le adang khat meihal biak nadingin pia ding a, a natui a paikhia mipa a dingin siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus15:16 “Mi khat in a natui a teh leh, amah in a pumpi khempeuh tui sungah sil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:17 A tungah a natui a tukna puan le savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:18 Pasal le numei a lupkhawm khit ciangin, amau tegel tui sungah kisil ding uh a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding uh hi." 
Leviticus15:19 “Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin, ni sagih sung a ninin om ding a, amah a lawng mi peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:20 Amah a nit hun sungin a lupna le a tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:22 Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a, tui sungah amahmah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:23 Ama tutna ahi lupna hitaleh na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh, mi khat in a lawn’ ciangin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:24 Pasal khat peuhmah tua nu tawh lumin, tua nu’ nitna ama tungah a om leh, ni sagih sung tua pa a nin hi ding a, tua pa’ lupna peuhmah zong a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:25 “Numei khat in ama nit hun hi lo napi-in ni tampi sung a si a suak ahi a, ama nit hun sung khengin nin nei-in ahi zongin a om leh, a ninneih sung khempeuh, ama nit hun sung mah bangin a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:26 Ama ninneih hun sungtengin a tutna khempeuh zong a nit sungin ama lupna tawh kibang ding a, amah a nin ahih mah bangin a tutna khempeuh zong a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:27 Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding a, a puante sawpin, amahmah tui sungah kisil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:28 Ahih hangin tua nu a nin a bei zawh ni sagih khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:29 A ni giat ni-in tua nu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in, kikhopna bukkong, siampipa kiangah tuate paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus15:30 Siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in, meihal biak nadingin adang khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in ama nitna hangin Topa’ mai-ah ama a’ ding kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus15:31 “Amau’ laizang a om ka biakbuk ninsakkha le-uh amaute in sihlawh ding uh ahih ciangin, tua bangin note in Israel mite amau’ nitna panin siangsakin na kem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus15:32 Hih pen a natui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a natui tehin, tua tawh mi nin a suak pa a dingin ngeina hi a," 
Leviticus15:33 nin a nei nu a’ ding zong ahi hi. Hihte pen pasal a natui a paikhia mi, ninnei numei le, a nin neih sungin numei tawh a lumkhawm mipa a dingin ngeina ahi hi."
