Leviticus16:1 Aaron’ tapa nihte in ngeina lopi-in Topa’ mai-ah mei tawh va pai-in a sihlawh khit uh ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah thu a gen hi. 
Leviticus16:2 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thuciamna singkuang tunga om hehpihna tokhom mai, dalna puan sunglam a siangtho munah a hunlopi-in hong pai nawn loh nadingin na sanggampa Aaron kiangah gen in. A hunlopi-in hong pai leh amah si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun pen hehpihna tokhom tunga meii sungah kei ka kilatna mun ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:3 Ahih hangin siangtho munah Aaron hong pai ding zia in: Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus16:4 “Amah in a siangtho saihadial puantungsilh silhin, saihadial pheituam teengin, saihadial kawnggak tawh kigakin, saihadial dialpi khim ding hi. Hihte pen a siangtho puan ahi hi. Amah in tui sungah a pumpi sil ding a, tua ciangin tua puante silh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:5 “Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biak nadingin keeltal nih le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat la ding hi. 
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in amahmah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah le a innkuanpihte a dingin kilemna bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:7 Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in, Topa’ mai kikhopna bukkongah tuate koih ding hi." 
Leviticus16:8 Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai saanin, khat pen Topa a’ ding, adang khat pen Azazel a’ ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:9 Aaron in Topa a’ ding ai a pha keel paipihin, khialhna hanga biakna-in pia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:10 Ahih hangin Azazel a dingin ai a pha keel pen gamlakah Azazel’ kiangah a kipuak theih nadingin kilemna bawl nadingin a hingin Topa’ mai-ah kipaipih ding hi. 
Leviticus16:11 “Aaron in amahmah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah le a innkuanpihte a dingin kilemna bawl ding a, amahmah a dingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal go ding hi." 
Leviticus16:12 Amah in Topa’ biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat le a kisunen paknamtui khut nih dim la ding hi. Amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin 
Leviticus16:13 thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theih nadingin Topa’ mai-ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi. Tua hi kei leh amah si ding hi. 
Leviticus16:14 Amah in bawngtal si tawmkhat la-in, a khutme tawh hehpihna tokhom a mailam tungah thehin, hehpihna tokhom mai-ah a khutme tawh a si sagihvei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:15 “Tua ciangin amah in mite a’ ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in, dalna puan sungah a si paipih ding a, bawngtal si a theh mah bangin a si thehin, hehpihna tokhom tung le hehpihna tokhom mai-ah theh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:16 Amah in tua bangin Israel mite’ nitna hang, amau’ thu palsatna hang, le amau’ khialhna khempeuh hangin siangtho mun adingin kilemna bawl ding hi. Amah in amau’ nitna sungah amau tawh a omkhawm kikhopna buk a dingin tua mah bangin a bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:17 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama a’ ding, a innkuanpihte a’ ding, le Israel mihonte khempeuh a dingin kilemna a bawl khit hong paikhiat matengin kikhopna buk sungah kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Leviticus16:18 Tua ciangin Topa’ mai-ah a om biakna tau-ah amah va pai-in, biakna tau siansuahna bawl ding a, bawngtal si le keel si tawmkhat la-in, biakna tau kimkota a kite nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:19 Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat biakna tau tungah sagihvei thehin, siangsakin, Israel mite’ nitsakna panin biakna tau siangthosak ding hi." 
Leviticus16:20 “Amah in siangtho mun, kikhopna buk, le biakna tau siansuahna a bawl khit ciangin, keel hing pen paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus16:21 Aaron in keel hing lu tungah a khut tegel nga-in, Israel mite’ mawhna, amau’ thu palsatna, le amau’ khialhnate khempeuh, keel tungah pulak ding hi. Amah in keel lu tungah tuate suanin, a paikhiatpih dingin a kithawisa mipa tawh sehnel gamah sawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:22 Keel in amau’ mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna-ah a pai dingin a keel khah ding hi. 
Leviticus16:23 “Tua ciangin kikhopna bukah Aaron hong pai-in, siangtho munah a tum hunin a silh saihadial puante suahin, tua lai-ah a puante nusia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:24 Amah in a siangtho mun khatah, a pumpi tui sungah silin, a puante silh ding a, hong paikhia-in, ama meihal biakna le mite’ meihal biakna pia-in, ama a’ ding le mite a dingin kilemna bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:25 Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi. 
Leviticus16:26 Azazel’ kiangah keel a paisak pa in a puante sawpin, a pumpi tui sungah sil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong ciah thei ding hi." 
Leviticus16:27 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna, khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal le keel pen giahphual pualamah kipuakhia ding a, a vun, a sa, le a ekte, mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus16:28 Tuate a hal pa in ama puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi sil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong ciah thei ding hi." 
Leviticus16:29 “Hih pen, a kha sagihna, a ni sawm ni-in note a dingin a tawntungin thukham hi ding a, tualsung mi hitaleh note lakah a hong peem khualmi hitaleh in an tangin, na na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus16:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note siansak nadingin note-a’ ding kilemna kibawl ding a, na khialhna khempeuh panun Topa’ mai-ah na siang ding uh hi." 
Leviticus16:31 Tua pen note a dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath hi a, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua pen a tawntung a thukham ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:32 A pa’ tanga siampi dingin sathau a kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin, a siangtho saihadial puante silh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:33 Amah in biakbuk siansuahna bawlin, kikhopna buk le biakna tau siansuah ding a, siampite le mihonte khempeuh a dingin kilemna a bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:34 Hih pen Israel mite a dingin amau’ khialhnate khempeuh hangin kum khatin khatvei kilemna a kibawlsak theih nadingin note a dingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses a gamta hi." 
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron, ama tapate, le Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in. Hih pen Topa’ thupiaksa thu ahi hi." 
Leviticus17:3 Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a, tuuno ahi a, keel ahi zongin giahphual sung ahi a, giahphual pua-ah ahi zongin go a," 
Leviticus17:4 Topa’ biakbuk mai, Topa’ tungah letsongin piak dingin kikhopna bukkongah a gawh kei leh, tua mipa thu palsat hi ding hi. Amah in sisan luangsak ahih manin ama mite’ lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:5 Hih pen, gamlakah Israel mite in a gawh uh amau’ biakpiaknate hong paipih theih nading, kikhopna buk kongkhak-a siampipa’ kiang, Topa’ tungah amaute in tuate hong paipih theih nading, le thunuama biakpiakna-in Topa tungah sa hong gawh theih nading uh deihna ahi hi." 
Leviticus17:6 Siampipa in kikhopna buk kong-a Topa’ biakna tau tungah a si thehin, Topa’ tungah a gim namtui dingin a thau hal ding hi." 
Leviticus17:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keeldawite a dingin amau’ biakpiaknate go nawn lo ding uh hi. Hih pen amau’ khang tawntungin amaute’ tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus17:8 “Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hitaleh, amaute lakah a peem khualmite sung panin hitaleh meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin a pia mipa in" 
Leviticus17:9 Topa’ tungah piak dingin kikhopna bukkongah a paipih kei leh, ama mipihte kiang panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:10 “Israel mite sung pan hitaleh amau’ lakah a peem khualmite sung pan hitaleh mi khat in si khat peuhpeuh a nek leh, si a ne mipa ka maisiat ding a, ama mite lak panin amah ka khenkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi nuntakna pen si sungah om hi. Note a’ ding kilemna bawl nadingin note a dingin biakna tau tungah tua si ka piazo hi. Si pen nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi. 
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in si ne lo ding a, note lakah a hong peem khualmi khatpeuh in zong si ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus17:13 “Israel mite khatpeuh hitaleh, amaute lakah a peem khualmi khatpeuh hitaleh in zong, sabetna-ah, a kine thei ding gamsa khatpeuh hitaleh vasa hitaleh a man pa in a si buakhia-in leivui tawh vuk ding hi." 
Leviticus17:14 Ganhing khempeuh’ nuntakna pen a si ahih manin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khinzo hi: Ganhing khat peuhpeuh si na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuh’ nuntakna pen a si ahi hi. Si a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi. 
Leviticus17:15 “A mawk sih hitaleh gamsate in a balgawp hitaleh a ne mi peuhmah, tualsung mi hitaleh peemta hitaleh tua mi in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a, tua khit ciangin amah siang ding hi." 
Leviticus17:16 Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawp loin ahi zongin, kisil loin ahi zongin a om leh, amah in ama mawhna pua ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus18:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus18:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:3 Note na tenna uh Egypt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a, note kong paipihna Kanaan gamah zong amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Note in amau’ gamtatnate na zui kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus18:4 Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungta ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:6 “Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:7 Na nu mawhpihna tawh na pa’ tungah maizumna na tun kei ding hi. Amah pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi. 
Leviticus18:8 Nangmah in na pa’ zi dangte zong na mawhpih kei ding hi. Tua pen na pa’ mindai nading ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:9 Nangmah in na sanggamnu, na pa’ tanu, ahih kei leh na nu’ tanu, inn-a suak hitaleh gam a suak hitaleh na mawhpih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:10 Nangmah in na tapa’ tanu ahih kei leh na tanu’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ mindaina pen nangma mindaina mah ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:11 Na pa’ zi’ tanu, na pa’ tanu pen na sanggamnu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:12 Na ni na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na pa’ sanggam numei ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:13 Na nu’ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:14 Na pa’ sanggampa’ tungah mindaina na tun kei ding hi; tua pen ama zi na naih kei ding hi, cihnopna ahi hi; tua nu pen nangma innlak nu ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:15 Na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na tapa’ zi ahi hi; amah na mawhpih kei ding hi. 
Leviticus18:16 Na sanggampa’ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua pen na sanggampa’ mindai nading ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:17 Na luppih numei khat’ tanu na mawhpih kei ding a, tua numei’ tapa’ tanu hitaleh tua numei’ tanu’ tanu hitaleh, luppih dingin na la kei ding hi. Amaute pen nangmah tawh a kinai beh numeite ahi uh hi. Tua bang gamtatna pen a siahuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:18 Nangmah in a sanggamnu a hingsuan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei ding a, a sanggamnu a hing laipi-in amah na luppih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:19 “Nangmah in numei khat nin a neih laitak, a nit hun sungin luppih dingin na naih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:20 Na vengpa’ zi tawh na lumkhawm kei ding a, tua nu tawh na kininsak kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:21 Nangmah in Molek tungah meihal biakna-a piak dingin na tate khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding a, tua bangin na Pasian’ min na daisak kei ding hi; keimah pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus18:22 Numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal khat tawh na lumkhawm kei ding hi; tua pen a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:23 Ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei ding a, numei khatpeuh in zong ganhing khatpeuh tawh a mawh dingin kipia lo ding hi; tua pen ngeina hi lo hi." 
Leviticus18:24 “Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh note’ mai-a ka paihkhiat minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amaute kininsak uh hi. 
Leviticus18:25 Leitung a nin suak ahih manin keimah in a leitang gimna pia-in, leitang in ama tunga a teng mite a luakhia hi." 
Leviticus18:26 Ahih hangin, tualsung mi hitaleh note lakah hong peem khualmi hitaleh, note in keima thukhamte le keima biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh a, hih a kihhuai nate khat beek na hih kei ding uh hi;" 
Leviticus18:27 (bang hang hiam cih leh note’ ma-a a om gam mite in hih a kihhuaite khempeuh gamta uh ahih manin leitang a nin a suak hi;) 
Leviticus18:28 tua bang hikeileh leitang in note’ ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin amah in note hong luakhia ding hi. 
Leviticus18:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a kihhuaite khatpeuh a hihte peuhmah, amau’ mite lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus18:30 “Tua ahih ciangin note’ ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khat peuhpeuh na gamtat ngei loh nading uh le tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak loh nadingun kong thuhilhte zui un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus19:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus19:2 “Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa note’ Pasian keimah ka siangtho hi. 
Leviticus19:3 Note a kuamah peuh in na nu le na pa uh zahtakin, note in ka Sabbath-te na tang ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:4 “Milimte lamah kihei kei unla, note in a kisungtawm pasian-te nomau a dingin bawl kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:5 “Note in Topa’ tungah thunuama biakpiakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan’ theih nadingin na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:6 Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine ding a, a ni thum ni ciang dongin a omlai peuhmah mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus19:7 A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh, tua pen a kihhuai hi a, kisang lo ding hi." 
Leviticus19:8 Tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa’ na a siangtho ninsak ahih manin ama mite sung panin kihawlkhia ding hi. 
Leviticus19:9 “Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lo uhah a nawl dongin an na la kei ding uh a, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sang zong na khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:10 Note in na leenggui lo uh hawkmai loin, leenggah a kiate zong na leenggui lo panun na tawm kei ding uh hi. Note in mizawngte le peemtate a dingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:11 “Note na guta kei ding uh hi. A man loin na gamta kei ding uh a, khatlekhat tungah zuau na kigen kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:12 Note in a man lopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a, tua bangin na Pasian uh’ min na daisak kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:13 “Note in na vengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a, a na na sut kei ding uh hi. A kicial nasempa’ thaman pen a zingsang dong zan tawntung na kemcip kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:14 Note in bilngongte phuisam loin, mittawte’ mai-ah a puk theih nading na na koih kei ding uh a, note in na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:15 “Note in thukhenna-ah thu a tang loin na khen kei ding uh hi. Mizawngte langgen loin, a liante’ thu zui loin, thumanna tawh na vengte uh thu na khen ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:16 Note in na mipihte lak uhah mi gensia-in vaksuk vakto loin, na vengpa uh a sih nadingin na langpang kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:17 “Note in na lungsim sung uhah na sanggampa uh na mudah kei ding uh a, na vengte uh tawh thu na kituah lohna uh kikum khawmin na siangsak ding uh hi; tua hikeileh ama hangin khialhna na pua ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:18 Note in nomau’ mipihte tungah phu la loin, amau na lungsim neih kei ding uh a, nomau na ki-it uh bangin na vengte uh na it ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:19 “Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi. Note in na lo uhah khaici nam nih na pawikhawm kei ding uh a, khau nam nih a kigan puan zong na silh kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:20 “Sila ahi numei, midang khat in zuthawl a piaksa, kitankhia nai loin amah suahtakna a kipia nai lo nu, pasal dang khat in a lupkhoppih leh, thukanna kinei ding hi. Amaute kithat lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu sila hi lai hi." 
Leviticus19:21 Ahih hangin tua pa in amahmah a dingin mawhna hanga biak nadingin tuutal khat, kikhopna bukkong, Topa’ kiangah hong paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus19:22 Siampipa in, tua pa a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh Topa’ mai-ah ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, a gamtatnasa a khialhna kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus19:23 “Note, Kanaan gamah tungin nek dingin kung nam khempeuh na suan uh ciangin, note in amau’ gahte kum thum sung na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciangin amau’ gah khempeuh siangtho-in, Topa’ tungah phatna biakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus19:25 Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate pen note a dingin hong gah semsem nadingin tuate’ gah na ne thei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:26 “Note in sa khat peuhpeuh a sunga si tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi. Mailam thugen kholhna, ahih kei leh aisan na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:27 Note in na baa samte uh met loin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus19:28 Note in mi site’ hangin dahna limin na ci tung uh liamsak loin note’ tungah ciaptehna khat peuhpeuh zong na sun kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanu uh biakinn sungah paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un. Tua bang hileh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a, gam sung khempeuh, mawhna tawh a kidim suak kha ding hi." 
Leviticus19:30 Note in ka Sabbath ni tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:31 “Vankahte le aisanna lamah kihei kei un. Amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:32 “Note, sam kangte’ mai-ah na kun ding uh a, puteekte’ maitang zahtakin, na Pasian uh na kihta ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:33 “Na gam sung uhah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh, ama tungah a man loin na gamta kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:34 Note lakah a hong peem khualmite tualsung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a, nomau mah bangin amaute na it ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Egypt gam sungah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:35 “Note in thukhenna, a sau tehna, a tam tehnate-ah a man loin na gamta kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:36 Note in tawi khaina man, tawisuang man, seu man, bung man, na zang ding uh hi. Kei pen Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:37 Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus20:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus20:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite khat peuhpeuh hitaleh Israel sunga a peem khualmite hitaleh, a tate khat peuhpeuh Molek pasian tungah a pia mipa kithat ding a, mihonte in suang tawh denglum ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:3 Kei mahmah in tua mipa ka maisiat ding a, ama mite lak panin ka hawlkhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a tate Molek tungah pia-in, ka biakbuk ninsakin, ka min siangtho daisak hi." 
Leviticus20:4 Amah in Molek tungah a tate khat a piak ciangin mihonte in tua pa kimuhmawh bawlin amah a thah kei uhleh," 
Leviticus20:5 keimah in tua mipa le ama innkuanpihte maisiatin, amah le Molek biakna-ah amah a zuite khempeuh amau’ mite lak panin ka hawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:6 “Mi khat vankahna le aisan lamah kihei-in tuate thu a dot leh, keimah in tua mipa ka maisiat ding a, ama mite lak panin amah ka hawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:7 Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla siangtho un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte zui unla, tuate sem un; note a hong siangthosak Topa pen keimah ka hi hi." 
Leviticus20:9 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a nu ahih kei leh a pa a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. Amah in a nu ahih kei leh a pa samsia khin a, ama sihna amahmah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:10 “Pasal khatpeuh a vengpa’ zi tawh a mawh leh, tua a khial pa le a khialnu kithat khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus20:11 A pa’ zi tawh a lumkhawm mipa in a pa a mindaisak a suak hi. Amau tegel kithat ding hi. Amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus20:12 Pasal khat a monu tawh a lupkhop leh, amau tegel kithat ding hi; amaute in si kinailua mi tawh khialhna a bawl uh ahi hi. Amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal dang khat tawh a lupkhop leh, amau tegel kihhuaina a gamta khin uh ahih manin amaute kithat ding a, amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:14 Pasal khat in zi nei-in, a zi’ nu tawh zong a lakthuah leh, tua pen a kilawm lo ahi hi. Note lakah tua bang kilawm lohna a om loh nadingin tua pa le a nutate, mei tawh kihallum ding hi." 
Leviticus20:15 Pasal khatpeuh ganhing khat tawh a mawh leh amah le a ganhing kithat ding hi. 
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in ganhing khat naihin tua tawh a mawh leh, note in a numei le a ganhing na that ding uh hi; amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:17 “Pasal khat in ama sanggamnu, ahih kei leh a nu’ tanu tenpihin a lupkhawm uhleh, tua pen a zumhuai hi a, amau’ mipihte’ omna panin amaute kihawlkhia ding hi. Ama sanggamnu tawh mawh ahih manin tua pa in ama mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus20:18 Pasal khat, nin a nei numei khat tawh lumkhawmin a mawh uhleh, amau tegel in siantho nading ngeina palsat uh ahih manin amau’ mipihte lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:19 “Note pen na nu’ sanggamnu ahih kei leh na pa’ sanggamnu tawh na mawh kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a nai behte tawh mawhna ahih manin amaute in amau’ mawhna pua ding uh hi. 
Leviticus20:20 Pasal khat, a pa’ sanggampa’ zi tawh a lupkhop leh, amah in a pa’ sanggampa a mindaisak ahi hi. Amaute in amau’ khialhna thuak ding uh a, ta nei loin si ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:21 Pasal khat in a sanggampa’ zi a lak leh, tua pen nitna hi a, amah in a sanggampa a mindaisak ahi hi. Amaute in ta nei lo ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:22 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukham khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in, tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua pen note na ten nadingun kong paipih nading leitang in note hong luakkhiat loh nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:23 Note’ mai-ah keimah in ka paihkhiat minamte’ ngeinate na zui kei ding uh hi. Amaute in hih nate khempeuh hih uh ahih manin amaute ka kih hi. 
Leviticus20:24 Ahih hangin keimah in note kiangah, ‘Note in amau’ leitang na luah ding uh hi. Bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, na neih dingun note tungah kong pia ding hi,’ kong ci khinzo hi. Kei pen mite’ kiang panin note a hong khenkhia Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus20:25 Tua ahih ciangin note in ganhing a siang leh a nin, vasa a siang leh a nin khentelna na bawl ding uh hi. Note in nin hi, ci-in na seh dingun keimah in ka tuam koihsa ganhing hitaleh vasa hitaleh leitung a a pai thei khat peuhpeuh tawh hitaleh, note na kininsak kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:26 Note pen keima a dingin na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah ka siangtho a, note pen keima-a’ na hih theih nadingun mite kiang panin note kong tuamkoih zo hi." 
Leviticus20:27 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin van a kah a, ai a saan leh kithat ding a, suang tawh amaute kidenglum ding hi. Amau’ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaron’ tapa siampite tungah thu gen inla, amaute lak panin kuamah in ama beh nai pen ahi a nu, a pa, a tapa, a tanu, a sanggampa," 
Leviticus21:2  
Leviticus21:3 ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tua nu in pasal nei nai lo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tua nu hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misite’ hangin kininsak lo ding hi. 
Leviticus21:4 Amah in pasal neisa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin, tua bangin kidaisak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:5 “Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin, amau’ khamul nawlhui zong kiat loin, a ci tung uh liamsak lo ding uh hi." 
Leviticus21:6 Amaute pen amau’ Pasian a dingin siangtho ding uh a, amau’ Pasian’ min daisak lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau’ Pasian’ anlum ahi, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute siangtho ding uh hi." 
Leviticus21:7 Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsaksa numei tenpih lo ding uh a, a pasal in a maksa numei zong tenpih lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa pen ama Pasian a dingin siangtho hi." 
Leviticus21:8 Amah in note’ Pasian’ anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh a, amah pen note a dingin siangtho ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah, note hong siangthosakpa, ka siangtho hi." 
Leviticus21:9 Siampipa khat peuhpeuh’ tanu in paktatna tawh amah le amah a kidaisak leh, ama pa a daisak ahi hi. Tua nu mei tawh kihallum ding hi." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ama sanggamte lakah siampi lianpen, a lu tungah nilh sathau a kisunnapa, a puante silh dingin a ki-ap khin siampipa in a samte phiahsak loin, a puante zong balkek lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:11 Amah in a nu le a pa nangawn ahi zongin misi khat peuhpeuh kiangah pai loin, amahmah zong kininsak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:12 Biakbuk panin zong paikhia loin, ama Pasian’ biakbuk zong daisak lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama Pasian-a’ ahi ki-apna nilh sathau ama tungah om hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus21:13 Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi. 
Leviticus21:14 Meigong numei, a kimasa numei, a kininsaksa numei, numei paktat, hih bangte pawl tenpih lo ding a, amah in ama mite lak panin nungak khat zi-in la ding hi." 
Leviticus21:15 Tua pen ama mite lakah a tate a daisak loh nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi, ci in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi in a khang khangin ama Pasian’ anlum pia dingin hong neh thei lo ding hi. 
Leviticus21:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei, mittaw, khelbai, maihem, le khutlekhe saulua," 
Leviticus21:19 khut liam, khe liam," 
Leviticus21:20 elkul leh mi cingtaak lo, mit hoih lo le cithak a vei, meima nei leh ciltang kitam mi in hong naih lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:21 Siampi Aaron’ suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa a’ ding meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai-ah hong pai lo ding hi. Amah in poina nei ahih manin, ama Pasian’ anlum pia dingin a nai-ah hong pai lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:22 Amah in ama Pasian’ anlum, a siangthopen le a siangtho ante ne thei ding hi." 
Leviticus21:23 Ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin, ka biakbuk a daisak loh nadingin dalna puan gei ahi a, biakna tau nai-ah ahi zongin hong pai lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen hi. 
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron le a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak loh nadingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi, Israel mite’ piak a siangthote panin a kikep nadingun gen in; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:3 Amaute kiangah, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh sung panin a khangkhangin khatpeuh in a nit laitakin Israel mite in Topa’ tungah a ap a siangtho nate a naih leh keima omna panin tua pa kihawlkhia ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:4 “‘Aaron’ gui sung panin meima nei leh a natui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a siangtho mateng a siangtho an ne thei lo ding hi. Misi lawnna hitaleh a natui a teh pa lawnna hitaleh a nin na khat peuhpeuh a lawng pa," 
Leviticus22:5 amah a nit theih nadingin a bokvak ganhing khat hitaleh nitna a ngah theih nading mi khat hitaleh a lawng pa, ama nitna pen bangbang hitaleh," 
Leviticus22:6 tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a, amah in tui sungah a pumpi a sil kei leh a siangtho an ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:7 Ni a tum ciangin amah siang ding a, tua khit ciangin amah in a siangtho an ne thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangte pen ama nek ding mah ahi hi." 
Leviticus22:8 A mawk sihte hitaleh gamsate in a balgawpte hitaleh amah in tuate nekna tawh amah kininsak lo ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in." 
Leviticus22:9 “Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi. Amaute a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus22:10 “A pualam mi in a siangtho an ne lo ding hi. Siampipa’ inn-ah a om peemta ahi a, a kicial nasemte in ahi zongin a siangtho an ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:11 Ahih hangin siampipa khat in ama a dingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh, tua a sila in ne thei ding hi. Ama inn sungah a suak mite in ama an ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:12 Siampipa’ tanu khat a pualam mi khat tawh a kiten leh tua nu in a siangtho biakna an ne thei lo ding hi. 
Leviticus22:13 Ahih hangin siampipa’ tanu pen meigong ahi a, a kima ahi zongin, ta nei loin a nungak lai mah bangin a pa’ inn-ah a ciahkik leh, tua nu in a pa’ an ne thei ding hi. Ahi zongin a pualam mi kuamah in tua an ne thei lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:14 “Mi khat in theih lohna hangin a siangtho an khat peuhpeuh a nekkhak leh, tua a na manzah seh nga-ah seh khat behlapin, siampipa tungah a siangtho an man pia ding hi." 
Leviticus22:15 Amaute in Topa’ tungah a piak ahi, Israel-te’ an a siangtho pen siampite in ninsak lo ding uh a," 
Leviticus22:16 tua bangin amau’ an a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna le khialhna amaute puasak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel mite sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin, thuciamna a tunsakna hitaleh meihal biakna-in Topa’ tungah a kipia utthu-a biakna hitaleh," 
Leviticus22:19 hong kisan’ theih nadingin bawngtal hitaleh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh, a sitbaang lo a pa khat na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:20 Note in a sitbaang khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zo lo ding hi. 
Leviticus22:21 Mi khatpeuh in bawnghon panin ahi a, tuulekeel hon panin ahi zongin thuciamna tunsak nading hitaleh utthu-a biakna-in hitaleh Topa’ tungah thunuama biakna a piak ciangin, a kisan’ theih nadingin a ganhing a cidam hi ding a, sitbaanna a om lo hi ding hi." 
Leviticus22:22 Ganhing a mittaw, a gamtang thei lo, a hem, meima nai a nei, cithak ahih kei leh meima a neite pen, note in Topa’ tungah pia loin, Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah tuate na zang kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:23 Bawngtal hitaleh tuuno hitaleh a na khat peuhpeuh a saulua ahih kei leh a tomluate pen note in utthu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin thuciamna tunsakna a piak dingin tua bangte kisang zo lo hi. 
Leviticus22:24 A ciltangte a sanim, a kisuzan, a kitam, ahih kei leh a ki-atkhia ganhing khat peuhpeuh, note in Topa’ tungah pia loin, na gam sung uhah biakna-in na zang kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:25 “Gamdang mite khat peuhpeuh tung panin a kingah ganhingte zong na Pasian uh’ an dingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbaang a, hem ahih manin tuate hong kisang zo lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus22:26 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:27 “Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung omkhawm ding hi. A ni giat ni a kipanin tua ganno pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi. 
Leviticus22:28 A pi pen bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh, note in a pi le a no ni khat sungin na gokhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:29 Note in Topa’ tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan’ theih nadingin na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:30 A tua ni mahin kine ding a, note in zingsang dong siit na nei kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:31 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus22:32 Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh a, Israel mite lakah kei hong kisiangthosak ding hi. Kei pen note a hong siangthosak Topa," 
Leviticus22:33 note’ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa ka hi hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi, ci-in na gen ding uh keimah Topa’ pawi a kisehte hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:3 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding a, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath, a siangtho kikhopna ahi hi. Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note’ tenna khempeuhah Topa a dingin Sabbath ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:4 “Hihte pen amaute a dingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topa’ pawi a kisehte, a siangtho biak kikhopnate ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:5 “A kha masa, a ni sawm le li nitak pen Topa’ Paisan Pawi ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:6 Tua kha mah, a ni sawm le nga ni pen Topa’ tungah silngo sawh loh anlum pawi ahi hi. Ni sagih sung note in silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:7 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:8 Ahih hangin note in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:9 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitangah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin, note in an na lakna uhah anpal lom khat, siampipa kiangah na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:11 Note hong kisan’ theih nadingin amah in Topa’ mai-ah anlom vei ding a, Sabbath ni a zing ciangin siampipa in tua anlom vei ding hi." 
Leviticus23:12 Note in anlom na vei ni-un, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:13 Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna pen sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding a, a gim namtui dingin Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in kipia ding hi. Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding leenggahzu tawh biakna pen leenggahzu thawl khat hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:14 Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma, hih ni matengin anlum hitaleh a ki-em an hitaleh a sial hitaleh na ne kei ding uh hi; tua pen note’ khang tawntungin na tenna khempeuh uhah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus23:15 “Note in Sabbath khit a zing ciang, vei-a biakna anlom na paipih ni uh a kipan nipikal sagih bit dong a ni na simto ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:16 A Sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciang dong ni sawmnga dong na simto ding uh a, tua ciangin note in Topa’ tungah an thak tawh biakna na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:17 Note in na tenna uh panin vei dingin an lawh nih a kibawl anlum nih nong paipih ding uh hi. Tuate pen annel a kibawl, silngo sawhin a ki-em, Topa’ tungah anpalin a kipia hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:18 Note in anlum tawh, a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno sagih, le bawngtalno khat, le tuutal nih na pia ding uh hi. Tuate, Topa’ tungah a gim namtui mei tawh kihal biak nadingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate tawh Topa’ tungah meihal biakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:19 Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat le thunuama biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus23:20 Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in anpal-anlum le tuuno nih tawh tuate vei ding a, tuate pen siampipa a dingin Topa’ mai-ah a siangtho hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:21 Note in tua ni mahin thu zaksakna na bawl ding uh a, a siangtho kikhop khat na nei ding uh hi. Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi; tua pen note’ tenna khempeuhah na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus23:22 “Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lonawl dongun la loin, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sangte zong na khawm kei ding uh a, mizawngte le khualmi a dingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:24 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna, a ni masa ni-in note in a thupi tawlngakna ni khat, peengkul aw tawh a kitaangko phawksakna, a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:25 Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh a, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:26 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:27 “Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni pen kilemna ni ahi hi. Tua pen note a dingin a siangtho kikhop hun hi ding a, note in an tangin, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:28 Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah note a dingin kilemna bawl nadingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in bang khat peuhpeuh a nekha mi peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi. 
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka that ding hi. 
Leviticus23:31 Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun na tenna khempeuh uhah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus23:32 Tua pen note a dingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi ding a, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua kha ni kua nitak a kipan, a nitak panin a nitak kik dong note in na Sabbath uh na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:33 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:34 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung pen Topa a’ ding buk pawi ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:35 A ni masa ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi ding a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:36 Ni sagih sung note in Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh a, a ni giat ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in, Topa’ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua pen a thupi kikhopna khat hi a, note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:37 “Hihte pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate, biakpiakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate, amau’ ni ciatin piak dingin a siangtho kikhopna hunin na gen ding uh, Topa’ pawi a kisehte ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:38 Note in Topa’ tungah na piak uh Topa’ Sabbath-te, note’ letsongte, thuciamna hangin na biaknate khempeuh uh le utthu-a na biaknate khempeuh uh banah piak ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:39 “Note in leitang a piangte na kaihkhop khit uh, kha sagihna, a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung Topa’ pawi na bawl ding uh hi. A ni masa ni pen a thupi tawlngakna khat hi a, a ni giat ni zong a thupi tawlngakna khat mah hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:40 Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte, nisuh hiangte, a teh tam singhiangpite, le lui a gialhekte la-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawina, ni sagih sung pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:41 Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh a, note’ khang tawntungin ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi. Note in kha sagihna sungah na bawl ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:42 No Israel mi khempeuh ni sagih sung buk sungah na teng ding uh hi. 
Leviticus23:43 Tua pen keimah in Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpih lai-in Israel mite, buk sungah ka tensakna thu note’ suanlekhakte in a theih nading uh ahi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:44 Tu-a bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topa’ pawi a kisehte a gen hi. 
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus24:2 “Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivaksuak theih nadingin meivak a dingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipih nading uh Israel mite thu pia in. 
Leviticus24:3 Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang dalna puan pualamah, Aaron in nitak a kipanin zingsang dongin Topa’ mai-ah a tawntungin tua meivak a ngeina bangin koih ding a, tua pen na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus24:4 Amah in kham citak meivakkhuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topa’ mai-ah omsak tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus24:5 “Nangmah in annel la inla, tua panin moh sawm le nih bawlin em in; moh khat ciangin annel lawh nih hi ding hi." 
Leviticus24:6 Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nihin na koih ding a, gual khatah guk om ding hi." 
Leviticus24:7 Phawkna-in Topa’ tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a paikhawm theih nadingin nangmah in a gual nihte-ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi. 
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath ni simin Aaron in a tawntung thuciamna-in Israel mite tang dingin Topa’ mai-ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus24:9 Tua pen Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntung a a ngah ding, a siangtho pen ama kaih ahih manin, Aaron le a suante-a’ ding hi a, amaute in a siangtho mun khatah ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus24:10 Tu-in Israel numei khat’ tapa, a pa Egypt mi ahi khat, Israel mite lakah a pai hi. Israel numei’ tapa le Israel mi khat giahphual ah kitawng uh a," 
Leviticus24:11 Israel numei’ tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nu’ min pen Shelomith hi a, Dan minam, Dibri’ tanu ahi hi." 
Leviticus24:12 Topa’ deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi. 
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus24:14 “A samsia mipa pen giahphual pualamah paipih in. Ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amau’ khut ngasak inla, mihonte khempeuh amah denglumsak in." 
Leviticus24:15 Tua ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi. 
Leviticus24:16 Topa’ min a gensia mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in amah denglum ding uh hi. Peemta hitaleh tualsung mi hitaleh, Min Siangtho a gensiate kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus24:17 “Mi a that pa kithat ding hi. 
Leviticus24:18 Ganhing a that pa in a ganhing mahin loh ding hi. A thu-in ci lehang nuntakna le nuntakna a kithuk ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus24:19 “Mi khat in a vengte khat a poisak leh, ama hih bangin ama tung mahah kithukkik ding a," 
Leviticus24:20 guh kitan tang ding guh kitan, mittang tang ding mittang, ha tang ding ha kihih ding a, amah in mi khat a poisak bangin amah kipoisak ding hi." 
Leviticus24:21 Ganhing a that pa in loh ding a, mi a that pa kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus24:22 Note in peemta le tualsung mi a dingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus24:23 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah hih thu a gen hi. Amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pualamah paipih uh a, suang tawh a denglum uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite in a hih uh hi." 
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus25:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah na tun uh ciangin, Topa pahtawina-in leitang tawlngak hun na omsak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:3 Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh a, kum guk sung na leenggui lo uh hahin a gahte na kaikhawm ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna-ah leitang ading a thupi tawlngakna sabbath, Topa pahtawina sabbath om ding hi. Note in na lo uh na pawi kei ding uh a, na leenggui lo uh na hah kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:5 A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh a, a kipuah lo leenggui gahte na khawm kei ding uh hi. Leitang adingin a thupi tawlngakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus25:6 Lo na khawh loh uh hangin leitang tawlngak kumin a piang tawmte in note a’ ding, na sila numei le na sila pasalte a’ ding, a kicial nasemte le note tawh a teng a peem mite a’ ding an hong sik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:7 A piang khempeuhte pen na bawngte uh le na leitang uhah a om ganhingte’ an ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:8 “Kum nipi sagih hun pen note a dingin kum sawmli le kua ahih theih nadingin note in kum nipi sagih, kum sagih mun sagihvei na simto ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:9 Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh a, kilemna ni-in note in na gam sung khempeuh uhah peengkul aw na gingkhiasak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:10 Note in a kum sawmngana siangthosakin, gam sunga a teng mi khempeuh tungah suahtakna thu na zasak ding uh hi. Note in nomau’ neihsa ciat ngahkikin, sila-in a kizuak mite nomau’ innkuanpihte ciat kiangah na ciahkik uh ciangin note a dingin jubilee hi ding hi." 
Leviticus25:11 Tua a kum sawmngana pen note a dingin jubilee hi ding hi. Tua kum sungin note in lo pawi loin, a li pote zong la loin, a kihah lo leengguite panin zong leenggah na khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen jubilee ahi hi. Tua pen note-a’ dingin siangtho ding a, note in lo panin a piang tawmte na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:13 “Hih jubilee kum sungin note khempeuh in nomau’ neihsa ciat na ngahkik ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:14 Note in na vengte’ tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na vengte’ kiang panin na lei uh ahi zongin note khatlekhat na kikhem kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee khit ciangin a jubilee kik dong a kum phazah tawh kituakin note in na vengte uh kiang panin lei-in, a an piang ding kum zah tawh kituakin amau in note tungah hong zuak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam lai leh a man na tamsak ding uh a, a kum a tawm leh a man na tawmsak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh no tungah hong zuak pen a tuk tung ding zah ahi hi." 
Leviticus25:17 Note khatlekhat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus25:18 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua hileh note lungmuang takin gam sungah na teng ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:19 Leitang in an hong piangsak ding a, note in na khamtakun ne-in, lungmuang takin na teng ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:20 “Note in, ‘Lo lah pawi loin, an lah la kei lehang, a kum sagihna-ah bang ne ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uhleh" 
Leviticus25:21 keimah in a kum gukna-ah note tungah thupha kong pia ding a, kum thum sung khom ding an hong piang ding hi." 
Leviticus25:22 A kum giatna-ah lo na pawi ding uh ciangin, note in anlui na ne lai ding uh hi. Anthak hong tun a kum kuana mateng note in a lui na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:23 “Leitang pen keima-a’ ahih manin neihsuak dingin leitang kizuak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen kei tawh a omkhawm khualmi leh peemtate na hi uh hi. 
Leviticus25:24 “Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanhkiksak thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:25 Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khenkhat a zuak leh, amah tawh a kinai a behpa hong pai-in a sanggampa’ zuaksa tanh ding hi." 
Leviticus25:26 Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a, amahmah hong haukikin a tanhzo dingin a pian’ leh," 
Leviticus25:27 amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim ding a, a zuakna mipa tungah a piak lai ding a kisam zah pia ding a, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:28 Ahih hangin amah in ama a dingin ngahkik zawh nading lampi a neih kei leh, tua ama zuak leitang pen jubilee kum mateng a leipa’ khut sungah om ding hi. Jubilee kum ciangin tua leitang kipiakhia ding a, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:29 “Mi khat in khuapikulh sungah tenna inn khat a zuak leh, a kizuak khit kum khat bit sungin amah in tanhkik thei ding a, kum khat bit sungin amah in tatkik theih nading thu nei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:30 Tua pen kum khat bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh, khuapikulh sunga om tua inn pen a leipa in khang tawntungin a neih dingin kibawlsak ding a, jubilee kum ciangin zong kipiakhia kik tuan nawn lo ding hi." 
Leviticus25:31 Ahih hangin a kimkotah kulh a nei lo khua neu-a innte pen gam sung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi. Tuate kitanhkik thei ding a, jubilee kum ciangin tuate kipiakhia ding hi." 
Leviticus25:32 Ahi zongin Levi mite’ khuapite, amau’ neihsa khuapite-a innte ahihleh, Levi mite in khatvei peuh ciangin tanh thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:33 Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tatkik theih ding hinapi a tatkikzawh kei leh, amau’ neihsa khuapi sunga tua inn pen jubilee kum ciangin kipiakik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi mite’ khuapi sunga innte pen Israel mite’ lakah amau’ neihsa ahi hi." 
Leviticus25:34 Ahih hangin amau’ khuapi taang gamte kizuak thei lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amau’ neih tawntung na ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:35 “Na sanggampa uh zawngin, note bangin amah a kivak zawh kei leh, note in amah na vak ding uh hi. Khualmi le peemta bangin amah pen note tawh hong om ding hi." 
Leviticus25:36 Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten theih nadingin ama tung panin a meet a khang la kei unla, na Pasian uh zahtak un." 
Leviticus25:37 Note in ama tungah a meetin sum leitawi pia loin, ama tungah a meetin na an uh zong na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:38 Kei pen note’ Pasian ahi ding le, note tungah Kanaan leitang a hong pia dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus25:39 “Na gei-a om na sanggampa zawngin, nangma tungah amahmah hong kizuak leh, sila bangin na na semsak kei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:40 Amah pen a kicial nasem le peemta bangin nang kiangah om ding hi. Amah in jubilee kum mateng nangma na hong sem ding a," 
Leviticus25:41 tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah le ama kiangah a om a tate paikhia ding a, ama innkuan zuan kikin, a pate’ neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte hi a, amaute sila-in kizuak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus25:43 Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a, na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:44 Note in na neih theih ding uh sila numei le sila pasalte hih bang ahi hi: Na kimkot uha om minam dangte lak panin sila numei le sila pasal na lei thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:45 Note in na gam sung uhah a suak, note lakah a hong peem khualmite leh note tawh a om amau’ innkuante lak panin zong na lei thei ding uh a, amaute pen nomau a’ hi thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:46 Note in amaute pen note’ khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amau’ neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi. Note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggam uh Israel mite khatlekhat hih gawpgawpna tawh na ki-uk kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:47 “Note lakah a teng khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a, ama kianga om na sanggampa uh zawngin, no tawh a om khualmipa tung ahi a, peemta mipa tungah ahi zongin, tua ahih kei leh khualmipa’ innkuan khat peuhpeuh tungah amah a kizuak leh," 
Leviticus25:48 amah a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanhkik thei ding a, ama sanggamte khat peuhpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:49 Ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi. Ama innkuan sunga a kinaipih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh amahmah kitanhkik thei ding hi. 
Leviticus25:50 Midang tungah amahmah a kizuak a kipan jubilee kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat ding a, ama suahtak nading sum pen a kum phazah tawh kituak hi ding hi. A topa tawh a omkhawm hun sungteng pen a kicial nasem khat thaman zahin seh ding hi." 
Leviticus25:51 Kum tampi in a sap lai leh, amah in tuate tawh a kituakin ama thaman ding a kipiakna sung panin ama kitatkhiat nadingin pia kik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:52 Ahih hangin jubilee kum ding kum tawmkhat bek in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi. Ama sepsak ding kum a omlai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiat nadingin sum piakik ding hi. 
Leviticus25:53 Amah pen a topa tungah a kum kumin a kicial nasempa tawh kibang ding hi. A topa in note’ muhna-ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uk lo ding hi. 
Leviticus25:54 Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh, jubilee kum ciangin amah le amah tawh a om a tate kikhahkhia ding hi." 
Leviticus25:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite pen kei a dingin nasemte ahi uh hi. Amaute pen Egypt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus26:1 “Note in nomau a dingin a mai-ah na kun dingun milim bawl loin, a kiseek milim hitaleh biakna song hitaleh na dingsak kei ding uh a, na gam sung uhah suang milim na phut kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:2 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus26:3 “Note in ka thukham zui-in, ka thupiaknate mangin tuate na sep uhleh," 
Leviticus26:4 keimah in note tungah guahtui a hunin kong pia ding a, leitang in an hong piangsakin, lo-a kungte in amau’ gah gah ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:5 Na cil uh ante leenggah lawh hun dong kimang ding a, leenggah minte zong lopawi hun dong kimang ding hi. Note in na khamtakun an na ne ding uh a, lungnuam takin na gam sung uhah na teng ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:6 “Keimah in gam sungah nopsakna hong pia-in, note lungnuam takin na lum ding uh a, bangmah in note hong lausak lo ding hi. Keimah in gam sung panin ganhing gilote ka hawlkhia ding a, galkidona in na gam uh hong nawk lo ding hi." 
Leviticus26:7 Note in na galte uh na delh ding uh a, note’ mai-ah namsau in amaute puksak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:8 Note nga in zakhat zo-in, note zakhat in tul sawm na zo ding uh hi. Note’ mai-ah namsau in na galte uh puksak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:9 Keimah in note ka hong pi ngaihsut ding a, note hong pungsakin, tampi kong phasak ding a, note tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:10 Note in sauveipi a kikhol anluite ne-in, a thak koih nadingin a lui na hahsiang masa ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:11 Keimah in note lakah omna ka bawl ding a, keimah in note kong kih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus26:12 Keimah, note’ lakah omin note’ Pasian ka hi ding a, note, keima mite na hi ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:13 Note pen amau’ sila na hihloh nadingun Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Keimah in note’ gimna hakkolte kuaitanin note a dingtangin kong paisak hi. 
Leviticus26:14 “Ahih hangin note in ka thu ngai loin, hih thupiaknate khempeuh na hih kei uh a," 
Leviticus26:15 ka thukhamte nialin, ka biakna ngeina kipte kih a, ka thupiaknate khempeuh sem loin, ka thuciamna na palsat uhleh," 
Leviticus26:16 keimah in note tungah hih bangin kong hih ding hi: Note’ tungah hong tung dingin keimah in thakhatthu a dipkuatna, zawngkhalna, le mite siasakin nuntakna a kiamsak ding cisa natna kong tungsak ding hi. Note’ lopawi zong a mawkna hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na galte un tuate ne ding hi." 
Leviticus26:17 Keimah in note kong maisiat ding a, na galte uh mai-ah lelhna na thuak ding uh hi. Note hong mudah mite in note hong uk ding a, kuamah in note hong delh lo napi-in na tai ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:18 “Tua bang hinapi-in note in ka thu nong ngaih kei veve uhleh, keimah in na khialhna hangun a zah sagih vei-in note kong thuhilhkik ding a," 
Leviticus26:19 keimah in na kiphatsakpih uh note’ vangliatna susia-in, van panin guah hong zusak loin, na leitang uh sik ka bangsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:20 Na leitang un an piangsak loin, na gam sung uha kungte in amau’ gah gah lo ding ahih manin note’ thatang a mawkna-in a bei hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:21 “Tua ciangin kei hong demin, keima thu na ngaih kei lai uhleh, keimah in note’ khialhna a zah sagih vei-in note’ tungah gimna kong tungsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:22 Keimah in note’ lakah gamsate hong khahin, amaute in na tate uh hong neksak ding uh a, na ganhingte uh susia-in, note mi tawmno khat hong suah ding a, note’ lampite zong gamkhing hong suak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:23 “Hih banga hihna tawh note hong kihei tuan loin, kei na hong demlai uhleh," 
Leviticus26:24 kei zong note hong gawtin, kei mahmah in na khialhnate uh hangin a zah sagih vei-in kong sat ding hi." 
Leviticus26:25 Keimah in, thuciamna omsa bangin phulakna na a sem ding namsau khat note’ tungah kong tungsak ding hi. Na khuapi sung uhah note na kikaihkhop uhleh zong keimah in note’ lakah natna kong tungsak ding a, na galte uh khut sungah note hong kipia ding hi." 
Leviticus26:26 Keimah in note’ nuntakna an ka suksiat ciangin, an kicing lo ahih manin nupi sawm in meibung khat sungah na anlum uh emkhawm ding a, na anlum uh a tawitehin hong piakhia kik ding hi. Note in na ne ding uh a, na khamzo kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:27 “Tua bang hinapi-in note in keima thu ngai loin, kei na hong demlai uhleh," 
Leviticus26:28 note ka hong heh ngawh bawl ding a, note’ khialhna hangin a zah sagih vei-in kong thuhilh ding hi." 
Leviticus26:29 Note na gil uh kial lua ding ahih manin na tapate uh le na tanute uh’ sa na ne ding uh hi. 
Leviticus26:30 Keimah in mual dawna na biaknate uh susia-in, na paknamtui biakna taute uh phukin, note’ milim’ siluang hawmte tungah na luanghawmte uh ka pai ding a, keimah in note kong kih ding hi." 
Leviticus26:31 Keimah in na khuapite uh siasakin, na biakna munte uh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, nomau’ hong biakna a gim namtuite ka diik kei ding hi." 
Leviticus26:32 Keimah in leitang ka siasak ding a, tua tungah a teng na galte un lamdangsa ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:33 Keimah in minam dangte lakah note kong thehthang ding a, keimah in namsau a paai panin dokin note kong delh ding hi. Na leitang uh gamkhing suak ding a, na khuapite uh a sia hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:34 Tua ciangin na galte uh leitangah na om tanvei uh, gamkhingin a om sungteng, leitang in tawlngak hun a ngah hi ding hi. Leitang tawlnga-in, a sabbath-te a tang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:35 Ama tungah na ten laitakun na ngahsak loh uh tawlngakna ahi a sabbath-te, gamkhingin a om sungteng a tawlnga hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:36 “Note’ sung panin galte’ leitangah a omlai mite tungah lungsim gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Nahthel ging in amaute taisak ding a, namsau mai-ah mi khat a tai bangin amaute tai ding uh a, kuamah in a delh lohpi-in amaute puk ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:37 Kuamah in delh lo napi-in namsau mai pan a taikhia bangin khatlekhat na kiphupai ding uh a, na galte uh nanzawh nading vangliatna na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:38 Minam dangte lakah note na sia ding uh a, na galte uh’ leitang in note hong valhtum ding hi." 
Leviticus26:39 Note’ sung panin galte’ leitangah a omlaite amau’ mawhna hangin kiam ding uh a, amau’ pute pate a mawhna uh hangin a kiam bangun amau zong a kiam ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:40 “Ahih hangin kei tungah khemna tawh hong gamtatnasa uh le kei hong demna uh hangin amaute gawt bawlin, amau’ galte’ leitangah amaute ka paipihna hangin, amau’ mawhna le a pu a pate uh mawhna pulakin a lungsim uh niamkhiatin, amaute in a mawhna a kipuahphat uhleh," 
Leviticus26:41  
Leviticus26:42 keimah in Jakob tawh ka thuciamna, Isaac tawh ka thuciamna, le Abraham tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding a, leitang zong ka phawk ding hi." 
Leviticus26:43 Ahih hangin amaute in leitang nusia-in, amaute om loin gamkhingin a om sungteng leitang in a sabbath-te na ngah ding hi. Amaute in ka biakna ngeina kipte nialin, ka thukhamte mudah uh ahih manin, a mawhna uh a kipuahphat ding uh kisam hi." 
Leviticus26:44 Bangbang ahi zongin, a galte uh gam sungah amaute a om sungteng uh keimah in amaute nilkhia loin, amaute a susia maimang zah ding le amaute tawh ka thuciamna a pelhzah dingin amaute ka mudah kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa amau’ Pasian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:45 Ahih hangin keimah in amaute ka ngaihsutna-in amau’ Pasian ka hih theih nadingin, minam dangte’ muhna-ah Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih amau’ pulepate tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus26:46 Hihte pen Moses tungtawnin Sinai Mual tungah Topa in amah le Israel mite kikalah a bawl thukhamte le biakna ngeina kipte le thute ahi hi. 
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus27:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvelin kiciamna a bawl ciangin, tua a kiciam mite pen nangmah in Topa -a’ in na seh dinga, a nuai-a kiseh bangin kitanh-in suaktakik thei ding hi." 
Leviticus27:3 Pasal kum sawmnih panin kum sawmguk a phate a man na sehna pen, biakinn shekel zangin pasal khat ciangin ngun shekel sawmnga hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:4 Numei ahihleh shekel sawmthum hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:5 Kum nga pan kum sawmnih ciang a phate, pasal ahihleh shekel sawmnih hi ding a, numei ahihleh shekel sawm hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:6 Kha khat pan kum nga ciang a phate pen pasal ahihleh ngun shekel nga hi ding a, numei ahihleh ngun shekel thum hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:7 Kum sawmguk pan a tungsiahte pen pasal ahihleh shekel sawm le nga hi ding a, numei ahihleh shekel sawm hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:8 “Mi khatpeuh zawnglua-in nangma sehzah a piakzawh kei leh, siampipa kiangah a mi hong kipaipih ding a, siampipa in ama man seh ding hi. A kiciam mipa a siamna tawh kizui-in siampipa in ama man seh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:9 “Mite in Topa’ tungah biakna-in a piakte pen ganhing ahihleh, mi khatpeuh in Topa’ tungah a piak tua bang ganhingte khempeuh a siangtho ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:10 Amah in na khat peuhpeuh, a hoihte a hoih lo tawh ahi zongin, a hoih lote a hoih tawh ahi zongin, laih lo, khek lo ding hi. Amah in ganhing khat ganhing adang khat tawh a khek leh, tua ganhing le a khekna ganhing a siangtho hi khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus27:11 Tua pen Topa’ tungah a kipia thei lo ganhing nin khat ahihleh, mipa in siampipa mai-ah a ganhing paipih ding a," 
Leviticus27:12 siampipa in hoih hi, ci-in ahi zongin sia hi, ci-in ahi zongin a man zah seh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:13 Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat behlap ding hi." 
Leviticus27:14 “Mi khatpeuh in a siangtho dingin Topa’ tungah a inn a ap ciangin, siampipa in a hoihna le a hoih lohna tawh kizui-in a man seh ding a, siampipa’ sehna bangin kip ding hi." 
Leviticus27:15 A ap pa in ama inn a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat sum tawh behlap ding a, tua inn ama a’ hi kik ding hi." 
Leviticus27:16 “Mi khat in a luah ama leitang phelkhat Topa’ tungah a ap leh, nangma sehna pen khaici vawh zah ding tawh kizui ding hi. Mangbuhham beem khat dim a pawina leitang pen ngun shekel sawmnga-in kiseh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:17 Amah in jubilee kum a kipanin a lo a ap leh, nangma sehna zahzah bit ding hi." 
Leviticus27:18 Ahih hangin jubilee kum khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh, siampipa in jubilee kumkik dong a omlai kumte tawh kizui-in a manzah sum seh ding a, nangma sehna zah panin kikhiam ding hi." 
Leviticus27:19 Lo a ap pa in a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat sum tawh behlap ding a, tua lo ama a’ hisuak ding hi." 
Leviticus27:20 Ahih hangin amah in a lo a tanh nuam lo ahi a, amah in midang khat tungah a zuak ahi zongin ahihleh, tua pen amah in tanhkik thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Leviticus27:21 A lo pen, jubilee huna piak khiat ciangin, a ki-apsa lo mah bangin Topa’ tungah a siangtho hi ding a, siampipa in tua lo tang ding hi." 
Leviticus27:22 “Amah in luahna tawh a neih ahi lo, a leisa lo pen Topa’ tungah a ap leh," 
Leviticus27:23 siampipa in jubilee kum ciang dong ding tua man seh ding a, tua ni-in a mipa in a kiseh zah, Topa’ tungah a siangtho-in pia ding hi." 
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum ciangin a lo pen a kileinapa, gamhluahna tawh tua leitang a nei mipa tungah tungkik ding hi." 
Leviticus27:25 “A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel kizang ding hi; gerah sawmnih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:26 “Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa a’ hi khinzo ahih mah bangin, kuamah in ganhing tacilte ap thei lo ding hi; bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh Topa -a’ ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:27 Ganhing nin ahihleh, nangma sehna bangin amah in lei kikin, tua banah seh nga-ah khat behlap ding hi. Tua hi lo a, a kitat kei leh, a kisehna bangin kizuak ding hi." 
Leviticus27:28 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih, Topa’ tungah a ap, a ki-apsa nate, mi hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, a luah ama lo hitaleh, kizuak lo ding, kitanh lo ding hi. A ki-ap na peuhmah Topa’ tungah a siangthopen ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:29 Mite lak nangawn panin a kisusiamang dingin a ki-apsa mi peuhmah, kitanh lo ding a, kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus27:30 “Leitang panin a piang khempeuh khaici hitaleh singgah hitaleh sawm-ah-khat Topa a’ hi a, Topa a dingin siangtho hi." 
Leviticus27:31 Mi khatpeuh in sawm-ah-khat a piak na khat peuhpeuh a tat nop leh, amah in tua banah nga-ah khat behlap ding hi." 
Leviticus27:32 Bawnghon leh tuulekeel hon sawm-ah-khat khempeuh le a cing pa’ ciangkhut nuai-a a pai ganhing khempeuh sawm-ah-khat peuhmah Topa a dingin a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:33 Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantel lo ding a, khek lo ding hi. A khek leh, tua leh a khekna pen a siangtho hi khawm ding hi. Tua pen kitanh lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus27:34 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite a dingin Moses tungah a piak thute ahi hi. 
Numbers1:1 Amaute, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in, Sinai sehnel gam kikhopna puanbuk sungah Topa in Moses hopihin hih bangin ci hi:" 
Numbers1:2 “Nang le Aaron in Israel mihonte khempeuh a innkuankuan, a behbehin, pasal peuhmah a milipin a phazah sim un." 
Numbers1:3 Israel sungah kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha, galdo dingin a kuan thei ding mi khempeuh a honhonin na sim ding uh hi." 
Numbers1:4 A minam simin a beh sungah a lutang ahi mi khat ciat in hong huh ding uh hi. 
Numbers1:5 No hong huh dingte’ min: Reuben sung panin Shedeur’ tapa Elizur; 
Numbers1:6 Simeon sung panin Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel; 
Numbers1:7 Judah sung panin Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon; 
Numbers1:8 Issakhar sung panin Zuar’ tapa Nethanel; 
Numbers1:9 Zebulun sung panin Helon’ tapa Eliab; 
Numbers1:10 Josef tapate, Efraim sung panin Ammihud’ tapa Elishama, le Manasseh sung panin Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel;" 
Numbers1:11 Benjamin sung panin Gideoni’ tapa Abidan; 
Numbers1:12 Dan sung panin Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer; 
Numbers1:13 Asher sung panin Okran’ tapa Pagiel; 
Numbers1:14 Gad sung panin Deuel’ tapa Eliasaf; 
Numbers1:15 Naftali sung panin Enan’ tapa Ahira ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers1:16 Hihte pen mihon sung panin a kiteel, amau’ phung sung panin a makaite, Israel behte’ lutangte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers1:17 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses le Aaron in a min kilosa hih mite khawmin, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in amaute in kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah a pha peuhmah a milipin a innkuankuan, a behbehin amau le amau a kiciamteh mihon buppite khawm uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sinai sehnel gamah amaute a phazah a sim hi." 
Numbers1:18  
Numbers1:19  
Numbers2:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen hi: 
Numbers2:2 Israel mite in amau’ dialkhai gei ciatah a beh dialkhaite tawh phual sat ding uh a, amaute in a pang simah kikhopna buk mai ngatin phual sat ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:3 Nisuahna lampangah phual a sat dingte pen Judah’ giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Judah mite a makai pa pen Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmsagih le tulli le zaguk a pha hi. Issakhar mite a makai pa pen Zuar’ tapa Nethanel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmnga le tulli le zali a pha hi. Zebulun mite a makai pa pen Helon’ tapa Eliab hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmnga le tulsagih le zali a pha hi. Judah’ phualah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawmgiat le tulguk le zali a pha hi. A kipaikhiat ciangin amau masa ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5  
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7  
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9  
Numbers2:10 A leitaw lampangah a pawlpawlin Reuben’ giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Reuben mite a makai pa pen Shedeur’ tapa Elizur hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmli le tulguk le zanga a pha hi. Simeon mite a makai pa pen Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmnga le tulkua le zathum a pha hi. Gad mite a makai pa pen Reuel’ tapa Eliasaf hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmli le tulnga le zaguk le sawmnga a pha hi. Reuben’ giahphual ah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawmnga le tulkhat le zali le sawmnga a pha hi. Amaute a nihna-ah paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12  
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16  
Numbers2:17 Tua ciangin kikhopna buk pen, giahphualte’ laizangah a om Levi mite’ phual tawh kikhin khawm ding a, a phual sat hun mah bangun amau’ san ciatah a dialkhai uh tawh paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:18 A nitumna lampangah a pawlpawlin Efraim giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Efraim mite a makai pa pen Ammihud’ tapa Elishama hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmli le zanga a pha hi. Manasseh mite a makai pa pen Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmthum le tulnih le zanih a pha hi. Benjamin mite a makai pa pen Gideoni’ tapa Abidan hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmthum le tulnga le zali a pha hi. Efraim giahphual ah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tulgiat le zakhat a pha hi. Amaute a thumna-ah paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20  
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24  
Numbers2:25 A leilu lampangah a pawlpawlin Dan giahphual dialkhai a neite hi ding a, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Dan mite a makai pa pen Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmguk le tulnih le zasagih a pha hi. Asher mite a makai pa pen Okran’ tapa Pagiel hi a, ama pawl tul sawmli le tulkhat le zanga a pha hi. Naftali mite a makai pa pen Enan’ tapa Ahira hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawmnga le tulthum le zali a pha hi. Dan’ giahphual a om mi a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawmnga le tulsagih le zaguk a pha hi. Amaute a dialkhai tawh kizui-in a pai nunung ding uh ahi hi." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27  
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31  
Numbers2:32 Hihte pen Israel mite a beh zui-a kisim hi a, a pawlpawlin giahphual ah a om mi a vekpi-in tul zaguk le tulthum le zanga le sawmnga a pha hi." 
Numbers2:33 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah Levi mite kisimkhawm lo hi. 
Numbers2:34 Tua bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a beh tawh kizui-in a innkuankuanin amau’ dialkhaite’ gei-ah giahphual sat uh a, tua bangmahin paikhia uh hi." 
Numbers3:1 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron le Moses’ huna mite ahi hi. 
Numbers3:2 Aaron’ tapate’ minte in: A ta upa Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, le Ithamar hi a," 
Numbers3:3 sathau a kinilh siampi, siampi za-ah na a sem dingin a kikipsak, Aaron’ tapate’ minte ahi hi." 
Numbers3:4 Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gam Topa’ mai-ah mei siangtho lo a zat uh ciangin Topa’ mai-ah Nadab le Abihu si hi. Amaute in ta nei lo uh ahih ciangin Eleazar le Ithamar in a pa uh Aaron’ nuntak sungteng bek siampi na a sem uh ahi hi. 
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte va paipih inla, amaute in siampi Aaron’ na a sep theih nadingun a mai-ah va koih in." 
Numbers3:7 Amaute in biakbuk-ah a sep uh ciangin amah le mihonpi a dingin kikhopna buk mai-ah na sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers3:8 Amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a, biakbuk-ah a sep uh ciangin Israel mite a dingin na sem ding uh hi." 
Numbers3:9 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate’ tungah Levi mite na pia ding a, amaute pen Israel mite lak panin keima tungah a kipiate hi ding uh hi." 
Numbers3:10 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate na seh ding a, amaute in a siampi nasep uh don ding uh hi. Ahih hangin midang khatpeuh in siampi nasep a sep leh, tua mi kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:12 “En in, Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi. Levi mite pen keima a’ hi ding hi." 
Numbers3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi. Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in, Israel sungah tacil khempeuh, mihing tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh, keima a dingin ka ap a, amaute pen keima a’ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:14 Topa in Sinai sehnel gam Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:15 “Levi mite, a behbeh, a innkuankuanin, pasal kha khat a pha panin a tungsiah peuhmah na sim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topa’ thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute a sim hi. 
Numbers3:17 Levi’ tapate’ min in: Gershon, Kohath, le Merari ahi hi." 
Numbers3:18 Gershon’ tapate’ min in: Libni le Shimei ahi hi. 
Numbers3:19 Kohath’ tapate’ min in: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, le Uzziel ahi hi." 
Numbers3:20 Merari’ tapate’ min in: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite pen Levi mite beh lutangte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers3:21 Gershon-te beh pen Libni mite le Shimei mite hi a, hihte pen Gershon-te beh ahi uh hi." 
Numbers3:22 Amaute, kha khat pan a tungsiah a pha pasal peuhmah tulsagih le zanga ahi hi." 
Numbers3:23 Gershon-te beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual sat ding uh a," 
Numbers3:24 tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Lael’ tapa Eliasaf hi ding hi. 
Numbers3:25 Gershon-te beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte pen a biakbuk, puanbuk a tuamna tawh, kikhopna buk kongkhak puankhai," 
Numbers3:26 buktual a puan kikhaite, biakbuk kiima om buktual a kongkhak puankhai le biakna tau, le a khaute le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:27 Kohath-te beh pen Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite, le Uzziel mite hi a, hihte pen Kohath-te beh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:28 Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan a tungsiah, biakbuk nasep a sem peuhmah tulgiat le zaguk ahi hi." 
Numbers3:29 Kohath-te beh in biakbuk leitaw lampangah giahphual sat ding uh a," 
Numbers3:30 Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Uzziel’ tapa Elizafan hi ding hi. 
Numbers3:31 Amau’ et dingte pen thuciamna singkuang, a sabuai, a meivakkhuam, a biakna taute, siampite in nasepna-in a zat uh biakbuk nazatte’ kidalna puan le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:32 Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar pen Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi ding a, biakbuk a en mite’ nasepna vil ding hi." 
Numbers3:33 Merari-te beh pen Mahli mite le Mushi mite hi a, hihte pen Merari-te beh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:34 Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tulguk le zanih ahi hi. 
Numbers3:35 Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi pen Abihail’ tapa Zuriel hi ding a, amaute pen biakbuk leilu lampangah giahphual a sat dingte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers3:36 Merari-te beh’ et dinga a kisehte pen biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, khuam bullente, a nengneng teng le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:37 Buktual kimkota khuampite le a bullente tawh, khetphimte le a khaute zong ahi hi." 
Numbers3:38 Nisuahna lampang biakbuk mai, kikhopna buk mai-ah giahphual a sat ding mite pen Israel mite a dingin bang khat peuhpeuh sep nadingin biakbuk sungah thu a nei Moses le Aaron le a tapate hi a, midang khatpeuh in biakbuk sungah na a sep leh kithat ding hi." 
Numbers3:39 Moses le Aaron in Topa’ thupiakna tawh a innkuankuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawmnih le tulnih a pha hi. 
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel mite sung pan pasal tacil khempeuh sim inla, kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah a min la in." 
Numbers3:41 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite nong laksak ding a, Israel mite’ ganhing tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite’ ganhing nong laksak ding hi - kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:42 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa’ thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi. 
Numbers3:43 Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawmnih leh tulnih le zanih le sawmsagih le thum ahi hi. 
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:45 “Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh le a ganhingte uh tang dingin Levi mite le a ganhingte uh la in. Levi mite keima a’ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Numbers3:46 Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh zanih le sawmsagih le thumin tamzaw ahih manin," 
Numbers3:47 tuate tat nadingin shekel khatah gerah sawmnih a pha, biakinn shekel zangin mi khat ciangin shekel nga pai la inla," 
Numbers3:48 tua a tamzaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:49 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a vallai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la a," 
Numbers3:50 biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tul khat le zathum le sawmguk le nga a la hi. 
Numbers3:51 Tua ciangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak mah bangin Topa’ thu tawh kizui-in kitatkhiatna sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah Moses in a pia hi." 
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers4:2 “Levi mite lak panin Kohath mite amau’ innkuankuan le a behbehin," 
Numbers4:3 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh sim in. 
Numbers4:4 Kikhopna buk sungah Kohath mite in a siangthopen nate tawh kisai nasepte sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:5 “Giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin Aaron le a tapate tumin kidalna puan lakhia ding uh a, tua puan tawh thuciamna singkuang tun ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:6 Tua ciangin amaute in savun tawh tuam ding uh a, tua tungah puan a dum tawh khuhin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:7 “Ompihna Anlum sabuai tungah amaute in puan a dum phah ding uh a, tua tungah a kuangdaite, paknamtui pakante, kuang-ukte, le tuibuahna thawl gongbakte koih ding uh a, a kikoih tawntung anlum zong a tungah om ding hi." 
Numbers4:8 Tua ciangin amaute in a ausan puan tawh tuate khuh ding uh a, savun tawh khuh thuahin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:9 “Mei vakna meikhuam pen, a meivakte, a taitehte, a kuangte, le sathau piakna nazatte khempeuh tawh puan a dum khatin tun ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:10 Amaute in a nazat khempeuh savun-in tunin a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:11 “Puan a dum khat tawh kham biakna tau khuh ding uh a, savun tawh tua mah tuam thuahin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:12 Amaute in biakbuk sungah a kizang nazat khempeuh la-in puan dum khat tawh tunin, savun tawh tuate tun thuah ding uh a, a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:13 Amaute in a biakna tau panin a vutte luakkhia ding uh a, a tungah puan a dupsan khat phah ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:14 Tua lai-ah nasep nadinga a kizang, biakna tau nazat khempeuh, a vutluahna peek, a tu-ka, a kawbia, le a kuang, biakna tau nazat khempeuh, a tungah koihin, tua tungah savun tawh tuam ding uh a, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:15 Aaron le a tapate in biakbuk le biakbuk nazat khempeuh a tun khit uh giahphual a kisuan ciangin, tuate a pua dingin Kohath mite hong pai ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute in a siangtho nate lawngkha lo ding uh hi; lawng le-uh si ding uh hi. Hihte pen Kohath mite’ puak ding kikhopna buk nate ahi hi." 
Numbers4:16 “Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar in meivak tui, a namtui paknamtui, a kikoih tawntung an tawh biakna, nilh sathau, le biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh, le a nazat khempeuh uk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers4:18 “Levi mite lakah Kohath minamte a sih loh nadingin hih un. 
Numbers4:19 A siangthopen nate nai-ah amaute a pai ciangun si loin a hinna dingun hih un. Aaron le a tapate pai-in a nasep ding uh le a van puak ding ciat uhah amaute seh ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:20 Ahih hangin a siangtho nate tomkhano sung bek nangawn a en dingin amaute tum lo ding uh hi; tum le-uh si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:21 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers4:22 “Gershon mite zong, amau’ innkuankuan le a behbehin sim in." 
Numbers4:23 Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi. 
Numbers4:24 Nasep le van puak ciangin Gershon-te beh’ nasep dingte: 
Numbers4:25 Biakbuk dalna puante, kikhopna buk a tuamna tawh, a tungzang a om a khuhna tuuvun, kikhopna buk kongkhak-a puankhai,"
