Numbers4:26 buktual a puan kikhaite, biakbuk le biakna tau kimkotah a om buktual kongpi puankhaite, a khaute, le amau’ nasep nadinga nazat khempeuh pua ding uh a, amaute in tuate tawh a kizom nasep kisam khempeuh sem ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:27 Gershon beh pasalte’ nasep ding, a puak ding le a hih dingte khempeuh uh Aaron le a tapate’ thupiakna bang hi ding a, a puak ding khempeuh uh amaute na ap ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:28 Hih pen kikhopna buk sungah Gershon beh pasalte’ nasep hi a, amau’ nasepna pen siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ ukna nuai hi ding hi." 
Numbers4:29 “Merari mite zong amau’ innkuankuan le a behbehin," 
Numbers4:30 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi. 
Numbers4:31 Kikhopna buk sungah amau’ sep dingte in: Biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, khuam bullente tawh," 
Numbers4:32 a kimkota om buktual a khuampite a bullente tawh, khetphimte, a khaute, a nazatte khempeuh le a nengnengte hi a, amaute’ puak dingin a kiseh nate a minin na lo ding hi." 
Numbers4:33 Hih pen siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ khutnuai-ah Merari mite in kikhopna buk sungah a sep ding teng uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:34 Topa’ thupiakna bangin Moses le Aaron le mihonte’ makaite in Levi mite sung panin beh thumte - Kohath-te beh, Gershon-te beh, le Merari-te beh sunga om pasal mi phazah sim uh hi. Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha a behbehin a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Kohath mi pasal a behtangun tulnih le zasagih le sawmnga a pha hi. Gershon mi pasal a behtangun tulnih le zaguk le sawmthum a pha hi. Merari mi pasal a behtangun tulthum le zanih ahi hi. Moses le Aaron le Israel makaite in a sim, Levi mi a kisim peuhmah, van puak nasep le kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawmthum pan kum sawmnga a pha, a vekpi-in tulgiat le zanga le sawmgiat a pha hi." 
Numbers4:35 Moses’ tungtawnin Topa’ thupiakna bangin a sep ding a puak ding ciat uh kiseh a, Topa’ thupiak bangin Moses in amaute a sim hi." 
Numbers5:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:2 “Amaute in miphakte, ninneite le misi tawh kisukha-in a ninte khempeuh giahphual pua-ah a omsak nadingun Israel mite thu pia in." 
Numbers5:3 A laizangah keima omna ahi amau’ giahphual a nitsak loh nadingun hih bangin a nin numei le pasal paikhiasakin, giahphual pua-ah na omsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers5:4 Tua mah bangin Israel mite in hih uh a, giahphual pua-ah amaute hawlkhia uh hi. Topa in Moses tungah a gen bangin Israel mite in hih uh hi." 
Numbers5:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:6 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa’ tungah mite a khialh theihna ahi khialhna khat peuhpeuh, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin gamta-in a mawh leh," 
Numbers5:7 a gamtatnasa a khialhna pulak ding hi. Amah in a tatkhialhna-ah a kicingin dinkik ding a, tua tungah nga-ah khat behlapin, a khialhna mi tungah pia ding hi." 
Numbers5:8 Ahih hangin a khialhna mi in tua khialhna hanga ditkikna a sang ding tanau a neih kei leh, a khial mi a dingin kilemna a bawlsakna ahi kilemna tuutal banah, khialhna hanga tua ditkikna pen siampipa a dingin Topa’ tungah tung ding hi." 
Numbers5:9 Amaute in siampipa tungah a paipih uh biakna peuhmah, Israel mite’ na a siangthote khempeuh, ama a’ hi ding hi." 
Numbers5:10 Mi khempeuh’ na a siangthote zong ama a’ hi ding a, mi khatpeuh in siampipa tungah a piak peuhmah ama a’ hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers5:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:12 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Mi khatpeuh’ zi vakvai-in a pasal a palhngulh a," 
Numbers5:13 pasal khat in tua nu luppihin, a pasal in tua thu a theih kei a, tua nu kininsak napi-in kuamah in phawk loin, a khialh laitakin tua nu kiman lo ahih manin a langah a pang ding teci a om loh hangin," 
Numbers5:14 a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a kininsak tawm a zi a upmawh leh; tua ahih kei leh zong, a numei kininsak lo napi-in, a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a zi a upmawh le;" 
Numbers5:15 tua pa in siampipa kiangah a zi paipihin, tuanu a dingin a kisam biakna, mangbuhham lawh khat paipih ding hi. A tungah sathau sung loin, paknamtui zong koih lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna, mawhna phawkkik nadinga an tawh biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers5:16 “Siampipa in tua nu va paipihin, Topa’ mai-ah koih ding hi." 
Numbers5:17 Siampipa in lei beel khatin tui siangtho la ding a, biakbuk sual tunga om leivui tawmkhat la-in tua tui sungah khah ding hi." 
Numbers5:18 Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah tua numei koih ding a, numei’ sam phelin, upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna ahi phawkkikna an tawh biakna tua numei tawisak ding hi. Siampipa in ama khut sungah tuisia tawi ding hi." 
Numbers5:19 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah kiciamsakin, ‘Na pasal’ ukna nuai-ah na om sungin, kuamah in nang hong luppih loin, nitna lamah a kihel lo na hih leh, hih tuisia panin suakta in." 
Numbers5:20 Ahih hangin na pasal’ ukna nuai-ah om napi-in nangmah vakvai a, nang le nang kininsakin, na pasal ahi lo midang khat in nang hong luppih leh," 
Numbers5:21 (siampipa in tua numei kiciamsak ding a, tua nu kiangah) Topa in na pheipi teemsakin na pumpi a pawmsak ciangin, na mite lakah hamsia le kiciamna-a zat dingin Topa in nang hong bawlin," 
Numbers5:22 hih tuisia in na gil sung zui hen la, na pumpi pawmsakin na pheipi teemsak hen,’ ci ding hi. Tua ciangin numei in, ‘Amen, Amen,’ ci ding hi." 
Numbers5:23 “Tua ciangin siampipa in laibu khat sungah hih hamsiate gelhin tuisia sungah silkhia ding hi. 
Numbers5:24 Tua numei a nasak velval thei ding tuisia a dawnsak 
Numbers5:25 siampipa in numei’ khutsung panin upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna lakhia ding a, Topa’ mai-ah tua an vei-in biakna tau-ah paipih ding hi." 
Numbers5:26 Siampipa in phawk nadingin an tawh biakna khut dim khat la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding a, tua khit ciangin a tui pen a numei dawnsak ding hi." 
Numbers5:27 Amah in a tui a dawnsak khit ciangin, tua nu amahmah kininsakin a pasal tungah thuman loin gamta ahihleh, tua tuisia pen ama sungah tumin nasak velval ding a, a pumpi pawmin a pheipi teem ding a, tua numei pen mite lakah hamsiatna-in kizang ding hi." 
Numbers5:28 Ahih hangin amahmah a kininsak hi loin a siang ahihleh, tua nu suakta-in ta nei thei ding hi." 
Numbers5:29 “Zi khat, a pasal’ ukna nuai-ah om napi-in vakvai-in amahmah a kinitsak ciang," 
Numbers5:30 ahih kei leh pasal khat in upmawhna lungsim nei-in a zi a upmawh ciangin, upmawhna thute-ah zat ding ngeina tu-a bang ahi hi. Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah numei koih ding a, hih ngeina khempeuh numei’ tungah zang ding hi." 
Numbers5:31 Hih thu-ah pasal in mawhsakna thuak lo ding a, ahih hangin numei a mawh leh ama mawhna thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers6:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, Topa a dingin amahmah a kituam koih nadingin Nazir kiciamna ahi, a tuam mahmah kiciamna a bawl ciangin," 
Numbers6:3 leenggahzu le khamtheihzu ne lo ding hi. Leenggahzu le khamtheihzu pan a kibawl tuithuk dawn lo ding a, leenggahtui khat peuhpeuh dawn loin, leenggah a hing hitaleh a keu hitaleh ne lo ding hi." 
Numbers6:4 Amah a kituam koih hun sungteng leenggui panin a piang bangmah ne lo ding a, a tang ahi a, a hawng nangawn ahi zongin ne lo ding hi." 
Numbers6:5 “Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sungteng ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Topa a dingin a tuam om hun a cin mateng amah a siangtho hi ding a, a sam a sau-in hawi ding hi." 
Numbers6:6 Topa a dingin a tuam om hun sungteng mi siluang kiangah pai lo ding hi. 
Numbers6:7 A nu, a pa, a sanggamnu, a sanggampa ahi zongin a sih leh tuate khat peuhpeuh hangin amah kininsak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian a dingin a tuam omna ama lu tungah om hi." 
Numbers6:8 A tuam om hun sungteng Topa a dingin a siangtho ahi hi. 
Numbers6:9 “Mi khatpeuh ama gei-ah thakhatin si-in, amah in a ki-ap ama sam a nitsak leh, ni sagih sung ngakin tua ciangin kisiansuahin a sam met ding hi." 
Numbers6:10 A ni giat ni-in amah in siampipa kiang kikhopna bukkongah vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih paipih ding a," 
Numbers6:11 siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in, meihal biak nadingin a khat pia ding a, ama a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh misi luang hangin amah khial hi. Amah in tua ni mahin a lutang apphakik ding a," 
Numbers6:12 a tuam om ding hun sungteng Topa a dingin amah tuam omin, mawhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat paipih ding hi. Ahih hangin ama tuam omna kininsak khin ahih manin a masa hun pen a mawkna hi ding hi." 
Numbers6:13 “A tuam om hun a cin ciangin zuih ding Nazir ngeinate: Kikhopna buk kongah amah kipaipih ding a," 
Numbers6:14 amah in Topa’ tungah letsong ahi meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa khat, khialhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a nu khat, le thunuama biak nadingin a sitbaang lo tuutal khat," 
Numbers6:15 le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh khat, sathau tawh a kibawl annel mohte, le silngo sawh loh, sathau tawh a kizut mohphengte, le an tawh biaknate le leenggahzu tawh biaknate paipih ding hi." 
Numbers6:16 “Siampipa in Topa’ mai-ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna le a meihal biakna pia ding a," 
Numbers6:17 a tuutal pen Topa’ tungah thunuama biakna-in silngo sawh loh anlum lawh tawh piakhawm ding a, an tawh a biakna le leenggahzu tawh biakna zong siampipa in pia ding hi." 
Numbers6:18 Tua Nazir mipa in a ki-ap a sam, kikhopna bukkongah met ding a, a ki-ap ama lutang panin a samte la-in thunuama biakpiakna nuai-ah a om mei sungah hal ding hi." 
Numbers6:19 “Siampipa in a kihuansa tuutal liang, le lawh sung panin silngo sawh loh moh khat, le silngo sawh loh mohpheng khat la-in, a ki-ap hun sunga a sam a met khit ciangin tua Nazir mipa’ khutah tuate koih ding a," 
Numbers6:20 Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biak nadingin siampipa in tuate vei ding hi. Tuate pen a kivei a sa-iik le a kipia a phei tawh siampipa a dingin a siangtho ama tanh ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Nazir mipa in leenggahzu ne thei ding hi. 
Numbers6:21 “Hih pen kiciamna a la Nazir mipa a dingin ngeina ahi hi. Ama piakzawh zahzah a piak banah, Topa’ tungah ama piakna pen Nazir hihna tawh a kiciamna bang hi ding a, ama kiciamna mah bangin amah in Nazir hihna tawh tuam om nading ngeina zui-in a gamta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers6:22 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers6:23 “Aaron le a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in hih bangin Israel mite thupha na pia ding uh hi. Amaute tungah hih bangin na ci ding uh hi: 
Numbers6:24 Topa in note thupha hong pia-in hong kem tahen. 
Numbers6:25 Topa in note tungah a maitang hong taangsakin note hong ompih tahen. 
Numbers6:26 Topa in note tungah a maipha hong pia hen la, note tungah nopsakna hong pia ta hen,’ ci-in thupha pia uh hen." 
Numbers6:27 “Amaute in tua bangin Israel mite tungah keima min lo ding uh a, keimah in amaute thupha ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:1 Moses in biakbuk dingsakin, tua biakbuk le a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin ap a, biakna tau le a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin a ap a man ni-in," 
Numbers7:2 Israel makaite, a beh ukpite, minam makaite ahi a kisim mite a ukte in," 
Numbers7:3 buk a nei leeng guk le bawngtal sawm le nih Topa’ mai-ah paipih uh a, leeng khatah makai nih, mi khatah bawngtal khat ciatin sehin a biakna uh pia uh hi. Amaute in biakbuk mai-ah tuate pia uh hi." 
Numbers7:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers7:5 “Kikhopna buk nasepna-ah zat dingin amau’ tung panin tuate sang inla, a nasep ciat uh tawh kizui-in Levi mite pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in leengte le bawngtalte saangin Levi mite a pia hi. 
Numbers7:7 Amau’ nasep tawh kizui-in Gershon mite tungah leeng nih le bawngtal li pia hi. 
Numbers7:8 Siampi Aaron’ tapa Ithamar’ ukna nuai-ah na a sem Merari mite tungah amau’ nasep tawh kizui-in leeng li le bawngtal giat pia hi. 
Numbers7:9 Ahih hangin Kohath mite tungah bangmah pia lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh liangko-ah a puak ding uh a siangtho nate kep ding amaute tavuan kipia hi. 
Numbers7:10 Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a ap nadingin makaite in a biakna uh biakna tau mai-ah pia uh hi. 
Numbers7:11 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Biakna tau ap nadingin makai khat in ni khat ciat a biakna uh pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:12 A ni masa ni-a biakna a piapa pen Judah minam, Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon ahi hi." 
Numbers7:13 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:14 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:15 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:16 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat," 
Numbers7:17 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:18 A ni nih ni-in Issakhar mite a makai, Zuar’ tapa Nethanel in biakna pia hi." 
Numbers7:19 A biak nadingin amah in biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:20 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:21 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:22 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:23 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Zuar’ tapa Nethanel’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:24 A ni thum ni-in Zebulun mite a makai, Helon’ tapa Eliab ahi hi." 
Numbers7:25 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:26 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:27 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:28 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:29 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Helon’ tapa Eliab’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:30 A ni li ni-in Reuben mite a makai, Shedeur’ tapa Elizur ahi hi." 
Numbers7:31 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:32 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:33 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:34 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:35 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Shedeur’ tapa Elizur’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:36 A ni nga ni-in Simeon mite a makai, Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:37 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:38 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:39 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:40 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:41 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:42 A ni guk ni-in Gad mite a makai, Deuel’ tapa Eliasaf ahi hi." 
Numbers7:43 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:44 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:45 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:46 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:47 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Deuel’ tapa Eliasaf’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:48 A ni sagih ni-in Efraim mite a makai, Ammihud’ tapa Elishama ahi hi." 
Numbers7:49 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:50 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:51 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:52 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:53 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Ammihud’ tapa Elishama’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:54 A ni giat ni-in Manasseh mite a makai, Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:55 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:56 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:57 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:58 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:59 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:60 A ni kua ni-in Benjamin mite a makai, Gideoni’ tapa Abidan ahi hi." 
Numbers7:61 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:62 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:63 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:64 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:65 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Gideoni’ tapa Abidan’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:66 A ni sawm ni-in Dan mite a makai, Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer ahi hi." 
Numbers7:67 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:68 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:69 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:70 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:71 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:72 A ni sawm le khat ni-in Asher mite a makai, Okran’ tapa Pagiel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:73 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:74 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:75 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:76 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:77 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Okran’ tapa Pagiel’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:78 A ni sawm le nih ni-in Naftali mite a makai, Enan’ tapa Ahira ahi hi." 
Numbers7:79 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:80 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:81 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat," 
Numbers7:82 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:83 le thunuama biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Enan’ tapa Ahira’ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:84 Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a piakte: Ngun kuangdai sawm le nih, ngun kuang sawm le nih," 
Numbers7:85 ngun kuangdai khat ciangin shekel za le sawmthum gikin ngun kuang khat ciangin shekel sawmsagih gik a, ngun kuangte khempeuh pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel tulnih le zali gik hi." 
Numbers7:86 Paknamtui tawh a kidim kham pakan sawm le nihte, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in khat ciangin shekel sawm gik a, kham pakan khempeuh pen shekel za le sawmnih gik hi." 
Numbers7:87 Meihal biak nadingin ganhing khempeuh pen bawngtal sawm le nih, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le nih, an-a biaknate tawh; le khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa sawm le nih," 
Numbers7:88 le thunuama biakpiakna-in ganhing khempeuh bawngtal sawmnih le li, tuutal sawmguk, keel a pa sawmguk, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawmguk ahi hi. Hihte pen biakna tau sathau a kinuh khit ciangin apna biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers7:89 Topa tawh a kiho dingin kikhopna buk sungah Moses a pai ciangin, kherub nihte’ kikal, thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom tung san teng panin amah a hopih awging khat om a, tua awging in Moses a hopih hi." 
Numbers8:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:2 “Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin, meivak sagihte in meivak khuam mai teng a taan dingin koih in, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers8:3 Aaron in tua bangmahin hih a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, meivak khuam mai teng a taan dingin meivakte a koih hi." 
Numbers8:4 Meivakkhuam a kibawlna zia in: Kham a kiseek hi a, a bul pan a kipan a paakte dongin a kiseek ahi hi. Topa in Moses tungah a lahsa lim tawh kizui-in amah in meivakkhuam a bawl hi." 
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite lak panin Levi mi teng lakhia inla, amaute siangsak in." 
Numbers8:7 Amaute siansak nadingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: Siansuahna tui amaute tungah theh inla, a pumpi khempeuh uh mulkiatna tawh amau kiatsak inla, a puante uh sawpin amau mah na kisiang tawmsak ding hi." 
Numbers8:8 Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat le sathau le annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na lasak ding a, nangmah in khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno adang khat na la ding hi." 
Numbers8:9 Kikhopna buk mai-ah Levi mite paipihin, Israel mihon buppi na khawm ding hi." 
Numbers8:10 Topa’ mai-ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin, Israel mite in Levi mite tungah a khut uh nga ding uh a," 
Numbers8:11 amaute in Topa’ na a sep theih nadingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topa’ mai-ah vei-a biakna-in a pia ding hi. 
Numbers8:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalte’ lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi. Levi mite a’ ding kilemna bawlsak nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat, meihal biakna-in a khat, Topa’ tungah na pia ding hi." 
Numbers8:13 “Aaron le a tapate’ mai-ah Levi mite na koih ding a, Topa’ tungah amaute vei-a biakna-in na pia ding hi." 
Numbers8:14 Tua bangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khenkhia ding a, Levi mite keima a’ hi ding uh hi." 
Numbers8:15 Amaute siangthosakin vei-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna bukah na a sem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi. 
Numbers8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ lak panin kei’ tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi. Israel mite’ tacil khempeuh tang dingin keima a dingin amaute ka la khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ lakah tacil khempeuh mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh keima-a’ ahi hi. 
Numbers8:17 Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in keima a dingin amaute ka tuam koih a," 
Numbers8:18 Israel mite’ lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi. 
Numbers8:19 Kikhopna bukah Israel mite a dingin na a sem ding le, biakbuk mai-ah Israel mite a paikhak ciangin Israel mite’ lakah gimna a tun loh nadingin Israel mite a dingin kilemna a bawl dingin Israel mite’ lak panin Aaron le a tapate’ tungah letsongin Levi mite ka pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers8:20 Tua bangin Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonpite khempeuh in Levi mite’ tungah a hih uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses’ tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah a hih uh hi. 
Numbers8:21 Israel mite, khialhna panin amaute kisiangthosak tawm uh a, a puante uh sawp uh hi. Aaron in vei-a biakna-in Topa’ mai-ah amaute pia a, amaute siansak nadingin Aaron in amau a’ ding kilemna a bawlsak hi." 
Numbers8:22 Tua khit ciangin Aaron le a tapate’ omna kikhopna buk sungah na a sem dingin Levi mite a pai uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi mite’ tungah a hih uh hi. 
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:24 “Hih pen Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi. Kum sawmnih le kum nga pan a tungsiah a phate, kikhopna buk nasepna sungah na a sem dingin hong pai ding uh hi." 
Numbers8:25 Kum sawmnga a phak uh a kipan nasepna panin amau kihemkhia-in na sem nawn lo ding uh hi. 
Numbers8:26 Ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte uh huh ding a, amaute in a na taktak sem lo ding uh hi. Tua bangin Levi mite’ nasep ding na seh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:1 Amaute Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna a kha masa sungin Sinai sehnel gamah Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers9:2 “A kiseh hunin Paisan Pawi, Israel mite khamsak in." 
Numbers9:3 A kiseh hun, tu kha ni sawm le li ni nitakin a thukhamte le a ngeina kip omte bangin na kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Paisan Pawi a kham nadingun Moses in Israel mite tungah a gen hi. 
Numbers9:5 Amaute in a kha masa, a ni sawm le li ni nitakin Sinai sehnel gamah Paisan Pawi kham uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite a gamta uh hi." 
Numbers9:6 Misi luang a lawnna uh hangin a nin mi pawlkhat om uh a, tua ni-in amaute in Paisan Pawi kham thei lo uh ahih manin Moses le Aaron’ mai-ah pai uh hi." 
Numbers9:7 Tua mite in, “Misi luang lawnna hangin ka nin uh hi. Ahi ta zongin bang hangin a kiseh hunin Israel midangte tawh Topa biakna hong kipiasak khawm lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers9:8 Moses in amaute kiangah, “Note’ thu tawh kisai, Topa’ thupiak ka zak dong na ngak dih un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:9 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers9:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note’ lakah mi khatpeuh ahi a, na suanlekhakte uh khatpeuh in ahi zongin misi luang lawnna hangin a nin ahi a, khualzinin gamlapi-ah a om ahi zongin, Topa a dingin Paisan Pawi kham veve ding hi." 
Numbers9:11 A kha nihna a ni sawm le li ni nitakin amaute in kham ding uh a, amaute in silngo sawh loh anlum le a kha meh tawh ne ding uh hi." 
Numbers9:12 Amaute in a zingsang dong bangmah siit lo ding uh a, a guh khat zong sutan lo ding uh hi. Paisan Pawi ngeinate tawh kizui-in amaute in a kham ding uh hi." 
Numbers9:13 Ahih hangin a siang mi khat khualzin lo napi-in Paisan Pawi a kham kei leh, amah in a kiseh hunin Topa biakna pia lo ahih manin a mite lak panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi. Tua mi in ama khialhna mah thuak ding hi." 
Numbers9:14 “Note’ lakah khualmi khat hong peemin, Topa a dingin Paisan Pawi a kham le Paisan Pawi thukhamte le a ngeina kipte bangin hih ding hi. Peemta le tualsung mite a dingin ngeina a kibang na neikhawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:15 Biakbuk a kidinsak ni-in meii in thuciamna biakbuk tuam a, nitak a kipan a zingsang dong meikuang tawh kibangin biakbuk tung sanah a om hi." 
Numbers9:16 Tua bangin omden hi. Sunin meii in tuam a, zanin mei tawh a kibang khat in tuam hi." 
Numbers9:17 Puanbuk tung san panin meii a kilaktoh khit ciangin Israel mite ding khia uh a, meii a kiphuhna munah Israel mite in giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Numbers9:18 Topa in thu a piak ciangin Israel mite ding khia uh a, Topa in thu a piak ciangin amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi. Biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl laiteng, amaute zong giahphual ah om uh hi." 
Numbers9:19 Biakbuk tungah ni tampi sung meii a om khinta zongin Israel mite in Topa’ thupiakna zui-in ding khia tuan lo uh hi. 
Numbers9:20 Biakbuk tungah ni tawmno sung bek meii om thei zel hi. Tua bang ciangin zong Topa’ thupiak bangin giahphual ah amaute tawmno sung mah omin, Topa’ thupiakna bangin amaute a ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:21 Khat veivei nitak a kipan zingsang dong tua meii om hi. Zingsangin meii a kilaktoh ciangin amaute ding khia uh a, tua ahih kei leh, sun khat le zan khat a omlai le zong, meii a kilaktoh hun hunin amaute ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:22 Ni nih ahi a, kha khat ahi a, a hun sauzaw ahi zongin biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl laiteng giahphual ah Israel mite omin ding khia lo uh a, ahih hangin a kilaktoh peuh ciangin amaute ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:23 Topa’ thupiakna tawh amaute in giahphual sat uh a, Topa’ thupiakna mah tawh amaute ding khia uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Topa’ thu a mang uh hi." 
Numbers10:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers10:2 “Ngun peengkul nih bawl in. Tuate na bawl ciangin na seek ding a, mihonte khop nading le giahphual nusiat nadingin na zang ding hi." 
Numbers10:3 A nihin a kitum ciangin kikhopna bukkong nangma kiangah mihon khempeuh hong kikhawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:4 Ahih hangin khat bek a kitum leh Israel minamte’ lutang ahi makaite nangma kiangah hong kikhawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:5 Dinkhiat nading zaksakna na tum ciangin nisuahna lampang a giahphual-ate ding khia masa ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:6 A nih veina na tum ciangin leitaw lampang a giahphual-ate ding khia ding hi. Amaute a dinkhiat ding peuhmah ciangun zaksakna kitum ding hi. 
Numbers10:7 Mihonte a kikaihkhop ding ciangin na tum ding a, ahih hangin a gindan na kibangsak kei ding hi." 
Numbers10:8 Aaron’ tapa siampite in peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Peengkul zatna pen na khang tawntungun note a dingin a kip den ngeina khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers10:9 Na gam sung uhah, no hong nengniam na galte uh tawh na kido ding uh ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah note hong kiphawk nadingin peengkulte tawh pataukohna aw na gingsak ding uh a, na langte panun note hong kihon ding hi." 
Numbers10:10 Na lungdam hun uh, a kiseh na pawi hunte uh, le kha kipat hunte-in, note in na meihal biaknate uh le thunuama na biakpiaknate uhah zong peengkulte na tum ding uh hi. Tuate pen na Pasian uh mai-ah phawkna-in kimang ding hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:11 A kum nihna, a kha nihna, a ni sawmnih ni-in thuciamna biakbuk tung san panin meii kilakhia to a," 
Numbers10:12 Sinai sehnel gam panin Israel mite phual khat pan phual khatah ding khia uh a, Paran gamlakah meii a khawl hi." 
Numbers10:13 Moses’ tungtawnin Topa’ thupiakna tawh khualzin cilna kipan uh hi. 
Numbers10:14 Judah mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia masa uh hi. Tua mihonte, Amminadab’ tapa Nahshon in uk hi." 
Numbers10:15 Issakhar minam honte, Zuar’ tapa Nethanel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:16 Zebulun minam honte, Helon’ tapa Eliab in uk hi." 
Numbers10:17 Biakbuk a kiphel khit ciangin, biakbuk a pua Gershon mite le Merari mite ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers10:18 A zomah Reuben’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Shedeur’ tapa Elizur in uk hi." 
Numbers10:19 Simeon minam honpite, Zurishaddai’ tapa Shelumiel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:20 Gad minam honpite, Deuel’ tapa Eliasaf in uk hi." 
Numbers10:21 Tua ciangin a siangtho nate pua-in Kohath mite ding khia uh a, amaute a tun ma-in biakbuk na kidingsak khin hi." 
Numbers10:22 A zomah Efraim mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammihud’ tapa Elishama in uk hi." 
Numbers10:23 Manasseh minam honte, Pedahzur’ tapa Gamaliel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:24 Benjamin minam honte, Gideoni tapa Abidan in uk hi." 
Numbers10:25 Tua ciangin adang khempeuh’ nungdalin Dan mite’ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammishaddai’ tapa Ahiezer in uk hi." 
Numbers10:26 Asher minam honte, Okran’ tapa Pagiel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:27 Naftali minam honte, Enan’ tapa Ahira in uk hi." 
Numbers10:28 Hih pen Israel mite a dinkhiat uh ciangin amau’ mihonte tawh kizui-in a paina zia uh ahi hi. 
Numbers10:29 Moses in ama zi’ sanggampa ahi, Midian mi Reuel’ tapa Hobab kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Note’ tungah kong pia ding hi,’ a cihna mun zuanin a ding khia ding ka hi uh hi. Ko hong zui in; nang kong limbawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-te hong limbawl ding hong ciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:30 Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong zui kei ding hi. Ka leitang le ka behte kiangah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:31 Moses in, “Kote hong nusia kei in, kong thum hi; nangmah in gamlakah giahphual sat nading zia thei na hih manin, kote a dingin lamhilh nong hi ding hi." 
Numbers10:32 Kote hong zui lecin, Topa in kote hong limbawl ding bangbangin nang zong kong limbawl ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:33 Tua ciangin Topa’ mual panin amaute dingkhia-in ni thum lam a pai uh hi. A tawlngak nading mun uh a zonsak dingin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang, amau’ mai ni thum lam na pai khol hi." 
Numbers10:34 Giahphual panin a dinkhiat peuhmah uh ciangin sunin amaute’ tungah Topa’ meii a om hi. 
Numbers10:35 Singkuang a dinkhiat peuhmah ciangin Moses in, “ Topa aw, dingin na galte kithehthangsak inla, nang hong mudahte na mai-ah taisak in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:36 A khawl ciangin, “ Topa aw, Israel tul sawm tampite’ kiangah hong ciahkik in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:1 Mihonte in amau’ tuahsiatna hangin Topa’ zakin a phun uh hi. Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin heh mahmah a, amaute’ lakah Topa’ mei kuangin, giahphual nawl kimkhat kangtum hi." 
Numbers11:2 Tua ciangin Moses’ zak dingin mite kiko uh hi. Moses in Topa’ tungah thu ngen a, mei a mit hi." 
Numbers11:3 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ lakah Topa’ mei a kuang hi. 
Numbers11:4 Tu-in amaute’ lakah a om gamdang mite in anlim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi. Israel mite zong kap kik uh a, “Sa nek ding nei hi leeng maw!" 
Numbers11:5 Egypt-ah man pia loin i nek ngasate, tangmaite, dawnpawlte, lo-uih neute, lo-uih sante, le lo-uih kangte i phawkphawk hi." 
Numbers11:6 Ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a, hih manna simloh bangmah dang om peuhmah lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers11:7 Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a, a mel pen bedolak singnai tawh kibang hi." 
Numbers11:8 Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a, an gawina tawh gawi-in, tua ahih kei leh sum sungah su-in, beelin huan uh a, mohin a bawl uh hi. A limna pen sathau tawh a kibawl moh ki-em tawh kibang hi." 
Numbers11:9 Zanin giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi. 
Numbers11:10 Mite a innkuankuanun a milipin a puanbuk kongah a kahna uh Moses in a za hi. Topa nak hehlua mahmah ahih manin Moses lungkim lo hi. 
Numbers11:11 Moses in Topa’ kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasempa hong hici bawlsiat na hi hiam? Bang hangin na maipha hong musak loin, hih mi khempeuhte’ tavuan kei’ tungah hong suan na hi hiam?" 
Numbers11:12 Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in kei’ kiangah, ‘Nau cingnu in nawine naungek a puak bangin, nangmah in amau’ pate piak dingin ka ciam leitangah amaute ang puakin paipih in,’ nong cih theih nadingin kei’ sunga piang ahi uh hiam?" 
Numbers11:13 Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi-ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai-ah amaute kapin, ‘Ka nek ding uh sa hong pia in,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Numbers11:14 Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka sizo kei a, kei a dingin tavuan lianlua hi." 
Numbers11:15 Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh, ka gentheihna ka kimuh loh nadingin nong hehpih zawh leh, thakhatin hong thatzaw in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite’ upa le ulian hi ci-in na theih, Israel upate’ sung panin mi sawmsagih hong khopsakin, kikhopna bukah amaute paipih inla, tua lai-ah nang tawh dingkhawmsak in." 
Numbers11:17 Keimah hong paisukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho ding a, keimah in nang’ sunga om kha pawlkhat la-in amaute’ sungah ka guang ding hi. Nang guak in na puak loh nadingin amaute in mite’ tavuan hong puakpih ding uh hi." 
Numbers11:18 Mite tungah, ‘Zing cianga dingin note ki-ap pha un, sa na ne ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ zakin na kap uh a, “Sa nek ding kua in hong pia ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gamah nuam i sa hi,” na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note’ tungah Topa in sa hong pia ding a, note in sa na ne ding uh hi." 
Numbers11:19 Note in ni khat sung, ahih kei leh ni nih sung, ahih kei leh ni nga sung, ahih kei leh ni sawm sung, ahih kei leh ni sawmnih sung bek ne loin," 
Numbers11:20 na ikkhiat dong uh le na kih dong matengun kha khat sung tawntung sa na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ lakah a om Topa nialin a mai-ah na kap uh a, “Bang hangin Egypt panin paikhia ihi hiam?” na ci uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:21 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Kei tawh a kisim khawm mi tul zaguk tak om hi. Nangmah in, ‘Kha khat sung tawntung a nek dingun amaute sa pia ning!’ na ci hi." 
Numbers11:22 Amaute’ khamzah dingin tuuhonte le bawnghonte amau a dingin kigozo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amau’ khamzah ding kimanzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Numbers11:23 Topa in Moses kiangah, “ Topa’ hih theih ding zah kiciangtan sa na hi hiam? Ka thugen a manin hong tun leh hong tun loh tu-in na mu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses paikhia-in mite’ tungah Topa’ thugente a gensawn hi. Amah in mite a makai mi sawmsagih kaikhawmin, Puanbuk kimkotah amaute omsak hi." 
Numbers11:25 Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong paisukin amah hopih a, ama sunga om kha pawlkhat la-in upa sawmsagihte’ sungah a guang hi. Amaute’ sungah tua kha a om ciangin, amaute in kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in tua khit zawh hih nawn lo uh hi." 
Numbers11:26 Giahphual ah mi nih om uh a, khat Eldad kici-in, a khat Medad kici a, amaute’ sungah tua kha a lut hi. Amaute pen a kiciamtehte lakah a kihelte hi uh a, ahih hangin Puanbukah pai loin, giahphual ah kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi." 
Numbers11:27 Tangval khat va tai-in Moses kiangah, “Eldad le Medad-te in giahphual ah thu a gen uh hi,” va ci hi." 
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi, Moses’ nasem, Nun’ tapa Joshua in, “Ka topa Moses aw, amaute kham in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi, Moses’ nasem, Nun’ tapa Joshua in, “Ka topa Moses aw, amaute kham in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:29 Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah, “Keima tangin hong hazatsak na hi hiam? Topa’ mi khempeuh kamsang hi hen la, Topa in amau’ sungah ama Kha guan leh ka cih laitak hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:30 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel upate giahphual ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
Numbers11:31 Topa’ kiang panin huih nungin, tuipi panin vamimte hong puak a, giahphual kiang hih lampang ni khat paina ciang, hua lampang ni khat paina ciang mah giahphual kimkotah kiasak a, lei maitang tungah pi thum bang a sah hi." 
Numbers11:32 Tua sun tawntung le a zan tawntung le a zing ciang tawntung mite dingin vamimte a khawm uh hi. Tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm a, amaute in amau a dingin giahphual kimkotah tuate a pho uh hi." 
Numbers11:33 Sa a kigaih ma, amau’ ha kawmah sa a baang laipi mahin, mite’ tungah Topa hong heh mahmah a, Topa in gimna lianpi khat tawh mite a vatgawp hi." 
Numbers11:34 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibrothhattaavah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sa a lunggulh mite tua lai munah a vui uh hi. 
Numbers11:35 Kibrothhattaavah panin Hazeroth munah mite pai uh a, Hazeroth-ah amaute a taam uh hi." 
Numbers12:1 Moses in Kush numei khat tenpih ahih manin, ama tenpih Kush numei’ hangin Miriam le Aaron in amah gensia-in," 
Numbers12:2 “ Topa in Moses’ tung bek tawnin thu gen ahi hiam? Eite’ tung zong tawnin hong gen hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in tua thu a za hi. 
Numbers12:3 Moses a lungnem mahmah hi a, leitung a om mi khempeuh sangin a lungnemzaw ahi hi." 
Numbers12:4 Topa in thakhatthu-in Moses le Aaron le Miriam kiangah, “Kikhopna bukah no mihing thumte hong pai un,” a ci hi. Amau thumte a pai uh hi." 
Numbers12:5 Meii khuam sungah Topa hong kumsukin, kikhopna bukkongah ding a, Aaron le Miriam a sam hi. Amau tegel mailam nehin hong pai uh hi." 
Numbers12:6 Topa in, “Ka thu za un: Note’ lakah kamsang a om leh Topa keimah in ama tungah maangmuhna tawh ka kilak a, amah tawh mang sungah ka kiho hi." 
Numbers12:7 Ka nasempa Moses tawh tua bang hi lo hi; ka innsung thu khempeuh amah ki-ap hi. 
Numbers12:8 Amah tawh kam le kam kiho-in, a kitel lo kampaute tawh hi loin, a kitel takin thu ka gen uh a, amah in Topa’ mel a mu hi. Tua bang ahih ciangin bang hangin ka nasem Moses gensiat ding lau lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:9 Amaute tungah Topa heh mahmah a, a hehsapi-in a paikhia hi." 
Numbers12:10 Puanbuk tung san panin meiipi a kilakkhiat ciangin Miriam phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi. Miriam’ lamah Aaron kihei a, tua numei a na phak hi." 
Numbers12:11 Aaron in Moses kiangah, “Ka topa aw, kote hai gamtatin ka khialhna hangun gim hong pia kei in." 
Numbers12:12 A nu’ sung panin a suahkhiat ciangin a pum phel langkhat a bei misi bangin Miriam hisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:13 Tua ciangin Moses in Topa’ tungah, “Amah damsak in, Pasian aw, kong thum hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Numbers12:14 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua numei’ maitang, a pa in cil phih leh tua numei ni sagih sung maizum ding hi lo ahi hiam? Giahphual pualamah ni sagih sung kikhumcipsak in; tua khit ciangin amah hong kipaipih kik thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:15 Tua ahih ciangin giahphual pualamah ni sagih sung Miriam kikhumcip hi. Miriam a kipaipih kik mateng khualzin a zom dingin mite ding khia lo uh hi. 
Numbers12:16 Tua khit ciangin Hazeroth panin mite ding khia uh a, Paran gamlakah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Numbers13:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers13:2 “Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan leitang a vaan dingin mi sawl inla, amaute lakah makai ahi, nam khat sung panin mi khat ciat sawl in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers13:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topa’ thupiakna tawh Paran gamlak panin Israel mite’ lutang ahi mi khempeuh a sawl hi. 
Numbers13:4 A sawl mite’ min hih bang ahi hi: Reuben minam panin Zakkur’ tapa Shammua; Simeon minam panin Hori’ tapa Shafat; Judah minam panin Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb; Issakhar minam panin Josef’ tapa Igal; Efraim minam panin Nun’ tapa Hoshea; Benjamin minam panin Rafu’ tapa Palti; Zebulun minam panin Sodi’ tapa Gaddiel; Josef minam (Manasseh minam) panin Susi’ tapa Gaddi; Dan minam panin Gemalli’ tapa Ammiel; Asher minam panin Mikhael’ tapa Shethur; Naftali minam panin Vofsi’ tapa Nahbi; Gad minam panin Makhi’ tapa Geuel ahi hi. 
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl mite’ min ahi hi. Moses in Nun’ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi. 
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl mite’ min ahi hi. Moses in Nun’ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi. 
Numbers13:6 Moses in Kanaan gam a vaan dingin amaute sawlin amaute kiangah, “Negeb gam galkhatah paito-in, mualtung gamah paito unla," 
Numbers13:7 leitang bangci hiam, tua leitangah a teng mite thahat hiam, amaute tawm hiam, tam hiam," 
Numbers13:8 amau’ tenna gam pen nuntak olna gam hiam, haksatna gam hiam, amau’ tenna khuapite pen giahphual hiam, munmuanhuai hiam," 
Numbers13:9 a leitang a lei hoih hiam, lei sia hiam, sing om hiam, om lo hiam, va thei un. Na siam tawpun va hih unla, tua leitang a gah pawlkhat hong ciahpih un,” a ci hi. Tua hun pen leenggah a palte a min hun ahi hi." 
Numbers13:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute paito-in Zin gamlak panin Hamath khua lutna gei, Rehob mun dong gam a vaan uh hi." 
Numbers13:11 Amaute Negeb lamah paito uh a, Hebron tung uh hi. Anak’ suanlekhakte ahi Ahiman mite, Sheshai mite, le Talmai mite, tua lai-ah na om uh hi. (Hebron pen Egypt gam a Zoan a kisat ma kum sagih lai-in kisat hi.)" 
Numbers13:12 Amaute Eshkol kuam tung uh a, tua lai panin leenggah bawk khat bek a hiang tawh loin, mi nih in zawl khatin a zawng uh hi. Amaute in mang kawlsing le thei zong tawmkhat a pua uh hi." 
Numbers13:13 Tua lai panin Israel mite in leenggah bawk a lawhna hangin tua mun pen Eshkol Kuam kici hi. 
Numbers13:14 Ni sawmli a cin ciangin gam vaanna panin amaute hong ciahkik uh hi. 
Numbers13:15 Paran gamlak Kadesh mun a Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah amaute hong tung uh hi. Amaute le mihon khempeuh tungah thu puakkik uh a, tua leitang a gahte amaute a lak uh hi." 
Numbers13:16 Amaute in Moses kiangah, “Kote nong sawlna leitangah ka va tung uh hi. Tua lai-ah bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin luang a, hih pen tua gam a gah ahi hi." 
Numbers13:17 Ahi zongin tua gam a teng mite thahat uh a, a khuapite uh kulh tawh ki-umin lian mahmah hi. Tua banah Anak’ suanlekhakte tua lai-ah ka mu uh hi." 
Numbers13:18 Amalek mite Negeb gamah teng uh hi. Hit mite, Jebus mite, le Amor mite, mualtung gamah teng uh hi. Kanaan mite tuipi gei le Jordan dungah teng uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Numbers13:19 Ahih hangin Kaleb in Moses’ mai-ah mite gamdaisakin, “Thakhatin paito-in va luah ni; bang hang hiam cih leh eite pen a zo thei mahmah ding ihi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers13:20 Tua ciangin amah tawh a paito mite in, “Tua mite a sim dingin i pai ngam kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh eite sangin amaute hatzaw uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers13:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a tamzaw in amau’ vaansa gam thu Israel mite tungah a sia lamin hong puak uh a, “Kote, a vaan dingin ka va paina uh gam pen a tunga teng mite a puksisak thei ding gam hoih lo ahi hi." 
Numbers13:22 Tua lai-ah Nefilim mite (Nefilim pana hong piang Anak mite) ka mu uh hi. Kote pen kauphe bang lelin ka kingaihsun uh a, amau’ muhna-ah zong tua bangmah ka hi takpi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:1 Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh nakpitakin kiko uh a, tua zan sung kap uh hi." 
Numbers14:2 Israel mite khempeuh in Moses le Aaron phunsan uh a, mihon buppi in amaute tungah, “Egypt gamah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung! Tua ahih kei leh zong hih gamlakah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung!" 
Numbers14:3 Namsau tawh a si dingin bang hangin Topa in hih gamah kote hong paipih ahi hiam? Ka zite uh le ka tate uh galte’ mat suak ding uh hi. Egypt-ah ciahkik ding ko a dingin hoihzaw ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
Numbers14:4 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Makai khat teelin Egypt-ah ciahkik ni,” kici uh hi." 
Numbers14:5 Tua ciangin Israel mihon kikhawmte khempeuh’ mai-ah Moses le Aaron boksuk uh hi. 
Numbers14:6 Gam vaante’ lakah a kihel Nun’ tapa Joshua le Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb-te in a puan uh balkekin," 
Numbers14:6 Gam vaante’ lakah a kihel Nun’ tapa Joshua le Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb-te in a puan uh balkekin," 
Numbers14:7 Israel mihonte khempeuh tungah, “A vaan dingin kote ka va painasa uh leitang a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
Numbers14:8 Eite’ tungah Topa a lungkim leh, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna hih leitangah eite hong paipihin eite tungah tua leitang hong pia ding hi." 
Numbers14:9 Topa phunsan kei hamtang un. Amaute pen zialmang pak ding ihih manin tua gam mite kihta kei un. Amau’ kiang panin amau’ kidalna kilakhia khin a, eite tawh Topa hong om hi; amaute kihta kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:10 Ahih hangin mihonte khempeuh in, amaute suang tawh deng un, a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh’ muhin kikhopna buk tungah Topa’ minthanna vang hong kilang hi." 
Numbers14:11 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite in bang tanvei kei hong simmawh ding ahi uh hiam? Amaute’ lakah ka hihsa limte om napi-in, amaute in bang tanvei hong um lo lailai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Numbers14:12 Pulnatna tawh amaute vatgawpin ka lawnkhia kik ding a, amaute sangin a lianzaw a thahat zaw minamin nang kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:13 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa’ kiangah, “Tua bang hileh Egypt mite in hih thu za ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ lak panin na thahatna tawh hih mite na paikhiatpih hi." 
Numbers14:14 Amaute in hih gam a teng mite tungah gen ding uh hi. Topa aw, hih mite’ lakah nang na omna thu hih mite in za khinzo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, maitang kituahin nang hong kimu a, amaute’ tungah nangma meii a ding hi. Amaute’ mai-ah sunin meii khuam sungah, zanin mei khuam sungah nang na pai hi." 
Numbers14:15 Tu-in hih mite mihing khat thah bangin that lecin, nangma minthang vangliatna a zasa minamte in," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Amaute’ tungah piak dinga a kiciam leitangah Topa in hih mite paipih zo lo ahih manin, amah in gamlakah amaute that hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:17 Tu-in, nang tungah hong thum ing. Nangmah in thu ciamin, ‘ Topa heh hak a, a itna kip lianin, mawhna le thu palsatna maisak a, ahih hangin a mawhte siangsak ngei loin, pate’ mawhna tate tungah, khang thum khang lina dongin thuk hi,’ na cih mah bangin Topa’ vangliatna liansak in." 
Numbers14:18  
Numbers14:19 A lian nangma itna kip tawh a kizui le Egypt panin tuhun dong hih mite na maisaksa tawh kizui-in hih mite’ mawhna maisak in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:20 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nangma gen bangin ka maisak hi." 
Numbers14:21 Ahih hangin a taktakin, ka nuntak laiteng, Topa’ minthanna tawh leitung kidim ding ahih mah bangin," 
Numbers14:22 Egypt le gamlakah ka hihsa ka vangliatna le ka limte mu khin napi-in sawmvei kei hong ze-etin keima aw a ngai lo mite," 
Numbers14:23 amau’ pate tungah piak dinga ka kiciam leitang a mu kuamah om lo ding uh hi. Kei hong simmawh mi kuamah in tua leitang mu lo ding hi. 
Numbers14:24 Ahih hangin ka nasem Kaleb ahihleh, amah in lungsim tuam nei-in limtakin kei hong zui ahih manin, amah in a zuat leitangah ka tunpih ding a, ama suanlekhakte in tua leitang luah ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:25 Tu-in tua kuam sungah Amalek mite le Kanaan mite teng uh ahih manin, San Tuipi paina lampi tawnin zing ciangin gamlakah pai un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:26 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers14:27 “Hih a gi lo mihonte in bang tanvei kei hong phunsan ding uh ahi hiam? Israel mite in kei hong phunsanna ka za khin hi. 
Numbers14:28 Amaute tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa in, ‘Kei a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka zakna-ah na gente uh no tungah ka hong hih ding hi." 
Numbers14:29 Na luanghawmte uh hih gamlakah lum ding hi. Note khempeuh, kum sawmnih pan a tungsiah, kei hong phunsante," 
Numbers14:30 Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb le Nun’ tapa Joshua simloh, note tengsak dingin ka kiciamna leitangah khat beek na tung kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:30 Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb le Nun’ tapa Joshua simloh, note tengsak dingin ka kiciamna leitangah khat beek na tung kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:31 Ahih hangin galte in man ding na cih uh na tate uh, keimah in ka tumpih ding a, note in na thusim loh uh leitang amaute in mu ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:32 Ahih hangin note ahihleh, na luanghawmte uh hih gamlakah lum ding hi." 
Numbers14:33 Na luanghawmte uh a nunung pen gamlakah a kisial mateng, gamlakah kum sawmli sung na tate uh tuucing hi ding uh a, note’ ginat lohna thuak ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:34 Na gam vaan sung uh ni phazah tawh kizui-in, ni sawmli, ni khat ciangin kum khat, note in na mawhna uh kum sawmli sung na thuak ding uh a, keima lungkim lohna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Numbers14:35 Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen hi. Keimah langpangin a kikaikhawm hih a gilo mihonte khempeuh tungah hih thu ka hih taktak ding hi. Hih gamlakah amaute beimang ding uh a, amaute si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:36 Moses in gam vaan dingin a sawl mite hong ciahkikin a gam thu a sialamin gen uh ahih manin mihonte Topa a phunsansak," 
Numbers14:37 a gam thu a sialamin a gen tua mite, Topa’ mai-ah gimna in sisak hi." 
Numbers14:38 Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nun’ tapa Joshua le Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi. 
Numbers14:38 Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nun’ tapa Joshua le Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi. 
Numbers14:39 Moses in Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen a, nakpitakin mite thum uh hi." 
Numbers14:40 Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, gamlak mual dawnah paito-in, “Thei un, hih lai-ah i om hi. Topa’ ciamnasa munah i paito ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i khial khin hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:41 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Bang hangin tu-in Topa’ thupiakna palsat na hi uh hiam, tangtung lo ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Numbers14:42 Na galte uh mai-ah note hong kisatpuk kha ding ahih manin kuanto kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ lakah Topa om lo hi. 
Numbers14:43 Amalek mite le Kanaan mite na mai uhah om ahih ciangin namsau tawh note na puk ding uh hi. Topa zuihna panin nungkik na hih uh ciangin note tawh Topa hong om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:44 Ahih hangin Topa’ thuciamna singkuang hitaleh Moses hitaleh giahphual panin ding khia lo napi-in gamlak mual dawnah kuantoh ding amaute in ngaihsun veve uh hi. 
Numbers14:45 Tua ciangin mualtung gamah a teng Amalek mite le Kanaan mite hong paisuk uh a, amaute zo-in Hormah ciang dong nangawnah amaute a delh uh hi." 
Numbers15:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah a teng dingin na tun uh ciangin 
Numbers15:3 bawnghon pan hitaleh tuuhon pan hitaleh thuciamna tunsak nadingin Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin na piak ciang uh hitaleh, Topa’ tungah a gim namtui bawl nadingin utthu-a biakna hitaleh, a kiseh pawi hunte-ah biakpiakna hitaleh na piak uh ciangin," 
Numbers15:4 biakna a paipih mipa in annel lawh khat sathau biing khat tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna Topa’ tungah pia ding hi. 
Numbers15:5 Tuuno khat tawh piak khawm dingin meihal biakna ahih kei leh biakpiakna tawh, tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na bawl ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:6 Tua ahih kei leh tuutal khat tawh piakkhawm dingin annel lawh nih sathau biing nih tawh a kibawl an tawh biak nading na bawl ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:7 Topa’ tungah a gim namtui-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:8 Meihal biak nading ahi a, thuciamna tunsakna-in biakpiak nading ahi a, Topa’ tungah thunuama biak nading ahi zongin bawngtal na bawl uh ciangin," 
Numbers15:9 mi khat in a bawngtal tawh annel lawh thum sathau biing thum tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna pia ding a," 
Numbers15:10 Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl nih na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:11 “Bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin, tuuno a pa ahi a, keelno a pa tawh ahi zongin piak khawm dingin tua bangin kihih ding hi." 
Numbers15:12 Na piak uh ganhing khempeuh a malzah tawh kizui-in tua bangin na bawlkim ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:13 Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piakna uhah tualsung mi khempeuh in hih nate tu-a bangin hih ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:14 Note kiangah khualmi khat hong peem ahi a, na khang tawntungun note lakah mi khatpeuh hong om ahi zongin, amah in Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piak nop leh, note’ hih mah bangin hih ding hi." 
Numbers15:15 Mihonpi a dingin ngeina khat om ding a, note le note’ lakah hong peem mi a dingin tawntung ngeina khat na khang tawntungun om ding hi. Topa’ mai-ah note le peemta mite na kibang ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:16 Note le note’ lakah hong peem mi a dingin a kibang thukhat, ngeina kip khat om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:18 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong paipihna gamah tungin 
Numbers15:19 tua gam a piang ante na nek uh ciangin Topa’ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:20 Na anlak uh a masa pen sung panin biakna-in moh khat na pia ding uh a, an cilna pana biakna-in na piak bangun na bawl ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:21 Na khang tawntungun na anlak uh a masa pen Topa’ tungah biakna-in na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:22 “Ahih hangin note khialin, Topa in Moses tungah a gensa hih thupiaknate khempeuh," 
Numbers15:23 Topa in a thupiak a kipanin na khang tawntungun, Moses tungtawnin Topa in note hong thupiakte khempeuh na zuih kei uhleh," 
Numbers15:24 theih lohna hangin mihonte’ phawk lohin a kikhial ahihleh, mihonte khempeuh in Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, ngeina kip om bangin an tawh biakna le a tuibuah tawh, le khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat pia ding hi." 
Numbers15:25 Siampipa in Israel mihonte khempeuh a dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amaute kimaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen tatkhialhna hi a, amaute in tua amau’ tatkhialhna hangin Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal amau’ biakna le khialhna hanga amau’ biakna uh Topa’ mai-ah paipih khin uh hi." 
Numbers15:26 Tua tatkhialhna in amaute khempeuh huamkha ahih manin Israel mihonte khempeuh le amau’ lakah a peem khualmi zong kimaisak ding hi. 
Numbers15:27 “Theihlohna hangin mi khat a khialh leh, khialhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha keelnu khat pia ding hi." 
Numbers15:28 Mi khat, theih lohna hangin a khialh ciangin, amah a siankik theih nadingin siampipa in tua a khial mipa a dingin Topa’ mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Numbers15:29 Theihlohna hangin na khat peuhpeuh a hih kha, Israel mite’ lakah a om tualsung mipa le amaute’ lakah a peem khualmipa a dingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:30 “Ahih hangin tualsung mi hitaleh peemta hitaleh, na khat peuhpeuh a hih teitei mipa in Topa a simmawh hi a, tua mipa kithat ding hi." 
Numbers15:31 Amah in Topa’ thu simmawhin, a thupiakna siasak ahih manin, tua mipa kithat ding a, ama mawhna amah in thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:32 Israel mite gamlakah a om sungun, Sabbath ni-in sing a tom mi khat mu uh hi." 
Numbers15:33 Sing a tom laitak a mu mite in Aaron le Moses, le mihonte khempeuh kiangah amah paipih uh hi." 
Numbers15:34 Amah bang kicih ding ci-in teltakin kigen lo ahih manin amaute in khumcip uh hi. 
Numbers15:35 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua-ah suang tawh amah deng ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:36 Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua-ah amah paipih uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin suang tawh amah a denglum uh hi." 
Numbers15:37 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:38 “Israel mite tungah gen inla, a khang tawntungun a puan mongte uhah a teep bawlin, a puan mongteep tungah khau dum khat a khih dingun sawl in." 
Numbers15:39 Tua pen, note in utluatna tawh na zuih theihzel uh ahi nomau’ lungsim le nomau’ mittang’ deihna zuikha loin, note in na et ding uh puanmongteep le Topa’ thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sep nading uh ahi hi." 
Numbers15:40 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sem ding uh a, na Pasian uh tungah na siangtho ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:41 Kei pen, note’ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:1 Tu-in Levi mite sung pan Levi’ tapa Kohath, Kohath’ tapa Izhar, Izhar’ tapa Korah; le Reuben mite sung pan Reuben’ tapa Eliab, Eliab’ tapa Dathan; le Abiram; le Peleth’ tapa On;" 
Numbers16:2 hih mite in pawl kai uh hi. Israel mite sung panin mi’ theihkim, mihon sung panin a kiteel, mihonte a makai mi zanih le sawmnga tawh Moses’ mai-ah ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:3 Moses le Aaron langpangin amaute kikaikhawmin amaute kiangah, “Khengval lua uh teh! Mihon khempeuhte a milipin siangtho uh a, amaute’ lakah Topa om hi. Bang hangin Topa’ mihonpite tungah nomau kiliansak tawm na hi uh hiam” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:4 Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin boksukin 
Numbers16:5 Korah le a pawlte khempeuh kiangah, “Zing ciangin Topa in a siangtho ahi mi, ama a’ ahi mi hong lakin, ama kiangah paisak ding a, amah in a teel ding mipa ama kiangah paisak ding hi." 
Numbers16:6 Hih bangin gamta un: Korah le a pawlte khempeuh in paknamtui beel la un. 
Numbers16:7 Zing ciangin Topa’ mai-ah tua beelte sungah mei koihin, mei tungah paknamtui koih unla, tua ciangin Topa’ teel mi pen a siangtho hong hi ding hi. Levi’ tapate aw, khengvallua uh teh!” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:8 Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “No Levi mite aw, tu-in za un." 
Numbers16:9 Israel mite’ Pasian in ama kiangah hong paipih ding, Topa’ biakbuk sungah nasep sem ding, mihonte’ na a sem dingin amau’ mai-ah a ding dingin Israel mihonte’ kiang panin hong khenkhiatna," 
Numbers16:10 le nang le na sanggamte ahi Levi’ mite, ama kiangah hong paipihna hawmthawh lai na hi hiam? Siampi nasepna zong deih lai na hi hiam?" 
Numbers16:11 Tua ahih ciangin nang le na pawlte khempeuh hih lai-ah na kikaihkhopna uh pen Topa langpanna ahi hi. Note in na phunsan uh Aaron pen bang mi hi mawk ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Numbers16:12 Tua ciangin Moses in mi sawlin Eliab’ tapa Dathan le Abiram samsak hi. Amaute in, “Kong pai kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:13 Kote’ tungah nangmah ulianin kibawl tawmin, gamlakah kote hong that dingin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam panin nong paikhiatpihna thu hawmthawh lai na hi hiam?" 
Numbers16:14 Tua tham loin nangmah in bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gamah kote hong paipih loin, lote le leenggui lote zong nong luahsak kei hi. Hih mite’ mit khelkhia ding na hi hiam? Kong pai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:15 Moses heh mahmah ahih manin Topa’ kiangah, “Amau’ biakna thupi ngaihsut kei in. Amaute tungah bangmah ka gamta khial kei a, a la uh khat beek nangawn ka laksak kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:16 Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “Nang le na pawlte, nang le amaute, Aaron tawh zing ciangin Topa’ mai-ah hong om un." 
Numbers16:17 Note in na milipun na paknamtui beel ciat uh la-in, a sungah paknamtui koih unla, Topa’ mai-ah na paknamtui beel ciat uh, paknamtui beel zanih le sawmnga paipih un. Aaron le nangmah in zong na paknamtui beel tuak uh paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:18 Tua ahih ciangin a milipun a paknamtui beel ciat uh la uh a, tuate sungah mei koihin a tungah paknamtui koih uh a, kikhopna buk kongah Moses le Aaron tawh ding khawm uh hi." 
Numbers16:19 Tua ciangin Korah in amaute’ langkhat, kikhopna bukkongah mihonte khempeuh khawm hi. Topa’ minthanna mihon khempeuhte tungah hong kilang hi." 
Numbers16:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers16:21 “Amaute tomno sungin ka beisak theih nadingin hih mihonte lak panin kihem un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:22 Amaute boksuk uh a, “Pasian, mi khempeuhte’ tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian aw, mi khat’ khialhna hangin mihon khempeuhte’ tungah nang heh ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:24 “Mihonte tungah hih bangin gen in: Korah, Dathan, le Abiram-te’ omna kiim panin paikhia un, ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:25 Tua ciangin Moses dingin Dathan le Abiram kiangah pai a, Israel upate in zong amah a zui uh hi." 
Numbers16:26 Amah in mihonte kiangah, “Amaute’ khialhna khempeuh tawh note hong kiphiatkhia kha ding ahih manin, hih migilote’ puanbuk panin paikhia unla, amau’ na khat beek lawng kha kei un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:27 Tua ahih ciangin Korah, Dathan, le Abiram-te’ omna kiim panin amaute a paikhia uh hi. Dathan le Abiram-te, a zite uh le a tapate uh le a taneute uh tawh hong pusuakin a puanbuk kong uhah dingkhawm uh hi." 
Numbers16:28 Tua ciangin Moses in, “Hih na khempeuh a sem dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi. Hih nasep pen keima utthu ahih lohna, hih thu tawh na thei ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:29 Mi khempeuh a sih ngei bang danin hih mite si a, tua ahih kei leh mi khempeuh in a tuah ngeite a tuah leh, Topa in kei hong sawl loh ahi hi." 
Numbers16:30 Ahih hangin Topa in a thak khat hong piangsakin, leitang in a kam ka-in amaute’ neih khempeuh tawh hih mite valhtumin, a hingtangin Leinuai-ah a tumsuk uhleh, hih mite in Topa a simmawh ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:31 Hih thute a gen khit phetin amau’ nuai-ah lei kiphelkham hi. 
Numbers16:32 Leitang a kam ka-in, Korah tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh le a innkuanpihte uh le a neihsa khempeuh uh valhtum hi." 
Numbers16:33 Tua ahih ciangin amaute le a neihsa khempeuh uh a hingtangun Leinuai-ah tumsuk uh hi. Leitang in amaute khupnelhin mihonpite’ lak panin amaute bei uh hi. 
Numbers16:34 Amaute’ kikona hangin a kiim uha om Israel mite khempeuh tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Leitang in hong valhtum kha in teh!” ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:35 Tua ciangin Topa’ kiang panin mei hong paikhia a, paknamtui a pia mi zanih le sawmngate kangtum hi." 
Numbers16:36 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:37 “Siampi Aaron’ tapa Eleazar in meikuang sung panin paknamtui beelte a lakkhiat ding gen inla, tua ciangin a gamlapi-ah mei thehthang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nate," 
Numbers16:38 amau’ nuntakna a beina dongin a khial hih mite’ paknamtui beelte a siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakna tau sitna kuangdai dingin seek un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa’ mai-ah tuate pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nate siangtho hi. Israel mite tungah tua bangin hih nate pen lim khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:39 Tua ahih ciangin siampi Eleazar in mei tawh a kangtum mite’ piak paknamtui sumngo beelte la-in biakna tau sitna-in a seek hi. 
Numbers16:40 Topa in Moses tungtawnin Eleazar tungah a gen bangin Korah le a pawlte tawh a kibang kha lo dingin, siampi ahi lo, Aaron’ suanlekhakte ahi lo mi peuhmah, Topa’ mai-ah paknamtui hal dingin a pai loh nading, Israel mite tungah phawksakna khat ahi hi." 
Numbers16:41 Ahih hangin a zing ciangin Israel mihon khempeuh in Moses le Aaron phunsan uh a, “ Topa’ mite na that uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:42 Moses le Aaron langpangin mihonte a kikhop uh ciangin, kikhopna buk lamah amaute a khuadak uh ciangin, meii in na tuam a, Topa’ minthanna vang kilang hi." 
Numbers16:43 Kikhopna buk mai lamah Moses le Aaron pai a," 
Numbers16:44 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:45 “Tomno sungin amaute ka siatsak theih nadingin hih mihonte’ lak panin paikhia un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amau tegel zong boksuk uh hi." 
Numbers16:46 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Na paknamtui beel la-in, biakna tau pana mei a sungah koih inla, a tungah paknamtui koihin, mihonte’ lakah paipih mengmeng inla, amaute a dingin kilemna bawlsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ kiang panin hehna hong paikhia khin a, gimna kipan khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:47 Tua ahih ciangin Moses’ gen bangin Aaron in paknamtui beel la-in mihonte lakah a tai hi. Mite lakah gimna kipan khin takpi a, amah in paknamtui koihin mite a dingin kilemna a bawlsak hi." 
Numbers16:48 A si le a hingte’ kikalah amah ding a, gimna a veng hi." 
Numbers16:49 Tu-in Korah’ tungtangah a site simloh, hih gimna tawh a si mi tul sawm le tulli le zasagih ahi hi." 
Numbers16:50 Gimna a ven’ ciangin kikhopna bukkong Moses kiangah Aaron a ciahkik hi. 
Numbers17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers17:2 “Israel mite tungah thu gen inla, amaute tung panin, beh khat ciangin ciangkhut khat, a beh tawh kizui-in a makaite khempeuh tung panin ciangkhut sawm le nih la in. A ciangkhut tungah amau’ min ciat gelh inla," 
Numbers17:3 Levi ciangkhut tungah Aaron’ min gelh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh beh lutang khatah ciangkhut khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers17:4 Tua ciangin kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna mai, nang tawh i kituahna munah tuate na koih ding hi." 
Numbers17:5 Keimah in ka teel mipa’ ciangkhut hong sel ding hi. Amaute in nang hong phunsanna, Israel mite’ phunna tua bangin kei’ kiang panin ka beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers17:6 Moses in zong Israel mite tungah tua thu a gen hi. A makaite khempeuh in a beh tawh kizui-in makai khat ciangin khat pai, ciangkhut sawm le nih ama tungah pia uh a, Aaron’ ciangkhut zong amau’ ciangkhut lakah a om hi." 
Numbers17:7 Moses in thuciamna puanbuk sung Topa’ mai-ah tua ciangkhutte a koih hi. 
Numbers17:8 A zing ciangin thuciamna puanbuk sungah Moses a pai leh, Levi-te beh a’ ding Aaron’ ciangkhut selin nguumkhia a, paakin, almond min gah a gah hi." 
Numbers17:9 Tua ciangin Moses in Topa’ mai panin Israel mite khempeuh kiangah ciangkhut khempeuh paikhiatpih hi. Amaute in en uh a, a ciangkhut ciat uh a la uh hi." 
Numbers17:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute si kha ding ahih manin, amaute in kei hong phunsanna beisak theih nadingin a lehdo mite a dingin lim ahi dingin thuciamna mai-ah Aaron’ ciangkhut koihkik in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers17:11 Tua ahih manin Topa’ sawl bangin Moses in zong a hih hi. 
Numbers17:12 Israel mite in Moses kiangah, “En in, kote a si ka hi ta uh a, kote khempeuh a mawkna ka hi ta uh hi." 
Numbers17:13 A nai-ah a pai, Topa’ biakbuk nai-ah a pai peuhmah si ding hi. Kote khempeuh ka bei nading uh hita hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers18:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Nang le na tapate le na behte in biakbuk sung nasepnate tawh kisai-in khialhna a om leh mawhna na puakhawm ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang le na tapate in na siampi nasepna uh tawh kisai-in khialhna a om leh no teng bek in mawhna na pua ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:2 Amaute in nang hong pawlin, thuciamna puanbuk mai-ah nang le na tapate na om laitakun note’ na hong sepsak theih nadingin na pate nam ahi Levi minam na sanggamte zong paipih in." 
Numbers18:3 Amaute in note hong huhin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh a, ahih hangin note le amaute si kha ding na hih ciangun biakbuk nazatte leh biakna tau-ah na hong seppih lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:4 Amaute in note hong pawlin, kikhopna buk vaanin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh a, note’ nasepte midang kuamah in hong seppih thei lo ding hi." 
Numbers18:5 Israel mite tungah hehna a om nawn loh nadingin biakbuk nasep leh biakna tau nasep note in na sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:6 En un, Israel mite kiang panin na sanggam uh Levi mite ka la khin a, amaute pen kikhopna buk nasep a sem dingin Topa’ tungah a kipia, note’ tungah letsong ahi hi." 
Numbers18:7 Nang le na tapate in biakna tau tawh kisai nate le dalna puan sunga om nate khempeuhah na siampi nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Na siampi nasep uh letsongin kong piak hi a, midangte in hong sep leh kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “En in, kei tungah hong kipia biakna a kikoih khempeuh, Israel mite in a ap nate khempeuh nang kong pia hi. Nangma tanh ding le na suanlekhakte’ kaih ahi tawntung dingin note tungah kong pia hi." 
Numbers18:9 Mei tawh hal dingte lak panin a kisit, a siangtho pen nangma ngah dingte in: Amaute in kei’ tungah hong piak amau’ biaknate khempeuh, an tawh amau’ biaknate khempeuh, khialhna hanga amau’ biaknate khempeuh, leh mawhna hanga amau’ biaknate khempeuh pen nang le na suanlekhakte a dingin a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Numbers18:10 A siangtho pen mun khatah na ne ding uh hi. Pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding hi; note a dingin a siangtho ahi hi. 
Numbers18:11 “Amau’ letsong biakna, Israel mite in vei-a biaknate khempeuh uh zong nomau-a’ ahi hi. Nang le na tapate le na tanute’ kaih tawntung dingin tuate kong pia hi. Na inn sunga om a siangtho mi peuhpeuh in ne thei ding hi." 
Numbers18:12 “Sathau limci pen khempeuh, le leenggahzu le an a limci pen khempeuh, Topa’ tungah amau’ piak anpalte, note’ tungah kong pia hi." 
Numbers18:13 Amaute in Topa’ tungah a piak uh, amau’ leitangah a min masa gah khempeuh nomau a’ hi ding hi. Na inn sunga om a siangtho mi peuhpeuh in ne thei ding hi." 
Numbers18:14 “Israel-te’ sungah a ki-ap na peuhmah nomau a’ hi ding hi. 
Numbers18:15 “Mihing le ganhing khempeuh sung panin Topa’ tungah mite in a piak tacil khempeuh, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, nomau a’ hi ding hi. Ahi zongin mihing tacil na tankhia ding uh a, ganhing nin tacil zong na tankhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:16 Tuate a kitatna man (kha khat a phak ciangin tuate na tankhia ding uh hi) gerah sawmnih a pha biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel nga-in na seh ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:17 Ahih hangin bawng tacil, ahih kei leh tuu tacil, ahih kei leh keel tacilte na tan kei ding uh hi; tuate a siangtho ahi hi. Biakna tau tungah tuate’ si na theh ding uh a, Topa’ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna-in tuate’ thau na hal ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:18 Ahih hangin a kivei sa-iik le a taklam phei nomau-a’ ahih mah bangin, tuate’ sate nomau a’ hi ding hi." 
Numbers18:19 “Israel mite in Topa’ tungah a piak a siangtho biaknate khempeuh, nang le na tapate le na tanute tungah kaih tawntung dingin kong pia hi. Tua pen nang le na suanlekhakte a dingin Topa’ mai-ah a tawntungin a kiphel thei lo, ci tawh thuciamna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:20 Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Nang in amau’ gam sungah gamhluah na nei kei ding a, amaute’ lakah tanh zong na nei kei ding hi. Kei pen Israel mite’ lakah nangma tanh le nangma luah ka hi hi." 
Numbers18:21 “Kikhopna buk sungah amaute’ nasepna thaman dingin Israel sunga sawm-ah-khat khempeuh, Levi mite’ tungah gamh-in ka pia hi." 
Numbers18:22 Amaute in khialhna thuakin si kha ding uh ahih manin, tu a kipanin kikhopna buk sungah Israel midangte pai-in tua sawm-ah-khat nekpih lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:23 Ahih hangin Levi mite in kikhopna buk nasep sem ding uh a, amaute in a tavuan uh pua ding uh hi. Tua pen amau’ khang tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding a, amaute in Israel mite’ lakah luah nei lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakna-in Topa’ tungah a piak uh Israel mite’ sawm-ah-khat pen Levi mite tungah luah dingin ka pia khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lakah amaute in luah a neih loh ding uh ka gensa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:25 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers18:26 “Levi mite kiangah hih bangin na gen lai ding hi: ‘Note’ luah dingin amaute’ tung panin kong piak sawm-ah-khat, Israel mite’ tung panin na lak uh ciangin, tua sung panin Topa’ tungah biakna, sawm-ah-khat sung pan sawm-ah-khat na pia sawn ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:27 Tua na biaknate uh, ancilna pana an le leenggah sukna pana kipia mah bangin note-a’ in kiciamteh ding hi." 
Numbers18:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite’ tung panin na ngah uh sawm-ah-khat khempeuh tung panin Topa’ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua bangin siampi Aaron’ tungah Topa a kibiakna na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:29 Note tungah hong kipia letsong lakah a limci pen, a siangtho pen paipihin Topa a’ ding biakna khempeuh na pia ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Numbers18:30 Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Tuate sung panin a limci pen teng na piak khit uh ciangin, a omlai teng Levi mite a dingin ancilna panin a piangte le leenggah sukna panin a piangte a kipia mah bangin kiciamteh ding hi." 
Numbers18:31 Nang le na innkuanpihte in mun khat peuhpeuhah na ne thei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen kikhopna buk sungah note’ nasepna thaman ahi hi. 
Numbers18:32 Tua sung panin a limci pen na piak nak-uhleh tua thu hangin mawhsakna na thuak kei ding uh hi. Israel mite’ na a siangthote na ninsak kei ding uh hi. Na nitsak uhleh na si ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers19:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses le Aaron’ kiangah," 
Numbers19:2 “ Topa’ thupiak thukham le ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Poina a nei lo, sitbaanna a om lo, a tungah nasepna kol a kivawh ngei nai lo, bawngla a san khat nomau kiangah hong paipih nadingun Israel mite kiangah gen un." 
Numbers19:3 Siampi Eleazar kiangah na pia ding uh a, giahphual pualamah kipaipihin ama mai-ah kigo ding hi." 
Numbers19:4 Siampi Eleazar in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat la-in, kikhopna buk mai lamah a si sagihvei theh ding hi." 
Numbers19:5 Ama muhna-ah a bawngla kihal ding a, a vun, a sa, le a si, a ek tawh kihal ding hi." 
Numbers19:6 Siampipa in taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khaute la-in bawngla a kihalna sungah tuate khul ding hi. 
Numbers19:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong pai ding hi. A nitak mateng siampipa a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:8 Bawngla a hal mipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:9 Mi a siang khat in bawngla vu khawmin, giahphual pualam a siang mun khatah tuate koih ding a, khialhna maisak nading, nitna siansak nading tui-ah zat dingin Israel mihonpite a dingin tuate kikem ding hi." 
Numbers19:10 Bawngla vute a khawm mipa in ama puante sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Hih pen Israel mite le amaute lakah a peem khualmi tungah tawntung ngeina hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:11 “Misi luang khatpeuh a lawng pa ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi. 
Numbers19:12 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in amahmah tui tawh kisiangsakin, tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in amahmah a kisiansak kei leh, amah a siang suak thei lo ding hi." 
Numbers19:13 Misi khatpeuh a lawng mi in amahmah a kisiansak tawm kei leh amahmah in Topa’ biakbuk a ninsak hi a, Israel sung panin tua mi kihawlkhia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuak lo ahih manin ama tungah nitna baang lai ahih ciangin a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:14 “Mi khat puanbuk sungah a sih ciangin puanbuk sungah a pai mi peuhmah le puanbuk sungah a om mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi. 
Numbers19:15 A kisiincip lo a kihong beel peuhmah a nin ahi hi. 
Numbers19:16 Namsau tawh gamlakah a kithat mi ahi a, misi pumpi ahi a, mi guh ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:17 “Amaute in a nin mipa a dingin a kihal khialhna hanga biakna vute la-in beel sung khatah tui luanglai tawh hel ding uh hi. 
Numbers19:18 Tua ciangin a siang mi khat in puknah la-in a sungah diah ding a, puanbuk tung le a nazat khempeuh tung le tua lai-ah a om mi khempeuh tung le guh ahi a, a kithat mi ahi a, misi ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mipa tungah theh ding hi." 
Numbers19:19 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siang mipa in a nin mipa tungah theh ding a, tua bangin a ni sagih ni-in amah in mi ninpa siangsakin, amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah kipumsil ding a, a nitak ciangin amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:20 “Ahih hangin a nin hi napi-in a kisiangsak lo mipa in Topa’ biakbuk ninsak ahih manin mihonpi panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuak lo ahih manin amah a nin ahi hi. 
Numbers19:21 Tua pen amaute a dingin tawntung ngeina khat hi ding hi. Nitna hangin tui a theh mipa in ama puante sawp ding a, nitna hangin a kizang tui a lawng mipa a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:22 A nin mipa in a lawn’ na khat peuhpeuh a nin hi ding a, tua na a lawng peuhpeuh zong a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:1 Israel mite, a mihon buppi, a kha masa sungin Zin gamlak tung uh a, Kadesh munah phual sat uh hi. Tua lai-ah Miriam si a, tua lai mahah kivui hi." 
Numbers20:2 Tu-in mihonte a’ ding tui om lo ahih manin Moses le Aaron’ langah amaute kikhawmin kituah uh hi. 
Numbers20:3 Mite, Moses tawh kiselin, “ Topa’ mai-ah ka sanggamte uh a sih lai-in a si hizaw hoh ta le ung!" 
Numbers20:4 Bang hangin hih lai-ah kote le ka ganhingte uh a si dingin Topa’ mihonte hih gamlakah hong paipih na hi hiam? 
Numbers20:5 Bang hangin hih mun sia-ah hong paipih dingin Egypt panin kote hong paitosak na hi hiam? An ahi a, thei ahi a, leenggui ahi a, mang kawlsing ahi zongin a omna mun ahih loh banah tui dawn ding nangawn zong om lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers20:6 Tua ciangin mihonte omna panin kikhopna bukkongah Moses le Aaron pai-in boksuk uh hi. Topa’ minthanna vang amaute’ tungah hong kilangin 
Numbers20:7 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers20:8 “Ciangkhut la-in, nang le na sanggampa Aaron in mihonte khawm un la, suangpi in amau’ muhin tui a piak ding sawl un. Tua bangin mihonte le amau’ ganhingte tui na ngahsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:9 Moses in zong Topa’ thupiak bangin ciangkhut a la hi. 
Numbers20:10 Moses le Aaron in suangpi mai-ah mihonte kaikhawmin amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu-in za un, a lehdo mite aw; hih suangpi panin note a’ ding tui hong phulkhiasak ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:11 Moses in a khut laamto-in a ciangkhut tawh tua suangpi nihvei sat a, tui tampi phulkhia-in mihonte le amau’ ganhingte in a dawn uh hi." 
Numbers20:12 Ahi zongin Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah, “Israel mite’ mai-ah kei hong um lo, hong siangthosak lo na hih uh ciangin amaute ka piaksa leitangah hih mihonte na tunpih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi."
