Deuteronomy17:11 amaute in note tungah hong piak thuhilhna le note tungah hong gen uh thukhensatna tawh kizui-in na hih ding uh hi. Amaute in note tungah hong gen bang teekteekin na hih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah nasem dingin a ding siampipa’ thu ahi a, thukhen pa’ thu ahi zongin man lohna tawh a khengvala a gamta mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Tua bangin Israel-te’ sung panin hoih lohna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in za-in, kihta-in, a khengvalin gamta ngam nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah tungin, note in tua leitang nei-in a tungah na ten uh ciangin, ‘Eite’ kimkota om minamte khempeuh mah bangin eite’ tungah kumpi khat i koih ding hi,’ na ci nuam kha ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Topa note’ Pasian in a teel mipa note’ tungah kumpi-in na koih thei takpi ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na mipihte bek uh lak panin kumpi-in mi khat na koih ding uh a, na sanggam uh ahi lo gamdang mi khat no’ tungah na koih thei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Amah in ama aituam dingin sakol tampi nei lo ding hi. Topa in no kiangah, ‘Hih lampi tawnin na kilehkik ngei kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci ahih manin, amah in sakolte a lei dingin Egypt gamah mite paisak lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 A lungsim heikhia kha ding ahih manin zi la thuah lo ding a, ama a dingin ngun le kham zong nakpitakin behlap lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ama kumpi tokhom tungah a tut ciangin Levi siampite’ kep hih thukhamte ama a dingin laibu khat sungah gelh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Hih thukham sunga thute le hih ngeinate kemin zuihna tawh Topa a Pasian zahtak ding a theih nading, a mipihte tungah ama lungsim a kiliatsak loh nading, thupiaknate them khat zong a pelh loh nading, le Israel-te sung ahi ama kumpi gam sungah amah le a tate saupi a om theih nadingin amah in a nuntak sung tawntung tua sunga thute sim ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:20  
Deuteronomy18:1 “Siampi ahi Levi minam khempeuh in Israel-te bangin tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin nei lo ding uh a, amaute in Topa’ tungah mei tawh kihal biaknate le a kaih ngeite uh ne ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Amaute in a sanggamte uh lakah gamhluah nei lo ding uh a, amah in amaute tungah a ciam mah bangin Topa pen amaute’ luah ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh biakna-in a pia mite’ tung panin siampite’ kaih dingte: Amaute in siampite’ tungah a liang le a paang nihte le a gilpi pia ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:4 Na anpal, na leenggahzu, na sathau, le na meet masak uh na tuumul uh na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi minamte Topa’ na a sem tawntung dingin na minam khempeuh uh sung panin Topa na Pasian un a teel ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Levi mi khat, Israel-te sung na khuapi uh khat peuhpeuh ahi ama tenna panin ama ut hun peuh ciangin Topa’ teelna munah hong pai thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Tua ciangin Topa’ mai-ah nasem dingin a om a lawm Levi midangte khempeuh mah bangin Topa a Pasian’ min tawh na sem thei ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Amah in a gamhluah a zuakna pan a sum ngahte banah nek ding a kikimin amaute tawh tanh ngahkhawm ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:9 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah na tun uh ciangin, tua minamte’ gamtatna a kihhuaite zuih ding na kisin kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Note lakah a tanu ahi a, a tapa ahi zongin biakna-in a zang, ai a saan, khong a khai, mailam thu a gen, ai a tawi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 bum a zang, van a kah, sikhate tawh a kiho, sikha thu a dong kuamah na om kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh hihte a hih mi peuhmah Topa a dingin a kihhuai ahi hi. Hih bang a kihhuai gamtatnate hangin note’ mai panin Topa na Pasian un amaute hawlkhia hi. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Note pen Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah paubaang loin na om ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in na suankhiat ding uh hih minamte in khongkhaite le aisante thu ngai uh hi. Ahih hangin note ahihleh tua bangin na gamtat ding uh Topa na Pasian un hong phal lo hi. 
Deuteronomy18:15 “ Topa na Pasian un note lak ahi na sanggamte uh lak panin note a dingin kei tawh a kibang kamsang khat hong khangsak ding hi. Note in ama thu na ngai ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Note in, ‘Si kha ding ka hih manun Topa kote’ Pasian’ aw hong zasakkik kei in. Hih a lian mei zong hong musak nawn kei in,’ ci-in na kikhop ni-un Horeb-ah Topa na Pasian uh tung pan na deih bang uh hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amaute’ hong ngetna thuman taktak hi." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Amau sanggamte lak panin nang tawh a kibang kamsang khat amaute a dingin ka khangsak ding hi. Ama gen dingte ka hilh ding a, amah ka thupiak khempeuh amaute tungah a gen ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Amah in keima min tawh a gen ka thute a don lo mi peuhmahte kei mahmah in ka thuk ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ahih hangin keimah in thugen dingin thu pia lo napi-in keima min tawh thu a gen ngam kamsangpa hitaleh pasian dangte’ min tawh thu a gen pa hitaleh, tua bang mite si ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Na lungsim sung uhah, ‘ Topa’ gen ahi lo thu bangci theih ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uhleh," 
Deuteronomy18:22 kamsang khat in Topa’ min tawh thu genin, tua thu pen hong tung lo ahi a, a man lo ahi zongin hong hih leh, tua thu pen Topa’ gen loh thu ahi hi. Kamsangpa in ama utthu a gen hi a, amah na kihtak ding uh kul lo hi." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “ Topa na Pasian un amaute’ leitang note hong piak minamte beisakin, note in amaute suankhia-in, amaute’ khuapite le innte-ah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy19:2 Topa na Pasian un note’ neih dingin hong piak gam sungah note a dingin khuapi thum na tuamkoih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Mi a thatkha peuhpeuh a tai theih nadingin Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun a hong piak leitang seh thumin khenin seh khat sungah khuapi khat ciat koihin a lampite na puah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:4 Mi khat sing a phuk dingin a vengpa tawh gamlakah pai-in, sing a phuk dingin a khut tawh a hei vaanin, a heitang a ga panin kikhongin a vengpa kha-in a sih bang danin, mi khat in sawm lohpi, a beisa hunah amah tawh kigal neihna om lopi-in a vengpa a sihsak khak leh, hih khuapite khat peuhpeuhah amah tai-in a nuntakna hu thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:5  
Deuteronomy19:6 Tua bang hikeileh, amah in a beisa hunah a vengpa tawh kigal neihna nei lo ahih manin sih nading thu om lo napi-in, a hehna tawh phula nuampa in mi that khapa delhin lampi a gamlatna hangin amah pha-in a si dingin liamsak kha ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Tua ahih ciangin, khuapi thum tuamkoih un, ci-in note thu a hong pia ka hi hi." 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama lampi zuih tawntungna tawh tuni-a kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uh a, amah in na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciam mah bangin Topa na Pasian un na gamgite uh hong keeksakin, na pu na pate uh piak dingin a ciam leitang note tungah hong piak leh, hih khuapi thum banah khuapi thum mah na behlap ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:9  
Deuteronomy19:10 Tua hikeileh Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak leitang tungah mawhbaang lo mi kithat kha ding a, tua mi thahna hanga mawhna note’ tungah hong tu ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a vengpa mudahin, amah pangsim a, amah satin liamsakin a sihsak a, tua mipa hih khuapi khat peuhpeuhah a tai leh," 
Deuteronomy19:12 ama khua upate in amah hong puakin hong paipih ding uh a, a sih theih nadingin phulapa tungah ap ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Note na nopsak theih nadingun amah hehpih loin, Israel-te sung panin mi that pa na beisak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “ Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun hong piak leitang tungah note’ kep ding na gamhluahna sung uhah khanglui mite in a phuhsa na vengte’ gisuang na khin kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Mi khat in a hihkhak mawhna lian ahi a, khialhna khat peuhpeuh a gamtatna-ah ahi zongin tua mipa’ langah teci khat guak kicing lo ding a, teci nih ahih kei leh teci thum bang thugenna tawh mawhsakna kikipsak bek ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Elna lungsim a nei teci khat in mi khat gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhsak leh," 
Deuteronomy19:17 thuneite a langnih tuakin, tuahun laitak a siampite le thukhente’ mai, Topa’ mai-ah pai ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Thukhente in limtakin kan ding uh a, teci pa pen zuau teci hi-in, a man lopi-in a sanggampa a mawhsak ahihleh," 
Deuteronomy19:19 a sanggampa tungah amah in hih dinga a sawm bang teekin ama tungah na hih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note sung panin gitlohna na siangsak ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Tua hileh a omlai mite in za-in lau ding a, note lakah tua bang gitlohna bawlkik ngei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi. Nuntakna tang ding nuntakna, mit tang ding mit, ha tang ding ha, khut tang ding khut, khe tang ding khe na hisak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Na langte uh a do dingin pai-in a sakolte, a leengte, le a galkapte uh nomau-a’ sangin a tamzaw-in na muh uh hangin amaute na kihta tuan kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh note tawh hong om hi." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Gal nai na tun uh ciangin siampipa a mai-ah hong pai-in mite kiangah thu genin 
Deuteronomy20:3 amaute kiangah, ‘Israel-te aw, za un. Tuni-in na langte uh a do dingin na nai uh hi. Na lungsim uh lausak kei un. Lau kei un, ling kei un, amaute kihta kei un." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah gualzawhna a hong pia ding, na langte uh hong dosak dingin note tawh hong kuan khawm pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Tua ciangin uliante in mite kiangah thu genin, ‘Inn thak lam khinin a ap nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in a inn ap kha ding ahih manin a inn-ah ciahkik hen." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Leenggui lo kho khinin a gah a ne nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in a gah ne kha ding ahih manin a inn-ah ciahkik hen. 
Deuteronomy20:7 A zi dingin lawm dong khinin a la nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in tua numei la kha ding ahih manin a inn-ah ciahkik hen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Uliante in mite kiangah thu genthuah lai-in, ‘A lau, a lungsim meidawi kua om na hi uh hiam? A lawmte meidawilawh kha ding ahih manin a inn-ah ciahkik hen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Uliante in mite kiangah thugen a man khit uh ciangin mite a makai ding kiseh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “A do dingin khuapi khatpeuh na nai uh ciangin kilem nading thu gen masa un. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Note hong dawnna pen kilem nading lam hi-in note kongpi hong hon leh, tua sunga om mi khempeuh in note a dingin aana tawh na semin, na na uh hong sepsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ahih hangin note tawh kilemna hong bawl loin note hong do leh, note in tua khua na umcih ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy20:13 Topa na Pasian un note’ khut sungah hong piak ciangin pasal khempeuh namsau tawh na that ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Ahih hangin numeite le naupangte, ganhingte, khua sunga na dang khempeuh, a kinusiate khempeuh note a dingin na la ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un note hong piak ahi na langte uh vante na tang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Hih nai-a om minamte’ khuapi ahi lo, note kiang panin a gamla khuapi khempeuh tungah tu-a bangin na hih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Ahih hangin, amau’ pasian-te a biakna uhah a hih uh a kihhuai gamtatnate khempeuh note hong hilh theih loh nading le tua bangin Topa na Pasian uh tungah na khialh theih loh nadingun, Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note’ tungah hong piak hih mite’ khuapi sungah mi khempeuh na hingkhawi kei ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un hong thupiaksa bangin Hit mite le Amor mite, Kanaan mite le Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite, a vekpi-in amaute na susiamang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:17  
Deuteronomy20:18  
Deuteronomy20:19 “Khuapi khat na lak theih nadingun do-in sauveipi na umcih uh hangin hei zatna tawh a singgah kungte na susia kei ding uh hi. A gahte na ne thei ding uh a, ahih hangin a kungte na phuk kei ding uh hi. Gamlak a om singkungte, note’ sukgawp dingin na gal uh hi zenzen ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Nek dinga kizang lo singkung hi, ci-in na theih teng bek uh note hong do khuapi a tuk mateng umcihna-in na zat dingun na phuk thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “ Topa na Pasian un note’ neih dingin a hong piak leitangah mi khat kithatin gamlakah lum a, a that a kitheih kei leh," 
Deuteronomy21:2 na upate uh le na thukhente uh hong paikhia-in, a kithat mipa’ omna kiima khuapite a gamlatna teh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Tua ciangin a kithat mipa’ omna tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate in a kisin nai lo, kol a kai nai lo bawngla khat la ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Tua khuapi upate in a kikho nai lo, khaici a kivawh nai lo, tuiluang a omna kuam khatah a bawngla paipihsuk ding uh a, tua kuam sungah a bawngla ngawng attan ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Topa na Pasian un Levi mi siampite ama na a sem ding le Topa’ min tawh thupha a pia dingin teelkhia ahih manin amaute hong pai ding uh a, kithuneihna le kitotna peuhmah amau’ thu tawh kivengsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:6 A kithat mipa tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate khempeuh in kuam sunga a ngawng a kitan bawngla tungah a khut uh sil ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy21:7 amaute in teci pangin, ‘Kote in hih mipa ka that kei uh a, a kithahlam zong ka thei kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Topa aw, na hotkhiatsa Israel mite’ mawhna hong maisak inla, mawhna nei lo mipa a kithahna hanga mawhna na Israel mihingte hong thuaksak kei in. Mi thahna hanga mawhna pan hong maisak in,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Topa’ muhna-ah a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note lak panin mawhna nei lo mi thahna hanga mawhna tua bangin na siangsak ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Na galte uh a do dingin kuan khia-in, Topa na Pasian un note’ khut sungah amaute hong pia a, amaute salin na mat ciangun," 
Deuteronomy21:11 salte lakah numei a melhoih khat mu-in, tua nu deihin na zi dingin na lak nop leh," 
Deuteronomy21:12 na inn-ah tua numei na ciahpih ding a, amah in a lu metin a cinte tan ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Amah in sal hihna puan suahkhia-in, na inn-ah om ding a, a nu le a pa’ hangin kha khat bit sung kap ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah na luppih thei pan ding a, nang pen ama pasal hi-in, amah pen na zi hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Tua ciangin, amah na deih nawn kei leh, ama utna peuhah na paisak ding hi. Ahih hangin amah daisak khin na hih manin sumin amah zuak loin, sila bangin na bawl kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Mi khat in zi nih nei a, khat itin a khat mudah a, a it leh a muhdah a zi tegel in ta nei tuakin, tapa a neih cil pen a muhdah nu tawh a neih ahihleh," 
Deuteronomy21:16 a tapate tungah gamhluah dingin ama neihsa a hawm ciangin, a muhdah nu’ tapa cil sangin deihzawkna hangin a it nu’ tapa pen a ta cil-in bawl thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ama neihsa khempeuh tanh nih piakna tawh a muhdah nu’ tapa a tacil mahin sang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pa pen ama sung panin a piang masa pen ahih manin tacil hihna za pen ama a’ ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Mi khat in a lungkhauh, a langpang thei, a nu’ thu ahi a, a pa’ thu ahi zongin a mang lo, a tai hangun amau’ thu a ngai lo tapa khat a neih leh," 
Deuteronomy21:19 a nu le a pa in tua mipa manin ama khuapi upate kiang, a tenna mun kongpi-ah paipihin," 
Deuteronomy21:20 amaute in a khuapi upate kiangah, ‘Hih ka tapa uh lungkhauhin hong langpang thei a, amah in ka thu uh hong mang lo a, an hai, zu hai bek ahi hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Tua ciangin khuapi pasal khempeuh in suang tawh amah denglum ding uh hi. Tua bangin note’ sung panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi. Tua hileh Israel-te khempeuh in za-in lau ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Mi khat in sihna thuak theih nading mawhna bawlin amah kithat a, sing tungah na khai uhleh," 
Deuteronomy21:23 zan tawntung sing tungah ama luang na omsak kei ding uh a, a ni mahin na phum ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuam tungah a kikhai siluang hawm pen Pasian in muhthadah sa hi. Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak na leitang uh na ninsak kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Na mipihte’ bawngtal ahi a, a tuu ahi zongin a gammang na muh uhleh huh loin na om kei ding uh hi. A nei pa kiangah na ciahpih kik ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Amah na veng nai uh hi lo a, a nei na theih kei uhleh, na inn uhah a gan ciahpihin a nei pa in hong zon mateng na kem ding uh a, hong zon ciangin na piakik ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Tua bangin a la, a puan, a mangsa na muh, na mipihte’ na a mang khat peuhpeuh na hih ding uh a, huh loin na om kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Na mipihte’ la ahi a, a bawngtal ahi zongin lam gei-ah a kia na muh uhleh, tuate huh loin na om kei ding uh a, tuate phottohsakkikna tawh na huh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Numei in pasal puan khat peuhpeuh silh lo ding a, pasal in zong numei puan silh lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin a gamta peuhmah Topa na Pasian uh tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Vasabu khat, sing tung ahi a, leilakah ahi zongin, a no ahi a, a tui ahi zongin omin, a pi in a no a ompih ahi a, a op ahi zongin na muh khak zenzen uhleh, a pi pen a no tawh na la khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:7 A pi na khah ding uh a, a no na la thei ding uh hi. Hih bang gamtatna pen na nopsak nading uh, sauveipi na nuntak theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Na inn tung panun mi khat kia-in mi sihna hanga mawhna na innsung uhah na tunsak khak loh nadingun inn thak na lam uh ciangin na innkhumzang uhah tangban na khung ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Na leenggui lo uhah khaici nam nih na vawh kei ding uh hi. Vawh le-uh cin na vawh uh an le na leenggui lo uhah a piang khempeuh a nin suak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Bawngtal khat le la khat tawh lo na khokhawm kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Samul le khau a kigankhawm puan na silh kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Na puanza uh kiu lite tungah puanmongteep na bawl ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Mi khat in zi la-in, amah a luppih khit ciangin amah mudahin," 
Deuteronomy22:14 a zumhuai gamtatna tawh tua nu mawhsakin, ‘Keimah in hih numei ka la a, amah tawh ka lupkhop ciangin ama sungah nungakna lim ka mu kei hi,’ cihna tawh tua nu tungah minsia a tut leh," 
Deuteronomy22:15 tua numei’ nu le a pa in a tanu uh’ nungakna lim a kilatna puan lakhia-in upate kiang kongpi-ah paipih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Numei’ pa in upate kiangah, ‘Hih mipa tungah a zi dingin ka tanu ka pia a, amah in deih nawn lo a," 
Deuteronomy22:17 “Na tanu’ sungah nungakna lim ka mu kei hi,” cihna tawh a zumhuai-in amah mawhsak hi. Ahi zongin hihte pen ka tanu’ nungakna a kilatna limte ahi hi,’ ci-in a puan lak ding hi. Amaute in khua upate mai-ah a puan phah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Tua ciangin tua khua upate in tua mipa la-in sat ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Amaute in ngun shekel zakhat liausak ding uh a, a numei’ pa’ tungah tuate pia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Israel nungak tungah minsia tun hi. Tua ciangin a numei pen ama zi mah hi ding a, a nuntak laiteng tua nu ma thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Ahih hangin a mawhsakna thumanin, numei sungah nungakna lim a kimuh kei takpi leh," 
Deuteronomy22:21 amaute in a pa’ inn kongah a numei paipih ding uh a, ama khuapi pasalte in suang tawh amah denglum ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pa’ inn sungah paktat gamtatna tawh Israel sungah haina tun hi. Tua bangin note’ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Mi khat, midang khat’ zi tawh a lumkhawm a kimuh leh, numei tawh a lum pa le a numei, a nih tuakun kithat ding hi. Tua bangin Israel sung panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “A kidongsa nungak khat om a, mi khat in khuapi sungah tua nu tuakin amah tawh a lupkhop leh," 
Deuteronomy22:24 tua khuapi kongpi-ah amau tegel na paipih ding uh a, a numei khuapi sungah a om hinapi-in mi’ huhna ngen dingin a kiko lohna hang le, tua pasal in a vengpa’ zi a va suksakna hangin, suang tawh a nihun na denglum ding uh hi. Tua bangin note’ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a kidongsa nungak khat gamlakah tuakin, mipa in tua nu buanin a luppih leh, tua numei tawh a lum mipa bek kithat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:26 A numei’ tungah bangmah na hih kei ding uh hi. Numei’ tungah sih nading mawhna om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen mi khat in a vengpa do-in a thah tawh kibang hi. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Hih mipa in gamlakah numei hih ahih manin, a kidongsa numei in huhna ngen dingin a kiko hangin amah a hon ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Mi khat in a kidong nai lo nungak khat tuakin, tua numei buanin luppih a, amau tegel a kimuh leh," 
Deuteronomy22:29 numei tawh a lum pa in nungak’ pa tungah ngun shekel sawmnga pia ding a, tua numei ama zi hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a numei va su khin hi. A nuntak laiteng tua numei ma thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Mi khat in a pa’ zidangte tenpih lo ding a, a pa-a’ ahi numei tawh mawh lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “A ciltang a kitam ahih kei leh, a pasal na a cing lo mipa Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah lut lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Zawlta peuhmah, Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah lut lo ding hi. A suan a khak khang sawmna dong nangawnin Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah tua bang mi kuamah lut thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Ammon mite ahi a, Moab mite ahi zongin Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah lut thei lo ding uh hi. A khang sawmna dong nangawnun Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah lut thei ngei peuhmah lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah anletui tawh amaute in note hong dawn lo uh a, note hong samsia dingin Mesopotamia gam Pethor khua panin Beor’ tapa Balaam cial uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un Balaam’ thu ngai lo hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong it ahih manin, Topa na Pasian un samsiatna pen note a dingin thupha-in hong heisakzaw hi." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Amaute’ nopsak nading ahi a, a daupai nading uh ahi zongin na khantawnun na hanciam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Edom mite khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na sanggam uh ahi hi. Egypt mi khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gamah peemta na hi ngei uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Amaute’ sung pana piang a khang thumna mite a kipan Topa a’ ding kikhopna sungah lut thei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Na galte uh a do dingin kuanin giahphual ah na om uh ciangin, siatna nam khempeuh panin nomau na kikem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Note lakah, zan sungin ama tungah thupiang hangin a siang lo mi a om leh giahphual pualamah amah paikhia ding a, giahphual sungah hong pai lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ahih hangin nitak ciangin amahmah tui sungah kisil ding a, ni a tum ciangin giahphual sungah hong paithei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Giahphual pua-ah awnghawh nading mun khat na nei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Na galhiamte uh banah tulzum khat na nei ding uh a, awng na hawh khit uh ciangin tua tawh lei to-in, na ek uh na vuk ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh note hong hon ding le note’ mai-a na galte uh a hong pia dingin Topa na Pasian uh na giahphual laizang uhah hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a kilawm lo nate a muh loh nading le note kiang panin amah a paikhiat loh nadingin na giahphual uh siangtho ding hi. 
Deuteronomy23:15 “A topa’ kiang panin no kiangah a hong tai sila, a topa kiang mahah na apkik kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Na khuapite uh lak panin ama teelna mun, ama lungkim penna, note lakah note tawh amah hong teng ding a, amah na nengniam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Israel ta numeite biakinn sunga a paktat pawlin om lo ding uh a, Israel tapate zong a paktat pawlin om lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:18 A paktat nu a kiguaihna sum ahi a, a paktat pa a kiguaihna sum ahi zongin thuciamna khat peuhpeuh piakna-in Topa note’ Pasian’ inn sungah na paipih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih tegel pen Topa note’ Pasian’ tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Na sanggampa tungah sumgum hitaleh, ankhing hitaleh, a meet ngaihsutna-in na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Gamdang mi tungah a meetin leitawi na pia thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggampa tungah a meetin leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Hihte pen a luah dingin na tumna uh gam sungah Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uhah thupha hong piak theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “ Topa note’ Pasian’ tungah thuciamna na bawl ciangun na ciamna uh tungsak loin na ommawk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un hong kal teekteek ding a, note tungah khialhna hong hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ahih hangin thuciamna bawl ding pan na kikep uhleh note’ sungah khialhna om lo ding hi. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Na kam uh tawh na ciamsa uh thu pen Topa note’ Pasian’ tungah nomau utthu-a na ciam uh ahih manin na kam uh panin a gingkhia peuhmah na tunsak ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Na vengpa’ leenggui lo-ah na pai uh ciangin na ut zahzah uh na kham dong uh leenggah na ne thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na van sung uhah na guang kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Na vengpa’ ankung ding laite lakah na pai uh ciangin na khut uh tawh a vuite na zut thei ding uh a, ahih hangin phiaukawi tawh na vengpa’ ankung ding laite na at kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Mi khat in zi la-in a tenpih ciangin, tua nu tungah kilawm lohna a om manin numei in a pasal’ mitah maipha mu lo a, amah in makna lai gelhin ama tungah pia-in ama inn panin sawlkhia a, a pasal’ inn panin amah kihem khia-in," 
Deuteronomy24:2 amah pai-in midang khat’ zi va suak a," 
Deuteronomy24:3 a pasal nunung in amah deih lo leuleu a, makna lai gelhin a numei’ khut sungah koih a, a inn panin tua nu sawlkhia-in, tua ahih kei leh zi dinga a la a pasal nunung a sih leh," 
Deuteronomy24:4 tua numei a hawlkhia a pasal masa in, tua nu a kinitsak khit ciangin a zi dingin lakik thei nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa’ mai-ah kihhuaina hi a, Topa note’ Pasian un luah dingin hong piak leitang tungah mawhna na tunpih kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Mi khat in zi a neih tungin galkapte tawh kuankhia lo ding a, nasep khat peuhpeuh zong kisawl lo ding hi. A laksa a zi tawh a lungdam khawm dingin inn-ah kum khat sung maang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Kuamah in an gawina ahi a, an gawina suangpek a tungnung ahi zongin khapna-in la lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khapna-in nuntakna a la suak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Mi khat in Israel mi a sanggamte khat gu-in, amah in sila bangin a bawl ahi a, a zuak ahi zongin a kimuh leh, tua guta pa kithat ding hi. Tua bangin note’ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Phaknatna hong tun ciangin Levi siampite in hong gen bangin na gamtat ding uh ngaihsun un. Amaute ka thupiakna bangin na gamtatna dingun na kingaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah Topa na Pasian un Miriam’ tungah a hihna phawk un. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Na vengte uh tungah na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na piak uh ciangin ama hong khapna a la dingin a inn-ah pai kei un. 
Deuteronomy24:11 A pualamah na ding ding uh a, leitawi na piakna mipa in nang kiangah a na khap hong paipih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Amah mizawng ahihleh ama hong khap puan na zantaamsak kei ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy24:13 ni a tum ciangin, a puanza silhin nang thupha hong piak theihna dingin tua hong na khap ama kiangah na piakik ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah note a dingin thumanna hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “A zawng a cimawh a kicial nasempa, na sanggamte khat ahi a, na gam sung na khuapite sunga om peemta khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, na nengniam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:15 A sep ni-in ama thaman, nitum ma-in na pia ding uh hi (bang hang hiam cih leh amah zawng a, tua bek a lungsimah om hi). Tua hikeileh Topa’ tungah amah in hong khia ding a, note na mawh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Tate’ tangin pate kithat lo ding a, pate’ tangin zong tate kithat lo ding hi. Mi khempeuh ama khialhna hang bekin kithat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Peemta’ thu ahi a, pa nei lo mi’ thu ahi zongin tuate a’ ding thutang na heisak kei ding uh a, meigong numei’ puan zong khapna-in na laksak kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Egypt-ah sila na hihna uh le Topa note’ Pasian in tua lai panin hong hotkhiatna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih banga na gamtat nading uh thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Na lo-ah an la-in lo lai-ah anlom na mangngilh uh ciangin a tawm dingin na paikik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo, le meigong numeite a’ ding ahi hi. Hih pen Topa note’ Pasian in na khut uh tawh na sepna khempeuh uhah note thupha hong piak theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Na oliv kungte uh na sat uh ciangin a hiangte na sat kikkik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo, le meigong numeite a’ ding ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Na leenggui lo panun leenggah na kaihkhop uh ciangin a sang na nung khop kik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo, le meigong numeite a’ ding ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Egypt gamah sila na hihna uh na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih bangin na gamtat nadingun thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Mite kikalah thu kineihna om a, thukhen zumah amaute pai-in, thukhente in amau’ thu khensakin, a dikpa khahin a mawh pa lelsak a," 
Deuteronomy25:2 a mawh pa satna thuak dinga kilawm ahihleh, thukhen pa in amah lumsuksakin a khialhna zahin ama muhin satsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Sat sawmli kipia thei ding a, ahih hangin tua val hi lo ding hi. Tua hikeileh, hih sangin a tamvei zaw mi khat in sat lai leh note’ muhna-ah na sanggampa uh a kineubawl suak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Bawng in an a cil laitakin a muk na tuam kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Sanggam pasalte teng khawmin, tuate khat si-in tapa a neih kei le, a sipa’ zi pen innkuan pualam khualmi tawh kiteng lo ding hi. A pasal’ sanggampa in luppihin a zi dingin amah la ding a, ama tungah pasal’ sanggampa’ nasep sem ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ama min Israel tungah a maiman’ loh nadingin tua nu in a neih masak a tapa pen a sisa a pasal’ ta-in kiseh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Mipa in a sanggampa’ zi a laknop kei leh, upate kiang kongpi-ah a sanggampa’ zi pai ding a, ‘Ka pasal’ sanggampa in a sanggampa’ min Israel sungah a zop ding ut lo a, pasal’ sanggampa’ nasep kei tungah hong sem nuam lo hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Tua ciangin mipa’ khuapi upate in amah samin thu genpih ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Tua nu ka la nuam kei hi,’ a cih teitei leh," 
Deuteronomy25:9 upate’ omin a sanggampa’ zi ama kiangah paito-in a khe panin a khedap kaihkhiatsakin a maitang cilphih ding hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, ‘A sanggampa’ innkuan a zomto lo mipa hih bangin kibawl ta hen,’ cikhia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Israel mite lakah ama innkuan pen, ‘A khedap a kikaih khiatsak mipa’ innkuan,’ kici ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Mi khatlekhat a kilai ciangin, a satpa’ kiang panin a pasal a honkhia dingin a khat pa’ zi hong pai a, a khutin a selsimte a matsak leh," 
Deuteronomy25:12 tua nu’ khut na sattansak ding uh a, amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Na ipsung uhah tawisuang nam nih, a lian le a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Na innsung uhah tehna nam nih, a lian le a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Tawisuang a cing a man na nei ding uh a, tehna a cing a man na nei ding uh hi. Topa note’ Pasian in hong piak leitangah na khan uh a sau theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangin gamta-in, a thuman lote khempeuh, Topa note’ Pasian’ tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Egypt panin nong paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah Amalek mite in note hong bawlna," 
Deuteronomy25:18 note gimin lungkhamin na om laitakun lampi-ah a hong simna, le note’ nungah a nunung khempeuh hong thahna uh phawk un; amaute in Pasian kihta lo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa note’ Pasian in note’ neih dingin gamh-in hong piak leitang tungah, Topa na Pasian un na kiim uha na galte khempeuh panun tawlngakna hong piak ciangin, mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite a kiphawkna na phiatkhiat ding uh na mangngilh kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “ Topa na Pasian un luah dingin a hong piak leitangah va pai-in, tua leitang luahin a tungah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy26:2 Topa na Pasian un a hong piak leitang pana piang gah khempeuh panin a gah masa pawlkhat la-in lawh khat sungah na koih ding uh a, ama min na omsak nadingun Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na pai ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Tua hun laitakin na a sem siampipa kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in kote piak dingin ka pu ka pate uh tungah a ciam leitangah ka tun khitna uh tuni-in Topa na Pasian kiangah kong ko uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Tua ciangin siampipa in note’ khut panin a lawh hong saang ding a, Topa note’ Pasian biakna tau mai-ah koih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy26:5 “ Topa note’ Pasian mai-ah note in, ‘A vak kawikawi kote’ pupi pen Aram mi hi a, amah Egypt-ah paisukin tua munah a peem lai-in mi tawmno ahi hi. Tua lai-ah amah a lian, a thahat, tampi a pha minam khat a suak hi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Egypt-te in kote hong ngong bawlin hong gimsak a, kote sal bangin hong bawl uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Tua ciangin ka pu ka pate uh Pasian ahi Topa Pasian’ tungah ka kiko uh a, Topa in kote’ aw hong za-in, ka gimnate uh, ka sepnate uh le hong netniamnate uh a mu hi." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Topa in a vangliatna le a thahatna, launa lianpi, lim le na lamdangte tawh Egypt panin kote hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Amah in hih mun hong tunpihin, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam hih leitang ko tungah hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Tua ahih ciangin en in, Topa, nangmah in kote nong piaksa leitang panin a gah a min masa kong paipih uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah na koihsuk ding uh a, Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah na bia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Topa note’ Pasian in note le na innkuanpihte uh tungah hong piak na a hoih khempeuhte hangin note le Levi mite le note lakah a om peemtate na lungdam khawm ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Sawm-ah-khat piak kum ahi, a kum thumna kumin, amaute in na khuapite uh sungah an ne-in, gilvahin a om theih nadingun Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote, le meigong numeite tungah na piak uh, na khawhsa uh sawm-ah-khat na piak khit uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy26:13 Topa note’ Pasian’ mai-ah, ‘Ka innsung panin a siangtho dingteng ka tuamkoih khin hi. Tua tham loin kei nong sawlna bangin na thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote, le meigong numeite tungah ka pia khin hi. Hih tungtangah na thupiakna khat zong ka khial kei a, ka mangngilh zong om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Dahin ka kah sungin zong sawm-ah-khat ka ne kei a, ka nit sungin zong ka khenkhia kei a, misite tungah zong ka pia kei hi. Topa ka Pasian’ thu ka mang a, kei nong thupiakna khempeuh bangin ka hih khin hi." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Vantung, nangma omna a siangtho panin hong ensuk inla, kote’ pulepate tungah bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam na ciam mah bangin, nangma mi Israel-te le na hong piaksa leitang thupha hong pia in,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Tuni-in Topa na Pasian un hih thukhamte le ngeina kipte na zuih ding uh note tungah thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na hih ding uh limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Tuni-in, Topa pen note’ Pasian ahihna le note in ama lampite tawnin, ama thukhamte le ama thupiaknate le ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thu na man’ ding uh na gen khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Tuni-in Topa in note pen amah in note tungah hong ciamsa bangin ama neih ding mi na hihna uh, le note in ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zuih nading uh," 
Deuteronomy26:19 ama bawlsa minam dangte khempeuh sangin phatna le minthanna le pahtawina a lianzaw a ngahin hong koih nading, le ama gensa mah bangin Topa note’ Pasian a dingin a siangtho mi na hih nading uh hong gen khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Tu-in Moses le Israel upate in mite thu pia-in, “Tuni-a kong gen uh thupiakna khempeuh na zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah pai dingin Jordan na kantan ni-un suangtumpite na phut ding uh a, buan tawh na zut ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa in note tungah hong ciam mah bangin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna leitang, Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna gamah a lut dingin na galkah uh ciangin tua suangte tungah hih thute na gelh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Jordan na galkah khit uh ciangin Ebal Mual tungah tuni-a kong thupiakna uh tawh kizui-in hih suangte na phut ding uh a, buan tawh tua suangte na zut ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Tua lai-ah Topa na Pasian uh a dingin suang kibawl biakna tau khat na bawl ding uh a, tuate tungah sik tawh a kibawl nazatte na liik kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Topa na Pasian uh a dingin a kiseek lo suangtumte tawh biakna tau na bawl ding uh a, tua biakna tau tungah Topa na Pasian uh a dingin meihal biaknate na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Tua ciangin thunuama biaknate na pia ding uh a, tua lai munah ne-in, Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na lungdam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Hih thute khempeuh tua suangte tungah a kitel takin na gelh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tua ciangin Moses le Levi siampite in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “Israel-te aw, gamdai unla ngai un: Tuni-in Topa note’ Pasian’ mi na suak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Tua ahih ciangin Topa note’ Pasian’ thu mangin, tuni-a kong gen uh ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte na zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Moses in tua ni mahin mite thuhilhin," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Jordan na galkah khit uh ciangin mite thupha a pia dingin Gerizim Mual tungah a ding ding minamte: Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, Josef, le Benjamin ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ebal Mual tungah hamsia a pia dingin a ding ding minamte: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, le Naftali ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Levi mite in awging lianpi tawh Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin ci ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy27:15 “‘ Topa a dingin a kihhuai ahi, khutsiampa’ khut tawh a kibawl, a kiseek ahi a, a kisung ahi zongin milim bawlin, mun simthamah a koih mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in dawngin, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “‘A nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a zahtak lo mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:17 “‘A vengpa’ gisuang a botkhia mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:18 “‘Mittaw pa lam a lakkhial mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:19 “‘Peemta, pa nei lo, le meigong numeite a’ ding thutang a heikhiatsak mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “‘Amah in a pa’ tungah maizumna tun ahih manin, a pa’ zidang tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:21 “‘Ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nulepa mawhna a bawl mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:22 “‘A nu’ tanu, a pa’ tanu, ahih kei leh a sanggamnu tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “‘A sungnu tawh a lumkhawm mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:24 “‘A vengpa a thatsim mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:25 “‘Mawhna nei lopa thah nadingin sumgolh a la mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:26 “‘Hih thute zuihna tawh hih thu a kipsak lo mipa in gimna ngah ta hen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mangin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uhleh Topa na Pasian un leitung minam dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in note hong bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Topa na Pasian uh thu na man’ uhleh hih thuphate khempeuh note tungah hong tung ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Khuapi sungah thupha ngah mi na hi ding uh a, lote-ah zong thupha ngah mi mah na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Note’ sung pana piangte, le na leitang uh pana piangte, le na ganhing uh pana piang, na bawngte uh pungin na tuuhonte uh tungah thupha om ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Na seengte uh le na annel mekna kuangte uhah thupha om ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Na sepna khempeuh uhah thupha na ngah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “ Topa in, note’ langah hong pang na galte uh na mai uhah lelhna thuaksak ding hi. Amaute lampi khat tawnin hong kuan ding uh a, note’ mai panin lam sagih tawnin taikeek ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “ Topa in note’ ansal tung le na hihna khempeuh uhah thupha hong puak ding hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna leitangah amah in note tungah thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh hong thupiaknate zui-in ama lampi na tot uhleh amah in note tungah hong ciamsa bangin ama a dingin a siangtho mi dingin Topa in note hong kipsak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:10 Topa in note hong sapna thu midang khempeuh in thei ding uh a, amaute in note hong kihta ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Note piak dingin na pu na pate uh tungah Topa in a ciamsa gam sungah note’ sung pana piangte, na gan khawi pan uha piangte, le na leitang pan uha piangte-ah Topa in note nakpitakin hong hausak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Note’ leitangah ama hunin guah a zusak ding le na sepna khempeuh uh thupha a pia dingin Topa in a na hoih kholna vantung note hong hon ding hi. Note in minam tampite tungah leitawi na pia ding uh a, ahih hangin note in leitawi na la kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Note in tuni-a kong thugente limtakin zuihna tawh Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate mangin, tuni-a no kong thupiakna kammalte panin, pasian dangte’ na semin a bia dingin na pial kei nak-uhleh, Topa in a makai-in note hong bawl ding a, mi’ nung zui-in hong bawl lo ding hi. Tunglam bekah na kah ding uh a, na nuaikiat ngei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:14  
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mang loin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte khempeuh limtakin na zuih kei uhleh, hih samsiatna khempeuh note tungah hong tung ding a, note hong ban ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Khuapi sungah hong kisamsia ding a, lo-ah zong hong kisamsia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Na lawhte uh le na annel mekna kuangte un zong samsiatna ngah ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Note’ sung pana piangte le na leitang uh pana piangte, na bawngte uh le na tuuhon note uh in zong samsiatna ngah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Na sep na bawlna khempeuh uhah hamsia na ngah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Note in Topa na nusiat uh a, na gamtatsiat uhleh, note sia-in na sihmang khit matengun Topa in note tungah samsiatna, buaina, cihmawhnate hong tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:21 A luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong beisak matengin note lakah pulnatna a tun nadingin Topa in bawl ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Topa in pulnatna le cisa natna, meima nasia le a sa mahmah keutumna, huihpi’ mutgawpna le a nom tawh note hong vatgawp ding a, note na sih matengun tuate na thuak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Na lu tung uha om vantungte pen sumngo bangin sanin guah zu lo ding a, na nuai uha om leitung pen sik bangin sak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Topa in na gam sung uha guahte tang dingin leivui le sehnel hong zusak ding a, note na sih matengun vantung panin note tungah tuate hong kiasuk ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “ Topa in na galte uh mai-ah note hong guallelsak ding hi. Amaute a do dingin lam khatah na kuan khawm ding uh a, amau’ mai-ah lam sagihin na taikeek ding uh hi. Leitung kumpi gamte khempeuh’ muhna-ah note a cikzethuai na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Note’ luanghawmte pen huih lak a leeng vasate khempeuh le leitung a ganhingte khempeuh’ an hi ding a, tuate a bengkhia ding mihing om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Topa in note na damkik theih loh nading uh Egypt meimatumte le meima daite, meima lipneite le cithak tawh note hong vatgawp ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Topa in haina, mittawtna, le lungsim buaina tawh note hong vatgawp ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Mittawte in khuamial lakah khua a zawt bangin sunin khua na zawt ding uh a, na hihnate uhah na maavang kei ding uh hi. Note hong kinengniamin na tate uh hong kisut niloh ding a, note hong huh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Zi dingin lawm khat na dong ding uh a, midang khat in na luppih ding hi. Inn na lam ding uh a, tua sungah na teng kei ding uh hi. Leenggui lo na zuan ding uh a, a gah na ne kha kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Na muh tangpi-un na bawngtal uh kigo ding a, a sa na ne kha kei ding uh hi. Note’ mai panin na la uh hong kingawh laksak ding a, note kiangah hong kipia kik nawn lo ding hi. Na tuute uh na galte uh tungah kipia ding a, note hong huh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Na tapate uh le na tanute uh midang tungah kipia ding a, amaute ngai-in sun nilohin na mit un enin na mit uh gim ding hi. Tuate pen nomau’ tha tawh na dalzawh ding uh hi lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Na theih nai loh uh minam khat in na leitang panun a piangte le na nasepsa khempeuh uh ne tum ding a, note hong kinengniamin hong kisugawp tawntung lel ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Tua ahih ciangin na mit un a muh ding nate in note hong hehsak mahmah ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Topa in note na kidamsakkik theih loh ding uh a nasia mahmah meimatumte tawh na khukte uh le na khete uh meimasak gawpin, na khenuai panun na luzang dong uhah na thuak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Note le na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh minam khat kiangah Topa in note le note tungah na koih uh na kumpipa uh hong tunpih ding a, tua lai-ah singlesuang tawh a kibawl pasian dangte’ na na sem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Topa in note hong paikhiatpihna mite lakah a cikzethuai, paunak, le gentehna na suak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Khaici tampi lo-ah na tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin tawmno bek na khawm ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kauphe in nemang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Note in leenggah lo zuanin na puah ding uh a, ahih hangin leenggahzu dawn loin, leenggah zong na ne kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh lung in tuate ne ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Na gam sung khempeuh uhah oliv kung na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin a thau tawh note na kizut kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na oliv gahte uh pulh ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Tanute le tapate na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute pen nomau a’ hi lo ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute galmat suak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Na singte khempeuh uh le, na leitang panun a piang khempeuh kauphete in tang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Note lakah a om peemtate lian semsem ding uh a, note na neu semsem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Amaute in note’ tungah leitawi hong pia ding uh a, note in amaute tungah leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute a makai hi-in, note a nungzui na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Amah in note hong piak thupiaknate le thukhamte zui loin, Topa na Pasian uh thu mang lo na hih manun, note na sih matengun hih samsiatnate khempeuh note’ tungah hong tungin, note hong delhin hong pha ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Note le na suanlekhakte uh tungah a tawntungin tuate pen lim le nalamdang hi ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Hih a tampi nate khempeuh om napi-in note in lungdamna le lungsim kipahna tawh Topa note’ Pasian’ na sem lo na hih manun," 
Deuteronomy28:48 Topa in note’ langah a hong sawl ding na galte uh’ na, gilkialna le dangtakna, pum guakin omna, le na khempeuh kitangsapna tawh, na sem ding uh hi. Na galte un note hong suksiat matengin note’ ngawngah sik hakkol hong thuah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Topa in a gamlapi leimong panin muvanlai leeng bangin a manlang, amau’ pau na theih loh uh minam, thukhualna a nei lo minam, khangham mite a zahtak lo, khangno mite tungah maipha zong a lak tuan lo minam khat, note’ langkhatah hong paipih ding a," 
Deuteronomy28:50  
Deuteronomy28:51 note na sih matengun amaute in na ganhon note uh le na leitang panun a piang gahte hong neksak ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong beisak matengun note a dingin an, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathau, na ganhingte uh ahih kei leh na tuuhon note uh zong hong nusiat lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Na gam sung uha a om na muan uh, a sang a muanhuai na kulhpite uh a cip khit dong matengin note’ khuapite khempeuh sungah amaute in note hong umcih ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piaksa na gam sung khempeuh uhah a om na khuapite khempeuh sung uhah note hong umcih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Na galte un hong umcihna le hong lungkhamsak nading ahi na lungkham hun sung uhah Topa na Pasian un note a hong piaksa, na sung panun a piang na tanute uh le na tapate uh’ sate na ne ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Note lakah a ngeksuak, a cithei pen mipa in a sanggampa, a it a zi, le amah tawh a om a tate a nunung pen’ tungah an pia nuam lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Na khuapite khempeuh sung uhah hong umcihna le na galte un note hong lungkhamsak nading hun sungah bangmah kinei nawn lo ding ahih manin ama nek a tate’ sate kuamah in midang hawm nuam lo ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Note lakah a om a ngeksuak, a cithei pen numei, amah ngekin a ci neel lua ahih manin a khenuai tawh lei sik ding a ngaihsun ngei vet lo nu in a it a pasal, a tanute le a tapate a dingin ama sung panin a piang a tate le ama sung panin a paikhia a nau-nungzuite phal lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hong umcihna le na galte un na khuapite uhah note hong lungkhamsak nading lungkhamna sungah bangmah neih lohna hangin amah in tuate nesim ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Hih a minthang, a zahtakhuai min, Topa na Pasian uh na kihtak theih nadingun hih laibu sunga kigelh hih thute limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsut kei uhleh," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Topa in note le na suan na khakte uh tungah nasia-in sauvei a om gimna, gimna a tuan diak, le a nasia, nat saute hong tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Amah in note’ kihtak Egypt natnate note’ tungah hong tungsakkik ding a, note’ tungah tuate kilawi lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Note na siat matengun hih thukham laibu sungah a kiciamteh lo natna le gimna khempeuh zong Topa in no tungah hong tungsak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Note, vantung aksite zahin a tam na hihna sung uhah tawmno bek na pha ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh thu na mang kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Topa in note tungah a hong bawlna le note tampi hong phaksakna-ah nuam a sak mah bangin, note tungah siatna tunsakna le note suksiatna-ah zong Topa in nuamsa ding a, a luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong kilakhia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “ Topa in leimong khat panin mong khat, mi khempeuhte lakah note hong thehthang ding hi. Tua lai-ah note le na pu na pate un a theih nai loh singlesuang tawh a kibawl pasian dangte’ na na sem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Hih minamte lakah oltak a nuntakna na mu kei ding uh a, kiptaka na om nading uh gam na nei kei ding uh hi. Topa in tua lai-ah lungsim linna, mit gimna, le nuntak tha beina hong pia ding a," 
Deuteronomy28:66 na nuntakna uh lunghimawhin na om tawntung ding uh hi. Sun le zanin na lau ngitnget ding uh a, nuntak lungmuanna na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Na lungsim un a kihtak launa le na mit un a muh ding nate’ hangin, zingsangin, ‘Nitak hileh!’ na ci ding uh a, nitakin, ‘Zingsang hileh!’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Note na zin kik ngei nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in kong ciam khualzinna, Egypt gamah teembaw tawh Topa in note hong paipih kik ding hi. Tua lai-ah sila numei le sila pasal dingin na galte uh tungah na kizuak ding uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in note hong lei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Hihte pen, Horeb-ah amaute tawh thuciamna a bawlsa banah, Israel mite tawh Moab gamah thuciamna a bawl dingin Topa in Moses a sawl, a thuciamna kammalte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moses in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Egypt gam sung note’ mit muhah, Topa in Faro’ tung le ama nasemte khempeuh le ama gam khempeuhah a bawlna," 
Deuteronomy29:3 note’ mit in a muhsa ze-etna lianpite, limte, tua nalamdang liante khempeuh na thei khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ahih hangin tuni dongin Topa in note’ tungah a thu na tel nading uh lungsim hitaleh, na muh nading uh mit hitaleh, na zak nading uh bil hitaleh hong pia nai lo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kum sawmli sung sehnel gamah note hong makaih khin hi. Note’ tung panin na puante uh sia nai lo a, na khe panun zong na khedapte uh sia nai lo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Topa pen na Pasian uh ahihna na theih nadingun nek ding anlum, le dawn ding leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin na ne nai kei uh a, ahi zongin na kisapna teng uh hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Hih mun na tun uh ciangin Heshbon kumpipa Sihon le Bashan kumpipa Og, eite a do dingin hong kuankhia uh a, ahih hangin amaute i zo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Amaute’ leitang i la a, Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte tungah luah dingin i pia hi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Tua ahih ciangin na hihna khempeuh uhah na daupai theih nadingun hih thuciamna kammalte khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “ Topa na Pasian un tuni-in note tawh a bawl, Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna sungah na lut theih nadingun, tuni-in amah in ama mi dingin note hong kipsak theih nading, le note’ tungah hong ciamna le na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tungah a kiciamna bangin, amah, note’ Pasian ahih theih nadingin, na minam lutangte uh, na upate uh, na uliante uh, Israel mi pasal khempeuh, na taneute uh, na zite uh, na giahphual uhah a om peemtate, na sing uh hong tomsakin na tui uh a hong tawisakte a kipan note khempeuh, tuni-in Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah na ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:11  
Deuteronomy29:12  
Deuteronomy29:13  
Deuteronomy29:14 Hih kiciamna note bek tawh a bawl hi lo a," 
Deuteronomy29:15 tuni-in eite tawh Topa i Pasian’ mai-ah a ding mite tawh a bawl mah bangin tuni-in eite tawh a om nai lo i suan i khakte tawh zong a bawl ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Egypt gamah i tenna le note in na nawk uh minamte lakah i paina na thei uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:17 A muhdahhuai amau’ na, singlesuang a kibawl, ngunlekham a kibawl, amaute’ lakah a om a milimte uh na mu khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Note lakah numei ahi a, pasal ahi a, innkuan ahi a, minam khat ahi zongin, tua minamte’ pasian a bia dingin Topa i Pasian kiang panin tuni-in a lungsim a heikhia a omkhak ding kidawm un. Tua hikeileh note lakah gu a nei gah kha a gah singkung hong bang ding a, hih kiciamna kammalte za napi-in a lungsimah amah thupha kipia tawmin, ‘Ka lungsim khauhna tawh ka gamta zongin ka suakta veve ding hi,’ a ci hong om kha ding hi. Hih in mihoih le misia, a kibangin phiatkhiatna hong suaksak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy29:19  
Deuteronomy29:20 Topa in amah maisak lo ding a, Topa’ hehna le hazatna meikhu bangin tua mipa’ langkhatah khuzaw-in, hih laibu sunga kigelh samsiatnate ama tungah tu ding a, Topa in a mun khempeuh panin ama min phiat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Topa in hih thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thuciam samsiatnate khempeuh tawh kizui-in gimna a thuak dingin Israel minamte khempeuh lak panin amah tengkhia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Hong khanglai ding, note’ nungah hong piang na tate uh, le a gamla gam panin a hong pai gamdang mite in, tua gam’ gim ngahna le Topa in a natsak cinatnate a muh uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy29:23 ‘A gambup pen kaat le ci, le nin a kangtum, khai kituh lo, bangmah po lo, lopa zong a po zawh lohna mun Sodom le Gomorrah, Admah le Zeboiim bangin a kilawnthal gawp, a hehna le a sinsona tawh Topa’ lotgawpte tawh kibang hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Minam khempeuhte in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih bangin hih gam bawl ahi hiam? Hih hehna lian, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci takpi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Amah in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih lai-in amaute tawh a bawl, a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa’ thuciamna amaute in nusia-in," 
Deuteronomy29:26 a theih nai loh uh pasian-te le amah in amaute tungah a piak loh pasian dangte’ na va semin a biakna hang uh ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Tua ahih ciangin a mite tungah Topa heh mahmah a, hih laibu sunga om samsiatnate khempeuh hih leitungah tungsak hi." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Topa in hehna, sinsona, lungham mahmahna tawh a leitang panun amaute zunglot a, tuni-a i muh bangin amaute gam dangah hawlkhia hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “ Topa i Pasian in hong lahkhiat loh thusim om a, ahih hangin hih thukham sunga om thute khempeuh i zuih theih nadingin hong lakkhia a, eite le i suan i khakte’ zuih tawntung ding ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Note’ mai-ah ka koih, na teel ding thu thupha le samsiatna, hih nate khempeuh note tungah hong tungin, Topa in note hong hawlkhiatna minamte lakah hih thute phawk kikin," 
Deuteronomy30:2 Topa note’ Pasian’ kiangah note le na suan na khakte uh paikikin, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh tuni-a kong gen ama thute na man’ uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Topa na Pasian un note na ngei uh hong bangsakkikin, note tungah hehpihna hong nei ding a, Topa na Pasian un note hong thehthangna mi khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawm kik ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:4 A kihawlkhia na mite uh van mong pekah a om leh zong, Topa na Pasian un tua lai panin note hong khawmin, tua lai panin amah in hong paipih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Note in na neih theih nadingun, na pu na pate uh neih leitangah, Topa na Pasian un hong paipih ding a, na pu na pate uh sangin a citheizaw a tamzaw-in note hong bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Note in na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh itin na hintheih nadingun, Topa na Pasian un note le na suanlekhakte uh tungah thu man’ nopna lungsim hong guan ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Topa na Pasian un hih samsiatnate khempeuh, no hong bawlsia na galte uh le na langte uh tungah tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Note in Topa’ thu mangkikin, tuni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Note in hih thukham laibu sunga kigelh ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte zui-in, Topa na Pasian uh thu na man’ uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh lamah na kihei uhleh, Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uh, note’ suanlekhakte, na ganhingte uh panin a piangte, le na leitang panun a piang khempeuhah nakpitakin hong daupaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na pu na pate uh tungah amah a lungkim mah bangin note tungah Topa hong lungkim kik ding a, note hong daupaisak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:10  
Deuteronomy30:11 “Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-a kong gen hih thupiakna pen note a dingin a haksa lua hi lo a, na zuihlah ding uh zong hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theih nadingin kua in vantungah eite a dingin hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theih nadingun vantung a om hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:13 Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theih nadingin kua in tuipi galkhatah hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theihna dingun tuipi gal-a om zong hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:14 A thu, hong nai mahmah hi. Note in na hih theih nadingun na kamsung uh le na lungsim sung uhah om hi." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Tuni-in na teel dingun note’ mai-ah nuntakna le a hoih na, sihna le siatna ka koih khinzo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Topa na Pasian uh itna, ama lampite totna, ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte le ama ngeina kipte zuihna tawh, tuni-a no tungah kong gen ahi Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate na man’ uhleh, note nungta-in tampi na pha ding uh a, a luah dingin note na lutna uh leitang tungah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ahih hangin na lungsim uh kihei-in, note in amah zui loin, pasian dangte a bia ding le a na a sem dingin note na kiheikhiat uhleh," 
Deuteronomy30:18 tuni-in note tungah hih thu kong genkhol hi: Note na si ding uh a, Jordan kantanin note a lut ding le a nei dingin na paina uh leitang tungah sauvei na nungta kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Tuni-in note’ langkhatah teci a pang dingin vantung le leitung ka sam a, note’ mai-ah na teel dingun nuntakna le sihna, thupha le samsiatna ka koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note le na suanlekhakte uh na hintheih nadingun nuntakna teel unla," 
Deuteronomy30:20 Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama thu mangin, amah beel un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tungah piak dingin a kiciamsa leitangah note na tentheih nadingun tua pen note-a’ dingin nuntakna le khansauna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Tua ciangin Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah a thugen zomlai hi. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Tuni-in kei kum za le kum sawmnih ka pha ta a, keima ut bangin ka gamtangzo nawn kei hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih Jordan galkhatah na pai kei ding hi,’ hong cizo hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Topa na Pasian mahmah uh note’ mai-ah hong galkah ding hi. Note’ mai-ah hih minamte amah in susia ding a, note in amaute na suankhia ding uh hi. Topa’ gensa bangin note’ mai-ah Joshua hong galkah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Topa na Pasian mahmah uh note’ mai-ah hong galkah ding hi. Note’ mai-ah hih minamte amah in susia ding a, note in amaute na suankhia ding uh hi. Topa’ gensa bangin note’ mai-ah Joshua hong galkah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Topa in amaute a suksiat lai-in, Amor kumpi Sihon le Og tung le amau’ leitang tungah a bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Topa in note tungah amaute hong pia ding a, note kong piak thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah na bawl ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Thahat unla, hang un. Lau kei unla, amaute kihta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh hong pai pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi. Note hong cimawhsak lo ding a, hong nusia lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tua ciangin Moses in Joshua samin, Israel-te khempeuh muhin ama kiangah, “Thahat inla hang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in amau’ pute pate tungah a ciamsa leitangah hih mite tawh na pai ding a, nangmah in tua leitang amaute na ngahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tua ciangin Moses in Joshua samin, Israel-te khempeuh muhin ama kiangah, “Thahat inla hang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in amau’ pute pate tungah a ciamsa leitangah hih mite tawh na pai ding a, nangmah in tua leitang amaute na ngahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Na mai-ah a pai pa pen Topa ahi hi. Amah in nang hong ompih ding a, nang hong cimawhsak loin, zong hong nusia lo ding hi. Lau kei inla, lungkia kei in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Moses in hih Thukham gelhin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mi siampite le upate khempeuh tungah a pia hi. 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moses in amaute thu pia-in, “Kum sagih a cin sim, a kisehsa suahtaksakna hun, buk pawi hunin," 
Deuteronomy31:11 amah in a teelna mun Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah a kilak dingin Israel-te khempeuh a pai uh ciangin, amau’ zakin Israel-te khempeuh mai-ah hih thukham na sim ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Jordan galkhatah a luah dingin na paina uh gamah na nuntak laitengun amaute in a thu za-in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theih nading, le hih thukham thute khempeuh limtakin a sep theih nading, le hih thu a thei nai lo amau’ tate in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theih nadingun, numei, pasal, le naupangte, le na khuapite uh sunga om peemtate, mi khempeuh khawm un,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:13  
Deuteronomy31:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na sih ding hun hong nai ta hi. Joshua sam inla, amah ka sawl theih nadingin kikhopna buk sungah hong om un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses le Joshua pai-in kikhopna buk sungah va om uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na sih ding hun hong nai ta hi. Joshua sam inla, amah ka sawl theih nadingin kikhopna buk sungah hong om un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses le Joshua pai-in kikhopna buk sungah va om uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Tua ciangin meii khuam omna puanbuk sungah Topa kilang hi. Meii khuam, puanbuk kong gei-ah a ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na pu na pate kiang a zuan ding na hita hi. Nang na om nawn loh ciangin hih mite pen na paina uh mite lakah a gam sung pasian-te uh tawh paktat ding uh a, amaute in kei hong nusia-in amaute tawh ka bawl ka thuciamna uh siasak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Tua hun ciangin amaute tungah ka sin so-in, amaute nusia-in ka mai ka seel ding a, amaute beimang ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin amaute in, ‘Eite’ lakah i Pasian a om loh manin hih siatnate i tungah hong tung hi lo ahi hiam?’ a cih theih nadingun amaute tungah siatna le gimna tampi tung ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Amaute, pasian dangte lamah kihei uh ahih manin amau’ gamtatnasa siatnate khempeuh hangin tua hun ciangin ka mai ka seel taktak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Tua ahih ciangin hih lai gelh inla, Israel mite hilh in. Hih la, kei a dingin Israel mite’ langkhatah teci a suah theih nadingin amaute tungah hilh in." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh tungah piak dinga ka kiciamna, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gamah amaute tunpih khinin, amaute in ne-in khamin a thau khit uh ciangin, pasian dangte a bia dingin kihei-in kei hong simmawhin ka thuciamna siasak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Siatna le haksatnate amaute tungah a tun ciangin hih la, teci-in amaute’ langkhatah pang ding hi (bang hang hiam cih leh a suanlekhakte un mangngilh lo ding uh hi); bang hang hiam cih leh piak dingin ka kiciam leitangah amaute ka paipih ma-in, amau’ vaihawm kholh a ngimnate uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni mahin Moses in hih la gelh a, Israel mite a hilh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua ciangin Topa in Nun’ tapa Joshua sawlin, “Thahat inla hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin ka kiciam leitang tungah Israel mite na paipih ding a, nang tawh kong om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua ciangin Topa in Nun’ tapa Joshua sawlin, “Thahat inla hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin ka kiciam leitang tungah Israel mite na paipih ding a, nang tawh kong om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Moses in a bei dongin hih Thukham kammalte laibu sungah a gelh a man ciangin," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Moses in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite thu pia a," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Hih Thukham laibu la unla, note’ langkhatah teci dingin a om theih nadingin Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang gei-ah koih un." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh a lehdo mite le a lungkhauh thei mite na hihna uh ka thei hi. En un, note tawh kei a nungta khawm laipi mahin, tuni-in Topa na lehdo khin uh hi. Ka sih khit ciangin bangzah takin lehdozaw lai ding na hi uh hiam!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hih thute amaute’ bilah genin, amau’ langkhatah teci a pang dingin vantung le leitung ka sap theih nadingin na minam upate uh le na uliante khempeuh uh kei kiangah hong khawm un." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sih khit ciangin note siatgamtatin, note kong sawlna lampi panin na pial taktak ding lam uh ka thei hi. Note’ sepna tawh amah hehsakin, Topa’ muhna-ah a sia gamta ding na hih manun, hong pai ding hunte-ah, note’ tungah gimna hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tua ciangin hih la malte a bei dongin Israel a kikhawm khempeuhte’ zakin Moses in gen a," 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Vantungte aw, ngai un, thu kong gen ding hi. Ka thugente leitung in za hen." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ka thuhilhte guahmal bangin zu-in, ka thugente daitui bangin kia hen la, lo ngeek tunga guah phin leh ankung tunga guahzu bang tahen." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ min ka phat ding hi. Eite’ Pasian a liatna gen un! 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Eite’ belh Topa, a nasepna kicing a, ama sepna khempeuh thumanna ahi hi. Thumanna nei-in, mawhna a nei lo Pasian hi a, amah thutangin thuman hi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ama tungah amaute gamtat sia uh a, amaute’ sitbaanna hangin ama tate hi nawn lo uh hi. Amaute pen a lampial, a lungsim kawi khang mite ahi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:6 A hai, ngaihsutna nei lo mite aw, tua bangin Topa thuk ding na hi uh hiam? Amah pen, note a hong piangsak, note hong bawlin a hong kipsak, na pa uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “A beisa hunte phawk unla, khang tampi hunte ngaihsun un. Na pate uh dong le-uh cin, hong hilh ding uh a, na upate uh dong le-uh cin hong gen ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Sang Pen pa in minam dangte tungah amau’ gamh pia a, mihingte a ten nading mun a seh ciangin vantungmi a phazah tawh a kizui-in mite’ gamgi a phut hi." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ahi zongin Topa’ tanh pen ama mite hi a, Jakob’ suante pen a kipia ama luah ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Amah in sehnel gam, huihpi nunna gam sungah amaute mu hi. Amah in amaute kawi-in kem a, ama mitnauta bangin amaute kem hi." 
Deuteronomy32:11 A bu a vil, a note tungah a kha a zap, a khate zakin a note a man, a kha tawh a note a pua muvanlai bangin" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Topa bek mah in amaute makaih a, amaute kiangah gamdang pasian om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Amah in leitung a sangna-ah amaute tuangsak a, amaute in gamlak pana piangte a ne uh hi. Suangpi panin amaute khuaizu hupsakin, meisuang tawh a kibang suang panin sathau a nesak hi." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Bawnghon panin bawngnawi thaukhal, tuuhon panin tuunawi, tuunote le tuutalte’ thau tawh, Bashan bawnghonte le keelte, mangbuh hoihpente tawh leenggahtui san na dawn uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Israel mite thau mahmah uh a, a lehdo thei mi suak uh hi. Note thau-in lianpi pha-in, na zol uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a bawl Pasian amaute in nusia-in, amau a Honkhia pa thusim lo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Amaute pen pasian dangte tawh ama hazat theih nadingin gamta uh a, a kihhuai gamtatnate tawh amaute in amah hehsak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Amaute in pasian ahi lo dawite, amau’ theih ngei loh pasian-te, hong suak nunung pasian thakte, na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh pasian-te’ tungah biakna a pia uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Note a hong Honkhia pa na phawk kei uh a, note a hong suaksak Pasian na mangngilh uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “ Topa in tua thu thei a, a tapate le a tanute in amah hehsak uh ahih manin tua ama tate a nolh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Amah in, ‘Amaute’ kiang panin ka mai ka seel ding a, amaute’ thumong bang hong hi hiam, ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a lampial khang mite hi a, cihtakna a nei lo tate ahi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Amaute in pasian a hilote tawh ka hazat nading hong bawl uh a, a milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi-a a gen taak lo mite tawh amaute’ hazat theih nading ka bawl ding a, a hai mahmah minam khat tawh amaute ka hehsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna in mei tawhkuang a, Leinuaite’ gamdong a kuang hi. Leitung le a tunga piangte kangtum a, mualte’ bulpite kuangsak hi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Amaute’ tungah siatna ka khol ding a, amaute’ tungah ka thaltangte ka zang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Gilkialin amaute si ding uh a, a sa mahmah meikuang le gunei natna in amaute netum ding hi. Keimah in amaute a pet dingin ha hiam a nei gamsate amaute a tu dingin gu a nei gulte ka sawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Namsau in gamlakah amaute susia-in, inn sungah launa lianpi om ding a, tangval le nungak, naungek nawi nete, samkangte tawh susia khawm ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Keimah in, “Amaute gamlapi-ah ka thehthang ding a, mite lakah amaute a kiphawkna ka beisak ding hi,” ka ci thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Amau’ langte in ngaihsun khialin, amaute in, “Eite i gualzo hi. Topa in hihte khempeuh bawl lo hi,” hong ci kha ding uh ahih manin galte’ hong phin ding ka lau hi,’ a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, ngaihsutna a nei lo minam hi a, amaute’ sungah thu theihtelna om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Amaute a pil hileh, hih thu theitel ding uh a, amau’ thu tawpna mu ding uh!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Amau a Honkhia pa in amaute zuakin, Topa in amaute piakhia kei leh bangci-in mi khat in mi tulkhat delh mangin, mi nih in mi tul sawm taisakzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh i galte’ pasian eite’ Pasian bang hi lo a, i galte’ thungetna a mawkna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Amaute, Sodom le Gomorrah bangin siahuai uh a, gu nei-in a kha leenggah a gah leenggui tawh kibang uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Amau’ leenggahzu pen gulpi gu le a gupha gul gunei gu tawh kibang hi. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Hihte kei kiangah kikholin, ka vankoihna sungah kisiincip hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Phulakna le thukkikna kei a’ hi a, a hun ciangin amaute puk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gim ngah hun ding hong naita a, amau’ siat nading hong tung pah hi." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ vang a beina le sila le sila a hilote a beina a muh ciangin Topa in a mite’ dikna kilangsak ding a, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna nei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Amau’ pasian-te, a bukna uh suangpi," 
Deuteronomy32:38 amaute’ biakpiakna thau ne-in, leenggahzu tawh a biakna uh a dawnte koi-ah om ahi hiam? Amaute thosakin note kihuhsak unla, amaute, na kidalna uh hisak un!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 ‘Tu-in thei un, keimah a kici pa pen kei ka hi a, kei simloh pasian dang kuamah om lo hi. Ka that a, ka nungtasak hi. Ka liamsak a, ka damsak hi. Ka khutsung pan a honkhiazo kuamah om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung lamah ka khut laamto-in ka kiciam a, a nungta tawntung ka hih mah bangin," 
Deuteronomy32:41 a tee ka namsau taatin, thu ka khen ciangin, ka galte tungah phu ka la ding a, kei hong mudahte ka thukkik ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thaltangte si ka tawksak ding a, ka namsau in mi that ding hi. a kithatte le a kimante, kei hong langpangte, sugawp ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Topa’ mite phat un, no minam dangte aw; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a nasemte’ phu la a, alangte thuk-in, ama mite’ gam adingin kilemna a bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tua ciangin Moses hong pai-in, mite’ zakin amah le Nun’ tapa Joshua in hih la malte khempeuh a sut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tua ciangin Moses hong pai-in, mite’ zakin amah le Nun’ tapa Joshua in hih la malte khempeuh a sut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen a man ciangin 
Deuteronomy32:46 amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khempeuh limtakin zui unla, na tate un a zuih dingin na hilh theih nadingun tuni-a note tungah kong gen thu khempeuh na lungsim uhah koih un." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen note a dingin a thuneu hi loin note’ nuntakna hi a, a luah dingin Jordan galkhat na paina uh gam sungah hih thu tawh sauveipi na hing ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Tua ni mahmahin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Jerikho gallam, Moab gam sungah a om Nebo Mual, hih Abarim mualtungah kahto in. A neih dingun Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan gam gal et in." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Hor Mual tungah na sanggampa Aaron si-in a mite kiangah a kigawm bangin, na kahtohna mualtungah si inla, na mite kiangah pai-in kigawm in." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Bang hang hiam cih leh Zin gam, Kadesh khua gei-a Meribah tui phual, Israel mite lakah keimah nong upna na siasak a, Israel mite lakah a siangtho-in kei nong zahtak kei hi." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Tua ahih manin na mai-ah a om gam na gal muh tei ding a, ahih hangin Israel mite ka piak gam sungah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Hih pen, Pasian’ mi Moses in ama sih ma-in Israel mite thupha a piakna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Amah in, “Sinai panin Topa hong pai a, Sinai panin eite a’ ding hong suakkhia hi. Paran Mual panin hong taangkhia a, a taklam khutah meikuang tawi-in, mi siangtho tul sawmte kiang panin a hong pai hi." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Hi taktak hi; amah in a mite it a, ama tungah a ki-ap mi khempeuh a khut sungah om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in na kalsuanna hong zui uh a, nang tung panin lamlahna ngah uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Jakob mihonte’ neih dingin Moses in kote tungah ngeina khat hong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Mite’ makaite kikhawmin, Israel minamte khempeuh a kikaihkhop ciangin, ama mi Israel-te lakah Topa, kumpi a suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reuben minamte’ thu gen a, “Reuben nungta-in si kei hen la, ama mite zong mi tawm hi kei ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Tua ciangin Judah minamte’ thu genin, “ Topa aw, Judah’ aw ngai inla, a mite kiangah amah paipih in. Na khutte tawh ama a’ ding do inla, a galte’ dona-ah a huhpa hi in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Tua ciangin Levi minamte’ thu genin, “Levi tungah na Thummim pia inla, na midik pa tungah na Urim pia in. Massah ah na ze-et mipa, Meribah tuite-ah na kitotpih pa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy33:9 A nu le a pa sangin nangmah hong thupi ngaihsutzaw uh a, ‘Amaute ka thupi sim kei hi,’ a ci pa ahi hi. Amah in a sanggamte paaikhia-in, a tate don lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi minamte in na thu hong mangin, na thuciamna zui uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Amaute in na ngeina kipte Jakob suante hilhin, na thukhamte Israel-te hilh ding uh hi. Amaute in na mai-ah paknamtui hong koihin, na biakna tau tungah meihal biakna bup hong koih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Topa aw, ama nate tungah thupha pia inla, a khut tawh a sepnate saang in. A galte’ kawng sutan inla, a ding kikzo nawn lo dingin amah a mudahte sugawp in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjamin minamte’ thu genin, “ Topa in a it mipa ama kiangah nuam takin om hi. Amah in sun tawntung kemin, amaute lakah om hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Josef minamte’ thu genin, “ Topa in ama leitang, tung lamah a om vantung letsong hoihpente, le nuai-a om a thuknate tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:14 ni hanga gah a hoihpente, le kha hanga piang a hoihpente tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:15 tanglai mualte tunga piang a hoih a limci pente le tawntung mualte’ hauhna tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:16 leitung le a tunga om letsong hoihpente le sawlbawk lakah a tengpa’ maipha tawh thupha pia tahen. Hihte khempeuh, Josef tungah tung hen la, a sanggamte lakah ulian ahi mipa’ lu tungah tung tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:17 A tacil, bawngtal bangin thahat a, a kite, gamsial kite tawh kibang hi. Amah in tuate tawh mite nawt ding a, leimong dongah amaute khempeuh phul ding hi. Efraim mi tul sawmte tua bang hi a, Manasseh minam tul tampite zong tua bangmah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Zebulun minamte’ thu genin, “Zebulun aw, na paikhiatna-ah lungdam in. Issakhar aw, na puanbukte sungah lungdam in." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Amaute in a mual uhah mite sam ding uh a, amaute in tua lai-ah biakpiakna mante pia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tuipi tung le sehnel sungah na manpha kiseelte ngah uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad minamte’ thu genin, “Gad a lianin a bawlpa in thupha ngah ta hen! Gad in humpinelkai bangin buk khikhe a, amah in a baan le a luzang, a balkham hi." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Amah in lei hoihpenna mun ama a dingin teel hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ukpa’ tanh kikoihcingsak hi. Mi makaite’ ngahte mah amah zong kingahsak a, amah in Israel-te tawh Topa’ thupiakna le thuman khennate a sem hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan minamte’ thu genin, “Dan pen Bashan panin a diangkhia humpinelkai no ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Naftali minamte thu genin, “O Naftali, maipha tawh nuam a sa, Topa’ thupha tawh a kidim, bualtuite le leitaw lam a nei pa,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Asher minamte thu genin, “Asher in tapa dangte sangin thupha ngahzaw tahen. A sanggamte’ pahtak hi hen la, a gam sungah oliv thau kidim tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Na khuapite, sik le sumngo tawh kidal ding a, na nuntak laiteng na thahatna tua bang hi ding hi,” a ci hi."
