Deuteronomy33:26 “Israel aw, nangmah huh dingin vantungah a tuang a liatna tawh vanpi-ah a om, Pasian tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Tawntung Pasian pen nangma omna hi a, nangmah huh dingin tawntung khutte a om hi. Amah in na mai-ah galte nawtkhia-in, ‘Susia un,’ ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lungmuangin om ding uh hi. Jakob suante bek an le leenggahzu gamah om hi. Hi taktak hi, a vantungte in daitui hong khiatsuk hi. Israel aw, mi nuamsa na hi hi. Nang hong kihuhna lum le na gualzawhna lum le na gualzawhna namsau ahi Topa in nang banga a hotkhiat mi kua om ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy33:29 Na galte in hong mai-etin, na kiangah hong pai ding uh a, amaute na tuancil ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Tua ciangin Moab zanglei panin Jerikho gal Nebo Mual, Pisgah dawnah Moses paito hi. Tua ciangin Topa in gam khempeuh, Gilead gam pan Dan ciang dong," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naftali gam khempeuh, Efraim le Manasseh gam, Judah gam khempeuh Nitumna Tuipi dong," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Negeb gam, le nisuh kung khuapi kuam a kici Jerikho panin Zoar ciang dong a kikhung zanglei a lak hi." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Hih gam, Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob tungah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding hi,’ ka cih leitang ahi hi. Na mit tawh nang kong musak khin a, ahih hangin tua lai-ah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ thugenna bangin Topa’ nasem Moses pen Moab gamah si a," 
Deuteronomy34:6 Bethpeor galkhat, Moab gam kuamah amah kiphum hi. Ahih hangin tuhun dongin a kiphumna mun kuamah in thei lo hi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses a sihin kum za le kum sawmnih pha hi. A mit maang lo a, a tha ngeina zong kiam lo hi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Moab zanglei-ah Israel mite ni sawmthum sung Moses hangin a kah khit uh ciangin Moses hangin kahna le thumna a veng ta hi. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tua ciangin Moses in, ama tungah a khut nga khin ahih manin Nun tapa Joshua lungsim pilna tawh a kidim hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in ama thu mangin, Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin a gamta uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tua ciangin Moses in, ama tungah a khut nga khin ahih manin Nun tapa Joshua lungsim pilna tawh a kidim hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in ama thu mangin, Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin a gamta uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Israel mite sungah Moses bangin Topa in maitang kimu-in a theih kamsang dang kuamah om lo hi. 
Deuteronomy34:11 Egypt gam sungah Faro le a nasemte le a gam khempeuhah a hih dingin Topa in ama tungah a piak limte le na lamdangte khempeuh a nei kuamah dang om lo hi. 
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel-te khempeuh muhna-ah Moses in a hih a lian vangliatna le a lauhuaite khempeuh a hih thei, amah tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Joshua1:1 Topa’ nasem Moses a sih khit ciangin Topa in Moses’ nasem, Nun tapa Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua1:2 “Ka nasempa Moses si ta ahih ciangin tu-in ding inla, nang le hih mite khempeuh, hih Jordan kantanin Israel mite tungah ka piak gam sungah pai un." 
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ciamsa bangin na khe in a totna mun khempeuh nang tungah kong pia hi. 
Joshua1:4 Sehnel gam le hih Lebanon panin gun lianpi Eufratis gun dong, ni a tumna lama Tuipi Lian lam, Hit mite’ leitang khempeuh nangma gam hi ding hi." 
Joshua1:5 Na nuntak sung tawntung kuamah in na mai hong khak zo lo ding hi. Moses tawh ka om mah bangin nang tawh zong kong om ding hi. Nang kong tamasak kei ding a, kong nusia kei ding hi." 
Joshua1:6 Thahat inla, hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin a pu a pate uh tungah ka ciam leitang hih mite na luahsak ding hi." 
Joshua1:7 Thahatin hang inla, ka nasem Moses in nang hong piak thukhamte khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat ding limtakin ngaihsun in. Na paina peuhah hoihtakin na lamzan’ theih nadingin tuate khat zong pelh kei in." 
Joshua1:8 Hih thukham laibu na mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. A sunga kigelh thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat theih nadingin sunlezanin na lungngaingai ding hi. Tua hileh na maa vang ding a, na nasep tangtung ding hi." 
Joshua1:9 Thu hong pia khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Thahat inla hang in. Lau kei inla lungkia kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina peuhpeuhah Topa na Pasian nang tawh hong om hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:10 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi makaite thu pia-in," 
Joshua1:11 “Giahphual ah pai unla, mite thu pia-in, ‘Na lam-an ding uh kigingkhol un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun note hong piak leitangah pai-in a luah dingin ni thum sungin hih Jordan a galkah ding na hi uh hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:12 Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam a langte tungah," 
Joshua1:13 “ Topa’ nasem Moses in note thu hong piakna kammal, ‘ Topa na Pasian un note tawlngakna mun hong pia-in, hih leitang note hong pia ding hi,’ a cihna thu phawk un." 
Joshua1:14 Moses in Jordan galkhat a note hong piak leitangah na zite uh, na taneute uh, le na ganhingte uh a na om ding uh hi. Ahih hangin note lakah galhang mi khempeuh in hiam tawi-in Jordan kantanin na sanggamte uh mai-ah pai-in," 
Joshua1:15 note hong piak bangin Topa in na sanggamte uh tungah tawlngakna pia-in, Topa na Pasian un amaute a piak leitang amaute in zong a luah mateng uh na huh ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note’ neih leitangah ciahkikin, Topa’ nasem Moses in Jordan gal ni a suahna lamah note hong piak leitang na luah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:16 Amaute in Joshua dawngin, “Kote nong thupiak khempeuh ka hih ding uh a, nong sawlna peuhpeuhah ka pai ding uh hi." 
Joshua1:17 Na khempeuhah Moses’ thu ka man’ uh mah bangin nangma thu zong kong mang ding uh hi. Moses a ompih mah bangin Topa na Pasian in nang hong ompih ta hen! 
Joshua1:18 Na thupiakna le na thute, na thupiak peuhpeuh hong langpangin a mang lo mipa kithat ding hi. Thahat inla hang in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:1 Tua ciangin Nun’ tapa Joshua in Shittim panin thukanin mi nih sawlsim a, “Pai-in gam va en unla, a diakdiakin Jerikho khua hong en un,” a ci hi. Amaute pai uh a, Rahab min nei a paktat numei khat’ inn-ah tungin giak uh hi." 
Joshua2:2 Jerikho kumpipa tungah, “Gam sung a en dingin Israel mi pawlkhat tu nitakin hih lai-ah hong tungzo hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
Joshua2:3 Tua ciangin Jerikho kumpipa in Rahab kiangah mi sawlin, “Na inn sunga hong tum, na kianga hong tung mite hong paikhiatpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh gam khempeuh a en dingin amaute hong pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:4 Ahih hangin Rahab in tua mi nihte la-in na seel khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Hi mah hi, ka kiangah mi hong pai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute koi pan hong pai uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi." 
Joshua2:5 Kulhkongpi a kikhak ding khuamial ciangin tua mite paikhia uh a, koi-ah pai uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi. Manlangin amaute delh le-uhcin na pha kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:6 Ahih hangin amah in innkhum zangah tua mite paipih to-in innkhum zangah a koih ngei bangin a koihsa anthul kungte lakah amaute seel khin hi. 
Joshua2:7 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Jordan lamah ngahmun dong delh uh a, a delhte a paikhiat phetin kulhkongpi kikhak hi." 
Joshua2:8 Amaute a lup ma-in innkhum zanga amaute kiangah Rahab paito-in 
Joshua2:9 tua mite kiangah, “ Topa in note’ tungah hih leitang hong piak khitna ka thei a, note ka hong kihta mahmah uh hi. Hih gam sunga a teng mi khempeuh note’ hangin lunggim uh hi." 
Joshua2:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin nong paikhiat lai-un Topa in note’ mai-ah San Tuipi a kansakna, le Jordan galkhat a om na suksiatmang uh Amor mite’ kumpi nihte ahi Sihon le Og tungah na bawlna uh ka za khin uh hi." 
Joshua2:11 Tua thu ka zak phetun ka lungsim uh bei a, note’ hangin mite’ lungsimah hanna bei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh, tunga om vantung le nuai-a om leitungah Pasian ahi hi." 
Joshua2:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note tungah kong dik gamtat bangin note zong ko innkuan-ah nong dik gamtat nading uh Topa’ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam unla, a man taktak lim khat kei hong pia un." 
Joshua2:13 Ka nu, ka pa, ka sanggamnute, ka sanggampate, le amaute tawh a kizomte khempeuh hong hon unla, sihna panin kote hong suaktasak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:14 Mite in ama tungah, “Nang’ tangin kote ka si ngam uh hi. Hih ko’ thu na genkhiat kei nakleh, Topa in kote tungah hih leitang hong piak ciangin nang tungah dikna le thumanna tawh kong gamta ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:15 Tua ciangin amah in tawlet panin khau khat tawh amaute khaisuk hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuapikulh sung lampangah ama inn kilam a, khuapikulh sungah amah teng hi." 
Joshua2:16 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Mualtungah pai un. Hong delhte tawh na kituak kha ding uh hi. Hong delhte hong ciahkik mateng ni thum sung tua lai-ah bu un. Tua khit ciangin na pai nading uhah na pai thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:17 Mite in ama kiangah, “Kote nong kiciamsak thuciamna thu tawh kisai-in ka paubaang kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua2:18 En in, hih leitangah kong pai uh ciangin kote nong khaisukna hih tawlet-ah hih khauhual san na khih ding hi. Na inn sungah na nu le na pa, na sanggamte le na pa’ innkuanpihte khempeuh na khawm ding hi." 
Joshua2:19 Mi khatpeuh na innsung panin kongzing lampi-ah a paikhiat le ama sihna pen ama khialhna hang hi ding a, kote ka siang ding uh hi. Ahih hangin inn sungah nang tawh a om mi khatpeuh a kisukkhak leh, ama sihna pen kote’ khialhna hi ding hi." 
Joshua2:20 Ahih hangin hih ko thute na genkhiat leh, kote nong kiciamsak thuciamna tawh kisai-in kote ka siang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Na thugen bangun hi ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute sawlkhia a, amaute paikhia uh hi. Amah in a khauhual san a tawlet-ah a khih hi." 
Joshua2:22 Amaute paikhia-in mualtungah pai uh a, a delhte a ciahkik mateng ni thum sung om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a delhte in lamdung khempeuh zongin bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Joshua2:23 Tua ciangin mualtung panin mi nihte paisuk kik uh a, galkahin Nun’ tapa Joshua kiangah tungin amau’ tunga thupiang khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Joshua2:24 Amaute in Joshua kiangah, “ Topa in leitang khempeuh eite’ khut sungah hong pia taktak hi. Tua tham loin tua gam a teng mi khempeuh eite’ hangin lungmang uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua3:1 A zing ciangin Joshua tho baihin Israel mi khempeuh tawh Shittim pan dingkhia-in Jordan gun tung uh a, a galkah ma-un tua munah a giak uh hi." 
Joshua3:2 Ni thum a cin ciangin giahphual ah uliante pai-in 
Joshua3:3 mite thu pia uh a, “ Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang Levi siampite in a puak na muh uh ciangin na omna panun dingkhia-in na zui ding uh hi." 
Joshua3:4 Hih lamah pai ngei lo na hih manun na pai nading uh lampi tu-a bangin na thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note le tua Thuciamna Singkuang kikalah mun awng, pi tulthum bang om ding hi. A gei-ah pai kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua3:5 Tua ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Nomau mah kisiangsak tawm un; bang hang hiam cih leh zing ciangin note’ lakah Topa in na lamdangte hong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:6 Tua ciangin Joshua in siampite kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang la unla, mite’ mai-ah paisuak un,” a ci hi. Amaute in Thuciamna Singkuang la-in mite’ mai-ah a pai uh hi." 
Joshua3:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Moses tawh ka omkhawm bangin nang tawh kong omkhawm nading thu amaute in a theih nadingun Israel mite khempeuh muhna-ah tuni-in nang liatsak ding ka kipan ding hi." 
Joshua3:8 Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite thu na pia ding a, ‘Jordan tuite’ gei na tun uh ciangin Jordan tui sungah tang loin na ding ding uh hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:9 Tua ciangin Joshua in Israel mite kiangah, “Hih lai-ah hong pai unla, Topa na Pasian uh thute za un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:10 Joshua in, “A nungta Pasian note lakah a omna hih thu tawh na thei ding uh hi. Amah in pel loin note’ mai panin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Hiv mite, Perez mite, Girgash mite, Amor mite, le Jebus mite hawlkhia ding hi." 
Joshua3:11 En un, leitung buppi’ Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang note’ mai Jordan lamah pai ding hi." 
Joshua3:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel minamte sung panin nam khat pan mi khat, mi sawm le nih teel un." 
Joshua3:13 Leitung buppi’ Topa ahi Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite’ khete in Jordan tui a sik ciangin Jordan tuite luang nawn lo ding a, a tunglam panin hong luangsuk tuite lomkhatin khawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:14 Tua ahih ciangin mite’ mai-ah Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite tawh Jordan galkah dingin a puanbuk uh panin mite dingkhia-in," 
Joshua3:15 Thuciamna Singkuang a puate Jordan tung a, Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite’ khe tui-ah a kidiah ciangin (anlak hun sung khempeuh Jordan a piau khempeuhah let hi)," 
Joshua3:16 a saklam panin hong luangsuk tuite khawlin khangto a, a gamlapi, Zarethan gei-a khuapi Adamah-ah a lomin kikhol a, Ci Tuipi a kici Arabah tuipi-ah a luangsukte kikhentat siang hi. Tua ciangin Jerikho gei-ah mite galkah uh hi." 
Joshua3:17 Israel-te khempeuh lei keu tungah a galkah sung, minam bup in Jordan a khen’ khit mateng, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan gun laizang lei keu tungah ding uh hi." 
Joshua4:1 A minam bupin Jordan a galkah khit uh ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua4:2 “Nam khat pan mi khat, mite lak panin mi sawm le nih teel inla," 
Joshua4:3 amaute thu pia-in, ‘Siampite’ khe a dinna mun mahmah, Jordan gun laizang panin suangtum sawm le nih la unla, a galah pua-in tu nitakin na giahna uh munah koih un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:4 Tua ciangin Joshua in nam khat panin mi khat, ama sehsa mi sawm le nihte Israel mite lak panin a sam hi." 
Joshua4:5 Joshua in amaute kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang mai Jordan laizangah pai unla, note in Israel minam phazah tawh kizui-in suangtum khat ciat la-in na liangko tung uhah pua un." 
Joshua4:6 Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangtumte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot ciangin note’ lakah lim khat hi ding hi." 
Joshua4:7 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah Jordan tuite kikhentan a, Jordan a galkah laitakun Jordan tuite kikhentan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih suangtumte pen Israel mite tungah a tawntungin phawkna hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:8 Joshua’ thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, Topa in Joshua a thupiak bangin Israel minam a phazah tawh kizui-in Jordan laizang panin suangtum sawm le nih a la uh hi. Amaute in a giahna uh munah tuate pua-in a koih uh hi." 
Joshua4:9 Tua ciangin Joshua in Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite’ khe a dinnasa mun, Jordan laizangah zong suang sawm le nih mah a phut hi. Tuni dongin tua suangte tua mun mahah omlai hi." 
Joshua4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Joshua a thupiak bangin mite tungah a gen dingin Topa in Joshua a thupiak khempeuh a vekpi-in a kiman khit matengin Jordan laizangah Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite a ding uh hi. Mite nawhsa-in galkah uh hi. 
Joshua4:11 Mite khempeuh a galkah khit uh ciangin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang le siampite, mite’ mai-ah na ma pai uh hi." 
Joshua4:12 Moses in amaute a sawlsa bangin Israel mite mai-ah hiam tawi-in Reuben minamte, Gad minamte, le Manasseh minam alangte na ma pai uh a," 
Joshua4:13 mi tul sawmli bang galdo dingin hiam tawi-in a baihsa-in Jerikho zanglei lam Topa’ mai-ah a pai uh hi. 
Joshua4:14 Tua ni-in Israel-te khempeuh’ muhna-ah Topa in Joshua liansak hi. Amaute in Moses lamdangsa-in a om uh mah bangin Joshua a nuntak sung tawntung lamdangsa-in a om uh hi. 
Joshua4:15 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua4:16 “Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan panin hong paikhiat nading thu pia in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in siampite thu pia a, “Jordan panin hong paikhia un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:18 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan laizang panin hong paikhia-in, siampite’ khe lei keu tungah hong omtoh ciangin, a ngeina bangin amau’ munah Jordan tuite hong luangkikin a piau khempeuh a tuum hi." 
Joshua4:19 Kha masa a ni sawm ni-in Jordan panin mite paikhia uh a, Jerikho nisuahna lam gamgi Gilgal-ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Joshua4:20 Jordan panin a lakkhiat uh tua suangtum sawm le nihte Joshua in Gilgal-ah a phut hi. 
Joshua4:21 Tua ciangin amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh ciangin," 
Joshua4:22 ‘Israel-te in lei keu tungtawnin hih Jordan kantan hi,’ ci-in na tate uh na theisak ding uh hi." 
Joshua4:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in i kantan khit matengin Topa na Pasian un a kansak San Tuipi tungah a bawl bangin, note in na kantan khit matengun Topa na Pasian un Jordan tuite note a dingin kangsak hi." 
Joshua4:24 Topa vanglian mahmah hi, ci-in leitung mi khempeuh in a theih nading le Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak tawntung theih nading uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:1 Nitumna lam Jordan galkhat a om Amor mite’ kumpite khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Kanaan mite’ kumpi khempeuh in, Israel mite in a kantan khit mateng amaute a dingin Jordan tuite Topa in a kansakna thu a zak uh ciangin lungmang uh a, Israel mite’ hangin a lungsim uh a bei hi." 
Joshua5:2 Tua hun laitakin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Meisuang tem bawl inla, Israel mite a nih veina vun at kik in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in meisuang tem bawl a, Gibeath-haaraloth munah Israel mite a vun a at hi." 
Joshua5:4 Joshua in amaute vun a atna a thu in: Egypt gam panin hong paikhia pasal galhang mite khempeuh, Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh ciangin lamkal sehnel gamah si khin uh hi." 
Joshua5:5 Hong paikhia mite khempeuh vun a ki-at khit hangin Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh sehnel gam lamkal a suak mite khempeuh a vun uh ki-at nai lo hi. 
Joshua5:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa’ thu a ngaih lohna hangun Egypt panin a hong paikhia minam bup, galhang mite a sih khit dong kum sawmli sung sehnel gamah Israel mite lam pai uh hi. Topa in amau’ tungah a piak dingin a pu a pate tungah a ciamsa bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna leitang a muhsak loh nading thu amaute tungah Topa kiciam hi." 
Joshua5:7 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in vun a at mite pen, amaute’ tangin amah in a piansak amau’ tate ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lampi-ah amaute a vun ki-at nai lo ahih manin vun at nai loh ahi uh hi." 
Joshua5:8 Minam bup vun ki-atna a man khit ciangin giahphual amau’ mun ciatah a dam mateng a om uh hi. 
Joshua5:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Tuni-in note’ tung panin Egypt gamah sal suakin na minsiatna uh ka zialkhia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen tuni dongin Gilgal kici hi." 
Joshua5:10 Israel mite Gilgal-a giahphual ah a om sungun tua kha a ni sawm le li ni nitakin Jerikho zanglei-ah Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi. 
Joshua5:11 Paisan Pawi khit a zing ciang ni teekteekin amaute in tua gam a piang silngo sawh loh moh le ankan a ne uh hi. 
Joshua5:12 Tua gam a piang a nek ni uh a zing ciangin manna a bei ta hi. Israel mite in manna nei nawn lo uh a, ahih hangin tua kumin Kanaan leitang a piangte a ne uh hi." 
Joshua5:13 Jerikho khua kiangah Joshua a tun ciangin a khuadaktoh leh, a khut sungah namsau dawhsa tawh mi khat a mai-ah na ding hi. Ama kiangah Joshua pai-in, “Ko’ pawl na hi hiam, ahih kei leh ka langte’ pawl na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:14 Amah in, “Hilo hi; Topa’ galkapte a ukpa-in tu-in kong pai hi,” a ci hi. Joshua zong bok sukin bia-in ama kiangah, “Ka topa in a nasempa bang hong sawl nuam ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:15 Tua ciangin Topa’ galkapte a ukpa in Joshua kiangah, “Na khe panin na khedapte suah in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dinna mun a siangtho leitang ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangmahin Joshua a gamta hi." 
Joshua6:1 Tu-in Israel mite’ hangin Jerikho kulhkongpi kikhakcip a, kuamah pusuak thei lo, sungtum thei lo hi." 
Joshua6:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Thei in, na khut sungah a kumpipa le a mi thahatte tawh Jerikho khua kong pia khin hi." 
Joshua6:3 Khuapi kimkotah galkap mi khempeuh khatvei na pai ding uh hi. Tua bangin ni guk sung na pai ding uh hi. 
Joshua6:4 Siampi sagih in Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawi ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni-in khuapi kimkotah sagihvei na pai ding uh a, siampite in peengkul tum ding uh hi." 
Joshua6:5 Amaute in tuutal ki sauveipi a ginsak khit uh ciangin, peengkul aw na zak phetun nakpitakin mi khempeuh awng ding uh hi. Khuapikulh cimmai ding a, mi khempeuh amau mai ciatah tangtakin khuapi sungah paisuak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Nun tapa Joshua in siampite samin amaute kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang la unla, tua Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah siampi sagihte tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawisak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:7 Tua ciangin amah in mite kiangah, “Mai nawtin pai un. Khuapi kimkotah pai unla, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah hiam tawi mite paisak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:8 Joshua in mite a thupiak bangin Topa’ mai-ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul a tawi siampi sagihte mai nawtin pai-in peengkul tum uh a, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang in amaute zui hi." 
Joshua6:9 Tua ciangin peengkul a tum siampite’ mai-ah hiam tawi mite pai uh a, peengkulte a kitum suak hun laitakin Thuciamna Singkuang nungah a nungdalte a pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:10 Ahih hangin Joshua in mite thu pia-in, “Awng un, ci-a kong sawl hun matengin note awng loin, na aw uh zong na kizasak kei ding uh a, na kam panun aw khat beek gingkhia lo ding hi. Awng un, kong cih ciangin na awng bek ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:11 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang khuapi kimkotah khatvei paisak a, amaute hong ciahkikin giahphual ah a zan giak uh hi." 
Joshua6:12 Tua ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baih a, siampite in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a la uh hi." 
Joshua6:13 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul sagih a tawi siampi sagihte paisuakin peengkulte tumsuak uh hi. Amaute’ mai-ah hiam tawite pai-in, peengkulte a kitum suak hun laitakin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang nungah a nungdalte a pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:14 A ni nih ni-in khuapi kimkotah khatvei pai uh a, giahphual ah ciahkik uh hi. Tua bangin ni guk sung a hih uh hi." 
Joshua6:15 A ni sagih ni-in khuavak tungin tho baih uh a, tua bangmahin khuapi kimkotah sagihvei a pai uh hi. Tuani bekin khuapi kimkotah amaute sagihvei pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:16 A sagih veina-ah, siampite in peengkul a tum ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Awng un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in khuapi note hong piazo hi." 
Joshua6:17 Khuapi le a sunga omte khempeuh pen Topa’ tungah biakna-in kisusia ding hi. Amah in i sawl kamtaite na seel ahih manin numei paktat Rahab le ama inn sungah amah tawh a omkhawmte khempeuh bek hing ding hi. 
Joshua6:18 Ahih hangin suksiat dingin a kiseh nate panin nomau mah na kikem ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh tuate na suksiat ding uh ciangin a kisusia ding nate khat peuhpeuh iplahin la kha-in Israel-te’ giahphual sungah siat nading na khat suaksakin haksatna na tun kha ding uh hi. 
Joshua6:19 Ahih hangin ngun le kham, sumngo le sik tawh kibawl nazatte Topa a dingin a siangtho ahi hi. Topa’ sumkoihna-ah tuate tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:20 Tua ahih ciangin mite awng a, peengkulte kitum hi. Mite in peengkul aw a zak phetun nakpitakin awng uh a, kulhpi cimmai-in, mi khempeuh amau mai ciatah tangtakin khuapi sungah pai uh a, khuapi a la uh hi." 
Joshua6:21 Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi sunga om khempeuh numei le pasal, a moi a ham, bawngtalte, tuute, le late khempeuh namsau tawh thatmang khin uh hi." 
Joshua6:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in tua gam thu a va kansim mi nihte kiangah, “Numei paktat nu’ inn-ah va pai unla, tua lai panin a numei le amah tawh a kizom khempeuh, ama tungah na ciamsa bangun hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:23 Tua ahih ciangin thu kansim tangvalte va tum uh a, Rahab, a nu, a pa, a sanggamte, le amah tawh a kizom khempeuh a paikhiatpih uh hi. Amaute in tua nu’ tanau teng khempeuh paipih uh a, Israel-te’ giahphual pualamah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua6:24 Amaute in khuapi le a sunga om khempeuh mei tawh hal uh a, ngun le kham, sumngo le sik tawh a kibawl nazatte bek Topa’ inn-a sumkoihna-ah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua6:25 Ahih hangin numei paktat Rahab, le tua nu tawh a kizomte khempeuh Joshua in a hingkhawi hi. Jerikho khua thu a kansim dingin Joshua in a sawl kamtaite tua nu in na seel ahih manin tuni dongin Israel mite lakah a suanlekhakte a teng uh hi." 
Joshua6:26 Tua hun laitakin Joshua in amaute tungah thuciamna khat koih a, “Mi khat kipanin hih Jerikho khuapi a lamkik pa in Topa’ mai-ah samsiatna thuak tahen. A tacil luang khaamin tua khuapi bulpi phut ding a, a tapa neupen luang khaamin a kulhkongpite phut ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:27 Tua bangin Topa in Joshua ompih a, gam khempeuhah ama min a thang hi." 
Joshua7:1 Ahih hangin a ki-ap nate tawh kisai-in Israel mite zuautat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minam Zerah tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan in a ki-ap nate pawlkhat la ahih manin Israel mite tungah Topa heh mahmah hi." 
Joshua7:2 Joshua in Jerikho panin Bethel nisuahna lam Bethaven gei-a om Ai khua-ah mi sawlin amaute kiangah, “Paito unla a gam va en un,” a ci hi. Tua mite paito-in Ai khua va ensim uh hi." 
Joshua7:3 Amaute Joshua kiangah hong ciahkikin ama kiangah, “Mi khempeuh kuantosak kei inla, mi tulnih ahi a, tulthum ahi zongin kuantosakin Ai khua simsak in. Amaute mi tawmno khat ahih manin tua lai-ah mi khempeuh gimtosak kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua7:4 Tua ahih ciangin mite lak panin tulthum bang tua lai-ah a kuanto uh hi. Ai mite’ mai-ah amaute tai uh a," 
Joshua7:5 Ai mite in amau’ kulhkongpi mai panin Shebarim ciang dong delh uh a, tuahsukna munah amaute sawmthum le guk khawng a that uh hi. Hih thu hangin Israel mite’ hanna bei-in, lau mahmah uh hi." 
Joshua7:6 Tua ciangin Joshua in dahna limin ama puante balkekin nitak mateng Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah, amah le Israel upate boksuk uh a, amaute in a lu tung uhah leivui a koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:7 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Ala, Topa Pasian, kote a hong susia ding Amor mite’ khut sungah a hong pia dingin bang hangin hih mite Jordan galkhatah hong paipih peuhmah na hi hiam? Jordan galkhatah ten ding a lungkim hi hoh ta le-ung!" 
Joshua7:8 Topa aw, Israel-te a galte uh mai-ah a nungkik uh ciangin bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam!" 
Joshua7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan mite le hih gam a teng mi khempeuh in hih thu za ding uh a, kote hong umcihin leitung panin kote hong phiatkhia mang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin a lian mahmah nangma min bang cih ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:10 Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Tho in, bang hangin tua bangin lei-ah bok na hi hiam?" 
Joshua7:11 Israel mite khial a, amaute in ka thupiak thuciamna palsat khin uh hi. Amaute in a ki-ap nate pawlkhat la uh a, amaute in gu-in zuauthu gen uh a, amau’ van lakah tua nate koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:12 Tua thu hangin Israel mite in a galte uh nang zo lo uh hi. Amaute pen suksiat ding mi na suak khin uh ahih manin a galte uh mai-ah nungkik uh hi. Note’ lak panin a ki-ap nate na suksiat kei uhleh note tawh kong omkhawm nawn kei ding hi. 
Joshua7:13 Tho in, mite siansuah inla, ‘Zing cianga dingin note kisiansuah tawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian Topa in, “Israel mite aw, note’ lakah a ki-ap nate om hi. Note’ lak panin a ki-ap nate na lakkhiat matengun na galte uh na nangzo kei ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua7:14 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin na minam namun note hong kipaipih ding hi. Topa in a lak minam sung panin a behbehin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a beh sung panin a innkuankuanin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a innkuan sung panin a mimi-in hong pai ding hi. 
Joshua7:15 Tua ciangin a ki-ap nate tawh a kila khawm mipa le a neih khempeuh, mei-in kihal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa’ thuciamna palsat hi. Israel sungah a zumhuai-in a gamta ahi hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:16 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baihin, a namnamin Israel-te hong paipih a, Judah minam kila hi." 
Joshua7:17 Tua ciangin amah in Judah behte hong paipih a, Zerah-te beh kila hi. Amah in Zerah-te beh a mimi-in hong paipih a, Zabdi kila hi." 
Joshua7:18 Tua ciangin amah in ama innkuanpihte a mimi-in hong paipih a, Judah minam Zerah’ tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan kila hi." 
Joshua7:19 Tua ciangin Joshua in Akhan kiangah, “Ka tapa aw, Israel Topa Pasian minthangsak inla, amah phat in. Tu-in na gamtatnasate kei tungah hong gen inla, bangmah hong im kei in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:20 Tua ciangin Akhan in Joshua dawngin, “A taktakin, Israel Topa Pasian tungah ka khial khin a, hih bangin ka gamta kha hi." 
Joshua7:21 Shinar panin vankia lakah puanhoih khat, le ngun shekel zanih a gik, le shekel sawmnga a gik kham tawn khat ka muh ciangin, tuate iplahin ka lakha hi. Tu-in tuate ka puanbuk sung leilakah a ngunte a nuai-ah omin kiseel hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:22 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in sawltakte sawl a, amaute a puanbukah va tai uh a, a puanbuk sungah a ngun nuainungin na kiseel takpi hi." 
Joshua7:23 Amaute in puanbuk panin tuate lakhia-in Joshua le Israel mite khempeuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin amaute in Topa’ mai-ah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:24 Tua ciangin Joshua le amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh in Zerah’ tapa Akhan, le a ngun, a puan, a kham tawn, a tanute, a tapate, a bawngtalte, a late, a tuute, a puanbuk, le a neih khempeuh la uh a, amaute in Akhor Kuam ciangah tuate a paipih uh hi." 
Joshua7:25 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Bang hangin kote tungah gimna hong tun na hi hiam? Tuni-in Topa in nang tungah gimna hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in suang tawh Akhan a denglum uh hi. Amaute in a innkuanpih dangte le a neihsate uh zong suang tawh denglumin a hal uh hi." 
Joshua7:26 Tua ciangin amaute in tuni donga a om suang honpi ama tungah a ciang uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ hehluatna a dai hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu dongin tua mun pen Akhor Kuam, kici hi." 
Joshua8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Lau kei inla lungkia kei in. Galkap khempeuh nang kiangah la inla, kithawi-in Ai-ah paito in. Nangma khut sungah Ai kumpipa le a mite, a khuapi, le a leitang kong piak khitna thei in." 
Joshua8:2 Jerikho le a kumpipa tungah na bawl bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah na bawl ding a, a van kinusiate le a ganhingte bek note a dingin na la ding uh hi. A khuapi nungah a khuapi a sim dingin na buksim ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua8:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua le galkap khempeuh Ai-ah a paito dingin kipan uh hi. Joshua in a tha kicing mi thahat tul sawmthum teel a, zanin tua mite a sawlkhia hi." 
Joshua8:4 Amah in amaute thu pia a, “En un, tua khuapi a sim dingin a nungah na buksim ding uh a, khuapi panin gamlapi-ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a kigingsa-in na om ding uh a," 
Joshua8:5 tua ciangin keimah le kei tawh a om mite khempeuh in khuapi kong naih ding uh hi. A masa bangin kote a do dingin hong kuankhiat uh ciangin amaute’ mai-ah kote ka na tai khem ding uh hi. 
Joshua8:6 Khuapi panin amaute hong paikhiat khit uh matengin kote hong delh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ‘A masa-a bangin eite’ mai-ah amaute tai uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiang panin ko ka tai ding uh hi." 
Joshua8:7 Tua ciangin na buksimna panun note na kipan ding uh a, khuapi na la ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note’ khut sungah hong pia ding hi." 
Joshua8:8 Khuapi na lak khit uh ciangin Topa’ hong sawlna bangin hihin, mei tawh khuapi na hal ding uh hi. Note thu kong piak khitna thei un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua8:9 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute a sawlkhia hi. A buksimna ding uh munah amaute pai-in, Ai nitumna lam, Bethel le Ai kikalah pang uh a, ahih hangin tua zanin giahphual a mite lakah Joshua omlai hi." 
Joshua8:10 Zingsangin Joshua tho baihin mite sam a, mite’ mai-ah Israel upate tawh Ai-ah a paito uh hi." 
Joshua8:11 Amah tawh a om galkap khempeuh paito uh a, khuapi mai naihin Ai leilu lampangah phual sat uh a, Ai le amaute’ kikalah luihawm khat om hi." 
Joshua8:12 Tua ciangin amah in mi tulnga bang paipihin, khuapi nitumna lam Bethel le Ai kikalah a buksim dingin a koih hi." 
Joshua8:13 Tua ahih ciangin galkapte, khuapi leilu lamah a phualpi le khuapi nitumna lamah a nungdalte a koih uh hi. Ahih hangin tua zanin Joshua kuam sungah a om hi." 
Joshua8:14 Ai kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin amah le tua khuapi mi khempeuh, Israel-te a do dingin manlangin kithawi-in Arabah lam paisukna-ah zingtungin a kuankhia uh hi. Ahih hangin khuapi nungah amah a buksim a omlam thei lo hi." 
Joshua8:15 Tua ciangin amau’ mai-ah Joshua le Israel-te khempeuh kilelsak khem uh a, gamlak lamah a tai uh hi." 
Joshua8:16 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi sunga om mi khempeuhte amau a delh dingin kikaikhawm uh a, Joshua a delh uh ciangin amaute khuapi panin a kihemkhia ahi hi." 
Joshua8:17 Ai khuasung pan Israel-te a delh lo pasal khat beek om lo uh a, khuapi kong honsa-in nusia-in Israel-te a delh uh hi." 
Joshua8:18 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Na khutsunga om teipi Ai lamah zan in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah tua khua kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in a khutsunga om teipi khuapi lamah a zan hi." 
Joshua8:19 Tua ciangin a buksimte diangkhia pah uh a, amah in a khut a zan khit phetin amaute tai-in khuapi sungah lut uh a, a khuapi la-in manlangin a hal uh hi." 
Joshua8:20 Ai mite in a nung et kik uh ciangin, khuapi meikhu vanah a kahto a mu uh hi. A nung a mai koimahah tai thei lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak lamah tai-in a kilelsak khemte in amau a delhte’ lamah hong kihei-in lehdelh kik uh hi." 
Joshua8:21 A buksimte in khuapi a lak khitna le khuapi meikhu a kahtohna Joshua le Israel khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin amaute kihei kikin Ai mite vatgawp uh hi. 
Joshua8:22 Tua ciangin Ai khua mite a do dingin khuapi panin Israel dangte hong kuankhia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ kikalah amaute om uh a, pawlkhat hih lamah pawlkhat hua lamah om uh ahih manin a suakta khat zong a om lo dongin Israel-te in amaute a vatmai uh hi." 
Joshua8:23 Ahih hangin amaute in Ai kumpipa hingmatin Joshua kiangah a paipih uh hi. 
Joshua8:24 Amaute in a delhna gamlakah Ai khuami khempeuh thatin, amaute khempeuh a bei dongin namsau tawh a thah uh a man khit uh ciangin, Israel-te khempeuh Ai-ah paikikin Ai khuami a omlaite namsau tawh a vatgawp uh hi." 
Joshua8:25 Tua ni-in a si, Ai mi khempeuh numei le pasal a vekpi-in tul sawm le tulnih ahi hi." 
Joshua8:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ai khuami khempeuh a suksiatmang khit matengin amah in a teipi a zanna a khut dokkik lo hi. 
Joshua8:27 Amah in Joshua a thupiak, Topa’ thugenna bangin Israel-te in ganhing le khuapi sunga van kinusiate bek a la uh hi." 
Joshua8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Ai hal a, tuni donga a om mah bangin nin khol napi khatin piangsak den hi." 
Joshua8:29 Tua ciangin amah in nitak mateng sing khat tungah Ai kumpipa a khai hi. Ni a tum ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin a luang la sukin, khuapi kulhkongpi lutna-ah paai uh a, a tungah suangtum lompi ciang uh a, tuni dongin tua suangcian omlai hi." 
Joshua8:30 Tua ciangin Joshua in, Moses Thukham Laibu sungah, “A kiseek lo suangte tawh a kibawl biakna tau, kuamah in a tungah siknazat a lik loh,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin, Topa’ nasem Moses in Israel mite a thupiakna bangin, Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian a dingin Ebal Mual tungah biakna tau khat a bawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua tungah Topa a dingin meihal biaknate pia-in, thunuama biaknate a go uh hi." 
Joshua8:31  
Joshua8:32 Tua lai mun, Israel mite’ omna-ah, Moses in a gelhsa a thukhamte tua suangte tungah a gelh hi." 
Joshua8:33 Tua ciangin Israel mite in thupha a ngah theih nadingun Topa’ nasem Moses in a thupiaksa bangin Israel mite khempeuh peemta hitaleh tualsuak hitaleh, a upate le a uliante le a thukhente uh tawh, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi siampite’ mai, Thuciamna Singkuang langkhat, Gerizim Mual mai lamah mi alang, Ebal Mual mai lamah mi alang a ding uh hi." 
Joshua8:34 Tua khit ciangin amah in thukham laibu sunga a kigelh bangbangin thukham kammal khempeuh, thupha le samsiatnate a sim hi." 
Joshua8:35 Moses in a thupiak kammalte khempeuh Israel mihonpite, numeite, le amaute lakah a teng peemtate mai-ah Joshua in a simloh khatzong om lo hi." 
Joshua9:1 Jordan galkhat a om mualtung gam le lei niamna gam Lebanon lam Tuipi Lian dung khempeuhah a om kumpite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin" 
Joshua9:2 Joshua le Israel mite a do dingin lungsim kikhatin kikhawm uh hi. 
Joshua9:3 Ahih hangin Gibeon khua-a teng mite in Jerikho le Ai tungah Joshua’ hihnasa thu a zak uh ciangin 
Joshua9:4 amaute in khembawl ding vaihawm uh a, lam-an bawlin, a late uh tungah a paatsa ip le a paatsa leenggahzu um, a kikeek leh a kiphopte suanin," 
Joshua9:5 a khe uhah a paatsa, a kiphop khedapte bulhin, a paatsa puante tawh a pai uh hi. A ante khempeuh uh zong keu-in ap hi." 
Joshua9:6 Amaute Gilgal-a giahphual a Joshua kiangah hong pai-in amah le Israel mite tungah, “A gamlapi panin kong pai uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna khat hong bawl un,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:7 Ahih hangin Israel mite in tua Hiv mite kiangah, “Kote’ mai-ah a teng mite na hi khathei ding uh hi. Tua hileh note tawh thuciamna hong bangci bawltheih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:8 Amaute in Joshua kiangah, “Kote, nangma nasem ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Kuate na hi uh hiam? Koi lai panin hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua9:9 Amaute in, “ Topa na Pasian uh min hangin a gamla mahmah gam panin na nasemte kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu, le Egypt gam sungah a hihte khempeuh," 
Joshua9:10 le Jordan galkhatah a om Amor kumpi nihte ahi, Ashtaroth ah a teng Heshbon kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og tungah a hihte khempeuh a kigenna ka za khin uh hi." 
Joshua9:11 Ka upate uh le ka gam sung uha a teng mite khempeuh in kote kiangah, ‘Na khualzin nading uh lam-an bawl unla, amaute a dawntuah dingin pai-in amaute kiangah, “Kote, na nasem ka hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna hong bawl un,” va ci un,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:12 Hih lai-ah ka anlum uh om hi. No kiangah a hong pai dingin kong dinkhiat ni uh, khualzin lam-an dingin ka inn panun ka guan laitakun lum lai hi. Ahih hangin tu-in en un, keu-in ap hi." 
Joshua9:13 Hih leenggahzu umte ka thun laitakun a thak ahi hi. Tu-in en un, puakgawp ta hi. Hih ka puante uh le ka khedapte uh khual gamlapi zinna-in paatgawpta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:14 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in amau’ an puakte sangkha uh a, Topa’ tung panin lamlahna dong lo uh hi." 
Joshua9:15 Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute tawh kilemna bawlin, amaute a hinsak nading thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin mihonte’ makaite amau’ tungah a kiciam uh hi." 
Joshua9:16 Amaute tawh thuciamna a bawl khit uh ni thum a cin ciangin, amaute pen a vengte ahihna le amaute’ nai-ah a tengte ahihna thu a za uh hi." 
Joshua9:17 Israel mite ding khia uh a, a ni thum ni-in amaute’ khuapite a ban uh hi. Amau’ khuapite pen Gibeon, Khefirah, Beeroth, le Kiriathjearim na hi hi." 
Joshua9:18 Ahih hangin, Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh mihonte’ makaite kiciamzo uh ahih manin Israel mite in amaute that lo uh hi. Tua ciangin makaite tungah mihon khempeuh phun uh hi." 
Joshua9:19 Ahih hangin makaite khempeuh in mihon khempeuh tungah, “ Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh amaute tungah i kiciamzo a, tu-in amaute i su thei kei ding hi." 
Joshua9:20 Amaute tungah i kiciam thuciamna hangin eite tungah hehna hong tung kha ding ahih manin hih bangin gamta-in amaute i hingsak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:21 Tua ciangin makaite in mihonte kiangah, “Amaute hingsak un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin makaite’ gen mah bangin mihon khempeuh a dingin amaute pen sing suite le tui tawite a suak uh hi." 
Joshua9:22 Joshua in amaute samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kote’ nai hih lai-ah a teng hinapi-in, ‘Note’ kiang panin gamla mahmah ung,’ cihna tawh kote hong khem na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua9:23 Tu-in note hong kisamsia a, note pawlkhat a tawntungin sila, ka Pasian uh inn-a dingin sing suite le tui tawite na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua9:24 Amaute in Joshua dawngin, “Gam khempeuh nang tungah a hong piak nading Topa na Pasian in a nasempa Moses a thupiakna le na mai panin gam sunga a teng mi khempeuh suksiat taktak nading thu na nasemte kiangah hong kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin note’ hangin nakpitakin ka lunghimawh uh a, hih bangin ka gamtakha uh hi." 
Joshua9:25 Tu-in, en in, nangma khut sungah kote ka om uh hi. Hoih na sak bang leh kote tungah bawl dingin nangma muhna-ah man na sak bangin hong bawl in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:26 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute tungah tua bangin bawl a, Israel mite’ khutsung panin amaute honkhia a, amaute thatsak lo hi." 
Joshua9:27 Ahih hangin Joshua in mihonte le Topa’ biakna tau-a dingin singtomte le tuitawite a suaksak hi. Topa in amah biak nadingin a teelna munah tuni dongin tua nasepte mah amaute in sem uh hi. 
Joshua10:1 Joshua in Ai a lakna zia, le Jerikho le a kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah a bawlna, le Gibeon khuasunga teng mite in Israel-te tawh kilemna a bawlna le amaute lakah a omna thu Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in a zak ciangin" 
Joshua10:2 nakpitakin a lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeon pen kumpi khuate khat mah bangin khua lian khat hi a, Ai khua sangin zong lianzaw-in a mite khempeuh zong mi thahat ahi hi." 
Joshua10:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham kiang, Jarmuth kumpipa Piram kiang, Lakhish kumpipa Jafia kiang, le Eglon kumpipa Debir kiangah kamtai sawlin," 
Joshua10:4 “Kei kiangah hong pai un. Hong huh unla, Gibeon vatgawp ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Joshua le Israel mite tawh kilemna na bawl khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:5 Tua ciangin Amor kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi, le Eglon kumpi, a galkapte khempeuh uh tawh paito-in Gibeon langkhatah phual satin a do uh hi." 
Joshua10:6 Tua ciangin Gibeon mite in Gilgal-a giahphual a Joshua kiangah kamtai sawlin, “Na nasemte hong nusia kei in. Manlang takin ko kiangah hong paito-in, kote hong hon inla, hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mualtung gam a teng Amor kumpite khempeuh kote langpangin kikhawm uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua10:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin amah le galhang mite khempeuh le a thahat mi khempeuh tawh Joshua a kuanto hi. 
Joshua10:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Amaute na khut sungah hong pia khin ka hih manin amaute kihta kei in. Amaute khat beek in nang hong nang zo lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin zan tawntung paito-in Joshua in thakhatthu-in amaute simgawp hi. 
Joshua10:10 Topa in Israel-te’ mai-ah amaute amkhamsakin, amaute in Gibeon-ah amaute tampi tak that uh a, Bethhoron paitohna lampi-ah amaute delhin, Azekah le Makkedah ciang dong amaute a vatgawp uh hi." 
Joshua10:11 Israel-te’ mai-ah amaute a tai laitak, Bethhoron paitohna-ah amaute a paisuk laitakun, Topa in vantung panin gialpi lianpite Azekah khua ciang dong, amaute’ tungah lawnsuk a, amaute a si uh hi. Israel mite in namsau tawh a thah sangin tua gialpi hangin a si mi tamzaw hi." 
Joshua10:12 Tua ciangin, Topa in Israel mite tungah Amor mite a piak ni-in Joshua in Topa tungah thu gen a, amah in Israel mite’ muhna-ah, “Ni aw, Gibeon-ah, Kha aw, Aijalon Kuam-ah khawlcip in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:13 Tua ciangin hih minamte in a galte uh a zawh khit mateng ni ding cipin kha a khawl hi. Hih thute, Jashar’ Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Vankim lai-ah ni khawlin ni khat bup bang tumsuk lo hi." 
Joshua10:14 Tua hun ma hitaleh tua hun khit hitaleh Topa in mi khat thu a ngaih tua ni bang nidang om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel mite a dingin a dosak hi. 
Joshua10:15 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a giahphual ah a ciahkik hi." 
Joshua10:16 Hih kumpi ngate tai-in Makkedah leihawm sungah bu uh hi. 
Joshua10:17 Tua ciangin Joshua kiangah, “Kumpi ngate Makkedah leihawm sungah a bu kimu khin hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
Joshua10:18 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Suangtum lianpite a leihawm gong liknelh unla, a cing dingin a gei-ah mi koih un." 
Joshua10:19 Ahih hangin note tua lai-ah om kei un. Na galte uh delhin a nungdalte bawh unla, a khuapi sung uhah amaute lutsak kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note’ khut sungah amaute hong piazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:20 Joshua le Israel mite in amaute a beisiang dongin tampi tak a thah khit uh ciang, le a suakta lai mite amau’ khuapi muanhuai sungah a tum khit uh ciangin," 
Joshua10:21 Makkedah giahphual Joshua kiangah mi khempeuh cidamin a ciahkik uh hi. Israel mite khatpeuh a paupih ngam kuamah om lo hi. 
Joshua10:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Leihawm gong hong unla, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate kei kiangah hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:23 Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh a, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi, le Eglon kumpite, ama kiangah a paipih uh hi." 
Joshua10:24 Amaute in Joshua kiangah tua kumpi ngate a paikhiatpih uh ciangin, Joshua in Israel mi khempeuh samin, amah tawh a kuankhawm galkapmangte kiangah, “A nai-ah hong pai unla, hih kumpite’ ngawngah na khe uh nga un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute a nai-ah hong pai-in, a khe uh amaute’ ngawng tungah a nga uh hi." 
Joshua10:25 Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei unla, lungkia kei un. Thakhauh unla, hang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ do na gal khempeuhte uh tungah Topa in hih bangin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:26 Tua khit ciangin Joshua in amaute satin sisak a, singkung nga tungah amaute a khai hi. Amaute in nitak dong sing tungah a khai uh hi." 
Joshua10:27 Ahih hangin ni a tum hun ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin lakhia sukin, amaute a buknasa leihawm sungah lawnsuk uh a, suangtum lianpite leihawm gongah a koih uh hi. Tu dongin tua suangtumte omlai hi." 
Joshua10:28 Tua ni-in Joshua in Makkedah khua la a, namsau tawh tua khua le a kumpipa vatgawp hi. A sunga om mi khempeuh susia mangin, bangmah siit lo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Makkedah kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:29 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Makkedah panin Libnah-ah paisuak uh a, Libnah khua a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:30 Topa in tua khua le a kumpipa zong Israel mite’ khut sungah a pia hi. Amah in namsau tawh tua khua le a sunga om mi khempeuh a vatgawp hi. Tua khua sungah bangmah siit lo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:31 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Libnah panin Lakhish-ah paisuak uh a, tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:32 Topa in Israel mite’ khut sungah Lakhish pia a, amah in a ni nih ni-in la-in, Libnah a bawl bangin tua khua le a sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh a vatgawp hi." 
Joshua10:33 Tua ciangin Lakhish a huh dingin Gezer kumpipa Horam hong kuanto hi. Ahi zongin khat zong a om nawn lo dongin Joshua in amah le a mite a vatgawp hi. 
Joshua10:34 Tua ciangin Lakhish panin Eglon-ah, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Joshua paisuakin tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:35 Tua ni mahin tua khua la uh a, namsau tawh a vatgawp uh hi. Lakhish a hih mah bangin tua khua sunga om mi khempeuh tua ni-in amah in a susiamang hi." 
Joshua10:36 Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Eglon panin Hebron-ah a paito hi. Amaute in tua khua simin," 
Joshua10:37 la-in, namsau tawh tua khua le a kumpi le a kiima om khempeuh a vatgawp hi. Eglon tungah a bawl bangin amah in kuamah siit lo a, tua khua le a sunga om khempeuh a susiamang hi." 
Joshua10:38 Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Debir lamah kihei kikin tua khua a sim hi." 
Joshua10:39 Amah in a kumpipa le a kiimnai-a khuapite khempeuh tawh tua Debir khua a la hi. Amaute in namsau tawh vatgawp uh a, a sunga om mi khempeuh a susiamang uh hi. Amah in kuamah siit lo a, Hebron le Libnah le a kumpipa tungah a bawlsa bangin Debir le a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:40 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mualtung gam le Negeb gam le lei niamna mun le mualpang suk, le a khuapite khempeuh a zo hi. Amah in kuamah siit lo a, Israel-te’ Topa Pasian’ thupiaksa bangin mi khempeuh a susiamang hi." 
Joshua10:41 Joshua in amaute Kadeshbarnea panin Gaza ciang dong, le Goshen gam khempeuh Gibeon ciang dong a zogawp hi." 
Joshua10:42 Israel-te’ Topa Pasian in Israel-te a dingin dosak ahih manin Joshua in hih kumpite khempeuh le amau’ leitang hun khat sungin a la khin hi. 
Joshua10:43 Tua ciangin amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a a giahphual ah Joshua a ciahkik hi. 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-te’ gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab le Shimron kumpipa, Akshaf kumpipa," 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-te’ gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab le Shimron kumpipa, Akshaf kumpipa," 
Joshua11:2 saklam mualtung le Khinneroth leitaw lama om Arabah gam sung, le Jordan gunkuam le nitumna lamah Nafathdor gam sunga om kumpite," 
Joshua11:3 nisuahna le nitumna lama om Kanaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, le mualtung gam a om Jebus mite, le Mizpah gam Hermon nuai-a Hiv mite tungah thu a puak hi." 
Joshua11:4 Tua ciangin amaute tampi a pha a galkap honpite tawh, a tam mahmah sakolte le leengte tawh, tuipi gei-a om sehnel bangin tampi tak hong kuankhia uh hi." 
Joshua11:5 Hih kumpite khempeuh in amau’ galkapte gawmin Israel mite tawh a kido dingin hong pai-in Merom lui-ah giahphual a sat khawm uh hi. 
Joshua11:6 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Zing ciang tubang hunin amaute khempeuh a kithatsa-in Israel mite tungah pia ding ka hih manin amaute kihta kei un. A sakolte uh a zagui na sattat ding uh a, a leengte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua11:7 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua zong a galkapte khempeuh tawh thakhat thu-in Merom lui gei amaute kiangah pai-in va sim uh hi. 
Joshua11:8 Topa in Israel-te’ khut sungah amaute pia a, amaute in vatgawpin a Lian Sidon le Misrefothmaim ciang dong, le nisuahna lamah Mizpeh kuam ciang dong delh uh a, amaute kuamah a om nawn lo dongin a vatgawp uh hi." 
Joshua11:9 Topa’ sawl bangin Joshua in amaute hih a, amau’ sakolte uh a zagui sattat sakin mei tawh a leengte uh a halsak hi." 
Joshua11:10 Tua hun laitakin Joshua kihei kikin Hazor la a, namsau tawh a kumpipa a that hi. (Tua hun laitakin Hazor khua pen tua kumpipa gam khempeuh sungah a thahat pen ahi hi.)" 
Joshua11:11 Amaute in tua sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh that khinmang uh hi. Khat zong hingkhawi lo uh a, a khuapi uh zong a haltum uh hi." 
Joshua11:12 Topa’ nasem Moses in a thupiaksa bangin Joshua in tua kumpite’ khuapite, le a kumpi khempeuh la-in namsau tawh amaute vatin thatmang khin hi." 
Joshua11:13 Ahih hangin Hazor khua longal mualtung a om khuapite khat zong Israel mite in hal lo uh a, Joshua in tua khua bek a hal hi." 
Joshua11:14 Israel mite in tua khuapite sunga van kinusiate le ganhingte amau’ galzawh van dingin a la uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute a thah khit matengun namsau tawh vatgawp uh a, khat beek hingkhawi lo uh hi." 
Joshua11:15 Topa in ama nasem Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in zong Joshua thu pia a, Joshua zong tua bangmahin gamta a, Topa in Moses a thupiaknate khempeuh a hihloh om lo hi." 
Joshua11:16 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mualtung gam le Negeb gam le Goshen gam khempeuh le lei niamna gam le Arabah le Israel-te’ mualtung gam le a lei niamna gamte," 
Joshua11:17 Seir lamah a kikhungto Halak Mual panin Hermon Mual nuai Lebanon kuama om Baalgad ciang dong a la hi. Amah in amau’ kumpite khempeuh la-in amaute vatgawpin a that hi. 
Joshua11:18 Hih kumpite khempeuh le Joshua sauveipi sung a kido hi. 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khua-a teng Hiv mite longal, Israel mite tawh kilemna a bawl khuapi khat zong om lo hi. Amaute in tua khua dangte khempeuh simin a lak uh ahi hi." 
Joshua11:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin amaute a kisuksiat mang nading le hehpihna ngah loin a kibeisak theih nadingin Israel-te a do nadingin a lungsim uh a khauhsak pa pen Topa ahi hi. 
Joshua11:21 Tua hun laitakin Joshua hong pai-in mualtung gam, Hebron, Debir, Anab, le Judah mualtung gam khempeuh, le Israel mualtung gam khempeuh panin Anak mite notkhiasiang a, Joshua in a khuapite uh tawh amaute susiamang khawm hi." 
Joshua11:22 Israel mite’ leitangah Anak mite khat zong om nawn lo a, Gaza, Gath, le Ashdod sung bekah pawlkhat omlai hi." 
Joshua11:23 Topa in Moses tungah a gensa bangin Joshua in leitang khempeuh a la hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amau minam tawh kizui-in a ngah ding bangin Israel mite tungah gamh-in a pia hi. Tua hun a kipan galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi. 
Joshua12:1 Tu-in nisuahna lam Jordan galkhat, Arnon kuam panin Arabah khempeuh, Hermon Mual ciang dong Israel mite in a leitang uh laksakin a zawh kumpi nihte:" 
Joshua12:2 Heshbon-ah a teng Amor kumpi, Arnon kuam gei-a om Aroer pan, le Gilead kuam laizang panin phellang ahi Ammon mite’ gamgi Jabbok gun ciang dong, le Arabah panin nisuahna lamah Khinneroth Tuipi, le Bethjeshimoth lamah Pisgah mualpang bul leitaw lama om Ci Tuipi ahi Arabah tuipi ciang dong a uk Sihon;" 
Joshua12:3  
Joshua12:4 le Bashan kumpi, Refaim panin a suaktate lakah khat, Ashtaroth le Edrei-ah tengin, Hermon Mual le Salekah le Bashan gam khempeuh, Geshur mite le Maakath mite gamgi ciang, le Gilead langkhat panin Heshbon kumpipa Sihon’ gamgi ciang dong a uk Og ahi hi." 
Joshua12:5  
Joshua12:6 Topa’ nasem Moses le Israel mite in amau tegel a zo uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ nasem Moses in Reuben mite le Gad mite le Manasseh minam alangte tungah a neih dingun amau’ leitang a pia hi. 
Joshua12:7 Hihte pen, Joshua le Israel mite in a zawh Jordan nitumna lampang, Lebanon kuam sung Baalgad panin Seir lamah a kikhungto Halak Mual kikal-a om kumpite ahi hi. (Joshua in mualtung gam, lei niamna gam, Arabah gam, mualpang suk, sehnel gam, le Negeb gam sunga om Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite’ leitangte Israel minamte’ tungah amau’ ngah ding tawh kizui-in a neih dingun a pia hi.)" 
Joshua12:8  
Joshua12:9 A zawh uh kumpite: Jerikho kumpi, khat; Bethel gei-a om Ai kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem kumpi, khat; Hebron kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth kumpi, khat; Lakhish kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:12 Eglon kumpi, khat; Gezer kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:13 Debir kumpi, khat; Geder kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:14 Hormah kumpi, khat; Arad kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:15 Libnah kumpi, khat; Adullam kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:16 Makkedah kumpi, khat; Bethel kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:17 Tappuah kumpi, khat; Hefer kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:18 Afek kumpi, khat; Lasharon kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:19 Madon kumpi, khat; Hazor kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:20 Shimronmeron kumpi, khat; Akshaf kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:21 Taanak kumpi, khat; Megiddo kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:22 Kadesh kumpi, khat; Karmel gam sunga Jokneam kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:23 Nafathdor sunga Dor kumpi, khat; Galilee sunga Goiim kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:24 Tirzah kumpi, khat; a vekpi-in kumpi sawmthum le khat ahi hi." 
Joshua13:1 Tu-in Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha hi. Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang teekin na kum tampi pha a, ahi zongin leitang lak ding tampi tak omlai hi." 
Joshua13:2 A omlai leitang: Filistia gam sung khempeuh, le Geshur gam khempeuh" 
Joshua13:3 (Kanaan mite’ gam ci-a a kiciamteh, leilu lam Ekron gamgi lam, Egypt nisuahna lama om Shihor pan Filistia gam Gaza, Ashdod, Ashkelon, Gath, le Ekron gamte a uk mi nga om hi), le Avvim gam," 
Joshua13:4 leitaw lamah, Kanaan mite leitang khempeuh, le Sidon mite gam ahi Mearah gam Amor mite gamgi ahi Afek ciang," 
Joshua13:5 le Gebal mite’ leitang, le Lebanon gam khempeuh, nisuahna lamah, Hermon Mual nuai-a Baalgad panin Hamath tumna ciang," 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon le Misrefothmaim kikalah a teng Sidon mite khempeuh ahi hi. Kei mahmah in Israel mite’ mai panin amaute ka hawlkhia ding a, nang kong thupiaksa bangin Israel mite tungah a luah dingun leitang hawm in." 
Joshua13:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in minam kua le Manasseh minam alangte tungah luah dingin hih leitang hawm in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua13:8 Reuben mite le Gad mite in Manasseh minam alang dang khatte tawh Topa’ nasem Moses in amaute a piaksa ahih manin nisuahna lam Jordan galkhatah gamh ngah khin uh hi. 
Joshua13:9 Arnon kuam mong a om Aroer pan, le kuam laizang a om khuapi, le Dibon ciang dong Medeba mualzang khempeuh;" 
Joshua13:10 le Ammon mite’ gamgi ciang dong Heshbon-ah a uk Amor kumpi Sihon’ khuapi khempeuh; 
Joshua13:11 Gilead, le Geshur mite le Maakath mite’ gam, le Hermon Mual khempeuh, le Salekah dong Bashan gam khempeuh;" 
Joshua13:12 Ashtaroth le Edrei-ah a uk Bashan gam sunga Og kumpi gam khempeuh (Refaim-a a suak tate lakah amah bek om hi); Moses in hihte zo-in a hawlkhia hi. 
Joshua13:13 Ahi zongin Israel mite in Geshur mite ahi a, Maakath mite ahi zongin hawlkhia lo uh a, tuni dongin Geshur mite le Maakath mite Israel-te lakah a teng uh hi." 
Joshua13:14 Levi minamte tung bekah Moses in gamh pia lo hi. Topa in Moses kiangah a gensa mah bangin Israel-te’ Topa Pasian’ tungah a kipia mei tawh kihal biaknate pen amau’ gamh ahi hi. 
Joshua13:15 Tua ciangin Moses in Reuben minamte tungah amau’ beh tawh kizui-in gamh pia hi. 
Joshua13:16 Tua ahih ciangin amau’ gamh pen Arnon kuam gei-a a om Aroer pan, le kuam laizang a om khuapi, le Medeba kianga mualzang khempeuh," 
Joshua13:17 Heshbon tawh, le mualzang tunga om a khuapite khempeuh; Dibon, Bamothbaal, Bethbaalmeon," 
Joshua13:18 Jahaz, Kedemoth, Mefaath," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim, Sibmah, le tua kuam mualtung a om Zereth-shahar," 
Joshua13:20 Bethpeor, Pisgah pang suk, le Bethjeshimoth hi a," 
Joshua13:21 mualzang khuapite khempeuh, le Heshbon-ah a uk, Moses in Midian makaite Evi, Reke, Zur, Hur, le Reba, tua gam a teng Sihon’ uliante tawh a zawh khop ahi Amor kumpi gam khempeuh a huam ahi hi." 
Joshua13:22 Beor’ tapa, aisan pa Balaam zong, Israel mite in adang a thahte lakah namsau tawh thatkhawm uh hi." 
Joshua13:23 Reuben mite’ gampi pen Jordan ahi hi. Hihte pen amau’ beh tawh kizui-in a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh Reuben mite’ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua13:24 Tua ciangin Moses in Gad minamte tungah zong amau’ beh tawh kizui-in gamh pia hi. 
Joshua13:25 Amau’ gam pen Jazer, le Gilead khuapite khempeuh, le Rabbah nisuahna lamah a om Aroer ciang dong Ammon mite’ leitang kimkhat," 
Joshua13:26 le Heshbon panin Ramathmizpeh le Betonim ciang, le Mahanaim panin Debir gam ciang dong," 
Joshua13:27 le Bethharam kuam sungah Bethnimrah, Sukkoth, le Zafon, Jordan galkhat nisuahna lam, Khinnereth Tuipi a niamna lam mong ciang, Jordan gamgi-in a nei, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon’ kumpi gam a omlai teng ahi hi." 
Joshua13:28 Hihte pen amau’ beh tawh kizui-in a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh Gad mite’ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua13:29 Tua ciangin Moses in Manasseh minam alangte tungah amau’ beh tawh kizui-in gamh a pia hi. 
Joshua13:30 Amau’ gam pen Mahanaim pan kipanin Bashan gam sung khempeuh, Bashan kumpipa Og’ kumpi gam sung khempeuh, le Bashan gam sunga om Jair khuapi sawmgukte," 
Joshua13:31 le Gilead alang, Ashtaroth, le Edrei, Bashan gam a Og’ kumpi gam khempeuh ahi hi. Hihte amau’ innkuan tawh kizui-in Makhir mi alangte a dingin Manasseh’ tapa Makhir mite tungah kipia hi." 
Joshua13:32 Hihte pen Jerikho nisuahna lam Jordan galkhat, Moab zanglei-ah Moses in a hawm gamhte ahi hi." 
Joshua13:33 Ahih hangin Levi minamte tungah Moses in gamh pia lo hi. Israel-te’ Topa Pasian in amaute kiangah a gensa mah bangin amah pen amau’ gamh ahi hi. 
Joshua14:1 Hihte pen, siampi Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua, le Israel minam sung pan beh lutangte in amaute tungah a piak, Kanaan gam sungah Israel mite’ ngah gamhte ahi hi." 
Joshua14:2 Minam kua le alangte a dingin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amau’ gamhte aisanna tawh kipia hi. 
Joshua14:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Jordan galkhatah minam nih le alangte tungah gamh pia khinzo hi. Ahih hangin amaute lakah Levi mite tungah bangmah pia lo hi. 
Joshua14:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Josef mite minam nihin kikhen a, Manasseh le Efraim minamte ahi uh hi. Tua gam sungah Levi-te tungah tanh kipia lo a, ahih hangin amau’ ten nading khuapite le a ganhingte uh a dingin lonona gamte kipia bek hi." 
Joshua14:5 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, amaute in leitang a hawm uh hi." 
Joshua14:6 Tua ciangin Judah minamte Gilgal-a Joshua kiangah pai uh a, amaute sung panin Kenaz mi Jefunneh tapa Kaleb in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Kadeshbarnea-ah Pasian mi Moses tungah nang le kei’ thu tawh kisai a gente na thei hi." 
Joshua14:7 A gam sung thukansim dingin Topa’ nasem Moses in Kadeshbarnea panin kei hong sawl lai-in kum sawmli ka pha a, ka lungsim a om bangin ama kiangah thu ka tunkik hi." 
Joshua14:8 Ahih hangin kei tawh hong paito khawm ka sanggamte in mite lungkiasak uh a, ahi zongin keimah in lungsim tak tawh Topa ka Pasian ka zui hi." 
Joshua14:9 Tua ni-in Moses kiciamin, ‘Nangmah in Topa ka Pasian, lungsim tak tawh zui na hih manin na khe in a totsa leitang pen nang le na tate a dingin gamh hi tawntung ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Joshua14:10 Tu-in, a cihsa bangin Topa in, Israel mite sehnel gamah a pai sung, Topa in hih thu Moses tungah a gen a kipan hih kum sawmli le nga sung kei hong nungtasak a, tu-in kei kum sawmgiat le nga ka pha hi." 
Joshua14:11 Moses in hong sawl hun lai mah bangin tuni-in kei ka tha hat lai a, galdo nading, le kuankhiatna le ciahkik nadingin ka thatang pen tua hun lai-a ka thatang mah bang lai hi." 
Joshua14:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in tua ni-a Topa’ gen hih mualtung gam kei hong pia in. Anak mite a muanhuai mahmah khuapi sungah a omna thu tua hun lai-in kong gen uh hi. Topa in kei hong ompih ding a, Topa’ cih mah bangin amaute ka hawlkhiazo kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua14:13 Tua ciangin Joshua in amah thupha pia a, Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb tungah gamh-in Hebron a pia hi." 
Joshua14:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian, lungsimtak tawh zui ahih manin tuni dongin Hebron pen Kenaz mi Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb’ gamh a suak hi." 
Joshua14:15 Hih Hebron min a nidangin Kiriatharba kici hi; Arba pen Anak mite lakah mi lianpen khat ahi hi. Tua ciangin galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi. 
Joshua15:1 Amau’ beh tawh kizui-in Judah mite’ ngah pen leitaw lamah Edom gamgi ciang hi a, leitaw lam a gamla penna munah Zin gam ciang ban hi." 
Joshua15:2 Leitaw lam a gamgi pen Ci Tuipi mong, leitaw lam a sun tuidawk pan kipan hi." 
Joshua15:3 Leitaw lam Akrabbim kahtohna-ah paikhia-in, Zin dong ban a, Kadeshbarnea leitaw lamah Hezron dung tawnin Addar ciang dong paito-in Karka lamah kihei a," 
Joshua15:4 Azmon ciang dong pai-in Egypt lui-ah suakkhia a, tuipi-ah a mong bei hi. Hih pen amau’ leitaw lam gamgi hi ding hi." 
Joshua15:5 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam gamgi pen Jordan tunna ciang dong Ci Tuipi ahi hi. Leilu lampang gamgi pen Jordan tunna tuipi dawk panin kipan hi. 
Joshua15:6 Bethhoglah lamah a gamgi paito a, Betharabah leilu lampangah paisuak hi. Tua ciangin Reuben tapa Bohan’ Suangpi dongah a gamgi paito-in," 
Joshua15:7 Akhor Kuam panin Debir-ah paito a, leilu lam manawhin, tua kuam leitaw lampangah a om, Adummim kahtohna galkhatah a om Gilgal lamah kihei hi. Tua ciangin Enshemesh luidung ah gamgi pai-in Enrogel-ah tawp hi." 
Joshua15:8 Tua ciangin Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) liangko leitaw lam Hinnom’ tapa’ kuamah gamgi paito-in, Refaim kuam leilu lam mong, nitumna lam Hinnom Kuam galkhatah a kikhung mual dawnah gamgi paito hi." 
Joshua15:9 Tua ciangin mual dawn panin Neftoah lui-ah gamgi kikhung a, tua panin Efron Mual khuapite-ah pai a, tua ciangin Baalah (Kiriathjearim a cihna) lamah gamgi kawi kual hi." 
Joshua15:10 Tua ciangin Baalah nitumna lam Seir Mual-ah gamgi kual a, tua panin paisuakin Jearim Mual (Khesalon a cihna) liangko leilu lamah pai-in, Bethshemesh-ah paisuk a, Timnah kiangah paisuak hi." 
Joshua15:11 Ekron leilu lam mual liangko-ah a gamgi paikhia a, tua ciangin Shikkeron-ah gamgi kawi kualin, Baalah Mual-ah paisuak a, Jabneel-ah lengkhia-in tuipi-ah a gamgi tawp hi." 
Joshua15:12 Tua ciangin nitumna gamgi pen Tuipi Lian dungteng ahi hi. Hih pen amau’ beh tawh kizui-in Judah mite’ kiimah a gamgi ahi hi. 
Joshua15:13 Topa in Joshua tungah a thupiak bangin Jefunneh tapa Kaleb tungah amah in Judah mite lakah tanh khat Kiriatharba, Hebron a cihna, (Arba pen Anak’ pa hi) pia hi." 
Joshua15:14 Tua lai panin Kaleb in Anak’ tapa thumte Sheshai, Ahiman, le Talmai, Anak’ suanlekhakte a hawlkhia hi." 
Joshua15:15 Tua lai panin Debir sunga a teng mite a sim dingin amah kuanto hi. Debir pen a nidangin Kiriathsefer kici hi. 
Joshua15:16 Kaleb in, “Kiriathsefer vatgawpin a lazo mi tungah ka tanu Aksah a zi dingin ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua15:17 Tua ciangin Kaleb’ sanggampa Kenaz’ tapa Othniel inla a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia hi." 
Joshua15:18 Tua nu ama kiangah a pai ding ciangin ama pa’ tung panin lo khat a nget ding hah gen hi. A la tung panin tua nu a kum ciangin Kaleb in tua nu kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua15:19 Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb gamah kei hong koih na hih buangin cik tuikhukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in tua nu tungah ciktui tungnungte le ciktui nuainungte a pia hi." 
Joshua15:20 Hihte pen amau’ beh tawh kizui-in Judah minamte’ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua15:21 Leitaw lam mongciik, Edom gamgi lamah Judah minamte’ neih khuapite: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah," 
Joshua15:23 Kadesh, Hazor, Ithnan," 
Joshua15:24 Zif, Telem, Bealoth," 
Joshua15:25 Hazorhadattah, Keriothhezron (Hazor a cihna)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema, Moladah," 
Joshua15:27 Hazargaddah, Heshmon, Bethpelet," 
Joshua15:28 Hazarshual, Beersheba, Biziothiah," 
Joshua15:29 Baalah, Iim, Ezem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Khesil, Hormah," 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain, le Rimmon: a vekpi-in khuapi sawmnih le kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:33 Tua ciangin lei niamna lamah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoah, Engannim, Tappuah, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah, le Gederothaim: khuapi sawm le li, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:37 Tua banah Zenan, Hadashah, Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mizpeh, Joktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakhish, Bozkath, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabbon, Lahmam, Khitlish," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoth, Bethdagon, Naamah, le Makkedah: khuapi sawm le guk, a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi." 
Joshua15:42 Tua ciangin Libnah, Ether, Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 Iftah, Ashnah, Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 Keilah, Akzib, le Mareshah: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. 
Joshua15:46 Ekron panin tuipi dong, Ashdod lampang a omte khempeuh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod, a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Gaza, a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Egypt lui le tuipi lian a gei ciang dong tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:48 Tua ciangin mualtung gamah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh," 
Joshua15:49 Dannah, Kiriathsannah (Debir a cihna)," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Goshen, Holon, le Giloh: khuapi sawm le khat, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Dumah, Eshan," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Bethtappuah, Afekah," 
Joshua15:54 Humtah, Kiriatharba (Hebron a cihna), le Zior: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Zif, Juttah," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibeah, le Timnah: khuapi sawm, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:58 Halhul, Bethzur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarath, Bethanoth, le Eltekon: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriathbaal (Kiriathjearim a cihna), le Rabbah: khuapi nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:61 Sehnel gamah Betharabah, Middin, Sekakah," 
Joshua15:62 Nibshan, Ci Khuapi, le Engedi: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:63 Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jerusalem-a a teng Jebus mite hawlkhia zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Jebus mite pen Judah mite tawh Jerusalem-ah a tengkhawm uh hi. 
Joshua16:1 Josef’ suanlekhakte’ tanh gamgi pen Jerikho luite’ nisuahna lam, Jerikho kiang Jordan panin sehnel gamah pai a, Jerikho panin mualtung gamte tawnin Bethel-ah paito hi." 
Joshua16:2 Tua ciangin Bethel panin Luz-ah pai-in, Arkhi mite gam Ataroth nawk hi." 
Joshua16:3 Tua ciangin nitumna lam Jaflet mite’ gam lam Bethhoron a niam lam gam ciang dongah paisuk hi. Tua ciangin Gezer-ah pai-in tuipi-ah tawp hi. 
Joshua16:4 Josef’ suan Manasseh, le Efraim mite in amau’ gamhluah dingin hih gamte ngah uh hi." 
Joshua16:5 Amau’ behbehin Efraim mite’ gam pen a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Nisuahna lamah amau’ gamgi pen Atarothaddar pan Bethhoron tungnung ciang ahi hi. 
Joshua16:6 Tua panin tuipi ciangah a gamgi pai a, leilu lamah Mikmethath ahi hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam a gamgi Taanathshiloh lamah kual pai-in, nisuahna lam galah pai-in Janoah a tung hi." 
Joshua16:7 Janoah panin Ataroth le Naarah ah paisuk a, Jerikho banin Jordan-ah tawp hi." 
Joshua16:8 Tappuah panin nitumna lam Kanah lui-ah gamgi pai-in tuipi-ah tawp hi. Hih pen amau’ behbehin Efraim minamte’ gamhluah hi a," 
Joshua16:9 Manasseh mite’ gamhluah sung panin Efraim mite a dingin a kikhenkhia khuapite, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua16:10 Ahi zongin amaute in Gezer sunga teng Kanaan mite hawlkhia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Kanaan mite pen Efraim mite lakah teng a, ahih hangin aana nasep a sem dingin sal a suak uh hi." 
Joshua17:1 Tua ciangin Josef’ tacil ahih manin Manasseh minam tungah tanh kipia hi. Manasseh minam sung panin tacil, Gilead’ pa Makhir tungah Gilead gam le Bashan gam kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah galhang mi ahi hi." 
Joshua17:2 Tua ciangin Manasseh minam a omlaite Abiezer, Halek, Asriel, Shekhem, Hefer, le Shemida-te tungah a behbehin piakna kinei hi. Hihte pen Josef’ tapa Manasseh’ ta pasal suanlekhakte a behbeh ahi hi." 
Joshua17:3 Ahih hangin Manasseh’ tapa Makhir, a tapa Hefer, a tapa Zelofehad in tapa nei loin tanu bek nei a, a tanute’ min in: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah, le Tirzah ahi hi." 
Joshua17:4 Amaute, siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le makaite mai-ah pai uh a, “Ka sanggamte uh tawh gamh hong piak nadingin Topa in Moses thu pia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ thupiakna bangin amau pate’ sanggamte tawh amah in gamh a pia khawm hi." 
Joshua17:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan galkhatah Gilead le Bashan-te simloh Manasseh tungah tanh sawm kia hi. 
Joshua17:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Manasseh’ tanute in a tapate tawh gamh ngahkhawm uh hi. A omlai Manasseh mite tungah Gilead leitang kipia hi. 
Joshua17:7 Manasseh-te’ gam in Asher panin Shekhem nisuahna lamah a om Mikmethath dong ban a, tua ciangin Entappuah mite’ leitaw lamah a gamgi pai hi." 
Joshua17:8 Tappuah leitang pen Manasseh a’ ahi hi. Ahih hangin Manasseh gamgi a om Tappuah khuapi pen Efraim tapate a’ ahi hi. 
Joshua17:9 Tua ciangin Kanah lui-ah a gamgi paisuk hi. Manasseh khuapite lak panin lui leitaw lama om hih lai-a khuapite pen Efraim a’ ahi hi. Tua ciangin lui leilu lampangah Manasseh gamgi paisuakin tuipi-ah tawp hi. 
Joshua17:10 Tua gam leitaw lamteng Efraim a’ hi-in, a leilu lamteng Manasseh a’ hi a, tuipi pen a gamgi hi a, leilu lamah Asher banin nisuahna lamah Issakhar a ban hi." 
Joshua17:11 Issakhar le Asher gam sungah zong Manasseh in gam ngah a, tuate pen Bethshean le a khuaneute, Ibleam le a khuaneute, Dor-a tengte le a khuaneute, Endor a tengte le a khuaneute, Taanak a tengte le a khuaneute, le Megiddo a tengte le a khuaneute hi a, a thumna pen Nafath ahi hi." 
Joshua17:12 Ahi zongin Manasseh’ tapate in hih khuapite luah zo lo uh ahih manin tua gamah Kanaan mite teng teitei uh hi. 
Joshua17:13 Ahih hangin Israel mite tampi pha-in a hat uh ciangin amaute in Kanaan mite nasemin koih uh a, hawlkhiamang khin lo uh hi." 
Joshua17:14 Tua ciangin Josef minam in Joshua kiangah thu genin, “ Topa in kote thu hong pia khin a, kote mi tampi hi napi-in bang hangin ngah khat le tanh khat bek gamh-in hong pia na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua17:15 Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Note mi tampi pha a, Efraim mualtung gam pen note a dingin neulua ahih ciangin Perez le Refaim gam tulakah pai unla, nomau a dingin gam sattawm un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua17:16 Josef minam in, “Kote a dingin mualtung gam kicing zo lo hi. Ahi zongin zang gam a teng Kanaan mite khempeuh, Bethshean le a khuaneute, Jezreel Kuam sunga om mite pen sik leeng neite hi zel uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua17:17 Tua ciangin Joshua in Josef’ suan Efraim le Manasseh mite tungah, “Note mi tampi pha-in vanglian na hih manun tanh khat kia na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua17:18 Mualtung gam pen note a’ hi ding a, tulak ahih hangin note in hah siangin a gamgi mong dong na luah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sik leeng nei-in, amaute a thahat hangin Kanaan mite na hawlkhiazo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:1 Tua ciangin Israel mihon buppi Shiloh-ah kikhawmin tua lai-ah kikhopna buk lam uh a, amaute’ mai-ah gam zawhsa-in om hi." 
Joshua18:2 Israel mite lakah gamh a kipia nai lo minam sagih omlai hi. 
Joshua18:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Israel mite kiangah, “ Topa, na pu na pate uh Pasian in note hong piaksa leitangah pai-in na luah ding uh bang tanvei zekai lai ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua18:4 Minam khat panin mi thum ciat hong pia unla, amaute va kuan khia-in vaksuk vakto-in, amaute’ luah dinga ngaihsutna tawh a leitang omziate hong gelhin, tua ciangin kei kiangah hong ciah dingun amaute ka sawl ding hi." 
Joshua18:5 Amaute in seh sagihin khenin, leitaw lam ama gam mahah Judah omsuakin, Josef’ innkuante leilu lam amau’ gamah om ding hi." 
Joshua18:6 Note in leitang khen sagihin hong ciamteh unla, na ciaptehna uh hih mun kei kiangah nong paipih ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Topa i Pasian’ mai-ah note a’ ding ai ka san ding hi." 
Joshua18:7 Levi mite in note lakah tanh nei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ siampi nasepna pen amau’ luah ahi hi. Gad, Reuben, le Manasseh minam alangte in Topa’ nasem Moses in amaute tungah a piak ahi Jordan Nisuahna lam galkhatah amau’ gamh ngah khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:8 Tua ahih ciangin mite a kuan uh hi. Leitang a ciaptehna a gelhna dingun Joshua in a pai mite thu pia a, “Vaksuk vakto-in leitang ciaptehna hong gelh unla, kei kiangah hong paikik un. Tua ciangin Shiloh mun Topa’ mai-ah note a dingin ai ka san ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:9 Tua ciangin mite kuanin gam sungah paisuk paito-in khen sagih suahin tua gam a khuakhua-in a ciaptehna uh laibu khat sungah khum uh a, Shiloh giahphual a Joshua kiangah amaute hong pai uh hi." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua in amaute a dingin Topa’ mai Shiloh-ah ai sansak hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amau’ tanh ding ciat Israel-te tungah leitang a pia hi. 
Joshua18:11 A behbeh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamte a’ ding aisan hun hong tung a, amau’ tungah a kipia gam pen Judah minam le Josef minamte kikalah hong kia hi." 
Joshua18:12 Leilu lamah amau’ gamgi pen Jordan panin kipan a, Jerikho leilu lam liangko-ah paito-in, tua panin mualtung gam nawkin nitumna lamah pai a, Bethaven sehnel gamah a tawp hi." 
Joshua18:13 Tua lai panin gamgi in Luz lam manawhin leitaw lam nawtin Luz (Bethel a kici) liangko-ah pai a, Bethhoron Nuainung leitaw lama om mualtung a Atarothaddar khua-ah paisuk hi." 
Joshua18:14 Tua ciangin mun dang manawhin gamgi pai a, Bethhoron galkhat, leitaw lama om mual panin nitumna lampang leitaw lamah kihei a, Judah minamte a’ ahi Kiriathbaal (Kiriathjearim a cihna)-ah a tawp hi. Hih in a nitumna lampang piangsak hi." 
Joshua18:15 Tua ciangin Kiriathjearim mong panin leitaw lampang kipan a, Efron lam, Neftoah Luite-ah gamgi pai hi." 
Joshua18:16 Tua ciangin Refaim kuam leilu lam mong a om, Hinnom’ tapa’ kuam a kimuhna mual a gamgi-ah pai hi. Tua ciangin Jebus mite’ gam liangko leitaw lam, Hinnom Kuam-ah paisukin, Enrogel-ah paisuk suak hi." 
Joshua18:17 Tua ciangin leilu lam manawhin kawi-in, Enshemesh-ah paisuak a, tua lai panin Adummim kahtohna galkhat, Geliloth-ah pai a, Reuben’ tapa Bohan’ Suangpi-ah paisuk hi." 
Joshua18:18 Tua ciangin Betharabah gam liangko leilu lamah paisuakin Arabah-ah paisuk hi. 
Joshua18:19 Tua ciangin Bethhoglah gam liangko leilu lamah gamgi paisuak a, Jordan mong leitaw lam, Ci Tuipi dawk leilu lamah a tawp hi. Hih pen leitaw lam gamgi hi a," 
Joshua18:20 Jordan in nisuahna lampang a gamgi piangsak hi. Hih pen a beh zui-in a kimkotah a gamgi a gamgi-in Benjamin minam’ luah ahi hi. 
Joshua18:21 Tu-in amau’ beh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamte’ khuapite in Jerikho, Bethhoglah, Emekkeziz," 
Joshua18:22 Betharabah, Zemaraim, Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 Avvim, Parah, Ofrah," 
Joshua18:24 Khefarammoni, Ofni, Geba - khuapi sawm le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua18:25 Tua ciangin Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpeh, Khefirah, Mozah," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haelef, Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna), Gibeah, le Kiriathjearim - khuapi sawm le li, a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamte’ luah ahi hi." 
Joshua19:1 A beh zui-in Simeon minam a’ ding aisan nihna hong tung hi. Amau’ gamh in Judah minamte’ gamh ngahsa pawkhat huam hi. 
Joshua19:2 Amau’ ngah ding gamhte pen Beersheba, Sheba, Moladah," 
Joshua19:3 Hazarshual, Bala, Ezem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah," 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Bethmarkaboth, Hazarsusah," 
Joshua19:6 Bethlebaoth, le Sharuhen - khuapi sawm le thum, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:7 Tua ciangin Ain, Rimmon, Ether, le Ashan - khuapi li a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi." 
Joshua19:8 Negeb gam Ramah-a om Baalathbeer ciang dong hih khuapite’ kiima om khuaneute khempeuh zong a huam ahi hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Simeon minamte’ luah ahi hi. 
Joshua19:9 Simeon minamte’ luah in Judah minamte’ gam sung khenkhat hong huam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minamte’ ngah pen amau a dingin lianlua a, amau’ luah sung panin Simeon minam in gamh ngahsawn uh hi." 
Joshua19:10 A beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minam a dingin aisan thumna hong tung hi. Amau’ luah gam in Sarid ciang dong ban hi. 
Joshua19:11 Tua ciangin nitumna lamah a gamgi paito-in Mareal ah paisuak a, Dabbesheth va su a, tua ciangin Jokneam nisuahna lama om lui a ban hi." 
Joshua19:12 Sarid panin nisuahna lam manawhin pai-in Khislothtabor gamgi-ah tung hi. 
Joshua19:13 Tua panin Daberath-ah pai-in Jafia ciang ban a, tua lai panin nisuahna lam Gathhefer, Ethkazin lamah paisuak a, tua ciangin Rimmon-ah pai lai-in Neah lamah a kawi hi." 
Joshua19:14 Tua ciangin leilu lam pan, Hannathon lamah gamgi kihei a, Iftahel kuamah a tawp hi." 
Joshua19:15 Tua ciangin Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah, le Bethlehem khuate zong huam a, khuapi sawm le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:16 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minamte’ luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:17 A beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamte a dingin aisan lina hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:18 A gam in Jezreel, Khesulloth, Shunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraim, Shion, Anaharath," 
Joshua19:20 Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez," 
Joshua19:21 Remeth, Engannim, Enhaddah, le Bethpazzez a huam hi." 
Joshua19:22 A gamgi in Tabor, Shahazumah, le Bethshemesh zong ban a, Jordan-ah a tawp hi. Khuapi sawm le guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:23 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamte’ luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:24 A beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamte a dingin aisan ngana hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:25 A gam in Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaf," 
Joshua19:26 Allammelek, Amad, le Mishal huam hi. Nitumna lamah Karmel le Shihorlibnath ban a," 
Joshua19:27 tua ciangin nisuahna lamah kihei-in Bethdagon-ah pai a, leilu lam Bethemek le Neiel lamah Zebulun le Iftahel kuam ban hi. Tua ciangin leilu lam Kabul," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, Kanah, le a Lian Sidon ciang dong paito lai hi." 
Joshua19:29 Tua ciangin Ramah-ah a gamgi kihei a, kulh a nei Taia khuapi a tung hi. Tua ciangin Hosah-ah gamgi kihei a, tuipi-ah a tawp hi. Mahalab, Akzib," 
Joshua19:30 Ummah, Afek, le Rehob khuapite huam a - khuapi sawmnih le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:31 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamte’ luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:32 A beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamte a dingin aisan gukna hong tung hi.
