Joshua19:33 A gamgi pen Helef, Zaanannim-a om tawsaw, le Adaminekeb, le Jabneel panin Lakkum ciang dong pai-in Jordan-ah a tawp hi." 
Joshua19:34 Tua ciangin nitumna lam Aznothtabor-ah a gamgi kihei a, tua lai panin Hukkok-ah pai-in, leitaw lamah Zebulun ban a, nitumna lamah Asher banin, nisuahna lam panin Jordan-ah Judah a ban hi." 
Joshua19:35 Kulh a nei khuapite pen Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Khinnereth," 
Joshua19:36 Adamah, Ramah, Hazor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedesh, Edrei, Enhazor," 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdalel, Horem, Bethanath, le Bethshemesh - khuapi sawm le kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:39 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamte’ luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:40 A beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamte a dingin aisan sagihna hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:41 A luah gamte in Zorah, Eshtaol, Irshemesh," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalbim, Aijalon, Ithlah," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timnah, Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath," 
Joshua19:45 Jehud, Beneberak, Gathrimmon," 
Joshua19:46 le Joppa galkhat a om Mejarkon le Rakkon a gamte tawh a huam hi. 
Joshua19:47 Dan mite in amau’ gam a taan ciangun Dan mite kuanto-in Leshem sim uh a, amaute in a mite manin namsau tawh a thah khit uh ciangin tua gam luahin a sungah teng uh a, amau’ pupi’ min tamin Leshem pen Dan ci-in min a phuak uh hi." 
Joshua19:48 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamte’ luah hi a, hih a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:49 Israel mite in gamh-in tua leitangte a hawm khit uh ciangin amaute lakah Nun tapa Joshua tungah gamh a pia uh hi. 
Joshua19:50 Topa’ thupiakna tawh ama nget khuapi, Efraim mualtung gam a om Timnathserah a pia uh hi. Amah in tua khuapi lamkikin a sungah a teng hi." 
Joshua19:51 Hihte pen siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le Israel minam beh lutangte in kikhopna bukkong, Topa’ mai Shiloh-ah aisanna tawh a hawmkhiat uh gamh ahi hi. Tua bangin amaute in leitang hawmna a zo uh hi." 
Joshua20:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua20:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Sawm lohpi-in ahi a, theih lohna hangin ahi zongin mi khat a that khapa a tai theih nadingin Moses tungtawnin nang tungah kong gen bukna khuapite teel in. Phulapa kiang panin note a dingin tua khuate pen bukna hi ding hi." 
Joshua20:3  
Joshua20:4 Hih khuapite khat peuhpeuhah amah tai-in khuapi kongpi tumna-ah ding ding a, tua khuapi upate kiangah a thu gentel ding hi. Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi sungah amah paipihin amah mun khat pia ding a, amaute tawh amah omkhawm ding hi." 
Joshua20:5 Tua ciangin phulapa in amah a delh leh, tua pa tungah mi that pa pia lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in theih lohna hangin a vengpa thatin, a beisa hun sungah ama tungah galneihna bangmah nei lo hi." 
Joshua20:6 Thukhenna thuak dingin mihonte mai-ah a din mateng, le tua hun laitak a siampi lianpen pa a sih hun mateng, tua khuapi sungah amah om ding hi. Tua khit ciangin mi that khapa ama khua ama inn, a hong taikhiatna khua-ah paikik thei ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua20:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Naftali mualtung gam sunga om Galilee gam sung panin Kedesh khua, Efraim mualtung gam sungah Shekhem khua, le Judah mualtung gam sungah Kiriatharba (Hebron a cihna) khuate a tuamkoih uh hi." 
Joshua20:8 Jerikho nisuahna Jordan galkhatah Reuben minam sung panin mualzang sehnel gam a om Bezer khua, Gad minam sung panin Gilead gam sunga om Ramoth khua, le Manasseh minam sung panin Bashan gam sunga om Golan khuate a seh uh hi." 
Joshua20:9 Hihte pen Israel mi khempeuh le amaute lakah a peem khualmi a dingin sawm lopi-in mi khat a that khapa pen mihonte mai-ah a din ma-in phulapa khutah a sih loh nadingin a tai theih nadinga a kiseh khuapite ahi hi. 
Joshua21:1 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le Israel minam beh lutangte kiangah Levi beh lutangte hong pai uh hi. 
Joshua21:2 Amaute in Kanaan gam sung Shiloh munah, “Ten nadingin khuapi le ka ganhingte uh a dingin a lononate tawh kote hong kipiak ding Moses tungtawnin Topa in thu piazo hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Joshua21:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ thupiakna tawh Israel mite in amau’ luah sung panin Levi mite tungah a nuai-a khuapite le lonona gamte a pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:4 Kohath behte a dingin aisan hong tung hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampi Aaron’ suanlekhak ahi Levi mite in Judah, Simeon, le Benjamin minamte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm le thum ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:5 Tua ciangin a omlai Kohath mite in Efraim minam, Dan minam le Manasseh minam alangte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:6 Gershon mite in Issakhar minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam, le Bashan gam sunga om Manasseh minam alangte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm le thum ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:7 Merari mite in a beh uh tawh kizui-in Reuben minam, Gad minam, le Zebulun minamte tung panin khuapi sawm le nih ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:8 Topa in Moses tungtawnin a thupiak bangin hih khuapite le a lonona gamte Israel mite in aisanna tawh Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:9 Judah minam le Simeon minam sung panin amaute in a nuai-a min kigen khuapite pia uh a," 
Joshua21:10 Levi mite ahi Kohath beh sung panin Aaron’ suanlekhakte tungah tung hi; amaute tungah a ai kia masa ahih man hi. 
Joshua21:11 Amaute in Judah mualtung gam Kiriatharba, Arba pen Anak’ pa (Hebron a cihna), a kiima lonona gam tawh amau tungah pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:12 Ahih hangin tua khuapi’ lote le a khuaneute pen Jefunneh’ tapa Kaleb tungah a neih dingin kipia khin hi. 
Joshua21:13 Amaute in siampi Aaron’ suanlekhakte tungah mi thatte’ bukna khuapi Hebron a lonona gamte tawh, Libnah a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:14 Jattir a lonona gamte tawh, Eshtemoa a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:15 Holon a lonona gamte tawh, Debir a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:16 Ain a lonona gamte tawh, Juttah a lonona gamte tawh, le Bethshemesh a lonona gamte tawh, hih minam nihte sung panin khuapi kua a pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:17 Tua ciangin Benjamin minam panin Gibeon a lonona gamte tawh, Geba a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth a lonona gamte tawh, le Almon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li a pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:19 Siampi Aaron’ suanlekhakte’ khuapite a vekpi-in khuapi sawmthum le thum, a lonona gamte tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua21:20 Levi mite sung panin Kohath beh ahi a omlai Kohath mite tungah a kipia khuapite pen Efraim minamte a’ sung pan ahi hi. 
Joshua21:21 Efraim mualtung gam a om khuapite sung panin mi thatte a’ ding Shekhem a lonona gamte tawh, Gezer a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim a lonona gamte tawh, le Bethhoron a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li amaute tungah kipia hi." 
Joshua21:23 Tua ciangin Dan minam sung panin Eltekeh a lonona gamte tawh, Gibbethon a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon a lonona gamte tawh, le Gathrimmon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:25 Tua ciangin Manasseh minam alangte sung panin Taanak a lonona gamte tawh, le Gathrimmon a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi." 
Joshua21:26 Kohath mi a omlai behte’ khuapite a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawm ahi hi. 
Joshua21:27 Tua ciangin Levi beh sunga om Gershon mite tungah Manasseh minam alangte a’ sung panin Bashan gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte a dingin bukna khuapi Golan a lonona gamte tawh, le Beeshterah a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi." 
Joshua21:28 Tua ciangin Issakhar minam sung panin Kishion a lonona gamte tawh, Daberath a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth a lonona gamte tawh, le Engannim a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:30 Tua ciangin Asher minam sung panin Mishal a lonona gamte tawh, Abdon a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:31 Helkath a lonona gamte tawh, le Rehob a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:32 Tua ciangin Naftali minam sung panin Galilee gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte a dingin bukna khuapi Kedesh a lonona gamte tawh, Hammothdor a lonona gamte tawh, le Kartan a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi thum kipia hi." 
Joshua21:33 Gershon mite beh tuamtuamte’ khuapite a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawm le thum ahi hi. 
Joshua21:34 Tua ciangin Levi mi a omlai Merari behte tungah, Zebulun minam sung panin Jokneam a lonona gamte tawh, Kartan a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:35 Dimnah a lonona gamte tawh, le Nahalal a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:36 Tua ciangin Reuben minam sung panin Bezer a lonona gamte tawh, Jahaz a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoth a lonona gamte tawh, le Mefaath a lonona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:38 Tua ciangin Gad minam sung panin Gilead gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte a’ ding bukna khuapi Ramoth a lonona gamte tawh, Mahanaim a lonona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:39 Heshbon a lonona gamte tawh, le Jazer a lonona gamte tawh, a vekpi-in khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:40 Levi beh a omlai ahi Merari beh tuamtuamte a’ ding khuapi a kipia a vekpi-in sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Joshua21:41 Israel mite’ neihsa lakah Levi mite’ khuapi a vekpi-in a lonona gamte tawh khuapi sawm le giat ahi hi. 
Joshua21:42 Hih khuapite in a kiim ciatah lonona gam nei ciat a, hih khuapi khempeuh tua bang ahi hi." 
Joshua21:43 Tua bangin Topa in amau’ pulepate tungah piak dingin a kiciam leitang khempeuh Israel tungah pia a, amaute in a ngah khit uh ciangin tua lai-ah a teng uh hi." 
Joshua21:44 Tua ciangin a pu a pate uh tungah a ciamsa bangin Topa in amaute tungah na khempeuhah tawlngakna a pia hi. Topa in a galte khempeuh uh amau khut sungah pia ahih manin a galte uh khat beek in zong amaute nang zo lo hi. 
Joshua21:45 Topa in Israel mite tungah a ciamsa thuhoih khempeuh khat zong a mawkna om lo a, a vekpi-in tangtung kim hi." 
Joshua22:1 Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte samin" 
Joshua22:2 amaute kiangah, “ Topa’ nasem Moses in note hong thupiak khempeuh zui-in, keimah in note kong thupiakna khempeuhah ka thu na hong mang khin uh hi." 
Joshua22:3 Tuni dong hih hun saupi sung na sanggamte uh na nusia kei uh a, Topa na Pasian uh hong sawlna limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsun uh hi." 
Joshua22:4 Tu-in Topa na Pasian un amaute tungah a ciamsa bangin na sanggamte uh tawlngakna pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ nasem Moses in note hong piak Jordan galkhat, note’ neihsa a omna leitang na inn uhah note ciah un." 
Joshua22:5 Topa’ nasem Moses in note hong piak thupiakna le thukham ahi, Topa na Pasian uh it ding, ama lampi khempeuh zuih ding, ama thupiakte zuih ding, amah belh ding, le na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh ama na na sep ding uh limtakin ngaihsun un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:6 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute thupha pia-in ciahsak a, amaute zong a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi." 
Joshua22:7 Tu-in Manasseh minam alangte tungah Moses in Jordan nisuahna lam Bashan gam sungah neihsa pia khin hi. Ahi zongin Joshua in alangte tungah Jordan nitumna lam a sanggamte kiang uhah neihsa a pia hi. Joshua in amaute a inn uhah sawlin thupha a piak ciangin 
Joshua22:8 amaute tungah, “Na inn uhah hauhna lianpi, ganhing tampi tak, ngun, kham, sumngo, sik le puan tampi tawh ciahkik un. Na galte uh van na suhte uh na sanggamte uh tawh hawm un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:9 Tua ahih ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte, Moses tungtawnin Topa’ thupiakna tawh a neih uh amau’ leitang ahi Gilead gamah a pai dingin Kanaan gam sunga om Shiloh munah Israel mite tawh kikhenin a inn uhah a ciah uh hi." 
Joshua22:10 Kanaan gam sunga om Jordan gam kiimteng a tun uh ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte in tua lai Jordan gun kiangah a lian mahmah biakna tau khat a lam uh hi." 
Joshua22:11 Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “En un, Israel mite’ lampang, Jordan kiim gam, Kanaan gam nawlah Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte in biakna tau khat lam uh hi,” a kicihna za uh hi." 
Joshua22:12 Israel mite in tua thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a do dingin Israel mihon buppi khempeuh Shiloh-ah kikhawm uh hi. 
Joshua22:13 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gilead gam a om Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte kiangah siampi Eleazar tapa Finehas," 
Joshua22:14 le amah tawh ukpi sawm, Israel minam innkuan panin khat ciat, Israel behte lakah innkuan lutang ahite a sawl uh hi." 
Joshua22:15 Tua ciangin Gilead gam sunga om Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah," 
Joshua22:16 “ Topa’ mihon buppi in, ‘ Topa lehdona-ah tuni-in note a dingin biakna tau khat lamna tawh Topa zuihna panin tuni-in kihei-in Israel Pasian’ tungah na gamtatnasa uh ahi hih khemna pen bang ahi hiam?" 
Joshua22:17 Topa’ mihonte tungah gimna khat a hong tungsak ahi, eite i kisiansuah nai beek lohna ahi, Peor-a i khialhna hawmthawhin, tuni-in Topa zuihna panin kiheikhia ding na hi uh hiam? Note in tuni-in Topa lehdo le-uhcin zing ciangin Israel mihon buppi tungah amah heh ding hi." 
Joshua22:18  
Joshua22:19 Ahih hangin tu-in note’ lak na leitang uh nin ahihleh Topa’ biakbuk a dinna mun Topa’ leitangah hong pai unla, kote’ lakah luah hong nei un. Topa lehdo kei unla, Topa i Pasian’ biakna tau simloh note a’ ding biakna tau na lamna uh tawh kote a lehdo hong suaksak kei un." 
Joshua22:20 Zerah’ tapa Akhan, a ki-ap nate-ah a khialh manin Israel mihon khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Ama mawhna hangin amah bek si lo hi,’ ci uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Joshua22:21 Tua ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam alangte in Israel beh lutangte dawngin," 
Joshua22:22 “A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! Amah in thei hi. Israel mahmah in zong thei ta hen! Lehdona ahi a, Topa’ tungah thuman lohna ahi zongin ahih a, Topa zuihna panin a pial dingin biakna tau lam ka hih uhleh, tuni-in kote hong zah kei hen. Tua ahih kei leh zong, tua tungah meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, thunuama biakna ahi zongin piakna dingin a lam ka hih uhleh Topa mahmah in hong thuk tahen." 
Joshua22:23  
Joshua22:24 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Hong tung ding hunte-ah na tate un ko’ tate tungah, ‘Israel Pasian, Topa tawh no bang kisai na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua22:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh no Reuben mite le Gad mite, le ko’ kikalah Topa in gamgi-in Jordan bawl khinzo hi. Topa’ sungah no tanh bangmah om lo hi,’ a cihkhak ding uh launa tawh ka bawl uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tate un Topa a biak ding uh na tate un khaktan kha ding uh hi." 
Joshua22:26 Tua ahih ciangin kote in, ‘Meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ding ahi zongin hi loin, ama omna-ah ka meihal biaknate uh le ka biakpiaknate uh le thunuama ka piaknate uh tawh Topa’ na ka sepna uh kote le note’ kikal le ko’ khit ciangin i suanlekhakte kikalah teci dingin bawl ni. Tua bang hikeileh hong tung ding hunte-ah na tate un ko’ tate tungah, “ Topa’ sungah no’ tanh bangmah om lo hi,” ci kha ding uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:27  
Joshua22:28 Tua ahih ciangin hong tung ding hunte-ah kote tung ahi a, kote’ suanlekhakte’ tungah ahi zongin hih bangin hong kicih leh, ‘Meihal biak nading ahi a, biakpiak nading ahi zongin hi loin note le kote kikalah teci dingin ka pu ka pate un a bawl Topa’ biakna tau lim en un,’ i ci ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh hi." 
Joshua22:29 Ama biakbuk mai-a om Topa ka Pasian uh biakna tau longal, meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, biakpiak nading lamna tawh ahi zongin kote in Topa lehdo-in Topa zuihna panin a pial ka hi het kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:30 Siampi Finehas le amah tawh a om mihon ukpi, Israel beh lutangte in Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh mite’ thugenna a zak uh ciangin tua thugennate in amaute lungkimsak mahmah hi." 
Joshua22:31 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar’ tapa Finehas in Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh mite tungah, “ Topa tungah note zuautat nai lo na hih manun eite’ lakah Topa om hi, ci-in tuni-in i thei hi. Tu-in note in Topa’ gimpiak nading panin Israel mite na honkhia uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:32 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar’ tapa Finehas le ukpite, Gilead gam a om Reuben mite le Gad mite kiang panin Israel mite’ omna Kanaan gamah ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah thu puak kik uh hi." 
Joshua22:33 Tua thu in Israel mite lungkimsak hi. Israel mite in Pasian phat uh a, Reuben mite le Gad mite a tenna leitang susia-in amaute galin do ding gen nawn lo uh hi." 
Joshua22:34 Reuben mite le Gad mite in a biakna tau uh min dingin “Teci” a phuak uh hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen Pasian ahihna thu eite’ kikalah teci ahi hi,” amaute in ci uh hi." 
Joshua23:1 Topa in amau’ kiima om gal khempeuh panin Israel mite tungah lungmuanna a piak khit a sawtpi ciangin Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha ta hi. 
Joshua23:2 Joshua in Israel khempeuh, a upate le a lutangte, a thukhente le a uliante uh samin amaute kiangah, “Tu-in kei teekin ka kum tampi pha ta hi." 
Joshua23:3 Note’ hangin Topa na Pasian un hih minam dangte khempeuh tungah a bawlnate na mu khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note a dingin hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi. 
Joshua23:4 En un, Jordan panin nitumna lama Tuipi Lian dong, a omlai minamte pen ka zawhsa minamte tawh na minamte uh gamh dingin note tungah kong pia khin hi." 
Joshua23:5 Topa na Pasian un note’ mai-ah amaute lehnawt ding a, note’ muhna panin hawlkhia ding hi. Topa na Pasian un note’ tungah hong ciam bangin amau’ gam na luah ding uh hi." 
Joshua23:6 Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a omlai hih minamte tawh kihel loin, amau’ pasian-te’ thu zong gen loin, tuate tawh zong kiciam loin, amau’ na sem loin, amaute’ mai-ah zong note kun loin, ahih hangin tuni-a na gamtat bangun Topa na Pasian uh na belh theih nadingun Moses’ thukham laibu sunga kigelhte khempeuh zui-in semin, themkhat zong pial loin na omna dingun khauhtakin om un." 
Joshua23:7  
Joshua23:8  
Joshua23:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note’ mai-ah a lian a thahat minamte hawlkhia a, note ahihleh tuni dongin mi khat beek in hong nangzo nai lo hi." 
Joshua23:10 Note tungah hong ciamsa bangin note a dingin hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahih manin note khat in mi tulkhat na taikeeksak zo uh hi. 
Joshua23:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh na it ding uh hoihtakin ngaihsun un. 
Joshua23:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh note nungkikin note lakah a omlai minamte tawh kipawlin amaute tawh kitengin, note in amau’ numeite tenpihin amaute in note’ numeite a tenpih leh," 
Joshua23:13 Topa na Pasian un note’ mai-ah hih minamte hawlkhia nawn lo ding hi, ci-in teltakin thei un. Topa na Pasian un note hong piak hih leitang hoih panin na sih khit matengun amaute pen note a dingin thangzak le tehlop, na nung uh a hong sat ciangduai, ahih kei leh na mit sung uh a hong sun ling tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Joshua23:14 “Tu-in leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin kei a pai ding ka hi ta a, note khempeuh in na lungsim uh le na nuntakna uhah, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai na hoih hong ciam khempeuh khat zong maimawk lo ahihna na thei uh hi. A vekpi-in note a dingin hong tangtung a, khat zong maimawk lo hi." 
Joshua23:15 Ahih hangin, amah in note hong thupiak ahi Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna palsatin, note in pasian dangte’ na semin tuate na biak uhleh, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai-in a ciam na hoih khempeuh a tun mah bangin Topa na Pasian un note hong piaksa hih leitang hoih panin amah in note hong suksiat khit matengin note tungah siatna khempeuh hong tungsak ding hi. Note tungah Topa hong sinso ding a, note tungah a hong piak leitang hoih panin note manlang takin na bei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua23:16  
Joshua24:1 Tua ciangin Joshua in Israel minam khempeuh Shekhem-ah kaikhawmin a upate, a makaite, a thukhente, le Israel uliante a sam hi. Tua ciangin Pasian’ mai-ah amau ciat kipia uh hi." 
Joshua24:2 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh tungah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, ‘Tanglai-in Eufratis gun galkhatah na pu na pate uh teng ngei a, tuate lakah Abraham le Nahor’ pa Terah pen khat bek ahi hi. Na pu na pate un pasian dangte bia uh hi." 
Joshua24:3 Tua ciangin Gun gal panin na pu uh Abraham la-in Kanaan gam khempeuhah ka paipih a, a suanlekhakte tampi ka phasak hi. Ama tungah Isaac ka pia a," 
Joshua24:4 Isaac tungah Jakob le Esau ka pia hi. A neih dingin Seir mualtung gam Esau ka pia a, ahih hangin Jakob le a tate Egypt-ah a paisuk uh hi." 
Joshua24:5 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron ka sawl a, a gam sunga ka sepnate tawh Egypt ka gimsak khit ciangin note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Joshua24:6 Egypt panin na pu na pate uh ka paikhiatpih a, tuipi a tung uh hi. Egypt mite in leeng le sakol tung tuangte tawh na pu na pate uh San Tuipi-ah delh uh hi." 
Joshua24:7 Kei tungah amaute hong kiko uh ciangin amaute le Egypt mite kikalah khuamial ka koih a, Egypt mite tungah tuipi luangsakin amaute ka tuumsak hi. Egypt tungah ka bawlna na thei uh a, sehnel gam sungah sauveipi na om uh hi." 
Joshua24:8 Tua ciangin Jordan galkhatah a teng Amor mite’ leitangah note kong paipih hi. Amaute in note hong do-in, note’ khut sungah amaute kong pia a, note in amau’ leitang na luah uh a, note’ mai-ah amaute ka susia hi." 
Joshua24:9 Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa, Zippor’ tapa Balak hong khangin Israel mite hong do hi. Amah in mi sawlin note hong samsia dingin Beor’ tapa Balaam a samsak hi." 
Joshua24:10 Ahih hangin Balaam’ thu ka ngai kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in note thupha hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin Balak’ khutsung panin note kong honkhia hi. 
Joshua24:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan galkhatah pai-in Jerikho na tung uh a, Jerikho mite in note hong do uh hi. Amor mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Girgash mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite in zong note hong do uh a, ahi zongin note’ khut sungah amaute kong pia hi." 
Joshua24:12 Amor kumpi nihte note mai-ah a hawlkhia tunpite keimah in note mai-ah ka sawl hi. Tua pen note’ namsau ahi a, note’ thal tawh ahi zongin na dona hang uh hi lo hi." 
Joshua24:13 Note in na sep loh uh leitang, na sat loh uh khuapite, note tungah kong pia a, tuate sungah na teng uh hi. Na suan loh uh leenggui lo pan a gah leh oliv huan pan a gah na ne uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Joshua24:14 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa zahtak unla, lungsim tak le thumanna tawh ama na sem un. Na pu na pate un Gun gal le Egypt gam sungah a biak uh pasian-te koihkhia unla, Topa’ na sem un." 
Joshua24:15 Topa’ na na sepnop kei uhleh, Gun galkhat a a na na sepsak uh na pu na pate uh pasian ahi a, note’ tenna gam Amor mite’ pasian ahi zongin, a na na sepsak ding peuhpeuh uh tuni-in teel un. Ahih hangin kei le ka innkuanpihte in ahihleh Topa’ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:16 Tua ciangin mite in dawngin, “Adang pasian-te’ na a sem dingin Topa nusiat ding ka ngaihsun ngei kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua24:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh salsuahna Egypt gam panin eite le i pu i pate a hong paikhiatpih, eite’ muhna-ah tua lim liante a bawl, i paina lampi khempeuh le i nawk mite khempeuh lakah hong kem pa pen Topa i Pasian ahi hi." 
Joshua24:18 Topa in eite’ mai-ah tua gam a teng Amor mite khempeuh hawlkhia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen eite’ Pasian ahih manin kote in zong Topa’ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:19 Ahih hangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “ Topa’ na na semzo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen a siangtho Pasian hi a, a aam Pasian zong ahi hi. Note’ thupalsatna ahi a, na khialhna uh ahi zongin hong maisak lo ding hi." 
Joshua24:20 Topa nusia-in gamdang pasian-te’ na na sep uhleh, note tungah a hoih hong bawl khit ciangin amah hong kihei-in note’ tungah siatna hong bawlin note hong beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:21 Tua ciangin mite in Joshua kiangah, “Hilo hi; Topa’ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Ama na a sem dingin Topa na teel khitna uhah note a dingin note mah teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:23 Amah in, “Tua ahihleh note’ lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koihkhia unla, Israel Pasian, Topa’ lamah na lungsim uh nga un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:24 Mite in Joshua kiangah, “ Topa i Pasian’ na ka sem ding uh a, ama thu ka mang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:25 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Shekhem-ah tua ni-in mite tawh thuciamna bawl a, amaute a dingin thukham le biakna ngeina kipte a bawl hi." 
Joshua24:26 Tua ciangin Joshua in Pasian’ thukham laibu sungah hih kammalte a gelh hi. Amah in suangtum lianpi khat la-in Topa biakna mun tawsaw nuai-ah a phut hi. 
Joshua24:27 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh kiangah, “En un, hih suangtum pen eite’ langkhatah teci hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in eite tungah hong thugen khempeuh hih suangtum in za khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin note, na Pasian uh tungah a man loin na gamtat loh nadingun hih suangtum pen note’ langkhatah teci hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in a milipin amau’ gamh ciatah, mite a ciahsak hi." 
Joshua24:29 Hih thute khit ciangin Topa’ nasem, Nun’ tapa Joshua si a, a khan kum za le kum sawmkhat a pha hi." 
Joshua24:30 Tua ciangin amaute in Gaash mual leilu lam, Efraim mualtung gam a om Timnathserah mun a ama gamhluah leitangah a vui uh hi." 
Joshua24:31 Joshua’ khang sung le Joshua sangin sau a nungtazaw upate khempeuh khang sungin Israel mite in Topa’ na sem a, Israel mite a dingin Topa in a sep na khempeuh a thei uh hi." 
Joshua24:32 Israel mite in Egypt panin a puak uh Josef’ guhte pen Shekhem’ pa Hamor’ tapate tung panin Jakob in dangka zakhat tawh a lei Shekhem leitangah kivui a, tua leitang pen Josef’ suanlekhakte’ luah a suak hi." 
Joshua24:33 Tua ciangin Aaron’ tapa Eleazar a si hi. Amaute in Efraim mualtung gam sunga a om, ama tapa Finehas tungah a kipia Gibeah khua-ah a vui uh hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan mite a sim dingin kua kuanto masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan mite a sim dingin kua kuanto masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:2 Topa in, “Judah minamte kuanto masa ding uh hi. En un, amau’ khut sungah tua leitang ka piazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges1:3 Tua ciangin Judah minamte in a sanggam uh Simeon minamte kiangah, “Kanaan mite i zawh theih nadingin ko tungah hong kipia gamah kote hong zui un. Tua mah bangin no hong kipia gamah kote in zong kong zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Simeon minamte in a zui uh hi." 
Judges1:4 Tua ciangin Judah minamte kuanto uh a, Topa in amaute’ khut sungah Kanaan mite le Perez mite a pia hi. Amaute in Bezek-ah tua mite tul sawm bang a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:5 Amaute in Bezek-ah Adonibezek tuakin amah tawh kido uh a, Kanaan mite le Perez mite a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:6 Adonibezek tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in delhin man uh a, a khutpite le a khepite attan uh hi." 
Judges1:7 Tua ciangin Adonibezek in, “A khutpi le a khepi a ki-attan kumpi sawmsagihte in ka sabuai nuai-ah an nengkia tawm ngei uh hi. Ka gamtatnasa bangin Pasian in kei hong thuk hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Jerusalem-ah amah paipih uh a, tua munah amah a si hi." 
Judges1:8 Tua ciangin Judah mite in Jerusalem simin la uh a, a mite thatin a khuapi hal uh hi." 
Judges1:9 Tua khit ciangin Judah mite, mualtung gam, Negeb gam, le lei niamna-a teng Kanaan mite a sim dingin paisuk uh hi." 
Judges1:10 Tua ciangin Hebron (Hebron pen a nidangin Kiriatharba)-ah a teng Kanaan mite a sim dingin Judah mite kuansuk uh a, amaute in Sheshai le Ahiman le Talmai a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:11 Tua lai panin Debir mite a sim dingin amaute a pai uh hi. Debir min pen nidangin Kiriathsefer ahi hi. 
Judges1:12 Tua ciangin Kaleb in, “Kiriathsefer simin a lazo pa tungah a zi dingin ka tanu Aksah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges1:13 Tua ciangin Kaleb’ naupa Kenaz’ tapa Othniel inla a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia pah hi." 
Judges1:14 Tua nu tawh a kiten ciangin a pa kiang panin lo khat a nget nading a zi hahsawl hi. A zi zong a la tung panin kum a, Kaleb in ama kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges1:15 Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb lei keu gamah hong koih na hih ciangin tuikhukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in ama tungah tuikhuk tungnungte le tuikhuk nuainungte a pia hi." 
Judges1:16 Tua ciangin Moses’ sungpate nam ahi Ken’ suanlekhakte, Judah mite tawh nisuh khuapi panin Negeb gam Arad gei-a om Judah gamah paito uh a, tua lai munah tungin tua mite tawh a tengkhawm uh hi." 
Judges1:17 Judah mite zong Simeon mite tawh paikhawmin Zefathah a teng Kanaan mite va zo-in susiamang uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min Hormah kici hi. 
Judges1:18 Judah mite in zong Gaza le a gam, Ashkelon le a gam, le Ekron le a gamte a la uh hi." 
Judges1:19 Topa in Judah mite huh ahih manin amaute in mualtung gamteng luah uh a, ahih hangin zang gam a teng mite hawlkhia zo lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sik leeng nei uh hi." 
Judges1:20 Tua ciangin Moses in a gensa bangin Kaleb tungah Hebron kipia a, tua sung panin amah in Anak’ tapa thumte a hawlkhia hi." 
Judges1:21 Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in Jerusalem-ah a teng Jebus mite hawlkhia lo uh ahih manin tuni dongin Jebus mite pen Jerusalem-ah Benjamin mite tawh a tengkhawm uh hi. 
Judges1:22 Josef minamte zong Bethel a sim dingin kuanto uh a, Topa in amaute a huh hi." 
Judges1:23 Amaute in thu kansim dingin Bethel-ah mi sawl uh hi. (Tua khuapi min pen a nidangin Luz ahi hi.) 
Judges1:24 Thu kansimte in khuapi panin hong paikhia mi khat mu-in ama kiangah, “Khuapi sung lutna lampi hong hilh in, kong thum uh hi, nang tungah kong diktat ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:25 Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sung lutna lampi amaute a lak hi. Amaute in namsau tawh tua khuapi mite vat uh a, ahih hangin tua mipa le a innkuante suaktasak uh hi." 
Judges1:26 A nung ciangin Hit mite gamah tua mipa pai-in khuapi khat sat a, a min pen Luz ci-in a phuak hi. Tu dongin tua khua min pen Luz mah ahi hi." 
Judges1:27 Manasseh mite in Bethshean le a khuaneute-a teng mite, Taanak le a khuaneute-a teng mite, Dor le a khuaneute-a teng mite, Ibleam le a khuaneute-a teng mite ahi a, Megiddo le a khuaneute-a teng mite ahi zongin hawlkhia lo uh ahih manin Kanaan gammite tua leitangah tenglai uh hi." 
Judges1:28 Ahi zongin Israel-te a thahat uh ciangin amaute in aana tawh na a sem dingin Kanaan mite koih uh a, hawlkhia siang lo uh hi." 
Judges1:29 Efraim mite in zong Gezer-ah a teng Kanaan mite hawlkhia lo uh ahih manin Gezer-ah amaute’ lakah Kanaan mite a teng uh hi. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun minamte in Kitron-a teng mite ahi a, Nahalol a teng mite ahi zongin hawlkhia lo a, Kanaan mite amaute lakah tengin aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:31 Asher minamte in Akko a teng mite, Sidon a teng mite, Ahlab a tengte, Akzib a tengte, Helbah a tengte, le Afik a tengte ahi a, Rehob-a tengte ahi zongin hawlkhia lo uh hi." 
Judges1:32 Tua gam a teng Kanaan mite lakah Asher mite teng uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in hawlkhia lo uh hi. 
Judges1:33 Naftali minamte in Bethshemesh-a tengte ahi a, Bethanath-a tengte ahi zongin hawlkhia loin, tua gam a teng Kanaan mite lakah a teng uh hi. Ahi zongin Bethshemesh le Bethanath-a teng mite pen amaute a dingin aana tawh na a sem mite a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:34 Amor mite in mualtung gamah Dan mite notkik uh a, zang gamah paisuksak lo uh hi." 
Judges1:35 Amor mite pen Harheres, Aijalon le Shaalbim-ah teng uh a, ahih hangin Josef minamte in amaute gawt semsem a, amaute pen aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:36 Amor mite’ gamgi pen Akrabbim kahtohna, Sela leilu lam pan kipan hi." 
Judges2:1 Tu-in Gilgal panin Bokhim-ah Topa’ vantungmi paito hi. Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Egypt panin note kong paipihto a, na pu na pate uh tungah piak dinga ka ciam leitangah note kong paipih hi. Keimah in, ‘Note tawh ka thuciam ka siasak ngei kei ding a," 
Judges2:2 hih gam a teng mite tawh thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi. Amau’ biakna taute na susia ding uh hi,’ ka hong ci hi. Ahih hangin note in ka thupiakna na mang kei uh hi. Bang hangin lehgamtat na hi uh hiam?" 
Judges2:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keimah in note’ mai-ah amaute ka hawlkhia kei ding hi. Amaute pen note’ lang suak ding uh a, a pasian-te uh note a dingin thang antah hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges2:4 Topa’ vantungmi in Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen ciangin mite a kap uh hi. 
Judges2:5 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Bokhim, ci-in min phuak uh a, tua lai munah Topa’ tungah biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges2:6 Joshua in mite ciahsak a, Israel mite zong leitang luah dingin amau’ gamh ciatah pai uh hi." 
Judges2:6 Joshua in mite ciahsak a, Israel mite zong leitang luah dingin amau’ gamh ciatah pai uh hi." 
Judges2:7 Mite in Joshua’ nuntak sung le, Israel-te a dingin Topa’ sepsa na lian khempeuh a mu, Joshua sanga sau a nungta zawte khempeuh nuntak sungin Topa’ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:7 Mite in Joshua’ nuntak sung le, Israel-te a dingin Topa’ sepsa na lian khempeuh a mu, Joshua sanga sau a nungta zawte khempeuh nuntak sungin Topa’ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:8 Tua ciangin Topa’ nasem ahi, Nun’ tapa Joshua, a khan kum za le kum sawmkhat a phak laitakin a si hi." 
Judges2:8 Tua ciangin Topa’ nasem ahi, Nun’ tapa Joshua, a khan kum za le kum sawmkhat a phak laitakin a si hi." 
Judges2:9 Amaute in Gaash Mual leilu lam, Efraim mualtung gam sung, Timnathheres-a ama luahna huam sungah a vui uh hi." 
Judges2:10 Tua ciangin tua khangmite khempeuh zong si khin uh a, amaute’ khit ciangin Topa hitaleh, Israel-te a dingin a septe hitaleh a thei lo khangthak hong piang uh hi." 
Judges2:11 Tua ciangin Israel mite, Topa’ muhna-ah a sia gamta-in Baal-te’ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:12 Egypt panin amaute a paikhiatpih a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa amaute in nusia uh hi. Amau’ kiima om mite’ pasian dangte’ nung zui-in, tuate’ mai-ah kun uh a, amaute in Topa hehsak uh hi." 
Judges2:13 Amaute in Topa nusia uh a, Baal-te le Ashtaroth pasian-te bia uh hi." 
Judges2:14 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sinso a, amaute’ na a sut, mi’ na a sut thei mite’ tungah amaute a pia hi. A kiima om a galte uh tungah amaute pia a, amaute in a galte uh nangzo nawn lo uh hi." 
Judges2:15 Galsim dingin amaute a kuankhiat sialun, Topa in a hilhkholhsa le Topa in amaute tungah a kiciamsa bangin amaute’ langkhatah a sia lamin Topa pang hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungkhamna tuak uh hi." 
Judges2:16 Tua ciangin, amaute’ na a sutgawp mite’ vangliatna panin amaute a honkhia thukhente Topa in khangsak hi." 
Judges2:17 Ahi zongin amaute in a thukhente uh thu ngai lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in pasian dangte bia-in tuate’ mai-ah kun uh hi. Topa’ thupiakna a mang amau’ pute pate’ tot lampi panin amaute pial pah uh a, amaute in Topa’ thu mang lo uh hi." 
Judges2:18 Topa in amaute a dingin thukhente a khansak sialin Topa in thukhente huh a, thukhente’ nuntak sung tawntung a galte uh khutsung panin amaute hon hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a gimsak a nengniamte’ hangin amau’ tauna in Topa’ hehpih nading piangsak hi." 
Judges2:19 Ahih hangin thukhente a sih peuhpeuh ciangin amaute kihei kikin a pu a pate uh sangin a siazaw-in gamta zel uh hi. Adang pasian-te’ nung zui uh a, amaute’ na semin a mai uhah kun uh hi. Amaute’ gamtatnate uh ahi a, a lungkhauhnate uh ahi zongin khia lo uh hi." 
Judges2:20 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa heh mahmah a, amah in, “Hih mite in amau’ pulepate’ tungah ka thupiak ka thuciamna khialin keima thu ngai lo uh ahih manin," 
Judges2:21 Joshua a sih lai-in a nusiat minamte khat zong tu a kipanin amaute’ mai-ah ka hawlkhia kei ding hi. 
Judges2:21 Joshua a sih lai-in a nusiat minamte khat zong tu a kipanin amaute’ mai-ah ka hawlkhia kei ding hi. 
Judges2:22 Amau’ pute pate in Topa’ lampi a zuih bangin zuih ding a don uh hiam, a don kei uh hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin hih mite tawh Israel mite ka ze-et ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua minamte thakhatin hawlkhia loin koihcing a, Joshua’ khut sungah amaute pia lo hi." 
Judges2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua minamte thakhatin hawlkhia loin koihcing a, Joshua’ khut sungah amaute pia lo hi." 
Judges3:1 Tu-in Israel-te sung panin Kanaan gam sungah galdona a theikha nai lo Israel-te ze-et nadingin Topa in minam pawlkhat a siit hi. 
Judges3:2 Tua khang Israel mite in galdona a theih nading, nidangin galdona a thei ngei lo tua bang mite a hilh theih nading bek ahi hi." 
Judges3:3 Tua a siit minamte: Filistia ulian ngate, Kanaan mi khempeuh, Sidon mite, le Baalhermon Mual panin Hamath lutna ciang dong Lebanon Mual tungah a teng Hiv mite ahi hi." 
Judges3:4 Moses tungtawnin a pu a pate uh a thupiak, Topa’ thupiaknate Israel-te in a mang uh hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin amaute pen Israel-te a kize-etna ahi hi." 
Judges3:5 Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite’ lakah Israel mite teng uh hi." 
Judges3:6 Amaute in a zi dingun a tanute uh la uh a, amau’ tanute a tapate uh tungah a pia uh hi. Amaute in a pasian-te uh a bia uh hi." 
Judges3:7 Topa’ muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta-in, Topa amau’ Pasian mangngilh uh a, Baal-te le Asherah milimte a bia uh hi." 
Judges3:8 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sinso a, amah in Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushanrishathaim tungah amaute a pia hi. Israel mite in Kushanrishathaim’ na kum giat sung a sem uh hi." 
Judges3:9 Ahih hangin Topa’ tungah Israel mite kiko uh a, Topa in Kaleb’ naupa Kenaz’ tapa Othniel, amaute a honkhia dingin a khangsak hi." 
Judges3:10 Topa’ Kha ama tungah tung a, amah, Israel mite’ thukhen a suak hi. Galsim dingin kuankhia a, Topa in ama khut sungah Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushanrishathaim a pia hi." 
Judges3:11 Tua ahih ciangin a gam in kum sawmli sung tawlngakna hun nei hi. Tua ciangin Kenaz’ tapa Othniel a si hi. 
Judges3:12 Tua ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta kik uh ahih ciangin Topa in Israel-te’ langkhatah Moab kumpipa Eglon thahatsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ muhna-ah amaute a sia gamta uh hi. 
Judges3:13 Eglon in Ammon mite le Amalek mite ama kiangah khawm a, va kuanin Israel-te va zo hi. Amaute in nisuh khuapi a luah uh hi." 
Judges3:14 Israel mite in Moab kumpi Eglon’ na kum sawm le giat sung a sem uh hi. 
Judges3:15 Ahih hangin Topa’ tungah Israel mite a kiko uh ciangin, Topa in Benjamin mi, Gera’ tapa a veikhoi Ehud, amaute’ honpa dingin a khangsak hi. Israel mite in ama tungtawnin Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah siah a puak uh hi." 
Judges3:16 Ehud in ama a dingin langnih a hiam, pi khat le alang a sau namsau khat bawl a, a puannuai a taklam phei tungah tua namsau a khih hi." 
Judges3:17 Tua ciangin amah in Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah a siah sung hi. Eglon pen a thau mahmah mi khat ahi hi. 
Judges3:18 Ehud in a siahsun’ a man khit ciangin siah a puak mite ciahsak hi. 
Judges3:19 Ahih hangin Gilgal kiang suang milimte omna panin amah kileh kikin, “Kumpipa aw, nang tungah gen ding thusim khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Gam dai un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amah a cing mi khempeuh ama omna panin paikhia uh hi." 
Judges3:20 Innkhum zang inndei a votna sungah amah guak tu-in a om laitakin ama kiangah Ehud hong pai hi. Ehud in, “Pasian’ kiang panin nang tungah gen ding thu khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tutna panin amah dingto hi." 
Judges3:21 Tua ciangin Ehud in a veilam khut tawh a taklam phei panin a namsau la-in, tua pa’ gil sungah a siatsuk hi." 
Judges3:22 A namsau banah a bul zong tum a, a thau in a namsau tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gil panin amah in a namsau dok lo a, a ek lawtkhia hi." 
Judges3:23 Tua ciangin inndei pua-ah Ehud paikhia-in, innkhumzang inndei kongkhakte amah khaknelhin tuate a kalh hi." 
Judges3:24 Amah a paikhiat khit ciangin nasemte hong pai hi. Innkhumzang inndei kongkhakte a kikalh a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Inn vot sunga inndei-ah awnghawh hi in teh,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi." 
Judges3:25 A cih nading uh a theih loh zah dong uh ngak uh hi. Ahih hangin innkhumzang inndei kongkhak amah in a hon loh veve ciangin, amaute in a tawhtang la-in hong uh a, sual tungah a topa uh na si hi." 
Judges3:26 Amau’ zia kikalin Ehud tai-in suang milimte kheng a, Seirah-ah a tai hi." 
Judges3:27 Amah a tun ciangin Efraim mualtung gamah peengkul a gingsak hi. Mualtung gam panin Israel mite amah tawh paisuk uh a, amau’ lutangin Ehud a nei uh hi." 
Judges3:28 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ka nung hong zui un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na gal uh Moab mite na khutsung uhah hong piazo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama nungah amaute paisuk uh a, Moab mite kiang panin Jordan ngahmunte la-in, mi khat zong galkahsak lo uh hi." 
Judges3:29 Tua hunin amaute in a thahat a siam Moab mite khempeuh, mi tul sawm bang that uh a, mi khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Judges3:30 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Moab gam pen Israel-te’ khutnuai a suak hi. Tua gam in kum sawmgiat sung tawlngakna a nei hi. 
Judges3:31 Ama khit ciangin Anath’ tapa Shamgar hi a, ciangkhut zum tawh Filistia mite zaguk a that pa ahi hi. Amah in zong Israel-te honkhia hi." 
Judges4:1 Ehud a sih khit ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah Israel mite a sia gamta kik uh hi. 
Judges4:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Hazor-ah a uk, Kanaan kumpipa Jabin’ khut sungah amaute a pia hi. Ama galkapte a ukpa pen, Harosheth-ha-goiim ah a teng Sisera ahi hi." 
Judges4:3 Tua ciangin Israel mite huhna a ngen dingin Topa’ tungah a kiko uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sik leeng zakua nei a, Israel mite kum sawmnih sung nakpitakin gim a pia hi." 
Judges4:4 Tua hun lai-in Lappidoth’ zi kamsang numei Deborah in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges4:5 Tua nu, Efraim mualtung gam sung Ramah le Bethel kikal nisuhkung nuai-ah tu zel a, thu a khensak dingin ama kiangah Israel mite hong pai uh hi." 
Judges4:6 Amah in mi sawlin Naftali gam Kedesh panin Abinoam’ tapa Barak samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian in nang thu hong pia-in, ‘Pai in, Tabor Mual-ah na mite khawm inla, Naftali minam le Zebulun minam panin mi tul sawm bang la in hong ci hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Judges4:7 Keimah in Jabin’ galkapmang Sisera, Kishon gun-ah nang hong dawntuah dingin a leengte le a galkapte tawh ka kaikhia ding a, na khut sungah amah kong pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:8 Barak in ama kiangah, “Kei na hong zuih ding le, ka kuan ding hi. Ahih hangin kei tawh nong kuan kei ding le, ka kuan kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “Nang tawh kong kuan taktak ding hi. Ahi zongin gualzawhna pen nangma min than nading hi lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in numei khat’ khut sungah Sisera pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Deborah dingin Barak tawh Kedesh-ah pai hi." 
Judges4:10 Barak in Kedesh-ah Zebulun minam le Naftali minamte a sam hi. Ama kiangah mihing tul sawm bang kuanto uh a, amah tawh Deborah kuanto khawm hi." 
Judges4:11 Tu-in Moses’ zi’ sanggampa Hobab’ suanlekhak Ken mite sung panin Ken mi Heber paikhia a, Kedesh kianga Zaanannim-a tawsaw ciang pekah a puanbuk a lam hi." 
Judges4:12 Abinoam’ tapa Barak, Tabor Mual-ah paito khin, ci-in Sisera kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
Judges4:13 Sisera in a leeng khempeuh, sik leeng zakua, le ama kianga om mi khempeuh, Harosheth-ha-goiim panin Kishon gun-ah a samkhia hi." 
Judges4:14 Tua ciangin Deborah in Barak kiangah, “Pai in! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khut sungah Sisera hong piak ni ahi hi. Na mai-ah Topa pai hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing tul sawm bang in zui-in Tabor Mual panin Barak a paisuk hi." 
Judges4:15 Topa in Barak’ mai-ah Sisera le a leengte khempeuh a taisak hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a leeng tung pan tuakin a khe-in a tai hi. 
Judges4:16 Barak in Harosheth-ha-goiim ciang dong a leengte le a galkapte delh a, Sisera’ galkapte khempeuh namsau tawh kithatin beimang uh a, mi khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Judges4:17 Ahih hangin Sisera, Ken mi Heber’ zi Jael’ puanbukah a khe-in a tai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hazor kumpipa Jabin le Ken mi Heber’ innkuante kilem uh hi." 
Judges4:18 Sisera a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong kihei in, ka topa aw, kei lamah hong kihei in; lau kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama puanbukah Sisera hong pai a, tua nu in sualphah puan khat tawh amah na khuh hi." 
Judges4:19 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Hong thum ing, dawn ding tui hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka dangtak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in bawngnawi koihna savun thawl hongin dawnsakin amah a khuhkik hi." 
Judges4:20 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Puanbuk kongah ding inla, mi khatpeuh hong pai-in na kiangah, ‘Hih lai-ah mi khatpeuh a om hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Om kei,’ na ci in,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:21 Ahih hangin Heber’ zi Jael in puanbuk khetphim khat la a, a khutah sek khat tawi-in ama kiangah damtakin pai a, a gimluatna hangin ihmucipin a om laitakin a khetphim in lei a bat dongin a paangah a khensuk hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a si hi." 
Judges4:22 En in, Barak in Sisera hong delh ciangin amah a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong pai in, na mi zon kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nu’ puanbuk sungah amah hong pai hi. Tua lai-ah Sisera a paangah puanbuk khetphim tawh a si-in na om hi." 
Judges4:23 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Israel mite’ mai-ah Pasian in Kanaan kumpi Jabin nuaisiah hi. 
Judges4:24 Israel mite in Kanaan kumpipa Jabin a suksiat matengin Kanaan kumpipa Jabin tungah thuak hak semsem uh hi. 
Judges5:1 Tua ciangin Deborah le Abinoam’ tapa Barak in tua ni-in la sa uh a," 
Judges5:2 “Makaite in Israel-te makai uh a, mite amau mahmah utna tawh kipia uh hi. Topa phat un." 
Judges5:3 Ngai un, kumpite aw, na bil uh ngat un, uliante aw. Topa tungah la ka sa ding a, Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa’ tungah la ngaih ka sa ding hi." 
Judges5:4 Topa aw, Seir panin na paikhiat ciang, Edom gam panin na paikhiat ciang, leitung ling a, vantung panin guah zu hi. Hi hi, meiite in tui hong khia a," 
Judges5:5 Topa’ mai-ah mualte kiling hi, Israel Pasian, Topa’ mai Sinai galkhatah." 
Judges5:6 “Anath’ tapa Shamgar’ hun lai, Jael’ hun lai-in, a hon hona khualzinte om nawn lo a, khualzinte lam gei-ah pial uh hi." 
Judges5:7 Israel sunga lo khote khawlcip uh a, bangmah sem thei lo uh hi. Nang, Deborah, nong khan mateng, Israel sungah nu banga nong khan mateng." 
Judges5:8 A thak pasian-te a kiteel ciangin, kulhkongpi sungah gal om pah hi. Lum ahi a, tei ahi zongin, Israel tul sawmlite lakah kimu ahi hiam?" 
Judges5:9 Mite lak panin utna tawh amau a kipia tawm Israel a ukte’ lamah ka lungsim pai hi. Topa phat un. 
Judges5:10 “A thu gen un, no la puang tungah a tuangte, sualphah puanhoih tungah a tute le lampi-ah a paite aw." 
Judges5:11 Tui phuala lasakna a tumte’ ginna in Topa’ gualzawhna gen a, Israel sunga lo khote in zong a gualzawhna mah genkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ mite kulhkongpite-ah paisuk uh hi." 
Judges5:12 “Khanglo in, khanglo in, Deborah! Khanglo in, khanglo in, la khat sa in! Tho in, Barak, na galmatte paikhiatpih in, Abinoam’ tapa aw." 
Judges5:13 Tua ciangin ulianpa’ mi a omlaite paisuk uh a, ama a’ ding a dosak dingin Topa’ mite paisuk uh hi." 
Judges5:14 Efraim panin amaute dingkhia-in tua kuamah pai uh a, nang, Benjamin, na behte tawh hong zui uh hi. Makhir panin a ukte hong paisukin, Zebulun panin ulianpa’ ciangkhut a tawite hong paisuk uh hi." 
Judges5:15 Issakhar uliante Deborah tawh hong pai a, Barak tungah Issakhar thuman hi. Kuam sung ama khe phungah amaute kituah uh hi. Reuben behte lakah nakpi taka lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi." 
Judges5:16 Bang hangin tuukhawkte lakah tuuhonte a dingin tamngai kitum a ngai dingin zekai na hi hiam? Reuben behte lakah nakpi taka lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi. 
Judges5:17 Jordan galkhatah Gilead om hi. Dan minamte bang hangin teembaw tawh om ahi hiam? Asher minamte, tuipi gei-ah tu lai a, leilak a tunna gei-ah a teng uh hi." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun mite a sih dongun gal sungah a kipia ngam mi hi a, Naftali minamte zong, gamlak a sangna munah tua bangmah ahi hi." 
Judges5:19 “Kumpite hong pai-in do uh hi. Tua ciangin Kanaan kumpite in Megiddo tuite’ gei, Taanak-ah do uh a, amaute in a kinusia ngunte ngah lo uh hi." 
Judges5:20 Vantung panin aksite in do uh a, amau paina ciat panin Sisera do uh hi." 
Judges5:21 Kishon guntui khang in amaute tai a, a leeng vanvan tuikhang, Kishon tuikhang in tai hi. Thakhauh takin mai nawtsuak ding!" 
Judges5:22 Tua ciangin sakol khe, a kop taina, a sakol hangte’ koptaina a ging hi." 
Judges5:23 “ Topa’ vantungmi in, ‘Meroz khua samsia in, a sunga teng mite nasia takin samsia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a huh dingin a thahatpa dona-ah Topa a huh dingin hong kuan lo uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:24 “Numeite lakah thupha ngah phapen Jael, Ken mi Heber’ zi, puanbukah a teng numei lak pan thupha ngah phapen ahi hi." 
Judges5:25 Sisera in tui ngen a, Jael in bawngnawi pia hi. Ulian hai sungah tua nu in bawngnawi thaukhal paipih hi." 
Judges5:26 Amah in puanbuk khetphim a khutin zam a, a taklam khutin nasemte’ khetbuk a zam hi. Sisera khatvei sat a, a lutang satkhamin, amah in phelkhamin a paang a sun hi." 
Judges5:27 Amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. Tua nu’ khe kiangah amah taang loin om hi. Ama khe phungah amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. A tukna munah, amah a si-in puk hi." 
Judges5:28 “Tawlet panin Sisera’ nu khuadak a, a kikalh simsiam kawm panin Sisera’ nu khuadak hi: ‘Bang hangin a leeng hong ciah ding hih tanvei sawt ahi hiam? A leeng khegingte bang hangin hici zekai ahi hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:29 A numeite a pilpennu in amah a dawng hiam, dawng lo hi. Amah le amah kidawng a," 
Judges5:30 ‘Amaute in vankinusiate mu-in hawm hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khat ciangin nungak khat ahih kei leh nih pai; a kinusia puan kinimte Sisera a’ ding, a kinusia puan kinim a kizemte, a kinim a kizem puan nihte ka ngawng a ding maw?’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:31 “Tua ahih ciangin na gal khempeuh si khin uh hi, Topa! Ahih hangin na lawmte pen a vangliatna tawh a suak ni bang ta hen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam in kum sawmli sung tawlngakna hun a nei hi." 
Judges6:1 Topa’ muhna-ah Israel-te a sia gamta uh a, Topa in Midian-te’ khut sungah amaute kum sagih sung a pia hi." 
Judges6:2 Israel-te tungah Midian-te gualzo uh hi. Midian-te’ kiang panin a buk nadingun leihawmte le munmuanhuaite a bawl uh hi. 
Judges6:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te in khai a tuh peuhmah uh ciangin Midian-te le Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite hong pai-in amaute sim uh hi. 
Judges6:4 Amaute a sim nadingun giahphual satin Gaza kiim ciangciang dong lei pana piangte susia uh a, Israel mite a nuntak nading bangmah nusia loin, tuu ahi a, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi zongin siit nei lo uh hi." 
Judges6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a ganhingte le a puanbukte uh tawh kauphe honpi bangin tamin hong pai uh a, amaute le a kalaohte uh kisim zo lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute hong tun ciangin gamteng beisak uh hi." 
Judges6:6 Midian-te’ hangin Israel-te kiniamkoih mahmah a, Israel mite in Topa’ tungah huhna ngenin kiko uh hi." 
Judges6:7 Midian-te’ hangin Israel mite Topa’ tungah a kiko uh ciangin," 
Judges6:8 Topa in Israel mite kiangah kamsang khat a sawl hi. Amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Salsuahna Egypt panin note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Judges6:9 Egypt mite le note hong nengniam mi khempeuh khut sung panin note kong honkhia a, note’ mai-ah amaute hawlkhia-in, amau’ leitang note kong pia hi." 
Judges6:10 Tua ciangin note kiangah, ‘Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Na tenna uh Amor mite’ pasian-te zahtakna na pia kei ding uh hi,’ kong ci hi. Ahih hangin note in ka thu na ngai kei uh hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:11 Tua ciangin Ofrah khua-ah Topa’ vantungmi hong pai a, Abiezer mi Joash neihsa tawsaw nuai-ah hong tu hi. Tua laitakin Joash’ tapa Gideon in Midian mite’ muh loh dingin leenggah sukna-ah mangbuh cil simin na om hi." 
Judges6:12 Topa’ vantungmi ama tungah kilangin ama kiangah, “ Topa in nang hong ompih hi, a thahat a vanglian mipa aw,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:13 Gideon in ama kiangah, “Kong thum hi, sia aw, Topa in kote hong ompih ahihleh, bang hangin hih thu khempeuh ko tungah hong tung ahi hiam? Ka pate un kote tungah hong genin, ‘ Topa in Egypt panin eite hong paipih hi lo ahi hiam?’ a cih uh a lamdang ama sepnate khempeuh koi-ah om ta ahi hiam? Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in kote hong paaikhia-in Midian-te’ khut sungah hong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:14 Tua ciangin ama lamah Topa kihei-in, “Hih nangma thahatna tawh pai inla, Midian-te’ khutsung panin Israel-te honkhia in. Nangmah hong sawl khin hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges6:15 Tua ciangin Gideon in ama kiangah, “Kong thum hi, Topa aw, Israel-te bangci hotkhiat zawh ding ka hi hiam? En in, Manasseh minam sungah keima behte a hat lo pen hi a, ka innkuan sung panin kei a neupen ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:16 Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang kong ompih ding a, nangmah in mihing khat bang lelin Midian-te na vatgawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in nong hehpih zawh leh, kei tawh a kiho mi pa pen nang na hihna lim khat hong lak in." 
Judges6:18 Kong thum hi, letsong puakin nang kiangah hong pai-in nangma mai-ah kong koih mateng hih lai panin na paikhia kei in,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nong tunkik mateng ka na om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:19 Tua ahih ciangin Gideon a inn-ah pai-in keelno khat le annel seu khat silngo sawh loh moh a bawl hi. A sa ciang sung khatah koihin a satui beel sung khatah koih a, tawsaw nuai ama kiangah tuate hong paipihin a pia hi." 
Judges6:20 Tua ciangin Pasian’ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Sa le silngo sawh loh moh la-in, hih suang tungah koih inla, a tungah satui sung in,” a ci hi. Tua bangmahin amah in a hih hi." 
Judges6:21 Tua ciangin Topa’ vantungmi in a khutsung a om ciangkhut dawn dawksakin, sa le silngo sawh loh mohte a su hi. A suang panin mei piangkhia-in, sa le silngo sawh loh moh a kangtum hi. Tua ciangin ama muhna panin Topa’ vantungmi a mang hi." 
Judges6:22 Tua ciangin Gideon in amah pen Topa’ vantungmi ahihlam a thei hi. Gideon in, “Ala, Topa Pasian! Topa’ vantungmi mai kituahin ka mukha khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:23 Ahih hangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Nopna na tungah hong om ta hen; lau kei in, na si kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in Topa a dingin biakna tau khat tua lai-ah lamin tua pen, “ Topa in nopna ahi hi”, ci-in min a phuak hi. Tua pen, Abiezer mite’ neihsa Ofrah khua-ah tuni dongin a dinglai hi." 
Judges6:25 Tua zanin Topa in ama kiangah, “Na pa’ bawng sung pan kum sagih a pha a bawngtal nih la inla, na pa’ neih Baal biakna tau phelin, a gei-a om Asherah milim phuk in." 
Judges6:26 Tua ciangin hih lai munmuanhuai dawnah Topa na Pasian a dingin biakna tau khat lamin, a suangte a ngeina ding bangin koih in. Tua ciangin a bawngtal nih la-in, na phuk Asherah milim sing tawh meihal biakna-in pia in,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:27 Tua ahih ciangin Gideon in a nasemte mi sawm paipihin, Topa in ama tungah a gen bangin a hih hi. Ahih hangin sunin a hih ding a innkuanpihte le a khuamite kihta lua ahih manin zanin a hih hi." 
Judges6:28 Tua khua mite zingsang tungin a thawh uh ciangin, Baal biakna tau kiphelkhia-in a gei-a om Asherah milim kiphuk a, a kilam thak biakna tau tungah bawngtal a nihna a kipia a mu uh hi." 
Judges6:29 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Hih na kua in hih ahi hiam?” kici uh hi. Amaute in a thu kanin a dot uh ciangin, “Joash’ tapa Gideon in hih hi,” kici uh hi." 
Judges6:30 Tua ciangin tua khuamite in Joash kiangah, “Na tapa in Baal biakna tau phelkhia-in a gei-a om Asherah milim phuk ahih manin ka thah theih nadingun amah hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges6:31 Ahih hangin Joash in ama langkhatah a pang mite khempeuh tungah, “Baal panpih ding a, ama tupna hutpih ding na hi uh hiam? Amah a panpih peuhmah zingsang ciangin kithat ding hi. Amah pasian ahihleh amahmah kihu tawm tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama biakna tau a kiphelsak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:32 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Gideon, “Keima langkhatah Baal pangsak un,” a cihnopna ahi Jerubbaal min kiphuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gideon in a biakna tau a phel hi." 
Judges6:33 Tua ciangin Midian mite, Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite khempeuh hong paikhawm uh a, amaute in Jordan kantanin Jezreel Kuam-ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Judges6:34 Ahih hangin Gideon’ tungah Topa’ kha hong tung hi. Amah in peengkul gingsak a, amah a zui dingin Abiezer mite kisamkhia hi." 
Judges6:35 Amah in Manasseh gam khempeuhah kamtaite sawl a, amaute zong amah a zui dingin kisam hi. Amah in Asher, Zebulun le Naftali minamte kiangah kamtaite sawl a, amah a pawm dingin amaute zong paito uh hi." 
Judges6:36 Tua ciangin Gideon in Pasian kiangah, “Na gensa bangin keima tha tawh Israel-te na hotkhiat ding leh," 
Judges6:37 en in, ancilna sual tungah tuumul lom khat ka koih hi. Tuumul tung bekah daitui omin leilak dang khempeuh a keu leh, na gensa bangin keima tha tawh Israel-te na honkhia ding hi, cih ka thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:38 Tua bangmahin a piang hi. A zing ciangin tho baihin a tuumulte a tui suk a, tuumul panin tui hai khat dim a sukkhia hi." 
Judges6:39 Tua ciangin Gideon in Pasian kiangah, “Kei tungah hong heh kei in, tu-a khatvei bek hong pausak lai in, kong thum hi; tuumul tawh hih khatvei bek hong sinsak lai in, kong thum hi. Tuumul tung bek keusak inla, mun dang leitung khempeuhah daitui omsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:40 Tua bangmahin Pasian in tua zanin a hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuumul tung bek keu a, mun dang leitung khempeuhah daitui a om hi." 
Judges7:1 Tua ciangin Jerubbaal (Gideon a cihna) le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zingsangin tho baihin Harod tuikhuk gei-ah giahphual a sat uh hi. Midian-te’ giahphual pen amau’ kiang pan leilu lam, Moreh mual kiang, kuam sungah om hi." 
Judges7:2 Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Amau’ khut sungah Midian mite piak nadingin nang tawh a omkhawm mite kei a dingin tamlua hi. Tua bangin tamlua leh kei tungah Israel-te kisialin, ‘Komau’ hatna hangin ka gualzo uh hi,’ ci kha ding uh hi." 
Judges7:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mite’ zakin taangko inla, ‘Lau-in a ling mi peuhmah a inn-ah ciah un,’ ci in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute ze-et hi; tul sawmnih le tulnih ciahkikin, tul sawm bang bek omlai hi." 
Judges7:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Mite tamlua lai ahih manin tui gei-ah amaute paipih in. Nang a dingin tua munah amaute kong sinsak ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi,’ ka cih pa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuan lo ding hi,’ ka cih peuhpeuh pa kuan lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tui phualah mite paipih suk hi. Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Ui in a liah bangin a lei tawh tui a liak mi peuhmah na tuamkoih ding hi. Tua mah bangin tui dawn dingin a khukdin suk peuhmah zong na tuamkoih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:6 Tui a liak, a khut uh a kamah a tuah mi zathum ahi hi. Ahih hangin a dangte khempeuh tui dawn dingin khukdin suk uh hi." 
Judges7:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Tui a liak mi za thumte tawh nangmah hong honkhia-in, na khut sungah Midian mite kong pia ding hi. A dangte khempeuh amau’ inn ciatah ciahsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:8 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Israel midang khempeuh ciahsak a, a beelte le a peengkulte khempeuh uh a kem mihing za thumte a khawlsak hi. Midian-te’ giahphual pen amau’ khanglam kuam sungah om hi." 
Judges7:9 Tua zan mahin Topa in ama kiangah, “Tho in, giahphual simin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah kong piazo hi." 
Judges7:10 Ahih hangin na simsuk ngam kei leh, na nasempa Purah tawh a giahphual nai uhah paisuk in." 
Judges7:11 Tua ciangin amaute’ thugen na za ding a, giahphual simin a kuansuk dingin na tha hong khauh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nasempa Purah tawh giahphual a om galkapte in a pualamah a galpanna munah a paisuk uh hi." 
Judges7:12 Midian mite, Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite khempeuh kauphe bangin tamin kuam dungah om uh hi. A kalaohte uh simzawh hi lo a, a tamna pen tuipi gei-a sehnel omzah bang ahi hi." 
Judges7:13 Gideon a tun ciangin, mi khat in a lawmpa kiangah mang khat na gen hi. Amah in, “Ngai in, mang khat ka man hi. Midian-te giahphual sungah mangbuhham tawh a kibawl moh khat hong tuksukin puanbuk hong ban a, puanbuk deng kha-in puanbuk puk a, puanbuk kilumletin leilakah kiphah hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:14 Tua ciangin a lawmpa in dawngin, “Hih pen, Israel mi Joash’ tapa Gideon’ namsau lo adang hi lo hi. Pasian in ama khut sungah Midian le mihon khempeuh pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:15 Gideon in a mang le a khiatna a kigenna a zak ciangin Pasian bia-in a khukdin hi. Israel-te’ giahphual ah ciahkik-in, “Tho un, bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khutsung uhah Midian honte hong piazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:16 Amah in mihing za thumte pawl thumin khenin, amaute khempeuh tungah peengkul le beel sungah meilah a om beel hawmte a pia hi." 
Judges7:17 Amaute kiangah, “Keimah hong en unla, a giahphual nawl ka tun ciangin kei’ hih bangin hih un." 
Judges7:18 Kei le ka ompih khempeuh in peengkul ka tum uh ciangin, giahphual pang khempeuhah zong peengkulte tum unla, ‘ Topa -a’ ding le Gideon a’ ding,’ ci-in awng un,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:19 Tua ahih ciangin, amaute in galvil a laih khit phet, zankim laitakin, Gideon le amah tawh a om mi za khatte giahphual nawlah hong pai uh a, amaute in peengkul tumin a khutsung uha om beelte a sukham uh hi." 
Judges7:20 A pawl thumun peengkul tumin beelte sukham uh a, a veilam khutun meilah tawi-in, a taklam khutun a tum ding uh peengkul tawi uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiko-in, “ Topa a’ ding le Gideon a’ ding namsau khat!” a ci uh hi." 
Judges7:21 Amaute a vekpi-in giahphual kiimah ding uh a, a galte khempeuh uh kiko-in taikhia uh hi." 
Judges7:22 Amaute in peengkul za thumte a tum uh ciangin, Topa in a galte khempeuh a namsau uh tawh amau le amau kisatgawp sak hi. Tua ciangin a galte uh Zererah gei Bethshittah ciang, le Tabbath kiang Abelmeholah gamgi dong tai uh hi." 
Judges7:23 Tua ciangin Naftali, Asher, le Manasseh minamte khempeuh sung panin mite kisamkhia a, amaute in Midian-te a delh uh hi." 
Judges7:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in Efraim mualtung gam khempeuhah kamtaite sawl a, “Midian mite’ langkhatah hong kuansukin Bethbarah ciang dong luite hong la unla, Jordan zong hong la un,” cisak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Efraim mite khempeuh kisamkhia a, amaute in Bethbarah ciang dong luite la-in, Jordan zong a la uh hi." 
Judges7:25 Amaute in Midian ulian nihte Oreb le Zeeb a man uh hi. Amaute in Midian-te a delh kawmun Oreb Suangpi-ah Oreb that uh a, Zeeb Leenggahsukna ah Zeeb that uh hi. Amaute in Jordan galkhat Gideon kiangah Oreb le Zeeb lutangte hong paipih uh hi." 
Judges8:1 Tua ciangin Efraim mite in Gideon kiangah, “Midian-te a do dingin na kuancil lai-in kote nong sap loh, kote hong bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in nakpitakin amah mawhsak uh hi." 
Judges8:2 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh teh dingin kote bang hi lel ka hi uh hiam? No Efraim minamte’ sep a themno khat pen ko minam bup khempeuhte’ sep sangin thupizaw hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Judges8:3 Pasian in note’ khut sungah Midian uliante Oreb le Zeeb hong piazo hi. Note tawh teh dingin kote in bang hihzo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah hih bangin kam a pau ciangin ama tunga amau’ hehna a bei hi. 
Judges8:4 Tua ciangin Gideon le amah tawh a om mi za thumte, Jordan tungin galkah uh a, a gimpi mahin amaute delh lai uh hi." 
Judges8:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sukkoth mite kiangah, “Kong thum hi, kei hong zuite tungah anlum pawlkhat pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute gim uh a, Midian kumpi Zebah le Zalmunna a delh ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:6 Tua ciangin Sukkoth uliante in, “Na galkapte tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah le Zalmunna na khut sungah omkhin ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:7 Tua ciangin Gideon in, “Tua ahihleh pha hi. Topa in Zebah le Zalmunna ka khut sungah hong piak khit ciangin gamlak lingte le lingkungte tawh na sa uh ka kuikek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:8 Tua lai panin Penuel-ah paito a, amaute tungah zong tua mah bangin a gen hi. Penuel mite in Sukkoth mite’ dawn mah bangin amah na dawng uh hi." 
Judges8:9 Tua ciangin amah in Penuel mite kiangah, “Lungnuamin kong paikik ciangin hih tausang ka supai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:10 Tu-in Zebah le Zalmunna-te, Nisuahna lam mi galkap khempeuh sung pan a omlaiteng, mihing tul sawm le tulnga bang bek a pha lai a galkapte uh tawh Karkor-ah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau a tawi mi tul za le tul sawmnih si khin hi." 
Judges8:11 Tua ciangin Nobah le Jogbehah nisuahna lam mihonte’ tot lampi zui-in Gideon paito-in a galte va bingphawn’ hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a galte uh galvil om lo hi. 
Judges8:12 Tua ciangin Zebah le Zalmunna tai uh hi. Amah in amaute delhin Midian kumpi nihte Zebah le Zalmunna manin amau’ galkap khempeuh kithehthang sak hi. 
Judges8:13 Tua ciangin Joash’ tapa Gideon a galsimna panin Heres kahtohna lam tawnin ciahkik hi. 
Judges8:14 Amah in Sukkoth mi tangval khat manin thu dong hi. Tua pa in ama a dingin uliante le upate mihing sawmsagih le sagih a min gelhsak hi. 
Judges8:15 Tua ciangin Sukkoth mite kiangah amah tungin, “Kei tungah hong kisialin, ‘A gim na mite tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah le Zalmunna na khut sungah omkhin ahi hiam?’ na cih uh Zebah le Zalmunna en un,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:16 Tua ciangin amah in a khuapi upate sam a, gamlak lingte le lingkungte zong la-in, tuate tawh Sukkoth mite a thuhilh hi." 
Judges8:17 Tua ciangin amah in Penuel tausang supai-in tua khua mite a that hi. 
Judges8:18 Tua ciangin amah in Zebah le Zalmunna kiangah, “Tabor-ah na thah uh mite koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amaute, nangmah bang uh hi; amaute in kumpipa’ tapate suun uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:19 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute, ka sanggam, ka laigui zoppihte ahi uh hi. Topa a nuntak mah bangin, amaute suaktasak hi le-uhcin note kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:20 Tua ciangin amah in a ta upa pen Jether kiangah, “Ding in, amaute that in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tangvalpa in a namsau dok ngam lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah tangval lai ahih manin a lungsim hang nai lo hi." 
Judges8:21 Tua ciangin Zebah le Zalmunna in, “Nangmahmah ding inla, kote hong hih in; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nasep a sem dingin pasal mah kisam hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Gideon dingin Zebah le Zalmunna that a, amau’ kalaohte’ ngawng a a om khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate a la hi." 
Judges8:22 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gideon kiangah, “Nang le na tapa le na tupa dongin zong kote hong uk un; bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-te’ khutsung panin kote nong honkhia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:23 Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note kong uk kei ding a, ka tapa in zong note hong uk lo ding hi. Topa in note hong uk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note tung panin kong ngetnop khat om hi. Note in van kinusia na top uh lak panin bilbahte hong pia un,” a ci hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Ishmael mite ahih manin kham bilbah nei uh hi.)" 
Judges8:25 Amaute in dawngin, “Lungkim takin kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in puan phah uh a, mi khempeuh in van kinusia a top uh lak panin bilbahte tua puan tungah a lawn uh hi." 
Judges8:26 Ama nget kham bilbahte a gihna pen kham shekel tulkhat le zasagih ahi hi. Midian kumpite in a zat khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate, khainiangte, puan dupsante le a kalaohte uh ngawng kimkotah a om ngawng-awhte a kisim lo ahi hi." 
Judges8:27 Tua ciangin Gideon in tuate mi limin bawlin ama khuapi Ofrah khua-ah a koih hi. Israel-te khempeuh in tua lai munah tua milim bia uh a, Gideon le a innkuanpihte a dingin thangzak khat a suak hi." 
Judges8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite’ mai-ah Midian-te guallel uh a, amaute kihisak zo nawn lo uh hi. Gideon’ hun sungin tua gam in kum sawmli sung lungnopna a nei hi." 
Judges8:29 Joash’ tapa Gideon pai-in ama aituam inn-ah a teng hi. 
Judges8:30 Tu-in Gideon in tapa sawmsagih, ama a’ mahmah nei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zi tampi nei hi." 
Judges8:31 Shekhem-ah a om a zineu in zong tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Abimelek a phuak hi." 
Judges8:32 Tua ciangin Joash’ tapa Gideon teeksih a, Abiezer mite’ neihsa Ofrah khua-a om a pa Joash’ hanah kivui hi." 
Judges8:33 Gideon a sih khit phetin Israel mite kihei kikin Baal-te bia uh a, a pasian dingun Baalberith a bawl uh hi." 
Judges8:34 Israel mite in, mun khempeuh panin amau’ galte’ khutsung pan a honkhia Topa a Pasian uh phawk lo uh hi." 
Judges8:35 Jerubbaal in Israel-te tungah a bawl thuhoihte khempeuh hangin amaute in Jerubbaal innkuante tungah lungdamna bangmah lak lo uh hi. 
Judges9:1 Tu-in Jerubbaal’ tapa Abimelek, Shekhem a a nu’ tanaute kiangah pai-in amaute khempeuh kiangah," 
Judges9:2 “Shekhem khuami khempeuh huau-in gen un, ‘Jerubbaal’ tapa sawmsagihte a vekpi in note hong uk ding le khat in note hong uk ding, note a dingin koi hoihzaw ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. Kei pen note’ guh note’ sa ka hihna zong phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:3 Tua ciangin a nu’ tanaute in ama tangin Shekhem mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute’ lungsim Abimelek zuih ding lamah hoi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah i naihuai ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges9:4 Tua ciangin amaute in Baaberith inn panin ngun pek sawmsagih Abimelek pia uh a, amah in ama nung a zui, bangmah-a a kimang lo le thu ngaihsun thei lo mite cialna hi." 
Judges9:5 Tua ciangin Ofrah-a a pa’ inn-ah amah pai-in, Jerubbaal’ tapa a sanggam mi sawmsagihte suang khat tungah a that hi. Ahih hangin amah bu ahih manin Jerubbaal’ tapa neupen Jotham a suakta hi." 
Judges9:6 Tua ciangin Shekhem khuamite khempeuh le Bethmillo khuamite khempeuh hong paikhawm uh a, amaute in Shekhem khua-a tawsaw songpi kiangah Abimelek kumpi a suaksak uh hi." 
Judges9:7 Jotham kiangah tua thu a kigen ciangin amah pai-in Gerizim Mual dawnah ding a, nakpi-in kiko-in amaute kiangah, “No Shekhem mite aw, Pasian in note’ thu hong ngaih theih nadingin ka thu hong ngai un." 
Judges9:8 Khatvei, singkungte amau’ tungah kumpi-in sathau a nilh dingin kuankhia uh a, amaute in oliv kung kiangah, ‘Kote hong uk in,’ a ci uh hi." 
Judges9:9 Ahih hangin oliv kung in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in pasian-te le mite a kipahtawina ahi ka thaunate nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:10 Tua ciangin singkungte in theikung kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:11 Ahih hangin theikung in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in ka khumna le ka gah hoihte nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:12 Tua ciangin singkungte in leenggui kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:13 Ahih hangin leenggui in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in pasian-te le mite a lungnuamsak ka leenggahzu nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:14 Tua ciangin singkung khempeuh in thangling kung kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:15 Thangling kung in singkungte kiangah, ‘Note tungah kumpi-in lungsim tak tawh sathau hong nilh na hih uhleh, hong pai unla, ka liimah hong bu un. Ahi zongin ka liim nuai-ah nong buk kei uhleh, thangling kung lak panin meikuang hong paikhia hen la, Lebanon taamtak kungte kangtum hen,’ ci hi." 
Judges9:16 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Abimelek kumpi-in na bawl uh ciangin lungsimtak le thumantak mah tawh a gamta na hi uh hiam? Jerubbaal le a innkuan tungah thuman takin gamta-in ama sepna tawh a kituakin amah a bawl mah na hi uh hiam? 
Judges9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa in note a’ ding hong dosakin a lauhuaina sungah a nuntakna pia a, Midian-te’ khutsung panin note hong honkhia hi." 
Judges9:18 Ahi zongin tuni-in ka pa’ innkuan langkhatah note pangin a tapate mi sawmsagih suang khat tungah na that uh a, ka pa in a nasem numei tawh a neih a tapa Abimelek pen note’ naihuai ahihna hangin Shekhem khuamite tungah kumpi-in na bawl uh hi." 
Judges9:19 Note in tuni-in Jerubbaal le a innkuanpihte tungah lungsimtak le thumantak tawh a gamta takpi mah na hih uhleh, Abimelek tungah note lungdam unla, note tungah zong amah lungdam tahen." 
Judges9:20 Ahih hangin tua bang ahih takpi kei leh, Abimelek sung panin meikuang hong paikhia hen la, Shekhem le Bethmillo khuamite kangtum hen. Shekhem khuamite sung pan le Bethmillo khuamite sung panin meikuang hong pai hen la, Abimelek kangtum hen,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:21 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Abimelek a kihtakna hangin Jotham taikhia-in Beer-ah pai-in tua lai-ah a teng hi. 
Judges9:22 Abimelek in Israel-te tungah kum thum sung uk hi. 
Judges9:23 Pasian in Abimelek le Shekhem mite kikalah kigalneihna omsak a, Shekhem mite in Abimelek lehdo uh hi." 
Judges9:24 Tua pen, Jerubbaal tapa sawmsagihte a kithahna thu tawh kisai-in, amaute a that a sanggampa uh Abimelek, le a sanggamte thah nadingin a hanthawn Shekhem mite tungah thukkikna hong tuntheih nadingin a kibawl mahmah ahi hi." 
Judges9:25 Tua hi a, Shekhem mite in Abimelek a pangsim dingin mual dawnah mi koih uh a, amaute in tua lam a tawn mi khempeuhte’ na na sut uh hi; hih thu Abimelek kiangah kigen hi." 
Judges9:26 Tua ciangin Ebed’ tapa Gaal a tanaute tawh Shekhem-ah hong kikhin uh hi. Shekhem mite in amah muang uh hi. 
Judges9:27 Amaute lo-ah kuanin a leenggui uh panin leenggah khawmin cil uh a, pawi khamin amaute’ pasian’ inn-ah pai uh a, an ne tui dawnin omin Abimelek zahko uh hi." 
Judges9:28 Tua ciangin Ebed’ tapa Gaal in, “Abimelek, kua hi a, ama na i sepsak dingin ei Shekhem mite kua ihi hiam? Jerubbaal’ tapa le ama ulian Zebul in Shekhem mite’ pulepa Hamor’ na sem uh hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ama na sem ding ihi hiam?" 
Judges9:29 Hih mite keima khutnuai hileh! Abimelek ka khinkhia ding hi. Abimelek kiangah, ‘Na galkap behlap inla hong kuankhia in,’ ka ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:30 Tua khuapi a uk Zebul in Ebed tapa Gaal’ kammalte a zak ciangin heh mahmah hi. 
Judges9:31 Amah in Arumah khua-a om Abimelek kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “En in, Ebed tapa Gaal le a tanaute Shekhem-ah hong pai-in nang langpangin tua khuapi sosuah hi." 
Judges9:32 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na ompih mite tawh zanin pai unla, gamlakah pangsim un." 
Judges9:33 Tua ciangin zingsang ni a suah phetin tho baih unla, khuapi simgawp un. A ompih mite tawh nang a do dingin hong kuankhiat ciangun ahi thei bangin amaute tungah na bawl ding uh hi,” cisak hi." 
Judges9:34 Tua ciangin Abimelek le amah tawh a om mite khempeuh zanin tho-in pawl li kisuahin Shekhem a sim dingin pangsim uh hi. 
Judges9:35 Tua ciangin Ebed tapa Gaal paikhia-in khuapi kulhkongpi lutna-ah ding a, Abimelek le amah tawh a om mite zong a pansimna panun dingto uh hi." 
Judges9:36 Gaal in tua mite a muh ciangin amah in Zebul kiangah, “En in, mual dawn panin mite hong paisuk!” a ci hi. Zebul in ama kiangah, “Mual liimte mi bangin a mu na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:37 Gaal pau kikin, “En in, a gam laizang panin mite hong paisuk a, Aisante’ Tawsaw lam panin pawlkhat hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:38 Tua ciangin Zebul in ama kiangah, “Tu-in na kamhanna koi-ah om ahi hiam? ‘Ama na i sep dingin Abimelek kua ahi hiam?’ a ci pa hi lo na hi hiam? Hih mite, na simmawhte hi lo ahi hiam? Tu-in paikhia inla amaute tawh kido in,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:39 Tua ciangin Shekhem mite’ mai-ah Gaal kuankhia-in Abimelek tawh kido hi. 
Judges9:40 Abimelek in Gaal delh a, ama mai-ah Gaal a tai hi. Kulhkongpi lutna ciang dong nangawnah mi tampi liamin tuk hi." 
Judges9:41 Tua ciangin Arumah ah Abimelek a teng hi. Zebul in Gaal le a tanaute hawlkhia a, amaute Shekhem-ah teng thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Judges9:42 A zing ciangin gamlakah Shekhem mite paikhia uh hi. Hih thu Abimelek kiangah kigen hi. 
Judges9:43 Amah in a mite la-in pawl thum suahin gamlakah pangsim uh hi. Tua ciangin amah khuadakin khuapi panin mite a kuankhia mu a, amaute do-in kipan a, amaute that hi." 
Judges9:44 Abimelek le amah tawh a om a pawlte in thakhatin mainawt uh a, ama pawldang nihte in gamlak a om mite delhin a thah sungin khuapikulh lutna-ah amaute na ding uh hi." 
Judges9:45 Abimelek in sun tawntung tua khuapi sim a, tua khuapi la-in a sunga om mite that a, tua khuapi phiatin ci a vawh hi." 
Judges9:46 Shekhem Tausang mite khempeuh in tua thu a zak uh ciangin Elberith’ inn munmuanhuai-ah lut uh hi. 
Judges9:47 Shekhem Tausang mite khempeuh kikaikhawm uh hi, ci-in Abimelek kiangah kigen hi." 
Judges9:48 Tua ciangin amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tawh Zalmon Mual-ah Abimelek kuanto hi. Abimelek in a khutin hei khat la-in selkeu lom khat sat a, tuate la to-in a liangko tungah koih hi. Tua ciangin amah tawh a om mite kiangah, “Kei’ hih nong muhsa bangun kei’ hih bangbangin manlangin hih un,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:49 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in amau a’ ding ciat selkeu tomin Abimelek zui-in munmuanhuai sim nadingin koih uh a, amaute in mei tawh munmuanhuai halin Shekhem Tausang mite, numei le pasal mi tulkhat bang a si hi." 
Judges9:50 Tua ciangin Thebez-ah Abimelek pai a, Thebez langpangin giahphual sat a, tua khua a la hi." 
Judges9:51 Ahih hangin tua khuapi sungah tausang muanhuai om a, tua khua numei le pasal, tua khuami khempeuh tua tausangah tai-in kikhaknelh uh a, tausang khumah amaute om uh hi." 
Judges9:52 Tua ciangin Abimelek zong tausangah pai-in sim a, mei tawh a hal dingin tausang kongkhak a naih hi." 
Judges9:53 Numei khat in an gawina suangpek tungnung, Abimelek’ lu tungah lawnin a lu guh dengkham hi." 
Judges9:54 Tua ciangin amah in ama hiam a tawisak tangvalpa nawh sapin ama kiangah, “Na namsau dok inla kei hong that in. Tua hikeileh mite in, ‘Numei khat in amah that hi,’ hong ci kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi. A tangvalpa in amah sunletin amah a si ta hi." 
Judges9:55 Israel mite in Abimelek a sihna a muh uh ciangin amau’ inn ciatah a ciah uh hi. 
Judges9:56 Ama sanggam sawmsagihte thatin a pa tungah a khialhna hangin tua bangin Pasian in Abimelek’ khialhna a thuk ahi hi. 
Judges9:57 Pasian in Shekhem mite khempeuh’ gitlohna hangin Jerubbaal’ tapa Jotham’ samsiatna bangin amau’ tungah gimna a tungsak hi. 
Judges10:1 Abimelek khit ciangin Israel-te a honkhia dingin Issakhar minam Dodo’ tapa Puah, Puah’ tapa Tola hong khang a, Efraim mualtung gam Shamir-ah a teng hi." 
Judges10:2 Amah in Israel-te kum sawmnih le kum thum sung thu khen hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, Shamir-ah kivui hi." 
Judges10:3 Ama khit ciangin Israel-te kum sawmnih le kum nih sung thu a khen Gilead mi Jair hong khang hi. 
Judges10:4 Amah in la sawmthum tungah a tuang tapa sawmthum a nei hi. Amaute in Gilead gam sunga om tu dongin Havvothjair a kici khuapi sawmthum nei uh hi. 
Judges10:5 Tua ciangin Jair si-in Kamon-ah kivui hi. 
Judges10:6 Tua ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah Israel mite a sia gamta kik uh a, Syria mite’ pasian-te, Sidon mite’ pasian-te, Moab mite’ pasian-te, Ammon mite’ pasian-te, Filistia mite’ pasian-te le Baal-te, le Ashtaroth bia uh a, amaute in Topa nusia-in ama na sem lo uh hi." 
Judges10:7 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sinso a, amah in Filistia mite tung le Ammon mite tungah amaute pia a," 
Judges10:8 amaute in Israel mite tua kum sugawpin nengniam uh hi. Amaute in Jordan galkhat Gilead gam sunga om Amor mite’ leitangah a om Israel mite khempeuh kum sawm le kum giat sung nengniam uh hi. 
Judges10:9 Judah, Benjamin, le Efraim minamte a sim dingin Ammon mite Jordan hong galkah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te nakpitakin lungkham uh hi." 
Judges10:10 Tua ciangin Topa tungah Israel-te kiko uh a, “Nang tungah kong khial khin uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kote in ka Pasian uh nusia-in Baal-te ka bia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges10:11 Topa in Israel mite kiangah, “Egypt-te le Amor mite, Ammon mite le Filistia mite kiang panin hong honkhia hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Judges10:12 Sidon mite, Amalek mite, le Maon mite in note hong nengniam uh hi. Kei tungah note nong kiko uh a, keimah in amaute’ khutsung panin note kong honkhia hi." 
Judges10:13 Tua hinapi-in note in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte na bia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note kong honkhia nawn kei ding hi. 
Judges10:14 Pai unla note’ teel pasian-te tungah ko un. Na lungkham hunun amaute kihonkhia sak un,” a ci hi." 
Judges10:15 Ahi zongin Israel mite in Topa tungah, “Ka khial khin uh hi. Hoih na sak bangin ko tungah hong hih in. Tuni-in hong honkhia in, kong thum uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges10:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in amau’ lak panin gamdang pasian-te koih khia-in Topa a bia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ gentheihna ah amah a dah hi.
