Judges10:17 Tua ciangin Ammon mite galhiam tawi dingin kisam uh a, Gilead-ah giahphual sat uh hi. Israel mite zong kikaikhawmin Gilead gam sung Mizpah-ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Judges10:18 Tua ciangin Israel mihonte le makaite khatlekhat in, “Ammon mite do dinga a kipan ngam kua om ihi hiam? A kipan ngam mipa, Gilead gam a teng mite khempeuh tungah lutang hi ding hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Judges11:1 Tu-in Gilead khuami Jefthah, a thahat galhang khat hi a, ahih hangin amah pen zawlta ahi hi. Jefthah’ pa Gilead hi a," 
Judges11:2 Gilead’ zi in zong amah tawh tapa dang nei hi. A tapate a khan ciangun amaute in Jefthah notkhia-in ama kiangah, “Ka pa uh inn sungah gamh na luah kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen numei dang tawh zawlta na hi lel hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:3 Tua ciangin a sanggamte kiang panin Jefthah tai-in Tob gam sungah teng a, bangmah a man lo mite in Jefthah pawmin amah tawh mite sugawpin pai kawikawi uh hi." 
Judges11:4 Tawlkhat khit ciangin Ammon mite in Israel-te sim uh hi. 
Judges11:5 Ammon mite in Israel-te a sim ciangin Tob gam panin Jefthah a la dingin Gilead upate va pai uh hi. 
Judges11:6 Amaute in Jefthah kiangah, “Ammon mite i do theih nadingin hong pai inla kote’ makai hong hi in,” va ci uh hi." 
Judges11:7 Ahih hangin Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in kei hong mudahin ka pa’ inn pan hong hawlkhia hi lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin thuhaksa na tuah uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi." 
Judges11:8 Tua ciangin Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “Kote tawh nang hong pai-in Ammon mite do-in Gilead gam sunga teng mi khempeuh tungah lutang nong hih theih nadingin nang’ lamah hong kihei ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:9 Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in Ammon mite a do dingin inn-ah kei nong ciahpih uh a, kei tungah Topa in amaute hong piak leh kei pen note’ lutang ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:10 Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “ Topa pen eite’ kikalah teci hi ding hi. Na cih bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Gilead upate tawh Jefthah pai a, mite in amau’ tungah lutang le makai-in amah koih uh hi. Jefthah in hih thute khempeuh Mizpah khuasung Topa’ mai-ah a gen ahi hi." 
Judges11:12 Tua ciangin Jefthah in Ammon mite’ kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Ka gam a sim dingin kei kiangah nong pai nadingin kei’ tungah bang thu om ahi hiam?” cisak hi." 
Judges11:13 Ammon mite’ kumpipa in Jefthah’ kamtaite dawng a, “Egypt panin Israel-te hong pai lai-in Arnon panin Jabbok le Jordan ciang ka gam hong laksak hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in thudamin hong piakik in,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:14 Jefthah in Ammon mite’ kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlkikin 
Judges11:15 ama kiangah, “Jefthah in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-te in Moab leitang hitaleh Ammon mite’ leitang hitaleh la lo hi." 
Judges11:16 Egypt panin Israel-te hong paitoh lai-in gamlak tawnin San Tuipi-ah hong pai-in Kadesh hong tung uh hi. 
Judges11:17 Israel-te in Edom kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawl a, ‘Kong thum uh hi; na gam sung hong nawksak in,’ cisak uh hi. Ahih hangin Edom kumpipa in a thu ngai lo hi. Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa kiangah zong sawl uh a, ahih hangin amah thukim lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kadesh-ah Israel-te om phot uh hi." 
Judges11:18 Tua ciangin sehnel gam tawnin amaute khualzin uh a, Edom gam le Moab gam kimkotin pai-in Moab gam nisuahna lampangah tung uh a, Arnon gun galkhatah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin Moab gam sungah amaute lut lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Arnon gun pen Moab gamgi ahi hi." 
Judges11:19 Tua ciangin Israel-te in Heshbon khua-ah a om Amor mite’ kumpi Sihon kiangah kamtaite sawl uh hi. Israel-te in ama kiangah, ‘Kong thum uh hi; ka gam uh a zuan dingin na gam hong nawksak in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges11:20 Ahih hangin Sihon in ama gam a nawk dingin Israel-te muang lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Sihon in a mite khempeuh kaikhawmin Jahaz-ah giahphual sat a, Israel-te na sim hi." 
Judges11:21 Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian in Sihon le a mite khempeuh Israel-te’ khut sungah pia a, amaute in zo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gam sunga teng Amor mite’ leitang khempeuh Israel-te in luah uh hi." 
Judges11:22 Amaute in Arnon gun panin Jabbok lui ciang leh sehnel gam panin Jordan gun ciang, Amor mite’ gam khempeuh a luah uh hi." 
Judges11:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian in ama mi Israel-te’ mai panin Amor mite paaikhia hi. Tu-in nangmah in luahkik ding sawm na hi hiam?" 
Judges11:24 Na pasian Khemosh in na neih dinga hong piakte kem peuh in. Kote ahihleh Topa ka Pasian un kote’ mai-ah a suankhiatte ka tang ding uh hi. 
Judges11:25 Tu-in nang pen Moab kumpipa, Zippor’ tapa Balak sangin ginazaw na hi hiam? Amah in Israel-te to ngei a, amaute do ngei ahi hiam?" 
Judges11:26 Heshbon le a khuaneute, Aroer le a khuaneute, le Arnon gun panga om khuapite khempeuh sungah Israel-te a ten kum zathum hun sung tengin bang hangin lakik lo na hi hiam?" 
Judges11:27 Tua ahih ciangin nang tungah ka khial kei a, kei nong simna-ah kei tungah nang nong khial hi. Topa, Thukhen pa in Israel mite le Ammon mite kikalah tuni-in thu khen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:28 Ahih hangin Ammon kumpipa in ama kiangah thu a puak Jefthah’ thu a don kei hi. 
Judges11:29 Tua ciangin Jefthah’ tungah Topa’ kha hong tung a, amah in Gilead le Manasseh nawkin Gilead gam Mizpah-ah paisuak a, Gilead gam Mizpah panin Ammon mite kiangah paisuak lai hi." 
Judges11:30 Jefthah in Topa tungah thuciamna bawlin, “Ka khut sungah Ammon mite nong piak leh" 
Judges11:31 Ammon mite kiang panin gualzo-in ka ciah ciangin keimah a dawn dingin ka innsung pan a hong pai peuhpeuh Topa a’ hi ding a, meihal biak nadingin kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:32 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a sim dingin Ammon mite kiangah Jefthah galkah a, Topa in ama khut sungah amaute a pia hi." 
Judges11:33 Amah in Aroer panin Minnith kiimnai ciang dong khuapi sawmnih, le Abelkeramim ciang dong mi tampi tak thatin a vatgawp hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite mai-ah Ammon mite guallel uh hi." 
Judges11:34 Tua ciangin Mizpah-a ama inn-ah Jefthah hong ciah hi. Amah a dawn dingin a tanu khuangneute tawh a laamsa-in hong paikhia hi. Tua nu pen ama ta khat neihsun hi a, amah simloh tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin adang nei lo hi." 
Judges11:35 Amah in a tanu a muh ciangin a puan balkekin, “Ala, ka tanu! Kei nong niamkoih mahmah hi. Kei a dingin lungkhamna lianpi nong suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa tungah thu ka ciam khin a, ka thuciamna ka dokkik thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:36 Tua ciangin a tanu in ama kiangah, “Ka pa aw, Topa tungah thu ciam khin na hih leh, na thuciamna tawh kizui-in kei’ tungah hong bawl in. Tu-in Topa in na gal Ammon mite tungah nang a’ ding hong thuksak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:37 Tua ciangin amah in a pa kiangah, “Kong ngetnop thu khat om hi. Kei pai-in mualtungah vak kawikawi-in kei le ka lawmte in nungak-in ka sih nading hangin ka thum theih nadingun kha nih sung kei guak hong omsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:38 Amah in, “Pai ta in,” a ci hi. Amah in kha nih sung a tanu paikhia sak hi. Tua ciangin amah le a lawmte paikhia-in nungakin a sih nading hangin mualte tungah kapin a thum uh hi." 
Judges11:39 Kha nih a cin ciangin a pa kiangah amah ciahkik a, amah in ama bawlsa a thuciamna bangin a tanu tungah hih hi. Tua nu pen pasal tawh a lumkhawm nai lo, nungakin khansih hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te sungah ngeina khat suak a," 
Judges11:40 Israel numeite kum khatin ni li sung kum simin Gilead mi Jefthah’ tanu hangin a thum dingin paikhia uh hi. 
Judges12:1 Efraim mite galhiam tawi dingin kisam uh a, amaute Zafon gun kantanin galkah uh a, Jefthah kiangah, “Bang hangin Ammon mite a sim dingin galkahin, nang tawh a kuankhawm dingin kote hong zawn lo na hi hiam? Na inn tawh nang kong halnelh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges12:2 Tua ciangin Jefthah in amaute kiangah, “Kei le ka mite in Ammon mite tawh buaina lianpi khat ka nei ngei uh hi. Note kong sap hangin amau’ khutsung panin kei nong honkhia kei uh hi." 
Judges12:3 Note in kei nong hotkhiat loh ding uh ka theih ciangin kei mahmah hanciam tawmin Ammon mite a sim dingin ka galkah a, Topa in kei’ khut sungah amaute hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin tuni-in kei a hong sim dingin hong kuan na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges12:4 Tua ciangin Jefthah in Gilead mite khempeuh khawmin Efraim mite tawh kido uh hi. Gilead mite in Efraim mite vatgawp uh hi. (Efraim mite in, “No Gilead mite pen Efraim-te le Manasseh-te sung panin Efraim mite a taisante na hi uh hi,” ci ngei uh hi.)" 
Judges12:5 Gilead mite in Efraim mite tung panin Jordan ngahmunte la uh hi. Efraim galtaite khat peuhpeuh in, “Hong galkah sak in,” a cih ciangin Gilead mite in ama kiangah, “Efraim mi na hi hiam?” ci uh hi. Amah in, “Hi kei ing,” a cih ciangin" 
Judges12:6 amaute in ama kiangah, “Tua ahihleh Shibboleth ci in,” ci uh a, tua ciangin amah in, “Sibboleth,” ci hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a manin ci thei lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah manin Jordan ngahmunte-ah that uh hi. Tua tungin Efraim mi tul sawmli le tulnih tuk hi." 
Judges12:7 Jefthah in Israel mite kum guk sung thu khen hi. Tua ciangin Gilead mi Jefthah si a, Gilead gam ama khuapi sungah kivui hi." 
Judges12:8 Ama nungah Bethlehem khuami Ibzan in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges12:9 Amah in tapa sawmthum nei hi. Ama beh pualam mite tungah tanu sawmthum mo kha a, a pualam panin a tapate a dingin tanu sawmthum la hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sagih sung thu khen hi." 
Judges12:10 Tua ciangin Ibzan si a, Bethlehem-ah kivui hi." 
Judges12:11 Ama nungah Zebulun mi Elon in Israel-te kum sawm sung thu khen hi. 
Judges12:12 Tua ciangin Zebulun mi Elon si a, Zebulun gam Aijalon-ah kivui hi." 
Judges12:13 Ama nungah Pirathon mi Hillel’ tapa Abdon in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges12:14 Amah in la sawmsagihte tungah a tuang tapa sawmli le tupa sawmthum nei hi. Amah in Israel-te kum giat sung thu khen hi. 
Judges12:15 Tua ciangin Pirathon mi Hillel’ tapa Abdon si a, Amalek mite’ mualtung gam Efraim leitang tung, Pirathon-ah kivui hi." 
Judges13:1 Topa’ muhna-ah Israel mite a sia gamtakik uh a, Topa in Filistia mite’ khut sungah kum sawmli sung amaute a pia hi." 
Judges13:2 Dan minam sung panin Zorah khuami Manoah min nei mi khat om hi. Ama zi tasel ahih manin ta nei lo hi. 
Judges13:3 Topa’ vantungmi tua numei kiangah kilangin ama kiangah, “En in, na tasel a, ta na nei kei hi. Ahi zongin tu-in gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi." 
Judges13:4 Tua ahih ciangin kidawm inla, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin ne loin, a nin bangmah ne kei in." 
Judges13:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi. Ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang pen a suah a kipanin Pasian’ tungah Nazir mi hi ding a, amah in Filistia mite’ khutsung panin Israel-te hotkhiat ding kipan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:6 Tua ciangin tua nu pai-in a pasal’ kiangah gen a, “Pasian’ mi khat ka kiangah hong pai a, ama mel pen Pasian’ vantungmi mel tawh kibangin dipkuathuai mahmah hi. Koi panin hong pai cih amah ka dong kei a, amah in ama min hong gen lo hi." 
Judges13:7 Ahih hangin amah in kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin ne kei inla, a nin bangmah ne kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang pen a suah a kipan a sih dong Pasian’ tungah Nazir mi hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:8 Tua ciangin Manoah in Topa kunh a, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; na hong sawl Pasian’ mipa ko’ kiangah hong paisakkik inla, a hong suak ding naupang ka bawl nading uh hong hilhsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:9 Pasian in Manoah’ aw ngai-in lo lai-ah tua nu a tut laitakin Pasian’ vantungmi ama kiangah hong pai hi. Ahih hangin a pasal Manoah amah tawh om lo hi. 
Judges13:10 Tua ciangin tua nu nawhsa-in tai-in a pasal kiangah, “En in, zanhal a kei kiangah hong pai mipa ka kiangah hong kilang kik hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:11 Tua ciangin Manoah dingin a zi zui a, mipa kiangah pai-in, “Hihnu kiangah thugenpa nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:12 Tua ciangin Manoah in, “Na thugente a manin hong tun ciangin naupang’ nuntakna zia ding bang hi a, amah in bang hih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:13 Tua ciangin Topa’ vantungmi in Manoah’ kiangah, “Numei’ kiangah ka gente khempeuh na kidawm hen." 
Judges13:14 Amah in leenggui pana piang peuhmah ne thei lo ding a, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin ne thei loin, a nin na khat peuhpeuh ne thei lo ding hi; amah ka thupiak khempeuh tang hen,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:15 Manoah in Topa’ vantungmi kiangah, “Kong thum hi; tawlkhat khawl inla, nang a dingin keelno khat hong bawlsak nung,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:16 Topa’ vantungmi in Manoah kiangah, “Nong khawlsak zongin na an ka ne kei ding hi. Ahih hangin meihal biak nading a baihsa-in na bawl leh Topa tungah pia in,” a ci hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh Manoah in amah Topa’ vantungmi ahihlam thei lo hi.)" 
Judges13:17 Manoah in Topa’ vantungmi kiangah, “Na thugente a manin hong tun ciangin nang kong pahtawi theih nadingun, na min bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:18 Topa’ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Hih thu a lamdang hi, ci-in thei napi-in bang hangin ka min hong dong na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:19 Tua ahih ciangin Manoah in an-a biakna tawh a keelno la-in nalamdang a bawl Topa a dingin suang tungah a pia hi. 
Judges13:20 Biakna tau panin vantung lamah meikuang a paitoh ciangin, Manoah le a zi in a et laitakun biakna tau meikuang sungah Topa’ vantungmi kahto hi. Tua ciangin amaute leilakah a bok uh hi." 
Judges13:21 Manoah le a zi’ tungah Topa’ vantungmi kilang nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin Manoah in amah Topa’ vantungmi ahihlam thei hi. 
Judges13:22 Manoah in a zi kiangah, “Pasian mu khin ihih manin i si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:23 Ahih hangin a zi in ama kiangah, “ Topa in eite thah hong sawm hileh, i meihal biakna le an tawh i biakna hong sang lo ding a, hih nate khempeuh hong lak loin, hih bang nate zong eite’ tungah hong pulak lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:24 Tua numei in tapa khat nei-in a min Samson a phuak hi. Naupang khangto a, Topa in thupha a pia hi." 
Judges13:25 Tua ciangin Topa’ kha in Zorah le Eshtaol kikal Mahanehdan ah Samson hanthot ding a kipan hi. 
Judges14:1 Khatvei Timnah-ah Samson va paisuk a, Timnah-ah Filistia nungak khat mu hi." 
Judges14:2 Tua ciangin amah ciahto-in a nu le a pa kiangah, “Filistia nungak khat Timnah-ah ka mu hi. Ka zi dingin va la un,” a ci hi." 
Judges14:3 Ahih hangin a nu le a pa in ama kiangah, “Nang pai-in dawibia Filistia mite kiang panin zi na lak nadingin na tanaute’ lak ahi a, i mipih khempeuh lakah ahi zongin numei khat beek om lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:4 A nu le a pa in hih thu pen Topa’ kiang pan ahihlam thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Filistia mite tungah paulap ding a zong ahi hi. Tua hun laitakin Filistia mite in Israel-te uk uh hi. 
Judges14:5 Tua ciangin a nu le a pa tawh Timnah-ah Samson paisuk a, Timnah leenggui lote-ah amah tung hi. Tua lai-ah humpinelkai khanglai khat in amah hawksan hi." 
Judges14:6 Tua ciangin ama tungah Topa’ kha khauhtakin hong tung a, mi khat in keelno khat a balgawp bangin amah in a khut guak tawh humpinelkai a balzan hi. Ahih hangin tua bangin ahihna thu a nu tung ahi a, a pa tungah ahi zongin gen lo hi." 
Judges14:7 Tua ciangin amah paisukin a numei tawh kiho hi. Tua nu in Samson lungkimsak mahmah hi. 
Judges14:8 Tawlkhat khit ciangin tua nu a la dingin paikik hi. Humpinelkai luanghawm a en dingin amah lampialin a va et leh humpinelkai luanghawm sungah khuai hon khat le khuaizu na om hi. 
Judges14:9 Amah in a khut tawh tuate sawkin paisuak a, a pai kawmin a ne hi. Amah a nu le a pa kiangah tungin tuate pawlkhat pia a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Ahih hangin humpinelkai luanghawm sung panin tua khuaizu a lakna thu gen lo hi." 
Judges14:10 Tua ciangin numei kiangah a pa paisuk a, Samson in zong tua lai-ah pawi khat a kham hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tangvalte’ hih ngei ahi hi." 
Judges14:11 Mite in amah a muh uh ciangin amah a uap dingin tangval sawmthum hong paipih uh hi. 
Judges14:12 Tua ciangin Samson in amaute kiangah, “Note’ mai-ah thuhaksa khat hong gen ning. Hih pawi ni sagih sungin a thu mukhia-in bang hiam cih nong gentheih uhleh saihadial puan silh sawmthum le pawipuan silh sawmthum note kong pia ding hi." 
Judges14:13 Ahih hangin bang hiam cih nong gentheih kei uhleh saihadial puan silh sawmthum le pawipuan silh sawmthum kei nong pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Na thuhaksa hong gen in, za dih ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:14 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “A ne pa sung panin nek ding pawlkhat hong piang a, a thahatpa sung panin a khum pawlkhat hong piang hi,” a ci hi. Ni thum sungin tua thuhaksa bang hiam cih gen thei lo uh hi." 
Judges14:15 A ni li ni-in amaute in Samson’ zi kiangah, “A thuhaksa bang hiam cih hong gen nadingin na pasal zol in. Tua hi kei le nang le na pa, na inn uh tawh kong hal ding uh hi. Kote a hong zawngsak dingin hih lai-ah hong sam na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:16 Tua ciangin Samson’ zi ama mai-ah kapin, “Kei nong mudah hi, kei nong it kei hi. Ka gam mite tungah thuhaksa na gen a, bang hiam cih kei’ tungah nong gen kei hi,” a ci hi. Amah in numei kiangah, “En in, ka nu kiang hitaleh ka pa kiang hitaleh ah ka gen kei hi. Nang kiangah hong gen tuan ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges14:17 A pawi ni sagih hun sungteng ama mai-ah tua nu kap niloh hi. A ni sagih ni-in Samson in a lawmnu kiangah gen ta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nakpitakin kunh niloh hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in a gam mite kiangah tua thuhaksa gen hi. 
Judges14:18 Tua khuapi mite in a ni sagih ni, ni a tum ma-in ama kiangah gen uh a, “Khuaizu sangin bang khumzaw a, humpinelkai sangin bang hatzaw ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Ka bawngla tawh lo kho khawm lo hi le-uhcin, ka thuhaksa na thei kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges14:19 Tua ciangin Samson’ tungah Topa’ kha khauhtakin hong tung a, Ashkelon ah amah paisukin tua khuamite sawmthum that a, amaute’ nate la-in a thuhaksa a genthei mite tungah a pawipuante a pia hi. A hehsa-in a pa’ inn-ah amaute ciahsan hi." 
Judges14:20 Tua ahih manin Samson’ zi pen a moliah pa’ zi dingin na kipia hi. 
Judges15:1 Tawlkhat khit, mangbuh lak hunin a zi kiangah a hawh dingin keelno khat tawh Samson a pai hi. Amah in, “Inndei sung ka zi kiangah ka lum ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in amah lutsak lo hi." 
Judges15:2 A sungpa in, “Amah mudah taktak hi ni teh, ci-in ngaihsun ka hih manin na lawmpa’ zi dingin ka pia hi. A naunu amah sangin hoihzaw hi lo ahi hiam? A u tangin amah na tenpih nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:3 Samson in, “Tutungin amau tungah siatna ka bawlna-ah Filistia mite tawh kisai-in ka mawh kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:4 Tua ciangin Samson pai-in ngia zathum manin meilah zong a la hi. Amah in a ngia meite khatlekhat kimatsakin a meite kikalah meilah khat ciat hencip hi. 
Judges15:5 A meilahte a kuansak khit ciangin Filistia mite’ ankung dinglaite lakah ngiate paisak a, anphualte le ankung dinglaite, le oliv lote kangtum hi." 
Judges15:6 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in, “Kua in hih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Timnah mite’ makpa Samson in hih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a sungpa in a zi laksakin a lawmpa tungah piaksak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong paito-in tua nu le a pa mei tawh a hallum uh hi." 
Judges15:7 Samson in amaute kiangah, “Hih pen, note’ hih ahihleh, ka kiciam hi. Note kong thuk ding a, tua khit ciangin ka khawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:8 Amah in amaute dawm loin tampi that a, tua ciangin paisukin Etam suanghawm sungah a om hi." 
Judges15:9 Tua ciangin Filistia mite paito-in Judah gamah giahphual sat uh a, Lehi sim uh hi." 
Judges15:10 Judah mite in, “Bang hangin kote simin hong paito na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Samson a hen ding le ko tungah amah in hong hih bangin ama tungah a hih dingin kong paito uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges15:11 Tua ciangin Judah mite mihing tulthum Etam suanghawmah paisukin Samson kiangah, “Filistia mite, eite a hong ukte ahihlam thei lo na hi hiam? Kote’ tungah nang’ hong bawl bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Amaute in kei tungah hong bawl bangin amaute tungah ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:12 Tua ciangin amaute in Samson kiangah, “Filistia mite’ khut sungah nang kong piak theih nadingun nangmah a hen dingin kong paisuk uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Note mahmah in nong thah loh nading uh kei tungah hong kiciam un,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:13 Amaute in Samson kiangah, “Kong that kei ding uh hi. Nang hong henin amaute’ khut sungah kong pia bek ding uh a, nang kong that het kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khauhual thak nih tawh amah hen uh a, tua suanghawm sung panin amah pai khiatpihto uh hi." 
Judges15:14 Lehi-ah Samson a tun ciangin amah a dawn dingin Filistia mite hong pai-in awng uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tungah Topa’ kha khauhtakin hong tung a, a khut tunga om khauhualte pen mei in a kat anthul khau tawh kibang a, amah a kikhihnate a khut panin tolhkhia hi." 
Judges15:15 Tua ciangin amah in la khaguh thak khat mu a, a khut zanin tua khaguh la-in tua tawh mihing tulkhat a that hi." 
Judges15:16 Tua ciangin Samson in, “La khaguh khat tawh a lom lomin, la khaguh khat tawh mihing tulkhat ka that hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:17 Tua a thugen a man khit ciangin a la khaguh paaikhia hi; tua mun pen Ramathlehi kici hi. 
Judges15:18 Tua ciangin amah dangtak mahmah ahih manin Topa samin, “Na nasempa’ tha tawh hih bang suahtakna lian nong piazo hi. Tu-in dangtakin kei si-in dawibia mite’ khut sungah puk ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges15:19 Tua ciangin Pasian in Lehi a om komdep khat hong a, tua sung panin tui hong phul hi. Amah in tua tui a dawn ciangin a tha hong dimkikin thakhauh kik hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun min Enhakkore kici a, tuhun dongin Lehi-ah tua tuikhuk omlai hi." 
Judges15:20 Amah in Filistia mite’ uk hun sung Israel-te kum sawmnih sung thu a khen hi. 
Judges16:1 Ni khat, Gaza khua-ah Samson pai a, tua lai-ah numei paktat khat mu-in tua nu kiangah a giak dingin a pai hi." 
Judges16:2 Gaza mite kiangah, “Samson hong pai,” ci-in kigen a, amaute in tua khua umcihin khuapi kulhkongpi-ah zan tawntung amah pangsim uh hi. Amaute zan tawntung daitakin om uh a, “Zingsang khuavak mateng ngak ni; tua ciangin amah that ni,” ci uh hi." 
Judges16:3 Ahih hangin zankim ciang dong Samson lum a, zankim ciangin tho-in khuapi kulhkongpi kongkhakte le a khuam nihte lenin a zawlte le a na khempeuh botto a, a liangko tungah tuate pua-in Hebron mai-ah a om mual dawnah tuate a tunpih hi." 
Judges16:4 Tua khit ciangin Samson in Sorek kuamah Delilah a kici numei khat ngai hi. 
Judges16:5 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante tua nu kiangah hong pai-in, “Amah hong zol inla, ama hatna koi-ah om hiam cihna le amah i nuaisiah zawh nadingin amah i hen theih nading, amah i zawh theih nading zia hong thei in. Na theihzawh le ngun pek tul le zakhat ciat nang kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:6 Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Na hatna lian koi-ah om a, mi khatpeuh in nang hong zawhtheih nadingin hong bangci kihen ding cihna thu, nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:7 Samson in tua nu kiangah, “Amaute in a keu nai lo thalkhau thak sagih tawh hong hen leh ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:8 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante in tua nu kiangah a keu nai lo thalkhau sagih hong paipih uh a, tua nu in tua khaute tawh amah a hen hi." 
Judges16:9 Tua laitakin tua nu in inndei sungah mi busak hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in ama kiangah, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin, patkhaute in mei a sukkhak ciangin a kitah bangin amah in thalkhaute botsat ziau hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama thahatna thusim kithei zo lo hi." 
Judges16:10 Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “En in, kei nong simmawh a, zuauthu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:11 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Amaute in a kizang nai lo khauhual thakte tawh kei hong hen leh ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:12 Tua ahih ciangin Delilah in khauhual thakte la-in tuate tawh amah hen a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A busim mite inndei sungnungah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Samson in mimkhau bangin khauhualte botsat ziau hi." 
Judges16:13 Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Tu dong kei nong simmawh a, zuauthu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih hong gen in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Ka lu tunga ka sam lom sagihte mimkhau tawh gan khawmin ciampek tawh khen bikbek lecin ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah a ihmut laitakin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte la-in siamin a gan hi. Amah in ciampek tawh khen bikbek a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a ihmutna pan amah khanglo-in a ciampek, a siambu, le a siam a kaikhia hi." 
Judges16:15 Tua ciangin numei in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na lungsim kei tawh a om lopi, ‘Nang kong it hi,’ ci thei na hi hiam? Hih thumvei dong kei nong simmawh a, na thahatna a omna mun nong gen kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:16 Nisimin nakpitakin a kutkut ciangin, sihna dong dingin Samson lunggim hi." 
Judges16:17 Amah in tua nu kiangah a lungsim khempeuh gen a, “Ka lu tungah mulkiatna kitah ngei lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka suah tung a kipan Pasian’ tungah a kipia Nazir mi ka hi hi. Ka sam kimet leh ka hatna in kei hong nusia ding a, ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:18 Ama tungah a lungsim khempeuh gen khin hi, ci-in Delilah in a theih ciangin amah in mi sawlin Filistia mi uliante sam a, “Tu-a khatvei hong pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a lungsim khempeuh kei kiangah hong gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Filistia uliante tua nu kiangah hong pai-in sum zong hong pua uh hi." 
Judges16:19 Tua nu in a phei tungah Samson ihmusak hi. Amah in mi khat samin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte metsak hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in amah gimsak ding kipan a, ama thahatna in amah nusia ta hi." 
Judges16:20 Tua nu in, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A ihmutna panin amah khanglo-in, “Nidanga mah bangin paikhia-in keimah kisingin suakta ning,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a nusiat khitlam amah in thei lo hi." 
Judges16:21 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in amah manin a mitte khelkhia uh a, Gaza-ah paipihin amah sumngo kol a bulh uh hi. Amah in thong sung an gawina-ah an a gawi hi." 
Judges16:22 Ahih hangin a kimet khit ciangin a lu tunga a samte khangkik dingin hong kipan hi. 
Judges16:23 Tu-in Filistia uliante a pasian uh Dagon tungah biakna lianpi khat a pia ding le a gualnuam dingin kikhawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in i khut sungah i gal pa Samson hong piazo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:24 Mite in amah a muh ciangun a pasian uh phat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in eite’ khut sungah i gam a susiapa, eite tampi hong that pa hong piazo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:25 A lungsim uh a nop ciangin amaute in, “Eite a dingin a kimawl theih nadingin Samson sam un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in thong panin Samson samkhia-in amau’ mai-ah mawlpih uh hi. Khuampite kikalah amah kidingsak hi." 
Judges16:26 Samson in ama khut a len tangvalpa kiangah, “Ka kingak theih nadingin innpite a do khuampite hong lawngsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:27 Tua laitakin a innpi pen numei le pasal tawh kidim hi. Samson a kimawlsak laitakin a en Filistia ulian khempeuh le innkhum zangah numei le pasal mi tulthum bang om uh hi. 
Judges16:28 Tua ciangin Samson in Topa samin, “ Topa Pasian aw, kei hong phawk in, kong thum hi. Tu-a ka mittang nihte’ tang dingin Filistia mite ka thuktheih nadingin hong thahatsak in, tu-a bek kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:29 Samson in innpi a do khuampi nihte manin, a khut taklamin khat, a khut veilamin khat lenin ama gihna tawh a khuamte a luai hi." 
Judges16:30 Samson in, “Filistia mite tawh hong sisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a thaneih khempeuh tawh a awng hi. Tua ciangin uliante le inn sunga om mi khempeuh tungah a innpi kicimsuk hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nuntak lai-a a thah sangin a sihna-a a thah a si mi tamzaw hi." 
Judges16:31 Tua ciangin a sanggam pasalte le a innkuanpihte khempeuh hong paisukin a luanghawm la uh a, ciahpihto-in Zorah le Eshtaol kikal-a om a pa Manoah’ hanah a vui uh hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sawmnih sung thu a khen hi." 
Judges17:1 Efraim mualtung gammi Mikah a kici min nei mi khat om hi. 
Judges17:2 Amah in a nu kiangah, “Ngun pek tul le zakhat hong kiguksak lai-in a gu pa na samsiatna thu ka za hi. A ngunte pen keima guk hi a, tu-in hih lai-ah tuate om hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nu in, “Ka tapa aw, Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:3 Amah in ngun pek tul le za khatte a nu kiangah piakik hi. A nu in, “A kiseek milim khat le a kisung milim khat bawl nadingin ka tapa a dingin Topa’ tungah a ngunte ka apsa ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong piakik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:4 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a nu kiangah a sum a piakkik ciangin a nu in zong ngun pek zanih la-in, a kiseek milim khat le a kisung milim khat-a a bawlsak ngunseek pa kiangah pia a, tuate pen Mikah’ inn sungah om hi." 
Judges17:5 Tua mipa Mikah in biakna phual khat nei a, amah in siampipuan khat le innsung pasian-te bawlin siampi a suak dingin a tapate khat a koih hi." 
Judges17:6 Tua hun lai-in Israel sungah kumpi om lo a, mi khempeuh amau’ hoihsak bang ciatin gamta uh hi." 
Judges17:7 Tua hun laitakin Judah gam Bethlehem khua sungah Levi mi tangval khat om hi. 
Judges17:8 Tua mipa a muhna mun peuhpeuhah a teng dingin Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin paikhia hi. Tua bangin khualzinin a pai laitakin Efraim mualtung gam sunga Mikah’ inn-ah va tung hi. 
Judges17:9 Mikah in ama kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Judah gam sung Bethlehem khua-a om Levi mi ka hi a, mun ka muhna peuhah a peem ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:10 Mikah in ama kiangah, “Kei tawh hong omin kei a dingin pa le siampi hong hi in; kum khatin ngun pek sawm, puan silh khat, le annek kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:11 Levi mipa zong Mikah tawh a tengkhawm dingin lungkim hi. Tangvalpa pen ama tungah a tapate khat tawh kibang hi. 
Judges17:12 Mikah in Levi mipa koihin, tangvalpa ama siampi suakin Mikah’ inn-ah a om hi." 
Judges17:13 Tua ciangin Mikah in, “ Topa in kei hong daupaisak ding hi, ci-in tu-in ka thei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampi-in Levi mite khat ka neita hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:1 Tua hun lai-in Israel-te sungah kumpi om lo hi. Tua hun lai-in Dan minamte in a ten nading uh leitang zong uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun dong mateng Israel minamte sung panin amau a’ ding gamhluah bangmah kialo hi. 
Judges18:2 Tua ahih ciangin Dan mite in gam ensimin a va zong dingin amau’ minam bup khempeuh lak panin mi siam nga Zorah le Eshtaol panin a sawl uh hi. Amaute in tua mite kiangah, “Pai unla gam va zong un,” a ci uh hi. Amaute Efraim mualtung gam, Mikah’ inn-ah hong tung uh a, tua lai-ah a taam uh hi." 
Judges18:3 Amaute Mikah’ inn-ah a om uh ciangin Levi mi tangval’ aw khat khenthei uh hi. Amaute kihei-in ama kiangah, “Kua in hih lai-ah nang hong paipih ahi hiam? Hih lai munah bang hih na hi hiam? Hih lai-ah na nasep bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:4 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Mikah in kei hong bawl hi. Amah in kei hong cialin kei pen ama siampi ka suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:5 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Kote’ kuankhiat khualzinna a tangtung ding hiam cih ka theih nadingun Pasian hong dotsak in, kong thum uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in amaute kiangah, “Lung nuamin pai un. Note’ khualzinna thu-ah Topa in hong panpih hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:7 Tua ciangin mi ngate paikhia-in Laish tung uh a, tua lai-a om mite, Sidon mite’ om bang danin daitakin omin bangmah a upmawh lohna, leitungah bangmah kisam loin a hauhna, le amaute Sidon-te’ kiang panin gamla omin kuamah tawh kizopna a neih lohna, lungmuang taka a tenna uh a mu uh hi." 
Judges18:8 Amaute Zorah le Eshtaol-a a sanggamte uh kiangah hong tunkik uh ciangin, a sanggamte un amaute kiangah, “Bang thu gen ding nong nei uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:9 Amaute in, “Ding un, amaute a sim dingin paito ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh a leitang ka mu khin uh a, a lei hoih mahmah hi. Bangmah hih loin ommawk ding na hi uh hiam? Pai ding zekai kei un; lutin leitang va luah ni." 
Judges18:10 Na pai uh ciangin bangmah a ummawh lo mite kiang na tung ding uh hi. Leitang zai mahmah hi. Pasian in na khutsung uhah leitungah bangmah a kisap lohna mun hong pia khinzo takpi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:11 Tua ciangin Dan minamte galhiam a tawi mihing zaguk Zorah le Eshtaol panin kuankhia uh a," 
Judges18:12 amaute paito-in Judah gam sung Kiriathjearim-ah giahphual sat uh hi. Hih thu hangin tuhun dongin tua mun pen Mahanehdan kici hi. Tua pen Kiriathjearim nitumna lamah om hi. 
Judges18:13 Amaute tua lai mun panin Efraim mualtung gamah paisuakin Mikah’ inn-ah a tung uh hi. 
Judges18:14 Tua ciangin Laish gam a ensim dingin a pai mi ngate in a sanggamte uh kiangah, “Hih innte khat sungah siampipuan khat, innsung pasian-te, a kiseek milim khat, le a kisung milim khat a omlam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na hih ding uh ngaihsun un,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:15 Tua ciangin amaute kihei-in Mikah’ inn-a Levi tangvalpa’ omna-ah tung uh a, ama omzia dong uh hi." 
Judges18:16 Tua hun sungtengin galhiam a tawi Dan mi za gukte kulhkongpi lutna-ah ding uh hi. 
Judges18:17 Tua ciangin, galhiam a tawi mi za gukte tawh kulhkongpi lutna-ah siampipa a din khawm laitakin gam ensim dingin a kuankhia mi ngate tumin a kiseek milim, a siampipuan, a innsung pasian-te, le a kisung milim la uh hi." 
Judges18:18 Hih mite Mikah’ inn sungah tumin a kiseek milim, a siampipuan, a innsung pasian-te, le a kisung milim a lak uh ciangin siampipa in amaute kiangah, “Bang hih na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges18:19 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Pau kei in; na khutin na kam hum inla, kote tawh hong pai-in kote a dingin pa le siampi hong hi in. Nang a dingin mi khat’ inn sungah siampi hih ding hoihzaw ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh Israel-te’ sungah minam le beh siampi hih ding hoihzaw ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:20 Tua ciangin siampipa a lungkim hi. Amah in a siampipuan, a innsung pasian-te, le a kiseek milim la-in mite’ lakah a pai hi." 
Judges18:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute’ mai-ah a taneute le a ganhingte le a vante uh omsakin, amaute paikhia uh hi." 
Judges18:22 Amaute Mikah’ inn panin a gamla khopkhat a tun uh ciangin Mikah’ innveng a om mite kikaikhawm uh a, Dan mite delhin a pha uh hi." 
Judges18:23 Amaute in Dan mite a otsan uh ciangin Dan mite hong kihei-in Mikah kiangah, “Hih bang mihon tawh nong delh nading bang thu om ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:24 Amah in, “Note in keima bawlsa ka pasian-te le ka siampipa la-in na paikhia uh hi. Keimah in bang nei nawn ka hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Bang thu ahi hiam?’ bang hangin hong ci thei na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges18:25 Dan mite in ama kiangah, “Kote’ lakah na aw hong kizasak kei in; tua hikeileh ka lawmte uh hehin nang hong hih ding uh a, na innkuanpihte tawh na si kha ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:26 Tua ciangin Dan mite pai uh hi. Mikah in ama a dingin amaute thahat lua hi, ci-in a muh ciangin amah kihei-in a inn-ah a ciahkik hi." 
Judges18:27 Dan mite in Mikah’ bawlsate le a siampipa paipihin, gamdai-in a om, bangmah a ummawh lo mite’ omna Laish tung uh a, namsau tawh amaute vatin mei tawh a khuapi a hal uh hi." 
Judges18:28 Amaute pen Sidon panin gamla uh ahih manin a honkhia ding om lo a, amaute in kuamah tawh kizopna nei lo uh hi. Tua mun pen Bethrehob-te’ neihsa kuam sungah om hi. Amaute in khuapi lamkikin a sungah teng uh hi." 
Judges18:29 Amaute in tua khuapi min pen Israel’ suan amau’ pianna Dan tamin Dan a phuak uh hi. Ahih hangin a masa-in tua khuapi min pen Laish ahi hi. 
Judges18:30 Tua ciangin Dan mite in a kiseek milim amau a dingin phut uh a, Moses’ tupa, Gershom’ tapa Jonathan le ama tapate pen tua gam a kilak hun dong Dan minamte a dingin siampi ahi uh hi." 
Judges18:31 Tua ahih ciangin Shiloh-ah Pasian’ biakbuk a om sungteng Mikah’ bawlsa a kiseek milim tua lai-ah a om hi. 
Judges19:1 Israel-te sungah kumpi a om loh hun laitakin, Levi mite khat Efraim mualtung gam mongah peemin, Judah gam Bethlehem panin zineu khat a la hi." 
Judges19:2 A zineu ama tungah heh a, ama kiang panin paikhia-in Judah gam Bethlehem khua-a a pa’ inn-ah ciah a, tua lai-ah kha li sung khawng a om hi." 
Judges19:3 Tua ciangin a pasal dingkhia-in kam nem tawh a hopih ding le a ciahpih kik dingin tua nu’ nungah a pai hi. Amah in a nasempa le a la nih tonpih hi. A sungpa’ inn-ah tung a, a sungpa in amah a muh ciangin lungdamna tawh a dawn dingin hong pai hi." 
Judges19:4 Tua ciangin a sungpa in amah taamsak a, amah tawh ni thum sung a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne, tui dawnin giakkhawm uh hi." 
Judges19:5 Tua ciangin a ni li ni zingsangin amaute tho baih uh a, pai dingin kithawi uh hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “An tawmkhat ne-in na tha khauhsak in. Tua khit ciangin na pai thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:6 Tua ahih ciangin tua mi nihte tukhawmin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. A sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “Tuzan taam ding lungkim hoh inla, na lung nuamsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:7 A pai dingin mipa a din ciangin a sungpa in a taamkik dong mateng kho hi. 
Judges19:8 Tua ciangin a ni nga ni-in a ding dingin zingsangin amah tho baih hi. A sungpa in, “An ne phot inla, ni a dialh mateng khawl lai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne uh hi." 
Judges19:9 Mipa le a zineu le a nasempa a paikhia dingin a din uh ciangin a sungpa in, “En in, tu-in nitak nai-in ni niamta hi; tuzan taam un. En in, ni tum dektak hi. Hih lai-ah giak inla, na lung nuamsak in. Zing ciang zingsangin tho baihin inn-ah na ciah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:10 Ahih hangin mipa tua zan taam nawn lo hi. Amah dingin paikhia a, Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) galkhat tung hi. Amah pen tuanna a kivawh la nih le a zineu tawh ahi hi." 
Judges19:11 Amaute Jebus kiang nai a tun uh ciangin ni niam khin a, a nasempa in a topa kiangah, “Hih Jebus mite’ khuapi-ah zan taam ni,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:12 A topa in, “Israel mite ahi lo, gamdang mite’ khuapi sungah i taam kei ding hi. Gibeah-ah i paisuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:13 Tua ciangin amah in a nasempa kiangah, “Hong pai in, hih munte khat peuhpeuh va naihin, Gibeah ahih kei leh Ramah-ah zan taam ni,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:14 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khengin paisuak uh a, Benjamin-te’ gam ahi Gibeah khua gei-ah ni tum a," 
Judges19:15 Gibeah-ah pai-in a giak dingin tua khua a zuan uh hi. Amah pai-in khuapisung kongzing laizangah tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a zan taam dingin kuamah in a inn-ah amaute sang lo hi. 
Judges19:16 Tua laitakin puteek khat lo-a a nasepna panin nitak ciangin hong ciah hi. Tua pa pen Efraim mualtung gam pan hi a, amah Gibeah khua-ah a peem hi a, tua khuamite pen Benjamin mite ahi hi." 
Judges19:17 Amah khuadak a, khualzin pa, khuapi kongzingah a mu hi. Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Koi-ah pai ding na hi hiam? Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges19:18 Amah in, “Keima hong paikhiatna Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin Efraim mualtung gam mongah a pai dingin hong nawk ka hi uh hi. Judah gam Bethlehem-ah ka pai hi. Tu-in ka inn-a a ciah ka hi hi. Kuamah in a inn-ah hong tungsak nuam lo hi." 
Judges19:19 Ka late uh a dingin buhtu le gan-an, kei le na nasemnu le na nasemte tawh a om tangvalpa a dingin anlum le leenggahzu ka nei uh a, a kisam bangmah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:20 Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Lunghimawh kei in. Na kisapna khempeuh ka en ding hi. Kongzingah giak kei hamtang in,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:21 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn-ah ciahpihin late gan-an a pia hi. Amaute in a khe uh silin an a ne uh hi. 
Judges19:22 Amaute in a lung uh nuamsakin a om laitakun, tua khuapi mi, mi ginalote in tua inn kimkotah pangin a kongkhak tumgawp uh hi. Amaute in inn nei puteekpa kiangah, “Ama taw ka luk theih nadingun na inn-ah a hong tung mipa hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges19:23 Inn nei pa, amaute kiangah pusuakin amaute tungah, “Hilo hi, ka sanggamte aw; tua bangin gitloh gamtat kei un." 
Judges19:24 En un, hih lai-ah ka ta nungak le ka zin pa’ zineu om hi. Amaute hong paikhiatpih ning. Amaute buanin hoih na sak bangun amaute tungah hih un. Ahih hangin hih mipa tungah tua bang a sia gamta kei un,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:25 Ahih hangin mite in ama thu ngai lo uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mipa in a zineu manin amaute kiangah koihkhia hi. Amaute in tua nu buan uh a, zingsang mateng zan tawntung tua nu hih uh hi. Zingsang khuavak dingin a kipat ciangin amaute in tua nu ciahsak uh hi." 
Judges19:26 Zingsang khua hong vak ciangin a numei hong ciahin, ama topa a omna mipa’ kongkhakah pukin khuavak dong om hi." 
Judges19:27 Zingsang ciangin a topa tho a, a khualzin zom dingin inn kongkhak hongin a paikhiat ciangin, inn kongkhakah a zineu lumin sangkil tungah a khutte a kinga a mu hi." 
Judges19:28 Amah in a zineu kiangah, “Tho in, pai ta ni,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in dawng nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin amah in domto-in a la tungah tua nu koih a, a inn-ah a ciahpih hi." 
Judges19:29 A inn-ah a tun ciangin amah in tem khat la a, a zineu lenin a phei a liangin seh sawm le nih suahin sem a, Israel-te’ gam sung khempeuhah a hawm hi." 
Judges19:30 A mu mite khempeuh in, “Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiata kipan tuni dongin hih bang thu piang ngei lo a, zong kimu ngei lo hi. Hih thu ngaihsun un; kikum unla, gen un,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:1 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, Gilead gam zong a kihel, Dan panin Beersheba dong hong kuankhia uh a, Topa’ kiang Mizpah-ah mihing khat bangin mihon hong kikhawm lian uh hi." 
Judges20:2 Israel minam khempeuh sung pan makai khempeuh, namsau tawi khe galkap mihing tul zali, Pasian’ mite’ kikhopna-ah amau mahmah kipia uh hi." 
Judges20:3 (Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah-ah a paina thu Benjamin mite in za uh hi.) Israel mite in, “Hih bang tatsiatna hong pianna thu hong gen in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:4 Tua ciangin a kithat numei’ pasal, Levi mipa in dawngin, “Benjamin-te’ gam Gibeah-ah kei le ka zineu a taam dingin ka tung uh hi." 
Judges20:5 Tua ciangin Gibeah mite kei’ langah hong pang uh a, zanin kote’ omna inn hong umcih uh hi. Amaute in kei hong that nuam uh a, ka zineu buangawpin tu-in amah si hi." 
Judges20:6 Tua ciangin ka zineu la-in ka semnen a, Israel-te’ luah gam sung khempeuhah ka hong hawm hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Israel-te’ lakah kihhuaina le lanluat khialhna gamta uh hi." 
Judges20:7 En un, no Israel mihingte khempeuh aw, na ngaihsutna uh gen unla, hih lai-ah kikum un,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:8 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh mihing khat bangin ding lianin, “Eite khempeuh khat zong i puanbukah pai loin, eite khat zong i inn-ah i ciah kei ding hi." 
Judges20:9 Tu-in Gibeah tungah eite’ hih ding thu in: Tua khua a sim dingin aisanna tawh i pai ding a," 
Judges20:10 amaute in Israel-te sungah lanluatna tawh a khialhna uh hangin Benjamin-te’ gam Gibeah a thuk theih nadingun mite a’ ding annek tuidawn a pua dingin Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin mi zakhat sung pan mihing sawm, tulkhat sung pan zakhat, tul sawm sung pan tulkhat i la ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:11 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi a sim dingin Israel mite khempeuh kikhawm uh a, kipawlin mi khat a bang uh hi." 
Judges20:12 Tua ciangin Israel minamte in Benjamin minam khempeuh kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Note’ lakah a piang thu pen bangzah tatsiatna ahi hiam?" 
Judges20:13 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kote in amaute thatin Israel-te’ sung panin siatna ka phiatkhiat theih nadingun Gibeah khuasunga om a mi ginalote hong piakhia un,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin-te in a sanggam uh Israel mite’ thu ngai lo uh hi." 
Judges20:14 Tua ciangin Israel mite do-in a kuankhia dingin Benjamin gam sung khuapite panin Gibeah khuapi-ah hong kituah uh hi. 
Judges20:15 Benjamin mite in tua ni-in amau’ khuapite panin, Gibeah-ah a teng a kitengkhia mihing zasagih banah, namsau a tawi mihing tul sawmnih le tulguk a khawm uh hi." 
Judges20:16 Hihte khempeuh lakah mi a kitengkhia a veikhoi zasagih om a, amaute khempeuh pen suang tawh samzang kapin a khial lote ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:17 Israel mite in Benjamin-te simloh, namsau a tawi mihing tul zali khawm uh a, hih mite khempeuh galsiam mi ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:18 Israel mite dingin Bethel-ah paito uh a, “Benjamin mite a sim dingin kua pai masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in Pasian a dong uh hi. Topa in, “Judah minamte paito masa ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:19 Tua ciangin Israel mite zingsangin tho-in Gibeah khua a sim dingin giahphual a sat uh hi. 
Judges20:20 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kuankhia uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite a sim dingin Gibeah-ah a gualin va naih uh hi. 
Judges20:21 Benjamin mite Gibeah pan hong kuankhia-in tua ni-in Israel mite tul sawmnih le tulnih lei-ah a tuksak uh hi. 
Judges20:22 Ahih hangin Israel mite kihanthawnin a ni masa ni-a a panna mun mah uhah gal pangkik uh hi. 
Judges20:23 Tua ciangin Israel mite paito-in nitak dong Topa’ mai-ah a kap uh hi. Amaute in Topa’ kiangah thu dongin, “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin gal phualah ka naihkik ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Amaute a sim dingin kuanto un,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:24 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a ni nih ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin hong nai uh hi. 
Judges20:25 Amaute a sim dingin a ni nih ni-in Gibeah panin Benjamin-te hong kuankhia uh a, Israel mite tul sawm le tulgiat lei-ah tuksak uh hi. Hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi hi." 
Judges20:26 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, galkap vekpi paito-in Bethel-ah tungin a kap uh hi. Tua lai mun Topa’ mai-ah amaute tu-in nitak dong tua ni an tang uh a, Topa’ mai-ah meihal biakna le thunuama biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges20:27 Israel mite in Topa thu dong uh a (bang hang hiam cih leh tua hunin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai-ah om a," 
Judges20:28 Aaron’ tapa Eleazar’ tapa Finehas in tua lai-ah tua hunin na sem hi), “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuankik lai ding ka hi uh hiam, tua ahih kei leh khawl ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Paito un; bang hang hiam cih leh zing ciangin amaute na khutsung uhah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:29 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te in Gibeah kiimah a pangsim dingin mi koih uh hi. 
Judges20:30 Israel mite a ni thum ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuanto uh a, a hun dangte-a mah bangin Gibeah langkhatah pang uh hi." 
Judges20:31 Tua ciangin amaute a do dingin Benjamin mite hong kuankhia uh a, khuapi panin amaute kipaikhia sak hi. A hun dangte-a mah bangin amaute in Bethel lamah a paito pen le Gibeah lamah a pai lam lianpi, le gamlakah Israel mite sawmthum bang that uh hi." 
Judges20:32 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite in, “A masa-a mah bangin i mai-ah amaute tai uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in, “Eite tai-in, khuapi panin lam lianpi-ah amaute paikhiasak ni,” a kici uh ahi hi." 
Judges20:33 Israel mite khempeuh amau’ omna mun panin dingin Baaltamar-ah a gualin pang uh hi. A pangsim Israel mite Gibeah nitumna lam amau omna panin hong ding khia uh hi. 
Judges20:34 Gibeah khua a sim dingin Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kitengkhia mi tul sawm hong kuan uh a, a galdo uh haksa mahmah hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in amau a dingin siatna a naina thu thei lo uh hi." 
Judges20:35 Tua ciangin Israel-te mai-ah Topa in Benjamin-te a zo hi. Israel mite in tua ni-in Benjamin mite tul sawmnih le tulnga le zakhat that uh a, hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:36 Tua ahih ciangin Benjamin mite in a guallelhna uh kimu uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite awn uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeah khua a sim dingin a koih uh a pangsimte muang uh hi. 
Judges20:37 Tua ciangin a pangsim mite manlangin hong pai-in Gibeah khua sungah lut uh a, a pangsim mite in namsau tawh khuapi mi khempeuh vatgawp uh hi." 
Judges20:38 Israel mite le a pangsim mite a kiciamna lim in, amaute in khuapi sung panin meikhu lianpi a suahsak toh uh ciangin" 
Judges20:39 Israel mite galsim dingin hong tum ding uh hi. Tu-in Benjamin mite in Israel mite sawmthum bang vatgawpin thah ding kipan uh hi. Amaute in, “A masa-a mah bangin eite’ mai-ah amaute kivattuk gawp taktak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:40 Ahih hangin amau’ kiciamna lim meikhu khuapi sung panin suakto dingin a kipat ciangin Benjamin mite nunghei uh a, a khuapi bup a khu-in vantungah a kahto a mu uh hi." 
Judges20:41 Tua ciangin Israel mite hong kilehhei uh a, Benjamin mite lungkia uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ siat nading a naina thei uh hi." 
Judges20:42 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ mai panin amaute kileh kikin gamlak lam manawh uh hi. Ahih hangin gal in amaute pha a, khuapi sung panin hong paikhia mite in amaute le a pawlte uh kikalsung tengah amaute sumai uh hi." 
Judges20:43 Amaute in Nohah panin nisuahna lamah Gibeah gal ciang dong Benjamin mite delhin tuancilin vatgawp uh hi. 
Judges20:44 Benjamin mite sung pan galhang mihing tul sawm le tulgiat tuk uh hi. 
Judges20:45 Tua ciangin a dangte kihei-in sehnel gam lam Rimmon Suangpi-ah tai uh hi. Amaute mihing tulnga lam lianpi dungah si uh a, Gidom ciang dong nakpitakin amaute kidelhin tulnih kithat hi." 
Judges20:46 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Benjamin-te a si khempeuh, namsau a tawi galhang mihing tul sawmnih le tulnga ahi hi." 
Judges20:47 Ahih hangin mihing zaguk kihei-in gamlak lam Rimmon Suangpi-ah tai uh a, Rimmon Suangpi-ah kha li sung om uh hi." 
Judges20:48 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kithawi kik uh a, namsau tawh a mi a sa-in a muh khempeuh uh vatgawp uh hi. A muh uh khuate khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
Judges21:1 Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah-ah kiciam uh a, “Benjamin mite tungah kuamah in i tanu mo-in i kha kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:2 Tua ciangin Bethel-ah Israel mite hong pai-in Pasian’ mai-ah nitak dong tu uh a, amaute nakpitakin a kap uh hi." 
Judges21:3 Amaute in, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa aw, tuni-in Israel-te sungah minam khat a pelem nading, hih thu bang hangin Israel-te tungah hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:4 A zing ciangin mite tho baihin tua lai-ah biakna tau khat lam uh a, meihal biakna le thunuama biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges21:5 Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “ Topa a’ ding kikhopna-ah Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin kua teng hong pai lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa kiangah a pai lo mite tawh kisai-in Mizpah-ah kiciamna lianpi khat bawl uh a, “Kithat ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:6 Israel mite in a sanggam uh Benjamin mite khasiat uh a, “Tuni-in Israel-te’ sung panin minam khat bei hi." 
Judges21:7 Eite in i tanute amaute tungah zi dingin pia lo ding hi hang, ci-in Topa tawh kiciam khin ihih ciangin a nungta lai amaute’ zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:8 Tua ciangin amaute in, “ Topa kiang Mizpah-ah Israel minamte hong pai lo a om hiam?” a ci uh hi. En in, Jabeshgilead panin tua giahphual kikhopna-ah kuamah pai lo hi." 
Judges21:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mite a kikhop ciangin, tua lai-ah Jabeshgilead a tengte khat zong om lo hi." 
Judges21:10 Tua ahih ciangin mihonte in a galhangte uh mihing tul sawm le tulnih tua lai-ah sawl uh a, “Pai unla Jabeshgilead-a tengte namsau tawh va vatgawp unla, nupite le naupang neute zong hih un." 
Judges21:11 Hih bangin na hih ding uh hi: Pasal khempeuh le pasal tawh a lumkhawmsa numei khempeuh na sumai ding uh hi,” ci-in thu pia uh hi." 
Judges21:12 Amaute in Jabeshgilead-a teng mite lakah pasal tawh a lumkhawm nai lo nungakno zali mu uh a, Kanaan gam a om Shiloh giahphual ah tuate hong paipih uh hi." 
Judges21:13 Tua ciangin mihon buppite in Rimmon Suangpi-a om Benjamin mite kiangah thu puak a, amaute kiangah kilemna thu gen uh hi." 
Judges21:14 Tua hun ciangin Benjamin-te hong ciah uh a, amaute in Jabeshgilead numei a hing a a koihte uh pia uh a, ahi zongin amau a dingin kicing zo lo hi." 
Judges21:15 Israel minamte sungah Topa in kitapkhapna omsak ahih manin mite in Benjamin-te khasiat uh hi. 
Judges21:16 Tua ciangin mihonte’ upate in, “Benjamin-te’ sung panin numeite kithat khin ahih manin a omlai mite’ zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:17 Amaute in, “Israel-te sung panin minam khat a bei loh nadingin Benjamin a suakta laite a dingin gamhluah a om ding kisam hi." 
Judges21:18 Ahi zongin amau’ zi dingin i tanute i pia thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite kiciam khinin, “Benjamin-te tungah zi a pia mipa in samsiatna ngah ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:19 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “En un, Bethel leilu lam, Bethel panin Shekhem lamah a paito lam lianpi nisuahna lam, Lebonah leitaw lamah a om Shiloh-ah Topa a’ ding kumsim pawi khamna om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:20 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Benjamin mite thu pia-in, “Pai-in leenggui lote-ah bukin" 
Judges21:21 vil un. Laamna-ah Shiloh nungakte a laam dingin hong pai uhleh, leenggui lote panin note in delhin mi khempeuh in na zi ding ciat uh Shiloh nungakte man unla, Benjamin gamah ciahpih un." 
Judges21:22 Amau’ pate ahi a, a sanggampate uh ahi zongin a lungkim lohna uh kote’ kiangah a gen dingin hong pai uh ciangin kote in amaute kiangah, ‘Kote tungah hehpihna tawh amaute hong pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh zi ding galsimna sungah ka ngahsakzo kei uh a, note zong a mawh na suahloh nadingun note in amaute tungah utna tawh na piaktawm uh ahi kei hi,’ ka ci ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:23 Benjamin mite zong tua bangmahin gamta uh a, amau mi a phazah tawh kituakin a laamte lak panin a zi dingun a la uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute pai-in a gamhluahna uhah ciahkik uh a, khuapite lamkikin a sungah a teng uh hi." 
Judges21:24 Tua hun ciangin Israel midangte tua lai panin paikhia uh a, mi khempeuh amau’ minam le a innkuanpih ciat, amau’ gamhluahna ciatah a ciah uh hi." 
Judges21:25 Tua hun lai-in Israel-te sungah kumpi om lo a, amau’ hoihsak bang ciatin mi khempeuh a gamta uh hi." 
Ruth1:1 Thukhente in a uk hun lai-in tua gam sungah kialpi tung a, Judah gam sunga Bethlehem khuami khat, a zi le a tapa nihte tawh Moab gamah a peem dingin a pai uh hi." 
Ruth1:2 Tua mipa’ min Elimelek hi a, a zi’ min Naomi hi-in, a tapa nihte min Mahlon le Khilion ahi hi. Amaute pen Judah gam Bethlehem-a Efrathah mite ahi uh hi. Amaute Moab gamah pai-in tua lai-ah om uh hi." 
Ruth1:3 Ahih hangin Naomi’ pasal Elimelek si a, a tapa nihte bek tawh tua nu a om hi." 
Ruth1:4 Hih a tapa nihte in Moab mite zi-in la uh hi. A khat min Orpah hi a, adang khat min Ruth ahi hi. Tua lai-ah amaute kum sawm bang teng uh hi." 
Ruth1:5 Tua ciangin Mahlon le Khilion si a, tua nupi a tapa nihte le a pasal in sihsan hi." 
Ruth1:6 Tua ciangin tua nu a mo tegel tawh Moab gam panin a ciahkik dingin kithawi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a mite kemin an a piakna thu Moab gam sung panin amah in za hi. 
Ruth1:7 Tua ahih ciangin ama omna mun panin a mo tegel tawh tua nu ding khia a, Judah gamah a ciahkik dingin pai uh hi." 
Ruth1:8 Ahih hangin Naomi in a mo nihte kiangah, “Pai un, na inn tuak uhah ciahkik unla, na nute uh tawh om un. A sisate hitaleh kei hitaleh nong limbawl uh mah bangin Topa in note hong limbawl tahen." 
Ruth1:9 Topa in na pasal kik uh inn tuakah hong nuamsasak ta hen!” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute namin, amaute a kap uh hi." 
Ruth1:10 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Hilo hi, na mipihte kiangah nang tawh kong ciahkhawm ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth1:11 Ahih hangin Naomi in, “Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, bang hangin hong zui ding na hi uh hiam? Note’ pasal hong hi thei dingin tapa nei nawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Ruth1:12 Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, na pai nading uhah pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nei dingin ka teek luata hi. Pasal nei dingin kilamen ing ci mah lengzong, tunitak mahmahin pasal nei-in tapate nei phial ta mah lengzong," 
Ruth1:13 amaute a khan khit dong ngakzo ding na hi uh hiam? Hilo hi, ka tanute aw, Topa in kei hong bawlsia ahih manin note sangin nakpitakin kei ka lunggimzaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:14 Tua ciangin amaute a kap kik uh hi. Orpah in a teeknu namin ciah a, ahih hangin Ruth in a teeknu beel hi." 
Ruth1:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “En in, na sanggamnu a mipihte le a pasian-te kiangah ciahkik khin hi. Na sanggamnu’ nungah nang zong ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:16 Ahih hangin Ruth in, “Nang kong nusiat nading ahi a, nang zuihna panin ka ciahkik nading ahi zongin hong cici nawn kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina-ah ka pai ding a, na giahna-ah ka giak ding hi. Na mite keima mite hi ding a, na Pasian keima Pasian hi ding hi." 
Ruth1:17 Na sihna-ah si-in ka kivui ding hi. Sihna cih lohbuang thudang hangin kong nusiat taak leh Topa in kei hong dawm kei ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:18 Tua ciangin Naomi in amah a zuih ding a lungsim a khentatna a muh ciangin bangmah ci nawn lo hi. 
Ruth1:19 Tua ahih ciangin Bethlehem a tun mateng uh a nihun paisuak uh hi. Bethlehem a tun uh ciangin amaute’ hangin a khuazang un luum lialua-in nupite in, “Hihnu Naomi mah ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth1:20 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Naomi hong ci nawn kei un; Mara hong ci un; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglianpa in nakpitakin kei hong gimsak hi." 
Ruth1:21 A dimin ka paikhia a, Topa in a hawmin hong ciahpih kik hi. Topa in kei hong gimsakin, Vanglianpa in kei tungah gimna hong tungsak ahih ciangin bang hangin Naomi hong ci lai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu-a bangin Moab gam panin Naomi, Moab mi a monu Ruth tawh hong ciahkik hi. Mangbuhham lak kipat laitakin Bethlehem khua hong tung uh hi." 
Ruth2:1 Tu-in Naomi in a pasal’ tanaute, Elimelek innkuansung mi, Boaz min nei a hau migina khat nei hi." 
Ruth2:2 Tua ciangin Moab mi Ruth in Naomi kiangah, “Lo-ah hong kuansak in la, maipha ka muhna peuhpeuh pa’ nungah anvuite lakah a sang hong tawmsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai in, ka tanu aw,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:3 Tua ahih ciangin amah kuankhia-in pai a, anlate’ nung lo sungah ansangte a tawm hi. Elimelek-te innkuan Boaz’ lo-ah va kuankha hi." 
Ruth2:4 Boaz zong Bethlehem panin hong kuanin amah in anlate kiangah, “ Topa in note hong ompih ta hen!” a ci hi. Amaute in dawngin, “ Topa in nang thupha hong pia ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth2:5 Tua ciangin Boaz in anlate a uk a nasempa kiangah, “Hih ka muh ngei loh numei kua’ ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:6 Tua ciangin anlate a uk nasempa in dawngin, “Moab gam panin Naomi tawh a hong ciahkik Moab numei ahi hi." 
Ruth2:7 Tua numei in, ‘Kong thum hi; ansang hong tawmsakin anlate’ nungah anlomte lakah a kiate hong khawmsak in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah hong pai-in tawlkhat zong khawl loin zingsang tung a kipan tu dong semsuak hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:8 Tua ciangin Boaz in Ruth kiangah, “Tu-in ngai in ka ta aw; midangte’ lo-ah ansang tawm dingin pai kei inla, hih lo zong nusia kei in. Hih lai-ah kuamah in bangmah hong cih lo ding ahih manin ka nasem numeite’ nai-ah om cinten in." 
Ruth2:9 Amaute’ anlakna lo mitsuan inla, amaute’ nungah zui in. Nang hong bawlsiat loh nading uh tangvalte thu ka pia khin hi. Na dang a tak ciangin pai inla tangvalte’ tui tawisa dawn in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:10 Tua ciangin amah a mai-in lei-ah puk a, leilakah kunin ama kiangah, “Kei gamdang mi khat hinapi, hih banga kei nong phawkna dingin bang hangin na mai-ah maipha ngah thei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:11 Ahih hangin Boaz in tua nu dawngin, “Na pasal a sih khit a kipan na teeknu a dingin na sepnate khempeuh, le na nu le na pa le na pianna gam nusia-in cikmahin na theih ngei loh mite kiangah na paina thu a kicing takin kei kiangah hong kigenzo hi." 
Ruth2:12 Topa in na gamtatnasate a pha tawh hong thuk a, a liimnuai beel dinga na paina Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in thaman a cingin hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:13 Tua ciangin Ruth in, “Ka topa aw, kei tungah nong dik mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen na nasem numeite hi lo napi-in na nasemnu’ tungah migitna kam nong pau hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:14 Annek hun ciangin Boaz in tua nu kiangah, “Hih lai-ah hong pai in; anlum ne inla, leenggahzu sungah na an diah in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin anlate gei-ah amah tu a, tua pa in ankante tua nu a pia hi. Amah in a kham mateng ne a, a khamval zong pawlkhat omlai hi." 
Ruth2:15 Tua nu ansang tawm dingin a din ciangin Boaz in a tangvalte hilh a, “Anlomte lak nangawnah tawmsak unla, amah ko sia kei un." 
Ruth2:16 Anlom hente lak panin zong ama a dingin pawlkhat dokkhia-in ama top dingin nusia unla, amah tai kei un,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:17 Tua ahih ciangin amah in nitak dong lo sungah ansang tawm hi. A topsa teng satkhia a, mangbuhham seu khat bang pha hi." 
Ruth2:18 Tua ciangin amah in tuate pua-in khuapi sungah a ciah hi. A an top teng a teeknu lakin, a ankhamvalte zong la-in a pia hi." 
Ruth2:19 Tua ciangin a teeknu in ama kiangah, “Tuni-in koi-ah tawm na hi hiam? Koi-ah sem na hi hiam? Nang hong phawk mipa in thupha ngah ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a teeknu kiangah a naseppihte gen a, “Tuni-a ka sepna mipa pen Boaz ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:20 Tua ciangin Naomi in a monu kiangah, “A dikna in a site hitaleh a hingte hitaleh a mangngilh lo Topa in amah thupha pia ta hen,” a ci hi. Naomi in ama kiangah, “Tua mipa pen i behte, i tanau naipen khat ahi hi,” zong ci lai hi." 
Ruth2:21 Tua ciangin Moab numei Ruth in, “Tu-a banah amah in kei kiangah, ‘Ka an khempeuh a lak khit matengun ka nasemte’ kiang nai-ah om in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi in a monu Ruth kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, ama numeite tawh na kuankhop theih hoih mahmah hi; tua hikeileh lo dangah nang hong kibawlsia kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Boaz’ numeite’ nai-ah amah omin mangbuhham lak khit dong ansang tawm a, a teeknu tawh a omkhawm hi." 
Ruth3:1 Tua ciangin a teeknu Naomi in ama kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, inn khat na suantheih nadingin na pasal ding kong vaihawmsak ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Ruth3:2 A numeite tawh na nasepna Boaz pen i tanau hi lo ahi hiam? Thei in, amah in tu nitakin ancilna-ah mangbuhham haih hi." 
Ruth3:3 Tua ahih ciangin kisilin sathau kinuh inla, na puan hoihpente silhin ancilna-ah paisuk in. Ahih hangin a nek a dawn a man mateng ama kiangah na pailam kitheisak kei in." 
Ruth3:4 Ahih hangin amah a lup ciangin a lupna mun encik in; tua ciangin pai inla a khe lam puan leemin lum in; tua ciangin na gamtat nading amah in hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:5 Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Na gen khempeuh ka hih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:6 Tua ahih ciangin ancilna-ah amah paisukin a teeknu in ama kiangah a gensa bang teekteekin a gamta hi. 
Ruth3:7 Boaz in a nek a dawn khit ciangin a lung nuam a, anphual nawlah lum dingin a pai hi. Tua ciangin damtakin numei hong pai-in a khe lam puan leem sakin a lumsuk hi." 
Ruth3:8 Zankim ciangin mipa a kihei ciangin a khe-ah numei khat na lum hi. 
Ruth3:9 Amah in, “Kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in dawngin, “Keimah na nasemnu Ruth ka hi hi; tanaute na hih ciangin na nasemnu na puan hong zawn in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:10 Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen, ka tanu aw; a hau hitaleh a zawng hitaleh tangvalte’ nung na zuih lohna-ah a masa sangin a lianzaw a tawpkhak hih ngeina man na gamta hi." 
Ruth3:11 Tu-in ka tanu aw, lau kei in; na nget khempeuh nang a dingin kong hihsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khuapih mite khempeuh in numei gina na hihlam hong thei uh hi." 
Ruth3:12 Kei pen tanau nai ka hi mah hi; ahih hangin kei sangin a naizaw tanau khat omlai hi. 
Ruth3:13 Tuzan om in; zingsang ciangin amah in nang tungah tanaute’ hih ding hong hih leh pha hi; amah hih sak in. Ahih hangin nang tungah tanaute’ sep ding a sepnop kei leh, tua ciangin, Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin nang tungah tanau nasep kong sem ding hi. Zingsang dong lum in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:14 Tua ahih ciangin zingsang dong a khe kiangah lum a, ahih hangin mi mel khatlekhat a kitheih ma-in amah a tho hi. Tua ciangin mipa in, “Ancilna-ah numei a paina kitheisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:15 Mipa in, “Na puanza hong paipih inla hong dawh in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a numei in dawh a, amah in mangbuhham lawh guk tehkhia-in tua nu guan a, tua ciangin khuapi sungah tua nu a ciah hi." 
Ruth3:16 A teeknu kiangah a tun ciangin amah in, “Ka tanu aw, bang na ci hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a thu khempeuh genin," 
Ruth3:17 “Hih mangbuhham lawh guk hong guan hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Na teeknu kiangah khut hawmguakin na ciah kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:18 Amah in dawngin, “Ka tanu aw, a thu hong bangci suahkhiat cih na theih mateng ngak in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mawk om lo ding a, tuni-in a thu siangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:1 Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna kulhkongpi-ah Boaz paito-in tua munah tusuk hi. Tua laitakin a tanaute, Boaz’ gen pa hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in, “Hong pai dih in, lawm aw; hih lai-ah tu dih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah hong kihei-in tusuk hi." 
Ruth4:2 Tua ciangin amah in khua upate mihing sawm samin, “Hih lai-ah tu dih un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tusuk uh hi." 
Ruth4:3 Tua ciangin amah in a tanaupa kiangah, “Moab gam panin a hong ciahkik Naomi in i tanaute Elimelek’ leitang zuak hi." 
Ruth4:4 Tua ahih ciangin hih thu nang kiangah kong gen ding ngaihsunin, ‘Hih lai-ah a tu mite’ muhna le keima mi upate’ muhna-ah lei in,’ kong ci hi. Na tat ding leh tanh in; ahih hangin na tat kei ding leh, a thu ka theih nadingin kei kiangah hong gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang simloh a tanh ding kuamah om lo ahih manin nang kiangah kong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:5 Tua ciangin Boaz in, “Naomi’ tung panin a lo na lei ni a kipanin, a site’ gamh a site’ beh sungah a kiptheih nadingin a sipa’ zi Moab numei Ruth zong a lei na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:6 Tua ciangin a tanaupa in, “Keima gamhluah siasak kha ding ka hih manin keima a dingin ka tanh thei kei ding hi. Keimah in tanh thei lo ka hih ciangin keima tattheihna thu nangmah in tang in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:7 Nidang lai-in Israel-te sungah tatna le kikhekna thu-ah ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Thu vaihawm khat peuhpeuh a kipsak nadingin mipa khat in a khedap suahkhia-in a lawmpa pia hi; hih banga hihna pen Israel-te’ sungah kipsakna ahi hi. 
Ruth4:8 Tua ahih ciangin a tanaupa in Boaz kiangah, “Nang a dingin lei in,” a cih ciangin amah in a khedap suahkhia hi." 
Ruth4:9 Tua ciangin Boaz in upate le mi khempeuh kiangah, “Tuni-in note pen Naomi’ tung panin Elimelek le Khilion le Mahlon’ neihsa khempeuh ka lei khitna thu teci na hi uh hi." 
Ruth4:10 A site’ min ama sanggamte le a pianna a khuasung panin a maiman loh nadingin ama gamhluahna-ah a site’ min a kizop theih nadingin a si khin Mahlon’ zi, Moab numei Ruth zong ka zi dingin ka lei khin hi; note pen tuni-in teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:11 Tua ciangin kulhkongpi-a om mite khempeuh le upate in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi. Topa in Israel-te’ pianna Rachel le Leah bangin na innkuan sunga hong pai numei bawl tahen. Efrathah-ah na dau pai hen la, Bethlehem-ah na min thang tahen." 
Ruth4:12 Topa in hih a khangno lai numei tawh nang hong piak na tate’ hangin Judah in Tamar tawh a neih a tapa Perez innkuan tawh kibangin na innkuan piang ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth4:13 Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in Ruth la-in ama zi a suak hi. Amah in a zi luppih a, Topa in tua nu gaisakin amah in tapa khat nei hi." 
Ruth4:14 Tua ciangin nupite in Naomi kiangah, “Tanau nei loin tuni-in nang a hong omsak lo Topa in thupha ngah hen la, Israel-te’ sungah ama min thang ta hen!" 
Ruth4:15 Amah pen nang a dingin na nuntakna a hong piakik, le na khanghamna-ah hong vak pa hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, tapa sagih sangin a thupizaw, nangmah hong it na monu’ neih tapa ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth4:16 Tua ciangin Naomi in naungek la-in a ang-ah tawi a, amah a cingnu a suak hi." 
Ruth4:17 A veng nupite in a min phuak uh a, “Naomi’ sung pan tapa khat suak,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in a min Obed phuak uh hi. Amah pen Jessi’ pa hi a, Jessi pen David’ pa ahi hi." 
Ruth4:18 Tu-in Perez’ suanlekhakte hih bang ahi hi: Perez pen Hezron’ pa," 
Ruth4:19 Hezron pen Ram’ pa, Ram pen Amminadab’ pa," 
Ruth4:20 Amminadab pen Nahshon’ pa, Nahshon pen Salmon’ pa," 
Ruth4:21 Salmon pen Boaz’ pa, Boaz pen Obed’ pa," 
Ruth4:22 Obed pen Jessi’ pa, Jessi pen David’ pa ahi hi." 
1Samuel1:1 Efraim mi Zuf’ tapa Tohu, a tapa Elihu, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Elkanah a kici min nei mi khat Efraim mualtung gam Ramathaimzofim-ah om hi." 
1Samuel1:2 Amah in zi nih nei hi. Khat’ min Hannah hi a, a khat’ min Peninnah ahi hi. Peninnah in ta nei a, ahih hangin Hannah in nei lo hi." 
1Samuel1:3 Elkanah a kumkumin a khuapi panin, Eli’ tapa nihte Hofni le Finehas in Topa’ siampi a sepna mun Shiloh-ah Vanglian Topa a bia ding le ama tungah biakna a pia dingin a pai zel hi." 
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in biakna a piak ciangin a zi Peninnah le a tanu le a tapate khempeuh tungah tanh pia hi. 
1Samuel1:5 Amah in Hannah a it hangin Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin Hannah tungah tanh khat bek a pia hi. 
1Samuel1:6 Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin amah a el a zipih in amah nakpitakin phin zel, hehsak zel hi." 
1Samuel1:7 Tua ahih ciangin a kumkumin tua bangin hi den uh hi. Topa’ inn-ah a paitoh simin Peninnah in Hannah phin zel hi. Tua ahih ciangin Hannah kapin an ne lo hi. 
1Samuel1:8 Tua ciangin ama pasal Elkanah in, “Hannah aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Bang hangin an ne lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin na lungsim dah ahi hiam? Kei pen tapa sawm sangin nang a dingin hoihzaw hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:9 Amaute in Shiloh-ah an a nek khit uh ciangin khatvei Hannah ding khia-in biakinn-ah thungen dingin a pai hi. Tua hun laitakin Topa’ biakinn kongkhak khuam pangah siampi Eli na tu hi. 
1Samuel1:10 Tua nu nakpitakin lungkhamin Topa’ tungah thu ngenin nakpitakin a kap hi. 
1Samuel1:11 Amah in thuciamna khat bawlin, “Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah in na nasemnu’ gimna nong et takpi a, keimah hong phawkin na nasemnu hong mangngilh loin na nasemnu tungah tapa khat nong piak leh, Topa’ tungah a khan tawntungin amah kong pia ding a, ama lu-ah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:12 Topa’ mai-ah thungenin a om laitakin Eli in tua nu’ kam na en hi. 
1Samuel1:13 Hannah a lungsimah pau hi. A mukte bek lingin a awging kiza lo ahih ciangin Eli in tua numei zukhamin ngaihsun hi. 
1Samuel1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in ama kiangah, “Bang tanvei zu kham ding na hi hiam? Na leenggahzu nek khawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:15 Ahih hangin Hannah in dawngin, “Hilo hi, ka topa aw; kei pen nakpitakin a lungkham numei ka hi hi. Leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin ka ne kei a, Topa’ mai-ah ka lungsim a sungkhia ka hi hi." 
1Samuel1:16 Lungkhamna le gimna tawh a pau ka hih manin numei ginalo bangin na nasemnu hong ngaihsun kei in, a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:17 Tua ciangin Eli in dawngin, “Nuam takin pai in. Israel-te’ Pasian in ama tungah na ngetsa thu hong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:18 Tua ciangin numei in, “Nangma mitah na nasemnu maipha hong musak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei pai-in an ne a, dahmai pua nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel1:19 Amaute zingsangin tho baihin biakinn-ah Topa a biak khit uh ciangin amaute’ khua Ramah-a a inn uhah a ciahkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Elkanah in a zi Hannah luppih a, Topa in tua nu’ thungetna a pia hi." 
1Samuel1:20 A hun ciangin Hannah gai-in tapa khat nei a, a min Samuel a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topa’ tung panin amah ka nget ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:21 Tua ciangin Elkanah le a innkuante khempeuh Topa’ tungah kumsim biakna le a thuciamna a pia dingin paito kik uh hi. 
1Samuel1:22 Ahih hangin Hannah paito lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pasal kiangah, “Naungek nawi tawh a kikhen phetin Topa’ omna mai-ah kilakin tua lai-ah a om tawntung dingin ka paipih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:23 A pasal Elkanah in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in hoih na sak pen bangin gamta inla, amah nawi tawh a kikhen dong ngak in. Topa in a kammal hong kipsak ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi omin nawi tawh a kikhen mateng a ta a khoi hi." 
1Samuel1:24 Numei in amah nawi tawh a kikhensak khit ciangin kum thum a pha bawngtal khat, annel seu khat, le leenggahzu savun thawl khat tawh amah la-in, Shiloh-a Topa’ inn-ah amah a paipih hi." 
1Samuel1:25 Tua ciangin amaute in a bawngtal go-in Eli kiangah a naupang a paipih uh hi. 
1Samuel1:26 Tua nu in, “Aw ka topa! Nangmah, a nungta na hih mah bangin ka topa aw, keimah in Topa’ tungah thu ngenin nangma omna hih lai munah a ding nu ka hi hi." 
1Samuel1:27 Hih naupang ka ngen hi. Topa in ama tungah keima ngetna hong pia hi. 
1Samuel1:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ tungah amah ka kawm hi. A nuntak laiteng Topa’ tungah amah a kikawm ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua lai-ah Topa a bia uh hi." 
1Samuel2:1 Hannah in zong thu ngenin, “ Topa’ tungah ka lungdam a, Topa’ hangin ka kipak hi. Nong huhna hangin ka galte ka nuihsan hi." 
1Samuel2:2 “ Topa bangin a siangtho kuamah dang om lo a, amah simloh kuamah dang om lo a, i Pasian tawh a kibang hong hu dang om lo hi." 
1Samuel2:3 Tua bangin kiphatsakna tawh pau nawn kei inla, na kamsung pan kihihsakna gingkhiasak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thei Pasian hi a, amah in gamtatnate a tawi khai hi." 
1Samuel2:4 A thahatte’ thalte kitan a, ahih hangin a thaneemte in thahatna ngah uh hi." 
1Samuel2:5 A gilvahte in an thalawh uh a, ahih hangin a gilkialte kial nawn lo uh hi. Tasel mi in ta sagih nei a, ahih hangin ta tampi a nei nu a lungzuang hi." 
1Samuel2:6 Topa in thatin hingsakkik a, amah in Leinuai-ah paipih sukin thotosak hi." 
1Samuel2:7 Topa in zawngsakin hausak a, amah in niamkhiat sukin, zong sangtosak hi." 
1Samuel2:8 Amah in leivui panin mizawngte phongto a, amah in a cimawhte a lungkhamna panun a phongto hi. Uliante tawh tukhawmsak a, minphatna ngahsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khuampite Topa a’ hi a, tuate tungah amah in leitung pumpi a koih hi." 
1Samuel2:9 “Amah in a thuman mite’ kalsuanna limtakin cing a, ahih hangin migilote khuamialna sungah kikhiasuk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thatang hatna tawh mi gualzo lo ding hi." 
1Samuel2:10 Topa’ langte tamkham ding a, amah in amaute do-in vantungah van gingsak ding hi. Topa in leimong dongah thu khen ding hi. Amah in ama kumpipa tungah thahatna pia ding a, a sathau nilh pa’ vangliatna sangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:11 Tua ciangin Ramah-a a inn-ah Elkanah a ciah hi. Ahi zongin naupang in siampi Eli’ omna-ah Topa’ na a sem hi. 
1Samuel2:12 Eli’ tapate pen bangmah a man lo mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in Topa zahtakna nei lo uh hi. 
1Samuel2:13 Mite’ tungah siampite’ gamtat zia ding ngeinate don lo uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin a sa a huan laitakin siampipa’ nasempa sikkeu-ka-thum nei khat a khutah tawi-in hong pai a," 
1Samuel2:14 amah in a sikkeu tawh sikbeel daii ahi a, beel-uk ahi a, beelpi ahi a, beel sungah ahi zongin sunsuk hi. Sikkeuka in a kaihkhiattoh khempeuh siampipa in tang ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin Shiloh-ah a pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah amaute in tua bangin hih uh hi." 
1Samuel2:15 Tua tham loin a thau a kihal ma-in siampipa’ nasempa hong pai-in biakna a pia mipa kiangah, “Siampipa a’ ding han’ ding sa hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nang tung panin sa minsa hong sang loin a sial bek hong sang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:16 Tua ciangin mipa in ama kiangah, “A thau hong hal masa sak inla, tua khit ciangin na deih zahzah la in,” a cih leh, amah in, “Hilo hi; tu mahmahin nong pia ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh thatanghat thu-in kong laksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ muhna-ah tangvalte’ khialhna lian mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa’ tungah biakpiaknate thupi seh lo uh hi. 
1Samuel2:18 Samuel pen saihadial siampipuan silhin Topa’ mai-ah na a sem naupang khat ahi hi. 
1Samuel2:19 Samuel’ nu a pasal tawh kumsim biakna pia dingin a paitoh ciangin ama a dingin puantual neu khat bawlin kum simin ama kiangah a puak hi. 
1Samuel2:20 Tua ciangin Eli in Elkanah le a zi thupha pia-in, “Amah in Topa’ tungah a apkik a ta’ tang dingin Topa in hih numei tawh nang ta dang hong neisak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a inn uhah amaute a ciah uh hi." 
1Samuel2:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Hannah thupha pia a, tua nu gai-in tanu nih le tapa thum a nei hi. Naupang Samuel ahihleh Topa’ omna-ah a khang hi." 
1Samuel2:22 Tu-in Eli teek mahmah a, Israel-te khempeuh tungah a tapate’ gamtatnate, le kikhopna buk lutna-ah na a sem numeite tawh a lupkhopna thute khempeuh zong a za hi." 
1Samuel2:23 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Mi khempeuh tung panin na gamtat siatnate uh ka za hi." 
1Samuel2:24 Hilo hi, ka tapate aw; Topa’ mite in a genthangna thu ka zakte hoih lo hi." 
1Samuel2:25 Mi khat midang khat tungah a khialh le ama a dingin thukhente in palai sem ding hi. Ahih hangin mi khat Topa’ tungah khial leh ama a dingin kua in va thumsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in a pa’ thu ngai lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amaute a thah nadingin Topa’ deihna ahi hi. 
1Samuel2:26 Tu-in naupang Samuel a pumpi khangin Topa le mite’ maipha a ngahtoto hi. 
1Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Pasian’ mi khat Eli’ kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt gam sung Faro’ khutnuai-ah na pupi Aaron le a innkuante a om laitakin Aaron’ tungah keimah ka kilang hi." 
1Samuel2:28 Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin amah ka siampi ahi ding, ka biakna tau-ah a pai ding, paknamtui a hal ding, keima mai-ah siampipuan a silh dingin ka teel hi. Israel mite’ tung panin mei tawh kihal keimah hong kibiaknate khempeuh na pupi innkuan tungah ka pia hi." 
1Samuel2:29 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keimah hong kibiaknate le ka thupiak ahi keimah hong kipiakte thusim loin, keima mi Israel-te’ piak a limci pen teng tawh note kithausakin, kei sangin na tapate pahtawi zaw na hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
1Samuel2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in thu hong genin: ‘Nangma innkuan le na behte keima mai-ah sungtumin pusuak tawntung ding hi, ci-in thu ka ciamsa hi,’ ci hi. Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in thu genin: ‘Tua bang hi nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong pahtawite ka pahtawi ding a, kei hong simmawhte ka simmawh ding hi." 
1Samuel2:31 En in, nangma innkuan sung le na beh sunga tangval hat khempeuh ka suksiat hun hong tung ding a, na innkuan sungah puteekte a om nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
1Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah ka piak daupainate khempeuh na lungkham hunin enna mit tawh na en ding a, na innkuan sungah puteek om ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
1Samuel2:33 Ka biakna tau panin ka suksiat loh na suante khat pen mitlawt dongin a kap ding le a lunggim dingin kikoih ding hi. Tua ciangin na innsung panin a khang khempeuh, mite’ namsau tawh si ding uh hi." 
1Samuel2:34 Na tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas tungah hong tung ding hih thu pen nang a dingin lim hi ding hi. Amau tegel a ni kikhatin si ding uh hi." 
1Samuel2:35 Tua ciangin ka lungsim sung le ka ngaihsutna bangin a sem ding a citak siampi khat keima a dingin ka khangsak ding hi. Amah, suanlekhak nei-in ka bawl ding a, ka sathau nilh pa’ mai-ah amah sungtumin pusuak tawntung ding hi." 
1Samuel2:36 Na suanlekhak a suakta mite khempeuh ngun peek khat ahi a, anlum lum khat ngen ding ahi zongin ama kiangah pai-in, “An tawm ka neih theih nadingin siampipa’ omna mun khat peuhpeuhah kei hong koih in, ci-in kong thum hi,” ci ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
1Samuel3:1 Tu-in Eli’ khutnuai-ah naupang Samuel in Topa’ na sem hi. Tua hun lai-in Topa in thu genmun lo a, maangmuh ommun lo hi." 
1Samuel3:2 Tua hunin a mit a maang dingin a kipan khin Eli in khua mu thei lo a, ama omna tuamah lum hi." 
1Samuel3:3 Pasian’ meivak mit nai lo a, Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang a omna mun Topa’ mun siangtho sungah Samuel lum hi." 
1Samuel3:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Samuel! Samuel!” ci-in sam ahih manin amah in, “Hih lai-ah om ing!” ci-in"
