1Samuel3:5 Eli kiangah tai a, “Hih lai-ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong sam kei hi; lumkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in a lum hi." 
1Samuel3:6 Tua ciangin Topa in sam kikin, “Samuel!” a ci hi. Samuel tho-in Eli kiangah pai-in, “Hih lai-ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong sam kei hi, ka tapa aw; lum kik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:7 Tua laitakin Samuel in Topa thei nai lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah hopih ngei nai lo hi. 
1Samuel3:8 Topa in Samuel a thum veina sam kik hi. Amah tho-in Eli kiangah pai-in, “Hih lai-ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in naupang a sapna thu Eli in a thei hi." 
1Samuel3:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in Samuel kiangah, “Pai-in lum in; amah in nang hong sap leh nangmah in, ‘Hong gen in, Topa aw, na nasempa in za hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Samuel pai-in ama omna-ah lumsuk hi." 
1Samuel3:10 Topa hong pai-in hong ding a, a hun dangte-a mah bangin, “Samuel! Samuel!” ci-in a sam hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Hong gen in, na nasempa in za hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “En in, a za mite khempeuh’ bil nihte a vut ding na khat Israel-te’ sungah a sem ding ka hi hi." 
1Samuel3:12 Tua ni ciangin ama innkuan tawh kisai ka gensa khempeuh a patna pan a tawpna dong Eli tungah ka tungsak ding hi. 
1Samuel3:13 A tapate in Pasian mindaisak a, amah in a tate kham lo ahih manin, ama theih a mawhna hangin ama innkuan gimna a pia tawntung ding ka hihna ama kiangah ka gen hi." 
1Samuel3:14 Tua ahih ciangin Eli innkuante’ mawhna pen biakna ahi a, piakna in ahi zongin a maisak zawh ngei loh nading thu Eli’ innkuante tungah ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuel zong zingsang dong lum hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topa’ inn kongkhakte hong hi. A maangmuhna Eli’ kiangah a gen ding Samuel lau hi. 
1Samuel3:16 Ahih hangin Eli in Samuel samin, “Ka tapa Samuel aw,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hih lai-ah om ing,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:17 Eli in, “Amah in nang kiangah hong gen bang ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong im kei in. Amah in nang tungah hong gente khempeuh kei kiangah ip nong neih leh, Pasian in nang hong dawm kei ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:18 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in ama kiangah a vekpi-in genin bangmah im lo hi. Tua ciangin Eli in, “Amah pen Topa ahi hi. Amah in hoih a sak bangin hih ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuel khang a, Topa in amah ompihin, Samuel’ thugente khat zong lei-ah kiasak lo hi." 
1Samuel3:20 Tua ciangin Dan le Beersheba kikal-a om Israel-te khempeuh in Topa’ kamsangin Samuel a kikipsakna thei uh hi. 
1Samuel3:21 Tua ciangin Shiloh-ah Topa kilang kik zelzel hi. Shiloh-ah Topa mahmah Samuel tungah kilangin thu gen a, Samuel in mite tungah gensawn hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in Samuel’ thu a zui uh hi." 
1Samuel4:1 Tu-in Filistia mite a sim dingin Israel-te kuankhia uh hi. Amaute in Ebenezer-ah phual sat uh a, Filistia mite in Afek-ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel4:2 Israel-te a do dingin Filistia mite kipan uh a, gal a kido uh ciangin Filistia mite in Israel-te zo-in galphual sungah mi tulli bang that uh hi." 
1Samuel4:3 Mihonte giahphual ah hong ciah ciangin Israel upate in, “Bang hangin Topa in tuni-in Filistia mite’ mai-ah eite hong taisak ahi hiam? Eite’ lakah amah hong pai-in a thahat i galte’ khutsung panin amah in eite hong hotkhiat theih nadingin Shiloh panin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih ni,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel4:4 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Shiloh-ah mi paisak uh a, kherub-te tungah a tu Vanglian Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai panin hong pua uh hi. Eli’ tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas, Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang tawh tua lai-ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel4:5 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang giahphual sung hong tun ciangin Israel-te khempeuh nakpitakin awng uh a, lei a thawn hi." 
1Samuel4:6 Filistia mite in otna gamlumna a zak uh ciangin amaute in, “Hebru mite’ giahphual ah nakpi a hih bang otna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang giahphual a tun khitna a theih uh ciangin" 
1Samuel4:7 Filistia mite lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Giahphualah a pasian-te uh tungzo hi,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Gimna ngah hi ta hang! Bang hang hiam cih leh nidangin hih bang piang ngei lo hi." 
1Samuel4:8 Gimna ngah hi ta hang! Kua in hih a thahat pasian-te’ khutsung panin eite hong honkhiazo ding ahi hiam? Hihte pen gimna a tuamtuamte tawh gamlakah Egypt-te a vatgawp pasian-te ahi hi. 
1Samuel4:9 Filistia mite aw, hang unla, pasal bangin gamta un. Tua hikeileh amaute, note’ sila hong hih mah bangin Hebru mite’ sila na suak ding uh hi. Pasal lungsim nei-in do un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel4:10 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite in do uh a, Israel-te kizo-in mi khempeuh a inn ciatah tai uh a, mi tampi tak kithat hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te khe galkap mi tul sawmthum puk hi." 
1Samuel4:11 Tua ciangin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang zong kiman a, Eli’ tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas zong kithat hi." 
1Samuel4:12 Giahphual panin Benjamin mi khat hong tai-in a puan kikeeksa le a lu tungah leivui khu-in Shiloh hong tung hi. 
1Samuel4:13 Amah a tun ciangin, lampi gei-ah a vilin ama tutna-ah Eli na tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang hangin a lungsim ling hi. Mipa khuapi sung hong tungin a thuteng a gen ciangin khuapi mi khempeuh lau-in kiko uh hi." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli in kikona awging a zak ciangin amah in, “Hih gamlumna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mipa manlangin hong pai-in Eli kiangah a gen hi." 
1Samuel4:15 Tu-in Eli kum sawmkua le kum giat pha a, a mitte maangin khua mu thei lo hi." 
1Samuel4:16 Mipa in Eli kiangah, “Keimah, galphual panin hong ciah ka hi a, tuni-in giahphual panin kong tai hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka tapa aw, bangci ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel4:17 A thu hong puak pa in dawngin, “Filistia mite’ mai-ah Israel-te tai uh a, mi tampi tak zong kithat hi; na tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas zong si uh a, Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang kiman khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel4:18 Amah in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang a gen ciangin kulhkongpi gei-a a tutna mun panin Eli thalpukin a ngawng kitanin a si hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah puteek hi-in gik hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sawmli sung thu khen hi. 
1Samuel4:19 Tu-in a monu, Finehas’ zi, naupaii-in a suak dektak ahi hi. Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang a kimatna le a pasal a sihna thu a zak ciangin amah kunin nausuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a nat hun tung ta hi." 
1Samuel4:20 Amah si dektak a, ahi zongin amah a don numeite in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in, tapa khat na nei hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in dawng lo a, zong don lo hi." 
1Samuel4:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Israel-te’ sung panin minthanna paikhia khinta!” ci-in a naungek min Ikhabod a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang a kimatna hang le a teekpa le a pasal’ hang ahi hi." 
1Samuel4:22 Amah in, “Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang kiman khin ahih manin Israel-te’ sung panin minthanna paikhia khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel5:1 Filistia mite in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang a mat uh ciangin Ebenezer panin Ashdod-ah pua uh hi. 
1Samuel5:2 Tua ciangin Filistia-te in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Dagon inn sungah paipihin Dagon kiangah koih uh hi. 
1Samuel5:3 Ashdod mite a zing ciang zingsang tungin a thawh uh ciangin, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai leilakah Dagon na maipuk hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Dagon phongto-in ama omna munah koihkik uh hi." 
1Samuel5:4 Ahih hangin a zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute a thawh uh ciangin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai leilakah Dagon na maipuk leuleu a, Dagon lutang le a khut tegel kitankhia-in sangkil gei-ah om a, Dagon a pumpi bek omlai hi." 
1Samuel5:5 Tuni dongin Dagon siampite le Dagon inn-ah a tumte khempeuh in hih thu hangin Ashdod a Dagon sangkil tung sik lo uh hi. 
1Samuel5:6 Topa in Ashdod khua mite nakpitakin gawt a, amah in uilut tawh Ashdod khua le a gam sung lausakin gimsak hi." 
1Samuel5:7 Ashdod mite in hih bang thute a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang eite kiang panin a paikhiat loh phamawh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite le i pasian Dagon hong gawt hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:8 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in mi sawlin Filistia uliante khempeuh khawm uh a, “Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in dawngin, “Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang Gath-ah koihsak ni,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai-ah paipih uh hi." 
1Samuel5:9 Ahih hangin amaute in tua Gath khua-ah a tunpih khit uh ciangin Topa in tua khuapi langpanin apkhapna lianpi piangsak a, amah in khuapi mite a moi a hamin gimsakin amaute in uilut vei uh hi." 
1Samuel5:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang Ekron-ah puak uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang Ekron a tun ciangin Ekron mite kiko uh a, “Kote le ka mite uh a that dingin amaute in Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang ko kiangah hong paipih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:11 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in mi sawlin Filistia uliante khempeuh khawmin, “Kote le ka mite uh hong thahloh nadingin Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang puakkhia unla, ama omna munah ciahkiksak un,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a khuapi sung khempeuhah si dektak a apkhapna om hi. Pasian in tua lai-ah amaute nak gawt mahmah hi." 
1Samuel5:12 A si lo sunte in uilut vei uh a, khuapi sunga kahna awging vantung dongah kizato hi." 
1Samuel6:1 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang Filistia gam sungah kha sagih sung om hi. 
1Samuel6:2 Tua ciangin Filistia-te in siampite le aisante sam uh a, “ Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang bang cih ding ihi hiam? Ama omna munah bang tawh kha ding ihi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:3 Amaute in, “Israel-te’ Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang na puakkhiat uhleh, a hawm guakin puak kei un. Bangbang hitaleh mawhna hanga biakna pia un. Tua ciangin note na dam ding uh a, note hong gawtna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:4 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah i piak ding mawhna hanga biakna bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in dawngin, “Filistia uliante a phazah tawh kizui-in kham uilut nga le kham simbeng nga hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh le na uliante uh tungah a kibang gimna hong tung hi." 
1Samuel6:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in na gam sung uh hong sugawp na uilut uh limte le na simbeng limte uh bawlin, Israel-te’ Pasian’ tungah zahtakna na lak ding uh hi. Note le na pasian-te uh le na gam uh hong gawtna amah in hong zangsak kha ding hi." 
1Samuel6:6 Egypt-te le Faro in a lungsim uh a khauhsak bangin bang hangin na lungsim uh khauhsak ding na hi uh hiam? Amah in amaute a mawlpih khit ciangin amaute in Israel mite paisakin, tua ciangin Israel mite kihemkhia uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel6:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in leeng thak khat bawlin a tungah kol a kibaang ngei nai lo bawngpi a no nawi a pia lai nih la unla, a bawngpite leeng-ah vawh un; ahih hangin amaute kiang panin a note la-in inn-ah ciahpih un." 
1Samuel6:8 Tua ciangin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in leeng tungah koih unla, mawhna hanga biakna-in na piak uh kham milimte a singkuang khat sungah guangin a gei-ah koih un. Tua ciangin sawlkhia unla, a lampi-ah paisak un." 
1Samuel6:9 A bawngte in Bethshemesh khua zuanin a paitoh leh siatna lianpi hong bawl pa pen amah hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a paitoh kei leh eite hong susia pa amah hi lo a, eite tungah a piang mawkmawk hi, ci-in i thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:10 Mite in tua bangmahin hih uh a, a no nawi a pia lai bawngpi nih la-in leeng-ah bulh uh hi." 
1Samuel6:11 Amaute in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang, le kham simbeng le amau’ uilut limte a omna singkuang leeng tungah a koih uh hi." 
1Samuel6:12 Tua ciangin bawngpite lamlian dung zui-in Bethshemesh lamah tang takin pai uh a, a paikawmun ham uh hi; taklam ah hitaleh veilam ah hitaleh kihei lo uh a, Filistia uliante in Bethshemesh gamgi ciang dong a nung a zui uh hi." 
1Samuel6:13 Tu-in Bethshemesh uliante in kuam sungah a mangbuh uh a lak laitak ahi hi. Amaute khuadakin Thuciamna Singkuang a muh uh ciangin, a muhna uh hangin amaute lungdam uh hi." 
1Samuel6:14 Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai-ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ekkhamin a bawngpite Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:14 Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai-ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ekkhamin a bawngpite Topa’ tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:15 Levi mite in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang le a gei-a om kham milim a omna singkuang la-in suangtumpi tungah a koih uh hi. Bethshemesh mite in tua ni-in Topa’ tungah meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:16 Filistia ulian ngate in tua bangteng a muh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin Ekron-ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
1Samuel6:17 Filistia-te in mawhna hanga biakna-in Topa’ tungah a piak uh kham uilutte in: Ashdod a’ ding khat, Gaza a’ ding khat, Ashkelon a’ ding khat, Gad a’ ding khat, le Ekron a’ ding khat ahi hi." 
1Samuel6:18 Ulian ngate’ uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite le a ki-um lo khuaneute a dingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uha suangtumpi pen Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah tuni dongin teci ahi hi. 
1Samuel6:18 Ulian ngate’ uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite le a ki-um lo khuaneute a dingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uha suangtumpi pen Bethshemesh khuami Joshua’ lo-ah tuni dongin teci ahi hi. 
1Samuel6:19 Amaute in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang en uh ahih manin amah in Bethshemesh mite pawlkhat that hi. Amah in amaute sawmsagih that a, mite lakah Topa in mi tampi that ahih manin mite thuum uh hi." 
1Samuel6:20 Tua ciangin Bethshemesh mite in, “Hih a siangtho Pasian, Topa’ mai-ah kua omzo ding ahi hiam? Eite’ kiang panin kua kiangah amah paisak ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Kiriathjearim-ah a teng mite kiangah kamtaite sawl uh a, “Filistia-te in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang hong puakkik khin uh hi. Hong paisuk unla, no kiangah puato un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:1 Tua ciangin Kiriathjearim mite hong pai-in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang puato uh a, mualtungah a om Abinadab’ inn-ah paipih uh hi. Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a en dingin amaute in ama tapa Eleazar a ap uh hi." 
1Samuel7:2 Kiriathjearim-ah Thuciamna Singkuang a om a kipan, hun saupi, kum sawmnih bang pha a, Israel mite khempeuh in Topa ngai-in thuum uh hi." 
1Samuel7:3 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel mite khempeuh kiangah, “Na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa’ lamah a kiheikik na hih uhleh note’ lak panin gamdang pasian-te le Ashtaroth nusian milim koihkhia-in Topa’ lamah na lungsim uh ngat unla, amah bek bia un. Tua hileh amah in Filistia-te’ khutsung panin note hong honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:4 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te in Baal-te le Ashtaroth koihkhia-in Topa bek a bia uh hi. 
1Samuel7:5 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Israel-te khempeuh Mizpah-ah khawm un. Note a dingin Topa’ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:6 Tua ahih ciangin amaute Mizpah-ah kikhawm uh a, tui tawi-in Topa’ mai-ah sungkhia uh a, tua ni-in an tangin tua lai munah, “ Topa’ tungah i khial khinzo hi,” a ci uh hi. Samuel in Israel mite Mizpah-ah thu khen hi." 
1Samuel7:7 Israel mite Mizpah-ah a kikhopna thu Filistia-te in a zak uh ciangin Israel-te a sim dingin Filistia uliante kuanto uh hi. Israel mite in tua thu a zak uh ciangin amaute in Filistia-te kihta uh hi. 
1Samuel7:8 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Samuel kiangah, “Filistia-te’ khutsung panin amah in eite hong hotkhiat theih nadingin Topa i Pasian’ tungah eite a dingin thunget na khawl kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:9 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in nawi a ne lai tuuno khat la-in Topa’ tungah a bupin meihal biakna-in a pia hi. Israel-te a dingin Topa’ tungah Samuel kiko a, Topa in amah na dawng hi." 
1Samuel7:10 Samuel in meihal biakna a piak laitakin Filistia-te in Israel-te a sim dingin hong nai uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa in aw lianpi tawh tua ni-in Filistia-te thawn gawpin amaute buaisakgawp a, Israel-te’ mai-ah amaute kinotkhia hi." 
1Samuel7:11 Tua ciangin Mizpah panin Israel-te paikhia-in Filistia-te delh uh a, Bethkar nuai ciang dong amaute a vatgawp uh hi." 
1Samuel7:12 Tua ciangin Samuel in suangtum khat la-in Mizpah le Jeshanah kikalah phut a, a min Ebenezer a phuak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Hih pen Topa in eite hong huhna teci ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:13 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia-te kizo a, Israel-te’ gam sungah tumkik nawn lo uh hi. Samuel’ hunsung khempeuh Topa in Filistia-te langpang hi." 
1Samuel7:14 Israel-te’ tung panin Filistia-te in a laksa khuapite, Ekron panin Gath ciang kikal sungteng, Israel-te tungah kipia kik a, Israel-te in Filistia-te’ khutsung panin a gam uh lakik uh hi. Israel-te le Amor mite kikalah zong kilemna om hi." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuel in a nuntak sung tawntung Israel-te thu khen hi. 
1Samuel7:16 A kumkumin Bethel, Gilgal, le Mizpah-ah kot pai a, amah in hih munte khempeuhah Israel-te thu khen hi." 
1Samuel7:17 Tua ciangin Ramah-ah amah ciahkik zel hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai-ah ama inn om a, tua lai-ah zong Israel-te tungah thukhen na mah a sem hi. Amah in tua lai-ah Topa a’ ding biakna tau khat a lam hi." 
1Samuel8:1 Samuel a teek ciangin amah in Israel-te’ tungah thukhenin a tapate a koih hi. 
1Samuel8:2 A ta upa’ min Joel hi a, a nihna’ min Abijah ahi hi. Amaute pen Beersheba-ah thukhente ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:2 A ta upa’ min Joel hi a, a nihna’ min Abijah ahi hi. Amaute pen Beersheba-ah thukhente ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:3 Ahih hangin a tapate amah bangin gamta lo uh a, sum ngah ding lam bek kin uh ahih manin sumgolh la-in thuman heikhia uh hi." 
1Samuel8:4 Tua ciangin Israel upate kikhawmin Ramah-a Samuel kiangah pai-in 
1Samuel8:5 ama kiangah, “En in, nang na teek ta a, na tapate in nangma khekhap hong zui lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin kote hong uk dingin kote a dingin kumpi khat seh in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel8:6 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote hong uk dingin kumpi khat hong pia in,” a cih uh ciangin hih thu in Samuel lungkim losak hi. Samuel in Topa’ kiangah thu ngen hi." 
1Samuel8:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amaute in nang kiangah hong gen thu khempeuh ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong nial hi lo a, amaute tungah kumpi hihna panin kei hong nial ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:8 Egypt panin amaute ka paikhiatpih a kipan tuni dongin amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte’ na semin, kei’ tungah hong bawlnate khempeuh mah bangin amaute in nang tungah zong hong bawl ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amaute’ thu ngai in. Amaute limtakin hilhkholin, amaute’ tungah a uk ding kumpipa’ hih zia ding lak bek in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel8:10 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in ama tung panin kumpi khat a ngen mite kiangah Topa’ thugen khempeuh a gen hi. 
1Samuel8:11 Amah in, “Note hong uk ding kumpipa’ hih zia dingte in: Amah in na tapate uh la-in a leengte-ah na semin a sakol nasem ding, le a leengte mai-ah a tai dingin seh ding hi." 
1Samuel8:12 Tua ciangin amah in ama a dingin a tul-a uk le a sawmnga a ukte, le pawlkhatte a lo kho-in a an a la ding, le a galsung nazatte le a leeng nate a bawl dingin seh ding hi." 
1Samuel8:13 Amah in na tanute uh paknamtui bawl ding, anhuan ding, le an em dingin la ding hi." 
1Samuel8:14 Amah in na lote uh, na leenggui lote uh, le na oliv lote uh sung panin a limcipen teng la-in ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi." 
1Samuel8:15 Amah in na an le na leenggahte uh sawm-ah-khat la-in ama uliante le ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi. 
1Samuel8:16 Amah in na nasem numeite uh, na nasem pasalte uh, na bawngte, uh le na late uh a gina pen teng la-in ama na a sem dingin koih ding hi." 
1Samuel8:17 Amah in na tuuhonte uh sawm-ah-khat la ding a, note pen ama sila na hi ding uh hi." 
1Samuel8:18 Tua ni ciangin note a dingin na teelsa uh na kumpipa uh hangin note na kiko ding uh a, ahih hangin tua ni ciangin Topa in note hong dawng lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel8:19 Ahih hangin mite in Samuel’ thu ngai nuam lo uh hi. Amaute in, “Hilo! Kote’ tungah kumpi khat ka nei ding uh hi." 
1Samuel8:20 Kote zong minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin, ka kumpipa uh’n kote hong ukin kote’ mai-ah pai-in ka galte uh hong dosak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuel in mite’ thugen khempeuh a zak khit ciangin Topa’ kiangah tua thute a genkik hi. 
1Samuel8:22 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amaute’ thu ngai inla, amaute-a’ dingin kumpi khat koih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh na khuapi ciat uhah ciah un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin-te sung panin Afiah’ tapa Bekorath, a tapa Zeror, a tapa Abiel, a tapa Kish min nei, Benjamin-te mihau khat a om hi." 
1Samuel9:2 Amah in tangval a melhoih, a min Saul ahi tapa khat nei hi. Israel mite lakah amah sangin a melhoihzaw, a thacingzaw khat zong om lo a, midang khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi." 
1Samuel9:3 Tua laitakin Saul’ pa Kish’ late a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kish in a tapa Saul kiangah, “Nasemte khat sam inla, late va zong in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Efraim mualtung gamteng le Shalisha gam teng nawkin zong uh a, ahih hangin mu lo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Shaalim gamteng zong uh a, ahih hangin tua gamah na om tuan lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Benjamin gamteng zong uh a, ahih hangin mu sam lo uh hi." 
1Samuel9:5 Zuf gam a tun uh ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om a nasempa kiangah, “Hong pai in, ciahkik ni. Tua hikeileh ka pa in late ngaihsun nawn loin eite hong lunghimawh zaw kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:6 Ahih hangin a nasempa in, “En in, hih khuapi sungah Pasian’ mi khat om a, a kizahtak mi khat ahi hi. Ama gen khempeuh a manin tung hi. Tua lai-ah pai ni. Eite’ khualzin khiatna thu amah in hong genthei kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasempa kiangah, “Ahih hangin pai lehang, tua mipa bang puak ding ihi hiam? I van sunga i anlum beita a, Pasian’ mipa kiangah i puak ding letsong om lo hi. Bang nei nawn ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:8 Tua ciangin a nasempa in Saul dawngkikin, “Hih lai-ah ngun sumnen tang khat ka nei hi. I vai hong gen nadingin Pasian’ mipa kiangah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:9 (Tua ma lai-in Israel-te sungah mi khat in Pasian kiangah thudong dingin a pai ciangin amah in, “Hong pai in, thumu pa kiangah va pai ni,” ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuhuna kamsang i cihte tua ma-in thumu pa kici hi.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasempa kiangah, “Tua ahihleh hoih hi, va pai ni,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian’ mipa a omna khuapi-ah amaute a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel9:11 Amaute khuapi omna mual tungah a paitoh laitakun khuapi panin tui tawi dingin hong paikhia nungaknote tawh kituak uh ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Thumu pa hih lai-ah a om hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel9:12 Amaute in, “Amah om hi; note’ mai diakah pai hi. Kinawh un; khuapi sungah tu mahmahin hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in tuni-in mualtung a biakna-ah biakna pia uh hi." 
1Samuel9:13 Khuapi sung na lut phetun mualtung a biakna-ah an ne dingin a pai ma-in amah na mu ding uh hi. Amah in biakpiakna thupha pia ding ahih manin ama pai mateng mite in an ne lo ding uh hi. Thupha a piak khit ciangin a kisam mite in ne thei pan uh hi. Tu-in paito un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah na tuakpah ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel9:14 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi-ah amaute paito uh hi. Khuapi sungah amaute a lut laitakun mualtung a biakna lamah Samuel a pai dingin amau’ lamah hong paikhia a mu uh hi. 
1Samuel9:15 Tu-in Saul hong pai ni a zan ni-in Samuel tungah Topa in thu na gen khin hi: 
1Samuel9:16 “Zing ciang tubang hunin Benjamin gam sung panin nang kiangah mi khat kong sawl ding a, nangmah in ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin amah sathau na nilh ding hi. Amah in Filistia mite’ khutsung panin ka mite honkhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ kikona kei kiang hong tung khin ahih manin ka mite’ gimna ka mu khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:17 Samuel in Saul a muh ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong gen mipa hih lai-ah hong paita hi. Amah pen ka mite’ tungah a uk ding pa ahi hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
1Samuel9:18 Tua ciangin Saul in kulhkongpi-ah Samuel va naihin, “Hong gen in; thumu pa’ inn koilai ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuel in Saul dawngin, “Keimah, thumu pa ka hi hi; mualtung a biakna-ah keima mai-ah na paito in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in tuni-in kei tawh an na ne ding a, zingsang ciangin nang hong ciahsakin na lungsim a om khempeuh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi." 
1Samuel9:20 Tuma ni thum lai-in a mang na late ahihleh, kimu khinta ahih manin tuate na lungsimah ngaihsun nawn kei in. Israel-te’ deihdeihte kua’ tungah om ahi hiam? Nang le na pa’ innkuante khempeuh tungah a om hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:21 Saul in dawngin, “Kei pen Israel minamte sung panin a tawmpen Benjamin-te hi lo ka hi hiam? Keima innkuan, Benjamin minam innkuan khempeuh sung panin a niampen hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih bangin kei tungah hong pau na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:22 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul le a nasempa samin inndei sungah paipih a, mihing sawmthum bang a pha a kisam mite lak tutna bul lamah a tusak hi." 
1Samuel9:23 Tua ciangin Samuel in anhuan pa kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong piak, ‘Na tuam koih in,’ kong cih pawl hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:24 Tua ahih ciangin anhuan pa in a khe le a kawngsa la-in Saul’ mai-ah a lui hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Thei in, a kisit pen nang’ mai-ah hong kilui hi. Ne in; bang hang hiam cih leh leenglate tawh na nektheih nadingin a kiseh hun a cin mateng nang a dingin hong kisitsak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Saul in Samuel tawh an ne khawm hi." 
1Samuel9:25 Amaute mualtung a biakna panin khuapi sungah a paisuk uh ciangin innkhumzangah Saul a dingin lupna khat na kiphah a, a ihmu dingin amah lumsuk hi." 
1Samuel9:26 Khua a vak ciangin Samuel in innkhumzanga Saul samin, “Na paina dingah kong sawl theih nadingin tho in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul tho-in, amah le Samuel, khuapi kongzingah a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel9:27 Amaute khuapi nawlah a paikawmun Samuel in Saul kiangah, “I mai-ah na nasempa a paisuak nading gen inla, amah a paisuak khit ciangin nang’ tungah Pasian’ thute kong theihsak theih nadingin tawlkhat hih lai-ah khawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:1 Tua ciangin Samuel in sathau thawl khat la a, ama lu tungah buakin amah nam a, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khin hi lo ahi hiam? Nangmah in Topa’ mite ukin a kiima om amau’ galte’ khutsung panin amaute na honkhia ding hi. Topa in ama luahte tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khitna lim hih bang hi ding hi:" 
1Samuel10:2 Tuni-in kei kiang panin na paikhiat ciangin Benjamin-te’ gam Rachel’ han kiang Zelzah-ah mihing nih na tuak ding a, amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Pai a na zon late kimu khin a, tu-in na pa in late ngaihsun nawn loin nangmah hong lunghimawh a, “Ka tapa bang cih ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
1Samuel10:3 Tua ciangin tua lai panin pai lai-in Tabor tawsaw lak na tung ding hi. Tua lai panin Bethel-a Pasian kiangah a paito, keelno thum a pua mi khat, anlum thum a pua adang khat, le leenggahzu savun thawl khat a pua mi khat, mi thum in nang hong dawn ding uh hi." 
1Samuel10:4 Amaute in nang hong hopihin nangmah in amau’ tung panin na san ding anlum nih nang tungah hong pia ding uh hi. 
1Samuel10:5 Tua khit ciangin Filistia khuacingte a omna Gibeath-elohim na tung ding hi. Tua khuapi sung na tun ciangin amaute mai-ah, harp lasakna, khuangneu, tamngai, le laiza lasakna tawh laamin awng kawmin mualtung a biakna panin hong paisuk kamsang honkhat na tuak ding hi." 
1Samuel10:6 Tua ciangin Topa’ kha in khauhtakin nang hong uk ding a, amaute tawh laamin awng khawmin mi tuamdang khatin na kikheel ding hi." 
1Samuel10:7 Hih limte nang tungah hong tun ciangin na tuah peuhpeuh na hih ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh Pasian hong om hi. 
1Samuel10:8 Tua ciangin keima mai Gilgal-ah na paisuk ding hi. Meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate a pia dingin nang kiangah kei zong kong pai ding hi. Nang kiangah kei hong pai-in na hih ding teng kong lah mateng, ni sagih sung na ngak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:9 Samuel nusia dingin a nunghei ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pianzia thak khat a pia hi. Tua ni-in Samuel’ gen limte khempeuh a piang hi. 
1Samuel10:10 Gibeah-ah amaute a tun uh ciangin, kamsang honkhat in amah na dawn hi. Pasian’ kha in khauhtakin amah hong man takpi a, amah zong amaute’ lakah laamin a awng hi." 
1Samuel10:11 Tua ciangin kamsangte tawh a gamtat khawmna, amah a theisa mi khempeuhte in a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, “Kish’ tapa’ tungah bang tung ahi hiam? Saul zong kamsang suak ahi hiam?” kici uh hi." 
1Samuel10:12 Tua ciangin tua lai-a mite khat in dongin, “Hih kamsang dangte kua’ tate ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Saul nangawn kamsang suak hi,” cihna paunak a kipatna hong suak hi." 
1Samuel10:13 Tua bangin laamin a otna a man ciangin mualtung a biakna tau omna-ah a pai hi. 
1Samuel10:14 Saul’ pano in amah le a nasempa a muh ciangin, “Koi-ah pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Late a zong dingin ka pai uh hi. Late kimu zo lo ding ci-in ka theih uh ciangin Samuel kiangah ka pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:15 Tua ciangin Saul’ pano in, “Kong thum hi; Samuel in nang kiangah hong gen teng kei tungah hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:16 Tua ciangin Saul in a pano kiangah, “Late a kimuh khitna ko kiangah teltakin hong kigen hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Samuel in a gen kumpi suah nading thu tawh kisai ama tungah bangmah gen lo hi." 
1Samuel10:17 Tu-in Samuel in Mizpah-a Topa’ kiangah mite khawm hi. 
1Samuel10:18 Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt panin Israel-te ka paikhiatpih a, Egypt-te’ khutsung le note hong nengniam kumpi gamte khempeuh’ khutsung panin note kong honkhia hi,’ ci hi." 
1Samuel10:19 Ahih hangin note in na tuahsiatnate uh le na lungkhamnate uh panin note a hong honkhia na Pasian uh tuni-in na nial uh a, note in, ‘Kote’ tungah kumpi khat koih in,’ na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na minam nam uh le a tul tulin Topa’ mai-ah kilak un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:20 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel minamte khempeuh a nai-ah hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Benjamin minam kila hi." 
1Samuel10:21 Amah in Benjamin minamte a behbehin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Matri innkuan kila hi. A tawpna-ah amah in Matri innkuan a mi malin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Kish’ tapa Saul kila hi. Ahih hangin amaute in amah a zon uh ciangin amah kimu zo lo hi." 
1Samuel10:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa kiangah dongkik uh a, “Tua mipa hih lai-ah hong pai hiam?” ci uh a, Topa in, “En un, amahmah van kawm lakah bu hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:23 Tua ciangin amaute tai-in tua lai mun panin amah hong paipih uh hi. Mite’ lakah amah a din ciangin mi khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi. 
1Samuel10:24 Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh tungah, “ Topa in a teelsa mipa na mu uh hiam? Mi khempeuh lakah amah tawh a kibang khat zong om lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh awngin, “Kumpipa khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel10:25 Tua ciangin Samuel in kumpipa’ thuneihna le a nasepte mite kiangah gen a, amah in tuate laibu khat sungah gelhin Topa’ mai-ah a koih hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh amau’ inn ciatah a ciahsak hi." 
1Samuel10:26 Saul zong Gibeah-a ama inn-ah ciah a, Pasian in amau’ lungsim a lawnsak mi thahatte zong amah tawh a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel10:27 Ahih hangin bangmah a man lo mi pawlkhat in, “Hih mipa in eite hong bangci hotkhiat zawh ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in amah simmawhin ama kiangah letsong puak lo uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in tua mite bangmah cih lo hi." 
1Samuel11:1 Tua ciangin Ammon mi Nahash a galkapte tawh paito-in Jabeshgilead umcih hi. Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Kote tawh kilemna hong bawl in; nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:2 Ahih hangin Ammon mi Nahash in amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khat tawh note tawh kilemna ka bawl ding hi. Keimah in note’ taklam mittang khempeuh khelkhia-in Israel-te khempeuh tungah mindaina kong omsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:3 Jabesh upate in ama kiangah, “Israel-te’ gam sung khempeuhah kamtaite ka sawltheih nadingun ni sagih sung a hun hong sot in. Tua ciangin kote hong honkhia ding kuamah a om kei le nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:4 Saul’ khua Gibeah-ah kamtaite a tun uh ciangin amaute in mite kiangah a thu gen uh a, tua ciangin mi khempeuh a gingin kapkhia uh hi." 
1Samuel11:5 Tu-in Saul a bawngtalte’ nung zui-in lo panin hong ciah hi. Saul in, “Amaute a kah nadingin bang in mite nasak ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jabesh mite’ thute ama kiangah a gen uh hi." 
1Samuel11:6 Saul in hih thute a zak ciangin Pasian’ kha in khauhtakin amah hanthawn a, nakpitakin a sin hong so hi." 
1Samuel11:7 Amah in bawng leengkai kap khat la a, tuate go-in semnen a, kamtaite sawlin Israel gam khempeuhah khak a, “Saul le Samuel nung zui-in a kuankhia lo peuhmah a bawngtalte’ tungah hih bangin kihih ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin mite tungah Topa kihtakna hong tung a, mihing khat bangin amaute hong kuankhia uh hi." 
1Samuel11:8 Amah in Bezek-ah amaute a kaihkhop ciangin Israel mite tul zathum pha a, Judah mite tul sawmthum pha hi." 
1Samuel11:9 Amaute in a hong pai kamtaite kiangah, “Jabeshgilead mite tungah hih bangin gen un: ‘Zing ciang, sun hun ma-in note hong kihonkhia ding hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Kamtaite hong tungin Jabesh mite kiangah a gen uh ciangin amaute lungdam uh hi." 
1Samuel11:10 Tua ahih ciangin Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Zing ciangin nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh a, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin kote’ tungah nong hih ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:11 A zing ciangin Saul in mite pawl thumin a khen hi. Tua ciangin amaute’ giahphual laizangah zingsang tungin hong pai uh a, sun nisat dong Ammon-te a satlum uh hi. A suakta mite kithehthang uh a, amaute mi nih nangawn a omkhopna om nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel11:12 Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, ”‘Saul in eite hong uk ding hiam?’ a cite kua ahi hiam? Amaute i thah theih nadingin a mite hong paipih in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:13 Ahih hangin Saul in, “Tuni-in mi khat zong kithat lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tuni pen Topa in Israel-te hong hotkhiat ni ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:14 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Hong pai un; Gilgal-ah pai-in kumpi dingin Saul kipsak phakik ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh Gilgal-ah pai uh a, tua lai mun Topa’ mai Gilgal-ah Saul kumpi-in a koih uh hi. Amaute in tua lai Topa’ mai-ah thunuama biakna pia uh a, Saul le Israel mite khempeuh tua lai-ah nakpitakin lungdam khawm uh hi." 
1Samuel12:1 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “En un, note in keima kiangah nong gen uh thu khempeuh ka hong mang a, note tungah kumpi khat ka koih khin hi." 
1Samuel12:2 Tu-in note’ makai pa pen kumpipa ahi hi. Keimah teekin ka sam kang ta a, ahi zongin note tawh ka tapate om hi. Ka neulai a kipan tuni dong note’ makai ka hi hi." 
1Samuel12:3 Hih lai-ah ka om hi; ka mawhna a om leh Topa’ mai le a sathau nilh pa’ mai-ah ka mawhna hong pulak un. Kua’ bawngtal ka laksak hiam? Ahih kei leh kua’ la ka laksak hiam? Ahih kei leh kua khem ka hi hiam? Kua nengniam ka hi hiam? Ahih kei leh keima mit a tawsak dingin kua’ tung panin sumgolh la ngei ka hi hiam? Ka mawhna nong lah theih uhleh kong dinkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel12:4 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nangmah in kote nong khem kei a, zong nong nengniam kei a, mi khat peuhpeuh tung panin zong bangmah na la kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:5 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Note in kei tungah bangmah na muh lohna thu uh Topa pen note’ langkhatah teci hi a, ama sathau nilh pa zong tuni-in teci ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hi mah hi; Topa, i teci ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:6 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Moses le Aaron teelin Egypt gam panin na pu na pate uh a paikhiatpih Topa, teci ahi hi." 
1Samuel12:7 Tua ahih ciangin tuni-in note le na pu na pate uh a dingin Topa in hotkhiatna a sepna thu khempeuh Topa’ mai note’ tungah hong genin kong mawhsak theih nadingin ding lai dih un. 
1Samuel12:8 Egypt-ah Jakob pai-in Egypt-te in amaute a netniam uh ciangin Topa’ tungah na pu na pate uh kiko uh a, Egypt panin na pu na pate uh paikhiatpihin hih lai munah amaute a tengsak ahi Moses le Aaron, Topa in a puak hi." 
1Samuel12:9 Ahih hangin amaute in Topa a Pasian uh mangngilh uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Hazor kumpipa Jabin’ galkap mangpa Sisera’ tung le Filistia-te tung le Moab kumpipa tungah amaute zuak a, hih mite in amaute sim uh hi." 
1Samuel12:10 Tua ciangin Topa tungah amaute kiko uh a, ‘Kote ka khial khin uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa nusia-in Baal-te le Ashtaroth na ka sem uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in ka galte uh khutsung panin kote hong honkhia in; nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Jerubbaal, Barak, Jefthah, le Samuel hong sawl a, na kiim khempeuh uha na galte uh khutsung panin note hong honkhia a, note lungmuang takin na om uh hi." 
1Samuel12:12 Tua ciangin note a sim dingin Ammon kumpipa Nahash hong kuanna na muh uh ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh na kumpi uh hi napi-in note in kei kiangah, ‘Kumpi khat in kote hong uk ding hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:13 “Tu-in note’ teelsa, note’ nget kumpipa en un; Topa in note’ tungah kumpi khat koih khinta hi." 
1Samuel12:14 Note in Topa zahtakin ama na sem a, ama aw ngai-in Topa’ thupiakna na langpan’ kei uh a, note a hong uk kumpipa le na Pasian uh na zuih uhleh thu hong nuam ding hi." 
1Samuel12:15 Ahih hangin note in Topa’ aw ngai loin Topa’ thupiakna na langpan’ uhleh Topa in note le na kumpipa uh hong langpan’ ding hi. 
1Samuel12:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in taang loin ding unla, note’ muhna-ah Topa in a hih ding hih na lian en un." 
1Samuel12:17 Tuhun pen mangbuh lak laitak hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in vanging le guah hong puaktheih nadingin Topa’ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Note a dingin kumpi khat na ngetna uh hangin Topa’ muhna-ah na gamtatnasa na gitlohna uh a liatna thu thei-in na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel12:18 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in Topa’ tungah thu ngen a, Topa in tua ni-in van gingsakin guah zusak hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in Topa le Samuel nakpitakin a zahtak uh hi." 
1Samuel12:19 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in Samuel kiangah, “Kote ka sih loh nadingun na nasemte a dingin Topa’ tungah thu ngen in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka khialhnasate uh banah kote a dingin kumpi khat ngenin ka khialhnate uh banah hih siatna ka behlap lailai uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:20 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Lau kei un; hih siatnate khempeuh na gamta khin uh hi. Ahi zongin Topa zuihna panin pial kei unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa’ na sem un." 
1Samuel12:21 Meetna hong pia thei lo, hong hon thei lo, a mawkna milimte biakna lamah pial kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a mawkna ahi hi." 
1Samuel12:22 Topa in ama min a khualna-in ama mite paaikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama mi-in note hong bawl nadingin Topa lungkim khin hi. 
1Samuel12:23 Tua tham loin kei zong, note a dingin Topa’ tungah thunget lohna tawh ka na khial het kei ding a, keimah in a hoih a man lampite note kong hilh ding hi." 
1Samuel12:24 Topa zahtak unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh citakin ama na sem un; bang hang hiam cih leh note a dingin amah in na lian hong bawlsaksate ngaihsun un." 
1Samuel12:25 Ahih hangin note na gamtat siat lai uhleh, note le na kumpipa uh, na nihun hong kiphiatkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:1 Saul in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmthum pha a, kum sawmnih le kum nih sung Israel-te a uk hi." 
1Samuel13:2 Saul in Israel-te mihing tulthum teel hi. Tul nihte Mikmash le Bethel mualtung gamah Saul tawh om a, tul khatte Benjamin gam sung Gibeah-ah a tapa Jonathan tawh om uh a, midang a omlaite amau’ inn a puanbuk ciat uhah amah in ciahsak hi." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathan in Geba-ah a om Filistia-te’ khuacingte zo a, Filistia-te in tua thu za uh hi. Tua ciangin Saul in gam khempeuhah peengkul tum a, “Hebru mi khempeuh zasak un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:4 Tua ciangin Saul in Filistia khuacingte a zawhna le Filistia-te a dingin Israel-te a huathuai ahihna zong Israel-te khempeuh in za uh hi. Gilgal-ah Saul a pawm dingin mite kisamkhia hi. 
1Samuel13:5 Tua ciangin Israel-te tawh a kido dingin Filistia-te kikhawmin, leeng tul sawmthum, sakol galkap tulguk, le a galkapte tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin tampi pha uh hi. Amaute hong paito-in Bethaven nisuahna lam Mikmash-ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel13:6 A galte in Israel mite neh mahmah ahih manin amaute haksatna sungah a omlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin suanghawm sung, leihawm sung, suang kawmlak, han lak, le tuikhukte sungah bu uh a," 
1Samuel13:7 a dangte in Jordan ngahmun kantanin Gad le Gilead gamah galkah uh hi. Saul ahihleh Gilgal-ah omlai a, amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lau-in ling uh hi." 
1Samuel13:8 Amah in Samuel’ seh hun, ni sagih sung a ngak hi. Ahih hangin Gilgal-ah Samuel hong pai lo a, ama kiang panin mite kithehthang hi." 
1Samuel13:9 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in, “Meihal biakna le thunuama biakna hih lai kei kiangah hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna a pia hi." 
1Samuel13:10 Meihal biakna a piak a man khit phetin Samuel hong tung a, amah a dawn ding le a hopih dingin Saul paikhia hi." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuel in, “Bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in, “Kei kiang panin mite kithehthangin, a ni kiseh sungin nang lah hong tung lo a, Mikmash-ah Filistia-te a kikhopna ka muh ciangin" 
1Samuel13:12 keimah in, ‘Tu-in Filistia-te keimah hong hih dingin Gilgal-ah hong paisuk ding uh a, keimah in Topa’ maipha ka ngen nai kei hi,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei mahmah kisawl tawmin meihal biakna ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:13 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Na hai gamtat hi; Topa na Pasian’ hong thupiakna na zui kei hi; bang hang hiam cih le Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang le na suanlekhakte a kipsaksuak ding ahi hi." 
1Samuel13:14 Ahih hangin tu-in na ukna kizomsuak lo ding a, Topa in ama lungsim bangin mi khat zong khin hi. Topa in nang hong thupiak zui lo na hih manin ama mite tungah ulian dingin Topa in amah seh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:15 Tua ciangin Samuel dingin Gilgal panin Benjamin-te’ gam sung Gibeah-ah paito hi. Tua ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om mite mihing zaguk bang kaikhawm hi. 
1Samuel13:16 Saul, a tapa Jonathan, le amau tawh a om mite Benjamin-te’ gam sung Gibeah-ah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Filistia-te in Mikmash-ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel13:17 Tua ciangin Filistia-te’ giahphual panin galsimte pawl thumin hong kuankhia uh hi. Pawlkhatte Shual gam Ofrah lamah kihei-in," 
1Samuel13:18 pawlkhatte Bethhoron lamah kihei a, pawlkhatte gamlak lam Zeboiim kuam a kimuh sukna gamgi lamah kihei uh hi." 
1Samuel13:19 Tua laitakin Israel gam sung khempeuhah sikseek khat zong om lo hi. Tua ahih manin Filistia-te in, “Hebru mite in amau a dingin namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin hong seeksak kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel13:20 Israel-te pen a lokhawhna tu, a hei, ahih kei leh a phiaukawi a seek hiam dingin Filistia-te kiangah paisuk zel uh hi." 
1Samuel13:21 Lokhawhna tu le tuzum seek hiam thaman hamu bang hi a, hei seek hiam thaman le ciangkhutah sik phuh thaman mat khat bang ahi hi." 
1Samuel13:22 Tua ahih ciangin galdo-in Saul le Jonathan tawh a om mite khat peuhpeuh khut sungah namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin om lo a, ahi zongin Saul le a tapa Jonathan in nei uh hi." 
1Samuel13:23 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in Mikmash paina ciangka a cing dingin mi sawl uh hi. 
1Samuel14:1 Ni khat ni-in Saul’ tapa Jonathan in ama galhiam a pua tangvalpa kiangah, “Hong pai in; gal khat-a Filistia khuacingte kiangah pai ni,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in a pa kiangah a pai ding thu gen lo hi." 
1Samuel14:2 Saul pen Migron-a om mang kawlsing nuai-a Gibeah nawlah om hi. Amah tawh a om mite zaguk bang pha a," 
1Samuel14:3 Shiloh-ah Topa’ siampi Eli’ tapa Finehas, a tapa Ikhabod, a sanggampa Ahitub’ tapa Ahijah in siampipuan silh hi. Mite in Jonathan a paikhiat khitlam thei lo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:4 Filistia khuacingte’ omna-ah pai ding Jonathan in a ngimna ciangka a pang khatah suangdawk khat omin, a pang langkhatah zong suangdawk khat mah om hi. A khat min Bozez hi a, a langkhat min Seneh ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:5 Suangdawk khat pen Mikmash mai leilu lamah dawkin a khat pen Geba mai leitaw lamah dawk hi. 
1Samuel14:6 Tua ciangin Jonathan in ama galhiam a pua tangvalpa kiangah, “Hong pai in; dawibia mi hih khuacingte kiangah va pai ni. Topa in eite a dingin hong hihsak kha ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hotkhiat nadingin a tam a tawm in Topa nawngkaisak lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:7 Tua ciangin a galhiam puapa in ama kiangah, “Na lungsim in a sawm khempeuh hih in. Nang tawh ka om a, nang lungsim mah bangin kei’ lungsim zong ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:8 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “En in, hua mite kiangah galkahin amaute kiangah i va kilak ding hi." 
1Samuel14:9 Amaute in, ‘Note kiangah kong pai mateng uh hong ngak un,’ hong cih leh i omna munah taang loin i om ding a, amaute kiangah i paito kei ding hi." 
1Samuel14:10 Ahih hangin amaute in, ‘Ko’ kiangah hong paito un,’ hong cih leh eite i paito ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in eite’ khut sungah amaute hong pia khin hi. Hih pen eite a dingin lim hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:11 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia khuacingte kiangah amau tegel va kilak uh hi. Filistia-te in, “En un, a bukna uh leivang panin Hebru mite hong pusuakkhia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel14:12 Khuacing mite in Jonathan le a galhiam puapa na hopih uh a, “Ko kiangah hong paito un; na khat kong lak ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan in a galhiam puapa kiangah, “Ka nung hong zuito in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-te’ khut sungah amaute hong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:13 Tua ciangin Jonathan a khut le a khe tawh kahto-in a galhiam puapa a nungah pai hi. Jonathan in amaute vattuk a, a galhiam puapa in ama nungah amaute that hi." 
1Samuel14:14 Jonathan le a galhiam puapa in a mi thah masak tungin lo ekah khat dung zui-in lo kaihna kuak dung tawnlang tan sungah mihing sawmnih bang si hi. 
1Samuel14:15 Tua ciangin giahphual sung, gam sung, le mite lakah apkhapna om hi. Khuacingte le galsimte nangawn ling uh hi. Zin ling a, buaina lianpi mahmah khat hong suak hi." 
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin-te’ gam sunga Gibeah-a Saul’ galvilte in a et uh ciangin hih lam hua lamah mihonte a kikhin muaimuai a mu uh hi. 
1Samuel14:17 Tua ciangin Saul in amah tawh a omkhawm mite kiangah, “Mi sim unla, eite kiang panin kua paikhia hiam thei un,” a ci hi. Amaute in mi a sim khit uh ciangin, Jonathan le a galhiam puapa na om lo hi." 
1Samuel14:18 Tua ciangin Saul in Ahijah kiangah, “Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang hih lai-ah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun laitakin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang Israel mite tawh pai hi." 
1Samuel14:19 Saul in siampipa a hopih laitakin Filistia-te’ giahphual a buaina hong lian semsem hi. Tua ciangin Saul in siampipa kiangah, “Tua Thuciamna Singkuang lenin Topa thu dot ding hun om nawn lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:20 Tua ciangin Saul le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh kikhawmin galphualah pai uh hi. A galte khempeuh’ namsau in amau’ lawmte mah hih ciat a, kitawhnawina lianpi khat na om hi." 
1Samuel14:21 Tu-in tua hun ma-in Filistia-te tawh omkhawm khinin giahphual ah amaute tawh a pai khinsa Hebru mite nangawn Saul le Jonathan tawh a omkhawm Israel-te tawh a kipawl dingin kihei uh hi. 
1Samuel14:22 Tua mah bangin, Filistia-te a taina thu Efraim mualtung gamah a bu Israel mite khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin amaute in zong galphualah nakpitakin a nungdelh uh hi." 
1Samuel14:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel-te tua ni-in honkhia a, galkidona in Bethaven a kheng hi." 
1Samuel14:24 Israel mite tua ni-in lungkham uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Saul in mite tungah kiciamna khat koih a, “Tu nitak mateng le ka galte ka thukzawh matengin an a ne pa in samsiatna ngah ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite khat beek in an ciam lo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:25 Mi khempeuh tulak a tun uh ciangin mun citengah khuaizu na om hi. 
1Samuel14:26 Mite tulak a lut uh ciangin, a khuaizu taak a, ahih hangin kuamah in ciam ngam vet lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in tua kiciamna kihta uh hi." 
1Samuel14:27 Ahih hangin a pa in kiciamna tawh mite a thuhilhna Jonathan in za lo ahih ciangin amah in a khutsunga om a ciangkhut dawn dawk sakin khuaizu sungah diahin a ne hi. Tua ciangin a tha hatkik hi. 
1Samuel14:28 Tua ciangin mite khat in, “Na pa in kiciamna khat tawh nakpitakin mite thuhilh a, ‘Tuni-in an a ne mipa in samsiatna ngah ta hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Mite gim mahmah uh hi." 
1Samuel14:29 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “Ka pa in gam sung nawngkaisak hi; hih khuaizu tawmno khat ka ciapna hangin ka tha a hatkikna mu un." 
1Samuel14:30 Mite in tuni-in a ut utun amau’ muhsa galte’ an kinusiate ne leh bangzah takin hoihzaw ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in Filistia-te i thah tamzo nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:31 Amaute in tua ni-in Mikmash panin Aijalon ciang dong Filistia-te sattuk uh hi. Tua ciangin mite gim mahmah uh hi. 
1Samuel14:32 Van kinusiate tungah mite va leengin, tuu le bawngtal le bawngnote a tuahtuahna munah go uh a, mite in tuate a si tawh a ne uh hi." 
1Samuel14:33 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah thu kiko a, “A si tawh sa nekna hangin Topa’ tungah mite khial uh hi,” kici hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Na zuau gamtat khin uh hi; suangtum lian khat hih lai kei kiangah hong khuk dih un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:34 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Mite lakah note pai-in amaute kiangah, ‘Mi khempeuh in a bawngtal ahi a, a tuu ahi zongin hih lai-ah hong paipihin go unla, a sa ne un; a si tawh nekna hangin Topa’ tungah khial kei un,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in tua zanin a bawngtalte uh hong paipihin tua munah go uh hi." 
1Samuel14:35 Tua ciangin Saul in Topa a’ ding biakna tau khat lam hi. Tua pen Topa a dingin a lam masak biakna tau ahi hi. 
1Samuel14:36 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Filistia-te kiangah zanin paisukin zingsang khuavak dong amaute va sugawp ni; amaute mi khat zong siit kei ni,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hoih na sak peuhpeuh hih in,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin siampipa in, “Hih lai-ah Pasian kiang nai ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:37 Tua ciangin Saul in Pasian kiangah thu dong a, “Filistia-te kiangah ka paisuk ding hiam? Israel-te’ khut sungah amaute nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tua ni-in amah in dawng lo hi." 
1Samuel14:38 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Mi a makaite khempeuh aw, hih lai-ah hong pai un; hih mawhna tuni-in hong pianna thei unla mu un." 
1Samuel14:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te a honkhia Topa a nuntak mah bangin, ka tapa Jonathan’ tungah tua mawhna a om leh zong, amah a si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin mite lak panin amah a dawng ngam mi khat zong om lo hi." 
1Samuel14:40 Tua ciangin amah in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “Note langkhatah na om ding uh a, kei le ka tapa Jonathan a langkhatah ka om ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “Hoih na sak bangin hih in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel14:41 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in, “Israel-te’ Pasian Topa aw, bang hangin tuni-in na nasempa hong dawng lo na hi hiam? Hih mawhna kei tung ahi a, ka tapa Jonathan’ tungah ahi zongin a om leh, Israel-te’ Pasian Topa aw, Urim hong pia in; ahih hangin hih mawhna na mi Israel-te tungah om ahihleh Thummim hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan le Saul kila a, a midangte suakta hi." 
1Samuel14:42 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Kei le ka tapa Jonathan kikalah ai san un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan kila hi." 
1Samuel14:43 Tua ciangin Saul in Jonathan kiangah, “Na gamtatnasa hong gen in,” a ci hi. Jonathan in ama kiangah gen a, “Ka khutsunga om ciangkhut dawn tawh khuaizu tawmkhat ka ciam hi. Hih lai-ah ka om hi; kei a si dingin ka kiging hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:44 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Nang na sih taktak kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen, Jonathan aw,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
1Samuel14:45 Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “Israel-te sungah hih gualzawhna lian a piangsak Jonathan si ding ahi hiam? Hi dek peuhmah lo ding! Topa a nuntak mah bangin, a lu tunga samzang khat zong leilakah kialo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Pasian tawh tuni-in tua thu piangsak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in Jonathan honkhia uh a, amah si lo hi." 
1Samuel14:46 Tua ciangin Filistia-te a delhna panin Saul khawl a, Filistia-te zong amau’ munah a ciah uh hi." 
1Samuel14:47 Saul, Israel-te tungah kumpi a suah khit ciangin mun khempeuha ama galte khempeuh, Moab-te, Ammon-te, Edom-te, Zobah kumpite, le Filistia-te a do hi. A galsimna peuhpeuhah amah gualzo tawntung hi." 
1Samuel14:48 Amah in hangtakin hihin Amalek-te vatgawp a, amaute a sugawp mite’ khutsung panin Israel-te a honkhia hi." 
1Samuel14:49 Tu-in Saul’ tapate pen Jonathan, Ishvi, le Malkhishua hi a, a tanu nihte: a uzaw min Merab hi a, a nauzaw’ min Mikhal hi a," 
1Samuel14:50 Saul’ zi min Ahinoam hi a, Ahimaaz’ tanu ahi hi. A galkap mangpa’ min Abner hi a, Saul’ pano Ner’ tapa ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:51 Saul’ pa Kish le Abner’ pa Ner pen Abiel’ tapate ahi uh hi. 
1Samuel14:52 Saul’ nuntak sung khempeuh Filistia-te tawh nakpi taka kidona om hi. Saul in, mi thahat khat peuhpeuh ahi a, mi hang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a muh ciangin, tua mipa ama galkap dingin pawlbawl pahpah hi." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuel in Saul kiangah, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang sathau a nilh dingin kei hong sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa’ thugen ngai in." 
1Samuel15:2 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute Egypt panin hong paikhiat lai-in amaute in lampi-ah Israel-te a nialna uh hangin Amalek mite gim ka pia ding hi. 
1Samuel15:3 Tu-in pai-in Amalek mite vatgawp unla, amaute’ neih khempeuh susiamang khin un. Amaute siit loin, numei le pasal, naupang le nawine laite, bawngtal le tuu, kalaoh le la, that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:4 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in Israel mite sam a, Telaim-ah khe galkap mi tul zanih le Judah mi tul sawm kaikhawm hi." 
1Samuel15:5 Tua ciangin Amalek khuapi-ah Saul hong pai-in kuam sungah pangsim hi. 
1Samuel15:6 Tua ciangin Saul in Ken mite kiangah, “Pai un; kihemkhia un. Amalek mite lak panin paikhiasuk un. Tua hikeileh amaute tawh note kong susiakhawm kha ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin Israel-te hong paikhiat lai-in amaute khempeuh tungah migitna na lak uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Amalek mite lak panin Ken mite kihemkhia uh hi." 
1Samuel15:7 Tua ciangin Saul in Havilah panin Egypt nisuahna lama om Shur ciang dong Amalek-te zo hi. 
1Samuel15:8 Amah in Amalek-te’ kumpipa Agag a hingin man a, mi khempeuh namsau tawh thatmang hi." 
1Samuel15:9 Ahih hangin Saul le mite in Agag, le a hoihpen tuute, bawngtalte, gannote, tuunote le a hoih khempeuh khawi uh a, tuate thatmang khin lo uh hi. A kisimmawh bangmah a man lo khempeuh amaute in thatmang uh hi." 
1Samuel15:10 Topa’ thu Samuel tungah hong tung hi: 
1Samuel15:11 “Kumpi-in Saul ka koih ka kisik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen keimah zuihna panin kihei kik a, ka thupiaknate sem lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel heh hi; zan tawntung Topa’ tungah kiko hi." 
1Samuel15:12 Tua ciangin Saul a dawn dingin zingsangin Samuel tho baih hi. Samuel kiangah, “Karmel-ah Saul hong pai hi. Amah in ama a dingin phawkna mual khat phutin, kihei-in paisuak a, Gilgal-ah paisuk hi,” kici hi." 
1Samuel15:13 Tua ciangin Samuel hong pai a, Saul in ama kiangah, “ Topa’ thupha na tungah hong tung hen. Topa’ thupiakna ka sem khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:14 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Tua ahihleh ka bil-a tuu hamna le ka zak bawngtalte’ hamna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:15 Saul in, “Amaute in Amalek-te kiang panin tuate hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian tungah biakna piak nadingin a limci pen tuute le bawngtalte mite in siit uh a, a dangte ka thatmang khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:16 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Khawl in! Topa in tuzanin kei kiangah hong gen thu nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in Samuel kiangah, “Hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:17 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Nang na kineu ngaihsut hun a om hangin, tu-in nang pen Israel minamte’ lutang hi lo na hi hiam? Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilh hi." 
1Samuel15:18 Topa in nasem dingin nang hong sawl a, ‘Pai in; mawhnei Amalek mite va susiamang inla, amaute a bei mateng va simgawp in,’ hong ci hi." 
1Samuel15:19 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topa’ thu mang lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin vankinusiate bawhin Topa’ muhna-ah a sia gamta na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel15:20 Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Keimah in Topa’ thu ka mang a, Topa in hong sawl nasepna-ah pai khinin, Amalek kumpipa Agag kong ciahpih khin a, Amalek mite ka susiamang khin hi." 
1Samuel15:21 Ahih hangin mite in a kinusiate, tuute le bawngtalte, suksiat dinga a ki-ap na hoihpente Gilgal-ah Topa na Pasian piak dingin la uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:22 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa in meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate Topa’ thu man’ ding zahin deih ahi hiam? En in, biakpiakna sangin thu man’ ding hoihzaw a, tuutal thaute sangin thu ngaih ding hoihzaw hi." 
1Samuel15:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh lehdona pen aisan mawhna bangmah hi a, lungkhauhna pen mawhna le milim biakna mah a bang ahi hi. Nangmah in Topa’ thu nial khin na hih manin, amah in zong kumpi hihna pan nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:24 Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Ka khial khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in mite kihta-in amau’ thu mangkha ka hih manin Topa’ thupiakna le nangma thute ka palsat khin hi." 
1Samuel15:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi; ka khialhna hong maisak inla, Topa ka biaktheih nadingin kei hong lehzuihkik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:26 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Nang tawh kong kilehkik kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topa’ thu na nial khin a, Israel-te’ tungah kumpi hihna panin Topa in nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:27 A paikhia dingin Samuel a kihei laitakin Saul in a puantualpi mongin len a, a puan kikeek hi." 
1Samuel15:28 Tua ciangin Samuel in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Israel-te’ kumpi gam nang’ tung panin tuni-in balkhia-in nang sangin a hoihzaw na vengpa tungah pia khin hi." 
1Samuel15:29 Israel-te’ minthang Pasian in zong zuau gen lo ding a, zong kisik lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a kisik dingin amah mi hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:30 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka khial khin hi; ahi zongin tu-in keima mi upate mai le Israel-te’ mai-ah kei hong pahtawi inla, Topa na Pasian ka biaktheih nadingin kei hong zuikik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:31 Tua ahih ciangin Saul’ nung zui-in Samuel kilehkik a, Saul in Topa a bia hi." 
1Samuel15:32 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Amalek-te’ kumpi Agag hih lai ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Agag launa linna tawh ama kiangah hong pai hi. Agag in, “Sih ding lungkhamna hong tung taktak ta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:33 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Na namsau in nute ta bei-in a bawl mah bangin na nu zong ta bei hi ta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Topa’ mai Gilgal-ah Agag a semnen hi." 
1Samuel15:34 Tua ciangin Ramah-ah Samuel pai a, Gibeah-a a inn-ah Saul zong a ciahto hi." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuel in ama sih ni dong Saul mukik lo a, ahih hangin Saul’ hangin Samuel a dah hi. Israel-te tungah kumpi-in Saul a koih manin Topa kisik hi." 
1Samuel16:1 Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Israel-te tungah kumpi hihna panin amah ka nolhkhitna mu napi-in Saul’ hangin bang tanvei dah ding na hi hiam? Na sathau biingah sathau thun inla, pai in; Bethlehem mi Jessi kiangah kong sawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tapate lak panin keima-a’ ding kumpi khat ka la khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuel in, “Bangci pai theih ding ka hi hiam? Saul in za le amah in kei hong that ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Bawngla khat paipih inla, ‘ Topa’ tungah biakna pia dingin kong pai hi,’ ci in." 
1Samuel16:3 Biakpiakna-ah Jessi sam in. Na hih ding teng na tungah kong lak ding a, nang tungah a min kong gen pa sathau nong nilhsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:4 Topa’ thupiak bangin Samuel gamta-in Bethlehem-ah a pai hi. Tua khuapi upate a lingsa-in amah a dawn dingin hong pai uh a, “Thuhoih a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:5 Amah in, “Thuhoih hi; Topa’ tungah biakna a pia dingin kong pai hi. Note ki-ap unla, biakpiakna-ah kei tawh hong pai un,” a ci hi. Amah in Jessi le a tapate apin, biakpiakna-ah amaute a sam hi." 
1Samuel16:6 Amaute hong tun ciangin amah in Jessi’ tapa Eliab enin, “ Topa’ sathau nilh pa ama mai-ah om taktak hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel16:7 Ahih hangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “A tungtham hitaleh a tun sanna hitaleh en kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ka nolh hi. Topa in mihingte’ muh bangin mu lo hi. Mihingte in a pualam a kilangte en a, ahih hangin Topa in a lungsim en hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:8 Tua ciangin Jessi in a tapa Abinadab samin Samuel mai-ah a paisak hi. Amah in, “ Topa in hih pa zong teello hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:9 Tua ciangin Jessi in Shammah paisak hi. Amah in, “ Topa in hih pa zong teello hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
1Samuel16:10 Jessi in a tapate a sagihna dongin Samuel mai-ah paisak hi. Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “ Topa in hih mite teello hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
1Samuel16:11 Tua ciangin Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “Na tapate khempeuh hih lai-ah a omkim mah ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jessi in, “A nautum pen omlai a, ahih hangin amah tuu cingin om hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “Hih lai-ah amah hong tun mateng eite in bangmah dang i hih thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:12 Amah in David samsakin amah hong tumpih hi. Amah in cidam mel pua-in, a mitte hoih a, a mel hoih hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ding in; amah sathau nilh in; hih pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:13 Tua ciangin Samuel in a sathau biing sunga sathau la-in a sanggamte laizangah amah sathau a nilh hi. Tua ni a kipanin Topa’ kha in khauhtakin David hong uk hi. Tua ciangin Samuel dingin Ramah-ah a ciah hi. 
1Samuel16:14 Tu-in Saul’ tung panin Topa’ kha paikhia a, Topa in kha gilo sawlin tua kha gilo in amah gimsak hi." 
1Samuel16:15 Saul’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Tu-in en in, Pasian’ hong sawl kha gilo in nang hong gimsak hi." 
1Samuel16:16 Tu-in na mai-a om nasemte in laiza lasakna a tumsiam mi khat a zon nadingin ka topa un na nasemte thu pia in. Pasian’ hong sawl kha gilo na tungah hong tun ciangin amah in tua hong tum ding a, tua ciangin na ci hong dam ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:17 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a nasemte kiangah, “Limtakin a tum thei khat kei a dingin hong zong unla, ka kiangah amah hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:18 Tangvalte khat in dawngin, “En un, Bethlehem mi Jessi’ tapa, a tumsiam, a thahat, a galhang mi, thugen a siam, a omnuam mi khat ka mu a, Topa in amah a ompih mi khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:19 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in Jessi kiangah kamtaite sawl a, “Na tapa David, tuute tawh a om pa, kei’ kiangah hong sawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:20 Tua ciangin Jessi in anlum, leenggahzu savun thawl khat, le keelno khat a pua ding la khat la-in, Saul kiangah tuate a tapa David puaksak hi." 
1Samuel16:21 Saul kiangah David hong tung a, ama nasepna-ah a lut hi. Saul in amah nakpitakin it a, amah pen a galhiam puapa a suak hi." 
1Samuel16:22 Saul in Jessi kiangah mi sawlin, “Keima nasepna-ah David hong omsak in. Amah ka pahtak mahmah mi khat ahi hi,” cisak hi." 
1Samuel16:23 Pasian’ sawl kha gilo Saul’ tungah a om peuhmah ciangin David in a laiza la-in a khut tawh tum ahih ciangin Saul thaksuakin a ci dam a, ama kiang panin kha gilo kihemkhia hi." 
1Samuel17:1 Tu-in Filistia-te in galsim dingin a galkapte uh khawmin Judah gam Sokoh-ah amaute kituah uh a, Sokoh le Azekah kikal Efesdammim-ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel17:2 Tua ciangin Saul le Israel mite kikhawmin Elah kuamah giahphual sat uh a, Filistia-te a do dingin kithawi uh hi." 
1Samuel17:3 Filistia-te a gal mualtungah ding uh a, Israel-te a galkhat mualtungah dingin, amaute’ kikalah kuam khat om hi." 
1Samuel17:4 Filistia-te’ giahphual panin Gath khuami Goliath a kici a makai, a tun pi kua val a sang mi khat hong paikhia hi." 
1Samuel17:5 Amah in a lu tungah sumngo sik lukhu khu-in, sik puan tawh amah kithawi a, a puan gihna sumngo shekel tulnga ahi hi." 
1Samuel17:6 Amah in a khete tungah sumngo ngaltuam bulh a, a liangko-ah sumngo teipi khawh kikhai hi." 
1Samuel17:7 A teibul siam lawngpi cia bang pha a, a teipak sik shekel zaguk gik a, ama mai-ah a lum puapa a pai hi." 
1Samuel17:8 Amah dingin Israel uliante otsanin, “Galdo dingin bang hangin hong kuankhia ngam na hi uh hiam? Kei, Filistia mi hi-in, note, Saul’ nasemte hi lo na hi uh hiam? Note a dingin mi khat teel unla, tua mipa kei kiangah hong paisuksak un." 
1Samuel17:9 Amah in kei hong do-in hong thah zawh leh kote na nasemte ka hi ding uh a, ahih hangin keimah in amah zo-in ka thah leh note, komau’ nasem na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:10 Tua ciangin tua Filistia mipa in, “Tuni-in Israel uliante kong to hi. I kido theih nadingin mi khat hong pia un,” cithuah lai hi." 
1Samuel17:11 Saul le Israel-te khempeuh in Filistia mipa’ kammalte a zak uh ciangin amaute lungkia-in nakpitakin a lau uh hi. 
1Samuel17:12 David pen Judah gam Bethlehem khua-a om Efrathah mi, tapa giat a nei Jessi min a nei pa’ tapa ahi hi. Saul’ hun lai-in tua mipa teek zo-in kum tampi pha ta hi." 
1Samuel17:13 Jessi’ tapa a u pen thumte in galdona-ah Saul zui khin uh hi. Gal sungah a pai a tapa thumte’ min pen, a ta upa Eliab, ama zomah Abinadab, le a thumna Shammah ahi hi." 
1Samuel17:14 David, a nautum pen hi a, a upa pen thumte in Saul zui a," 
1Samuel17:15 ahih hangin Bethlehem-a a pa’ tuute a vak dingin Saul’ kiang panin David ciah zelzel hi. 
1Samuel17:16 Ni sawmli sung zing le nitakin Filistia-pa hong pai-in hong ding zelzel hi. 
1Samuel17:17 Tua ciangin Jessi in a tapa kiangah, “Hih ankan seu khat le hih anlum sawm na ute puak dingin guang inla, na ute kiang giahphual ah manlangin va puak inla," 
1Samuel17:18 a tul a ukpa kiangah zong hih sathaukhal sawmte puak in. Na ute’ omdan va mu inla, amau’ omzia a kitheihna lim pawlkhat hong ciahpih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:19 Tua laitakin Filistia-te tawh kido-in Saul le amaute, le Israel mite khempeuh, Elah kuamah om uh hi." 
1Samuel17:20 Tua ciangin Jessi in a thupiak bangin zingsangin David tho baihin, a kem ding midang khat tawh a tuute nusia a, a ante pua-in a pai hi. Mihonte giahphual ah pai-in galdo kikona a ot laitakun amah giahphual va tung hi." 
1Samuel17:21 Israel-te le Filistia-te, galkap le galkap a kido dingin kinaih uh hi." 
1Samuel17:22 David in van cing pa’ khut sungah a nate nusia-in galkapte kiangah va tai a, pai-in a ute va hopih hi." 
1Samuel17:23 Amaute tawh a kiho laitakin, Gath khuami Filistia-te a makaipi Goliath min nei pa, Filistia uliante lak panin hong paikhia-in a masa-a mah bangin kam hong pau hi. David in ama kampau a za hi." 
1Samuel17:24 Israel mite khempeuh in tua mipa a muh uh ciangin ama kiang panin taikhia uh a, lau mahmah uh hi." 
1Samuel17:25 Israel mite khatlekhat kiho-in, “Hih hong paikhia mipa na mu ngei uh hiam? Israel-te a to dingin hong paito takpi hi. Amah a that mipa tungah kumpipa in sum tampi pia-in, ama tanu zong pia ding a, a pa’ innkuante, Israel sungah aana nasep le siah khempeuh kipengsak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel17:26 David in ama kianga ding mite kiangah, “Hih Filistia-pa thatin Israel-te’ tung panin hih mindaina a beisak pa a dingin bang kihih ding ahi hiam? A nungta Pasian’ galkapte a to dingin hih dawibia Filistia-pa kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:27 Mite in a kibang mahin dawng uh a, “Amah a that mipa tungah tua bang tua bangin kihih ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel17:28 David in mite kiangah thu a gen laitakin ama u a upen Eliab in a za hi. David tungah Eliab heh mahmah ahih manin, “Bang hangin hong paisuk na hi hiam? Tua tuu tawmkhatte gamlakah kua tawh nusia na hi hiam? Na kihaimuanna le na lungsim gitlohna ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh galkidona a en dingin nong paisuk hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:29 David in, “Bang hih ka hi hiam? Kam bek hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:30 Tua ciangin ama kiang panin midang khat kiangah kihei-in a kibang mahin thu dong a, mite in a masa-a mah bangin amah dawngkik uh hi." 
1Samuel17:31 David’ kampaute a kizak ciangin amaute in Saul kiangah gen uh a, Saul in amah samsak hi." 
1Samuel17:32 Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Ama hangin kuamah lungkiasak kei in. Na nasempa pai-in hih Filistia-pa tawh ka va kido ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:33 Saul in David kiangah, “Hih Filistia-pa tawh a kido dingin ama langkhatah na kuanzo kei ding hi. Nang pen tangval na hi pan a, amah pen a tangval a kipan galkap mi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:34 Ahih hangin David in Saul kiangah, “Na nasempa in a pa’ tuute a kem zel hi. Humpinelkai ahi a, vom ahi zongin hong pai-in tuute lak panin tuuno a mat ciangin," 
1Samuel17:35 a nungah delhin vatgawpin a kamsung panin tuuno ka honkhia hi. Kei hong hih dingin amah hong ding leh keimah in a ngawngin manin vatgawpin ka that hi. 
1Samuel17:36 Na nasempa in humpinelkai le vomte that khin ngei hi. Amah in a nungta Pasian’ galkapte ninsak ahih manin dawibia hih Filistia-pa pen tuate khat tawh kibang lel ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:37 Tua ciangin David in, “Humpinelkai khecin le vom khecin panin kei a hong honkhia Topa in hih Filistia-pa’ khutsung panin zong kei hong honkhia ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi. Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Pai in; Topa in nang hong ompih ta hen!” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:38 Tua ciangin Saul in a galvante David pia a, amah in a lu tungah sumngo lukhu khusakin, sik puan silhsak hi." 
1Samuel17:39 Tua ciangin David in a galdalnate tungah a namsau khih a, amah kingeinaseh lo ahih manin lam pai dingin a kithawi leh pai thei lo hi. Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Hihte tawh lam ka pai thei kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka kingeinaseh kei hi,” a ci hi. David in tuate suahkhia hi." 
1Samuel17:40 Tua ciangin amah in a khutah a ciangkhut tawi-in, lui panin suangmai tang nga tengin a tuucin thungip sungah tuate koih hi. A khut sungah a suanglotna tawi a, Filistia-pa’ nai-ah a pai hi." 
1Samuel17:41 Tua ciangin a mai-ah a lum puapa tawh Filistia-pa hong pai-in David hong naih hi. 
1Samuel17:42 Filistia-pa khuadakin David a muh ciangin amah in simmawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a tangval pan, a cidam tuak, a melhoih khat hi lel hi." 
1Samuel17:43 Tua ciangin Filistia-pa in David kiangah, “Ui hong sa a, ciangkang tawh sat hong sawm na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Filistia-pa in a pasian-te’ min tawh David samsia hi." 
1Samuel17:44 Filistia-pa in David kiangah, “Ka kiangah hong pai in. Huih lak vasate le gamlak gamsate tungah na sa ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:45 Tua ciangin David in Filistia-pa kiangah, “Namsau, teipi, le teikhawh tawh kei kiangah nang nong kuan hi. Ahih hangin kei pen Israel galkapte’ Pasian, a Vanglian Topa, nangmah in na to mipa’ min tawh nang kiangah kong kuan hi." 
1Samuel17:46 Tuni-in Topa in ka khut sungah nang hong pia ding a, keimah in nang hong sattukin na lu ka tankhia ding hi. Tua ciangin tuni-in huihlak vasate le leitung ganhingte tungah Filistia mi a site’ luanghawmte ka pia ding hi. Israel sungah Pasian khat a omlam leitung mi khempeuh in a theih nading," 
1Samuel17:47 le Topa in namsau le teipi tawh a hotkhiat lohna thu hih lai-a a om khempeuh in a theih nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh galdona pen Topa a’ hi a, amah in kote’ khut sungah note hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:48 David tawh a kituah dingin Filistia-pa dingin hong pai a, hong nai ciangin David zong Filistia-pa tawh a kituah dingin gal mai-ah a delh hi." 
1Samuel17:49 Tua ciangin David in a khutin a thungip sawkin suangtang khat la a, a kap leh Filistia-pa’ taltang a kha hi. A taltangah a suangtang tum a, leilakah amah maipuk hi." 
1Samuel17:50 Tua ahih ciangin David in suanglotna khat le suangtang khat tawh Filistia-pa zo-in a that hi. David’ khut sungah namsau om lo hi. 
1Samuel17:51 Tua ciangin David tai-in ama tungah ding a, Filistia-pa’ namsau mah a paai panin dok a, amah thatin tua tawh a lu a tankhia hi. Filistia-te in a makai pa uh a sihna a theih uh ciangin a taikeek uh hi." 
1Samuel17:52 Tua ciangin Israel-te le Judah-te awngin ding uh a, Gath le Ekron kulhkongpi ciang dong Filistia-te delh uh ahih manin Shaarim panin Gath le Ekron ciang dong Filistia mi a liamte puk uh hi." 
1Samuel17:53 Tua ciangin Filistia-te a delhna panun Israel-te hong ciahkik uh a, amaute in a giahphual uh luhsak uh hi." 
1Samuel17:54 David in Filistia-pa’ lutang la-in Jerusalem-ah paipih a, ahih hangin a galvan teng ama puanbukah a koih hi." 
1Samuel17:55 Filistia-pa do-in David a kuankhiatna Saul in a muh ciangin galkap mangpa Abner kiangah, “Abner aw, hih tangvalpa kua’ tapa ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Abner in, “Kumpipa aw, ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:56 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tangvalpa kua’ tapa ahi hiam, kan in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:57 Filistia-pa a thahna panin David hong ciah ciangin Abner in amah samin a khutsunga Filistia-pa’ lutang tawh Saul’ mai-ah a paipih hi. 
1Samuel17:58 Saul in ama kiangah, “Tangvalpa aw, kua’ tapa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. David in dawngin, “Bethlehem khuami na nasempa Jessi’ tapa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:1 David le Saul a kiho khit a kipanin Saul’ tapa Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David a it hi. 
1Samuel18:2 Saul in tua ni a kipanin ama kiangah David omsak a, a pa’ inn-ah ciahsak lo hi." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David it ahih manin amah tawh thuciamna khat a bawl hi. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathan in ama silhlai a puantualpi suahin David pia a, a galkidalna le a namsau nangawn le a thal le a kawnggak zong a pia hi." 
1Samuel18:5 Saul in a sawlna mun khempeuhah David in a maa tun hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in galkapte a uk dingin amah a koih hi. Mi khempeuh le Saul’ nasemte in zong hih thu hoih a sa uh hi. 
1Samuel18:6 Filistia-pa a thahna panin David ciahin, amaute in inn lam a zuat uh ciangin Israel khuapi khempeuh sung panin kumpi Saul a dawn dingin khuangtung le lasaknate tawi-in numeite a laam kawmin hong kuankhia uh hi." 
1Samuel18:7 Amaute gualnuamin numeite khatlekhat in, “Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,” kici uh hi." 
1Samuel18:8 Saul heh mahmah a, hih thugenna in amah lungkim lo sak hi. Amah in, “Amaute in David tungah a tul sawmin pia-in, kei tungah a tulin hong pia bek uh hi. Kumpi min puak cih simloh bang dang nei nawn ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:9 Tua ni a kipan Saul in David encik hi. 
1Samuel18:10 A zing ciangin Pasian’ sawl kha gilo in Saul hong bawh a, nisimin David in a hih ngei bangin laiza lasakna a tum laitakin ama innsung tengah Saul hang gawp hi. Saul in a khut sungah a teipi tawi hi." 
1Samuel18:11 Saul in a teipi-in David nih vei a khawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kawm tawh David ka khawhcip ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin David in a nih vei mahin na pelhthei hi." 
1Samuel18:12 Saul in David kihta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih a, ahih hangin Saul kiang panin amah kihemkhia khinta hi." 
1Samuel18:13 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a omna panin David lakhia-in mihing tulkhat a ukin koih a, mite a makai-in amah kuankhia-in hong ciah hi." 
1Samuel18:14 David in a sepna khempeuhah a maa tun hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih hi. 
1Samuel18:15 Amah in matutzawhna lianpi a neihlam Saul in a muh ciangin amah lamdang sa-in om hi. 
1Samuel18:16 Ahih hangin Israel-te khempeuh le Judah-te khempeuh in David it uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute makaihin amah kuankhia-in hong ciah hi. 
1Samuel18:17 Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Hih lai-ah ka tanu uzaw Merab om hi. Nang tungah zi dingin kong pia ding hi. Kei a dingin hang peuh inla, Topa’ gal do in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Saul in, “Keima khut sungah amah si loin Filistia-te’ khut sungah si hen,” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel18:18 David in Saul kiangah, “Kei pen kumpipa’ makpa ka hih nadingin kei, bang hi a, Israel-te tungah ka tanaute, ka pa’ innkuante bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:19 Ahih hangin David’ tungah Saul’ tanu Merab a kipiak ding laitakin Meholah mi Adriel tungah a zi dingin kipia hi. 
1Samuel18:20 Tu-in Saul’ tanu Mikhal in David ngai hi. Saul kiangah hih thu a kigen ciangin Saul a lungdam hi. 
1Samuel18:21 Saul in, “Ama a dingin ka tanu pen thangzak ahih theih nading le Filistia-te’ khut sungah a sihtheih nadingin ama tungah ka tanu pia ning,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in David kiangah a nih veina genin, “Nang pen tu-in ka makpa na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:22 Saul in a nasemte thu pia a, “David kiangah thu tuam genpih unla, ‘En in, nang tungah kumpipa lungkim a, ama nasemte khempeuh in nang hong it hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kumpipa’ makpa suak in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:23 Saul’ nasemte in David kiangah hih thute gen uh hi. David in, “Kei pen mizawng hi-in a zahtakhuai lo ka hihna mu napi-in kumpipa’ makpa suah ding a thuneu sa na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:24 Tua ciangin Saul’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin David in gen hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel18:25 Tua ciangin Saul in, “David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding uh hi: ‘Kumpipa in a galte a thukkik theih nadingin Filistia-te’ zangteep zakhat cih simloh kumpipa in moman deih lo hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tu-in Saul in Filistia-te’ khut tawh David sihsak ding ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel18:26 Saul’ nasemte in David kiangah hih thute a gen uh ciangin kumpipa’ makpa ahih ding David a lungkim hi. A hun a bei ma-in," 
1Samuel18:27 David dingin ama mite tawh pai a, Filistia mi zanih that hi. Tua ciangin amah kumpipa’ makpa a suahtheih nadingin kumpipa tungah a cingin a kipia amaute’ zangvun teepte David in hong paipih hi. Saul in a tanu Mikhal ama zi dingin a pia hi." 
1Samuel18:28 Ahih hangin Topa in David a ompihna le Israel-te khempeuh in amah a itna thu Saul in a muh ciangin 
1Samuel18:29 David a kihta semsem hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul pen David’ gal hi tawntung hi. 
1Samuel18:30 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante galsim dingin hong kuankhia uh a, amaute hong kuankhiat simin Saul’ nasem dangte khempeuh sangin David in a maa tunzaw hi. Tua ahih manin mite in David thupi muh semsem hi." 
1Samuel19:1 Tua ciangin Saul in David thah ding a ngaihsutna thu a tapa Jonathan le a nuai-a ulian khempeuh kiangah a gen hi. Ahih hangin Saul’ tapa Jonathan in David diksa mahmah hi. 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathan in David kiangah, “Ka pa Saul in nang thah hong sawm hi. Tua ahih ciangin zingsang ciangin kidawm inla, mun simtham khatah omin bu in." 
1Samuel19:3 Kei paikhia-in nangma bukna phual nai-ah ka pa kiangah ka ding ding a, nangma thu ka pa kiangah ka gen ding hi. Ama tung panin phawk ka neih leh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathan in a pa Saul kiangah David’ thu a hoihin genin ama kiangah, “Kumpipa, a nasempa David tungah khial kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah amah hong khial lo a, ama nasepnate nang a dingin nasep hoih ahi hi." 
1Samuel19:5 Amah in a nuntakna pia ngamin Filistia-pa that a, Topa in Israel-te khempeuh a dingin gualzawhna lianpi piangsak hi. Nangmah in hih thu na mu a, na lung a dam hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin thu om lopi-in David thahna tawh a mawhbaang lo mipa tungah khial ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:6 Saul in Jonathan’ thu mang hi. Saul kiciam a, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin amah kithat lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:7 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David samin, Jonathan in hih thute khempeuh ama tungah lak hi. Jonathan in Saul kiangah David paipih a, a nidanga mah bangin ama sepna ngei-ah a sem hi."
