1Samuel19:8 Tua ciangin gal hong omkik hi. David kuankhia-in Filistia-te tawh kido a, amaute tampi tak that a, ama mai-ah amaute a tai uh hi." 
1Samuel19:9 Tua ciangin a khut sungah a teipi tawi-in a inn sungah a tut laitakin Topa’ sawl kha gilo Saul’ tungah hong tung hi. David in a laiza lasakna tum hi. 
1Samuel19:10 Saul in a teipi-in kawm tawh David khawhcip dingin khawh a, ahih hangin amah in na pelh a, kawm tungah a teipi kiphut hi. Tua ciangin David tai-in a suakta hi." 
1Samuel19:11 A zingsang ciangin amah a thahtheih nadingin tua zanin Saul in amah a vil dingin David’ inn-ah mi sawl hi. Ahih hangin David’ zi Mikhal in ama kiangah, “Tuzanin na nuntakna na suahtak kei leh, zing ciangin nang hong kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:12 Tua ahih ciangin Mikhal in tawlet-ah David khiasuk hi. Amah taikhia-in suakta hi. 
1Samuel19:13 Mikhal in milim khat la-in lupna tungah koih a, keelmul lukham khat a lu-ah koihin puan silhsak hi." 
1Samuel19:14 Saul in David a man dingin mi a paisak ciangin amah in, “Amah a ci na hi,” na ci hi." 
1Samuel19:15 Tua ciangin Saul in David a en dingin mi sawl a, “Amah ka thahtheih nadingin a lupna tawh kei kiangah amah hong puato un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:16 A mi sawlte hong tun ciangin, keelmul lukham a lu sanah omin lupna tungah a milim na om hi." 
1Samuel19:17 Saul in Mikhal kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin kei hong khem a, amah a suahtak nadingin ka gal pa khah na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Mikhal in Saul dawngin, “Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Hong paisak in; bang hangin nang hong that ding ka hi hiam?’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:18 Tu-in David tai-in suakta a, Ramah-ah Samuel kiangah pai-in, ama tungah Saul’ hihna teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin amah le Samuel pai-in Naioth-ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel19:19 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah, “En in, Ramah khuasung Naioth vengah David om hi,” kici hi." 
1Samuel19:20 Tua ciangin David a man dingin Saul in mi sawl hi. Amaute in kamsang honte laamin awngin omin, amaute a makai-in Samuel a ding a muh uh ciangin, Saul’ sawltakte tungah Pasian’ kha hong tung a, amaute zong laamin a awng uh hi." 
1Samuel19:21 Hih thu Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin, amah in midang sawl leuleu a, amaute zong laamin awng leuleu uh hi. Tua ciangin Saul in mi a thum veina sawl a, amaute zong tua bangmah hi veve uh hi." 
1Samuel19:22 Tua ciangin amahmah Ramah-ah pai a, Seku-a om tuikhuk lianpi tung hi. Amah in, “Samuel le David koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Mi khat in, “En in, Ramah khuasung Naioth vengah om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:23 Tua lai panin Ramah khuasung Naioth vengah amah pai hi. Ama tungah zong Pasian’ kha hong tung a, Ramah khuasung Naioth veng a tun mateng a paikawmin laamin awng hi." 
1Samuel19:24 Amah in zong a puante suahkhia-in Samuel’ mai-ah laamin awng a, tua sun tawntung le tua zan tawntung a guaktangin a om hi. Tua hun a kipanin, “Saul zong kamsang suak khin ahi hiam?” kici hi." 
1Samuel20:1 Tua ciangin Ramah khuasung Naioth veng panin David tai-in, Jonathan kiangah hong tungin ama mai-ah, “Bang hih ka hi hiam? Ka mawhna bang ahi hiam? Amah in kei thah dingin hong zon nadingin na pa’ mai-ah ka khialhna bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:2 Tua ciangin amah in David kiangah, “Tua bang hi het lo ding! Na si kei ding hi. En in, ka pa in kei kiangah gen loin a lian hitaleh a neu hitaleh bangmah hihlo hi; bang hangin ka pa in kei tungah hih thu hong im ding ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:3 Ahih hangin David in dawngin, “Nangma nong pahtaklam na pa in teltakin thei hi. Tua ahih manin amah in, ‘Amah dah kha ding ahih manin hih thu Jonathan theisak kei ning,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a taktakin, Topa nungta-in nang na nuntak mah bangin kei ka sih nading themkhat bek in sam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:4 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Na gen peuhpeuh nang a dingin kong hihsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:5 David in Jonathan kiangah, “En in, zing ciang pen Khadet ni hi a, kumpipa tawh sabuai-ah pel loin ka tut ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin a ni thum ni nitak dongin lo sungah ka buk theih nadingin kei hong paisak in." 
1Samuel20:6 Na pa in kei hong kan leh, ‘David in ama khuapi Bethlehem-ah a va taipak dingin kei kiangah limtakin hong kingen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau innkuan khempeuh a dingin kumsim biakpiakna tua lai-ah om hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
1Samuel20:7 Amah in, ‘Pha hi!’ a cih leh na nasempa a dingin a hoih hi ding hi; ahih hangin amah a heh leh amah in siatna a ngaihsutna thei in." 
1Samuel20:8 Tua ahih ciangin thuman itna tawh na nasempa hong bawl in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a siangtho thuciamna-ah na nasempa na tunpih hi. Ahih hangin kei sungah mawhna a om leh, nangmahmah in kei hong that in; bang hangin na pa kiangah kei hong paipih ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:9 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “Nang tungah tua bang hi het kei hen! Ka pa in nang tungah siatna tung ding a ngaihsutna thei leng nang kiangah hong gen lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:10 Tua ciangin David in Jonathan kiangah, “Na pa in nang hong ngawh dawn leh kua in kei kiangah hong gen ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathan in David kiangah, “Hong pai in, lo sungah pai ni,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau tegel lo sungah a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel20:12 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa, teci hi ta hen! Zing ciang tubang hun ahi a, a ni thum ni-in ahi zongin, ka pa’ ngaihsutna tawng ka kankhiat khit ciangin, nangma tungah a lungsim a hoih leh, nang kiangah mi hong sawlin hong pulak lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
1Samuel20:13 Ahih hangin nang tungah siatna bawl nading in ka pa a lungkimsak leh, a muanhuaina-ah nang na pai theih nadingin nang kiangah a thu kong pulak kei a, nang kong sawlkhiat kei taak leh Topa in keimah Jonathan hong dawm kei tahen. Topa in ka pa a ompih mah bangin nang zong hong ompih tahen." 
1Samuel20:14 Kei ka nuntak lai leh ka sih loh nadingin Topa’ thuman itna kei tungah hong lak in. 
1Samuel20:15 Keima innkuan panin na thumanna dokkik ngei kei in. Leitung maitang panin David’ galte khempeuh Topa in a phiatkhiat ciangin," 
1Samuel20:16 David’ innkuan panin Jonathan’ min phiatkhia kei in. Topa in David’ galte tungah phu la ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:17 Tua ciangin Jonathan in amah a itna David tungah kiciampha kik hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama pumpi a it zahin amah in David a it hi. 
1Samuel20:18 Tua ciangin Jonathan in ama kiangah, “Zing ciang pen Khadet ni ahi hi. Na tutna awng ding ahih manin nang hong kiphawk ding hi." 
1Samuel20:19 A ni thum ni-in nakpitakin nang hong kiphawk kanzaw lai ding hi. A thu a kikup ciangin na bukna-ah pai inla, suangcian hua lampangah om in." 
1Samuel20:20 Tua ciangin muitum bangin tua lampangah thaltang thum ka lawn ding hi. 
1Samuel20:21 Naupang khat sawlin ama kiangah, ‘Pai in; thaltangte va zong in,’ ka ci ding hi. Naupang’ kiangah, ‘En in, nangma kiang hih lamah thaltangte om hi, tawm in,’ ka cih leh nang a hong pai ding na hi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin nang a dingin lungmuanhuai-in launa om lo hi." 
1Samuel20:22 Ahih hangin tangvalpa kiangah, ‘En in, thaltangte nangma khen ah om hi,’ ka cih leh, nang paikhia in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nang hong sawlkhia hi." 
1Samuel20:23 Nang le kei in i gen thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh, nang le kei kikalah Topa om tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:24 Tua ahih ciangin lo sungah David bu hi. Khadet ni hong tun ciangin an ne dingin kumpipa tu hi. 
1Samuel20:25 A nidanga bangin kawm gei-a a tutna tung, ama tutna-ah kumpipa tu hi. A kigalsai-in Jonathan tu-in, Saul’ pangah Abner tu a, ahih hangin David’ mun a awng hi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ahi zongin Saul in tua ni-in bangmah gen lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ama tungah thu khatpeuh piang hi ding hi; amah siang lo hi; siang lo taktak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:27 Ahih hangin a ni nih ni, Khadet ni khit a zing ciangin David’ mun awng lai hi. Tua ciangin Saul in a tapa Jonathan kiangah, “Bang hangin Jessi’ tapa zanni hitaleh tuni hitaleh an nekna-ah hong pai lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathan in Saul dawngin, “Bethlehem-ah a pai dingin limtakin kei tungah David hong kingen hi." 
1Samuel20:29 Amah in, ‘Kei hong ciahsak in; ka innkuante un khua sungah biakpiakna bawl uh a, ka sanggampa in tua lai-ah ka om ding thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nong hehpihna-in hong paisakin ka sanggamte hong musak in,’ hong ci hi. Hih thu hangin kumpipa’ sabuai-ah amah hong pai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:30 Tua ciangin Jonathan tungah Saul heh mahmahin ama kiangah, “A kiheikhial, a lehdo numei’ tapa aw, nangma maizum nading le na nu’ mindai nadingin Jessi’ tapa na pawlpihna thu a thei lo hong sa na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel20:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah Jessi’ tapa a nuntak laiteng nang na hi a, na kumpi za ahi zongin kip lo ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi sawl inla, kei kiangah amah hong paipih in. Amah a si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:32 Tua ciangin Jonathan in a pa Saul dawngin, “Bang hangin amah kithat ding ahi hiam? Amah in bang hih ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:33 Ahih hangin Saul in amah a khawhkha dingin ama lamah a teipi lawn hi. Tua ahih ciangin a pa in David thah ding a ngaihsutna Jonathan in theitel hi. 
1Samuel20:34 Tua ciangin heh mahmahna tawh sabuai panin Jonathan ding khia a, tua pawi a ni nih ni-in an ne lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa in David minsiasak ahih manin ama hangin a dah hi." 
1Samuel20:35 A zing ciangin David tawh a kiciamna lo-ah Jonathan pai-in, amah tawh naupangno khat pai hi." 
1Samuel20:36 Amah in a naupang kiangah, “Tai inla ka thaltang lotte va tawm in,” a ci hi. Naupang a tai laitakin ama khen ah a thaltang khat lawn hi." 
1Samuel20:37 Jonathan’ thaltang lot a tukna munah naupang a tun ciangin Jonathan in a naupang samin, “Nang’ khen’ hua lamah thaltang om hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:38 Tua ciangin Jonathan in naupang samin, “Manlang in; hong kinawh in; tua lai-ah om kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jonathan’ naupang pa in a thaltangte khawmin a topa kiangah a paipih hi." 
1Samuel20:39 Ahih hangin naupang in bangmah thei lo a, Jonathan le David bek in a thu thei uh hi." 
1Samuel20:40 Tua ciangin Jonathan in a hiamte a naupang pa kiangah pia-in ama kiangah, “Pai inla, khuapi sungah ciahpih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:41 Naupang a paikhiat khit phetin suangcian pang panin David dingin lei-ah maipuk a, thumvei kun hi. Jonathan sangin David nakpitakin dahzaw a, amau khatlekhat kinamin, khitui luangin khatlekhat kikah uh hi." 
1Samuel20:42 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Ei tegel Topa’ min tawh kiciamin, ‘Kei le nang kikal, le keima suanlekhakte le nangma suanlekhakte kikalah a tawntungin Topa om ding hi,’ i cih mah bangin nuamtakin pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah dingin paikhia a, Jonathan zong khuapi sungah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel21:1 Tua ciangin Nob khua-a siampipa Ahimelek kiangah David pai hi. Ahimelek a lingsa-in David a dawn dingin hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nang guak hong hi a, kuamah hong tonpih lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:2 David in siampi Ahimelek kiangah, “Kumpipa in na khat hong sawlin kei kiangah, ‘Nang kong sawlna le nang kong hilh thute khat zong kuamah theisak kei in,’ hong ci hi. Tua mun tua munah tangvalte tawh kiciamna khat ka bawlzo hi." 
1Samuel21:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang bang nei na hi hiam? Anlum lum nga ahih kei leh hih lai-a a om peuhpeuh hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:4 Siampipa in David dawngin, “Tutakin anlum mawkmawk ka nei kei hi; ahih hangin anlum siangtho om hi; tangvalte numei panin a kikep nak-uhleh la in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:5 Tua ciangin David in siampipa dawngin, “A taktakin ci lehang, hih bangin ka paikhiat uh ciangin numeite kiang panin kote ka kikem tawntung uh hi. Khualzin mawkmawk ciang nangawnin zong tangvalte siangtho hi. Tuni-in amaute bangzahin siangthozaw kan ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:6 Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in anlum siangtho amah pia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh anlum dang om lo a, a kilakkhiat ni-in anlum a lum lai tawh a kilaih pah ding, Topa’ mai panin a kilakhia Ompihna Anlum bek om hi." 
1Samuel21:7 Tua laitakin Topa’ mai-ah biakna vai-in a om, Saul’ nasemte mi khat tua lai-ah na omkha hi. Ama min Doeg hi a, Saul’ gancing makai pa hi a, Edom mi ahi hi." 
1Samuel21:8 Tua ciangin David in Ahimelek kiangah, “Teipi ahi a, namsau ahi zongin hih lai-ah nei lo na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa’ nasep pen nawhtat ding kul ahih manin ka namsau ahi a, ka hiamte ahi zongin ka la man kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:9 Siampipa in, “Elah kuamah na thah Filistia mi Goliath’ namsau, puan tawh kitunin hih lai-ah siampipuan nungah om hi. Tua na deih leh la in. Bang hang hiam cih leh adang om lo a, tua bek hih lai-ah om hi,” a ci hi. David in, “Tua sanga hoihzaw adang om lo hi; kei hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:10 David dingin tua ni-in Saul kiang panin tai a, Gath kumpipa Akhish kiangah pai hi." 
1Samuel21:11 Akhish’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih David, a gam kumpipa hi lo ahi hiam? Amaute khatlekhat in ama thu la-in sa-in laam uh a, ‘Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,’ ci hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel21:12 David in hih thute a lungsimah ciamteh a, Gath kumpipa Akhish kihta mahmah hi." 
1Samuel21:13 Tua ahih ciangin amaute’ mai-ah a gamtat kheelin, amaute’ muhna-ah a hai-in kibawl a, kulhkongkhakte tung kui gawpin, a khamul tungah a cilphuan kaisuksak hi." 
1Samuel21:14 Tua ciangin Akhish in a nasemte kiangah, “En un, hih mipa a hai ahihlam na mu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin kei kiangah amah hong paipih na hi uh hiam?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ka omna-ah mihai-a gamta dingin hih mipa nong paipih nadingun mihai kisam thuah lai ka hi hiam? Hih mipa ka inn sungah hong pai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel22:1 David tua lai panin kihemkhia-in Adullam leihawmah tai hi. A sanggamte le a pa’ innkuante khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin ama kiang tua lai munah paisuk uh hi. 
1Samuel22:2 Tua ciangin a lungkham mi khempeuh, leiba a nei mi khempeuh, le a lungkim lo mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. Amah pen amaute tungah a ukpa a suak hi. Tua lai-ah amah tawh mihing zali bang a om hi." 
1Samuel22:3 Tua lai mun panin Moab gam Mizpah-ah David a pai hi. Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah, “Pasian in kei a dingin hong sepsak ding ka theih matengin ka nu le ka pa na kiangah hong omsak in, ci-in kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:4 Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah amaute nusia a, munmuanhuaina sungah David a om sungteng amah tawh omkhawm uh hi." 
1Samuel22:5 Tua ciangin kamsangpa Gad in David kiangah, “Munmuanhuai sungah om nawn kei in; kihem inla, Judah gamah pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David kihemkhia-in Hereth tulakah a pai hi." 
1Samuel22:6 Tu-in David le amah tawh a om mite a kimuhna thu Saul in za hi. A khut sungah a teipi tawi-in, a nasemte khempeuh a kimkotah dingin Gibeah khua a sangna mun makeng kung nuai-ah Saul a tu hi." 
1Samuel22:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a kimkotah a ding a nasemte kiangah, “Tu-in za un, no Benjamin-te aw; Jessi’ tapa in note khempeuh’ lote le leenggui lote hong pia-in, note khempeuh a tul a uk, a za a ukin hong koih dingin um a," 
1Samuel22:8 note khempeuh in kei hong sawmsim na hi uh hiam? Tuni-a bangin hong pangsim dingin ka tapa in Jessi’ tapa tawh thukimna a bawl ciangin kuamah in kei kiangah hong pulak loin, ka tapa in keimah a do dingin ka nasempa a hanthotna-ah note kuamah dah loin, kei kiangah zong nong pulak kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:9 Tua ciangin Saul’ nasemte’ kiangah a ding, Edom mi Doeg in dawngin, “Ahitub’ tapa Amalek’ kiang, Nob khua-ah Jessi’ tapa a pai ka mu a," 
1Samuel22:10 amah in ama a dingin Topa’ tungah thu dotsakin, anletui pia a, Filistia mi Goliath’ namsau ama tungah pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ahitub’ tapa siampi Ahimelek le a pa’ innkuante ahi Nob-a om siampi khempeuh a sam dingin mi sawl a, kumpipa kiangah amaute khempeuh hong pai uh hi." 
1Samuel22:12 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ahitub’ tapa aw, tu-in za in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hih lai-ah om ing, topa aw,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:13 Tua ciangin Saul in ama kiangah, “Tuni-a bangin hong pangsimin kei a do dingin hong kipat theih nadingin bang hangin nang le Jessi’ tapa in kei hong sawmsim a, ama tungah an le namsau pia-in, ama a dingin Pasian kiangah thu dotsak na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:14 Tua ciangin Ahimelek in kumpipa dawngin, “Na nasemte khempeuh lak panin kumpipa’ makpa ahi nangmah hong cingte a ukpa David bangin kua thumanin, na inn sungah kua kipahtawi ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ama a dingin Pasian’ kiangah thu ka dotsak a masa pen tuni ahi hiam? Hilo hi. Kumpipa in a nasempa ahi a, ka pa’ innkuante khempeuh ahi zongin ngawh kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa in a tam hitaleh a tawm hitaleh hih thu khempeuh bangmah thei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Ahimelek aw, nang le na pa’ innkuante na si taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:17 Kumpipa in ama kiimah a ding a cingte kiangah, “Kihei unla Topa’ siampite that un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute zong David tawh pangkhawm uh a, amaute in ama tailam thei napi-in kei kiangah hong pulak lo uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin kumpipa’ nasemte in Topa’ siampite tung a tu dingin a khut uh taangkhiasak lo uh hi." 
1Samuel22:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Doeg kiangah, “Kihei inla, siampite hih in,” a ci hi. Edom mi Doeg kihei-in siampite hih a, tua ni-in saihadial siampipuan a silh mihing sawmgiat le nga a that hi." 
1Samuel22:19 Amah in siampite’ khuapi Nob khua sunga om nuntakna a nei khempeuh numei le pasal, naupang le nawine, bawngtalte, late le tuute, namsau tawh a that khin hi." 
1Samuel22:20 Ahih hangin Ahitub’ tapa Ahimelek’ tapate lakah Abiathar a kici khat suakta-in David kiangah a tai hi. 
1Samuel22:21 Saul in Topa’ siampite a thah khitna thu Abiathar in David kiangah a gen hi. 
1Samuel22:22 David in Abiathar kiangah, “Tua ni-in Doeg tua lai-ah om ahih ciangin Saul’ kiangah gen taktak ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Na pa’ innkuanpih mite khempeuh’ sihna ka piangsakkha hi." 
1Samuel22:23 Kei tawh hong om in; lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a that dingin a hong zongte in nang zong thah dingin a hong zong ahi hi; kei kiangah om lecin lungmuanna sunga om na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:1 Tu-in amaute in David kiangah, “En in, Filistia-te in Keilah khua sim uh a, a ancilnate uh luh uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
1Samuel23:2 Tua ahih ciangin David in Topa thu dongin, “Pai-in Filistia-te ka sim ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in David kiangah, “Pai-in Filistia-te sim inla, Keilah khuamite honkhia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:3 Ahih hangin David’ mite in ama kiangah, “En in, Judah gam hih munah eite i lau hi. Filistia galkapte simin Keilah-ah pai lehang bangzahin lauzaw ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:4 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dongkik hi. Topa in amah dawngin, “Ding in; Keilah-ah paisuk in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah Filistia-te kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:5 Tua ciangin David le a mite Keilah-ah paisuk uh a, Filistia-te tawh kido-in amau’ ganhingte ciahpihin amaute tampi tak a that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in Keilah-a teng mite a honkhia hi." 
1Samuel23:6 David kiang Keilah-ah Ahimelek’ tapa Abiathar a tai lai-in amah in siampipuan khat kengin paisuk hi. 
1Samuel23:7 Keilah-ah David a tunkhitna thu tu-in Saul kiangah kigen hi. Saul in, “Pasian in ka khut sungah amah hong pia khin hi; bang hang hiam cih le kulhkongpi le a kalhna zawl a nei khua sungah lutna tawh amahmah kikhaknelh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:8 Tua ciangin Saul in galsim ding, Keilah khua-ah a paisuk ding, David le a mite a umcih dingin mi khempeuh a sam hi." 
1Samuel23:9 Saul in ama tungah a sia a sawmna David in thei hi. Amah in a siampi Abiathar kiangah, “Hih lai-ah siampipuan hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:10 Tua ciangin David in, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa aw, keima hangin khuapi susia dingin Saul in Keilah-ah pai hong sawmna thu na nasempa in za khin taktak hi." 
1Samuel23:11 Keilah mite in ama tungah kei hong ap ding hiam? Na nasempa’ zak bangin Saul hong paisuk ding hiam? Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa aw, kong thum hi, na nasempa tungah hong gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amah hong paisuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:12 Tua ciangin David in, “Keilah mite in kei le ka mite Saul’ tungah hong ap ding uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amaute in note hong ap ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:13 Tua ciangin mi zaguk bang a pha, David le a mite dingin Keilah panin kihemkhia uh a, amaute a pai theihna peuhpeuh uhah pai uh hi. Keilah panin David a suahtakna thu Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in a vai a khawl phot hi." 
1Samuel23:14 Zif gamlak mualtung gam sung, gamlak munmuanhuaina-ah David om hi. Saul in nisimin amah zong a, ahih hangin Pasian in ama tungah David pia lo hi." 
1Samuel23:15 Amah a that dingin Saul kuankhia khin ahih manin David a lau hi. Zif gamlak Horesh munah David om hi. 
1Samuel23:16 Tua ciangin Saul’ tapa Jonathan dingin David kiang Horesh-ah pai a, Pasian in hong huh ding hi, ci-in amah a hanthawn hi." 
1Samuel23:17 Amah in David kiangah, “Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Saul in nang hong sukhalo ding hi. Nang pen Israel-te tungah kumpi na hi ding a, kei pen nangma zom ka hi ding hi; ka pa Saul in zong hih thu thei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:18 Tua ciangin amau tegel in Topa’ mai-ah thuciamna bawl uh hi. Horesh-ah David om lai-in, Jonathan a inn-ah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel23:19 Tua ciangin Saul’ kiang Gibeah-ah Zif mite paito uh a, “Jeshimon leitaw lam, Hakhilah mualtung, Horesh a munmuanhuai sung kote’ lakah David om hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel23:20 Tu-in hong paisuk in, kumpipa aw; amah na matnopna thu thei ka hih manun hong paisuk in. Kote’ hih ding ahihleh kumpipa tungah amah kong ap ding uh ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:21 Tua ciangin Saul in, “ Topa in note thupha hong pia ta hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei tungah hehpihna nong nei uh hi." 
1Samuel23:22 Pai-in va kiciansak lai un. Ama bukna mun thei-in va mu unla, tua lai-ah kua in mu hiam, hong thei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ngiansiam mahmah hi, ci-in kei tungah hong kigen hi." 
1Samuel23:23 Tua ahih ciangin amah a bukna, a kiselsimna mun khempeuh hong ciamteh unla, thu a kiteltak tawh kei kiangah hong paikik un. Tua ciangin note tawh kei kong kuan ding hi. Gam sungah amah a omlai nakleh, Judah gam sung khempeuh zon ding ahi zongin a tul lak panin amah ka zongkhia teitei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:24 Amaute ding uh a, Zif-ah a pai dingin Saul’ mai-ah a na ma pai uh hi. Tu-in David le a mite Jeshimon leitaw lam Arabah gam sung Maon gamlakah om uh hi." 
1Samuel23:25 Saul le a mite amah a zong dingin kuan uh hi. Hih thu David kiangah kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin Maon gamlak a om suangpi-ah amah paisuk hi. Saul in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in Maon gamlakah David delh hi. 
1Samuel23:26 A mualpang khatah Saul pai a, David le a mite a mualpang langkhatah pai uh hi. Saul le a mite in David le a mite a man dingin hong um uh ahih manin Saul a pelh dingin David a nawhtai laitakin," 
1Samuel23:27 Saul kiangah kamtai khat hong tung a, “Hong kinawh inla hong ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia-te in gam sung hong sim hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:28 Tua ahih ciangin David a delhna panin Saul kileh kik a, Filistia-te a do-in a pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kikhenna Mual kici hi." 
1Samuel23:29 Tua lai panin David paito-in Engedi munmuanhuai-ah a om hi. 
1Samuel24:1 Filistia-te a delhna panin Saul a ciah ciangin ama kiangah, “En in, Engedi gamlakah David om hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
1Samuel24:2 Tua ciangin Saul in Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kiteel mihing tulthum la-in Sathak Suangpi mai-ah David le a mite a zong dingin a pai hi. 
1Samuel24:3 Lam gei-a tuukhawk omna-ah a pai hi. Tua gei-ah leihawm khat om a, awng hawh dingin tua sungah Saul a pai hi. Tu-in David le a mite tua leihawm tawngnung sungah na tu uh hi." 
1Samuel24:4 Tua ciangin David’ mite in ama kiangah, “ Topa in nang kiangah, ‘En in, na khut sungah na gal pa kong pia ding a, hoih na sak bangin ama tungah na hih ding hi,’ hong cih pen tuni hita hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin David dingin Saul’ puantualpi mong atkhiatsak sim hi." 
1Samuel24:5 Tua khit ciangin amah in Saul’ puanmong a atkhiat manin David a lungsim nuamthei nawn lo hi. 
1Samuel24:6 Amah in a mite kiangah, “Amah pen Topa’ sathau nilh pa hi, ci-in a thei gegupi-in ama tungah ka khut ka ngak ding, Topa’ sathau nilh pa ahi ka topa tungah hih bang ka hih ding Topa in hong kham hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:7 Tua ahih ciangin David in hih thute tawh a mite zol a, amaute Saul hihsak lo hi. Tua ciangin Saul ding khia-in leihawm nusia a, a pai nading lampi-ah a paisuak hi." 
1Samuel24:8 Tua khit ciangin David zong leihawm sung panin paikhia-in Saul nung sap a, “Ka to kumpipa!” a ci hi. Saul in a nung a et ciangin David in lei-ah a mai kunin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
1Samuel24:9 Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin, ‘En in, David in na siat nading zong hi,’ a ci mite’ thu um na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel24:10 En in, Topa in tuni-in leihawm sung, ka khut sungah nang hong piakna nangmahmah in tuni-in na thei khin hi. Mi pawlkhat in nang a that dingin kei hong sawl a, ahih hangin nang kong hih kei hi. Keimah in, ‘Ka topa tungah ka khut ka nga kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen Topa’ sathau nilh pa ahi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
1Samuel24:11 En in, ka pa aw, ka khutsunga na puantualpi mong en in. Kei tungah khialhna ahi a, kumpi dona ahi zongin a om lohna, na puantualpi mong atkhia napi-in nang kong thahlohna thu tawh thei-in na mu ding hi. Kei thah dingin nong zon hangin nang tungah ka khial kei hi." 
1Samuel24:12 Topa in kei le nang kikalah thu hong khen tahen. Topa in kei tangin nang tungah hong thuk tahen. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi. 
1Samuel24:13 Tang-ate’ paunak in, ‘A gilote’ sung panin gitlohna hong piang,’ a cih mah bang ahi hi. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel kumpipa kua do-a hong kuankhia ahi hiam? Kua delh na hi hiam? Uisi maw! Uili maw! 
1Samuel24:15 Tua ahih ciangin Topa thukhen hong hi-in, kei le nang kikalah thukhenna hong pia hen la, hih thu thei-in ka thu-ah hong pang hen la, na khutsung panin kei hong honkhia ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:16 David in hih thute Saul kiangah a gen a man khit ciangin Saul in, “Ka tapa David, tu-a ka zak nang’ aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul a kap hi." 
1Samuel24:17 Amah in David kiangah, “Nang pen kei sangin na thuman zaw hi. Keimah in nang tungah a sia kong bawl laitakin nang in kei tungah a pha nong bawl hi." 
1Samuel24:18 Topa in na khut sungah kei hong koih laitakin nang in kei nong thah lohna-ah kei nong limbawlna tu-in na hong laktel hi. 
1Samuel24:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a gal pa mu leh amah in a suakta-in a gal pa paikhiasak ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tuni-in kei tungah nong bawlna hangin Topa in a hoih tawh nang thaman hong pia tahen. 
1Samuel24:20 Tu-in en in, kumpi na hih taktak ding ka thei hi. Israel kumpi gam nangma khut sungah a kip ding hi." 
1Samuel24:21 Tua ahih ciangin keima nunga ka suanlekhakte beisak loin, ka pa’ innkuan panin ka min na phiat loh nadingin Topa’ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:22 Tua ciangin Saul’ deih bangin David a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Saul a inn-ah a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David le a mite munmuanhuai-ah paito uh hi. 
1Samuel25:1 Tu-in Samuel si a, Israel-te khempeuh kikhawmin ama hangin kap uh a, amaute in Ramah-a a inn-ah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Paran gamlakah David paisuk hi." 
1Samuel25:2 Karmel mualah nasep a nei mi khat Maon khua-ah a om hi. Tua pa hau mahmah a, amah in tuu tulthum le keel tulkhat nei hi. Amah in Karmel-ah a tuumul a met hi." 
1Samuel25:3 Tua mipa’ min Nabal hi a, a zi’ min Abigail ahi hi. Tua numei, tei le melhoih a thuah khat hi a, ahih hangin a pasal pen a ki-uk zo lo mi le a gamtatsia khat hi a, amah Kaleb mi ahi hi." 
1Samuel25:4 Nabal in a tuumul a metna thu David in gamlakah a za hi. 
1Samuel25:5 Tua ahih ciangin David in a tangvalte sawm sawl hi. David in a tangvalte kiangah, “Karmel-ah paito-in Nabal kiangah pai unla, keima min tawh amah va hopih un." 
1Samuel25:6 Hih bangin amah na hopih ding uh hi: ‘Nang tungah nopna om ta hen, na innkuan tungah nopna om ta hen, na neih khempeuh tungah zong nopna om tahen." 
1Samuel25:7 Gan mul mette na neihna ka za hi. Na tuucingte kote tawh omin amaute tungah siatna ka bawl kei uh a, Karmel-ah a om sungteng uh amaute in bangmah mansuah lo uh hi." 
1Samuel25:8 Na tangvalte uh dong lecin amaute in nang kiangah hong genthei ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tangvalte maipha na musak in; bang hang hiam cih leh pawi ni-in kong pai uh hi. Na neih sung pan nong piak theih peuhpeuh na nasemte le na tapa David tungah pia in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:9 Tangvalte hong tun ciangin amaute in hih thu khempeuh David’ minin Nabal kiangah gen uh a, tua ciangin amaute in ngak uh hi." 
1Samuel25:10 Tua ciangin Nabal in David’ nasemte dawngin, “David kua ahi hiam? Jessi’ tapa kua ahi hiam? Tulai-in a tote kiang panin a taikhia nasem tampi om hi." 
1Samuel25:11 Ka anlum le ka tui le ka gan mul meette a dingin ka gawh ka sate la-in koilai panin hong pai cih ka theih loh mite tungah pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel25:12 Tua ahih ciangin David’ tangvalte ciahkikin hih thu khempeuh ama kiangah a gen uh hi. 
1Samuel25:13 David in a mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh in na namsau uh kuah ciat un!” a ci hi. Amaute khempeuh in a namsau uh kuah uh a, David in zong a namsau a kuah hi. Mihing zali bang David’ nungah paito uh a, mihing za nihte van ngakin om uh hi." 
1Samuel25:14 Ahih hangin Nabal’ nasem tangvalte khat in Nabal’ zi Abigail kiangah thu genin, “En in, ka topa uh a hopih dingin gamlak panin David in kamtaite hong paisak a, amah in amaute na tai hi." 
1Samuel25:15 Ahi zongin kote tungah tua mite hoih mahmahin kote in siatna ka thuak kei uh a, amaute tawh ka pai laiteng uh gamlakah ka om sungun bangmah ka mansuah kei uh hi." 
1Samuel25:16 Tuute kemin amaute tawh ka omsung khempeuh uh sun le zanin amaute in kote hong hu uh hi. 
1Samuel25:17 Tua ahih ciangin hih thu thei inla, na hih ding ngaihsun in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka topa le a innkuan khempeuh tungah siatna tunsak ding kingaihsun a, amah a khansia ahih manin kuamah in hopih thei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:18 Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin, anlum lum zanih, leenggahzu savun thawl nih, a han’ minsa tuu nga, ankan lawh nga, leenggahkeu bawk zakhat, le theimoh zanih la-in late tungah tuate a guang hi." 
1Samuel25:19 Tua nu in a tangvalte kiangah, “Keima mai-ah na paisuak un; note’ nungah kei kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in a pasal Nabal hilh lo hi." 
1Samuel25:20 Amah la tungah tuangin mual liahah a paisuk laitakin, en in, David le a mite ama lamah hong paisuk uh hi; amah in amaute na dawn hi." 
1Samuel25:21 Tu-in David in, “Ama neihsa khempeuh khat zong a mangthang lo dingin hih mipa’ neih khempeuh gamlakah a mawkna-in ka cing a, amah in hih thuhoihte a sia tawh kei tungah hong thuk hi." 
1Samuel25:22 Zing ciangin ama neihsa khempeuh lakah pasal khat zong ka siit taak leh Pasian in keimah David hong dawm kei ta hen,” na ci khin hi." 
1Samuel25:23 Abigail in David a muh ciangin kinawh a, a la tung panin tuakin David’ mai-ah puk a, leilakah a kun hi." 
1Samuel25:24 Ama khe phungah pukin, “Kei tung bekah, ka topa aw, mawhna om tahen. Na kiangah na nasemnu thu hong gensak inla, na nasemnu’ thugente hong ngai in, ci-in kong thum hi." 
1Samuel25:25 Ka topa in hih a khansia mipa Nabal ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama min mah bangin amah zong a tuaci mah ahi hi. Nabal ama min hi a, haina in amah vukcip hi. Ahih hangin na nasemnu keimah in nangma hong sawl na tangvalte ka mukha kei hi." 
1Samuel25:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa aw, Topa nungta-in, nang zong na nuntak mah bangin, mi na thahloh nading le nangma khut tawh thukkikna na hihloh nadingin Topa in nang hong kho ahih manin, tu-in na galte le nangma tungah siat nading a zongte khempeuh Nabal bang tahen." 
1Samuel25:27 Tu-in na nasemnu keimah in nangmah ka hong puak hih letsong nangma nung hong zui tangvalte hong piasak in. 
1Samuel25:28 Na nasemnu’ khialhna hong maisak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topa’ galte do na hih manin Topa in na suanlekhakte kipsak paisuak ding a, na nuntak laiteng nang sungah siatna kimu lo ding hi." 
1Samuel25:29 Nangmah delhin hong that dingin mite hong kipat leh, nang pen Topa na Pasian’ kepna sung a hing mite lakah na om ding a, amah in suanglotna tawh lotkhiat bangin na galte lawnkhia ding hi." 
1Samuel25:30 Topa in nangmah tawh kisai thu a hoih a gente khempeuh tawh kizui-in hong hihin, Israel-te tungah ulianin nang hong koih khit ciangin," 
1Samuel25:31 thu om lopi-in mi thahna ahi a, nangmahmah in phulakna hangin ahi zongin, dah nading thu ahi a, lungsim nat nading thu ahi zongin na nei kei ding hi. Topa in limtakin nang hong bawl ciangin na nasemnu hong phawk in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:32 Tua ciangin David in Abigail kiangah, “Tuni-in keimah a dawn dingin nang a hong sawl Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen!" 
1Samuel25:33 Tuni-in mi thahna le keima khut tawh phulak nading panin keimah hong kem nangma ngaihsutna in thupha ngah ta hen! 
1Samuel25:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong gimsak nading panin hong kho Israel Pasian, Topa a nungta taktak ahih mah bangin, nang hong kinawhin keimah a dawn dingin hong pai lo hi lecin, zing ciangin Nabal sung pan pasal khat zong hing nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:35 Tua ciangin David in ama tung panin amah a puakte a sang hi. Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Lung nuamin na inn-ah ciahto ta in. Na thu ka ngai a, nong thumna kong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:36 Tua ciangin Nabal kiangah Abigail hong tungkik hi. Kumpipa’ pawi tawh kibangin amah in a inn sungah pawi na kham hi. Nabal lungnuam mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zu kham mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin zingsang khuavak mateng ama kiangah bangmah gen peuhmah lo hi. 
1Samuel25:37 Zingsang ciang, Nabal’ zukhamna a ven’ ciangin a zi in ama kiangah hih thute gen a, thakhatin a lungtang si-in amah suangtum bang hi." 
1Samuel25:38 Tua khit ni sawm bang ciangin Topa in Nabal vat a, amah a si ta hi." 
1Samuel25:39 Nabal a sihna thu David in a zak ciangin amah in, “Nabal khut tung panin ka ngah zahkohna hong thuksakin, siatna panin a nasempa a lenkik Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Topa in Nabal’ gamtat siatna ama lu tung mahah tungkiksak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin David in mi sawlin ama zi dingin Abigail helsak hi." 
1Samuel25:40 David’ nasemte Karmel-a Abigail’ kiang a tun ciangin amaute in tua nu kiangah, “David in ama zi dingin a la dingin kote nang kiangah hong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel25:41 Tua ciangin amah dingin lei-ah maikun a, “En un, na nasemnu uh ka topa’ nasemte’ khe a silsak ding nasem ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:42 Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin dingin la tungah tuang a, ama nasem numei nga in amah a kem hi. David’ kamtaite’ nung zui-in pai a, tua ciangin ama zi a suak hi." 
1Samuel25:43 David in Jezreel khuami Ahinoam zong la a, amau tegel ama zi a suak uh hi." 
1Samuel25:44 Saul in ama tanu Mikhal, David’ zi pen, Gallim khuami Laish’ tapa Palti tungah na pia khin hi." 
1Samuel26:1 Tua ciangin Saul kiang Gibeah-ah Zif mite hong pai uh a, “Jeshimon nisuahna lam Hakhilah mualtungah David bu hi lo ahi hiam?” va ci uh hi." 
1Samuel26:2 Tua ahih ciangin Saul kithawi-in David a zong dingin Israel mi a kiteel mihing tulthum tawh Zif gamlakah a paisuk hi. 
1Samuel26:3 Tua ciangin Saul in Jeshimon nisuahna lam lampi gei-ah a om Hakhilah mualtungah giahphual sat hi. Ahih hangin gamlakah David omlai hi. Amah a delhin gamlakah Saul a hong paina thu a theih ciangin 
1Samuel26:4 David in thukan simte sawl a, Saul hong pai taktak ahihna thu a thei hi." 
1Samuel26:5 Tua ciangin David dingin Saul in giahphual a satna munah a pai hi. David in Saul’ galkap mangpa, Ner’ tapa Abner tawh a lupna mun mu hi. Giahphual laizangah Saul lum a, ama kimkotah a galkapte in phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel26:6 Tua ciangin David in Hit mi Ahimelek le a nu uh Zeruiah ahi Joab’ sanggampa Abishai kiangah, “Saul’ giahphual ah kei tawh kua hong paisuk ding na hi uh hiam” a ci hi. Abishai in, “Kei nang tawh kong paisuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:7 Tua ahih ciangin David le Abishai zanin galkapte kiangah pai uh hi. Giahphual sungah Saul na ihmu a, a lukhung leilakah a teipi na kiphut a, Abner le galkapte ama kimkotah na lum uh hi." 
1Samuel26:8 Tua ciangin Abishai in David kiangah, “Pasian in na gal pa tuni-in na khut sungah hong pia ahih ciangin tu-in teipi-in lei tawh khatvei bek hong khawhcipsak in, nihvei khawh ding kisam lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:9 Ahih hangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Ama tungah siatna bawl kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ sathau nilh pa a su peuhpeuh mawhna pan peng ding sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:10 David in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin Topa in amah vat taktak ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong a sih hun hong tung ding hi; tua ahih kei leh gal kikapna sungah amah paisukin si ding hi." 
1Samuel26:11 Topa’ sathau nilh pa tungah ka khut ka ngak ding Topa in kei hong kham hi; ahih hangin tu-in a lukhungah a om a teipi le a tuithawl la-in paikhia ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:12 Tua ahih ciangin David in Saul’ lukhung a a om a teipi le a tuithawl a la hi. Tua ciangin amaute paikhia uh hi. Kuamah in mu lo hi; zong thei lo hi; kuamah khanglo lo hi. Amaute khempeuh ihmu uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute ihmut suak mahmah sak hi. 
1Samuel26:13 Tua ciangin David a pang khatah pai-in, amaute kikal saupi a kihalin mual dawn a gamla-ah a ding hi." 
1Samuel26:14 David in galkapte le Ner’ tapa Abner samin, “Abner aw, hong dawng lo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Abner in dawngin, “Kumpipa a sam kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:15 David in Abner kiangah, “Pasal hi lo na hi hiam? Israel-te sungah nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin na to kumpipa vil lo na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na to kumpipa a that dingin mi khat hong pai hi." 
1Samuel26:16 Hih banga na gamtatna hoih lo hi. Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin a si dingin na kilawm hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ sathau nilh pa, na topa na vil kei hi. Tu-in a lukhung a om kumpipa’ teipi le a tuithawl koi-ah om ahi hiam, thei in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:17 Saul in David’ aw khenthei a, “Ka tapa David, tu-a a ging nangma’ aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. David in, “Ka topa, kumpipa aw, keima’ aw ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Bang hangin ka topa in a nasempa delh ahi hiam? Bang gamta khial ka hi hiam? Ka tungah bang mawhna om ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel26:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka to kumpipa in a nasempa’ thu za in. Keimah a do dingin nang hong toksuah pa pen Topa ahihleh amah in biakna hong sang ta hen; ahih hangin mihing ahihleh amaute in Topa’ mai-ah samsiatna ngah tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Pai in; pasian dangte’ na sem in,’ ci-in Topa’ gamh ka ngah loh nadingin tuni-in kei hong hawlkhia uh hi." 
1Samuel26:20 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa’ omna panin gamdang leitangah kei hong sisak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh mualtungah vaka a beng pa bangin uili bang lel keimah a that dingin Israel kumpipa nong kuankhia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:21 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ka gamta khial hi; hong ciahkik in, ka tapa David aw; bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in kei hong suaktasak na hih manin na tungah siatna kong bawl nawn kei ding hi. Ka hai gamtatkha a, nakpitakin ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:22 Tua ciangin David in dawngin, “Hih lai-ah na teipi om hi, kumpipa! Tangvalte khat hong paisak inla hong lasak in." 
1Samuel26:23 Topa in mi khempeuh a thumanna le a thutakna hangin thaman pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tuni-in ka khut sungah nang hong pia a, keimah in Topa’ sathau nilh pa a hih dingin ka khutte ka taangkhiasak kei hi." 
1Samuel26:24 En in, tuni-in nangmah kong suahtaksak mah bangin Topa in zong kei hong suaktasak hen la, haksatna khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:25 Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Thupha ngah ta in, ka tapa David! Nangmah in na tampi na sem ding a, tuate na zo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David ama lampi-ah pai-in, Saul zong ama omna munah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel27:1 David in a lungsim sungah, “Saul’ khut tawh ni khat ni ciangin ka si theikha ding hi. Kei a dingin Filistia-te’ gamah tai ding sangin a hoihzaw dang om lo hi. Tua hileh Saul in Israel gamgi huam sungah kei hong zon niloh lungkia ta ding a, ama khutsung panin ka suakta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:2 Tua ahih ciangin David kithawi a, amah tawh a om mihing za gukte tawh Gath kumpipa, Maok’ tapa Akhish kiangah a pai hi." 
1Samuel27:3 Tua ciangin David, a innkuanpihte le a mite a innkuanpih ciat tawh, David zong a zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam le Nabal’ zi meigongnu, Karmel khuami Abigail tawh, Gath-a Akhish kiangah va teng hi." 
1Samuel27:4 Gath-ah David tai hi, ci-in Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in David zong nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel27:5 Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, ka ten theih nadingin gam sung khuate khatah kei a’ ding mun hong pia in; bang hangin na nasempa nang tawh kumpi khua sungah tengkhawm ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:6 Tua ahih ciangin Akhish in tua ni-in ama tungah Ziklag khua a pia hi. Tua ahih manin tuni dongin tua khua pen Judah kumpite a’ ahi hi. 
1Samuel27:7 Filistia gam sungah David a ten hunsung pen kum khat le kha li sung ahi hi. 
1Samuel27:8 Tu-in David le a mite paito-in Geshur mite, Girzi mite, le Amalek mite va sim hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite pen Egypt lam Shur ciang dongah tanglai a kipanin a teng mite ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel27:9 Tua ciangin David in tua gam vatgawp a, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawi loin, ahih hangin tuute, bawngtalte, late, kalaohte, le puante la-in Akhish kiangah hong ciahkik hi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akhish in, “Tuni-in kua va sim na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin David in, “Judah mite’ Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Jerahmeel mite’ Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Ken mite’ Negeb gam,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:11 David in, “Amaute in kote’ thu genin, ‘David in tua bangin hih hi,’ ci ding uh ahih ciangin,” ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin Gath-ah thu a puak thei ding numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawi lo hi. Filistia-te’ gam sungah a ten sungteng tua bang gamtatna pen ama ngeina ahi hi." 
1Samuel27:12 Akhish in David muangin, “Ama mipih Israel-te in a muhdah theih nadingin amahmah kibawl khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah ka nasem hi tawntung ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel28:1 Tua hunin Filistia-te in Israel-te a sim dingin a galkapte khawm uh hi. Akhish in David kiangah, “Nang le na mite, kei tawh galkapte lakah a kuankhawm ding na hihlam thei in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:2 David in Akhish kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; na nasempa in bang hih thei hiam, cih na thei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Akhish in David kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; khan tawntungin keimah a hong cing dingin nang kong koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:3 Tu-in Samuel si khin a, Israel-te khempeuh ama hangin kapin, ama khuapi Ramah-ah vui uh hi. Saul in vankahte le aisante a gam sung panin beisak hi." 
1Samuel28:4 Filistia-te kikhawm uh a, hong pai-in Shunem-ah giahphual sat uh hi. Saul in Israel-te khempeuh khawm a, amaute in Gilboa-ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel28:5 Saul in Filistia galkapte a muh ciangin lau a, a lungsim nakpi takin ling hi." 
1Samuel28:6 Saul in Topa tungah thu a dot ciangin, Topa in mang tawh hitaleh, Urim tawh hitaleh, kamsangte tawh hitaleh dawng lo hi." 
1Samuel28:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasemte kiangah, “Ama kiangah pai-in ama tung pan thu ka dot theih nadingin vankahthei numei khat kei a dingin hong zonsak un,” a ci hi. A nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, Endor-ah vankahthei khat om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel28:8 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a mel seelin puan dang silh a, amah le mi nih pai hi. Amaute zanin tua numei kiangah va pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei a dingin a sisate’ kha kiang pan thu hong dotsak inla, nang kianga a min kong gen peuhpeuh kei a dingin hong saptohsak in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:9 Numei in ama kiangah, “Saul’ hihsa thu, gam sung panin vankahte le aisante a suksiatna na thei taktak hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keima sih nading a piangsak dingin kei a dingin thangzak hong koih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:10 Ahih hangin ama tungah Topa’ min tawh Saul kiciam a, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih thu hangin nang tungah gimna hong tung het lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:11 Tua ciangin numei in, “Kua hong sapsak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Samuel hong sapsak in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:12 Numei in Samuel a muh ciangin a gingin kikokhia hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong khem na hi hiam? Nang, Saul na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:13 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; kua mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Leisung panin pasian khat hong paikhiato ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:14 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Ama mel bangci ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Puteek khat hong paito a, amah in puantualpi silh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul in tua pen Samuel hi, ci-in thei a, lei-ah a maikunin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
1Samuel28:15 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin keimah saptohna tawh hong nawngkaisak na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in dawngin, “Nakpi takin ka lungkham hi; Filistia-te in kei hong sim a, kei kiang panin Pasian kiheikhia-in kamsangte tawh ahi a, mang tawh ahi zongin hong dawng nawn lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka gamtat nading zia a hong gen dingin nang kong sam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:16 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa, nang kiang panin kiheikhia-in na gal suak khin ahih ciangin bang hangin kei thu hong dong lai na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel28:17 Topa in kei’ tungtawnin hong gensa bangin nang tungah hong hih hi. Topa in na khutsung panin kumpi gam balkhia-in na vengpa David’ tungah pia khin hi. 
1Samuel28:18 Nangmah in Topa’ thu ngai loin, Amalek tungah ama heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in hihlo na hih manin Topa in nang tungah tuni-in hihte hong tungsak hi." 
1Samuel28:19 Tua tham loin Topa in Israel mite zong nang tawh Filistia-te’ khut sungah hong piakhawm ding hi. Zing ciangin nang le na tapate in zong kei kiang nong zuan ding uh hi. Topa in Israel galkapte zong Filistia-te’ khut sungah pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:20 Tua ciangin Samuel’ thugente hangin lau lua-in leilakah Saul tawnpuk pah hi. Amah in sun tawntung le zan tawntung bangmah ne lo ahih manin a tha nem mahmah hi. 
1Samuel28:21 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah a numei hong pai-in amah a lau mahmahna a muh ciangin tua nu in Saul kiangah, “En in, na nasemnu in na thu hong ngaizo hi. Ka luang khamin, kei tungah nong gen bangin ka gamtazo hi." 
1Samuel28:22 Tua ahih ciangin nang zong na nasemnu’ thu hong ngai in; na mai-ah anlum tawmkhat hong luisak in; na paina dingah na pai ciangin na thahat nadingin ne in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:23 Amah in nial a, “Ka ne kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tua numei tawh kopin a nasemte in ci teitei uh ahih manin amau’ cih bangin a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin leilak panin amah tho-in lupna tungah a tu hi." 
1Samuel28:24 Tu-in tua numei in a inn-ah bawngno thau khat nei a, amah in manlang takin go-in, tua ciangin annel la a, a annel meekin silngo sawh loh anlum em a," 
1Samuel28:25 Saul le a nasemte’ mai-ah lui a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute dingin tua zanin a paikhia uh hi." 
1Samuel29:1 Tu-in Filistia-te in a galkap khempeuh uh Afek-ah khawm uh a, Jezreel gam sunga om tuikhuk gei-ah Israel-te in giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel29:2 Filistia uliante a za za, a tul tulin a pai laitakin David le a mite zong Akhish tawh a nungah pai uh hi." 
1Samuel29:3 Filistia galkap a ukte in, “Hih Hebru mite in hih lai-ah bang hong hih uh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Akhish in Filistia galkap a ukte kiangah, “Ni tampi, kum tampi kei tawh a omkhin, Israel kumpi Saul’ nasempa David hi a, kei kiangah hong tai a kipanin tuni dongin ama tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:4 Ahih hangin Filistia galkap a ukte ama tungah heh uh hi. Filistia galkap a ukte in ama kiangah, “Amah na koihna munah a ciahkik theih nadingin hih mipa sawlkik in. Gal kidona sungah eite’ lang hong suak kha ding ahih manin galdona sungah eite tawh amah hong kuansuk lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mipa in a topa tawh kilemna bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Hih lai-a om mite’ lutang tawh bawl ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel29:5 Amaute khatlekhat in la-in sa-in laam uh a, ‘Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,’ a cih pa uh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel29:6 Tua ciangin Akhish in David samin ama kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, nang na thuman a, hih vai-ah kei tawh hong kuankhia-in na ciah ding man ka sa hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei kiangah nong pai a kipan tuni dong nang tungah khialhna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Ahih hangin uliante in nang hong thukim lo uh hi." 
1Samuel29:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ciahkik in. Filistia uliante na lungkim lohsak khak loh nadingin lungkim takin ciah in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:8 Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Ahih hangin, keimah in bang hih ka hi hiam? Ka to kumpipa’ galte do-in ka pai theih loh nadingin nangma nasepna-ah kong tum ni a kipan tuhun dong na nasempa’ tungah bang mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:9 Tua ciangin Akhish in David dawngin, “Nang pen keima muhna-ah Pasian’ vantungmi khat mah bangin paubaang lo na hihna ka thei hi; ahi zongin Filistia galkap a ukte in, ‘Amah pen eite tawh galphualah hong kuanto lo ding hi,’ ci uh hi." 
1Samuel29:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tawh a hong pai na topa’ nasemte tawh zingsangin tho baih un. Zingsangin kipan baih unla, khua a vak phetin kihemkhia un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:11 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia gamah a ciahkik dingin David a mite tawh zingsang tungin ding khia uh a, Filistia-te ahihleh Jezreel khua-ah paito uh hi." 
1Samuel30:1 David le a mite a ni thum ni-in Ziklag hong tun uh ciangin, Amalek-te in Negeb le Ziklag na sim khin uh hi. Amaute in Ziklag zo-in mei tawh na hal uh a," 
1Samuel30:2 numei khempeuh le tua khuasunga omteng a neu a lianin man uh hi. Amaute in khat zong that lo uh a, ahih hangin amaute khempeuh paikhiatpih uh hi." 
1Samuel30:3 David le a mite khuapi a tun uh ciangin a khuapi uh mei tawh na kihalin, a zite uh, a tanute uh, le a tapate uh salin a kimat khitna thei uh hi." 
1Samuel30:4 Tua ciangin David le amah tawh a om mite in a aw uh gingsakin a tha bei dongun kap uh hi. 
1Samuel30:5 David’ zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam le Karmel khuami Nabal’ zi meigongnu Abigail zong salin kiman hi." 
1Samuel30:6 David nakpitakin lungkham hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a tanu a tapate uh hangin lungsimsia uh ahih manin amaute in suang tawh amah den ding gen uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa a Pasian in David thakhauhsak hi. 
1Samuel30:7 Tua ciangin David in Ahimelek tapa Abiathar kiangah, “Siampipuan hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abiathar in David kiangah siampipuan a paipih hi." 
1Samuel30:8 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dong a, “Hih mihonte ka delh ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Delh in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pha taktak ding a, na mite na honkhiazo taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:9 Tua ahih ciangin David le amah tawh a om mihing za gukte kuankhia uh a, Besor lui-ah tungin, tua lai-ah mi pawlkhat kinusia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:10 Ahih hangin David le mi za lite a delhin paisuak uh a, Besor lui a galkah dingin a gimlua mi zanih kinusia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:11 Amaute in Egypt mi khat gamlakah mu uh a, David kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Amaute in an pia uh a, amah in ne hi. Amaute in tui dawn ding zong a pia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:12 Theimoh khat le leenggahkeu bawk nih zong a pia uh hi. Amah in tuate a nek khit ciangin a tha hong dimkik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh an ahi a, tui ahi zongin sun thum le zan thum ne lo dawn loin om hi." 
1Samuel30:13 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Nang kuate na hi hiam? Koi pan na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Kei pen Amalek-te khat’ nasem, Egypt mi tangval khat ka hi hi. Tuma ni thum lai-in ka ci na ahih manin ka topa in hong nusia hi." 
1Samuel30:14 Kote in Khereth mite’ Negeb gam le Judah-te’ gam sung le Kaleb mite’ Negeb gam ka sim uh a, mei tawh Ziklag ka hal uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:15 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Hih mite kiangah nong paipih suk nuam ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nangmah in kei nong thahlohna ding ahi a, ka topa’ khut sungah nong apkik loh nading ahi zongin Pasian’ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam peuh lecin hih mihonte kiangah nang kong paipihsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:16 Tua ciangin amah in David paipih suk hi. Filistia-te’ gam le Judah gam panin a lak uh na tampite hangin amaute gam sung khempeuhah kithehthangin an ne, tuidawn, laamin na om uh hi." 
1Samuel30:17 Tua ciangin David in a zing ciang phalvak a kipan nitak dong amaute vatgawp a, kalaoh tung tuangin a tai tangval za lite simloh amaute khat zong suakta lo uh hi." 
1Samuel30:18 David in Amalek-te’ laksa khempeuh ngahkik a, a zi nihte honkhia hi." 
1Samuel30:19 A neu a lian, tanute tapate nate ahi a, a kila khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a kisam khat zong om lo a, David in a vekpi-in ciahpih kik hi." 
1Samuel30:20 David in tuuhonte le bawnghonte khempeuh zong man hi. Mite in tua ganhingte ama mai-ah hawl uh a, “David’ na lakte ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:21 Tua ciangin, David a zui dingin a gimlua, Besor lui-ah a kinusia mihing za nihte kiangah David tung hi. David le amah tawh a om mite a dawn dingin amaute hong kuankhia uh a, a nai a tun ciangin David in amaute hopih hi." 
1Samuel30:22 Tua ciangin David tawh a pai mite lak panin a gilo le mi ginalote khempeuh in, “Amaute pen eite tawh hong paisuak lo uh ahih manin, amaute in a zite le a tate uh la-in a paikhiatpih uh cih simloh, eite’ ngahkik nate khat zong amaute i pia kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:23 Ahih hangin David in, “Ka sanggamte aw, Topa in eite hong piaksa nate tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi. Amah in eite hong kemin eite a do dinga hong pai mihonte i khut sungah hong pia khin hi." 
1Samuel30:24 Hih thu-ah kua in no’ thu hong ngai ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh gal sungah a kuan mipa’ tanh zah mah, van a ngak mipa in tang ding a, amaute in a kibangin ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:25 Tua ni a kipanin tuni dongin amah in Israel-te a dingin thukham le biakna ngeina kipin a bawl hi. 
1Samuel30:26 Ziklag a tun ciangin David in Judah upa a lawmte kiangah a na lakte pawlkhat khakin, “ Topa’ galte’ na a kilate sung panin hih lai-ah note a’ ding letsong a om hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:27 Tua nate pen Bethel, Negeb gam sunga om Ramoth, le Jattir," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer, Sifmoth, Eshtemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 Karmel, Jerahmeel khuapite, Ken khuapite," 
1Samuel30:30 Hormah, Borashan, Athak," 
1Samuel30:31 Hebron sunga omte, David le a mite a pai ngeina mun khempeuhte a’ ding ahi hi." 
1Samuel31:1 Filistia-te in Israel-te sim uh hi. Filistia-te’ mai-ah Israel-te tai uh a, Gilboa Mual tungah thahin tuk uh hi." 
1Samuel31:2 Filistia-te in Saul le a tapate pha uh hi. Filistia-te in Saul’ tapate Jonathan, Abinadab, le Malkhishua a that uh hi." 
1Samuel31:3 Gal in nakpitakin Saul neh a, gal thaltawite in nakpitakin amah liamsak hi." 
1Samuel31:4 Tua ciangin Saul in a galhiam puapa kiangah, “Hih dawibia mite hong pai-in kei hong dawtletin hong mawlpih kha ding uh ahih manin na namsau dok inla, tua tawh hong dawtlet in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a galhiam puapa in hih ngam lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah lau mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in ama namsau la-in tua tungah puk hi." 
1Samuel31:5 A galhiam puapa in Saul a sihna a muh ciangin amah zong a namsau tungah kipuksuk sakin amah tawh a sikhawm hi. 
1Samuel31:6 Tua bangin Saul, a tapa thumte, a galhiam puapa, le a mi khempeuh, a ni kikhatin a sikhawm uh hi." 
1Samuel31:7 Tua ciangin Jezreel kuam galkhat le Jordan galkhat a om Israel mite in Israel mite tai-in Saul le a tapate a sih khitna thu a zak uh ciangin amaute in a khuapite uh nusia-in tai uh ahih ciangin Filistia-te hong pai-in tuate sungah a teng uh hi. 
1Samuel31:8 A zing ciangin a kithat mite’ na a la dingin Filistia-te hong pai ciangin Saul le a tapa thumte Gilboa Mual tungah a si mu uh hi. 
1Samuel31:9 Amaute in Saul’ lu tankhia-in a galhiam hawkkhia uh a, a milimte uh le mite kiangah hih thuhoih a puak dingin Filistia gam sung khempeuhah kamtaite a sawl uh hi." 
1Samuel31:10 Amaute in Ashtaroth biakinn sungah ama galhiam koih uh a, Bethshan khuakulhah ama luang a suang uh hi." 
1Samuel31:11 Ahih hangin Jabeshgilead ah a teng mite in Saul’ tungah Filistia-te’ hihna a zak uh ciangin," 
1Samuel31:12 a hang mi khempeuh dingin zan tawntung pai uh a, Bethshan kulh tung panin Saul’ luang le a tapate’ luangte va la uh hi. Amaute in Jabesh-ah tunpihin tua lai-ah a hal uh hi." 
1Samuel31:13 Amaute in a guhte la-in Jabesh khuasung makeng kung nuai-ah vui uh a, ni sagih sung an a tang uh hi." 
2Samuel1:1 Saul a sih khit, Amalek-te a thahna panin David a ciahkik ciangin Ziklag-ah David ni nih om hi." 
2Samuel1:2 A ni thum ni-in, a puan kikekin a lu tungah lei omin Saul’ giahphual panin mi khat hong pai hi. David kiangah amah hong tun ciangin leilakah pukin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
2Samuel1:3 David in ama kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in David kiangah, “Israel giahphual panin kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:4 David in ama kiangah, “Bangci bang ahi hiam? Hong gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Giahphual panin mite tai a, mi tampi zong pukin si uh hi. Saul le a tapa Jonathan zong a si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:5 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah a gen tangvalpa kiangah, “Saul le a tapa Jonathan a sihna bangci theih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:6 Tua ciangin tangvalpa in, “Gilboa Mual-ah ka omkha a, tua lai munah Saul a teipi tungah kingam hi." 
2Samuel1:7 Saul in a nunglam hong et ciangin kei hong mu-in hong sam hi. Keimah in ka dawng a, ‘Hih lai-ah om ing,’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel1:8 Saul in kei kiangah, ‘Kua na hi hiam?’ hong ci hi. Keimah in Saul ka dawng a, ‘Kei, Amalek mi ka hi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel1:9 Saul in kei kiangah, ‘Ka pangah ding inla kei hong that in; bang hang hiam cih leh gimna ka thuak a, ahi zongin ka naang lai hi,’ hong ci hi." 
2Samuel1:10 Tua ahih ciangin ama pangah dingin amah ka that hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a tuk khit ciangin nungta zo lo taktak ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Tua ciangin a lu tungah a om kumpi lukhu le a ban tungah a om a banbulh kong la a, tuate hih lai ka topa kiangah kong paipih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:11 Tua ciangin David in ama puante lenin balkek a, amah tawh a om mite khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin a hih uh hi." 
2Samuel1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Saul, a tapa Jonathan, le Topa’ mi Israel-te hangin amaute thumin kap uh a, nitak dong an a tang uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal sungah amaute si uh hi." 
2Samuel1:13 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah thu a puak tangvalpa kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen Amalek mi peemta khat’ tapa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:14 David in ama kiangah, “ Topa’ sathau nilh pa a that dingin na khut na liik khiat ding na lau loh a bangci thu ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:15 Tua ciangin David in tangvalte khat samin, “Pai in; amah thatlum in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua thupuak pa sat a, amah a si hi." 
2Samuel1:16 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Nangma mawhna nangma lu tungah tung ta hen; bang hang hiam cih leh nangma kampau in nang’ langkhatah teci pangin, ‘ Topa’ sathau nilh pa ka that khin hi,’ na ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:17 Tua ciangin Saul le a tapa Jonathan’ hangin kah la phuakin David kap a," 
2Samuel1:18 amah in Judah mite tungah hih kah la a kihilh nading thu a pia hi. Tua la pen Jashar Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Amah in: 
2Samuel1:19 “Israel aw, na minthanna, na mual sangte tungah kithat! A vanglianpa bangci-in tuk!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gath khua sungah gen kei in. Ashkelon kongzingah genthang kei in. Filistia numeite lungdam kha ding, dawibia numeite nuamin diang kha ding." 
2Samuel1:21 “No Gilboa mualte aw, daitui ahi a, guahtui ahi zongin, na tung uhah omsak kei un. Tui thukpi kilok zong omsak kei un! Bang hang hiam cih leh a vanglianpa’ lum nin a, Saul’ lum, sathau kinuh lo hi." 
2Samuel1:22 “Jonathan’ thaltang gupha a, Saul’ namsau zong kihtakhuai hi. Jonathan’ thaltang guakkik lo a, Saul’ namsau zong hong guakkik lo hi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Saul le Jonathan, ki-it uh a, it-huai uh! A sih a hinin amaute kikhen lo a, muvanlai sangin zaptel zaw uh a, humpinelkai sangin thahat zaw uh hi." 
2Samuel1:24 “No Israel numeite aw, Saul’ hangin kap un. Puansan neel a silh, na puan tung uhah kizepna kham a suangte aw, ama hangin kap un." 
2Samuel1:25 “A vanglianpa bangci-in tuk galphual sungah! Jonathan aw, na mual sangte tungah nang hong kithat hi." 
2Samuel1:26 Nangma hangin ka lungkham hi, ka sanggam Jonathan; kei nong itna lamdang a, numei’ itna sangin lianzaw hi." 
2Samuel1:27 “A vanglianpa bangci-in tuk, galhiamte bangci-in sia!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:1 Hih hun khit ciangin David in Topa thu dong a, “Judah khuapi khat peuhpeuhah ka paito ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in ama kiangah, “Paito in,” a ci hi. David in, “Koi penah paito ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hebron-ah,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin tua lai-ah David paito a, ama zi nihte, Jezreel khua mi Ahinoam le Karmel khua mi Nabal’ zi meigongnu Abigail zong a pai uh hi." 
2Samuel2:3 David in amah tawh a om a mite, mi khempeuh a innkuanpih ciat tawh paipihto a, Hebron khua-ah amaute a teng uh hi." 
2Samuel2:4 Tua ciangin Judah mite hong pai-in amaute in tua lai munah Judah kumpi dingin David sathau a nilh uh hi. Amaute in David kiangah, “Saul a vuite pen Jabeshgilead mite hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin" 
2Samuel2:5 Jabeshgilead mite kiangah David in kamtaite sawlin amaute kiangah, “Note in na topa uh Saul tungah thumanna lakin amah vui na hih manun Topa in note thupha hong pia ta hen!" 
2Samuel2:6 Tu-in Topa in itna kip le thumanna note tungah hong lak ta hen! Note hih bangin gamta na hih manun note tungah thuhoih kong bawl ding hi. 
2Samuel2:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note kithakhauhsakin hang un; bang hang hiam cih leh na topa uh Saul si a, Judah mite in amau’ tungah kumpi-in kei sathau hong nilh khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:8 Tu-in Ner’ tapa Abner, Saul’ galkap mangpa in Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth la-in Mahanaim ah paipih hi." 
2Samuel2:9 Amah in Gilead, Ashur, Jezreel, Efraim, Benjamin, le Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah bawl hi." 
2Samuel2:10 Israel-te tungah uk dingin a kipatin Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth kum sawmli pha a, amah in kum nih sung uk hi. Ahih hangin Judah minamte in David’ nung zui uh hi." 
2Samuel2:11 Judah minamte tungah kumpi-in Hebron-ah David kum sagih le kha guk sung a om hi. 
2Samuel2:12 Ner’ tapa Abner le Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth’ nasemte Mahanaim panin Gibeon-ah paikhia uh hi. 
2Samuel2:13 Zeruiah’ tapa Joab le David’ nasemte paikhia-in Gibeon bual-ah amaute dawntuah uh hi. Amaute bual langkhatah, adang khatte a bual langkhatah tu uh hi." 
2Samuel2:14 Tua ciangin Abner in Joab kiangah, “Tangvalte ding sakin eite’ mai-ah kimawlsak ni,” a ci hi. Joab in, “Amaute dingsak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:15 Tua ciangin amaute dingin galkah uh a, Benjamin le Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth a dingin sawm le nih, le David’ nasemte zong sawm le nih mah ahi hi." 
2Samuel2:16 Tua ciangin alang ciat uh lutang lenin, a namsau tawh a lang pa dawt ciat uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tukkhawm uh hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeon-ah a om tua mun pen Helkathhazzurim kici hi." 
2Samuel2:17 Tua ni-in galkidona nasia mahmah a, Abner le Israel mite David’ nasemte in zo uh hi." 
2Samuel2:18 Zeruiah’ tapa thumte, Joab, Abishai, le Asahel, tua lai-ah om uh hi. Asahel pen Syria sakhi lee bangin a khe manlang hi." 
2Samuel2:19 Asahel in Abner delh a, amah a delh laitakin Abner a zuihna-ah pial hetloin delh paisuak hi." 
2Samuel2:20 Tua ciangin Abner in a nung enin, “Asahel aw, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Keimah ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:21 Abner in ama kiangah, “Na taklamah ahi a, na veilamah ahi zongin kihei inla, tangvalte khatpeuh manin a na sut in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah a zuihna panin Asahel pial lo hi." 
2Samuel2:22 Tua ciangin Abner in Asahel kiangah, “Keimah zuihna panin pial in; bang hangin nang lei-ah hong vatgawp ding ka hi hiam? Nang hong vatgawp leng na sanggampa Joab’ mai-ah ka maitang bangci lak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci kik hi." 
2Samuel2:23 Ahih hangin amah lampial nuam lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abner in a teipi tong lamin a gil khawh a, a nungah a teipi lengsuak hi. Tua ciangin amah tukin tua phualah a si hi. Asahel tukin a sihna munah a pai mi khempeuh tang loin a ding uh hi." 
2Samuel2:24 Ahih hangin Joab le Abishai in Abner delh ding kipan uh hi. Ni a tum laitakin Gibeon gamlak paina lampi-a om Giah mai-ah a kikhung Ammah mual a tung uh hi. 
2Samuel2:25 Tua ciangin Abner a pawlpih Benjamin-te kikaikhawm uh a, amaute pawlkhat suakin mual dawn khatah a pang uh hi." 
2Samuel2:26 Tua ciangin Abner in Joab samin, “Mi hih bangin kithat lai ding ahi hiam? A tawpna-ah a haksat zawk nading thei lo na hi hiam? A sanggamte uh a delhna panin na mite a kihei nadingin na thupiak ding bangtan sawtlai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Joab in, “Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin, hong pau lo hi lecin, a sanggamte uh a delhna panin zingsang mateng mite khawl lo taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joab in peengkul tum hi. Mi khempeuh khawl a, Israel-te delh nawn loin amaute in do nawn lo uh hi." 
2Samuel2:29 Tua ciangin Abner le a mite Arabah kantanin tua zan tawntung pai uh hi. Amaute in Jordan kantan uh a, sun ma sungteng pai-in Mahanaim tung uh hi." 
2Samuel2:30 Abner a delhna panin Joab ciahkik hi. Amah in mi khempeuh a kaihkhop khit ciangin Asahel sim lohin David’ nasemte mi sawmkua le kua kisam hi. 
2Samuel2:31 Ahih hangin David’ nasemte in Abner a’ ahi Benjamin-te mihing zathum le sawmguk that uh hi. 
2Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin amaute in Asahel la-in Bethlehem-ah a om ama pa’ hanah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Joab le a mite zan tawntung pai uh a, Hebron-ah khua a vak hi." 
2Samuel3:1 Saul’ innkuan le David’ innkuante’ kikalah sauveipi galkidona om hi. David thahat semsem a, Saul thaneem semsem hi." 
2Samuel3:2 Hebron-ah David’ tapate suak hi: A tacil pen Jezreel khuami Ahinoam tawh a neih Ammon ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:3 A ta nihna pen Karmel khua mi Nabal’ zi meigongnu Abigail tawh a neih Khileab ahi hi. A thumna pen Geshur kumpipa Talmai’ tanu Maakah’ tapa Absalom ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:4 A lina pen Haggith’ tapa Adonijah ahi hi. A ngana pen Abital’ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:5 A gukna pen David’ zi Eglah ta Ithream ahi hi. Hihte pen Hebron khua-ah David’ sung pan a suak ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:6 Saul innkuan le David innkuante a kisim sungin Saul’ innkuan sungah Abner hong thahat semsem hi. 
2Samuel3:7 Tu-in Saul in Aiah’ tanu Rizpah min nei zineu khat nei hi. Ishbosheth in Abner’ kiangah, “Bang hangin ka pa’ zineu luppih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:8 Tua ciangin Ishbosheth’ thugennate hangin Abner heh mahmah a, “Kei pen Judah mite a dingin ui bang lel ka hi hiam? Keimah in na pa Saul’ innkuante, a sanggam pasalte, le a lawmte tungah tuni dongin thumanna ka lak lai a, David’ khut sungah note kong pia nai kei hi. Ahi zongin tuni-in nang in numei khat lel tawh kisai-in kei nong mawhsak hi." 
2Samuel3:9 Saul’ innkuan panin kumpi gam khinin, Dan panin Beersheba dong Israel le Judah-te tungah David’ kumpi tokhom phuh ding Topa in ama tungah a ciamsa thu David a dingin ka tunsak kei taak leh Pasian in keimah Abner hong dawm kei ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Ishbosheth in kam khatin zong Abner dawng ngam lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Abner kihta hi. 
2Samuel3:12 Tua ciangin Abner in Hebron-a David kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Hih gam kua in uk ding ahi hiam? Kei tawh thuciamna hong bawl in. Israel-te khempeuh nang kiangah a paipih dingin keimah kong pang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:13 Amah in, “Pha hi; nang tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Ahih hangin nang’ tung panin na khat ka kisam hi. Tua pen, kei tawh a kimu dingin nong pai ciangin Saul’ tanu Mikhal nong paipih masak kei leh ka mai na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:14 Tua ciangin David in Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Filistia-te’ vundawn za khatin ka leisa ka zi Mikhal hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:15 Tua ciangin Ishbosheth in mi sawlin ama pasal, Laish tapa Paltiel kiang panin amah a la hi." 
2Samuel3:16 Ahih hangin a pasal in amah zui-in, Bahurim paina lam tawntung ama nungah a kap hi. Tua ciangin Abner in ama kiangah, “Pai in; ciahkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah ciahkik hi." 
2Samuel3:17 Tua ciangin Abner in Israel upate tawh thu kikumin, “A beisa tawlkhat sungteng note tungah kumpi dingin David na zong uh hi." 
2Samuel3:18 Tu-in taksuak sak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in David tungah kam ciamin, ‘Ka nasempa David’ khut tawh Filistia-te’ khutsung pan le amau’ galte khempeuh’ khutsung panin ka mi Israel-te ka honkhia ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:19 Abner in Benjamin-te tungah zong thu gen hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te le Benjamin-te khempeuh in tua bangin hih ding hoih hi, ci-in a ngaihsutna uh Hebron-a David’ kiangah a gen dingin Abner a pai hi." 
2Samuel3:20 Hebron-a David kiangah mihing sawmnih tawh Abner a pai ciangin, Abner le amah tawh a om mite a dingin David in pawi khat a kham hi." 
2Samuel3:21 Tua ciangin Abner in David kiangah, “Amaute in nang tawh thuciamna a bawl theih nading le na deih bangin amaute khempeuh tungah na uk theih nadingin keimah dingin ka to kumpipa kiangah Israel-te khempeuh ka kaikhawm ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in Abner sawlkhia a, amah zong lung nuamin a pai hi." 
2Samuel3:22 Tua khit phetin a galsimna panun David’ nasemte Joab tawh hong tung uh a, amaute in na tampi hong ciahpih uh hi. Ahih hangin Hebron khuasung David kiangah Abner na om nawn lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh David in amah sawlkhia khin a, amah lungnuamin ciah khinzo hi." 
2Samuel3:23 Joab le amah tawh a om galkap khempeuh hong tun ciangin Joab kiangah, “Kumpipa’ kiangah Ner’ tapa Abner hong pai a, lungnuam takin amah ciahkhiasak khin hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Samuel3:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Joab pai-in, “Bang hih na hi hiam? Na kiangah Abner hong pai hi. Nang in amah sawlkhia-in amah a ciahkhiat khitna bang thu ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel3:25 Nang hong khem ding, na pusuahna le na sungtumna a thei ding, le na hihna khempeuh a thei dingin Ner’ tapa Abner’ hong paina na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:26 David’ omna panin Joab a paikhiat ciangin, amah in Abner’ nungah kamtaite sawl a, amaute in Sirah Tuibeem panin amah hong paipih kik uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua thu thei lo hi." 
2Samuel3:27 Hebron-ah Abner hong paikik ciangin, Joab in amah tawh a kituam ho dingin kulhkongpi pamah paikhiatpih a, a sanggampa Asahel’ phulakna-in amah in a gil sun a, tua ciangin a si hi." 
2Samuel3:28 Tua khit, David in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in, “Ner’ tapa Abner a kithahna hangin Topa’ mai-ah keimah le ka kumpi gam, a tawntungin mawhbaang lo hi." 
2Samuel3:29 Joab lu tung le ama innkuante khempeuh tungah tu ta hen! Joab’ innkuante nin paikhia a nei mi ahi a, a phak mi ahi a, ciangkhut khun mi ahi a, namsau tawh a kithat mi ahi a, annek ding a nei lo mi tawh ahi zongin kilawi ngei kei ta hen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:30 Tua bangin Joab le a sanggampa Abishai in Abner that uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Gibeon-a galkidona-ah a sanggampa uh Asahel thahsak hi. 
2Samuel3:31 Tua ciangin David in Joab le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh kiangah, “Na puan uh balkekin puanhampi silh unla, Abner’ mai-ah kap un,” a ci hi. Kumpipa David in hankuang a zui hi." 
2Samuel3:32 Amaute in Hebron-ah Abner vui uh a, Abner’ hanah kumpipa a kap hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh zong a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel3:33 Tua ciangin Abner’ hangin kumpipa in kah la-in, “Mi hai pa a sih bangin Abner si ding ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel3:34 Na khutte kihen lo a, na khete kol kibulh lo hi. Mi gilote’ thah bangin nang na si hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama hangin kap kik uh hi." 
2Samuel3:35 Tua ciangin ni a omlai-in an ne dingin David a zol dingin mi khempeuh hong pai uh a, ahih hangin David kiciamin, “Ni a tum matengin an ahi a, na khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin ka ciap taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:36 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in tua thu thei uh a, tua in amaute lungdamsak hi. Kumpipa’ sep khempeuh in mi khempeuh lungdamsak hi." 
2Samuel3:37 Tua ahih ciangin Ner’ tapa Abner thah ding kumpipa’ deihna ahih lohlam tua ni-in mi khempeuh le Israel-te khempeuh in thei uh hi. 
2Samuel3:38 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Tuni-in Israel-te sungah ulian ahi milian khat a tukna thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel3:39 Sathau kinilh kumpipa hinapi-in tuni-in ka tha a nem hi. Zeruiah’ ta hih mite kei a dingin haksa lua hi. Gamtatsia pa a gitlohna bangin Topa in thuk ta hen!” a ci hi. 
2Samuel4:1 Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth in Hebron-ah Abner a sihna thu a zak ciangin a tha kiam a, Israel-te khempeuh lungkia hi." 
2Samuel4:2 Saul’ tapa in galsim pawlte a makai mi nih nei hi. Khat pa’ min Baanah hi-in, adang khat pa’ min Rekhab hi a, Beeroth khua pan Benjamin mi Rimmon’ tapate ahi uh hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh Beeroth zong Benjamin a’ in kisim hi." 
2Samuel4:3 Beeroth mite Gittaim-ah tai uh a, tuni dongin tua lai-ah peemta-in om uh hi.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Saul’ tapa Jonathan in a khezaw tapa khat nei hi. Jezreel panin Saul le Jonathan’ thu hong tunin amah kum nga pha hi. Amah a cingnu in amah la-in taipih a, tua nu a nawhtaina lamin naupang kia-in a khe zaw hi. Ama min Mefibosheth ahi hi." 
2Samuel4:5 Tu-in Beeroth mi Rimmon’ tapate Rekhab le Baanah ding khia uh a, sun nisat hun pawlin Ishbosheth’ inn-ah a sun tawlngak laitakin hong tung uh hi." 
2Samuel4:6 Inn kongcing nu mangbuh a su khin hi a, a lusuk suakin ihmu hi. Tua ahih ciangin Rekhab le a sanggampa Baanah simlut uh hi." 
2Samuel4:7 Amaute inn sungah a tun uh ciangin a lupna deisung a lupna tungah Ishbosheth lumin a om laitakin amaute in amah satin that uh a, a lu tan uh hi. Amaute in ama lu la-in Arabah lam tawnin zan tawntung pai uh a," 
2Samuel4:8 Ishbosheth’ lutang Hebron-a David’ kiang tunpih uh hi. Amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah, thah dingin nang a hong zong, na gal Saul’ tapa Ishbosheth’ lutang om hi. Topa in tuni-in Saul le a suanlekhakte tungah kote’ to kumpipa a dingin hong thuksak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel4:9 Ahih hangin David in Beeroth mi Rimmon’ tapate Rekhab le a sanggampa Baanah dawngin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin ka nuntakna hong honkhia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
2Samuel4:10 mi khat in kei kiangah, ‘En in, Saul si hi,’ ci-in hong gen ciangin, amah thuhoih puakin kingaihsun a, ama thu puak thaman ka piakna-in amah manin Ziklag-ah ka that hi." 
2Samuel4:11 Migilote in a thuman mi khat ama innsung a lupna tungah a thah ciangin note’ tungah ama phu hong la-in, leitung panin note hong susiazaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel4:12 Tua ciangin David in a tangvalte thu pia a, tangvalte in amaute thatin a khut le a khete sattan uh a, Hebron-a bual gei-ah amaute khai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Ishbosheth’ lutang la-in Hebron-a Abner’ hanah a vui uh hi." 
2Samuel5:1 Tua ciangin Israel minamte khempeuh Hebron-a David kiangah hong pai-in, “En in, kote pen nangma guh le nangma sa ka hi uh hi." 
2Samuel5:2 A beisa hunte-ah, kote tungah Saul kumpi ahih laitakin Israel-te kuan khiatpihin a ciahpih pa pen nangmah na hi hi. Topa in nangma kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima mi Israel-te a cing pa hi-in, Israel-te tungah ulian na hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel5:3 Tua ahih ciangin Israel upate khempeuh Hebron-a kumpipa kiangah hong pai uh hi. Kumpipa David in amaute tawh Topa’ mai Hebron-ah thuciamna khat bawl a, amaute in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in David sathau a nilh uh hi." 
2Samuel5:4 Gam uk dingin a kipatin David kum sawmthum pha a, amah in kum sawmli sung uk hi." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron panin kum sagih le kha guk sung Judah gam sung uk a, Jerusalem panin kum sawmthum le thum sung Israel-te khempeuh le Judah gam a uk hi." 
2Samuel5:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa le a mite tua gam a teng Jebus mite a sim dingin Jerusalem-ah pai uh a, amaute in David kiangah, “Kote nong zo vet kei ding hi; mittaw le khebaite nangawn in nang hong notkhiazo ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. “Hih lai-ah David hong paizo peuhmah lo ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi." 
2Samuel5:7 Ahi zongin David in kumpipa’ khua ahi Zion munmuanhuai la hi. 
2Samuel5:8 Tua ciangin David in tua ni-in, “Jebus mite a vatgawp nuam peuhmah, keimah David in ka muhdah zahin a mudah mi peuhmah, tua khebaite le mittawte a sim dingin tuizawl dungah pai ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Mittawte le khebaite Topa’ inn sungah lut lo ding hi,” kici hi." 
2Samuel5:9 Tua ciangin munmuanhuai sungah David tengin David khuapi ci-in min a phuak hi. Tua ciangin David in Millo panin biakinn lamah khuapi lam hi. 
2Samuel5:10 David lian semsem hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Pasian, Topa in amah ompih hi." 
2Samuel5:11 Tua ciangin Taia kumpipa Hiram in kamtaite le taamtak singte, le David a dingin inn khat a lamsak khutsiamte, le leilesuang innlam a siamte zong a puak hi." 
2Samuel5:12 Tua ciangin David in Israel-te’ tungah kumpi-in Topa in amah a kipsak khitna le Israel mite’ hangin ama kumpi gam a liatsakna a phawktel hi. 
2Samuel5:13 Hebron panin hong tun khit ciangin David in Jerusalem panin zineute le zite lathuah lai a, David’ tanute le tapate piangthuah lai hi." 
2Samuel5:14 Jerusalem-ah a neih a tate’ min: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhar, Elishua, Nefeg, Jafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada, le Elifelet ahi hi." 
2Samuel5:17 Israel-te tungah kumpi-in David sathau a kinilh khitna thu Filistia-te in a zak uh ciangin David a man dingin Filistia-te khempeuh kuanto uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua thu za-in munmuanhuai-ah paisuk hi. 
2Samuel5:18 Tu-in Filistia-te hong pai-in Refaim kuamsung dim uh hi. 
2Samuel5:19 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dongin, “Filistia-te do-in ka kuanto ding hiam? Keima khut sungah amaute na hong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in David kiangah, “Kuanto in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah Filistia-te kong pia taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel5:20 Tua ciangin Baalperazim-ah David hong pai-in David in tua lai-ah amaute a zo hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tuikhang in a phulkhap bangin Topa in ka mai-ah ka galte phukham hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun Baalperazim ci-in min kiphuak hi." 
2Samuel5:21 Filistia-te in tua lai-ah a milimte uh nusia uh a, David le a mite in tuate a puakhia uh hi." 
2Samuel5:22 Tua ciangin Filistia-te hong kuantokik lai-in Refaim kuamsung dim khin uh hi. 
2Samuel5:23 David in Topa thu a dot ciangin amah in, “Na kuanto kei ding hi; amaute’ nung lamah kual pai inla, lungli kungte gal panin amaute hih in." 
2Samuel5:24 Lungli kungte’ dawnah lampaina kheging na zak ciangin na tha saan in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia galkapte a vatgawp dingin na mai-ah Topa pai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel5:25 Tua ciangin Topa in amah a thupiak bangin David in hih a, Geba panin Gezer ciang dong Filistia-te a vatgawp hi." 
2Samuel6:1 David in Israel-te a kiteelkhia mi tul sawmthum khawmkik hi. 
2Samuel6:2 Tua ciangin David in kherub-te tungah a tu, Vanglian Topa’ min tawh a kisam Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang tua mun panin a paipihto dingin amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tawh Baalejudah-ah a pai hi." 
2Samuel6:3 Amaute in leeng thak khat tungah Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang pua uh a, mualtung a om Abinadab’ inn panin paikhiatpih uh hi. Abinadab’ tapate Uzzah le Ahio in leeng thak tungah Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang koihin hawl uh a, Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah Ahio a pai hi." 
2Samuel6:4  
2Samuel6:5 Tua ciangin David le Israel mite khempeuh in Topa’ mai-ah a tha neih zahun la sa-in, laiza khausai lasaknate, harp khausai lasaknate, khuangneute, kuangtuahte, le daltuahte tumin lungdamin a lam uh hi."
