2Samuel6:6 Nakon’ ancilna mun a tun uh ciangin bawngtalte muktu ahih manin Uzzah in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zanin len kha hi. 
2Samuel6:7 Tua ciangin Uzzah tungah Topa hong sinso hi. Amah in Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zan ahih manin Pasian in tua lai-ah amah vatlum a, Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang gei-ah amah si hi." 
2Samuel6:8 Topa in Uzzah gim pia ahih manin David heh hi. Tuni dongin tua mun pen Perezuzzah kici hi. 
2Samuel6:9 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in David in Topa kihta hi. Amah in, “ Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang bangci-in ka kiangah hong tung thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:10 Tua ahih ciangin David khuapi sungah Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih ding David ut lo a, Gath khua mi Obededom’ inn-ah paipih hi." 
2Samuel6:11 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang Gath khua mi Obededom’ inn sungah kha thum sung om a, Topa in Obededom le a innkuan khempeuh thupha a pia hi." 
2Samuel6:12 Tua ciangin Kumpi David kiangah, “Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang hangin Topa in Obededom innkuan le ama neih khempeuh thupha pia hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David pai-in Obededom’ inn panin David khuapi-ah lungdamna tawh Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto hi." 
2Samuel6:13 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang a puate kal guk a suan khit ciangin amah in a puate tawlkhat khawlsakin bawngtal khat le bawngno thau khat biakna-in a pia hi. 
2Samuel6:14 Tua ciangin a tha neih khempeuh tawh Topa’ mai-ah David lam hi. David in saihadial siampipuan khat silh hi. 
2Samuel6:15 Tua ahih ciangin David le Israel mi khempeuh in otna le saki tumna awging tawh Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto uh hi. 
2Samuel6:16 Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang David khuapi sung hong tun laitakin tawlet panin Saul tanu a zi Mikhal hong khuadak a, Topa’ mai-ah Kumpi David diangin a lam mu hi. Tua nu in a lungsim sungah amah simmawh hi." 
2Samuel6:17 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang hong tumpih uh a, David in ama a dingin a lamsak puanbuk sung ama mun dingah a koih hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa’ mai-ah meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate a pia hi." 
2Samuel6:18 David in meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate a piak khit ciangin amah in Vanglian Topa’ min tawh mite thupha pia a," 
2Samuel6:19 Israel mihon buppi, mi khempeuh, numei le pasalte tungah anlum pheng khat, sa baak khat, le leenggahkeu pheng khat ciat a pia hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi." 
2Samuel6:20 Tua ciangin a innkuante thupha a pia dingin David a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David a dawn dingin Saul’ tanu Mikhal hong paikhia a, “Tuni-in Israel kumpipa, mi mawkmawkte khat maizum loin a guak om bangin, a nasemte’ numeite’ muhna-ah tuni-in a tangguakin omin, amahmah bangci kipahtawi ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:21 Tua ciangin David in Mikhal kiangah, “ Topa’ mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin a hong koih dingin na pa le a innkuan khempeuhte sangin kei a hong teelzaw Topa’ mai ahi hi. Keimah in Topa’ mai-ah lungdamna ka bawl ding hi." 
2Samuel6:22 Hih sangin a simmawhhuai zaw-in ka kibawl lai ding a, nangma mit bekah a ginalo ka hi ding hi. Ahih hangin nangma gen numeite in keimah hong pahtawi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:23 Tua ahih ciangin Saul’ tanu Mikhal in a sih ni dongin ta nei thei nawn lo hi. 
2Samuel7:1 Tu-in kumpipa ama inn sungah tengin Topa in ama kiima a galte khempeuh panin tawlngakna a piak khit ciangin," 
2Samuel7:2 kumpipa in kamsang Nathan kiangah, “Tu-in thei in; keimah taamtak inn hoih sungah ka om a, ahih hangin Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang puanbuk sungah omlai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:3 Tua ciangin Nathan in kumpipa kiangah, “Pai in; na lungsim a om khempeuh hih in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong ompih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:4 Ahih hangin tua zan mahin Nathan kiangah Topa’ thu hong tung a," 
2Samuel7:5 “Pai inla ka nasempa David kiangah gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ten nading biakinn khat hong lamsak ding na hi hiam? 
2Samuel7:6 Israel mite Egypt panin ka paikhiatpih toh ni a kipan tuni dongin biakinn sungah ka om nai kei a, puanbuk sungah omin ka pai kawikawi hi." 
2Samuel7:7 Israel mite khempeuh tawh ka painasa mun khempeuhah, ka mi Israel-te a cing dingin ka piak thukhente khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Bang hangin taamtak biakinn hoih hong lamsak lo na hi hiam?” ci-in kam khat beek gen ngei ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
2Samuel7:8 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasempa David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin lonona mun, tuute na zuihna panin nang kong la hi." 
2Samuel7:9 Na paina peuhpeuhah nang tawh kong om a, na galte khempeuh ka hong zosak hi. Leitung miliante’ min khat mah bangin nang a dingin min lian khat kong bawlsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:10 Keimah in ka mi Israel-te a dingin mun khat ka seh ding a, amau’ munah amaute tengin a kinawngkaisak nawn loh nadingin amaute ka phut ding hi. Nidanga bangin mi ngongtatte in," 
2Samuel7:11 ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka koih khit zawh, amaute gimsak nawn lo ding hi. Na galte khempeuh panin nang tungah tawlngakna kong pia ding hi. Tua tham loin Topa in nang a dingin suanlekhak hong bawlsak ding nang tungah Topa in gen hi." 
2Samuel7:12 Na pu na pate’ kiang na zuat ni ciangin, nangma sung panin hong suakkhia ding na tapa nangma nungah ka khangsak ding a, keimah in ama kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:13 Amah in keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding a, keimah in ama kumpi gam tokhom a tawntungin ka kipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:14 Kei pen ama pa ka hi ding a, amah pen keima tapa hi ding hi. Amah in mawhna a bawl ciangin, keimah in mite’ ciangduai tawh amah ka thuhilh ding hi." 
2Samuel7:15 Ahih hangin nangma ma-a ka hepkhiat Saul’ tung panin ka lakkhiat bangin ama tung panin ka itna kip ka lakhia kei ding hi. 
2Samuel7:16 Na suanlekhakte le na kumpi gam keima mai-ah a kip tawntungin kibawl ding a, na kumpi tokhom kip tawntung ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:17 Hih thute khempeuh tawh a kizui le hih maangmuhna khempeuh tawh a kizui-in Nathan in David kiangah a gen hi. 
2Samuel7:18 Tua ciangin kumpi David sungtumin Topa’ mai-ah tu a, “Topa Pasian aw, tu ciang dong hih bangin kei nong kep nadingin kei kua hi a, ka innkuan bang ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel7:19 Hih pen nangma mitah thu neuno khat hi lai hi, Topa Pasian aw. A hong tung ding sauveipi sung na nasempa’ suanlekhakte’ thu ding na gen khin a, mailam khangte zong kei nong lak khin hi, O Topa Pasian!" 
2Samuel7:20 David in nang tungah bang genthuah nawn ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na nasempa na thei hi, O Topa Pasian!" 
2Samuel7:21 Nangma thuciamna bang le na lungsim tawh kizui-in na nasempa na theihsak nadingin hih thu lian khempeuh na piangsak hi. 
2Samuel7:22 Tua ahih ciangin nang na lian takpi hi, Topa Pasian aw. Ka bilun ka zakna uh tawh kizui-in nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo a, nang simloh Pasian dang om lo hi." 
2Samuel7:23 “Ama mite’ mai-ah minam khat le a pasian-te hawlkhiatna tawh ama a dingin min bawlin, amaute a dingin a lian a lauhuai nate hih sakin, ama mi dingin a honkhia dingin Pasian a paina na mi Israel-te, leitung minam dang kua tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel7:24 Nangmah in nangma mi ahi tawntung dingin na mi Israel-te nangma a dingin na kipsak hi. Topa aw, nangmah, amaute’ Pasian na suak hi." 
2Samuel7:25 Topa Pasian aw, tu-in na nasempa le ama suanlekhakte tawh kizomin na gensa thu a tawntung dingin kipsak inla, nangma gensa bangin hih in." 
2Samuel7:26 Tua hileh, ‘Vanglian Topa pen Israel-te tungah Pasian hi,’ ci-in nangma min kiliansak tawntung ding a, nangma mai-ah na nasempa David’ suanlekhakte kumpi-in kikipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te’ Pasian, Vanglian Topa nangmah in, ‘Nangma suanlekhakte kumpi-in kong bawlsak ding hi,’ ci-in na nasempa tungah pulakna na bawl khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nasempa in nang tungah hih thungetna hong ngen ngam hi." 
2Samuel7:28 Tu-in Topa Pasian aw, nang, Pasian na hi a, na thute manin, na nasempa tungah hih na hoih na ciam khin hi." 
2Samuel7:29 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangma mai-ah a om tawntung theih nadingin na nasempa’ suanlekhakte thupha piak ding hong lungkim in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in na gen khin a, nangma thupha tawh na nasempa’ suanlekhakte thupha kipia tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel8:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin David in Filistia-te zo-in amaute nuaisiah a, David in Filistia-te’ khutsung panin Methegammah khua a la hi." 
2Samuel8:2 Tua ciangin amah in Moab mite zo a, amaute khauzang khat tawh tehin, leilakah amaute lumsak hi. Amah in thah dingin gual nih le khah dingin gual khat dim a teh hi. Tua ciangin Moab mite David’ khutnuai mite suakin siah a puak uh hi." 
2Samuel8:3 Zobah kumpipa Rehob’ tapa Hadadezer in Eufratis gun kiim gamte ngahkik nuamin hong kuan ahih manin David in amah do-in a zo hi. 
2Samuel8:4 David in ama tung panin sakol galkap tulkhat le zasagih le khe galkap tul sawmnih la hi. David in leengkai sakol khempeuh a zagui atsat a, ahih hangin leeng zakhat a dingin a kicing a siit hi." 
2Samuel8:5 Damaskas gam a Syria mite, Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer a huh dingin hong kuan ciangin David in Syria mite tul sawmnih le tulnih a that hi." 
2Samuel8:6 Tua ciangin David in Damaskas gam Aram-ah khuacingte a koih hi. Syria mite David’ nasem suak uh a, siah a puak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuhah gualzawhna a pia hi." 
2Samuel8:7 Tua ciangin David in Hadadezer’ nasemte in a puak kham kibawl lumte la-in Jerusalem-ah a paipih hi. 
2Samuel8:8 Hadadezer’ khuapite Betah le Berothai panin Kumpi David in sumngo tampi tak a la hi. 
2Samuel8:9 Hamath kumpipa Toi in David in Hadadezer’ galkap buppi a zawhna thu a zak ciangin," 
2Samuel8:10 amah in Hadadezer do-in a zawhna hangin amah va hopihin a lungdampih dingin Toi in Kumpi David kiangah a tapa Joram a sawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hadadezer pen Toi tawh galin kido ngei zel hi. Joram in ngun, kham, le sumngo tawh a kibawl nate puak hi." 
2Samuel8:11 Kumpi David in hihte zong, a nuaisiah minamte khempeuh Edom, Moab, Ammon mite, Filistia-te, Amalek, le Zobah kumpipa Rehob’ tapa Hadadezer’ vannusiatte sung panin a ap ngun le kham tawh Topa’ tungah a ap khawm hi." 
2Samuel8:12  
2Samuel8:13 David minthang semsem hi. A ciah ciangin amah in Ci Kuam-ah Edom mite tul sawm le tulgiat a that hi. 
2Samuel8:14 Tua ciangin amah in Edom-ah khuacingte a koih hi. Edom gam sung khempeuhah amah in khuacingte koih a, Edom mi khempeuh David’ nasemte a suak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuhah gualzo sak hi." 
2Samuel8:15 Tua ahih ciangin David in Israel-te khempeuh uk a, a mite khempeuh tungah thutang le thuman a zang hi." 
2Samuel8:16 Zeruiah’ tapa Joab in galkapte uk hi. Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat thu ciamteh pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel8:17 Ahitub’ tapa Zadok le Abiathar’ tapa Ahimelek siampi ahi uh hi. Seraiah lai-at pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah in Khereth mite le Peleth mite uk uh hi. David’ tapate pen siampite ahi uh hi. 
2Samuel9:1 Tua ciangin David in, “Jonathan’ hangin ama tungah migitna ka lahtheih nadingin Saul’ innkuan sungah mi khatpeuh a omlai hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:2 Saul’ innkuan sungah Ziba min nei nasempa khat om a, amaute in David kiangah amah sam uh hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Ziba na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasempa kei pen Ziba ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Pasian’ tungah ka ciamsa bangin migitna ka lahtheih nading Saul’ innkuan-ah mi khat beek omlai lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Jonathan’ tapa khat omlai hi; amah a khe zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:4 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Amah koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Lodebar-a Ammiel’ tapa Makhir’ inn-ah amah om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:5 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in mi sawlin Lodebar-a Ammiel’ tapa Makhir’ inn panin amah a lasak hi. 
2Samuel9:6 Tua ciangin Saul’ tapa Jonathan, a ta Mefibosheth David kiangah hong pai a, maipukin zahtakna a bawl hi. Tua ciangin David in, “Mefibosheth!” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “En in, na nasempa,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:7 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih le na pa Jonathan’ hangin nangma tungah migitna kong lak ding a, na pu Saul’ leitang khempeuh nangma tungah kong piakik ding hi. Tua ciangin nangmah in ka sabuai-ah an na ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:8 Tua ciangin amah in zahtakna bawlin, “A sisa ui tawh a kibang kei bang lel, nong hici bawl nadingin na nasempa bang ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Saul’ nasempa Ziba samin ama kiangah, “Saul le a innkuan tawh a kizom khempeuh na topa’ tupa’ tungah ka pia khin hi." 
2Samuel9:10 Nang le na tapate le na nasemte in ama a dingin lo na kho ding uh a, na topa’ tupa in annek ding a neihtheih nadingin a piangte na tunpih ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na topa’ tupa Mefibosheth in keima sabuai-ah an ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi. Ziba in tapa sawm le nga le nasem sawmnih nei hi." 
2Samuel9:11 Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in nong thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in na nasempa in hih ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ tapate khat bangin Mefibosheth in David’ sabuai-ah an a ne hi." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheth in Mika min nei tapa tangval khat nei hi. Ziba’ inn-ah a teng khempeuh Mefibosheth’ nasemte a suak hi. 
2Samuel9:13 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah Mefibosheth teng a, amah in kumpipa’ sabuai-ah an ne tawntung hi. Mifibosheth a khe a langnihin a zaw hi." 
2Samuel10:1 Hih hun khit ciangin Ammon mite’ kumpipa si a, a tapa Hanun in ama tangin uk hi." 
2Samuel10:2 Tua ciangin David in, “Keima tungah a pa thuman takin hong gamtat bangin Nahash’ tapa Hanun’ tungah thuman takin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in a pa’ hangin amah a hehnem dingin a nasemte a sawl hi. David’ nasemte Ammon mite’ gamah va tung uh hi." 
2Samuel10:3 Ahih hangin Ammon mite’ uliante in a topa uh Hanun kiangah, “David in nangma kiangah hehnemte hong sawl manin na pa a pahtawi hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi hiam? David in a nasemte khuapi sung a en ding, le a lawnthal dingin hong sawl hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel10:4 Tua ciangin Hanun in David’ nasemte manin a khamul uh alang ciat kiatkhiatsak a, a puan uh a laizang, a kawng ciangah atkhiat sakin amaute a sawlkhia hi." 
2Samuel10:5 David kiangah tua thu a kigen ciangin amaute a dawn dingin amah in mi sawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mite nakpitakin maizum uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Na khamul uh a saukik mateng Jerikho-ah om unla, tua ciangin hong ciah un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel10:6 Ammon mite in amaute David’ huat mi a suah khitna uh a muh uh ciangin, Ammon mite in mi sawlin Bethrehob-a Syria mite, Zobah-a Syria mite, khe galkap tul sawmnih, le Maakah kumpipa’ mi tulkhat tawh, le Tob mite tul sawm le tulnih a cial uh hi." 
2Samuel10:7 David in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in Joab le a thahat mihon khempeuh a sawl hi. 
2Samuel10:8 Tua ciangin Ammon mite hong kuankhia-in kulhkongpi lutna-ah galsim dingin panmun hong la uh hi. Zobah le Rehob-a Syria mite, Tob mite, le Maakah-te, gamlakah amau pawl ciatin om uh hi." 
2Samuel10:9 Joab in a nung le a mai-ah amah a sim dingin gal in a panna a muh ciangin, amah in Israel-te’ sung pan mi pawlkhat teelkhia a, Syria mite a do dingin a pangsak hi." 
2Samuel10:10 Ama mi a omlai teng a sanggampa Abishai’ ukna sungah koih a, Ammon mite’ langkhatah amaute a pangsak hi." 
2Samuel10:11 Tua ciangin amah in, “Syria mite kei a dingin a hat luat leh kei nong huh ding hi. Ahih hangin Ammon mite nang a dingin a hat luat le kei hong pai-in nang kong huh ding hi." 
2Samuel10:12 Kihangsak in; i mite a’ ding le i Pasian’ khuapite a dingin kipasalsak ni; Topa in hoih a sak bangin hong hih ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel10:13 Tua ahih ciangin Joab le amah tawh a om mite in Syria mite a do dingin naih uh a, ama mai-ah amaute tai uh hi." 
2Samuel10:14 Ammon mite in Syria mite a tai a muh uh ciangin amaute zong Abishai’ mai-ah tai-in khuapi sungah lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Ammon mite a dona panin Joab ciahin Jerusalem-ah a tung hi. 
2Samuel10:15 Israel-te in amaute a zawhna thu Syria mite in a muh uh ciangin amau mahmah kikaikhawm uh hi. 
2Samuel10:16 Tua ciangin Hadadezer in mi sawlin Eufratis galkhat a Syria mite samsak hi. Hadadezer’ galkap mangpa Shobak makai-in Helam-ah amaute tung uh hi. 
2Samuel10:17 Hih thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in Israel-te khempeuh kaikhawm a, Jordan kantanin Helam tung uh hi. David a do dingin Syria mite in na pang uh a, amah tawh kido uh hi." 
2Samuel10:18 Israel-te’ mai-ah Syria mite tai uh hi. David in leeng zasagih a hawl Syria mite, le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawmli thatin, amau’ galkap mangpa Shobak liamsak a, tua lai-ah amah a si hi." 
2Samuel10:19 Hadadezer’ nasem ahi kumpite khempeuh in Israel-te in amaute a zawhna thu a muh uh ciangin, amaute in Israel-te tawh kilemna bawl uh a, amaute’ khutnuai mi a suak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Ammon mite a huh lai ding uh Syria mite lau ta uh hi." 
2Samuel11:1 Galdo dingin kumpite a kuankhiat hun tua kum phalbi sungin David in Joab, le amah tawh a om a nasemte, le Israel-te khempeuh sawl a, amaute in Ammon mite sugawpin Rabbah khua umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin David Jerusalem-ah om hi." 
2Samuel11:2 Khatvei nitak lamin a lupna panin David tho-in kumpi innkhumzangah a pai leh innkhumzang panin amah in numei khat a kisil galmuh kha hi. A numei melhoih mahmah hi. 
2Samuel11:3 David in mi sawlin tua numei’ thu kansak hi. Mi khat in, “Hih nu pen Hit mi Uriah’ zi, Eliam’ tanu Bathsheba hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:4 Tua ahih ciangin David in kamtaite sawlin tua nu samsak hi. Tua nu ama kiangah hong pai a, amah in tua nu luppih hi. (Tua nu a khasim nitna panin a kisiansuah tung ahi hi.) Tua ciangin ama inn-ah a ciah hi." 
2Samuel11:5 Tua ciangin tua numei gai hi. Amah in mi sawlin David kiangah, “Nau ka paii hi,” ci-in gensak hi." 
2Samuel11:6 Tua ciangin David in Joab kiangah thu puak a, “Hit mi Uriah ka kiangah hong sawl in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joab in David kiangah Uriah sawl hi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ama kiangah Uriah a tun ciangin David in Joab bangci om a, mite bangci uh a, galdona bangci mavan’ hiam cih dong hi." 
2Samuel11:8 Tua ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Na inn-ah ciahsuk inla tawlnga in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa’ inn panin Uriah paikhia a, kumpipa kiang panin letsong khat in amah zui hi." 
2Samuel11:9 Ahih hangin Uriah a topa’ nasemte khempeuh tawh kumpipa’ kongpi gei-ah lum a, ama inn-ah ciahsuk lo hi." 
2Samuel11:10 “Uriah a inn-ah ciahsuk lo hi,” ci-in amaute in David kiangah a gen uh ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Khualzin a hong tung hi lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin na inn-ah ciahsuk lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:11 Uriah in David kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang, Israel-te, le Judah mite gal sungah om uh a, ka topa Joab le ka topa’ nasemte gamlakah giak uh hi. Tua ahih manin an ne tuidawn ding le ka zi tawh a lum dingin ka inn-ah ciahsuk ding ka hi hiam? Nangmah na hin mah bangin, hih bang ka gamta het kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:12 Tua ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Hih lai-ah tuni zong om inla, zing ciangin nang kong paikhiasak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Uriah zong tua zan le a zing ciang Jerusalem-ah om hi." 
2Samuel11:13 David in amah samin ama omna-ah zu le an nesak a, amah zu khamsak hi. A nitak ciangin amah a lum dingin a topa’ nasemte tawh paikhia a, ahih hangin ama inn-ah ciahsuk tuan lo hi." 
2Samuel11:14 Zingsang ciangin David in Joab kiangah lai khat gelh a, Uriah khut tungah a lai khak hi." 
2Samuel11:15 A lai sungah, “Galsim a haksatna penah a madawkin Uriah koih inla, amah kivat tukin a sihtheih nadingin ama kiang panin nungkik un,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
2Samuel11:16 Joab in khuapi a umcih ciangin mi a hangte om hi, ci-in a theihna munah Uriah a seh hi." 
2Samuel11:17 Khuapi mite hong kuankhia-in Joab tawh kido uh hi. Mite’ lakah David’ nasemte pawlkhat si hi. Hit mi Uriah zong kithat hi. 
2Samuel11:18 Tua ciangin Joab in mi sawlin galkidona thu khempeuh David kiangah a gen hi. 
2Samuel11:19 Amah in kamtai pa thu hilhin, “Galkidona thu khempeuh kumpipa kiangah na gen khit ciangin," 
2Samuel11:20 kumpipa a heh suakin amah in nangma kiangah, ‘A sim dingin khuapi-ah tua zahin a nai-in pai na hi uh hiam? Kulh tung panin hong kap ding uh thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubbesheth’ tapa Ahimelek kua in that hiam? Numei khat in angawina suangpek tungnung kulh tung pan ama tungah khiatsukin Thebez-ah amah si hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua zahin kulh nai-ah pai na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh nangmah in, ‘Hit mi na nasempa Uriah zong si hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:22 Tua ahih ciangin kamtai pa pai a, hong tungin a gen dingin Joab in a sawl thu khempeuh David kiangah a gen hi." 
2Samuel11:23 Kamtai pa in David kiangah, “Mite in kote hong zothawhin gamlakah kote a do dingin hong kuankhia uh hi. Ahih hangin kote in kulhkongpi lutna dongah amaute ka notkik uh hi." 
2Samuel11:24 Tua ciangin thaltawite in kulh tung panin na nasemte hong kap uh a, kumpipa’ nasem pawlkhat si hi. Hit mi na nasempa Uriah zong si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:25 David in kamtai pa kiangah, “Joab kiangah hih bangin na gen in: ‘Hih thu hangin nangmah kilungkhamsak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau in koi lai panin hong vat ding cih a kimatheih lo mah ahi hi. Khuapi na simna hanciamin lumlet in,’ ci-in Joab hanthawn in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:26 Uriah’ zi in a pasal a sihna thu a zak ciangin a pasal’ hangin kap hi. 
2Samuel11:27 A kahna a ven’ ciangin David in mi sawlin ama inn-ah tua nu lasak a, tua nu ama zi suakin, amah tawh tapa khat a nei hi. Ahih hangin David’ gamtatna thu in Topa lungkim lo sak hi." 
2Samuel12:1 Tua ciangin Topa in David kiangah kamsang Nathan sawl hi. Amah hong pai-in David kiangah, “Khuapi khat sungah mi nih om a, khat hau-in a khat zawng hi." 
2Samuel12:2 A hau pa in tuuhon le bawnghon tampi nei hi. 
2Samuel12:3 Ahih hangin a zawng pa in bangmah nei lo a, a leisa tuuno a nu khat bek nei hi. Amah in tua tuuno khoi a, amah le a tate tawh khangkhawm hi. Ama an ne-in a hai panin dawn a, ama ang sungah lum a, ama a dingin tanu tawh kibang hi." 
2Samuel12:4 Tu-in mihau pa’ inn-ah zin khat hong tung a, amah in a tuuhon ahi a, a bawnghon pan ahi zongin ama kiangah a tung khualzin pa a dingin a gawh ding la nuam loin mizawng pa’ tuuno laksak a, ama kianga a tung mipa a dingin a gawhsak hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:5 Tua ciangin tua mipa’ tungah David sinso mahmah hi. Amah in Nathan kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih banga a gamta mipa a sih ding kilawm hi." 
2Samuel12:6 Amah hih bangin gamta a, amah in hehpihna nei lo ahih manin a tuuno a zah li-in loh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:7 Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “Nang pen tua mipa na hi hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilhin Saul’ khutsung panin nang kong honkhia hi." 
2Samuel12:8 Keimah in na topa’ inn le na topa’ zite na khut sungah kong pia a, Israel-te le Judah mite nang kong pia hi. Hihte a tawmlua hileh tua zah nih a hong pia khin ding ka hi hi." 
2Samuel12:9 Ama muhna-ah a sia a gamta dingin bang hangin Topa’ thu simmawh na hi hiam? Nangmah in Hit mi Uriah namsau tawh vatin, ama zi nangma zi dingin na la a, Ammon mite’ namsau tawh amah na that khin hi." 
2Samuel12:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangmah in kei hong simmawhin Hit mi Uriah’ zi nangma zi dingin la khin na hih manin na inn sungah namsau tawh kidona veng ngei lo ding hi,’ ci hi." 
2Samuel12:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En in, keimah in nangma innkuan sung panin nangma langah siatna a piangsak ding khat ka khangsak ding hi. Na zite na muhin la-in na vengpa’ tungah ka pia ding a, amah in sun nitaang sungah na zite luppih ding hi." 
2Samuel12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in a simthamin na hih hi; ahih hangin keimah in Israel-te khempeuh’ muh dingin suntangpi-in ka hih ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:13 David in hih thu a zak ciangin Nathan kiangah, “ Topa’ tungah ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “ Topa in zong na khialhna hong maisak khinzo hi; nang na si kei ding hi." 
2Samuel12:14 Ahi zongin, hih bangin gamtatna tawh Topa thusim peuhmah lo na hih manin nang’ sung panin a hong piang naungek si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:15 Tua ciangin Nathan a inn-ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin Uriah’ zi in David tawh a neih naungek Topa in vat a, a ci hong na hi." 
2Samuel12:16 Tua ahih ciangin David in naungek a dingin Pasian’ tungah thum hi. David in an tangin zan tawntung leilakah a lum hi. 
2Samuel12:17 Tua ciangin leilak panin a phong dingin a innsung upate ama kiangah ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amah tho lo a, amaute tawh an zong ne nuam lo hi." 
2Samuel12:18 A ni sagih ni-in naungek si hi. Ama kiangah, naungek si hi, ci-in a gen ding uh David’ nasemte lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Naungek a hinlai nangawnin amah i hopih hangin i thu hong ngai lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in ama kiangah, naungek si, ci ngam ding ihi hiam? Amahmah kisusia kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:19 Ahih hangin ama nasemte a kihuauna uh David in a muh ciangin naungek si hi, ci-in a thei hi. Tua ciangin David in a nasemte kiangah, “Naungek si ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amah si ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:20 Tua ciangin David leilak panin tho-in kisil a, sathau nilhin a puante khek a, Topa’ inn-ah pai-in Pasian a bia hi. Tua ciangin ama inn-ah ciah hi. An a nget ciangin amaute in a mai-ah lui uh a, amah in a ne hi." 
2Samuel12:21 Tua ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih banga na gamtatna a bangci hiam? Naungek a hin lai-in an tangin na kap hi; ahih hangin naungek a sih ciangin tho-in an na ne zawsop hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:22 Amah in, “Naungek a hin lai-in an tangin ka kap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Naungek a hin nadingin Topa in kei hong hehpih ding hiam, hong hehpih lo ding hiam, cih kua in theikhol ahi hiam?’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel12:23 Ahih hangin tu-in amah si ta hi; bang hangin an tang nawn ding ka hi hiam? Amah lakik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ama kiangah kei ka pai ding a, ahih hangin kei kiangah amah hong kik lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:24 Tua ciangin David in a zi Bathsheba hehnem a, ama kiangah pai-in amah tawh a lumkhawm hi. Tua nu in tapa khat nei a, a min Solomon a phuak hi. Topa in tua naupang it ahih manin," 
2Samuel12:25 kamsang Nathan’ tungah thu puak hi. Topa’ itna hangin ama min Jedidiah a phuah ding a gen hi. 
2Samuel12:26 Tu-in Joab in Ammon khuapi Rabbah simin a khuapi tuikhuk la hi. 
2Samuel12:27 Joab in David kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Rabbah khuapi ka sim a, a khuapi tuikhuk ka la khin hi." 
2Samuel12:28 Tua ahih ciangin mi a omlaiteng kaikhawm inla, khuapi langah phual satin khuapi la in; tua hikeileh keimah in khuapi la-in keima min pua kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:29 Tua ahih ciangin David in mi khempeuh kaikhawmin Rabbah-ah pai a, tua khuapi simin a la hi." 
2Samuel12:30 Tua ciangin amah in amau’ pasian Molek lu tungah a om lukhu a laksak hi. Tua lukhu kham talen khat gik a, a sungah suangmanpha khat om hi. David’ kumpi lukhu tungah tua suangmanpha kikoih hi. Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sunga vankinusiate tampi tak paikhiatpih hi." 
2Samuel12:31 Amah in a sunga om mite paikhiatpihin singatnate, tuzumte, le heite tawh na a sem dingin koih a, leiseek seekna-ah amaute na semsak hi. Tua bangin Ammon mite’ khuapi khempeuh a hih hi. Tua ciangin David le mi khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciah uh hi." 
2Samuel13:1 Tu-in David’ tapa Absalom in Tamar min nei sanggam numei a melhoih mahmah khat nei hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin David’ tapa Ammon in tua nu ngai hi. 
2Samuel13:2 Ammon in ngailua mahmah ahih manin a sanggamnu Tamar hangin cinat lawh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nungak le tangval kituam omsak ahih manin Ammon in tua nu a muhtheih nading omtheih tuaklo hi. 
2Samuel13:3 Ahih hangin Ammon in David’ sanggampa Shimeah’ tapa Jonadab min nei lawmpa khat nei a, Jonadab pen mi tei mahmah khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel13:4 Amah in Ammon kiangah, “Kumpipa’ tapa aw, bang hangin zingsang khat khit zingsang khat thakiam semsem na hi hiam? Kei kiangah a hang hong gen lo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Ammon in ama kiangah, “Ka sanggampa Absalom’ sanggamnu Tamar ka ngai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadab in ama kiangah, “Na lupna tungah lum inla, a cina kineih in. Nangmah a veh dingin na pa hong pai ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Keimah in mu-in ama khut panin an ka nek theih nadingin ka sanggamnu Tamar hong paisakin annek ding hong piasak inla, ka muhna-ah an hong bawl sak in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:6 Tua ahih ciangin Ammon lumin a cina kineih hi. Amah a en dingin kumpipa a pai ciangin Ammon in kumpipa kiangah, “Ama khut panin ka nek theih nadingin ka sanggamnu Tamar hong paisakin mohpheng nih khawng na bawlsak nading kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:7 Tua ciangin David in inn-a Tamar kiangah mi sawlin, “Na sanggampa Ammon’ inn-ah pai-in ama a’ ding an bawlsak in,” cisak hi." 
2Samuel13:8 Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampa Ammon lumin a omna mun a inn-ah Tamar pai hi. Amah in annel lom la-in meek a, ama muhna-ah mohphengte bawlin a em hi." 
2Samuel13:9 Tua ciangin amah in sikbeeldai la-in ama mai-ah sungkhia a, ahih hangin amah in ne nuam lo hi. Tua ciangin Ammon in, “Kei kiang panin mi khempeuh sawlkhia masa in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama kiang panin mi khempeuh paikhia hi." 
2Samuel13:10 Tua ciangin Ammon in Tamar kiangah, “Na khut tung panin ka nek theih nadingin inndei sungah an hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tamar in a bawlsa mohphengte la-in inndei sung a sanggampa Ammon kiangah paipih hi." 
2Samuel13:11 Ahih hangin amah in a nek dingin ama kiang nai-ah a paipih ciangin, amah in tua numei lenin ama kiangah, “Hong pai in; kei tawh hong lum in ka sanggamnu aw,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:12 Amah in dawngin, “Hilo hi, ka sanggampa aw, kei hong thatang hih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel sungah tua bangin kigamta lo hi. Hih bangin hai gamtat lua kei in." 
2Samuel13:13 Keimah in ka maizumna koi-ah seelcipzo ding ka hi hiam? Nang zong, Israel-te sungah mihai luate khat bang na hi ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi, kumpipa kiangah gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nang a dingin kei hong khaktan lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:14 Ahih hangin amah in a thugen ngai lo hi. Amah sangin hatzaw ahih manin thatanghat thu tawh hihin amah luppih hi. 
2Samuel13:15 Tua ciangin Ammon in nakpitakin Tamar mudah hi. Amah in a cil-a a itna zah sangin a muhdahna lianzaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin Ammon in ama kiangah, “Ding in, paikhia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:16 Ahih hangin a numei in ama kiangah, “Hilo hi, ka sanggampa aw; bang hang hiam cih leh kei nong sawlkhiatna pen kei tungah nong hihsa thu sangin lianzaw hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a thu ngai lo hi." 
2Samuel13:17 Amah in a nasem tangvalpa samin, “Ka omna panin hih numei koihkhia inla, ama nungah kongkhak kalh in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:18 Tua nu in puantualpi ban nei khat silh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa’ tanute in tua bangin puan silh hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nasempa in tua nu koihkhia-in ama nungah kongkhak kalh hi. 
2Samuel13:19 Tua ciangin Tamar in a lu tungah vut koihin ama silh puantualpi bansau balkek hi. Tua ciangin a lu tungah a khut koihin paikhia a, a paikawmin a gingin a kap hi." 
2Samuel13:20 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Absalom in ama kiangah, “Na sanggampa Ammon in nang hong bawlsia ahi hiam? Bangbang hitaleh kilungnuamsak in, ka sanggamnu aw; amah pen na sanggampa ahi hi; hih thu na lungsimah koih kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampa Absalom’ inn-ah Tamar lungzuang khawngai-in a om hi." 
2Samuel13:21 Kumpi David in hih thute khempeuh a zak ciangin heh mahmah hi. 
2Samuel13:22 Absalom in Ammon kiangah a pha ahi a, a sia ahi zongin bangmah gen vet lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a sanggamnu Tamar thatanghat thu tawh hih ahih manin Absalom in Ammon mudah lua mahmah hi." 
2Samuel13:23 Tua zawh kum nih bit khit ciangin Absalom in Efraim nai-a om Baalhazor-ah tuumul mette khawm a, Absalom in kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh sam hi." 
2Samuel13:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Absalom hong pai-in, “En in, na nasempa in tuumul mette khawm hi; kumpipa le a nasemte na nasempa tawh nong pai ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in Absalom kiangah, “Hilo hi, ka tapa aw; i vekpi-in pai kei ni; pai lehang kote pen nang a dingin vangik ka hi kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amah in ci teitei a, ahih hangin amah pai nuam loin ama thupha a tungah a pia hi." 
2Samuel13:26 Tua ciangin Absalom in, “Tua bang hi lo ding ahihleh ka sanggampa Ammon kote tawh nong paisak ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nang tawh amah hong pai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:27 Ahih hangin Absalom in Ammon le kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh amah tawh a paisak mateng ci teitei hi. 
2Samuel13:28 Tua ciangin Absalom in a nasemte thu pia a, “Ammon in zu a kham hun phawk unla, note kiangah, ‘Ammon sat un,’ kong cih ciangin amah that un. Lau kei un; note thu hong pia khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Hang unla, thahat un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:29 Tua ahih ciangin Absalom’ nasemte in ama thupiaksa bangin Ammon hih uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh dingin a la tung ciat uhah tuangin a tai uh hi. 
2Samuel13:30 Amaute lamkalah a om laitakin David kiangah thu tung a, “Absalom in kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh that a, khat beek siit lo hi,” kici hi." 
2Samuel13:31 Tua ciangin kumpipa ding a, a puante balkekin leilakah a lum hi. A kianga om a nasemte khempeuh in zong a puan uh balkek uh hi." 
2Samuel13:32 Ahih hangin David’ sanggampa Shimeah’ tapa Jonadab in, “Amaute in kumpipa’ tapa tangvalte khempeuh that hi, ci-in ka topa in ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon bek si hi. Amah in a sanggamnu Tamar thatanghat thu tawh a hih ni a kipanin Absalom’ thupiakna tawh hih thu a kisehkhol ahi hi." 
2Samuel13:33 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh si hi, ci-in ka topa in ngaihsunin na lungsimah koih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon bek si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:34 Tua kikal sungin Absalom tai hi. Tua ciangin galvil tangvalpa a khuadak leh, mualpang nai Horonaim lampi panin mihon hong pai a mu hi." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab in kumpipa kiangah, “En in, kumpipa’ tapate hong tungzo hi. Na nasempa’ gen bangin hong piang takpi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:36 Amah in a thugen a man khit phetin, kumpipa’ tapate hong tungin hong kap uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa zong a nasemte khempeuh tawh nakpitakin a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel13:37 Ahih hangin Absalom tai-in Geshur kumpipa Ammihud’ tapa Talmai kiangah tung hi. Ni tampi sung David a tapa’ hangin a thum hi. 
2Samuel13:38 Absalom ahihleh Geshur-ah pai a, tua lai-ah kum thum sung a om hi." 
2Samuel13:39 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom ngai-in hong mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah si hi, ci-in thei khin ahih manin Ammon’ thu-ah kihehnem khin hi." 
2Samuel14:1 Tu-in kumpipa in Absalom a ngaihna thu Zeruiah’ tapa Joab in a phawk hi. 
2Samuel14:2 Tua ahih ciangin Joab in Tekoa-ah mi sawlin tua panin numei pil khat la-in ama kiangah, “Dahin a kap kineih inla, dahna lim puante silh in. Sathau nilh kei inla, misi hangin ni tampi a thum khin numei bangin gamta in." 
2Samuel14:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah pai inla, hih bangin ama kiangah thu gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in ama gen ding thute a hilh hi." 
2Samuel14:4 Kumpipa kiangah Tekoa numei a pai ciangin lei-ah maipukin zahtakna bawl a, “Hong huh in! Aw kumpipa,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Na lungkhamna bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kalai, ka pasal si ta a, meigong numei khat ka hi hi." 
2Samuel14:6 Na nasemnu in tapa nih nei a, lo sungah amau tegel kitawng uh hi. Amau tegel a khen ding kuamah om lo a, khat in a khat pa satin that hi." 
2Samuel14:7 Tu-in ka beh buppi na nasemnu’ langah hong pangin amaute in, ‘Ama thah a sanggampa’ nuntakna tangin amah ka thah theih nadingun a sanggampa a sat mipa hong pia in,’ hong ci uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in innluah pa zong susia ding uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in a omlai ka lametna pa beisakin leitungah ka pasal’ suanlekhak a suakta omsak lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:8 Tua ciangin kumpipa in tua numei kiangah, “Na inn-ah ciah in; nang tawh kisai-in thu ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:9 Tua ciangin Tekoa numei in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa aw, keima tung le ka innkuan tungah mawhna om ta hen; kumpipa le a tokhom mawhpeng ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:10 Kumpipa in, “Nang’ tungah mi khatpeuh in thu khatpeuh hong gen leh kei kiangah amah hong paipih in; amah in nang hong sukik ngei nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:11 Tua ciangin amah in, “Phulapa in that nawn loin, ka tapa a kisuksiat loh nadingin kumpipa in Topa na Pasian’ tungah na kiciam ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin na tapa’ samzang khat zong lei-ah kialo ding hi,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
2Samuel14:12 Tua ciangin a numei in, “Ka to kumpipa tungah na nasemnu kam khat hong gensak in, ci-in kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:13 Tua ciangin a numei in, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin Pasian’ mite’ langah tua bang na hih sawm na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bang lungsim khentatna na piakna-ah kumpipa in a hawlkhiatna a inn-ah a paipih kik mateng kumpipa amahmah mawh a kipia ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:14 Eite khempeuh i si ding a, a kikhawm kik thei lo leilakah a bua tui tawh i kibang hi. Ahih hangin a hawlkhiat pa a kipuasehin a kikoih loh nadingin lampi a zong mipa’ nuntakna Pasian in lakhia lo ding hi." 
2Samuel14:15 Mite in kei hong lausak ahih manin tu-in ka to kumpipa kiangah hih thu a gen dingin kong pai hi. Na nasemnu in, ‘Kumpipa kiangah thu ka gen ding a, kumpipa in a nasemnu’ ngetna sem kha ding hi." 
2Samuel14:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in za-in, Pasian’ gamh panin kei le ka tapa hong susia khawm ding mipa’ khut panin a nasemnu honkhia ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
2Samuel14:17 Na nasemnu in, ‘Ka to kumpipa’ kammal in nopsakna hong pia ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipa pen a pha le a sia a khenthei dingin Pasian’ vantungmi tawh kibang hi. Topa na Pasian in nang hong ompih ta hen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a numei dawngin, “Nang kong dot peuhpeuh hong im kei in,” a ci hi. A numei in, “Ka to kumpipa in gen hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:19 Kumpipa in, “Hih thu khempeuh Joab’ vaihawmna tawh hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. A numei in dawngin, “Nang a nungta taktak na hih mah bangin ka to kumpipa aw, ka to kumpipa’ gen bang teekteek mah ahi hi. Kei hong sawl pa pen na nasempa Joab hi a, na nasemnu’ gen dingin hih thute a hong sawl pa amah ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:20 Na thu paizia khek nadingin na nasempa Joab in hih thu hih hi. Ahih hangin ka topa in leitung a om na khempeuh theih nadingin Pasian’ vantungmi pilna tawh a kibang pilna na nei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:21 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Joab kiangah, “Tu-in en in, hih thu kong pia hi; pai in, tangvalpa Absalom hong ciahpih kik in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:22 Tua ciangin Joab lei-ah maipuksuk a, zahtakna bawlin kumpipa thupha a pia hi. Tua ciangin Joab in, “Kumpipa in a nasempa’ ngetna a piakna-ah, tuni-in ka to kumpipa nangma muhna-ah maipha ka muhna na nasempa in ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:23 Tua ahih ciangin Joab dingin Geshur-ah pai a, Jerusalem-ah Absalom a ciahpih hi." 
2Samuel14:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Ama inn-ah amah tuam tensak in; keima omna-ah amah hong pai lo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom ama inn-ah tuam tenin kumpipa omna-ah pai lo hi." 
2Samuel14:25 Tu-in Israel-te khempeuh sungah a melhoihna hangin Absalom zahin tua bangin phat ding kuamah om lo hi. A khenuai a kipan a luzang dongin ama tungah paubaanna om lo hi. 
2Samuel14:26 Amah in a sam a met ciangin (kum bei simin amah in met zel hi; a sam a gih ciangin amah in met hi), amah in a sam tawi khai a, kumpipa’ gik tehna-in shekel zanih a gik hi." 
2Samuel14:27 Absalom’ sung pan tapa thum, le a min Tamar ahi ta numei khat a suak hi; tua nu pen a melhoih mahmah khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:28 Tua hi a, kumpipa’ omna-ah pai loin Absalom kum nih bit Jerusalem-ah teng hi." 
2Samuel14:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah a sawl dingin Absalom in Joab samsak hi. Ahih hangin ama kiangah Joab hong pai lo hi. Amah in a nih veina sawl a, ahih hangin Joab hong pai lo veve hi." 
2Samuel14:30 Tua ciangin amah in a nasemte kiangah, “En un, Joab’ lo pen keima-a’ zom hi a, tua lai-ah amah in mangbuhham nei hi; pai unla mei tawh va hal un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom’ nasemte in a lo mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
2Samuel14:31 Tua ciangin Joab dingin Absalom’ kiang ama inn-ah pai-in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasemte in mei tawh ka lo hong halsak ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:32 Absalom in Joab dawngin, “En in, nang kiangah thu kong puak a, ‘Kumpipa kiangah nang hong sawlin, “Bang hangin Geshur panin hong pai ka hi hiam? Tua lai-ah omlai leng kei a dingin hoihzaw ding hi,” ci-in a va dong dingin hih lai-ah nong pai nading kong gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kumpipa omna-ah kei hong paisak in; kei tungah mawhna a om leh amah hong thatsak in,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:33 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Joab pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom sam hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kumpipa kiangah hong pai a, a mai lei ngatin kumpipa’ mai-ah a kun hi; tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom a nam hi." 
2Samuel15:1 Hih hun khit ciangin Absalom in leeng khat le sakolte, le ama mai-ah a tai ding mi sawmnga la hi." 
2Samuel15:2 Absalom tho baihin kulhkongpi lam gei-ah tu zel hi. Mi khatpeuh in thu khensak dingin kumpipa’ mai-ah pai nading thu a neih ciangin Absalom in amah samin, “Koi khua pan na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasempa, Israel-te sungah tua minam tua khua ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
2Samuel15:3 Absalom in ama kiangah, “Thei in, na thugente hoihin man hi; ahih hangin na thu a khen dingin kumpipa in a koih mi om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:4 Tua tham loin Absalom in, “Gam sungah kei thukhen hi leng! Thu ahi a, a hang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah kei kiangah hong pai ding a, keimah in ama tungah thu a tangin ka khen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:5 Ama tungah zahtakna a bawl dingin mi khatpeuh a nai-ah hong pai ciangin amah in a khut zan a, amah lenin a nam hi." 
2Samuel15:6 Tua bangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah thu a khensak dingin a hong pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah a hih hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom in Israel mite’ lungsim na zo hi. 
2Samuel15:7 Kum li a cin ciangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei hong paisak inla, Topa’ tungah ka ciamsa ka thuciam, Hebron-ah hong piasak in, ci-in kong thum hi." 
2Samuel15:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Aram gam Geshur-ah ka om laitakin na nasempa in thu khat ciam a, ‘ Topa in Jerusalem-ah kei hong paipih kik taktak leh Topa’ tungah biakna ka pia ding hi,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:9 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Nuamtakin pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin Hebron-ah a pai hi." 
2Samuel15:10 Ahih hangin Absalom in Israel minam khempeuh kiangah a simthamin kamtaite sawl a, “Peengkul aw na zak phetun, ‘Absalom, Hebron-ah kumpi hi!’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:11 A kisam mi za nihte Jerusalem panin Absalom tawh a pai uh hi. Amaute lungsim hoih tawh a pai hi a, bangmah thei lo uh hi." 
2Samuel15:12 Absalom in biakna a piak laitakin David’ thulamlak pa, Giloh mi Ahithofel, ama khuapi Gilo panin samsak hi. Tua ciangin sawmsimna hong hat semsem a, Absalom tawh a om mite kibehlaplap hi." 
2Samuel15:13 Tua ciangin kamtai khat David kiangah hong pai-in, “Israel mite’ lungsim Absalom’ lamah pai khin hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
2Samuel15:14 Tua ciangin David in Jerusalem-ah amah tawh a om a nasemte khempeuh kiangah, “Ding un, tai ni; tua hikeileh Absalom’ kiang panin eite’ suahtak nading om lo ding hi. Manlangin pai ni; tua hikeileh amah in eite hong pha pak ding a, eite’ tungah siatna hong tungsakin namsau tawh khuapi hong vat ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:15 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, ka to kumpipa in na khensat peuhpeuh a sem dingin na nasemte kiging hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel15:16 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, ama innkuan le a ulian khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Kumpipa in inn kem dingin a zineu sawm nusia hi." 
2Samuel15:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, mi khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Tua ciangin khuanawl inn tawpna-ah amaute khawl uh hi." 
2Samuel15:18 Tua ciangin a nasemte khempeuh in amah nawkin pai uh hi. Khereth mi khempeuh, Peleth mi khempeuh, le Gath panin amah a zui mi za gukte khempeuh, kumpipa’ mai nawkin paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel15:19 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Gath mi Ittai kiangah, “Bang hangin nang zong kote hong zui na hi hiam? Ciahkik inla, kumpipa tawh om in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen gamdang mi na hi a, na inn panin gam dangah a om zong na hi hi." 
2Samuel15:20 Nang pen zan mah beka hong pai na hi hi. Koi lai munah kei pai ding cih thei lopi-in kote tawh a kawivak dingin nang hong bawl ding ka hi hiam? Ciahkik in, na sanggamte ciahpih in. Topa in itna kip le thumanna nang’ tungah hong lak ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:21 Ahih hangin Ittai in kumpipa dawngin, “ Topa nungta-in, ka to kumpipa zong nungta ahih mah bangin, sih nading ahi a, hin nading ahi zongin ka to kumpipa a omna peuhpeuhah na nasempa om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:22 Tua ciangin David in Ittai kiangah, “Tua ahihleh pai in, paisuak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Gath mi Ittai, a mi khempeuh le amah tawh a om a naupang khempeuh tawh a paisuak hi." 
2Samuel15:23 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh a pai laitakin gam sung mi khempeuh a gingin kapkhia uh a, kumpipa in Kidron lui kantanin, mi khempeuh zong gamlak lamah a paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel15:24 Tua ciangin Abiathar hong paito a, Zadok zong Levi mi khempeuh tawh hong pai-in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang hong pua uh hi. Mi khempeuh in khuapi a khen’ khit mateng amaute in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang nga phot uh hi." 
2Samuel15:25 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Zadok kiangah, “Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang khuapi sungah puakik in. Topa’ maipha ka muh nakleh, amah in kei hong paipih kikin Thuciamna Singkuang le a omna mun hong musakkik ding hi." 
2Samuel15:26 Ahih hangin amah in, ‘Na tungah lungkimna ka nei kei hi,’ hong cih leh, en in, hih lai-ah kei ka om hi; amah in hoih a sak bangin kei tungah hong bawl hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:27 Kumpipa in siampi Zadok kiangah, “En in, nuamtakin nang le Abiathar, na tapa nihte Ahimaaz le Abiathar’ tapa Jonathan tawh khuapi sungah ciahkik un." 
2Samuel15:28 Thei in, kei kiangah thu a hong zasak dingin nang’ kiang panin thuko mi hong tun mateng gamlak tui ngahmunte-ah ka na ngak ding hi,” cithuah lai hi." 
2Samuel15:29 Tua ahih ciangin Zadok le Abiathar in Pasian’ Thuciamna Singkuang Jerusalem-ah puakik uh a, amaute tua lai-ah om uh hi." 
2Samuel15:30 Ahih hangin Oliv Mual tung kahtohna-ah David paito a, khe guak le lu tuamsa-in a paikawmin kap hi. Amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lu khuhsa-in a paitoh kawmun a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel15:31 Tua laitakin David kiangah, “Ahithofel zong mi sawmsimte lakah Absalom tawh om hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; Ahithofel’ thugente haina-in na heisak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:32 Pasian a kibiakna mun mual dawnah David a tun ciangin, Arkhi mi Hushai amah a dawn dingin a puantungsilh balkeksa le a lu tungah lei baang tawh hong pai hi." 
2Samuel15:33 David in ama kiangah, “Nang hong zuisuak lecin kei a dingin vangik na hi ding hi." 
2Samuel15:34 Ahih hangin khuapi sungah nang ciahkikin Absalom kiangah, ‘Aw kumpipa, kei, nangma nasem ka hi ding hi. Hun beisa sungah na pa’ nasem ka hih mah bangin tu-in nangma nasem ka hi ding hi,’ ci lecin, Ahithofel’ thugente kei a dingin na zo ding hi." 
2Samuel15:35 Siampi Zadok le Abiathar tua lai-ah nang tawh om hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ inn pan na zak peuhpeuh siampi Zadok le Abiathar’ kiangah gen in. 
2Samuel15:36 En in, amau’ tapa tegel, Zadok’ tapa Ahimaaz le Abiathar’ tapa Jonathan, amaute tawh omkhawm hi. Na zak peuhpeuh amaute’ tungtawnin kei tungah nong puak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:37 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah Absalom a lut laitakin David’ lawmpa Hushai zong khuapi sungah a pai hi. 
2Samuel16:1 David in mual dawn a khen’ khit tawmvei ciangin Mefibosheth nasempa Ziba in anlum zanih, leenggah phehkeu bawk zakhat, khuakhal singgah zakhat le leenggahzu savun um khat a pua van a kivawh la nih tawh amah na dawn hi." 
2Samuel16:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ziba kiangah, “Bang hangin hihte hong paipih na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in dawngin, “Late pen kumpipa’ innkuante a tuan nading, anlum le khuakhal singgahte pen tangvalte’ nek ding, le leenggahzu pen gamlakah a gimte’ dawn ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Na topa Saul’ tupa koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Amah Jerusalem-ah om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Tuni-in Israel mite in ka pu Saul’ kumpi gam kei hong piakik ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ziba kiangah, “En in, Mefibosheth’ neihsa khempeuh tu-in nangma a’ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ziba in, “Kei, nangma nasempa ka hi hi; ka to kumpipa’ muhna-ah maipha hong musak tawntung in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:5 Bahurim-ah Kumpi David a tun ciangin Saul’ innsung innkuan mi, Gera’ tapa Shimei min nei mi khat hong paikhia a, a paikawmin David samsia tawntung hi." 
2Samuel16:6 Amah in Kumpi David le a nasemte khempeuh suang tawh deng hi. Mi khempeuh le mi thahatte khempeuh David’ taklam le veilamah om uh hi. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei in a samsiat kawmin, “Pai mang, pai mang, nang mi that pa, bangmah man lo mipa!" 
2Samuel16:8 Ama tangin na uk Saul’ innkuante na thahna hangin Topa in nangma tungah hong thuk hi. Topa in na tapa Absalom’ tungah kumpi gam pia khinta hi. Thei in, na siatna nangma lu tungah hong tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen mi that pa na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:9 Tua ciangin a nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai in kumpipa kiangah, “Bang hangin hih uisi a banglel mi khat in ka to kumpipa samsia ding ahi hiam? Hong kuansak inla a lu hong tankhiasak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:10 Ahih hangin kumpipa in, “No Zeruiah tapate aw, note tawh bang kisai ahi hiam? Topa in ama kiangah, ‘David samsia in,’ a cihna hangin hong samsia ahihleh, ‘Bang hangin tuaci hih na hi hiam?’ kua in ci ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:11 Tua ciangin David in Abishai le a nasemte khempeuh kiangah, “En un, keima tapa mahmah in kei thah dingin hong zong hi; hih Benjamin mi in bangzahin tu-in hong zongzaw kan ding ahi hiam! Ama thu-in omsak un, amah hong samsiasak un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah a sawl hi kha ding hi." 
2Samuel16:12 Topa in ka thuakna hong enin, tuni-a kei hong samsiatna hangin Topa in a hoih tawh kei hong thuk kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama galkhat mualpangah Shimei pai a, a paikawmin samsia-in suang tawh amah dengin leivui a theh laitakin David le a mite lampi-ah pai uh hi." 
2Samuel16:14 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om mi khempeuhte gim mahmahin Jordan tung uh a, tua lai-ah amah kitawldamsak hi." 
2Samuel16:15 Tu-in Absalom le Israel mite khempeuh Jerusalem hong tung uh a, Ahithofel amah tawh om hi." 
2Samuel16:16 Tua ciangin David lam a lak pa, Arkhi mi Hushai, Absalom kiangah hong tun ciangin Hushai in Absalom’ kiangah, “Kumpipa khan sawt ta hen! Kumpipa khan sawt ta hen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:17 Absalom in Hushai kiangah, “Hih bang pen na lawmpa tungah thumanna ahi hiam? Bang hangin na lawmpa tawh pai lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai in Absalom kiangah, “Hilo hi; Topa le hih mite le Israel mite khempeuh a dingin a kiteel mipa a’ ka hi ding a, amah tawh ka om ding hi." 
2Samuel16:19 Tua banah, kua’ na sem ding ka hi hiam? Ama’ tapa hi lo ding ahi hiam? Na pa’ na ka sep bangin nangma na ka sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:20 Tua ciangin Absalom in Ahithofel kiangah, “Na ngaihsutna hong gen in; bang hih ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofel in Absalom’ kiangah, “Inn kem dingin a nusiat na pa’ zineute luppih in; tua ciangin nangmah in na pa na muhdah bawlna thu Israel-te khempeuh in za-in nangmah tawh a om mite khempeuh’ tha khauhsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:22 Tua ciangin amaute in innkhumzangah Absalom a dingin puanbuk khat lam uh a, Israel-te khempeuh’ muhna-ah Absalom in a pa’ zineute luppih hi." 
2Samuel16:23 Tua hun lai-in Ahithofel’ thugente pen Pasian’ kammal mahmah bangin kingaihsun hi. Tua bangin David le Absalom in Ahithofel’ thugente a thupi ngaihsut uh ahi hi. 
2Samuel17:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin Ahithofel in Absalom kiangah, “Mi tul sawm le tulnih hong teelsak in; keimah kuankhia-in tuzanin David ka delh ding hi." 
2Samuel17:2 Amah gimin lungkia-in a om laitakin amah ka hih ding a, amah ka amkhamsak ding hi. Tua hileh amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tai ding uh hi. Keimah in kumpipa bek ka satpuk ding a," 
2Samuel17:3 mothak in a pasal kiang a zuatkik mah bangin mi khempeuh nang kiangah kong ciahpih kik ding hi. Nangmah in mi khat bek’ nuntakna na zong hi; midang khempeuh nuamtakin om ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:4 Tua thugenna in Absalom le Israel upate khempeuh lungkimsak hi. 
2Samuel17:5 Tua ciangin Absalom in, “Arkhi mi Hushai zong sam un; ama thugen ngai phot ni,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:6 Absalom kiangah Hushai hong pai ciangin Absalom in ama kiangah, “Tua bangin Ahithofel in thu gen hi; ama genna bangin i hih ding hiam? Tua ahih kei leh nang gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:7 Tua ciangin Hushai in Absalom kiangah, “Tutungin Ahithofel’ thugen hoih lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:8 Tua banah Hushai in, “Na pa le a mite mi thahat hi a, gamlakah a note a kilaksak vompi bangin amaute a hehna na thei hi. Tua banah na pa galdona lamsang a siam hi a, mite tawh zanin amah om khawm lo ding hi." 
2Samuel17:9 Tu nangawnin amah dum khat sungah ahi a, mundang khatah ahi zongin bu khin ding hi. Kisim cilna-ah mi pawlkhat si leh tua thu a za mi peuhpeuh in, ‘Absalom a zui mite lakah a si om khin hi,’ ci ding hi." 
2Samuel17:10 Tua ciangin a lungtang humpinelkai lungtang a bang galhang mipa nangawn launa tawh lungkia gawp ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te khempeuh in na pa mi thahat ahihna le amah tawh a om mite mi hang ahihna thei uh hi. 
2Samuel17:11 Ahih hangin keima ngaihsutna hih bang ahi hi: Dan panin Beersheba ciang dong, tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin a tam Israel mi khempeuh nang kiangah khawmin galsim dingin nangmahmah na kuan ding hi." 
2Samuel17:12 Tua ciangin amah i muhna mun khat peuhpeuhah theihkholh lohin i hihgawp ding hi. Amah le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh khat zong kisiit lo ding hi. 
2Samuel17:13 Amah khuapi khat sungah a nungkik le, Israel-te khempeuh in tua khuapi sungah khauhual paipihin tua lai munah suangtang khat nangawn a kimu nawn lo dingin kuam sungah tua khua i kaikhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:14 Tua ciangin Absalom le Israel mite khempeuh in, “Arkhi mi Hushai’ thugen pen Ahithofel’ thugen sangin hoihzaw hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Absalom’ tungah siatna a tunsak theih nadingin Ahithofel’ thugen hoih in a lelh ding Topa in a sehsa ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:15 Tua ciangin Hushai in siampi Zadok le Abiathar kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Ahithofel in Absalom le Israel upate kiangah gen a, tua bang tua bangin keimah in thu ka gen hi." 
2Samuel17:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in manlang takin mi sawl inla, David kiangah, ‘Tuzan gamlak tui ngahmunte-ah giak kei inla, bangbang hitaleh galkah in; tua hikeileh kumpipa le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh hong kivalhtum kha ding hi,’ ci-in gen sak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:17 Tu-in Jonathan le Ahimaaz in Enrogel-ah ngak uh hi. Nasem numei khat pai-in amaute kiangah gen a, amaute pai-in Kumpi David kiangah gen zel uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute khuapi sungah a lutlam uh a kimu lo ding ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:18 Ahih hangin tangval khat in amaute mu-in Absalom kiangah gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau tegel manlang takin paikhia uh a, a huang sungah tuikhuk a nei Bahurim-a mi khat’ inn-ah tung uh a, tuikhuk sungah amaute tuaksuk uh hi." 
2Samuel17:19 Tua ciangin a numei in khuhna khat la-in tuikhuk gong tungah phah a, tua tungah an zalh a, bangmah kithei lo hi." 
2Samuel17:20 Absalom’ nasemte tua nu’ inn-ah hong tun ciangin amaute in, “Ahimaaz le Jonathan koi lai-ah om ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. A numei in amaute kiangah, “Amaute lui galkhatah pai khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong a muh zawh loh uh ciangin Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
2Samuel17:21 Amaute a paikhiat khit ciangin tuikhuk panin mite hong paikhia uh a, pai-in Kumpi David kiangah a thu gen uh hi. Amaute in David kiangah, “Ding in; tui galkhatah manlang takin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang tua bangin nangma langkhatah Ahithofel in thu gen hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel17:22 Tua ciangin David le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh ding uh hi. Amaute in Jordan kantan uh a, khuavak ciangin Jordan a kantan nai lo khat beek om nawn lo uh hi." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahithofel in ama thugen a kizuih loh a muh ciangin a la tutphah vawhin ama khuapi a inn-ah nuak ciah hi. Tua ciangin amah in a innkuan vai hawmsak a, a man ciangin amahmah gui-awk hi. Amah si a, a pa’ hanah kivui hi." 
2Samuel17:24 Tua ciangin Mahanaim ah David tung hi. Absalom in Israel mite khempeuh tawh Jordan kantan hi. 
2Samuel17:25 Tu-in Absalom in Joab tangin galkapte a uk dingin Amasa koih khin hi. Amasa pen Nahash’ tanu Abigail a tenpih, Ishmael mi ahi Ithra min nei mi khat’ tapa hi a, ama nu Abigail le Joab’ nu Zeruiah a unau ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:26 Israel-te le Absalom in Gilead gamah giahphual sat uh hi. 
2Samuel17:27 Mahanaim ah David a tun ciangin Ammon mite’ gam Rabbah khua panin Nahash’ tapa Shobi, le Lodebar panin Ammiel’ tapa Makhir, le Rogelim panin Gilead mi Barzillai in" 
2Samuel17:28 lupnate, kuangte, le leibeelte, mangbuh, mangbuhham, an, an kan, bepi le besan," 
2Samuel17:29 khuaizu le bawngnawi-thaukhal, le tuu le sathaukhalte, David le amah tawh a om mite’ nek dingin hong puak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Mite gamlakah gilkialin, gimin dangtak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel18:1 Tua ciangin David in amah tawh a om mite khawmin a tultul a ukte le a zaza a ukte-in koih hi. 
2Samuel18:2 David in galkapte khen thum suah a, khenkhat Joab’ ukna nuai-ah, khenkhat Joab’ sanggampa Zeruiah’ tapa Abishai’ ukna nuai-ah, khenkhat Gath mi Ittai’ nuai-ah koihin galdo dingin a kuansak hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in mite kiangah, “Note tawh kei zong kong kuankhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:3 Ahih hangin mite in, “Nang nong kuankhia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote tai le-ung amaute in kote phamawh hong sa lo ding hi. Kote kimkhat si le ung amaute in kote phamawh hong sa lo ding hi. Ahih hangin nang pen kote tul sawm zahin na manpha hi. Tua ahih ciangin khuapi panin kote kiangah huhna hong puak lecin hoihzaw hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel18:4 Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Note in hoih na sak pen bangun ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin galkap khempeuh a zaza le a tultulin a paikhiat laitakun kulhkongpi pangah kumpipa ding hi." 
2Samuel18:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Joab le Abishai le Ittai thu pia-in, “Keimah nong khualna-un tangvalpa Absalom hong dawm mahmah un,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in Absalom’ thu galkapmangte tungah a vaikhakna mi khempeuh in za uh hi." 
2Samuel18:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te a do dingin gamlakah galkapte kuankhia uh a, Efraim tulakah kido uh hi." 
2Samuel18:7 David’ nasemte in tua lai-ah Israel mite zo uh a, tua ni-a mi kithat tam a, mi tul sawmnih ahi hi." 
2Samuel18:8 Tua gam maitang tung khempeuhah galkikapna omkim hi. Tua ni-in namsau’ thah sangin thudang hangin tulakah a si mi tamzaw hi. 
2Samuel18:9 David’ nasemte in Absalom tuakkha uh hi. Absalom a la tungah tuang a, tawsaw lianpi hiang pha nuai khatah a la tai-in, a lutang tawsaw hiang lakah awk a, ama nuai panin a la taisuakin, vanlelei kikalah amah a kikhai-in kinusia hi." 
2Samuel18:10 Tua ciangin mi khat in mu-in Joab kiangah gen a, “En in, tawsaw hiang kawm lakah Absalom a kikhai ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:11 Joab in ama kiangah a gen mipa kiangah, “Bang! Nang amah mu maw! Bang hangin leilakah amah satkhiasuk lo na hi hiam? Nang tungah ngun peek sawm le kawnggak khat hong pia ngel ding hi ve ing,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:12 Ahih hangin a mipa in Joab kiangah, “Ngun peek tulkhat ka khut sungah hong koih ta lecin zong kumpipa’ tapa a hih dingin ka khutmeno khat zong ka zankhia kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kote’ zakin kumpipa in nang le Abishai le Ittai thu hong pia-in, ‘Keimah nong khualna-un tangvalpa Absalom hong dawm un,’ hong ci hi." 
2Samuel18:13 Thudang khatah, amah langpangin zuautat leng (Kumpipa tungah a ki-im bangmah om lo hi), nangmahmah kikang koihin nong hu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:14 Joab in, “Hih bangin nang tawh hun ka beisak kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in thaltang thum la-in tawsaw hiang kawmah Absalom a hing lai-in a lungtang sungah tuate a siat hi." 
2Samuel18:15 Tua ciangin Joab’ galhiam tawite tangval sawm in Absalom umcih a, amah satin that uh hi." 
2Samuel18:16 Tua ciangin Joab in peengkul tum a, Israel-te a delhna panun galkapte hong ciahkik uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Joab in amaute kho hi." 
2Samuel18:17 Tua ciangin amaute in Absalom la-in tulaka dum lianpi khat sungah amah paai uh a, ama tungah suangcian a lian mahmah khat ciang uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh amau’ inn ciatah tai uh hi." 
2Samuel18:18 Absalom in ama nuntak lai-in khuampi khat la-in ama a dingin phutin Kumpipa’ Kuamah om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keima min hong zom ding tapa ka nei kei hi,” a ci hi. Tua khuampi ama min tamin phuak a, tuni dongin Absalom’ Mual, kici hi." 
2Samuel18:19 Tua ciangin Zadok’ tapa Ahimaaz in, “Kei hong taisak inla, Topa in ama galte’ vangliatna panin amah a hotkhiat lungdamna thu kumpipa kiangah hong puaksak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:20 Joab in ama kiangah, “Nang in tuni-in lungdamna thu na puak kei ding hi. A nidang ciangin lungdamna thu na puak thei ding a, ahih hangin tuni-in lungdamna thu na puak kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa’ tapa si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:21 Tua ciangin Joab in Kush mipa kiangah, “Pai inla na muhsa teng kumpipa kiangah va gen in,” a ci hi. Kush mipa zong Joab’ mai-ah kunin, tua ciangin a tai hi." 
2Samuel18:22 Tua ciangin Zadok’ tapa Ahimaaz in Joab kiangah, “Bangbang piang taleh kei zong Kush mipa’ nungah hong taisak in,” a ci kik hi. Joab in, “Lungdamna thu puakna hangin thaman ngah lo ding cih thei napi-in, ka tapa aw, bang hangin tai ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:23 Amah in, “Bangbang piang taleh ka tai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in ama kiangah, “Tai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ahimaaz zanglei lam tawnin tai a, Kush mipa makhelh hi." 
2Samuel18:24 Tua laitakin kulhkongpi puanung le a sungnung kikalah David na tu hi. Galvil pa kulhkongpi khumzangah paito a, a khuadak ciangin amah guakin a hong tai mi khat a mu hi." 
2Samuel18:25 Galvil pa in kumpipa kiangah a gen hi. Kumpipa in, “Amah guak ahihleh thuhoih ahi hi,” a ci hi. Amah hong nawhtai-in hong nai hi." 
2Samuel18:26 Tua ciangin galvil pa in midang khat a hong tai mu leuleu hi. Galvil pa in kulhkongpi-ah ko a, “En un, midang khat zong hong tai leuleu!” a ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Amah in zong lungdamna thu hong paipih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:27 Tua ciangin galvil pa in, “A masa pa’ taizia pen Zadok’ tapa Ahimaaz’ tai tawh kibang hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amah mihoih hi a, lungdamna thuhoih tawh hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:28 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Ahimaaz hong kiko-in, “Na khempeuh hoih hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa mai-ah lei maingatin amah kun a, “Ka to kumpipa’ langkhatah a khut a liik mite nangma khut sungah a hong pia Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tangvalpa Absalom a hoihhoih hiam?” a ci hi. Ahimaaz in dawngin, “Joab in na nasempa hong sawl laitakin buaina lianpi khat ka mu a, ahih hangin bang hiam cih ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:30 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Kiheikhia inla, hih lai-ah ding in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kiheikhia-in taang loin a ding hi." 
2Samuel18:31 Tua ciangin Kush mipa hong tung hi. Kush mipa in, “Ka to kumpipa a dingin lungdam nading thu om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma langah a ding mi khempeuh’ vangliatna panin tuni-in Topa in nang hong honkhia hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:32 Kumpipa in Kush mipa kiangah, “Tangvalpa Absalom a hoihhoih hiam?” a ci hi. Kush mipa in dawngin, “Ka to kumpipa’ galte, le siat nadingin nangma langkhatah a ding khempeuh, tua tangvalpa bang ta hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:33 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ lungsim nakpitakin sukha a, kulhkongpi tunga inndei sungah paito-in a kap hi. A paikawmin amah in, “Aw ka tapa Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa Absalom! Nangma tangin kei sizaw taleng. Aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:1 Joab kiangah, “En in, Absalom’ hangin kumpipa kapin thum hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Samuel19:2 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-a gualzawhna mi khempeuh a dingin thumna hong suak mawk hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in mite in, “Kumpipa a tapa’ hangin dah hi,” ci-in za uh hi." 
2Samuel19:3 Tua ciangin galsung pan a tai uh ciangin a maizum mite a geel bangin tua ni-in khuapi sungah mite simlut uh hi. 
2Samuel19:4 Kumpipa in a mai khuh a, nakpitakin kapkhia-in, “Aw ka tapa Absalom! Aw Absalom! Ka tapa, ka tapa!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ inn sungah Joab hong pai-in, “Tuni-in nangma nuntakna, na tanute le na tapate’ nuntakna, na zite le na zineute’ nuntakna a hong honkhia na nasemte khempeuh na maizumsak hi." 
2Samuel19:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nang hong mudahte itin, nang hong itte na mudah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ukte le nasemte nang adingin bangmah ahihlohna tuni-in na kitelsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Absalom hingin, kote khempeuh tuni-in si le ung na nuam ding ka thei hi." 
2Samuel19:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ding in, paikhia inla na nasemte tungah kamneem pau in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pai kei leh tuzan ciangin mi khat zong nang kiangah hong om nawn lo ding hi, ci-in Topa’ min tawh ka kiciam ngam hi. Hih thu pen na tangval a kipan tu ciang dong na tungah hong tungsa siatna khempeuh sangin nang a dingin siazaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:8 Tua ciangin kumpipa dingin kulhkongpi gei-ah a tu hi. Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “En un, kulhkongpi-ah kumpipa tu hi,” ci-in kigen a, tua ciangin kumpipa mai-ah mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi. Tu-in Israel mite amau’ inn ciatah na tai khin uh hi." 
2Samuel19:9 Israel minam khempeuh sungah mi khempeuh thu kisel uh a, “Kumpipa in i galte’ khutsung panin hong khahkhia-in Filistia-te’ khutsung panin hong honkhia hi. Tu-in Absalom’ hangin i gam sung panin amah taikhia hi." 
2Samuel19:10 Ahih hangin eite’ tungah sathau i nilh Absalom, gal sungah si khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in bang hangin kumpipa lakkik ding bangmah gen lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:11 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in hih thu, siampi Zadok le Abiathar kiangah puakin, “Judah upate kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Israel-te khempeuh’ thu kumpipa kiangah tung khin hi. Bang hangin note in kumpipa a inn-ah a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel19:12 Note pen ka behnai na hi uh a, note pen keima si keima sa na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin kumpipa a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam?’ ci un." 
2Samuel19:13 Tua ciangin Amasa kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima si keima sa hi lo na hi hiam? Tua kipan Joab’ munah nang pen ka galkapte a ukpa na hih kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen, ci hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:14 David’ thugen in Judah mite khempeuh’ lungsim thakhatin zo pah hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Nang le na nasemte khempeuh hong ciahkik un,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:15 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan-ah kumpipa hong paikik hi. Kumpipa a dawn ding le Jordan galah kumpipa a paipih dingin Gilgal-ah Judah mite hong pai uh hi. 
2Samuel19:16 Tua ciangin Bahurim panin Benjamin mi Gera’ tapa Shimei, Kumpi David a dawn dingin Judah mite tawh manlangin paisuk hi." 
2Samuel19:17 Benjamin sung panin mi tulkhat amah tawh om hi. Tua ciangin Saul’ innsung nasem Ziba, a tapa sawm le nga le a nasem sawmnihte tawh kumpipa’ mai Jordan-ah taisuk a," 
2Samuel19:18 kumpipa’ innkuante a galkahpih ding le ama deih bangin na a sem dingin amaute in ngahmun ngap uh hi. Jordan a galkah ding ciangin Gera’ tapa Shimei kumpipa’ mai-ah boksukin 
2Samuel19:19 kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in Jerusalem na nusiat ni-in na nasempa’ gamtat khialhna ka topa in hong mawhsak kei inla, hong ciamteh kei in; kumpipa in ngaihsutin nei kei in." 
2Samuel19:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khialh khitna na nasempa in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin, en in, ka to kumpipa a dawn dingin a hong paisuk dingin Josef minam khempeuh sung panin a masa penin tuni-in kong tung hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:21 Tua ciangin a nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai hong paukhia a, “Amah in Topa’ sathau nilh pa samsia ahih manin hih thu hangin Shimei thah ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:22 Ahih hangin David in, “Note pen tuni-in kei’ lang bangin na om nadingun no Zeruiah’ tapate tawh kei bang kisai ihi hiam? Tuni-in Israel sungah mi khatpeuh kithat ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in Israel-te’ tungah kumpi ka hihna thei hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:23 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Nang na si kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah kiciamna a bawl hi." 
2Samuel19:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa a dawn dingin Saul’ tupa Mefibosheth hong paisuk hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ni a kipan lungnuamin hong tunkik ni dong, amah in a khete zem lo, a khamul puah lo, a puante zong sawp lo hi." 
2Samuel19:25 Jerusalem panin kumpipa a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mefibosheth aw, bang hangin kei hong zui lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:26 Amah in dawngin, “Ka topa! Aw Kumpipa, ka nasempa in kei hong khem hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa in ama kiangah, ‘Kei a tungah tuangin kumpipa ka zuih theih nadingin kei a dingin la khat tutphah vawh in,’ ka ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa a khe bai hi." 
2Samuel19:27 Amah in ka to kumpipa kiangah na nasempa hong gensia hi. Ahih hangin ka to kumpipa pen Pasian’ vantungmi tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak bangin hong hih in. 
2Samuel19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipa’ mai-ah ka pa’ innkuante khempeuh a si zah dong dingin a sia ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in na sabuai-ah a ne mite lakah na nasempa na hong koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa tungah ka koh ding thudang bang neithuah nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
2Samuel19:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangma thu gen lailai na hi hiam? Ka lungsim ka khentatzo hi; nang le Ziba in leitang na hawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:30 Tua ciangin Mefibosheth in kumpipa kiangah, “Aw, ka to kumpipa lungnuamin inn hong tung khin na hih nungsang, a vekin amah lasak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:31 Rogelim panin Gilead mi Barzillai zong hong paisuk hi. Jordan galkhatah amah a kha dingin kumpipa tawh Jordan ciang dong amah paisuak hi. 
2Samuel19:32 Barzillai pen kum sawmgiat a pha, a khangham mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Mahanaim ah kumpipa a om laitakin amah in an pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mihau mahmah khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel19:33 Kumpipa in Barzillai kiangah, “Kei hong zui inla, Jerusalem-ah kei tawh hong om in, nang kong vak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:34 Ahih hangin Barzillai in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei, kumpipa tawh Jerusalem-ah a paito dingin ka nuntak ding kum bangzah hun nei nawn ka hi hiam?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tuni-in kei kum sawmgiat ka pha ta a, a nuam le a nuam lo khentel thei nawn ka hi hiam? Na nasempa in a nek ahi a, a dawn ahi zongin a limna phawk thei nawn ka hi hiam? Lasa numeite le lasa pasalte’ aw za thei nawn ka hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa tungah na nasempa vangik kibehlap hong hi ding ka hi hiam?" 
2Samuel19:36 Na nasempa in Jordan galkhatah tomkha sung kumpipa hong zui ding hi. Kei pen tua bang hamphatna lianpi a ngah dingin zong ka kilawm kei hi. 
2Samuel19:37 Keima khuapi sung mah, ka nu le ka pa’ han nai-ah ka sih theih nadingin na nasempa hong ciahsakkik in, ci-in kong thum hi. Ahih hangin hih lai-ah ka tapa na nasempa Khimham om hi; ka to kumpipa tawh amah galkah sak in; hoih na sak bangbangin ama a’ ding hihsak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:38 Tua ciangin kumpipa in dawngin, “Khimham in kei hong zui ding a, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin ama a’ ding ka hihsak ding hi; kei tung panin na deih khempeuh nangma a dingin kong hihsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:39 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Jordan galah pai uh a, kumpipa zong a pai hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Barzillai namin thupha pia a, ama inn-ah amah a ciah hi." 
2Samuel19:40 Gilgal-ah kumpipa paisuak a, amah tawh Khimham paisuak hi. Judah mi khempeuh, le Israel mi a kimkhatte in zong ama paina dingah kumpipa a kha uh hi." 
2Samuel19:41 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh hong pai-in kumpipa kiangah, “Bang hangin ka sanggam uh Judah mite in nang hong gukhia-in, kumpipa le a innkuante, le David’ mite amah tawh, Jordan galah paipih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:42 Judah mite khempeuh in Israel mite dawngin, “Kumpipa pen kote tawh beh kinai ahihna hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih thu-ah heh na hi uh hiam? Kumpipa’ sum bei-in an ne peuhmah ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amah in letsong khat peuhpeuh kote hong pia ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:43 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Judah mite dawngin, “Kumpipa sungah tanh sawm ka nei uh a, David’ sungah note khempeuh sangin tam ka neizaw uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin note in kote hong simmawh na hi uh hiam? Kote pen i kumpipa ciahpih kik ding a gen masate hi lo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite’ kammal sangin Judah mite’ kammal kihtakhuai zaw hi." 
2Samuel20:1 Tu-in tua lai-ah Benjamin mi, Bikhri’ tapa Sheba min nei, mi ginalo khat hong omkha hi. Amah in peengkul tumin, “David’ sungah tanh i nei kei a, Jessi’ tapa’ sungah gamh i nei kei hi; na inn ciat uhah ciah un, Israel-te aw,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:2 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh David’ kiang pan nungkik uh a, Bikhri’ tapa Sheba zui uh hi. Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jordan panin Jerusalem ciang dong a kumpipa uh kiptakin zui uh hi." 
2Samuel20:3 Tua ciangin Jerusalem-a a inn-ah David tung hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in inn kem dingin a nusiat a zineu sawmte la-in a kivil inn khat sungah amaute koihin amaute a vak hi. Ahih hangin amaute luppih lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a khang laipi-in meigong numei suak uh a, a sih dong uh amaute kikhumcip hi." 
2Samuel20:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Amasa kiangah, “Ni thum sungin Judah mite kei kiangah khawm inla, nangmahmah zong hih lai-ah hong om in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah-te a sam dingin Amasa pai a, ahi zongin ama tungah a kiciam a kisehsa khengin amah zekai hi." 
2Samuel20:6 Tua ciangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Tu-in Bikhri’ tapa Sheba in Absalom sangin eite tungah siatna tamzaw hong bawl ding hi. Na topa’ nasemte la inla, amah delh in. Tua hikeileh amah in ama a dingin khuapi muanhuaite ngahin eite tungah buaina hong piangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:7 Tua ciangin Abishai’ nungah Joab le Khereth mite le Peleth mite, le mi thahat khempeuh pai uh hi. Bikhri’ tapa Sheba a delh dingin Jerusalem panin amaute kuankhia uh hi." 
2Samuel20:8 Gibeon gam sunga suangtumpi-ah amaute a tun uh ciangin amaute a dawn dingin Amasa hong pai hi. Tu-in Joab in galkap puan silhin, tua tungah, a kawng tungah a kigak a paai sunga namsau tawh a kithuah kawnggak khat om a, a mailam manawhin a pai laitakin a namsau seel hi." 
2Samuel20:9 Tua ciangin Joab in Amasa kiangah, “Ka sanggampa aw, bang cici na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joab in amah a hopih kawmin a taklam khut tawh a khamul-in Amasa man hi." 
2Samuel20:10 Ahih hangin Amasa in Joab’ khutsunga om namsau mu lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in a namsau tawh a pumpi sat a, nihvei sat kul loin a gilpi leilakah buakhia hi; tua ciangin Amasa a si hi. Tua ciangin Joab le a sanggampa Abishai in Bikhri’ tapa Sheba delh uh hi." 
2Samuel20:11 Tua ciangin Joab’ mite khat Amasa’ kiangah dingin, “Joab a gum peuhmah, le David-a’ ahi mi peuhmah in Joab zui un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:12 Lam lianpi a ama sisan sungah Amasa kidiahin a om hi. Tua lai-ah a pai mi peuhmah in amah a muh ciangin a khawl uh hi. Mi khempeuh a khawlna tua mipa in a muh ciangin amah in lam lianpi panin gamlakah Amasa puakhia-in ama tungah puan khat a khuh hi. 
2Samuel20:13 Lam lianpi panin amah a kilakkhiat khit ciangin Bikhri’ tapa Sheba a delh dingin Joab nungah mi khempeuh paisuak hi. 
2Samuel20:14 Tua ciangin Israel minamte khempeuh nawkin Abelbethmaakah khua-ah Sheba pai hi. Bikhri mi khempeuh kikhawm uh a, amah zui-in khuapi sungah tum uh hi." 
2Samuel20:15 Tua ciangin Joab tawh a om mi khempeuh hong pai-in Abelbethmaakah khua-ah amah umcih uh hi. Amaute in khuapi simna-in suang cianpi khat bawl uh a, kulhpi langkhatah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kulhpi a puk theih nadingin amaute in kulhpi nuai to uh hi." 
2Samuel20:16 Tua ciangin numei pil khat in khuapi panin samin, “Za un! Joab kiangah gen un: ‘Nang tungah thu kong gen theih nadingin hih lai-ah hong pai in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:17 Tua ciangin tua nu’ mai-ah Joab hong pai hi. Tua numei in, “Nang, Joab na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in ama kiangah, “Na nasemnu’ thugente ngai in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka ngai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tanglai-in amaute in, ‘Abel-ah thu dong sak un,’ ci thei uh a, tua bangin amaute in thu siangsak uh hi." 
2Samuel20:19 Kei pen Israel sungah tua bangin kilemna a deih a thuman mi khat ka hi hi. Nang in Israel sungah nu tawh a kibang khuapi khat suksiat ding na hanciam hi. Bang hangin Topa’ gamhluah valhtum ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
2Samuel20:20 Joab in dawngin, “Keimah in ka valhtum ding ahi a, ka suksiat ding ahi zongin keima ngaihsut hi dek lo hi." 
2Samuel20:21 Tua thu man lo hi. Ahih hangin Efraim mualtung gammi Bikhri’ tapa Sheba a kici mipa in Kumpi David lehdo hi; amah bek hong pia in. Tua hileh khuapi panin ka nungkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in Joab kiangah, “En in, kulh sung panin nang kiangah ama lutang hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:22 Tua ciangin ama pilna zangin mi khempeuh kiangah tua numei a pai hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Bikhri’ tapa Sheba’ lu tankhia-in Joab kiangah lawnkhia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in peengkul tum a, khuapi panin amaute kikhenin a milipin a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa kiang Jerusalem-ah Joab a ciah hi." 
2Samuel20:23 Tua laitakin Joab pen Israel galkap khempeuh a uk ahi hi. Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah pen Khereth mite le Peleth mite a uk ahi hi. 
2Samuel20:24 Adoram pen aana tawh na a kisemsakte a uk ahi hi. Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat pen thu ciamteh pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva pen lai-at pa ahi hi. Zadok le Abiathar siampite ahi uh hi. 
2Samuel20:26 Jair mi Ira zong David’ siampi ahi hi. 
2Samuel21:1 Tu-in kum khat khit kum khat, David’ hun sungin kum thum sung kialpi tung hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa’ kiangah thu dong hi. Topa in, “Amah in Gibeon mite that ahih manin Saul le a innkuan tungah mi thahna hanga mawhna om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Gibeon mite sam hi. Tu-in Gibeon mite pen Israel-te’ sung hi loin Amor mi a omlaite ahi uh hi. Amaute a hingkhawi ding Israel mite kiciam khin napi-in, Israel le Judah mite a’ ding a deih luatna-in Saul in amaute thah dingin hanciam hi." 
2Samuel21:3 Tua ciangin David in Gibeon mite kiangah, “Note a dingin bang hong hihsak ding ka hi hiam? Note in Topa’ mite thupha na piaktheih nadingun bangci bangin kilemna hong bawl ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:4 Gibeon mite in ama kiangah, “Kote le Saul ahi a, a innkuan tawh kikalah ahi zongin kitotna a om pen ngun le kham in maisak zo lo ding hi. Israel-te sungah mi khatpeuh ka thah hangun zong lungkim zawh nading om lo hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Note a’ ding kong hihsak ding bang hi, ci na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi."
