2Samuel21:5 Amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Israel gam sungah kote in mun ka neih loh nadingun kote hong netumin suksiat ding Saul in vaihawm hi." 
2Samuel21:6 Topa’ mualtung, Topa’ mai Gibeon-ah amaute ka khai theih nadingun ama tapa sagihte hong pia in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amaute kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:7 Ahih hangin kumpipa in amah le Saul’ tapa Jonathan’ kikalah a om, Topa tawh kiciamna hangin Jonathan’ tapa, Saul’ tupa Mefibosheth a siit hi." 
2Samuel21:8 Ahi zongin Aiah’ tanu Rizpah’ tapa nih, Saul tawh a neih Armoni le Mefibosheth; le Saul’ tanu Merab in Meholah mi Barzillai’ tapa Adriel tawh a neih a tapa ngate a la hi." 
2Samuel21:9 Amah in Gibeon mite tungah amaute pia a, amaute in Topa’ mai mualtungah amaute khai uh a, amau sagihte sikhawm uh hi. Mangbuhham lak kipat hun, anlak kipat cil lamin amaute kithat hi." 
2Samuel21:10 Tua ciangin Aiah’ tanu Rizpah in a puanhampi la-in, anlak a kipan van panin amau’ luanghawmte tungah guah a zuk dongin ama lup nadingin suangpi tungah a phah hi. Sunin huihlak vasate in ahi a, zanin gamsate in ahi zongin amau’ luanghawmte a sukkhak loh nadingun a cing hi." 
2Samuel21:11 Saul’ zineu, Aiah’ tanu Rizpah’ gamtatna thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
2Samuel21:12 David pai-in Gilboa mualtungah Filistia-te in Saul a thah lai hunin Filistia-te in amaute a khaina mun Bethshan khuasung kongzing lampi laizang panin a luanghawm a guksak Jabeshgilead mite’ tung panin Saul’ guhte le a tapa Jonathan’ guhte a lakik hi. 
2Samuel21:13 Amah in tua lai panin Saul’ guhte le a tapa Jonathan’ guhte paipihto hi. Amaute in a kikhai mi sagihte’ guh zong kaikhawm uh hi. 
2Samuel21:14 Tua ciangin amaute in Zela khuasung Benjamin’ leitang, a pa Kish’ han sungah Saul le a tapa Jonathan’ guhte phum uh a, amaute in kumpipa’ thupiak khempeuh hih uh hi. Tua khit ciangin tua gam ading thumnate Pasian in a ngai hi." 
2Samuel21:15 Filistia-te, Israel-te tawh kidokik uh a, David a nasemte tawh paisuk khawmin Filistia-te a sim uh hi. Tua galkidona-ah David gim mahmah hi." 
2Samuel21:16 Mithagolte’ suante khat, a teipi sumngo shekel zathum a gik, namsau thak khat a kuah Ishbibenob in David thah ding ngaihsun hi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ahih hangin amah a huh dingin Zeruiah’ tapa Abishai hong pai a, Filistia-pa simin amah a that hi. Tua ciangin David’ mite in amah kunh-in, “Galsim dingin ko tawh nong kuankhia nawn kei ding hi. Hong kuan lecin Israel mite’ muan le suanpa kong taan kha ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel21:18 Hih hun khit ciangin Filistia-te tawh Gob-ah galkidona omkik a, Hushah mi Sibbekai in mithagolte’ suante khat ahi Saf a that hi." 
2Samuel21:19 Tua ciangin Filistia-te tawh galkidona om leuleu a, Bethlehem mi Jaareoregim’ tapa Elhanan in a teipi siamgante’ siamlawngpi cia a pha, Gath mi Goliath a that hi." 
2Samuel21:20 Tua ciangin, a khut langtuakah khutme guk, le a khe langtuakah kheme guk, a vekpi-in sawmnih le li a nei, mi thalian khat a omna Gath-ah gal om leuleu hi. Amah zong mithagolte’ sung panin a piang ahi hi." 
2Samuel21:21 Amah in Israel-te a phin ciangin, David’ sanggampa Shimei’ tapa Jonathan in amah that hi." 
2Samuel21:22 Hih mi lite pen Gath-a mithagolte’ sung pana piang ahi uh hi. David le a nasemte in amaute a that uh hi. 
2Samuel22:1 Tua ciangin Topa in ama galte khempeuh’ khutsung, le Saul’ khutsung panin amah a hotkhiat hunin David in hih la kammalte Topa’ tungah a gen hi." 
2Samuel22:2 Amah in, “ Topa, kei hong hupa, ka kulhpi, kei hong honkhia pa," 
2Samuel22:3 ka Pasian, ka kihutna, ka bukna pa, lum bangin kei a hong dal, ka munmuanhuai le ka belh, keimah hong honkhia pa hi a, ngong hihna panin hong hon hi." 
2Samuel22:4 A phat taak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong kihon hi." 
2Samuel22:5 “Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna tuihualte in kei hong tum a, siatna tuikhangte in kei hong nawk hi." 
2Samuel22:6 Leinuai khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi." 
2Samuel22:7 Ka lungkhamna-ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasian ka sam hi. A biakinn panin amah in ka aw hong za a, ka kikona awging ama bil a tung hi." 
2Samuel22:8 “Tua ciangin ama hehna hangin leitung kisingin, nakpitakin kilokgawp a, vantung bulpite kilinggawp hi." 
2Samuel22:9 A nakvang sung panin meikhu pusuak a, a kamsung panin a kangtum mei pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuangkhia hi." 
2Samuel22:10 Amah in vantungte niamsakin hong paisuk a, ama khenuai-ah khuamial sahpi om hi." 
2Samuel22:11 Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leng a, huih khate tungah amah kimu hi." 
2Samuel22:12 Amah in ama kimkotah khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuh nadingin meii sahpi a zang hi." 
2Samuel22:13 Ama mai-a a taang sung panin mei-amte kuangkhia hi. 
2Samuel22:14 “Vantung panin Topa hong awngsuk a, Sang Pen pa in a aw hong gingsak hi." 
2Samuel22:15 Amah in thaltangte lawnin thehthang gawp a, khuaphialep phiasakin amaute a taisak hi." 
2Samuel22:16 Tua ciangin Topa’ mawhsakna awging lianpi hangin tuipi tawte kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi." 
2Samuel22:17 “Amah in a sangna mun panin hong banin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin kei hong kaikhia hi." 
2Samuel22:18 A hat ka galte panin kei hong honkhia a, kei hong mudahte panin hong suaktasak hi. Keima a dingin ka galte hatlua uh hi." 
2Samuel22:19 Ka kamsiat ni-in kei hong simgawp uh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi." 
2Samuel22:20 Amah in mun tanzau khatah kei hong paikhiatpih a, kei tungah lungkim ahih manin kei hong honkhia hi." 
2Samuel22:21 “Ka thumanna tawh kizui-in Topa in thaman hong pia a, ka sianthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi." 
2Samuel22:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ thu ka zui a, ka Pasian ka langpang kei hi." 
2Samuel22:23 Ama biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
2Samuel22:24 Ama mai-ah kawk ka baang kei a, kisuanna dangte panin hoihtakin ka kikem hi." 
2Samuel22:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka thumanna, ama muhna-ah ka sianthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi." 
2Samuel22:26 “Thuman mi tungah nangmah na thuman a, a kawkbaang lo mi tungah a kawkbaang loin na gamta hi." 
2Samuel22:27 A siangtho mi tungah a siangtho-in na gamta a, a thukawi mi tungah thupeelin na gamta hi." 
2Samuel22:28 Nangmah in mi niamte na honkhia a, ahih hangin a kiphasakte na niamkhiat hi." 
2Samuel22:29 Topa aw, nang pen keima meivak na hi hi. Ka Pasian in ka khuamial vaksak hi." 
2Samuel22:30 Nangma hangin galkap hon khat ka sugawpzo a, ka Pasian’ hangin khuakulh khat ka kanzo hi." 
2Samuel22:31 “Hih Pasian a thu kicing a, Topa’ kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a beelte khempeuh a dingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
2Samuel22:32 Topa longal Pasian kua hiam? I Pasian simloh, hong hu kua hiam?" 
2Samuel22:33 Hih Pasian, a muanhuai keima belh hi a, ka lampi khempeuh lungmuanhuaisak hi." 
2Samuel22:34 Amah in sakhipite’ khe bangin ka khe kipsak a, mun sangna-ah keimah hong koih hi." 
2Samuel22:35 Amah in galsimzia kei hong hilh a, sumngo thal khauhpente ka keekzo hi." 
2Samuel22:36 “Nangmah in kei hong dalin na hong honkhia a, nangma hong huhna in kei hong liansak hi." 
2Samuel22:37 Ka kalsuan nading mun tanzau keima nuai-ah nong pia a, ka khe taal lo hi." 
2Samuel22:38 Ka galte delhin ka susia a, amaute a beitum mateng kei ka kileh kei hi." 
2Samuel22:39 Amaute ka beisak a, amaute ka sunlet hi; amaute thokik nawn lo uh a, ka khenuai-ah amaute puk uh hi." 
2Samuel22:40 “Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in galdo nadingin tha nong guan a, keimah hong dote ka nuai-ah na nengniam hi." 
2Samuel22:41 Nangmah in ka galte, kei hong mudahte, na nungkiksak a, keimah in amaute ka susiagawp hi." 
2Samuel22:42 Amaute khuadak uh a, ahih hangin a honkhia ding kuamah om lo hi. Topa’ tungah hong ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in amaute dawng lo hi." 
2Samuel22:43 “Leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute tuankhamin ka sikcipsuk hi." 
2Samuel22:44 Mite tawh kidona panin nangmah in nong honkhia a, minamte’ lutangin kei nong bawl a, ka theih ngei loh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi." 
2Samuel22:45 Keimah mai-etin gamdang mite ka kiangah hong pai uh hi. Amaute in ka thu a zak phetun, ka thu hong mang uh hi." 
2Samuel22:46 Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun lingin hong paikhia uh hi." 
2Samuel22:47 “ Topa hing hi; kei hong hupa in thupha ngah hen la, ka Pasian, kei hong honkhia pa," 
2Samuel22:48 hong thuksakin, keima nuai-ah mite a koihsuk Pasian," 
2Samuel22:49 ka galte kiang panin kei hong paikhiatpih pa vanglian tahen. Nangmah in ka langte tungah kei nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei nong honkhia hi." 
2Samuel22:50 “ Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam khempeuh lakah nang kong phat ding a, na min phatna la ka sa ding hi." 
2Samuel22:51 Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilh pa David le a suanlekhakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:1 Jessi’ tapa David, milianpi a suak mipa, Jakob’ Pasian’ sathau nilh pa, Israel laphuak siampa David’ kam nunungte hih bang ahi hi:" 
2Samuel23:2 “ Topa’ kha in kei tungtawnin thu hong gen a, ka kam sungah ama thugente om hi." 
2Samuel23:3 Israel Pasian kampau khin a, Israel a hupa in kei kiangah hong ci khin hi: Mi khat in mite tungah thutang takin ukin Pasian zahtakna tawh limtakin a uk ciangin" 
2Samuel23:4 amah pen amaute tungah zingsang khuavak bangin taang ziazua a, meii kaai loh ni zingsang a ni taangkhia, leilak panin lopate a selsak guahtui tawh kibang hi." 
2Samuel23:5 Hi hi, ka innkuan zong Pasian tawh tua bangmah hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tawntung thuciamna kei tawh hong bawl a, na khempeuh a hoih a kipin hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong huhin, ka deihna khempeuh tangtungsak ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel23:6 Ahih hangin mi gilote ahihleh a kilawnkhia lingkungte tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khut guak tawh amaute kilawng ngam lo a," 
2Samuel23:7 amaute a lawng ding mipa pen sik le teipi bul tawh kithawi a, amaute mei tawh kihaltum siang hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:8 David’ neih mi thahatte’ minte: Tahkhemon mi Joshebbasshebeth hi a, amah pen mi thumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing zagiat do-in hun khat sungin thatmang khin hi." 
2Samuel23:9 Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte lakah amah a zom pa pen Ahoah mi Dodo’ tapa Eleazar ahi hi. Galsim dingin a kikaikhawm Filistia-te to a, Israel mite a nungkik hunin David tawh amah om hi." 
2Samuel23:10 Amah dingin a khut a hikcip mateng Filistia-te sattuk a, a namsau a khut sungah omcip hi. Topa in tua ni-in gualzawhna lianpi piangsak a, a kithat mite’ na a tawm ding bekin ama nungah mite hong paikik uh hi." 
2Samuel23:11 Ama zomah Harar mi Agee’ tapa Shammah ahi hi. Besan a dimna mun Lehi-ah Filistia-te kikaikhawm uh a, Filistia-te’ kiang panin mite tai uh hi." 
2Samuel23:12 Ahih hangin amah in tua munah panmun la-in hu a, Filistia-te that a, Topa in gualzawhna lianpi a piangsak hi." 
2Samuel23:13 Ukpa sawmthumte lak panin mi thumte paisukin, Refaim kuamah Filistia mihonte in giahphual satin a om laitakin, Adullam leihawm a David kiangah anlak hun pawlin tung uh hi." 
2Samuel23:14 Tua hunin munmuanhuai sungah David om a, Filistia khuacingte Bethlehem-ah om uh hi." 
2Samuel23:15 David in lunggulhna tawh, “Kulhkongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin mi khat in tuidawn ding kei hong pia leh!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:16 Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte in Filistia-te’ giahphual phulin kulhkongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin tui tawikhia uh a, a tui la-in David kiangah paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin David in a tui dawn lo hi. Amah in Topa a dingin a tui sung a," 
2Samuel23:17 “ Topa aw, hih tui ka dawn het kei ding hi. Amau’ nuntakna khamin a pai mite’ sisan a dawn tawh ka kibang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in dawn lo hi. Mi thahat thumte’ hanzia tu-a bang ahi hi." 
2Samuel23:18 Tu-in Zeruiah’ tapa, Joab’ sanggampa Abishai, mihing sawmthumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thumte do-in amaute that a, mihing sawmthumte’ banah minphatna ngahbeh hi." 
2Samuel23:19 Mihing sawmthumte sung pan amah a minthang pen hi a, amaute a ukpa a suak hi. Ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nai lo hi." 
2Samuel23:20 Jehoiada’ tapa, Kabzeel khuami Benaiah pen gal a hang, na lianpite a sempa hi a, amah in Moab galhang mi nih a vat hi. Amah zong paisukin vuk a kiat ni khatin leihawm sunga om humpinelkai khat a that hi." 
2Samuel23:21 Amah in a melhoih Egypt mi khat a that hi. Egypt mipa in a khut sungah teipi tawi hi. Ahih hangin Benaiah ciangkhut khat tawh ama kiangah paisuk a, Egypt-pa’ khutsung panin a teipi sutkhia-in ama teipi mah tawh amah a that hi." 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah in hihte hihin, a thahat mi thumte’ minphatna zah phial a ngah hi." 
2Samuel23:23 Mihing sawmthumte’ lakah amah minthang a, ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nai lo hi. David in amah a cingte a ukin a koih hi." 
2Samuel23:24 Joab’ sanggampa Asahel zong sawmthumte’ lakah khat ahi hi. Bethlehem mi Dodo’ tapa Elhanan," 
2Samuel23:25 Harod khuami Shammah, Harod khuami Elika," 
2Samuel23:26 Palti mi Helez, Tekoa khuami Ikkesh’ tapa Ira," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathoth khuami Abiezer, Hushah mi Mebunnai," 
2Samuel23:28 Ahoah mi Zalmon, Netofah khuami Maharai," 
2Samuel23:29 Netofah khuami Baanah’ tapa Heleb, Benjamin mite’ gam sunga om Gibeah khuami Ribai’ tapa Ittai," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathon khuami Benaiah, Gaash gei-a kuam pan Hiddai," 
2Samuel23:31 Betharabah khuami Abialbon, Bahurim khuami Azmaveth," 
2Samuel23:32 Shaalbon khuami Eliahba, Jashen’ tapate, Jonathan," 
2Samuel23:33 Harar mi Shammah, Harar mi Sharar’ tapa Ahiam," 
2Samuel23:34 Maakah khuami Ahasbai’ tapa Elifelet, Gilo khuami Ahithofel’ tapa Eliam," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmel khuami Hezro, Arbi mi Paarai," 
2Samuel23:36 Zobah khuami Nathan’ tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani," 
2Samuel23:37 Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiah’ tapa galhiam a tawi Beeroth khuami Naharai," 
2Samuel23:38 Ithri mi Ira, Ithri mi Gareb," 
2Samuel23:39 Hit mi Uriah, a vekpi-in sawmthum le sagih ahi uh hi." 
2Samuel24:1 Khatvei, Israel-te tungah Topa hong hehkik a, amah in mite’ gim nadingin David hanthawnin, “Pai in; Israel le Judah mi a phazah sim in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Joab le amah tawh a om galkap ukte kiangah, “Mite a phazah ka theih nadingin Dan panin Beersheba ciang dong Israel minamte khempeuh lakah pai unla mi phazah va sim un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:3 Ahih hangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa’ muhin Topa na Pasian in mite tu-a a omzah za khatin a tamna behlap tahen. Ahih hangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa in hih thu deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:4 Ahih hangin kumpipa’ kamgente in Joab le galkap ukte zozaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a phazah a sim dingin kumpipa’ omna panin Joab le galkap ukte a paikhia uh hi. 
2Samuel24:5 Amaute in Jordan kantanin kuam laizang a om khuapi Aroer panin kipanin Gad lam manawh uh a, Jazer-ah paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel24:6 Tua ciangin amaute Gilead tung uh a, tua panin Hit mite’ gam Kadesh tung uh hi. Tua lai panin Dan tungin, Dan panin kual pai-in Sidon tung uh hi." 
2Samuel24:7 Tua ciangin Taia munmuanhuai le Hiv mite le Kanaan mite’ khuapite khempeuh tung uh hi. Tua panin Judah-te’ Negeb lam Beersheba-ah pai uh hi. 
2Samuel24:8 Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuhah amaute a pai khit uh, kha kua le ni sawmnih a cin khit ciangin Jerusalem-ah hong tungkik uh hi." 
2Samuel24:9 Tua ciangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah mite a phazah a gawm a pia hi: Israel sungah namsau a tawi galhang mi tul zagiat om a, Judah mi tul zanga om hi." 
2Samuel24:10 Ahih hangin mi a sim khit ciangin David’ lungsim in amahmah gimsak hi. Tua ciangin David in Topa’ tungah, “Ka gamtatnasa sungah nakpitakin ka khial hi. Ahih hangin, tu-in, Topa aw, nang tungah kong thum hi; na nasempa’ mawhna hong maisak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka hai gamtatkha khin hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:11 Zingsangin David a thawh ciangin David’ thumu pa ahi kamsang Gad tungah Topa’ thu hong tung a," 
2Samuel24:12 “Pai inla, David kiangah hih bangin gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah thu thum kong pia hi; nang tungah kong hih theih nadingin tuate khat teel in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:13 Tua ahih ciangin David kiangah Gad hong pai-in ama tungah gen a, “Na gam sungah kum thum sung kialpi hong tung ding hiam? Ahih kei leh na galte in nang hong delh laitakin amaute’ mai-ah kha thum sung tai ding na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh na gam sungah ni thum sung pulnatna hong tung ding ahi hiam? Tu-in ngaihsun in; kei hong sawl pa’ kiangah bang dawnna puakkik ding ka hi hiam khentat in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:14 Tua ciangin David in Gad kiangah, “Nakpi takin ka lung a kham hi. Ama hehpihna lian ahih manin Topa’ khut sungah tung ni; bangbang ahi zongin mihing khut sungah hong tungsak kei hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:15 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in zingsang a kipan a kiseh hun dongin Israel-te tungah natna tungsak hi. Dan panin Beersheba dongin mihing tul sawmsagih a si hi. 
2Samuel24:16 Vantung mi in Jerusalem khua a susia dingin kithawi-in a khut a zan ciangin tua tatsiatna panin Topa kisik a, mite lakah suksiatna na a sem vantungmi kiangah, “Phazo hi; tu-in khawl ta in,” a ci hi. Topa’ vantungmi pen Jebus mi Araunah’ ancilna gei-ah a om hi." 
2Samuel24:17 Tua ciangin mite a vat vantungmi a muh ciangin David in Topa’ tungah thu gen a, “En in, ka mawh hi; a khial pa pen kei ka hi hi. Hih mite in bang khialhna nei ahi uh hiam? Kong thum hi; kei le ka innkuante bek gim hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:18 Tua ciangin tua ni-in David kiangah Gad pai-in ama kiangah, “Paito in; Jebus mi Araunah’ ancilna-ah Topa a’ ding biakna tau khat phut in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ thupiak bangin Gad’ cihna zui-in David paito hi. 
2Samuel24:20 Araunah a khuadaksuk ciangin kumpipa le a nasemte ama lamah a hong paito a mu hi. Araunah paikhia-in a mai lei ngatin kumpipa zahtakna a bawl hi. 
2Samuel24:21 Tua ciangin Araunah in, “Bang hangin ka to kumpipa a nasempa kiangah hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. “Mite’ tung panin gimna a ven’ theih nadingin Topa a’ ding biakna tau lam nading na ancilna mun a lei ding,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:22 Tua ciangin Araunah in David kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in hoih na sak bangin la inla biakna pia in; meihal biak nadingin bawngtalte, le a sing dingin ancilna peekte le bawngtal kolte hih lai-ah om hi." 
2Samuel24:23 Kumpipa aw, keimah Araunah in hihte khempeuh kumpipa tungah kong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua banah Araunah in kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa, na Pasian in nang hong sang ta hen,” cithuah lai hi." 
2Samuel24:24 Ahih hangin kumpipa in Araunah kiangah, “Hilo hi; nangma tung panin hihte a man tawh kituakin kong lei ding hi. Topa ka Pasian’ tungah kei’ sum bei loin meihal biaknate ka pia kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in ngun shekel sawmnga tawh ancilna mun le bawngtalte a lei hi." 
2Samuel24:25 Tua ciangin David in Topa a’ ding biakna tau khat tua lai-ah lam a, meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gam adingin thumna Topa in ngai a, Israel-te’ tung panin gimna a veng hi." 
1Kings1:1 Tu-in Kumpi David teekin kum tam ta hi. Amaute in amah puan a silhsak uh hangin a khua lum thei lo hi. 
1Kings1:2 Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa a dingin nungakno khat kizong hen la, amah in kumpipa enin amah a kemnu hita hen. Ka to kumpipa a khua a lum theih nadingin na ang sungah tua nu lum hen,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:3 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel gam sung khempeuhah nungak melhoih khat zong uh a, Shunem mi Abishag mu-in, kumpipa kiangah amah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings1:4 Tua nungak melhoih mahmah a, kumpipa a kemnu suakin ama na a sem hi. A lupkhawm uh hangin kumpipa in amah hih zo lo hi." 
1Kings1:5 Tu-in David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah amahmah kiliansak tawmin, “Keimah, kumpi ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in ama a dingin leengte le sakol tung tuangte, le ama mai-ah a tai ding mihing sawmnga vaihawm hi." 
1Kings1:6 A pa David in, “Bang hangin tua bang tua bangin gamta na hi hiam?” ci-a dotna tawh khatvei beek amah tai ngei lo hi. Amah pen a melhoih mahmah mi khat zong ahi hi. Amah pen Absalom zom a suak ahi hi." 
1Kings1:7 Amah in Zeruiah’ tapa Joab le siampi Abiathar tawh vaihawm hi. Amaute in Adonijah zui-in amah panpih uh hi. 
1Kings1:8 Ahih hangin siampi Zadok, le Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah, le David’ mi a thahatte in Adonijah panpih lo uh hi." 
1Kings1:9 Adonijah in Enrogel gei-a om Gulpi’ Suangpi kiangah tuute, bawngtalte, le ganno thaute biakna-in pia-in, amah in kumpipa’ tapate ahi a sanggamte khempeuh le Judah gam kumpi uliante khempeuh sam a," 
1Kings1:10 ahih hangin kamsangpa Nathan ahi a, Benaiah ahi a, mi thahatte ahi a, a sanggampa Solomon ahi zongin sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:11 Tua ciangin Nathan in Solomon’ nu Bathsheba kiangah, “Haggith’ tapa Adonijah kumpi suak khinin, David in tua thu a theih lohna thu za nai lo na hi hiam?" 
1Kings1:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in hong pai in. Nangma nuntakna le na tapa Solomon’ nuntakna na suahtaksak theih nadingin nang tungah ngaihsutna kong pia ding hi. 
1Kings1:13 Thakhatin Kumpi David kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘Ka to kumpipa in na nasemnu’ tungah hong kiciamin, “Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah maangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” ci hi lo na hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Adonijah kumpi suak ahi hiam?’ ci in." 
1Kings1:14 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah thu na gen laitakin kei zong nangma nungah hong pai-in nangma thugen teng kong panpih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:15 Tua ahih ciangin Bathsheba a inndei sung kumpipa kiangah va pai hi (tu-in kumpipa teek mahmah a, Shunem mi Abishag in kumpipa’ na sem hi.)" 
1Kings1:16 Bathsheba kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:17 Tua nu in ama kiangah, “Ka topa aw, na nasemnu tungah Topa na Pasian’ min tawh kiciamin, ‘Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah maangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
1Kings1:18 Tu-in en in, ka to kumpipa in na theih loh hangin, Adonijah kumpi ahi hi." 
1Kings1:19 Amah in biakna-in bawngtalte, ganno thaute, le tuute, tampi tak pia khin a, kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh, siampi Abiathar, le galkapte a ukpa Joab sam a, ahih hangin amah in na nasempa Solomon sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:20 Ka to kumpipa aw, tu-in nangma nungah ka to kumpipa’ tokhom tungah kua tu ding, ci-a amaute kiangah na gen ding ngakin Israel-te khempeuh in nang hong en uh hi." 
1Kings1:21 Tua bang hikeileh ka to kumpipa na bei ciangin kei le ka tapa Solomon a khialin a hong kiseh hun hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:22 Kumpipa tawh tua nu kiho-in a om laitakin kamsangpa Nathan hong tum hi. 
1Kings1:23 Kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah kamsangpa Nathan om hi,” ci-in a kigen hi. Kumpipa mai-ah amah hong pai ciangin a mai leilam ngatin kumpipa’ mai-ah a kun hi." 
1Kings1:24 Tua ciangin Nathan in, “Ka to kumpipa aw, ‘Keima nungah Adonijah maangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ci na hi hiam?" 
1Kings1:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in amah paisuk khinin, bawngtalte, ganno thaute, le tuute, tampi tak biakna-in pia a, kumpipa’ tapate khempeuh, galkapte a ukpa Joab, le siampi Abiathar sam hi. Amaute in ama a’ ding pawi bawl uh a, ‘Kumpi Adonijah a khansau hen!’ ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:26 Ahih hangin na nasempa keimah, le siampi Zadok, le Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah, le na nasempa Solomon, amah in hong sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:27 Ka to kumpipa in hih thu thukimpihin, nangma khit ciangin ka to kumpipa’ tokhom tungah kua tu ding cih thu na nasem kote’ kiangah hong im na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:28 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in dawngin, “Bathsheba ka kiangah hong samkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa omna-ah tua nu hong pai-in, kumpipa’ mai-ah a ding hi." 
1Kings1:29 Kumpipa kiciamin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin kei a hong honkhia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
1Kings1:30 nangma tungah Topa, Israel Pasian’ min tawh hong kiciamin, ‘Keima nungah ka tapa Solomon maang ding a, keima tangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ka cihsa mah bangin, tuni-in zong ka cikik hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:31 Tua ciangin Bathsheba in leilam maingatin kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, “Ka to kumpi David nungta tawntung ta hen!” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:32 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan, le Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah samsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ mai-ah amaute hong pai uh hi." 
1Kings1:33 Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Na topa’ nasemte paipih unla, ka tapa Solomon keima la-sakol tungah tuangsakin Gihon-ah paipihsuk un." 
1Kings1:34 Israel-te’ tungah kumpi-in tua lai munah siampi Zadok le kamsang Nathan sathau nilhsak un. Tua ciangin peengkul tum unla, ‘Kumpi Solomon khansau hen!’ ci un." 
1Kings1:35 Tua ciangin ama nungah note nong pai ding uh a, amah hong pai-in ka kumpi tokhom tungah hong tu ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keima tangin amah kumpi hi ding hi. Israel le Judah a ukpa dingin amah ka seh khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:36 Tua ciangin Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah in dawngin, “Hi ta hen! Topa, ka to kumpipa’ Pasian in tua bangin kipsak tahen." 
1Kings1:37 Topa in ka to kumpipa a ompih mah bangin Solomon zong ompih hen la, ka to Kumpi David’ tokhom sangin ama tokhom lianzaw sak hen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:38 Tua ahih ciangin Zadok, kamsang Nathan, Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah, le Khereth mite le Peleth mite paisukin Kumpi David’ la-sakol tungah Solomon tuangsak uh a, Gihon-ah amah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings1:39 Tua lai-ah siampi Zadok in puanbuk panin sathau biing la-in Solomon a nilh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in peengkul tum uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Kumpi Solomon khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:40 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama nungah pai-in tamngaikop tum uh a, nakpitakin lungdam uh a, amau’ gamlumna in lei a thawnkham hi." 
1Kings1:41 Adonijah le amah tawh a om leenglate khempeuh in a pawi bawl a man khit uh ciangin hih thu za uh hi. Joab in peengkul aw a zak ciangin amah in, “Khuapi sungah hih gamlumna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:42 Amah a kampau laitakin, siampi Abiathar’ tapa Jonathan hong pai hi. Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Hong tum in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang migina na hi a, thuhoih nong puak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:43 Jonathan in Adonijah dawngin, “Hilo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i to kumpi David in kumpi-in Solomon bawl khin hi." 
1Kings1:44 Kumpipa in amah tawh siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan, le Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah, le Khereth mite le Peleth mite sawl khin hi. Amaute in kumpipa’ la-sakol tungah amah tuangsak khin uh hi." 
1Kings1:45 Siampi Zadok le kamsang Nathan in Gihon-ah kumpi-in amah sathau nilh khin uh hi. Tua lai panin amaute lungdamin ciahkhin uh ahih manin khuapi sung gamlum hi. Nangma zak pen hih gamlumna ahi hi. 
1Kings1:46 Tu-in Solomon in kumpi tokhom luah khinta hi. 
1Kings1:47 Tua tham loin kumpipa’ nasemte i to Kumpi David tungah lungdamna a ko dingin pai uh a, ‘Na Pasian in nangma min sangin Solomon’ min a thangzaw-in bawl hen la, nangma tokhom sangin ama tokhom a lianzaw-in bawl ta hen,’ ci uh hi. A lupna tung panin kumpipa mahmah zong kun hi." 
1Kings1:48 Kumpipa in zong, ‘Keima mit-a ka muhin keima suanlekhakte khat ka kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin tuni-in a pia Topa, Israel Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:49 Tua ciangin Adonijah’ leenglate khempeuh ling uh a, dingin amau’ mun ciatah a ciah uh hi." 
1Kings1:50 Tua ciangin Adonijah in Solomon kihta hi. Amah pai-in biakna tau kite pom hi. 
1Kings1:51 Tua ciangin Solomon kiangah, “Adonijah in Kumpi Solomon hong kihta hi. Amah in biakna tau kite lenin, ‘Amah in a nasempa namsau tawh a thahloh nading kei tungah Kumpi Solomon hong kiciam masa hen,’ ci hi,” kici hi." 
1Kings1:52 Tua ciangin Solomon in, “Amah in a kilawm mi ahihna a lahtel theih leh ama samzang khat zong leilakah kialo ding a, ahi zongin ama sungah gitlohna a kimuh leh amah si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:53 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawl a, amaute in zong biakna tau panin amah paikhiatpih uh hi. Amah hong pai-in Kumpi Solomon’ tungah zahtakna bawl hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in ama kiangah, “Na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:1 David’ sih ding hun a nai ciangin amah in a tapa Solomon thuhilhin," 
1Kings2:2 “Leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin a pai ding ka hi ta hi. Thakhauhin pasal na hihna kilangsak in. 
1Kings2:3 Amah in kei tungah a hong gen, ‘Na tapate in a lungsim khempeuh uhleh a nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh keima mai-ah thuman takin gamtat ding limtakin a ngaihsut nak-uhleh Israel kumpi tokhom tungah khat beek in nang hong tamasak lo ding hi,’ ci-a a thugenna Topa in a kipsak theih nadingin, Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin Topa na Pasian’ thuhilhna zui-in, ama lampite hoihtakin tawn inla, ama thukhamte, a thupiakte, a biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin zui in. Tua hileh na heksuk na hektohna khempeuhah na dau hong pai ding hi." 
1Kings2:4  
1Kings2:5 “Tham loin, Zeruiah’ tapa Joab in kei hong bawlna, gal sunga a si mite’ phu a lakna-in gal kilem hun sungin a thah, Israel galkap ukte ahi mi nih, Ner’ tapa Abner le Jether’ tapa Amasa tungah a bawlna le, amah in mawhna nei lo mite thatin, tua ama gamtatna hangin ka thuaknate zong na thei hi." 
1Kings2:6 Tua ahih ciangin nangma pilna bangin gamta inla, lungnuam takin sih ngeina tawh amah na sihsak loh ding thei in." 
1Kings2:7 Ahih hangin Gilead mi Barzillai’ tapate tungah thuman takin gamta inla, na sabuai a an nete bangin amaute omsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Absalom’ kiang panin ka tai lai-in amaute in tua bang thumanna tawh kei hong bawl uh hi." 
1Kings2:8 Mahanaim ah ka pai lai-in a nasia samsiatna tawh kei a hong samsia, Bahurim panin a hong pai Benjamin mi Gera’ tapa Shimei zong nang tawh om hi. Ahih hangin Jordan-ah keimah a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin ama tungah Topa tawh kiciamin, ‘Namsau tawh nang kong that kei ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
1Kings2:9 Ahi ta zongin tu-in amah a mawhbaang loin ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang mipil na hi hi. Ama tungah na bawl dinga a kilawm na thei ngawn ding hi. Amah thatin a lutang hanah na paipihsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:10 Tua ciangin David si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi." 
1Kings2:11 Israel-te tungah David in kum sawmli sung uk hi. Amah in Hebron-ah kum sagih sung ukin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum le kum thum sung uk hi." 
1Kings2:12 Tua ahih ciangin a pa David’ tokhom tungah Solomon tu a, ama kumpi gam kiptakin kiphut hi." 
1Kings2:13 Tua ciangin Solomon’ nu Bathsheba kiangah David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah hong pai hi. Tua nu in, “Thunuama hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Thunuam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:14 Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Nang tungah gen ding khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:15 Adonijah in, “Kumpi gam pen keima-a’ hi-in, Israel-te khempeuh in keima uk ding a lamet mahmahna uh na thei hi. Ahi zongin kumpi gam kihei-in ka sanggampa-a’ suak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen Topa’ kiang pan ahi hi." 
1Kings2:16 Tu-in nangma tung panin kong nget ding khat om hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Tua nu in ama kiangah, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:17 Amah in, “Kumpi Solomon kiangah nong ngetsak ding kong thum hi. Amah in nang’ thu hong nial lo ding hi. Shunem mi Abishag ka zi dingin kei tungah hong piak ding ka ut hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:18 Bathsheba in, “Hoih mahmah hi; kumpipa kiangah kong gensak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:19 Tua ahih ciangin Adonijah tangin ama tungah thu a gen dingin Kumpi Solomon kiangah Bathsheba va pai hi. Tua ciangin tua nu a dawn dingin kumpipa dingin tua nu mai-ah a kun hi. Tua ciangin ama tokhom tungah tu-in kumpipa’ nu a dingin tutna khat lasak hi. Tua nu ama taklamah a tu hi. 
1Kings2:20 Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma tungah na neuno khat nget ding ka nei hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Hong ngen in, nu aw; kong nial kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:21 Amah in, “Shunem mi Abishag ama zi dingin na sanggampa Adonijah tungah kipia hen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:22 Kumpi Solomon in a nu dawngin, “Bang hangin Adonijah a dingin Shunem mi Abishag hong ngen na hi hiam? Kumpi gam zong ama a dingin ngetsak lai vet in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah ka u hi a, ama lamah siampi Abiathar le Zeruiah’ tapa Joab pang hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:23 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon zong Topa tawh kiciamin, “Hih thu in Adonijah’ nuntakna a lei kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen!" 
1Kings2:24 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, kei hong kipsakin ka pa David’ tokhom tungah hong koih a, ama ciamsa bangin kei tung le ka suanlekhakte tungah kumpi gam hong pia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, tuni-in Adonijah kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:25 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah sawl hi. Amah in tua pa satpuk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi." 
1Kings2:26 Tua ciangin siampi Abiathar’ kiangah kumpipa in, “Nangma mun le nangma gam a omna Anathoth ah ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sih ding a kilawm ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in ka pa David’ mai-ah Topa Pasian ’ Thuciamna Singkuang na puakna le ka pa’ gimna-ah na gimkhopna hangin tutungin nang kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Topa’ siampi hihna panin Abiathar hawlkhia-in, Eli innkuan tawh kisai thu Topa in Shiloh-ah a genna thu tua bangin a tungsak hi." 
1Kings2:28 Hih thu Joab kiang a tun ciangin Topa’ puanbukah Joab tai-in biakna tau kite a len hi. (Joab in Absalom pawlpih loin Adonijah a na pawlpihna hang ahi hi.) 
1Kings2:29 Kumpi Solomon kiangah, “ Topa’ puanbukah Joab tai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin Solomon in Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah sawlin, “Pai in; amah satpuk in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ puanbukah Benaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa in thu hong pia a, ‘Hong paikhia in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Hilo hi, hih lai-ah kei ka sizaw ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Benaiah in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Tua bangin Joab in thu gen a, tua bangin amah in kei hong dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:31 Kumpipa in amah dawngkikin, “Ama cihsa bangin hih in; amah satlum inla phum in. Joab in thu om lopi-in mi a thahna hangin mawhna pen keima tung le ka suanlekhakte’ tung panin tua bangin na siangsak ding hi." 
1Kings2:32 Topa in ama mawhna ama lu tung mahah tungsakkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David’ theih loh kalin amah in Israel galkapte a uk Ner’ tapa Abner le Judah galkapte a uk Jether’ tapa Amasa, amah sangin thuman zaw-in a hoihzaw ahi mihing nih do-in namsau tawh a that hi." 
1Kings2:33 Tua ahih ciangin mi thahna hangin gimna pen Joab’ lu tung le ama suanlekhakte’ lu tungah a tawntungin hong tungkik ding hi. Ahih hangin David’ tung, ama suanlekhakte’ tung, ama innkuan tung, le ama kumpi tokhom tungah Topa’ kiang panin a tawntung nopna om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:34 Tua ciangin Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah paito-in amah satpuk sukin that a, gamlak ama inn sungah amah kiphum hi." 
1Kings2:35 Kumpipa in Joab tangin galkapte’ tungah Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah koih a, kumpipa in Abiathar’ tangin siampi Zadok a koih hi." 
1Kings2:36 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “Jerusalem-ah inn khat lamin tua lai-ah teng inla, tua lai mun panin mun khat peuhpeuhah paikhia kei in." 
1Kings2:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang paikhia-in Kidron lui na kantan ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in; na sih leh nangma khialhna hang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:38 Tua ciangin Shimei in kumpipa kiangah, “Na thugen hoih hi; ka to kumpipa’ gen bangin na nasempa gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem-ah sauveipi sung Shimei om hi." 
1Kings2:39 Ahih hangin kum thum a cin ciangin Gath kumpipa Maakah’ tapa Akhish kiangah Shimei’ silate nih va tai uh hi. Shimei’ kiangah, “En in, na silate Gath-ah om hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei dingin la khat a van vawhin a silate a zong dingin Gath-a Akhish kiangah pai a, Gath panin a silate a ciahpih hi." 
1Kings2:41 Jerusalem panin Gath-ah Shimei pai-in a ciahkikna thu Solomon kiangah a kigen ciangin 
1Kings2:42 kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa tawh hong kiciam sakin, thupi takin nang hong thuhilhin, ‘Nang, mun khat peuhpeuhah na paikhiat ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in,’ hong ci hi lo ka hi hiam? Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Na thugen hoih hi; ka mang hi,’ na ci hi." 
1Kings2:43 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topa’ tungah na kiciamna le nang hong thuhilhin kong thupiakna zui lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Kings2:44 Tua banah kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Ka pa David tungah siatna na bawlte khempeuh na lungsimah na thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in nangma siatna nangma lu tung mahah hong tunkik ding hi." 
1Kings2:45 Ahih hangin Kumpi Solomon thupha kipia-in, a tawntungin Topa’ mai-ah a tokhom kikipsak ding hi,” zong a ci lai hi." 
1Kings2:46 psap Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah thu pia hi. Amah paikhia-in Shimei satpuk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi. Tua ahih ciangin Solomon’ khut sungah kumpi gam kikipsak hi." 
1Kings3:1 Solomon in Egypt kumpipa Faro tawh numei-a kizopna bawl hi. Amah in Faro’ tanu la a, ama inn le Topa’ biakinn le Jerusalem kimkota kulhpi a lam a zawh mateng David khuapi sungah tua nu paipihin omsak hi." 
1Kings3:2 Ahi zongin Topa a dingin biakinn kilam nai lo ahih manin mite in mualtung a biaknate-ah biakna pia uh hi. 
1Kings3:3 Solomon in Topa itin, a pa David’ thukhamte zui hi. Ahi zongin amah in mualtung a biaknate-ah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal hi." 
1Kings3:4 Tua ciangin biakna a pia dingin Gibeon-ah kumpipa pai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mualtung a biakna mun a lian pen ahi hi. Solomon in tua biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tam veipi tak a piaknasa mun ahi hi. 
1Kings3:5 Gibeon-ah zanin mang sungah Solomon’ tungah Topa kilang hi. Pasian in, “Nang kong piak ding hong ngen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:6 Solomon in, “Na nasem ka pa David’ tungah a lian itna kip na lak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh cihtakna, thumanna tawh nangma mai-ah gamta-in, nangma tungah lungsim thutang hi. Nangmah in ama a dingin hih a lian itna kip koihsakin, tuni-in ama tokhom tungah a tu ding tapa khat na pia hi." 
1Kings3:7 Tu-in, Topa ka Pasian aw, kei pen naupangno khat hinapi-in ka pa David’ munah kumpi-in na nasempa nong koih hi. Bangci gamtatin bangci nasep ding cih ka theih khat zong om lo hi." 
1Kings3:8 A lian, a phazah a kisim zo lo, a tamna a kiseh thei lo, nangmah in na teelsa na mite lakah na nasempa om hi." 
1Kings3:9 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in a sia le a pha ka theihtheih nadingin na mite uk nading thu theihtelna lungsim na nasempa hong pia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a lian a tam na mite kua in ukzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Kings3:10 Solomon’ thungetna in Topa lungkimsak hi. 
1Kings3:11 Pasian in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in hih thu hong ngenin, nangma a dingin khansauna ahi a, hauhna ahi a, na galte thahzawh nading ahi zongin hong ngen loin, a man thu na theih nadingin nang a dingin thu theihtelna hong ngen na hih manin," 
1Kings3:12 en in, nangma hong ngetna bangin kong pia ding hi. En in, nangma hun ma-in nang tawh a kibang a om loh nading le nangma khitah zong nang tawh a kibang hong khan loh nadingin pilna le theihna lungsim kong pia ding hi." 
1Kings3:13 Nangma hunsung tawntung kumpi dang nang tawh a kiteh theih lohna dingin nangma hong nget loh hauhna le pahtawina zong nang kong pia ding hi. 
1Kings3:14 Na pa David in a tot bangin nangmah in ka lampite tawnin, ka thukhamte le ka thupiaknate na zuih nakleh na khan ka sausak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:15 Tua ciangin Solomon khanglo a, hih pen a mang na hi hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah amah pai a, Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah amah dingin meihal biaknate le thunuama biaknate pia-in, a nasemte khempeuh a dingin pawi khat a kham hi." 
1Kings3:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah numei paktat nih hong pai-in a mai-ah ding uh hi. 
1Kings3:17 A numei khat in, “Aw, ka topa aw, hih numei le kei, inn khat sungah ka omkhawm uh hi; amah zong inn-ah a om sungin keimah in ta khat ka nei hi." 
1Kings3:18 Ka ta neih khit ni thum ni ciangin hih numei in zong ta hong nei hi. Ko gel bek a om ka hi uh a, kote tawh inn sungah kuamah dang om lo hi." 
1Kings3:19 Amah in delhphahkha ahih manin zanin hih numei’ tapa a si hi. 
1Kings3:20 Tua ciangin zankim laitakin amah tho-in, na nasemnu ka ihmut laitakin ka kiang panin ka tapa la-in ama ang-ah koih a, ama tapa si kei’ ang-ah hong koih hi." 
1Kings3:21 Zingsangin ka ta nawi a pia dingin ka thawh ciangin, a sisa na hi hi. Ahih hangin limtakin ka et ciangin, amah pen keima sung pana suak ta na hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:22 Ahih hangin a numei dang khat in, “Hilo hi; a hing naupang keima a’ hi a, a si naupang nangma a’ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a masa nu in, “Hilo hi; a si naupang nangma a’ hi a, a hing naupang keima-a’ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin kumpipa’ mai-ah amau tegel in thu gen tuak uh hi." 
1Kings3:23 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Khat in, ‘A nungta pen keima tapa hi a, nangma tapa si hi,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin adang khat in, ‘Hilo hi; nangma tapa si a, keima tapa a hing pen ahi hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Namsau khat hong la un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ mai-ah namsau khat hong kipaipih hi." 
1Kings3:25 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “A nungta naupang khen nih suah unla, khat tungah alang pia-in, adang khat tungah alang pia un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:26 Tua ciangin a tapa a nungta numei in a lungsimah a tapa khasiat ahih manin kumpipa kiangah, “Aw ka topa aw, a nungta naupang amah piazaw in; bangbang hitaleh amah that kei in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a khat in, “Hih pen kei ka hi a, amah in ahi zongin tang thei lo ding hi; hong hawmsak un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:27 Tua ciangin kumpipa in dawngin, “A masa numei tungah naupang hing pia un; bangbang hitaleh that kei un; amah pen a nu ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:28 Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh in kumpipa’ piak thukhenna za uh hi. Thutang a sem dingin ama tungah Pasian in pilna pia hi, ci-in phawk uh ahih manin amaute in kumpipa lamdangsa-in a om uh hi." 
1Kings4:1 Kumpi Solomon pen Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a," 
1Kings4:2 ama nuai-ah panmunte le a semte hih bang ahi hi: Siampi nasep: Zadok’ tapa Azariah ahi hi. 
1Kings4:3 Lai-at nasep: Shisha’ tapa Elihoref le Ahijah ahi uh hi. Thu ciamteh nasep: Ahilud’ tapa Jehoshafat ahi hi. 
1Kings4:4 Galkapte a uk nasep: Jehoiada’ tapa Benaiah ahi hi. Siampite nasep: Zadok le Abiathar ahi uh hi. 
1Kings4:5 Uliante tungah a uk nasep: Nathan’ tapa Azariah ahi hi. Kumpi thu lamlak nasep: Nathan’ tapa Zabud ahi hi. 
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn uk nasep: Ahishar ahi hi. Aana tawh nasemte a uk nasep: Abda’ tapa Adoniram ahi hi. 
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawm le nih nei-in tuate in kumpipa le a innkuan a dingin annek tuidawn vaihawmsak uh hi. Mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung annek tuidawn vaihawmsak ciat uh hi. 
1Kings4:8 Tua a vaihawm uliante: Benhur: Efraim mualtung gam sungah; 
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz khua, Shaalbim, Bethshemesh khua, le Elonbethhanan khua sungah;" 
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth khua sungah (Soko le Hefer gam khempeuh ama a’ hi); 
1Kings4:11 Benabinadab: Nafathdor gam sung khempeuhah (amah in Solomon’ tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi); 
1Kings4:12 Ahilud’ tapa Baana: Taanak khua, Megiddo khua, le Jezreel khua nuai Zarethan khua panga om Bethshean gam khempeuh, le Bethshean khua panin Jokmeam khua le Abelmeholah dongah;" 
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Ramothgilead gam sungah (amah in Gilead sunga om Manasseh’ tapa Jair’ khuaneute le Bashan sungah a om Argob gam sung, kulhpite le sumngo zawlte a nei khuapi lian sawmguk nei hi);" 
1Kings4:14 Iddo’ tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim khua sungah; 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz: Naftali gam sungah (amah in Solomon’ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi); 
1Kings4:16 Hushai’ tapa Baana: Asher gam le Bealoth khua sungah; 
1Kings4:17 Paruah’ tapa Jehoshafat: Issakhar gam sungah; 
1Kings4:18 Ela’ tapa Shimei: Benjamin gam sungah; 
1Kings4:19 Uri’ tapa Gebal: Amor mite’ kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gam sungah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawm le nihte banah Judah gam sung khempeuh a uk ulian khat omlai hi. 
1Kings4:20 Judah mi le Israel mi tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tam uh a, amaute in anne tuidawnin lungdam uh hi." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon in Eufratis panin Filistia gam le Egypt gamgi ciang dong kumpi gam khempeuh uk hi. Amaute in siah hong puak uh a, a nuntak sung tawntung uh Solomon’ na sem uh hi." 
1Kings4:22 Solomon a’ ding ni khatin annek tuidawn, annel lawh sawmthum, le an lawh sawmguk," 
1Kings4:23 bawngtal a thau sawm, le lonona a kivak bawng sawmnih; tuu zakhat; sakhitalte, le Syria sakhite, sanangte, le a thau vasate a kisim lo hi lai hi." 
1Kings4:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Eufratis nitumna lam gam sung khempeuh Tifsah panin Gaza ciang dong, Eufratis nitumna lampang kumpi khempeuh uk a, ama kiim mun khempeuhah galdaihna om hi." 
1Kings4:25 Solomon’ hun sung khempeuh Judah le Israel lungmuang takin omin, Dan panin Beersheba ciang dong nangawn mi khempeuh a leenggui le a theikung nuai uhah lungnuamin om uh hi." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon in a leengte a dingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawmli le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tulnih zong nei hi. 
1Kings4:27 Tua uliante in Kumpi Solomon le Kumpi Solomon’ sabuai-ah a hong pai mite khempeuh a dingin amau ciat sik kha sunga dingin annek tuidawn vaihawm uh a, amaute in bangmah kisamsak lo uh hi." 
1Kings4:28 Amau’ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a kisapna munah sakolte le sakol zaptelte a dingin mangbuhham le buhtu zong paipih uh hi. 
1Kings4:29 Pasian in Solomon’ tungah tehzawh lohin a thuk mahmah pilna le theihna, le genzawh loh lungsim zaina pia a," 
1Kings4:30 Solomon’ pilna in nisuahna lam mi khempeuh le Egypt pilna khempeuh khumlet hi. 
1Kings4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pilzaw a, Ezrah mi Ethan, le Mahol’ tapa Heman, Kalkol, le Darda sangin pilzaw lai a, a kiima minam khempeuh lakah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
1Kings4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pilzaw a, Ezrah mi Ethan, le Mahol’ tapa Heman, Kalkol, le Darda sangin pilzaw lai a, a kiima minam khempeuh lakah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
1Kings4:32 Amah in paunak tulthum zong genkhia a, ama laphuah dawng tul le dawng nga ahi hi." 
1Kings4:33 Amah in Lebanon-a om taamtak a kipan phungmai a po puknahte dongin singkung thu a gen hi. Amah in khe li nei ganhingte, vasate, a bokvak ganhingte, le ngasate’ thu a gen hi." 
1Kings4:34 Mi khempeuh le leitung kumpi khempeuh sung panin Solomon’ pilna thu a ngai dingin ama pilna thu a zasate hong pai uh hi. 
1Kings5:1 Amaute in ama pa’ munah kumpi-in amah sathau a nilhna thu a zak ciangin Taia kumpi Hiram in a nasemte Solomon kiangah sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hiram in David it tawntung hi. 
1Kings5:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in Hiram kiangah kam khak a," 
1Kings5:3 “ Topa in ama khenuai-ah amaute a koihsak matengin amah a umcih a galte tawh kidona hangin ka pa David in Topa ama Pasian’ min dingin biakinn a lam theih lohna thu na thei hi. 
1Kings5:4 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa ka Pasian in na khempeuhah tawlngakna kei tungah hong pia hi. Hong langpang ahi a, thusia ahi zongin om lo hi." 
1Kings5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah, ‘Nangma tangin na kumpi tokhom tungah ka koih ding na tapa in ka min dingin biakinn lam ding hi,’ a cih mah bangin Topa ka Pasian’ min dingin biakinn khat lam ka sawm hi." 
1Kings5:6 Tua ahih ciangin Lebanon taamtak singte kei a dingin a kiphukna ding thu pia in; ka nasemte in nangma nasemte seppih ding uh a, nangma seh bangin na nasemte’ thaman ding nang tungah kong pia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon mite bangin sing suih a siam kote lakah khat zong a om lohna na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings5:7 Hiram in Solomon’ kam a zak ciangin nakpitakin lungdam a, “Hih a lian a tam mite a uk dingin David’ tungah a pil tapa a pia Topa in tuni-in thupha ngah ta hen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings5:8 Tua ciangin Hiram in Solomon kiangah mi sawlin, “Kei kiangah nong thu-khak ka za hi. Taamtak sing le taaksan sing tawh kisai na deih khempeuh a hih dingin ka kiging hi." 
1Kings5:9 Ka nasemte in Lebanon panin tuipi-ah tuate hong puaksuk ding uh hi. Nangma cihna munah a pai dingin tuipi a tawn dingin keimah in tuate phongin ka bawl ding a, tua lai munah keimah in a singte phelsakin nangmah in na ngah ding hi. Nangmah in ka mite a’ ding anpiakna tawh ka deihnate nong kicingsak ding hi,” cisak hi." 
1Kings5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Hiram in ama deih taamtak le taaksan singte Solomon pia a," 
1Kings5:11 Solomon in Hiram tungah a mite’ an dingin mangbuh beem tul sawmnih le oliv thau bungpi tul sawmnih dim a pia hi. Solomon in Hiram’ tungah a kum kumin hihte a pia hi. 
1Kings5:12 Ama tungah a ciam bangin Topa in Solomon tungah pilna pia hi. Solomon le Hiram kilem uh a, amau tegel in thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi." 
1Kings5:13 Kumpi Solomon in Israel sung panin aana tawh na a sem mite la hi. A lak mite mihing tul sawmthum pha hi. 
1Kings5:14 Amah in Lebanon-ah tua mite kha khatin tul sawm a kikhelin puak hi. Amaute Lebanon-ah kha khat omin inn-ah kha nih om ding uh hi. Adoniram in hih a kila mite uk hi. 
1Kings5:15 Solomon in vanpua mi tul sawmsagih le mualtung gamah suangseek mi tul sawmgiat zong nei a," 
1Kings5:16 na a sem mite a uk, Solomon’ nuai-ah ulian tulthum le zathum, nasep ukte a kihel lo ahi hi." 
1Kings5:17 Suangseeksa tawh biakinn bulpi a phuh theih nadingin kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh amaute in a lian, a manpha suangtumte tokhia uh hi." 
1Kings5:18 Tua ahih ciangin biakinn lam nadingin Solomon’ mi innlamte le Hiram’ mi innlamte le Gebal mite in sing phuk le singlesuang nasep a sem uh hi. 
1Kings6:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kum zali le kum sawmgiatna, Israel-te tungah Solomon’ uk a kum lina, a kha nihna ahi Ziv kha-in amah in Topa’ biakinn lam ding kipan hi." 
1Kings6:2 Kumpi Solomon in Topa a dingin a lam biakinn, a sung pi sawmkua sau-in, pi sawmthum zai a, pi sawm le nga sang hi." 
1Kings6:3 Biakinn mai-ah a innliim pen biakinn zaina zahin pi sawmthum sau a, inn mai lamah pi sawm le nga sang hi." 
1Kings6:4 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn a dingin a pualam a kihui tawlette a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:5 Amah in biakinn pang tuak le a nunglam biakinn kawm kimkotin a kawm tungah zong inn lam a, a kimkot a pangah inndei bawl hi." 
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainung pen pi sagih le alang zai-in, a laita pi kua zai a, a thumna pi sawm le alang zai hi. Kawm sungah innkam a lut loh nadingin amah in inn pualam pang kimkota dingin a nanna singbekte a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:7 Biakinn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna mun panin a kibawlsa suangte tawh kilam hi. Tua ahih manin a kilam laitakin hei ahi a, sek ahi a, sik nazat khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a gingte biakinn huang sungah kiza lo hi." 
1Kings6:8 A dawl nuainung lut nading pen biakinn leitaw lampangah om hi. A dawl laita-ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna-ah kipai hi. 
1Kings6:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in biakinn lamin a zo hi. Amah in innkamte khungin taamtak peekte tawh inndap a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:10 Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin, dawl khat ciangin pi sagih le alang sang ciat a, taamtak singte-in a biakinn tawh kizom hi." 
1Kings6:11 Tu-in Topa’ thu Solomon’ tungah hong tung a," 
1Kings6:12 “Nangmah in na lam hih biakinn tawh kisai-in, ka thukhamte zui-in ka ngeina kipte mang a, ka thupiaknate khempeuh kemin tuate na zuih leh, na pa David tungah ka gen thu nang’ tungah kong kipsak ding hi." 
1Kings6:13 Tua ciangin na lam biakinn sung Israel mite lakah ka teng ding a, keima mi Israel-te ka nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in biakinn lamin a zo hi. 
1Kings6:15 Amah in taamtak peekte tawh biakinn sung kawm dap hi. Sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in sing tawh a sunglam tuam hi. Tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh a sual tuam hi. 
1Kings6:16 Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nunglam pi sawmthum taamtak peekte tawh lam a, amah in siangtho pen mun, biakinn sungnung dingin a inn sungah a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:17 Biakinn sungnung mai-a innsung, pi sawmguk sau hi." 
1Kings6:18 Inn sunga om taamtak singte tungah umgah le pakpalh lim kigelh hi. A vekpi-in taamtak a kidap hi a, suang kimu lo hi." 
1Kings6:19 Amah in Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang koih nadingin a sungtawng penah biakinn sungnung a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:20 Biakinn sungnung, pi sawmthum sau-in, pi sawmthum mah zai a, pi sawmthum mah sang a, amah in kham citak tawh a zut hi. Amah in taamtak sing biakna tau khat zong a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:21 Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh innsung zut a, biakinn sungnung mai kantanin kham khainiang khung a, kham tawh a zut hi." 
1Kings6:22 Amah in a inn buppi a zawh dongin kham tawh a zut hi. Biakinn sungnung a biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh a zut hi. 
1Kings6:23 Amah in biakinn sungnungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a, pi sawm le nga tuak a sang hi." 
1Kings6:24 Kherub kha langkhat, pi sagih le alang sau-in, kherub kha lang dang khat, pi sagih le alang mah sau a, a kha langkhat mong panin a mong langkhat dong pi sawm le nga ahi hi." 
1Kings6:25 Kherub adang khat zong pi sawm le nga mah sau a, Kherub tegel a sauna le a pianlim kibang hi." 
1Kings6:26 Kherub khat a sauna pi sawm le nga hi a, a kherub dang khat zong tua zah mah ahi hi." 
1Kings6:27 Amah in biakinn sung tawngnung penah kherub-te a koih hi. Kherub-te’ khate kizal a, khat’ kha in kawm banin, adang kherub’ kha in a kawm langkhat ban hi. Amau’ kha langkhat tegel inn laizangah kituah hi." 
1Kings6:28 Amah in kham tawh tua kherub-te a zut hi. 
1Kings6:29 Amah in a sungnung le a puanung inndeite, a kimkotin inn kawm khempeuh tungah kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:30 A sungnung le a puanung inndei sung innsualte amah in kham tawh a zut hi. 
1Kings6:31 Biakinn sungnung lut nadingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte a bawl hi; a bangtung zawl le kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi. 
1Kings6:32 Amah in kherub-te, nisuh kungte, le pakpalh lim kibawlte tawh oliv sing kongkhak peek nihte a tuam hi; amah in tuate kham tawh zut a, kherub-te le nisuh kungte tungah kham a theh hi." 
1Kings6:33 Tua bangmahin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte," 
1Kings6:34 le taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte a bawl hi. Kongkhak a peek nihte kikhepin, adang kongkhak a peek nihte zong kikhep hi." 
1Kings6:35 Tuate tungah amah in kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte bawl a, tua a bawlte tungah a tukimin kham tawh a zut hi." 
1Kings6:36 Amah in a kiseek suang gual thum le taamtak sing gual khat tawh a tual sungnung a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:37 A kum lina, Ziv kha-in Topa’ biakinn a bulpi kipan hi." 
1Kings6:38 A kum sawm le khatna, a kha giatna ahi Bul kha-in a na khempeuh le a kigen khempeuh bangin a kizo hi. Amah in tua a lamna-in kum sagih sung hun a bei hi." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon in ama inn ding zong kum sawm le thum sung lamin a inn buppi a zo hi. 
1Kings7:2 Amah in Lebanon Tulak Inn a kici khat a lam hi. A sauna pi zalesawmnga hi a, a zaina pi sawmsagih le nga hi-in, a sanna pi sawmli le nga hi a, taamtak khuampi gual thum tungah taamtak innkam kikhungin tua tungah a kilam ahi hi." 
1Kings7:3 Gual khatah sawm le nga a om khuampi sawmli le nga tunga kilam inndei tung san teng taamtak sing tawh kituam hi. 
1Kings7:4 A pang kawm tegel tungah tawlet gual thum tuak om a, a tawlet gual thumte khatlekhat kitang hi." 
1Kings7:5 A kongkhakte le a tawlet khempeuhte a pang kikim kiu li nei vive hi a, a gual thumin tawlet khatlekhat kitang dimdiam hi." 
1Kings7:6 Tua ciangin amah in Khuampi Innpi a kici khat lam hi. A sauna pi sawmsagih le nga hi a, a zaina pi sawmli le nga ahi hi. A mai lamah khuampite a nei innliim om a, tua khuampite tungah a tungkhuhna khat om hi." 
1Kings7:7 Tua ciangin amah in a thukhen nading mun Thukhenna Innpi ahi Kumpi Tokhom Innpi a kici khat lam a, a sual panin a innsun ciang dong taamtak sing kizang hi." 
1Kings7:8 Kumpi Tokhom Innpi nung lamah ama ten nading inn zong tua mah bangin a kilam ahi hi. Solomon in zi-a a lak Faro’ tanu a dingin hih innpi tawh a kibang inn dang khat zong a lam hi. 
1Kings7:9 Hihte khempeuh, a bulpi nangawn a kipan a khum dong, le Topa’ biakinn tual a kipan tual lianpi dongin, limtakin tehin, a kitan, a nung le a mai suangatna tawh a ki-at a manpha suangte tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Kings7:10 A bulpi pen a manpha suang, suang lian, pawlkhat pi sawm le nih, pawlkhat pi sawm le nga a pha suangte ahi hi." 
1Kings7:11 Tuate’ tung ate pen limtakin tehin a kitan a manpha suang, le taamtak sing ahi hi." 
1Kings7:12 Tual lianpi in a kimkotah a kiseek suang gual thum simin taamtak sing gual khat nei hi. Tua mah bangin Topa’ biakinn tual sungnung le innliim in zong a nei hi. 
1Kings7:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawlin Taia khua-a om Huram samsak hi. 
1Kings7:14 Amah pen Naftali minam meigongnu’ tapa hi a, ama pa pen Taia khuami sumngo seek na a sempa ahi hi. Amah in sumngo tawh na khat peuhpeuh hih nadingin pilna, theihna, siamna a nei ahi hi. Kumpi Solomon kiangah amah hong pai-in ama na khempeuh a sem hi." 
1Kings7:15 Amah in sumngo khuampi nih sung hi. Khuampi khat a sauna pi sawmnih le sagih hi a, a khuam pum kimkot pi sawm le giat pha hi. A sung hawm a, a sahna zung li ahi hi. A khuam nihna zong tua mah tawh kibang hi." 
1Kings7:16 Khuampite tungah a bulh dingin amah in a kisung sumngo khuamluzepna nih zong a bawl hi. Khuamluzepna khat a sauna pi sagih le alang hi a, adang khat khuamluzepna a sauna tua zah mah ahi hi." 
1Kings7:17 Tua ciangin amah in khuampite lu dawna khuamluzepna a dingin khainiang a kihuiheek tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam nih a bawl hi. Ngen khat pen khuamluzepna khat a’ ding hi a, a ngen dang khat pen khuamluzepna adang khat a’ ding ahi hi." 
1Kings7:18 Tua mah bangin amah in mang kawlsing gahte a bawl hi. Khuampi lu dawna om khuamluzepna tuam nadingin ngen tawh kibangin a bawl tung kimkotah gual nih bawl a, a khuamluzepna dang khat zong tua mah bangin a bawl hi." 
1Kings7:19 Tua ciangin innlim a om khuampi dawnah a om khuamluzepnate pi guk pha a, tuate tungah unok pak a kibawlte om hi." 
1Kings7:20 A khuamluzepnate pen a khuampi nihte tung le ngen tawh kibanga kibawl gei-a a om a bem a dawk tungah om hi. A kimkotah gual nihin mang kawlsing gah zanih om a, a khuamluzepna dang khatah zong tua bangmah ahi hi." 
1Kings7:21 Amah in biakinn innlimah khuampite a phut hi. Leitaw lamah a khuam khat phutin a min Jakhin phuak a, leilu lamah a khuam dang khat phutin a min Boaz a phuak hi." 
1Kings7:22 A khuampite dawnah unok pak a kibawl om hi. Tua bangin khuampite a bawl a man khin hi. 
1Kings7:23 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi a bawl hi. Tua tuikuang a bem hi a, a gei khat pan a gei khat pi sawm le nga pha-in, pi sagih le alang thuk a, a kimkot pi sawmli le nga a pha hi." 
1Kings7:24 A geivial nuai pi sawmli le nga sung, tuikuangpi kimkotin um gahte kibawl hi. Tua um gahte gual nihin om a, a tuikuangpi a kisunin kisung khawm pah hi." 
1Kings7:25 Bawngtal sawm le nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a, thum leilu lam nga a, thum nitumna lam nga-in, thum leitaw lam nga a, thum nisuahna lam a nga hi. Tuate tungah a tuikuangpi kikoih a, a nunglam uh a sunglamah om hi." 
1Kings7:26 A tuikuang sahna khutpeekmai cia ahi hi. A geivial pen unok pak tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl hi. Tua sungah tui tambong tulli bang ta thei hi. 
1Kings7:27 Amah in sumngo kibawl tuikuang a kingakna sawm zong a bawl hi. Tua a bawlte pi guk sau, pi guk zai, pi li le alang sang hi." 
1Kings7:28 Tua a kingaknate hih bangin kibawl hi: Tuate in a khawkte nei-in, tua a khawkte a kungah kibulh a," 
1Kings7:29 tua ciangin a kungah a kibulh a khawkte tungah humpinelkaite, bawngtalte, le kherub-te om hi. Tua kungte tung, humpinelkaite le bawngtalte’ tung le nuai-ah a sawi-in a kikalh limliam om hi." 
1Kings7:30 Tua tham loin tua ngaknate in sumngo tawh a kibawl leengpeite le leengpei zawlte nei ciat a, a kiu lite-ah tuikuangpi nannate om hi. Tua nannate a kisung hi a, a pang ciatah pakkual om hi." 
1Kings7:31 A gong pen a kingakna pan pi khat le alang sangto hi. A gong pen kingakna a kibawl bangin bem a, pi nih le letmat thum thuk hi. A gongah lim kigelhte om hi. A khawkte in sikli nei a, bem lo hi." 
1Kings7:32 A leengpei lite pen a khawkte’ nuai-ah om hi. Leengpei zawlte a kingakna tawh sakhat mah hi a, leengpei a sanna pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
1Kings7:33 A peite pen sakol leengpei bangin kibawl hi; a pei zawl, a peikual, a peikalhna, le a kalhna bulte khempeuh a kisung ahi hi." 
1Kings7:34 A kingaknate’ kiu ciatah a nanna li om ciat a, tua a nannate a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
1Kings7:35 Tua ciangin a ngakna dawnah letmat kua a sang vial bem khat om hi. A ngakna dawnah a kipsaknate le a khawkte pen a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi. 
1Kings7:36 Tua ciangin a kipsaknate le a khawkte tungah a mun awng zah ciat tawh kizui-in amah in kherub-te, humpinelkaite, le nisuh kungte gelhin a kimkotah pakkual a bawl hi." 
1Kings7:37 Tu-a bangin amah in a kingakna sawm bawl hi. A vekpi-in a kibangin kisungin, a liatna le a pianlim a kibang ahi hi." 
1Kings7:38 Tua ciangin amah in sumngo tuikuang sawm bawl hi. Tuikuang khatah tui tambong sawmgiat bang ta-in, tuikuang vangsung pi guk ciat pha a, a kingakna sawmte a dingin tuikuang khat ciat om hi." 
1Kings7:39 Tua ciangin amah in tua a kingaknate, biakinn leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi. Tua ciangin biakinn khang nisuahna lam kiu-ah tuikuangpi a koih hi." 
1Kings7:40 Huram in beelte, kawbiate, le kuangte zong a bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin Huram in Kumpi Solomon a dingin Topa’ biakinn a ding nasep khempeuh a zo hi." 
1Kings7:41 Khuampi nihte, khuampite dawnah a om khuamluzepna kuak nihte, le khuampite dawnah a om khuamluzepna kuak nihte tuam nading ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl nihte;" 
1Kings7:42 khuampite tungah a om khuamluzepna nihte a tuam dingin ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl khat a dingin mang kawlsing gah gual nih ahi, ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl nih a dingin mang kawlsing gah za lite;" 
1Kings7:43 a kingakna sawmte, le a kingaknate tungah a om tuikuang sawmte;" 
1Kings7:44 tuikuangpi khat, le tuikuangpi nuai-ah a om bawngtal sawm le nihte ahi hi." 
1Kings7:45 Tu-in beelte, kawbiate, le kuangte, Huram in Kumpi Solomon a dingin a bawl, Topa’ biakinn sungah a om nazatte khempeuh a tee sumngo tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan zanglei, Sukkoth le Zarethan kikal beel lei-ah kumpipa in tua nate sungsak hi." 
1Kings7:47 Tamlua ahih manin Solomon in hih nate khempeuh tawiteh zo lo hi; sumngo gik zah kithei lo hi. 
1Kings7:48 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ biakinn sunga om nazat khempeuh Solomon in bawl hi. Kham biakna tau, Ompihna Anlum a dingin kham sabuai," 
1Kings7:49 biakinn sungnung mai, leitaw lampangah nga omin, leilu lampangah nga a om kham citak meivakkhuamte; kham tawh a kibawl paakte, meivakte, le taitehte;" 
1Kings7:50 paknamtui a dingin haite, taitehte, kuangte, pakante, le kham citak vutluahna; le siangtho pen mun biakinn sung tawngnung kongkhakte le biakinn sung kongkhakte a dingin kham bilte ahi hi." 
1Kings7:51 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Topa’ biakinn a hih nasep khempeuh kizo hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in a pa David’ apsa nate, ngun, kham, le nazatte paipihin Topa’ biakinn sung vankoihna-ah tuate a koih hi." 
1Kings8:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Zion a kici David khuapi panin Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn sungah a paipih dingin Jerusalem khuasung ama kiangah Israel upate le minam lutang, Israel beh makaite a khawm hi." 
1Kings8:2 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh a kha sagihna Ethanim kha sunga pawi hunin Kumpi Solomon kiangah kikhawm uh hi. 
1Kings8:3 Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a, siampite in Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn-ah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings8:4 Tua ciangin amaute in kikhopna buk, le puanbuk sunga om a siangtho nazatte khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Siampite le Levi mite in tuate paipihto uh hi." 
1Kings8:5 Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a kikhawm Kumpi Solomon le Israel mihonte khempeuh in biakna-in tuu le bawngtalte tampi tak pia uh ahih manin tuate a phazah kisim zo lo hi. 
1Kings8:6 Tua ciangin siampite in a kherub-te’ kha nuai, siangthopen mun sung, biakinn sungnung lama ama munah Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih uh hi." 
1Kings8:7 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang omna mun tungah a kha uh zak ahih manin Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah kherub-te in khuhna piangsak uh hi. 
1Kings8:8 A zawlte sau mahmah ahih manin biakinn sungnung mai siangtho mun panin a zawl mongte kimu a, ahih hangin a pualam panin kimu thei lo hi. Tuni dongin tua san takah tuate om hi." 
1Kings8:9 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat lai-un Topa in Israel mite tawh thuciamna a bawlna Horeb-ah Moses in suangpek nih a koih simloh bangmah dang om lo hi." 
1Kings8:10 Siangtho mun panin siampite a paikhiat ciangin meii in Topa’ biakinn tuam a," 
1Kings8:11 meii hangin siampite nasem dingin om thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ minthanna vang in Topa’ biakinn a tuam hi. 
1Kings8:12 Tua ciangin Solomon in, “ Topa in vantungah ni koih khin a, ahih hangin khuamial sahpi sungah amah a ten ding gen khin hi." 
1Kings8:13 Keimah in nangma a dingin a kipahtawi mun khat, na ten tawntung nading biakinn khat ka lam khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:14 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte a din laitakin kumpipa in en kawikawi-in Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha a pia hi. 
1Kings8:15 Tua ciangin amah in, ”‘Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te ka paikhiatpih a kipanin keima min a om theih nadingin biakinn khat lamna ding Israel minam khempeuh sungah khuapi khat zong ka teel kei hi. Ahih hangin ka mi Israel-te tungah a uk dingin David ka teel hi,’ ci-in ka pa David tungah a kam tawh a ciamsa a tungsak Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
1Kings8:16  
1Kings8:17 Israel Pasian, Topa’ min dingin biakinn khat lam ding ka pa David’ lungsim sungah om ngei hi." 
1Kings8:18 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah, ‘Keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding na lungsim sungah a omna thu a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
1Kings8:19 Ahi zongin nangmah in a biakinn na lam kei ding a, nangma sung pan hong suak ding na tapa in ka min dingin biakinn a lam ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
1Kings8:20 Tu-in ama bawlsa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David’ munah keimah khangin, Topa’ ciamsa bangin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah ka tu a, Israel Pasian, Topa’ min dingin a biakinn ka lam khin hi." 
1Kings8:21 Amah in Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topa’ thuciamna a omna Thuciamna Singkuang a dingin tua lai-ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:22 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh a omna Topa’ mai-ah Solomon ding a, vantung lamah a khutte zak hi." 
1Kings8:23 Amah in, “Israel Pasian, Topa aw, tunga om vantung ahi a, nuai-a om leitungah ahi zongin, nangma mai-ah a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh a gamta na nasemte tungah thuciamna lenin itna kip a lak, nang tawh a kibang pasian om lo hi." 
1Kings8:24 Na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu na kipsak hi. Nangmah in na kam tawh na gen a, tuni-in na tungsak hi." 
1Kings8:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian, Topa aw, ama tungah, ‘Keima mai-ah nang na gamtat mah bangin na tapate in keima mai-ah gamtat ding a kidop nak-uhleh, Israel kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin keima mai-ah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in na nasem ka pa David tungah na ciamsa thu lenkip in." 
1Kings8:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian aw, na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu kipsak in." 
1Kings8:27 “Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teng taktak ding ahi hiam? Vantung le vantung a sangpen in nang hong huam zo lo hi. Tua ahih manin keima lamsa hih biakinn in bangzahin nang hong huam zo lo zaw kan ding ahi hiam? 
1Kings8:28 Ahi zongin na nasempa’ thungetna le a hong thumna hong don in la, Topa ka Pasian aw, tuni-in nangma mai-ah na nasempa in a hong ngetna, a kikona le a thungetna hong ngai in." 
1Kings8:29 ‘Tua lai-ah ka min om ding hi,’ na cihna mun hih biakinn lamah sun le zanin na mit hak inla, na nasempa in hih mun lamah a thungetna hong za in." 
1Kings8:30 Amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na mi Israel-te’ hong thumna zong ngai in. Na tenna mun vantung panin hong za inla, ka mawhna uh hong maisak in." 
1Kings8:31 “Mi khat a vengpa tungah khialin, amah a kiciamsak a, amah hong pai-in hih biakinn sung nangma biakna tau mai-ah a kiciam leh," 
1Kings8:32 nangmah in vantung panin za-in gamta inla, na nasemte thu khen inla, a mawh pa thuak sakin ama lu tung mahah ama gamtatna tungsak in la, a dikpa a dikna langsakin ama dikna tawh kizui-in thaman pia in." 
1Kings8:33 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin galte mai-ah na mi Israel-te a guallelh ciangin, amaute nang lamah hong kihei kikin nangma min hong phawk a, hih biakinn sungah thu ngenin nang tungah hong thum uhleh," 
1Kings8:34 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel-te’ khialhna maisak inla, a pu a pate uh tungah na piak leitangah amaute paipih kik in." 
1Kings8:35 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh ciangin, amaute in hih mun lamah thu ngenin na min hong phawk a, amaute na gimsak ciangin amau’ khialhna panin a kihei uhleh," 
1Kings8:36 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel, na nasemte’ khialhna maisak in la, amaute’ zuih ding lampi hoih hilh inla, na mite tungah gamh-in na piaksa leitang tungah guah zusak in." 
1Kings8:37 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin, pulnatna ahi a, ankung natna ahi a, ankung zawngkhalna ahi a, kauphe ahi a, lung ahi zongin a om a, amau’ khuapi khat peuhpeuh a galte un umcihin, bangbang gimna, bangbang natna hitaleh," 
1Kings8:38 mi khatpeuh ahi a, na mi Israel-te khempeuh in ahi zongin amau’ lungsim natna thei-in hih biakinn lamah a khutte hong zanin bangbang thungetna hitaleh bangbang thumna hitaleh hong bawl uhleh," 
1Kings8:39 na tenna vantung panin za-in maisak in. Tua ciangin amau’ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang, nang bek in mihing khempeuh lungsim na thei hi)." 
1Kings8:40 Tua hileh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hun sung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi. 
1Kings8:41 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel a hi lo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi panin hong pai-in 
1Kings8:42 (bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthanna le nangma mite a dingin na sepsak na liante’ thu za ding uh hi), hih biakinn lamah thu hong nget ciangin," 
1Kings8:43 na tenna vantung panin za inla, tua gamdang mipa in nang tungah hong ngetna khempeuh tawh kizui-in hih in. Nangma mi Israel-te mah bangin leitung mi khempeuh in na min thei-in nang hong zahtak nading, le hih ka lamsa biakinn pen nangma min tawh a kilo ahihna a theihna ding uh ahi hi." 
1Kings8:44 “A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuankhia-in, bangbang lamah amaute sawl hita lecin, nangmah in na teelsa khuapi lam, Topa’ tung le nangma min dingin ka lamsa biakinn lamah thu hong nget uh ciangin," 
1Kings8:45 amau’ hong thungetna le hong thumna vantung panin za-in amau’ vai huh in. 
1Kings8:46 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin - bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khial lo kuamah om lo hi - amaute tungah nang heh a, galte tungah amaute pia-in, amaute kimanin a galte’ gam a gamla ahi a, a nai-ah ahi zongin kipuakhia a," 
1Kings8:47 ahi zongin amaute a kipuak khiatna leitangah amaute in a lungsim uhah thu ngaihsunin kisik kik a, ‘Kote khialin lampialin ka gitloh tat uh hi,’ ci-in amaute a mante’ leitang panin nang tungah hong thum uh a," 
1Kings8:48 amaute manin a puakhia a galte uh leitangah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh le a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisik kikin, nangmah in na teelsa khuapi, amau’ pute pate’ tungah na piaksa amau’ leitang, le nangma min dingin ka lam biakinn lam nga-in nangma tungah thu hong nget uhleh" 
1Kings8:49 vantung na tenna mun panin amau’ hong thungetna le hong thumna za-in, amau’ vai huh in." 
1Kings8:50 Nang tungah hong khial na mite le nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amau’ thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin, a galte un amaute tungah hehpihna a neih theih nadingun amaute manin a puakhia mite’ muhna-ah amaute hehpih in." 
1Kings8:51 (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt panin na paikhiatpih, sik meiphual sung panin na paikhiatpih nangma mi le nangma luah ahi uh hi.)" 
1Kings8:52 Na nasempa’ hong thumna le na mi Israel-te’ hong thumna-ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung inla, nang hong sap peuhmah uh ciangin amaute na bil na ngat in." 
1Kings8:53 Egypt panin ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasempa Moses tungtawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na tengkhia hi, Topa Pasian aw,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:54 Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna le thumnate khempeuh Topa’ tungah a bawl khit ciangin, vantung lamah a khutte a zan sa-in a khukdinna mun Topa’ biakna tau mai panin amah dingto hi." 
1Kings8:55 Tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in," 
1Kings8:56 “Ama hong ciamsa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israel-te tungah tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah ta hen! A nasempa Moses tungtawnin a gensa ama thuciam hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawk lo hi. 
1Kings8:57 I pu i pate a ompih mah bangin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih hen la, eite hong nusia kei hen la, hong taisan kei hen." 
1Kings8:58 Amah in i pu i pate a thupiaksa ahi ama lampi khempeuh a zui ding, le ama thupiaknate, a thukhamte, le a ngeina kipte a zui dingin ama lamah i lungsim hong awnsak hen." 
1Kings8:59 Topa’ mai-ah ka thumna kammalte sun le zanin Topa i Pasian in hong za hen la, nisimin a kisam bangin a nasempa’ vai le ama mi Israel-te’ vai hong huh tahen." 
1Kings8:60 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in Topa pen Pasian hi, ci-in thei ding uh a, kuamah dang a om lohna phawk ding uh hi." 
1Kings8:61 Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian’ tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman unla, tuni-a bangin ama thukhamte zui-in a thupiaknate mang un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:62 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa’ mai-ah biakna a pia uh hi. 
1Kings8:63 Solomon in thunuama biakna-in Topa’ tungah bawngtal tul sawmnih le tulnih le tuu tul zakhat le tul sawmnih a pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le Israel mi khempeuh in Topa’ biakinn a ap uh hi. 
1Kings8:64 Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topa’ biakinn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuama biakna a thaute a tazo dingin Topa’ mai-a sumngo biakna tau neulua ahih manin tua lai-ah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuama biakna thaute a pia hi. 
1Kings8:65 Tua hi a, tua hun lai-in Solomon le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa i Pasian’ mai-ah ni sagih sung, Hamath khua lutna panin Egypt lui dong kikhopna lianpi khat bawlin pawi khat kham uh hi." 
1Kings8:66 A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi. Amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a, Topa in a nasempa David le ama mi Israel-te tungah hoihna a lahnate khempeuh hangin lungdamna le lungsim kipahna tawh a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi." 
1Kings9:1 Solomon in Topa’ biakinn le kumpi inn le a lamnop khempeuh a lam a man khit ciangin," 
1Kings9:2 Gibeon-a ama tungah a kilahsa bangin Solomon tungah Topa a nihveina kilang hi. 
1Kings9:3 Topa in ama kiangah, “Keima mai-ah na hihsa na thungetna le na thumnate ka za khin hi. Na lamsa hih biakinn ka ap khin hi. A tawntungin tua biakinn sungah kei hong kibia ding a, a tawntungin tua biakinn ka hu ding hi." 
1Kings9:4 Nang ahihleh, na pa David a gamtat bangin lungsim thupina le thumanna tawh ka mai-ah gamta-in, nang kong thupiak khempeuh bangin sem a, ka thukhamte le ka ngeina kipte na zuih leh," 
1Kings9:5 na pa David tungah, ‘Israel kumpi tokhom tungah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in ka ciamsa bangin Israel-te tungah na kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi." 
1Kings9:6 Ahih hangin nang na hi a, na tate ahi zongin, keimah zuihna panin pialin, note mai-ah ka koih ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte na zuih kei uh a, pasian dangte’ na a sem ding le a bia dingin na pai uhleh," 
1Kings9:7 amaute ka piaksa leitang panin Israel mite ka lakhia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka apsa biakinn pen ka muhna panin ka lawnkhia ding a, Israel-te pen mi khempeuh lakah paunak le thugentehna suak ding hi." 
1Kings9:8 Tua ciangin hih biakinn pen ninbulomtang suak ding a, a nawkkha mi khempeuh in lamdangsa-in, eh! ci ding uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih leitang le hih biakinn hih bangin hih ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi." 
1Kings9:9 Tua ciangin amaute in, ‘Egypt panin a pu a pate uh a paikhiatpih Topa a Pasian uh amaute in nusia-in pasian dangte len uh a, tuate bia-in a na a sepna hang uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih siatna khempeuh amaute tungah tungsak hi,’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings9:10 Solomon in inn nihte, Topa’ biakinn le kumpi inn a lam kum sawmnih a beina," 
1Kings9:11 Taia kumpi Hiram in Solomon’ deih zahzah taamtak sing le taaksan sing le kham a piak khit ciangin, Kumpi Solomon in Galilee gam sunga om khuapi sawmnih, Hiram tungah a pia hi." 
1Kings9:12 Ahih hangin Solomon in amah a piaksa khuapite a en dingin Taia panin Hiram hong pai ciangin, tua khuapite tawh amah lungkim zo lo hi." 
1Kings9:13 Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Ka sanggam aw, kei nong piak hih khuapite a bangci khuapi ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin tuate Kabul gam kici hi." 
1Kings9:14 Hiram in kumpipa kiangah a piak kham talen zakhat le talen sawmnih a pha hi. 
1Kings9:15 Topa’ biakinn, ama inn, Jerusalem kulh, le Hazor, Megiddo, le Gezer khuate a lam dingin Kumpi Solomon in aana tawh na a semte a la hi." 
1Kings9:16 (Egypt kumpi Faro paito a, Gezer la-in mei tawh hal a, a khuapi sunga teng Kanaan mite thatin Solomon’ zi, a tanu’ tungah mokenin a khuapi a piak ahi hi." 
1Kings9:17 Tua ahih manin Solomon in Gezer khua lamkik hi). Tua banah Bethhoron nuainung 
1Kings9:18 le Baalath le Judah gam sung gamlakah Tamar," 
1Kings9:19 le Solomon in a neih vankoihna khuapi khempeuh, le a leengte-a’ ding khuapite, le a sakol tung tuangte a’ ding khuapite, le Jerusalem sung, Lebanon sung, le ama ukna gam sung khempeuhah zong Solomon in a lamnop khempeuh a lamkik hi." 
1Kings9:20 Israel mi a hi lo Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, le Jebus mite sung panin a omlai mi khempeuh," 
1Kings9:21 Israel mite in a suksiat khit siang zawh loh, tua gamah amau’ nunga a omlai a suanlekhakte uh, Solomon in aana tawh na a sem salin bawl ahih ciangin tuni dongin tua bangmahin amaute om uh hi." 
1Kings9:22 Ahih hangin Solomon in Israel mite salin bawl lo hi. Amaute pen galkapte, ama nuai-ah a uliante, a galkapmangte, a leeng ukte, le a sakol tung tuangte ahi uh hi." 
1Kings9:23 Solomon’ innlam nasep a uk ulianpite mi zanga le sawmnga ahi hi. 
1Kings9:24 Faro tanu a dingin Solomon in a lamsak ama inn-ah a om dingin David khuapi panin amah a paikhiat khit ciangin Solomon in Millo a lam hi. 
1Kings9:25 Solomon in Topa a dingin a lam biakna tau tungah meihal biakna le thunuama biakna kum khatin thumvei pia-in Topa’ mai-ah paknamtui a hal hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a biakinn a zo hi. 
1Kings9:26 Kumpi Solomon in Edom gam sung San Tuipi gei dunga om Eloth nai-a Eziongeber-ah teembaw honkhat a bawl hi. 
1Kings9:27 Tua ciangin Hiram in tua teembaw honte tawh tuipi tung nasep a thei tuipi mi a nasemte, Solomon’ nasemte tawh sawlkhia hi." 
1Kings9:28 Tua ciangin amaute Ofir-ah pai-in tua lai panin kham talen zali le sawmnih hong pua uh a, amaute in Kumpi Solomon kiangah tuate tunpih uh hi." 
1Kings10:1 Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Topa’ min tawh kisai-in Solomon’ minthanna a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh amah a ze-et dingin hong pai hi. 
1Kings10:2 Amah nungzui honpi, a namtui nate a pua kalaohte, kham tampi, le suangmanpha tampi tawh Jerusalem-ah hong pai a, Solomon’ kiangah a tun ciangin amah in a lungsim a om khempeuh Solomon tungah a gen hi." 
1Kings10:3 Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah a gentel theih loh, haksa lua a sak bangmah om lo hi." 
1Kings10:4 Sheba kumpinu in Solomon’ pilna, ama lamsa a inn," 
1Kings10:5 a sabuai-ah a an, a uliante’ omzia, le a nasemte’ etna, a puante uh, a an piate, le Topa’ biakinn-ah a piak meihal biaknate khempeuh a muh khit ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah hi." 
1Kings10:6 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka gam sung panin nangma thu le na pilna ka zak a kigen thute man mahmah hi."
