2Chronicles36:23 “Persia kumpipa Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Vantung Pasian, Topa in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh kei hong pia khin a, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua-ah ama a dingin biakinn khat ka lamsak ding hong sawl hi. Note lakah ama mi ahi khempeuh, Topa a Pasian uh in ompih tahen. Biakinn lam dingin Jerusalem-ah amaute paito sak un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra1:1 Persia kumpi Sairas’ uk kum khatna kumin, Jeremiah tungtawnin Topa’ thugen a tun theih nadingin, ama gam sung khempeuhah taangkona khat bawlin lai-in zong a gelh nadingin Persia kumpi Sairas’ lungsimah Topa in a suaksak hi. Amah in hih bangin a hih hi:" 
Ezra1:1 Persia kumpi Sairas’ uk kum khatna kumin, Jeremiah tungtawnin Topa’ thugen a tun theih nadingin, ama gam sung khempeuhah taangkona khat bawlin lai-in zong a gelh nadingin Persia kumpi Sairas’ lungsimah Topa in a suaksak hi. Amah in hih bangin a hih hi:" 
Ezra1:2 “Persia kumpi Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung Pasian, Topa in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh keima tungah hong pia khin a, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua-ah ama a dingin biakinn khat ka lamsak ding hong sawl hi." 
Ezra1:3 Note lakah ama mi peuhmah a Pasian in ompih hen la, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua-ah paito hen la, Israel Pasian, Topa’ biakinn lamkik hen. Amah pen Jerusalem-ah a om Pasian ahi hi." 
Ezra1:4 Tua ciangin koilai mun koilai gam a om hitaleh Judah mi a omlai khempeuh, ama omna mun mite in Jerusalem-a om Pasian’ biakinn a dingin utthu-a a piakte uh banah, ngun le kham, nate le ganhingte tawh zong huh ciat uh hen,” a ci hi." 
Ezra1:5 Tua ciangin Judah le Benjamin sunga innkuan lutangte, le siampite le Levi mite, Jerusalem khua-a om Topa’ biakinn a lamkik dingin a lungsim sung uhah Pasian in a suahsak mite khempeuh kithawi uh hi." 
Ezra1:6 Tua ciangin a veng a pamte in thatang tawh a huh uh banah ngun tawh kibawl umlebeel, kham, van tuamtuamte, ganhingte, le letsong manphate tawh huh thuah lai uh hi." 
Ezra1:7 Tua tham loin, Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin puakhia-in ama pasian-te’ biakinn sungah a koihsa ahi Topa’ biakinn-a om ngei umlebeelte zong kumpipa Sairas in pusuah hi." 
Ezra1:8 Persia kumpi Sairas in hihte pusuahin sumkem pa Mithredath’ khut sungah ap hi. Tua pa in Judah ukpa Sheshbazzar a dingin a malzah simin sazian bawlsak hi. 
Ezra1:9 Tua nate a phazah: Kham kuang tulkhat, ngun kuang tulkhat, umlebeel a nam tuamtuam sawmnih le kua," 
Ezra1:10 kham kuang-uk sawmthum, ngun kuang-uk a nam tuamtuam zali sawmkhat, le umlebeel adang tulkhat ahi hi." 
Ezra1:11 Kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte khempeuh a vekpi-in tulnga zali sawmguk kua pha hi. Tua hi a, Babylon panin salte a kiciahpih kik ciangin Sheshbazzar in tua nate khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciahpih hi." 
Ezra2:1 Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin Babylon-ah salin a lakte sung panin hih mite Jerusalem le Judah-ah a ciahkikte hi a, amau’ khua ciatah a ciah uh ahi hi." 
Ezra2:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, le Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel mi phazahte:" 
Ezra2:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, le Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel mi phazahte:" 
Ezra2:3 Parosh suante - tulnih zakhat sawmsagih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:4 Shefatiah suante - zathum sawmsagih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:5 Arah suante - zasagih sawmsagih le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:6 Pahathmoab beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - tulnih zagiat sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:7 Elam suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:8 Zattu suante - zakua sawmli le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:9 Zakkai suante - zasagih sawmguk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:10 Bani suante - zaguk sawmli le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:11 Bebai suante - zaguk sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:12 Azgad suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:13 Adonikam suante - zaguk sawmguk le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:14 Bigvai suante - tulnih sawmnga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:15 Adin suante - zali sawmnga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:16 Ater a kici Hezekiah suante - sawmkua le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:17 Bezai suante - zathum sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:18 Jorah suante - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:19 Hashum suante - zanih sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:20 Gibbar suante - sawmkua le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:21 Bethlehem khuami - zakhat sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:22 Netofah khuami - sawmnga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:23 Anathoth khuami - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:24 Bethazmaveth khuami - sawmli le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:25 Kiriathjearim khua, Khefirah khua, le Beeroth khuami - zasagih sawmli le thum ahi hi." 
Ezra2:26 Ramah khua le Geba khuami - zaguk sawmnih le khat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:27 Mikmash khuami - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:28 Bethel khua le Ai khuami - zanih sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:29 Nebo khuami - sawmnga le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:30 Magbish khuami - zakhat sawmnga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:31 Elam adang khat suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:32 Harim suante - zathum sawmnih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:33 Lod khua, Hadid khua, le Ono khuami - zasagih sawmnih le nga ahi hi." 
Ezra2:34 Jerikho khuami - zathum sawmli le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:35 Senaah gammi - tulthum zaguk sawmthum ahi uh hi. 
Ezra2:36 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - zakua sawmsagih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:37 Immer suante - tulkhat sawmnga le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:38 Pashhur suante - tulkhat zanih sawmli le sagih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:39 Harim suante - tulkhat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi. 
Ezra2:40 Levi mite sung panin: Hodaviah-te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawmsagih le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:41 Lasate sung panin Asaf’ suante - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:42 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante, Akkub suante, Hatita suante, le Shobai suante, a vekpi-in - zakhat sawmthum le kua ahi hi." 
Ezra2:43 Biakinn nasemte sung panin Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante," 
Ezra2:44 Keros suante, Siaha suante, Padon suante," 
Ezra2:45 Lebanah suante, Hagabah suante, Akkub suante," 
Ezra2:46 Hagab suante, Shamlai suante, Hanan suante," 
Ezra2:47 Giddel suante, Gahar suante, Reaiah suante," 
Ezra2:48 Rezin suante, Nekoda suante, Gazzam suante," 
Ezra2:49 Uzza suante, Paseah suante, Besai suante," 
Ezra2:50 Asnah suante, Meunim suante, Nefisim suante," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante," 
Ezra2:52 Bazluth suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante," 
Ezra2:53 Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante," 
Ezra2:54 Neziah suante, le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:55 Solomon’ nasemte nam sung panin: Sotai suante, Hassofereth suante, Peruda suante," 
Ezra2:56 Jaalah suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante," 
Ezra2:57 Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokherethhazzebaim suante, le Ami suante ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:58 Biakinn nasemte khempeuh le Solomon’ nasemte’ suanlekhak khempeuh a vekpi-in zathum sawmkua le nih a pha uh hi. 
Ezra2:59 Temelah, Teharsha, Kherub, Addan, le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik, Israel mi hinapi-in amau’ behlephung a kan thei lo mite:" 
Ezra2:60 Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante, le Nekoda suante, mi zaguk sawmnga le nih ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:61 Siampite sung panin zong: Habaiah suante, Hakkoz suante, le Barzillai suante (amah in Gilead mi Barzillai tanute khat tenpihin tua min tawh a kilo pah) ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:62 Hih mite in khang kiciamtehna-ah amau’ min a zon uh hangin amau’ min na om lo ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a, siampi nasep semsak thei lo uh hi." 
Ezra2:63 Urim le Thummim aisanna tawh ai a san ding siampi khat a om mateng amaute in biakna an siangpente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpa in a gen hi. 
Ezra2:64 Mi a vekpi - tul sawmli le tulnih le zathum sawmguk pha uh a," 
Ezra2:65 amaute’ nasem numei le pasal mihing - tulsagih le zathum sawmthum le sagihte kisim lo hi. Amaute in lasa numei le pasal mihing zanih nei uh hi. 
Ezra2:66 Amau’ sakolte - zasagih sawmthum le guk, amau’ la-sakol - zanih sawmli le nga," 
Ezra2:67 amau’ kalaoh - zali sawmthum le nga, le a la uh - tulguk zasagih le sawmnih pha hi." 
Ezra2:68 Amaute Jerusalem-a Topa’ biakinn a tun uh ciangin Pasian’ biakinn ama mun ngei-ah lamkik nadingin innkuan lutangte pawlkhat in Pasian’ biakinn a dingin piakna bawl uh hi. 
Ezra2:69 Amaute in a hih zawhna zah uh tawh kizui-in tua nasep nadingin vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tul sawmguk le tulkhat, ngun mina tulnga, le siampipuan zakhat a pia uh hi." 
Ezra2:70 Siampite, Levi mite, le mi pawlkhatte Jerusalem le a kiim nai-ah teng uh hi. Lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte, le Israel mi khempeuh amau’ khuapi ciatah a teng uh hi." 
Ezra3:1 A kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amau’ khuapi ciatah teng khin uh ahih manin, khekhat khai bangin Jerusalem-ah hong kituah diam uh hi." 
Ezra3:2 Tua ciangin Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua le a siampipihte, le Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel le a behte hong kipan uh a, Pasian’ mi Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin meihal biaknate piak nadingin Israel Pasian biakna tau a bawl uh hi." 
Ezra3:3 Amaute in tua gam a midang tengte kihta uh ahih manin a mun lui mahah biakna tau phut pahin zing le nitak simin Topa’ tungah meihal biakna a pia uh hi. 
Ezra3:4 Tua ciangin amaute in a kikipsaksa bangin buk pawi bawl uh a, nisimin zat dingin a kisehsa zah bangin meihal biakna nisimin a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:5 Tua ciangin hihte banah a tawntung a meihal biakna, Khadet sima biakna, le Topa’ pawi a kisehsa hun khempeuh le Topa’ tungah amau’ utthu tawh a pia mite khempeuh’ biaknate zong a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:6 Topa’ biakinnpi a bul a kiphuh nai loh hangin a kha sagihna a ni masa ni a kipanin amaute in Topa’ tungah meihal biaknate piak ding kipan uh hi. 
Ezra3:7 Tua hi a, amaute in suangseekte le khutsiamte tungah sum pia uh a, Persia kumpi Sairas’ tung panin a thu ngahna bangun Lebanon mualtung gam panin tuipi gei Joppa khua-ah taamtak singte a hong puaksuk ding Sidon khuamite le Taia khuamite tungah zong annek tuidawn le sathau a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:8 Amaute, Jerusalem khua-a Pasian’ biakinn-ah a hong ciahkik uh a kum nihna, tua kum a kha nihna sungin Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua, nasep kipan uh a, a Israel mipihte, siampite, Levi mite, le salsuahna panin Jerusalem-ah a hong ciahkik mite khempeuh in zong a huh uh hi. Amaute in Levi mite kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah peuhmah Topa’ biakinn sungah biakna nasepte a vaan dingin a seh uh hi." 
Ezra3:9 Jeshua a tapate le a behte tawh, le Hodaviah-te beh Kadmiel le a tate in Henadad’ tapate le Levi mi a tapate uh le a behte uh tawh Pasian’ biakinn-ah nasemte tungah ukna tavuan a lakhawm uh hi." 
Ezra3:10 Innlamte in Topa’ biakinn a bul a phuh uh ciangin, Israel kumpipa David in a geelkholhsa bangin Topa a phat dingin siampite in a puan uh silhin peengkul tawh, Asaf’ tapa Levi mite daltuah tawh a panmun ding uhah hong pang uh hi." 
Ezra3:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa phatna le lungdamkohna a kidawngin sa uh a, “ Topa hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te hong itna kip tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi. Topa’ biakinn bulpi kiphut khin ahih manin mi khempeuh in nakpitakin Topa phat uh hi." 
Ezra3:12 Midang tampi lungdamin a aw neih zahun a kiko uh hangin a biakinn masa a mu ngeisa siampite, Levi mite, le innkuan lutang, midang tampite in hih biakinn bulpi a kiphuh a muh uh ciangin kapin a thum uh hi." 
Ezra3:13 Mite nakpitakin kiko ahih manin lungdamna awging, le kahna le thumna awgingte mite in khen thei lo uh hi. Gamlapi pek panin tua awgingte a kiza hi." 
Ezra4:1 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mite in Israel Pasian Topa a dingin biakinn khat a lamna thu Judah le Benjamin mite’ galte in a zak uh ciangin 
Ezra4:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua, le innkuan lutangte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah, “Biakinn lamna-ah ko zong hong kihelsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh note mah bangin ko zong na Pasian uh ka bia uh a, hih lai-ah kote hong koih Assiria kumpipa Esarhaddon’ hun lai a kipanin note’ Pasian’ tungah biakna ka pia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:3 Ahih hangin Zerubbabel le Israel sunga innkuan lutang a omlaite in amaute kiangah, “Kote’ Pasian a dingin ka lam uh biakinn pen note’ hong lunghihmawhpih ding hi lo hi. Persia kumpipa Sairas in kote hong thupiaksa bangin Israel Pasian, Topa a dingin ko teng guak mah in ka lam ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:4 Tua ciangin tua gam a teng midangte in Judah mite lungkiasakin biakinn a lam zomlai ding uh a lausak uh hi. 
Ezra4:5 Amau’ ngimna a tangtun theih loh nadingin amaute in a langpang dingin zum nasemte golhguk pia uh hi. Persia kumpipa Sairas’ hun a kipan kumpi Darias hun dong hih bangin hih ngitnget uh hi. 
Ezra4:6 Ahasueras in uk ding hong kipat ciangin Judah gam le Jerusalem-a a tengte a khiatna thu tua gamah a na tengsate in lai-in a gelh uh hi. 
Ezra4:7 Tua ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis hun ciangin Mithredath, Tabeel, le a lawmte uh thukimna tawh kumpipa tungah lai gelh uh a, a lai pen Aram lai-in kigelh a, Aram pau mahin kisimkhia hi." 
Ezra4:8 Menzipipa Rehum le lai-at pa Shimshai in Kumpi Artakzaksis tungah Jerusalem tawh kisai thu a nuai-a bangin gelh uh hi. 
Ezra4:9 Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai, le a lawmte khempeuh, thukhente, mangpite, thuvaante, uliante, Erek khuami le Babylon khuami, Susa khua-a om Elam mite," 
Ezra4:10 le a lian a minthang Ashurbanipal in hong puakhia-in Samaria khuapi-ah a hong tensak mite le Eufratis Gun langkhat a kizawhna gam sunga a om mite tung panin lai puak, a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:11 A lai sung thu hih a nuai-a bang ahi hi: “Artakzaksis Kumpipa tungah, Eufratis Gungal gam a om na nasemte in hopihna kam kong puak uh hi." 
Ezra4:12 “Nangma kiang panin ko kiangah a hong pai Judah mite, tu-in Jerusalem-ah tung khin uh a, a gilo, mi lehdo thei ahi khuapi pen amaute in lamkikin, amaute in a khua bulpi vel khinin, kulhpi cian’ a kipat khitna thu thei in." 
Ezra4:13 Amau’ khuapi kilam kikin kulhte kizo leh amaute in siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin hong pia nawn lo ding uh a, a tawpna-ah kumpi hong sukkhak ding thu thei in." 
Ezra4:14 Kote in kumpipa tawh thuciamna kip nei khin ka hih manun kumpipa’ minsiatna ka muh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin nangma mai-a a semte’ thuciamtehna laibute a ki-etkik theih nadingin kumpipa tungah thu kong zasak uh hi. Thuciamtehna laibu sung en lecin hih khuapi pen a lehdo thei khuapi, kumpipa tung le a ukna gamte tungah siatna a piangsak, kumpi dona a khua sungah a om tawntungna thu na mukhia ding hi. Hih khuapi a kisukcipna zong hih thu hang mah ahi hi." 
Ezra4:15  
Ezra4:16 Hih khuapi kilam kikin a kulhte kizo khin leh Eufratis Gungal gam na uk nawn loh nading thu, nangma tungah kong theikholsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a lai uh hih bangin thuk hi: “Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at pa Shimshai, le Samaria le Eufratis Gungal gam sunga om na lawmte khempeuh uh tungah hopihna lai kong khak hi." 
Ezra4:18 “Keima tungah nong khak uh lai pen a kitel takin keima zakna-ah hong kisim khin hi. 
Ezra4:19 Keimah in hih thu a kikanna ding thu ka pia a, tu-in kikantel khinta hi. Tanglai a kipanin hih khuapi pen kumpi langah pangin, hih khua sungah lehdona le kumpi dona a om ngitngetna thu kimukhia hi." 
Ezra4:20 A vanglian kumpite in Jerusalem-ah uk ngei-in, Eufratis Gungal gambup tungah aana zang uh a, siah, mangmu, le losapte tua kumpite tungah kipia hi." 
Ezra4:21 Tua ahih ciangin hih mite a nasep uh a khawlna ding thu pia in. Keimah in thu kong piakkik mateng hih khuapi kilamkik lo ding hi. 
Ezra4:22 Hih thu tawh kisai-in na sep ding don loin ommawk kei in. Tua hi kei leh kumpi tungah siatna le gimna hong khang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra4:23 Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai, le amau’ lawmte’ zakna-ah Kumpi Artakzaksis tung panin a kingah lai a kisim ciangin, Jerusalem-ah amaute pai pahin Judah mite a nasep uh aana tawh a khawlsak uh hi." 
Ezra4:24 Tua hun a kipanin Jerusalem-a om Pasian’ biakinn a kisepna a khawl hi. Persia kumpi Darias’ uk a kum nihna dong tua bangin a khawlcip phot hi. 
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddo’ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem-ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin, Israel Pasian’ min tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddo’ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem-ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin, Israel Pasian’ min tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Ezra5:2 Tua ciangin Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua, Jerusalem-a Pasian’ biakinn lamkik ding kipan pah uh a, Pasian’ kamsangte in amaute ompihin huh uh hi." 
Ezra5:3 Tua laitakin Eufratis Gungal gam sung teng a uk sawn Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, le amau’ lawmte hong paipahin amaute kiangah, “Note in hih biakinn lamkikin a nate na bawlna ding uh kua in thu hong pia ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra5:4 Hih biakinn lam nasepna-ah a sem mite’ min zong amaute in dong uh hi. 
Ezra5:5 Ahi zongin Pasian in Judah upate huh ahih manin Darias kiangah a thu va tungin ama tung pan thu a kingahkik hun dong a nasep zomna uh kikhaktan lo hi. 
Ezra5:6 Eufratis Gungal gam a uk sawn Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, le Eufratis Gungal gam sung thu a vaan ama lawmte in Kumpi Darias tungah lai khak uh hi." 
Ezra5:7 Amaute in thuzaksakna lai hih bangin a gelh uh hi: “Kumpi Darias tungah thupha namcin hong tung tahen. 
Ezra5:8 “Judah gam, a lian Pasian’ biakinn-ah ka va paina uh kong theisak uh hi. Tua biakinn pen suang lianpipite tawh kilamin a kawmte sing tawh kibawl hi. Hih biakinn limtakin kisemin amau’ makaihna tawh a nasep uh telh mahmah hi." 
Ezra5:9 “Hih biakinn a kilamkikna ding le a nate a zawh nadingin kua in thu pia hiam, cih thu hih upate tungah ka dong uh hi." 
Ezra5:10 Nangmah in a makai teng na theih nadingin amaute’ min zong ka dong uh hi. 
Ezra5:11 “Amaute in hih bangin hong dawng uh hi: ‘Kote pen vantung le leitung Pasian’ nasemte ka hi uh a, kum tampi lai-in a kilamsa biakinn a lamkik ka hi uh a, a lian Israel kumpi khat in lamin a zawhsa ahi hi." 
Ezra5:12 Ahi zongin ka pu ka pate un vantung Pasian hehsakkha uh ahih manin Babylon kumpipa, Khaldea mi Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah amaute pia hi. Tua kumpipa in hih biakinn susia a, a mite Babylon-ah ciahpih hi." 
Ezra5:13 Ahi zongin Babylon kumpipa Sairas’ uk a kum khatna kumin hih Pasian’ biakinn a kilamkikna ding amah in thu pia hi. 
Ezra5:14 Tua tham loin Jerusalem-a biakinn sung panin Nebukhadnezzar in la-in Babylon biakinn sunga a koih ahi Pasian’ biakinn sunga om ngeisa kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte zong kumpi Sairas in Babylon biakinn panin lakhia-in gam ukin a hong koih Sheshbazzar min nei pa tungah ap hi. 
Ezra5:15 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Hih umlebeelte paipih inla, Jerusalem-a biakinn-ah va koihkik in. Tua lai-a Pasian’ biakinn pen a mun ngei mahah lamkik sak in,” ci hi." 
Ezra5:16 Tua ciangin Sheshbazzar hong pai-in Jerusalem-a Pasian’ biakinn a bulpi hong phut hi. Tua hun a kipanin tu dong lamkik kisem suak a, ahi zongin kizo nai lo hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezra5:17 “Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak leh, Jerusalem-a hih Pasian’ biakinn a kilamkikna ding thu kumpipa Sairas in thu pia takpi hiam, pia taktak lo hiam cih a kitheih nadingin Babylon khua sunga om laibu koihna innte sung zongsak in. Tua khit ciangin kumpipa in na deihna hong zasakkik in,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra6:1 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in thu pia a, Babylon khua sunga lai manphate a kisenna innte sung kizong hi." 
Ezra6:2 Ahi zongin Babylon khua sungah na om lo a, Media gam sung kumpi khuapi Ekbatana-ah laizial khat kimu a, tua sungah hih a nuai-a bangin a kiciamteh kimu hi:" 
Ezra6:3 “Kumpi Sairas’ kum khatna kumin Jerusalem khua-a Pasian’ biakinn tawh kisai-in kumpipa in thu pia hi: Biakna kipia-in meihal biakna a kipaipihna munah biakinn lamsakkik un. A sanna pi sawmkua, a vai pi sawmkua mah hi ding a," 
Ezra6:4 a kawm pen suang thuap thum le sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl, thuap li hi ding hi. Hih sum beinate ahihleh kumpi sum panin kipia ding hi." 
Ezra6:5 Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin lakhia-in Babylon-ah a hong tunpih Pasian’ biakinn sunga om kham le ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte zong kipiakik ding hi. Tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn-ah kipuakik ding a, Pasian’ biakinn sunga a omna munmun ciatah kikoihkik ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Ezra6:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in hih bangin thu a pia hi: “Tu-in Eufratis Gungal gam a uk Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, le Eufratis Gungal gam sung a vaan na lawmte, tua mun panin na kihemkhia ding uh hi." 
Ezra6:7 Judah mi a ukpa le a upate in hih Pasian’ biakinn a lamkik theih nadingun na tuaci omsak ding uh hi. Ama mun ngei mahah a biakinn lamsakkik un. 
Ezra6:8 Hih a kigen Pasian’ biakinn a kilamkik theih nadingin hih Judah upate a dingin na hih dingte uh zong thu kong pia hi. Hih nasepna a mawk khawl loh nadingin, Eufratis Gungal gam sung panin a kingah siahte ahi kumpi sum sung panin beina khempeuh a cingin kipia ding hi." 
Ezra6:9 Vantung Pasian’ tungah meihal biakna-in piak dingin a kisam khempeuh - bawngtalnote, tuutalte, ahih kei leh tuunote na pia ding uh a, Jerusalem-a siampite’ hong ngetna bangin mangbuh, ci, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathaute, kitasam loin nisimin amaute tungah piasak un." 
Ezra6:10 Tua hileh amaute in vantung Pasian’ tungah a namtui biaknate pia-in kumpipa le a tapate’ nuntakna ding thu hong ngetsak thei ding uh hi. 
Ezra6:11 Tua tham loin, mi khatpeuh in hih thupiakna a siatsak leh ama inn panin a innkam khat kidawhkhiat sakin tua tungah amah kihen cipin kisatgawp ding a, tua banah a inn zong a kisuksiatna ding thu kong pia thuah lai hi." 
Ezra6:12 Hih ka thupiakna a siasak nuam, Jerusalem-a Pasian’ biakinn a susia nuam kumpi khatpeuh ahi a, mi khatpeuh ahi zongin a om leh, ama min omna dinga tua mun a bawl Pasian in tua mipa lawnthal tahen. Keimah Darias in thu kong pia hi. Ka thupiak bang teekteekin sep ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra6:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in amaute tungah a thupiak bang teekteekin Eufratis Gungal gam sung a uksawn Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, le a lawmte in sem uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a, kamsang Haggai le Iddo’ suan Zekhariah’ thugenna hangin Judah upate in a biakinn lam uh zom suakin maavang uh hi. Israel Pasian’ sawlna le Persia kumpi Sairas le Darias le Artakzaksis-te’ thupiakna tawh amaute in a biakinn lam uh a zo uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a, kamsang Haggai le Iddo’ suan Zekhariah’ thugenna hangin Judah upate in a biakinn lam uh zom suakin maavang uh hi. Israel Pasian’ sawlna le Persia kumpi Sairas le Darias le Artakzaksis-te’ thupiakna tawh amaute in a biakinn lam uh a zo uh hi." 
Ezra6:15 Tua hi a, Kumpi Darias’ kum gukna, Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in a biakinn kizo hi." 
Ezra6:16 Tua ciangin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, le sal a suaksa a hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in lungdamna lianpi tawh Pasian’ biakinn apna a bawl uh hi." 
Ezra6:17 Amaute in Pasian’ biakinn apna-in bawngtal zakhat, tuutal zanih, le tuuno zali go uh a, mawhna hanga biak nadingin Israel-te khempeuh a dingin a minam phazah tawh kizui-in keeltal sawm le nih a pia uh hi." 
Ezra6:18 Tua ciangin Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Jerusalem-a Pasian’ nasep nadingin siampite amau’ panmun ngei-ah pangsak uh a, Levi mite amau’ nasepna ngei-ah a semsakkik uh hi." 
Ezra6:19 A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in sal a suaksa a hong ciahkik mite in Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi. 
Ezra6:20 Siampite le Levi mite a vekpi-un kisiansuah khin uh a, a vekpi-un zehsiang khin uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in sal suaksa a hong ciahkik khempeuh a’ ding, a siampipihte uh le amau mahmah a dingin Paisan tuuno a go uh hi." 
Ezra6:21 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik Israel-te le Israel Pasian, Topa a bia dingin tua gam a midang tengte le a nitna uh pan amau le amau a kihemkhia tawm mite khempeuh in tua Paisan Pawi an a ne uh hi." 
Ezra6:22 Tua hi a, amaute in lungdamna tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ lungdamna ding a om theih nadingin Topa in Assiria kumpipa’ lungsim amau’ tungah a nuam dingin a bawlsak hi. Tua ahih manin Israel Pasian ahi Pasian’ biakinn a sepna uhah kumpipa in amaute a huh hi." 
Ezra7:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis uk hun sungin Ezra, a pa Seraiah, a pa Azariah, a pa Hikiah," 
Ezra7:2 a pa Shalum, a pa Zadok, a pa Ahitub," 
Ezra7:3 a pa Amariah, a pa Azariah, a pa Meraioth," 
Ezra7:4 a pa Zerahiah, a pa Uzzi, a pa Bukki," 
Ezra7:5 a pa Abishua, a pa Finehas, a pa Eleazar, a pa siampi lianpen pa Aaron:" 
Ezra7:6 hih Ezra pen Babylon panin hong tungto hi. Amah pen Israel Pasian, Topa in a piak Moses thukham a siam laithei mi khat ahi hi. Topa ahi ama Pasian in ompih ahih manin ama nget khempeuh kumpipa in a pia hi." 
Ezra7:7 Kumpi Artakzaksis in a uk a kum sagihna kumin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte, le biakinn nasem pawlkhat zong, Jerusalem-ah Ezra tawh tungto uh hi." 
Ezra7:8 Kumpipa’ uk kum sagih a cin kum, a kha ngana sungin Jerusalem tung uh hi." 
Ezra7:9 A kha masa a ni khat ni-in Babylon pan a ding khia dingin Ezra in a ni sehkhol a, a kha ngana a ni khat ni-in Jerusalem a tung uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in amah ompih hi." 
Ezra7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ezra in Topa’ thukham sinin zuih ding, le Israel mite a hilh dingin amah kipia hi." 
Ezra7:11 Kumpi Artakzaksis in siampi ahi, laithei pa lah ahi, Israel-te a dingin Topa’ thupiaknate le thukhamte a siam Ezra tungah a piak lai pen hih bang ahi hi:" 
Ezra7:12 “Kumpite’ kumpi ahi Artakzaksis kiang panin vantung Pasian’ thukham a siam, siampi hi-in laithei pa lah ahi Ezra tungah:" 
Ezra7:13 “Ka lungsim khentatna hih bang ahi hi: Ka gam sunga om Israel mi khatpeuh ahi a, a siampite uh ahi a, Levi mite ahi zongin, Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik nuam khempeuh in nang hong zuih theih nadingun thu ka pia hi." 
Ezra7:14 Nang tungah hong kipia ahi na Pasian’ thukham tawh kisai-in Judah le Jerusalem-ah thu bangci om hiam cih a va thei dingin kumpipa keimah le thu hong lamlak mihing sagihte in kong sawl uh hi. 
Ezra7:15 Kumpipa le a thu lamlakte in Jerusalem-ah a teng Israel Pasian tungah lungkim takin a piak ngun le khamte zong," 
Ezra7:16 Babylon gamah na muh uh ngun le khamte, le Jerusalem-a note’ Pasian’ biakinn dingin mite le siampite in lungkim takin a piak khiat zuazuate uh tawh a va puakkhawm ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezra7:17 “Hih ka thupiakna tawh kizui-in hih sumte pen Jerusalem-a note’ Pasian’ biakinn-a biakna tau tungah piak dingin bawngtalte, tuutalte, tuunote, le a an tawh biaknate, le a leenggahzu tawh biakna dingte leina ding bekin na zang ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:18 Tua banah ngun le kham a val a omlai leh, note’ Pasian’ deihna tawh kituakin hoih na sak bangun na lawmte tawh na zang thei ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:19 Na Pasian’ biakinn-ah zat dingin hong kipia umlebeelte pen Jerusalem Pasian tungah na va pia ding hi. 
Ezra7:20 Na Pasian’ biakinn a dingin a kisam, na piak ding a phamawh a omkhak zenzen leh kumpipa sum sung panin na zang thei ding hi." 
Ezra7:21 “Tua hi a, kumpipa keimah Artakzaksis in Eufratis Gungal gam sunga om kumpi vankemte khempeuh tungah hih bangin thu ka pia hi: Vantung Pasian’ thukham a siam lai a thei, siampi Ezra in note tung panin a kisapna hong nget ciangin," 
Ezra7:22 ngun talen zakhat, mangbuh seu zakhat, leenggahzu tambong zanih, sathau tambong zanih ciang, le ci a deih zahzah na pia ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:23 Vantung Pasian in a deih peuhpeuh, vantung Pasian biakinn a dingin limtakin hih un. Tua hikeileh kumpipa tapate le kumpi gam tungah amah hong heh kha ding hi." 
Ezra7:24 Siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte, ahih kei leh hih Pasian’ biakinn-a nasemte khat peuhpeuh tung panin siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin lakna ding thu na neih lohna uh zong kong zasak uh hi, ka ci hi." 
Ezra7:25 “Tua hi a, nang Ezra in nang tungah hong kipia na Pasian’ pilna tawh kizui-in Eufratis Gungal gam sunga mite thu a khen dingin na Pasian’ thukham a thei mite seh in. Nang le amaute in na Pasian’ thukham a thei lote na hilh ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:26 Na Pasian’ thukham le kumpipa’ thukham a mang lo peuhmah, sihna ahi a, hawlkhiatna ahi a, neihsa matna ahi a, thongkiatna ahi zongin, a ngah ding a kilawm thukhenna tawh khauhtakin gim kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra7:27 Tua ciangin Ezra in, “Jerusalem-a om Topa’ biakinn tua bangin a minthangsak thuah dingin kumpipa lungsimah suak a, kumpipa le a thu lamlakte le a uliante kei tungah a thunuam dingin a bawl i pu i pate’ Pasian ahi Topa in thupha ngah ta hen!” a ci hi. Tua hi a, Topa ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna thei ka hih manin ka lungsim hong hang a, kei hong zui dingin Israel makaite ka khawm hi." 
Ezra7:28  
Ezra8:1 Kumpi Artakzaksis’ uk hun sungin Babylon panin kei tawh hong ciahto khawm a behbehin a kiciamteh beh lutangte hih bang ahi hi: 
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniah’ tapa ahi hi. 
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniah’ tapa ahi hi. 
Ezra8:3 Zekhariah: Parosh-te beh sung pan hi a, amah tawh pasal zakhat le sawmnga kiciamteh hi." 
Ezra8:4 Eliehoenai: Pahathmoab-te beh panin Zerahiah’ tapa hi a, pasal zanih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:5 Shekaniah: Zattu-te beh panin Jahaziel’ tapa hi a, pasal zathum tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:6 Ebed: Adin-te beh panin Jonathan’ tapa hi a, pasal sawmnga tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:7 Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliah’ tapa hi a, pasal sawmsagih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:7 Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliah’ tapa hi a, pasal sawmsagih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:8 Zebadiah: Shefatiah-te beh panin Mikhael’ tapa hi a, pasal sawmgiat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:9 Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehiel’ tapa hi a, pasal zanih le sawm le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:9 Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehiel’ tapa hi a, pasal zanih le sawm le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:10 Shelomith: Bani-te beh panin Josifiah’ tapa hi a, pasal za le sawmguk tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:11 Zekhariah: Bebai-te beh panin Bebai’ tapa hi a, pasal sawmnih le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:12 Johanan: Azgad-te beh panin Hakkatan’ tapa hi a, pasal za le sawmkhat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:13 Elifelet, Jeiel, le Shemaiah: A hong nungpai Adonikam-te beh zong hi uh a, pasal sawmguk tawh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra8:14 Uthai le Zabbud: Bigvai-te beh pan hi uh a, pasal sawmsagih tawh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra8:15 Ahava gam lamah a luang lui gei khatah amaute ka khawm a, tua lai-ah ni thum sung ka tam uh hi. Mite le siampite ka etphat ciangin Levi mite khat zong na om lo hi." 
Ezra8:16 Tua ahih ciangin a lawmte lakah a makai, Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekhariah, le Meshullam-te, le thu ngaihsut siam Joiarib le Elnathan-te ka sam a," 
Ezra8:17 Kasifia mun a a makai pa Iddo kiangah va pai-in, tua lai-a biakinn nasem amah le a behte in, eite’ Pasian’ biakinn-a na a sem ding mihing hong puak ding uh a ngen dingin ka sawl hi." 
Ezra8:18 Tua hi a, hehpihna a nei eite’ Pasian in hong ompih ahih manin Levi mi Mahli-te beh sung panin thu ngaihsutsiam mi ahi Sherebiah, a tapate le a behte tawh pasal sawm le giat," 
Ezra8:19 le Merari-te beh panin Isaiah, a behte le amau’ tapate mi sawm le nih le Hashabiah tawh," 
Ezra8:19 le Merari-te beh panin Isaiah, a behte le amau’ tapate mi sawm le nih le Hashabiah tawh," 
Ezra8:20 Levi mite’ na a sem dingin David le a uliante in a tuamkoih ahi biakinn nasem zanih le sawmnih hong pia hi. Hih mite khempeuh amau’ min ciat tawh a kisam ahi hi. 
Ezra8:21 Tua ciangin eite’ Pasian’ mai-ah kote kiniamkhiat thei-in, kote le ka naupangte uh le ka neihsa khempeuh uh nuamtakin ka khualzinna uhah ka pai theih nading uh Pasian’ tung pan ka nget theih nadingun Ahava lui-ah an tanna ding thu ka taangko hi." 
Ezra8:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa kiangah, “Ka Pasian un amah a zong mite khempeuh ompihin amau a dingin a hoih na sem a, amah a nusiate khempeuh tungah amah heh hi,” ci-in gen khin ka hih manun lampi-ah kote hong kha dingin galkapte le sakol tung tuangte kumpipa kiangah ka nget ding ka mai a zum hi." 
Ezra8:23 Tua hi a, kote in an ka tang uh hi. Nuamtakin khual ka zin theih nading uh i Pasian’ tungah ka ngen uh a, amah in ka thungetna uh hong pia hi." 
Ezra8:24 Tua ciangin siampi liante sung panin mi sawm le nih - Sherebiah, Hashabiah, le amau’ behte mi sawm ka tuamkoih hi." 
Ezra8:25 Tua ciangin i Pasian’ biakinn nasep nadingin kumpipa le a thu lamlakte le a uliante le tua lai-a a om Israel mi khempeuh in a tuam khen ciat uh ngun le kham le umlebeelte, amaute tungah ka ap hi." 
Ezra8:26 Amaute tungah ka apte: Ngun talen zaguk sawmnga, talen nih a gik ngun tawh a kibawl umlebeel zakhat, kham talen zakhat," 
Ezra8:27 kham darik tulkhat man tawh a kibawl kuang-uk sawmnih, le kham zahin a manpha sumsan hoih tawh a kibawl beel nih ahi hi." 
Ezra8:28 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “ Topa tungah note hong ki-ap hi. Umlebeelte zong biakna vante ahi hi. Ngun le khamte ahihleh na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa tungah citna tawh a kipia na ahi hi." 
Ezra8:29 Siampi liante, Levi mite, le Israel mi beh lutangte’ muhin Jerusalem khua-ah Topa’ biakinn dei sungah na puak dong mateng uh vilin kem un,” ka ci hi." 
Ezra8:30 Tua ahih manin siampite le Levi mite in Jerusalem-a i Pasian’ biakinn-ah puak dingin ngun, kham, le umlebeelte a hong sang uh hi." 
Ezra8:31 Tua ciangin Jerusalem a zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawm le nih ni-in Ahava lui panin ka ding khia uh hi. I Pasian in kote hong ompih ahih manin lamkalah galte le pansimna a tuamtuamte tawh hong kipelhsak hi. 
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi. 
Ezra8:33 A ni li ni-in Uriah’ tapa siampi Meremoth’ tavuan lakna tawh i Pasian’ biakinn sungah ngun, kham, le umlebeelte kiseng hi. Finehas’ tapa Eleazar in amah huh a, Levi mi Jeshua’ tapa Jozabad le Binnui’ tapa Noadiah in amau tegel huh uh hi." 
Ezra8:34 Vante a ki-ap ciangin limtakin kivel a, a ki-ap na khempeuh ciaptehna lai khat kibawl hi." 
Ezra8:35 Tua ciangin salsuahna panin inn hong zuankik mite in Israel-te khempeuh a dingin Israel Pasian tungah meihal biakna-in bawngtal sawm le nih, tuutal sawmkua le guk, tuuno sawmsagih le nih, le mawhna hanga biakna-in keeltal sawm le nih a pia uh hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Topa’ tungah meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Ezra8:36 Amaute in Eufratis Gungal gam sung tenga kumpipa’ nuai-ah a uksawn a lian pente le uliante tungah kumpipa’ thupiaknate zong a va gen uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in mite le Pasian’ biakinn lam nasep a huh uh hi." 
Ezra9:1 Hih thute khempeuh a kisep khit ciangin keima kiangah makaite pawlkhat hong pai-in, “Hih gam a teng gamdang mite’ nitna le Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Jebus mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite, Egypt mite, le Amor’ mite’ gamtat a kihhuaite panin Israel mi, siampite le Levi mite nangawn zong, a siangtho-in tuam om lo uh hi." 
Ezra9:2 Amaute le a tapate un hih gam a teng minam dangte’ numeite tenpih uh a, tua thu hangin a siangtho minam pen tu-in gamdang mite tawh a kihel suak ta hi. Tua hi a, hih thu-ah makaite le thukhen uliante pen a khial masa ahi uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Ezra9:3 Hih thu ka zak ciangin dah mahmahin ka puante balkekin, ka sam le ka khamul botin, cih nading thei loin ka om hi." 
Ezra9:4 Tua ciangin sal a suak hih mite’ cihtak lohna hangin Israel Pasian’ gim piak ding lau-in a ling mite khempeuh kei kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, nitak biakpiak hun dong cih nading thei loin ka om hi." 
Ezra9:5 Tua hi a, nitak biakpiak hun ciangin khua phawk kikin ka puankekpi mah silh kawmin khukdinin Topa Pasian’ lamah ka khut zakin," 
Ezra9:6 “Ka biak Pasian aw, ka mawhnate un ka lu dawn dong uh hong vuknelhin vantung dong banto ahih manin nangma lam kong et ding maizumin ka mai a san hi, ka Pasian aw." 
Ezra9:7 Ka pu ka pate uh hun a kipanin tuhun dong mawhna lianpi ka nei uh hi. Tua thu hangin ka kumpite uh le ka siampite un gamdang kumpite’ khut sungah sihna, salsuahna, neihsa kisuhna, le maizumna thuak uh a, tuhunin zong tua bangmah ka thuak uh hi." 
Ezra9:8 Ahi zongin tu-in Topa ka Pasian un tomkha sung kote hong hehpih a, a suakta pawlkhat hong omsakin nangma mun siangtho-ah siksan ding mun nong pia hi. Nangmah in ka mit uh hong vaksakkikin ka salsuahna uhah ka nuntakna uh ka thakpat theih nading uh kalsuan cilna nong pia hi." 
Ezra9:9 Kote pen sal ka hi takpi uh hi; ahi zongin ka salsuahna uhah ka Pasian un nong nusia kei a, kote’ Pasian’ biakinn puahkikin ka dinsakkik theih nading uh le Judah le Jerusalem-ah kidalna kulh ka neih theih nadingun kipat thakna na hong piak theih nadingin Persia kumpite ko tungah a thunuam dingin nong bawlsak hi." 
Ezra9:10 “Kote’ Pasian aw, hih bang hi khin ahih ciangin kote in bang gen thei nawn ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem kamsangte tungtawnin kote thu hong pia-in, ‘Note va lutin na luah ding uh gam pen, tua gam a a na teng gamdang mite in ninsakin a kihhuai a gamtatnate uh tawh mong khat pan mong khat dongin a ninsa gam nin ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin na tanute uh amau’ tapate tawh kitengsak kei unla, na tapate uh zi dingin amau’ tanute zong la kei un. Amaute’ phattuamna ding le a maavanna ding uh hanciam kei un. Tua bang hileh note thahatin tua gam a piangte nuamtakin na ne ding uh a, na tate un a luah tawntung dingun tua gam na piasawn thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in nong thupiaknate ka zui kei uh hi." 
Ezra9:11  
Ezra9:12  
Ezra9:13 Tu-in kote’ gamtatsiate le a lian ka mawhnate uh hangin hih bang gimna lian ka thuak uh hi; ahi zongin nangmah in kote’ tuah dinga kilawmzah gimna hong tuaksak loin, tu-a banga a nungta lai-in nong omsak zaw hi." 
Ezra9:14 Hih banga ka thuak khit uh ciangin kote in na thupiaknate mang lo kikin, a kihhuai-in a gamta mite tawh kitengin kizomkik ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua bang hi kik le-ung, a suakta, a nungta ka om nawn loh dongun kote’ tungah na hehna hong tungsak ding hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Ezra9:15 Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang na thutang a, ahi zongin tuni-a a omlai ko teng nong suaktasak veve hi. Na muhna-ah kote a mawhpi mah hita le-ung hong hehpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna tawh nangma mai-ah kuamah om thei lo hi,” ci-in thu ka ngen hi." 
Ezra10:1 Ezra in tu-a bangin thu ngenin mawhna pulakin khitui naptui tawh Pasian’ biakinn mai-ah kunin a om laitakin Israel mi numei, pasal, naupang, mi tampi tak ama kiimah hong kikhawmin amaute khempeuh zong nakpitakin a kap uh hi." 
Ezra10:2 Tua ciangin Elam-te beh sung panin Jehiel’ tapa Shekaniah hong pau-in Ezra kiangah, “Hih gam a teng gamdang numeite tenpihna tawh i Pasian tungah i khial hi. Ahi ta zongin Israel mite a dingin lametna omlai hi." 
Ezra10:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa uh nangma ngaihsutna le i Pasian’ thupiakna a kihta mite’ ngaihsutna bangin hih i zite le a tate uh i makna ding thu i Pasian’ tungah kiciam ni. Tua ciangin thukham sunga om bangin gamta ni." 
Ezra10:4 Kipan in; nangma nasep ding ahi hi; kote in kong huh ding uh hi. Hang inla sem in,” a ci hi." 
Ezra10:5 Tua ciangin Ezra dingin, a kigensa bangin amaute a gamtat nadingun a kiciam dingin siampi makaite, Levi mite, le Israel mi khempeuh sawl a, amaute zong a kiciam pah uh hi." 
Ezra10:6 Tua ciangin Pasian’ biakinn panin Ezra paikhia-in Eliashib’ tapa Jehohanan’ omna inndei-ah pai-in tua lai-ah a giak hi. Salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik mite’ khialhna hangin dah ahih manin amah in anletui ne zo lo hi. 
Ezra10:7 Tua ciangin Judah le Jerusalem sunga a om a hong ciahkik salte khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a hong kikhopna ding uh," 
Ezra10:8 le ni thum sungin a hong tung lo a om leh uliante le upate’ hoihsakna bangin a neihsa khempeuh uh kimanin, salsuaksa mihonte panin a kihawlkhiat theih nading thu taangkona khat kibawl hi." 
Ezra10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah le Benjamin mi khempeuh ni thum sungin Jerusalem-ah hong kikhawm uh a, tua pen a kha kuana a ni sawmnih ni ahi hi. Tua hi a, Pasian’ biakinn mai inntualah hih thu hangin mi khempeuh patau-in guah lakah lingin a tu uh hi." 
Ezra10:10 Tua ciangin siampi Ezra dingto-in amaute kiangah, “Note in gamdang numeite zi-in la-in Israel mite’ mawhna na behlap uh hi." 
Ezra10:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa’ tungah na mawhna uh pulak unla, ama deihna bangin gamta-in hih gam a teng gamdang mite le gamdang mi ahi na zite uh tawh kikhenin tuam om un,” a ci hi." 
Ezra10:12 Tua ciangin a kikhawm mi khempeuh in dawngin kiko uh a, “Hi ta hen, na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi." 
Ezra10:13 Ahi zongin mi tampi hi hang a, guahzuk laitak zong ahi hi. Hih guah lakah ka omsuak zo kei ding uh hi. Tua tham loin hih thu-ah eite in mawhna lianpi hihkha ihih manin ni khat ni nih sungin hih nasep a kizo thei ding hi lo hi." 
Ezra10:14 A kikhawm mihonpite’ tangin i makaite semsak inla, hih thu hangin eite’ tungah Pasian’ hehna a dam matengin, i khuapite sung khempeuhah gamdang numei a tenpih mi khempeuh amau khuasung upate le thukhente ciat tawh a kiseh hunin i makaite kiangah va kilak uh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra10:15 Asahel’ tapa Jonathan le Tikvah’ tapa Jahzeiah tegel bek in hih thu nial uh a, Meshullam le Levi mi Shabbethai bek in tua a nialte panpih uh hi." 
Ezra10:16 Tua hi a, thukham omsa bangin, a hong ciahkik salsuakte a gamta uh hi. Siampi Ezra in amau’ beh ciat tangin beh lutang pawlkhat tengkhia a, tuate khempeuh a minin a kilokhia ahi hi. A kha sawmna a ni khat ni-in hih mite a thukan ding uh kipan uh a," 
Ezra10:17 a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a tenpih mite’ thu a kan uh a zo uh hi. 
Ezra10:18 Siampite beh lak panin Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua le a sanggamte beh sung panin Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, le Gedaliah-te in gamdang numei a tenpihna kimu hi." 
Ezra10:19 Amaute in a zite a mak ding uh kiciam uh a, amau’ mawhna hangin biakna-in tuuhon panin tuutal khat hong paipih uh hi." 
Ezra10:20 Immer-te beh sung panin Hanani le Zebadiah ahi uh hi. 
Ezra10:21 Harim-te beh sung panin Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel, le Uzziah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:22 Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad le Elasah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:23 Levi mite sung panin Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (Kelita a kici), Pethahiah, Judah, le Eliezer ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:24 Lasate sung panin Eliashib ahi hi. Kongcingte sung panin Shallum, Telem, le Uri ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:25 Israel mi adangte sung pan: Parosh-te beh panin Ramiah, Izziah, Malkhijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Makhijah, le Beinaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:26 Elam-te beh panin Mattaniah, Zekhariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth, le Elijah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:27 Zattu-te beh panin Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, le Aziza ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:28 Bebai-te beh panin Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, le Athlai ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:29 Bani-te beh panin Meshullam, Maluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal, le Jeremoth ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:30 Pahathmoab-te beh panin Adna, Khelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui, le Manasseh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:31 Harim-te beh sung panin Eliezer, Isshijah, Malkhijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk, le Shemariah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:33 Hashum-te beh sung panin Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Elifelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, le Shimei ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:34 Bani-te beh panin Maadai, Amram, Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kheluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib," 
Ezra10:37 Mattaniah, Mattenai, le Jaasu ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:38 Binnui-te beh panin Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah," 
Ezra10:42 Shalum, Amariah, le Josef ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, le Benaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, le Benaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:44 Hih mite khempeuh in gamdang numei tenpih uh a, amaute in a zite uh a tate uh tawh a makhawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliah’ tapa Nehemiah’ thugen hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawmnihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa-ah ka om laitakin," 
Nehemiah1:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le midang pawlkhat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu le sala matna panin a suakta ahi a omsuak Judah mite’ thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi. 
Nehemiah1:3 Salsuahna panin a suakta, tua gam a omsuakte in haksatna lianpi le maizumna a ngahna uh, le Jerusalem kulh kicimin kulhkongpite mei in a kattumna thu a hong gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:4 Hih thu ka zak ciangin tusukin ka kap niloh a, ni tampi sung an tangin, vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ka thungetna-ah, “Aw vantung Pasian, Topa, nang hong itin na thupiakna a zuite tungah thuciamna limtakin a zui, a lian a kihtakhuai Pasian aw," 
Nehemiah1:6 Israel mi ahi na nasemte’ tangin sun le zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai dingin na bil hong ngat inla, na mit hong hak in. Nangma tungah ko Israel mite ka khialhna uh, keimah le ka pu ka pate zong ka khialhna uh ahi ka mawhnate uh kong pulak uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma tungah kong khialkhin uh a, na nasempa Moses tungah na piak ahi thupiaknate, thukhamte, le ngeina kipte ka zui kei uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Na nasem Moses tungah, ‘Na cihtak kei uhleh minam dangte lakah kong thehthang ding hi." 
Nehemiah1:9 Ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uhleh leimong dongah a kithehthangsa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min om nadingin ka teelnasa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi,’ ci-a na thugen hong phawkkik in." 
Nehemiah1:10 Topa aw, amaute pen na vangliatna le a thahat na khut tawh na hotkhiatsa na nasemte le nangma mite ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:11 Keima hong thungetna le nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemte’ thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu-in kei tungah maavanna hong pia inla, kei tungah hih kumpipa hong migitna ding lungsim hong guan in,” ka ci hi. Tua hun laitakin kei pen kumpipa’ an a piapa ka hi hi." 
Nehemiah2:1 Kumpi Artakzaksis’ kum sawmnihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei, a leenggahzu a baihsa-in a om khit ciangin la-in kumpipa ka pia a, ama mai-ah ka om laitakin ka mai a khing hi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Amah in, “Cina lopi-in bang hangin na mai khing ahi hiam? Na dahna khat om hi ding hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin lau mahmahna tawh" 
Nehemiah2:3 kumpipa ka dawng a, “Kumpipa nungta tawntung in. Ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi siagawp a, a kongpite kangtum ahih ciangin maikhing loin bangci om theih ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Kei tungah bang hong ngen nuam na hi hiam?” hong ci hi. Kei zong ka lungsim tawngah vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen a," 
Nehemiah2:5 tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin, “Kumpipa na lung a kim a, dik na sak leh, ka puahphatkik theih nadingin Judah gam sung ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi-ah nong paisakna ding kong thum hi, topa,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu a gei-ah tukawmin), “Bang tanvei sawt ding a, cik ciangin hong ciahkik thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ka ngetna hong thukimpih a, kei zong ka ciahkik ding hun ka gen hi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah, “Kumpipa na thukim leh, Judah gam ka tun dong amaute in hong paisuaksak theih nadingun Eufratis Gungal gam sung a uksawn mite ka piak ding laikhakte," 
Nehemiah2:8 le biakinn hutna ding munmuanhuai kongpi ding, khuapi kulh ding, le ka omna ding inn lam nadingin sing hong piaktheih nadingin kumpipa’ tulak a kem Asaf’ tungah piak ding laikhak zong, kei tungah hong pia in,” ka ci hi. A dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompih ahih manin kumpipa in ka ngette hong pia hi." 
Nehemiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eufratis Gungal gam a uksawn mite kiang ka tung a, kumpipa’ laikhakte amaute tungah ka pia hi. Kumpipa in galkapmangte le sakol galkapte kei hong khasak hi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ahi zongin Israel mite’ phattuamna ding a sem dingin mi khat a paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat le Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpitakin lungkim lo uh hi. 
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem khua ka tun ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi. 
Nehemiah2:12 Tua ciangin zanin vakkhia-in mi tawmkhat ka tonpih hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem a dingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsimah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuanna simloh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi. 
Nehemiah2:13 Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk le Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a, a kicimsa Jerusalem kulhpi le mei in a kattumsa a kongpite ka en hi." 
Nehemiah2:14 Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi le Kumpipa’ Bual-ah ka paisuak hi. Ahi zongin ka tuanna ganhing a paisuak theih nading mun om lo hi. 
Nehemiah2:15 Tua hi a, a zanpi mahin kuam lampi-ah pai-in khuapi kulh ka vel hi. Tua ciangin Kuam Kongpi mah tawnin khuapi sungah ka lutkik hi." 
Nehemiah2:16 Tua hi a, khuasung upate in ka paina mun ahi a, ka sep ahi zongin thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih nasep tavuan a la ding Judah mite, siampite, uliante, khuasung upate, le a dangte tungah ka gen nai kei hi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “I lungkhamna thu na thei uh hi. Jerusalem a siasa-in omin, a kongpite mei in kangtum hi. Hong pai un, zahkona i ngah nawn loh nadingin Jerusalem kulh ciangpha ni,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:18 Tua ciangin a dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna le kumpipa in kei tungah hong gen thute zong amaute tungah ka gen hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tu-in nasep kipan pah ni,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin lawp mahmahna le ngimna hoih tawh nasep a kipan uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat, Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah, le Arab gammi ahi Geshem in tua thu a zak uh ciangin, kote zahpihna le simmawhna tawh, “Hih na sep uh bang ahi hiam? Kumpipa lehpan’ na hi uh hiam?” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:20 Tua ciangin amaute dawngin, “Vantung Pasian in ka maa uh hong telhsak ding a, ko ama nasemte in nasep a kipan ta ka hi uh hi; note in ahihleh Jerusalem tawh kisai-in thu na neih theih nadingun bangmah kimematna na nei kei uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah3:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib le a siampipihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte le a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi. Amaute in Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a, tua ciangin Pasian’ tungah ap uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:2 A zomah Jerikho khua mite in sem uh hi. Amaute’ zomah Imri’ tapa Zakkur in sem hi. 
Nehemiah3:3 Tua ciangin Hassenaah’ tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:4 Amaute’ zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in ama khawk sung puah hi. Tua zomah Meshezabel’ tapa Berekhiah, a tapa Meshullam hi a, tua zomah Baana’ tapa Zadok in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:5 A zom kikah Tekoa khua mite in puah uh a, ahi zongin amau’ uliante in a tote uh sawl bangin sem nuam lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:6 Tua ciangin Paseah’ tapa Joiada le Besodeiah’ tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh a, a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Amaute’ zomah Gibeon le Mizpah khuami ahi, Gibeon mi Melatiah le Meronoth khuami Jadon in Eufratis Gungal gam a uksawn pa’ zum dong puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Tua zomah khamseek pa Harhaiah’ tapa Uzziel in puah a, a zomah paknamtui bawlpa Hananiah in puah hi. Amaute in Kulh Zai ciang dong a ngeina bangin Jerusalem bawlkik uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam phelkhat a uk, Hur’ tapa Refaiah in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:10 A zomah Harumaf’ tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi. Tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiah’ tapa Hattush in puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:11 Harim’ tapa Malkhijah le Pahathmoab’ tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:12 Amaute’ zomah Jerusalem gam a phelkhat a uk, Hallohesh’ tapa Shallum in a tanute tawh a puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun le Zanoah khua-a teng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi. Amaute in tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh a, Nin Kongpi ciang dong pi tul le pi zanga sung kulh a puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Bethhakkherem gam a uk, Rekhab’ tapa Malkhijah in Nin Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna a bulh hi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah gam a uk, Kolhozeh’ tapa Shallum in Tuinak Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawlpha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh hi. Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa’ huan gei-a kulh ciang a, David khuapi pana hong paisuk kahlei ciang dong a sem hi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ama zomah Bethzur gam phelkhat a uk, Azbuk’ tapa Nehemiah in David’ han san ciang, a kibawl tawm bual le Galkap Inn ciang dong puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ama zomah a puah Levi mite: Bani’ tapa Rehum hi a, ama zomah Keilah gam phelkhat a uk Hashabiah in ama gam tangin puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ama zomah a puah a behte: Keilah gam phelkhat a uk, Henadad’ tapa Bavvai in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:19 A zomah Mizpah gam a uk, Jeshua’ tapa Ezer in a Kiu-a galvan koihna kahtohna san khawk khat puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ama zomah Zabbai’ tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib’ inn kongkhak ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:21 Ama zomah Hakkoz’ tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in Eliashib’ inn kongkhak panin Eliashib’ innmong ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ama zomah Jerusalem kiimnai-a om siampite in puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:23 A zomah Benjamin le Hasshub in amau’ inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiah’ tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Azariah in ama inn gei san teng puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ama zomah Henadad’ tapa Binnui in Azariah’ inn panin a Kiu," 
Nehemiah3:25 le kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzai’ tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng le kumpipa’ inn panin hong dawkkhia, zumcingte’ omna ahi tausang tungnung teng puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Ama zomah Parosh’ tapa Pedaiah in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang le tausang dawk puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:27 Ama zomah Tekoa khuamite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang, khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:28 Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahihleh siampite in amau’ inn mai san ciat puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:29 Amaute’ zomah Immer’ tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing, Shekaniah’ tapa Shemaiah in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ama zomah Shemaiah’ tapa Hananiah le Zalaf’ tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiah’ tapa Meshullam in ama inndei mai san teng puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:31 Ama zomah khamseek pa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai sana om biakinn nasemte’ inn le sumbukte’ inn ciang, le a kiu-a inndei tungnung ciang dong puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:32 Tua ciangin khamseekte le sumbukte in a kiu-a inndei tungnung le Tuu Kongpi kikal a puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanballat in kote’ kulh cianna thu a zak ciangin lungkim loin heh mahmah a, ko Jew mite hong zahko hi." 
Nehemiah4:2 Amah in a kikholhpihte le Samaria galkapte’ kiangah, “Hih Jew mi niangnuangte in bang hih ding a kipan ahi uh hiam? Hih mun a bawlpha dinga kingaihsun ahi uh hiam? Biakpiakna hangin a nasep uh ni khat sungin zo dingin kilamen ahi uh hiam? Amaute in a kangtumsa ninbulomtang panin suangtum bawlkik thei ding ahi uh hiam?” ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:3 Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in, “Amaute in bangbang ciang ta le amau’ kulh cian’ tungah ngia khat kah leh kicim lel ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:4 Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiah in thu ka ngen a, “Hong za in, kote’ Pasian aw; kote hong kisimmawh hi. Kote hong zahkona amau’ lu tungah lehtuksak inla, gamdang khatah sal suakin mi’ bawlsiatin amaute omsak in." 
Nehemiah4:5 Amaute in a langtangin kulh ciangte’ mai-ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih manin amau’ mawhna maisak kei inla, na ciaptehna panin zong a mawhna uh sumit kei in,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a, nasep a kimciang bang kizo hi. Mite in utna lungsim tawh sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:7 Ahi zongin Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite, le Ashdod mite in Jerusalem kulh cian’ nasep kizom suakin, kulh vang teng huk ding a kipat khitna thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:8 Tua hi a, Jerusalem hong simin buaina a piangsak dingin amaute kipawlin vaihawmna khat nei uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:9 Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a, amaute a en dingin sun le zanin galvil ka koih uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in, “Nasemte a tha uh zaw ta a, ahi zong nin tampi omlai hi. Eima tha tawh kulh cian’ i zo ngei kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:11 Tua ciangin ka galte un, “Amau’ phawk loh kalun amaute lakah pai-in i that ding a, a nasep uh i beisak ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:12 Amaute lakah a teng Jew mite khuapi sungah hong pai ciangin, ka galte uh a omna khempeuh ciat panun hong pai-in kote hong simna ding thu, sawmvei tak hong hilhkhol uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Tua ahih ciangin kulh nunglam mun niam penna mun awng tengah a namsau uh, a teipi uh, le a thal uh tawh, a innkuan kuanun ka mite ka pangsak hi." 
Nehemiah4:14 Mite’ launa ka muh ciangin, uliante, mi ukte, le mi khempeuh tungah, “Amaute kihta kei un. Na sanggamte, na tapate, na tanute, na zite uh, le na inn na lote uh a dingin hong dosak, a lian a kihtakhuai Topa phawk un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:15 Amau’ hong sawmna thu kote in ka phawkna uh le Pasian in amau’ geelna a suksiatna thu ka galte un thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka nasepna ciat uh kulh tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:16 Tua hun a kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kimkhat in na sem a, a kimkhat in a teipite, a lumte, le a thalte uh tawi-in sik puan silhin ding uh a, uliante in kulh a ciang Judah mi khempeuh uk uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh-a cian’ ding na a nawn mite in a khut langkhat uh tawh a van puak uh lenin a khut langkhat uhah galhiam tawi uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:18 Kulh ciangte in na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uhah a namsau uh kuah uh hi. Peengkul tum pa ahihleh keima kiangah om hi. 
Nehemiah4:19 Tua ciangin mi liante, mi ukte, le mi khempeuh tungah, “I nasepna lian a, zaipi tak huam hi; eite kulh tungah kikhenin khatlekhat i kigamla hi." 
Nehemiah4:20 Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I Pasian in eite a dingin hong dosak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:21 Tua hi a, nisimin khuavak a kipan nitak aksi suah dong, mi kimkhat in teipi tawi-in, mi kimkhat in na ka sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:22 Tua hun mahin mite kiangah, “Zanin galvil, sunin nasemin hong om theih nadingun mi khempeuh na nasemte ciat uh tawh Jerusalem khua sungah hong giak un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:23 Tua ahih ciangin keimah a kipan ka behte, ka nasemte, le kei hong cingte, a kuamah peuh puan suah man om loin, mi khempeuh in ka khut uhah galhiam ka tawi den uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Tu-in mi nautang numei le pasalte in a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkim lohna kam hong gingsak uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:2 Mi pawlkhatte in an lei nadingin a tanute uh le a tapate uh a piakna thu hong gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:3 Pawlkhatte in kial tun huhau-in an lei nadingin a lote, a leenggah lote, le a innte uh a piakna hong gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:4 Pawlkhatte in kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh le a leenggui lote uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:5 Amaute in, “Kote pen ka behte uh mah bangin cilesa kibang hi-in, ka naupangte uh zong amau’ naupangte mah bangin a hoih hinapi-in, ka tanute uh le ka tapate uh sal suak dingin ka phum uh hi. Ka tanute uh pawlkhat zong sal suakkhin a, ka lote uh le ka leenggui lote uh midangte a’ suakkhin ahih manin amaute tat nadingin ka hih zawh uh bangmah om lo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Amaute’ kikona le hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi. 
Nehemiah5:7 Kei zong hih thu limtakin ka ngaihsun a, tua ciangin uliante le thukhente taii-in amaute kiangah, “No le no leiba manin salin na kila uh hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute nakpitakin taii-in," 
Nehemiah5:8 “Minam dangte tungah sala kizuaksa i Jew mipihte ahizo zahzahin i tanhkik hi. Tua hinapi-in note in na mipihte uh na zuak uh a, tu-in amaute i tatkik ding hi zel hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute pau loin om uh a, a gen ding mel uh thei lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:9 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Note’ gamtatna hoih lo hi. I gal ahi minam dangte’ zahkona i ngah loh nadingin i Pasian zahtakna tawh na gamtat ding uh kilawm hi." 
Nehemiah5:10 Kei le ka behte le ka nasemte in zong an le sum leitawi-in ka piakhia uh hi. Leiba manin mi kilakna phiat ni. 
Nehemiah5:11 Tuni mahmahin a lote, a oliv lote, a innte uh le a meetin na lak uh sum, an, leenggahzu, le sathaute, amaute tungah pia kik un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hihte khempeuh ka piakik ding uh a, amaute tung panin bangmah ka kal nawn kei ding uh hi. Na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ciangin siampite ka sam a, a ciamsa bangun a gamtat nadingun siampite’ mai-ah kiciamna ka bawlsak hi." 
Nehemiah5:13 Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin, “Hih thuciamna a tungsak lo peuhmah a inn le a neihsa panin Pasian in singkhia tahen. Hih bangin kisingkhia hen la, hawmsuak hen!” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in, “Hi ta hen,” ci uh a, Topa a phat uh hi. Tua hi a, a ciamsa bangun mite a gamta uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:14 Tua tham loin, Judah gam a uk dingin hong kiseh hun a kipan, Kumpi Artakzaksis’ kum sawmnihna pan a kum sawmthum le nihna dong, kum sawm le nih sung, kei le ka behte in gam ukte’ ngah ngei ante ka ne kei uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Keima hun ma-in a ukte in mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a, amaute’ tung panin nisimin an le leenggahzu ngun shekel sawmli man a la uh hi. Amau’ nasemte nangawn mite tungah kiliansak lai uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian ka zahtakna hangin tua bangin kei ka gamta kei hi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Hih kulh cianna-ah kei mahmah in zong ka sem a, kei a dingin leitang bangmah ka la kei hi. Keima mite khempeuh nasem ding bekin tua lai-ah kisutuah uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kiim le pama minam dangte’ kiang pan hong paite banah, nisimin ka sabuai-ah an a ne, thukhente le Jew mi a kihelin leengla za le sawmnga bang ka nei den hi." 
Nehemiah5:18 Nisimin innsung annektawm dinga kibawl bawngtal khat le tuu limci guk ahi hi. Tua mah bangin ak zong kibawl a, ni sawm simin leenggahzu a um tampipi-in kihih hi. Tua zahin bei taseleh gam ukte’ ngah theih ahi anletui ka kal kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mite genthei lua hi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Pasian aw, hih mite a dingin ka bawlna khempeuh kei a dingin a hoih lamin hong phawk in." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kongpite-ah kongkhak ka bulh nai loh uh hangin, kulh ka cian’ khitna uh le a vang khat zong a om nawn lohna thu, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mi Geshem, le ka gal dangte khempeuh un a zak uh ciangin," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanballat le Geshem zong Ono zanglei sunga om Hakkofirim khua-ah pai-in amaute tawh thu a kikum dingin hong sam uh hi. Hih pen kei hong suksiat nopna uh ahi hi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Tua ahih ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah kamtaite ka sawl a, “Tu laitakin nasep thupi ka nei hi; kong pai thei kei ding hi. Kei hong pai leng, kong pai sung ka om loh kalteng nasep kitawlnga ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:4 Amaute in tu-a bangmahin livei tak hong sam uh a, kei zong a livei mahin tu-a bangin ka dawngkik hi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Tua bangmahin Sanballat in a ngaveina hong sam a, tua tungtangin a kamtai pa in laikhak khat hong pia hi." 
Nehemiah6:6 A laikhak sungah, “Minam dangte lakah a kigen, Geshem in zong tu-a a kigen thu man hi, ci-a a gen thu in: Nang le Jew mite in kumpi lehdo ding na sawm uh a, tua thu hangin kulh na ciang uh hi. Tua banah nangmahmah zong kumpi na utna kigen lai hi." 
Nehemiah6:7 Judah gam in kumpi khat nei ta hi, ci-in, nang kumpi na hihna thu Jerusalem-ah a taangko dingin kamsangte pawlkhat a koihin zong hong kigen hi. Kumpipa in hih thu za pelmawh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin thakhatin hong pai inla, hih thu kikum ni,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Tu-a na gen bangin bangmah om lo hi. Tua bang thu pen nangma phuahtawm ahi hi,” ci-in ka thuk hi." 
Nehemiah6:9 Kote in ka hanciamna uh khiamin nasep a kizawh loh nading deihna tawh amaute in kote hong lausak theih nading uh a hanciam uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hahkat semsem zaw uh hi. 
Nehemiah6:10 Mehetabel’ tapa Delaiah, a tapa Shemaiah a inn-ah omcip ahih manin ni khat ama kiangah ka pai leh amah in, “Pasian’ inn sung, siangtho munah kituahin biakinn kong kikhaknelh ni; bang hang hiam cih leh nang hong that dingin amaute hong pai uh a, zanin amaute in nang hong that ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:11 Ahih hangin keimah in, “Mi kei bangte tai ding ahi hiam? Mi kei bangte a suahtak nadingin biakinn sungah bu ding ahi hiam? Ka pai peuhmah kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:12 Tua ciangin a thusim ka phawkkhia hi. Pasian in tua bang thu a gen dingin amah a sawl hi lo a, Tobiah le Sanballat in tua bangin thugen dingin golhguk a na pia na hi a, ama thugenna pen keimah suksiat nopna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ama thugen bangin gamta-in mawhna ka bawl theih nadingin keimah hong lausak nadingin a kicial ahi hi. Tua bangin zuikha leng kei hong minsia sakin hong simmawh ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pasian aw, amau’ sepnate’ hangin Tobiah le Sanballat thei inla, keimah lausak dingin a hanciam kamsangnu Noadiah le kamsang dang khempeuh zong thei in." 
Nehemiah6:15 Elul kha ni sawmnih le nga ni-in kulh kizo a, ni sawmnga le nih sung hun bei hi." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ka galte un hih thu za-in, ka kiim uha om minam dangte in a theih uh ciangin lamdangsa a, kote’ Pasian’ huhna tawh hih nasep kizo ahihna a phawk uh hi." 
Nehemiah6:17 Hih hun sungteng khempeuh Jew uliante in Tobiah kiangah lai tampi khak uh a, Tobiah’ laikhakte zong amaute’ kiangah tung hi." 
Nehemiah6:18 Tobiah pen Arah’ tapa Shekaniah’ makpa hi a, ama tapa Jehohanan in Berekhiah’ tapa Meshullam’ tanute khat tenpih ahih manin Judah gam sunga mi tampi amah tawh kipawl hi." 
Nehemiah6:19 Amaute in ama hoihnate zong keima zak-ah hong gen uh a, keima sepna teng zong ama kiangah na puak uh hi. Tua hi a, Tobiah in zong ka lau theih nadingin kei tungah lai tampi hong khak hi." 
Nehemiah7:1 Kulh kiciang khinin, kongkhakte ka bulh khin uh a, kongcingte, lasate, le Levi mite a kiseh khit ciangin," 
Nehemiah7:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le biakinn a uk Hananiah in a et dingin Jerusalem ka pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hananiah pen midang tampi sangin a citakzaw, Pasian a zahtakzaw khat ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Tua hi a, amaute tungah, “Sun mateng Jerusalem kongpite hongsak kei un. Tua ciangin ni omlai mahin kongte khaksakin kalhsak un. Jerusalem khuasunga tengte lak panin khuacing dingte seh unla, pawlkhatte galvilna munah, pawlkhatte amau’ omna inn mai ciatah omsak un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah7:4 Khuapi lianin zai a, ahi zongin a sungah mi tawm bek om a, innte a kilam om nai lo hi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Tua ciangin uliante, thukhente, le mite a innkuan kuanun ciaptehna ding ka lungsim sungah Pasian in hong suaksak hi. Tua hi a, hong ciahkik masate’ khang ciaptehna laibu ka mu hi. Tua sungah a kigelh ka muhte:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin salin a lak mite sung panin hih mite pen Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, le Baanah-te’ makaihna tawh Jerusalem le Judah gam sung amau khua ciatah a hong ciahkik ahi uh hi. Israel sung panin mi a phazah:" 
Nehemiah7:7  
Nehemiah7:8 Parosh suante - mi tulnih zakhat sawmsagih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:9 Shefatiah suante - mi zathum sawmsagih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:10 Arah suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:11 Pahathmoab-te beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - mi tulnih zagiat le sawm le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:12 Elam suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:13 Zattu suante - mi zagiat sawmli le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:14 Zakkai suante - mi zasagih sawmguk ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:15 Binnui suante - mi zaguk sawmli le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai suante - mi zaguk sawmnih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad suante - mi tulnih zathum sawmnih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam suante - mi zaguk sawmguk le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai suante - mi tulnih sawmguk le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:20 Adin suante - mi zaguk sawmnga le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ater a kici Hezekiah’ suante - mi sawmkua le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:22 Hashum suante - mi zathum sawmnih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai suante - mi zathum sawmnih le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:24 Harif suante - mi zakhat sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon suante - mi sawmkua le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem le Netofah khuami - zakhat sawmgiat le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth khuami - zakhat sawmnih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:28 Bethazmaveth khuami - sawmli le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriathjearim, Khefirah, le Beeroth khuami - zasagih sawmli le thum ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:30 Ramah le Geba khuami - zaguk sawmnih le khat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmash khuami - zakhat sawmnih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel le Ai khuami - zakhat sawmnih le thum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo adang khat khuami - sawmnga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam adang khat suante - tulkhat zanih sawmnga le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khuami - zathum sawmnih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikho khuami - zathum sawmli le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod, Hadid, le Ono khuami - zasagih sawmnih le khat ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:38 Senaah khuami - tulthum zakua sawmthum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:39 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - zakua sawmsagih le thum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:40 Immer suante - mi tulkhat sawmnga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:41 Pashhur suante - mi tulkhat zanih sawmli le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:42 Harim suante - mi tulkhat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:43 Levi mite sung panin: Hodevah-te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawmsagih le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:44 Lasate sung panin Asaf suante - mi zakhat sawmli le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:45 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante, Akkub suante, Hatita suante, le Shobai suante - mi zakhat sawmthum le giat ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:46 Biakinn nasemte sung panin a hong ciahkikte: Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante," 
Nehemiah7:47 Keros suante, Sia suante, Padon suante," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana suante, Hagaba suante, Shamai suante," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanan suante, Giddel suante, Gahar suante," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaiah suante, Rezin suante, Nekoda suante," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazzam suante, Uzza suante, Paseah suante," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai suante, Meunim suante, Nefushesim suante," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante," 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlith suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante," 
Nehemiah7:56 Neziah suante le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomon’ nasemte’ suanlekhakte sung panin: Sotai suante, Sofereth suante, Perida suante," 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante," 
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokherethhazzebaim suante, le Amon suante ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:60 Biakinn nasemte le Solomon’ nasemte’ suanlekhakte mi a vekpi-in zathum sawmkua le nih a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:61 Temelah, Telharsha, Kherub, Addan, le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik, Israel mi hinapi-in amau’ behlephung a kan thei lo mite:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante, le Nekoda suante, mi zaguk sawmli le nih ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:63 Siampite’ sung panin zong: Hobaiah suante, Hakkoz suante, Barzillai suante (amah in Gilead mi Barzillai’ tanute khat tenpihin tua min tawh a kilo pah) ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:64 Hih mite in khang ciaptehna sungah a kiciamteh mite lakah amau’ min a zon uh hangin mu lo uh ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a, siampi nasep semsak thei lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Tua hi a, Urim le Thummim aisanna tawh ai san ding siampi khat a om matengin amaute in biakna an siangtho pente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpa in a gen hi." 
Nehemiah7:66 Mi a vekpi-in tul sawmli tulnih zathum sawmguk pha a," 
Nehemiah7:67 amaute’ nasem numei le pasal tulsagih zathum sawmthum le sagihte kisim lo lai hi. Tua banah amaute in lasa numei le pasal zanih sawmlinga nei uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:68 Amau’ sakol zasagih sawmthum guk, a la-sakol uh zanih sawmli nga," 
Nehemiah7:69 a kalaoh uh zali sawmthum nga, le a late uh tulguk zasagih sawmnih a pha hi." 
Nehemiah7:70 Beh lutang mi pawlkhat in nasep nadingin nate pia uh hi. Gam ukpa in vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tulkhat, kuang-uk sawmnga, le siampipuan zanga sawmthum a pia hi." 
Nehemiah7:71 Tua ciangin beh lutang pawlkhatte in vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tul sawmnih le ngun mina tulnih zanih a pia uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:72 Tua ciangin midangte’ piakte pen kham darik tul sawmnih, ngun mina tulnih, le siampipuan sawmguk le sagih ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Tua ciangin siampite, Levi mite, le mi pawlkhatte Jerusalem khua le a kiimah teng uh hi; kongcingte, lasate, biakinn nasemte, le Israel midangte amau’ khuapi ciatah a teng uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amau’ khuapi ciatah teng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi-ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawmtuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen laithei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amau’ khuapi ciatah teng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi-ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawmtuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen laithei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a, a kha sagihna a ni khat ni-in numei pasal, le thu theitel thei ding a kikhawm khempeuh mai-ah siampi Ezra in thukham laibu hong paipih hi." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a, a kha sagihna a ni khat ni-in numei pasal, le thu theitel thei ding a kikhawm khempeuh mai-ah siampi Ezra in thukham laibu hong paipih hi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Tua ciangin amah in Tui Kongpi mai-a om tualpi lam mai ngatin zingsang tung a kipan sun ciang dong, numei pasal le thu a tel thei ding mite’ zakin tua laibu sunga thute sim a, mi khempeuh in tua thukham laibu sunga thu kisimte limtakin a ngai uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah laithei pa Ezra dingto a, ama taklam pangah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah, le Maaseiah ding uh a, a veilam pangah Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkhijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zekhariah, le Meshullam a ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah laithei pa Ezra dingto a, ama taklam pangah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah, le Maaseiah ding uh a, a veilam pangah Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkhijah, Hashum, Hashbaddanah, Zekhariah, le Meshullam a ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sangzaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuh’ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sangzaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuh’ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian, Topa thupha pia a, mi khempeuh in a khut uh laamto-in, “Hi tahen. Hi ta hen,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin a lu uh kunin leilam maingatin Topa a bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian, Topa thupha pia a, mi khempeuh in a khut uh laamto-in, “Hi tahen. Hi ta hen,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin a lu uh kunin leilam maingatin Topa a bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Mite amau’ omna san ciatah a om sungun mite in thukham a tel theih nadingun Levi mi Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, le Pelaiah-te in a khiatna a gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Amaute in Pasian’ thukham laibu sung panin a kitel takin sim uh a, a cihnopna a kitelin gen uh a, tua a kisim thute a tel nadingun a hilh uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah, laithei pa lah hi-in siampi lah ahi Ezra, le mite a hilh Levi mite in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Tuni pen Topa note’ Pasian a dingin biakna ni siangtho ahi hi; a kap a mau om kei un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham kammalte a zak uh ciangin mi khempeuh kap uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah, laithei pa lah hi-in siampi lah ahi Ezra, le mite a hilh Levi mite in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Tuni pen Topa note’ Pasian a dingin biakna ni siangtho ahi hi; a kap a mau om kei un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham kammalte a zak uh ciangin mi khempeuh kap uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:10 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu-in ciah un. Anlim tuilim ne-in thadim unla, a nei zo lote zong va kholh un; bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa a dingin tuni pen biakna ni siangtho ni ahi hi; dah kei un, bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ hong piak lungdamna in note hong thahatsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Nehemiah8:11 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in mite gamdaisak a, “Daitakin om un; bang hang hiam cih leh tuni pen biakna ni siangtho ni ahi hi; dah kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh anne tuidawnin midangte a kholh ding le lungdam a om dingin a ciah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen thute amaute in a theitel uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh laithei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh laithei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:14 Tua ciangin, a kha sagihna pawi hun sungin sawlbuk sungah Israel mite a omna ding thu, le amaute in a khuapi khempeuh uh le Jerusalem-ah taangko-in, “A kigensa bangin sawlbuk lam nadingin gamlakah pai unla oliv hiangte, gamlak oliv hiangte, mui sing hiangte, le a teh tam singhiang dangte va sat un,” ci-in a gen ding uh, Moses tungtawnin Topa in a thupiakna pen thukham sungah a kigelh lam a mu uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:15  
Nehemiah8:16 Tua ahih ciangin mite kuankhia-in tua singhiangte hong pua-in amau’ innkhumzang ciat, le a inntual uh le Pasian’ biakinn tual, Tui Kongpi tual, le Efraim Kongpi tualah sawlbuk a lam uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a, salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik a kikhawm mite khempeuh in sawlbuk lamin tuate sungah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Nun’ tapa Joshua’ hun a kipanin tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua bangin hih ngei lo uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a, salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik a kikhawm mite khempeuh in sawlbuk lamin tuate sungah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Nun’ tapa Joshua’ hun a kipanin tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua bangin hih ngei lo uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Tua hi a, a kipat ni a kipan a bei ni dong Ezra in ni simin Pasian’ thukham laibu a simkhia hi. Amaute in ni sagih sung tua pawi kham uh a, a ngeina om bangin a ni giat ni-in pawi khupna thupi kikhopna khat a om hi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Tua hi a, a kipat ni a kipan a bei ni dong Ezra in ni simin Pasian’ thukham laibu a simkhia hi. Amaute in ni sagih sung tua pawi kham uh a, a ngeina om bangin a ni giat ni-in pawi khupna thupi kikhopna khat a om hi." 
Nehemiah9:1 Tua kha mah a ni sawmnih le li ni-in an tang dingin Israel mite kikhawm uh a, puanhampi silhin a lu tung uhah lei kibuak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Tua hi a, gamdangmi khempeuh panin Israel mite tuam om uh a, amaute in dinsa-in amau’ khialhnate le a pu a pate uh mawhnate a pulak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:3 Tua ciangin amau’ omna mun ciat uhah dingin Topa amau’ Pasian’ thukham laibu nai thum sung sim uh a, adang nai thum sung amaute in mawhna pulakin Topa a Pasian uh zahtakna a bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:4 Levi mite’ kahlei tungah Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani, le Khenani ding uh a, Topa amaute’ Pasian’ tungah nakpitakin kiko uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:5 Tua ciangin Levi mi Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah, le Pethahiah-te in, “Ding un, Topa na Pasian uh phat unla, ‘A tawntung pan a tawntung dongin a minthang na min in thupha ngah a, thupha khempeuh le phatna dang khempeuh sangin a sangzaw hi." 
Nehemiah9:6 Nang bek Topa na hi hi. Nangmah in a sang pen vantung le vana om khempeuh, leitung le a tunga om khempeuh, le tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh na bawl hi. Nangmah in tuate khempeuh na omsak a, vantung mihonpi in nang hong bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:7 Nang pen Abram teelin Khaldea gam Ur khuapi panin paikhiatpihin Abraham min a phuak Pasian, Topa na hi hi." 
Nehemiah9:8 Nangma tungah amah a cihtakna na mu a, Kanaan mite gam, Hit mite gam, Amor mite gam, Perez mite gam, le Girgash mite gam, amah le a suanlekhakte tungah piak dingin ama tungah thuciamna khat na bawl hi. Nang thuman na hih manin na thuciamna na tungsak hi." 
Nehemiah9:9 “‘Nangmah in Egypt gam sunga ka pute ka pate uh’ gimna mu-in San Tuipi-ah hong kikona uh na za a,"
