Nehemiah9:10 amaute in ka pu ka pate uh kihihsakna tawh a hih gawpna thei na hih manin Faro le a nasemte le a gammi khempeuh langpangin lim le na lamdang na bawl hi. Tua hi a, tuni dongin a kip minphatna khat nangma a’ dingin na ngah hi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Amaute’ mai-ah tuipi phelkham na hih manin tuipi laizang lei keu tungah amaute paisuak uh a, ahi zongin tuihual sunga suanglot bangin tui thukna sungah amau a delhte na lawn hi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Sunin meii khuam khat tawh amaute lam na lak a, amau’ lampaina khua a vaksak dingin zanin mei khuam khat tawh lam na lak hi." 
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai Mual tungah kumsukin, vantung panin amaute hopihin, amaute tungah a man thukhenna, thukham taktak, a hoih ngeinate le thupiaknate na pia a," 
Nehemiah9:14 na nasempa Moses tungtawnin amaute tungah na Sabbath siangtho na theisak a, thupiaknate, ngeinate, le thukhamte na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:15 A gilkialna uh a vahsak dingin vantung panin an na pia a, a dangtakna uh a phasak dingin suangpi panin tui na phulsak a, amaute tungah piak dingin na kiciamsa gamah lutin a luah nadingun amaute na sawl hi." 
Nehemiah9:16 “‘Ahi zongin kote’ pute pate kihisakin lungkhauh uh a, na thupiaknate mang lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:17 Amaute in thu mang nuam lo uh a, amaute lakah na bawl na lamdangte ngaihsun kha lo uh hi. Amaute lungkhauh niloh uh a, a salsuahna uh Egypt-ah a paipih kik dingin makai khat seh uh hi. Ahi zongin nang pen mawhna a maisak nuam, dikin hehpihna a nei, lungduai-in itna kip a nei Pasian na hi a, amaute na nusia tuan kei hi." 
Nehemiah9:18 Amaute in a kisung bawngno khat amau mah a dingin bawlin, “Hih pen Egypt panin note a hong paikhiatpih na pasian uh ahi hi,” ci-in gendai mawhna lianpi a bawl uh ciangin zong," 
Nehemiah9:19 nang in na hehpih mahmah manin amaute gamlakah na nusia kei hi. Sunin lam a lak meii khuam in amaute nusia lo a, zanin a pai nading uh lampi a vaksak dingin mei khuam in zong amaute nusia lo hi." 
Nehemiah9:20 Amaute hoihtakin thu na hilh a, na manna an zong amaute kiang panin na lakik kei a, a dangtakna uh a phasak dingin tui na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawmli tawntung gamlakah amaute na vak a, amaute in bangmah tangsapna nei lo uh hi. A puante uh zong sialo a, a khe uh zong bawk beek lo hi." 
Nehemiah9:22 Nangmah in amaute tungah kumpi gamte le mite na pia a, tuate pen galsung van ngah dingin na piak ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Heshbon kumpipa Sihon’ gam le Bashan kumpipa Og’ gam luah uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:23 Nangmah in amau’ suanlekhakte vana aksi zahin simzawh lohin na tamsak a, a pu a pate un a luah dingin na piak dingin na ciamsa gamah amaute na paipih hi." 
Nehemiah9:24 A suan a khakte uh tua gamah lutin a lak uh ciangin, amau’ mai-ah tua gam a teng Kanaan mite na nuaisiah a, a ut bang bangun a bawl dingun a kumpite le a mite amau’ khut sungah na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:25 Tua hi a, amaute in kulhnei khuapite le gam hoihte la uh a, na hoih tampi tawh a kidim innte, suang kikhuak tuibemte, leenggui lote, oliv lote, le nek theih singgah kung tampi a luah uh hi. Amaute in tuate ne-in gilvahin thau uh a, nangma hoihna hangin nuamsa mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:26 “‘Ahi zongin amaute in demnopna lungsim nei-in nang hong lehdo uh hi. Amaute in na thukham nungngat uh a, nangma lamah hong ciahkikna dingun amaute a hilh na kamsangte that uh a, amaute in gendai mawhna lianpi bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:27 Hih thu hangin a galte uh khut sungah amaute na ap a, a galte un amaute hih gawpgawp uh hi. Ahi zongin amau a kihih gawpgawp hun ciangin nang tungah hong ko uh a, nangmah in vantung panin na za a, na hehpihna lianpi tawh amau’ galte’ kiang panin amaute a honkhia ding honkhiate na puak hi." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ahi zongin a tawldam khit uh ciangin nangma muhna-ah a sia gamta zel uh a, nangmah in amau’ galte’ khut sungah amaute na nusia a, a galte un amaute a ukgawp uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in nang tungah huhna hong nget uh ciangin vantung panin amau’ ngetna za-in na hehpihna tawh amaute tam veipi na honkhia hi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Tua hi a, na thukham lamah amaute hong kihei kikna ding limtakin na hilh a, ahi zongin amaute kihisakin na thupiaknate don lo uh hi. A zuite tungah nuntakna a pia thei ahi na ngeina kip tungah amaute khial uh hi. Lungkhauhin phengphi-in amaute kiheikhia uh a, thu mang nuam lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kum tampi sung lungduaina tawh amaute na thuak a, na kamsangte tungtawnin amaute na hilh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ngai nuam lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin gamdang mite’ khut sungah amaute na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ahi ta zongin na hehpihna lian hangin amaute beisak loin, zong na nusia kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh dikna le hehpihna a nei na hi hi." 
Nehemiah9:32 “‘Tua ahih ciangin tu-in a lian, a vanglian, a kihtakhuai, thuciamna kiptakin a len kote’ Pasian aw, Assiria kumpite’ hun a kipan tuni dongin ka kumpite uh, ka uliante uh, ka siampite uh, ka sanggamte uh, ka pu ka pate uh le ko mi khempeuh tungah hong tung gimnate hong neu ngaihsutsak kei in." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kote tungah hong tungsa thu khempeuhah nang a thutang na hi a, nang citakin a om na hi a, kote a khial gamtatkha ka hi uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Ka kumpite uh, ka uliante uh, ka siampite uh le ka pu ka pate un nangma thukham zui lo uh a, amaute tungah na piak ahi na thupiaknate le na hilhkholhnate zong don lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:35 Amaute tungah na piak gamzai lei hoihah omin, amaute tungah na piak hauhna lianpi tawh nuamsa-in amau’ kumpite’ khutnuai-ah a om laitak nangawnun amaute in nangma na hong sem lo uh a, a gamtat hoih lote uh nusia lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tu-in kote sal ka hi uh hi. Ka pu ka pate un a leitang pana piangte ne-in a na hoih khempeuhte nuamtakin a ngah nadingun na piak gam hih lai munah kote sal ka hi ta uh hi. 
Nehemiah9:37 Tu-in leitang tunga piang khempeuh pen kote’ mawhna hangin kote’ tungah nong koih kumpite tungah tung ta hi. Tua kumpite in kote tungah thu hong nei-in, ka ganhingte uh a ut utun hong hihsak uh a, kote lungkham mahmahin ka om uh hi,’ ci un,” a ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:38 Hih thute khempeuh hangin a kip thuciamna khat bawlin lai-in ka gelh uh a, ka uliante uh, ka Levi mite uh le ka siampite un zong tua lai tungah a min uh a gelh uh hi."

Nehemiah10:28 A omlai Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, kongcingte, lasate, biakinn nasemte, a zite a tapate le a tanute, thu teltheihna a nei, Pasian’ thukham hangin gamdang mite panin a tuam om mi khempeuh in" 
Nehemiah10:29 a sanggam uh ahi amau’ makaite pawmin, Pasian’ nasem Moses in a piak Pasian’ thukham zui-in, eite’ Topa ahi Topa’ thupiakna khempeuh, ama ngeinate le ama thukhamte a zuihna ding uh kiciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:30 Gamdang mite tungah i tanute i kha kei ding a, i tapate’ zi dingin zong i la kei ding hi." 
Nehemiah10:31 Hih mite in Sabbath ni-in van ahi a, an ahi zongin hong zuak leh Sabbath ni le ni siangtho khat peuhpeuh ni-in i lei kei ding hi. Kum sagihna-a an piangte nusia-in tua kumin leiba khempeuh i maisak ding hi." 
Nehemiah10:32 Eite’ Pasian’ biakinn-ah nasepna ding ahi Ompihna Anlum, a manmanin an tawh biakna, a manmanin meihal biakna, Sabbath ni, Khadet ni, a kiseh pawite, biakna letsongte, le Israel mite’ tangin a kibawlsak ahi kilemna bawl nadingin mawhna hanga biaknate, le i Pasian’ biakinn-ah sep ding a kisam dangte khempeuhah zat dingin kum simin shekel khat seh thum ah khat piak ding ka kiciam uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:33  
Nehemiah10:34 Tua ciangin thukham sunga a kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin a kumkumin Topa eite’ Pasian’ biakna tau tungah cih dingin beh a banbanin i Pasian’ biakinn sungah sing a kitut nadingin siampite, Levi mite, le ko mi vekpite in sing pua ding sehna ai ka san uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:35 I leitang panin a piang anpalte le singgah kungte panin a gah masa khempeuh a kumkumin Topa’ biakinn-ah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:36 Thukham sunga kigelh mah bangin i Pasian’ biakinn-ah a om, i Pasian’ biakinn sungah na a sem siampite kiangah zong tapa upa pente le bawngte’ tacilte, le ganhonte’ tacilte, le tuuhonte’ tacilte paipih ding," 
Nehemiah10:37 le annel lom meek masak pen siampite tungah puak ding, le gah nei sing khempeuh panin a gah masa, sathau le leenggahzu thakte khempeuh i Pasian’ biakinn sung vankoihna-ah puak ding, le lokhawhna khuaneute khempeuhah sawm-ah-khat a kaikhawmte pen Levi mite ahih manin leitang panin sawm-ah-khat khempeuh Levi mite kiangah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:38 Levi mite in sawm-ah-khat a khop uh ciangin Aaron’ suan siampite tawh hih khawm ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in i Pasian’ biakinn sunga vankoihna a kilawm mun inndeite-ah sawm-ah-khat a ngah uh sung pan sawm-ah-khat puaksawn ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakinn umlebeelte a kikoihna inndeite le na a sem siampite, kongcingte le lasate a giahna inndeite-ah Israel mite le Levi mite in a kipia ante, leenggahzu le sathaute a paipih ding uh ahi hi. Eite’ Pasian’ biakinn kinloin i om kei ding hi." 
Nehemiah11:1 Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah mi makaite teng uh hi. Tua lo midang teng, amau’ lak pan mi sawm-ah-khat, khuapi siangtho Jerusalem-ah a teng ding aisanna tawh kiteel uh a, a omlai mi sawmah kuate ahihleh khuapi dangte-ah om uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:2 Tua hi a, sawl lohin, Jerusalem-ah amau’ thu-in a tengtawm nuam khempeuhte mipi in pakta uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:3 Hih a nuai-ate pen Jerusalem-a a teng a uksawn ukpite ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin Judah khuapi dangte-ah Israel midangte, siampite, Levi mite, biakinn nasemte, le Solomon’ nasemte’ suanlekhakte teng uh a, amau’ neihsa, amau’ khuapi ciatah teng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:4 Judah minam le Benjamin minam sung panin mi pawlkhat zong Jerusalem-ah teng uh hi. Perez’ suan Mahalalel, a tapa Shefatiah, a tapa Amariah, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Uzziah, a tapa Athaiah’ suante," 
Nehemiah11:5 le Shelah’ suan Zekhariah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Adaiah, a tapa Hazaiah, a tapa Kolhozeh, a tapa Baruk, a tapa Maaseiah’ suante ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:6 Jerusalem-ah a teng Perez’ suante khempeuh galhang mi zali sawmguk le giat a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:7 Jeshaiah’ tapa Ithiel, a tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Kolaiah, a tapa Pedaiah, a tapa Joed, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Sallu’ suante," 
Nehemiah11:8 le a beh Gabbai le Sallai hi uh a, mi zakua sawmnih giat pha uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikri’ tapa Joel pen amau’ mapi hi a, Hassenuah’ tapa Judah pen khuapi uk a nihna pa ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikri’ tapa Joel pen amau’ mapi hi a, Hassenuah’ tapa Judah pen khuapi uk a nihna pa ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:10 Pasian’ biakinn a uk Ahitub’ tapa Meraioth, a tapa Zadok, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Hilkiah, a tapa Seraiah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Jedaiah, le Jakhin," 
Nehemiah11:11  
Nehemiah11:12 le inn nasep a sem a behte hi uh a, mi zagiat sawmnih le nih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Malkhijah’ tapa Pashhur, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Amzi, a tapa Pelaliah, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Adaiah," 
Nehemiah11:13 le beh lutang ahi a beh dangte hi a, mi zanih sawmlinih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Immer’ tapa Meshillemoth, a tapa Ahzai, a tapa Azarel, a tapa Amashsai," 
Nehemiah11:14 le a thahat a vanglian a behte hi a, mi zakhat sawmnih le giat pha uh a, Haggedolim’ tapa Zabdiel pen amau’ mapi ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Bunni’ tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Azrikam, a tapa Hasshub, a tapa Shemaiah," 
Nehemiah11:16 le Pasian’ biakinn pualam nasep a uk, Levi mite’ ukpite ahi Shabbethai, Zozabad," 
Nehemiah11:17 le lungdam koh thungetna patkhiat ding a makai Asaf, a tapa Zabdi, a tapa Mika, a tapa Mattaniah, le a sanggamte lakah a nihna ahi Bakbukiah, le Jeduthun’ tapa Galal, a tapa Shammua, a tapa Abda’ suante beh ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:18 Khuapi siangtho sungah Levi mi a om khempeuh mi zanih sawmgiat le li a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:19 Akkub, Talmon, le a behte hi uh a, mi zakhat sawmsagih nih pha uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:20 A omlai Israel-te, siampite, le Levi mite ahihleh Judah khuapi dangte-ah amau’ luah leitang ciatah teng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ahi zongin biakinn nasemte ahihleh Ofel mualbo-ah teng uh a, Ziha le Gishpa in amaute a uk uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem-a Levi mite ukin Pasian’ biakinn nasepna a vaan pa pen Mika’ tapa Mattaniah, a tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Bani, a tapa Uzzi hi a, amah pen lasa Asaf suante sung pan ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Tuate beh in kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh na sem uh a, tua lasate in nisimin na a sep ding uh kisam hi." 
Nehemiah11:24 Tua ciangin Judah’ tapa Zerah, a tapa Meshezabel, a tapa Pethahiah pen mite tawh kisai zum thu khempeuhah kumpipa’ zat pen ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:25 Khuaneute le a kiima lote tawh kisai-in: Mi pawlkhatte’ tenna pen Kiriatharba le a khuaneute, Dibon le a khuaneute, Jekabzeel le a khuaneute," 
Nehemiah11:26 Jeshua, Moladah, Bethpelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 Hazarshual, Beersheba le a khuaneute,"

Nehemiah11:29 Enrimmon, Zorah, Jarmuth," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoah, Adullam le a khuaneute, Lakhish le a lote, le Azekah le a khuaneute ahi hi. Tua hi a, amaute pen Beersheba panin Hinnom Kuam dongah teng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:31 Tua ciangin Geba, Mikmash, Aija, Bethel le a khuaneute," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah,"

Nehemiah11:34 Hadid, Zeboiim, Neballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod, Ono, le Geharashim khuate-ah Benjamin mite teng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:36 Tua ciangin Judah gam a Levi mite pawlkhat Benjamin gamah kigawm hi.

Nehemiah12:22 Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan, le Jaddua-te’ hun lai-a beh lutangte le siampite ahihleh Persia kumpipa Darias hun ciang dong Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Levi mite beh sung panin beh lutangte pen Eliashib’ tupa Johanan’ hun ciang dong Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. 
Nehemiah12:24 Tua ciangin Levi mi ukpite: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Jeshua, Binnui, le Kadmiel hi uh a, Pasian’ mi David’ thupiakna bangin a banbanin phatna la a sa ding le lungdamna a ko dingin a sanggamte uh tawh na a sem ding uh ahi hi." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon le Akkub-te pen vankoihna kongpite a cing kongcingte ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon le Akkub-te pen vankoihna kongpite a cing kongcingte ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hih pen Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua, a tapa Joiakim’ hun le gam ukpa Nehemiah, le siampi hi-in laithei pa zong ahi Ezra-te’ hun lai-a vaihawmna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hih pen Jozadak’ tapa Jeshua, a tapa Joiakim’ hun le gam ukpa Nehemiah, le siampi hi-in laithei pa zong ahi Ezra-te’ hun lai-a vaihawmna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah12:27 Tua ciangin amaute in daltuahte, harp lasaknate, le laiza lasaknate tawh lungdam ko-in la sa-in lungdamna tawh kulhpi apna a bawl dingin Jerusalem-ah hong pai theih nadingun Levi mite a omna khempeuh uhah a zong uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Tua hi a, Jerusalem kiim le Netofah mite’ khuaneute panin Levi mi lasate hong kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:29 Bethgilgal khua le Geba kiimnai le Bethazmaveth khua panin zong hong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lasate pawl in Jerusalem kiimah amau a dingin khuaneute sat uh hi. 
Nehemiah12:30 Tua ciangin siampite le Levi mite amau mah kisiansuah tawm uh a, tua khit ciangin mite le kongpite le kulhpi a siansuah uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:31 Tua ciangin khuapi kulhzangah Judah mi uliante ka paipih a, lampai kawmin lungdamna a ko dingin pawl lian nih ka seh hi. Kulhzang panin pawlkhatte taklam manawhin Nin Kongpi lamah a pai uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:32 Tuate’ nungah Hoshaiah le Judah uliante kimkhat," 
Nehemiah12:33 le Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam," 
Nehemiah12:33 le Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah, le Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah, le Jeremiah," 
Nehemiah12:35 le siampi pawlkhat: Asaf, a tapa Zakkur, a tapa Mikaiah, a tapa Mattaniah, a tapa Shemaiah, a tapa Jonathan, a tapa Zekhariah," 
Nehemiah12:36 le ama behte Shemaiah, Azarel, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah, le Hanani-te, Pasian’ mi David’ lasakna nate tawh pai uh a, tuate lakah laithei pa Ezra masa hi." 
Nehemiah12:36 le ama behte Shemaiah, Azarel, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah, le Hanani-te, Pasian’ mi David’ lasakna nate tawh pai uh a, tuate lakah laithei pa Ezra masa hi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Tuinak Kongpi panin kulh kahtohna David khuapi kahlei-ah paito-in, David’ inn khengin nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi dongah pai uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Lungdamna a ko a pawldang khat pen veilam manawhin pai uh a, mi a kimkhat tawh amaute ka zui hi. Kulh tungah pai-in Meikhuk Tausang pan Kulh Zai-ah" 
Nehemiah12:39 tua panin Efraim Kongpi, tua ciangin Jeshanah Kongpi, tua ciangin Ngasa Kongpi, tua ciangin Hananel Tausang, tua ciangin Za Khat Tausang, tua ciangin Tuu Kongpi-ah pai uh a, tua ciangin Thong Kongpi-ah khawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Tua hi a, lungdamna a ko hih pawl nihte, Pasian’ biakinn hong tung uh a, uliante pawlkhat le kei ka omkhawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:41 Tua ciangin siampi Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Mikaiah, Elioenai, Zekhariah, le Hananiah-te a peengkulte uh tawh om uh a," 
Nehemiah12:42 Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malkhijah, Elam, le Ezer zong a om uh hi. Tua hi a, Jezrahiah makai-in lasate inla sa uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:43 Pasian in nakpitakin amaute lungdamsak ahih manin amaute in tua ni-in biakpiakna lian tampi pia-in lungdam uh a, numei naupangte zong lungdam uh hi. Tua hi a, Jerusalem khuasunga lungdamna awging gamlapi pek pan nangawnin kiza hi." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tua ciangin khuapite’ kiimah lo omte panin a golna le a neuna tawh kizui-in siampite le Levi mite a dingin thukham sunga om bangin a kaihkhop ding uh a kipia nate, anpalte, le sawm-ah-khatte a koihna ding uh vankoihna innte a uk dingin mi kiseh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampite le Levi mite’ nasepna hangin Judah mi khempeuh lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:45 Tua hi a, David le a tapa Solomon’ thupiakna tawh kizui-in lasate le kongcingte mah bangin amaute in amau’ Pasian’ nasepte le siansuah nasep a sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh David’ hun lai-in lasate a ukpi le phatna le lungdamkohna a makai-in Asaf om hi. 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubbabel le Nehemiah’ hun lai-in Israel mite khempeuh in lasate le kongcingte a dingin a nisim tanh uh pia uh a, amaute in Levi mite a’ ding tuamkoih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in Aaron suante a dingin tuamkoihsawn leuleu uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:1 Tua ciangin amaute in mipi’ zakin Moses’ laibute sim uh a, Pasian’ mite’ kikhopna-ah Ammon mi le Moab mite a kihel ngei loh nading thu kiphawkkhia hi;" 
Nehemiah13:2 bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in anletui tawh Israel mite na dawn lo uh a, amaute a samsia dingin Balaam cial zawsop uh hi. Ahi zongin i Pasian in tua samsiatna thupha-in hong heisak hi." 
Nehemiah13:3 Mite in hih thukham a zak uh ciangin Israel mite lak panin gamdang suan peuhmah khenkhia uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:4 Ahi zongin tua hun ma-in, i Pasian’ biakinn sunga vankoihna inndeite a uk dingin a kiseh, Tobiah tawh a kimeltheih siampi Eliashib in," 
Nehemiah13:5 Levi mite, lasate, le kongcingte tungah piak dingin a kisawl an tawh biakna, paknamtui, umlebeelte, sawm-ah-khat a kipia an, leenggahzu, le sathau, le siampite a dingin a kipia nate a koihna ngei uh inndei lianpi khat, Tobiah a dingin bawlsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksis in a uk kum sawmthum le nihna kumin ama kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian’ laitakin Jerusalem-ah ka om kei hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin kumpipa kiangah a khuan ka ngen a," 
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem-ah ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah a dingin Pasian’ biakinn huang sungah inndei khat a vaihawmsakna thu, Eliashib’ gamtat hoih lohna ka phawkkhia hi." 
Nehemiah13:8 Hih thu-ah lungkim het lo ka hih manin inndei sung panin Tobiah’ van teng ka lawnkhia hi. 
Nehemiah13:9 Tua ciangin tua inndei a siansakna ding uh, le Pasian’ biakinn-a umlebeelte, an tawh biakna le paknamtui a koihkik nadingun thu ka pia hi." 
Nehemiah13:10 Levi mite’ ngah dingte amau’ tungah kipia lo ahih manin Levi mite le lasate in a nasep ngeite uh nusia-in a lote uhah na a sepna uh zong ka phawkkhia hi. 
Nehemiah13:11 Tua ahih ciangin uliante tungah ka lungkim kei a, “Bang hangin Pasian’ biakinn kinusiacip ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. Tua hi a, amaute kaikhawm kikin amau’ sepna ngei mun ciatah ka pangsakkik hi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in an, leenggahzu, le sathau sung pan sawm-ah-khat hong paipihin vankoihna innte-ah hong tun uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tua ciangin tua vankoihna innte a kem dingin siampi Shelemiah, laithei Zadok, le Levi mi Pedaiah, le amaute a huh dingin Mattaniah’ tapa Zakkur, a tapa Hanan ka seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute mi muanhuai ahi uh hi. Amau’ nasep pen a sanggamte uh tungah amau’ tanh ciat uh a hawmkhia ding uh ahi hi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pasian aw, hih thu tawh kisai-in kei hong phawk inla, ka Pasian’ biakinn le a nasep nadingin ka sepsa gamtat hoihte maimangsak kei in." 
Nehemiah13:15 Tua hun lai-in Judah gam sungah mite in Sabbath ni-in leenggah sukin, a khawhsate uh khawmin late tungah suanin, leenggah, thei, le van namkim, Sabbath ni-in Jerusalem-ah hong puakna ka mu hi. Tua ni-in na a zuakna uh hangin ka lungkim lohna amaute tungah ka gen hi." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jerusalem khuasunga teng Taia khuamite in zong ngasa le van namkim hong paipihin Judah mite tung le Jerusalem khua sungah Sabbath ni-in zuak uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:17 Tua ciangin Judah uliante tungah lungkim loin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin hoih lohna gamta-in Sabbath ni ninsak ngam na hi uh hiam?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Na pu na pate uh tu-a bang teekin a gamtat manin eite tung le hih khuapi tungah hih bang siatna khempeuh hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in note in Sabbath ni nitsakna tawh Israel tungah hehna tamzaw na tungsak uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah13:19 Tua hi a, Sabbath ni ding khuamial ciangin kongpite a kikhakna ding ka sawl a, Sabbath bei khit mateng a kihon loh nadingin thu ka pia hi. Tua ciangin, Sabbath ni-in khua sungah van hong kilutpih lohna dingin kongpite a cing dingin ka nasemte pawlkhat ka koih hi." 
Nehemiah13:20 Tua ahih manin sumbukte le na nam tuamtuam a zuakte, khatvei nihvei khawng Jerusalem khua pualamah giak uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:21 Ahi zongin amaute hilhkholin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kulh gei-ah giak na hi uh hiam? Nong giah kik uhleh note tungah thu kong bawl ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua hun a kipanin Sabbath ni-in amaute hong pai nawn lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:22 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni a siangtho-in a omsak theih nadingun amaute kisiansuah tawmin kongpite hong cin nadingun Levi mite ka sawl hi. Ka Pasian aw, hih thu-ah zong hong phawk inla, na itna tawh kizui-in siatna panin kei hong pengsak in." 
Nehemiah13:23 Tua hun lai mahin zong Judah mite in Ashdod numei, Ammon numei, le Moab numeite a tenpihna," 
Nehemiah13:24 le a tate uh kimkhat in Ashdod kampau a zatna, le Judah kampau zang thei loin, amau pau ciat bek a zat theihna thu ka mukhia hi." 
Nehemiah13:25 Amaute taigawpin ka samsia a, pawlkhat satin a sam uh ka bawhsak gawp hi. Tua ciangin Pasian’ min tawh amaute ka kiciamsak a, “Note in amau’ tapate’ zi dingin na tanute uh na pia kei ding uh a, na tapate uh zi ding ahi a, nomau’ zi dingin ahi zongin amaute’ tanu na la kei ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Israel kumpipa Solomon zong tua bang numeite’ hangin khial hi lo ahi hiam? Minam tampite lakah amah tawh a kibang kumpi khat zong om lo a, ama Pasian in amah itin, Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah koih hi; ahi ta zongin gamdang numeite in amah nangawn khialsakzo hi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon aw, nangma gamtatnate hong zui-in, gamdang numeite tenpihna tawh hih siatna lian khempeuh gamta-in i Pasian tungah hong zuautat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ka cisak hi." 
Nehemiah13:28 Siampi lianpen pa Eliashib’ tapa Jehoiada’ tapate khat pen Horonaim khuami Sanbalat’ makpa na hi hi. Tua ahih manin keima kiang panin amah ka hawlkhia hi. 
Nehemiah13:29 Ka Pasian aw, amaute in siampi nasepna le siampite le Levi mite’ thuciamna siasak uh ahih manin amaute thei ta in." 
Nehemiah13:30 Tua bangin gamdang tawh a kizom nate khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak a, siampite le Levi mite a nasep ngei mah uhah ka semsakkik hi." 
Nehemiah13:31 Tua ciangin a kiseh hunin zat dingin cih ding sing tawh biakna le anpal tawh biakna ding ka vaihawmsak hi. Ka Pasian aw, a hoih lamin kei hong phawk in." 
Esther1:1 Hih lai-a kigelh thupiangte pen India gam panin Ethiopia gam dong, gamneu zakhat sawmnih le sagih a uk Ahasueras’ hun lai-a piang thu ahi hi." 
Esther1:2 Hih hun laitakin kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi sunga kumpi tokhom tungah amah tu hi. 
Esther1:3 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama nuai-a a uliante khempeuh le a nasemte a dingin pawi khat bawlsak hi. Ama khutnuai-a om Persia le Media galkapmangte le ama nuai-a uliante le ama nuai-ah gam a uksawnte a om laitakin," 
Esther1:4 a kumpi gam hauhna le ama thupi ziazuana ni tampi sung, ni za le ni sawmgiat sung tak a lak hi." 
Esther1:5 Hih pawi hun a bei khit ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga om milian mineu mi khempeuh a dingin kumpipa in pawi khat a bawl hi. Tua pawi pen kumpi inn huang sungah kibawl a, ni sagih sung kibawl hi." 
Esther1:6 Tua huang sungah suangkang khuamte kiphut a, khau malneu le khau dupsan tawh ngun kualte-ah kikhihin a kikhai dalna puanpakte kikhungin, suangmanpha a san, a dum, a kang, le a vom, a nam tuamtuamte kizangin a kizem suangphah kiphah tungah kham le ngun kibawl lupnate kikoih hi." 
Esther1:7 Kham hai nam tuamtuamte tawh zu kihawm a, kumpipa’ hauhna tawh kituakin deihdeihin zu kizang hi." 
Esther1:8 Tua lai-ah zu nekna zia pen kihah piak cih om lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in amau’ duh zahzah bek a neksakna ding uh kumpipa in a nuai-a a uliante thu pia hi. 
Esther1:9 Tua banah Kumpinu Vashti in zong numeite a dingin Kumpipa Ahasueras’ innsung mahah pawi khat a bawl hi. 
Esther1:10 A ni sagih ni, zunekna hangin a lung a nop ciangin kumpipa in ama na a sem innsungmang sagihte Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha, Abagtha, Zethar, le Karkas-te sam a, mite le uliante mai-ah Kumpinu Vashti a melhoihna a lahtheih nadingin a kumpi lukhu khusa-in ama kiangah a paipih nadingun a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu a mel a hoih takpi mah ahi hi." 
Esther1:11  
Esther1:12 Ahih hangin Kumpinu Vashti in innsungmangte’ thupuak kumpipa’ sapna a nial hi. Hih a nialna thu-ah kumpipa heh mahmah a, a hehna hangin a sin so hi." 
Esther1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in upadi siam a mipilte thu dong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh upadi le biakna lam thutheite khempeuh thu dot pen kumpipa’ zat ngei khat ahi hi. 
Esther1:14 Ama gei nai penah a tu mite pen Persia le Media gam ulian sagihte ahi Karshena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena, le Memukan-te hi uh a, kumpipa kiangah a hawh thei, kumpi gam sungah ulian pente ahi uh hi." 
Esther1:15 “Innsung mangte’ tungtawnin keimah kumpi Ahasueras’ thupiakna bangin Kumpinu Vashti gamta lo ahih manin Kumpinu Vashti tungah upadi tawh kizui-in bangci kihih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Esther1:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa le uliante’ zakin Memukan in dawng a, “Kumpinu Vashti khial hi; kumpipa tung bek hi loin Kumpipa Ahasueras’ ukna gam sung khempeuha om uliante le mi khempeuh tungah zong a khial ahi hi." 
Esther1:17 Kumpinu’ gamtatna thu numei dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh a, hih thu hangin numeite in a pasalte uh simmawh ding uh a, amaute in, ‘Kumpipa Ahasueras in ama kiangah a pai dingin Kumpinu Vashti thu pia napi-in pai lo hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Esther1:18 Hih banga kumpinu’ gamtatna thu a za Persia le Media gam numei liante in kumpipa nuai-a uliante tungah tuni mahmahin hih thu gen ding uh a, kisimmawhna le kizahtak lohna tampi piangsak ding hi." 
Esther1:19 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, kumpi thupiakna khat paisak inla, Kumpipa Ahasueras’ mai-ah Vashti a kilakkik nawn loh nadingin a kikhelkik ngei nawn lo ding Persia mite le Media mite’ upadi sungah gelhsak in. Tua ciangin amah sangin a kilawmzaw numei khat ama za luahsak in." 
Esther1:20 Tua banga kumpipa’ thupiakna thu kumpi gam sung khempeuhah a kizak ciangin numei khempeuh in a neu a lian amau’ pasal ciat zahtak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther1:21 Kumpipa le uliante in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa uh a, Memukan’ gen bangin kumpipa a gamta hi." 
Esther1:22 Pasal khempeuh pen ama innsung ukpa ahihna ding le ama kampau a kizuih kim nadingin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuhah amau’ lai ciat, le mi khempeuh tungah amau’ pau ciatin laikhakte kigelh hi." 
Esther2:1 Hih thu teng a pian’ khit, Kumpipa Ahasueras’ hehna a dam ciangin, amah in Vashti phawkin, Vashti’ gamtatna le amah tawh kisai-in a thupiakna zong thei hi." 
Esther2:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa a dingin a melhoih nungak khangnote zongsak in." 
Esther2:3 Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi-a numeite’ omna-ah a melhoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipih nadingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuhah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk, kumpipa’ innsungmang Hegai’ kep dingin ki-ap hen. Tua ciangin tua numeite tungah paknamtui tuamtuam kiguan’ hen." 
Esther2:4 Tua sung panin kumpipa’ deih bel nungak pen Vashti’ tangin kumpinu suak hen,” a ci uh hi. Kumpipa in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa a, tua bangin a gamta hi." 
Esther2:5 Tu-in kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Benjamin minam Kish, a tapa Shimei, a tapa Jair, a tapa Mordekai a kici Jew mi khat om hi." 
Esther2:6 Amah pen, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin Judah kumpipa Jekoniah tawh a lak galmatte lak a kihel khat ahi hi." 
Esther2:7 Amah in a innlak pate khat’ tanu, a min masa Hadassah, a nung ciangin Esther a kici, a khoi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a nu le a pa om nawn lo hi. Tua numei melhoihin a ngaihbaang mahmah khat hi a, a nu le a pa a sih ciangin Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak ahi hi." 
Esther2:8 Kumpipa’ thupiakna kithei kimin, Hegai’ kep dingin ap dingin kumpi khua Susa khuapi-ah numei tampi hong kipaipih ciangin, numeite a uk Hegai’ tungah ap dingin kumpipa’ inn-ah Esther zong kipaipih hi." 
Esther2:9 Amah in tua nungak hoihsa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite le a annek ding pia pah a, kumpipa’ innsung panin a kiteel nasem numei sagih zong guan a, amah le a nasem numeite’ tungah numeite’ omna a hoihpen mun a pia pah hi." 
Esther2:10 Mordekai in kham ahih manin Esther in ama namlephung genkhia lo hi. 
Esther2:11 Esther bangci om a, ama tungah bang piang hiam cih a theih nadingin numeite’ omna inntual mai-ah nisimin Mordekai va pai zel hi." 
Esther2:12 Numeite a kigin’ hun a vekpi-in kha sawm le nih sung hi a, sathau le myrrh paknamtui tawh kha guk sung kipuahin, paknamtui tuamtuamte le kipuahna dangte tawh kha guk sung mah kipuah uh hi." 
Esther2:13 Kiginkholhna hun cing a, Kumpipa Ahasueras’ kiangah numeite a pai ciangin numeite’ omna panin kumpipa’ inn-ah a deih peuhpeuh uh kikengsak hi." 
Esther2:14 Nitakin kumpipa kiangah va pai a, a zingsang ciangin numeite’ omna a mun dang khatah kiciahsak a, kumpipa’ zineute a uk, kumpipa’ innsungmang Shaashgaz in kem hi. Kumpipa in a deihkik kei leh kumpipa kiangah paikik nawn lo a, kumpipa in a deih leh a minin kisamkik hi." 
Esther2:15 Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihail’ tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun ciangin, numeite a uk kumpipa’ innsung mangpa Hegai’ gen teng lobuang kizepna ding puan dang bangmah ngenthuah lo hi. Tu-in Esther a mu mi peuhmah in hoihsa kim uh hi." 
Esther2:16 Ama uk a kum sagihna, kha sawmna ahi Tebeth kha sungin kumpi innsung Kumpi Ahasueras’ kiangah Esther a kipaipih ciangin," 
Esther2:17 kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin itzaw a, a nungak dangte khempeuh sangin limbawl zaw hi. Tua hi a, kumpi lukhu amah khusakin Vashti’ tangin kumpinu a suaksak hi." 
Esther2:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante le a nasem khempeuh a dingin pawi lianpi khat a bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuhah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khakna ding uh zong thu zasak kim a, kumpipa min tawh a kilawm a kituak letsongte zong a hawmkhia hi." 
Esther2:19 Tua hun sungin Mordekai in kumpi nasep a ngah hi. 
Esther2:20 Ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a, a innkuan ahi zongin pulak lo hi. Mordekai’ kep sungin ama thu a man’ mah bangin tu-in zong Mordekai’ gen bangin gamta hi." 
Esther2:21 Ni khat, kumpi nasemin Mordekai a om hun sungin kongcing ahi kumpipa’ innsungmangte Bigthana le Teresh heh uh a, Kumpipa Ahasueras thah ding a sawm uh hi." 
Esther2:22 Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a, Esther in Mordekai’ hong thupuak, ci-in kumpipa kiangah a gensawn hi." 
Esther2:23 A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nih tegel kikhailum hi. Hih thupiangte khempeuh kumpipa’ theihin Kumpi Gam Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi. 
Esther3:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag-te beh Hammedatha’ tapa Haman a za khangsak a, amah tawh a semkhawm ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in a bawl hi." 
Esther3:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai-ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai pen amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah kun lo hi. 
Esther3:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ huang sunga om kumpipa’ nasemte in Mordekai kiangah, “Bang hangin kumpipa’ thupiak mang lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Esther3:4 Nisimin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a, ahih hangin amah in mang nuam lo hi. Jew mi ahihna thu amaute kiangah gen khin ahih manin tua banga ama nialna a kimang ding mah ahi hiam cih a theih nadingun Haman kiangah a thu ko uh hi." 
Esther3:5 Ama mai-ah Mordekai a kun lohna, amah a zahtakbawl lohna a theih ciangin Haman nak heh mahmah hi." 
Esther3:6 Amah in Mordekai’ mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suktaak sa lo a, Ahasueras’ kumpi gam sung khempeuhah a om Jew mi khempeuh, Mordekai le a minam buppi-in a suksiat theih nading lampi a zong hi." 
Esther3:7 Kumpi Ahasueras’ uk a kum sawm le nihna, a kha masa pen ahi Nisan kha a kipanin a ni ni, a kha kha-in Pur a kici aisanna tawh Haman’ muhin ai kisan a, a kha sawm le nihna Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in ai a pha hi." 
Esther3:8 Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasueras’ kiangah, “Na ukna gam tuamtuam sunga om mite lakah a om kawikawi, amau a tuam om mi pawlkhat om hi. Amau’ ngeinate pen midangte a’ tawh kibang lo a, amaute in nangma thukhamte zui lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih mite na hici khahkhong ding kilawm lo hi." 
Esther3:9 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh amaute a kisuksiatna ding thu pia-in lai-in gelh in. Tua hileh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khutnuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther3:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khutsung panin a minthuhna zungbuh suahin Jew mite’ gal, Agag-te beh Hammedatha’ tapa Haman’ tungah a pia hi." 
Esther3:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah, “Na sum cihte nangmah kong piakik hi; na mi cihte zong nangma khut sungah kong pia hi; na ut bangbangin bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Esther3:12 A kha masa a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipa’ lai-atte khempeuh kisam a, Haman’ genna tawh kizui-in kumpipa’ nuai-ah gam tampi a uksawnte le gam khat a uksawnte, le gam uksawnte’ khutnuai-ah a mi tuamtuamte lakah uliante tungah lai kipaisak hi. Gam khempeuhah amau’ lai ciat, mi khempeuh tungah amau pau ciatin kigelh hi. Hih lai pen kumpipa Ahasueras’ min tawh kigelhin kumpipa’ minthuhna zungbuh tawh min kithuh hi." 
Esther3:13 Tua bangin kumpipa’ ukna gam khempeuhah laitaite kipiasak a, Adar kha ahi a kha sawm le nihna a ni sawm le thum ni, ni khat sungin Jew mi a moi a ham, numei naupang, a vekpi-in susia-in, thatin, a beisakmangna ding uh, le a neihsate uh a laksak nadingun thu kipia hi." 
Esther3:14 Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baihsa-in a om theih nadingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuhah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gam sung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi. 
Esther3:15 Kumpipa’ thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a, hih thupiakna pen kumpi khua Susa khuapi panin a kihawmkhia ahi hi. Kumpipa le Haman zu ne-in om hithiat uh a, ahi zongin Susa khuapi sung buai mahmah hi." 
Esther4:1 Mordekai in hih thupiang teng a theih ciangin a puan balkekin puanhampi silhin vut kibuak a, nakpitakin a kap kawmin khua sungah vak kawikawi hi." 
Esther4:2 Puanhampi silh kawmpi-in kongpi-ah kuamah kilutsak lo ahih manin kumpi inn kongpi panin a kimuhna mun ciangah pai hi. 
Esther4:3 Kumpipa’ thupiakna a tunna gam Jew mite’ omna khempeuhah nakpi taka thumna le tauna, antanna, kahna, le dip-humna om hi. Mi a tamzaw in puanhampi silhin vut lakah lum uh hi." 
Esther4:4 Esther’ nasem numeite le a innsungmangte hong pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen ciangun kumpinu in lamdangsa mahmah hi. A puanhampi a laih nadingin amah in Mordekai a’ ding puante khak a, ahih hangin Mordekai in tuate na sang lo hi." 
Esther4:5 Tua ciangin Esther in ama na a sem dingin a kiseh, kumpipa innsungmangte lak panin Hathak a kici mipa samin hih thu pen bang hi a, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in Mordekai tung panin thu a va kan dingin a sawl hi." 
Esther4:6 Kumpi inn kongpi mai-a om khuapi kongzing tualpi a om Mordekai kiangah Hathak va pai a," 
Esther4:7 Mordekai in ama tunga thupiangte khempeuh le Jew mite sukmang nadingin kumpipa’ sumkholna-ah Haman in piak dinga a sum ciamzah thute khempeuh ama kiangah na gen hi. 
Esther4:8 Amaute a kisukmang nadingin Susa khua panin a kihawmkhia lai dal khat zong Mordekai in ama tungah pia a, amah in Esther tungah tua lai na pia-in a thu a na gentelna ding le, kumpipa kiangah Esther na pai-in ama mipihte a dingin a na thumsak ding zong a sawl hi." 
Esther4:9 Hathak zong ciahin Mordekai’ thugen teng Esther kiangah va gen hi. 
Esther4:10 Tua ciangin Esther in Hathak mah sawlkikin Mordekai’ tungah thu zasak a," 
Esther4:11 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin sap lohpi-in mi khat peuhpeuh kumpipa’ omna inn sungah a va lut leh upadi khat bek om a, tua pen, thah ding ahi hi; kumpipa in ama lamah a kham kumpi ciangkhut a na zan leh tua mipa suakta bek ding ahihna thu kumpipa’ nasemte le ama ukna gam mi khempeuh in a theih ciat uh ahi hi. Tu-in kumpipa kiangah a pai dingin hong kisap loh zawh ni sawmthum bang pha ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther4:12 Tua hi a, Esther’ thugen teng Mordekai tungah kigen hi." 
Esther4:13 Tua ciangin Mordekai in Esther a dawnkikna thu amahmah puasakkik a, “Kumpi inn sungah na omna hangin Jew mi khempeuh lak panin nang a suakta tuan dingin kingaihsun kei in." 
Esther4:14 Hih bang hunin bangmah hih loin na omcip leh, Jew mite’ suahtakna ding le noptuamna ding thu mundang khat pan hong piang veve ding a, nangmah le na innkuanpihte na simang ding uh hi. Hih kumpi inn na tunna pen hih bang huna mah dinga a tung na hih mel zong kua in thei ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Esther4:15 Tua ciangin Esther in Mordekai a dawnna lai amah puasak leuleu a," 
Esther4:16 “Pai-in Susa khua sunga om Jew mi khempeuh khawm inla, keimah ngaihsutna-in an na tang un. A sun a zan ci loin ni thum sung an ne lo, tui dawn loin na om un. Na tan’ uh mah bangin kei le ka nasem numeite in zong ka na tang ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin ngeina ahihloh hangin kumpipa kiangah ka va pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai pai-in Esther’ sawl bang teekteekin a gamta hi. 
Esther5:1 A ni thum ni-in Esther in a kumpipuan silhin kumpipa’ inntual sungnungah dingin kumpi inn lam a nga hi. Kumpi innsung a kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tu-in kongpi lam na nga hi. 
Esther5:2 Inntualah Kumpinu Esther dinga a om kumpipa in a muh ciangin Esther in kumpipa’ maipha ngah a, kumpipa in a khuta a tawi kumpi ciangkhut pen Esther’ lamah a zan hi. Tua ciangin Esther in hong naihin tua ciangkhut dawn va lawng hi." 
Esther5:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, bang thu ahi hiam? Kei tungah nong nget peuhpeuh, ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciang dong, nang tungah hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:4 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, kumpipa a’ dinga kong bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin tuni-in Haman tawh hong pai un,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Esther’ deih bangin i gamtat theih nadingin manlangin Haman va sam un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin Esther’ bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin kumpipa le Haman hong pai uh hi." 
Esther5:6 Amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Esther’ kiangah, “Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia ding hi. Nong nget peuhpeuh ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciang dong nangawn hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:7 Esther in dawngin, “Nang tung panin kong ngetnop kong thumnop thu in:" 
Esther5:8 Topa aw, nong hehpih zawh a, na lung a kim a, kong nget thu nong piakzawh ding le, no tegel a dingin ka na bawl an a ne dingin zing ciangin kumpipa le Haman hong pai un. Zing ciangin nong cih bangin ka deihna kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:9 Tua ahih ciangin lungdam kipakin tua ni-in Haman a ciah hi. Ahih hangin kongpi-a om Mordekai in amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah ding lo, kun lo-a om a muh ciangin Mordekai tungah nakpitakin a heh hi." 
Esther5:10 Ahi zongin Haman ki-ip tentanin inn-ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin a lawmte le a zi Zeresh sam a," 
Esther5:11 ama hauhna teng, a tapa neih teng, kumpipa in amah a pahtak manin a za a khansakna teng, le kumpipa’ nasemte le ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in amah a koihna thute khempeuh amaute tungah genin a lak hi." 
Esther5:12 Tua ciangin Haman in, “Tua tengbek hi nai lo lai hi. Kumpinu Esther nangawn in ama bawlsa an kumpipa tawh a nekhawm dingin kei simloh midang kuamah paisak lo hi. Zing ciangin zong kumpipa tawh kei hong samkhawm hi." 
Esther5:13 Ahi zongin kumpipa’ kongpi-a a tu Jew mi Mordekai ka muh laiteng hih thute khempeuh a mawkna suak zel hi,” ci lai hi." 
Esther5:14 Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh le a lawmte khempeuh in ama kiangah, “Pi sawmsagih le nga a sang khuam phutsak inla, tua tungah Mordekai a kikhailup nadingin zingciangin kumpipa kiangah gen in. Tua ciangin nitak an ne dingin lungnuam takin kumpipa tawh pai in,” a ci uh hi. Haman in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa a, a khuam a phutsak hi." 
Esther6:1 Tua zanin kumpipa ihmu thei lo a, nisim thupiang ciaptehna Khang Tangthu Laibu lasak a, ama zakin tua laibu kisim hi." 
Esther6:2 Tua banga a kisim ciangin, kongcingte sung panin innsungmang Bigthana le Teresh in Kumpipa Ahasueras thah a sawmna thu pen Mordekai in a genna thu a kiciamtehna simkha uh hi." 
Esther6:3 Tua thu a zak ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih thu hangin Mordekai’ tungah pahtawina ahi a, minliatna ahi zongin bang kipia ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua lai-a a om kumpipa’ nasemte in Mordekai’ tungah bangmah a kipiak lohna thu a gen uh hi." 
Esther6:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih kiimnai-ah kua om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua laitakin Mordekai thah nadingin a phuhsa khuam tungah Mordekai khailupna ding thu kumpipa kiangah a ngen dingin kumpi huang sungah Haman hong tum hi." 
Esther6:5 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih lai-ah Haman om hi; inntualah ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amah hong tumsak un,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Haman hong tum a, kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah bang kihih leh hoih na sa hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Haman in a lungsim sungah ngaihsun a, “Kumpipa in kei sangin a pahtawi nopzawk ding kua om zenzen ahi hiam?” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
Esther6:7 Tua ahih manin Haman in kumpipa kiangah, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa a dingin" 
Esther6:8 kumpipa mahmah in a silh kumpi puante, le kumpipa a tuanna sakol a lukhu tawh la sak in." 
Esther6:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ ulianpen khat tungah tua kumpi puante le sakol apsak in. Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa pen amah zemsak inla, tua ciangin khuasung kongzing lampi-ah sakol tungah a tuangsa-in na ulian pen pa kaisak inla, ama mai-ah kiko sakin, ‘Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah hih bangin kibawl ding hi,’ cisak in,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah, “Na cihsa bangin manlangin kumpi puante le sakol la pah inla, kongpi-a om Jew mi Mordekai tungah hih thute khempeuh hih in. Na gensa khat beek siit kei in,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:11 Tua ahih ciangin Haman in kumpi puante le sakol la-in Mordekai zem a, khuapi sung kongzing lampi-ah amah tuangsakin, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah hih bangin kibawl ding hi,” ci-in a taangko hi." 
Esther6:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ kongpi-ah Mordekai ciahkik hi. Haman ahih le kilukhuhsa-in a thum kawmin a inn-ah ciahpah vingveng hi. 
Esther6:13 Tua ciangin Haman in a zi Zeresh le a lawmte khempeuh tungah ama tunga thupiang teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh le a lawmte in ama kiangah, “Tu-a na lelhtak Mordekai pen Jew mi ahi hi; amah na zo kei ding a, amah in nang hong zozaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Esther6:14 Tua bangin Haman tawh amaute a kiho laitakin kumpipa’ innsungmangte hong pai a, Esther’ bawlsa nitak an a ne dingin amah a paikhiatpih pah uh hi." 
Esther7:1 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpinu Esther tawh an a ne dingin kumpipa le Haman va pai uh hi. 
Esther7:2 A ni nih ni, amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Esther kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, nong ngetnop bang ahi hiam? Nong nget khempeuh ka kumpi gam phelkhat dongin hong kipia ding hi,” ci kik leuleu hi." 
Esther7:3 Tua ciangin Kumpinu Esther in dawngin, “Kumpipa in nong hehpihzawh a, kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, kong nget kong thumnop thu pen keimah le ka mipihte sihna tawh nong kipelhsakna ding ahi hi." 
Esther7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei le ka mite suksiat ding, thah ding, beisakmang dingin hong kizuak hi. Kote, numei pasal a kibangin sal dingin hong kizuak hileh bangmah ka pau kei ding hi; tua bang lel tawh kumpipa nawngkaisak taak lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther7:5 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Hih banga gamtat ding a ngaihsun kua hi a, koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Esther7:6 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Hong langpang ka gal pa! Hih migilo Haman!” a ci hi. Tua laitakin kumpipa le kumpinu’ mai-ah cih nading thei loin Haman a om hi." 
Esther7:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa a hehsa-in annekna pan dingkhia-in kumpi huan sungah a pai hi. Ahi zongin Haman ahihleh tua lai mahah omin Kumpinu Esther in a nuntakna a suahtaksakna ding a thum hi; bang hang hiam cih le kumpipa in amah thah dingin a ngaihsutna a lungsim a thei hi. 
Esther7:8 Kumpi huan panin a annekna mun uhah kumpipa hong paikik ciangin Esther’ tutna lamah Haman na awn phei-in a om mu a, kumpipa in, “Ka innsung ka muhna nangawnah hih mipa in kumpinu hih ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. Kumpipa in tua thu a cih phetin amaute in Haman’ mai puan a khuh uh hi." 
Esther7:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ na a sem innsungmangte lakah Harbona in, “Nidangin kumpipa’ na hoihtakin a sem ngei Mordekai thah nadingin Haman mahmah in a phuhsak, pi sawmsagih le nga a sang khuam pen Haman’ inn-ah tumahin om hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther7:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tua tungah amah khailum un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai khailup nadingin a phuh khuam tungah Haman a khailum uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa’ hehna a dam hi." 
Esther8:1 Tua ni mahin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Jew mite’ gal ahi Haman’ neihsa khempeuh Kumpinu Esther tungah pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa’ omna-ah Mordekai hong tung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a kinaina zia, kumpipa kiangah Esther in gen hi." 
Esther8:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman’ tung panin a lakkiksa minthuhna zungbuh pen suahkhia-in Mordekai a pia hi. Tua hi a, Haman’ neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin Esther in Mordekai a koih hi." 
Esther8:3 Kumpipa’ mai-ah Esther khatvei va paikikin khitui naptui tawh a khe mai-ah va puk a, Agag mi Haman’ vaihawm siatna lianpi le Jew mite a sawmna thu a kipelhkik theih nadingin va thum hi." 
Esther8:4 Kumpipa in Esther’ lamah a kham ciangkhut na zan a," 
Esther8:5 tua ciangin Esther thoto-in kumpipa mai-ah dingin, “Kei nong hehpihzawh a, hih ka ngaihsutna man na sak a, hoih na sak le, na ukna gam sung khempeuhah a om Jew mite thahna ding a sawmna-in Agag-te beh Hammedatha’ tapa Haman in a laigelhte dawhkik nadingin lai khat gelhsak in." 
Esther8:6 Ka mipihte tungah hih siatna lianpi a tung ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam? Ahih kei le ka innkuanpih tungah a tung hih siatna ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Esther8:7 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther le Jew mi Mordekai tungah, “Haman in Jew mite thah hong sawm ahih manin sing tungah amah kikhailum khin a, Haman’ neihsa khempeuh Esther’ tungah kong pia khin hi." 
Esther8:8 Kumpipa’ min tawh kigelhin, kumpipa’ minthuhna tawh a kithuh khinsa lai pen kidokkik thei nawn lo ahih manin, tu-in Jew mite tawh kisai-in hoih dinga na up bangin kumpipa’ min tawh gelh inla, tua khit ciangin kumpipa’ minthuhna zungbuh tawh thuh in,” a ci hi." 
Esther8:9 Tua ahih ciangin a kha thumna ahi Sivan kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipa’ lai-atte kisam a, Mordekai’ gen bang teekteekin Jew mite tung le India panin Ethiopia dong gam zakhat le sawmnih le sagih a uk ahi gam tampi a ukte, gam khat a ukte le tua gam sunga uliante tungah lai kihawmkik a, amau’ lai ciat le amau’ pau ciatin kigelh a, Jew mite a’ ding zong amau’ lai le amau’ pau mahin kigelh hi." 
Esther8:10 Tua lai pen Kumpipa Ahasueras’ minin kigelhin kumpipa’ min thuhna zungbuh mah tawh kithuh a, kumpi sakol bukah a kikhawi kumpipa’ sakolte tungah laitaite kituangsakin lai kihawmsak hi." 
Esther8:11 Kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thumna ni khat sungin Kumpi Ahasueras’ ukna gam sung khempeuhah Jew mite in amau a sim ding mi ahih kei leh a gamte’ hihna ding panin khua khempeuhah amau na kipawlin na kihu-in, tua banga amaute a hih dingte pen a numei a naupangin susia-in, thatin a beisakna ding uh le a neihsate uh a laksak theihna dingun hih banga lai piakna tawh kumpipa in Jew mite tungah hih theihna ding thu a pia hi." 
Esther8:12  
Esther8:13 Tua thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuhah kihawmin mi khempeuh kitheisakin, amau’ galte a thukkikna ding ahi tua ni tawh kisai-in Jew mite a kiginkholh ding uh ahi hi." 
Esther8:14 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa’ sakolte tungah laitaite tuangin kumpipa’ thu-kin sawl mah bangin nawhtai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah zong tua thupiakna lai a kihawm hi. 
Esther8:15 Tua ciangin kumpi puan a san le a kang silhin, kham tawh kibawl kumpi lukhu lianpi khu-in, saihadial puanneel le puansan silhsa-in kumpipa’ omna panin Mordekai paikhia hi. Tua ciangin Susa khuapi sung mi khempeuh lungdamin awng uh hi." 
Esther8:16 Tua hi a, Jew mite in suahtakna, lungdamna, le pahtawina ngah uh hi." 
Esther8:17 Kumpipa’ thupiakna a tunna gam le khua khempeuhah Jew mite a dingin lungdamna le kipahna, pawi bawlna le nasep khawlin zum khakna a om hi. Tua hi a, midangte in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin tua gam a om mi tampi tak in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, a ci uh hi." 
Esther9:1 A kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipa’ thupiakna bangin sepkhiatna ding hun hong tung hi. Jew mite’ galte in gualzo dinga a ki-up ni teek pen amau a mudah mite’ tungah Jew mite a gualzawh ni ding hong hizaw hi. 
Esther9:2 Tua ni-in amaute’ siatna ding a geelte a sugawp dingin Kumpipa Ahasueras’ ukna gam khempeuha amau’ khuapite sungah Jew mite kikhawm uh hi. Mi khempeuh in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin kuamah in Jew mite nang ngam lo uh hi. 
Esther9:3 Mordekai kihta uh ahih manin gam tampi a ukte le gam khat a ukte le gam sunga ulian tuamtuamte le kumpi ulian khempeuh in Jew mite panpih uh hi. 
Esther9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi inn sungah Mordekai ulianpi khat suak a, a vangliatna a khan semsem mah bangin gam khempeuhah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
Esther9:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jew mite in namsau tawh a galte uh tampi tak thatlum uh a, amau a mudahte a ut utun hihgawp uh hi." 
Esther9:6 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sung mahmahah Jew mite in mi zanga thatin susia uh hi. 
Esther9:7 Tua hi a, amaute in Jew mite’ gal ahi Hammedatha’ tapa Haman’ tapa sawmte Parshandatha, Dalfon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai, le Vaizatha-te zong a that uh hi. Ahi zongin amau’ neihsate suksak lo uh hi." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga a kithat zah tua ni mahmahin kumpipa kiangah kizasak hi. 
Esther9:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Jew mite in mi zanga that uh a, Haman’ tapa sawmte zong that uh hi. Ka ukna gamdangte sungah zong bangzah that ding kithei lo hi. Tu-in bang deih lai na hi hiam? Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther9:13 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, tuni-a mah bangin zing ciangin zong Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite tungah hih theihna thu pia inla, Haman’ tapa sawmte’ luanghawmte khuam tungah khaisak in,” a ci hi." 
Esther9:14 Tua ahih manin tua banga a hih nadingin kumpipa in a sawl hi. Susa khuapi sungah hih thu suakkhiasak a, khuam tungah Haman’ tapa sawmte kikhai hi." 
Esther9:15 Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni-in kikhawm kikin Susa khua sungah mi zathum that uh hi. Ahi zongin amau’ neihsate suksak lo uh hi. 
Esther9:16 Tua mah bangin kumpipa’ ukna gam tuamtuama om Jew mite zong amau’ kihut nadingin kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in zong amau a mudah mihing tul sawmsagih le tulnga thatin a galte uh tungah phu la uh hi. Ahih hangin a neihsate uh suksak lo uh hi. 
Esther9:17 Hih banga a hih pen Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni hi a, a ni sawm le li ni-in tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi." 
Esther9:18 Ahih hangin Susa khua sunga om Jew mite ahihleh a ni sawm le thum le sawm le li ni-in kikaikhawm uh a, a ni sawm le nga ni tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi." 
Esther9:19 Hih thu hangin gam sung khuaneute-a teng Jew mite in Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni pawi bawlna le lungdam ni dingin tawlngak ni-in nei uh a, anlim nono kikholhna ni-in a zang uh hi." 
Esther9:20 Tua ciangin Mordekai in hih thupiangte khempeuh lai-in ciamteh a, a nai a gamla a om Kumpi Ahasueras’ ukna gam sung khempeuha om Jew mite tungah lai paisak hi." 
Esther9:21 A kumkumin Adar kha ni sawm le li ni le sawm le nga ni a tanna dingun thu a pia hi. 
Esther9:22 Tua nite pen Jew mite a galte uh tung panin a suahtak ni, dahna le thumnate lungdamna le lungnopna a suah kha ahi hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in pawi bawl ni le lungdam ni-in nei-in, anlim nono khatlekhat kikholh ni le mizawngte tungah letsong piak ni-in a zat dingun thu a pia hi." 
Esther9:23 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai’ laigelhna tawh kizui-in Jew mite in a patsa uh hih banga a hihnate uh a zom uh hi. 
Esther9:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi khempeuh’ gal ahi, Hammedatha’ tapa, Agag-te beh Haman in Jew mite sugawpin a suksiat nadingin Pur kici ai sanin Jew mite suksiat ding sawm hi." 
Esther9:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin, Jew mite sukna dingin Haman in a geelsa thu hoih lo pen Haman’ lu tung mah a lehtukna ding, le amah le a tapate khuam tungah a kikhaina ding lai-in gelhin thu a pia hi." 
Esther9:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pur min tamin hih hun sung teng Purim ci-in min a phuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih lai sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh, le hih thute amau’ mit tawh mu-in a pumpi uh tawh a tuahna uh hangin," 
Esther9:27 Jew mite amau mahmah, le a suan a khakte uh, le amau a pawlpih khempeuh in lai sunga kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin kum simin hih ni nihte a pel loin a tan’ ding uh kipsak uh a," 
Esther9:28 a khangkhangin innkuan sim, gam sim, khuapi simah hih nite phawkin a kitanna ding, le Jew mite lakah hih Purim nite a kitan’ ngitngetna ding ahi a, a suanlekhakte un zong hih thu a mangngilh hetloh nading uh ahi zongin khotakin a len uh hi." 
Esther9:29 Tua ciangin Abihail’ tanu Kumpinu Esther in Purim thu tawh kisai hih laikhak nihna a kipsak nadingin Jew mi Mordekai tungah aana a kicingin a piakna lai-in a gelh hi. 
Esther9:30 Kumpi Ahasueras’ ukna gam za le sawmnih le sagih sungah a om Jew mite khempeuh tungah kilemna le nopna a omna ding deihsakna laite kikhak a," 
Esther9:31 Jew mi Mordekai in a gelhsa bangin a kisehsa tawh kizui-in hih Purim nite a tan nadingun thu kipia hi. Tua mah bangin amaute le a suanlekhakte uh a dingin antanna ding le thumna bawlna ding ngeinate a gelh uh hi. 
Esther9:32 Kumpinu Esther’ thupiakna in hih Purim bawlna ding ngeinate kipsak a, lai thupite sungah hih thu kiciamteh hi." 
Esther10:1 Kumpipa Ahasueras in a ukna gam leitung le tuikulh tunga tengte tung panin siah kai hi. 
Esther10:2 Ama vangliatna le a sepnate khempeuh, le Mordekai tungah a piak minphatnate, Media le Persia Kumpite’ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
Esther10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpipa Ahasueras’ zomah Mordekai a lianpen ahi hi. Mordekai in ama mite’ phattuamna ding le a suanlekhakte uh a khantohna ding hanciam ahih manin Jew mite lakah milian khat hi a, a gam mihonpite in a it kim uh hi." 
Job1:1 Uz gamah Job kici min nei mi khat a om hi. Tua mipa a paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian a zahtak mi khat hi a, amah in gamtat hoih lo peuhmah peel hi." 
Job1:2 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum nei hi. 
Job1:3 Amah in tuu tulsagih, kalaoh tulthum, bawngtal kap zanga, lapi zanga le nasem tampi tak a nei hi. Tua ahih manin nisuahna gam sungah Job a haupen khat ahi hi." 
Job1:4 Ama tapate in inn khat panin inn khatah a ban banin pawi bawlin pai kawikawi uh a, tua pawi a siim dingin a sanggam numei thumte uh zong a sam kawikawi uh hi." 
Job1:5 Tua banga a pawi bawl uh gual khat a kikhit ciangin Job in a tapate samin amaute siansuah a, zingsangin tho baihin a ta phazah tawh kizui-in meihal biakna a pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Job in, “Ka tate khialin, a lungsim sung uhah Pasian samsia khathei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tu-a bangin Job in hih tawntung hi." 
Job1:6 Ni khat ni-in Topa’ omna-ah vantung mite hong pai uh a, tuate lakah Satan zong hong kihel hi." 
Job1:7 Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi pana hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin ka hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawkkha hiam? A paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoih lo a peel amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:9 Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Job in Pasian hong mawk zahtak ahi hiam?" 
Job1:10 Amah le a innkuan le a neihsate khempeuh na hutna-in a kimkotah daai khan hi lo na hi hiam? Ama hihna khempeuhah thupha na pia a, genzawh lohin ama neihsa pung hi." 
Job1:11 Ahi zongin na khut zanin ama neihsa khempeuh suksak lecin na maitang mahmahah nang hong samsia pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, ama neihsa khempeuh na khut sungah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah taktak ahihleh na su kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ omna panin Satan a paikhia hi." 
Job1:13 Ni khat, a tapate le a tanute in a u pen uh inn-ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi." 
Job1:14 Kamtai khat Job kiangah hong tungin, “Bawngtalte in lo kho-in, tuate gei-ah late gamta uh hi." 
Job1:15 Tua laitakin Seba mite hong pai-in ganhingte hong sut a, namsau tawh gancingte thatkhin uh hi. Hih thu a hong zasak thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:16 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tungin, “Vantung panin keek hong kia a, tuute le tuucingte kha-in kangtum uh hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:17 Tua pa in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu-in, “Khaldea mite hon thum in kalaohte hong sut a, namsau tawh kalaoh tung tuangte khempeuh that hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:18 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu a, “Na tapate le na tanute a u pen uh inn-ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi." 
Job1:19 Tua laitakin sehnel gam panin huihpi pingpei hong nungin a inn mutpai-in na tate denglum hi. Nang kiangah hih thu a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:20 Hih thu a zak ciangin Job dahlua-in a puan balkek a, a sam met khia-in leilakah bok sukin Pasian a bia hi." 
Job1:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nu sung panin guaktangin ka suak a, guaktang mahin ka ciahkik ding hi. Topa in hong pia a, Topa mah in hong lakik hi. Topa’ min kiphat ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Job1:22 Hih thu khempeuhah Job khial lo a, Pasian zong mawhsak lo hi." 
Job2:1 Ni khat ni-in Topa’ omna-ah vantung mite hong paikik uh a, Satan zong amaute lakah hong kihelin Topa’ omna mahah hong pai hi." 
Job2:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi lai panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin kong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:3 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawk hiam? A paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoih lo a peel, amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah om lo hi. Thu om lopi-in amah susia dingin kei nong kam pausak a, ahi zongin ama hoihna bangmah hem tuan lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:4 Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Vun bek in vun mah leizo bek, ci-in paunak a om mah bangin mi khat in ama nuntakna a hutna-in a neih khempeuh pia ngam ding hi." 
Job2:5 Tu-in na khut zan inla, ama sa le a guh suksak lecin nangma maitang mahah pel loin nang hong samsia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:6 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, na khut sungah amah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah sisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Job2:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ omna panin Satan paikhia a, Job a khetul pan a luzang dongin a kihhuai meima a veisak hi." 
Job2:8 Tua ciangin Job in beel kitam themkhat la-in tua tawh kikhuatin vut lakah a tu hi. 
Job2:9 Tua ciangin a zi in, “Na upna khiam tuan lo ding na hi hiam? Pasian samsia inla sisuk mai in,” a ci hi." 
Job2:10 Ahih hangin amah in a zi kiangah, “Numei haite’ kampau bangin na pau hi. Pasian’ tung panin a hoih sang ihih ciangin siatna zong sang lo ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Hih thu khempeuhah a kampau nangawnin Job khial lo hi." 
Job2:11 Job’ lawmte thum, Teman khuami Elifaz, Shuah gammi Bildad, le Naamah gammi Zofar-te in Job in a thuak gimna thu teng a zak uh ciangin a inn ciat panun amah a hehnem ding le a hanthawn dingin kituahin hong paikhawm uh hi." 
Job2:12 Amaute in a gamla sim mun panin Job a muh tungun amah thei pah lo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a gingin kapkhia uh a, a puan uh balkekin a lu tung uh a tukik dingin leivui lawnto uh hi." 
Job2:13 Tua ciangin leilakah sun sagih le zan sagih sung amah tawh tukhawm uh a, ama thuakna a nasiat mahmah lamtak mu uh ahih manin kuamah in kam khat beek a paupih ngam kei uh hi." 
Job3:1 Hih bang teng khit ciangin Job in thugen hong kipan a, mihingin a pian’ ni a samsia hi." 
Job3:2 Tua ciangin Job in," 
Job3:3 “Ka suah ni, le ‘Pasal naungek khat kipaii hi,’ a kicih zan beimang hen!" 
Job3:4 Tua ni khimzin’ ni suak hen! Vana Pasian in phawkin nei kei hen la, tua ni-in khuavak taang kei hen." 
Job3:5 Khuaniim, khuamial in khuhcip hen. Tua ni-in meiipi zing hen la, tua ni awk in valhtum hen." 
Job3:6 “Tua zan, khuamial sahpi in mancip hen! Kum khat sunga nidangte tawh kisim khawm kei hen la, kha khat sunga nidangte lakah kiseh khawm kei hen." 
Job3:7 Tua zanin ta piang kei hen la, lungdam otna awging tua zanin ging nawnkei hen." 
Job3:8 Phuisamna tawh awle a khiim thei, a mitphial tawh tuipi ganhing a hencip thei mite in tua zan samsia tahen." 
Job3:9 Tua ni zingsang aksite mial hen. A vak ngei lo ding khuavak ngak niloh hen la, zingsang phalvak mu ngeikei hen;" 
Job3:10 bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong kipaiina naugil na khakcip lo a, kei’ muhna panin lungkhamna hong hepkhiatsak lo hi." 
Job3:11 “Bang hangin a sisa-in suak hoh lo a, bang hangin ka suah phetin si pah hoh lo ka hi hiam?" 
Job3:12 Bang hangin ka nu’ khuk tungah hong kitawi se a, ka nu’ nawi hong kiteepsak se ahi hiam?" 
Job3:13 Tua hi zenzen kei leh hanah nuamtakin ka lum hithiat khin ding hi. Sihna sungah ihmu-in ka tawlnga khin ding a," 
Job3:14 inn hoihnono a lam kumpite le uliante," 
Job3:15 ngun le kham tawh a kidim a hau a liante tawh nuamtakin hanah ka tawlnga khinta ding hi. 
Job3:16 Bang hangin a hun cing lo-a suakte bang, khuavak a mu man loin a si naungekte bangin hong kiseelcip hoh lo ahi hiam?" 
Job3:17 Tua lai-ah migilote in hong sukha nawn lo ding a, a gim mite tawlnga hithiat ding hi." 
Job3:18 Tua lai-ah galmat salte in nopna ngah ding a, nasem ukpa’ awging za nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Job3:19 Tua lai munah milian mineu omkhawm a, silate nangawn a topa’ kiang pan suakta hi." 
Job3:20 “Bang hangin lungkhamna a thuak mipa, a nuntakna haksa a sa mahmah mipa," 
Job3:21 sih ding lunggulh ngeungau napi, a si thei lo, sum phum zon sangin sih ding a lim zonzaw," 
Job3:22 han sung a tun ciangin a nuam mahmah, hankhuk a tun ciangin nuam lua-in a dianggawp mite, khuavak a mu dingin mi-in piang laizang ahi hiam?" 
Job3:23 Bang hangin mailam thu ding a thei lopi-in a mot om ding, a kimkotah Pasian in daai a khaknelh mipa, mi-in piang zenzen ahi hiam?" 
Job3:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh khuisatna, ka annek suak a, ka tauna, luipi ging bang hi." 
Job3:25 Ka kihtaktak thu ka tungah hong tung ta a, ka laulau thu, ka tuak ta hi." 
Job3:26 Lungnopna, daitakin omna, ka nei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong nawk niloh a, tawldam hun ka nei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Job4:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in thu hong gen a," 
Job4:2 “Mi khatpeuh in thu hong genpih leh na heh ding hiam? Kua in a kam ipzo nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Job4:3 Lunghiang mite na hanthotna, khut kha ban kha mite na thakhauhsakna," 
Job4:4 a puk mite na thugenna tawh na kipsakna, khukzaw mite na hatsak ngeite ngaihsun in." 
Job4:5 Ahi zongin nang tungah tuate hong tung a, na thuakzo kei hi. Tuate in nang hong su a, na lungniam hi." 
Job4:6 Na biakna in hong hehnem zo lo ahi hiam? A paubaang lo, na nuntakna in lametna hong pia zo lo ahi hiam?" 
Job4:7 Tu-in ngaihsun in: Midik kimlai kua sia ngei ahi hiam? A thutang mi a kisuksiatna koi-ah mu ngei na hi hiam? 
Job4:8 Mawhna bawlin buaina a piangsak mi in a gamtatna bangin a gah a atna ka thei hi. 
Job4:9 Pasian’ husanna tawh tua bang mite sia a, ama hehna in tua bang mite kangtum hi." 
Job4:10 Humpinelkai hawk bangin migilote’ hawkna dai ta a, Pasian in amaute’ ha suktansak khin ahih manin gamdai ta uh hi." 
Job4:11 Annek ding a mu lo a thahat humpinelkai bangin amaute simang khin uh a, a tate uh kithehthang hi." 
Job4:12 “Tu-in kei kiangah thu khat hong tung khian a, ka bil in tua thu ginghiau a za hi." 
Job4:13 Mi a ihsip hun zankim laitak, zan mangmat hun laitakin" 
Job4:14 launa le linna kei tungah hong tung a, ka pumpi linna in kei hong lausak hi." 
Job4:15 Huih in ka mai hong mut a, ka khuasikmul hong suaksak hi." 
Job4:16 A mel ka khen theih loh lim khat hong ding a, keima mai-ah mihing lim khat hong om a, tua ciangin aw un duadua khat ka za a," 
Job4:17 ‘Pasian’ mai-ah mi khatpeuh paubaang loin omzo ngei ding ahi hiam? Amah a Bawlpa’ mai-ah sitbaang loin omzo ngei ding ahi hiam? 
Job4:18 Pasian in ama nasemte mahmah muangzo loin, ama sawltakte’ mawhna mu ahihleh," 
Job4:19 inn umna kawmin buan a kizatna inn sunga a teng mite, a inn bulpi leivui ahi," 
Job4:20 zing kal nitak kalin, a kisusia thei sungah a omte, bangzah ta-in kuama don lohin si pakin," 
Job4:21 amau’ liatna in taisan pak ding a, pilna ngah ngei loin si pakzaw ding hi lo ahi hiam?’ hong ci hi." 
Job5:1 “Tu-in na thu ko in: Nang hong huh ding om ahi hiam? A siangthote kua pen’ lam zuan ding na hi hiam? 
Job5:2 Mihai pa in a hehna sihlawh a, muhdahna in sihna piangsak hi." 
Job5:3 Mihai pa in limtakin zung kha ngei napi, ama inn thakhatin a kizunglot ka mu ngei hi." 
Job5:4 A tapate suahtaksak zawh ding hi nawn lo hi. Kulhkongpi gei-ah amaute kisugawp a, amaute a honkhia ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job5:5 Midangte in a neihsate liahtumsak uh a, amah sangin a hatzaw pa in a um a beel sunga a omte nangawn laksak a, a neih a lam duhgawhin a deihgawh hi." 
Job5:6 Leilak panin gimna hong piangtawm lo a, lei sung panin lungkhamna hong pokhiatawm lo hi." 
Job5:7 Mei-ek a to leen mah bangin mihingte in amau’ lungkhamna ding mah a piangsak uh hi. 
Job5:8 “Nang hi leng, ka Pasian’ tungah ka thum ding a, ama tungah ka thu ka ap ding hi." 
Job5:9 Amah in na liante le kuama phawk zawh loh thute sem a, genzawh lohin a lamdang na tampi a bawl hi." 
Job5:10 Amah in guah zusak a, lo khempeuh tui a buak hi." 
Job5:11 Amah in mi niamte sangkoih a, a dahte lungnuamsak hi." 
Job5:12 Amah in migilote’ geelna suksiatsak ahih manin amaute in a ngimna uh tangtun thei lo uh hi. 
Job5:13 Amah in migilote amau’ gitlohna mahah awksak a, ngian a zangte’ geelna zong a lumletsak hi." 
Job5:14 Sunthapai-in khuamial sung kidenna a, suntangpi mahin zan bangin mial a zawt uh hi." 
Job5:15 Ahi zongin amah in amau’ kiang panin pa nei lote honkhia a, mi thahatte kiang panin mi cimawhte a honkhia hi." 
Job5:16 Tua ahih manin mizawngte in lametna neikik uh a, thuman lo mite ahihleh kihencip hi." 
Job5:17 “Pasian in a taii mite mi nuamsa hizaw ahih manin, Vanglianpa’ taiina thupi san in." 
Job5:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a liamsak hangin a liamna tunsak ding a, ama satna liamma damsak ding hi." 
Job5:19 Lungkhamna gukvei dong na tuahna-ah amah in nang hong hon ding a, a sagihveina dingah siatna in nang hong su nawn lo ding hi." 
Job5:20 Kialpi sungin sih nading pan nang hong honkhia ding a, gal sungah namsau panin nang hong suaktasak ding hi." 
Job5:21 Gensiatna panin nang hong kihu ding a, siatna hong tun ciangin na lau kei ding hi." 
Job5:22 Suksiat ding le puksih dingte na nuihsan lel ding a, leitung gamsate na kihta kei ding hi." 
Job5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh na lo sungah suang om lo ding a, gamlak gamsate in hong su lo ding hi." 
Job5:24 Na inn sungah lunghihmawhna ding om lo hi, ci-in na thei ding a, na inn kiim na et ciangin a kitasam bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Job5:25 Na suan na khakte tampi tak pha ding hi, ci-in na thei ding a, na sunga piangte leitung lopa zah pha ding hi, ci-in na thei ding hi." 
Job5:26 A hun ciangin ancilna phualah buhlom a tun mah bangin a teek sihin han na zuan ding hi. 
Job5:27 Hih thute khempeuh ka kantel uh a, a thuman a na hi hi. Hih thute ka zaksa uh hi a, a manna na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job6:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job6:2 “Ka lunggimna kitawikhai hen la, ka haksatna khempeuh kitawiteh leh!" 
Job6:3 Tuipi sehnel khempeuh sangin gikzaw ding ahih manin ka kampaute guhin a kha hi. 
Job6:4 Vanglianpa’ thaltangte in kei hong kha a, ka sungah a thal gu kidiah hi. Pasian in a kihtakhuai-in kei hong su hi." 
Job6:5 Gam late in lopa a nek laitakin ham a, bawngtal in an a nek laitakin ham ahi hiam?" 
Job6:6 An lim lote, ci sawh loin kine thei a, aktui da kang in limna nei ahi hiam?" 
Job6:7 Ka kam in tuate ciam nuam lo a, tuate khempeuh a luaksuahhuai an tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Job6:8 “Ka ngetna ngah thei hi leng a, Pasian in ka deihna hong pia ding hileh" 
Job6:9 Pasian in kei hong sucip hen la, a khut zanin kei hong that vet leh!" 
Job6:10 Tua hileh keima kihehnepna hi ding a, hih zahta ka thuakna-ah nuamin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Siangtho Pa’ thu ka nial khat zong om lo hi." 
Job6:11 Ka thuak lai nadingin bang hatna nei nawn a, lungduai a ka om nadingin lamet ding bang om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job6:12 Ka thahatna suang bang hi a, ka pumpi in sumngo tha paii ahi hiam?" 
Job6:13 Kei le kei’ sung panin huhna bangci ngahtawm theih ding ka hi hiam? Kei hong kihuhna ding ka ngetna ding kuamah om lo hi. 
Job6:14 “Pasian ka nusia a, ka nusia kei zongin, hih bang lungkham hunin lawm citak ka kisam hi." 
Job6:15 No ka lawmte pen, lui tuikhang bang, a mangthang pak tui let bang," 
Job6:16 nin a khalhnelh vuk le tuikhal bangin na zuautat uh hi. 
Job6:17 Khua a lum ciangin tuate tui mangthang a, ni a sat ciangin a kang hi." 
Job6:18 Tua tui a zong dingin khualzin mite pai kawikawi a, gam sung tengah kawi pai-in a mangthang uh hi." 
Job6:19 Tema khuami khualzinte in zong tua tui zong uh a, Sheba mite in zong tua tui muanin a nei uh hi." 
Job6:20 Ahi zongin tua a lametna uhah cimawh uh hi. Tua tui zuan uh a, a om loh ciangin cih nading thei loin kamka lel uh hi." 
Job6:21 Tu-in zong kei a dingin note tua bang lel na hi uh hi. Ka gimna teng nong mu uh a, na lau uh hi." 
Job6:22 No kiangah, ‘Na khat peuhpeuh hong pia un, ka suahtak nadingin sum tawh hong huh un," 
Job6:23 ka galte’ kiang panin hong honkhia un, kei a hong nengniamte’ khutsung panin hong tankhia un,’ hong ci ngei zenzen ka hi hiam?" 
Job6:24 “Hong hilh thei le-uhcin, pau loin ka ompah ding hi. Ka khialhna hong theitelsak dih un." 
Job6:25 Lungsim takpi tawh thugennate heh loin kisang thei a, ahi zongin no hong taiina in bang phatuamsak ahi hiam?" 
Job6:26 Kamging mawkmawk lelte heh taak sa a, huih’ letmang cihmawh kamte thupi ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?" 
Job6:27 Mi cimawh khat suksiatgawp sawm a, na lawm khat uh hihgawp sawm na hi uh hiam?" 
Job6:28 Tu-in kong thum hi; kihei unla kei hong en un. Na maitang uhah zuau a gen dingin kilawm ka hi hiam? 
Job6:29 Ngaihsun pha un, a kilawm lopi-in kei hong hih kei un. Ngaihsun pha un, ka hoihna teng a hong kize-et hi lel hi." 
Job6:30 Ahi zongin zuau gen mahin nong ngaihsun lai veve uh a, a sia le a pha a khenthei loin nong seh lai veve uh hi." 
Job7:1 “Leitungah mihing in nasep haksa nei a, ama hun pen nasempa-a’ bang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job7:2 Sila nasemte in niliim lunggulhin nasempa in a thaman a ngak tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job7:3 A mawkna-in kha tampi sung ka om a, zanthapai-in lungkhamna bek keima tanh ahi hi." 
Job7:4 Nitak ka lup ciangin, ‘Cik ciangin khua hong vakin zing ka tho tam,’ ka ci hi. Ahi zongin zan sau a, zingsang khuavak mateng ka kigawigawi hi." 
Job7:5 Ka pumpi tung khempeuhah than bekbek kidim a, ka vun tung khempeuh meima in tuamcip hi." 
Job7:6 Ka hunte siamgante’ siam ciangtang sangin manlang zaw a, lametna om loin a mong tung pak hi." 
Job7:7 “Pasian aw, ka nuntakna husan’ bang bek ahihna hong phawk in. Ka mit in hun nuam mukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job7:8 Kei hong mu ngei pa in kei hong mukik nawn lo ding a, na hong et laitak mahin ka mangthang ding hi." 
Job7:9 Meiilum kaite bei-in a manthan bangin Leinuai a paisuk pa mangthang ding hi. 
Job7:10 Ama inn ah hong ciahkik nawn lo ding a, ama omna ngei mun in amah thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job7:11 Tua ahih manin pau loin ka om kei ding hi. Ka lungkham manin kam ka pau ding a, ka gimluat manin ka phun ding hi." 
Job7:12 “Kei a hong cing ding na koih nadingin kei, tuipi ganhing hong sa na hi hiam?" 
Job7:13 Lum leng nuam ding a, ihmu leng phatuam ding hi, ci leng lah," 
Job7:14 a lauhuai mang nong mansak a, a lauhuai maangmuhna tawh nong lausak hi." 
Job7:15 Tua ahih manin gui-awk ding ka utzaw a, hih bang ka thuak sangin ka si nuamzaw hi." 
Job7:16 Ka lungkham a, ka nungta nuam nawn kei hi. Ka nuntakna pen husan’ bang hi lel ahih manin hong hici omsak hoh in." 
Job7:17 “Nang in hih zahin na thupi ngaihsut dingin na lungsimah na ngaihsut dingin 
Job7:18 zingsang simin gim a pia dingin ama kiangah pai-in amah na ze-et themthum nadingin mihing bang hi lel ahi hiam? 
Job7:19 Tomkha sung beek hong pelh lo ding a, ka hu beek hong sangsak man lo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job7:20 Mihingte a encik pa aw, a khial ka hih leh zong nangma tungah bang gamta khial ka hi hiam? Bang hangin kei hong ngim a, bang hangin nangma muitum suak zenzen ka hi hiam?" 
Job7:21 Bang hangin ka khialhna hong maisak lo a, ka mawhna hong maisak lo na hi hiam? Tu-in han sungah ka lum ding a, nong zonzon hangin ka na om nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job8:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job8:2 “Tua bang thu bang tanvei gengen ding a, bang tanvei paupau ding na hi hiam?" 
Job8:3 Pasian in thutang a zanglo sa na hi hiam? Vanglianpa in thuman a zanglo sa na hi hiam? 
Job8:4 Na tate ama tungah khial a, amau’ mawhnate amaute a tuaksak ahi hi." 
Job8:5 A hun lai-in Pasian zong inla, Vanglianpa’ hehpihna ding thuum lecin," 
Job8:6 nang dikin thutang kisa mahmah na hih leh pel loin amah in nang hong en ding a, na thumanna tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Job8:7 Tua hileh, na zawn’ mahmah khit hangin a tawpna-ah na hau kik ding hi." 
Job8:8 “Khangluite’ thu kantel inla, pute pate’ tuahsa thute ngaihsun pha in." 
Job8:9 Eite pen zan mah mi ihi a, bangmah i thei kei hi. Leitung a i nuntakna pen niliim bang lel ahi hi." 
Job8:10 Amaute in nang hong hilhin, a thu hong genin, amau’ phawksa thute hong gen ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job8:11 “Ciknawng om lohna-ah laiphai kung po thei ahi hiam? Tui om lohna-ah pumpeeng pung thei ahi hiam? 
Job8:12 Ahi zongin tuate a pak kimlai a phuk hun nai lopi-in kungno dang khempeuh sangin keu masa zaw hi. 
Job8:13 Pasian a mangngilhte tua bangmah ahi hi. Pasian a don lo mite’ lametna a bei ta ahi hi. 
Job8:14 Ama kimuanna maimom khau bang hi lel a, ama ki-upna maimom bu bang hi lel hi." 
Job8:15 A inn tungah kingam a, a inn hoi hi. A inn lencip a, ahi zongin kip zo lo hi." 
Job8:16 “Amah pen nitaang sungah hoihtakin a khang kungno, a huan sungah a dawn hilhhelh kungno ahi hi." 
Job8:17 Ahi zongin suangtum lakah a zung a kivialgawp, suangtawphah a phukha zung a suak hi." 
Job8:18 Tua ciangin mi khatpeuh in a phung pan zungbawh a, ‘Cik mahin nang hong thei ngei peuhmah kei ing,’ ci-in a lawnkhia hi." 
Job8:19 Hih bang danin ama nuntakna bei a, lei sung panin kung dangte hong pokhia hi." 
Job8:20 “Theitel in; Pasian in cikmah hunin mawhbaang lo mite nilkhia lo ding a, gamtatsia mite huh ngei lo ding hi." 
Job8:21 Na mukah lungdam nuihna hong omsak ding a, na kam sungah lungdam a kikona hong omsak ding hi." 
Job8:22 Nang hong mudahte in maizumna ngah ding uh a, migilote’ puanbuk maimang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job9:1 Tua ciangin Job in Pasian dawng a," 
Job9:2 “Kuamah in Pasian a zawhzawh lohna a teltakin ka theita hi. 
Job9:3 Mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh thu a kinial ding hileh tulkhat sungah khatvei nangawn dawng thei lo ding hi. 
Job9:4 Amah pil mahmah a, vanglian mahmah hi. Kua in khauhtakin nial a, nial paisuakzo ahi hiam?" 
Job9:5 Pasian in mualte lingsak a, tawlngasak lo hi. Ama hehna tawh mualte a lumlet hi." 
Job9:6 Amah in leitung lokgawp a, a khuampite kiling hi." 
Job9:7 Amah in ni a suak lo dingin thu pia a, aksite sincip hi." 
Job9:8 Amah bek in vanpi zal a, tuipi tuihualte tuancil hi." 
Job9:9 Amah pen vana a om Khawlei-uikai, Zawlzawng, Seguk, le Khanglam aksite a bawlpa ahi hi." 
Job9:10 Amah in kuama theih zawh loh na lian tampi bawl a, kuama simzawh loh nalamdang tampi sem hi." 
Job9:11 “Ka kiangah amah hong pai a, ke’n amah ka mu thei kei hi. Amah gam tangtang napi-in, amah ka theithei kei hi." 
Job9:12 Amah in lakhia nuam leh a khaktanzo ding kua om ahi hiam? Bang hih na hi hiam, kua’n ci thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:13 Pasian in ama hehna dokkik het lo mah ding hi. Rahab’ pawlte nangawn a khenuai-ah kun uh hi. 
Job9:14 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in bangci dawn theih ding a, amah ka nialna ding kammal bangci muh ding ka hi hiam?" 
Job9:15 Kei ka dik hangin amah ka dawng thei kei hi. Kei hong mawhsak pa tungah hong hehpih ding ka nget kul hi. 
Job9:16 Thukhen zumah amah samin hong pai hita mah leh zong ka thumna hong ngai dingin ka um tuan kei hi. 
Job9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu themno khat hangin nakpitakin kei hong hih a, thu om lopi-in gimna tampi hong thuaksak hi." 
Job9:18 Ka hu nangawn hong sangsak man lo a, lungkhamna tawh kei hong kidimsak hi." 
Job9:19 Thatanghat thu ding hileh, amah hat mahmah a, thutang kituh hi leng, kua in thukhen zumah amah samzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:20 Kei ka dik hangin keima kam mah siksanin kei hong man ding a, mawhbaang lo ka hih hangin keima kampau hong lehheisak ding hi." 
Job9:21 Paubaanna ka neih loh hangin kei a thupi-in ka kingaihsun tuan het kei a, ka nuntakna ka kih hi." 
Job9:22 Thu khat bek om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a paubaang lote le a gilote susia khawm hi, ka ci hi." 
Job9:23 Lauhuai lianpi hong tung pakin sihna a om ciangin mawhbaang lote’ thumna a nuihsan lel hi. 
Job9:24 Migilote’ khut sungah leitung kipia a, amah in thukhen mangte’ mit a tuncipsak hi - amah hikeileh kua hi ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:25 “Laitaite sangin ka hun nawhtai zaw a, beipak ahih manin nopna ngah kha lo hi." 
Job9:26 Pumpeeng gunkuang bangin ka hun nawhpai a, muvanlai sa bawh bangin a nawhlen’ hi." 
Job9:27 Ka dahnate kimangngilh bawlin kimaitaisak ding ci taleng zong," 
Job9:28 a dikin nong seh loh ding lamtak thei khin ka hih manin ka thuak ding thute hangin kei ka lau mahmah hi. 
Job9:29 Kei a mawhin hong kiseh veve ding ahihleh bang hangin a mawkna-in na sem ding ka hi hiam? 
Job9:30 Satpiang tawh kei kisilin, vuttui tawh ka khut sawp taleng," 
Job9:31 buannawng sungah kei nong hencip veve ding a, ka puan ninte in a kihhuai hong suaksak ding hi."
