Job9:32 Amah ka dawn theih nadingin amah, kei bangin mi hi lo a, thukhen zumah thu kineihpih theih hi lo hi." 
Job9:33 Ko tegel kikalah thu hong khen ding khat om thei hen la, ko tegel tungah aana hong zang ding khat om thei hileh," 
Job9:34 kei hong kisatna ciang hong paih khiatsak ding a, kei tungah lauhuaina lianpite hong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Job9:35 Bangbang ahi zongin amah kihta hetloin ka pau ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei’ omzia ding bangin kei ka om loh lamtak teltakin ka kithei hi. 
Job10:1 “Ka nuntakna ka cimtak mahmah ta hi. Ka dahna thu ka ut utin ka gen ding a, ka lungkham manin ka paupau ding hi." 
Job10:2 Pasian kiangah hih bangin ka ci ding hi: Kei hong mawhsak kei in. Kei nong langpanna thu hong gen in. 
Job10:3 Na khut tawh na sepsate simmawh bawlin, migilote’ vai panpihin, hih bangin nong netniamna ah bang phattuamna ngah na hi hiam?" 
Job10:4 Mihing bang lelin gamta na hi hiam? 
Job10:5 Na nuntak hun tan kote’ nuntak tan bang lelin ngaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job10:6 Bang hangin ka mawhna hong sulzuihin, ka khialhna khempeuh hong kantel na hi hiam?" 
Job10:7 Ka mawh lohna na thei a, nang kiang panin kei hong hon ding a om lohna na theihsa mah ahi hi." 
Job10:8 “Nangma khut tawh kei hong lomin na hong piangsak a, tu-in nangma khut mah in kei hong lehsuksiat hi." 
Job10:9 Leivui pana kei nong bawlna hong phawkkik in. Leivui mahin hong dengvui kik takpi ding na hi hiam? 
Job10:10 Kei ka pian nadingin ka pa’ tungah tha na guan a, ka nu’ sungah kei nong khangsak hi." 
Job10:11 Guh le thaguite tawh ka pumpi ding nong bawl a, sazang le vun tawh tua guhte nong tuamsak hi." 
Job10:12 Kei, nuntakna hong pia-in, nong it tawntung a, nangma hong kepna hangin kei ka nungta hi." 
Job10:13 Ahi zongin a beisa hun sung khempeuhah kei a’ ding thusim khat na neihna tu-in ka theita hi. 
Job10:14 Ka khialhkhaknate hong ensim niloh na hih manin ka mawhnate hong maisak nuam lo na hi hi. 
Job10:15 Ka khialh phetin gim nong pia pah a, ka gamtat hoih ciangin zong nong pakta tuan kei hi. Mindaina le maizumna tawh kei ka kidim hi." 
Job10:16 Mavanna khatpeuh neisun leng zong, humpinelkai bangin ka siatna ding na zong a, kei’ gimtheih nadingin nalamdang tuamtuam nangawn na bawl liang hi." 
Job10:17 Kei a hong langpang dingin teci na nei tawntung a, keima tungah na hehna hong khang semsem a, kei nong sukna ding thuthak na mu tawntung hi." 
Job10:18 “Pasian aw, bang hangin ka nu’ sung panin kei hong piangsak peuhmah na hi hiam? Kuama hong muh ma-in a si hizaw hoh leng!" 
Job10:19 Ka nu’ sung pan hankhuk zuat pah ding pen mihing a pian loh zah mahin a hoih ahi hi. 
Job10:20 Keima nuntakna bei dektak ta hi lo ahi hiam? Hong hici omsak hoh in! Ka hun neih laisun teng nuam takin hong zangsak in. 
Job10:21 Kei a pai baihta ding ka hi a, a hong ciahkik ngei ding ka hi kei hi - khuamial, lungzinna gam," 
Job10:22 khuavak nangawn khuamial ahihna gam, khuamial gam, lungzinna gam, lungkhamna gam, a zuan ta ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job11:1 Tua ciangin Naamah gammi Zofar in dawng a," 
Job11:2 “Kampau hih zahta hong kidawng lo ding sa a, kam tam pauna hangin thumanin hong kiseh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job11:3 Job aw, na thugente hong dawng thei lo dingin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam? Na simmawh kampaute hong kidawng mawh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job11:4 Nangma thugente a man na sa kha a, Pasian’ muhna-ah a siangtho dingin na kingaihsun kha hi." 
Job11:5 Pasian in na thugente hong dawngkik le ut mahmah ing! 
Job11:6 Pilna nam tampi a omna thu, mihing’ theih zawh loh thuthuk, a omna thu hong gen ding hi. Na mawhna zahin Pasian in gim hong piak lohna thei in." 
Job11:7 “Pasian’ thuthuk thei khinzo ding na hi hiam? Vanglianpa’ hih theihna thei khinzo ding na hi hiam? 
Job11:8 Vantung sangin Pasian sangzaw a, ahi zongin tua vantung nangawn na banzo kei hi. Pasian in leinuai thu thei a, ahi zongin nangmah in tua thu na thei kei hi." 
Job11:9 Pasian’ liatna pen leitung sangin golzaw a, tuipi sangin zaizaw hi." 
Job11:10 Pasian in nang hong manin thu hong sit leh amah a khaktan ding kua om ahi hiam? 
Job11:11 Pasian in mi hoih lote thei takpi hi. Mawhna a muh ciangin thudon lo ding ahi hiam? 
Job11:12 Gamlak a om late mihing suak ngei ding a, mihaite pil ngei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job11:13 “Job aw, na lungsim a hoihin bawl inla, Pasian’ lamah kihei in." 
Job11:14 Khialhna na bawl khak leh paaikhia inla, na inn sungah gitlohna omsak kei in." 
Job11:15 Tua hileh kisuanna om loin na khuadak ngam ding a, na lung nuamin launa na nei kei ding hi." 
Job11:16 Na lungkhamnate veng ding a, tuikhang pak bangin na phawk nawn kei ding hi." 
Job11:17 Tua ciangin na nuntakna, sun sangin taangzaw ding a, nuntak lungzin’ pen hun, sun sangin taangzaw ding hi." 
Job11:18 Lungnuam tak le lametna nei-in na om ding a, Pasian in nang hong hu-in, tawldamna hong pia ding hi." 
Job11:19 Kuamah kihtak nei loin nuamtakin na om ding a, mi tampi in nangma maipha hong zong ding uh hi." 
Job11:20 Ahih hangin migilote ahihleh cimawhin khuadak ding uh a, suahtakna ding lampi mu lo ding uh hi. Amau’ ngah ding ahihleh sihna bek ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job12:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job12:2 “Note pen theihna kicing na kisa mah uh a, pilna a nei na kisa mah uh hi." 
Job12:3 Ahi zongin note zah mahin kei zong thu ka thei a, midangte sangin na theihzawk uh bang om tuan ahi hiam?" 
Job12:4 Ka lawmte nangawn in tu-in kei hong nuihsan uh a, kei dikin paubaang lo napi hong nuihsan uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in ka thungetna a hong piak hun om hi." 
Job12:5 Note in lungkhamna bangmah na nei kei uh a, kei na hong ciamnuih bawl gawpgawp uh hi. A puk dektak mipa na satgawp uh hi." 
Job12:6 Guta mite nuamtakin om hithiat uh a, Pasian a simmawhte nuamtakin nungta uh hi." 
Job12:7 “Ahi zongin gamsate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Vasate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi." 
Job12:8 Leitung ganhingte va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Tui sung ngasate zong va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi." 
Job12:9 Pasian’ khut in amaute a bawlna thu a vekpi-un thei kim uh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job12:10 A piansaksate’ nuntakna Pasian mah in a uk ahi hi. Mihing khempeuhte’ nuntakna ama khut sungah om hi. 
Job12:11 Leii in an a ciap mah bangin, bil in ngai thei hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job12:12 “Khanghamte in pilna nei a, nuntak saute in thu theitel uh hi." 
Job12:13 Pasian in pilna le vang nei a, amah thukipin thu a theitel hi." 
Job12:14 Pasian in phelkek leh kuamah in lamkik zo lo a, Pasian in thongah mi koih leh kuamah in suaktasak zo lo hi." 
Job12:15 Pasian in guah khaktan leh leitung keugaw a, tui a khah ciangin tui hong khang hi." 
Job12:16 “Pasian thahatin gualzo tawntung a, mi khemte le khemna a thuakte Pasian’ ukna nuai-ah a om uh ahi hi." 
Job12:17 Amah in mipilte’ pilna susia-in, makaite pen mihai bangin gamtasak hi." 
Job12:18 Amah in kumpite zakiasak a, thongah a khia hi." 
Job12:19 Siampite mihai suaksak a, mi vangliante lawnthal hi." 
Job12:20 Amah in mi’ muante a pau thei loin bawl a, khanghamte’ pilna a paihkhiatsak hi." 
Job12:21 Amah in mi vangliante mindaisak a, mi thupite’ kihihsakna a beisak hi." 
Job12:22 Amah in khuamial sung panin thuthukte kalkhia a, a kithei zo lo thute kitelsak hi." 
Job12:23 Amah in minamte thahatsakin liansak a, ahi zongin amah in tuate zogawpin susia hi." 
Job12:24 Amah in minam makaite a pilna uh paihkhiatsak a, lampi om lohna gamlakah vakvaisak hi." 
Job12:25 Khuamial lakah amaute in mialzawt uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoihoi uh hi." 
Job13:1 “Na gen uh thu khempeuh ka muhsa vive hi a, ka bil-in ka zakzaksa, ka theihtheihsa thu ahi hi." 
Job13:2 Note’ theih khempeuh, kei zong ka thei hi. Note khempeuh sangin ka neuzaw tuan het kei hi." 
Job13:3 Ahi zongin note tawh kam a kinial hi loin, Pasian tawh a kinial ka hi hi. Pasian tawh hih ka thu ka kinial nuam hi." 
Job13:4 Note in na haina uh zuauthu tawh na melh uh a, kuamah a damsak zo lo zato siam-a kinei mite tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Job13:5 Pau hetloin om hi le-uhcin, mipil mah hong kisazaw ding hi." 
Job13:6 “Tu-in ka thugen hong ngai unla, ka gen laitakin limtak ngai un." 
Job13:7 Pasian’ min dingin thuman lo genin, ama a dingin zuauthu gensak ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Job13:8 Pasian angvan ding a, ama a’ ding gensak ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Job13:9 Pasian in limtakin note hong entel leh note’ sungah hoihna mu ding ahi hiam? Mihingte na khem bangun Pasian a khem thei dingin kingaihsun na hi uh hiam? 
Job13:10 A simthamin angvanna na zat uhleh amah in note hong taii taktak ding hi. 
Job13:11 Ama vangliatna in note hong lausak ding a, note tungah amah kihtakna hong tung ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job13:12 Na thugente uh vutkhu bang hi lel a, na siksante uh leivui bang hi lel hi." 
Job13:13 Pau kei unla, kei, thu hong gensak dih un; a piang peuhpeuh a piang hi mai hen." 
Job13:14 “Ka nuntakna pia ngamin, ka nuntakna ka ap ngam hi." 
Job13:15 Pasian in kei hong that mah taleh zong, phamawh ka sa kei hi. Ahi zongin ama mai-ah ka thu ka gen veve ding hi." 
Job13:16 Pasian’ mai-ah migilote pai ngam lo uh ahih manin, ka hanna pen ka gualzawhna hi ding hi." 
Job13:17 Ka thugente limtak ngai unla, ka lahtelnate na za un." 
Job13:18 Ka thu a gen dingin a baihsa-in ka om a, thu ka zawh ding lamtak teltakin ka thei hi." 
Job13:19 “Pasian aw, keimah hong mawhsak ding na hi hiam? Nong mawhsak leh pau hetloin a si dingin ka kiging hi." 
Job13:20 Thu nih ka hong ngen hi, ka hong nget hong pia in. Tua ciangin nang tungah bangmah kong im kei ding hi." 
Job13:21 Kei tungah gim hong pia nawn kei inla, hih bang launa hong thuaksak nawn kei in." 
Job13:22 Pasian aw, hong hopih masa in, kong dawng ding hi. Kei, thu hong gensak inla, nangmah in hong dawng in." 
Job13:23 Ka mawhna ka khialhna bangzah pha ahi hiam? Ka mawh ka khialhna teng hong theisak in. 
Job13:24 “Bang hangin kei hong peel a, gal bangin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job13:25 Bang hangin keimah lausak ding hanciam na hi hiam? Kei, singteh bang lel hi lo ka hi hiam? Anvai themkhat galin do ding na hi hiam?" 
Job13:26 “Nangmah in kei tungah thusiapi nong zong a, ka neulai huna ka gamtatna nangawn tawh nong mawhsak hi." 
Job13:27 Nangmah in ka khe sikkol nong bulh a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh le ka khekhap nangawn na entel hi." 
Job13:28 Tua huhau-in singmuat bangin ka puk a, nget in a nek puan bangin ka zan-gawp hi." 
Job14:1 “Mihingte a nuntak hun tom mahmah a, lungkhamna tawh kidim hi." 
Job14:2 Amaute paak bangin khangin keu pak uh a, niliim bangin pai hanhanin, mangthang uh hi." 
Job14:3 Pasian aw, tua bang lel mi kei hong en a, thukhenna a thuak dingin na mai-ah hong sam na hi hiam?" 
Job14:4 Mihing banga a ninte sung panin a siang hong piang lo ding hi. 
Job14:5 A nuntak tan ding kisehkhol a, a nuntak kha phazah ding kiciangtan khin hi. Nangmah in na ciangtan khin a, kikheel thei nawn lo hi." 
Job14:6 Amah en loin tuaci omsak mai inla, a nuntak haksapi mah zomzomsak hoh in." 
Job14:7 “A kiphuk khinsa singkung nangawn in lametna nei buang a, a bul sel kikin nungtakik thei hi." 
Job14:8 Lei sungah a zungte teek a, a bulsum a si zongin," 
Job14:9 guahtui ngahin, singkungno-in hong selkik hi." 
Job14:10 Ahi zongin mi si a, amah maimang pah hi. Amah a beina tungta a, koi-ah om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job14:11 “Gun tuite le tuipi tuite a kan’ hun om thei ding hi. 
Job14:12 Ahi zongin vanpi a omlaiteng, misite thokik ngei lo ding a, a ihmutna panun khanglo ngei lo, gamtang ngei lo ding uh hi." 
Job14:13 “Hih gimna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin nong phawk loh nading mun misite’ gam sungah kei hong busak in. Mi a si khinsate hingkik thei lo ahih manin a hingin hong omsak peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ut hi. Na hehna a dam ciangin hong phawkkik peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ngak nuam hi. 
Job14:14  
Job14:15 Tua khit ciangin kei na hong sam ding a, ke’n kong dawng ding hi. Nangma bawlsa ahi keimah na hong lunggulh ding hi." 
Job14:16 Tua hun ciangin ka kalsuanna khempeuh nong en ding a, ahi zongin ka khialhnate nong sulzuih nawn kei ding hi." 
Job14:17 Ka khialhnate hong maisakin, nong paihkhiatsak ding a, ka mawhna khempeuh nong phiatkhiatsak ding hi. Tu-a bangin a piang thei hileh ka ut mahmah hi." 
Job14:18 “Ahi zongin a taktakin, mualte a puk ding hun suangkeente nangawn a cip ding hun hong tung ding hi." 
Job14:19 Tui in suangte nawtkhia-in, guahtui in lei a nawtkhiat bangin nangmah in mihingte’ lametna na beisak hi." 
Job14:20 Nangmah in mi khat zogawpin na hawlkhia a, na sa mahmah ahih manin a si dingin a ha a li hi." 
Job14:21 Amah a pahtawi dingin a tapate hong pai taleh zong amah gimlua ahih manin bangmah phawkzo nawn lo a, a tapate mindai taleh zong bangmah phawkzo nawn lo hi." 
Job14:22 A pumpi sunga a natnate le a lungsim gimnate bek a phawkzo lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job15:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in Job dawng a," 
Job15:2 “Job aw, mawk paupau kei in! Nang’ pau bangin mipilte pau ngei lo a," 
Job15:3 bangmah-a kimang lo kampaute pau lo a, phattuamna om lo dingpi-in thu seello uh hi." 
Job15:4 Ahi zongin nangmah in Pasian zahtakna na beisak a, ama mai-ah thugenna ding na khaktan hi." 
Job15:5 Tu-in na mawhna thu na kam pan hong gingkhia a, ngian zangin na kampau tawh na mawhna na seel hi." 
Job15:6 Na mawhna thu kei’ hong gen kisam lo a, na pauna khempeuh in na mawhna hong langsakta hi." 
Job15:7 “Mihing a a piang lakah a masa pen kisa na hi hiam? Pasian in mualte a bawl lai-in a piang khin kisa na hi hiam? 
Job15:8 Pasian’ vaihawmnate a za simin kingaihsun na hiam? Nang bek in pilna khempeuh a nei-in kingaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job15:9 Ko’ theih loh thu bang thei tuan na hi hiam? Ko’ muh loh thu bang mu tuan na hi hiam? 
Job15:10 Na pa’ pianma a a piang puteek samkangte’ tung panin kote in ka pilnate uh a ngah ka hi uh hi. 
Job15:11 “Pasian in nang hong hehnem hi; bang hangin nialnial na hi hiam? Kam khum kam nem tawh Pasian’ tangin nang tungah thu kong gen uh hi. 
Job15:12 Ahih hangin na lung khauhin kote nong heh et hi. 
Job15:13 Pasian’ tungah a heh na hi a, amah a simmawh na hi hi." 
Job15:14 “Mihing a a piang peuhmah paubaang hetloin siangtho taktak zo ding ahi hiam? Pasian’ tungah a thumanzo kua om ding ahi hiam? 
Job15:15 Pasian in a siangtho vantung mite nangawn muang lo ahihleh, ei mawhnei mite bang hangin hong muang mah ding ahi hiam?" 
Job15:16 Mihing in tui i dawn bangin siatna i dawndawn a, mihing pen siahuai-in bangmah i man kei hi." 
Job15:17 “Job aw, ka thutheihte na ngai in." 
Job15:18 Amaute tung bekah gam kipia ahih manin, amaute a pialkhiatpih ding gamdang mi tawh a kihel lo, a pu a pate un bangmah im loin thu a hilh suksuk uh mipilte’ thugente kong gen ding hi. Tua a gen uh thute in:" 
Job15:19  
Job15:20 “Mi a nengniam migilo pa in a khan tawntungin lungkhamna thuak ding hi. 
Job15:21 Launa ding awging a bilah za ngitnget ding a, lungmuangin a om laitakin gutate in buluh ding hi." 
Job15:22 Lungzinna pan suahtakna ding lametna om lo a, amah a that dingin mun khatah namsau in ngak khinkhian a," 
Job15:23 amah a ne dingin musanete in a ngak uh hi. A mailam thu lungzinhuai ahihna thei hi. 
Job15:24 A thahat kumpi khat bangin lungkhamna le lungzinna in amah a hihgawp dingin a ngak khikhe hi. 
Job15:25 “Pasian langpangin a khuttum a lahsan, Vanglianpa a dem mipa in hih bang thute a thuak hi." 
Job15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in khauhtakin Pasian langpangin, a lum sahpi tawh a lehdo hi." 
Job15:27 “A thatang muanhuai-in a pumpi a liat hangin 
Job15:28 ama tenna khuapi sia-in, ama inn kinusia ding a, a sawt loin ninbulomtang suak ding hi." 
Job15:29 Amah sauvei hau lo ding a, a neihsate kip lo ding hi. Ama liim nangawn maimang ding a," 
Job15:30 khuamial panin suakta lo ding hi. Amah pen a hiangte mei in a kattumsak, a paakte huih in a letkhiatsak, singkung tawh kibang ding hi." 
Job15:31 Amah in gitlohna suanin nei ahih manin, gitlohna bek mah ngahkik ding hi." 
Job15:32 A hun a tun ma-in amah bei ding a, singhiang bangin keu-in hingkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Job15:33 A min ma-in a gahte a pulh leenggui bang ding a, a paakte a pulhmang khin oliv kung bang ding hi." 
Job15:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian a ngaihsun lote mi cimang suak a, sumgolh tawh a kilam innte mei in kangtum hi." 
Job15:35 Mihingte in siatna ding bek ngaihsunin sem uh a, mi khem ding bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job16:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job16:2 “Tua bang thute ka zaza khin a, no’ hehnepna pen gimna ding bek ahi hi." 
Job16:3 Khawl hun nei loin gengen lai ding na hi uh hiam? Na gen ding uh omom lai ahi hiam? 
Job16:4 Note le keimah a kikhek thei hi lehang, note’ gen khempeuh kei zong ka gen thei ding hi. Note ka lu hong peisanin thu tampi tak mah ka hong gen thei ding hi." 
Job16:5 Ahi zongin keimah in note hong tua cih loin, thuhoih mahmah tawh note hong hehnemin, note hehnepna ding thu ka gen ding hi." 
Job16:6 Thu gengen taleng ka natna nuamtuam lo a, pau kei taleng zong, phatuam tuan lo hi." 
Job16:7 Pasian aw, kei nong paatsak ngingei a, ka innkuan khempeuh na sisakmang khin hi." 
Job16:8 Kei na hong mancip a, keima gal na suak hi. Ka vun guak le ka guh guak bekin ka om a, keima mawhna a kilatna-in mite in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Job16:9 “Pasian in a hehna tawh hong balnen ngingei a, a ha hong gawisanin hong heh et hi." 
Job16:10 Mite in kei hong zahko uh a, ka paang a beeng dingin hong kikhawmtuah uh hi." 
Job16:11 Pasian in migilote’ khut sungah kei hong pia hi. 
Job16:12 Kei nuamtakin a om kimlai, Pasian in ka gawlin hong manin, hong balgawpin hong sugawp hi. Pasian in a muitum dingin kei hong suang a," 
Job16:13 ka kimkot panin a thaltangte tawh hong kap hi. Tua thaltangte in kei hong kha-in hong liamsak a, tua bang nangawnah kei hong hehpih lo hi." 
Job16:14 Amah in hong hehpih hetloin kei hong liamsak thuahthuah a, galkap a heh pa bangin kei hong hihgawp hi." 
Job16:15 “Kei thumin puanhampi ka silh a, guallelin leivui lakah ka om hi." 
Job16:16 Ka kahkahna-in ka mai khempeuh san gawp a, ka mitkhute bawkgawpin khua ka mu thei kei hi." 
Job16:17 Ahi zongin ngongtatna themkhat zong ka zang kei a, Pasian tungah ka thungetna pen lungsim takpi tawh ahi hi." 
Job16:18 “Leitung aw, a man loin kei hong kibawlna seelcip kei in! Thuman deihin ka kikona ka awging daicipsak kei in." 
Job16:19 Kei a dingin a ding ding, a hong panpih ding mi khat vantungah om hi." 
Job16:20 Pasian in ka khitui luanna hong mu-in ka thungetna hong za leh ka ut hi. 
Job16:21 Mi khat in a lawmpa a’ ding a thumsak mah bangin mi khatpeuh in Pasian’ kiangah kei a dingin hong thuumsak leh ka ut hi. 
Job16:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun nai mahmah ta a, ka lehzuih nawn loh ding lampi zui-in a pai ka hita hi." 
Job17:1 “Ka bei ding hun nai kuan ta a, hu ka sangzo nawn kei hi. Kei a dingin hankhuk cih loh bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Job17:2 Ka heina khempeuhah mite in hong zahko uh a, amau’ hong phinna in hong lungzingsak hi." 
Job17:3 Pasian aw, kei hong hu in. Ka thugente hong panpih ding kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Job17:4 Nangmah in amaute thuman a mu lo dingin bawl na hih manin amaute a gualzo-in na bawl kei ding hi. 
Job17:5 Paunak-ah, sum ngahnop manin mi khat in a lawmte a heek leh, ama tate in tua gitlohna thaman thuak hi, kici hi." 
Job17:6 Tu-in amaute in kei tungah hih paunak hong bulh uh a, mite in hih thu za-in kei hong cilphih uh hi." 
Job17:7 Ka dahna hangin ka mit mial a, ka khut ka khete ciangkang bang ta hi." 
Job17:8 Mihoihin a kineite in lamdang hong sa uh a, migiloin kei hong seh uh hi." 
Job17:9 Mite’ zahtaka a kinei mite in amau’ ngaihsutna uh man mahmah sa semsem uh hi. 
Job17:10 Ahi zongin amaute khempeuh hong pai-in ka mai-ah hong ding le-uh amaute’ lakah mipil khat zong ka mu kei ding hi. 
Job17:11 “Ka hun beita hi. Ka geelna teng maimang a, ka lametna teng beita hi." 
Job17:12 Ka lawmte in, khuamial kimlai, sun khuavak, ci uh hi. Khuavak hong nai ta hi, ci-in gen uh a, ahi zongin khuamial sung mahah kei ka omlai veve hi." 
Job17:13 Kei’ lamet ding misite’ gam bek omlai a, tua khuamial sungah lumin ka ihmu ding hi." 
Job17:14 Hankhuk sung pen ka pa hi, ka ci ding a, kei hong ne thante pen ka nu le ka sanggam numeite, ka ci ding hi." 
Job17:15 Kei’ lamet ding tua lai-ah bang om ahi hiam? Tua lai-ah ka lamet ding bang nong muhsak uh hiam? 
Job17:16 Misite’ gam Leinuai-ah ka pai ciangin nopsakna in kei hong zui lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job18:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job18:2 “Job aw, khawl hun nei thei lo ding na hi hiam? Hong khawl phot lecin, thu kong gen thei ding uh hi." 
Job18:3 Bang hangin bawng bang lelin kote hong ngaihsun a, mihaipi-in kote hong seh na hi hiam?" 
Job18:4 Na hehna tawh nangmah a kigimsak bek na hi hi. Nangma hangin leitung kinusia ding a, mualte a kinkhia dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job18:5 “Migilo pa’ meivak kisumit ding a, cikmah hunin kuangkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Job18:6 Ama buk sungah a meivak mit ding a, ama inn sungah khua a mial ding hi." 
Job18:7 A khe kip ngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a khe bai ta hi. Amah in a ngaihsut khialhna a puklawh hi." 
Job18:8 Thangsiahna ngen sungah amah bungbu tuk a, gum sungah amah kia hi." 
Job18:9 Thangah a khetulin awk a, thangkhau in amah gakcip hi." 
Job18:10 Amah siahna-in leilakah khauzak kitung a, a pai nading lampi-ah thang kisiah hi." 
Job18:11 Lauhuaina in amah pang a, a kalsuanna khempeuh a sulzuih hi." 
Job18:12 A hauh ngei hangin tu-in gilkial ta a, siatna in a su dingin amah ngak gige hi." 
Job18:13 A kihtakhuai natna in a pum khempeuh tuam a, a khut le a khete muatsakmang khinta hi." 
Job18:14 Lungmuang takin a omna a inn panin amah kikaikhia a, Sihna Kumpipa kiangah amah kitunpih hi." 
Job18:15 Ahih hangin zatui tawh ama inn a kisiansuah khit ciangin tua inn-ah a ut peuhpeuh teng thei pah ding hi. 
Job18:16 Lei sunga ama zungte keu-in, a tunga a hiangte a si ta hi." 
Job18:17 Inn le gamah ama minthanna beita a, kuamah in amah phawkkha nawn lo hi." 
Job18:18 A nungtate’ gam panin amah kihawlkhia ding a, khuavakna mun panin khuamialna-ah kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Job18:19 Amah in suanlekhak nei lo a, ama tennasa munah ama gui a zom ding om lo hi." 
Job18:20 Nisuahna pan nitumna dong ama thuakna a za peuhmah kigaihin a ling uh hi. 
Job18:21 Migilote, Pasian a ngaihsun lote a thutawpna uh tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job19:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job19:2 “Bang tanvei thu genin hong gimsak ding na hi hiam? 
Job19:3 Kei nong simmawh niloh a, tua banga na gamtatna-ah maizumna mel na nei thei kei hi." 
Job19:4 A khial takpi hi taleng zong nang’ lainatna ding bang om ahi hiam? 
Job19:5 Keimah sangin a hoihzaw-in nang na kingaihsun a, ka thuak gimnate pen keima mawhna hangin na ngaihsun hi." 
Job19:6 Hih thu hong piangsak pa Pasian ahihlam mu thei lo na hi hiam? Kei hong mat nadingin amah in thang hong siah hi. 
Job19:7 Keimah hong ngongbawlna ka nialnial hangin kuamah in hong don kei hi. Thuman ka deih hangin hong kipia kei hi. 
Job19:8 Pasian in ka lampi khaktan a, ka paisuakzo kei hi. Amah in ka pai nading lampi khua mialcipsak hi." 
Job19:9 Amah in ka hauhna khempeuh hong lakkhiatsak a, ka min hoih kimlai hong siasak hi." 
Job19:10 Amah in ka pumpi khempeuh hong satgawp hi. Ka nopsakna teng hong zunglot sakin, vulgawpin a si dingin kei a hong nusia hi." 
Job19:11 Keima tungah Pasian’ hehna hong sogawp a, ama gal lian penin kei a hong ngaihsun hi." 
Job19:12 Amah in keimah a sim dingin a galkapte hong sawl a, a galkapte in dum to-in ka buk hong umcih uh hi." 
Job19:13 “Pasian in ka sanggamte hong taisansak a, kei hong theisate kiangah khualmi ka suak hi." 
Job19:14 Ka behte le ka lawmte beimang khinta uh hi. 
Job19:15 Ka inn-ah a hong tung ngei keima zinte in hong mangngilh ta a, ka na a sem numeite in khualmi bangin hong bawl uh a, amaute’ mai-ah midangpi khat ka suak hi." 
Job19:16 Ka nasemte khatpeuh ka sap ciangin hong dawng nuam lo uh a, hong huhna ding uh ka thum ciang nangawnin hong thudon lo uh hi." 
Job19:17 Ka zi nangawn in ka gimnam thuak zo lo a, ka sanggamte mahmah in zong hong naih nuam lo uh hi." 
Job19:18 Naupang melmawl nangawn in kei hong simmawh uh a, kei hong muh uh ciangin hong nuihsan uh hi." 
Job19:19 Ka lawm it pente nangawn in kei hong muhdah et uh a, ka it pente nangawn in kei hong langbawl uh hi." 
Job19:20 Ka guh tungah ka vun kol dihdiahin om a, a nungta liailiai bekin kei a om ka hi hi." 
Job19:21 Hong hehpih un! Hong hehpih un! Keima lawmte hi lo na hi uh hiam? Pasian in kei hong satpai ta hi. 
Job19:22 Pasian’ hong bawlsiat bangin bang hangin no zong kei hong bawlsia ding na hi uh hiam? Nong gimsakna uh kicing ta hoh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job19:23 “Ka thugente khempeuh mi khatpeuh in ciamteh hen la, laibu khat sungah a khum hileh ut mahmah ing!" 
Job19:24 Tua ahih kei leh zong, ka thugente khempeuh sikkhu khat tawh suang tungah kikhen hen la, a mang ngei nawn lo dingin a kigelh hileh ut ing!" 
Job19:25 “Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah kei hong panpih ding a nungta tawntung khat vantungah a omna thu ka thei hi. 
Job19:26 Natna in ka vun a nektum khit hangin, hih ka pumpi mahmah tawh Pasian ka mu ding hi." 
Job19:27 Keima mit teekteek tawh amah ka mu ding a, amah in kei hong khualmi et lo ding hi. “Ka lungsim hanna a bei hi." 
Job19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Amah bangci gimsak thei ding ihi hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Kei nong suktheih nadingun paulap khatpeuh na zong uh hi." 
Job19:29 Ahi zongin tu-in namsau kihta un. Tua namsau in a mawhte tungah Pasian’ hehna hong sem ding hi. Tua ciangin thukhen ding khat a omlam na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job20:1 Tua ciangin Naamah gammi Zofar in dawng a," 
Job20:2 “Job aw, ka heh nong suaksak a, ka ki-ipzo nawn kei hi." 
Job20:3 Na thugente khempeuh kei nong simmawhna kampau vive hi a, ahi zongin kong dawnna ding ka thei hi." 
Job20:4 Tanglai pek a kipan, leitung mi a om cil a kipanin," 
Job20:5 migilote’ nopsak hun a tom mahmahna thu, Pasian a don lote’ lungdam hun a tom mahmahna thu thei lo na hi hiam?" 
Job20:6 Migilo pa lian mahmahin vantung a banto zongin, lian mahmahin a lutang in meii lak a banto zongin," 
Job20:7 leivui them bangin maimang veve lel ding hi. Amah a thei ngei mite in, ‘Amah koi-ah omta ahi hiam?’ ci-in lamdangsa ding uh hi." 
Job20:8 Amah pen zan a mangmat bang, mumaang bangin maimang ding a, cikmah hunin kimukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job20:9 Ama tenna ngei mun panin amah maimang ding a," 
Job20:10 mizawngte’ na a suhsakte, a tate in lohsak ding uh hi." 
Job20:11 A pumpi moi suahin a thatang a hat mahmah hangin a sawt loin leivui a suakpak ding ahi hi. 
Job20:12 “Ama kam sungah gitlohna lim sa mahmahin, namtui mahmah sa-in, a leii tawh lop melmel a," 
Job20:13 amah in muammuam nuamin siakhia nuam lo a, lim sa mahmahin a dangtawng denna-in a neih hangin," 
Job20:14 a gil sung a tun ciangin a kha mahmah an suakin, gu a kha mahmahte zahin kha deidai hi." 
Job20:15 Migilo pa in a guksa nate luakhia kik a, a gil sung nangawn panin Pasian in a lakkhiatsak hi." 
Job20:16 Migilo pa’ nekte pen gu tawh kibang a, gul guneite’ tuk bangin amah a sisak hi." 
Job20:17 Amah in bawngnawi le khuaizu gun tui bangin a luang mukha lo ding hi. 
Job20:18 Amah in a nasep thamante nusia ding a, a hauhna khempeuh zangkha man lo ding hi." 
Job20:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mizawngte bawlsia-in don lo a, midangte’ inn lamsate sutin a tang hi." 
Job20:20 “A huaihamna bei ngei lo a, a duh khempeuh siit nei lo hi." 
Job20:21 Amah in a nek ciangin a khamval cih om ngei lo a, tu-in a hauhna khempeuh a beimang khinta ahi hi." 
Job20:22 A cihtheih pen hun laitakin lungkhamna lianpen a tuak hi. 
Job20:23 Amah in a duhduh ne mai hen! Pasian in hehna tawh amah gim pia ngawn ding hi. 
Job20:24 Amah in namsau pelhin a taina-ah sumngo thal in kaptuk ding hi. 
Job20:25 Thaltang khat in ama pumpi pailet a, a te-dildel thaltang mukah si taak keuhkeuh a, ama tungah a kihtakhuai hong tung hi." 
Job20:26 A kholsa khempeuh kisusia a, mihing’ tawh loh meikuang in amah le a innkuan khempeuh a kangtum hi." 
Job20:27 Vantungte in hih mipa’ mawhna pholak uh a, leitung in ama langah teci a pang hi." 
Job20:28 Pasian’ hehna hangin ama hauhna khempeuh a kisusiamang ding ahi hi. 
Job20:29 “Migilote’ ngah dingin Pasian in a piak gimna migilote’ ngah pen tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job21:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job21:2 “Ka thugente limtakin hong ngai unla, ka thu nong ngaihna uh nong hehnepna uh hisak ni." 
Job21:3 Thu ka gen theih nading hun hong pia unla, ka gen khit ciangin na ut uhleh hong zahpih un." 
Job21:4 “Kei’ kitotpih pen mihing hi lo hi. Bang hangin lungtom lo ding ka hi hiam? 
Job21:5 Kei hong en dih un. Lamdangsak taak hi lo ka hi hiam? 
Job21:6 Keima tunga thupiang ka ngaihsut ciangin lamdangsa mahmahin lau-in ka ling hi. 
Job21:7 “Bang hangin Pasian in migilote khantosak a, hausakin liansak ahi hiam?" 
Job21:8 A tate uh nuamtakin a khantohna, a u a nau, a suan a khakte uh a punna a mu ding dongin a nungta uh hi." 
Job21:9 Pasian in amaute’ inn sungah lungkhamna tungsak lo a, amaute in lauhuaina thuakkha ngei lo uh hi." 
Job21:10 A bawngte uh pung a, tatolh cih om ngei lo hi." 
Job21:11 Tuuno bangin a naupangte uh taikhia-in kimawl uh a," 
Job21:12 tamngai le harp lasakna aw tawh a kituakin a lam uh hi. 
Job21:13 Amaute a nuntak sungin cithei mahmah uh a, gentheihna tuak se loin nuamtakin a si hiat uh hi." 
Job21:14 “Migilote in Pasian nawlkhin uh a, Pasian in amau’ nuntak ding a deihsakte thei nuam lo uh hi." 
Job21:15 Pasian’ na sep ding kisam sa se lo uh a, Pasian kianga thunget phattuamna om kei, ci uh hi." 
Job21:16 Amau’ thahatna hang bek tawh a gina kisa uh a, amau’ ngaihsutna le kei’ ngaihsutna kigamla hi." 
Job21:17 “Migilo pa’ meivak kisukmitsak ngei ahi hiam? Amaute khat beek in lungkhamna tuak ngei ahi uh hiam? Pasian in hehna tawh migilote gim pia ngei ahi hiam? 
Job21:18 Huih in a letkhiat buhkungte, le huihpi in a mutkhiat buhsi bangin amaute bawl ngei ahi hiam?" 
Job21:19 “Pasian in a pa’ khialhna hangin a ta gim pia hi, na ci uh hi. Tua bang hi lo! Pasian in a mawhte teek mah gim pia hen la, amau’ mawhna hangin gim pia ahihna theisak hen." 
Job21:20 Mawhneite amau’ mawhna hangin gimna thuaksak hen la, Vanglianpa’ hehna theisak tahen." 
Job21:21 Mi khat a nuntakna a bei khit ciangin, a naupangte’ nopsakna phawk thei nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job21:22 Mi khat in Pasian’ tungah thu hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Vanglianpa tungah thu khen thei ding ahi hiam? 
Job21:23 “Mi pawlkhatte a cithei mahmahin si a, lungmuang tak le lungnuam takin om uh a," 
Job21:24 annek tuidawn a kicingin a nei uh hi. 
Job21:25 Mi pawlkhatte ahihleh nopsak cih theikha ngei loin lunggimin a si uh hi. 
Job21:26 Ahi zongin a kibangin a vekpi-in si-in kivui a, than in amaute tuamcip hi." 
Job21:27 “Na lungsim sung uhah na ngaihsutna uh, kei nong siatsak nopnate uh ka tel mahmah hi." 
Job21:28 Siatna a gamta, mi lianpa’ inn, koi-ah omta ahi hiam, na ci uh hi." 
Job21:29 “Khualzinzin mite tawh kiho ngei lo na hi uh hiam? Amaute’ thugente, thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Job21:30 Pasian hehin, mite gim a piak ciangin migilote peng tawntung zawsop hi." 
Job21:31 Migilo pa a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding, migilo pa mawhsakin a langpang ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job21:32 Migilo pa a kivui ciangin a hankhuk kicing a," 
Job21:33 mi tul tampi in amah kha-in hoihtakin lei tawh kivuk hi. 
Job21:34 “Tu-in note in a mawknapi tawh hehnep nong sawm uh hi. Na gen uh thu khempeuh zuauthu vive hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Job22:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in dawng a," 
Job22:2 “Mipil pente i cih nangawn, ama a’ ding cih lohbuang, Pasian a dingin a kimanna om lo hi." 
Job22:3 Na gamtat hoihna in Pasian’ phattuamna ding bangmah piangsak lo a, na hoihna in Pasian hoihsak tuan lo hi." 
Job22:4 Nangmah in Pasian na zahtakna hangin amah in nang hong taii-in hong ze-et hi lo hi. 
Job22:5 Na mawhna a tamna hang, na gitlohna a liatna hang hizaw hi." 
Job22:6 Na sanggampa’ leiba tangin a silh ding sitsak loin a puan teng na laksak hi. 
Job22:7 A dangtakte tui na pia nuam kei a, a gilkialte an na pia nuam kei hi." 
Job22:8 Na vangliatna le na za liatna zangin, gam khempeuh na la khin hi." 
Job22:9 Meigongte a huh nuam lo ciang bek hi loin, mi tagahte bawlsia-in a neihsa uh na sut hi." 
Job22:10 Tua ahih manin na kimkotah thang hong kisiah a, thakhatthu-in launa in nang hong buaisak hi." 
Job22:11 Khuavak kimlai khuamial hong suak vatin khua na mu thei kei a, tuikhang in nang hong tuumcip hi." 
Job22:12 “Van a sangpen dawnah Pasian a om hi a, a sang mahmah a om aksite hong suk et lai hi." 
Job22:13 Ahi zongin nangmah in, ‘Pasian in bang thei ding ahi hiam? Meii in Pasian tuamcip hi. Eite’ thu bangci-in khenthei ding ahi hiam?’ na ci hi." 
Job22:14 Van khumzangah Pasian a paikawmin meii pailetin Pasian in hong musuk thei lo ding hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Job22:15 “Migilote’ gamtat ngeite mah gamtat ding ngaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job22:16 Amau’ hun tung lopi-in tuikhang in amaute taai hi. 
Job22:17 Hih mite pen Pasian a nial, Pasian in bangmah a cih thei lo dingin a ki-um mite ahi uh hi." 
Job22:18 Tua hitaseleh amaute a daupaisak Pasian hi a, migilote’ ngaihsutna pen keima ngaihsutna tawh kigamla mahmah hi." 
Job22:19 Migilote tungah gim kipia a muh uh ciangin mihoihte nuam a, paubaanna a nei lo mite in a nuihsan uh hi." 
Job22:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote’ neih khempeuh kisuksiatsak gawp a, a omlai sunte nangawn mei in a kangtum hi." 
Job22:21 “Job aw, tu-in Pasian tawh kilem inla, amah galbawl nawn kei in. Tua hileh amah in nang thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Job22:22 Ama hong hilhnate zui inla, ama thute ciamteh in." 
Job22:23 Lungsim tak tawh Vanglianpa lamah kihei inla, na innsung pan gamtatsia beisak inla," 
Job22:24 na kham neihte leivui bang lelin ngaihsunin, na Ofir khamte suang bang lelin ngaihsunin," 
Job22:25 Vanglian Pasian pen na kham le na ngun hisak lecin," 
Job22:26 Pasian muanin na nei tawntung ding a, na lungdamna bulpi amah ahihlam na thei ding hi." 
Job22:27 Thu na nget ciangin na ngetna hong pia ding a, nangma thuciamnate na tungsak ding hi." 
Job22:28 Na hih khempeuh na tangtun ding a, na maa hong vang ding hi." 
Job22:29 Pasian in mi kiphasakte niamkhiat a, mi niamte a hon hi." 
Job22:30 Nang a mawhbaang lo, a gamtat man na hih nakleh nang hong hon ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job23:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job23:2 “Tu laitakin Pasian’ tungah a phun lo, a heh loin ka om thei kei a, thum loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Job23:3 Amah ka zon dan ding thei-in, ama kiang ka tunna ding zia a thei hi leng," 
Job23:4 a mai-ah ka thu ka gen ding a, kei ka dikna thu a kicingin ka gen ding hi." 
Job23:5 Ama hong gen ding thute le kei a hong dawnna ding thute ka thei nuam hi. 
Job23:6 Pasian in a thaneih khempeuh tawh keima langkhatah hong pang ding ahi hiam? Hong langpan lo ding a, ka thugen hong ngai ding hi." 
Job23:7 Kei a thuman ka hi a, Pasian kiangah ka gen ding hi. Kuama phelzawh nawn loh dingin kei’ dikna a genkhia ding hi." 
Job23:8 “Ahi zongin Nisuahna lam ka zong a, Pasian ka mu kei hi. Nitumna lam ka zong a, amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Job23:9 Leilu lam ka zon hangin amah ka mu thei kei a, Leitaw lam ka zon hangin zong amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Job23:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in ka kalsuanna khempeuh thei a, kei hong ze-et leh ka sianthona a mu ding hi." 
Job23:11 Ama hong lamlahna citakin ka zui cinten a, lam ka pial ngei kei hi." 
Job23:12 Pasian’ thupiakna bangin ka gamta ngitnget a, keima utna zui loin ama deihna ka zui hi." 
Job23:13 “Amah kikheel ngei lo a, kuamah in amah nial zo lo hi. Ama hih nopte kuamah in khaktan zo lo hi." 
Job23:14 Tua ahih manin kei a dingin a geelsate tungsak ding hi. Amah in hih bangin geelna tampi tak a nei ahi hi. 
Job23:15 Tua hi a, ama omna-ah kei ka lau mahmah a, ka ngaihsut khak ciangin amah ka kihta hi." 
Job23:16 Vanglian Pasian in ka lungsim hanna hong mangsak hi. 
Job23:17 Khuamial in ka mit a mialsak hangin keima kihtak pen khuamial hi lo a, Pasian ahi hi." 
Job24:1 “Pasian in bang hangin a thukhen ni ding seh lo a, ama nasemte thutang ahihna a lah ni ding seh lo ahi hiam?" 
Job24:2 “Mihingte in leitang zaipi a ngah theih nadingun gisuangte khinsim uh a, tuute gu-in amau’ tuuhonte tawh khawi khawm uh hi." 
Job24:3 Mi tagahte’ la neihsunte guksak uh a, meigong numei in a leiba a loh khit dong a bawngtal a matsak uh hi." 
Job24:4 Mizawngte’ ngah theih dingte khaktan uh a, mizawngte notkhia ahih manun amaute lau-in a bucip uh hi." 
Job24:5 “Tua ahih manin gamlak a om la bangin gam keu sungah a an ding uh zongtawm uh a, a tate uh an ding koimahah mu zo lo uh hi." 
Job24:6 Midangte’ lo sungah anlak na sem uh a, migilote’ leenggui lo-ah leenggah loin a om uh hi." 
Job24:7 Zanin puan silhloin lum uh a, khuadampi lakah silh ding nei loin om uh hi." 
Job24:8 Mualtung gam panin a hong zu guahtui in amaute kawtciimsak a, suangpi pang peuh beelin a toncip uh hi." 
Job24:9 “Migilote in pa nei nawn lo naupangte sila-in nei uh a, mizawngte’ tate leiba tangin a la uh hi." 
Job24:10 Tua mizawngte in puan silhloin na sem uh a, gilkialpi mahin anlak na a sem uh hi." 
Job24:11 A thau ngah nadingin oliv gahte gawi-in leenggahzu ngah nadingin leenggahte cil napi-in, gilkial dangtakin ki-omsak hi." 
Job24:12 Khuapi sungah a liam le a si kuante’ kikona kiza napi-in Pasian in amau’ thungetnate don lo hi. 
Job24:13 “Sun khuavak a nial, tua khuavak thuzia a thei lo, khuavak lampi a pelh mi pawlkhat om hi." 
Job24:14 A zawng a cimawhte a thatlum dingin khuavak ma-in mi that pa kuankhia a, zan khuamial hun sungin mite’ na a guksak hi." 
Job24:15 Numei tunga a mawh mipa in khuamial ding ngakin om a, mite’ theih loh dingin ama mel a seel hi." 
Job24:16 Gutate in sun sungin a ciamtehsa teng zanin a inn luh uh a, sun sung bu-in khuavak a peel uh hi." 
Job24:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh zan khuamial pen amaute khempeuh a dingin zing khuavak bang hi a, zan khuamial lauhuai sung nuam a sa uh hi." 
Job24:18 “Tua bang migilo peuhpeuh tuikhang in taai a, ama neih leitangte Pasian in samsia a, tua leenggui lote-ah nasemin kikuan nawn lo hi." 
Job24:19 Nisat hun le khuakhal hunin vukkhalte a manthan bangin mihingte’ gam sung panin mawhnei mi a mangthang hi. 
Job24:20 Amah kiphawkkha nawn lo a, ama nu nangawn in zong a mangngilh ta hi. Thante in amah netum a, amah maimang ta hi." 
Job24:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite, numei taciingte’ neihsa tawh a kivak uh hi a, meigongte’ phattuamna ding bangmah bawl lo uh hi." 
Job24:22 Pasian in a thahatna tawh mi vangliante susia a, amah a gamtat ciangin migilo pa a si pah hi." 
Job24:23 Pasian in a lungnuamin amah nungtasak a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah encik tawntung hi." 
Job24:24 Migilo pa tomkha sung a liat hangin kiak bangin vulkik pah a, a kisattan ankung bangin a keu pah hi." 
Job24:25 Hih thu kua in nialzo ding na hi uh hiam? Ka thugennate man lo hi, ci-in kei langah hong pangin ka thugente hong selzo ding kua om na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job25:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job25:2 “Pasian vanglian a, mi khempeuh in a zahtak ding ahi hi. Ama vantung kumpi gam, nuamtakin a omsakzo hi." 
Job25:3 Ama na a sem vantung mite bangzah pha cih kua in simzo ding ahi hiam? Pasian’ khuavak in a bat lohna koi lai mun om ahi hiam? 
Job25:4 Pasian’ muhna-ah kua dikzo ding a, siangthozo ding ahi hiam?" 
Job25:5 Ama mitah khapi nangawn taang sa zo lo lai a, aksite nangawn siang sa zo lo lai hi." 
Job25:6 Tua ahihleh, lungno, ganhing no ahi lel mihing pen bangci ding ahi hiam? Mihing in Pasian’ muhna-ah bang man lel ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job26:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job26:2 “A hehpihhuai kei nong huhna, a thazawngkhal kei nong hotna, hih bang ahi hiam?" 
Job26:3 Kei bang mihai tungah thu manpha nong gen a, pilna thu tampi nong pulak hi." 
Job26:4 Tua bang thu a gen dingin kua in hong sawl a, kua’ lungsim hong pulakkhia na hi hiam?" 
Job26:5 “Misite’ gam kiling a, a sunga a teng mite launa tawh a ling hi." 
Job26:6 Pasian’ muhna-ah misite’ gam kilang sinsen a, a muh theih loh nadingin a liah bangmah om lo hi." 
Job26:7 Pasian in mun awng tungah vanpi hong zalkhia a, bangmah in a len lopi-in leitung a khai lingleng hi." 
Job26:8 Amah in meiilom lakah tuite khol a, tua a gik mahmah tui meii a puazosak hi." 
Job26:9 Amah in kha a liah ding bawl a, meii tawh kha a khuh hi." 
Job26:10 Amah in muh tawpna-ah git dinden a, khuavak le khuamial a khen hi." 
Job26:11 Amah in vanpi a pua khuampite a taii ciangin tua khuampite lau-in a ling uh hi. 
Job26:12 Ama thahatna tawh tuipi zo a, ama siamna tawh tui ganhing golpi Rahab thatlum hi." 
Job26:13 A hu a san ciangin vantung teng siang pah a, ama khut in a taikhia gulpi thatlum hi." 
Job26:14 Hihte pen ama vangliatna themkhat bek hi pan a, i zak thute pen a hemlam bek hi pan hi. Pasian a liatna taktak kua’n theizo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job27:1 Tua ciangin Job in thu genkik a," 
Job27:2 “Keima dikna a hong seelcipsak Pasian, ka lungsim a hong gimsak Vanglian Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
Job27:3 ka sungah nuntakna a omlaiteng, Pasian’ hu, ka nakah ka diik laiteng," 
Job27:4 ka muk tawh thusia peuhmah ka gen het kei ding a, ka kam tawh zuauthu peuhmah ka gen het kei ding hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
Job27:5 Note a thuman hi, kong ci ngei kei ding a, ka nuntak laiteng, kei a thuman hi’ng, ka cihna thu ka khia ngei kei ding hi." 
Job27:6 Kei thuman ka kisakna ka khia ngei kei ding hi. Ka lungsimah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi. 
Job27:7 “Kei a hong langpan’, kei a hong dote in migilo le thuman lote bangin gimna thuak ta uh hen." 
Job27:8 Pasian in amaute’ nuntakna a laksak hun ciangin, migilote a dingin lametna om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job27:9 Lungkhamna a thuak uh ciangin Pasian in amau’ kikona awging ngai ding ahi hiam? 
Job27:10 Pasian’ piak ding lungdamna a deih ding uh kilawm ahih manin, ama tungah thu a nget tawntung ding uh a kilawm ahi hi." 
Job27:11 “Pasian’ vangliatna bangzahin lian mahmah cih hong gensak unla, Vanglian Pasian’ geelsa teng hong laktelsak dih un." 
Job27:12 Ahi zongin tuate khempeuh na theih khitsa uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin mawk pau na hi uh hiam? 
Job27:13 “Vanglian Pasian in migilote, mi ngongtatte, gim a piakzia hih bang ahi hi." 
Job27:14 Tapa tampi a neih hangun, a vekpi-in gal sungah si mangkhin ding uh hi. A tate uh a tawntungin gilkial niloh ding uh hi." 
Job27:15 A nungta laisunte zong pulnatna tawh si ding uh a, meigong numeite in misite kahzo nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Job27:16 Migilote in kuama simzawh loh ngun tampi tak nei ding uh a, genzawh lohin nikten’ puansilh ciang venvan ding uh hi." 
Job27:17 Ahi zongin mihoih pawlkhat in tua puante silhin, thuman mi pawlkhat in tua ngunte tang lel ding uh hi." 
Job27:18 Migilote’ lam innte kho lo a, maimom bu, ahih kei leh lo honna buk tawh kibang lel hi." 
Job27:19 Amaute a hausa-in lum uh a, ahih hangin a khanlawh uh ciangin a hauhna teng uh na maimang ta hi." 
Job27:20 Lauhuaina in tuikhang pak bangin nawkgawp ding a, zan ciangin huihpi in amaute mutkhiamang ding hi." 
Job27:21 Nisuahna huihpi in amaute leenkhia-in a inn panun gamlapi-ah leenkhia ding hi. 
Job27:22 Amaute a suahtak theih nading a hanciam tantan kimlai mah, hehpih ngaihsut hetloin leenkhiamang ding hi." 
Job27:23 Amaute a tai laitakun huih in nawk gawpin, a susiagawp dingin mutkhiagawp ding hi." 
Job28:1 “Ngun a kitawh khiatna a khuk om a, kham a kisiansakna a mun mah om hi." 
Job28:2 Mihingte in lei sung panin sik tokhia a, suang sung panin sumsan a huantui uh hi." 
Job28:3 Mihingte in khuamial thukpen sung zongin, lei sung a thukpi dong hahkatin zong uh a, khuamial thuktawng sung pan suang a tokhia uh hi." 
Job28:4 Mihingte’ tenna panin a gamlapi mun, kuamah a pai ngei lohna sungah lei sung sumte a tokhia uh hi. Tua lai munah amau guak in na semsem uh a, lei thuk sungah khauhual tawh kiveisuk kiveito uh hi." 
Job28:5 I annek dingte leitungah hong pokhia a, ahi zongin leinuai thuk sung mei bangin a sa mahmah hi." 
Job28:6 Lei sunga om suangte sungah sapfaia suangmanpha om a, a leivuite sungah kham a om hi." 
Job28:7 Simbung in zong tua lampi thei ngei lo a, luimu zong tua lai-ah va leng ngei lo hi." 
Job28:8 Humpinelkai ahi a, ganhing dangte ahi zongin cikmah hunin tua lai-ah va pai ngei lo uh hi." 
Job28:9 “Mihingte in suang a sakpente to uh a, mualte’ bul lei sung panin a tokhia uh hi." 
Job28:10 Suangte a tawhvang uh ciangin suangmanphate a mu uh hi. 
Job28:11 Amaute in tuinak kipatna dong lei sung to uh a, a kiphumcip nate hong suahkhia uh hi." 
Job28:12 Ahi zongin koi lai-ah pilna kimu ding ahi hiam? Koi lai-ah thutheihna nak om ahi hiam? 
Job28:13 “Mihingte in a kimuhna ding a lampi thei lo uh a, mihingte’ gam sungah zong a lampi om lo hi." 
Job28:14 A thuk mahmah tuipi liante in, ‘Ko’ sungah om lo hi,’ ci uh a, tuipite in, ‘Ko kiangah om lo hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Job28:15 Pilna pen kham tawh a kileizo hi lo a, a man ding zah zong ngun tawh sehtheih hi lo hi." 
Job28:16 Ofir kham tawh pilna a kileizo hi lo a, suangmanpha pen tawh zong a kileizo hi tuan lo hi." 
Job28:17 Pilna a manphatna kham le limlang tawh tehtheih hi lo a, kham hoihpen a kibawl nate tawh zong leizawh hi lo hi." 
Job28:18 Pilna a manphatna suangkhi le limlang tawh genteh theih hi lo a, pilna themkhat bek nangawn kep sangin manphazaw lai hi." 
Job28:19 Ethiopia gamah a piang topaz suangmanphate tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a, kham citak hoihpen tawh zong kiteh thei tuan lo hi." 
Job28:20 “Tua ahihleh koi lai panin pilna hong piang ahi hiam? Thutheihna koi lai-ah om ahi hiam? 
Job28:21 Nuntakna a nei sung pan a mu thei kuamah om lo a, a leengthei vasate nangawn in mu thei lo uh hi." 
Job28:22 Sihna le siatna nangawn in a thu hemzak bek ung, ci lai uh hi." 
Job28:23 “Pasian bek in pilna lampi thei a, amah bek in a omna mun a thei hi." 
Job28:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in leimong dong mu a, vantung nuai-ah a om na khempeuh a mu thei hi." 
Job28:25 Pasian in huih a gik ding zah bawlin, tuipi a liatna ding zah a seh laitak," 
Job28:26 guah zukna ding mun thu pia-in, khuaphialep in a zuih ding lampi bawlin a vaihawm laitak nangawnin," 
Job28:27 amah in pilna mu-in a manphate entel a, amah in hoihsa ahih manin a kipsak hi." 
Job28:28 “Tua ciangin amah in mihingte tungah thu genin, ‘Topa zahtakna, pilna hi a, siatna pelhna pen thutheihna hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Job29:1 Tua ciangin Job in a thu genkik a," 
Job29:2 “Ka nuntakna nidanga bang hi kik hen la, Pasian in kei hong et hun lai bang hong hi kik leh ka ut hi." 
Job29:3 Tua hun lai-in Pasian in kei hong ompih tawntung a, khuamial sungah ka pai laitakin khuavak hong pia hi." 
Job29:4 Tua hun pen ka cihtheih hun laitak hi a, Pasian in ka innkuan a hong hut laitak hun ahi hi." 
Job29:5 Tua hun lai-in Vanglian Pasian in kei hong ompih a, ka kimkotah ka tate a om uh hi." 
Job29:6 Ka bawngte le ka keelte in nawi deih zahzah hong pia uh a, suang tam penna nangawnah ka oliv kungte hoih mahmah hi." 
Job29:7 Khuasung upate a kikhop uh ciangin a kikhawm dingin kei ka pai ciangin 
Job29:8 kei hong muh phetun khangnote in tutna hong awn uh a, kei hong zahtakna limun papite na ding uh hi." 
Job29:9 Khuasung uliante a kiho na khawl pah uh a, a khut uh tawh a kam uh na hum uh hi." 
Job29:10 Mi a thupi pente nangawn na gamdai pah uh a, kuamah pau loin na om uh hi." 
Job29:11 “Ka thugen a za mi peuhmah in a hoihlamin na za uh a, a hong mu mi peuhmah in dik hong sa uh hi." 
Job29:12 Mizawng ka theih peuhmah ka huh tawntung a, cih nading thei lo tagahte zong ka huh hi." 
Job29:13 A lungkham a cimawhte in kei hong phat uh a, meigong numeite a lungnuamin ka omsak hi." 
Job29:14 Thuman, puan bangin ka silh a, thuman in kei hong tuam hi. Thutang, puanpi-in ka silh a, thutang in kei hong tuam hi." 
Job29:15 Mittaw mite a dingin mittang ka hi a, khebai mite a dingin khe ka hi hi." 
Job29:16 Mizawngte a dingin a pa uh ka hi a, lungkhamna a thuak, ka theih loh mite nangawn ka panpih tawntung hi." 
Job29:17 Migilote’ gitlohna khempeuh ka susia gawpmang a, amau’ sukgawp mi khempeuh ka honkhia hi." 
Job29:18 “Ka nuntak kum sehnel zahin a tam dingin ka ngaihsun a, lungnuam takin inn-ah a si dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Job29:19 A zung in tui a ngah tawntung singkung tawh ka kibang a, daitui in a hiangte a nomsak singkung tawh ka kibang hi." 
Job29:20 Mi khempeuh in kei hong phat tawntung uh a, ka tha a hat tawntung hi." 
Job29:21 Mite in ka thugen ngai-in hong ngak dimdem uh a, kuamah pau hetloin limtakin hong ngai uh hi." 
Job29:22 Thu ka gen khit ciangin a genthuah ding uh bangmah thei nawn lo uh a, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang pah uh hi." 
Job29:23 Lo khote in khuapi guah deih mahmahin a ngak bangin, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang uh hi." 
Job29:24 Itna tawh ka nuihsat ciangin amaute lungnuam mahmah uh a, ka mai a tai ciangin a maigumna uh a bei hi." 
Job29:25 Amaute ukin a vai ding uh ka hawmsak a, kumpipa in a galkapte a makaih bangin ka makai a, a lungkham uh ciangin amaute ka hehnem hi." 
Job30:1 “Ahi zongin tu-in, a pate uh kimanna a nei lo ka uite tawh tuu cing dingin a kuan dingin zong ka deih loh, kei sanga a khangnozawte in hong ciamnuih bawlta uh hi." 
Job30:2 Amau’ hatna khempeuh tu-in bei khinta ahih manin, amau’ hatna kei a dingin a kimanna om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:3 Amaute zawng mahmahin gilkial uh ahih manin gamlak singzung keu peuh teep lel ding uh hi. 
Job30:4 Amaute in singkungnote botin ne uh a, limna alna a nei lo poding zung nangawn a ne uh hi." 
Job30:5 Gutate otkhai-in a kidelh khiat bangin mite lak panin amaute kihawlkhia hi. 
Job30:6 Amaute pen hawkguam sung, leihawm sung, luihawm, le keenhawm sungah a ten uh a kul ahi hi." 
Job30:7 Ganhing bangin gamlakah amaute ham uh a, sawlkawm nuai-ah kilomin a omkhawm uh hi." 
Job30:8 Bangmahin a kimang lo hih bang misia honte, mite omna gam sung panin a kihawlkhia hi." 
Job30:9 Tu-in amaute in kei hong simmawh bawlin hong nuihsan uh a, amaute’ ciamnuihna bek ka suak khinta hi." 
Job30:10 Amaute in kei hong kih uh a, kei tawh tehna-in amaute hoihlua kisa uh a, amaute in ka maitang nangawn cil hong phih vial uh hi." 
Job30:11 Pasian in hong zawngkhalsak, hong cimawhsak ahih manin amaute in a ut utun kei hong bawlsia uh hi." 
Job30:12 Amaute in hong simgawpin, kei hong taikhiasak uh a, ka sih theih nadingin ka mai-ah na pang uh hi." 
Job30:13 Ka suahtak theih nading lampi na khaktan uh a, kei suksiat ding hanciam uh a, amaute a kho ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job30:14 Kei ka bukna leihawmah amaute hong tuaksuk uh a, kei hong sucipsuk uh hi." 
Job30:15 Launa tawh ka kidim a, ka cihtheihna khempeuh meii bangin a thengta hi." 
Job30:16 “Tu-in a si ding ka hita a, ka gimna panin noptuam ngahna ding bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:17 Zan thapai-in ka guh sung, ka tang sung khempeuh na a, a hong pet tawntung natna dai ngei peuhmah lo hi." 
Job30:18 Pasian in ka puan ngawng pan kei hong manin ka puan tawh hong heekcip hi. 
Job30:19 Buannawng ciim sungah kei hong lawnkhia a, ninbulom bang lel ka hita hi." 
Job30:20 “Pasian aw, nang kong sam a, na hong dawng ngei kei hi. Nang tungah thu kong ngen a, nong don het kei hi." 
Job30:21 Kei tungah nong gilo mahmah a, nong hih theih zahin kei na hong bawlsia hi." 
Job30:22 Huih lakah na hong lawn a, huih na hong leensak a, huihpi in hong lawnsuk hong lawnto hi." 
Job30:23 Mi khempeuh a dingin sehkholhin a kikoihsa sihna-ah a hong paipih na hihna ka thei hi. 
Job30:24 Na hehpih ding a hong thum ding cih lohbuang, bangmah dang a hih thei nawn lo misia pa, bang hangin sugawp na hi hiam?" 
Job30:25 A lungkham mite tawh kei kap khawmin, a cimawh mite dahpih hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Job30:26 Lungdamna le khuavakna ka lamet laitakin, lungkhamna le khuamialna hong tung zawsop hi." 
Job30:27 Lunggimna le natna in kei hong sugawp a, gimna ka thuak ding cih loh bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:28 Lungkham sinkhamin ka om a, mihon lakah dingin huhna ka ngen hi." 
Job30:29 Kei pen gamkhing sunga a om ngia le vasa-kalaohte tawh kipawlin a kikhawl ka hita hi. 
Job30:30 Ka vun vomin dulhkhia a, ka pumtangin ka ci sa gawp hi." 
Job30:31 Nidangin lungdamna la a kisa ka zakna munah tu-in thumna le kahna aw bek ka za ta hi. 
Job31:1 “Lunggulhna tawh nungak khatpeuh ka et ngei loh nading, kiciamna ka bawlkhin hi." 
Job31:2 Vanglian Pasian in eite bang hong cih a, mihingte’ gamtatna bangci thuhkik ahi hiam?" 
Job31:3 A man loin a gamtate tungah siatna le gimna a tungsak hi. 
Job31:4 Pasian in ka gamtatna khempeuh thei a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh a hong mu hi." 
Job31:5 “Ka gitloh gamtat ngei lohna, kuamah ka khem ngei hetlohna, ka gamtat hoihna thute-ah ka kiciam ngam hi." 
Job31:6 Pasian in tawikhaina manah hong tawikhai hen; ka paubaan hetlohna hong mu ding hi. 
Job31:7 Lampi man panin ka pial a, siatna lam ka zuih a, ka khut tungah mawhna a baan taak leh" 
Job31:8 ka khawhsa ante midangte’ nek suak hen la, ka an neih khempeuh maimang tahen." 
Job31:9 “Ka vengte’ zi zawlmitin, a kong gei-ah ngakin ka buk taak leh" 
Job31:10 ka it ka zi in midangte’ an suksak hen la, midangte’ ang-ah lum tahen." 
Job31:11 (Tua bang mawhna pen a siahuai hi a, sihna a thuak ding ahi hi." 
Job31:12 Ka neih khempeuh a kangtum thei mei husia tawh a kibang ahi hi.) 
Job31:13 “Ka nasemte khat peuhpeuh kei tungah hong phun ciangin, ama thu ngai-in limtakin ka bawl hi." 
Job31:14 Tuaci kei leng, Pasian’ mai mu ngam ding ka hi hiam? Keima thu a khen dingin Pasian hong pai ciangin bang gen mawk ding ka hi hiam?" 
Job31:15 Kei a hong piangsak Pasian mah in keima nasemte zong a piangsak ahi hi. 
Job31:16 “Mizawngte ka huh ding ka mangngilh ngei kei a, meigong numeite ka guaksuaksak ngei kei hi." 
Job31:17 Keimah in an ne napi-in, tagahte a gilkialin ka koihkhong ngei kei hi." 
Job31:18 Ka khang tawntungin tua bangte ka en tawntung hi. 
Job31:19 “Mi a cimawh, puan silh ding a lei zo lo, a zawng lua ka muh ciangin," 
Job31:20 ka tuuhon panin ka ngah tuumul puan kibawl ka pia hi. Amah in zong a lungsim neih khempeuh tawh kei a hong phat hi. 
Job31:21 “Zum thukhenna-ah zo-na ning cih ngaihsutna tawh tagah khatpeuh ka khem taak leh," 
Job31:22 ka khutte buisum hen la, ka liang bul panin kilongkhia tahen." 
Job31:23 Pasian’ gimpiak ding kihta ka hih manin, tua bang peuhmah ka gamta ngei kei ding hi." 
Job31:24 “Leitung hauhna muan le suanin ka nei ngei kei a," 
Job31:25 ka hauhna zong ka kisaktheihpih ngei kei hi. 
Job31:26 A taang mahmah ni ahi a, a hoih mahmah kha ahi zongin, cikmahin ka bia ngei kei hi." 
Job31:27 Tuate pahtawina le zahtakna limin ka khut lapna tawh cikmah hunin ka khial ngei het kei hi. 
Job31:28 Tua bang mawhna in sihna a thuak ding hi a, tua bang mawhna pen Vanglian Pasian nialna ahi hi." 
Job31:29 “Ka galte’n gim a thuak teh ka kipak ngei kei a, haksatna a tuah uh teh ka lungdam ngei kei hi." 
Job31:30 A sih ding uh deihna tawh ka samsia ngei kei hi. 
Job31:31 Zin le leengte limtakin ka do tawntungna thu ka na a hong sepsak mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi. 
Job31:32 Khualzin mi khempeuh ka inn-ah ka tungsak tawntung a, kongzing lakah amaute ka lumsak ngei kei hi." 
Job31:33 Midangte in a mawhnate uh pulak loin imcip uh a, ahih hangin keima mawhna cikmahin ka im ngei kei hi." 
Job31:34 Midangte’ hong kam pau ding kihtakin ka nei ngei kei hi. Amau’ hong simmawh ding ka kihtakna hangin pau loin ka om ngei kei a, ka bucip ngei kei hi." 
Job31:35 “Ka thugente kuamah in na ngai lo ding ahi hiam? Ka gen thu khempeuh man hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi. Vanglian Pasian in kei hong dawng tahen. “Ka langte in kei hong mawhsakna thute ka tawi theih dingin lai sungah a kigelh hileh" 
Job31:36 tua mawhsaknate kisialhna tawh ka ngawngah ka ok ding a, mi khempeuh in a muh dingin ka sangsak ding hi." 
Job31:37 Ka gamtatna khempeuh Pasian kiangah ka gen ding a, ama muhna-ah lungdamin kihihsakna tawh ka om ding hi." 
Job31:38 “Ka khawh leitang ka guk ahih a, a nei taktak pa’ tung pan ka suh ahih a," 
Job31:39 tua leitang a piang ante ka nek a, tua lo a khote a puksi-in ka omsak taak leh," 
Job31:40 tua lo sungah mangbuh le mangbuh ham tangin kiak le ling po ta hen,” a ci hi. Job’ thugente beita hi." 
Job32:1 Job amahmah dik kisa tawntung ahih manin hih mihing thumte in Job’ thugente dawn ding ngaihsun nawn lo uh hi. 
Job32:2 Ahi zongin a thu a za, Ram minam, Buz-te beh, Barakhel’ tapa Elihu a heh hong suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job amah kidiksakin Pasian mawhsak zawsop hi." 
Job32:3 Job’ lawm thumte tungah zong a heh suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job a dawnna ding uh thei lo uh ahih manin Pasian a khial tawh hong kibang hi. 
Job32:4 Elihu ahihleh amaute lak panin a khangno pen ahih manin adangte a pau kim khit mateng bangmah pau loin a om hi. 
Job32:5 Ahi zongin hih mihing thumte in Job a dawn theih loh a muh ciangin a hehna thuakzo nawn lo hi. 
Job32:6 Tua ahih ciangin Buz-te beh Barakhel’ tapa Elihu in thu gen ding hong kipan a, “Kei a khangno lai hi-in, note a khangham na hih manun, ka ngaihsutna note lakah kong gen ngam kei hi." 
Job32:7 No a khangham zawte in thu a gen ding kilawm hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Job32:8 Ahi zongin mihingte tungah a hong tung pilna pen Vanglian Pasian’ kha in a hong piak ahi hi. 
Job32:9 Khanghamna in mi pilsak lo a, thuman zong theisak tuan lo hi." 
Job32:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keima thugen dingte nong ngaih ding uh ka deih hi. Keima ngaihsutna hong gensak dih un. 
Job32:11 “Thu na gengen laitakun lungduai takin kong ngaingai a, na thugen dingte uh na zonzon laitakun ka hong ngak hithiat hi." 
Job32:12 Limtakin kong ngai a, na cihmawhna uh ka thei hi. Job’ thugente a man lohna na gentel thei kei uh hi." 
Job32:13 Bang hangin pilna a nei-in kigen thei ding na hi uh hiam? Note in lel na hih manun Pasian in Job dawng ding hi. 
Job32:14 Job in note tungah thu tampi hong gen a, kei tungah hong gen lo hi. Ahi zongin note’ dawn bangin ka dawng ngei kei ding hi." 
Job32:15 “Job aw, hih mite in nang hong lel uh a, nang hong dawnna ding bangmah thei lo uh hi." 
Job32:16 Amaute pau loin a om ciangun kei zong pau loin ngak lailai ding ka hi hiam? Amaute in a gen ding uh thei nawn loin ommawk uh hi. 
Job32:17 Tu petpetin kei zong nang kong dawng ding a, keima ngaihsutnate ka hong pulak ding hi." 
Job32:18 Thu a gen dingin kha in kei hong sawl a, tu taktak ciangin ka kam ka ki-ipzo nawn het kei hi." 
Job32:19 Thugen theih nading hun a nei lo hi leng, leenggahzu thak a kithun leenggahzu um bangin ka puakkham ding hi." 
Job32:20 Ka thuakzo nawnkei a, ka genkhia ta ding hi." 
Job32:21 Hih ka thugenna-ah kuamah ka pawlpih kei ding a, kuamah phattuam ka nei kei ding hi." 
Job32:22 Kuamah ka mawkphat thei kei hi. Tuaci mawkphat leng Pasian in kei hong sumang pak ding hi. 
Job33:1 “Job aw, tu-in ka thugen khempeuh limtakin hong ngai in." 
Job33:2 Ka lungsim sunga om thute a hong gen ding ka hi hi. 
Job33:3 Ka gen khempeuh lungsim takpi tawh ka gen hi a, a man thu a gen ka hi hi." 
Job33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian’ kha in kei hong sawl a, Vanglianpa in kei tungah nuntakna hu hong pia hi." 
Job33:5 “Na hong dawn theih leh limtakin hong dawng in. Na hong seelna ding limtakin kiging in. 
Job33:6 Job aw, nang le kei, Pasian’ hong muhna-ah a kibang ihi a, i nih tuakin leivui pana piang ihi hi." 
Job33:7 Tua ahih manin kei nong kihtakna ding bangmah thu om lo a, nang ka hong zawhthawh bawlgawpna ding zong bangmah thu om tuan lo hi." 
Job33:8 “Keima zakin thu na gen khin a, na thugente ka za khin hi." 
Job33:9 Nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei a, ka gamta khial kei hi. Ka paubaang kei a, mawhna ka sukha kei hi." 
Job33:10 Pasian in kei hong sukna ding thu zongzong a, gal bangin kei hong bawl hi." 
Job33:11 Amah in ka khe kolbulh a, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong encik hi,’ na cihna ka za hi." 
Job33:12 “Ahih hangin, Job aw, nangmah na khialzaw hi. Pasian pen mihing sangin lianzaw hi." 
Job33:13 Pasian in mihingte’ phunna thudon ngei lo hi, ci-in thugenna tawh bang hangin Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam?" 
Job33:14 Pasian in a lam tuamtuamin thu hong gengen napi-in, ama thugente khempeuh kuamah in thudon lo hi." 
Job33:15 Zanin mite a ihmut ciangin, mang le maangmuhna sungah Pasian in thu a gen hi." 
Job33:16 Pasian in thu hong gen a, ama hilhkholhna hangin mite lau mahmah uh hi." 
Job33:17 Mite in khialhna a bawl nawn lohna ding, mi kiphasakte a suahkhak loh nading, Pasian in a deihna hangin mite kiangah thu a gen hi." 
Job33:18 Pasian in mihingte siatna thuaksak lo a, sih nading panin amaute a honkhia hi." 
Job33:19 Pasian in cinatsakna tawh mihingte thuhilh a, a pumpi khempeuh natna tawh a kidimsak hi." 
Job33:20 Cina pa in an ne zo lo a, an limpen nangawn a kih tha a suak hi." 
Job33:21 A ci a sa khempeuh kiam a, a guh guak bekin a om hi." 
Job33:22 A beina ding a nai hita a, misi gam a zuan ding hita hi." 
Job33:23 “Mihingte’ tavuan a phawksak, Pasian’ vantungmi tul tampite lak panin vantungmi khat amah a huh dingin hong paikhia ding hi." 
Job33:24 Vantung mi in amah a hehpihna hangin, ‘Amah suaktasak in. Misite gamah paisak kei in. Amah tatkhiatna ding hih lai-ah om hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Job33:25 Tua ciangin ama pumpi khangnosuak kikin, a thahat pen hun laitak a bangkik ding hi." 
Job33:26 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama thungetna pia ding a, amah in lungdamna tawh Pasian bia ding a, Pasian in ama a dingin thu a hoihlamin a heisakkik ding hi." 
Job33:27 Tua ciangin amah in mihonpite’ zakna-ah, ‘Kei ka khial khin hi. A manin ka gamta kei a, ahi zongin Pasian in kei hong suaktasak hi." 
Job33:28 Misite’ gam sung ka tunna ding panin amah in kei hong kem a, tu-in kei ka nungta lai hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Job33:29 Pasian in hih thute khempeuh mihingte tungah hong hihkik zelzel a," 
Job33:30 sih nading panin honkhia kik zelin nuntak nuam a pia kik hi. 
Job33:31 “Job aw, ka thugente limtakin hong ngai in. Gamdai-in om inla, kei thu hong gensak in." 
Job33:32 Ahi zongin gennop mahmah na neih leh hong gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh midik na hih ding ka hong deihsak hi. 
Job33:33 Ahi zongin gennop velvel na neih khol kei leh keima thugen hong ngai in. Mipil na hih theih nading thu kong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job34:1 Tua ciangin Elihu in," 
Job34:2 “No a pilin a kinei mite aw, ka thugente ciamteh un. Thu thei a a kinei mite aw, ka thugente ngai un." 
Job34:3 An na ciap uh ciangin a lim a lim lo na thei uh hi. Thu kigen na zak uh ciangin pil kampau le hai kampau na khenthei uh hi. 
Job34:4 Thuman bang hiam cih tengkhia ni. Thuhoih bang hiam cih mukhia ni. 
Job34:5 Job in, ‘Kei ka dik hi. Pasian in kei a thumanin hong seh nuam lo hi." 
Job34:6 Kei a thuman hinapi zuauthu genin hong seh hi. Kei a khial hi lo napi gim thuakin ka cimawh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Job34:7 “Hih Job tawh a kibang mi na mu ngei uh hiam? Amah in Pasian zahtakna lim bangmah nei het lo hi. 
Job34:8 Amah in migilote tawh kikholh nuam sa mahmah a, mawhnei mite tawh a vak kawikawi hi." 
Job34:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Pasian’ deihna i zuih hangin phattuamna bangmah om lo hi,’ ci hi." 
Job34:10 “Ahi zongin thu ngaihsun thei a kinei note khempeuh in ka thugenna hong ngai un. Pasian a giloin gamta ngei ding a, Vanglianpa in a man loin sem ngei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job34:11 Pasian in a gamtatna tawh kizui-in mite tungah thaman pia a, a thuak dingun a kilawm bangin gim a pia hi." 
Job34:12 A taktakin ci lehang, Pasian a man loin gamta ngei lo a, thutang kimlai a khialin heisak lo hi." 
Job34:13 Pasian in ama vangliatna mi khatpeuh tung panin a ngah ahi hiam? Leitung khempeuh a uk dingin mi khatpeuh in amah a koih ahi hiam? 
Job34:14 Pasian in ama ngaihsutna kheel hen la, nuntakna hu a dokkik hileh" 
Job34:15 nuntakna a nei khempeuh si pah ding uh a, mihing khempeuh leivui suakkik ding uh hi." 
Job34:16 “Job aw, mipil-a kinei na hih leh ka thugente hong ngai in." 
Job34:17 Vanglianpa in thutang a deih lo dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam? Nang in a thuman Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam? 
Job34:18 Kumpite le uliante bangmahin kimang loin a gitloh uh ciangin, amaute a mawhsak ngam pa Pasian bek ahi hi." 
Job34:19 Pasian pen mi khempeuh a hong piangsak pa hi a, amah in uliante panpih tuan nei lo a, mizawngte sangin mihaute thupi ngaihsutzaw tuan lo hi." 
Job34:20 Mihingte ahihleh zan khat thu-in sipak thei hi. Pasian in mite satpukin sisak thei a, nakpitakin hih kul loin mi thahat pente zong a that thei hi." 
Job34:21 Pasian in mihingte’ gamtatna khempeuh hong encik a, i kalsuanna themno dongin hong mu khin hi." 
Job34:22 Gamtatsia mite a buk theih nadingun a seelcipzo ding, khuamial khuazing koimahah om lo hi." 
Job34:23 Pasian’ mai-ah mihingte in thukhenna a thuak ni ding, a kiseh hun omtuam lo hi." 
Job34:24 Amah in a thu kan kul loin mi vangliante sugawp a, amaute’ tang dingin midangte a koih hi." 
Job34:25 Amah in amaute’ gamtatnate a vekpi-in thei ahih manin zan khat thu-in amaute lumletin a susiagawp hi. 
Job34:26 Pasian in mi khempeuh’ muhin mawhneite gim a pia hi. 
Job34:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ama thu mang nawn lo uh a, a thupiakte khempeuh don nawn lo uh hi." 
Job34:28 Amaute in mizawngte kapsak gawp uh a, mizawngte’ huh ngetna awging Pasian in a za hi." 
Job34:29 “Pasian in bangmah hih het kei taleh zong, kuamah in Pasian mawhsak thei lo ding hi. Amah in hong maingat hetkei taleh zong, kuamah in bangmah cihthei tuan lo ding hi." 
Job34:30 Migilote hong uksak taleh zong, tua panin suahtakna ding kuamah in vaihawm zo lo ding hi." 
Job34:31 “Job aw, Pasian’ tungah na khialhnate pulakin na khialh nawn loh nading thu ciam nai lo na hi hiam?" 
Job34:32 Pasian in na khialhnate a hong lahna ding ngenin, na gamtatsiat nawn loh nading ut nai na hi hiam?" 
Job34:33 Pasian nial na hih manin amah in nangma utna a bang hangin hong hihsak ding ahi hiam? Hih thu pen kei’ ngaihsut ding hi loin, nangma khensat ding ahi hi. Tu-in nangma ngaihsutna a kician takin hong gen in." 
Job34:34 “Thu a ngaihsun theite in hih thu man hi, hong cihpih ding uh a, ka thugenna a za mipil peuhmahte in," 
Job34:35 ‘Thu a thei lopi-in Job in thu gen a, a thugen peuhmah a khiatna nei om lo hi." 
Job34:36 Job’ thugente khempeuh ngaihsun le-uhcin, migilo bangin a kampauna na thei ding uh hi." 
Job34:37 Amah a khialhna khawl nuam het lo a, eite khempeuh’ mai-ah Pasian simmawhin zahpih bawlgawp hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job35:1 Tua ciangin Elihu mah in," 
Job35:2 “Job aw, Pasian’ muhna-ah ka paubaang kei hi, na cih ding kilawm lo hi." 
Job35:3 Pasian kiangah, ka khialh hangin bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Khialhna ka gamtat loh manin bangmah phattuamna ka ngah kei hi, na cih ding kilawm lo hi." 
Job35:4 Nang le na lawmte tungah thu ka hong gen ding hi. 
Job35:5 “Vantung ento dih un. Meiite bangzah takin sang omto ahi hiam? 
Job35:6 Mawhna na gamtat manin, Pasian bangmah sukha lo hi. Tampi tak khial talecin zong amah sukha tuan ahi hiam?" 
Job35:7 Na thumanna hangin Pasian in phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? Pasian in nang kiang panin bangmah deih lo hi. 
Job35:8 Na khialhna hangin na mipihte bek in thuak a, na gamtat hoihna hangin na mipihte bek in phattuamna ngah hi." 
Job35:9 “Mite in gim a thuak ciangin tau uh a, amaute a honkhia dingin midang khatpeuh a sam uh hi." 
Job35:10 Lungzin’ hun laitakin thahatna a pia, amaute a Piangsak Pasian’ lam nga lo uh hi." 
Job35:11 Eite mipilin a hong bawl, ganhingte le vasate sangin a pilzaw-in a hong bawl Pasian’ lam nga lo uh hi." 
Job35:12 Amaute migilo mi kihisakte ahih manun, huh ding a nget hangun Pasian in pia lo hi." 
Job35:13 Ngetnget, gengen, a phattuamna bangmah om lo hi. Vanglian Pasian in na mu lo, na ngai lo hi." 
Job35:14 “Job aw, nangmah in, ‘Pasian ka mu thei kei a, ahi zongin ka thu ama khut sungah om a, lungduai takin ka ngak niloh hi,’ na ci hi." 
Job35:15 Pasian in kuamah gim pia lo a, khialhna zong thupi ngaihsut lo hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Job35:16 Tua banga kam na paupau a mawknapi hi a, na gen mel zong a thei het lo na hihna thu a hong kilangsak na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job36:1 Elihu in a thugen zomlai a," 
Job36:2 “Lungduai takin tawmkhat hong ngailai in. Pasian’ tangin ka gen ding thu pawlkhat omlai hi. 
Job36:3 Kei a hong Piangsak Pasian thuman hi, ci-in kong lah nadingin thu tampi tak kaikhawmin ka hong gen ding hi." 
Job36:4 Ka thugente khempeuh a khial om het lo a, na mai-ah thugenpa pen mipil khat ahi hi." 
Job36:5 “Pasian a thahat mahmah hi napi-in, kuamah simmawh lo hi. Amah in a theih loh bangmah om lo hi." 
Job36:6 Amah in mimawhte daupaisak lo a, a zawng gimna a thuakte tungah a manin a gamta hi." 
Job36:7 Amah in thuman mite hu a, kumpi ukna za zong pia a, pahtawina lianpi a ngahsak tawntung hi." 
Job36:8 Ahi zongin mite sikkol kibulh a, a gamtatnasate hangin gimna a thuak uhleh," 
Job36:9 Pasian in amau’ mawhna le a kiphatsaknate uh a lakkhia ahi hi. 
Job36:10 A gamtatsiatna panun a khawl nadingun amau’ bil sungah thu a gengen hi. 
Job36:11 Amaute in Pasian’ thu mangin ama na sem le-uh amaute nuamsa-in a khan uh a sau hi. 
Job36:12 Ahi zongin ama thu mang kei le-uh, namsau tawh si ding uh a, misite’ gam zuan ding uh hi." 
Job36:13 “Migilote a hehin nitum uh a, gimna a thuak ciang nangawnun ama huh ding ngen lo uh hi." 
Job36:14 Amaute khansih uh a, a zumhuaipi-in a bei uh hi." 
Job36:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in gimna tawh mite thuhilh a, khua a phawktheih nadingun gimna a zang ahi hi." 
Job36:16 Pasian in lungkhamna panin nang hong paikhiatpihin, lungnuam takin nang hong omsak a, na sabuai tungah anlim nono kilui venvan hi." 
Job36:17 Ahi zongin tu-in na ngah dinga kilawm gimna a thuakta na hi hi. 
Job36:18 Sumgolh’ khemsa-in gamta kei inla, leitung nate’ bawlin lam kipialsak kei in." 
Job36:19 Huh ding na nget hangin a phattuamna om nawn lo a, na hauhna na liatna in hong huh thei nawn lo hi." 
Job36:20 Mihingte a beimang hun ding, zan khuamial hong tun hun ding lunggulh kei in." 
Job36:21 Siatna lamah na kihei khak lohna ding limtakin kidawm in. Na siat khak loh nadingin gimna hong kithuaksak ahi hi. 
Job36:22 “Pasian a vangliat mahmahna limtakin phawktel in. Pasian pen sia khempeuh lakah sia lianpen ahi hi. 
Job36:23 Pasian’ gamtatzia ding kuamah in sawl thei lo a, Pasian gamtatsia hi, ci-in kuamah in zong mawhsak zo lo hi." 
Job36:24 Pasian a nasepna hangin mi khempeuh in a phat tawntung mah bangin nang zong amah phatzaw in. 
Job36:25 Mi khempeuh in Pasian’ sepsate mu uh a, theikim zo lo uh ahih manin lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Job36:26 Pasian a liatna a kicingin i theizo kei a, ama kum phazah zong i simzo kei hi." 
Job36:27 “Amah in tuipi panin tuite lato a, tua a lak tuite guahtui-in a bawl hi." 
Job36:28 Amah in meii sung panin guah piangsak a, mihing khempeuh a dingin guah a zusak hi." 
Job36:29 Meiite a pai henhanna hitaleh, vanah van a ginna hitaleh kuamah in thei zo lo hi." 
Job36:30 Amah in vantungah khua phiasak a, ahi zongin tuipi thuk sung a mialsak hi." 
Job36:31 Amah in tu-a bangin mihingte hong vak a, annek ding tampi tak a hong pia ahi hi." 
Job36:32 Amah in keek thu pia a, a kap nop penpen a kha dingin a sawl hi." 
Job36:33 Amah a heh ciangin huihpi sam a, vanging pen ama hong pai nading a kitheihna ahi hi." 
Job37:1 “Hih huihpi in ka dip hong kuasak a, ka dip vana khai hong bangsak hi." 
Job37:2 Ama kam panin a hong gingkhia hih vanging Pasian’ pauna awging, limtakin ngai in." 
Job37:3 Amah in vanah khua phiasak a, leimong khat pan mong khat dong a taan hi." 
Job37:4 Tua ciangin a vanglian vanging, ama awging hong kiza a, tua hun sungteng mahin khua a phiaphia hi." 
Job37:5 Pasian’ sawlna tawh na lamdangpipi piang a, eite’ theih zawh loh thute a hong piang hi." 
Job37:6 Amah in leitungah vuk a kia dingin sawl a, guah tampi tak a zusak hi." 
Job37:7 Amah in mihingte a nasep uh khawlsak a, amah a gamtang ahihna a kilangsak hi." 
Job37:8 Gamsate in a lupna ngei delh uh a, a kua sungah bucip uh hi." 
Job37:9 Leitaw lam panin guahpi hong zu a, leilu lam panin huihpi hong nung hi." 
Job37:10 Pasian’ husanna in tuite khalsak a, tui lianpite khalin sik bangin a sak hi." 
Job37:11 Amah in meiipi nomsak a, meiipi in khua a phiasak hi." 
Job37:12 Pasian’ deihna zui-in a kikhin kawikawi hi. Leitung mun khempeuhah pai-in, Pasian’ sawl teng a sem uh hi." 
Job37:13 Pasian in mihingte gim a piakna ding ahi a, pahtakna a lahna ding ahi zongin, leitungah tu-a bangin a piangsak hi." 
Job37:14 “Job aw, tawlkhat khawlin ngai inla, Pasian’ bawlsa na lamdangte ngaihsun dih in." 
Job37:15 Pasian in thu pia a, meii lak panin khua a phiatsak theihna na thei hiam?" 
Job37:16 Bangmah in a len lopi-in vantungah meii a omsak theihna, a lamdang hih ama siamna na thei hiam?" 
Job37:17 Leitaw lam huihpi nasia takin a nun’ laitakin na puan sungah khua-ul kai-in na om hi. 
Job37:18 Limlang bangin a sak mahmah van peekpi ama hih bangin zalzo na hi hiam? 
Job37:19 Pasian kiangah ka gen ding uh hong hilh in. A hawmpi-in ka om uh a, ka gen ding uh om lo hi." 
Job37:20 Pasian tawh kiho theih nading ka ngen kei ding hi. Kei hong suksiat nadingin kei kipia ding ka hi hiam? 
Job37:21 “Tawlkhat sung khuavak kimu vet lo a, guah le meii in a liah hi. Tua ciangin huih hong nungin tuate khempeuh a mutsiang hi." 
Job37:22 Kham mel khuavak leilu lam pan hong taang a, Pasian’ minthanna pen zahtakna tawh kidimsak hi." 
Job37:23 Pasian vanglian mahmah a, eite’ theihzawh hi lo hi. Amah thuman mahmah a, thutang takin na a sem hi." 
Job37:24 Tua ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah a zahtakna, mipil a kisate amah in a don lohna, lamdangsak ding hi lo hi.” a ci hi." 
Job38:1 Tua ciangin huihpi lak panin Topa in Job tungah thu hong gen a," 
Job38:2 “Kei’ pilna a nial dingin nang kua na hi hiam? Thu na theih lohlam a kilangsak na hi bek hi. 
Job38:3 Kipasalsakin dingto inla, kong thudot dingte hong dawng in." 
Job38:4 Leitung ka bawl laitakin nang om na hi hiam? Thei kisa na hih leh tua thu hong gen in. 
Job38:5 Bangcia-in golsak ding cih kua in seh ahi hiam? Kua in a golna ding zah khau khai ahi hiam? Hihte khempeuh thei kisa na hi hiam? 
Job38:6 Leitung a pua khuampite bang tungah kiphut ahi hiam? Kua in leitung a bulpi phut ahi hiam? 
Job38:7 Tua ni-in zingsang aksite in la sa khawm uh a, Pasian’ tapate lungdamin a kiko uh hi." 
Job38:8 “Lei sung panin tuipi hong suahkhiat laitakin, tua tuipi a khaktan ding kongpi kua in na khak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:9 Meii tawh tuipi a tuamcip pa, khuamial tawh a vialcip pa keimah ka hi hi." 
Job38:10 Tuipi gamgi ding ciamteh sakin, ama huangsung ding bekah ka omsak hi." 
Job38:11 Tuipi kiangah, ‘Hih ciang bek na pai ding a, hih banah na kin nawn kei ding hi. Na tuihualte hih ciang bek pai ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Job38:12 Job aw, nangmah in, ‘Tuni-in khua vak in,’ ci-in na nuntak sung tawntung thu pia ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:13 Zing khuavak in leitung a mongin manin, a kawma bu migilote a sinkhiat ding, thu pia thei ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:14 Khuavak in mualleguamte kilangkhia sak a, puan a tonin a kikoih tawh a kibatna a kilangsak hi." 
Job38:15 Migilote a dingin sun khuavak taanglua a, siatna a gamtatna ding uh a khamcip hi." 
Job38:16 “Tuipi sungtawng tuinakah pai ngei na hi hiam? Tuipi nuai lei tam tungah lam pai ngei na hi hiam? 
Job38:17 Misite’ gam khuamial kongkhakpi, mi khatpeuh in nang hong lak ngei ahi hiam?" 
Job38:18 Leitung bangcia lian ding cih na thei hiam? Hih thute thei na hih leh hong dawng in. 
Job38:19 “Leitung khuavak hong kipatkhiatna mun ahi a, leitung khuamial hong kipatna mun ahi zongin, thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:20 Nangmah in amau’ omna mun ciang dong va thei a, tua ciang dongah va kha kik ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:21 Na nuntakna sawtta a, leitung a pianin nang suakkhin na hih teh tua thute khempeuh thei mah ni teh!" 
Job38:22 “Vuk a kikoihna munah nang va lut ngei a, gial a kikhopna mun va mu ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:23 Tuate, lungkham huna ding, gal om hun cianga dingin ka koihcing ahi hi." 
Job38:24 Leitung nitaang a hong suahkhiatna mun ahi a, nisuahna huihpi hong kipatna mun ahi zongin, va tung ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:25 “Kua in guahzukna ding tui lampi bawlsak a, keek’ lampi ding sialsak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:26 Mihing om lohna mun leilakah, kua in guah zusak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:27 Lopate a po theih nadingin lei keu-in a sak bekbakte kua in tui buak ahi hiam? 
Job38:28 Guah in pa nei ahi hiam? Daitui in pa nei ahi hiam? 
Job38:29 Kua’ sung panin tuikhal hong piangkhia a, kua’ sung panin vana vukte hong suak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:30 Tua tuite suang bangin sak a, tuipi tui teng khalcip hi." 
Job38:31 “Vana om Seguk henkop thei a, Zawlzawng a kikhihna phel thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:32 Ama hun hunin aksite lam lak thei a, Khawlei-uikai a pai nading lampi lak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:33 Vana om nate’ zuih ding ngeina bawlsak thei a, lei-a om nate’ zuih ding ngeina bawl thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:34 “Vana om meiite in guah hong zuksakna ding nangmah in sawl na hi hiam? 
Job38:35 ‘Khua phia in,’ ci-in thu pia lecin, ‘Nong sawl bangin phia ning,’ hong ci ding ahi hiam?" 
Job38:36 Nail gun a khan ding a thei gun vapite kua in hilh a, guahzuk ding a thei akluite, kua in hilh ahi hiam?" 
Job38:37 Leivuite khalcipin, leitang a sak ciangin, meiite thu pia-in vana tuibemte a hong dingin kua in pilna nei ahi hiam?" 
Job38:38  
Job38:39 “Humpinelkai le a note leihawm sungah bu-in, a kua sung uhah lumin ngakin a om laitakun, a an ding uh zonsak thei a, a note’ gilkialna vahsak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:40  
Job38:41 Va-akte a gilkialin leng kawikawi-in, a note in an duhin kei tungah hong nget ciangun, tua va-akte an a piapa kua ahi hiam?" 
Job39:1 “Sathakte a suah hun ding thei ngei na hi hiam? Sakhite a suah laitakin nau va dom ngei na hi hiam? 
Job39:2 Tuate a ni ciamtehin, a suah hun ding uh thei na hi hiam?" 
Job39:3 A no suak dingin lei-ah a bawhsuk hun laitak thei na hi hiam? 
Job39:4 A note gamlakah khangin, a nute kiang pan paikhia-in ciahkik nawn lo uh hi." 
Job39:5 “Kua in gam-late tungah suahtakna pia ahi hiam? Kua in khahin a ut utin vaksak ahi hiam? 
Job39:6 Amau’ om nadingin gamlak ka pia a, bangmah a po zawh lohna zanglei-ah ka tengsak hi." 
Job39:7 Gamlumna mun khuapite tawh a kigamla-ah om uh a, kuamah in zualsak zo lo a, na semsak zo lo uh hi." 
Job39:8 Mualte tungah an zongin vak kawikawi uh a, nektheih ding singkung lopa a hing peuhpeuh zuan kawikawi uh hi." 
Job39:9 “Gambawngtal in nangma na hong sem ding ahi hiam? Na ganbukah gambawngtal hong giak nuam ding ahi hiam? 
Job39:10 Nangmah in khauhual tawh khihzo ding a, na lo-ah na lokhawhna leeng kaisakzo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job39:11 Nasem dingin a hat mahmah hangin, nangma na hong sepsak dingin lamen ngam na hi hiam?" 
Job39:12 Lo a na anpiangte hong kaihkhop sakin, na ancilna-ah an hong khawm dingin um na hi hiam?" 
Job39:13 “Vasa-kalaohte in a kha uh bangzah takin nawh zap thei ahi hiam! Ahi zongin gun vapi bangin vasa-kalaoh leng thei lo hi. 
Job39:14 Vasa-kalaoh in leilakah a tui nusia a, a tuite a luumsak dingin leilak a ap hi." 
Job39:15 Mi khatpeuh in a khe tawh a tuite a sikkhap khak ding, gamsa khatpeuh in a sikkhap khak ding, phawk khollo hi." 
Job39:16 A tuite ama a’ bangin ngaihsun khollo a, ka gimnate a mawkna suakkha ding hi, ci-in lunghimawh lo hi." 
Job39:17 Amah a hai-in a bawlpa ama tungah pilna a guan lopa keimah ka hi hi. 
Job39:18 Ahi zongin a tai ciangin sakol sangin hatzaw hi. 
Job39:19 “Job aw, sakolte a hatsak pa nang na hi hiam? Sakol zaangmul a posak pa nang na hi hiam?" 
Job39:20 Sakolte kauphe bangin diangsak thei-in, mite’ kihtak dingin phitsak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job39:21 Amaute in lawpna tawh a khe-un lei khuat uh a, a thaneih khempeuh uh tawh gal sungah a diang uh hi." 
Job39:22 Amaute in launa mel bangmah thei lo uh a, namsau kihta-in nungkik cih zong om lo hi." 
Job39:23 Amaute’ tungah a tuang mite’ galhiam, lum le teite a tee zalzal hi." 
Job39:24 Lawp mahmahna tawh sakolte in mainawt uh a, peengkul a kitum ciangin omkhong thei lo uh hi." 
Job39:25 Peengkul a kitum ciangin ham hathat uh a, gal mai a tun ma-un gal gimnam za uh a, galkapmangte’ thupiakna awging a za uh hi." 
Job39:26 “Simbung in a kha zalin leitaw lamah a leentheihna ding nangma kiang panin hong sin ahi hiam? 
Job39:27 Muvanlai in sang leenin mualtungah bu a tomna ding nang’ thupiakna hong ngak ahi hiam? 
Job39:28 Suangpi dawnah bu bawl a, suangheeng kawmte phualpi-in nei hi." 
Job39:29 Tua lai mun panin khuadak kawikawi a, manin a nek ding an a gal et hi." 
Job39:30 Gan sihna kimkotah musanete kikhawm uh a, a note in sasi a dawn uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job40:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Job kiangah," 
Job40:2 “Job aw, nangmah in Vanglian Pasian nong dem hi. Tu-in khawl ding na hiam, ahih kei leh keima thugen nong dawng ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job40:3 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job40:4 “ Topa aw, ka haipau kha hi. Hong bangci dawn theih ding ka hi hiam? Tu a kipanin ka pau nawn kei ding hi."
