Job40:5 Ka gen dinga kilawm zahval genkha ka hih manin, tu a kipanin ka pau nawn het kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job40:6 Tua ciangin huihpi sung panin Topa in Job tungah thu genkik a," 
Job40:7 “Kipasalsakin dingto inla, ka thudotnate hong dawng in." 
Job40:8 Kei a thutang loin hong seh a, nang thutang kisa-in kei hong mawhsak na hi hiam?" 
Job40:9 Kei zahin nang hat na hi hiam? Kei’ awging zahin nang a’ gingzo ding ahi hiam? 
Job40:10 Na ngap nakleh na minthanna ding le na kihihsak theih nadingin tu-in hong kipan inla, minthanna le minliatna ngah ta in." 
Job40:11 A kiphasak mite en inla, na hehna tawh amaute niamkhiat gawp in." 
Job40:12 Mi kiphasakte en inla, amaute niamkhiat gawp in. Migilote khempeuh a omna mun munah tuancil in." 
Job40:13 Amaute khempeuh lei sungah phumcip inla, misite’ gam sungah amaute khihcip in." 
Job40:14 Tua bangin na hihzawh nakleh nang a hong phat masa pen pa, nang a gualzo pa na hihna thu a hong phawk masa pen pa ka hi ding hi." 
Job40:15 “Tui-sakol ganhing golpi ngaihsun dih in. Amah le nang a piangsak pa keimah ka hi hi. Amah in bawngtal bangin lopa bek mah ne a," 
Job40:16 ahi zongin ama pum sungah bangzah hatna om a, bangzahta-in a sazang khauh ahi hiam?" 
Job40:17 Ama mei, taamtak sing bangin khauhin tal po veva a, a khe-a a sazangte hat pha mahmah hi." 
Job40:18 Ama guhte sumngo bangin khauh a, ama khete sikzawl bangin a khauh hi." 
Job40:19 “Ganhing khempeuh lak pan a lamdang pen hi a, amah a Piangsak pa bek mah in amah a zozo ahi hi." 
Job40:20 Gamsate omna mualtung panin ama an ding lopa kipuak hi. 
Job40:21 Amah lingkung nuai-ah lum a, nawng sunga pumpeeng lakah a bu hi." 
Job40:22 Lingkungte le lui gei-a gialhek kungte in ama a’ ding niliim piangsak hi. 
Job40:23 Amah in gun tuikhangte kihta het lo a, tuikhang in ama maitang a nawkgawp hangin nuamtakin omthei veve hi." 
Job40:24 Kua in ama mit tawsakin manzo ding ahi hiam? Kua in a nakpheh-ah khau vawhzo ding ahi hiam? 
Job41:1 “Ngasa siahna sikkawi tawh Awle manzo ding a, khauhual khat tawh a leii henzo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:2 A nakpheh-ah khau vawhzo ding a, a khaguh-ah sikkawi bulhzo ding na hiam?" 
Job41:3 Amah in na khahna ding hong thum ding a, na hehpihna ding hong ngen ding ahi hiam?" 
Job41:4 Na sila ahi tawntung dingin nangma tungah thu hong ciam ding ahi hiam? 
Job41:5 Na nasem numeite na mawlpih bangin mawlpihzo ding a, vasa khawi bangin bawlzo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:6 Ngasa bengte in lei dingin hong deek ding a, sa zuakte in zuak dingin a sa sem ding ahi hiam?" 
Job41:7 Ngasa khawhna teipi tawh a vun khawhletzo ding a, teipi lingnei tawh a lutang khawhletzo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:8 Khatvei sukhakhin lecin na hihkik nawn kei ding a, tua na sukkhakna thu na mangngilh nawn kei ding hi." 
Job41:9 “Awle a mu mi peuhmah lau-in lei-ah a puk uh hi. 
Job41:10 Awle a heh ciangin kihtakhuai mahmah a, ama omna mai-ah kuamah om ngam lo hi." 
Job41:11 Leitung a om mihingte lakah Awle a suk manin a sihlawh lo kua om ahi hiam? 
Job41:12 “Awle khete, a guh a taang, a thahatna ziate gen loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Job41:13 Kua in ama puan tungnung hawkkhiatsak zo a, a sik puanpi sunletzo ahi hiam?" 
Job41:14 A kihtakhuai a hate a kam sungah om ahih manin, kua in ama kam phensak ngam ahi hiam?" 
Job41:15 A nungzang sukah a lipte lum bangin kithuapsuk cinten a, suang bangin sakin kimatcip bikbek ciat hi." 
Job41:16 Tua lipte khatlekhat kithuapcip bikbek ahih manin, khatlekhat kikalah huih nangawn thawl zo lo hi." 
Job41:17 Tuate kinak mat lua ahih manin, bangmah in phelkhia zo lo hi." 
Job41:18 Amah a hetchiai ciangin mei-ek bangin taang zaizai a, a mittangte nisuak bangin a taang hi." 
Job41:19 A kam panin mei kuangkhia a, mei-ek leengkhia zaizai hi." 
Job41:20 A nak panin meikhu suak a, selkeu khu tawh kibang hi." 
Job41:21 Ama husanna in mei tawhkuang a, ama kam panin meikuang a suakkhia hi." 
Job41:22 A ngawng zong thakhauh mahmah ahih manin, a gim thei het lo thatang a nei ahi hi." 
Job41:23 A vun tung khempeuh a nipna mun mahmah om lo a, sik peek bangin a sak kim hi." 
Job41:24 A lungsim in suangtum bangin kihtak khat zong nei lo a, an gawina suang bangin sakin do lah nei lo hi." 
Job41:25 Amah hong kithawi ciangin mi thahat pente nangawn lau a, kihta mahmah uh ahih manin cih nading thei loin a om uh hi." 
Job41:26 Namsau tawh a kisut hangin bunzo vet lo a, teipi le thaltangte in zong bunzo tuan het lo hi." 
Job41:27 Ama a dingin sikte, buhkung bangin nip a, sumngote nangawn sing muatsa bang lel hi." 
Job41:28 Amah khua a phawksakzo ding, thaltang om lo a, suang tawh a kiden ciangin anvai them tu bang lel hi." 
Job41:29 Ama a dingin molhtum pen buhkung bang hi lel a, teipi tawh a kikhawh ciangin a nuihsan lel hi." 
Job41:30 A khecinte, beelpei kitamte tawh kibang a, lam a pai ciangin leilak kuikek gawp hi." 
Job41:31 Amah in tuipi tokin beel sunga tuiso bangsakzo a, sathau sa sunga tui tu bangin tuipi phuansak zaizai zo hi." 
Job41:32 A painasa khempeuhah tuihual om dandan a, tuipi phuansak pheuphau hi." 
Job41:33 Amah tehpih theih ding leitungah bangmah om lo a, bangmah kihtak a nei het lo ganhing ahi hi." 
Job41:34 Amah in a kihtakhuai ganhing a kihisak pente nangawn nuai-et lai a, amah pen gamsa khempeuh’ kumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:1 Tua ciangin Job in Topa dawng a," 
Job42:2 “ Topa aw, vangliatna khempeuh na neihna, na hihnop khempeuh na hih theihna thu ka thei hi." 
Job42:3 Kei bangmah a thei lo kimlai, ‘Bang hangin ka pilna hong dem ngam na hi hiam?’ na hong ci hi. Keimah in ka tel zawh loh thute, kei a dingin a lamdanglua thu a gengen ka hi hi." 
Job42:4 Thu na gen laitakin ka na ngaihna ding, na thugente kong dawn ding, na hong gen hi." 
Job42:5 Nidangin mi’ gensawn bekin nang ka hong thei a, tu-in keima mit mahmah tawh nang ka hong mu ta hi." 
Job42:6 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka paunasate khempeuh hangin ka maizum mahmah a, tu-in vutlevai khu-in nakpitakin ka kisik hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:7 Topa in hih thute khempeuh Job tungah a gen khit ciangin, Teman khua mi Elifaz kiangah, “Ka nasempa Job bangin, keima thu na gen ding uh a kilawm bangin gen lo na hih manun, nang le na lawm tegel tungah ka heh hi." 
Job42:8 Tu-in bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Job kiangah paipih un la, note a dingin biakpiakna-in nei un. Job in note a dingin thu hong ngetsak ding a, keimah in ama thungetna ka pia ding hi. Note’ haina zahin kong minsiasak kei ding hi. Note in Job’ gen bangin keima thu a manin na gen kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ sawl bangin Elifaz, Bildad, le Zofar gamta uh a, Topa in Job’ thungetna a pia hi." 
Job42:10 Job in a lawm thumte a’ ding thu a ngetsak khit ciangin, Topa in Job citheisakkik a, nidanga a neih ngeizah nihin neihsa lamsa a guan hi." 
Job42:11 Tua ciangin Job’ sanggam pasalte, a sanggam numeite, le a lawm ngeite a inn-ah hong hawh uh a, a inn-ah pawi bawlin lungdamin a omkhawm uh hi. Topa in ama tungah a tunsak gimnate hangin a khasiatpihnate uh genin a hanthawn uh hi. Amaute in sum le kham zungbuh khat ciat tawh va pha uh hi." 
Job42:12 Tua tham loin Topa in Job’ nuntakna a masa lam sangin a nunung lamah thupha limpiak zaw hi. Job in tuu tul sawm le tulli, kalaoh tulguk, bawngtal kap tulkhat, le la a pi tulkhat a nei hi." 
Job42:13 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum neikik a," 
Job42:14 a tanu upa pen Jemimah phuak a, a nihna Keziah phuak a, a tum pen Kerenhappuk a phuak hi." 
Job42:15 Job’ tanute zahin a melhoih leitungah numei dang khat zong om lo a, a pa un a sanggam pasalte uh tawh a kibangin gamh a luahkhawmsak hi." 
Job42:16 Hih hun khit ciangin Job kum za le kum sawmli sung nungta lai a, a tute ciang bek hi loin a tu-sawnsawn ciang dong zong a mu hi." 
Job42:17 Tua khit ciangin a khankhinin a teeksih ta hi. 
Psalms1:1 Mi nuamsa i cihte pen migilote’ thu a zui lo mi, mimawhte’ gamtat bangin a gamta lo mi, mi a thusim lote tawh a kipawl lo mi ahi hi." 
Psalms1:2 Ama nopsakna pen Topa thu sung bek mah hi a, sun le zanin ama thu a ngaihsunsun mi ahi hi." 
Psalms1:3 Amah pen lui tuiluang gei-a a kisuan ama gah hunin gah a, a teh a vul ngei lo singkung tawh kibang hi. Ama hihna khempeuhah a maa pai mahmah hi." 
Psalms1:4 Migilote ahihleh tua bang hi lo uh a, huih in a letkhiat anvai tawh kibang lel uh hi." 
Psalms1:5 Tua ahih ciangin migilote in thukhenna thuak zo lo ding uh a, mimawhte pen midikte’ pawl sungah kihel thei lo ding uh hi;" 
Psalms1:6 bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in midikte lam lakin hu tawntung a, migilote ahihleh sia maimang ding uh hi." 
Psalms2:1 Bang thu hangin minam dangte siatna dingah kithukhat sim uh a, mite in a mawkna dingpi-in sawmsim uh ahi hiam?" 
Psalms2:2 Leitung kumpite le gam ukte in Topa le ama sathau nilh pa langpangin vaihawm uh a," 
Psalms2:3 “Amau’ hong henna khaute sutat khia-in, amau’ khaute ei kiang panin paaikhia ni,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms2:4 Vantunga a tupa in amaute na nuihsan a, tua Topa in amaute a zahko hi." 
Psalms2:5 Tua ciangin hehna tawh amau kiangah thu gen ding a, hehluat mahmahna tawh amaute linglawng sakin," 
Psalms2:6 “Ka mual siangtho Zion tungah ka kumpi ka tusak khin hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms2:7 Topa’ thukhenna tu-in ka hong gen ding hi: Amah in keima tungah, “Nang pen ka tapa na hi a, tuni-in na Pa ka suak hi." 
Psalms2:8 Keima tungah hong ngen in; nangma luah dingin minamte ka bawl ding a, leimong dongin na neihsa ka hisak ding hi." 
Psalms2:9 Sik tawn khat tawh amaute na satkham ding a, beelseek pa in beel a denkhap bangin leilakah amaute na dengzan ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Psalms2:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpite aw, tu-in pil ta un; leitung gam a ukte aw, tu-in thu phawk ta un." 
Psalms2:11 Launa tawh Topa’ na sem unla, linna tawh a khe nam un; tua hikeileh amah sinso-in lamkalah na siamang ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah heh pakpak hi. Amah a bel khempeuh mi nuamsate ahi hi." 
Psalms2:12  
Psalms3:1 Topa aw, ka galte tam mahmah a, mi tampi tak in kei hong langpan’ nainai uh hi." 
Psalms3:2 Pasian in amah huh lo ding, mi tampi in hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms3:3 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen ka kidalna lum, ka minthanna le ka lu hong phong pa na hi hi." 
Psalms3:4 Nakpi takin Topa ka galsap a, amah in a mual siangtho panin kei a hong dawng hi." 
Psalms3:5 Lumin ka ihmu a, Topa in hong kem ahih manin ka thokik hi." 
Psalms3:6 Keimah a hong galbawl keimah a hong umcih mi tul sawm tampite ka kihta kei hi. 
Psalms3:7 Tho in, Topa! Kei hong hon in, ka Pasian! Bang hang hiam cih leh ka galte khempeuh’ paang nangmah in na beenggawp a, migilote’ ha na sutan hi." 
Psalms3:8 Gualzawhna pen Topa nangma hang ahi hi. Na mite tungah na thupha hong tung ta hen! 
Psalms4:1 A thuman ka Pasian aw, ka hong sap ciangin hong dawng in. Gimna ka thuak ciangin nopsakna nong pia hi. Kei hong hehpih inla, ka thungetna hong za in." 
Psalms4:2 Mite aw, ka minphatna in bang tanvei daina thuak ding ahi hiam? Bang tanvei thumawkna deihin zuauthu zong ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms4:3 Ahih hangin Topa in ama a dingin miphate a tuamkoihlam thei ta un. Ke’n ka sap ciangin Topa in hong za hi. 
Psalms4:4 Lau-in ling unla, mawhna peel un. Na lupna tung uhah lungngai phapha unla, om khikhe un." 
Psalms4:5 A man biakpiaknate lui unla, Topa muang un." 
Psalms4:6 Mi tampi in, “Thupha tampi hong pia in. Ko tungah na maitang vang hong taangsak in, Topa!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms4:7 Amaute, an le leengtui a hauh cianga a nuam uh sangin nuamna lianzaw ka lung sungah nong guan hi." 
Psalms4:8 Nuamtakin lumin ka ihmu ta ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah bek in lungmuanna munah na hong omsak hi." 
Psalms5:1 Topa aw, kong paunate hong ngai inla, ka hong thumnate hong thudon in." 
Psalms5:2 Ka kumpi le ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah hong thum ka hih manin ka kikona aw hong ngai in." 
Psalms5:3 Topa aw, zingsang simin ka aw nong za a, zingsang simin nangma a dingin biakna bawlin kong ngak hi." 
Psalms5:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna lamsang a deih Pasian na hi kei a, siatna pen tawlkhat zong nang tawh a omkhawm thei ahi kei hi." 
Psalms5:5 A kisathei mite nangma mit tawh kituak lo a, siatna a bawlte khempeuh nangmah in na mudah hi." 
Psalms5:6 Zuauthu a gen mite nangmah in na susia hi. Topa in mi thahnopna lungsim le mi khemnopna lungsim a neite a mudah hi. 
Psalms5:7 Kei ahihleh a kicing itna kip suangin na inn sungah ka tum ding a, nangmah zahtakna tawh kunin a siangtho na biakinn lam nga-in kong bia ding hi." 
Psalms5:8 Topa aw, gal tampi nei ka hih manin na thumanna tawh kei hong makaih inla, keima mai-ah na lampi taangsak in." 
Psalms5:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau sungah thuman om lo hi. Amau lungsimah siatna bek ngaihsun uh a, amau’ gawlgui pen a kihongsa hankhuk tawh kibang hi. A kam uh tawh mawk phat uh hi." 
Psalms5:10 Pasian aw, a mawhna uh amau mah thuaksak inla, amau’ thu mah tawh amaute puksak in. Amaute in nangmah hong lehdo uh ahih manin amau’ mawhna tampite hangin amaute paaikhia in." 
Psalms5:11 Ahih hangin nang hong belte khempeuh lungdamsak inla, nuamna la sasak tawntung in. Nangma min a deihte nangma hangin gualzo-in a lungdam theih nadingun amaute na hu hi." 
Psalms5:12 Topa aw, thuman mi thupha na pia a, lum tawh dal bangin deihsakna tawh na dal hi." 
Psalms6:1 Topa aw, na heh laitak hong taii kei inla, lungso sa-in hong thuhilh kei in." 
Psalms6:2 Topa aw, thaneem ka hih manin kei tungah dikna hong zang in. Topa aw, ka guh ka taang na mahmah ahih manin hong damsak in." 
Psalms6:3 Ka hingim mahmah hi. Topa aw, bang tanvei nang hong zekai lai ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms6:4 Topa aw, hong kihei inla, kei hong hon in. Itna kip a nei pa na hih manin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh misite omna gam sungah nangmah phawk theih nading bangmah om lo ahih manin, Leinuai panin kua in nang hong phat thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms6:6 Ka tautauna-in ka gim hi. Zan sialin ka khitui in ka lupna tum a, ka kahkahna-in ka lupna kawt dikdek hi." 
Psalms6:7 Dahna hangin ka mit mial a, ka galte’ hong bawlna hangin ka mitzung zaw semsem hi." 
Psalms6:8 Siatna a bawlte khempeuh aw, ka kiang panin kihemkhia un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka kahna aw a za hi." 
Psalms6:9 Topa in keima thumna hong za khinzo a, Topa in ka thungetna hong sang ta hi." 
Psalms6:10 Ka galte khempeuh zahhuai mahmahin genthei ding uh hi. Amaute nungkikin maizumna thuak pah ding uh hi. 
Psalms7:1 Topa ka Pasian aw, nangmah ka hong bel hi. Kei hong delhte’ kiang panin hong dal inla hong hon in." 
Psalms7:2 Kei hong hon kei lecin a hong hon ding dang kuamah om lo ahih manin amaute in humpinelkai bangin hong kaikhia-in hong balgawp ding uh hi. 
Psalms7:3 Topa ka Pasian aw, ka gamtat a siat a, ka khut a khialh leh," 
Psalms7:4 bangmah thu om lopi-in ka lawmte khemin, ka galte ka huh taak leh," 
Psalms7:5 galte in kei hong delhin hong pha uh hen la, leilakah kei hong tuancilsak inla, leilakah kei hong sialpai ta uh hen." 
Psalms7:6 Tho in, Topa, a hehsa-in thasaan inla, ka galte’ hehna panin kei hong dal in. Khanglo in, ka Pasian aw, thukhenna ding hun khat na seh khinzo hi." 
Psalms7:7 Nangma omna kiimah mite kikhawmsak inla, amaute’ omna tung a sangna munah tu in." 
Psalms7:8 Topa in mite thu a khen hi. Topa aw, ka thumanna le keima sunga om ka dikna tawh kizui-in thu hong khen in." 
Psalms7:9 Lungsim le ngaihsutna a en a thuman Pasian aw, migilote’ siatna beisak inla, mi thumante kipsak in." 
Psalms7:10 Pasian, kei hong hupa hi a, lungsim man mite a hon hi." 
Psalms7:11 Pasian, thu a tangin a khen pa hi a, migilote tungah a heh den pa ahi hi." 
Psalms7:12 Mite a kibawlphat kik kei leh, Pasian in a thalkhau sui zo a, a namsau taat ding hi." 
Psalms7:13 Amah in mei thaltang bawl a, sih theihna ama galhiamte a baihsa-in a koihzo hi." 
Psalms7:14 Migilo in thusia paii a, suak nuamin na a, zuauthu a hingkhia hi." 
Psalms7:15 Amah in gum to a, ama tawhsa gum sung mahah amah a kia hi." 
Psalms7:16 Ama lunggulh hoih lo pen ama lu tungah tukik a, ama gamtatsia pen ama luzang mahah tukik hi." 
Psalms7:17 Ke’n ahihleh, ama dikna om bangin Topa’ tungah lungdamna ka lak ding a, a Sangpen Topa’ min phatna la ka sak ding hi." 
Psalms8:1 Topa kote’ Topa aw, leitung khempeuhah na min lian mahmah hi. Nangmah a hong kiphatna awgingte in vantung ban a," 
Psalms8:2 naungekte le naupangte’ kam tawh nangmah phatna la kisa hi. Gal na neih manin galte le langpangte na daihsakna dingin panmunkip na bawl khin hi. 
Psalms8:3 Na nasepna, na bawlsa, kha le aksite, le na vantungte ka et ciangin," 
Psalms8:4 na ngaihsut tham dingin mihing bang hi lel a, na phawk tham dingin mihing’ ta bang hi lel ahi hiam?" 
Psalms8:5 Ahi zongin, vantungmi sangin a neuzaw deuh bekin na bawl a, minthanna le pahtawina nangmah in na guan hi." 
Psalms8:6 Na khut tawh na bawlsate khempeuh tungah ukna thu ama tungah na pia a, na khempeuh na uksak hi." 
Psalms8:7 Tuu le bawng khempeuh, gamsa khempeuh zong," 
Psalms8:8 huih lak a leng vasate, tui sunga om ngasate, tui, lampi-a a tawn khempeuhte, na khempeuh ama khenuai-ah na koih hi." 
Psalms8:9 Topa, kote’ Topa aw, leitung khempeuhah na min lian mahmah hi." 
Psalms9:1 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa tungah lungdamna kong ko ding a, na bawl a lamdangte khempeuh ka gen ding hi." 
Psalms9:2 Nangma hangin nuamin ka diang ding a, na min phatna ka sa ding hi, Sangpenpa aw." 
Psalms9:3 Ka galte a nungkik ciangin, nangma mai-ah amaute pukin kisia uh hi." 
Psalms9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima thutanna na hong kipsak a, tokhom tungah tu-in thu a manin na khen hi." 
Psalms9:5 Minamte na taii a, migilote na susia hi. A maimang dingin amau’ min na phiat hi." 
Psalms9:6 Siat denna sungah galte beimang hi. A khuate uh na zunglot a, amaute kiphawkkha nawn lo hi." 
Psalms9:7 Topa ahihleh kumpi za-ah tu ngitnget a, thukhen nadingin a tokhom a bawl hi." 
Psalms9:8 Leitung mite’ thu a mantakin khen a, a kilawm bangin mite’ thu a khen hi." 
Psalms9:9 Topa pen, netniamna a thuakte a’ dingin munkip hi a, haksat hun ciangin munmuanhuai ahi hi." 
Psalms9:10 Topa aw, nang a hong zongte nusia lo na hih manin, na min a theite in nang hong muang uh hi." 
Psalms9:11 Zion-ah a om Topa phatna la sa un! Ama nasepnate mite’ lakah gen un! 
Psalms9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna a hua pa in amaute phawk a, a thuak mite’ awging amah in mangngilh lo hi." 
Psalms9:13 Ka tungah hong dik in, Topa! Sihna pan hong honkhia pa aw, kei hong mudahte’ hangin keima gim thuaknate hong en inla," 
Psalms9:14 nangmah a hong kiphatnate phawk kikkik inla, na hong hotkhiatna hangin Jerusalem khua sungah ka nuamna ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms9:15 Amau’ bawlsa gum sung mahah minamte kiasuk uh a, a ngenthang siahna uhah amau’ khe mah a awk hi." 
Psalms9:16 Topa in thu hong khenin migilote amau’ nasepna mahah awksakna tawh amah hong kilang hi. 
Psalms9:17 Pasian a mangngilh minam khempeuh sung panin migilote, Leinuai-ah pai ding uh hi." 
Psalms9:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte kimangngilh den lo ding a, mizawngte’ lametna bei paisuak lo ding hi." 
Psalms9:19 Tho in, Topa! Mi kizosak ke’n; na mai-ah minamte sam inla, amaute’ tungah thu khen in!" 
Psalms9:20 Amaute lausak in, Topa! Mi ahih lelna uh minamte theisak in!" 
Psalms10:1 Topa aw, bang hangin gamla din na hi hiam? Haksat hunin bang hangin nang bucip khong na hi hiam?" 
Psalms10:2 Migilote in kiphatsakna tawh mizawngte uuk delh uh hi. Amau ngaihsut vaihawmna mahah amaute awksak in. 
Psalms10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilo in a lungsim deihna kisaktheihpih a, ngahna dingah a huaiham pa in Topa phuisamin a taisan hi." 
Psalms10:4 Migilo in kiphatsakna lungsim nei a, Topa zong lo hi. Ama ngaihsutna khempeuhah, “Pasian om kei,” a ci hi." 
Psalms10:5 A hihna khempeuhah a maa pai ngitnget hi. Na thukhennate khempeuh ama muhna in a batzawh lohin sang mahmah a, a galte khempeuh ahihleh amah in nehpiksan lel hi." 
Psalms10:6 A lungsim sungah, “Kiling ngei kei ning; khang tawntungin kamsiatna tuak kei ning,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Psalms10:7 Ama kampaute pen hamsia, khemna, le netniamna tawh kidim a, siatna le man lohna bekbek thugenin a nei tawntung hi." 
Psalms10:8 Khuaneute sungah mi a buksimin tu a, munbu kawmah mawhnei lote a that hi. Ama mit in mi tuahsiate ensim a," 
Psalms10:9 humpinelkai in a kuahawm sung pan a buk bangin amah in buksimin, mizawngte a man dingin buk a, a ngenthang sungah mizawngte kai-in a man hi." 
Psalms10:10 A thatanghat thu tawh mi tuahsia mi sucipin a puksuk sak hi. 
Psalms10:11 Ama lungsim sungah, “Hih thute pen Pasian in mangngilh hi; a mai seel hi, en lo ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Psalms10:12 Tho in, Topa! Pasian aw, na tha hong san inla, a thuakte mangngilh kei in." 
Psalms10:13 Bang hangin migilo in Pasian simmawh a, a lungsim sungah, “Hong thei kei na’n teh,” ci ahi hiam?" 
Psalms10:14 Nangmah in na mu hi. Na huh theih nadingin haksatna le gimna a thuakte na ciamteh hi. A tuahsia mi in nangma tungah ama pumpi hong ap a, pa nei lote a huhpa na hi hi." 
Psalms10:15 Giloin siatna a bawlte’ khut kuaitan gawp inla, siatna a bawlzo nawn lo dingin gim pia in." 
Psalms10:16 Topa, a tawntungin kumpi hi a, ama leitang panin minam dangte beimang ding hi." 
Psalms10:17 Topa aw, lungnemte’ deihna na ngai ding hi. A lungsim uh na hatsak ding a, na bil na ngat ding hi." 
Psalms10:18 Pa nei lote le netniamna a thuakte tungah nang na thutang a, leitung mite in launa tuakkha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms11:1 Ke’n Topa ka bel hi. Bang hangin ka tungah, “Vasa leeng bangin mualtungah tai in;" 
Psalms11:2 bang hang hiam cih leh, en in, migilote in khuamial sung panin lungsim thutangte a kap dingin a thalkhau uhah thaltang bulhin a thal uh a keek uh hi." 
Psalms11:3 Bulpite kisusia khin leh midikte in bangcih thei nawn ding hiam?” nong ci thei diam? 
Psalms11:4 Topa a biakinn siangtho sungah om a, Topa’ tokhom vantungah om hi. Amah in mihingte hong en a, mihingte’ gamtatna khempeuh a theitel hi." 
Psalms11:5 Topa in midikte le migilote entel a, a ngongtat nuam mite a lungsim in mudah hi." 
Psalms11:6 Amah in migilote tungah mei-am le kaat zusak ding a, amau’ ngah ding gimna huihsa mahmah hi ding hi." 
Psalms11:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa dik mahmah a, dik gamtatna a deih hi. Thutang mi in ama mai a mu ding hi." 
Psalms12:1 Topa aw, hong huh in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lak panin mi thumante maimang ta a, mipha khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Psalms12:2 Mi kim in a vengte kiangah zuauthu gen ciat a, phat khemna kam zol le lungsim nam nih tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Psalms12:3 “I Leii tawh gualzo ding, i mukte eima neihsa; i to kua hiam?” a ci vial, kiphatsakna a piangsak leii, phat khemna muk khempeuh, Topa in atkhia tahen." 
Psalms12:4  
Psalms12:5 Topa in, “Mizawngte a neihsa kihawkkhia a, mi cimawhte thumin tau uh ahih ciangin tu-in dingin, amau’ lunggulh, lungmuanna munah amaute ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms12:6 Topa’ thuciamnate, a siangtho thuciamna hi a, meikhuk sungah sagihvei a kisiangsak ngun tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms12:7 Topa aw, kote hong dal inla, tukhang mite kiang panin kote hong kem in." 
Psalms12:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lakah siatna kipahtawi a, mun khempeuhah migilote kidimin vak kawikawi uh hi." 
Psalms13:1 Topa aw, bang tanvei hi lai ding ahi hiam? Kei hong mangngilh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Bang tanvei kei kiang pan na maitang seel ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms13:2 Bang tanvei gimna thuakin, sunthapai-in ka lungsim dah ding ahi hiam? Bang tanvei kei tungah ka galte gualzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms13:3 Topa ka Pasian aw, ngaihsun inla hong dawng in. Ihmulum kha ding ka hih manin ka mitte hong vaksak in." 
Psalms13:4 Ka galte in, “Ama tungah gualzo khin ung,” ci kha ding hi. Kei ka lin’ manin ka galte nuam kha ding hi." 
Psalms13:5 Ahih hangin na itna kip ka muang a, nong hotkhiatna hangin ka lungdam ding hi." 
Psalms13:6 Nong hehpihna kicing ahih manin, Topa, la kong sak ding hi." 
Psalms14:1 Mihaite in a lungsim sung uhah, “Pasian om lo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Amaute sia uh a, kihhuai gamtat uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms14:2 A pil gamtat, Pasian a zong a om uh hiam, cih a theih nadingin Topa in vantung panin mihingte hong ensuk hi." 
Psalms14:3 Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un pukkhin uh hi. A kibangin sia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat zong om lo hi." 
Psalms14:4 Topa’ tungah thu a ngen lo, annek bangin ka mite a netum, siatna a bawlte in thutheihna nei lo ahi hiam?" 
Psalms14:5 Launa lianpi sungah amaute om ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in midikte ompih hi. 
Psalms14:6 Mizawngte’ geelna susia nuam uh a, ahih hangin Topa pen mizawngte’ belh ahi hi." 
Psalms14:7 Israel-te a’ ding hotkhiatna Zion panin hong tunna ding thu ka ngenngen hi. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi." 
Psalms15:1 Topa aw, na biakinn sungah kua om ding ahi hiam? Na mual siangtho tungah kua teng ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms15:2 Paubaang loin gamta-in, a manin na sem a, lungsim tak a gen mi," 
Psalms15:3 mi gensia loin, a lawmte tungah siatna bawl lo a, a vengte a mawhsak lo mi," 
Psalms15:4 migilote thusim lo a, ahi zongin Topa a zahtakte a pahtawi mi, ama natna ding nangawnah a ciampel lo mi," 
Psalms15:5 ama sum a meetin a kha lo, thutang mite a langpan lo, golhguk a la lo mite teng ding uh hi. Hih bangin a gamtate pen ling ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms16:1 Pasian aw, nang hong bel ka hih manin keimah hong kem in." 
Psalms16:2 Topa tungah, “Nang, ka Topa na hi hi; nang tawh loin hoihna ka nei kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms16:3 Leitungah a om mi siangthote ahih le, amaute nampi hi a, amaute sungah ka lungkimna teng om hi." 
Psalms16:4 Pasian dang a teelte in amau’ dahna khangsak hi. Amau’ si theh biaknate ke’n bawlpih loin, amau’ pasian-te ka biakpih kei ding hi." 
Psalms16:5 Topa pen keima luah dinga ka teelsa, keima muanpi na hi a, keima ngah ding khempeuh na khut sungah om hi." 
Psalms16:6 Kei-a’ pen mun nuam mahmah sung hong tu ahih manin gamhluah hoih nei ka hi hi. 
Psalms16:7 Ngaihsutna a hong lak Topa ka phat a, zanin zong ka lungsimah hong suak hi." 
Psalms16:8 Topa ka maingat tawntung a, ka taklamah amah om ahih manin ka kiling kei ding hi." 
Psalms16:9 Tua ahih ciangin lungdamin ka kipak a, lungmuangin ka om hi." 
Psalms16:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Leinuai nong zuansak kei a, na mihoih pa Leihawmpi na musak kei hi." 
Psalms16:11 Nangmah in nuntakna lampi keimah nong lak hi. Nangma omna munah lungdamna lianpi om a, nangma taklamah nop tawntungnate a om hi." 
Psalms17:1 Topa aw, thuman ka hong ngetna hong za inla, ka otna hong ngai in! Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong thungetna hong ngai in!" 
Psalms17:2 Thuman mu na hih manin ka dikna hong kilangsak in. 
Psalms17:3 Keima lungsim hong sin inla, zan hun sungin ka kiangah hong hawh inla, keimah hong ze-et lecin, ka sungah gitlohna na mu kei ding hi. Ka kampau-in zong bangmah ka khial kei hi." 
Psalms17:4 Gamtatna thu-ah ci leng, nangma thupiaknate ka zui a, mi ngongtatte’ gamtat ziate ka pelh hi." 
Psalms17:5 Nangma lampi zui-in ka pai a, na lam ka pial ngei kei hi." 
Psalms17:6 Pasian aw, hong dawng ding na hih manin nang kong sam hi. Na bil hong ngat inla, ka thu hong za in." 
Psalms17:7 Amau’ galte’ kiang panin nang hong belte a honpa aw, na itna kip lamdang takin hong lak in." 
Psalms17:8 Kei a hong sugawp migilo, kei a hong umcih a kihtakhuai mahmah ka galte kiang panin mitnauta bangin hong kem inla, na kha liimah hong seel in." 
Psalms17:9  
Psalms17:10 Amaute in hehpihna lungsim bangmah nei lo uh a, a kam uh tawh amaute kiphatsak pau uh hi." 
Psalms17:11 Amaute in kei hong sulzuih uh a, tu-in kei hong umcihin, keimah leilak den nadingin a hong en uh hi." 
Psalms17:12 Amaute pen a balnen nuam humpinelkai tawh kibang uh a, humpinelkai khanglai sabuk tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms17:13 Topa aw, tho in! Amaute maiphut inla, thalpaih in! Topa aw, a deih khempeuh uh hih leitungah a nei migilote kiang panin na khut le na namsau tawh kei hong honkhia in. Amau a dingin na koihcing gimnate thuaksak inla, a tate un zong a cingvalin thuak uh hen la, a naungekte uh a’ ding nangawn nusiat lai ta uh hen." 
Psalms17:14  
Psalms17:15 Kei ka hih leh, thumanna tawh na maitang ka en ding a, ka khanlawh ciangin nangma mel muhna tawh ka lungkim ding hi." 
Psalms18:1 Ka thahatna ahi Topa aw, nangmah ka hong it hi." 
Psalms18:2 Topa pen keima suangpi, ka munkip muanhuai, kei a hong honkhia pa, ka Pasian, ka suangpi, ka belh pa, ka lum, ka kihotkhiatna ki, ka munkip ahi hi." 
Psalms18:3 A phattaak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms18:4 Sihna khaute in hong gakcip a, sihna tuihualte in kei hong nawk hi." 
Psalms18:5 Leinuai sihna khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi." 
Psalms18:6 Ka gimna-ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasian’ tungah huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Amah in a biakinnpi panin ka aw hong za a, amah ka kohna aw in ama bilte va banto hi." 
Psalms18:7 Ama hehna hangin leitung kipumpei-in kivei a, mual bulpite zong kisingin ling damdam hi." 
Psalms18:8 Ama nakvangte panin meikhu pusuak hi. Ama kam panin mei husia pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuangkhia hi." 
Psalms18:9 Amah in vanpi niamsakin hong kumsuk a, ama khenuai-ah meiivom sahpi a om hi." 
Psalms18:10 Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leeng a, huih khate tungah manlang takin hong leeng hi." 
Psalms18:11 A kimkotah a ki-um nadingin khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuh nadingin meii sahpi le tui tawh a zingsak hi." 
Psalms18:12 Ama mai-a khuaphia sung panin gialpi le mei-amte in ama meii sahpite a phulet hi. 
Psalms18:13 Topa zong vantungah awng a, Sangpenpa in gialpi le mei-am ahi ama aw hong gingsak hi." 
Psalms18:14 Amah in a thaltangte lawn a, a galte kithehthangsak hi. Khuaphialep phiasak a, a galte a susia hi." 
Psalms18:15 Topa aw, nangma mawhsakna na awging hangin tuipi taw kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi." 
Psalms18:16 Amah in a sangna panin a khut tawh zamin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin keimah hong kaikhia hi." 
Psalms18:17 Ka gal hat pa kiang pan le hong mudahte kiang panin kei hong honkhia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a dingin amaute hatlua uh hi. 
Psalms18:18 Amaute in ka kamsiat hunin kei hong nehthawh uh hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi. 
Psalms18:19 Amah in mun tanzau khatah kei hong paikhiatpih a, ka tungah lungkim ahih manin a hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms18:20 Topa in ka thumanna tawh kizui-in noptuamna hong pia a, ka sianthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi." 
Psalms18:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ lampite ka tawn khin a, ka Pasian’ kiang panin gitlohna tawh ka paikhia kei hi." 
Psalms18:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama biakna ngeina thukip omte khempeuh limtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte ka paaikhia kei hi." 
Psalms18:23 Ama mai-ah kawkbaang hetloin ka om a, kisuanna dingte panin kei ka kikem hi." 
Psalms18:24 Tua ahih manin Topa in ka thumanna le ama muhna-ah ka sianthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi. 
Psalms18:25 Thuman mi tungah nang na thuman a, kawkbaang lo mi tungah nang na diktat hi." 
Psalms18:26 A siangtho mi tungah na siangtho gamtat a, thukawi mite na galbawl hi." 
Psalms18:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi niamte na honkhia a, ahih hangin mi kiphasakte na niamsak hi." 
Psalms18:28 Nangmah in keima mei nong vaksak a, Topa ka Pasian in ka khuamial na vaksak hi." 
Psalms18:29 Nangma hangin galkap honkhat ka sugawpzo a, ka Pasian hangin khuakulh khat ka kanzo hi." 
Psalms18:30 Hih Pasian - a thu kicing a, Topa’ kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a belte khempeuh a dingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
Psalms18:31 Topa longal, Pasian kua hiam? Pasian longal, suangpi kua hiam?" 
Psalms18:32 Keima tungah thahatna a hong guan Pasian, ka lampi lungmuan nadingin a bawl pa ahi hi." 
Psalms18:33 Amah in sangaipi khe bangin keima khe hong bawlsak a, mual sang dawnah ka khe hong kipsak hi." 
Psalms18:34 Galsim siam nadingin ka khutte hong hilh a, keima khut in sumngo thal nangawn a keekzo hi." 
Psalms18:35 Na hotkhiatna lum kei hong pia khinin, na taklam khut in kei hong phong a, nangma hong huhna in keimah hong liansak hi." 
Psalms18:36 Ka kalsuanna ding mun tanzau nong pia a, ka khe taal lo hi." 
Psalms18:37 Ka galte delhin ka pha a, a vekpi-un a kisiat khit matengun ka ciahkik kei hi." 
Psalms18:38 Amaute khempeuh a thawhkik zawh loh nadingun ka sunletgawp a, ka khenuai-ah a puk uh hi." 
Psalms18:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh galdo nadingin keimah tha nong guan a, keimah a hong dote ka nuai-ah na nengniam hi." 
Psalms18:40 Ka galte na nungkiksak a, kei hong mudahte ka susia hi." 
Psalms18:41 Huhna ding ngenin amaute kikoko uh a, ahih hangin a hon ding kuamah om lo hi. Amaute in Topa’ tungah ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in dawng lo hi." 
Psalms18:42 Huihpi mai-ah leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute ka lawnkhia hi." 
Psalms18:43 A lehdo mite kiang panin nangmah in kei na hong honkhia a, minamte’ lutangin kei na hong bawl a, ka theih ngei loh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi." 
Psalms18:44 Ka thu a zak phetun amaute in hong mang pah uh a, gamdang mite in kei hong mai-et uh hi." 
Psalms18:45 Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun a lingsa-in hong paikhia uh hi." 
Psalms18:46 Topa hing hi. Keima suangpi in thupha ngah hen la, ka kihotkhiatna Pasian," 
Psalms18:47 hong thuhkik sakin keima nuai-ah mite a hong zawhsak Pasian," 
Psalms18:48 ka galte kiang panin keimah a hong honkhia pa minthangin vanglian tahen. Ka langte tungah keimah nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin na hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms18:49 Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam dangte lakah nang ka hong phat ding a, nangma min phatna la ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms18:50 Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilh pa David le a suan a khakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi." 
Psalms19:1 Vantung in Pasian’ minthanna gen a, vanpi in ama nasepna taangko hi." 
Psalms19:2 Nisimin thu gengen a, zan simin theihtelna pulaklak hi." 
Psalms19:3 Pauna le kammal om lo a, amau’ aw kiza lo hi." 
Psalms19:4 Ahih hangin a aw uh leitung khempeuhah kizel a, a kammal uh leimong dongah a tung hi. Amau’ sungah ni a’ ding omna khat bawl khin a," 
Psalms19:5 a innsung pan a hong pusuak zi pi tangval tawh ahi zongin, lungtaii takin tai ding a kipan mi thahat khat tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi." 
Psalms19:6 Ama suahna van mong pan hi a, mong khat dongin pai a, ama satna panin a kiliah thei bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms19:7 Topa’ thu kicing a, nuntakna a thaksuaksak hi. Topa’ teci panna hi takpi a, mi pillote pilsak hi." 
Psalms19:8 Topa’ thuhilhte man a, lungsim nuamsak hi. Topa’ thupiakna siang a, mitte vaksak hi." 
Psalms19:9 Topa a kizahtakna siang a, kip tawntung hi. Topa’ ngeina kipte thuman a, a vekin kituakin man kim hi." 
Psalms19:10 Kham sangin ahi zongin kham hoihpen sang ahi zongin tuate deihhuaizaw a, khuaizu le khuailuzu taakte sangin zong khumzaw lai hi." 
Psalms19:11 Tua tham loin tuate’ hangin a nasem pa in thuphawkna ngah a, tuate zuihna-ah noptuamna lian a om hi." 
Psalms19:12 Ahih hangin kua in ama khialhnate mukhia theitawm ahi hiam? Theih loh manin khialhna panin kei hong siangsak hi. 
Psalms19:13 Mawh kaltangnate panin zong na nasempa hong kem inla, tuate keima tungah hong uksak kei in! Tua ciangin kei ka kawkbaang kei ding a, mawhna liante panin ka siang ding hi." 
Psalms19:14 Topa, ka belh suangpi le keimah hong tankhia pa aw, ka kammal le ka lungsim ngaihsutnate nangma muhna-ah a sanhuai suaksak ta in!" 
Psalms20:1 Gimna na thuak ciangin Topa in nang hong en hen la, Jakob’ Pasian in nangmah hong dal ta hen!" 
Psalms20:2 Siangtho mun panin huhna nang hong puak hen la, Zion panin nang hong panpih ta hen!" 
Psalms20:3 Na biakpiaknate khempeuh amah in hong phawk hen la, na meihal biakpiakna hong sang ta hen!" 
Psalms20:4 Na lungsim’ deihna amah in hong pia hen la, na geelna khempeuh hong tangtungsak ta hen!" 
Psalms20:5 Na gualzawhna-ah eite lungdamin awngin, i Pasian’ min tawh i lante khai ni!" 
Psalms20:6 Topa in a sathau nilh pa a huh ding tu-in ka thei ta a, ama vantung siangtho panin amah dawng ding a, a vangliatna tawh amah gualzosak ding hi." 
Psalms20:7 Mi pawlkhat in leengte kihihsakpih a, mi pawlkhat in sakolte kihihsakpih hi. Ahih hangin eite in Topa i Pasian’ min bek i kihihsakpih hi." 
Psalms20:8 Amaute kinawmsawmin pukgawp ding uh a, ahih hangin eite tho-in i dingtang ding hi." 
Psalms20:9 Topa aw, kumpipa tungah gualzawhna pia inla, kong sap ciangun hong dawng in." 
Psalms21:1 Topa aw, na hatna hangin kumpipa lungdam a, na huhna hangin amah nak nuam mahmah hi." 
Psalms21:2 Ama lungsim deihna teng nangmah in na pia khin a, ama hong ngette na khaktan kei hi." 
Psalms21:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh thupha hoihte tawh amah na dawntuah a, ama lu tungah kham siang lukhu na khusak hi." 
Psalms21:4 Nangma tung panin amah in nuntakna hong ngen a, ama tungah nuntak sau na pia hi." 
Psalms21:5 Nangma huhna hangin ama minthanna lian a, hoihna le minliatna ama tungah na pia hi." 
Psalms21:6 Nangmah in a tawntungin thupha ngah pen dingin amah na bawl a, nangma ompihna hangin lungdamna tawh amah na kipaaksak hi." 
Psalms21:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Topa muang a, Sangpenpa’ itna kip hangin amah a kiling kei ding hi." 
Psalms21:8 Na khut in na galte khempeuh sugawp ding a, na khut taklam in nang hong mudahte sugawp ding hi." 
Psalms21:9 Na kilat ciangin meiphual kuang bangin amaute na hih ding hi. Topa in hehna tawh amaute nawmvalh ding a, meikuang in amaute kangtum ding hi." 
Psalms21:10 Leitung panin a suan a khakte, mi’ tate’ lak panin amau’ tate na susia ding hi." 
Psalms21:11 Nangma langah siatna ding vaihawmin, gitlohna a bawl uh hangin tangtung lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms21:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na taisak ding a, na thal tawh a maitang uh na ngim ding hi." 
Psalms21:13 Topa aw, na hatna hangin nang hong kipahtawi ta hen! Nangma vangliatna la sa-in ka hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:1 Ka Pasian, ka Pasian aw, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam? Nong huhna ding ka hong thumna panin bang hangin gamla om na hi hiam?" 
Psalms22:2 Ka Pasian aw, sunin kong kiko a, ahi zongin nong dawng kei hi. Zanin zong ka kiko a, ahi zongin lungsim nopna ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Psalms22:3 Ahih hangin nang na siangtho a, Israel-te’ pahtawi-in na tu hi." 
Psalms22:4 Ka pate un nangmah hong muang uh hi. Amaute in hong muang uh a, nangmah in amaute na honkhia hi." 
Psalms22:5 Nangma tungah amaute in hong ko uh a, amaute kihon hi. Nangmah hong muang uh a, guaksuak lo uh hi." 
Psalms22:6 Ahih hangin kei pen lungno khat bang lel ka hi a, mi ka bang kei hi. Mite’ ko gawpgawp, mite’ simmawh ka hi hi." 
Psalms22:7 Hong mu mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko-in, hong mukpiksan uh a, a lu uh hong peisan hi." 
Psalms22:8 “ Topa’ tungah amah in ama thu ap hi. Amah kihonkhia sak un; amah deih ahih manin honkhia ta hen!” hong cihsan uh hi. 
Psalms22:9 Ahih hangin nang pen gil sung panin kei a hong suaksakpa na hi a, ka nu’ ang sungah a muanhuai-in keimah na hong kem hi." 
Psalms22:10 Ka suah tung a kipan nangma tungah kong tung a, ka nu in hong paii lai a kipan keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms22:11 Haksatna nai ahih manin kei tawh kigamla om kei in; kei a hong huh ding kuamah dang om lo hi. 
Psalms22:12 Bawngtal tampi tak in kei hong umcih uh a, Bashan gam bawngtal hatte in kei hong umcih uh hi." 
Psalms22:13 Humpinelkai hawk, a sabawh nuam bangin amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh hi." 
Psalms22:14 Tui buakkhiat bangin kei hong kibuakhia a, ka guh ka taang khempeuh kilawi mangkhin hi. Ka lungtang khuainun bang a, ka awm sungah tuisuak hi." 
Psalms22:15 Ka thahatna, leibeel phel bangin keu a, ka leii zong toncip ta hi. Nangmah in leivui sungah kei na hong koih hi." 
Psalms22:16 Ka kiimah uite om a, siatna bawl mi honkhat in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ka khut ka khete hong sunletzo uh hi." 
Psalms22:17 Ka guh khempeuh kimu thei hi. Amaute in hong sal gega uh hi. 
Psalms22:18 Amaute in ka puante hawm uh a, ka puan a hawm nadingun lai ai a san uh hi." 
Psalms22:19 Ahih hangin Topa aw, gamla om kei in. Keimah a hong huhpa aw, a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms22:20 Namsau panin keimah hong hon inla, uite’ kiang panin ka nuntakna hong hon in." 
Psalms22:21 Humpinelkai kam panin keimah hong hon inla, gamsialte’ ki panin a cimawh keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms22:22 Ka u ka naute tungah nangma min ka gen ding a, mihon kikhopna laizangah nangmah kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms22:23 Topa a zahtak mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Jakob’ suan mi khempeuh aw, amah minthangsak un. Israel mi khempeuh aw, amah lamdang sa un." 
Psalms22:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a thuak mi’ gimna simmawh bawl lo a, zong kihbawl lo hi. Ama kiang pan a mai seello a, ama tungah a koh ciangin, amah in a za hi." 
Psalms22:25 Mihonpite lakah nang ka hong phatna ding na piangsak a, nang a hong zahtakte’ mai-ah ka thuciamna kong pia ding hi." 
Psalms22:26 Gimna a thuakte in kham takin ne ding uh a, amah a zongte in Topa phat ding uh hi. A lungsim uh nuam tawntung ta hen!" 
Psalms22:27 Leitung mi khempeuh in phawkin Topa’ lamah kihei ding uh a, minam khempeuh in ama mai-ah bia ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh ukna pen Topa a’ hi a, minamte tungah amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms22:29 Hi hi, a kiphasak mi khempeuh ama mai-ah kunsuk ding uh a, a sithei mihing khempeuh ama mai-ah kun ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:30 A hong khangkik mite in ama na sem ding uh hi. Mite in a hong piang lai ding mite tungah Topa’ thu gen ding uh a," 
Psalms22:31 a suak nai lo mite tungah ama sepsa, hotkhiatna thu gen ding uh hi." 
Psalms23:1 Topa pen tuucin bangin hong cing hi a, kisapna teng kicing ta hi." 
Psalms23:2 Lo nona-ah hong lumsak a, tuidam kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Psalms23:3 Thahatna thak kei hong guan hi. A hong ciamsa mah bangin-ah lampi manah kei hong kha hi. 
Psalms23:4 Topa aw, kei hong ompih na hih manin khuamial thukpi ka nawk hangin ka lau kei hi. Na molhtum le na ciangkhut in kei hong hu hi." 
Psalms23:5 Keima galte’ muhna munah an nong lui hi. Thupi takin nong pahtawi a, keima hai zong dimlet ta hi." 
Psalms23:6 Na hoihna le nong itna in ka khantawnin a hong zuih ding tel takin-ah ka thei ta a, a tawntungin na inn sungah ka om ding hi." 
Psalms24:1 Leitung le a tunga omte, leitung le a tunga tengte Topa -a’ ahi hi." 
Psalms24:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tuipite sungah a bul phut a, tui tungah a kipsak hi." 
Psalms24:3 Topa’ mual tungah kuate kahto ding ahi hiam? Ama mun siangtho-ah kuate ding ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms24:4 Gamtat siangtho le lungsim siangtho a nei, a man lo thu-ah a nuntakna pia loin, khemna tawh a kiciam lo mite ahi hi." 
Psalms24:5 Tua bang mite in Topa’ tung panin thupha ngah ding uh a, amaute a honkhia Pasian’ kiang panin diksakna ngah ding uh hi." 
Psalms24:6 Tua bang mite pen, amah a zong, Jakob’ Pasian’ mai a zong minam ahi hi." 
Psalms24:7 Minthang Kumpipa hong tumtheih nadingin, kulh kongpite lian hon unla, tanglai kongkhakte gol hon un."

Psalms25:1 Topa aw, nangma tungah thu ka hong ngen hi." 
Psalms25:2 Ka Pasian aw, nangmah ka hong muang hi. Hong zahhuaisak kei in. Keima tungah ka galte gualzo-in lungdamsak kei in." 
Psalms25:3 Nangmah a hong ngakte kuamah zahhuaisak kei in. Thukhual loin a zuau theite zahhuaisak in. 
Psalms25:4 Topa aw, na zia na tong a thei-in hong bawl inla, na lampite hong hilh in." 
Psalms25:5 Na thuman sungah kei hong paipih inla, lam hong hilh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong hon Pasian na hi a, nang kong muang tawntung hi." 
Psalms25:6 Topa aw, tanglai pek a kipan a omsa ahih manin, na hehpihna le na itna kip hong phawkkik in." 
Psalms25:7 Topa aw, ka khangno lai-a ka mawhna le ka khialhnate ciamteh kei inla, na hoihna na ngaihsutna le na itna kip tawh kizui-in kei hong phawk in!" 
Psalms25:8 Topa hoihin thutang hi. Tua ahih manin mimawhte lam a hilh hi. 
Psalms25:9 Amah in lungsim kiniamkhiatte a manah paipihin a zia a tong a hilh hi. 
Psalms25:10 Ama thuciamna le a thupiak a zuite a dingin Topa’ lampi pen itna kip le cihtakna ahi hi. 
Psalms25:11 Topa aw, ka mawhna lian ahih manin, nangma min phat nadingin keima mawhna hong maisak in." 
Psalms25:12 Topa a zahtak mi kua ahi hiam? Ama lampi zuih ding Pasian’ hilhna a ngah mi ahi hi. 
Psalms25:13 Amah nuamsa tawntung ding a, a tate in leitang nei ding uh hi." 
Psalms25:14 Topa tawh kilawmtatna pen amah a zahtakte a’ ding hi a, a thuciamna amau tungah kitheithangsak hi." 
Psalms25:15 Topa’ lam ka en tawntung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ngenthang panin ka khete hong sutkhia ding hi. 
Psalms25:16 Kei lamah nang hong kihei-in, kei hong hehpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh kei guakbek hi-in gimna ka thuak hi." 
Psalms25:17 Ka lungsim natnate khempeuh hong damsak inla, ka gimnate khempeuh panin hong paikhiatpih in." 
Psalms25:18 Ka gimna le ka thuaknate hong ngaihsun inla, ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak in." 
Psalms25:19 Ka galte bangzah takin a tamna le kei hong muhdah luatnate hong ngaihsun in. 
Psalms25:20 Kei hong cing inla, hong honkhia in. Nangmah hong bel ka hih manin kei hong maizumsak kei in." 
Psalms25:21 Nang hong muang ka hih manin, kicinna le thutanna in kei hong kem tahen." 
Psalms25:22 Pasian aw, amau’ haksatna khempeuh panin na mi Israel-te honkhia ta in." 
Psalms26:1 Topa aw, a hoihin gamta-in Topa hong muang ka hih manin, ka thutanna hong lak in." 
Psalms26:2 Topa aw, hong ze-et inla hong sin in. Ka lungsim le ka ngaihsutna hong entel in." 
Psalms26:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in lam hong lak a, nangma tungah citakin ka gamta hi." 
Psalms26:4 Mikhialte tawh tukhawm loin, thusim neite tawh ka kipawl kei hi." 
Psalms26:5 Siatna a bawl mite ka mudah a, migilote tawh ka tukhawm kei hi." 
Psalms26:6 Topa aw, mawh baan lohna ka lahna-in ka khutte ka sil a, biakna pia-in na biakna tau kiim ah ka pai hi." 
Psalms26:7 Lungdam kohna la a gingin sa-in, nangma nasep a lamdangte ka gen kawm hi." 
Psalms26:8 Topa aw, nangma inn-a ten ding le na minthang a omna munah om ding ka ut hi." 
Psalms26:9 Mimawhte, mi that nuamte, siatna a bawl mite, le golhguk a la nuamte tawh kei hong susia khawm kei in." 
Psalms26:10  
Psalms26:11 Ahih hangin kei ahihleh, ka hoih gamtat hi. Hong hehpih inla, kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms26:12 Leizang munah ka ding hi. Mihon tampi lakah Topa ka phat ding hi. 
Psalms27:1 Topa, ka khuavak le hong honpa ahi hi. Kua kihta ding ka hi hiam? Topa, kei a dingin munmuanhuai ahi hi. Bang laupih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms27:2 Hong langpangte le ka galte ahi, siatna bawlte in hong do a, kei nektum hong sawm ciangun, amaute kisukha-in puk ding uh hi." 
Psalms27:3 Mi honkhat in keimah hong langpangin phual a sat uh hangin, ka lungsim lau lo ding hi. Keimah hong langpangin gal hong kuan hangin tua nangawnah ka lungmuang ding hi." 
Psalms27:4 Topa’ tung panin na khat ka ngen khin a, tua ngenin ka zon ding pen: Topa’ inn sungah ka khan tawntungin om ding, Topa’ hoihna et ding le ama biakinn sungah thu dot dingte ahi hi." 
Psalms27:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh haksat hun ciangin amah in a buk sungah kei hong seel ding hi. A puanbuk khuhna nuai-ah kei hong seel ding a, a sangna suang tungah kei hong koih ding hi." 
Psalms27:6 Tu-in ka kimkotah a om ka galte tungah ka gualzo ding hi. Lungdamin kikona tawh ama buk sungah biakna ka pia ding a, la ka sa ding hi. Topa tungah la ngaih ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms27:7 Topa aw, ka otna aw hong za inla, kei hong hehpihin hong dawng in!" 
Psalms27:8 “Ka mai hong zong in,” na hong ci khinzo hi. Keimah in nangma tungah, “ Topa aw, nangma mai kong zong hi,” ka hong ci hi." 
Psalms27:9 Kei kiang panin na maitang seel kei in. Hehpihna tawh na nasempa hong hawlkhia kei in; kei hong nei pa na hi hi. Hong paaikhia kei inla, hong nusia kei in, kei hong honkhia Pasian aw." 
Psalms27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nu le ka pa in hong nusiat hangin Topa in kei hong kem ding hi. 
Psalms27:11 Topa aw, na lampi hong hilh inla, ka galte’ hangin lam phei-ah kei hong kha in." 
Psalms27:12 Ka langte’ deihna bangin kei hong nusia kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh teci man lote ka langah pang khin a, amaute in zuau genin kei hong tawng niloh uh hi." 
Psalms27:13 A hingte’ gam sungah Topa’ hoihna a mu dingin kei ka ki-um hi. 
Psalms27:14 Topa muang in. Thakhauh inla, na lungsim hangsakin, Topa muang in." 
Psalms28:1 Topa aw, awngin nang kong sam hi. Ka belh suangpi aw, keima thu-ah hong bilngong kei in. Tua bangin kei tungah hong dai dide lecin, Leihawm sunga a paisukte tawh a kibang ka suak ding hi." 
Psalms28:2 Siangtho pen mun lamah ka khutte hong laamto a, nangma kiangah huhna kong nget mah bangin kong thumna aw hong za in." 
Psalms28:3 Amau’ lungsim sungah siatna a om hinapi a vengte tawh kilemna thu a gen khem, siatna bawlte, migilote tawh kei hong lakhiakhawm kei in." 
Psalms28:4 Amau’ sepna le a gamtat siatnate uh bangin amaute thukkik in. Amau’ sepna tawh a kizui-in amaute tungah thuk inla, amau’ ngah ding a kilawm thaman pia in." 
Psalms28:5 Amaute in Topa’ nasepnate thupi ngaihsut lo ahih manun, amah in amaute susia-in a donkik nawnkei ding hi." 
Psalms28:6 Ka thumna aw hong za ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms28:7 Topa, ka hatna le ka lum hi a, amah ka muang hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong kihuh a, lungdamin ka diang a, ka lasakna tawh ama tungah lungdamna ka ko hi." 
Psalms28:8 Topa, ama mite’ hatna hi a, amah pen a sathau nilh pa’ bukna le a honkhia pa ahi hi." 
Psalms28:9 Na mite hon inla, na luahte thupha pia in. Amau a cing pa hi inla, a tawntungin amaute huh in." 
Psalms29:1 Topa -a’ ci un, van mite aw; minthanna le hatna Topa -a’ ci un." 
Psalms29:2 Ama minthanna Topa’ tungah pia unla, a siangtho kizepna tawh Topa bia un." 
Psalms29:3 Topa’ awging tuipite tungah kiza hi. A minthang Pasian’ aw ging damdam a, tui tampite tungah Topa’ aw kiza hi." 
Psalms29:4 Topa’ awging vanglian a, Topa’ awging, liatna tawh kidim hi." 
Psalms29:5 Topa’ awging in taamtak singte kitansak a, Topa’ awging in Lebanon mual taamtak singte a kuaitan hi." 
Psalms29:6 Lebanon mual le Sirion mualte bawngno le gamsialno bangin amah in a diangsak hi. 
Psalms29:7 Topa’ awging in meikuang taangkhia sak hi. 
Psalms29:8 Topa’ awging in gamlak lok a, Topa in Kadesh gamlak lok hi." 
Psalms29:9 Topa’ awging in singkungte heekgawp a, gammang tulak hawkkhia-in a kolhsak hi. Ama biakinn sungah a vekpi-un awngin, “Pasian’ min thang ta hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Psalms29:10 Topa in tui thukpite uk a, a tawntung kumpi hihna tawh Topa a tu hi." 
Psalms29:11 Topa in ama mite tungah thahatna pia tahen. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna thupha pia tahen. 
Psalms30:1 Topa aw, nangmah hong phatin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei nong laamto khin a, ka tungah ka galte na lungdamsak kei hi." 
Psalms30:2 Topa ka Pasian aw, huhna a hong ngenin nang tungah kong awng a, kei na hong damsak khin hi." 
Psalms30:3 Topa aw, Leinuai panin kei nong paikhiatpihto khin a, Leihawm sungah a pai khinsate lak panin kei nong nungta kiksak hi." 
Psalms30:4 Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa tungah phatna la sa-in ama tungah lungdamna ko un." 
Psalms30:5 Ama hehna tomno sung bek hi a, ama hong deihsakna pen khang tawntung ading ahi hi. Zan hun sungteng kahna omkha mah ding a, ahih hangin zing khuavak tawh nuamna hong tung hi." 
Psalms30:6 Keimah in ahihleh, ka daupai laitakin, “Ka kiling ngei kei ding hi,” ka ci kha hi." 
Psalms30:7 Topa aw, nong deihsakna tawh mual kip bangin kei nong phut khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in na maitang na seel a, kei ka khasia hi." 
Psalms30:8 Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko a, Topa tungah kong thum hi:" 
Psalms30:9 “Leihawm sungah paisukin ka sihna-ah bang meetna om ahi hiam? Leivui in nang hong phat ding ahi hiam? Na thumanna gen ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms30:10 Topa aw, hong za inla, kei hong hehpih in. Topa aw, keimah huhpa hong hi in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms30:11 Topa ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah lungdamna ka hong koh tawntung theih nading, ka lungsim in nang hong phat theih nading, a dai om mawk loh nadingin ka thumna le ka taunate lamna tawh nong heisak a, dahna lim ahi ka puanhampi hong suahkhiat sakin nuamna na hong guan hi." 
Psalms30:12  
Psalms31:1 Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Hong maizumsak ngei kei inla, na thumanna tawh kei hong honkhia in!" 
Psalms31:2 Na bil hong ngat inla, hong hon pak in! Ka belh ding suangpi hong hi inla, kei hong dal ding munkip muanhuai hong hi in!" 
Psalms31:3 Nang pen ka suangpi le ka munkip muanhuai na hi hi. Nangma min ngaihsutna tawh kei hong kha-in lam hong lak inla," 
Psalms31:4 keima belh pa na hih manin hong kisiahna ngenthang panin kei hong lakhia in. 
Psalms31:5 Nangma khut sungah keimah kong ki-ap hi. Topa, a thuman Pasian aw, keimah na hong hon ding hi." 
Psalms31:6 Mawkna milim a thupi ngaihsutte na mudah hi; ahih hangin keimah in Topa ka hong muang hi. 
Psalms31:7 Na itna kip hangin lungdamin ka kipak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thuakna mu khinin, ka kamsiatna-ah na hong don khin hi." 
Psalms31:8 Galte’ khut sungah kei na hong pia kei a, mun tanzau-ah ka khe na dingsak hi." 
Psalms31:9 Topa aw, genthei ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Dahna hangin ka mit thuk a, ka lungsim le ka pumpi zong gim mahmah ta hi." 
Psalms31:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna dahna vive hi a, ka hunte khuisatna vive ahi hi. Ka gentheihna hangin ka tha kiamgawp ta a, ka guhte zong ngaam ta hi." 
Psalms31:11 Ka vengte khempeuh’ nuihsat ka suak a, ka vengte tungah a cikzethuai ka hi a, ka meltheih khempeuhte’ gimneih mi ka suak hi. Konglakah hong mute in kei hong peelin hong taisan uh hi." 
Psalms31:12 Misi bangin kei hong kiphawk nawn lo a, beel kitam khat tawh ka kibang lel ta hi." 
Psalms31:13 Ka galte’ kihuauna ka za a, ka kiim ka pamah launa om hi. Kei hong langpangin amaute in vai hawmkhawm a, thah dingin kei hong sawm uh hi." 
Psalms31:14 Ahih hangin nang kong muang hi, Topa aw. Keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms31:15 Keima nuntakna nangma khut sungah om hi. Keima galte le kei a hong bawlsiate’ khutsung panin kei hong honkhia in! 
Psalms31:16 Na nasempa tungah na mai hong taangsak inla, na itna kip tawh kei hong hon in!" 
Psalms31:17 Topa aw, nangma tung panin huhna hong ngen ka hih manin kei hong maizumsak kei in. Migilote maizumsak inla, amaute a pau ding thei loin Leinuai-ah paisak in." 
Psalms31:18 Thumante’ langah pang a, kihihsak pau-in, kiphatsakna le simmawhna tawh pau-in zuauthu a gen mite a pau thei loin omsak in." 
Psalms31:19 Nang hong zahtakte a dingin na koihsa na hoihte, nang hong beelte a dingin mite’ muhna-ah na bawl, nangma hoihna kicing a, mi khempeuh in thei uh hi." 
Psalms31:20 Mite’ sawmsimna panin na omna huam sungah amaute na seel a, kitotna mun panin na buk sungah a muanhuai-in amaute na kem hi." 
Psalms31:21 Gal in khuapi a umcih bangin kei hong ki-umcih hun lai-in a itna kip a lamdangin kei tungah hong lak ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms31:22 Lauthawngna tawh, “Nangma muhna panin a gamlapi-ah kei hong notkhia hi,” ka ci khin hi. Ahih hangin nang tungah huhna ka hong nget ciangin keima hong thumnate nangmah in na hong za hi." 
Psalms31:23 Ama mi siangtho khempeuh aw, Topa phat un! Pasian in thuman mite kem a, ahih hangin a kiphatsak gamtatte nakpitakin a thuk hi." 
Psalms31:24 Topa a ngak mi khempeuh aw, na tha uh khauhsak unla, na lungsim uh hangsak ta un!" 
Psalms32:1 Ama khialhna kimaisak a, ama mawhna a kiselcipsak mi, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms32:2 Topa in mawhna a khuksak loh mi, a lungsim sungah khemna a om lo mi, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms32:3 Ka mawhna ka pulak loh ciangin, sunthapai ka tautauna hangin ka pumpi a thaneem hi." 
Psalms32:4 Sun le zan tawntung gim nong piakna ka thuak a, khuakhal nisa’ kat bangin ka thahatna a keucip hi." 
Psalms32:5 Keima khialhnate nangma tungah kong pulak a, ka mawhna ka im kei hi. “Ka khialhnate khempeuh Topa’ tungah ka pulak ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka mawhna nin nong maisak hi." 
Psalms32:6 Tua ahih ciangin nang hong kimuh theih lai-in mihoih khempeuh, nang tungah thu kingensak in. Tua hileh tuikhang in amaute ban lo ding hi." 
Psalms32:7 Nang pen kei a dingin ka bukna mun na hi a, haksatna pan kei hong kemin hotkhiatna kicing nong pia hi." 
Psalms32:8 Na pai nading lampi lakin ka hong hilh ding a, ka mit tawh hong enin thu kong hilh ding hi." 
Psalms32:9 A kamkaih tawh uk lohin a phamawh, thutheihna a nei lo, sakol le la bang kei in." 
Psalms32:10 Migilote in gimna tampi thuak uh a, Topa a muangte ahihleh itna kip in a hu hi." 
Psalms32:11 Thumante aw, Topa tungah lungdamin kipak un. Lungsim man mi khempeuh aw, lungdamin awng un!" 
Psalms33:1 No thuman mite aw, Topa tungah lungdam un! Pahtawina pen thutangte tawh kilawm kituak hi." 
Psalms33:2 Laia khausai lasakna tawh Topa phat unla, harp zang sawm khausai lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms33:3 Ama tungah la thak sa unla, a gingpha mahmahin hoihtakin khausai tum un." 
Psalms33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa thutang a, ama hihna khempeuh thuman tawh a sem hi." 
Psalms33:5 Amah in thuman le thutang deih a, leitungah Topa’ itna kip a kidim hi." 
Psalms33:6 Topa’ kampauna tawh vantung piang a, a kam pana husanna tawh vantung nate a piang hi." 
Psalms33:7 Amah in tuipi tuite thawl khat sunga thun bangin mun khatah gawm a, tuithukpite tuibeem-ah a koih hi." 
Psalms33:8 Leitung khempeuh in Topa zahtak uh hen la, leitung a tengte khempeuh, amah lamdangsakna tawh ding ta uh hen!" 
Psalms33:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pau a, leitung hong piang hi; amah in thu pia a, na khempeuh hong om hi." 
Psalms33:10 Topa in minamte’ thungaihsutna a mawkna suahin, mite’ geelna a khaktan hi." 
Psalms33:11 Topa’ thungaihsutna kip ngitnget a, ama lungsim ngaihsutna khang tawntungin a kip hi." 
Psalms33:12 Topa, Pasian-a a nei minam, ama luah dingin teelna a ngah minamte thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms33:13 Topa in vantung panin hong ensuk a, mihing khempeuh a mu hi." 
Psalms33:14 A tutna mun panin amah hong dakkhia-in, leitung mite a en hi." 
Psalms33:15 Amau’ lungsim a bawlpa in amaute’ gamtatnate en gige hi. 
Psalms33:16 Kumpi khat a galkap tampite in suaktasak zo lo a, galkap hang pa ama hatna tawh kihonkhia zo lo hi." 
Psalms33:17 Sakol galkapte pen gualzawh nadingin a mawkna lametna hi a, amau’ hatna tawh hon zo lo hi." 
Psalms33:18 Amah a zahtakte, a itna kip lametna a neite, sihna panin honkhia-in, kialpi hun sungin amaute a hinkep theih nadingin Topa in amaute en tawntung hi." 
Psalms33:19  
Psalms33:20 Topa i ngak hi; amah pen eite hong huhpa le i lum ahi hi. 
Psalms33:21 Ama min siangtho eite in muang ihih manin ama sungah i lungdam hi. 
Psalms33:22 Topa aw, nang kong lamet uh mah bangin kote’ tungah na itna kip hong omsak in." 
Psalms34:1 Topa ka phat tawntung ding a, amah phatna ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms34:2 Topa ka phat ding hi. Gimna thuakte zasak unla, lungdam uh hen." 
Psalms34:3 Kei tawh Topa nak phat un, ama min pahtawi khawm ni!" 
Psalms34:4 Keimah in Topa ka zong a, amah in kei hong dawngin, ka launa khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms34:5 Amah en unla, maitai un; tua hileh na mai uh zum ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms34:6 Hih mi hehpihhuai pa kiko-in, Topa in amah za a, ama haksatna khempeuh panin amah a honkhia hi." 
Psalms34:7 Amah a zahtakte’ kiimah Topa’ vantungmi in giahphual sat a, amaute a honkhia hi." 
Psalms34:8 Topa tawh kikhawl phot unla, ama hoihna thei un! Amah a beel mite mi lungdam ahi uh hi." 
Psalms34:9 Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa zahtak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a zahtak mite in kitangsapna nei lo hi." 
Psalms34:10 Humpinelkai khanglaite in kisapna le gilkialna thuak a, ahih hangin Topa a zongte in na hoih a kisap uh om lo hi." 
Psalms34:11 Tate aw, hong pai unla hong ngai un; Topa zahtakna thu ka hong hilh ding hi." 
Psalms34:12 Nopna a neih theih nadingin nuntakna le khansau a deih kua ahi hiam? 
Psalms34:13 Siatna ding panin na leii kem inla, zuau genna panin na muk kem in." 
Psalms34:14 Siatna panin kihemkhia inla, a hoih bawl in. Kilemna ding hanciam inla, na phak mateng delh in." 
Psalms34:15 Topa’ mit in thuman mite’ lam en a, amau’ kikona lamah a bil a ngat hi." 
Psalms34:16 Siatna a bawl mite hih leitung panin a kiphawkna a kisuktat nadingin Topa in amaute a langpang hi. 
Psalms34:17 Huhna a ngen dingin thumante a kiko ciangin Topa in za a, a haksatna khempeuh panun amaute a honkhia hi." 
Psalms34:18 Lungsim kitamzante kiangah Topa hong om a, lungsim zangawpte a hon hi." 
Psalms34:19 Thuman mi’ thuakna a tam mahmah hangin tuate khempeuh panin Topa in amah a hon hi. 
Psalms34:20 Amah in thuman mipa kem a, a guh khat zong kitan lo hi." 
Psalms34:21 Siatna in migilote that ding a, thuman a mudah mite gim kipia ding hi." 
Psalms34:22 Topa in ama nasemte honkhia a, amah a bel mi khat beek gim kipia lo ding hi." 
Psalms35:1 Topa aw, kei hong langpangte langpang inla, kei hong dote do in." 
Psalms35:2 Lum lian le lum neu la inla, keimah hong huh in!" 
Psalms35:3 Teipi le teitangzang dok inla, kei hong delhte’ lam ngat in! Keima tungah, “Nang a hong honpa ka hi,” hong ci in." 
Psalms35:4 Kei hong sawmte mai zumin mindaisak ta in! Keima siatna ding a bawlte nungkik sakin sisak in! 
Psalms35:5 Topa’ vantungmi’ hawlna tawh huih letkhiat ansite tawh amaute kibangsak in. 
Psalms35:6 Topa’ vantungmi’ delhna-ah a taina lampi uh mialin nalsak in. 
Psalms35:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thu om lopi-in a ngenthang uh tawh kei hong siah uh a, thu om lopi-in gum to-in kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms35:8 A phawk loh kalun amaute’ tungah siatna tungsak in! Amau’ ngenthang mahah amaute mah awksak inla, a kisiamang khin dingin amaute puksak in." 
Psalms35:9 Tua ciangin Topa tungah ka lungdam mahmah ding a, ama hotkhiatna-ah nuamin ka diang ding hi." 
Psalms35:10 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh, “ Topa aw, ama a dingin a hatluate kiang panin a thahat lo mi a honkhia, a bawlsiate’ kiang panin mizawngte a honkhia, nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam?” ka ci ding hi." 
Psalms35:11 Mi a el tecite hong kipan uh a, ka theih loh thute kei hong dong uh hi." 
Psalms35:12 Amaute in ka hoihnate siatna tawh hong thuk uh a, ka khawngai mahmah hi." 
Psalms35:13 Ahih hangin kei ahihleh, amaute a cinat uh ciangin, puanhampi silhin an tangin kei ka kigimtawm sak hi." 
Psalms35:14 Ka lawm, ka sanggampa hangin a dah bangin ka dah hi. A nu’ hanga a kap mi bangin kapin ka vak kawikawi a, kunin ka kidikdik hi." 
Psalms35:15 Ahih hangin kei ka tukna-ah amaute nuamin kikhawm uh a, kei simmawh dingin kikaikhawm uh hi. Ka theih ngei hetloh khebaite nangawn in tawlnga hetloin kei hong gensia niloh uh hi." 
Psalms35:16 Zahtakna mel nei hetloin kei hong zahko niloh uh a, a ha uh hong gawisan uh hi." 
Psalms35:17 Topa aw, bang tanvei hong enkhong ding na hi hiam? Amau’ hong sukgawpna panin keimah hong honkhia inla, humpinelkaite kiang panin kei hong hon in." 
Psalms35:18 Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna lian sungah nangma tungah lungdamna ka hong ko ding a, mihonpite lak panin nang ka hong phat ding hi." 
Psalms35:19 A man lopi a ka gal a hite kei tungah lungdamsak kei inla, thu om lopi a kei hong mudahte, mitheek kipiasak kei in." 
Psalms35:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kilemna thu gen lo uh a, daitakin a om mite langpangin, khemna thu ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms35:21 Amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh a, amaute in, “Ha, Ha! Mu khin hang ei!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms35:22 Topa aw, na mu khin hi; dai ommawk ke’n! Topa aw, kei kiang panin gamla om ke’n!" 
Psalms35:23 Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, ka thu hong thei inla, kei a dingin nangmah hong kisosuah tawm in!" 
Psalms35:24 Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, na thumanna tawh a kituakin keima thutanna hong langsak inla, keima gimna-ah amaute lungdamsak ke’n!" 
Psalms35:25 Amau le amau tungah, “Ha, i tuptup tung ei!” kicisak kei in. “Amah nawmvalhtum khin hang,” amaute cisak kei in." 
Psalms35:26 Kei’ kamsiatna-ah a lungdamte maizumsak inla, zahhuaigawp sak in! Kei tungah a hong kiliansakte maizumna le mindaina thuaksak in!" 
Psalms35:27 Kei thutang ka hihna lahkhiat ding a deihte lungdamin awngin, kipaaksak inla, “A nasempa’ hoihna-ah a lungkim Topa lian hi,” cici sak in." 
Psalms35:28 Tua ciangin na thumanna le nangmah phatna sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms36:1 Mawhna in migilo pa’ lungsim tawngah thu gen a, amah in Pasian zahtakna nei het lo hi." 
Psalms36:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna kidawkkhia lo a, muhdahna thuak lo ahih manin amah kimawkphat tawm hi." 
Psalms36:3 Ama kammalte pen siatna le khemna vive hi a, pil gamtatna le hoih gamtatna bei khinta hi." 
Psalms36:4 A lupna tungah lumin siat gamtat ding a ngaihsun hi. Hoih lohna lamah amah kibulhtawm a, amah in siatna nolh lo hi." 
Psalms36:5 Topa aw, na itna kip in vantung ban a, na cihtakna in vanpi dong banto hi." 
Psalms36:6 Na thumanna pen Pasian’ mualte tawh kibang a, na thukhennate pen tuipi thuk tawh kibang hi. Mihing le ganhing na hon hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms36:7 Pasian aw, na itna kip manpha mahmah hi. Mihing tate na kha liimah bu uh hi." 
Psalms36:8 Na inn sunga na tampite tawh amaute nuamsa uh a, na hoihna gun panin amaute na dawnsak hi." 
Psalms36:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna tuinak nangmah tawh om a, na khuavak sungah kote in khuavak ka mu uh hi." 
Psalms36:10 Nang hong theite tungah na itna kip hong zom inla, lungsim thutangte tungah na hotkhiatna hong zom in!" 
Psalms36:11 A kihisak mite kei hong sukhasak kei inla, migilote, hong hawlkhiasak kei in." 
Psalms36:12 Hua lai-ah siatna bawlte a cimawhin kun uh a, amaute kisuncip sukin, thozo nawn lo uh hi." 
Psalms37:1 Migilote’ hangin kilungsosak kei inla, a man loin a gamta mite en’ dingin ngaihsun kei in." 
Psalms37:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh lopa bangin amaute vulpak ding uh a, lokung hingte bangin keutum ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:3 Topa muang inla, gamtat hoih in. Gam nuamah teng inla, thumanin om in." 
Psalms37:4 Topa sungah lungkim in; amah in na deihna hong pia ding hi. 
Psalms37:5 Topa tungah na vai teng ap in. Amah muang in; amah in hong sem ding hi. 
Psalms37:6 Amah in nangma dikna khuavak bangin, nangma thumanna nitaang bangin hong langsak ding hi." 
Psalms37:7 Topa’ mai-ah khawl dide inla, lungduai takin ngak in. A hihna a daupai pa tung le siatna a bawlpa tungah kilungso tawmsak ke’n!" 
Psalms37:8 Hehna panin kikham inla, sinsona nusia in. Nangmah kilungso tawmsak ke’n; tua in siatna bekah a hong paipih hi." 
Psalms37:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kipuaseh ding a, ahih hangin Topa a ngakte in leitung luah ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:10 Ahih hangin tawlkhat sungin migilo pa om nawn lo ding a, ama omna mun na lim zon mahmah hangin tua lai-ah amah na om lo ding hi." 
Psalms37:11 Ahih hangin lungnemte in leitung luahin, genzawh lohin amaute nuamsa ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:12 Migilo in thuman pa sawm a, a ha a gawisan hi." 
Psalms37:13 Ahih hangin Topa in migilo pa’ hun a tungta ahihlam mu ahih manin amah a nuihsan lel hi. 
Psalms37:14 Mizawngte le mi cimawhte a suniam ding, a thutangte a that dingin migilote in namsau dokin, a thal uh a keek hi." 
Psalms37:15 A namsau uh amau’ lungtang mahah tumin, a thalte uh kitan ding hi." 
Psalms37:16 Migilote’ hauhna sangin thuman mite in tawmno khat bek a neihna hoihzaw lai hi. 
Psalms37:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote’ thahatna kipaih khiatsak ding a, ahih hangin Topa in mihoihte a huh hi." 
Psalms37:18 Topa in a paubaang lote kem a, amau’ gamh kipden ding hi." 
Psalms37:19 Siatna hun ciangin amaute kimaizumsak lo a, kial hun ciangin tampi nei uh hi." 
Psalms37:20 Ahih hangin migilote kisia hi. Topa’ galte pen lono etlawm tawh kibang a, amaute mangthang pak uh hi. Meikhu bangin mangthang uh hi." 
Psalms37:21 Migilo in leitawi la a, lohkikzo nawn lo hi. Thuman mi ahihleh cingh-in mi a pia hi." 
Psalms37:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ thupha piakte in leitung luah ding uh a, ahih hangin a samsiatte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:23 Topa in mi a lam pai nading lak a, ama lungkim bangin a gamta pa amah in a kipsak hi." 
Psalms37:24 Amah a puk hangin lutuk lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama khut len hi. 
Psalms37:25 Thuman mi a kinusiacip, a suanlekhakte ngen tawmin a kivak, ka neu lai a kipanin tu-a ka teek hun ciang dong ka mu ngei nai kei hi." 
Psalms37:26 Amah in mi citpiak ngitngetin, mi tungah leitawi piakhia a, a suanlekhakte zong thupha ngah mi a suak hi." 
Psalms37:27 Siatna panin kikem inla, gamtat hoih in; tua hileh na khantawnin, na kip paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms37:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thutang deih a, ama mi siangthote nusia lo ding hi. Thuman mite kikemcing den ding a, ahi zongin migilo’ suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:29 Thuman mi in leitung luah ding a, tua leitang tungah teng paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms37:30 Thuman mi’ kam in pilna gen a, a leii in thutang gen hi." 
Psalms37:31 A lungsim sungah ama Pasian’ thukham om a, a gamtatna khempeuhah lampial het lo hi." 
Psalms37:32 Migilo in thuman mi encik a, thah dingin a zong hi." 
Psalms37:33 Topa in migilo pa’ khut sungah amah nusia lo ding a, thusit dingin a kipaipih ciangin mawhna thuaksak lo ding hi." 
Psalms37:34 Topa ngak inla, ama lampi zui in. Leitang a luah dingin nang hong liansak ding a, migilote’ siatna nangmah in na en ding hi." 
Psalms37:35 Lebanon taamtak sing bangin a sang pha mahmah migilo kiphasak khat keimah in ka mu hi. 
Psalms37:36 Ama kiangah ka paikik a, amah na om nawn lo hi. Amah ka zonzon hangin kimuzo nawn lo hi." 
Psalms37:37 Paubaang lo mi ciamteh inla, thutang mi en in; bang hang hiam cih leh gal a phuang lo mi a dingin nopna a om hi." 
Psalms37:38 Ahih hangin thupalsatte kisusiamang khin ding a, migilote’ suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:39 Topa in thuman mite honkhia a, amah pen haksat hun ciangin amaute’ bukna ahi hi." 
Psalms37:40 Amaute in Topa beel ahih manin amah in amaute huhin honkhia a, migilote’ kiang panin amaute honin suaktasak hi." 
Psalms38:1 Topa aw, a hehsa-in kei hong taii kei inla, lungsosa in kei hong thuhilh kei in." 
Psalms38:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thaltangte ka sungah hong tum khin a, ka tungah na khuttum hong tu khinta hi." 
Psalms38:3 Nangma hehna hangin kei ka ci na a, ka mawhna hangin ka pumtangin ka na hi." 
Psalms38:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mawhnate in ka lu dong hong tuumzo a, keima puak dingin a giklua vangik tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms38:5 Ka haina hangin ka liamnate nai-in uih a," 
Psalms38:6 keimah hong kikunsak a, hong kibokcipsak hi. Sunthapai-in kapin ka vak kawikawi hi." 
Psalms38:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka ci sa mahmah a, nakpitakin ka ci na hi." 
Psalms38:8 Kei hong kinengcip gawpin ka thahatna beimang khin a, ka lungsim gimna hangin thumin ka tautau hi." 
Psalms38:9 Topa aw, ka deihna khempeuh na thei a, ka khuisatnate na za hi." 
Psalms38:10 Ka lungtang kisat a, ka tha in lel hi. Ka mit in zong khua mu thei nawn lo hi." 
Psalms38:11 Ka gim thuakna-ah ka lawmte le ka kithuahpihte kidang koih uh a, keima behte nangawn kei kiang pan gamla om uh hi." 
Psalms38:12 Kei a hong that nuamte in a thang uh zak a, kei’ natna ding a zongte in siatna ding thu bek gen uh a, sunthapai-in khemna bekbek ngaihsutin nei uh hi." 
Psalms38:13 Ahih hangin kei pen bilngong ka bang a, khua ka za kei hi. A kam a ka thei lo, a pau thei lo mi ka bang hi." 
Psalms38:14 Bil khua za lo, tawnna kam a za thei lo mi khat tawh kei ka kibang takpi hi." 
Psalms38:15 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah ka hong muang hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, a hong dawng ding pa nangmah na hi hi." 
Psalms38:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Ka khe a taal ciangin kei tunga hong kihisakte, keima gim thuakna-ah lungdam sak kei in,” cih bek ka hong thum hi." 
Psalms38:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh puk dingin ka kithawi a, ka gimna kam tuan lo hi." 
Psalms38:18 Ka thuman lohna ka pulak a, ka mawhna hangin ka dah hi." 
Psalms38:19 A thuman lopi-in ka gal a hite thahat a, kei a hong mudah khialte tam mahmah uh hi." 
Psalms38:20 A hoih gamta ka hih manin ka hoihna pen siatna tawh a hong thukte ka langpangte ahi hi. 
Psalms38:21 Topa aw, kei hong nusia kei in. Ka Pasian aw, ka kiang pan gamla om ke’n!" 
Psalms38:22 Topa, kei hong honpa aw, keimah a hong huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms39:1 “Ka leii tawh ka khialhloh nadingin ka gamtatna ka kikem ding a, ka omna-ah migilote a omlaiteng ka kam ka kham ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms39:2 Pau loin ka dai om a, ka dai omna a mawkna suak a, ka thuakna khang semsem hi." 
Psalms39:3 Ka sungah ka lung so a, ka lungngaih ciangin ka lung so semsem hi. Tua ciangin ka paukhia a," 
Psalms39:4 “ Topa aw, ka mong le ka hun a kisehzah hong theisak inla, ka nuntakna a beipak hun ding hong theisak in!” ka ci hi." 
Psalms39:5 Ka nuntakna hun khutme tan bang bekin na bawl a, ka nuntakna hun nangma muhna-ah bangmah gentham lo hi. Mihing khempeuh, husan’ bang bek hi takpi hi." 
Psalms39:6 Niliim bangin mihing pai kawikawi takpi hi. A mawkna-in amau lungkham takpi uh a, kua’ ngah ding cih thei lopi-in mite in na a khol uh hi." 
Psalms39:7 Tu-in Topa aw, ke’n, bang ngaklai ding ka hi hiam? Keima lametna nangma sung bekah om hi." 
Psalms39:8 Ka thupalsatna khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia inla, mite’ nuihsatin kei hong bawl kei in." 
Psalms39:9 Hih bangin a hong bawl nangmah na hih manin pau loin ka om a, ka kam ka ka kei hi." 
Psalms39:10 Nong vuakna ma ka tung panin lakhia in. Na hong vuakna hangin ka tha beita hi. 
Psalms39:11 Mi khat a mawhna hangin tai-in na sat ciangin, nget in a nektum bangin ama na manpha na beisak hi. Mihing khempeuh husan’ khat bang bek hi takpi hi." 
Psalms39:12 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong ngai inla, ka kikona hong za in. Ka khitui luanna hong thudon in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pu ka pate khempeuh bangin kei zong na zin, na peemta ka hi hi." 
Psalms39:13 Ka manthan hun matengin ka lungnop theih nadingin kei hong en in! 
Psalms40:1 Topa lamenin ka ngak ngiungeu a, amah kei lam hong nga-in ka kikona aw hong za hi." 
Psalms40:2 Dahna dum sung, buannawng panin kei hong kaikhia-in suangpi tungah ka khete nga a, ka khesikna mun a muanhuaisak hi." 
Psalms40:3 Eima Pasian phatna la thak keimah hong hilh hi. Mi tampite in hih thu mu-in amah zahtak ding uh a, amaute khempeuh in Topa muang ding uh hi." 
Psalms40:4 Topa a muang a, mi kiphasakte lamah a kihei lo, pasian man lote lamah a pialkhia lo mi thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms40:5 Topa ka Pasian aw, na sep a lamdangte le ko a dingin na ngaihsutnate tampi tak na phasak a, kuamah dang tawh tehtheih na hi kei hi. Tuate pulakin gen ding hi leng, genkhit zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms40:6 Gan gawh biakna le khawhsa tawh biakna na deih kei a, khua ka zak theih nading bil na hong guan hi. Meihal biakna le mawhmaina ding biakna zong na kulsak kei hi." 
Psalms40:7 Tua ciangin keimah in, “En in, laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh khinsa bangin ka hong pai hi." 
Psalms40:8 Nangma deih bang hihna-ah nuam ka sa hi, ka Pasian aw. Nangma thukham ka lung sungah om hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms40:9 Hotkhiatna hangin lungdam thu mihonpi lakah ka gen ding hi. Topa aw, lungdam thugen ka khawl ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms40:10 Nangma hotkhiatna thu ka im kei a, na thumanna le na hotkhiatna ka gen khin hi. Na itna kip le na thumanna mihonpi tungah ka im kei hi." 
Psalms40:11 Topa aw, na hehpihna kei kiang panin humcip kei inla, na itna kip le na thumanna kei a hong kem tawntung ding hisak ta in." 
Psalms40:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a malin simzawh loh ding siatna tampite in kei hong umcih a, khua a hong musak thei lo zah dong dingin ka mawhna thaman ka thuak khinta hi. Amaute ka sam mal sangin tamzaw uh a, ka lung in a lel ta hi." 
Psalms40:13 Topa aw, keimah hong honkhia nuam in. Topa aw, hong huh meng in." 
Psalms40:14 Kei a hong that nuamte zahhuaisak inla, maisiasak in. Keima siatna ding a deihte nungkiksak inla minsiasak in." 
Psalms40:15 Keima tungah, “Ha ha!” hong ci vialte zahhuaina tawh maikhingsak in." 
Psalms40:16 Ahih hangin nang a hong zongte khempeuh nangma hangin nuamin kipak hen la, na hotkhiat ding a deihte in, “ Topa lian hi!” ci ngitnget ta uh hen." 
Psalms40:17 Kei ahihleh zawngin ka cimawh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong mangngilh lo hi. Nang pen kei hong huhpa le hong honkhia pa na hi hi. Zekai kei in, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms41:1 Mi genthei a khualte thupha ngah ahi hi. Topa in haksatna hunah amaute honkhia ding hi. 
Psalms41:2 Topa in amaute hu-in hingsak ding a, leitungah amaute thupha ngah mi kici ding hi. Amau’ galte’ khut sungah amaute pia lo ding hi." 
Psalms41:3 A ci uh a nat ciangin Topa in amaute kem ding a, a cinatna khempeuh uh damsakkik ding hi." 
Psalms41:4 Ke’n ahihleh, “ Topa aw, kei hong hehpih inla, kei hong damsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah kong khialzo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms41:5 Ka galte in elna tawh keima thu gen uh a, “Cik ciangin amah a si tam, cik ciangin a min a mang tam,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms41:6 Keimah a en dingin mi hong pai ciangin, kam mawkna a pau uh hi. A lungsim uhah siatna kaikhawm uh a, a paikhiat uh ciangin a genthang uh hi." 
Psalms41:7 Kei hong mudah khempeuh in keima thu kihuauhuau uh a, kei a dingin a sia thei pen ding a geelgeel uh hi." 
Psalms41:8 Amaute in, “Amah nak gim mahmah hi. A lupna panin thokikzo nawn lo ding hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms41:9 Ka muan, ka lawm it pa, keima an a ne pa nangawn in a khetul tawh kei hong peek vial hi." 
Psalms41:10 Ahih hangin, Topa aw, amaute na thukkik theih nadingin kei hong hehpih inla, hong damsak in." 
Psalms41:11 Ka galte in keimah hong zo lo ding a, keima tungah nong lungkimna ka thei ding hi." 
Psalms41:12 Keima hoihna hangin na hong huh ding a, nangma omna-ah nong omsak tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms41:13 Israel Pasian, Topa in khang tawntungin thupha ngah tahen. Amen, Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 Sakhi in tuiluang sialsial a lunggulh bangin nang ka hong lunggulh hi, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms42:2 A nungta Pasian kong deih hi. Cik ciangin kei hong pai-in Pasian’ maitang hong mu thei ding ka hi hiam? 
Psalms42:3 Mite in keima tungah, “Na Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, sun le zanin ka khitui an-in ka ne hi." 
Psalms42:4 Ka lungsim sung ka suahkhia a, pawi bawl mihon khat kipakin otna le nuamna la tawh Pasian’ inn-ah ka makaihna, mihonpi tawh ka paina ka phawkkik hi." 
Psalms42:5 Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian’ sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms42:6 Ka lungsim tamkham ahih manin Jordan le Hermon gam, Mizar mualtung panin nang ka hong phawk hi." 
Psalms42:7 Nangma tuizeu gingte khatlekhat kidawng uh a, dahna tuihualte in kei a hong tuum hi." 
Psalms42:8 Topa in sun tawntungin a itna kip hong lak a, zan hun ciangin nuntakna a hong pia Pasian’ tungah thungetna la ka sa hi." 
Psalms42:9 “Bang hangin kei hong mangngilh na hi hiam? Galte in hong sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam?” ci-in ka Pasian, kei a hong huhpa’ tungah ka gen hi." 
Psalms42:10 Ka langte in kei tungah, “Na Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, ka sungah meima nai tawm bangin hong tum ngangngang hi." 
Psalms42:11 Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian’ sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms43:1 Pasian aw, ka dikna hong langsak inla, migilote tawh ka thu-ah kei hong panpih in. Mi khemte le thutang lote kiang panin kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms43:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong belh Pasian na hi hi. Bang hangin kei hong nilkhia na hi hiam? Galte’ sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam? 
Psalms43:3 Na khuavak le na thuman hong sawlkhia inla, na mual siangtho, na omna-ah kei hong paipih sakin, hong khasak in." 
Psalms43:4 Tua ciangin na biakna tau-ah ahi a, ka lung a hong damsak Pasian kiangah ahi zongin ka pai ding a, laiza khausai lasakna tawh nang ka hong phat ding hi, aw Pasian, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms43:5 Bang hangin khakunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms44:1 Pasian aw, ka pu ka pate uh a khan lai-a na hihnasate, amaute in kote tungah hong gen uh a, kote in ka bil uh tawh ka za khin uh hi." 
Psalms44:2 Nangmah in minam dangte na hawlkhia mang a, ahih hangin amau’ munah ka pu ka pate uh na tengsak hi. Midangte na sugawp a, ahih hangin amaute na suaktasak hi." 
Psalms44:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in namsau tawh leitang ngah lo uh a, amau’ khut in amaute’ tungah gualzawhna pia lo hi. Na khut taklam le na baan, na hehpihna maipha hizaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah nang na lungkim hi." 
Psalms44:4 Nang pen Jakob a dingin gualzawhna a sehkhol, keima Kumpipa le keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms44:5 Nangma huhna tawh ka galte uh ka sawnpai uh a, ko a hong do mite na min suangin ka tuancil uh hi." 
Psalms44:6 Bang hang hiam cih ka thalpi suanin ka nei kei a, ka namsau in zong kei hong hon zo lo hi."
