Psalms44:7 Ahih hangin nangmah in ka galte’ kiang panun kote na hong hon a, ko a hong mudahte na zahhuai gawpsak khin hi." 
Psalms44:8 Pasian’ hangin kote ka angtang ngitnget uh a, nangma tungah ka lungdam tawntung ding uh hi." 
Psalms44:9 Ahih hangin nangmah in kote hong nusia-in, nong minsiasak khin a, ka galkap hon uh tawh na hong kuankhawm kei hi." 
Psalms44:10 Galte kiang panin kote nong nungkiksak a, ka galte un ka neihsa teng uh buluah khin uh hi." 
Psalms44:11 Tuu gawh ding bangin kote na hong bawl a, minam dangte lakah nong thehthang khin hi." 
Psalms44:12 Na mite a man tawmno khatin na hong zuak a, a man ding na sang nget kei hi." 
Psalms44:13 Ka vengte uh’ zahko, ka kiim uha omte’ nuihsat leh thusim lohin kote na hong bawl khin hi." 
Psalms44:14 Minam dangte lakah a sia lama gentehna, mite lakah ciamnuih-a neihin kote na hong bawl khin hi." 
Psalms44:15 Keimah a hong ko mi le keimah a hong minsiasak mite’ kampauna ahi a, galte le langte in hong bawlna hang ahi zongin, sunthapai-in ka zahhuai den a, maizumna tawh ka kidim hi." 
Psalms44:16  
Psalms44:17 Na thuciamna-ah khial lo napi, nang hong mangngilh lo napi, hih thute khempeuh ko tungah hong tung khin hi." 
Psalms44:18 Ngiate’ omna-ah kote hong balnen gawpin, khuamialpi sungah nong paihdak ding zahin, ka lungsim uh kihei nai lo a, ka kalsuan uh lampial nai lo hi." 
Psalms44:19  
Psalms44:20 Ka Pasian uh mangngilh khinin pasian dang tungah ka khutte uh a khakkhin hi le ung," 
Psalms44:21 Pasian in hih thu mukhia lo ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in lungsim thusim a thei hi. 
Psalms44:22 Nangma hangin sunthapai-in kote hong kithat a, gan gote’ tuu gawh ding bangin kote hong kikoih hi." 
Psalms44:23 Topa aw, bang hangin ihmu na hi hiam? Nangmah hong tho tawm in!" 
Psalms44:24 Bang hangin na maitang seel na hi hiam? Bang hangin ka thuakna uh le hong kisukcipnate mangngilh na hi hiam? 
Psalms44:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh leilakah ka puk uh a, leivui lakah guallelin ka lum uh hi." 
Psalms44:26 Tho to in, kote a hong huh dingin hong pai in! Na itna kip hangin kote hong honkhia in!" 
Psalms45:1 Thubul hoih khat tawh ka lungsim hong dimletin, kumpipa la ka phuah a, ka leii pen laithei pa’ laikung tawh hong kibang hi." 
Psalms45:2 Mihingte lakah nangmah na hoihpen a, thugen na siam a, na kam khum zungzung hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang thupha hong pia tawntung hi." 
Psalms45:3 Vanglian kumpipa aw, na minthanna le na liatna tawh na namsau kuah in." 
Psalms45:4 Thumanna a omna ding le thuman a hu dingin na minliatna tawh gualzo-in hong pusuak inla, dipkuathuai hihnate na taklam khut nangmah kihilhsak in." 
Psalms45:5 Kumpipa’ galte’ lungtangah na thaltang hiamte lut a, mite na nuai-ah puk uh hi." 
Psalms45:6 Na kumpi tokhom siangtho kip tawntung hi. Na kumpi ciangkhut thumanna ciangkhut hi a," 
Psalms45:7 thuman deihin gitlohna na mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian ahi, nangma Pasian in na khangualte tungah a kikhai to-in lungdamna sathau nang hong nilhzo a," 
Psalms45:8 na puantualpite myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, le thalsing namtuite a nam hi. Saiha tawh kibawl innpite panin khausai lasaknate in nang hong lungdamsak a," 
Psalms45:9 kumpite’ tanute, numei uliante lakah om a, na taklamah Ofir gam khamte tawh kizemin kumpinu a ding hi." 
Psalms45:10 Tanu aw, ngai dih in; ngaihsun inla, na bil hong ngat in. Na mite le na behte mangngilh in." 
Psalms45:11 Na melhoihna hangin kumpipa in hong deih ding hi. Na topa ahih ciangin ama mai-ah kun in. 
Psalms45:12 Mi haupen ahi Taia mite in na manpha namkim letsong tawh nang hong maivil ding uh hi. 
Psalms45:13 Kumpi tanu a inndei sungah kham puantualpi tawh kizem a, mel tuamtuam a nei puantualpite silh a, mihon kigual deudaute lakah a kithuahpih nungakte le amah a khate tawh kumpipa kiangah kipaipih hi." 
Psalms45:14  
Psalms45:15 Kumpipa’ inn-ah a tun ciangun lungdamna le nuamna tawh amaute kitumpih hi. 
Psalms45:16 Na pate’ tang ding na tapate hong hi ding a, nangmah in leitung khempeuhah amaute, ulian na suaksak ding hi." 
Psalms45:17 Keimah in khang tawntungin na min ka kiphawksak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in nang hong phat den ding uh hi. 
Psalms46:1 Pasian, i belh leh i thahatna hi a, haksat hunin a hong huh pahpah pa ahi hi." 
Psalms46:2 Tua ahih ciangin, leitung kikhinin, mualte tuipi sung a kidenna zongin, a tuite ging zuazua-in phuan zuazua a, hih ginna hangin mual liante a ling zongin, i lau kei ding hi." 
Psalms46:3  
Psalms46:4 Sangpenpa’ tenna khua siangtho, Pasian’ khuapi, a lungdamsak gun khat a om hi." 
Psalms46:5 Ama laizangah Pasian om a, amah a kiling kei ding hi. Pasian in phalvak tungin amah huh ding hi." 
Psalms46:6 Minamte lungkham uh a, kumpi gamte kiling hi. Ama aw gingkhiasak a, leitung kicimgawp hi." 
Psalms46:7 Vanglian Topa eite tawh hong omkhawm a, Jakob Pasian eima belh ahi hi." 
Psalms46:8 Hong pai unla, Topa’ sepna hong mu un. Leitung khempeuh gamkhing a suahsak khitna hong en un." 
Psalms46:9 Amah in leimong dongah gal beisak hi. Amah in thalpi kuaitanin teipi susia a, leengte mei tawh a haltum hi." 
Psalms46:10 “Om hithiat unla, Pasian ka hihna thei un. Minamte lakah keimah hong kisangsak a, leitung khempeuhah ka min hong kithangsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms46:11 Vanglian Topa, eite tawh hong omkhawm a, Jakob’ Pasian, eima belh ahi hi." 
Psalms47:1 Mi khempeuh aw, na khut uh beeng un! Lungdamna la nakpi-in sa-in Pasian phat un." 
Psalms47:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a Sangpenpa, dipkuathuai a, leitung khempeuh a uk kumpi lian khat ahi hi." 
Psalms47:3 Mi khempeuh eima nuai-ah, minamte i khenuai-ah amah in hong zawhsak hi." 
Psalms47:4 Ama it Israel-te’ angtanpih eima luah ding leitang amah in hong teelsak hi. 
Psalms47:5 Awging tawh Pasian paito a, peengkul aw tawh Topa paito hi." 
Psalms47:6 Pasian tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un! I Kumpipa tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un!" 
Psalms47:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian pen leitung khempeuhte’ kumpi ahi hi. La sakna tawh amah phat un! 
Psalms47:8 Pasian in minamte uk a, a tokhom siangtho tungah Pasian tu hi." 
Psalms47:9 Uliante le Abraham’ Pasian’ mite kipawl khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mite’ lumte khempeuh Pasian-a’ suak khinta a, amah a sangpi-in kithangsak hi." 
Psalms48:1 Topa lian a, i Pasian’ khuapi sungah nakpitakin phat ding ahi hi." 
Psalms48:2 Kumpi lianpa’ khuapi, leilu lama a om ama mual siangtho hoihin a sang mahmah Zion mual pen leitung khempeuh’ lungdamna ahi hi." 
Psalms48:3 A muanhuai tua mualah amah a hu taktakpa ahihna Pasian in a lakkhin hi. 
Psalms48:4 Ahi zongin, kumpite kikaikhawmin, a sim dingin hong kuankhawm uh hi." 
Psalms48:5 Amaute in Zion a muh phetun lamdangsa mahmah uh a, dipkua vatin tai uh hi." 
Psalms48:6 Numei nausuak na a sa bangin amaute linggawp uh hi. 
Psalms48:7 Nisuahna huihpi tawh Tarshish kici teembaw liante nang na susia hi. 
Psalms48:8 Ka zaksa bangun Vanglian Topa’ khuapi, i Pasian’ khuapi, Pasian in a phuhkip ngitngetna ka mu khin uh hi." 
Psalms48:9 Pasian aw, na biakinn sungah nangma itna kip ka ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms48:10 Pasian aw, na min in leimong dong a zelh bangin, nangmah hong kiphatna in zong a zel hi. Na taklam khut gualzawhna tawh a kidim hi." 
Psalms48:11 Zion Mual lungdamsak in. Na thukhenna hangin Judah mite lungdamsak in. 
Psalms48:12 Hih pen eima Pasian hi a, a tawntungin eima Pasian hi, ci-in khangkikte tungah na gen theih nadingun Zion kiimvelin pai-in, a tausang phazah sim unla, a kulh phungmai a hoih mahmahte ngaihsunin, a phualpi muanhuaite va nawk kim un. Amah pen a tawntungin lam hong lak ding pa ahi hi." 
Psalms48:13  
Psalms48:14  
Psalms49:1 Hih thu za un, mi khempeuh aw! Ngai un, leitung a a teng khempeuh," 
Psalms49:2 milian mineu, mihau mizawngte aw!" 
Psalms49:3 Ka kam in pilna thu gen ding a, ka lungsim ngaihsutna kitelsiang ding hi." 
Psalms49:4 Paunak thu theihhak khat ka ngaihsun ding a, laiza lasakna tawh a khiatna ka gentel ding hi." 
Psalms49:5 Haksat hun, hong bawlsiate’ gitlohna in hong nencip ciangin bang hangin lau ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms49:6 Mite in a hauhna uh muangin, tampi a neihna uh a kisaktheihpih hangun," 
Psalms49:7 amah le amah a kitankhia tawmzo taktak, a nuntakna man ding Pasian’ tungah a piazo mi kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms49:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nuntakna tatna ding a man tam mahmah a, Leihawmpi mu ngei lo zah ding a hing tawntung dingin kitankhiazo ngei lo hi." 
Psalms49:9  
Psalms49:10 Amah in a pilte nangawn a si mu ding a, a haite le a tei lote a kibangin sia-in, amau’ neihsa khempeuh midangte’ tungah nusiat uh hi." 
Psalms49:11 Amaute in leitangte amau’ min a puaksak uh hangin hankhuk pen khang tawntung amau’ omna hi ngitnget ding hi. 
Psalms49:12 Ama hauhna-ah mi kipsuak thei lo a, a sithei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Psalms49:13 Hih pen a kihai muante’ ngah hi a, amau’ ngahsa tawh a lungkimte’ thumong ahi hi." 
Psalms49:14 Tua bangin amaute Leinuai-a dingin kiseh hi. Sihna pen amau a cing pa hi ding hi. Hankhuk sungah amaute tuaksuksuak ding uh a, a mel uh sia ding a, Leinuai, amau’ inn hi ding hi." 
Psalms49:15 Ahih hangin Pasian in Leinuai’ vangliatna panin kei hong honkhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong sang ding hi. 
Psalms49:16 Mi khatpeuh a hauh ciang ahi a, a innkuan minthanna a khan ciang ahi zongin lau-in lunghihmawh dingin ngaihsun tuan kei in." 
Psalms49:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sih ciangin bangmah keng lo ding a, a minthanna in amah zuisuk lo ding hi." 
Psalms49:18 A hin lai-in amah a lungdamin kingaihsunin, mi khat in ama a’ ding na a lim sep ciangin phatna a ngah hangin," 
Psalms49:19 khuavak a mu nawn lo dingin a si khinsa a pu a pate kiang mahah amah pai veve ding hi. 
Psalms49:20 Ama hauhna in mi hing paisuaksak thei lo a, a sithei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Psalms50:1 Vanglian, Topa Pasian hong paukhia a, nisuahna le nitumna kikal leitung mi khempeuh a khawm hi." 
Psalms50:2 Hoih kicinna Zion panin Pasian hong taangkhia hi. 
Psalms50:3 Eite’ Pasian hong pai a, amah dai ommawk lo hi. Ama mai-ah mei husia om a, a kimkotah huihpi om hi." 
Psalms50:4 A mite tungah thu a khen theih nadingin tunglam vantung le leitung a sam hi. 
Psalms50:5 “Biakpiakna tawh, kei tungah thuciamna a bawlte, ka mi citakte ka kiangah hong khawm un,” a ci hi." 
Psalms50:6 Vantung in ama thumanna gen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian mahmah thukhen pa ahi hi. 
Psalms50:7 “Ka mite aw, ngai un; thu ka hong gen ding hi. Israel-te aw, note’ langkhatah teci ka pang ding hi. Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, nomau’ Pasian ka hi hi." 
Psalms50:8 Na biakpiakna uhah note kong mawhsak kei hi. Na meihal biaknate uh ka mai-ah om ngitnget hi. 
Psalms50:9 Ahi zongin na inn pan uha bawngtal hitaleh na ganbuk pan uha keeltal hitaleh ka hong sang kei ding hi. 
Psalms50:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak ganhingte khempeuh, mual tul tampite tunga a om ganhingte keima-a’ ahi hi." 
Psalms50:11 Huih lak vasate khempeuh keimah in ka thei a, gamlak a gamta khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi." 
Psalms50:12 “Ka gil kial taleh zong note kiang panin an kong ngen kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung le a sunga om khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi. 
Psalms50:13 Bawngtalte’ sa ne ding a, keelte’ sisan dawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms50:14 Lungdam biakpiakna Pasian tungah pia unla, Sangpenpa tungah na thuciamnate uh bawl un." 
Psalms50:15 Haksat hun ciangin keima tungah hong ko un. Note kong honkhia ding a, note in keima min nong thangsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms50:16 Ahih hangin migilote tungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Ka thukhamte lawhna ding ka thuciamna na muk uh tawh genna ding thu nei na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms50:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh hilh ding na ut kei uh a, ka thute na nunglam uhah na paai uh hi." 
Psalms50:18 Guta khat mu le-uhcin ama lawm na hi pah uh a, a paktat mite tawh na kikhawl uh hi." 
Psalms50:19 “Na kam uh, siatna na uksak uh a, na leii un khemna a khangsak hi." 
Psalms50:20 Na sanggamte uh langpangin thu na gen uh a, amaute’ mawhna na zong uh hi." 
Psalms50:21 Hihte khempeuh na gamta khin uh a, bangmah ka pau kei hi. Kei pen no tawh a kibangin nong ngaihsunkha uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in note ka hong taii a, na mawhna uh na mai uhah ka koih hi." 
Psalms50:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Pasian a mangngilh mite aw, hih thu ciamteh un. Tua hikeileh note kong balgawp ding hi. Note hong honkhia ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms50:23 Biakpiak nadingin lungdam piakna hong paipih mi in kei a hong pahtawi ahi hi. Ka thu a mang mite khempeuh ka honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms51:1 Pasian aw, nangma itna kip om bangin kei hong hehpih inla, na hehpihna lian om bangin ka thu palsatnate hong phiatkhiatsak in." 
Psalms51:2 Ka khialhna panin hong silsiang kiuhkeuh inla, ka mawhna panin kei hong siangsak in." 
Psalms51:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thupalsatnate ka thei a, ka mawhnate khempeuh ka phawk ngitnget hi." 
Psalms51:4 Nangma tungah khialin, nangma muhna-ah a sia ka gamta khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na thugenna-ah nang na thutang a, thu na hong khenna-ah pauna ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms51:5 A khialsa mahin kei ka suak a, ka nu in a gil sungah hong paii tung a kipan a mawh sa ka hi hi." 
Psalms51:6 Nang in nuntakna sungah thumanna na deih hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka lungsim tawngah ciimna hong hilh in. 
Psalms51:7 Puknah tawh hong nul in; kei ka siang ding hi. Hong sil in; vuk sangin ka ngozaw ding hi. 
Psalms51:8 Lungdamna le kipahna kei tungah hong pia inla, na hong sukgawp mipa hong lungdamsak in." 
Psalms51:9 Ka mawhna khempeuh na mai panin seel inla, ka khialhna khempeuh hong phiatkhiatsak in." 
Psalms51:10 Pasian aw, keima sungah lungsim siangtho hong piangsak inla, a thak a man ngaihsutna ka sungah hong guan in." 
Psalms51:11 Nangma omna panin kei hong paaikhia kei inla, keima kiang panin na kha siangtho lakhia kei in." 
Psalms51:12 Nong hotkhiatna hangin hong lungdamsakkik inla, utna lungsim tawh keimah hong huh ta in." 
Psalms51:13 Tua ciangin thupalsatte na zia na tong ka hilh ding a, nangma lamah mimawhte hong kiheikik ding uh hi." 
Psalms51:14 Kei a hong hon Pasian aw, sih nading panin kei hong honkhia in. Nong hotkhiatna thu lungdam takin ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms51:15 Topa aw, ka pau theih nadingin kei hong huh in; nangmah ka hong phat ding hi." 
Psalms51:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing tawh biakna na deih kei hi. Meihal biakna hong pia hita leng zong, na lungdam kei ding hi." 
Psalms51:17 Pasian’ san theih biakna pen lungsim kitamzan ahi hi. Pasian aw, a kitamzan, a kisik lungsim na simmawh kei ding hi." 
Psalms51:18 Na lungkimna pha tawh Zion tungah a pha bawl inla, Jerusalem kulhpite ciangkik ta in." 
Psalms51:19 Tua ciangin biakpiakna man, meihal biakna le meihal biakpiakna bupah na lungkim ding a, na biakna tau tungah bawngtalte hong kipia ding hi." 
Psalms52:1 Mi thahatpa aw, bang hangin miphate suksiatna-ah kisial na hi hiam? Sunthapai-in, suksiatna na ngaihsunsun hi." 
Psalms52:2 Zuau nasempa aw, na leii a hiam pha mahmah mulkiatna tem tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms52:3 Hoihna sangin siatna na deihzaw a, thuman genna sangin zuauna na deihzaw hi." 
Psalms52:4 Mi a khem thei pa aw, a siasak thei kammal khempeuh deih belin na nei hi." 
Psalms52:5 Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang hong susia paisuak ding hi. Amah in nang hong bawhin na buk sung panin hong kaikhia ding a, a hingte’ leitang panin hong zunglot ding hi." 
Psalms52:6 Thuman mite in nang hong mu-in, lau mahmah ding uh a, nang hong nuihsanin," 
Psalms52:7 “Pasian a bel lo, ama hauhnate a muang, ama hauhna a bel pa en un,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms52:8 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh Pasian’ innsunga a om oliv kung a hing tawh ka kibang hi. Pasian’ itna kip ka muang ngitnget hi. 
Psalms52:9 Hih bangin keimah hong bawlkhin na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam ngitnget ding hi. Thuhoih ahih manin miphate omna-ah nangma min ka taangko ding hi. 
Psalms53:1 Mihai in a lungsim sungah, “Pasian om lo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Amaute sia uh hi. A kihhuai-in gamta uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms53:2 A pil, Pasian a zong mi a om uh hiam, cih a theih nadingin Pasian in vantung panin mihingte hong ensuk hi." 
Psalms53:3 Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un pukkhin uh hi. A kibangin kisia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat beek om lo hi." 
Psalms53:4 Pasian tungah thu a ngen lo, an nek bangin ka mite a netum, siatna a bawlte in thu theihtelna nei lo ahi hiam?" 
Psalms53:5 Cikmahin tua bang launa a om ngei lo, launa lianpi sungah amaute om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in migilote’ guhte thehthang ding hi. Pasian in amaute nial ahih manin, amaute maizumin kikoih ding hi." 
Psalms53:6 Zion panin Israel-te a’ ding hotkhiatna hong tunna ding thu ka ngenngen hi. Pasian in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi." 
Psalms54:1 Pasian aw, na thahatna tawh kei hong honkhia inla, na vangliatna tawh ka dikna hong kilangsak in." 
Psalms54:2 Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka kampaute hong ngai in." 
Psalms54:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi kiphasakte in kei hong langpang uh a, mi helhhawtte in thah dingin hong zong uh hi. Amaute in Pasian thudon lo uh hi." 
Psalms54:4 Pasian, kei hong huhpa hi a, Topa, kei hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms54:5 Amah in ka galte siatna tawh thuk ding hi. Na thumanna tawh kizui-in amaute sumai in. 
Psalms54:6 Utna lungsim tawh biakpiakna kong pia ding a, nang hoih na hih manin, nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms54:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna khempeuh panin kei nong honkhia khin a, ka galte a guallelhna keimah in ka mu khin ta hi." 
Psalms55:1 Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong ngai inla, ka hong thumna panin nangmah bu kei in." 
Psalms55:2 Keima lam hong nga inla, ka hong ngetna hong pia in. Ka lungsim gimna in kei hong zogawp ta hi." 
Psalms55:3 Migilote’ sukcipna, galte’ huging in kei hong gimsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima tungah haksatna hong tun uh a, hehna tawh keimah hong galbawl ding amaute in nuamsa uh hi." 
Psalms55:4 Ka sungah ka lungsim na mahmah a, sih ding launate kei tungah hong tungzo hi." 
Psalms55:5 Launa le linna ka tungah hong tung a, launa in hong vukcip hi." 
Psalms55:6 Hih bangin ka ci hi: “Vakhu bangin kha nei hi leng! Ka leengkhia ding a, nuamtakin ka om hithiat ding hi." 
Psalms55:7 Gamla pekah ka vakthap ding a, gam sungah ka giak ding hi." 
Psalms55:8 Gensiatna huihpi le huih husiate panin bukna ka zong pak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms55:9 Topa aw, amau’ geelnate suksiat sakin a pau uh kilamdangsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khua sungah ngongtatna le kam kiselna ka mu hi." 
Psalms55:10 Amaute sun le zanin kulhpi tungah kot paipai uh a, khua sungah siatna le ngongtatnate om a, mite lakah lungkhamna om hi." 
Psalms55:11 Sumzuak sumleina mun panin kisukcipna le kikhemnate veng lo hi. 
Psalms55:12 Kei hong phin galte hi lo hi. Hi leh ka thuakzo ding hi. Kiphatsakna tawh kei hong bawlte, langpang mi hi lo hi. Hi leh ama kiang panin ka bu thei ding hi." 
Psalms55:13 Ahih hangin ka kikimpih, ka kikholhpih, ka lawm theih mahmah, nangmah na hi hi." 
Psalms55:14 Kam khum tawh i kihoho ngei a, Pasian’ inn sungah i kikhawl khawm ngei hi." 
Psalms55:15 Amau’ tungah sihna tungsak in. Leinuai-ah a hingtangin amaute paisuk sak inla, amaute launa lianpi tawh a han uhah paisak in." 
Psalms55:16 Ahih hangin keimah in Pasian’ tungah ka ko a, Topa in kei hong hon ding hi." 
Psalms55:17 Nitak, zingsang, le sunin ka gimna leh ka thumnate ama tungah ka gen a, amah in keima thumna aw, hong za ding hi." 
Psalms55:18 Amah in ka galsimna sungah kei hong kem ding a, a muanhuai munah kei hong koih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a hong do dingin mi tampi tak kigual deudau uh hi." 
Psalms55:19 Tanglai pek panin kumpi-in a kikoih Pasian in za-in amaute niamkhiat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukham zui lo uh a, Pasian zahtak lo uh hi." 
Psalms55:20 Ka kikholhpih ngei mi in a lawmte langpangin sugawp a, a thuciamna palsat hi." 
Psalms55:21 Ama kampau, thawhbat sangin nelzaw a, ahi zongin a lung sungah muhdahna om hi. A kammalte sathau sangin nipzaw a, ahi zongin tuate pen namsau hiam mahmah tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms55:22 Topa tungah na vangik nga in, amah in hong huh ding hi. Amah in mi thumante kilingsak ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms55:23 Ahih hangin Pasian aw, dum thuk penna munah amaute na lawnsuk ding a, mi thatte le mi khemte pen amau nuntak ding zah lang hing lo ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in nang ka hong muang ding hi." 
Psalms56:1 Pasian aw, mite in kei hong tuancil ahih manin kei hong hehpih in. Sunthapai-in galte in kei hong sucip hi." 
Psalms56:2 Sunthapai-in ka galte in kei hong tuancil uh a, kiphatsakna tawh mi tampi in kei hong do hi." 
Psalms56:3 Kei ka lau ciangin nangmah ka hong muang hi. 
Psalms56:4 A thu ka phat Pasian’ sungah, lunghihmawhna khat zong nei hetloin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing ahi lelte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms56:5 Amaute in ka vai siatsak ding sunthapai-in hanciam uh a, amau’ ngaihsutnate khempeuh keima siatna ding ahi hi." 
Psalms56:6 Amaute kikaikhawmin keimah hong buk uh a, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong encik uh hi. Amaute in keimah thah ding a hanciam uh bangin," 
Psalms56:7 amau’ khialhna hangin amaute thuk in. Pasian aw, hehna tawh tua mite lawnkhiasuk in." 
Psalms56:8 Ka sin linnate khempeuh nangmah in na ciamteh khin hi. Ka khituite khempeuh na thawl sungah thun in. Tuate na laibu sungah kiciamteh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Psalms56:9 Tua ciangin, keimah in kong koh ni peuh ciangin ka galte nungkik ding hi. Pasian pen keima-a’ ahihna ka thei hi." 
Psalms56:10 A thu ka phat Pasian’ sungah, a thu ka phat Topa’ sungah," 
Psalms56:11 lunghihmawhna khat zong nei hetloin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing lellelte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms56:12 Pasian aw, nang tungah ka kiciamna ka zuih kul hi. Nangma tungah lungdamna kong thuk hi." 
Psalms56:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin nong honkhia khin hi. Pasian’ mai, nuntakna khuavak sungah ka pai theih nadingin ka khe a taalna ding panin na hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms57:1 Kei hong hehpih in Pasian aw, nang hong bel ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Siatna huihpi a ven’ mateng na kha liimah kong bu ding hi." 
Psalms57:2 A Sangpen Pasian’ tungah, keima deihna a hong tungsak Pasian’ tungah ka ko hi." 
Psalms57:3 Amah in vantung panin keimah hong dawngin hong honkhia ding a, amah in kei hong tuancilte maizumin a koih ding hi. Pasian in ama itna kip le a thumanna hong lak ding hi." 
Psalms57:4 Huaihamna tawh mihing a netum, humpinelkai tawh a kibang mite’ lakah ka om hithiat hi. Amau’ hate, namsau hiam tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms57:5 Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms57:6 Amaute in keima khe, thang hong siah uh a, lungkhamin hong koih uh hi. Ka pai nading munah gum khat to uh a, ahih hangin tua gum sungah amaute mah kia uh hi." 
Psalms57:7 Ka lungmuang hi, Pasian aw, ka lungmuang hi. La ka sa ding a, nakpitakin ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms57:8 Ka tho ding hi. Harp lasakna le laiza lasakna aw, tho ta un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning." 
Psalms57:9 Topa aw, mite lakah lungdam kong ko ding a, minamte lakah nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms57:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipi banto hi." 
Psalms57:11 Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms58:1 No gam ukte aw, a manin thu na khen uh hiam? Note in mi khempeuh’ thu a tangin na khen uh hiam?" 
Psalms58:2 Hi peuhmah lo hi; na lungsim uhah a man lo na ngaihsun uh a, gam sungah ngongtatna na gamta uh hi." 
Psalms58:3 Migilote a khan tawnun khial uh hi. A suah tung mahun lam khial pah uh a, zuauthu gen uh hi." 
Psalms58:4 Amaute in gulpi’ gu bang gu nei uh a, a khiimte’ aw ahi a, a zol siamte’ aw ahi zongin bangmah a za het lo, gul bilngong tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms58:5  
Psalms58:6 Pasian aw, amau’ kam sunga a om a hate uh sutan inla, humpinelkai khanglai hatu-te botkhia in, Topa aw." 
Psalms58:7 Tui luangkhiate bangin amaute mangthangsak inla, lopa bangin amaute kituancil gawpin keutumsak in." 
Psalms58:8 Amaute a naai a bei toktol, a hun cing loin a suak, ni a mu ngei lote bangsak in." 
Psalms58:9 Na beelte in lingkung kuang sa a sak ma-in, a hing a keu-in amah in phiatkhia mang hen." 
Psalms58:10 Heh thukna a muh ciangin thuman mipa lungdam ding a, migilote’ sisan sungah amah in a khete sil ding hi." 
Psalms58:11 Mite in, “Thuman mi a’ ding noptuamna om taktak a, leitung thu a khen Pasian khat om taktak hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms59:1 Ka Pasian aw, ka galte’ kiang panin keimah hong honkhia in. Kei a hong langpangte panin kei hong dal in." 
Psalms59:2 Siatna a bawlte’ kiang panin hong suaktasak inla, mi that nuamte’ kiang panin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms59:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong pangsim uh a, a kihtakhuai mite keimah hong langpangin kikaikhawm uh hi. Topa aw, keima thupalsatna hang hi lo," 
Psalms59:4 kei’ khialhna hang hilopi-in, amaute va kithawi uh hi. Nangmah in hong phawk in. Keimah a hong huh dingin hong pai inla, kei hong en in." 
Psalms59:5 Nang, Vanglian Topa Pasian, Israel’ Pasian na hi hi. Minam khempeuh gim a pia dingin tho inla, khemna tawh siat gamtat ding a sawmte kuamah siit kei in." 
Psalms59:6 Nitak simin amaute hong paikik zelzelin ui bangin ku uh a, khuasung tengah vak khuankhuan uh hi." 
Psalms59:7 Amaute a kam uh tawh nakpipi-in hawk uh a, a muk uh tawh zuauthu gengen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kua’n hong za ding hiam?” ci-in amaute in ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms59:8 Topa aw, ahih hangin nang in amaute na nuihsan lel a, minam khempeuh na zahpih hi." 
Psalms59:9 Ka thahatna aw, nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka Pasian aw, ka munkip muanhuai na hi hi." 
Psalms59:10 Ka Pasian in ama itna kip tawh keimah hong dawn ding a, ka Pasian in gualzawhna tawh ka galte hong en sak ding hi." 
Psalms59:11 Amaute that kei in; that lecin ka mite in mangngilh ding hi. Na vangliatna tawh amaute kilokgawp sak inla, amaute niamkhiat in, Topa, kote hong hupa aw." 
Psalms59:12 Amau’ kama a mawhna a muk uh tawh a pauna hangin, amau’ kiphatsakna-ah amau mah awksak in. Amaute in hamsiatna zangin zuauthu a genna hangun," 
Psalms59:13 hehna tawh amaute beisak in. Amaute khempeuh a beisiang dongin sumai in. Tua hileh Pasian in Israel-te tungah leimong dongin a uk khitna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. 
Psalms59:14 Nitak simin amaute hong paikik zelzelin ui bangin ku uh a, khuasung tengah vak khuankhuan uh hi." 
Psalms59:15 An zong dingin vak kawikawi uh a, a kham uh ngah kei leh humham uh hi." 
Psalms59:16 Ahih hangin keimah in na vangliatna la ka sa ding a, zingsangin na itna kip phatna la nakpitakin ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang, ka munkip muanhuai na hi a, ka gentheih hunin keima belh na hi hi." 
Psalms59:17 Ka thahatna aw, nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, nang pen ka munkip muanhuai, keima tungah itna kip a hong lak Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms60:1 Pasian aw, kote na hong nilkhia khin a, ka panmunte uh na sukham mang khin hi. Kote tungah nangmah na heh khin hi. Kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik ta in." 
Psalms60:2 Nangmah in lei na lingsak khin a, lei na khangkhamsak khin hi. Kip lo ahih ciangin a kitam mate matkik in." 
Psalms60:3 Nangmah in na mite a haksa na thuaksak khin hi. Ka dawn dingun ko a hong hoisak leenggahzu na hong pia khin hi. 
Psalms60:4 Thalte panin kihemin a kikaihkhop nadingun nang hong zahtakte a dingin dial khat na koih khin hi. 
Psalms60:5 Nangma it mite a suahtak theih nadingin na khut taklam tawh gualzawhna pia inla, kote’ ngetna hong pia in." 
Psalms60:6 A biakinn sungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Gualzo a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khenkhia-in Sukkoth gam kuam ka sehkhia ding hi." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead gam keima a’ hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-a’ mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka siklukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi." 
Psalms60:8 Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, ka neihsa hi cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn a, Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms60:9 Kua in khuapi muanhuai-ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam? 
Psalms60:10 Pasian aw, nangmah in kote a hong don nawn lo khinta hi lo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komau’ galkapte tawh na hong kuankhia kei hi." 
Psalms60:11 Ka galdona uhah huhna hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihing’ huhna a mawkna hi. 
Psalms60:12 Pasian tawh khauhtakin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak ding pa ahi hi. 
Psalms61:1 Pasian aw, ka kikona aw hong za inla, ka thungetna hong ngai in." 
Psalms61:2 Ka lungsim a neu ciangin, leimong panin nang kong sam hi. Keimah sangin a sangzaw suangpi tungah hong paipih in." 
Psalms61:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang, keima bukna na hi a, galte’ langah tausang muanhuai na hi hi." 
Psalms61:4 Na buk sungah hong omsak tawntung inla, nangma khate’ hutna sungah lungmuangin hong omsak in." 
Psalms61:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, ka thuciamnate khempeuh nangmah in na za khin a, nangmah a hong zahtak mite’ ngah dingte keimah nong pia khinta hi." 
Psalms61:6 Kumpipa khantosak inla, khang tawntungin nungtasak in." 
Psalms61:7 Pasian’ mai-ah amah om ngitnget hen la, ama itna kip le a thumanna in amah kem tahen." 
Psalms61:8 Tua ciangin nisimin ka thuciamnate bangin gamta-in, na min phatna ka sasa ding hi." 
Psalms62:1 Dai dide-in Pasian bek ka ngak a, ama hong hotkhiat ding muangin ka om hi." 
Psalms62:2 Kei hong huhpa le hong honpa amah bek hi a, ka guallel ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms62:3 Note khempeuh in kawm a hoi tawh a kibang, gawl bangin a kiling mi khat a susia dingin bang tanvei hih huan nilohin, susia ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms62:4 Amah a zaliatna panin sukniam ding bekbek amaute in a sawm uh hi. Amaute in thuman lo-ah nuamsa mahmah uh hi. Amaute in a kampi uh tawh phat khem uh a, ahih hangin a sungtawng uhah samsiat uh hi." 
Psalms62:5 Amah bek ka muan ahih manin, daitakin Pasian bek ka ngak hi." 
Psalms62:6 Kei hong hupa le hong honpa amah bek mah hi a, ka guallel ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms62:7 Keima suahtakna le ka minphatna Pasian’ hang ahi hi. A muanhuai ka belh pa, ka bukna Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms62:8 Mite aw, amah muang tawntung unla, na lungkhamna teng uh ama tungah gen un. Pasian, eite’ bukna ahi hi." 
Psalms62:9 Mihingte ahihleh husan’ bang bek hi a, a lian a neu kibang lel hi. Tawi a kikhai ciangin amaute in leek lo uh a, amaute a kigawmin husan’ sangin zangzaw hi." 
Psalms62:10 Zawhthawh thu tawh ngahna muanin nei kei inla, suhgawpnate lametin nei kei in. Na hauhna a khan leh, tuate muanin nei kei in." 
Psalms62:11 Vangliatna pen keima a’ hi, ci-in Pasian in a genna ka zak ngeingeisa ahi hi." 
Psalms62:12 Topa aw, itna kip nangma a’ ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sepna bang ciatin mite na thuk hi." 
Psalms63:1 Pasian aw, keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong zong a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang kong deih hi. Tui om lohna gamkeu bangin ka pumpi bup in nang hong deih hi." 
Psalms63:2 Tua ahih manin biakinn sungah nangmahmah le na vangliatna na minthannate kei hong musak in. 
Psalms63:3 Nuntakna sangin nangma itna kip hoihzaw ahih manin nangmah ka hong phat ding hi. 
Psalms63:4 Tua ahih ciangin ka nuntak laiteng nang kong phat ding a, ka khutte hong laam to-in thu kong ngen ding hi." 
Psalms63:5 Ka lupna tungah nangmah hong ngaihsunsunin, zanthapai-in kong lungngaihngaih ciangin guhngek le sathau ne bangin ka lung tai mahmah a, lungdam mahmahna tawh nangmah phatna la ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms63:6  
Psalms63:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huhpa na hi a, nangma hutna sungah lungdamin la ka sa hi." 
Psalms63:8 Nangmah ka hong bel a, nangma taklam khut in keimah a hong len hi." 
Psalms63:9 Ahi zongin thah dingin kei a hong zongte, lei thukpi sungah paisuk ding uh hi." 
Psalms63:10 Gal sungah amaute si ding uh a, ngiate’ an suak ding uh hi." 
Psalms63:11 Ahi zongin Pasian’ hangin kumpipa lungdam ding a, Pasian tawh thuciamna a nei khempeuhte zong minthang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh zuauthu a gen kam khempeuh kihubing ding hi." 
Psalms64:1 Pasian aw, ka thumna aw hong za inla, gallauna panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms64:2 Migilote’ sawmsimna, thusia bawlte’ vaihawmna," 
Psalms64:3 namsau taat bangin a leii uh a taatte, thaltang bangin thu hoih lo a ngimte," 
Psalms64:4 a buk simna panun mawhbaang lo mi a kapte, lau hetloin thakhatin amah a kapte’ kiang panin kei hong liah in." 
Psalms64:5 Amaute in thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi. Amaute in thangsiah sim ding gen uh a, “Eite kua in hong mu ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms64:6 Eite’ mawhna kua in phawkzo ding ahi hiam? Siam mahmahna tawh i sawmsimna i vaihawm hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte’ sung thu le a lungsim ngaihsutna uh thuk mahmah hi." 
Psalms64:7 Ahih hangin Pasian in a thaltang tawh amaute kapgawp ding a, amaute khempeuh thakhatin liam ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:8 Amau’ kampaunate hangin amaute siatna thuaksak ding a, amaute a mu khempeuh in a lu uh peisan ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:9 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in Pasian’ hihsa thute gengen ding uh a, ama hihsa nate khempeuh ngaihsunsun ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:10 Topa’ nasepna hangin midikte lungdam ding uh a, amah a bel ding uh hi. Lungsim thutangte khempeuh in amah a phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:1 Pasian aw, Zion-ah nangmah phat dingin kilawm a, nangma tunga thuciamsate hong kitungsak ding hi." 
Psalms65:2 Thungetna a zapa na hi a, mawhna hangin nangma kiangah mi khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:3 Ka mawhnate un kote hong zawh ciangin, nangmah in tuate na hong maisak hi." 
Psalms65:4 Nangma inn-ah a om dingin na teel na lakte mi nuamsa ahi hi. Nangma biakinn siangtho, na innsunga hoihna tawh kote ka lungkim ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:5 Tuipi gamla pente le leimong khempeuhte’ lamet, kote a hong honkhia Pasian," 
Psalms65:6 a thahatna tawh mualte a bawl, vangliatna tawh a kidim," 
Psalms65:7 tuipi gingte, tuihualte, mi gamlumte a daisak pa aw," 
Psalms65:8 leimong peka omte in na hihna limte a kihtak nadingun a kihtakhuai gamtatna zangin, nong hotkhiatna tawh kote’ ngetna nong pia hi. Nisuahna le nitumna kikalah a om mi khempeuhte lungdamna tawh a awng dingin na bawl hi." 
Psalms65:9 Nangmah in leitung enin, guah na hong zusak a, leitung a hoihna nakpitakin na behlap hi. Pasian’ gunpi tui tawh kidim a, leitungah an na piangsak hi. Tua bangin nangmah in na khempeuh na bawlkhol hi." 
Psalms65:10 Tu-ma-kuakte khempeuh tui tampi tak na buak a, leivumte zalhmai-in, guahtui tawh na nipsak a, a po kungte thupha na pia hi." 
Psalms65:11 Nangma hauhna tawh kum na phasak a, na leeng paina khempeuhah sathau a taak hi." 
Psalms65:12 Ganhing tatna, a noptuak mahmah munte-ah ganhing honte omin, mualte khempeuh zong lungdamna tawh kidim a," 
Psalms65:13 gamlak lonona munte tuuhon tawh kizemin, kuampite an tawh kidim a, amaute lungdamin awngin la a sa khawm uh hi." 
Psalms66:1 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Pasian’ tungah lungdamna aw ging phasak un." 
Psalms66:2 Ama minthanna sa unla, ama tungah minthanna pia un." 
Psalms66:3 Pasian’ tungah thu gen unla, “Nangma bawlnate bangzahta-in dipkuathuai! Na vang lian mahmah ahih manin na mai-ah na galte in nang hong mai-et uh hi." 
Psalms66:4 Leitung mi khempeuh in nangmah hong bia uh hi. Amaute in nangmah phatna la hong sak uh a, nangma minphatna la hong sak uh hi,” ci-in gen un." 
Psalms66:5 Hong pai unla, Pasian’ sepsate mu un. Mite’ lak a a bawlnate-ah amah dipkuathuai hi." 
Psalms66:6 Amah in tuipi tui pen leikeu suaksak a, i pu i pate in a khe uh tawh tua tuipi na kantan uh hi. Tua bangin ama nasepna hangin eite i lungdam hi." 
Psalms66:7 Ama thahatna tawh a uk ngitnget pa, ama mit tawh minamte a encik ngitnget pa, mi lehdote in langpan’ kei uh hen." 
Psalms66:8 Mite aw, a hingte lak a a hong kem pa, i khe a hong taalsak lopa, eite’ Pasian phat un. Amah phatna aw kizasak tawntung un." 
Psalms66:9  
Psalms66:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, kote na hong sin khin a, mei tawh ngun a kisin bangin kote na hong sin khin hi." 
Psalms66:11 Nangmah in ngen sungah kote na hong tungsak a, ka nungzang uhah vangikpi na hong suan hi." 
Psalms66:12 Ka galte uh nong tuancilsak a, tui le mei lauhuainate ka thuak uh hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in a tanzau munah kote nong paipih hi." 
Psalms66:13 Meihal biaknate tawh nangma inn sungah kei ka hong pai ding hi. Ka lungkham laitakin ka muk pana a gingkhia, ka kama ka thuciamte nangma tungah ka hong pia ding hi." 
Psalms66:14  
Psalms66:15 Ganhing thaute tawh meihal biaknate, tuutal-a biakna khute tawh biakna kong pia ding a, bawngtalte le keelte tawh nangmah biakpiakna ka bawl ding hi." 
Psalms66:16 Pasian a zahtakte khempeuh aw, hong pai unla, hong za un. Kei-a’ dinga ama bawlsate ka hong gen ding hi." 
Psalms66:17 Ama tungah huhna ngenin nakpitakin ka kiko a, lasakna tawh amah ka phat hi." 
Psalms66:18 Ka lung sungah mawhna kem leng, Topa in keima thu hong ngai lo ding hi." 
Psalms66:19 Ahih hangin Pasian in, keima thu hong ngai khin taktak a, keima thungetna aw, hong don khinzo hi." 
Psalms66:20 Amah in keima thungetna hong nolh loin, keima kiang panin a itna kip lakhia lo ahih manin Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen!" 
Psalms67:1 Pasian in eite hong hehpihin thupha hong pia hen la, eite khempeuh tungah a mai hong taangsak tahen." 
Psalms67:2 Leitungah nangma deihna, minam khempeuhte lakah na vanglian hotkhiatna kithei tahen." 
Psalms67:3 Pasian aw, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong phat hen la, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong pahtawi tahen." 
Psalms67:4 Mite’ thu a manin khenin, leitung minamte khempeuh lamlakin makai na hih manin, minamte nuamin lungdamna la hong sak ta uh hen." 
Psalms67:5 Pasian aw, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong phat hen la, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong pahtawi tahen." 
Psalms67:6 Leitang in ama hauhna gahkhia khinta a, Pasian, eima Pasian in eite thupha hong pia khin hi." 
Psalms67:7 Pasian in eite thupha hong pia khin hi. Leimong dong mi khempeuhte in amah zahtak uh hen. 
Psalms68:1 Pasian hong kipan hen la, ama galte kithehthangsak hen. Amah a mudahte ama mai-ah tai uh hen." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu leengkhia bangin amaute a hawlkhia ding hi. Mei mai-ah khuainun a tui bangin Pasian’ mai-ah migilote siamang ding hi. 
Psalms68:3 Ahih hangin midikte lungdam ding hi. Pasian’ mai-ah nuamin diang ding uh a, amaute lungdam mahmahin awng-awng ding uh hi." 
Psalms68:4 Pasian’ tungah la sa unla, ama min phatna la sa un. Meiite tungah a tuang pa la sak un. Ama min pen Topa ahi hi; ama mai-ah lungdamin diang un!" 
Psalms68:5 Pa nei lote’ pa le meigong numeite a hupa pen, a siangtho mahmah ama omna-ah a om Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms68:6 Pasian in a cimawhte a tenna ding innlelo guan a, thongkia mite nopsakna munah a tunpih hi. Ahih hangin mi lehdote ahihleh keugaw gamah teng uh hi." 
Psalms68:7 Pasian aw, nangma mite mai-ah na kuankhiat ciang, gamlak nawkin na pai ciangin," 
Psalms68:8 nangmah Pasian na om manin lei kiling gawpin vantungte in guah a zusak hi. Pasian ahi, Israel Pasian’ omna-ah Sinai mual nangawn a kiling gawp hi." 
Psalms68:9 Pasian aw, na luah mite vulgawp uh ahih manin guah tampi zusakin na nosuaksakkik hi." 
Psalms68:10 Nangma mihonte in tua sungah omna ding mu uh hi. Pasian aw, nangma hoihna tawh a cimawh mite’ kisapna a kicingin na guan hi." 
Psalms68:11 Topa in thu pia hi: Hih thu a pua mihonte tam mahmah uh a," 
Psalms68:12 “Kumpipa’ galkapte tai uh!” ci uh hi. Inn-a om nupite in galte’ van a kisutte hawm uh a, tua vante pen" 
Psalms68:13 ngun tawh a kizut vakhu limte hi a, a khate kham tawh kizut hi. Bang hangin note pawlkhat, tuukhawk sungah mawk om na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms68:14 Vanglianpa in tua gam panin kumpite a nawhkeek ciangin Zalmon mualtungah vuk a kia tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms68:15 Aw mual lianpi, Bashan mual, aw mual dawnzum tampi a nei Bashan mual!" 
Psalms68:16 Dawnzum tampi a nei mual aw, Pasian in ama om nadingin a deih mual Pasian’ om tawntungna ding mun bang hangin simmawh et na hi hiam?" 
Psalms68:17 Leeng muanhuai tul sawmnih, vantungmi a tultul tawh, Sinai mual pan siangtho munah Topa hong pai hi." 
Psalms68:18 Topa nangmah Pasian tua munah na om theih nadingin a sangna-ah kahto-in salte na paipih a, mihonte le mi lehdote’ tung nangawn panin piakkhong nate na ngah hi." 
Psalms68:19 Nisimin eite a dingin a hong thuaksak Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Pasian pen eite hong honkhia pa ahi hi. 
Psalms68:20 Eite’ Pasian pen hong honkhia Pasian hi a, sihna pan a hong suaktasak Topa Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms68:21 Ahih hangin Pasian in mawhna a gamta a galte’ lutang khempeuh sukham ding hi. 
Psalms68:22 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note in sisan sungah na khe uh silin, na uite un galte’ sisan a liak theih nadingin Bashan mual panin galte lakhia kikin, tuipi thuk sung panin ka kaikhia kik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms68:23  
Psalms68:24 Pasian aw, ka Kumpipa, keima Pasian, a zahtakhuai takin biakinn sungah na paina kimu hi." 
Psalms68:25 A masa-in lasate, a nunungin tamngai tumte, a laizangah nungak khuangtumte in:" 
Psalms68:26 “Israel’ suanlekhakte aw, mipi kikhopna sungah Topa Pasian phat un!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms68:27 Amaute’ lakah a mi tawmpen Benjamin-te a mapi-in om a, amau’ zomah Judah kumpite le a mite, Naftali kumpite le a mite ahi uh hi." 
Psalms68:28 Pasian aw, na vangliatna kilangsak in. Kote a dingin a hong bawlsak Pasian aw, na thahatna hong lak in." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalem-a na biakinn hangin kumpite in nang tungah letsong hong puak uh hi. 
Psalms68:30 Pumpeeng lak a teng Egypt mite- tua ganhingte, bawngtal hon, bawngnote taigawp in. Siah a lunggulhte tuancil inla, gal a uuk mite thehthang gawp in." 
Psalms68:31 Egypt gam panin sumngo lakhiasak inla, Pasian’ tungah thungetna-in Ethiopia gam a khut zansak mengmeng in." 
Psalms68:32 Leitung kumpi gamte aw, Pasian’ tungah la sa un. Vantung, tanglai vantung a a tuang Topa phatna la sa un. Ngai un, ama aw, a vanglian mahmah ama aw hong gingkhiasak hi." 
Psalms68:33  
Psalms68:34 Israel-te’ tungah a lian, Pasian’ hatna pahtawi un; ama vangliatna vantungah om hi." 
Psalms68:35 Israel-te’ Pasian, ama biakinn sungah zahtakhuai mahmah a, ama mite tungah vangliatna le hatna a pia hi. Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen!" 
Psalms69:1 Pasian aw, hong hon in! Bang hang hiam cih leh tuikhang in ka ngawng ciang hong tuum ta hi." 
Psalms69:2 Khe tawh dinkipna ding mun a om lohna buannawng thuk sungah ka tumsuk a, tuithuk sung tung khinta-in ka tungah tuikhang a luang hi." 
Psalms69:3 Ka kikokona-in ka gim a, ka dang keuta hi. Ka Pasian ka ngakngakna-in ka mitte maang ta hi." 
Psalms69:4 Thu om lopi-in kei a hong mudah mi, ka lu tunga samzangte sangin tamzaw uh hi. Kei a hong susia ding, zuauthu tawh a hong dote hat mahmah uh hi. Kei’ guk lohpi ke’n loh ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms69:5 Pasian aw, ka pil lohna na thei a, ka tatkhialhnate nangma kiang pan kiliah lo hi." 
Psalms69:6 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, nangmah a hong muangte keima hangin zahhuaisak kei in. Israel Pasian aw, nang a hong zongte keima hangin mindaisak kei in." 
Psalms69:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma hangin kona ka thuak a, maizumna in kei hong pumtuam khinta hi." 
Psalms69:8 Ka sanggamte lakah midangpi ka suak a, khualmi ka bang hi." 
Psalms69:9 Nangma inn ka deihluatna mei bangin ka sungah sa a, nangmah hong kote’ konate keima tung hong tu hi." 
Psalms69:10 An ngolhna tawh ka lungsim ka kiniamkhiat a, tua pen keimah hong kikona lehsuak zawsop hi." 
Psalms69:11 Ka puan dingin puanhampi bawl taleng zong amaute a dingin gentehna ka suak veve hi. 
Psalms69:12 Kongzing lakah mite’ gengen ka hi a, zukhamte in keima thu la-in hong sa uh hi." 
Psalms69:13 Topa aw, ke’n ahihleh nang tungah thu kong ngen hi. A kicing na itna kip tawh a hun hoih ciangin hong dawng in, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms69:14 Buannawng thuk sungah tumsukna ding panin nangma thuman huhna tawh kei hong hon inla, tuithukte le ka galte’ kiang panin kei hong suaktasak in." 
Psalms69:15 Keima tungah tuikhang lauhuai hong luangsak kei inla, khuamial thukpi hong nawmvalhsak kei in. Gum in a kuavang keima tungah hong khaknelhsak kei in." 
Psalms69:16 Topa aw, na itna kip hoih ahih manin kei hong dawng inla, na hehpihna lian a om tawh kizui-in kei’ lam hong nga in." 
Psalms69:17 Na nasempa kiang pan na maitang seel kei inla, kei cimawh ka hih ciangin hong dawng meng in." 
Psalms69:18 Kei kiangah hong nai inla, kei hong hon in. Ka galte’ khutsung pan kei hong khah in!" 
Psalms69:19 Keimah hong kisimmawhna, ka maizumna le ka mindaina nang na thei a, ka galte khempeuh zong nang na thei hi." 
Psalms69:20 Simmawhna in ka lungsim hong zo a, kei ka cimawh ta hi. Kei a hong hehpih ding mi ka zonzon hangin kuamah om lo a, hong huh ding ka zon hangin kuamah ka mu kei hi." 
Psalms69:21 Amaute in an dingin gu hong pia uh a, ka dangtakna-ah dawn dingin tuithuk hong pia uh hi." 
Psalms69:22 Amau’ mai-a kilui ante thangzak suaksak inla, amau’ biakna pawi ante tehlop suaksak in." 
Psalms69:23 Khua a muh theih loh nadingun amau’ mit mialsak inla, a kawngte uh zawcipsak in." 
Psalms69:24 Amaute tungah nangma thangpaihna sungsuk inla, na sinsona amaute bansak in." 
Psalms69:25 Amaute’ phualpi a kilawi mun suak hen la, amau’ bukah mi khat zong tengsak kei in." 
Psalms69:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na satgawp mi amaute in bawlsia uh a, nangmah in na liamsaksa mi amaute in gimsak sawnsawn uh hi." 
Psalms69:27 Amau’ gim thuakna banah thuaksak thuahthuah lai inla, nangma tung panin suahtakna ngah kei ta uh hen." 
Psalms69:28 A nungtate’ laibu sung panin amaute kiphiatsak inla, miphate lakah a min uh kikhumsak kei in." 
Psalms69:29 Ahih hangin keimah in gimna thuakin na ka sa hi. Pasian aw, kei hong kaito-in hong honkhia ta in." 
Psalms69:30 Lasakna tawh Pasian’ min ka phat ding a, lungdamna tawh amah ka pahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms69:31 Hih banga hihna in bawngtal tawh biakna ahi a, bawngtalno tawh biakna sangin zong Topa lungdamsak zaw ding hi." 
Psalms69:32 Netniamna a thuakte in hih thu mu-in lungdam uh hen. Pasian a zong note aw, na lungsim uh nosuaksakkik un." 
Psalms69:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a cimawhte’ aw za a, henna sungah a om a mite simmawh lo hi." 
Psalms69:34 Vantung le leitung, tuipi le a sungah a om khempeuhte in amah phat ta uh hen." 
Psalms69:35 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Zion honin Judah khuapite lamkik ding a, a nasemte tua lai-ah tengin tang pah ding uh hi." 
Psalms69:36 Ama nasemte’ tate in tua leitang luah ding uh a, amah a itte tua sungah teng ding uh hi." 
Psalms70:1 Pasian aw, keimah hong honkhia nuam in. Topa aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms70:2 Kei, thah hong sawmte maizumin kibuaigawp sak in. Keima siatna ding a deihte nungkiksak inla, mindaisak in." 
Psalms70:3 “Ha, ha!” a cite a maizumna uh tawh maikhingsak in." 
Psalms70:4 Nang hong zongte khempeuh lungdam mahmahin na min hangin kipak tahen. Na hotkhiat ding a utte in, “Pasian lian hi,” cici tahen." 
Psalms70:5 Ahih hangin kei zawngin ka cimawh hi. Pasian aw, hong manlang in. Nang pen keimah huhpa le hong honkhia pa na hi hi. Topa aw, hong zekai kei in." 
Psalms71:1 Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms71:2 Na thumanna tawh kei hong huh inla, hong honkhia in. Keima lamah na bil hong ngat inla, hong hon in." 
Psalms71:3 Hong hon dingin ka belh suangpi, ka kulh muanhuai, hong hi ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong honpa le ka belh pa na hi hi." 
Psalms71:4 Ka Pasian aw, migilote’ khutsung pan le thuman lo mite le migilote’ matna panin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms71:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian aw, ka neu lai a kipanin ka hong lamet, ka hong muan na hi hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms71:6 Ka suah tung a kipanin nangmah kong bel a, ka nu’ gil sung panin hong lakhia pa na hi hi. Nangmah ka hong phat ngitnget hi." 
Psalms71:7 Mi tampite a dingin a siahil bang ka hih hangin nang pen a muanhuai, keima belh na hi hi." 
Psalms71:8 Sunthapai-in nangmah ka hong phat a, na minthanna ka gen tawntung hi." 
Psalms71:9 Ka teek hun ciangin kei hong lawnkhia kei inla, ka tha a kiat ciangin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms71:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka galte kihoho-in, keimah hong thahnopna thu kikumkum uh hi." 
Psalms71:11 “Pasian in amah nusiazo a, amah a hon ding kuamah om lo ahih manin, amah delhin man ni,” kici uh hi." 
Psalms71:12 Pasian aw, kei kiang panin gamla om kei in. Ka Pasian aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms71:13 Kei hong mawhsakte zahhuai-in beimang uh hen la, keima siatna ding a zongte simmawhna le minsiatna in tuamcip tahen." 
Psalms71:14 Ahih hangin ke’n, nang kong lamen ding a, nangmah kong phat semsem lai ding hi." 
Psalms71:15 Thuman tawh na hotkhiatna na nasepnate simzawh lohin tam ahih manin sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms71:16 Topa Pasian aw, na nasep liante ka phat ding a, na thumanna bek genin ka nei ding hi." 
Psalms71:17 Pasian aw, ka khangno lai a kipanin nong thuhilh a, a lamdang na nasepnate ka gengen lai hi." 
Psalms71:18 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian aw, hong piang lai ding mite khempeuh tungah nangma hatna thu ka gen khit matengin, teekin ka sam a kang zongin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms71:19 Pasian aw, na vangliatna le na thumanna in van sangpite banto hi. Pasian aw, na lianpipi na sem khinzo hi. Nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam?" 
Psalms71:20 Gimna lianpipi a hong tuaksak nangmah in kei nong hingkiksak ding a, lei thukpi sung panin nong lakhiato ding hi." 
Psalms71:21 Nangmah in ka min hoihna nong khangsak ding a, nong hehnem kik ding hi." 
Psalms71:22 Ka Pasian aw, na thumannate hangin kei zong harp lasakna tawh nangmah kong phat ding hi. Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa aw, laiza lasakna tawh nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms71:23 Nangmah phatna ka sak ciangin nuamin ka awng ding a, na hong hotkhiatna hangin ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nuamin ka awng ding hi." 
Psalms71:24 Keima siatna ding a zongte kizahhuaisak khin a, minsia khinzo ahih manun thuman tawh na hong huhna sunthapai-in ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms72:1 Pasian aw, nangma thutang, kumpipa hilh inla, nangma thuman, kumpi tapa hilh in." 
Psalms72:2 Amah in thumanna tawh na mite tungah thu khen hen la, na mizawngte tungah thu a tangin khen tahen." 
Psalms72:3 Mual liante le mual neute in thumanna tawh na mite a dingin nopna tampi piangsak tahen. 
Psalms72:4 Amah in mizawngte a’ ding thu a manin khen hen la, mi cimawhte tungah suahtakna pia-in, midang a nengniamte sucipgawp tahen." 
Psalms72:5 Ni le kha a omlaiteng, khang tawntungin amah hing tahen." 
Psalms72:6 Amah pen pawn lak lopa tungah a kia guah, lei a kawtsak guahzu tawh kibang tahen." 
Psalms72:7 Ama hun sungin thuman pung hen la, khapi a bei mateng nopna om tahen." 
Psalms72:8 Ama ukna, tuipi khat pan tuipi khat, Gunpi panin leimong dongin om tawntung tahen." 
Psalms72:9 Ama galte khempeuh ama mai-ah kun uh hen la, amah a langpangte leilak kidenna uh hen." 
Psalms72:10 Tarshish kumpite le tuikulh neu-a kumpite in ama tungah siah pia uh hen la, Sheba le Seba kumpite in letsong puak ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:11 Kumpi khempeuh ama mai-ah bok uh hen la, minam khempeuh in ama na sem ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte in a koh ciangin amah in honkhia a, mizawng, a huh ding a om lote amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms72:13 A thakiam, a cimawh mite amah in hehpih a, mi cimawhte’ nuntakna amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms72:14 Amah in amaute pammaihsa ahih manin netniamna le ngong hihna panin amaute a honkhia hi. 
Psalms72:15 Amah a khansau hen la, Sheba gam a khamte ama tungah kipia tahen. Ama a dingin thu kingetsak tawntung hen la, sunthapai-in ama a dingin thupha kingetsak tahen." 
Psalms72:16 Gam sung khempeuhah an tampi tak piang hen la, mual liante dawnah dim mema-in Lebanon gam hoih sung bang ta hen la, gamlak a lopate bangin khuapite sunga om mite pung ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:17 Ama min kip tawntung hen la, a minthanna kip paisuak hen. Ama hangin mite in thupha ngah hen la, minam khempeuh in amah pen thupha ngah pa, ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:18 Na lamdangte a bawl amah bek ahi Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Psalms72:19 A minthang ama min in thupha ngah tawntung hen la, ama minthanna tawh leitung khempeuh kidim tahen. Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Jessi’ tapa David’ thungetnate a beita ahi hi. 
Psalms73:1 Israel mite bangin a lungsim a siangtho a thutang mite tungah Pasian hoih takpi hi. 
Psalms73:2 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh ka khe kisuipuk dektak a, ka khe taal dektak hi." 
Psalms73:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote’ daupaina ka muh ciangin mi kihisakte ka eng hi. 
Psalms73:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nat velvalna bangmah thuak lo uh a, a pumpi uh cidamin zol hilhial hi." 
Psalms73:5 Amaute in midangte bangin haksatna thuak lo uh a, amaute in midangte bangin gimna ngah lo uh hi." 
Psalms73:6 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khainiang bangin kiphatsakna ok uh a, puan bangin ngongtatna silh uh hi." 
Psalms73:7 A lungsim panun gitlohna pusuaksak uh a, a ngaihsutna uh gitlohna tawh a dimlet hi." 
Psalms73:8 Amaute in mi thusim loin el pau uh a, kiliatsakna tawh a sucip dingin mi a tawng uh hi." 
Psalms73:9 Amaute’ gensiatna in vantung dong banto a, kiliatsakna tawh leitungah thu gen kawikawi uh hi." 
Psalms73:10 Tua ahih ciangin mite in amaute phat uh a, amau’ mawhna zong lo uh hi." 
Psalms73:11 Amaute in, “Pasian in bangci theih ding ahi hiam? Sangpenpa in phawk ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Psalms73:12 Amaute migilo ahi uh hi. A tawntungin nuamtakin om hithiat uh a, amaute a hauhna uh khang semsem zaw lai hi." 
Psalms73:13 Ka lungsim siangsak a, mawhna ka bawl loh hangin a phattuamna om tuan lo hi." 
Psalms73:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh sunthapai-in gimna ka thuak a, zingsang simin hong kithuhilh hi." 
Psalms73:15 Tu-a bangin thu a gen hi leng, nangma mite tungah a thutak lo ka suak ding hi." 
Psalms73:16 Ahih hangin hih thu a bangci hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin kei a dingin a lunggimhuai mahmah nasep khat hong suak a," 
Psalms73:17 Pasian’ biakinn sungah ka pai ciangin a thutawpna dongte ka tel hi. 
Psalms73:18 Nangmah in amaute mun nalna-ah na koih takpi ding a, a sia dingin amaute na tuksak ding hi." 
Psalms73:19 Tomno sungin amaute kisusia-in, lau mahmahna in amaute nilkhiamang ding hi." 
Psalms73:20 Amaute pen zan a mangmat tawh kibang lel a, na khanlawh ciangin amaute a bangci pian hiam, ci-in na phawk nawn kei hi." 
Psalms73:21 Ka lung khamin ka lungsim hong nat ciangin," 
Psalms73:22 keimah hai-in bangmah ka thei kei a, nangma mai-ah ganhing tawh ka kibang hi." 
Psalms73:23 Ahih hangin nangmah tawh ka omkhawm ngitnget a, ka khut taklamin kei na hong len hi." 
Psalms73:24 Thulahna tawh keimah nong makaih a, a nung ciangin minthanna munah na hong tunpih ding hi." 
Psalms73:25 Nang simloh vantungah kua nei ka hi hiam? Nang simloh ka deih ding leitungah kuamah om lo hi. 
Psalms73:26 Ka lungsim le ka pumpi zawngkhal kha ding a, ahih hangin Pasian pen ka lungsim hatna le keima a’ hi tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms73:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a kigamlate kisia ding uh a, nangma tungah a hong khialte na beisak ding hi." 
Psalms73:28 Ahih hangin kei a dingin Pasian’ kiangah om ding a hoih ahi hi. Na sepnate khempeuh ka gentheih nadingin Topa Pasian ka hong bel hi. 
Psalms74:1 Pasian aw, bang hangin kote hong paaikhia paisuak na hi hiam? Bang hangin na gam sunga om nangma tuute tungah heh na hi hiam?" 
Psalms74:2 Tanglai-in na ngahsa na mihonte, nangma luah minam dingin na tatkhiatsate phawk in! Na tennasa Zion Mual hong phawk in." 
Psalms74:3 A sia densa munah hong pai in. Na biakinn sunga om khempeuh galte in susia khinta hi. 
Psalms74:4 Nangma galte mun siangtho laizangah awng uh a, amau’ dialte gualzawhna lim dingin a khai uh hi." 
Psalms74:5 Amaute pen tulak sing phatna-ah pai-in heipi tawh sing a phuk bang uh hi. 
Psalms74:6 Tua ciangin biakinn na a kizemte khempeuh sek-hei le sekpi tawh a satkham uh hi. 
Psalms74:7 Amaute in mei tawh na biakinn hal uh a, nangmah hong kibiakna mun a susia uh hi." 
Psalms74:8 Amaute in, “A vekpi-in zo mang khin ni,” kici uh a, gam sung tenga om Pasian biakna inn khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
Psalms74:9 Kote in ka mailam thu ding uh ka thei kei uh hi. Kamsang khat zong om nawn lo a, bang tanvei hi ding, ci-in a thei kuamah ka om kei uh hi." 
Psalms74:10 Pasian aw, ka galte in bang tanvei hong thusim loin om ding ahi hiam? Langpangte in nangma min hong simmawh den ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms74:11 Bang hangin na khut dokkik a, na khut taklam na ang-ah koihcip na hi hiam?" 
Psalms74:12 Ahi zongin Pasian pen tanglai pek a kipanin kumpi hi tawntung a, hih leitungah a hong honkhia zelzel ngei ka Kumpi ahi hi." 
Psalms74:13 Na vangliatna tawh tuipi na khenkham a, tuite tunga gulpite’ lutangte na sukham hi." 
Psalms74:14 Nangmah in Awle’ lutangte na sukham a, amah pen, gamlak ganhingte’ nek dingin na pia hi." 
Psalms74:15 Ciktuite le luite na phulsak a, guntui luangte na kangsak hi." 
Psalms74:16 Sun pen nangma a’ hi a, zan zong nangma a’ mah ahi hi. Nangmah in ni le kha na bawl hi." 
Psalms74:17 Leitung gamgi khempeuhte le phalbi hun le khuakhal hunte na bawl khin hi. 
Psalms74:18 Topa aw, galte in nang hong thusim lohna le, dawibia mite in nangma min a hong simmawhna hong phawk ta in." 
Psalms74:19 A cimawh mite a gal gilote uh khut sungah nusia kei inla, bawlsiatna a thuak mite mangngilh kei in." 
Psalms74:20 Nangma thuciamna hong pi ngaihsut in; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mun mialna khempeuh mi ngongtatte tawh kidim hi. 
Psalms74:21 A kisikcip mite zahhuaisak kei inla, mizawng le mi cimawhte nangma min kiphatsak in." 
Psalms74:22 Pasian aw, tho inla, nangma thu-ah hong pang in. Dawibia mite in sun tawntungin nang a hong thusim lohna hong phawk ta in!" 
Psalms74:23 Nangma galte’ kikona aw, nang a hong langpangte a gamlum semsemna mangngilh kei ta in." 
Psalms75:1 Pasian aw, nangma tungah ka lungdam mahmah uh a, nangma tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. Nangma liatna thu ka gen uh a, a lamdang na bawlnate ka sut kikkik uh hi." 
Psalms75:2 A hun ka sehsa ni ciangin thu a manin ka khen ding hi. 
Psalms75:3 Leitung le a tunga tengte khempeuh a kilin’ ciangin a khuampite a kipsak pa keimah ka hi hi. 
Psalms75:4 A kiphasakte tungah, “Kiphasak kei un,” a gilote tungah, “Kihisak kei un." 
Psalms75:5 Kihisak kei unla, kiphatsakna tawh kampau kei un,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms75:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh vangliatna pen nisuahna lam ahi a, nitumna lam ahi a, gamlak pan ahi zongin a hong pai hi lo hi." 
Psalms75:7 Mihing khat a sangsak, mihing khat a niamsak thukhen pa pen Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms75:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ khut sungah leenggahzu a phuan, a kihelkim ngingei hai khat om a, amah in tua sung panin hong bungkhia ding a, leitung migilo khempeuh in a tawdat dong takin a liaktum ding uh hi." 
Psalms75:9 Ahih hangin kei ahihleh ka lungdam ngitnget ding a, Jakob Pasian’ tungah phatna late ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms75:10 Migilote’ vangliatna khempeuh amah in susia ding a, ahih hangin thuman mite’ vangliatna khang semsem ding hi." 
Psalms76:1 Judah gam sungah Pasian kithei a, Israel gam sungah ama min lian hi." 
Psalms76:2 Zion khua sungah ama tenna mun kibawl hi. 
Psalms76:3 Amah in tua lai-ah thaltangte, lum, namsau, le galhiamte a kuaitan hi." 
Psalms76:4 A om ngitnget mual liante sangin na min thangzaw a, na lianzaw hi." 
Psalms76:5 A thahatte’ neihsa nate kisutkhia a, amaute ihmucip suak uh hi." 
Psalms76:6 Jakob’ Pasian aw, nangma thuhilhna hangin sakol le a tung tuang pa khawlcip uh hi." 
Psalms76:7 Ahih hangin nang na kihtakhuai mahmah hi. Na heh khit phot ciangin nangma mai-ah kua ding ngam nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms76:8 Vantung panin thukhenna na genkhia hi. Gimna a thuak leitung mi khempeuh a hon dingin thukhen dingin Pasian a kipat ciangin leitung lau mahmahin tang hetloin a om khikhe hi. 
Psalms76:9  
Psalms76:10 Mihingte’ hehna in nang hong kiphatna ding piangsak ding a, na hehna panin a suakta mite in nangmah pahtawina pawi a bawl ding uh hi." 
Psalms76:11 Topa na Pasian’ tungah na thuciamnate uh pia unla, tuate khempeuh zui un. Leitung kumpite sangin a kihtakhuai zaw, uliante’ lungsim a niamkhiat, zahtak ding ahipa’ tungah, ama kiimah a om mi khempeuhte in letsong puak ta uh hen!" 
Psalms76:12  
Psalms77:1 Pasian’ tungah a gingin ka kiko khia a, a hong zaktheih nadingin a gingin ka kiko hi." 
Psalms77:2 Ka lungkham hunin keimah in Topa ka zong hi. Zanin thu ngenin gim hetloin ka khut ka zan a, ahi zongin hehnepna ka ngah kei hi." 
Psalms77:3 Keimah in Pasian ka ngaihsun a, ka tautau hi. Lung ka geelgeel a, ka gim mahmah hi." 
Psalms77:4 A ihmu lo dingin kei na hong bawl a, lungkham lua-in ka pau thei kei hi." 
Psalms77:5 Hun luite ka ngaihsun a, sawtpek lai-a kumte ka phawk hi." 
Psalms77:6 Zanthapai-in ka lungsimah ka kihoho a, lung geelgeelin thu ka kan ciangin:" 
Psalms77:7 “Topa in hong nial paisuakin, kei tungah maipha hong piakik lo ding hiam?" 
Psalms77:8 Ama itna kip bei paisuakin, ama thuciamte maimang suak ding hiam?" 
Psalms77:9 Pasian in hehpihna a neih ding mangngilh khinta ahi hiam? Ama hehna in hehpihnate vukcip khin ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. 
Psalms77:10 Tua bang ahihleh, “Sangpenpa’ hat nawn lohna pen ka khakham veina ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms77:11 Topa’ sepnate ka lungsimah ka phawk ding a, hun lui lai-a nangma na lamdangte ka ciamteh ding hi." 
Psalms77:12 Nangma nasepna khempeuh ka lungngaingai ding a, nangma sep na liante ka ngaihsunsun ding hi." 
Psalms77:13 Pasian aw, nangma lampi siangtho hi. Eima Pasian tawh kibangin bang pasian lian ahi hiam?" 
Psalms77:14 Nang pen na lamdangte a bawl, minam dangte’ lakah na vangliatna a langkhiasak khin Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms77:15 Nangmah in na vangliatna tawh Jakob le Josef’ suante, na mite na honkhia hi." 
Psalms77:16 Tui in nang hong muh ciangin Pasian aw, tuite in nang hong muh ciangin a lau uh hi. Tui thukpi zong a ling hi." 
Psalms77:17 Meiipite in tui sungkhia-in, vante ging damdam a, nangma thaltangte mun citengah a leeng uh hi." 
Psalms77:18 Na vanging lianpi pingpei sungah omin, khuaphialepte in leitung taan a, leitang linggawpin a kising damdam hi." 
Psalms77:19 Nangma lamlianpi tuipi tung hi a, nangma lamneute zong luiliante’ tung mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin na khekhapte kimu lo hi." 
Psalms77:20 Nangmah in Moses le Aaron’ khut tawh nangma mite tuuhon bangin na makaih hi. 
Psalms78:1 Ka mite aw, keima hilhna ngai unla, ka kam tawh ka thugente na bil uh hong ngat un." 
Psalms78:2 Note tungah thugentehna zangin ka kam ka-in thu ka hong gen ding hi. I pu i pate in hong gensa, eite in i zaksa le i theihsa, tanglai-a thuthukte ka hong genkhia ding hi." 
Psalms78:3  
Psalms78:4 Hih thute, i tate tungah eite in im loin, a hong piang lai ding khang thakte tungah, Topa’ minthang nasepna, ama vangliatna, ama sepsa na lamdangte i gen ding hi." 
Psalms78:5 Amaute pen Pasian tungah a lungsim thuman lo, lungsim kip a nei lo khangmi, lungsim khauhin a lehdo khangmi, amau’ pulepate tawh kibang loin, amaute in Pasian sungah amau’ lametna koihin, Pasian’ nasepnate mangngilh loin, ama thupiakte zui-in, a suak nai lo naupangte, a hong piangkik khang thakte in a thu thei-in, amaute ding khia-in amau’ tuletate tungah a thu a gentheih nadingin, amah in, i pate in a tate a hilhsawn dinga a sawl ahi, Israel sungah thukham khat koihin, Jakob sungah tecipanna khat a koih hi." 
Psalms78:6  
Psalms78:7  
Psalms78:8  
Psalms78:9 Thal a tawi Efraim mite, galkido ni-in nungkik uh hi." 
Psalms78:10 Amaute in Pasian’ thuciamna zui lo uh a, ama thukham bangin gamta nuam lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:11 Ama bawlsa le amaute tungah nalamdang a lahsate amaute in mangngilh uh hi. 
Psalms78:12 Egypt gam sung Zoan munah, a pu a pate uh’ muhna-ah amah in nalamdang a bawl hi." 
Psalms78:13 Amah in tuipi kikhensakin amaute kantansak a, tuite a lompi-in a omsak hi." 
Psalms78:14 Sun hunin amah in amaute meiipi khat tawh kha a, zan tawntung, meikuang taang khat tawh amaute a kha hi." 
Psalms78:15 Amah in gam sungah suangpite kitamsak a, tuithukpi sung panin a piangkhia bangin amaute’ tungah tui dawn ding tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms78:16 Amah in suangpi sung panin luitui luangkhiasak a, guntui luang bangin tuite a luangsak hi." 
Psalms78:17 Ahi zongin ama tungah amaute khial lailai uh a, Sehnel gam sungah Sangpen pa a lehpan uh hi." 
Psalms78:18 Amaute in amau’ duh mahmah an a kalhna uh tawh amaute in a lungsim sung uhah Pasian a ze-et uh hi. 
Psalms78:19 Amaute in Pasian gensia uh a, “Pasian in gamlakah an pia thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms78:20 Amah in suangpi sat a, tui lengkhia-in tuite dimlet takpi ahi hiam? Amah in ama mite, an ahi a, sameh ahi zongin a pia thei takpi ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Psalms78:21 Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin hehna tawh kidimin, meikuang tawh Jakob sugawp a, Israel tungah a heh semsem hi." 
Psalms78:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasian um lo uh a, a honkhiazo dingin muang lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:23 Ahi zongin amah in, tunga om vantungte thu pia-in, vantung kongte hong a," 
Psalms78:24 nek dingin amau tungah manna an zusakin, amaute tungah vantung an a pia hi." 
Psalms78:25 Mihingte in vantung mite’ an ne uh a, amah in amaute tungah an tampi a puak hi." 
Psalms78:26 Amah in vantungah nisuahna huih nungsakin, ama vangliatna tawh leitaw lam huih paikhiatpih a," 
Psalms78:27 amah in amaute tungah leivui zah-a tam sa zusak a, tuipi sehnel zah-a tam vasate a khiatsuk hi." 
Psalms78:28 Amau’ giahphual laizang, amau’ omna kiim khempeuhah tuate a kiasak hi." 
Psalms78:29 Amau’ duh pen pia ahih manin, amaute in ne-in gilvah uh hi." 
Psalms78:30 Ahih hangin amaute in a duh pen uh a kham ma, amau’ kam sungah an a omlaipi mahin," 
Psalms78:31 amaute’ tungah Pasian’ hehna tungkikin amah in amaute lakah a hatpen teng thatin, Israel-te’ muanlesuan teng a vatlum hi." 
Psalms78:32 Hih na lamdangte khempeuh a omkhin hinapi-in amaute khial lai veve uh a, ama na lamdangte’ hangin amaute in um tuan lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:33 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amau’ hunte husan’ khat bangin maimangsak a, amau’ nuntakna, launa lianpi tawh a beisak hi." 
Psalms78:34 Amaute pawlkhat a thah khit ciangin a omlai mite in amah zong pan uh hi. Amaute kisikin, lungsim taktak tawh Pasian a zong uh hi." 
Psalms78:35 Amaute in Pasian pen, amaute a honkhia, Sangpen Pasian, amaute a hupa ahihna a phawk uh hi." 
Psalms78:36 Ahih hangin amaute in a kampi bek uh tawh amah phatkhem uh a, a leii uh tawh ama tungah zuaugen uh hi." 
Psalms78:37 Amaute’ lungsim ama lamah kip lo uh a, ama thuciamna-ah amaute thuman lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:38 Ahi zongin amah in hehpihna lungsim nei ahih manin amau’ khialhnate maisakin, amaute susia lo hi. Amah in a hehna ip zelzel a, a hehna khempeuh phongkhia lo hi." 
Psalms78:39 Amah in, amaute pen mihing hi lel a, a hong paikik nawn lo huihnung bang ahihna uh a phawk hi." 
Psalms78:40 Amaute in gamlakah amah lehdo zelzel uh a, sehnel gam sungah amah dahsak uh hi." 
Psalms78:41 Amaute in amah ze-et kikkik uh a, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pasian a phin uh hi." 
Psalms78:42 Galte’ kiang panin amah in amaute a hotkhiat ni hitaleh, Egypt gamah ama limte a bawl hun lai hitaleh, Zoan gamah a bawl a na lamdangte hitaleh, ama vangliatna hitaleh, amaute in ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:43  
Psalms78:44 Amaute in a luituite uh a dawn theih loh nadingin amau’ guntuite amah in sisan a suaksak hi. 
Psalms78:45 Amaute a petthei cippi honte, amaute’ lote a susia uiphukte amau’ lakah a sawl hi." 
Psalms78:46 Amau’ lo ante tangngol pia a, amau’ sepna gahte kauphe a pia hi." 
Psalms78:47 A leengguite uh gial tawh denggawp a, a theithekte uh vukkhal tawh susia hi." 
Psalms78:48 A ganhingte uh gial tawh denglum a, a gan khawite uh keek tawh a denglum hi." 
Psalms78:49 Amaute’ tungah a lauhuai ama sinsona, hehna, thangpaihna, gimna, le a susiathei van mi honkhat a khah hi." 
Psalms78:50 Amah in a sinsona ip loin, kuamah hinkhawi lo a, pulnatna tawh amaute a sisak hi." 
Psalms78:51 Ham’ suante’ inn sungah a ta upa pen teng, Egypt gam sung tacil khempeuh amah in a vatmai hi." 
Psalms78:52 Tua ciangin amah in tua bangin ama mite gamlakah paikhiatpihin, ganhing honpi bangin amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms78:53 Amah in a muanhuaina munah amaute paipih ahih manin amaute lau lo uh hi. Ahih hangin tuipi in amau’ galte tuumcip hi. 
Psalms78:54 A khut taklam tawh ama ngahsa mual ahi, a gam siangtho-ah amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms78:55 Amau’ mai panin midangte hawlkhia-in, amaute’ luah ding neihsa hawmsak a, Israel minamte amau’ buk sungah a tengsak hi." 
Psalms78:56 Ahi zongin amaute in Sangpen Pasian ze-etin lehdo uh a, ama thupiakna zui loin," 
Psalms78:57 a pu a pate uh mah bangin kiheikhia-in a zuau gamtat uh hi. Thal ginalo bangin amaute a kihuiheek uh hi. 
Psalms78:58 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a munsangte uh tawh amah a sinso nadingin phinphin uh a, amau’ milim bawlte tawh ama hazatna ding a piangsak uh hi." 
Psalms78:59 Pasian in a zak ciangin heh pha mahmah a, amah in Israel-te a nial siangtho hi." 
Psalms78:60 Mihingte’ lakah ama omna puanbuk ahi, Shiloh khua-a ama omna biakinn nusia a," 
Psalms78:61 ama vangliatna, galte’ tungah ap a, ama minthanna, galte’ khutah a pia hi." 
Psalms78:62 Amah in ama mite namsau tawh sisak a, ama luahte tungah a hehna a nga hi." 
Psalms78:63 Mei in a tangvalte kanglum a, a nungakte’ pasal ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Psalms78:64 Amau’ siampite, namsau in puksak a, amau’ zite in a pasalte kah zo lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:65 Tua ciangin Topa pen zukhamin a awng mi thahatpa, a ihmu tho bangin a khanglo hi." 
Psalms78:66 Amah in a langpangte zo a, a maizum tawntung dingin amaute a koih hi." 
Psalms78:67 Amah in Josef’ suante nial a, Efraim minamte teello hi." 
Psalms78:68 Ahih hangin ama it Zion Mual, Judah minam a teel hi." 
Psalms78:69 A kip den dingin a phuhsa leitang bang leh, a vantung inn bangin ama biakinn a lam hi." 
Psalms78:70 Amah in ama mi Jakob, ama luah Israel a cing dingin, no a nei tuupite a cinna, tuubukte panin la-in, ama nasem David a teel hi." 
Psalms78:71  
Psalms78:72 Amah in lungsim thutang tawh amaute hoihtakin cingin, a siam mahmah a khut tawh amaute lam a lak hi." 
Psalms79:1 Pasian aw, na luah gam sungah dawibiate hong pai uh hi. Amaute in na biakinn siangtho ninsak gawp uh a, Jerusalem khuapi siasak gawp khin uh hi." 
Psalms79:2 Amaute in, na nasemte’ luanghawmte huihlak vasate pia uh a, na mi siangthote’ sate leilak ganhingte a pia uh hi." 
Psalms79:3 Amaute in Jerusalem kimkotah tui buakkhiat bangin amaute’ sisan buakhia uh a, amaute a vui ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms79:4 Kote pen ka vengte uh’ zahko, ka kiim uha omte in a hong ko a hong nuihsat ka suak khinta uh hi." 
Psalms79:5 Topa aw, bang tanvei hi ding ahi hiam? Heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Nangma hazat hehna meikuang bangin kuang paisuak ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms79:6 Nangmah a hong thei lo minamte tung le, nangma tungah thu a hong ngen lo kumpi gamte tungah hehgawp in." 
Psalms79:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka mite uh thatmang khin uh a, ka gam sung khempeuh uh susiagawp khin uh hi." 
Psalms79:8 Ka pu ka pate uh mawhna hangin ko a suanlekhakte hong lang ngaihsut kei inla, hong kiniamkoih ahih manin kote a huh dingin na hehpihna hong paisak mengmeng in." 
Psalms79:9 Kote a hong honkhia Pasian aw, nangma min a than nadingin kote hong huhin, nangma min hangin kote hong khahkhia-in, ka mawhnate uh hong maisak ta in." 
Psalms79:10 “Amaute’ Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” minam dangte in a cih ding kilawm ding ahi hiam? Na nasemte’ sisan luangkhia a phulakna pen, minam dangte’ lak, komau’ muhna-ah kitheisak in." 
Psalms79:11 Thongkiate’ tauna ngai inla, thah dingin a kisehte na vangliatna tawh kizui-in suaktasak in." 
Psalms79:12 Amaute in nang hong zahkona mah tawh ka vengte uh’ ang sungah a zah sagihin thuk in, Topa!" 
Psalms79:13 Tua ciangin nangma mi, nangma gam sung tuu kote in nangma tungah lungdamna kong lak ngitnget ding uh a, a khang khangin nangmah phatnate ka gengen ding uh hi." 
Psalms80:1 Tuuhon bangin Josef a paipih, Israel Tuucingpa aw, ngai in! Kherub tungah a tupa aw," 
Psalms80:2 Efraim, Benjamin le Manasseh’ mai-ah taangkhia in! Na tha saan inla, kote a honkhia dingin hong pai ta in." 
Psalms80:3 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms80:4 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na mite’ thungetna-ah bang tanvei sinso niloh ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms80:5 Nangmah in a an dingun amaute tungah khitui na pia a, amaute’ dawn dingin khitui tampi na pia hi." 
Psalms80:6 Nangmah in, ka vengte uh’ thusim lohin kote na hong bawl a, ka galte un hong thusim loin hong nuihsan uh hi." 
Psalms80:7 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms80:8 Nangmah in Egypt panin leenggui khat na la a, minam dangte hawlkhia-in, tua leenggui na suan hi." 
Psalms80:9 Nangmah in tua leenggui a dingin leitang na hahsiang a, amah in zungthuk kha-in gam sung a dim hi." 
Psalms80:10 Ama liim in mual liante hoihtakin liimsun a, a hiang in taamtak sing liante hoihtakin khuh a," 
Psalms80:11 tuipi lamah a hiangte zamin, a dawnngekte in Gunpi lam a zuan hi." 
Psalms80:12 Tua ahih ciangin, lampi-ah a pai mi khempeuh in a gah a lawhtheih nadingin, bang hangin nangmah in a daigawl suvang na hi hiam?" 
Psalms80:13 Gamlak a om ngal in susiagawp a, zangsung sa khempeuh in kivakna-in nei uh hi." 
Psalms80:14 Hong kiheikik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Vantung panin hong ensukin hong mu in. Na khut taklam in a suansa, hih leenggui hong don in." 
Psalms80:15  
Psalms80:16 Amaute in mei tawh halin sattan gawp uh hi. Amaute heh et inla, susiagawp in." 
Psalms80:17 Ahih hangin nangma a dingin na hatsak mi’ tapa, na taklama om mipa tungah na thahatna guan in." 
Psalms80:18 Tua ciangin nang kiang panin ka kiheikik nawn kei ding uh hi. Kote hong nungtasak in, nang kong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms80:19 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Topa Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms81:1 Eite’ thahatna Pasian’ tungah nakpitakin la sa unla, Jakob Pasian’ tungah lungdamin awng un." 
Psalms81:2 La khat phuangin, khuangno tumin, a ngaih laiza khausai lasakna le harp khausai lasakna limtakin tum un." 
Psalms81:3 Khadet, khalik, i pawi ni-in peengkul tum un." 
Psalms81:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh, tua bang hih ding pen Israel-te a dingin thukham hi a, Jakob Pasian’ biakna ngeina a kip khat ahi hi." 
Psalms81:5 Egypt gamah a pai lai-un Israel mite’ tungah thupiakna-in amah in a neih ahi hi. Ka theih ngei loh kampau khat hih bangin ka za hi: 
Psalms81:6 “Na liangko uha om na vangikte uh ka hong lakkhiatsak a, na khut uha vangikte ka hong khiasak hi." 
Psalms81:7 Na cihmawh uh ciangin kei na hong sam uh a, keimah in note ka hong honkhia hi. A kilang lo vanging sung panin note ka hong dawng a, Meribah tui phualte-ah note ka hong ze-et hi." 
Psalms81:8 Ka mite aw, note kong thuhilh laitakin limtakin hong ngai un. Israel-te aw, keima thu a hong ngai hi hoh le-uh cin!" 
Psalms81:9 Note’ lakah pasian dang om lo ding a, pasian dang khat’ mai-ah na kun kei ding uh hi." 
Psalms81:10 Egypt gam panin note a hong lakhia, Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Na kam uh a golin ka un, keimah in kong dimsak ding hi." 
Psalms81:11 “Ahih hangin ka mite in keima thu hong ngai lo uh a, Israel-te in keima thu themkha zong zui lo uh hi." 
Psalms81:12 Tua ahih ciangin a ut bangun a gamta dingin amau’ lungsim khauhna bangin ka gamtasak hi. 
Psalms81:13 Ka mite in ka thu hong ngai-in, keima deih bangin Israel a gamta hileh!" 
Psalms81:14 Amau’ galte khempeuh ka zawhsak pak ding a, amau’ galte langpangin ka khut ka liik ding hi." 
Psalms81:15 Kei a hong mudahte ka mai-ah hong kun ding uh a, amaute’ gimthuakna kip paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms81:16 Mangbuh hoihpen tawh note ka hong vak ding a, suangpi pana khuaizu tawh note kong gilvahsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms82:1 Thu vaihawm kikhopna sungah Pasian in ama panmun hong len a, amah in pasian-te’ lakah thu a khen hi." 
Psalms82:2 “Note in bang tanvei a man loin thu khenin, migilote tungah angvanna zang ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms82:3 A ginalo mite le pa a nei lo mite tungah thuman unla, a thuakte le a cimawhte’ thu a manin khen un." 
Psalms82:4 A ginalo mite le a cimawh mite hon unla, migilote’ khutsung panin amaute honkhia un,” a ci hi." 
Psalms82:5 Amaute in thutheihna ahi a, thutelna ahi zongin bangmah nei lo uh a, khuamial sungah gamta uh ahih manin leitung bulpite khempeuh a kilinggawp hi." 
Psalms82:6 Ke’n kong cihin-ah, “Note khempeuh, Sangpenpa’ tate, pasian-te na hi uh hi." 
Psalms82:7 Ahi zongin mite bangin si-in, kumpi khat peuhpeuh bangin na kia ding uh hi,” kong ci hi." 
Psalms82:8 Pasian aw, tho in; leitung mite thu khen in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam khempeuh nangma a’ ahi hi." 
Psalms83:1 Pasian aw, dai dide-in om kei in. Lungnuamin, tang loin ommawk kei in, Pasian aw." 
Psalms83:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte in gamlumna piangsak uh a, nang hong mudahte kiphasak mahmah uh hi." 
Psalms83:3 Amaute in khem siamna tawh na mite thangsiah uh a, amaute in na it mite langpangin thu kikum uh hi." 
Psalms83:4 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, minam khat hihna panin amaute beisak ni. Israel min peuhmah kiphawksak nawn kei ni!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms83:5 Amaute in siatna ding geelin kithukhat uh a, nangmah hong langpangin thuciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms83:6 Edom mite le Ishmael mite, Moab le Hagri mite," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, Ammon, le Amalek mite, Filistia le Taia khua mite tawh thuciam a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms83:8 Assiria mite in zong amaute pawlpih uh a, amaute pen Lot’ suanlekhakte a dingin pawl muanhuaite ahi uh hi." 
Psalms83:9 Endor munah a kizogawp, leilakah a luang uh a muatgawp, Midian mite’ tungah na bawl bang leh, Kishon gun-a Sisera le Jabin-te’ tungah na bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl in." 
Psalms83:10  
Psalms83:11 “Pasian’ gam hoihte eima tan’ dingin la ni,” a ci Oreb le Zeeb-te bangin amau’ miliante bawl inla, Zeba le Zalmunna-te bangin amau a ukte khempeuh bawl in." 
Psalms83:12  
Psalms83:13 Ka Pasian aw, amaute pen pingpei sunga ninnen, huih mai-a ansi leeng bangsak ta in." 
Psalms83:14 Mei in gamlak a haltum bang, mualliante a kuansak bangin" 
Psalms83:15 na khuapi huihpi tawh amaute delh inla, na huihpi tawh amaute lausak gawp in." 
Psalms83:16 Topa aw, amaute in na min hong zontheih nadingin amaute khempeuh maizumna tawh kidimsak in." 
Psalms83:17 Amaute maizumin lungkia densak inla, a mindai-in siasak in." 
Psalms83:18 Topa a kici min nei nangmah bek leitung khempeuhah a Sangpenpa na hihna amaute theisak in. 
Psalms84:1 Vanglian Topa aw, nangma tenna mun bangzah takin etlawm ahi hiam?" 
Psalms84:2 Ke’n ka lunggulh mahmah hi. Topa’ huangsung ka lunggulh mahmah a, ka lungsim le ka pumpi a nungta Pasian’ tungah lungdam mahmahin la a sa hi." 
Psalms84:3 Vanglian Topa, ka kumpi le ka Pasian aw, na biakna tau-ah, kawlgit nangawn in a inn ding mu a, phialphiah in a omna ding, a note a koihna ding bu a mu hi." 
Psalms84:4 Nangma inn sungah tengin, nangmah phatna a sa ngitnget mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi." 
Psalms84:5 Nangma tung panin thahatna ngahin Zion zuatna lampi a tawn nuam mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Psalms84:6 Amaute in Kuamkeu mun kantanin a pai laitakun tua kuam pen ciktui tampi tawh kidim a, guahzu masate in zong tua mun pen bualtuite tawh a kidimsak hi." 
Psalms84:7 Amaute a paikawmun a tha uh hat semsem a, pasian-te’ Pasian Zion-ah mu ding uh hi." 
Psalms84:8 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka thungetna hong ngai in, Jakob Pasian!" 
Psalms84:9 Pasian aw, kote a hong hu ding pa hong etsak inla, na sathau nilh pa hong kem in." 
Psalms84:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mun dangah ni tulkhat om sangin nangma huang sungah ni khat om hoihzaw hi. Gitlohna inn sungah ka ten sangin ka Pasian’ inn kongcing pa ka hi nuamzaw hi. 
Psalms84:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian pen eite a hong hupa a minthang i kumpi hi a, maipha le pahtawina a hong piapa ahi hi. Thumanin a gamta mite tungah Topa in na hoih bangmah siit lo hi." 
Psalms84:12 Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah a hong muang mite, thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi." 
Psalms85:1 Topa aw, nangma leitang na hehpih a, Jakob’ nopsaknate a ngeina na bangsakkik hi." 
Psalms85:2 Na mite’ mawhna na maisak a, amau’ khialhna khempeuh na maisak hi." 
Psalms85:3 Na hehna khempeuh na damsak a, na sinsona na daisak hi." 
Psalms85:4 Kote hong honkhia Pasian aw, kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik inla, kote tunga na lungkim lohna hong beisak ta in."
