Psalms85:5 Kote’ tungah heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Khang tawntungin heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms85:6 Kote in nangmah kong phat theih nadingun ko na mite hong nungtasakkik lo ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms85:7 Topa aw, kote tungah na itna kip hong lak inla, hong huhin hong hon in." 
Psalms85:8 Topa Pasian’ thugen ding hong zasak dih un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama lamah lungsim takpi tawh a kihei ama mi siangtho, ama mite’ tungah kilemna thu a gen ding hi." 
Psalms85:9 I gam sungah minthanna a om theih nadingin amah a zahtakte a dingin ama hong hotkhiatna hong om takpi hi. 
Psalms85:10 Itna kip le thutak kigawm ding a, thuman le kilemna kihual ding uh hi." 
Psalms85:11 Leilak panin thutak hong pokhia ding a, vantung panin thuman in hong ensuk ding hi." 
Psalms85:12 Topa in a hoih nate eite tungah hong pia ding a, i leitang in hauhna piangsak ding hi." 
Psalms85:13 Topa’ mai-ah thuman na ma pai ding a, ama lampi a bawlkhol ding hi." 
Psalms86:1 Topa aw, kei hehpihhuai-in cimawh ka hih manin na bil hong ngat inla, hong dawng in." 
Psalms86:2 Mihoih ka hih manin kei hong kem in. Nangmah a hong muang na nasempa hong hon in. 
Psalms86:3 Nang pen ka Pasian na hi hi. Topa aw, sun tawntung hong kiko ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in." 
Psalms86:4 Topa aw, nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin na nasempa hong kipaaksak in." 
Psalms86:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah hoihin mawhna na maisak a, hong ngente khempeuh tungah itna kip tampi na nei hi." 
Psalms86:6 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, nang tungah thumin kong kikona hong ngai in." 
Psalms86:7 Kei hong dawng na hih manin ka haksat hun ciangin nangma tungah kong ngen hi. 
Psalms86:8 Topa aw, pasian-te lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo a, nangma sep bang, kuamah in sem thei lo hi." 
Psalms86:9 Topa aw, na bawlsa minam khempeuh hong pai-in na mai-ah hong kun ding uh a, nangma min hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms86:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah lianin na lamdangte na bawl a, nang bek Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms86:11 Topa aw, nang tungah hong thumanin nangma lampi ka zuih theih nadingin kei hong hilh inla, nangma min a zahtakte tawh keima lungsim pumkhat hong bangsak in." 
Psalms86:12 Topa ka Pasian aw, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na tungah ka lungdam a, nangma min ka thangsak ngitnget ding hi." 
Psalms86:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah na hong itna kip lian mahmah a, Leinuai thuk sung panin kei nong honkhia khin hi." 
Psalms86:14 Pasian aw, mi kihisakte, kei langpangin hong kipan hi. Thu-helhawt mi pawlkhat in kei, thah hong sawm uh a, amaute in nang hong thudon lo uh hi." 
Psalms86:15 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a hehpih thei, a dik Pasian na hi a, heh hak mahmahin, itna kip le thumanna tawh a kidim na hi hi." 
Psalms86:16 Kei lamah hong kihei inla, kei hong hehpih in. Na nasempa thahatsak inla, na nasem numei’ tapa hong hon in." 
Psalms86:17 Topa nangmah in kei hong huhin, nong thahatsakna hangin, kei hong mudahte in mu-in a zahhuai nadingun keima tungah na maipha hong lak in." 
Psalms87:1 Mual Siangtho tungah ama phuhsa khuapi om hi. 
Psalms87:2 Topa in Israel gam mundang khempeuhte sangin Zion kulhkongpi itzaw hi. 
Psalms87:3 Pasian’ khuapi aw, na minthanna teng hong kigengen hi." 
Psalms87:4 Kei hong theite lakah Egypt le Babylon ka hel hi. Filistia, Taia le Ethiopia te zong kihel a, “Hihte pen hua lai mah panin a piang ahi hi,” kici ding hi." 
Psalms87:5 Zion tawh kisai-in ahihleh, “Minam khempeuh ama sung pana suak ahi hi,” kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Sangpenpa mahmah in amah kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms87:6 Topa in, “Hihte pen hua lai-a suak,” ci-in minam khempeuh ciamtehin a gelh ding hi." 
Psalms87:7 Tua sunga teng mite in, “Kote’ lungdamna khempeuh nangma sungah om hi,” ci ciat ding uh hi." 
Psalms88:1 Topa, ka Pasian aw, sunin huhna kong ngen a, zan hun sungin nangma mai-ah kong kiko hi." 
Psalms88:2 Ka thungetna hong za inla, nong huh ding ka hong ngetna hong ngai in." 
Psalms88:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh lungkhamna tampi thuakin, ka si dektak hi." 
Psalms88:4 Kei pen a sidek mi tawh ka kibang ta a, ka thahatna khempeuh beimang khinta hi." 
Psalms88:5 Misite lakah a kinusia, a kithatlum, han sunga lum, na huh zawh ahi nawn lo, na phawk nawn lohte ka bang ta hi." 
Psalms88:6 Kei pen, mialin a thukna mun, Leihawm thuk sungah nong koih khinta hi." 
Psalms88:7 Nangma hehna keima tungah gik mahmah a, na tuihualte khempeuh tawh kei na hong vukcip hi." 
Psalms88:8 Ka kikholhpih mite in kei a hong pelh dingin na hong bawl a, amaute tungah a cikzethuai khatin kei na hong bawl hi. Ka suahtak theih loh nadingin kei hong kikhumcip a," 
Psalms88:9 ka gim thuakna hangin ka mit a mial ta hi. Topa aw, nisimin nangma tungah kong ngen a, thu ngenin ka khutte nangma lamah kong zan hi." 
Psalms88:10 A sisate a dingin nalamdang a bawl na hi hiam? Nangmah a phat dingin mi a si khinsate hong tho ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms88:11 Han sungah na itna kip kigen ding a, siatna munah nangma thumannate kigen ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms88:12 Khuamialna sungah na na lamdangte kithei a, mangngilhna gam sungah na hotkhiat huhna kithei ahi hiam?" 
Psalms88:13 Ahih hangin Topa aw, na tungah huhna kong ngen a, zingsang simin na mai-ah thu ka hong ngen hi." 
Psalms88:14 Topa aw, bang hangin kei hong paaikhia na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei kiang panin na maitang seel na hi hiam?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka neu tung a kipan gim thuakin ka si dektak hi. Nong gimpiakte ka thuak a, ka cih nading mel ka thei nawn kei hi." 
Psalms88:16 Nangma hehna in keimah hong nawkgawp khin a, a lauhuai mahmah nangma hong sukgawpna in kei hong susia ta hi." 
Psalms88:17 Amaute in tuikhang bangin sun tawntungin kei hong umcih uh a, kei hong tuamcip uh hi." 
Psalms88:18 Kei hong itte le ka lawmte keimah nong pelhsak khin a, khuamial bekbek, keima kikholhpih ahi hi." 
Psalms89:1 Topa aw, na itna kip la-in ka sa tawntung ding a, nangma thutakna ka gen tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma itna kip tawntung a, na thutakna zong vantung bangin kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms89:3 Nangmah in, “Ka teelpa tawh thuciamna ka bawlzo a, ka nasem David tungah thu ka ciamzo hi:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Na suan na khakte kumpi-in ka kipsak ding a, na kumpi gam khang tawntungin ka kipsak ding hi,’” na ci khin hi." 
Psalms89:5 Topa aw, na nasepna a lamdangte, vantungte phatsak inla, mi siangthote’ kikhopna sungah na thumanna phatsak in." 
Psalms89:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen vantung a kua tawh kitehthei ding ahi hiam? Mi siangthote’ kikhopna sungah a kizahtak Pasian, a kiima omte khempeuh tungah lianin a zahtakhuai Topa pen van mite’ lakah kua pen tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:7  
Psalms89:8 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na khempeuhah na thutak a, nangmah bangin a vanglian kua om ahi hiam, Topa aw." 
Psalms89:9 Nang in tuipi khang na uk a, a tuihualte a san ciangin na daisak hi." 
Psalms89:10 Nangmah in a kithat lumsa luanghawm khat bangin ganhing golpi Rahab na sugawp a, na thahatna tawh na galte na zogawp hi." 
Psalms89:11 Vantungte nangma a’ hi a, leitung zong nangma a’ mah ahi hi. Leitung le a sunga om khempeuh nangma phuhsa ahi hi." 
Psalms89:12 Saklam le khanglamte nangma bawlsa hi a, Tabor mual le Hermon mual in lungdamna tawh na min hong phat uh hi." 
Psalms89:13 Nangma vang lian mahmah a, na thahatna kigen thei lo hi." 
Psalms89:14 Thuman le thutang tawh na ukna za na phut a, itna kip le thuman tawh na khempeuh na sem hi." 
Psalms89:15 Topa aw, lungdamin lasakna tawh nang hong bia a, na migitna khuavak sungah nuamtakin a nungta, nangma hangin sunthapai-in lungdam a, nangma hoihna hong phat mite mi nuamsa ahi uh hi." 
Psalms89:16  
Psalms89:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nakpitakin kote na hong gualzosak a, kote hong angvanin na hong gualzosak hi." 
Psalms89:18 Kote a hong hu Topa hi a, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pasian nangmah in ka kumpipa uh nong pia hi." 
Psalms89:19 Hun lui lai-in na thuman mipa tungah mang sungah thu na gen a, “A vanglian khat pa tungah lukhu ka koih khinzo a, mite lak panin a kitengkhia mi khat ka liansakzo hi." 
Psalms89:20 Ka nasempa David ka muzo hi. Ka thahatna ama tungah a om ngitnget theih nading, ka vangliatna in zong, amah a thakhauhsak theih nadingin ka sathau siangtho amah ka nilh khin hi." 
Psalms89:21  
Psalms89:22 Galte in amah khemzo ngei lo ding a, migilote in zong amah zo ngei lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms89:23 Ama mai-ah a galte ka sugawp ding a, amah a mudahte ka satpuk ding hi." 
Psalms89:24 Amah it tawntungin ama tungah ka thutak ding a, amah a gualzo-in ka bawl tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:25 Mediterranean Tuipi a kipan Eufratis Gunpi dong amah ka uksak ding hi. 
Psalms89:26 Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima Pa le ka Pasian na hi a, kei a hong honkhia pa le a hong hupa na hi hi,’ hong ci ding hi." 
Psalms89:27 Keimah in amah ta upa penin ka bawl ding a, leitung kumpite lakah a lianpenin ka bawl ding hi." 
Psalms89:28 Amah ka itna ka kipsak tawntung ding a, ama tungah ka thuciamna ka kipsak tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:29 Ama suanlekhakte kumpi ka hisak ngitnget ding a, a ukna za, vantung bangin ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms89:30 “Ama tate in ka thukhamte nusia-in, ka biakna ngeina kip om bangin a gamtat kei uh a, amaute in ka ngeina siasakin ka thupiak a zuih kei uhleh, amaute’ thupalsatna hangin ciang tawh gim ka pia ding a, amau’ mawhnate hangin satna tawh gim ka pia ding hi." 
Psalms89:31  
Psalms89:32  
Psalms89:33 Ahih hangin amah ka itna ka khiam kei ding a, ka thuciamna ka kipelhsak kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:34 Ka thuciamna siasak loin, ka kam pana paikhia thute ka kheel kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:35 “A tawntung a kimang dingin ka sianthona tawh khatvei ka kiciam khin a, David’ tungah ka zuau kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:36 Ama suanlekhakte kizom paisuak ding a, vana ni a taan laiteng a kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms89:37 Khapi bangin tua pen kipsuak ding a, vantung a om laiteng kip ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms89:38 Ahih hangin tu-in amah nialin na lawnkhia a, na sathau nilh pa’ tungah na heh mahmah hi." 
Psalms89:39 Na nasempa tawh na thuciamna na pelh khin a, ama kumpi lukhu leivui lakah na paihsak hi." 
Psalms89:40 Ama kulhte khempeuh na sukham khin a, ama galpanmun kipte a sia na suah khin hi." 
Psalms89:41 A pai khempeuh in ama nate sutgawp uh a, amah pen a vengte’ nuihsat a suak hi." 
Psalms89:42 Ama galte na gualzosak a, ama galte na lungdamsak khin hi." 
Psalms89:43 Ama galhiamte a mawkna na suaksak a, gal kidona-ah amah na guallelsak hi." 
Psalms89:44 Nangmah in ama khut panin a kumpi ciangkhut na lakhia a, a kumpi tokhom leilak na denna hi." 
Psalms89:45 Nangmah in a teek hun nai lopi-in amah na teeksak a, maizumna tawh na kidimsak hi." 
Psalms89:46 Topa aw, nang bang tanvei bucip den ding na hi hiam? Na hehna bang tanvei meikuang bangin kuangkuang ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:47 Topa aw, nuntak hun a tom mahmahlam hong phawk in. Mihingte a mawk nadingin bawl na hi hiam?" 
Psalms89:48 A si thei lo kua om ahi hiam? Sihna hankhuk panin kua suaktazo ahi hiam? 
Psalms89:49 Topa aw, na thumanna tawh David tunga na thuciamna, hun lui lai-a na itna kip koi-ah omta ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:50 Topa aw, na nasempa bangzah takin hong kithusim lohna, galte in phinna-in a hong neihna, Topa aw, amaute in na sathau nilh pa a paina khempeuhah a hong nuihsatna uh hong phawk ta in." 
Psalms89:51  
Psalms89:52 Topa in thupha ngah tawntung tahen. Amen! Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Topa aw, khang tawntungin kote’ omna mun na hi hi." 
Psalms90:2 Mual liante a kipiansak ma, leitang le leitung na bawl ma pek, a tawntung a kipan a tawntung dongin Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms90:3 Mi, leivui na suaksakkik a, “Mihingte aw, ciahkik un,” na ci hi." 
Psalms90:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma muhna-ah kum tulkhat a bei ciangin zanni ahi a, zan ihmut laitakin khanlawh khat sung tawh ahi zongin a kibang bek hi." 
Psalms90:5 Nangmah in mite na phiatkhia hi. Amaute pen a ihmu tawh kibang uh a, zingsangin a nokik lopa tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms90:6 Zingsangin palhin thaksuak kik a, nitak ciangin vulin a keu uh hi." 
Psalms90:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma sinsona in kote hong susia a, na hehluatna in kote hong lausak gawp hi." 
Psalms90:8 Nangmah in ka mawhnate uh na mai-ah na koih a, ka khialh simnate uh na maitangah na koih hi." 
Psalms90:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun khempeuh uh na hehna-in bei a, ka nuntak hun uh husan’ khat bangin a bei hi." 
Psalms90:10 Kote’ nuntak sung kum sawmsagih bang hi a, cidam le-ung kum sawmgiat bang hithei hi. Ahih hangin tua hunsung nangawn gimna le haksatna hi a, tua hunte bei pakin kote ka maimang uh hi." 
Psalms90:11 Nang hong kizahtak nadingin na sinsona’ vangliatna kua in thei a, na hehna’ husiatna kua in thei ahi hiam?" 
Psalms90:12 Tua ahih ciangin pilna lungsim ka ngah theih nadingun ka nuntak hun uh a tomlam ka theih nadingun hong hilh in. 
Psalms90:13 Topa aw, hong kihei kik in. Bang tan sauvei ding hiam? Na nasemte hong hehpih in." 
Psalms90:14 Ka nuntak tawntung uh lungdamin ka kipak theih nadingun zingsangin na itna kip tawh kote hong lungkimsak in. 
Psalms90:15 Kote nong gimsak ni zah, siatna ka thuak uh kum phazah mah, kote hong kipaaksak in." 
Psalms90:16 Na nasemte tungah na nasepna, a tate uh tungah na minthanna, na vang hong kilangsak in." 
Psalms90:17 Kote’ Topa Pasian aw, kote tungah na thupha hong tungsak inla, kote’ nasepna khempeuh hong tangtungsak in." 
Psalms91:1 Sangpenpa’ liahna sung, Vanglianpa’ liim sungah a om mi khempeuh in" 
Psalms91:2 Topa’ tungah, “Ka bukna le ka munkip muanhuai, ka muan ka Pasian na hi hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms91:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thangsiah pa’ thangzak le a lauhuai pulnatna panin nang hong honkhia ding hi. 
Psalms91:4 Amah in a khate tawh nang hong tuam ding a, ama khate’ nuai-ah bukna ding na mu ding hi. Ama thumanna in nang hong dalin hong hu ding hi." 
Psalms91:5 Nangmah in zan a lauhuaina, sun-a thaltang leengte, khuamial lakah a vak khiankhian pulnatna, sun nitaang a suksiatnate na kihta kei ding hi." 
Psalms91:6  
Psalms91:7 Na kiangah mi tulkhat, na kimkotah mi tul sawm, hong tukin a sih hangin bangmah na ci kei ding hi." 
Psalms91:8 Na mit tawh na en bek ding a, migilote a kithukkikna na mu ding hi." 
Psalms91:9 Nangmah in Topa pen na buk nadingin bawlin, Sangpenpa, nang a hong hu dingin bawl khin na hih manin" 
Psalms91:10 nangma tungah siatna hong tung lo ding a, na inn sungah gimna hong tung lo ding hi." 
Psalms91:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong cing dingin amah in ama vantungmi nang hong kemsak ding hi. 
Psalms91:12 Na khete le suang a kitahkhak loh nadingin amaute in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi. 
Psalms91:13 Nangmah in humpinelkai le gul gunei tung na tawn ding a, na khenuai-ah humpinelkai khanglai le gulpi na tuancil ding hi." 
Psalms91:14 Itna tawh hong bel ahih manin amah ka honkhia ding a, ka min hong thei ahih manin mun sangna-ah amah ka koih ding hi." 
Psalms91:15 Amah in hong sap ciangin amah ka dawng ding hi. Haksatna sungah amah ka ompih ding a, amah honkhia-in ka pahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms91:16 Nuntak sau tawh amah ka lungkimsak ding a, amah ka honkhia ding hi." 
Psalms92:1 Sangpenpa aw, Topa tungah lungdamna lah ding, nangma min phatna la sak dingin kilawm a, zangsawm khausai lasakna le harp lasakna, laiza lasaknate tumin, zingsangin nangma itna kip, zanin na thumanna genkhiat dingin a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms92:2  
Psalms92:3  
Psalms92:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangma sepna tawh kei nong lungdamsak a, nangma sepnate hangin lungdamin la ka sa hi." 
Psalms92:5 Topa aw, na nasepnate lian mahmah a, na ngaihsutnate thuk mahmah hi." 
Psalms92:6 Migilote, lopa bangin selkhia-in, siatna bawl khempeuh a pun’ mahmah hangun, a tawntungin siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi. Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a sangna-ah a omden na hihna thu, lungsimmawl mi in theithei lo a, lungsim tei lo mi in tel thei lo hi." 
Psalms92:7  
Psalms92:8  
Psalms92:9 Topa aw, na galte si ta ding! Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte beimang ding a, siatna a bawl khempeuhte kithehthang ding uh hi." 
Psalms92:10 Ahih hangin nangmah in zangsial bangin kei na hong hatsak a, kei thupha hong pia-in nong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms92:11 Ka galte’ pukna ka mit in mu khinta a, keimah a hong do a gilote’ siatna ka bil in za khinta hi." 
Psalms92:12 Nisuh kung bangin thuman mi palh a, Lebanon mualtung a om taamtak kung bangin a khang hi." 
Psalms92:13 Topa’ inn sungah amaute kisuan a, i Pasian’ huang sungah amaute palh uh hi." 
Psalms92:14 Topa thutang hi, ci-in a lah nadingun amaute teek napi-in gah lailai uh a, amaute tui kiuhkeuhin hing sitset uh hi. Amah pen kei hong hupa hi a, ama sungah thuman lohna om lo hi." 
Psalms92:15  
Psalms93:1 Topa in uk a, vangliatna kumpi puan kisilhsak hi. Topa, kumpi puan kisilhsak a, thahatna tawh amah kidim hi. Leitung kikipsak a, kiling ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms93:2 Tanglai pek panin na tokhom a kipsa hi a, nang pen a tawntung a om na hi hi." 
Psalms93:3 Topa aw, gunte hong khangin, a aw uh hong sangsak a, nakpitakin hong ging hi." 
Psalms93:4 A sangna munah a om Topa vanglian hi. Tui tampi gingte sangin vanglian zaw a, tuipi hualte sangin vanglian zaw hi." 
Psalms93:5 Na thupiaknate kip mahmah hi. Topa aw, sianthona pen a tawntungin na inn tawh a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms94:1 A thukkik Pasian, a thukkik Pasian, Topa aw, na hehna hong lakkhia in." 
Psalms94:2 Tho in, leitung thukhen pa aw, a kiphasak mite tungah amau’ ngah ding a kilawm gimna pia ta in." 
Psalms94:3 Topa aw, migilote bang tanvei lungdam ding uh a, migilote bang tanvei lungnuamin omom lai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:4 Gamtatsiate bang tanvei kihisak lai ding uh a, a siat gamtatna uh bang tanvei kisialhpih lai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:5 Topa aw, amaute in nangma mite sugawp uh a, nangma luahte gimsak uh hi." 
Psalms94:6 Amaute in meigong numeite le khualmite thatlumin pa nei lote suamlum uh hi. 
Psalms94:7 Amaute in, “ Topa in mu lo hi; Jakob Pasian in thei lo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms94:8 Theitel un, mi lungsimmawl pente aw! Lung pillote aw, cik ciangin pil ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:9 I bil a bawlpa in khua za lo ding ahi hiam? I mit a piangsak pa in khua mu lo ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms94:10 Minamte a thuhilhpa in mi thuhilh lo ding ahi hiam? Mihingte tungah theihtheihna a hilh Topa in mihingte’ ngaihsutna thei a, amaute pen husan’ bang bek ahihna teltakin a thei hi." 
Psalms94:11  
Psalms94:12 Topa aw, migilote a dingin gum khat a kitawh hun mateng, haksat hun sungteng a tawlngak theih nadingin na thukham na hilh mi, na thuhilh mi, mi nuamsa ahi hi." 
Psalms94:13  
Psalms94:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite nusia lo ding a, ama luahte paidak lo ding hi." 
Psalms94:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thutang pen thuman mite tungah hong tungkik ding a, lungsim thutang khempeuh in amah zui ding uh hi." 
Psalms94:16 Kei a dingin migilote a do dingin kua kipan ahi hiam? Kei a dingin siatna a bawlte’ langkhatah kua ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms94:17 Topa in kei hong huh lo hileh, gamkhing sungah ka tung khinta ding hi." 
Psalms94:18 Topa aw, “Ka khe taal,” ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin na itna kip in kei hong kaito hi." 
Psalms94:19 Ka lungsim ngaihsutna a tam mahmah ciangin kei na hong hehnem a, na hong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms94:20 Sihna ding ngeina a bawl, a gilo gam ukte, nang tawh kipawl ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms94:21 Amaute in thuman mihoihte thah sawm uh a, a mawhbaang lo mite sihna thuaksak uh hi." 
Psalms94:22 Ahih hangin Topa pen keima munkip, keima Pasian, ka belh suangpi a suak khinta hi." 
Psalms94:23 Amah in amau’ mawhnate amau’ tung mahah tungsakkikin, a gitlohna hangun amaute a maimangsak ding hi. Topa, i Pasian in amaute maimangsak ding hi." 
Psalms95:1 Hong pai un, Topa phat ni. Eite a hong hu, a hong honkhia pa tungah lungdamna la sa ni." 
Psalms95:2 Ama omna-ah lungdamna ko-in pai ni. Phatna late, ama tungah lungdam takin sa ni." 
Psalms95:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a lian Pasian hi a, pasian khempeuh tungah Kumpi lianpa ahi hi." 
Psalms95:4 Amah in leitung khempeuh uk a, guam thuk pen panin mual sang pen dawn dongin amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms95:5 Ama bawlsa tuipite uk a, ama bawlsa leitung zong amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms95:6 Hong pai un, amah bia-in kun ni. Eite hong Bawl Topa’ mai-ah khukdin ni." 
Psalms95:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen eite’ Pasian hi a, eite pen ama hong kep mite le ama khutsunga om a tuute ihi hi. Tuni-in hih bangin ama hong thugen za un:" 
Psalms95:8 Amaute in ka nasepna mu khin uh hinapi, Meribah le Massah munah na pate un kei hong ze-etin, gamtatna tawh ka lah ding hong kalh hun lai uh bangin, note in na lungsim uh khauhsak kei un." 
Psalms95:9  
Psalms95:10 Kum sawmli sung tua minam ka kih a, “Amaute pen a lungsim uhah a khial mi hi a, amaute in ka thupiakte mang lo uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms95:11 Tua ahih ciangin keima nopsakna munah amaute a lut lo dingin sinso kawmin ka kiciam hi. 
Psalms96:1 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa tungah la thak khat sa un. Topa tungah la sa un." 
Psalms96:2 Topa tungah la sa unla, ama min phat un. Ni khat khit ni khat ama hong hotkhiatna thu gen tawntung un." 
Psalms96:3 Ama minthanna minamte lakah gen unla, ama nalamdang septe mi khempeuh lakah pulak un." 
Psalms96:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian a, nakpitakin phat ding ahi hi; pasian dangte khempeuh sangin amah zahtak zawk ding ahi hi." 
Psalms96:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam dangte’ pasian khempeuh milim hi lel a, ahih hangin Topa ahihleh vantungte a bawlpa ahi hi." 
Psalms96:6 Pahtawina le liatnate ama mai-ah om a, hatna le hoihnate ama omna mun siangtho-ah om hi." 
Psalms96:7 Mi namkimte aw, Topa in minthanna le hatna nei hi, ci-in mang un. Topa in nei hi, ci-in mang un." 
Psalms96:8 Ama min in a ngah dingin a kilawm minthanna Topa’ tungah pia unla, biakpiakna hong kengin ama huang sungah hong pai un." 
Psalms96:9 Puan siangtho silhin Topa bia un. Leitung mi khempeuh aw, ama mai-ah ling un." 
Psalms96:10 Minam khempeuh lakah thu gen kawikawi unla, “ Topa in uk hi. Leitung kikipsak a, kiling ngei lo ding hi. Amah in mihingte’ thu a manin khen ding hi,” ci un." 
Psalms96:11 Vantung mite kipak hen la, leitung mite lungdam hen. Tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh awng ta uh hen." 
Psalms96:12 Lo le a sunga om khempeuh nuamin diang uh hen. Gamlak a sing om khempeuh in Topa’ mai-ah lungdamin la sa hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hong pai ta hi. Leitung mite’ thu a khen dingin hong pai ta hi. Amah in thumanna tawh leitung ukin mite’ thu ahi bangin khen ding hi. 
Psalms96:13  
Psalms97:1 Topa in uk hi. Leitung lungdam hen la, tuikulh neu tampite zong lungdam ta uh hen." 
Psalms97:2 Meiipite le khuamial sahpite ama kiimah om a, thumanna le thutannate ama tokhom bulpi ahi hi." 
Psalms97:3 Ama mai-ah mei pai a, ama kiima om a galte a kangtum hi." 
Psalms97:4 Ama khuaphialepte in leitung taangsak a, leitung in mu-in a ling hi." 
Psalms97:5 Topa’ mai, leitung mi khempeuh’ Topa’ mai-ah mual liante khuainun bangin a tuisuak uh hi." 
Psalms97:6 Vantungte in ama thumanna genkhia uh a, mi khempeuh in ama minthanna mu uh hi." 
Psalms97:7 Bangmah a man lo milimte a kisaktheihpih, milim a bia mi khempeuhte maizumin kikoih a, ama mai-ah pasian khempeuh kun uh hi." 
Psalms97:8 Pasian aw, Zion in za-in nuam a, na thukhennate hangin Judah khuapite lungdam uh hi." 
Psalms97:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, leitung khempeuh a ukpa na hi a, pasian dang khempeuh sangin nakpitakin na lianzaw hi." 
Psalms97:10 Topa in gitlohna a mudahte it a, amah in a mi siangthote’ nuntakna siatna ding pan a kem hi. Amah in migilote’ khutsung panin amaute a honkhia hi." 
Psalms97:11 Thuman mite’ tungah khuavak hong taang a, lungsim thutang mite tungah lungdamna hong tung hi." 
Psalms97:12 Thuman mite aw, Topa’ nasepnate hangin lungdam unla, ama min siangtho phat un." 
Psalms98:1 Amah in na lamdangte bawl ahih manin Topa’ tungah la thak sa un. Ama khut taklam le ama khut siangthote in amah gualzosak hi. 
Psalms98:2 Topa in ama gualzawhna kitheisak khinzo a, amah in minamte’ muhna-ah ama thumanna langsak khin hi." 
Psalms98:3 Amah thutakin, it tawntungna nei ahih manin Israel-te tungah a thuciamna a tungsak hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in eite’ Pasian’ gualzawhna mu khinta uh hi." 
Psalms98:4 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa’ tungah lungdamin la sa-in lungdamin awngkhia unla, phatna la sa un." 
Psalms98:5 Laia lasakna tawh Topa’ tungah phatna late sa unla, laiza lasakna le la ngaih tawh phat un." 
Psalms98:6 Peengkulte le saki aw tawh Topa, Kumpipa’ mai-ah lungdamna gingsak un." 
Psalms98:7 Tuipi le a sunga omte khempeuh aw, awng unla, leitung le a tunga teng khempeuhte aw, la sa un." 
Psalms98:8 Gunte aw, na khut uh beeng un. Mualte aw, Topa’ mai-ah lungdamin la sa un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung a uk dingin amah hong pai ta a, thumanna tawh leitung mite’ thu ahi ding bangin hong khen ding hi." 
Psalms98:9  
Psalms99:1 Topa in uk hi. Mihonte ling hen. Kherub-te tungah amah tu hi. Leitung ling tahen. 
Psalms99:2 Zion khuapi-ah Topa lian a, amah in leitung mi khempeuh uk hi." 
Psalms99:3 A lian a kihtakhuai ama min mi khempeuh in phat ta uh hen. Amah siangtho hi. 
Psalms99:4 Thutang a deih, Vanglian Kumpipa aw, nangmah in thuman na phut khin a, Israel-te sungah thutang le thuman na semkhia hi." 
Psalms99:5 I Topa Pasian phat unla, ama khengakna munah bia un. Amah siangtho hi." 
Psalms99:6 Moses le Aaron-te ama siampi hi uh a, amah a biate lakah Samuel zong a kihel hi. Topa’ tungah amaute kiko uh a, amah in amaute a dawng hi." 
Psalms99:7 Amah in meii khuampi sung pan amaute tungah thu gen a, ama teci pannate le amah in amaute tungah a thukham piakte amaute in a zui uh hi." 
Psalms99:8 Kote’ Topa Pasian aw, nang in amaute na dawng hi. Amau’ mawhna hangin gim na piak tei hangin amau’ mawhnate a maisak nuam Pasian na hihna amaute’ tungah na kilangsak hi." 
Psalms99:9 I Topa Pasian phat unla, ama mual siangtho-ah bia un; bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Pasian a siangtho hi." 
Psalms100:1 Gam khempeuh aw, Topa’ tungah lungdamna aw gingsak un." 
Psalms100:2 Lungdamna tawh Topa’ na sem un. Ama omna-ah la sa kawmin hong pai un. 
Psalms100:3 Topa, Pasian ahihna thei un. Eite hong bawlpa amah hi a, eite ama a’ ihi hi. Eite ama mi ihi a, ama gankhahna sunga om a tuute ihi hi." 
Psalms100:4 Lungdam kohna tawh ama kongpi-ah lut unla, amah phatna tawh ama huang sungah tum un. Ama tungah lungdam ko unla, ama min phat un." 
Psalms100:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih hi. Ama itna kipin kho tawntung a, ama thumanna a khang khangin kip hi." 
Psalms101:1 Keima la pen thumanna le thutanna la ahi hi. Nang ka hong sak ding hi; Topa aw, kong sak ding hi." 
Psalms101:2 Paubaanna a om lo thu bek ka kin ding hi. Cik ciangin kei kiangah hong pai ding na hi hiam? Lungsim hoihna tawh ka inn sungah ka gamta ding hi. 
Psalms101:3 A sia na peuhmah ka deih kei ding hi. Lamkhial mite’ nasepna ka mudah a, tuate tawh ka kisukha kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:4 Lungsim kawina ka deih hetkei a, siatna, ngaihsutin zong ka neikha kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:5 A vengte a gensia sim mite ka susia ding a, kiphatsakna, kihihsakna lungsim a nei mi ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:6 Leitungah a thuman mite kei tawh a om theih nadingin maipha ka pia ding a, paubaanna om loin a gamta mi in keima na hong sem ding hi." 
Psalms101:7 Khemna a zang mi peuhmah keima inn-ah teng lo ding a, zuauthu a gen mi peuhmah keima omna-ah om thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Psalms101:8 Zingsang simin leitung a migilote khempeuh ka susia ding a, Topa’ khuapi panin siatna bawlte khempeuh ka khenkhia ding hi." 
Psalms102:1 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka thumna hong ngai in." 
Psalms102:2 Ka cihmawh hunin kei kiang panin bu kei in. Keima lam hong nga inla, kong sap ciangin hong dawng pah in." 
Psalms102:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna, meikhu bangin beimang a, ka pumpi meikuang bangin a sa hi." 
Psalms102:4 Lungkham luatna hangin lopa bangin ka keutum a, an nangawn ka nezo kei hi." 
Psalms102:5 A gingin ka tautauna hangin ka guh guakin ka om hi. 
Psalms102:6 Gamlak a om musane le mun kolhna-ah a om simbu tawh ka kibang hi. 
Psalms102:7 Ihmu thei loin ka om a, innkhum dawna vasa khat guak a om tawh ka kibang hi." 
Psalms102:8 Sun nilohin ka galte in kei hong zahko uh a, kei hong simmawhte in samsiatna-in ka min a zang uh hi." 
Psalms102:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh vut bek ka annek hita a, na thangpaihna le na hehna hangin ka tuidawnte khitui tawh kihel hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in kei hong domto napi-in lei nong denna hi." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Keima nuntakna pen nitak lama a om niliim tawh kibang lel a, lopa bangin ka vulgawp hi." 
Psalms102:12 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na kip ngitnget a, khang tawntungin nang hong kiphawkna kip hi." 
Psalms102:13 Nangmah tho-in Zion khua na hehpih ding hi. Amah na angvan hun ding hita a, a kiciangtansa hun hong tung khin hi." 
Psalms102:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasemte in tua khua suangtumte it uh a, a leivuite nangawn pammaih sa uh hi." 
Psalms102:15 Minamte in Topa hong zahtakin, leitung kumpi khempeuh in na minthanna hong zahtak ding uh hi." 
Psalms102:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion khua lam ding a, ama minthanna hong kilang ding hi." 
Psalms102:17 Amah in mi cimawhte’ thungetna kinin, amau’ thumna simmawh lo ding hi." 
Psalms102:18 A suak nai lo mite in Topa a phat theih nadingin a hong tung lai ding khang mite a dingin hih thu kiciamteh hen: 
Psalms102:19 Mihingte, kumpi gamte, Topa a bia dingin a kikaihkhop uh ciangin, mite in Zion khua sungah Topa’ min, Jerusalem khua sungah amah phatna a pulak theih nadingun, thongkiate’ taunate a za ding le a si dingin a kisehte a khahkhia dingin a sangna ama siangtho mun panin amah in hong ensukin, vantung panin Topa in leitung hong en hi." 
Psalms102:20  
Psalms102:21  
Psalms102:22  
Psalms102:23 Amah in kei a khangtung kimlai ka thahatna hong suktat sakin, ka hunte hong khiapsak hi." 
Psalms102:24 Keimah in, “Khang tawntungin a kip ka Pasian aw, hong khansihsak kei in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms102:25 Tanglai hunin nangmah in leitung bulpi na koih a, vantungte zong nangma khut tawh na bawlsa ahi hi." 
Psalms102:26 Amaute sia ding uh a, ahih hangin nang na kip ding hi. Puan bangin amaute paatkhia ding uh hi. Nangmah in amaute puan bangin na khek a, amaute a maimang uh hi." 
Psalms102:27 Ahi zongin nang na kibang ngitnget a, na nuntak hun in mong nei lo hi." 
Psalms102:28 Na nasemte’ tate lungmuangin om ding uh a, amau’ suanlekhakte na mai-ah kip ding uh hi." 
Psalms103:1 Topa ka phat ding a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ama min siangtho ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms103:2 Topa ka phat ding a, ama migitna ka mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Psalms103:3 Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak a, ka natna khempeuh hong damsak hi." 
Psalms103:4 Hankhuk tung ding kimlai hong suaktasak a, itna le hehpihna tampi hong pia hi." 
Psalms103:5 Muvanlai bangin ka tha a hat theih nadingin thupha namkim hong pia hi. 
Psalms103:6 Topa in a kinengniamte a dingin thuman thutangin thu a khen hi. 
Psalms103:7 Amah in ama geelna Moses tungah gen a, ama nasepnate Israel mite a musak hi." 
Psalms103:8 Topa dikin hehpihna tawh kidim a, heh hakin, a lian mahmah itna kip tawh a kidim hi." 
Psalms103:9 Amah in a tawntungin hong taii ngitnget lo ding a, amah heh paisuak lo ding hi." 
Psalms103:10 Amah in eite’ khialhna tawh a kituakin eite tungah hong bawl lo a, eite’ mawhna tawh a kituakin hong thukkik lo hi." 
Psalms103:11 Vantung pen leitung panin a san mah bangin amah a zahtakte’ tungah ama itna kip lianin sang mahmah hi. 
Psalms103:12 Nisuahna pen nitumna panin a gamlat mah bangin i mawhna hangin gimnate eite’ kiang panin gamlapi-ah a nilkhia hi. 
Psalms103:13 Pa in tate a hehpih bangin Topa in amah a zahtakte hong hehpih hi. 
Psalms103:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite’ pianna hong thei a, eite pen leivui ihihna a phawk hi." 
Psalms103:15 Eite ihih leh i nuntakna pen lopa tawh kibang a, lolai-ah a po paakte bangin a palh hi." 
Psalms103:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh huih in amah semin beimang a, tua mun in amah thei nawn lo hi." 
Psalms103:17 Ahih hangin Topa’ itna kip pen amah a zahtak mite tungah a tawntung pan a tawntung dongin kip ngitnget a, ama thumanna pen ama thuciamna zui-in a thupiak bangin sep ding a phawk mite tungah a khang khangin a kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms103:18  
Psalms103:19 Topa in vantungah ama tokhom phutkhin a, amah in mun khempeuh a uk hi." 
Psalms103:20 Ama thugen a ngai, ama thu bangin a sem no a thahat, no ama vantung mite aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms103:21 Ama deih bangin a gamta ama nasem, ama mihon khempeuhte aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms103:22 Ama ukna sunga a om ama bawlsate aw, Topa phat un. Ke’n, Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms104:1 Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, nang na lian mahmah hi. Minthanna le liatna nang na silh hi." 
Psalms104:2 Puanza tawh tuam bangin khuavak tawh na kituam a, vantungte pen puanbuk bangin na zal hi." 
Psalms104:3 Vana om tui tungah na inn na lam a, na leeng dingin meiipite na bawl a, huih khate tungah nang na tuang hi." 
Psalms104:4 Na kamtai dingin huihte na bawl a, mei le meikuangte na nasemte na hisak hi." 
Psalms104:5 Leitung a ling ngei lo dingin ama bulpi tungah na phut hi. 
Psalms104:6 Nangmah in puan tawh tuam bangin leitung pen tui thukpi tawh na tuam a, tuate in mualte tuumcip hi." 
Psalms104:7 Na thuhilhna hangin tua tuite taikhia uh a, na thupiakna awging a zak uh ciangin kikhawhkhia uh hi." 
Psalms104:8 Mualtung le guam sungah tua tuite luang uh a, amau a dingin na sehsa munah a tung uh hi." 
Psalms104:9 Tua tuite in leitung a tuamkik loh nadingin amaute’ kantan loh ding gamgi khat na phut hi. 
Psalms104:10 Kuamte sung panin ciktui na phulkhiasak a, mualte kikalah a luang uh hi." 
Psalms104:11 Gamlak ganhingte’ dawn ding tui na pia a, gamlak sakolte in a dangtakna uh tua tui-ah a phasak uh hi." 
Psalms104:12 Tua tui kiangah huihlak vasate om uh a, singhiangte lakah amaute ham zaizai uh hi." 
Psalms104:13 A sangna mun na omna panin mite tungah guah na zusak a, nangma thupha tawh leitung a kidim hi." 
Psalms104:14 Nangmah in ganhingte a dingin lopa, mihing in leilak panin an a ngah theih nadingin a khawh ding ankungte," 
Psalms104:15 mihing lungsim a nuamsak ding leenggahzu, mihing maitang a zolsak ding sathau, mihing lungsim a hatsak ding an na piangsak hi." 
Psalms104:16 Topa in a suan, Lebanon muala om taamtak singte, tua ama singkungte in guahtui tampi a ngah hi." 
Psalms104:17 Tua singte tungah vasate in bu bawl uh a, taksing kungte lakah gun vapite in bu a tom uh hi." 
Psalms104:18 Mual sangte pen sathakte a’ ding hi a, suangtumte pen sakhite’ belh ding ahi hi." 
Psalms104:19 Hun ciamteh nadingin khapi na bawl a, ni in zong a tum ding hun a thei hi." 
Psalms104:20 Nangmah in khuamial na bawl a, gamlak ganhing khempeuh a vakkhiat hun pen zan hunsung ahi hi." 
Psalms104:21 Humpinelkai khanglaite in amau’ nek ding sa a ngah nadingun nakpitakin hawk uh a, amau’ an ding Pasian’ tung pan a ngah uh hi." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a suah ciangin amaute kihemkhia uh a, a kua sung uhah a lum hithiat uh hi." 
Psalms104:23 Mite pen nasem dingin kuankhia uh a, nitak mateng na sem uh hi." 
Psalms104:24 Topa aw, na sepsa nate tam mahmah hi. Nangmah in ciimna tawh tuate khempeuh na bawl a, na piansak ganhingte tawh leitung a kidim hi." 
Psalms104:25 Hua lai-ah, ganhing a lian a neu, simzawh lohin a tam, a vak muamua-na, lianin a zai mahmah tuipi om hi." 
Psalms104:26 Hua tuipi tungah teembawte le gualnop nadingin na bawl Awle a pai hi. 
Psalms104:27 A hun ciangin an na piak ding ngakin hihte khempeuh in nangmah hong en uh hi. 
Psalms104:28 Na piak ciangin amaute in ne uh a, an na pia a, amaute lungkim uh hi." 
Psalms104:29 Na maitang na seel ciangin amaute khasia uh hi. Amau’ husanna na lakkhiat ciangin amaute si-in amau’ pianna leivui-ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
Psalms104:30 Na hu na sankhiat ciangin amaute a kipiangsak hi a, nangmah in leitung na bawlthak hi." 
Psalms104:31 Leitung a et ciangin tua leitung kilingin, mualte a lawn’ ciangin tua mualte meikhu a suak, ama nasepna-ah Topa lungdam hen la, Topa’ minthanna kip tawntung tahen." 
Psalms104:32  
Psalms104:33 Ka nuntak laiteng Topa tungah la ka sa ding a, ka hin laiteng ka Pasian phatna la ka sasa ding hi." 
Psalms104:34 Topa in hong lungdamsak ahih manin ka lasaknate in zong amah lungdamsak tahen. 
Psalms104:35 Leitung panin mawhnei mite beimang hen la, migilote om nawn kei hen. Ke’n, Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms105:1 Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in, ama min phat unla, ama sepnate khempeuh mite lakah kitheisak un." 
Psalms105:2 Ama tungah la sa un. Ama tungah phatna la sa unla, a lamdang a septe khempeuh gen ciat ta un." 
Psalms105:3 Ama min siangtho hangin lungdam unla, Topa a zong mite lungdam tahen." 
Psalms105:4 Topa le ama huh ding zon belin nei unla, a tawntungin ama maipha zong niloh un." 
Psalms105:5 No ama nasem, Abraham’ suanlekhak, Jakob’ tate, ama teel mite aw, ama sepsa a lamdang nate, ama nalamdang lahte, a genkhiat a thukhennate phawk ciat ta un!" 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Amah pen Topa, eite’ Pasian hi a, ama thupiaknate leitung khempeuh in a zuih ding ahi hi." 
Psalms105:8 “Na luah dingin Kanaan gam ka hong pia ding hi,” ci-in Abraham tawh thuciam a bawlsa, Isaac tungah a thuciamsa, Jakob tungah thupiakna a kipsak, Israel tungah tawntung thuciamna, ama thupiaksa kammal, ama thuciamna pen khang tulkhat dongin amah in phawk ngitnget hi." 
Psalms105:9  
Psalms105:10  
Psalms105:11  
Psalms105:12 Amaute tawm mahmahin, bangmah gentham lo uh a, khualmi hi-in," 
Psalms105:13 minam khat panin minam dang khatah, gam khat pan gam khatah a vak kawikawi laitakun," 
Psalms105:14 amah in amaute kuamah nengniamsak lo hi. Amaute’ hangin amah in kumpite thuhilhin," 
Psalms105:15 “Ka sathau nilhte sukha kei un; ka kamsangte tungah siatna bawl kei un,” ci hi." 
Psalms105:16 Amah in leitungah kialpi tungsakin, nektheih an khempeuh a siatsak ciangin," 
Psalms105:17 amah in, Josef a kici, sila-a a kizuak mi khat, amaute’ mai-ah a sawl hi." 
Psalms105:18 Ama khete pen kolte in nasak a, ama ngawng pen sikkol sungah kikoih hi." 
Psalms105:19 Ama thugente a tun matengin Topa in amah ze-et hi. 
Psalms105:20 Amah a khahkhia dingin kumpipa in mi paisak a, mihingte a ukpa in amah a khahkhia hi." 
Psalms105:21 Josef in kumpipa’ uliante ama ut bangin lamlakin, a upate pen pilna hilhsak a, ama innsung topa ama neihsa khempeuh a ukpa-in a koih hi." 
Psalms105:22  
Psalms105:23 Tua ciangin Egypt gamah Israel va pai a, Ham’ gam sungah peemta-in Jakob va om hi." 
Psalms105:24 Topa in ama mite pungsak mahmah a, a galte sangin amaute hatzaw sak hi." 
Psalms105:25 Ama mite mudahin, ama nasemte siamna tawh a khem dingin amaute’ lungsim amah in kiheisak hi." 
Psalms105:26 Amah in, ama nasem Moses le ama teelsa Aaron a sawl hi." 
Psalms105:27 Amaute in ama limte amaute’ lakah na lamdangte Ham’ gam sungah a bawl uh hi. 
Psalms105:28 Amah in khuamial sawl a, leitung khim a zingsak hi. Ahih hangin Egypt mite in ama thu a langpang uh hi." 
Psalms105:29 Amah in amau’ tuite sisan suaksak a, a ngasate uh a sisak hi." 
Psalms105:30 Amau’ leitang tung le a kumpipa’ innsung nangawn uiphukte tawh a kidim hi. 
Psalms105:31 Amah kampau a, thohonpi le thokangte gam sung dimin hong om hi." 
Psalms105:32 Amah in a guah dingun gialpi, amau’ gam sung khempeuh a taangsak khuaphialep, amaute a pia hi." 
Psalms105:33 Amah in amau’ leengguite le a theikungte uh vattansak a, amau’ gam sung sing khempeuh a kuaihtansak hi." 
Psalms105:34 Amah kampau a, kauphete le tangngolte, simzawh lohin hong pai uh a," 
Psalms105:35 gam sunga kung khempeuh, amau’ leitang panin a gah khempeuh a nektumsak mang hi." 
Psalms105:36 Amau’ sung pan a piang masa Egypt tacil khempeuh a satlum hi. 
Psalms105:37 Tua ciangin amah in ngun le kham tawh Israel-te paikhiatpih a, amaute a vekpi-in cidamin thahat kim uh hi." 
Psalms105:38 Amaute a paikhiat ciangun Egypt mite lungdam mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kihta uh hi. 
Psalms105:39 Amaute a liah dingin amah in meiipi kaisak a, zanin khua muh nadingin mei a omsak hi." 
Psalms105:40 Amaute in ngen a, vantung panin anlum tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms105:41 Amah in suangpi hong a, tui a phulkhia hi. Guntui bangin sehnel gamah tui a luang hi." 
Psalms105:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama thuciamna le ama nasem Abraham a phawk hi. 
Psalms105:43 Tua ahih ciangin ama mite lungdamna tawh, ama teel mite lasakna tawh a paikhiatpih hi." 
Psalms105:44 Amaute in ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thukhamte a neih theih nadingun, amah in amaute tungah minam dangte’ leitang pia a, midangte’ nasepna gahte zong amaute a ngahsak hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms105:45  
Psalms106:1 Topa phat un. Topa’ tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms106:2 Topa’ nasepna lianpite kua in genkhia thei ding a, kua in a kicingin amah phat thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms106:3 Thutang a zui, a tawntungin thumanin a gamta mite, mi nuamsa ahi hi." 
Psalms106:4 Topa aw, nangma teel mite’ daupaina ka muh theih nading, nangma minamte’ kipakna sungah ka lungkim theih nading, nangma luahte tawh ka minthan’ khawm theih nadingin na mite tungah maipha na lah ciangin kei hong phawk inla, amaute na hotkhiat ciangin kei zong hong huh in." 
Psalms106:5  
Psalms106:6 Ka pu ka pate uh a kipan kote ka khial khin uh hi. Mawhna ka bawl khin uh a, ka gilo gamtat khin uh hi." 
Psalms106:7 Ka pu ka pate un Egypt gamah a om lai-un nangma nasepna a lamdangte ngaihsun lo uh hi. Na itna kip a tampite phawk lo uh a, San Tuipi-ah Sangpenpa hong lehdo uh hi." 
Psalms106:8 Ahi zongin amah in a lian mahmah a vangliatna a kitheihsak nadingin ama min a ngaihsutna-in amaute a honkhia hi. 
Psalms106:9 Amah in San Tuipi thuhilh a, tua tuipi a kang hi. Amah in gamlak kantan bangin tuithuk kantanin amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms106:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah in galte’ khutsung panin amaute honkhia a, langpangte’ vangliatna panin amaute a khahkhia hi." 
Psalms106:11 Tui in amau’ langte tuummang khin a, amaute a suakta khat zong om lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:12 Tua ciangin amaute in ama thu um uh a, amah phatna la a sa uh hi." 
Psalms106:13 Ahih hangin amaute in ama nasepte mangngilh pah uh a, ama thugen ding ngak loin a gamta pah uh hi." 
Psalms106:14 Ahih hangin amaute in gamlakah duhluat mahmahna nei uh a, sehnel gam sungah Pasian a ze-et uh hi." 
Psalms106:15 Amah in amaute’ nget pen pia a, ahih hangin amaute lakah natsia a tungsak hi." 
Psalms106:16 Gamlakah Moses le Topa’ mi siangtho Aaron a hazat uh ciangin," 
Psalms106:17 lei kihongin Dathan valhtum a, Abiram’ pawlte a vukcip hi." 
Psalms106:18 Amaute’ sungah mei hong piangkhia a, meikuang in migilote a kangtum hi." 
Psalms106:19 Amaute in Horeb gam sungah bawngno khat bawl uh a, a kisung tua milim a bia uh hi." 
Psalms106:20 Amaute in Pasian’ minthanna pen lopa a ne bawngtal lim tawh a khek uh hi. 
Psalms106:21 Amaute in Egypt gam sungah na lianpite a bawl, Ham’ gam sungah na lamdangte le San Tuipi-ah a kihtakhuai nate a bawl, amau’ Honpa, Pasian mangngilh uh hi." 
Psalms106:22  
Psalms106:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a suksiatna ding a hehna panin a heikhia dingin Pasian’ mai-ah ama teelpa Moses ding hikeileh amaute ka susia ding hi, amah in ci hi." 
Psalms106:24 Amaute in gam nuam simmawh uh a, ama thuciamna um lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:25 Amaute a puanbuk sung uhah phun niloh uh a, Topa’ thu ngai lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:26 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut laamto-in gam sungah amaute puksak a, leitung gam khempeuh minamte’ lakah amau’ suanlekhakte a thehthang ding a kiciam hi." 
Psalms106:27  
Psalms106:28 Tua ciangin amaute in Peor-a Baal pasian bel uh a, nuntakna a nei lote tungah biakna-in a kipia sate a ne uh hi." 
Psalms106:29 Amau’ gamtatna tawh Topa’ hehna ding piangsak uh a, amaute’ lakah pulnatna hong tung hi." 
Psalms106:30 Tua ciangin Finehas dingin hong palai a, pulnatna a hong dai hi." 
Psalms106:31 Tua thu pen a khang a khangin ama thumanna-in kiciamteh tawntung hi. 
Psalms106:32 Amaute in Meribah tuiphualah amah sinso sakin, amah a langpang uh hi. Thakhatin kamguh a paukha Moses in amaute’ huhau-in siatna a ngahlawh hi." 
Psalms106:33  
Psalms106:34 Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in tua mite that lo uh hi. 
Psalms106:35 Minam dangte tawh kihelin amau’ gamtat bangbang a gamta dingin a kisin uh hi. 
Psalms106:36 Amau a dingin thangzak ahi amau’ milimte a biakpih uh hi. 
Psalms106:37 Amaute in a tapate uh le a tanute uh dawi biakna-in a nei uh hi. 
Psalms106:38 Amaute in Kanaan gam milimte a biakna-un mawhna nei lo a tanute uh le a tapate uh that uh a, hih mi thahna hangin gam sung a nin a suak hi." 
Psalms106:39 Tua ahih ciangin amau’ sepna tawh amaute a nin suak uh a, amau’ gamtatnate tawh palhngulhna a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms106:40 Tua ciangin ama mite tungah Topa’ hehna hong kitawhkuang a, amah in ama luah minamte a kih hi." 
Psalms106:41 Amau a mudah minamte in amaute a uk theih nadingin tua minamte’ khut sungah amaute a pia hi. 
Psalms106:42 A galte un amaute nengniam uh a, amau’ khutnuai-ah amaute a koih uh hi." 
Psalms106:43 Amah in amaute tam veipi honkhia hi. Ahih hangin amaute in lehdona lungsim vom uh a, amau’ mawhna hangin amaute a kiniamkoih hi." 
Psalms106:44 Tua bang ahi ta zongin amaute’ kikona a zak ciangin amaute’ cihmawhna a don hi. 
Psalms106:45 Amaute a’ ding a ngaihsutna-in ama thuciamna phawk a, ama itna kip tawh kizui-in a kolsak hi." 
Psalms106:46 Amaute a man mi khempeuhte in a khasiatpih zah dong dingin amah in amau’ tungah a piangsak hi. 
Psalms106:47 Topa, kote’ Pasian aw, kote hong hon inla, nangma min siangtho kong phat theih nading uh le nangma tungah lungdamna kong koh theih nadingun minam dangte’ lak panin kote hong kaikhawmkik in." 
Psalms106:48 Topa, Israel Pasian in a tawntung a kipan a tawntung dongin thupha ngah tahen. Mi khempeuh in, “Amen,” ci ta uh hen. Topa phat un." 
Psalms107:1 “ Topa tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung!”" 
Psalms107:2 Tu-a teng mah, nisuahna le nitumna, leilu lam le leitaw lam, leitung pana ama kaihkhop, galte’ khutsung panin a hong hotkhiat mite in ci kikkik ta uh hen." 
Psalms107:3  
Psalms107:4 Pawlkhatte gamlakah gammang uh a, a tenna ding uh khuapi tunna lampi mu zo lo uh hi." 
Psalms107:5 Gilkial dangtakin amaute sibup uh hi. 
Psalms107:6 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau’ cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms107:7 Amau’ tenna ding khuapi a tun matengun amah in lampi manah amaute a paipih hi. 
Psalms107:8 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang ama sepnate hangin amaute in Topa’ tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a gilkial a dangtakte phasak a, bangmah a nei lote tungah na hoih tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms107:10 Pawlkhatte, khuamial sung, a zing sungah tu uh a, sikkol kibulhin gimna thuakin thong kia uh hi." 
Psalms107:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasian’ thu sel uh a, Sangpenpa’ thugente a nial uh hi." 
Psalms107:12 Nasep haksa tawh amaute’ lungsim niamsak hi. Amaute puk uh a, a huh ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms107:13 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau’ cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms107:14 Amah in khuamial sung le a zing sung panin amaute lakhia a, amau a kihennate a botsat hi." 
Psalms107:15 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sumngo kongkhakte sukhamin sikzawlte tum nih a suah hi. 
Psalms107:17 Pawlkhatte amau’ khialhna hangin a ci uh na a, a mawhna hangun gimna a thuak uh hi." 
Psalms107:18 Amaute in an peuhmah kih uh a, sihna kongpi tawh amaute kinai ta uh hi." 
Psalms107:19 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau’ cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms107:20 Amah in thu vaikhakin amaute damsak a, siatna ding panin amaute a honkhia hi." 
Psalms107:21 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:22 Lungdam koh piaknate pia-in ama nasepnate lungdam la tawh amaute gensak un. 
Psalms107:23 Pawlkhatte, teembaw tawh tuipi-ah pai uh a, tui liante tungah sumbawl na a sem uh hi." 
Psalms107:24 Amaute in tuithuk tungah Topa’ gamtatna a lamdang a septe a mu uh hi. 
Psalms107:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, tuipi hualte a piangsak huihpi a nungsak hi." 
Psalms107:26 Amaute, vanah kilawnto-in, a thukna-ah kiasuk uh hi. A lauhuai siatna sungah amau’ lungsim hanna a bei hi." 
Psalms107:27 Amaute zukham bangin hoisuk hoito uh a, a cih nading mel uh thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Psalms107:28 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uhah Topa ko uh a, amau’ cihmawhna panin amah in a honkhia hi." 
Psalms107:29 Amah in huihpi daisak a, tuipi hualte a bei hi." 
Psalms107:30 Tua ciangin, tua tuihualte a khawl manin amaute a lungdam uh hi. Amah in amaute’ utna khua-ah a paipih hi." 
Psalms107:31 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a sepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:32 Amaute in mihon kikhopna sungah amah pahtawi-in, upate’ kikhopna sungah amah phat ta uh hen." 
Psalms107:33 Amah in, a tunga a teng mihingte’ gitlohna hangin gunte sehnel gam suaksakin ciktuite leikeu suaksak a, an tampi a pianna leitang pen ci-lei a suaksak hi." 
Psalms107:34  
Psalms107:35 Amah in sehnel gam pen bualtuite suaksak a, leitang keu pen ciktui a suaksak hi." 
Psalms107:36 Amah in tua munah gilkialte tengsak a, a tenna ding uh khuapi amaute in a sat uh hi." 
Psalms107:37 Amaute in lo-ah an tuhin leenggui suan uh a, a gah tampi tak a ngah uh hi." 
Psalms107:38 Ama thupha piakna hangin ante nakpitakin pung a, amau’ bawngte zong kiamsak lo hi." 
Psalms107:39 Amaute pen nenniamna, haksatna le dahna tawh khiamsuk gawpin a kiniamkoih suk ciangin" 
Psalms107:40 amah in, amau a bawlsiate tungah simmawhna buak sukin lampi om lohna gam sungah amaute a vakvaisak hi." 
Psalms107:41 Ahih hangin amah in amau’ thuakna sung panin a cimawhte laamto a, tuu honpite bangin amau’ innkuante a pungsak hi." 
Psalms107:42 Lungsim thutangte in hih thu mu-in kipak uh a, a gilote in ahihleh amau’ kam a cih ciat uh hi." 
Psalms107:43 A pil peuhmah in hih thute don hen la, Topa’ itna kip lungngaingai tahen." 
Psalms108:1 Pasian aw, ka lungsim a kigingsa-in om hi. Ka sa ding hi; nangmah phatna late ka sa ding hi. Kei ka khanglo ding hi." 
Psalms108:2 Harp lasakna le laiza lasakna aw, khanglo un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning." 
Psalms108:3 Topa aw, mite lakah nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding a, minam dangte lakah nangma tungah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms108:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipite banto hi." 
Psalms108:5 Pasian aw, vantungte’ tungah sangto lai in. Leitung khempeuhah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms108:6 Nangma it mite, na hatna tawh hon inla, kong ngetna bangun hong pia in." 
Psalms108:7 Ama biakinn sungah Pasian in thu ciam khin a, “Gualzo a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khenkhia-in, Sukkoth gam kuam ka sehkhia ding hi." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead gam keima a’ hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-a’ mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka siklukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi." 
Psalms108:9 Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, keima neihsa hi, cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn hi. Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms108:10 Kua in khuapi muanhuai-ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam? 
Psalms108:11 Pasian aw, nangmah in kote hong don lo khinta hi lo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komau galkapte tawh na kuankhia kei hi." 
Psalms108:12 Ka galdona uhah kote hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing’ huhna a mawkna hi. 
Psalms108:13 Pasian tawh khauhtakin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak ding pa ahi hi. 
Psalms109:1 Keima hong phat Pasian aw, dai dide-in ommawk kei in." 
Psalms109:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote le zuauthu gente keima langah hong pang uh a, keimah hong gensia-in, zuauthu bekbek genin nei uh hi." 
Psalms109:3 Amaute in muhdah kamte pau-in kei hong gensia uh a, thu om lopi-in kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Psalms109:4 Amaute ka itna, amaute a dingin thu ka ngetsakna nangawn amaute in hong thukna-in kei hong mawhsak uh hi." 
Psalms109:5 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hoihna a dingin siatna itna a dingin muhdahna tawh kei hong thuk uh hi. 
Psalms109:6 Ka gal pa’ langah migilo khat pangsak inla, thusitna a thuak dingin mawhna a zong mi khat paipih sak in." 
Psalms109:7 Amah thu a kisit ciangin thu lelin pusuaksak inla, ama hong thumnate zong mawhna suaksak in." 
Psalms109:8 Amah khantom hen la, midang khat in ama nasep za ngah tahen." 
Psalms109:9 Ama tate pa nei lo hi ta hen la, a zi zong meigong numei hi tahen." 
Psalms109:10 Ama tate vak kawikawi-in khut dawhin ngen hen la, a kisiasa a tenna mun panun kihawlkhia ta uh hen." 
Psalms109:11 Ama leibatna pa in a neih khempeuh man hen la, khualmite in a omlai sunsunte sut tahen." 
Psalms109:12 Ama tungah kuamah migi kei hen la, pa nei lo ama tate kuamah in hehpih kei tahen." 
Psalms109:13 Ama suanlekhakte bei hen la, khang khat sungin a vangliatna maimang tahen." 
Psalms109:14 Topa’ mai-ah a pu a pate’ mawhna kiciamteh hen la, a nu’ mawhna kimaisak kei tahen." 
Psalms109:15 Topa’ mai-ah tua mawhnate omsak inla, leitung panin amah a kiphawkna bei tahen." 
Psalms109:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh migitna lah ding ngaihsun lo a, a zawng a cimawhte le lungsim kitamzan mite a sih dongun a bawlsia hi." 
Psalms109:17 Amah in mi samsiat nuam a sa hi. Ama tungah samsiatnate tungsak in. Amah in thupha pia nuam lo hi. Kuamah in amah thupha pia kei tahen. 
Psalms109:18 Amah pen puansilh bangin samsiatna kingeina seh hi. Tua a samsiatnate ama pumpi sungah tui bangin a guhte sungah sathau bangin lutin kizel tahen. 
Psalms109:19 Tua samsiatnate pen ama kituamna puan tawh kibang hen la, nisimin amah a kigakna a kawnggak tawh kibang tahen." 
Psalms109:20 Hih bang teng pen keimah hong mawhsakte’ tung, kei hong gensiate’ tungah Topa’ kiang pan a thaman hi tahen." 
Psalms109:21 Ahih hangin Topa ka Pasian aw, na min na ngaihsutna tawh keima tangin hong pang inla, na itna kip hoih ahih manin kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms109:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei genthei-in ka cimawh a, ka lungsim tawng dongin na hong nasak hi." 
Psalms109:23 Nitak a niliim bangin kei ka bei a, kauphe bangin kei hong kisingkhia hi." 
Psalms109:24 An ngolhna hangin ka khukte zaw a, ka pumpi silesa zong kiamgawp khinta hi." 
Psalms109:25 Amaute’ nuihsatin kei ka om a, amaute in kei hong muh ciangun lusu ngeungeu uh hi." 
Psalms109:26 Topa ka Pasian aw, kei hong huh in. Nangma itna kip tawh kituakin kei hong hon in." 
Psalms109:27 Topa aw, hih pen nangma bawl, nangma khut in a sep ahihna amaute theisak in." 
Psalms109:28 Amaute in kei hong samsiat hangin nangmah in kei thupha nong pia ding hi. Ka langte zahhuaisak inla, na nasempa keimah hong kipsak ta in." 
Psalms109:29 Kei hong mawhsakte in mindaina silh uh hen la, puanza silh bangin amau’ maizumna tawh kituamcip ta uh hen." 
Psalms109:30 Topa tungah ka lungdamna a gingpha-in ka ko ding a, mihonte lakah amah ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms109:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh sih nading gimna a piapa’ khutsung pan a honkhia dingin mi cimawh pa’ taklamah amah hong ding hi. 
Psalms110:1 Topa in ka to kumpipa tungah, “Na galte nangma khengakna-in ka bawl matengin ka taklamah tu in,” a ci hi." 
Psalms110:2 Topa in Zion panin na kumpi ciangkhut hong puak hi. Na galte’ tungah uk in. 
Psalms110:3 Nangma mihonte mual siangtho tungah na makaih ciangin, utna lungsim tawh na mite hong kipia ding uh hi. Daitui bangin zingsangin na khangnona nangma tungah hong tung ding hi." 
Psalms110:4 Topa in thu ciamzo a, ama ngaihsutna kheel lo ding hi. “Melkhizedek bangin a tawntungin siampi na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms110:5 Nangma taklamah Topa hong om a, ama heh ni-in kumpite a zogawp ding hi." 
Psalms110:6 Kumpipa in minamte lakah thu khen ding a, tua munte si luanghawm tawh a dimsak ding hi. Amah in a zai mahmah leitungah ukpite a susia ding hi." 
Psalms110:7 Amah in lampi gei-a om luitui dawn ding a, amah a tha hatin a gualzo pa hi ding hi." 
Psalms111:1 Topa phat un. Lungsim thutangte a omna, mihon kikhopna sungah ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa’ tungah lungdamna ka ko ding hi." 
Psalms111:2 Topa’ nasepna lian a, hoih a sa mi khempeuh in tuate kankan uh hi." 
Psalms111:3 Ama nasepnate, pahtawina le minliatna tawh kidim a, ama thumanna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms111:4 Amah in phawk tawntung dingin a lamdang nasepnate hong bawl a, Topa dikin hehpihna nei hi." 
Psalms111:5 Amah in amah a zahtakte an pia a, a thuciamna a phawk tawntung hi." 
Psalms111:6 Amah in ama mite tungah minamte’ gamh a piakna tawh ama vangliatna hong lak khin hi. 
Psalms111:7 Ama nasepnate khempeuhah amah thumanin citak a, a thupiaknate muantaak mahmah hi." 
Psalms111:8 A tawntungin tuate kip ngitnget a, thuman le thutang tawh zuih ding ahi hi." 
Psalms111:9 Amah in ama mite honkhia a, a tawntung a kimang dingin thupiakna a bawl khin hi. Ama min siangtho-in vanglian mahmah hi." 
Psalms111:10 Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna ahi hi. Ama thupiak a zuite khempeuh tungah thukhen siamna a pia hi. Amah phat tawntung ding ahi hi. 
Psalms112:1 Topa phat un. Topa zahtakin a thupiaknate nuam a sa mahmah mi, thupha ngah mi ahi hi." 
Psalms112:2 Ama suanlekhakte leitungah vanglian ding a, a lungsim thutang mite’ suanlekhakte thupha kipia ding hi." 
Psalms112:3 Hauhna le nopsaknate a innkuan sungah dim ding a, ama thumanna kip tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms112:4 Lungsim thutangte a dingin khuamial sung panin khuavak hong taangkhia hi. Topa dik a, hehpihna nei-in, amah thuman hi." 
Psalms112:5 Cingh gamtatin mite tungah leitawi pia a, thutangin a gamta mite tungah thu a hoih hi." 
Psalms112:6 Amah kiling lo taktak ding a, kiphawk tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms112:7 Amah in thusia zak ding lau lo hi. Topa muang a, ama lungsim a kip hi." 
Psalms112:8 Amah lau loin, lunghimawh loin om hithiat a, amah a langpangte a guallelh ding a theitel hi." 
Psalms112:9 Amah in hawmkhia zuahzuah a, mizawngte tungah a piakhia hi. Ama migitna kip tawntung a, amah vanglianin kipahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms112:10 Migilo in hih thu mu-in a heh suak mahmah a, a ha gawigawi-in a tuimang hi. Migilote’ lametna a mawkna a suakta hi." 
Psalms113:1 Topa phat un. Topa’ nasemte aw, phat un. Topa’ min phat un." 
Psalms113:2 Topa’ min in tu a kipanin thupha ngah tawntung tahen. 
Psalms113:3 Nisuahna pan nitumna dongin Topa’ min phat ding ahi hi. 
Psalms113:4 Topa in minam khempeuh tungah uk a, ama minthanna vantung sangin sangzaw hi." 
Psalms113:5 A sangna munah a tu, vantung le leitung a hong ensuk Topa, eite’ Pasian pen kua tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms113:6  
Psalms113:7 Amah in leivui panin mizawngte laamto-in, ninphual panin mi cimawhte le a lungkhamte domto a," 
Psalms113:8 uliante tawh kikhawl sakin ama mite’ ulianin a bawl hi. 
Psalms113:9 Amah in tasel numei tungah ta guan a, ta a nei nu a lungdamin a bawl hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms114:1 Israel-te, Egypt gam panin pusuakin, Jakob innkuanpihte paudang a zang mite kiang pan a paikhiat uh ciangin" 
Psalms114:2 Judah-te, Topa’ mi siangtho suak a, Israel-te, ama uk mi a suak hi." 
Psalms114:3 Tuipi in amaute mu-in taikhia a, Jordan gun a nungkik hi." 
Psalms114:4 Mual liante tuutal bangin diang uh a, mual neute tuuno bangin a diang uh hi." 
Psalms114:5 Tuipi aw, na taikhiatna ding, Jordan gun aw, na nungkikna ding," 
Psalms114:6 mual liante aw, tuu bangin mual neute aw, tuuno bangin na dianna ding uh bang in hong nasak ahi hiam?" 
Psalms114:7 Leitung aw, suangpi, bualtui suaksak a, meisuang, ciktui a suaksak, Jakob’ Pasian’ omna, Topa’ omna-ah ling in." 
Psalms114:8  
Psalms115:1 Kote tungah hi loin, Topa aw, kote tungah hi loin, na itna kip le na thumanna hangin nangma tungah minthanna om tahen." 
Psalms115:2 Bang hangin minam dangte in, “Amaute’ Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci laizang ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms115:3 Vantungah eite’ Pasian om a, ama ut peuhpeuh a hih hi." 
Psalms115:4 Amau’ milimte pen ngun le kham hi lel a, mihingte’ khut tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
Psalms115:5 Amaute in kam nei napi-in pau thei lo uh a, mit nei napi-in khua mu thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:6 Amaute in bil nei napi-in khua za lo uh a, nak nei napi-in a nam thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:7 Amaute in khut nei napi-in lawng thei lo uh a, khe nei napi-in pai thei lo uh hi. Amaute in aw gingsak thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:8 Tuate a bawlte le tuate a muangte khempeuh pen tuate mah tawh kibang uh hi. 
Psalms115:9 Israel-te aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:10 Aaron innkuante aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:11 Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:12 Topa in eite hong phawk a, thupha hong pia ding hi. Amah in Israel mite, thupha hong pia ding a, amah in Aaron innkuante thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Psalms115:13 Amah in Topa a zahtakte a lian a neu-in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Psalms115:14 Topa in note le na tate uh hong pungsak tahen. 
Psalms115:15 Van le lei a bawl Topa in note thupha hong pia tahen. 
Psalms115:16 Vantung pen Topa a’ hi a, ahih hangin leitung pen mihingte tungah hong pia khin hi." 
Psalms115:17 Misite ahi a, gamdaihna sungah a pai peuhpeuhte in ahi zongin Topa phat lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:18 Ahih hangin eite in tu a kipanin a tawntungin Topa i phat ngitnget ding hi. Topa phat un. 
Psalms116:1 Topa ka it hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ka aw hong za-in ka thumnate hong ngai hi. 
Psalms116:2 Amah ka sap sialin ka sapna aw hong ngai hi. 
Psalms116:3 Sihna khau in kei hong gakcip hi. Leinuai sihna in kei hong mancip a, natna le lungkhamna ka thuak hi." 
Psalms116:4 Tua ciangin Topa’ tungah thu ngenin, “ Topa aw, nang tungah kong thum hi; kei hong hon in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms116:5 Topa dikin thuman a, i Pasian in hehpihna nei hi." 
Psalms116:6 Topa in thu thei lo mi hong kem a, kei hong kiniamkoih ciangin amah in hong huh hi." 
Psalms116:7 Lungmuang takin ka om ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keima tungah Topa hong thunuam hi. 
Psalms116:8 Topa in sihna panin kei hong honkhia hi. Ka khituite hong kangsak a, kei hong guallelsak lo hi." 
Psalms116:9 Tua ahih ciangin mihingte’ omna leitung, Topa’ mai-ah nungta-in ka vak kawikawi hi." 
Psalms116:10 “Nakpi takin gimna ka thuak hi,” ka cih hun ciang nangawnin ka upna mah ka len cinten hi." 
Psalms116:11 Lunghihmawhna tawh, “Mi khempeuh zuau gen vive hi,” ka cih hun nangawnin ka um lailai hi." 
Psalms116:12 Kei tunga ama thupha tampite Topa’ tungah bangci thuk ding ka hi hiam? 
Psalms116:13 Topa in kei hong hotkhiat ka lungdamna hangin, ama kiangah tuiphih biakna ka paipih ding hi." 
Psalms116:14 Topa’ tungah ka thuciamnasa pen ama mite khempeuh a kikhopna munah ka pia ding hi. 
Psalms116:15 Ama mi siangthote a sih ciangin Topa in na sa mahmah hi. 
Psalms116:16 Topa aw, kei pen nangma nasem ka hi hi. Nangma nasem ka hi a, na nasemnu’ ta ka hi hi. Keimah hong kikhihnate nong sutkhiatsak zo hi." 
Psalms116:17 Lungdam koh biakpiakna nang tungah kong pia ding a, Topa’ tungah thu kong ngen ding hi." 
Psalms116:18 Jerusalem khuapi aw, ama mi khempeuh a omna sung, Topa’ inn huangsung, nangma laizangah, Topa’ tungah ka thuciamnasa ka pia ding hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms116:19  
Psalms117:1 Minam khempeuhte aw, Topa phat un. Minam khempeuhte aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms117:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a hong itna lian mahmah a, Topa’ thutakna a tawntungin kip ngitnget hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms118:1 Topa’ tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms118:2 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Israel-te in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:3 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Aaron innkuante in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:4 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” amah a zahtakte in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:5 Ka cihmawhna-ah Topa ka sam a, Topa in hong dawngin mun tanzau-ah hong koih hi." 
Psalms118:6 Topa in kei hong ompih hi. Bangmah ka kihta kei ding hi. Mihingte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms118:7 Kei hong huh dingin kei lamah Topa om hi. Kei hong mudahte pen gualzawhna tawh ka en ding hi. 
Psalms118:8 Mi i muan sangin Topa belh ding hoihzaw hi. 
Psalms118:9 Uliante i muan sangin Topa belh ding hoihzaw hi. 
Psalms118:10 Minam khempeuh in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa’ vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi. 
Psalms118:11 Amaute in ka kimkotah kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa’ vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi. 
Psalms118:12 Amaute in khuaipi bangin kei hong umcih uh a, ahi zongin selkeu kuang bangin amaute daikik pak uh hi. Topa’ vang tawh amaute ka sugawp hi." 
Psalms118:13 Kei ka puk nadingin nakpitakin hong kisawn a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi." 
Psalms118:14 Topa in a vanglian, a thahatin kei hong bawl a, amah pen kei a hong honpa ahi hi." 
Psalms118:15 Ngai un! Thuman mite’ puanbuk sungah gualzawh lungdamna la kisa a, “ Topa’ taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi." 
Psalms118:16 Topa’ taklam khut kipahtawi a, Topa’ taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi,” kici hi." 
Psalms118:17 Kei ka si kei ding a, ka hing ding hi. Topa’ sepnate ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms118:18 Topa in nasia takin kei hong thuhilh a, ahih hangin kei hong sisak lo hi." 
Psalms118:19 Topa’ tungah lungdamna ko-in ka lut theih nadingin biakinn kongpite kei hong hon in. 
Psalms118:20 Hih pen Topa’ kongpi ahi hi. Thuman mi bek hih kongpi-ah lut ding hi. 
Psalms118:21 Nangmah in kei hong dawngin, hong honkhia na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam hi." 
Psalms118:22 Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. 
Psalms118:23 Hih pen Topa’ nasepna hi a, eite’ mitah lamdang hi." 
Psalms118:24 Hih ni pen Topa’ hong piak ni hi a, eite lungdamin i kipak ding hi." 
Psalms118:25 Topa aw, kote hong hon in; hong thum ung. Topa aw, kong thum uh hi; kote hong daupaisak in." 
Psalms118:26 Topa’ min tawh hong pai pa in thupha ngah tahen. Topa’ inn panin nang kong phat uh hi. 
Psalms118:27 Topa pen Pasian ahi hi. Amah in eite tungah nopsakna hong piazo hi. Na khut uhah singhiang tawi-in, biakna tau kimkotin pai un." 
Psalms118:28 Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi. Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangmah kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms118:29 Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:1 Amau’ gamtatna-ah paubaan om loin Topa’ ngeina sungah a gamtate thupha ngah ahi hi. 
Psalms119:2 Ama thuhilhnate zui-in, a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amah zongin, khialhna zong bawl loin, ama lampi a zuite, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms119:3  
Psalms119:4 Nangma thuhilhte limtakin zuih dingin thu nong pia hi. 
Psalms119:5 Nangma ngeina kipte zuihna-ah ka gamtatna kip tahen. 
Psalms119:6 Na thupiakte khempeuh mitsuanin nei ka hih manin, kei ka maizum kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:7 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte ka sin khit ciangin lungsim thutang tawh nangmah kong phat ding hi. 
Psalms119:8 Nangma ngeina kipte ka zui ding hi; kei hong nusia suak kei in. 
Psalms119:9 Tangval khat in ama gamtatna a siangtho mahmah dingin bangci kep ding ahi hiam? Nangma thu zuihna tawh ama gamtatna siangthosak thei ding hi. 
Psalms119:10 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang ka hong zong hi. Na thupiaknate panin kei hong pialsak kei in. 
Psalms119:11 Nangma tungah kong khialh loh nadingin ka lungsim sungah nangma thu ka khol hi. 
Psalms119:12 Topa aw, thupha ngah ta in; na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:13 Nangma hong piak nangmah biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms119:14 Hauhnate khempeuh sangin nangma thuhilhnate nuam ka sa zaw hi. 
Psalms119:15 Nangma thuhilhnate lungngaingai-in, nangma lampite ka mitsuan ding hi." 
Psalms119:16 Nangma ngeina kipte-ah nuam ka sa ding a, nangma thu ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:17 Nungta-in nangma thu ka zuih theih nadingin na nasempa tungah hong cingh in. 
Psalms119:18 Nangma thukham sung panin a lamdang nate ka muh theih nadingin keima mitte hong honsak in. 
Psalms119:19 Kei pen hih leitungah peemta ka hi hi; kei’ kiang panin na thuphate seel kei in. 
Psalms119:20 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte a tawntungin ka lunggulh venvan hi. 
Psalms119:21 Nangmah in na thupiaknate panin a pialkhia, a kisamsiat, a kiphasakte na thuhilh hi." 
Psalms119:22 Na thuhilhnate zui ka hih manin amau’ hong nuihsatna le hong simmawhnate panin kei hong suaktasak in. 
Psalms119:23 Uliante in kei hong langpangin thu a vaihawm uh hangin na nasempa in na ngeina kipte ngaihsunsun ding hi. 
Psalms119:24 Na thuhilhnate ka deih hi. Tuate pen keimah thu hong lakte ahi hi. 
Psalms119:25 Guallelin leivui lakah ka lum hi. Na thu omsa bangin kei hong hingsak in. 
Psalms119:26 Ka gamtatnate kong gen ciangin nangmah in kei nong dawng hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in. 
Psalms119:27 Nangma ngeina kipte kei hong theitel sak in. Nangma nasep lamdangte ka ngaihsunsun ding hi. 
Psalms119:28 Dahna in kei hong vukcip hi. Nangma thu omsa bangin kei hong thakhauhsak in. 
Psalms119:29 A man lo lampite ka zuih khak loh nadingin kei hong kem in. Hong hehpih inla, na ngeinate hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:30 Thuman lampi ka teel khin a, na biakna ngeina kipte ka deih hi." 
Psalms119:31 Topa aw, na thuhilhnate ka pom hi. Kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms119:32 Keima theihna nong zaisak ciangin nangma thupiaknate lawpna tawh ka zui ding hi. 
Psalms119:33 Topa aw, na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in. A mong dongin ka zui ding hi." 
Psalms119:34 Nangma thute kemin ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ka zuih theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong pia in. 
Psalms119:35 Nangma thupiakna lampi-ah kei hong paipih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua-ah nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:36 Nangma thuhilhnate’ lamah ka lungsim awnsak inla, ngahna ding bekah awnsak kei in." 
Psalms119:37 Bangmahin a kimang lo nate, kei hong kinsak kei inla, nangma thu omsa bangin hong nungtasak in." 
Psalms119:38 Na thu hong mangte tungah na thuciamnate, na nasempa tungah hong kipsak in." 
Psalms119:39 Ka kihtak hong kikonate kei’ kiang pan heikhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah biakna ngeina kipte hoih mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:40 En in, na thuhilhnate ka lunggulh hi. Na thumanna tawh kei hong hingsak in." 
Psalms119:41 Topa aw, na ciamna bangin na itna kip, na hotkhiatna kei tungah hong tungsak in." 
Psalms119:42 Tua hileh na thu ka muanna hangin kei hong zahkote ka dawnna ding hong om ding hi. 
Psalms119:43 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte lamenin om ka hih manin a man thu hong gen theisak tawntung in. 
Psalms119:44 Nangma thu tatsat loin ka zui ngitnget ding hi. 
Psalms119:45 Nangma thuhilhnate zuih ding hanciam ka hih manin nuamtakin ka nungta ding hi. 
Psalms119:46 Kumpite’ mai-ah nangma thute ka gen ding a, maizumna ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka deih nangma thupiakna zuih ding nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:48 Keima deih ahi na thupiakte ka zahtak a, na ngeina kipte ka lungngaingai ding hi." 
Psalms119:49 Keimah nong lametsakna ahi na nasempa’ tungah na thuciamna hong phawk in. 
Psalms119:50 Hih pen ka thuakna-ah keima kihehnepna hi a, na thuciamna in kei tungah nuntakna hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:51 Mi kiphasakte in kei hong zahko gawp uh a, ahih hangin nangma thupiakna panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
Psalms119:52 Topa aw, hun lui lai-a nangmah biakna ngeina kipte ka ngaihsut ciangin ka lung hong nuam hi." 
Psalms119:53 Nangma thu a nusia migilote’ hangin ka heh a suak hi. 
Psalms119:54 Hih leitung ka omna peuhah nangma ngeina kipte la phuahin ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:55 Topa aw, zanin na min ka phawk a, nangma thu ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:56 Nangma thuhilhte zui ka hih manin keima tungah hih thupha hong tung hi. 
Psalms119:57 Topa pen keima tanh ahi hi. Na thute zuih ding ka kiciam hi. 
Psalms119:58 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na maipha kong ngen hi. Na thuciamna omsa bangin kei hong hehpih in. 
Psalms119:59 Ka gamtatnate ka ngaihsun a, na ngeinate zuih ding ka kiciam hi." 
Psalms119:60 Kei kinawhin, na thupiakte zuih ding ka zekai kei hi." 
Psalms119:61 Migilote’ khau in kei hong vialh hangin nangma thu ka mangngilh tuan kei hi. 
Psalms119:62 A thuman na ngeina kipte hangin nangmah a phat dingin zankim laitakin ka tho hi. 
Psalms119:63 Kei pen, na thuhilhte a zui, nangmah a hong zahtakte tawh a kikhawlpa ka hi hi." 
Psalms119:64 Topa aw, leitung pen nangma itna kip tawh kidim hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:65 Topa aw, na thuciamna bangin na nasempa na limbawl hi." 
Psalms119:66 Na thupiakte um ka hih manin thu khentel theihna le theihsiamna hong hilh in. 
Psalms119:67 Gim nong piak ma-in lam ka pial thei zel a, ahih hangin tu-in na thu ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:68 Nangmah na hoih a, a hoih nate na sem hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:69 Mi kiphasakte in kei’ thu, zuau vive gengen uh a, ahih hangin keimah in ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na thuhilhte ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:70 Amaute’ lungsim in thu theithei loin khikcip a, ahih hangin keimah in nangma thu sung nuam ka sa hi." 
Psalms119:71 Nangma ngeina kipte ka sin theih nadingin gimna ka thuak pen kei a dingin hoih mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:72 Nangma kam sung pana thu pen kham le ngun tul tampite sangin kei a dingin hoihzaw hi. 
Psalms119:73 Nangmah in kei hong piangsakin na hong bawl hi. Na thupiaknate ka sin theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong pia in. 
Psalms119:74 Nangma thuciamna muang ka hih manin nang hong zahtakte in kei hong mu-in lungdam ding uh hi. 
Psalms119:75 Topa aw, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte man hi, ci-in ka thei a, na thumanna hangin kei gim na hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:76 Na nasempa tungah na thuciamna bangin keimah hong hehnem dingin na itna kip a baihsa-in hong omsak in. 
Psalms119:77 Ka nuntak theih nadingin kei hong hehpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thu nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:78 Mi kiphasakte zahhuaisak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in khemna tawh kei hong lumlet uh hi. Ke’n ahihleh na thuhilhte ka lungngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms119:79 Na teci pannate a theih nadingun nang hong zahtakte kei’ lamah hong kiheisak in. 
Psalms119:80 Guallelh maizumna ka thuak loh nadingin nangma ngeina kipte a kicing takin a zuizo mi hong hisak ta in. 
Psalms119:81 Na hong hotkhiat ding ka ngakngakna-in ka tha bei ta a, nangma thu muangin ka lamen hi." 
Psalms119:82 Na thuciamnate ka etetna-in ka mitte thazaw ta hi. “Cik ciangin hong hehnem ding na hiam?” kong ci hi. 
Psalms119:83 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen meikhu lak a a kikoihdak savun-um tawh ka kibang a, ahi zongin nangma ngeina kipte ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:84 Na nasempa in bang tanvei ngaklai ding ka hi hiam? Kei hong bawlsiate cik ciangin thu khen ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms119:85 Nangma thu a zui lo, mi kiphasakte in keimah hong siahna-in gum a to uh hi." 
Psalms119:86 Nangma thupiakte khempeuh man taktak hi. Amaute in thuman lopi-in kei hong bawlsia uh hi. Kei hong huh in. 
Psalms119:87 Amaute in kei hong thatzo dektak uh hi. Ahih hangin na thuhilhnate ka mangngilh tuan kei hi. 
Psalms119:88 Na kam pana na teci pannate ka zuih theih nadingin na itna kip tawh kei hong hingsak in. 
Psalms119:89 Topa aw, vantungah nangma thu kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:90 Nangma thumanna khang tawntungin kip hi. Nangmah in leitung na kipsak a, om tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:91 Nangma sehna tawh tu dongin amaute kip uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh nangma nasem ahi hi. 
Psalms119:92 Nangma thu, nuam a sa lo hileng, ka gimthuakna-ah ka kisia khinzo ta ding hi." 
Psalms119:93 Nangma thuhilhte ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate tawh nong nungtasak hi. 
Psalms119:94 Kei pen nangma a’ ka hi hi. Kei hong hon in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thuhilhte zuih ding ka hanciam hi. 
Psalms119:95 Migilote in keimah a hong that dingin hong buk uh hi. Ahih hangin na teci pannate ke’n ka lungngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms119:96 A kicinga a kingaihsun nate khempeuh in mong a neihna ka mu khin a, ahih hangin na thupiakna in mong nei loin zai mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:97 Na thu deih mahmah ing. Sun tawntungin ka lungngaihngaih ahi hi. 
Psalms119:98 Na thupiakna in ka langte khempeuh sangin a pilzaw-in hong bawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen kei tawh omkhawm den hi. 
Psalms119:99 Ka siate khempeuh sangin thu ka telzaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na teci pannate ka ngaihsunsun hi. 
Psalms119:100 Khanghamte sangin thu ka telzaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na thuhilhnate ka zui hi. 
Psalms119:101 Na thu ka zuih theih nadingin gamtatsia khempeuh ka pelh hi. 
Psalms119:102 Nangmah in hong hilh khin na hih manin na biakna ngeina kipte panin kei ka pial kei hi. 
Psalms119:103 Nangma thute khum mahmah a, khuaizu sangin khumzaw hi." 
Psalms119:104 Na thuhilhnate hangin thu theihtelna ka ngah hi. Tua ahih ciangin a man lo lampi khempeuh ka mudah hi. 
Psalms119:105 Nangma thu pen lam hong lak ding meivak hi a, ka paina lampi-ah khuavak ahi hi." 
Psalms119:106 A thuman ahi nangmah biakna ngeina kipte a zui dingin ka kiciam khin a, ka kipsak khin hi." 
Psalms119:107 Nakpi takin gimna ka thuak hi. Topa aw, nong ciamsa bangin kei hong nungtasak in." 
Psalms119:108 Topa aw, phatin kong biaknate hong sang inla, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:109 Nisimin ka nuntakna a lauhuai sungah om ngitnget a, ahih hangin nangma thu ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:110 Migilote in kei thang hong siah uh a, ahih hangin na thuhilhnate panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
Psalms119:111 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte tawntung keima luah ahi hi. Tuate pen keima lungdamna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:112 Nangma ngeina kipte ka sih mateng a zui tawntung dingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi. 
Psalms119:113 Nangma tungah a thuman lote ka mudah a, ahih hangin keimah in nangma thu ka deih hi." 
Psalms119:114 Nang pen keima bukna mun le kei hong hupa na hi hi. Na thuciamna ka muang hi. 
Psalms119:115 No, siatna a bawlte aw, Pasian’ thupiakte ka zuih theih nadingin kei kiang panin paikhia un." 
Psalms119:116 Kei ka nuntak theih nadingin na thuciamna tawh kizui-in kei hong huh inla, ka lametna-ah kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms119:117 Ka suahtak theih nading le na ngeina kipte sungah nuamsa-in ka om ngitnget theih nadingin kei hong huh in. 
Psalms119:118 Nangma ngeina kipte panin a pialkhiate khempeuh na nilkhia hi. Amau’ khem siamna a mawkna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:119 Leitung a migilote khempeuh sik-ek bangin na ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin na teci pannate ka deih hi. 
Psalms119:120 Nang kong zahtakna hangin ka khuasikmul suak a, na thukhennate ka zahtak hi." 
Psalms119:121 Thutang thumanin ka gamta hi. Hong nengniamte’ khut sungah kei hong nusia kei in. 
Psalms119:122 Na nasempa a dingin nangmah hong kikham inla, mi kiphasakte hong nengniamsak kei in." 
Psalms119:123 Nangma hotkhiatna le a man na thuciamna hong tun ding ka etna-in ka mitte a gim ta hi. 
Psalms119:124 Na itna kip tawh kituakin na nasempa tungah hong bawl inla, na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:125 Kei pen na nasempa ka hi hi. Na thuhilhnate ka theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong guan in. 
Psalms119:126 Topa aw, nangma thu kipalsat khin ahih ciangin thu na khen ding hun hita hi." 
Psalms119:127 Tua ahih ciangin khamte, le kham hoihpente sangin nangma thupiakna ka deihzaw hi." 
Psalms119:128 Tua ahih ciangin na thuhilhnate khempeuh tawh a kituakin kei ka gamta a, a man lo lampi khempeuh ka mudah hi." 
Psalms119:129 Na thuhilhnate lamdang pha mahmah a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh tuate ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:130 Na thute gentelna in khua vaksak a, thu thei lote tungah thu theihtelna a guan hi." 
Psalms119:131 Na thupiakte ka lunggulhna-in ka kam ka-in ka leii ka kha hi. 
Psalms119:132 Nangmah hong itte tungah na hih ngei bangin kei lamah hong kihei-in kei hong hehpih in. 
Psalms119:133 Na hong ciamsa bangin ka pukna ding panin hong kem inla, keima tungah siatna gualzosak kei in." 
Psalms119:134 Nangma thuhilhte ka zuih theih nadingin hong nengniamte’ kiang pan kei hong honkhia in. 
Psalms119:135 Na nasempa tungah na mai hong taangsak inla, na ngeina kipte hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:136 Mite in nangma thu zui lo uh ahih manin ka khitui hawk luanin a luang hi. 
Psalms119:137 Topa aw, nang na thuman a, na thukhennate zong thuman mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:138 Nangma koihsa ngeina kipte thumanin thutak hi.
