Psalms119:139 Ka galte in nangma thu kin het lo uh ahih manin keima hehna mei bangin a kuang hi. 
Psalms119:140 Na thuciamnate kician mahmah a, na nasempa in tuate deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:141 Kei ka neu a, hong kisimmawh hi. Ahih hangin na thuhilhnate ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:142 Nangma thumanna kip tawntung a, na thukham zong man tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:143 Dahna le lungkhamna ka tungah hong tung a, ahih hangin na thupiaknate nuam ka sakna ahi hi." 
Psalms119:144 Na teci pannate a tawntungin thuman hi. Thu theihtelna hong guan in; tua hileh ka nungta ding hi. 
Psalms119:145 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang tungah kong kiko hi. Hong dawng in, Topa! Na ngeina kipte ka zui ding hi." 
Psalms119:146 Nang tungah kong kiko hi. Na thuhilhnate ka zuih theih nadingin kei hong hon in. 
Psalms119:147 Khuavak ma-in tho-in huhna ngenin kong kiko a, nangma thuciamna hong tun ding lamenin ka om niloh hi." 
Psalms119:148 Nangma thuciamna a lungngaingai dingin zan khuavakin ka zanhak hi. 
Psalms119:149 Topa aw, na itna kip tawh a kizui-in ka aw hong za inla, nangma thutang tawh kizui-in ka nuntakna hong kem in." 
Psalms119:150 Gitloh ngimna tawh kei hong bawlsia mite in kei hong nehta uh a, amaute in nangma thu ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms119:151 Ahih hangin Topa aw, kei kiangah nang nong nai a, na thupiaknate khempeuh ahi taktak vive ahi hi." 
Psalms119:152 Tuate a tawntungin a kip dingin na bawl ahihna thu, nangma thuhilhnate panin sawtpi-in ka thei hi." 
Psalms119:153 Ka thuakna hong en inla, kei hong honkhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thu ka mangngilh kei hi." 
Psalms119:154 Ka thu-ah hong pang inla, kei hong suaktasak in. Na ciamsa bangin kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms119:155 Migilote, kihonkhia lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in na thukhamte zui lo uh hi." 
Psalms119:156 Topa aw, na hehpihna lian hi. Na biakna ngeina kip tawh a kituakin kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms119:157 Kei hong bawlsiate, ka langte tam mahmah a, ahih hangin nangma thu panin kei ka pial tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:158 Thuman lo mite ka muh ciangin ka kih mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nangma thupiakte zui lo uh hi. 
Psalms119:159 Nangma thuhilhnate bangzah takin ka deihna hong ngaihsun in. Topa aw, na itna kip tawh a kizui-in kei hong hon in." 
Psalms119:160 Na thubulpi thumanna hi a, a man mahmah, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh a tawntungin kip paisuak hi." 
Psalms119:161 Uliante in thu om lopi-in kei hong bawlsia uh a, ahih hangin na thute lamdang sa mahmahin ka thupi ngaihsut hi." 
Psalms119:162 Vankinusia tampi tak a ngah pa bangin na thuciamna-ah ka lung a dam mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:163 Zuaunate zadahin ka kih a, ahih hangin nangma thu ka deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:164 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte hangin nisimin sagihvei nang kong phat hi. 
Psalms119:165 Nangma thu a deihte in lungnopna lianpi ngah uh a, amaute a tuksakzo ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms119:166 Topa aw, nong hotkhiat ding ka ngak a, na thupiakte ka sem hi." 
Psalms119:167 Na thuhilhnate ka zui a, tuate ka nak deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:168 Na thuhilhnate le na ngeina kip omte khempeuh hoihtakin ka zui a, ka gamtatna khempeuh nangmah in na hong mu hi." 
Psalms119:169 Topa aw, kong kikona aw, na kiang hong tung hen la, nangma thu omsa tawh kizui-in thu theihtelna kei hong guan in." 
Psalms119:170 Keima thumna in na kiang hong ban hen la, nangma thu omsa tawh kizui-in kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms119:171 Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh na hih manin kong phat tawntung ding hi. 
Psalms119:172 Na thupiak khempeuh man mahmah ahih manin nangma thu phatna la ka sa ding hi. 
Psalms119:173 Nangma thuhilhte hong zui ka hih manin keimah hong huh dingin a kigingsa-in om tawntung in. 
Psalms119:174 Topa aw, nong hotkhiat ding ka lamen a, nangma khut sungah nuam ka sa mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:175 Nang kong phat theih nadingin kei hong nungtasak inla, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte kei hong huhsak in." 
Psalms119:176 A gammang tuu bangin lam ka pial khin hi. Tua ahih manin na nasempa hong zong in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thupiaknate ka pelh kei hi. 
Psalms120:1 Ka cihmawh ciangin Topa’ tungah ka kiko a, amah in hong dawng hi." 
Psalms120:2 Topa aw, mizuaute le mikhemte’ kiang panin kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms120:3 Mikhem theite aw, note’ tungah bang hong kipia ding a, note’ tungah bang hong kihih ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms120:4 Galhang pa’ thal hiamte le sesing hol-am hi ding hi. 
Psalms120:5 Note lakah ka omkhak pen Meshek gam sungah tenkhak sangin haksazaw a, Kedar mite lakah tenkhak sangin siahuaizaw hi." 
Psalms120:6 Gal kilemna a deih lo mite lakah sauvei ka teng luakha hi. 
Psalms120:7 Kei pen gal kilemna a ngaihsun mi ka hi hi. Ahih hangin kilemna ding thu ka gen ciangin amaute in galkido ding utna tengin nei uh hi. 
Psalms121:1 Keimah in mualtung lam ka ento hi. Keimah huhna koi lai pan hong pai ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms121:2 Van le lei a bawl Topa’ kiang panin keimah huhna hong pai hi. 
Psalms121:3 Amah in ka khe taalsak lo ding a, kei hong kem pa lusu lo ding hi." 
Psalms121:4 En un, Israel a kem pa lusu lo a, zong ihmu lo hi." 
Psalms121:5 Topa in nang hong cing ding a, nangmah a hong hu dingin na kiangah hong om hi." 
Psalms121:6 Sunin ni in nang hong gimsak lo ding a, zanin kha in zong nang hong sukha lo ding hi." 
Psalms121:7 Topa in siatna khempeuh panin nang hong hu ding a, amah in a muanhuai-in nang hong kem ding hi." 
Psalms121:8 Topa in tua kipan a tawntungin na vaksuk na vaktohna-ah nang hong kem ding hi. 
Psalms122:1 Amaute in kei tungah, “ Topa’ inn-ah pai ni,” hong cih uh ciangin kei ka kipak hi." 
Psalms122:2 Jerusalem aw, na kulhkongpi sungah kote hong tungin ka ding khinta uh hi." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem khuapi pen Israel-te tungah thu a kipiaksa bangin Topa’ tungah lungdamna a ko dingin Topa’ minamte, Israel minamte, a hong paitohna, khuapi lian tawh a kibangin a kibawl, kiptakin a kilam bikbek khuapi ahi hi." 
Psalms122:4  
Psalms122:5 David’ innkuante’ kumpi tokhom, thukhenna ding kumpi tokhomte, tua lai-ah kikoih hi." 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem khuapi, a nopsakna ding thu ngen unla, “Nang hong itte a dau pai tahen." 
Psalms122:7 Na khua sungah lungnopna om hen la, na galvilna tausangte’ huam sungah lungmuanna om ta hen,” ci-in ngen un." 
Psalms122:8 Sanggamte le kikholhpihte ka khualna-in, “Jerusalem in nopna om ta hen,” ka ci ding hi." 
Psalms122:9 Topa eite’ Pasian’ inn ka khualna-in nangma hoihna ding thu ka ngen ding hi. 
Psalms123:1 Vantungah a om pa aw, nangmah kong ento hi." 
Psalms123:2 Nasem pasalte in a topa uh muang a, nasem numeite in a tonu uh a muan mah bangin ko tungah hehpihna nong neih matengin Topa kote’ Pasian kong mitsuan uh hi." 
Psalms123:3 Kote hong hehpih in. Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote in ka thuak zawh loh uh simmawhna ka thuak uh hi." 
Psalms123:4 A ututin a gamta mite in kote a hong zahkona, a kiphasak mite in hong simmawh bawlna hangin ka gimthuakna uh sauvei lua khinta hi." 
Psalms124:1 Israel mite aw, Topa in hong panpih lo hileh i tuah ding thu thei un." 
Psalms124:2 Eite langpangin mite hong kipat ciangin eite’ lamah Topa hong pang lo hileh," 
Psalms124:3 eite’ tungah a hehna uh a kisosuah ciangin amaute in eite a hingin hong nawmvalh khin ding uh hi. 
Psalms124:4 Tuikhang in eite hong tai-in, tuihual in hong tum khin ding a," 
Psalms124:5 tuipi husiate in hong tuummang khin ding hi. 
Psalms124:6 Amaute’ suksiat dingin eite a hong piakhia lo Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms124:7 Thangsiahte’ thangzak panin vasa a suahtak bangin eite i suakta hi. Thangkhau kibottat a, eite i suakta khinta hi." 
Psalms124:8 Van le lei a bawl Topa’ tung panin eite huhna hong pai hi. 
Psalms125:1 Topa a muang mite pen ling hetloin a om tawntung Zion Mual tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalem kimkotah mualte a om mah bangin ama mite’ kimkotah tua kipan a tawntungin Topa om ding hi. 
Psalms125:3 Thuman mite a khialhkhak loh nadingun amau a kipia leitang tungah migilote in amaute uk paisuak lo ding hi. 
Psalms125:4 Topa aw, a hoih mite tung le na thupiakna a zui mite tungah hehpihna hong nei in." 
Psalms125:5 Ahih hangin amau’ gitlohna a zuite pen siatna a bawlte gim na piak ciangin amaute tawh piakhawm in. Israel tungah nopna om ta hen! 
Psalms126:1 Topa in Zion-ah eite hong ciahpih kik ciangin i mang tawh kibang liang hi. 
Psalms126:2 Lungdamin i nui a, lungdam lua-in la i sa hi. Tua ciangin minam dangte kiho-in, “ Topa in amau a dingin na lianpite bawl khinta hi,” kici uh hi." 
Psalms126:3 Topa in eite a dingin na lianpite bawl khinta a, eite i kipak hi." 
Psalms126:4 Topa aw, lei keuna munah guah in tui a puak bangin kote’ nopsaknate a ngei hong bangsakkik ta in." 
Psalms126:5 Khitui tawh khai a tuhte lungdamin kikona tawh an la sak ta in. 
Psalms126:6 Kap kawmin kuankhia-in a tuh ding khaici a pua mi lungdamin kikona tawh buhlomte pua-in hong ciah ding hi. 
Psalms127:1 Topa in inn lampih kei leh innlamte’ sepna a mawkna ahi hi. Topa in khuapi hutpih kei leh khuapi cingte’ cinna a mawkna ahi hi. 
Psalms127:2 Zingsangin tho baihin, gimpi a nangma sepsa an na nek hakna zong a mawkna mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ama itte tungah a ihmut sung nangawnun a pia hi." 
Psalms127:3 En un, tate pen Topa’ tung pana letsong hi a, tapate pen ama hong piak thupha ahi hi." 
Psalms127:4 Mi khat in a khangno lai-in a neih tate pen galhang pa’ khutsunga a om a thaltangte tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms127:5 A thallawng dimin tua bang thaltang a nei pa mi lungdam ahi hi. Amah guallel ngei lo ding a, zahhuai ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms128:1 Topa zahtakin ama thu a zui mi khempeuh thupha ngah mi ahi hi. 
Psalms128:2 Na khut tawh na sep thaman na ne ding a, na lungdamin na maavang ding hi." 
Psalms128:3 Nangma inn sungah na zi, a gah pha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang ding a, na sabuai kiimah a tu na tate, oliv no dawng hilhhelh tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Psalms128:4 En un, Topa a zahtak mi tua bangin thupha kipia ding hi." 
Psalms128:5 Topa in Zion panin nang thupha hong pia hen la, na nuntak sung tawntung Jerusalem’ nopsakna mu ta in." 
Psalms128:6 Na tute a mu dingin hong siam tahen. Israel tungah nopna om ta hen! 
Psalms129:1 “Ka neu lai a kipanin nakpitakin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh hi,” Israel in tu-in ci tahen." 
Psalms129:2 “Ka neu lai a kipanin nakpitakin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh a, ahih hangin amaute in kei hong zo nai lo uh hi." 
Psalms129:3 Lo khote in lei a kuih bangin ka nungzang hong kuikek uh a, tu-ma-kuakte tawh kibangsak uh hi." 
Psalms129:4 Topa thuman a, amah in migilote’ henna khaute sutat khinta hi,” amaute in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms129:5 Zion a mudahte khempeuh maizumin kinungkiksak tahen. 
Psalms129:6 Amaute pen a khan khit ma-a a vul, innkhumzanga lopa, an at pa in a khut sungah a kaihkhop loh, buhlom hen pa in a ang-ah a pom loh, amau a mukhate in, “ Topa’ thupha na tungah om tahen. Topa’ min tawh thupha kong pia uh hi,” a cih loh mite tawh kibangsak in." 
Psalms129:7  
Psalms129:8  
Psalms130:1 Topa aw, ka lungkham mahmahna panin nang tungah kong kiko hi." 
Psalms130:2 Topa aw, ka aw hong za in. Ka thumna awgingte hong ngai in." 
Psalms130:3 Topa aw, nangmah in mawhneite ciamteh lecin, Topa aw, kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms130:4 Ahih hangin nangmah hong kizahtak theih nadingin nangmah in mawhna na maisak hi. 
Psalms130:5 Topa’ hong huh ding lawpna tawh ka ngak a, ama thugen ka muang hi." 
Psalms130:6 Galvilte in zingsang hun ding a ngaklah sangin galvilte in phalvak hun ding a ngaklah sangin, Topa ka ngaklah zaw hi." 
Psalms130:7 Israel aw, Topa muang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ itna kip tawntungin, hong honkhia nuam tawntung hi." 
Psalms130:8 Mawhna a om khempeuh panin amah in Israel-te a honkhia ding hi. 
Psalms131:1 Topa aw, ka lungsim kiliansak nawn lo a, kei ka kihisak nawnkei hi. Kei a dingin a lianlua le a lamdang luate ngaihsutin ka nei kei hi." 
Psalms131:2 A nu’ nawi tawh a kikhenta naupang bangin daitakin ka om dide zota hi. A dai hithiat-a om naupang tawh ka kibangta hi. 
Psalms131:3 Israel aw, tu a kipanin a tawntungin Topa muang in." 
Psalms132:1 Topa aw, David na ngaihsutna-in a gim thuaknate khempeuh le amah in, “Jakob’ Vanglianpa’ tenna ding, Topa a’ ding mun ka muh matengin ka inn sungah ka lum kei ding a, ka lupna ka zuan kei ding hi. Ka ihmu kei ding a, ka mitkhute ka kikhupsak kei ding hi,” ci-in Jakob’ Vanglianpa’ tungah hong thuciamna le Topa’ tungah hong kiciamnate phawk in." 
Psalms132:2  
Psalms132:3  
Psalms132:4  
Psalms132:5  
Psalms132:6 Jaar gam sungah Thuciamna Singkuang ka mu uh hi, cihna thuthak Bethlehem-ah kiza hi." 
Psalms132:7 “Ama omna munah va pai ni; ama khengakna-ah va bia ni,” ka ci uh hi." 
Psalms132:8 Topa aw, tho inla na vangliatna lim Thuciamna Singkuang tawh na omna munah pai in." 
Psalms132:9 Na mite na hotkhiatna thu, na siampite in taangko hen la, na mi siangthote lungdamin awng ta uh hen." 
Psalms132:10 Na nasempa David tungah thu na ciamzo hi; na sathau nilh pa nial kei in. 
Psalms132:11 Topa in a pelh loh ding kiciamna taktak khat David tungah kiciam a, “Nang’ sung pana na tate khat na kumpi tokhom tungah ka koih ding hi." 
Psalms132:12 Na tate in, amau’ tungah ka hilh ding ka thuciamna le ka teci pannate a zuih nak-uhleh, amau’ tate zong na kumpi tokhom tungah tu paisuak ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms132:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion teel khinzo a, amah in tua mun pen ama ten nadingin a deih hi." 
Psalms132:14 “Hih mun pen ka om tawntungna ding ahi hi; hih mun deih ka hih manin hih lai-ah ka teng ding hi. 
Psalms132:15 Ama beemlepang thupha tampi ka pia ding a, a mizawngte an ka vak kham ding hi." 
Psalms132:16 Ka hotkhiatna thu, a siampite ka taangkosak ding a, a mi siangthote lungdamin la sa-in awng ding uh hi." 
Psalms132:17 Keimah in tua lai-ah David’ suanlekhakte kumpi lianin ka koih ding a, ka sathau nilh pa’ ukna ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms132:18 Ama galte maizumna tawh ka dimsak ding a, ahih hangin ama kumpi gam khangin zai semsem ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms133:1 En un, sanggamte pumkhat suakin a tut khawm uh ciangin bangzahin hoihin nuam ahi hiam?" 
Psalms133:2 Tua pen a puan ngawng tungah Aaron’ khamul kaisuk zui-in a lu tung panin a taaksuk, sathau manpha tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms133:3 Tua pen Zion mualte tungah a kia, Hermon mual pana hong piang daitui tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nuntak tawntungna thupha tua munah a pia hi." 
Psalms134:1 Zan khuavakin Topa’ inn sungah a ding, Topa’ nasemte khempeuh aw, hong pai-in Topa phat un." 
Psalms134:2 Siangtho mun lamah na khutte uh laamto-in Topa phat un. 
Psalms134:3 Van le lei a bawl Topa in Zion panin note tungah thupha hong pia tahen. 
Psalms135:1 Topa phat un. I Pasian’ inn huangsung, Topa’ innsunga a ding, Topa’ nasemte aw, Topa phat un; ama min phat un." 
Psalms135:2  
Psalms135:3 Topa phat un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih hi. Ama min phatna la sak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah phatnophuai hi. 
Psalms135:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama a dingin Jakob teel a, ama neihsa dingin Israel teel khinta hi." 
Psalms135:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian hi, ci-in ka thei a, eite’ Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a lianzaw hi." 
Psalms135:6 Vantung le leitung, tuipi le a thukna sung khempeuhah Topa in ama ut peuhpeuh a bawl hi." 
Psalms135:7 Amah in leimong panin meiipi kaisakin, guahzuk nadingin khuaphialepte bawl a, a huihkua panin huih a pusuaksak hi." 
Psalms135:8 Amah in Egypt gam sungah mihing ganhing tacil khempeuh a vatmai hi. 
Psalms135:9 Egypt aw, nangma sungah lim le na lamdangte, Faro le a nasem khempeuhte gimpiakna-in a lak hi." 
Psalms135:10 Minam tampite vatmai-in kumpi vangliante that a," 
Psalms135:11 Amor kumpipa Sihon, Bashan kumpipa Og le Kanaan kumpite a that hi." 
Psalms135:12 Amau’ leitang khempeuh, ama mi Israel-te’ luah dingin a piakhia hi." 
Psalms135:13 Topa aw, nangma min kip tawntung hi. Topa aw, na minthanna khang tawntungin a kip hi." 
Psalms135:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite’ thu khenin, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna a nei ding hi." 
Psalms135:15 Minam dangte’ pasian-te pen mihingte’ khut tawh a kibawl, ngun le kham ahi hi." 
Psalms135:16 Amaute in kam nei napi, pau thei lo uh hi. Amaute in mit nei napi, khua mu thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms135:17 Amaute in bil nei napi, khua za thei lo uh hi. Amaute’ kam sungah naksuk naktoh theihna nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms135:18 Milim a bawl mite pen milim mah bangsak in. Milim a muang khempeuhte zong tua milimte mah bangsak in. 
Psalms135:19 Israel mite aw, Topa phat un. Aaron’ innkuante aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms135:20 Levi mite aw, Topa phat un. Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms135:21 Jerusalem inn-a a nei, Zion-a om Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Topa phat un." 
Psalms136:1 Amah hoih ahih manin Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:2 Lungdamna pen pasian-te’ Pasian’ tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:3 Lungdamna pen topate’ Topa’ tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:4 Na lamdang lian a bawl amah bek Pasian ahipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:5 Theihna tawh vantungte a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:6 Tuite tungah leitung a zal pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:7 Khuavak lianpite a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:8 Sun pen ni a uksak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:9 Zan pen kha le aksite a uksak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:10 Egypt gam tacil khempeuh a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:11 Amau’ gam sung pan Israel-te a paikhiatpih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:12 A baan zanin a khut thahat tawh a paikhiatpih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:13 San Tuipi a phelkham pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:14 Israel-te tui laizang a kantan sakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:15 Ahih hangin Faro le a mihonte San Tuipi sungah a thalpaih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:16 Sehnel gam nawkin ama mite a paipihpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:17 Kumpi liante a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:18 Kumpi minthangte a that pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:19 Amor mite’ kumpipa Sihon’ hang le, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi;" 
Psalms136:20 Bashan kumpipa Og’ hangin, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:21 Amaute’ leitang pen gamhluah dingin a piakhia pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:22 Ama nasem Israel tungah gamh a a piapa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:23 Miniam ihih laitakin a hong phawk pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:24 I galte’ kiang pan eite hong honkhia pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:25 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh an a vak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:26 Vantung Pasian’ tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms137:1 Zion khuapi i ngaihsut khak ciangin Babylon luite gei-ah eite tusukin i kapkap hi. 
Psalms137:2 Tua lai-a gialhek kungte tungah i laiza lasaknate i khai hi; 
Psalms137:3 bang hang hiam cih leh ei hong man mite in la i sak ding hong deih a, ei hong bawlsiate in i gualnop ding hong deihin, “Zion late khat hong sak un,” hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms137:4 Topa’ la, gam dangah bangci sak theih ding ihi hiam?" 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalem khuapi aw, nang kong mangngilh taak leh ka taklam khut buisum ta hen!" 
Psalms137:6 Nang kong phawk kei a, kei’ lungdamna a lian pen sangin Jerusalem a sangzaw-in kong koih kei taak leh ka dang tawngah ka leii toncip ta hen!" 
Psalms137:7 Topa aw, Jerusalem a siat hun lai-in Edom mite in, “Sumai un, sumai un! A bulpi dongin sumai un!” a cih vialna uh phawk in." 
Psalms137:8 Misusia Babylon aw, kote’ tungah nong bawl bangin nang tungah hong thukpa in lungdamna ngah ta hen!" 
Psalms137:9 Na taneute hong laksakin suangtumpi denna-in a hong neihsak pa in lungdamna ngah ta hen! 
Psalms138:1 Topa aw, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko a, pasian-te’ mai-ah nangmah phatna ka sa hi." 
Psalms138:2 Na biakinn siangtho lamah kei ka kun a, na itna kip le na thumanna hangin na min kong phat hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dang khempeuh sangin na min le na thu a liatzawkna na lak hi." 
Psalms138:3 Nang kong sap ciangin kei nong dawng a, na thahatna tawh kei nong thakhauhsak hi." 
Psalms138:4 Topa aw, leitung khempeuh in na thuciamnate za khin uh ahih manin nang hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms138:5 Topa’ minthanna lian mahmah ahih manin amaute in Topa’ nasepna ziate la-in sa ding uh hi. 
Psalms138:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian mahmah napi-in amah in a neute don a, a kiphasakte ahihleh amah in gamlapi panin mu thei veve hi." 
Psalms138:7 Haksatna tuamtuamte ka thuak ciangin kei nong kem hi. A heh ka galte, kei’ tangin nong dosak a, na thahatna tawh kei na hong honkhia hi." 
Psalms138:8 Topa in kei a dingin a ngaihsutte hong tungsak ding hi. Topa aw, na itna kip tawntung hi. Na sepsa na maban hong tun ta in." 
Psalms139:1 Topa aw, nangmah in kei na hong entel a, nong thei khin hi." 
Psalms139:2 Nangmah in ka heksukna, ka hektohnate na thei hi. Nangmah in ka ngaihsutnate gamlapi pek panin na thei hi." 
Psalms139:3 Nangmah in ka sep laitak ahi a, ka khawl laitak ahi zongin na hong mu a, ka gamtatna khempeuh a vekpi-in na thei hi." 
Psalms139:4 Topa aw, kam khat bek nangawn ka paukhiat ma-in, nangmah in ka gen dingteng a vekpi-in na thei khin hi." 
Psalms139:5 Nangmah in ka nung le ka mai-ah nong dal a, na thahatna tawh kei na hong hu hi." 
Psalms139:6 Tua bangin kei nong theihna pen kei a dingin lamdang lua mahmah a, thuthuk lua ahih manin kei’ theihtel zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms139:7 Nangmah a pelh dingin koi-ah pai ding a, nangma omna panin koi lai-ah taikhia ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms139:8 Vantungah kahto leng tua lai-ah nang na om ding a, Leinuai misite’ gamah lupna bawlta leng zong tua lai-ah zong nang na om veve ding hi." 
Psalms139:9 Leimong pekah leengin, tuipi mong pekah omta leng zong," 
Psalms139:10 tua lai nangawnah nangma khut in kei hong paipihin, na khut taklam in kei hong len ding hi." 
Psalms139:11 “Khuamial in kei hong tuamcip hen la, ka kiima khuavak omte zan khuamial suak hen,” ci taleng zong," 
Psalms139:12 tua nangawnah, nangma a dingin khuamial pen mial lo a, zan khuamial pen sun nitaang tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang a dingin khuamial pen khuavak mah bang lel hi." 
Psalms139:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pumpi na khempeuh na hong piangsak a, ka nu’ gil sungah keimah nong khuituah hi." 
Psalms139:14 Kihtak dingin a kilawm na hih manin nang ka hong phat hi. Na nasepnate lamdang mahmah! Nangmah in kei nong lim theih mahmah hi. 
Psalms139:15 A thukna sung mun simthamah kei hong kikhuituahin hong kibawl laitakin, ka guh ka taang, na mai-ah kiliah lo hi." 
Psalms139:16 A kipiangsak nai lo keima pumpi nate na mit in a mu hi. Ka pumpi nate khat beek a om ma, ka ni zah ding a kiciangtan laitakin, tuate khempeuh na laibu sungah kigelh khin hi." 
Psalms139:17 Pasian aw, na ngaihsutnate kei a dingin manpha mahmah a, tuate khempeuh a vekpi-in zai mahmah hi." 
Psalms139:18 Tuate a mal sim leng sehnel sangin tamzaw hi. Ka khanlawh ciangin nang tawh ka omkhawm lai hi. 
Psalms139:19 Pasian aw, migilote that inla, kei kiang panin mi that theite paikhia sak in." 
Psalms139:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong dem uh a, ngimna hoih lo tawh nang hong pang uh hi." 
Psalms139:21 Topa aw, nang hong mudah mite ke’n mudah hi lo ka hi hiam? Nang’ langah hong pangte ke’n kih hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms139:22 Amaute ka mudah mahmah a, amaute ka galin ka seh hi." 
Psalms139:23 Pasian aw, kei hong entel inla, ka lungsim hong thei in. Kei hong sit inla, ka ngaihsutnate hong thei in." 
Psalms139:24 Kei sungah siattheihna a omkha hiam hong en inla, tawntung lampi-ah kei hong kha in." 
Psalms140:1 Topa aw, migilote kiang panin kei hong honkhia inla, mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms140:2 Amaute in a lung sung uhah thusia geelgeel uh a, gal phuang ngitnget uh hi." 
Psalms140:3 A leii uh gulpi leii bang a, a thugente uh gulgu bang hi." 
Psalms140:4 Topa aw, migilote’ khutsung panin kei hong cing inla, kei, sukpaih ding a hong sawm mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms140:5 Mi kiphasakte in keimah hong siahna-in tehlop tung sim uh a, amaute in ngenthang zakin lam gei-ah thangzak tawh kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms140:6 Topa’ tungah hih bangin ka ci hi: Nang pen keima Pasian na hi hi; ka thumna awte hong ngai in, Topa!" 
Psalms140:7 Topa, keima Topa, a thahat hong honkhia pa aw, galkidona sungah keimah nong hu hi." 
Psalms140:8 Topa aw, migilo pa’ deihnate tangtungsak kei inla, ama thusia sawmna a maban sotsak kei in!" 
Psalms140:9 Kei hong umcih mite gualzosak kei inla, kei hong sawmnate uh amau’ lu tung mah tusak in!" 
Psalms140:10 Amaute tungah mei-am kuang zusak in. A thokikzo nawn lo dingin dum sungah amaute kiasak in! 
Psalms140:11 Mi gensia pa leitungah mavangsak kei inla, mi ngongtat pa pen thusia in sulzuih ta hen!" 
Psalms140:12 Topa in gimna a thuak mite’ thu a panpihna, mi cimawhte a dingin thu a manin a khenna ka thei hi." 
Psalms140:13 Thuman mite in nangma min hong phat pelmawh ding uh a, lungsim thutangte pen nangma omna-ah teng ding uh hi." 
Psalms141:1 Topa aw, nang kong sam hi; hong kinawh in. Nang kong sap ciangin ka aw hong ngai in." 
Psalms141:2 Ka thungetna pen na mai-ah paknamtui bangsak inla, ka khutte ka laptohna pen nitak biakpiakna bangsak in." 
Psalms141:3 Topa aw, keima kam a cing ding khat koih inla, ka mukte’ kongkhak a vil ding khat koih in." 
Psalms141:4 Mawh bawlnopna lungsim hong neisak kei inla, a gilo mite tawh hong kikhawlsak kei in. Amau’ anlimte hong duhgawh sak kei ta in." 
Psalms141:5 Mipha pa kei hong vuasak inla, ahih hangin migilote ka lu sathau nilhsak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gitloh gamtatnate nakpitakin langpangin thu ka ngenngen hi." 
Psalms141:6 Amaute, thu kisitin mawhsakna a thuak uh ciangin, Topa’ thute man hi, ci-in a thei ding uh hi." 
Psalms141:7 Mi khat in suangpi khat sukhamin leitungah a thehthang gawp bangin Leinuai’ kongvangah amau’ guhte kithehthang hi. 
Psalms141:8 Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, nang ka hong muang tawntung a, nangmah ka hong bel hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms141:9 Amaute in kei hong siahna uh tehlop le siatna bawlte’ thangzak panin kei hong kem in. 
Psalms141:10 Kei ka suahtak khit ciangin amau’ ngenthang sung mahah migilote awksak in. 
Psalms142:1 Topa’ hong huh ding ngenin ka kiko a, Topa’ tungah ka thum hi." 
Psalms142:2 Ama mai-ah ka lungkim lohna ka sung a, ama mai-ah ka haksatna teng ka gen hi." 
Psalms142:3 Ka cih nading ka theih nawn loh ciangin, amah in ka mailam ding hong theihsak hi. Ka paina lampi-ah ka galte in tehlop khat tawh kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms142:4 Ka kiim ka pam khuadakin ka en kawikawi a, ahih hangin kei hong huh ding kuamah om lo hi. Ka belh ding kuamah om lo a, kuamah in kei hong don lo hi." 
Psalms142:5 Topa aw, nang tungah kong kiko hi. Nang pen keima belh na hi a, a hingte’ leitangah keima tanh na hi hi, ka hong ci hi." 
Psalms142:6 Ka kikona hong ngai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nakpitakin kei hong kiniamkoih suk hi. Kei hong bawlsiate’ kiang pan hong honkhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a dingin amaute hatlua uh hi. 
Psalms142:7 Thong sung panin kei hong lakhia in. Tua ciangin nangma mite tawh kong phatkhawm ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh itna lianpi tawh kei tungah nong gamta hi. 
Psalms143:1 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, kong thumnate hong ngai in. Na thumanna le na thutakna tawh kizui-in kei hong dawng in." 
Psalms143:2 Na nasempa, thu hong sit kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma mai-ah mihing a dikzo kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms143:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gal in kei hong bawlsia-in hong zogawp hi. Sauveipi lai-a a site bangin a mial sungah hong tusak hi. 
Psalms143:4 Tua ahih ciangin cih nading ka thei nawn kei a, ka lungtangah si teng nawn lo hi." 
Psalms143:5 Hun luite ka phawk a, na sepsa khempeuh ka ngaihsunsun hi. Na khut in a sepsa nate ka lungngaingai hi." 
Psalms143:6 Thu ngenin nang lamah ka khutte ka hong zan a, lei keu in tui a duh bangin nang ka hong duh hi." 
Psalms143:7 Topa aw, kei hong dawng mengmeng in. Kei ka cimawh ta hi. Leihawm sung misite kiangah a paisukte tawh ka kibat loh nadingin kei kiang panin na maitang seel kei in." 
Psalms143:8 Nang hong muang ka hih manin zingsang simin na itna kip kei hong phawksak in. Nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin ka pai nading lampi hong hilh ta in. 
Psalms143:9 Topa aw, ka langte’ kiang panin kei hong honkhia in. Nangmah a bel dingin ka hong tai hi." 
Psalms143:10 Keima Pasian na hih manin nangma deih bangin a gamta dingin kei hong hilh in. Kei hong hehpih inla, lam phei-ah hong kha in." 
Psalms143:11 Topa aw, nangma min na ngaihsutna-in keima nuntakna hong kem in. Nangma thumanna tawh kituakin haksatna panin hong paikhiatpih in." 
Psalms143:12 Kei pen nangma nasem ka hih manin na itna kip tawh kituakin ka galte khenkhia inla, ka langte khempeuh susia in." 
Psalms144:1 Ka khutte galdona ding ka khutmete galkap nadingin a hilh, keimah a hong hu, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Psalms144:2 Amah pen ka suangpi le ka munkip muanhuai, ka kulhpi le hong honkhia pa, ka lum le ka belh pa, ka nuai-ah mite a zopa ahi hi." 
Psalms144:3 Topa aw, nangmah in na hong phawk tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, nangmah in na hong ngaihsut tham dingin mihing’ tapa bang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms144:4 Mi pen husan’ khat tawh kibang a, ama hunte pen a tai dandan niliim tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms144:5 Topa aw, na vanpite niamsak inla, hong paisuk in. Mualte lawng inla, meikhu suaksak in." 
Psalms144:6 Khuaphialep phiasak inla, amaute kithehthang sak in. Na thaltangte lawn inla, amaute susia in." 
Psalms144:7 A sangna mun panin na khut hong zan inla, tui lian lauhuaite le gamdang mite’ vangliatna panin hong honkhia in." 
Psalms144:8 A kam uh tawh zuauthu a gente le limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuauthu mah a gen lai vevete’ kiang pan kei hong phel inla, hong honkhia ta in." 
Psalms144:9 Pasian aw, la thak khat kong sak ding a, harp zangsawm khausai lasakna nang kong tum ding hi." 
Psalms144:10 Kumpite tungah gualzawhna a piapa, na nasem David a honkhia pa na hi hi." 
Psalms144:11 A gilo galte kiang panin kei hong hon inla, a kam uh tawh zuauthu a gen limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuau a gen lai veve gamdang mite’ khutsung pan kei hong honkhia in." 
Psalms144:12 Ka tapate uh a tangval lai-in khang cingin a khauh mahmah singkungte bang ta hen la, ka tanute uh a nungak lai-in kumpi inn lamna dinga a kisui innkiu khuampite bang tahen." 
Psalms144:13 Ka saalte uh a dimin an nam khempeuh om ta hen la, ka tuute uh a tultul a thenthen-in gamlakah suak tahen." 
Psalms144:14 Ka kongzingte uhah cimawhin kikona om kei tahen. 
Psalms144:15 Tua bang thupha a ngah mi mi lungdam ahi hi. Topa pen amau’ Pasian ahi mite pen mi lungdam ahi hi. 
Psalms145:1 Ka Pasian le ka Kumpipa aw, nangmah hong pahtawi-in a tawntungin nangma min kong phatphat ding hi." 
Psalms145:2 Nisimin hong pahtawi-in a tawntungin nangma min kong phatphat ding hi. 
Psalms145:3 Topa lian hi; nakpitakin phat ding hi a, ama liatna ngaihsutzawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms145:4 A khang a khangin nangma nasepnate kiphatphat ding a, a vanglian na bawlnate kigengen ding hi." 
Psalms145:5 Na liatna le na minthanna a lamdang nangma sepnate ka lungngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms145:6 A vanglian nangma bawlnate mite in taangko ding uh a, nangma vangliatna mah kei zong ka pulak ding hi." 
Psalms145:7 Amaute in nangma liatna, na minthanna genkhia-in nangma thumanna nakpitakin sa ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:8 Topa dikin hehpihna nei a, heh hak mahmahin itna kip lianpi a nei hi." 
Psalms145:9 Topa pen mi khempeuh tungah hoih a, a bawlsa khempeuh tungah hehpihna a nei hi." 
Psalms145:10 Topa aw, nangma bawlsa khempeuh in nangma tungah lungdamna hong ko ding uh a, na mi siangtho khempeuh in nang hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:11 Amaute in na kumpi gam a minthanna thu gengenin na vangliatna thu sutsut ding uh a," 
Psalms145:12 a vanglian nangma sepnate le na kumpi gam a hoihna, a minthannate mi khempeuh tungah kitheisak ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:13 Nangma kumpi gam pen a kip tawntung kumpi gam hi a, nangma ukna khang tawntungin a kip hi. A thuciamna khempeuhah Topa thutak mahmah a, a gamtatna khempeuhah zong hehpihna a nei ahi hi." 
Psalms145:14 Topa in a puk mite khempeuh huh a, niamsakna a thuakte khempeuh a sangtosak hi." 
Psalms145:15 Nuntak husanna a nei khempeuhte’ mit in nang hong en uh a, a hun a tun ciangin amaute an na vak hi." 
Psalms145:16 Nangmah in na khut na hong a, nuntak husanna a nei khempeuhte’ deihna a kicingin na pia hi." 
Psalms145:17 Topa pen a sepna khempeuhah thutang a, a gamtatna khempeuhah hehpihna a nei hi." 
Psalms145:18 Amah a sam mi khempeuh kiangah Topa nai om a, lungsim takpi tawh a sam mi khempeuh kiangah amah nai om hi." 
Psalms145:19 Amah a zahtakte’ deihna a kicingin tungsak a, amaute’ kikona zong za-in amaute a honkhia hi." 
Psalms145:20 Topa in amah a itte khempeuh kem a, ahih hangin migilo khempeuh amah in susia ding hi." 
Psalms145:21 Topa ka phat tawntung ding hi. Mi khempeuh in a tawntungin ama min siangtho phat ta uh hen. 
Psalms146:1 Topa phat un. Ke’n, Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms146:2 Ka hin laiteng Topa ka phat ding a, ka nuntak laiteng ka Pasian’ tungah phatnate ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms146:3 Huhna a hong pia thei lo uliante ahi a, mi mawkmawkte ahi zongin muang kei un." 
Psalms146:4 A husanna a bei ciangin lei-ah ciahkik uh a, tua ni mahmahin a ngaihsutnate uh beita hi." 
Psalms146:5 Jakob’ Pasian pen amah huhpa hi-in, ama Topa Pasian a muang mipa mi lungdam ahi hi." 
Psalms146:6 Amah in van le lei, tuipi le tuate sungah a om khempeuh bawl a, a tawntungin thuman hi." 
Psalms146:7 A kinengniam mite a dingin thumanna semkhia a, gilkialte an a vak hi. Topa in thongkiate a khahkhia hi." 
Psalms146:8 Topa in mittawte khua a musak hi. Topa in niamsakna a thuak mite sangtosak a, Topa in thuman mite a it hi." 
Psalms146:9 Topa in peemtate kem a, meigong numeite le pa nei lote a huh hi. Ahih hangin amah in migilote’ vaihawmna a suksiatsak hi." 
Psalms146:10 Zion aw, nangma Pasian Topa in khang tawntungin uk ding hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms147:1 Topa phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite’ Pasian’ tungah phatnate i sak ding hoih hi. Phatna sak ding nuam a, zong a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms147:2 Topa in Jerusalem khuapi lam a, amah in a kinilkhia Israel-te a kaikhawm hi." 
Psalms147:3 Amah in lungsim kitamte damsak a, amau’ meimate a tuamsak hi." 
Psalms147:4 Amah in aksite a phazah ding seh a, tua aksite amau min ciatin a sam hi." 
Psalms147:5 Eite’ Topa lian a, ama vang lian mahmah hi. Amah in thu a theihtelna pen ngaihsutzawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms147:6 Topa in a kisikcip mite laamto-in, migilote leilak a denna hi." 
Psalms147:7 Topa tungah lungdamkohna la sa unla, laiza lasakna tawh eite’ Pasian’ tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms147:8 Amah in vanpite meiipi tawh tuamin, leitung a dingin gun bawl a, mualte tungah lopa a posak hi." 
Psalms147:9 Amah in ganhingte le a ham va-aknote an a vak hi. 
Psalms147:10 Ama lungkimna le amah in nuam a saknate pen sakol thahatna le galhangte’ hang hi lo hi. 
Psalms147:11 Amah a zahtak mite le ama itna kip a muangte tungah Topa a lungkim hi. 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalem khuapi aw, Topa phat in. Zion aw, nangma Pasian phat in." 
Psalms147:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in na kulhkongpi zawlte tosak a, nangma mite thupha hong piaksak hi." 
Psalms147:14 Amah in na gam sungah kilemna bawl a, mangbuh hoihpente tawh nang hong gilvahsak hi." 
Psalms147:15 Amah in thu hong pia a, ama thu manlangin leitung hong tungsuk hi." 
Psalms147:16 Amah in tuumul bangin vukkhal hong pia a, vut bangin vukpak hong thehthang hi." 
Psalms147:17 Amah in suangtum bangin tuikhalte hong lawnkhia hi. Tua a votna kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms147:18 Amah in thu pia-in tuate tuisuak hi. Amah in a huih nungsak a, tuite a luang hi." 
Psalms147:19 Amah in Jakob tungah ama thu gen a, Israel tungah ama ngeina kipte le ama biakna ngeina kipte a gen hi." 
Psalms147:20 Amah in tua bangin minam dang khat peuhpeuh tungah bawl ngei lo hi. Amaute in amah biakna ngeina kipte thei lo uh hi. Topa phat un. 
Psalms148:1 Topa phat un. Vantung panin Topa phat unla, a sangna panin amah phat un." 
Psalms148:2 Ama vantungmi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Ama mihonte khempeuh aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:3 Ni le kha aw, amah phat un. A taang aksi khempeuh aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:4 Van sangpente le vantung a om tuite aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:5 Topa’ min amaute phatsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, amaute a piang hi." 
Psalms148:6 Amaute a tawntung a om dingin amah in kipsak a, a palsat loh ding uh thupiakna amah in a bawl hi." 
Psalms148:7 Leitung panin Topa phat un, no gulpi liante le tuipi thuk khempeuh," 
Psalms148:8 mei le gial, tuikhal le vuk, ama thupiakna a mang huihpi!" 
Psalms148:9 Amah phat un, no mual liante le mual neute khempeuh, gah a nei singkungte le taamtak singkung khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:10 Gamsate le innsate khempeuh, a bokvak ganhingte le a leeng vasate khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:11 No leitung kumpite le mihing khempeuh, leitung uliante le thukhente khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:12 Nungakte le tangvalte, teeksiate le naupangte aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:13 Topa’ min phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah bek a minlian hi a, ama minthanna pen leitung le vantung sangin sangzaw lai hi." 
Psalms148:14 Amah in ama mite thahatsak a, ama mi siangthote khempeuh, ama mai-ah a om Israel-te khempeuh in amah phat uh hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms149:1 Topa phat un. Topa’ tungah la thak sa un. A thuman mite’ kikhopna sungah amah phatna sa un. 
Psalms149:2 Amah a Bawlpa tungah Israel lungdam hen la, amau’ Kumpipa’ tungah Zion mite kipak tahen." 
Psalms149:3 Lamna tawh amah phat unla, khuang le laiza lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms149:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mite tungah Topa lungdam a, miniamte gualzo sakin a pahtawi hi." 
Psalms149:5 A gualzawhna uhah thuman mite lungdamin diang uh hen la, ama mai-ah khukdinin nuamna la sa uh hen." 
Psalms149:6 Minam dangte tungah phu la-in gim a pia ding, a kumpite uh sikkhau tawh henin a miliante uh sikkol a bulh ding, a kigelhsa thukhenna bangin amaute tungah a semkhia dingin langnih a hiam namsau a tawi kawmun Pasian phatin awng ta uh hen. Hih pen Pasian’ mite’ gualzawhna ahi hi. Topa phat un."

Psalms149:9  
Psalms150:1 Topa phat un. Ama biakinn sungah Pasian phat unla, ama vangliatna mun vantungah amah phat un." 
Psalms150:2 A vanglian ama sepnate hangin amah phat unla, a liat mahmahna tawh kituakin amah phat un." 
Psalms150:3 Peengkul aw tawh amah phat unla, githa lasakna le harp lasakna tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:4 Khuang le lamna tawh amah phat unla, khausai lasaknate le tamngai tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:5 Daltuahte tawh amah phat unla, nakpitakin a ging daltuahte tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:6 Husang thei khempeuh in Topa phat un. Topa phat un. 
Proverbs1:1 David’ tapa, Israel kumpi Solomon’ paunakte:" 
Proverbs1:2 Mite in pilna le thuhoihte a phawk theih nading, khiatna thuk a nei kammalte a theih theih nading." 
Proverbs1:3 A hoihin a pil gamtat theih nading, thuman, thutang, a kilawmin a gamtat theih nading." 
Proverbs1:4 Thuthei nai lote in a theih nading, khangnote in pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna a ngahna ding." 
Proverbs1:5 Mi ciimsate ciimsak semsemin, mi pilsate pilsak semsemin," 
Proverbs1:6 paunakte le thugentehnate hoihtakin thei-in, mipilte’ kampau leh a thugente uh a theih nading ahi hi." 
Proverbs1:7 Topa zahtakna in pilna kipatna hi a, mihaite in pilna le thuhilhna don lo uh hi." 
Proverbs1:8 Ka ta aw, na pa’ hong thuhilhna hoihtakin zui inla, na nu’ hong thugente ngai in." 
Proverbs1:9 Tua thuhilhnate in na gamtat hong hoihsak ding a, kizepna lukhu le kizepna khi bangin hong etlawmsak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka ta aw, mi hoih lote in nang hong zol ciangin, amau’ zolna zui kei in." 
Proverbs1:11 Amaute in, “Hong pai in, mi khatpeuh va that ni! Mi ommuang khat va muansuam ni!" 
Proverbs1:12 I muh tungin a cidam, a hing kimlai hinapi, i suk khit ciangin a sisa hi ding!" 
Proverbs1:13 Na a manpha a namkimin i sut ding a, tua bang nate i inn dimin i nei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:14 Kote tawh hong kipawl lecin, i ngah khempeuh i hawm ding hi,” hong cih uh hangin ut kei in." 
Proverbs1:15 Ka ta aw, tua bang mite tawh kikhawl kei inla, amaute kiang panin kihemkhia in." 
Proverbs1:16 Amaute a sia-in gamta nuam vanvan uh a, mi thah ding lamsang haksa sa het lo uh hi." 
Proverbs1:17 I matnop vasate’ muhtangpi-in, i siahna ngenthang zaak leeng a mawkna ahi hi." 
Proverbs1:18 Ahi zongin mite in amau’ awkna ding mah thang siah uh a, kuamah dang awk loin, amau mah hai awk uh hi." 
Proverbs1:19 Zawhthawh thu tawh mi’ na a sutte in sihlawh tawntung zaw a, hih bangin a gamtate in tua bangmah tuak ngitnget hi." 
Proverbs1:20 Ngai in! Kongzing lampi le van kizuakna phualpi-ah pilna hong kiko hi. 
Proverbs1:21 Khuapi kulhkongpi tual le mi a kikhopna mun khempeuhah nakpitakin hong awngkhia a," 
Proverbs1:22 “Mihaite aw, bang tanvei hai omom nuam na hi uh hiam? Bang tanvei pilna thudon loin om ding na hi uh hiam? Pilna ngaihsutin nei ngei lo ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Proverbs1:23 Kong thuhilhna hong ngai un; ka ngaihsutna kong gen ding a, ka theihna kong zasak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:24 Keimah in note hong samsam napi-in nong ngai nuam kei uh a, ka khut hong vanvan napi-in kuamah in nong thudon kei uh hi." 
Proverbs1:25 Ka thugente khempeuh hong thudon loin, kong tainate khempeuh hong mang nuam lo na hih manun," 
Proverbs1:26 lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong nuihsan lel ding a, launa na tuah uh ciangin kong thusim kei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:27 Lungkhamna in huihpi’ nawk bangin note hong nawkgawpin, pingpei’ pei bangin note hong peigawpin, lungkhamna le sinkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong don kei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:28 Tua bang hun ciangin kei nong sam ding uh a, ahi zongin kong dawng kei ding hi. Limtakin kei nong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin koimahah nong mu kei ding uh hi." 
Proverbs1:29 Note in pilna na deih kei uh a, Topa na zahtak nuam kei uh hi." 
Proverbs1:30 Ka thugente na deih kei uh a, kong thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih manun," 
Proverbs1:31 na gamtatna bangun na thuak ding uh a, nomau’ gamtatna mah in note hong gimsak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei lote in pilna a don loh manun sihlawh uh a, mihaite in lunghihmawhna a neih loh manun siatlawh uh hi." 
Proverbs1:33 Ahi zongin ka thugenna a ngaite in lungnopna ngah ding uh a, launa nei loin nuamtakin om hithiat ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs2:1 Ka ta aw, kong hilhte thei inla, kong gente mangngilh kei in." 
Proverbs2:2 Pilna thute limtakin ngai inla, na theihtel zawh nadingin hanciam in." 
Proverbs2:3 Thu theih nading hanciam takpi inla, thu muhna ding hahkat takpi in." 
Proverbs2:4 Ngun, ahih kei leh a kiseel sum manpha zon bangin, hahkatin pilna zong in." 
Proverbs2:5 Tua hileh, Topa zahtakna thu na thei ding a, Pasian na theitel ding hi." 
Proverbs2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh pilna a piapa pen Topa hi a, amah pen pilna le siamna a hilh pa ahi hi." 
Proverbs2:7 Pasian in thuman mite pilna guan a, midikte a hu hi." 
Proverbs2:8 Amah in thutang mite cing a, amah a itte a kem hi." 
Proverbs2:9 Tua hileh thuman le thutang a hoih le a kilawm na thei ding hi. 
Proverbs2:10 Tua ciangin mipil na suak ding a, na pilna hangin nuam na sa ding hi." 
Proverbs2:11 Na thungaihsut theihna le na thutelna in nangmah hong hu-in," 
Proverbs2:12 a sia-in na gamtatkhak ding hong kem ding a, kampauna tawh buaina a piangsak thei mi," 
Proverbs2:13 nuntakna manin a nungta lo, mawhna khuamial sungah a gamta," 
Proverbs2:14 a sia-in gamtat ding nuam a sa, a sia-a gamtatna-ah a lungkim mahmah," 
Proverbs2:15 mi lungsim kawi, muan theih loh ding mite panin nang hong kem ding hi." 
Proverbs2:16 A pasal tungah citak loin a pasal a nusia, Pasian’ mai-ah a kiciamna a mangngilh, kam khum mahmah tawh nangmah zol ding a hanciam, numei paktatte panin hong cing ding hi." 
Proverbs2:17  
Proverbs2:18 Tua nu’ inn-ah pai lecin sihna lampi a zui na hi a, misite gam a zuan na hi hi." 
Proverbs2:19 Tua bang numei tawh mawhna a bawl mite in nuntak nuam neikik ngei lo uh hi. 
Proverbs2:20 Tua ahih manin mihoihte’ gamtat bangin na gamta ding a, thuman mite’ gamtatna na zui ding hi." 
Proverbs2:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi thuman, miginate, hih i leitungah tengin om ding uh a," 
Proverbs2:22 ahi zongin Pasian in leitung panin migilote lawnkhia-in, singkung zungbawh bangin mawhneite botkhia ding hi." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka ta aw, kong thuhilhte mangngilh kei inla, kong thugente phawk tawntung in." 
Proverbs3:2 Kong thuhilhte in na khan hong sausak ding a, hong daupaisak ding hi." 
Proverbs3:3 Thumanna le cihtakna khahsuah ngei kei inla, na ngawngah tuate okin, na lungtang tungah gelh in." 
Proverbs3:4 Tua hileh, Pasian’ mai le mite’ mai-ah maipha ngahin na maa vang ding hi." 
Proverbs3:5 Na lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa muang inla, nang’ theihna suang kei in." 
Proverbs3:6 Na hihna khempeuhah amah phawk in. Tua hileh lampi man amah in hong lak ding hi. 
Proverbs3:7 Nangmah a pilin kingaihsun tawm kei inla, Topa zahtakin a sia peel in." 
Proverbs3:8 Tua hileh nang a dingin damna zatui tawh kibang ding a, na meimate hong damsakin na natnate hong daisak ding hi." 
Proverbs3:9 Na neihsa le na anpalte tawh Topa zahtak in. 
Proverbs3:10 Tua hileh na ansalte an tawh kidim ding a, beel dimletin leenggahzu na nei ding hi." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka ta aw, Topa’ thuhilhna limtakin ngai-in, hong tainate thudon in." 
Proverbs3:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh pa in a pahtak a tapa a thuhilh bangin Topa in a it mite a thuhilh hi. 
Proverbs3:13 Pilna nei-in thu a thei mipa, a lungdam mi ahi hi." 
Proverbs3:14 Pilna nei leeng ngun sangin hoihzaw a, kham sangin zong manpha zaw hi." 
Proverbs3:15 A manpha pen suangmanpha nangawn sangin pilna manpha zaw lai a, mihingte’ deih theih na lakah tehpih theih ding om lo hi." 
Proverbs3:16 Pilna in khan hong sausak a, hauhna le pahtawina zong hong piathuah lai hi." 
Proverbs3:17 Pilna in nuntakna hong nuamsak a, lungmuang takin hong omsak den hi." 
Proverbs3:18 Pilna a nei mite a lungdam mi hi a, pilna a nei mite nuntakna singkung tawh kibang uh hi." 
Proverbs3:19 Topa in pilna tawh leitung bawl a, a theihtelna tawh vantung a bawl hi." 
Proverbs3:20 Ama pilna in guntuite luangsak a, meiite in leitungah guah zusak hi." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka ta aw, pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna len tawntung inla, cikmah ciangin khahsuah ngei kei in." 
Proverbs3:22 Tuate pen nang a dingin nuntakna hi ding a, na hoih nadingin kizepna hi ding hi." 
Proverbs3:23 Tua hileh lungmuang takin na nungta ding a, pukna ding thu bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:24 Launa om loin nuamtakin na lum ding a, zan tawntung lungmuang takin na ihmu thei ding hi." 
Proverbs3:25 Migilote tungah huihpi bangin siatna a tun ciangin, nang na lunghihmawhna ding bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a muanhuai-in nang hong kem ding a, siatna hong tuaksak lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:27 Na hihzawh ding ahih nakleh midangte’ kitangsapna huh tawntung in. 
Proverbs3:28 Na vaihawmsak theihpah ding thute ahih nakleh, zing ciangin hong paikik in, ci-in a hun sotto kei in." 
Proverbs3:29 Nangmah hong muangin nangma nai-ah a hong teng na vengpa, gim a ngahna ding bangmah vaihawm kei in." 
Proverbs3:30 Nangma tungah siatna bangmah a hong bawl lo, mi khatpeuh tawh thu om lopi-in kimawk tot kei in." 
Proverbs3:31 A ngongtat thei mite engkha kei inla, amau’ gamtat bangin gamtakha kei in." 
Proverbs3:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sia-in a gamtate mudah a, thuman mite bek a pawlpih dingin a la hi." 
Proverbs3:33 Topa in migilote’ innsung samsia a, thuman mite’ innsung thupha a pia hi." 
Proverbs3:34 Amah in mi kihisakte bangmahin sim lo a, a kiniamkhiatte tungah maipha a pia hi." 
Proverbs3:35 Mipilte in minphatna le pahtawina ngah ding uh a, mihaite in maizumna le mindaina ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs4:1 Tate aw, na pa uh’ hong hilhnate ngai unla, thu na teltheih nadingun limtakin ngaihsun un." 
Proverbs4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh kong hilh thute thuhoih ahi hi. Kong hilhte khempeuh limtakin ciamteh un. 
Proverbs4:3 Kei zong tapa khat neihsun ka hi a, naupangno khat ka hih lai-in" 
Proverbs4:4 ka pa in thu hong hilh a, “Ka thugente ciamteh inla, mangngilh kei in. Kong gen bangin gamta in; tua hileh na nungta ding hi." 
Proverbs4:5 Pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna na neihna ding hahkat in. Kong gen thute mangngilh kei inla, hoihtakin ngaihsun in." 
Proverbs4:6 Pilna nusia kei in; tua hileh siatna panin nang hong hu ding hi. Pilna deih in; tua hileh lungmuang takin na om nadingin hong kem ding hi. 
Proverbs4:7 Pilna na ngahna ding a thupi masa pen hi a, na neih khempeuh na beilawh zongin na zon ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs4:8 Pilna deih in; mi lianin hong bawl ding hi. Limtakin pom in; pahtawina hong ngahsak ding hi. 
Proverbs4:9 Pilna in pahtawina le minthanna nangma tungah hong tungsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Proverbs4:10 Ka ta aw, ka thugente limtakin zui in. Tua hileh na khansau ding hi." 
Proverbs4:11 Na pilna ding lampi kong hilhzo a, na gamtatna ding zia kong genzo hi." 
Proverbs4:12 Hoihtakin gamta lecin nang hong nawngkaisakzo ding bangmah om lo ding a, na tai hangin zong na pukkha kei ding hi." 
Proverbs4:13 Hong kihilhnate lencip inla, khahsuah kei in. Na nuntakna ding ahih manin limtakin zui in." 
Proverbs4:14 Migilote tawh kikhawl kei inla, amau’ gamtatnate zui kei in." 
Proverbs4:15 Amau’ gamtat bangin gamta peuhmah ke’n! Gitlohna peel in! Paisan inla, na maban sem in." 
Proverbs4:16 Migilote in a sia khatpeuh a sep mateng uh lum thei lo uh a, mi khatpeuh a sukzawh mateng uh ihmu thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs4:17 Gitloh gamtatna, annek bangin nuamsa uh a, ngongtatna, tui dawn bangin a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Proverbs4:18 Ahi zongin thuman mite’ zuih lampi ahihleh sun dong a taang pha semsem zingsang khuavak tung tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs4:19 Migilote’ lampi ahihleh zan khuamial bangin mial a, amaute a tuksak, a suihkhakte nangawn mu thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka ta aw, ka thugente don inla, ka kammalte ngai in." 
Proverbs4:21 Na kiang panin paikhiasak kei inla, na lungsimah ciamteh in." 
Proverbs4:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a zuite in nuntakna le cidamna-in a nei uh hi. 
Proverbs4:23 Na lungsim ngaihsutnate nuntakna nak hi a, na neihsa a manpha pen bangin na kep ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs4:24 A man lo thu gen ngei kei inla, zuauthu le a kiza khial thei ding kammalte zang het kei in." 
Proverbs4:25 Kisuanna nei hetloin om liuliau inla, maizumin kuncip kei in." 
Proverbs4:26 Na khatpeuh na sepna thu theitel in. Tua hileh na nasep peuhpeuh maavang ding hi. 
Proverbs4:27 Siatna peelin a manin gamta inla, thuman lampi panin themcik zong pialkha kei in." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka ta aw, ka pilna le ka thumuhnate, limtakin ngai-in hong za in." 
Proverbs5:2 Tua hileh a kilawmin na gamtatzia ding na thei ding a, na kampaunate in na pil lamtak hong kilangsak ding hi." 
Proverbs5:3 Numei paktatte’ kampau khuaizu bangin khum mahmahin a thugente uh a neel dakdak hangin," 
Proverbs5:4 a tawpna-ah lungkhamna le natna simloh nangma tungah bangmah dang hong guan lo hi. 
Proverbs5:5 Amah in sihna gamah nang hong paipih ding a, ama tot lampi pen sihna mun tunna lampi ahi hi." 
Proverbs5:6 Nuntakna lampi-ah amah om lo a, nang na phawk loh hangin amah lam pialin a vakvai ahi hi." 
Proverbs5:7 Tate aw, tu-in ka thugente limtakin hong ngai unla, ka thugente mangngilh kei un." 
Proverbs5:8 Tua bang numei tawh kinehkha kei unla, a inn gei nangawnah paikha kei un." 
Proverbs5:9 Tua bang na hih kei uhleh na min hoihna teng uh midang tungah tung ding a, hehpihna a nei lo mite’ khutlum tawh na khansih ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:10 Khualmite in na neihsa teng uh la ding a, na sepsa khempeuh uh midangte in ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:11 Na sih kuan uh ciangin thumin na tau ding uh a, gawngin na guhguak bekun na om ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:12 Tua ciangin, “Bang hangin thu thei hoh lo a, hong kihilhna mang hoh lo ka hi hiam?" 
Proverbs5:13 Kei hong hilh siate’ thu ka mang nuam kei a, amau’ hong hilhnate ka don keikha hi." 
Proverbs5:14 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka cimawh vat a, mi’ mai-ah ka min a sia hi,” na ci ciat ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:15 Na zi’ tungah citak inla, amah bek itin nei in." 
Proverbs5:16 Pasal dang tawh va vakzau-in kongzing lakah va mawhkha ding hi. 
Proverbs5:17 Na zi pen nangma a’ ding bek hi a, midangte tawh na neihkhawm ding hi lo hi." 
Proverbs5:18 Tua ahih ciangin na zi tawh lungkim inla, na tenpih numei tawh lungdam in." 
Proverbs5:19 A it-huai a ngaihbaangin ngaihsun tawntung inla, ama ngaihbaanna tawh lungdamin, ama hong itna tawh lungkim in." 
Proverbs5:20 Ka ta aw, bang hangin numei dang lunggulh ding a, numei dangte’ ngaihbaanna iplah ding na hi hiam?" 
Proverbs5:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in na gamtatna khempeuh hong mu a, na paina khempeuhah nang hong en kawikawi hi." 
Proverbs5:22 Migilo pa’ mawhna thangzak bang hi a, ama mawhna thang sung mahah amah a awk hi." 
Proverbs5:23 Ama pumpi ki-uk zo lo ahih manin amah in sihlawh a, ama hailuatna in hankhuk sung a tun hi." 
Proverbs6:1 Ka ta aw, na lawmte khatpeuh in sum leitawi a lak ciangin a lohzawh kei leh ama tangin a lohsak dingin kam na ciamkha hiam?" 
Proverbs6:2 Na kampauna hangin nang hong kimanin, na thuciamna hangin na awkkha hiam?" 
Proverbs6:3 Ka ta aw, tua bang na hih khak leh, tua mipa’ khut sungah a om na hi hi. Na suahtak theih nadingin manlangin a kiangah pai inla, hong khah nadingin ama kiangah thum in." 
Proverbs6:4 Ihmumu kei inla, om mawkmawk kei in." 
Proverbs6:5 Sabeng pa’ kiang panin a suahtak nadingin sakhi a tai bangin, thangah a awk vasa a kitom bangin na suahtak nadingin hanciam in." 
Proverbs6:6 Thadahpa aw, miksite kiangah pai inla, amau’ nuntakzia va en in." 
Proverbs6:7 Amaute in a uk ding le a makai ding kuamah nei lo napi-in," 
Proverbs6:8 khuakhal sungin a nek ding uh, tuk hun sungin kaikhawm khol uh hi." 
Proverbs6:9 Thadahpa aw, bang tanvei lumlum ding a, cik ciangin thokhia ding na hi hiam?" 
Proverbs6:10 Tawmkhat sung mengme lai ning, na cih kikalin" 
Proverbs6:11 zawnna le cihmawhna in migilo gutate bangin nang hong sugawp pak ding hi. 
Proverbs6:12 Miginalo pa, a gilo pa, thuzuau genin vak kawikawi a," 
Proverbs6:13 nang hong khemnop manin a mitheek hong pia-in, a khe tawh hong su-in a khut tawh hong khoih hi." 
Proverbs6:14 A lungsimah thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh a, a omna peuhah buaina a piangsak hi." 
Proverbs6:15 Tua ahih manin theihkholh lohin ama tungah lungkhamna tung ding a, bawlkikzawh nawn loh dongin siatna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs6:16 Topa in a muhdah, a khahkhong ngei loh ding, thu guk, tua zah bek hi lo, thu sagih tak om a, tuate pen" 
Proverbs6:17 kihihsakna, zuauthu genna, mawhnei lo mi thahna," 
Proverbs6:18 thusia bawl ding ngaihsutna, gamtatsiat ding a manlangte," 
Proverbs6:19 zuauthu gen teci man lote, le kitotna a piangsakte ahi hi." 
Proverbs6:20 Ka ta aw, na pa’ hong gen bangin gamta inla, na nu’ hong thuhilhnate mangngilh kei in." 
Proverbs6:21 Amau’ hong thugente phawk tawntung inla, na lungsimah ciamteh niloh in." 
Proverbs6:22 Tua thute in na paina peuhah lam hong lak ding a, zanin na ihmut kalin nang hong cing ding a, sunin na hah sungin na gamtatna ding hong hilh ding hi." 
Proverbs6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham le a hilhnate pen a taang mahmah khuavak bang hi a, khalna le hilhnate pen nuntakna ding lampi hi a," 
Proverbs6:24 mi’ zi tawh na mawh loh nadingin nang hong kemin, kam khum zangin a hong zol numei ginalote kiang panin nang hong hu ding hi." 
Proverbs6:25 Amau’ melhoihna iplahkha kei inla, amau’ hong zawlmitna khenglahkha kei in." 
Proverbs6:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh anlum khat tawh numei paktat khat kingahzo a, ahi zongin numei tawh mawhna in nuntakna bup siasak hi." 
Proverbs6:27 Na ang sungah meikuang pom lecin na puan kang loin om ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs6:28 Mei-am tungtawnin pai lecin na khe kang loin om ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs6:29 Tua mah bangin mi’ zi tawh a mawhte in gimna thuak ding uh a, tua bang a gamta peuhmah in gimna thuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs6:30 A gilkial a cimawh mi khat in na a guk ciangin, midangte in mawhsak lua lo napi," 
Proverbs6:31 amah kiman leh a zah sagihin kilohsak a, a neih khempeuh a piak kul hi." 
Proverbs6:32 Ahi zongin numei tawh a mawhte pen thu ngaihsun thei lo mi hi a, amau le amau a kisusiatawm ahi uh hi." 
Proverbs6:33 Mawhna a bawl mi in satgawpna thuak ding a, a min sia-in mindai paisuak ding hi." 
Proverbs6:34 A numei’ pasal a hehzawk theih nading thudang om nawn lo a, a heh thukna-ah khawl hun cih nei thei lo hi." 
Proverbs6:35 Amah in sumlepai sang nuam vet lo a, letsong tampi piakna in a hehna damsak zo lo hi." 
Proverbs7:1 Ka ta aw, ka thugente ciamteh inla, kong sawl thute khempeuh mangngilh ngei kei in." 
Proverbs7:2 Kong gen bangin gamta lecin na nungta ding hi. Kong thuhilhte, na mitnauta bangin hoihtakin kem in." 
Proverbs7:3 Kong hilhnate kem tawntung inla, na lungtang tungah gelh in." 
Proverbs7:4 Pilna na sanggamnu dingin nei inla, thumuhna na lawm it pen dingin nei in." 
Proverbs7:5 Tua hileh midangte’ zi tungah na khialhkhak loh nading, kam khum tawh a hong zol numei ginalote tawh na khialhkhak loh nadingin hong hu ding hi." 
Proverbs7:6 Khatvei, ka omna inn-ah, ka tawlet panin ka khuadak a," 
Proverbs7:7 bangmah a phawk nai lo tangval honkhat lakah, tangval thu thei lo khat, ka lim muhkha hi." 
Proverbs7:8 Lamdungah amah a vak laitakin, tua bang numei paktat a omna inn gei khatah va paikha a," 
Proverbs7:9 tua hun pen nitak nitum khit zawh, khuamui hun laitak ahi hi." 
Proverbs7:10 Tua numei in numei paktatte’ puansilh ngeite a silh kawmin ngimna khat tawh tua tangval na dawntuah hi. 
Proverbs7:11 Tua numei pen maizumna mel thei loin a hang mahmah hi a, lamdung tengah vak tawntung hi." 
Proverbs7:12 Mihon omna van zuakna phual, lamdung citeng, kongkiu khatpeuhah mi ngakin om niloh hi." 
Proverbs7:13 Tua numei in tangvalpa thakhatin kawi-in tawp a, na maitai bawl mahmahin ama kiangah," 
Proverbs7:14 “Tuni-in biakpiakna ka bawl a, nek ding sa tampi ka nei hi." 
Proverbs7:15 Ka nekpih dingin nang ka hong zong a, tu-in kong mu petmah hi." 
Proverbs7:16 Ka lupna tungah a nop mahmah dingin, Egypt gam puan hoihpente ka phahzo hi." 
Proverbs7:17 Myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, le sinnamon paknamtui tawh, ka lupna tung a namtui dingin ka bawl khinta hi." 
Proverbs7:18 Hong pai in; zanthapai-in ki-itna bawlin, ang kikawmin lungnuam ni." 
Proverbs7:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pasal khual gamlapi-ah zin a, tu laitakin inn-ah om lo hi." 
Proverbs7:20 Amah in sum tampi keng a, nipikal nih bang mateng hong tung lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs7:21 Tua ahih manin kam khum kam neel tawh amah zol a, tangvalpa in tua zolna a mangkha hi." 
Proverbs7:22 Tua ahih manin a kigo ding bawngtal in a sih nading mun a zuat bangin, sakhi in a awkna ding thang zuanin a dian’ laklak bangin," 
Proverbs7:23 thaltang in ama lungtang a khakna ding munah amah va pai hi. Vasa in a sih nading thang antah a bawh bangin va bawh a, a lauhuai sung a tun lamtak thei lo hi." 
Proverbs7:24 Ka tate aw, kei’ lam hong nga unla, ka thugente hong ngai un." 
Proverbs7:25 Tua bang numeite’ zolna mang kei unla, tua bangte tawh khialkha kei un." 
Proverbs7:26 Tua bang numei in mi tampi tak siasakin, simzawh loh ding mi tampi’ sihna a piangsak hi." 
Proverbs7:27 Tua bang numei zuihna pen sihna gam zuatna hi a, sih baihna ding lampi zuatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:1 Ngai un! Pilna in hong sam a, thungaihsut theihna hong kiko hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs8:2 Lamdung mualtung tengah, lamka citeng mun khempeuhah ding a," 
Proverbs8:3 khuapi lutna lampi gei-ah, mi omna kongpi tualah hong kiko a," 
Proverbs8:4 “Mi khempeuh tungah ka hong thum a, leitung a om mi khempeuh ka hong sam hi." 
Proverbs8:5 Ngaihsut kicing nai lote aw, na lungsim uh khanghamsak un. Mihaite aw, thu ngaihsun un." 
Proverbs8:6 Ngai un, thu manpha kong gen ding hi; ka gen khempeuh thuman vive ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:7 Ka thugente a man bekbek hi a, zuauthu ka deih kei hi." 
Proverbs8:8 Ka gen khempeuh ahi vive hi a, zuauthu, thukawi om het lo hi." 
Proverbs8:9 Thungaihsun theite a dingin telnop mahmah a, thu mutheite a dingin siang mahmah hi." 
Proverbs8:10 Ngun sangin kong thuhilhnate deihzaw unla, kham hoihpen sangin thutheihna deihzaw un." 
Proverbs8:11 “Suangmanpha sangin pilna ahi keimah ka hoihzaw a, kei tawh na hong tehpih theih ding uh a manpha dang om lo hi." 
Proverbs8:12 Pilna ahi keimah in thuthuk muhtheihna ka nei a, thu a telin theihna le a kilawm ngaihsut theihna ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:13 Topa zahtakna pen thusia muhdahna hi a, kiphatsakna le kihihsakna, gamtatsia le thuzuau ka mudah hi." 
Proverbs8:14 Thu geelin ka semkhia a, thu theihtelna nei-in, kei ka thahat hi." 
Proverbs8:15 Kumpite in a gammite a ukna ding, mi ukte in ngeina man a zat theih nadingin keimah in ka huh hi." 
Proverbs8:16 Leitung a om mi ukte khempeuh in keima huhna bek tawh ukzo uh a, milian mi thupite in keima huhna bek tawh vaihawmzo uh hi." 
Proverbs8:17 Kei hong itte ka it a, kei hong zong peuhmahte in hong mu uh hi." 
Proverbs8:18 Piakkhiat theih ding hauhna le minphatna, daupaina le ma tutsak zawhna a kicingin ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:19 Keima kiang panin na ngahte uh ngun hoihpen sangin hoihzaw a, kham hoihpen sangin zong hoihzaw lai hi." 
Proverbs8:20 Thuman lampi ka zui a, thutang lampi ka tawn hi." 
Proverbs8:21 Kei hong itte ka hausak a, a inn dimin neihlelam ka pia hi." 
Proverbs8:22 “ Topa in kei hong piangsak masa pen a, tangtawnga ama sep lak pan a masa pen ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:23 Tangtawng pek lai-in kei hong bawl a, leitung a om ma-in hong bawl masak pen ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuipite a om ma-in kei ka suakkhin a, kei’ suah hunin lui tuite om nai lo hi." 
Proverbs8:25 Mual liante a kibawl ma-in kei ka suakkhin a, mual neute a kibawl mapekin kei ka om khinta hi." 
Proverbs8:26 Leitung khempeuh a bawl ma, lei themkhat bek nangawn a bawl mapekin kei ka om khinta hi." 
Proverbs8:27 Amah in vantung bawlin tuipi kimkotah vanpi mong ding a bawl laitak," 
Proverbs8:28 amah in vantungah meiite kipsakin tuipi tuinakte a bawl laitak," 
Proverbs8:29 tuipi tuite in ama cihna ban a khengin a luan loh nading thu a piak laitak ka om a, leitung bulpi a phuh laitak kei ka om hi." 
Proverbs8:30 Na geel siampa bangin amah tawh kikhawlin keimah pen nisimin ama lungdamna ka hi a, ama kianga om nuamsa-in," 
Proverbs8:31 leitungah ka lungdam a, mihingte lakah nuam ka sa hi." 
Proverbs8:32 “Tate aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai unla, kong gente zui le-uhcin lungdamna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs8:33 Hong kihilhnate zui-in pilna ngah unla, thudon loin ommawk kei un." 
Proverbs8:34 Ka thugenna a ngai, nisimin ka kong gei-ah omin, ka inn-ah a ngak mipa in lungdamna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs8:35 Kei hong mu mi in nuntakna a mu hi a, Topa’ mai-ah maipha ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:36 Ahi zongin kei hong mu lo mi, amahmah a kisusia hi a, kei hong mudah peuhmah, a si nuam ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Proverbs9:1 Pilna in a inn lam a, a innkhuampi sagih a phut hi." 
Proverbs9:2 Amah in pawi bawl dingin sa go-in leenggahzu khaih a, annekna ding sabuai a bawl hi." 
Proverbs9:3 Khuasung munsang khempeuh panin mi a sam dingin a nasem numeite sawl a," 
Proverbs9:4 “Thu thei lote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samsak a, mihaite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:5 “Hong pai unla, ka an huansa ne-in, ka bawlsa leenggahzu hong dawn un." 
Proverbs9:6 Thu thei lote taisanin khansau unla, pilna lampi zui un,” cisak hi." 
Proverbs9:7 Mihaite thuhilh lecin hong maizumsak ding a, migilote thuhilh lecin hong sugawp ding hi." 
Proverbs9:8 Mihaite thuhilh kei in; hong mudah ding uh hi. Mipilte thuhilh in; hong it ding uh hi. 
Proverbs9:9 Mipilte thuhilh lecin pil semsemna-in nei ding a, thuman mite thuhilh lecin a thutheihna uh khang semsem ding hi." 
Proverbs9:10 Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna hi a, Siangtho Pa theihna pen thumuhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs9:11 Pilna in na khang hong khan ding a, na nuntakna hong sausak ding hi." 
Proverbs9:12 Pil lecin nangma phattuamna ding hi a, pilna don kei lecin nangma supna ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs9:13 Haina pen a kamtam, zumna mel a thei lo numei tawh kibang a," 
Proverbs9:14 ama kong gei-ah ahi a, a sangpen munah ahi zongin amah tu a," 
Proverbs9:15 ama kiang a nawkkha, amau’ nasep bek a phawk kimlai mite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:16 “Thu thei lote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samin, mihaite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:17 “Tui dawnsim, khumdiak a, an neksim, limdiak hi,” ci hi." 
Proverbs9:18 Tua lai-ah a paite a sihna thu tua lai-ah a lutsate sihna gam thuk sungah a om khitna thu, a khemzawh mite in phawkkha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs10:1 Hihte pen Solomon’ paunakte ahi hi: Ta pil in a pa lungdamsak a, ta hai in a nu dahsak hi." 
Proverbs10:2 Thuman loin ngahna-ah phattuamna om lo a, thumanna in sih nading pan hong hon hi." 
Proverbs10:3 Topa in mihoihte a gilkialin koih lo a, migilote a duh uh nesak lo hi." 
Proverbs10:4 Thadahna in zawnna hi a, thanuamna in hauhna hi." 
Proverbs10:5 A hunin an a lapa mipil hi a, anlak hunin a ihmu pa in maizumna a ngah hi." 
Proverbs10:6 Mihoihte in thupha ngah a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen hi." 
Proverbs10:7 Mihoihte kiphawkphawk a, migilote kimangngilh pah hi." 
Proverbs10:8 Mipilte in thuhilhna mang a, a hai paute in lungkhamna tuak hi." 
Proverbs10:9 Thuman mite lungnuamin om hithiat a, thuman lote kiman hi." 
Proverbs10:10 Khialhna kimuhmawh bawlna in buaina piangsak a, hang takin hilh ngamna in nopna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs10:11 Mihoihte’ kampaute pen nuntakna tuinak bang a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen uh hi." 
Proverbs10:12 Muhdahna in kitotna piangsak a, itna in mawhna khempeuh maisak hi." 
Proverbs10:13 Thungaihsun theite’ kam sungah pilna om a, mihaite’ nungzangah ciangduai kinga hi." 
Proverbs10:14 Mipilte in a pilna uh behlapin, mihaite a pau ciangin thusia tawh kizom pahpah hi." 
Proverbs10:15 Hauhna in mihaute hu a, zawnna in mizawngte siasak hi." 
Proverbs10:16 Mihoihte’ thaman nuntakna hi a, migilote’ thaman siatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:17 Kihilhna manna nuntak lampi zuihna hi a, hilhna man’ nop lohna lampi lauhuai zuihna ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:18 Mi a mudahte bek in zuauthu gen a, mi a gensiate mihai ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:19 Kam tam paute tampi khial a, pau iptheite mipil hi." 
Proverbs10:20 Mihoihte’ thugente nguntang bang a, migilote’ ngaihsutnate in bangmah man lo hi." 
Proverbs10:21 Mihoihte’ thugente in mi tampi nuamtuamsak a, mihaite in a hai sihpih uh hi." 
Proverbs10:22 Topa’ thupha in mite hausak a, dahna le gimna tawh piakhawm lo hi." 
Proverbs10:23 Mihaite in gamtatsiat ding nuamsa uh a, thungaihsun theite in pil gamtatna nuamsa uh hi." 
Proverbs10:24 Migilote tungah a kihtaktak uh tung a, mihoihte in a deihdeih uh ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs10:25 Huihpi a nun’ ciangin migilote leenmang a, thuman mite lungmuangin om tawntung uh hi." 
Proverbs10:26 Leenggahtui thuk in ha kimsak a, meikhu in mit a siipsak bangin, mi thadah in a cial pa a nasak hi." 
Proverbs10:27 Topa zahtakna in khan sausak a, migilote khansih hi." 
Proverbs10:28 Mihoihte’ lametna lungdamna hi a, migilote’ lametna a hawmpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:29 Topa in midikte hu a, migilote a susia hi." 
Proverbs10:30 Midikte lungmuang takin om tawntung ding uh a, migilote in omna ding mun ngah zo lo ding uh hi." 
Proverbs10:31 Midikte in pilna thu gen uh a, thu hoih lo a gente’ leii ki-attan ding hi." 
Proverbs10:32 Midikte in a gen ding uh thuhoih thei a, migilote in thusia bekbek gengen uh hi." 
Proverbs11:1 Tawikhaina man lo a zangte Topa in mudah a, tawikhaina man a zangte tungah Topa lungkim hi." 
Proverbs11:2 Mi kiphasakte in minsiatna ngahpak ding ahih manin a hoihbekin om ding hoihzaw tham hi. 
Proverbs11:3 Midikte thumanin gamta uh a, migilote amau’ hoih lohna in susia hi." 
Proverbs11:4 Hauhna in sih nading panin hong hu thei lo a, thumanna in na sih ding hong hu thei hi." 
Proverbs11:5 Thumanna in midikte’ nuntakna a nuamzaw-in piangsak a, migilote in amau’ gitlohna mah puklawh uh hi." 
Proverbs11:6 Thumanna in midikte honkhia a, thuman lo mite in amau’ huaihamna mah awkpih uh hi." 
Proverbs11:7 Migilote a sih ciangin a lametna teng uh tawh bei khawm a, hauhna suanna a mawkna a suak hi." 
Proverbs11:8 Lungkhamna a tuah loh nadingun midikte kihu a, migilote tungah lungkhamna tungzaw hi." 
Proverbs11:9 Pasian a ngaihsun lo mite’ thugenna hangin mite in siatna thuak a, midikte’ pilna hangin mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs11:10 Midikte a tuahphat ciangin khua sungah lungdamna om a, migilote a sih ciangin zong khua sungah lungdamin kikona a om hi." 
Proverbs11:11 Thuman mite’ omna hangin khuapi a lian suak a, migilote’ kampauna hangin khuapi a sia suak hi." 
Proverbs11:12 Simmawhna tawh midang hopihna pen haina hi a, mipilte pau loin om dide hi." 
Proverbs11:13 Mi a gensiasiate tungah thusim kigen ngam lo a, a muanhuai mite’ tung bekah thusim kigen ngam hi." 
Proverbs11:14 Thulamlak ding a nei lo mihingte kipuk uh a, thulamlak tampi neihna pen lungmuanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs11:15 Midang khat’ leiba lohsak ding na kiciam leh na kisik ding hi. Tua bang thu-ah kihel kei lecin nang a dingin hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs11:16 A dik numei kizahtak a, a dik lo numei mindai hi. A thadah mi in sum nei ngei lo a, a hahkat mi in sum hau hi." 
Proverbs11:17 Migi lecin nang a dingin a hoih a bawl na hi a, gilo lecin nangmahmah a kigimsak na hi bek hi." 
Proverbs11:18 Migilote in a man nei taktak bangmah ngah lo a, thumanin a gamtate in peel loin thaman hoih a ngah hi." 
Proverbs11:19 Thumanin gamtat ding a hanciamte nungta ding a, a sia-in a gamta teiteite si ding uh hi." 
Proverbs11:20 Topa in lungsim gilote mudah a, a manin a gamtate tungah a lungkim hi." 
Proverbs11:21 Migilote in gim a thuak hamtang nading, midikte gimna tawh a kipelhna ding teltakin thei in." 
Proverbs11:22 Thu a ngaihsun thei lo numei melhoih pen vokpi muk a om kham nakbah tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs11:23 Mihoihte’ deihna thuhoih tawh kizom tawntung a, migilote’ deihna a tun ciangin mi khempeuh a heh hi." 
Proverbs11:24 Mi pawlkhat in sum zang ziahziah napi-in hau semsem uh a, mi pawlkhat cil mahmah napi, zawng semsem hi." 
Proverbs11:25 A cingh mite hau semsem ding a, midang a huhte in huhna mah ngahkik ding hi." 
Proverbs11:26 An man khan ding ngakna-in a zuak nuam lote kisamsia a, leinop hunin a zuakpahte kiphat hi." 
Proverbs11:27 Thuhoih a hanciamte in pahtakna ngah a, siatna a hanciamte in siatna mah ngah hi." 
Proverbs11:28 Tuk lai-a singteh tam bangin midikte’ hauhna khang ding a, phalbi lai-a singteh pulh bangin hauhna a suangte kiam ding uh hi." 
Proverbs11:29 A innkuan sung a ukkhial mite hawmsuak ding a, a haite pen mipilte’ sila suak tawntung ding hi." 
Proverbs11:30 Midikte a khansau a, migilote khansih hi." 
Proverbs11:31 Mihoihte hih leitungah thaman kipia ahihleh migilo le mawhneite gimna kipiazaw kan ding hi. 
Proverbs12:1 Pilna a deihte, kithuhilh ding ut uh a, kitai ding ut lohna pen haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs12:2 Mihoihte in Topa’ maipha ngah a, siatna a gamtate amah in a mawhsak hi." 
Proverbs12:3 Gitlohna in lungmuanna piangsak lo a, thuman mite lungmuang takin om uh hi." 
Proverbs12:4 Zi hoih pen a pasal’ minthanna le lungdamna hi a, a pasal a maizumsak zi pen a pasal a dingin a dam thei lo guhnatna tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs12:5 Thuman mite in a kilawm a kituakin hong bawl a, migilote bek in hong khem nuam hi." 
Proverbs12:6 Migilote’ thugente mi thahnopna bekbek hi a, midikte’ thugente in lauhuaina sunga om mite a honkhia hi." 
Proverbs12:7 Migilote in sihna tuakin cimang a, thuman mite nungta-in khang kizom hi." 
Proverbs12:8 Mipilte kiphatin kipahtawi a, mihaite kineu-et hi." 
Proverbs12:9 Nektawm ding nei lopi-in milian bangin omna sangin nuntakna ding na semin mi mawkmawk hihna hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs12:10 Midikte in a gannote hoihtakin don a, migilote in a gannote bawlsia hi." 
Proverbs12:11 Nakpi takin lo khote in an hau a, man nei lopi-in hun beisakna in haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs12:12 Migilote’ belh munmuanhuai pen leikhal bangin kitamzan a, mihoihte’ zung kip tawntung hi." 
Proverbs12:13 Migilote in a zuaugenna uh awkpih a, thuman mite buaina tawh kipelh hi." 
Proverbs12:14 Mite in kam hoih pauna hangin thaman ngah uh a, a sepna bangun zong thaman ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs12:15 Mihaite pen amau mah thuman kisa tawntung a, mipilte in mi’ thugenna ngai nuam uh hi." 
Proverbs12:16 Mihaite in a hehna uh langsakpah uh a, mipilte in a hehna uh ipzo hi." 
Proverbs12:17 Thuman mite in thu taktak mah gen uh a, zuau tecite in khemna thu bek gen uh hi." 
Proverbs12:18 Ngaihsun lo-a kampauna in tem hiam bangin mi liamsak thei a, mipilte’ kampauna in tua bang liamna damsak thei hi." 
Proverbs12:19 Thuman genna kip tawntung a, thuzuau genna tomno sung bek kimang hi." 
Proverbs12:20 Thusia ngaihsunte lungkham uh a, thuhoih vaihawmte lungdam uh hi." 
Proverbs12:21 Thuman mite tungah thusia tung lo a, migilote lungkhamna tawh kidim hi." 
Proverbs12:22 Topa in zuaugen mite mudah a, mi citakte tungah a lungdam hi." 
Proverbs12:23 Mipilte in a theihna uh im khinkhian a, mihaite in a haina uh pholaklak hi." 
Proverbs12:24 Mi thanuamte vanglian a, mi thadahte sila suak hi." 
Proverbs12:25 Lunghihmawhna in lungkhamna piangsak a, kampau hoih in mi lungdamsak hi." 
Proverbs12:26 Midikte in a gamtatna uh tel et a, migilote a gamtatna un lam pialsak hi." 
Proverbs12:27 Thadahte a tup tung ngei lo a, a thanuamte in a deih ngah hi." 
Proverbs12:28 Mi thumante’ gamtatna in nuntakna piangsak a, mihaite’ gamtatna in sihna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs13:1 Ta pil in a pa’ hilhna mang a, a kihisak mi in a khial min pua nuam lo hi." 
Proverbs13:2 Mihoihte in a kam siamna bangun thaman sang a, mizuaute pen siattat ding bek ut uh hi." 
Proverbs13:3 Pau a ki-ipzo mi in a nuntakna a hu hi a, a mawk paupau mi pen amah a kisiasak tawm ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:4 Thadah mi in a deih ngahzo lo a, nasep hahkat mi in a deih khempeuh ngahzo hi." 
Proverbs13:5 Thuman mi in zuauthu deih lo a, a gilo mi in gensiatna le mindaina ding bek a pau hi." 
Proverbs13:6 Thumanna in midikte hu a, gitlohna pen mawhneite’ pukna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:7 Mi pawlkhatte, zawng napi-in kihausak uh a, mi pawlkhatte, hau napi-in kizawngsak uh hi." 
Proverbs13:8 Mihau pa’ sum hauhna in a nuntakna tankhiazo a, mizawng pa in a kitatna ding bangmah nei lo hi." 
Proverbs13:9 Thuman mite khuavak bangin taang lela a, migilote meivak bangin mitpak hi." 
Proverbs13:10 Hilh ding ut lo, kihihsakna in kitotna bek piangsak thei a, hong kithuhilh ding utna pen a hoihzaw ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:11 Ol takin hauhpakna oltak mahin kiamkik pah a, haksapi-in hauhtohna khangto semsem hi." 
Proverbs13:12 Lamet tun lohna in lungsim cinasak a, deihna tangtunna pen lungdamna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:13 Thu kihilh ding ut lohna pen siat ding utna hi a, thu kihilhna zuihna pen lungnopna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:14 Mipilte’ thuhilhna pen nuntakna tuinak bang hi a, sihna thang tawh kipelhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:15 Thungaihsut theihna maipha ngahna hi a, zuautatna in lungkhamna bek piangsak hi." 
Proverbs13:16 Thungaihsun theite pilna tawh gamta a, mihaite in a haina taangko hi." 
Proverbs13:17 Kamtai ginalo in mi lungkhamsak a, a citak thupuak pa in mi lungdamsakkik hi." 
Proverbs13:18 Thukihilhna a zui lo mi in zawnna le mindaina ngah a, thukihilhna a zui mi in minphatna le pahtawina a ngah hi." 
Proverbs13:19 Deihna ngahna in lungsim nuamsak a, siat gamtatna panin mihaite pialkhia nuam lo hi." 
Proverbs13:20 Mipil tawh kikhawl lecin na pil ding a, mihai tawh kikhawl lecin gimna na thuak ding hi." 
Proverbs13:21 Tuahsiatna in mawhneite sulzuih kawikawi a, midikte tuahpha kawikawi hi." 
Proverbs13:22 Midikte in a tu a tate’ luah ding gamh nei uh a, mawhneite’ neihsate ahihleh midikte a’ ding hi lel hi." 
Proverbs13:23 Lo thak panin mizawngte’ khamkhop ding an piangkha ding a, ahi zongin thuman lohna hangin tua nangawn maimang thei ding hi." 
Proverbs13:24 A ta a tai nuam lote a ta mudah hi a, a ta a itte in limtakin thuhilhin a tai hi." 
Proverbs13:25 Thuman mi in a kham ding nei-in gilvah a, a gilo mi in nektawm ding nei loin a gil a kial hi." 
Proverbs14:1 Numei pilte in innsung nuntakna khangsak a, numei haite in innsung susia hi." 
Proverbs14:2 Thumanin a gamta mite in Topa zahtak uh a, a sia-in a gamta mite in Topa simmawh uh hi." 
Proverbs14:3 Mihaite a pau ciangin siatna thuaklawh uh a, mipilte’ pauna in siatna ding pan pengsak hi." 
Proverbs14:4 Bawngtal om kei leh lo panin an tawm bek kila a, bawngtal tha tawh an a kihau ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:5 A citak teci in thuman bekbek gen tawntung a, a ginalo teci in zuau bekbek gen tawntung hi." 
Proverbs14:6 Mi a simmawh theite in pilna a zon uh hangin ngah zo lo uh a, thungaihsun theite in olno takin ngah thei uh hi." 
Proverbs14:7 Mihaite tawh kikhawl kei in; amau’ kiang pan pilna na ngah kei ding hi. 
Proverbs14:8 Thungaihsun theite a pilna in lampi man musak a, mihaite a haina in lam khialsak hi." 
Proverbs14:9 Mihaite in a khialh hangun phamawh sa lo uh a, mipilte a khialh ciangun mawhmaisak ding deih uh hi." 
Proverbs14:10 Lungdamna le lungkhamna eimah bek in i theih hi a, midang kuamah in hong phawkpih kha lo hi." 
Proverbs14:11 Migilote’ inn kisusia ding a, thuman mite’ inn kipin gina semsem ding hi." 
Proverbs14:12 Mihingte in thuman lampi hi, ci-in a ngaihsutte pen sihna lampi hikha thei hi." 
Proverbs14:13 Nuihna pen cihmawh seelna zong hithei a, kigualnop sakna a ven’ ciangin dahna hong kilangkik hi." 
Proverbs14:14 Misia in siatna thaman ngah a, mipha in phatna thaman ngah hi." 
Proverbs14:15 Mihaite in a thuzak peuh um pahpah a, mipilte in a gamtatna ding ngaihsun cian hi." 
Proverbs14:16 Mipilte kidawmin siatna panin kihem a, mihaite in thu ngaihsun masa loin gamta pahpah hi." 
Proverbs14:17 A lungtom mite hai gamtat a, mipilte lungduai hi." 
Proverbs14:18 Mihaite in haina bek mah ngah a, mipilte in pilna mah ngah thuah hi." 
Proverbs14:19 Migilote in mihoihte mai-et uh a, maipha a piak ding uh a thum uh hi." 
Proverbs14:20 Kuamah in mizawngte ngai lo a, mihaute in lawm tampi nei hi." 
Proverbs14:21 Mizawngte a simmawhte a khial hi a, mizawngte tungah a cinghte a lungdam hi." 
Proverbs14:22 Na a hoih a semte mite in muangin zahtak a, a sia gamtatna pen khialhna lianpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:23 Gimpi-a nasepna pen hauhna hi a, kam bek pau-in tutmawkna pen zawnna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:24 Pilna pen mipilte’ minthanna lukhu hi a, haina pen mihaite’ kizepna bulpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:25 Thutak a gen teci in nuntakna huzo a, zuauthu a gen teci in mi lehhek hi." 
Proverbs14:26 Topa a zahtak mi in lungmuanna nei a, a tate’ belhtheih ding mi kician ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:27 Topa zahtakna pen nuntakna tuinak tawh kibang a, sihna thang tawh hong kipelhsak hi." 
Proverbs14:28 Mi tampi a uk kumpipa minthang a, a uk ding mi om kei leh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:29 A lungduaite mipil hi a, lungtomna pen haina kilatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:30 Lungnopna in pumpi cidamsak a, hazatna pen guh a muatsak natna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:31 Mizawngte bawlsiatna pen a piangsak Pasian simmawhna hi a, mizawngte tungah citna pen Pasian zahtakna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:32 Migilo pa ama tatsiatna in puksak a, mihoih pa ama hoihtatna in hu hi." 
Proverbs14:33 Thungaihsun theite’ sungah pilna teng a, mihaite in pilna thei kha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs14:34 Thumanna in minam minthangsak a, mawhna in minam mindaisak hi."
