Proverbs14:35 A hoihin a gamta a mite tungah kumpipa lungdam a, a gina-in a gamta lote gim a pia hi." 
Proverbs15:1 Kam nemin dawnna in hehna damsak a, kam khauh in hehna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs15:2 Mipilte in pilna thu gen a, mihaite in haina thu gen hi." 
Proverbs15:3 Topa’ mit in mun khempeuh mu a, misia, mipha, hong encik kim hi." 
Proverbs15:4 Kam khum in nuntakna piangsak a, kam sia in lung gimsak hi." 
Proverbs15:5 A pa’ hilhna a ngai nuam lote mihai hi a, hilhna a mang nuamte mipil ahi hi." 
Proverbs15:6 Thuman mite’ neihsa kip a, migilote’ hauhna in lungkham a guan hi." 
Proverbs15:7 Mipilte’ kampauna in pilna khangsak a, mihaite’ lungsimah thuman lohna bek om hi." 
Proverbs15:8 Topa in migilote’ biakpiakna kihhuai sa a, thuman mite’ thungetna-ah lungdam hi." 
Proverbs15:9 Topa in migilote’ gamtatna kihhuai sa a, thuman a deih mite a it hi." 
Proverbs15:10 A gamta khial mite nakpitakin kithuhilh a, thukihilhna a mang nuam lote in sihna thuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs15:11 Sihna gam sungah a omte nangawn Pasian in mu ahihleh, mihingte’ ngaihsutna tel muhzaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs15:12 A kihisak mite in kithuhilhna ngai nuam lo uh a, mipilte kiangah thu dong ngei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs15:13 Lungdamna in maitaisak a, lungkhamna in maigumsak hi." 
Proverbs15:14 Thungaihsun theite in pilna zong uh a, mihaite ahihleh a theih lohna uh tawh lungkim uh hi." 
Proverbs15:15 Mizawngte lungkham tawntung uh a, a lungdam mite in nuntak nuamsa mahmah uh hi." 
Proverbs15:16 Hau napi-in lungkham sangin zawng napi-in Topa zahtakna hoihzaw tham hi. 
Proverbs15:17 Kitawngtawng kawmin sameh limpen nekna sangin ki-it diamdiamin anteh meh nek hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs15:18 Lungtomna in kitotna piangsak a, lungduaina in kilemna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs15:19 Mi thadahte in mun khempeuhah haksatna tuak a, mi thumante in haksatna tuak kha lo hi." 
Proverbs15:20 Ta pilte in a pa lungdamsak a, ta haite bek in a nu simmawh hi." 
Proverbs15:21 Mihaite in a hai mah uh lungdampih a, mipilte ahihleh a manin gamta uh hi." 
Proverbs15:22 Lim ngaihsut loin sepna tawh bangmah piang zo lo a, limtakin geelna tawh maa kitunzo bek hi." 
Proverbs15:23 A hun mahin dawnpah theihna lungkimhuai a, a kilawm kammal tawh dawnpah theihna hoihzaw kan hi." 
Proverbs15:24 Mipilte in nuntakna lampi zuito uh a, sihna lampi zuisuk lo uh hi." 
Proverbs15:25 Topa in mi kiphasakte’ inn phelkhiatsak a, meigongte’ neihsa hutpih hi." 
Proverbs15:26 Topa in migilote’ ngaihsutna kihhuaisa a, midikte’ kampaunate hoih a sa hi." 
Proverbs15:27 A man loin sum ngahna in innsung lungkhamsak a, sumgolh a deih lote a nuntak sauvei nuam hi." 
Proverbs15:28 Mihoihte in a kampau ding ngaihsun phot a, migilote’ paupakna pen thusia tawh kizom hi." 
Proverbs15:29 Topa in midikte’ thungetna ngai a, migilote’ thungetna thudon lo hi." 
Proverbs15:30 Maitaina in lung nuamsak a, thuhoih zakna in lung damsak hi." 
Proverbs15:31 Kithuhilhna zuih theihna pen mipilte’ lakah kihel theihna ahi hi. 
Proverbs15:32 Kihilh ding a ut lote amahmah a kisusia hi a, kithuhilh ding a utte pil semsem ding hi." 
Proverbs15:33 Topa zahtakna pen pilna mah hi pah a, kiniamkhiatna in pahtawina hong ngahsak hi." 
Proverbs16:1 Mite in bangbang a geel zongin Topa’ deihna bang bekin a piang ding hizaw hi. 
Proverbs16:2 Mihingte pen a gamtatna uhah man kisa a, ahi zongin Topa in a khenna khat na om hi." 
Proverbs16:3 Na geelnate khempeuh Topa ap in; tua hileh na geelna bangin tangtung ding hi. 
Proverbs16:4 Topa in na khempeuh ngimna nei-in bawl a, migilote nangawn siatna a thuak dingin a bawl ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:5 Topa in a kihisak mite mudah a, amaute in gimna thuak hamtang uh hi." 
Proverbs16:6 Thumanna le cihtakna mawhmai ngahna hi a, Topa zahtakna siatna tawh kipelhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:7 Topa’ deih bangin gamtatna pen galte nangawn lawma kaihzawhna ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:8 Thuman loin hauhna sangin thumanin tawmno neihna a hoihzaw ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:9 Mihing in thu geel a, ahi zongin Topa’ deihna bangin kisemkhia hi." 
Proverbs16:10 Kumpipa in thuman genin thu a khen ciangin khial ngei lo hi. 
Proverbs16:11 A man tawikhaina le tawi tehnate Topa a’ hi a, a tawisuang khempeuh ama bawlsa ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:12 Thumanin gamtatna bek in kumpi kipsak ahih manin a sia-a gamtat ding kumpite ut lo uh hi. 
Proverbs16:13 Kumpite in thuman genna deih uh a, thuman a gen mite it uh hi." 
Proverbs16:14 Kumpipa heh leh mi khatpeuh in sihlawh thei a, mipil khat in kumpipa lungdamsak thei hi." 
Proverbs16:15 Kumpipa maitai leh nuntakna hi a, ama pahtakna pen tuk hunin guah a zusak meiipi tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs16:16 Kham sangin pilna hoihzaw a, ngun sangin thutheihna deihhuai zaw hi." 
Proverbs16:17 Mihoihte in siatna tawh a kipelh ding lampi tawn uh a, a lampi tot ding limtakin a ngaihsun mi in a nuntakna a hu ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:18 Kisaktheihna in siatna hong tuaksak a, kiphatsakna in pukna hong piangsak hi." 
Proverbs16:19 Mi kihisak tawh kipawlin vankisutte ngahna sangin mizawngte tawh kikhawlin mineu a om hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs16:20 Thuhilhna a mang mite a maa vang ding a, Topa a muang mite a lung dam ding hi." 
Proverbs16:21 Lungsim pilte thumuhna tawh kampau uh a, amau’ kam khumna zaknophuai kisa semsem hi." 
Proverbs16:22 Pilna pen mipilte a dingin hinna tuinak bang hi a, mihaite ahihleh amau’ haina mah in gimna thuaksak hi." 
Proverbs16:23 Mipilte in thu ngaihsun kawmin kam pau uh a, amau’ pauna zaknophuai semsem hi." 
Proverbs16:24 Kam khum pen khuaizu bang hi a, i kamah khum a, i pumpi a dingin zong hoih mahmah hi." 
Proverbs16:25 Hoih hi, ci-in i ngaihsut thu khat pen sih theih nading thu na hi zawsop thei hi." 
Proverbs16:26 An duhna in mi na semsak a, gilkialna in nak sepsak semsem zaw hi." 
Proverbs16:27 Migilote in siatna ding bek zongzong uh a, a kampaunate uh na a kangtumthei meikuang tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs16:28 Mihoih lote in kitotna piangsak a, mi gensiate in lawmta ki-it kimlai kimudahsak hi." 
Proverbs16:29 A ngongtat mite in a lawmte zol a, lungkhamna sung tunpih hi." 
Proverbs16:30 A mit hong sitsante thusia a ngaihsun hi a, a neh hong piksante thusia geel ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:31 A teekte’ sam kang minthanna lukhu hi a, thumanin nuntakna tawh a ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:32 Thahatna sangin lungduaina hoihzaw a, khuapi khat ukzawhna sangin eimah ki-ukzawhna hoihzaw hi." 
Proverbs16:33 Mite in bangbangin ai a san zongin, a piang ding thu pen Topa’ deihna bangbek hizaw hi." 
Proverbs17:1 Kitawng kawmkawmin pawipi sungah an nekna sangin lungnuam takin mohkeu themkhat nekna hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs17:2 A pil silapa in a topa’ ta hai tungah aana nei-in a topa’ gamh pawlkhat a luah hi. 
Proverbs17:3 Kham le ngunte mei sungah kize-et a, mihingte’ lungsim Topa in ze-et hi." 
Proverbs17:4 Migilote in gitlohna thu bek mah ngaihin nei uh a, zuautheite in zuauthu mah ngaihin nei hi." 
Proverbs17:5 A zawngte a simmawh pa in amah a Piangsak pa a simmawh hi a, midangte’ tuahsiatna-ah a lungdam mipa in gim thuak hamtang ding hi." 
Proverbs17:6 Tute pen puteekte a dingin minthanna lukhu hi a, tate pen pate’ minthanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:7 Miliante in zuauthu gen ngei lo a, mihaite in na-a kimang kam pau ngei lo hi." 
Proverbs17:8 Sumgolh a zangte in ai bangin ngaihsun uh a, a deih khempeuh uh a ngahsak dingin ngaihsun uh hi." 
Proverbs17:9 Mi’ khialhna a maisakte midangte in itin lawm hau uh a, mi’ khialhna ciaptehna pen lawm taanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:10 Mihai khat zavei a kisatna sangin mipil khat khatvei tai-na in bunzaw hi. 
Proverbs17:11 Thusia bekbek a deih tawntung migilote kiangah, a gilo kamtai pa bangin sihna tung ding hi." 
Proverbs17:12 Mihaite a hai gamtatna uh i tuahkhak sangin a no a kilaksak vompi hang khat tuak lehang hoihzaw lai hi. 
Proverbs17:13 Thuhoih kimlai thusia tawh a thukte’ inn sungah cikmahin thusia veng cih om ngei lo hi. 
Proverbs17:14 Kitot i kipat ciangin tui lipi cinna phung kehsakkhak tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih manin a nasiat ma-in kitot khawlpak in. 
Proverbs17:15 Migilote khahkhongna, thuman mite mawhsakna, a nih tuakin Topa in deih lo hi." 
Proverbs17:16 Mihai pa in thu ngaihsun thei lo ahih manin pilna zonna ding sum tampi a zat hangin a phattuamna om lo hi. 
Proverbs17:17 Lawm citak in a tawntungin hong it a, i sanggamte pen i lungkhamna a hong thuakpih dingin a piang ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:18 Thu a ngaihsun thei lo mihaite bek midang’ leiba lohsak dingin kipia ngam hi. 
Proverbs17:19 Khialh ding a utte lungkham ding a ut hi a, kihisak-a kam paupaute buaina ding a zongzong ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:20 Lungsim hoih lote in lungdam mu lo uh a, mi a khem theite in lungkhamna tuak uh hi." 
Proverbs17:21 Tapa hai pen a pa’ lungkhamna hi a, ta hai a nei pa a lung dam lo hi." 
Proverbs17:22 Maitaina in ci damsak a, maigum tawntungna in guhtui teepkang hi." 
Proverbs17:23 A ginalo thukhente in sumgolh sangsim uh a, a thukhenna uhah thuman om nawn lo hi." 
Proverbs17:24 Mipilte in a hoihpenin gamtatna ding thei uh a, mihaite in a cih nading thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs17:25 Ta hai in a pa dahsak a, a nu lungkhamsak hi." 
Proverbs17:26 A thuman mi gimpiak ding hoih lo a, mihoihte satna pen thukhialhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:27 Thu a thei taktakte in gengen khol lo a, a paupau khol lote thumu taktak hizaw hi." 
Proverbs17:28 Mihaite pau loin om leh a pil mahin kingaihsun hi. Thungaihsun thei na hihna a kilat nadingin pau loin om khinkhian in. 
Proverbs18:1 Midangte tawh a kipawlthei pha lote amah bek thupi a kisate hi a, midangte’ cih khempeuh man a sak khat beek om lo hi." 
Proverbs18:2 Mihaite in thu a teltheih zawhna ding uh kin lo uh a, pil si, a kicih theih nading deihna bek tawh thu gen uh hi." 
Proverbs18:3 Mawhna bawl leeng maizumna tawh kizom pah a, minsiatna ngah leeng mindaina tawh kizom pah hi." 
Proverbs18:4 Mihingte’ kampau pen pilna kipatna suak thei a, tuipi bangin thuk-in luitui bangin a siang hi." 
Proverbs18:5 Mimawhte angvanin diksak a, midikte mawhsak ding thuman lo hi." 
Proverbs18:6 Mihaite in kitotna ding a pat ciangin hong sat un, ci-in a ngenngen ahi hi." 
Proverbs18:7 Mihaite a pau ciangin amau’ siatna ding mah a pau hi a, amau’ kampau mah awkpih uh hi." 
Proverbs18:8 Gensiatna pen anlim mahmah tawh kibang a, thakhatin i sungah kihupsuk hi." 
Proverbs18:9 Na a susia mite a hoih loh zah mahin a thadahte zong mihoih lo ahi hi. 
Proverbs18:10 Topa’ min pen tausang muanhuai tawh kibang a, thuman mite in belin lungmuangin om thei uh hi." 
Proverbs18:11 Khuapi kiima kulhpi in amah a hut bangin a hauhna in amah a hu dingin mihau pa in ngaihsunkha hi. 
Proverbs18:12 A kiniamkhiatte in zahtakna ngah uh a, a kihisakte pen siat ding a manawh hita hi." 
Proverbs18:13 A thu za khin nai lopi-in dawnkikna pen haina le maizumna ahi hi. 
Proverbs18:14 Mihingte’ lungsim in cinatna thuakzo sak a, mihing lungsim kisia leh cih nading om nawn lo hi." 
Proverbs18:15 Thungaihsun theite in a pilna uh behlap a, pilna a ngah nadingun mipilte in a bil uh tawh limtakin ngai uh hi." 
Proverbs18:16 Letsong in a piapa a dingin lampi honsak a, miliante tawh kimusak thei hi." 
Proverbs18:17 Thukhenna zumah a lang pa in a thuk mateng a gen masa pa a thuman tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs18:18 Thugen a siam tuak mi nih zum sungah a kiseel ciangin kiciamna bek in thu khenzo hi. 
Proverbs18:19 Sanggamte na huhna in khuapi muanhuai bangin hong hu a, sanggam tawh kitotna in kidon lohna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs18:20 Mi khat in a kampauna hangin gilvahna ngah ding a, a thugenna hangin nuntakna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs18:21 Kampauna in sihna ahi a, hinna ahi zongin piangsak thei a, i kampauna bangin a piangte san loh phamawh hi." 
Proverbs18:22 Zi a muzote na hoih a mu hi a, Topa’ maipha a ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs18:23 Mizawngte a pau ciangin thumna kam zang a, mihaute in a dawn ciangin kihihsakna kam zang hi." 
Proverbs18:24 Lawm pawlkhatte sauvei kimang lo a, lawm pawlkhatte sanggam sangin kipzaw hi." 
Proverbs19:1 Zuau genin mihai hihna sangin citakin zawn’ khiukheuna hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs19:2 Thuthei lopi-in lawpluatna hoih lo a, mawk nawhtatna in lungkhamna piangsak thei hi." 
Proverbs19:3 Mi pawlkhat in amau’ haitatna hangin gimna a ngah hinapi-in Topa ngawhin mawk heh uh hi. 
Proverbs19:4 Mihaute in lawm mu thuahthuah a, mizawngte in a neihsun teng nangawn khahsuahsuah uh hi." 
Proverbs19:5 Thuman gen lo teci in gim tuak pelmawh ding a, zuaugen mi suakta lo ding hi." 
Proverbs19:6 A cingh mihau pa’ maipha ngah ding ki-ut ciat a, na a piak mi khempeuh ama lawm ahi hi." 
Proverbs19:7 Mi khempeuh in a sanggam zawng pa uh mudah ciat ahih manin a lawmte in a taisatna a thu lamdang hi lo hi. 
Proverbs19:8 Pilna a zongpa in ama phattuamna ding a zong hi a, thu a thei mipa’ sepna maavang ding hi." 
Proverbs19:9 Thuman lo teci in gim tuak pelmawh ding a, zuaugen mi in sihna thuak ding hi." 
Proverbs19:10 Mihaite a nop lua-in a nuntak ding kilawm lo a, silate in miliante a uk ding kilawm lo zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs19:11 Pilna in mi lungduaisak a, mi’ hong hehsaknate kiphawkmawh bawlna in minthanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs19:12 Kumpipa’ hehna humpinelkai hawk bangin lauhuai a, ama pahtakna lopa tunga daitui taak bangin deihhuai hi." 
Proverbs19:13 Tapa hai pen a pa’ lungkhamna hi a, zi phunphun pen a theu thei lo guahciin tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs19:14 Inn le neihsate pen pate’ tung panin a kiluah hi a, zi pil ahihleh Topa bek in hong pia thei hi." 
Proverbs19:15 A thadahte lumlum a, a mawk omte a gil kial hi." 
Proverbs19:16 Thukham a zuite a khansau ding a, thukham a zui lote si ding hi." 
Proverbs19:17 Mizawngte tungah a piate in Topa’ tungah a pia hi a, Topa in a cingin amaute tungah lohkik ding hi." 
Proverbs19:18 Thu hong mantheih lai-in na ta thuhilh in; na hilh kei leh a siatna ding a deih na hi hi. 
Proverbs19:19 Migilo pa ama thuak ding gimna mah thuaksak zaw in. Honkhia lecin na hotkhiatkik zelzel kul ding hi. 
Proverbs19:20 Thu kigente ngai-in hong kihilhte mang lecin mai lamah na pil ding hi. 
Proverbs19:21 Mihing’ ngaihsutna-ah thu tampi om a, ahi zongin Topa’ deihna tawh a kituakte bek kimang ding hi." 
Proverbs19:22 Duhhopna pen mindaina hi a, zuau gen pa hihna sangin mizawng hihna hoihzaw lai hi." 
Proverbs19:23 Topa a zahtakte a khansau a, lungkim takin nuamsa-in om uh a, siatna bangmah tuak kha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs19:24 A thadah mi in a khut tawh ankuang sawksukin a kam sungah a tuttohkik ding nangawn ut lo liang hi. 
Proverbs19:25 Thu thei lote in satna bek tawh pilna ngahzo a, thungaihsun theite in taina lel tawh pilna ngahzo uh hi." 
Proverbs19:26 A pa nawtgawpin a nu a notkhia tapa pen zumna le mindaina a piangsak tapa ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:27 Thuhilhna a mang nuam lo tapa pen pilna a thei kha lo ding tapa ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:28 Mi a susia nuam teci in thuman gen nuam lo a, migilote in gitloh tatna nuamsa uh hi." 
Proverbs19:29 Mi a thusim lote in ciangduai thuak uh a, mihaite in satna thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs20:1 Leenggahzu in mi kamtam sakin khamtheihzu in mi kitawngsak a, zukhamna pen haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:2 Kumpipa’ hehna pen a lauhuai mahmah humpinelkai hawk bang hi a, kumpipa a hehsak khate in sihlawh uh hi." 
Proverbs20:3 Kitot khak ding pelhna in pahtak ngahna hi a, mihaite bek kitot ding ut uh hi." 
Proverbs20:4 Lo khawh hunin a kho nuam lo thadahpa in tuk anlak hun ciangin bangmah nei lo ding hi. 
Proverbs20:5 Mihingte’ ngaihsutna pen a thuk sunga om tui tawh kibang a, thuthuk mu theite bek in suahkhia thei hi." 
Proverbs20:6 Mi khempeuh pen mi citakin kigen kim uh hi; ahi zongin a citak takpi ding mi kimuzo ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs20:7 Mi khat thumanin a hoihin a nuntak leh ama suanlekhakte mi hampha ahi uh hi. 
Proverbs20:8 Thukhenna tokhom tungah thu khenin a tu kumpipa in a mitin a etna tawh a hoih lote khenkhia thei hi. 
Proverbs20:9 “Ka lungsim siangtho hi; mawhna ka nei het kei hi,” a ci thei ding mi kua om ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs20:10 Tawisuang nam nih le piciang nam nih zangin mi khemna pen Topa in a deih lohna kibang hi. 
Proverbs20:11 Naupangte nangawn mi citak mihoih ahihna a gamtatna panun kimukhia thei hi. 
Proverbs20:12 Topa in khua muhna ding mit, khua zakna ding bil hong guan hi." 
Proverbs20:13 Lumlum lecin na zawng ding a, semsem lecin na hau ding hi." 
Proverbs20:14 Van leipa in van zuakpa kiangah, “Kiman kei, kiman kei,” cici khem a, a paikhiat khit ciangin sumdek siam mahmah ing, ci-in mi kiangah kisial hi." 
Proverbs20:15 Pilna tawh kam na pau theih leh kham le suang manpha sangin a manphazaw a nei na hi hi. 
Proverbs20:16 Mi khat in gamdang mi khat’ leiba a lohsak dingin kam a hai ciam leh a ciam bangin a neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi. 
Proverbs20:17 A man loin a kingah an pen lim zungzung a, ahi zongin a nung ciangin suangtang haikhak tawh a kibang ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:18 Hoihtakin geelna tawh nasepna tangtung hi. Geelna kician om lopi-in galsim dingin kipan kei in. 
Proverbs20:19 Mi a gensia kawikawite in thu im thei lo hi. Tua banga mi haipaute tawh kikhawl kei in. 
Proverbs20:20 Na nu le na pa na samsiat leh khuamial sunga om meivak kisumit na bang ding hi. 
Proverbs20:21 A baih lamin hauhpakna pen a tawpna-ah phattuamna om lo hi. 
Proverbs20:22 Mite’ hong bawlsiatna thuk ding ngaihsun kei inla, Topa’ hong huh ding ngakzaw in." 
Proverbs20:23 Tawisuang nam nih a zangte Topa in mudah a, amah in tawikhaina man lote hoih sa lo hi." 
Proverbs20:24 Topa in mite’ gamtatna zia ding uk hi. Koici gamtat ding cih mihing in bangci theih ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs20:25 Pasian’ tungah piak ding na ciam ma-in hoihtakin ngaihsun masa in. Tua hikeileh na kinungsik kha ding hi. 
Proverbs20:26 A pil kumpipa in migilote tengkhia a, khasiat loin gim piagawp hi." 
Proverbs20:27 Topa in mihing lungsim meivak bangin zang a, i sungtawng dongin hong mu tel hi." 
Proverbs20:28 Kumpipa in thuman, thutang, citakin a uk laiteng a kumpi za-ah kip bek hi." 
Proverbs20:29 Khangnote’ thahatna pen amau’ minthanna hi a, khanghamte’ sam kanna pen amau’ thupina lim ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:30 Nakpi takin satna in misia kimlai a pha hong suah a, nakpitakin vuakna in i sungtawng hoih lohna teng a siangsak hi." 
Proverbs21:1 Topa’ khut sungah kumpipa om a, lo sunga tuilak bangin a deihna peuhah hei kawikawi thei hi." 
Proverbs21:2 Na gamtatna khempeuh nangmah in man na sak hangin Topa in na lungsim tawng a ettelna phawk in. 
Proverbs21:3 Topa in biakpiakna sangin thuman thutang deihzaw hi. 
Proverbs21:4 Kihisakin gamtatna le kiphatsakna lungsimte pen mawhna hi a, migilo hihna lim ahi hi." 
Proverbs21:5 Limtakin ngaihsunin geelgeelna pen hauhna lampi hi a, nawhsa-in lopthop hihna pen zawnna lampi ahi hi." 
Proverbs21:6 Zuaugenna tawh hauhnate beimang pak a, sihna khuk sung hong tunpih hi." 
Proverbs21:7 Migilote a manin gamta nuam lo uh ahih manin amau’ gamtatsiatna mah a awkpih uh hi. 
Proverbs21:8 Mimawhte thukawi-in gamta uh a, midikte a manin gamta uh hi." 
Proverbs21:9 Phun bek a thei zi tawh inn sungah tenkhop sangin innkhumzang kiu khatah tangten’ hoihzaw tham hi. 
Proverbs21:10 Migilote in thusia bekbek deih uh a, a lawmte nangawn zah tuan lo uh hi." 
Proverbs21:11 Mi kiphasakte gim a kipiak ciangin mi mawkmawkte in pillawh uh a, mipilte a kihilh ciangin thutheihna-in nei uh hi." 
Proverbs21:12 Pasian in migilo pa’ inn sungah a kisem khempeuh mu tel a, migilote lawnthalin a siasak hi." 
Proverbs21:13 Mizawngte’ huh ngetna a pia nuam lote pen amau zong cimawhin huhna a nget uh ciangin kipia lo ding hi. 
Proverbs21:14 A simthamin letsong piakna in hehna damsak a, puannuai tawi in sinsona daisak hi." 
Proverbs21:15 Thutangin na a kisep ciangin midik khempeuh lungdam a, ahi zongin migilote lungkham hi." 
Proverbs21:16 A kilawm gamtatna pan a pialkhia mite misi honte lakah a tung hi. 
Proverbs21:17 A noptat nuamte zawng uh a, zu ne-in sathau namtui a nilhte hau lo uh hi." 
Proverbs21:18 Midikte’ thuak dingin a bawlsak uh gimnate pen migilote mah in lehthuak zawsop uh hi. 
Proverbs21:19 A phun hat zi gilo tawh tenkhop sangin gam simthamah khat guak tangten’ hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs21:20 Mipil pa’ inn sungah neihlelam a dimin om a, ahi zongin mihai pa in a ngahzahzah zangkhia pah hi." 
Proverbs21:21 Thuman thutakin gamta tawntung lecin na khan sau-in pahtawina na ngah ding hi. 
Proverbs21:22 Mipil khat in mi thahatte in a hut khuapi lazo a, amau’ muanmuan kulhpi nangawn susiazo hi." 
Proverbs21:23 Kampau a ki-ipzote lungkhamna tawh kipelh hi. 
Proverbs21:24 Mi kihisak i cihte pen kilian sakin a kiphasak mite ahi hi. 
Proverbs21:25 Mi thadahpa in na sem nuam lo ahih manin amahmah a kithattawm ahi hi. 
Proverbs21:26 Mihoih lote in lungkim hun nei loin deih thuah tawntung uh a, mihoihte cingh-in piakhia tawntung uh hi." 
Proverbs21:27 Topa in migilote’ biakpiaknate deih lo a, ngimna hoih lo tawh a piakte uh deih lo zaw kan lai hi." 
Proverbs21:28 A man lo tecite mangthang ding uh a, thuman tecite’ kam kizaza ding hi." 
Proverbs21:29 Migilote pen muantheih dingin khauh pau uh a, midikte ahihleh lungmuang takin kampau hiathiat uh hi." 
Proverbs21:30 Mihingte’ pilna, a thutheihna le a thugente khempeuh, Topa’ deihna tawh a kituah kei leh a kimanna om lo hi." 
Proverbs21:31 Galdo nadingin sakolte a baihsa-in kikoih a, ahi zongin galzawhna pen Topa’ hang hizaw hi." 
Proverbs22:1 Hauhna sangin min hoihna deihhuai zaw a, kham le ngun sangin mi’ hong thusimna deihhuai zaw hi." 
Proverbs22:2 A hau a zawng a kilamdanna om lo a, a nih tuakun Topa’ bawlsa ahi uh hi." 
Proverbs22:3 Mipilte in a lauhuai thu mu thei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs22:4 Kiniamkhiat-a Topa zahtakna thaman in hauhna, minthanna, le khansauna ahi hi." 
Proverbs22:5 Migilote’ lampi-ah thang kisiahin so kidawh a, mipilte in tua lampi pelh uh hi." 
Proverbs22:6 Naupang khat a neulai-in lampi man tawnsak lecin a teek dongin lampial nawn lo ding hi. 
Proverbs22:7 Mihaute in mizawngte uk a, leitawi a late pen a piate’ sila a suak hi." 
Proverbs22:8 Thuman lo khaici a vawhte in lungkhamna tuak uh a, amau’ hehna ciangduai amau’ tung mah tukik ding hi." 
Proverbs22:9 A cingh mi in mizawngte an pia a, amah in thupha ngahkik hi." 
Proverbs22:10 Mi kiphasakte hawlkhia lecin kitotna le kisimmawhna bei pah ding hi. 
Proverbs22:11 Kamsiamna in kumpipa’ lawm hong suaksak a, ahi zongin Topa in lungsim takpi a deih hi." 
Proverbs22:12 Topa in thuman mite kem a, ahi zongin thuzuau gente a lawnthal hi." 
Proverbs22:13 Mi thadahte a inn-ah lumlum a, “Pua pial lehang humpi’n hong hih kha’n teh,” ci uh hi." 
Proverbs22:14 Numei tungah mawhna pen thangzak bang hi a, tua thangah a awkte tungah Topa a heh hi." 
Proverbs22:15 Naupangte a hai gamtat a ngeina hi a, deihtakin pangbetna in mihoih suaksak thei hi." 
Proverbs22:16 Hauhnop manin mihaute letsong pia leeng kizawnlawh a, hauhnop manin mizawngte’ neihsa laksak lehang zong kihauhlawh tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs22:17 Na bil uh hong ngatin mipilte’ thugen ngai unla, ka hong hilh pilna thute na lungsim uhah lutsak un." 
Proverbs22:18 Na lungsim uhah ciingin zang thei le-uhcin, na lung uh dam tawntung ding hi." 
Proverbs22:19 Tua hileh Topa muanin na nei ding uh a, tuni-in note’ phattuamna ding kam a pau ka suak ding hi." 
Proverbs22:20 Thuhilhna le pilna thu nam sawmthum hih lai-ah note a dingin ka gelh a," 
Proverbs22:21 thuman a kan dingin note hong sawlte’ tungah thuman bang hiam cih na genkik theih nadingun thuman na theih nading uh ka deihna ahi hi. 
Proverbs22:22 Bangmah hong cih zo lo ding cihna hangin nuamtak sa-in mizawngte’ neihsa mawk suh kei unla, zumah khia-in mawk bawlsiat kei un." 
Proverbs22:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute panpih ding a, amau a bawlsiate tungah phu a laksak ding hi." 
Proverbs22:24 A hehbaih mite tawh kipawl kei unla, a lungtom mite tawh kikhawl kei un." 
Proverbs22:25 Amau’ hoih lohnate na zuihkhak loh nadingun na kidop kei uhleh note in zong na awklawh kha ding uh hi. 
Proverbs22:26 Midangte’ leiba lohsak dingin kamciamin leiba tavuan lakha kei un. 
Proverbs22:27 A leiba lohsakzo kei le-uhcin na lupna nangawn uh hong kidawhkhiatsak ding hi. 
Proverbs22:28 Na pu na pate’ phuhsa gisuang cikmah hunin khin kei un. 
Proverbs22:29 A nasepna-ah a siam mahmah mi na theikha uh hiam? Amah in mi mawkmawkte’ na sem lo ding a, kumpite’ na sem ding hi." 
Proverbs23:1 Miliante tawh an nekhawm dingin na tut uh ciangin na tutpih pa limtakin en un. 
Proverbs23:2 An a ngaklah thei mi na hih khak uhleh zong limtakin kidawm un. 
Proverbs23:3 Hong thangsiahna hi khathei ding ahih manin tua anlimte lunggulh pah lua kei un. 
Proverbs23:4 Hauhnop man bekin sum’ sila suak kei unla, a man loin gamtakha kei un." 
Proverbs23:5 Na ngahsa uh sumte mitphiat kalin beimang thei a, muvanlai bangin thakhatin leengmang thei hi." 
Proverbs23:6 A cil tentan mite’ an neksak kei unla, a anlimte uh duhgawhkha kei un." 
Proverbs23:7 “Ne ne un,” hong cih hangin a cih takpi hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dangtawng a hong sun samzang nekkhak tawh kibang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:8 Na neksa teng uh na luakhia kik ding uh a, na kamsiam ngah teng uh maimang ta ding hi." 
Proverbs23:9 Mihaite pil hopih kei un; amaute in a manphatna phawk thei lo uh hi. 
Proverbs23:10 Tanglai gisuang khin kei unla, tagahte’ leitang va keek kei un." 
Proverbs23:11 Amaute a pawlpih pa pen Topa hi a, note’ langkhatah amaute panpih ding hi." 
Proverbs23:12 Hong kihilhnate zui unla, pilna thu hong kigente ngai un." 
Proverbs23:13 Naupangte sat ding lunghiang kei un; satna hangin si lo ding hi. 
Proverbs23:14 Ciangduai tawh sat le-uhcin nuntaklawh zaw ding uh hi. 
Proverbs23:15 Ka ta aw, mipil suak lecin ka lungdam mahmah ding hi." 
Proverbs23:16 Thuman na gen ciangin ka nuam mahmah ding hi. 
Proverbs23:17 Mawhnei mite engkha kei inla, Topa zahtakna zom paisuak in." 
Proverbs23:18 Tua bang hi lecin lametna om a, cithei-in na khansau ding hi." 
Proverbs23:19 Ka ta aw, ka thu ngai inla, mipil suak in; lampi man zuih ding ngaihsutpi-in nei in." 
Proverbs23:20 Zu nenete tawh kikhawl kei inla, a uisante tawh kithuahkha kei in." 
Proverbs23:21 Zu nenete le a uisante zawng ding uh a, a ne beka nitumte in puansia bek silhzo ding hi." 
Proverbs23:22 Nangma pianna na pa’ thu ngai inla, na nu a teek ciangin simmawh bawl kei in." 
Proverbs23:23 Thuman, pilna, siamna, thungaihsut theihna lei in; zuakkhiat dingin tuate pammaih lua hi." 
Proverbs23:24 Ta hoih a nei pa a lung dam ding a, ta pil a nei pa a ta’ tungah lungkim ding hi." 
Proverbs23:25 Na nu le na pa a kipak nadingin gamta inla, na pianna nu lungdamsak in." 
Proverbs23:26 Ka ta aw, ka thugente ciamteh inla, keima gamtat bangin nang zong gamta in." 
Proverbs23:27 Numei paktatte pen kiattheihna ding gum tawh kibang a, numei ginalote pen tangciak theihna hawkguam tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs23:28 Gutate bangin nang hong buksim a, mi tampi tak siasak uh hi." 
Proverbs23:29 Kuate in gal nei a, kuate in dahna thuak hiam? Thu om lopi-in kuate liam a, thu om lopi-in kuate a mit san gega hiam?" 
Proverbs23:30 Zu ne-a a tut khote zu a nenete ahi hi. 
Proverbs23:31 Hai sungah a phuan seuhseuh gawl sungah a tumsuk hithit thei leenggahzu san et-in nei kei in. 
Proverbs23:32 A tawpna-ah gulpi bangin nang hong tu ding a, gul gunei in a tuk na bang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:33 Na mitah na lamdangdang hong suak ding a, hoihtakin na pau thei nawn kei ding hi." 
Proverbs23:34 Tuipi tungah a lum tawh na kibang ding a, a suk awn a to awn teembaw dawna tuang tawh na kibang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:35 “Hong vuak hangun ka liam kei a, hong sat hangun ka phawk kei hi. Ka pilvang ciangin zu ka ne kik ding hi,” na ci ding hi." 
Proverbs24:1 Migilote eng kei inla, amaute tawh kikhawl kei in." 
Proverbs24:2 Amaute in tatsiat ding bek ngaihsun uh a, thusia bekbek genin nei uh hi." 
Proverbs24:3 Pilna tawh inn kilam a, ngaihsut siamna tawh inn kip hi." 
Proverbs24:4 Thungaihsut theihna inn sungah a hoih a manpha nate a dimtakin om hi. 
Proverbs24:5 Thahatna sangin pilna hoihzaw a, thakhauhna sangin thutheihna hoihzaw hi." 
Proverbs24:6 Geel siamna tawh galte kizo a, ngaihsut siamna tawh gualzawhna kingah hi." 
Proverbs24:7 Pil kampauna pen mihaite’ theihzawh dingin thuk lua mahmah a, mihaite in mihon lakah thu gen ngam lo uh hi." 
Proverbs24:8 Thusia lamsang a deih mite thusia bawl mi kici hi. 
Proverbs24:9 Mihaite’ vaihawmna in khialhna bek piangsak lel a, mi a simmawh theite midangte in mudah uh hi." 
Proverbs24:10 Haksatna na tuah ciangin na lung a kiat leh a ginalo mi na hi hi. 
Proverbs24:11 Thah dinga a kikaikhia mipa honkhia inla, sih nading mun a zuan mipa lehkaih kik in." 
Proverbs24:12 Ke’n theikha kei ing, na cihnop hangin lungsim a thei Pasian in theitel veve hi; nang hong encik Pasian in hong teltheihna phawk in. Mi khempeuh a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding hi." 
Proverbs24:13 Ka ta aw, khuaizu khum ahih manin ne in. I kamah khuailuzu khum mahmah hi." 
Proverbs24:14 Pilna pen i nuntakna-ah khuaizu tawh kibang a, pilna nei lecin mai lamah lametna om a, na khan hong sausak ding hi." 
Proverbs24:15 Migilote’ gamtat bangin thuman mite’ omna sugawp kei inla, amau’ tenna inn luhgawp kei in." 
Proverbs24:16 Mihoihte sagihvei dong a puk hangin tho kikkik thei a, migilote ahihleh tuahsiatna thuakin kithallot hi." 
Proverbs24:17 Na galte in gimna a ngah ciangin lungdam kei inla, a puk ciangin kipak kei in." 
Proverbs24:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thei-in nang tungah lungkim lo ding a, na galte tungah heh nawn loin gim pia lo kha ding hi." 
Proverbs24:19 Migilote’ hangin lung nuammawh kei inla, amaute eng kei in." 
Proverbs24:20 Amaute in mai lamah lamet ding bangmah nei lo a, amaute’ meivak kisukmitsak ding hi." 
Proverbs24:21 Ka ta aw, Topa le kumpipa zahtak khawm inla, amau a langpangte tawh kipawlkha kei in." 
Proverbs24:22 Tua bang mite thakhatthu-in kisugawp thei ding hi. Pasian le kumpipa’ piansak theih ding gimna kuamah in genkhol thei lo hi. 
Proverbs24:23 Mipil dangte in zong hih bangin thu gen uh hi: Mi lang muhin thukhenna hoih lo hi. 
Proverbs24:24 Mimawh kimlai a diksak thukhen pa leitung a mi khempeuh in mudahin phuisam ding hi. 
Proverbs24:25 A mawh mi gim a pia thukhen pa ahihleh thupha kipia-in daupai ding hi. 
Proverbs24:26 A mantakin dawnkikna pen lawm taktak hihna lim ahi hi. 
Proverbs24:27 Na nuntakna ding zong masa inla, na an nek ding a kicin ciang bekin na inn ding lamin zi le ta nei pan in." 
Proverbs24:28 Thu kician om lopi-in na vengpa’ langkhatah teci pang kei inla, amau’ siat nadingin zuauthu gen kei in." 
Proverbs24:29 Kei tungah hong bawl bangin kei zong ka bawl ding a, ama hong hihna bangin ka thuk ding hi, cikha kei in." 
Proverbs24:30 Mi thadahpa’ lo gei-ah ka va pai a, mihai pa’ leenggui lo ka va nawkkha hi." 
Proverbs24:31 Limtakin ka et ciangin a lo ciing bupah kiak dim a, a leitang khempeuh lopa in khuhcip a, a umna a phungcian suangte kicim khin hi." 
Proverbs24:32 Tua bang ka muh ciangin thu ka lungngaingai a, thu manpha khat ka mukhia hi." 
Proverbs24:33 Tawmkhat ihmutna, tawmkhat lusukna, tawmkhat sung na sep lohna, khutzepin ommawkna hangin" 
Proverbs24:34 i tungah zawnna hong tung a, cihmawhna in hong khuhcip hi." 
Proverbs25:1 Judah kumpi Hezekiah’ lai-atte in a teikhiat uh Solomon’ paunak dangte: 
Proverbs25:2 Pasian in thu a ip manin a min thang a, kumpite in thu a genkhiat manin minthang uh hi." 
Proverbs25:3 Vantung sang lua-in leisung a thuk luat mah bangin kumpipa’ ngaihsutna thuk lua-in kithei zo lo hi. 
Proverbs25:4 Ngun a ek teng paikhia lehang sikseekpa in na hoihpi piangsak thei hi. 
Proverbs25:5 Kumpipa kiang pan migilote nilkhia lehang thumanin ama ukna kip thei bek hi. 
Proverbs25:6 Kumpipa mai-ah na om ciangin milian kineih kei inla, miliante’ tutna ding munah tukha kei in." 
Proverbs25:7 Uliante a awn dingin hua lai-ah va tusuk in, hong kicih sangin hih lai-ah hong tuto in, hong kicih ding hoihzaw hi." 
Proverbs25:8 Thu khatpeuh na theih ciangin thukhen zum tun pah kei in. Na vengpa in nang’ khialhna hong laktel kik leh nang bang lawh nawn ding na hi hiam? 
Proverbs25:9 Na thuneihpih na vengpa bek mah tawh thu kiseel inla, mi khat’ thusim midang’ tungah genthang kei in." 
Proverbs25:10 Tua hikeileh amah hehin nang hong maizumsak ding a, na minsiatna bei ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Proverbs25:11 A kilawm hunin kammal khat paukhiatna pen ngun pek tunga kham pek khat a kisuang tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs25:12 Hilhna a sang thei mipa a dingin a pil thuhilhpa pen kizepna kham bilbah tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs25:13 Amah a sawlte tungah a citak kamtai pa pen anlak huna tuivot tawh kibang a, a tote’ lungsim thaksuak sak hi." 
Proverbs25:14 Bangmah a piak lohpi a kisialhpih pa pen guah a zusak tuan lo meiipi le huihpi nung tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs25:15 Lungduai a zolzolna tawh gam ukte kizo thei a, kam nemin pauna tawh aana neite kizo thei hi." 
Proverbs25:16 Khuaizu na nek ciangin a hoihkhop bek zah ne in. Tua hikeileh khamlua-in na lua ding hi. 
Proverbs25:17 Na vengte’ inn-ah hawh mun lua kei in. Hong cimtakin hong mudah kha ding hi. 
Proverbs25:18 A lawmte’ langkhatah teci man lo a pang mi pen molhtum, namsau, ahih kei leh thal hiam tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:19 Haksat hunin a zuautat mi muanin neihkhakna pen hana, ahih kei leh khebai tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:20 A dah a lungkham mipa kiangah lasakna pen khuadam laitakin puan suahkhiat tawh kibang a, meima ci-al nuh tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:21 Na galte a gil a kial leh an pia inla, a dang a tak leh tui pia in." 
Proverbs25:22 Tua hileh amau’ maizum nadingin a bawl na hi a, Topa in nang tungah thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Proverbs25:23 Leilu lam huih in guah a zuksak bangin gensiatna in hehna piangsak hi. 
Proverbs25:24 Phun bek a thei zi tawh inn sungah tenkhop sangin innkhumzang kiu khatah tangten’ hoihzaw tham hi. 
Proverbs25:25 A dangtak mipa in tuivot lim a sak bangin gamlapi-a om lawmte’ kiang panin thuzak nuam kisa hi. 
Proverbs25:26 Mihoih khat in mihoih lote’ gamtatna a zuihkhak ciangin hawktui nin, ahih kei leh tui uih tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:27 Khuaizu a tam lua nek ding a hoih loh bangin phat ding deihluatna a hoih lo ahi hi. 
Proverbs25:28 Ama lungsim a ki-uk zo lo mipa pen dalna kulhpi a nei lo khuapi tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:1 Tuk laitak a vuk kia le anlak huna guahzu bangin mihaite a dingin pahtawina a kilawmna om lo hi. 
Proverbs26:2 Thu om lopi a hong kisamsiatna pen bangmah a hong cih thei lo, khawlna mun mel a nei lo, a leengsuk a leengto phialphiah tawh kibang lel hi." 
Proverbs26:3 Sakolte sat ding kisam a, late kamkaih kisam a, mihaite zong sat ding a kisam ahi hi." 
Proverbs26:4 Mihaite’ thudotna dawngdawng lecin nang zong amau mah bangin a hai na hi hi. 
Proverbs26:5 Mihaite a pilin a kingaihsut khak loh nadingin amau’ haina tawh kizui-in dawng zaw in. 
Proverbs26:6 Mihai khat kamtai-in a zang pa pen ama khe mah a sattantawm, siatna a zong pa ahi hi." 
Proverbs26:7 Khebai pa’ khe a kimanna om loin a kikhai mawk bangin mihaite a dingin paunak in bangmah man nei lo hi. 
Proverbs26:8 Saili kuangah sailungtang khihcip lehang phattuamna a om loh bangin mihaite pahtawina zong a mawkna ahi hi. 
Proverbs26:9 Mihaite in paunak thuhilhnate a paukhiat ciangin zukham pa in a khut a ling om a khei dingin a kipan tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs26:10 Mihai a tuahkhak peuh tha cial a a nei pa pen a tuahkhak peuh a ban kap thal tawipa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:11 Ui in a luak a zuatkik bangin mihaite zong a haitat ngei bangin ta kik zel hi. 
Proverbs26:12 A pil lo kimlai a pil a kisapa sangin mihaite a dingin lametna omzaw lai hi. 
Proverbs26:13 Thadahpa in, “Lampi-ah humpinelkai om! Kongzingah humpinelkai om!” ci-in lumlum hi." 
Proverbs26:14 Kongkhak pen kawmhek tungah a kiheihei lel bangin mi thadahpa a lupna tungah kiheihei hi. 
Proverbs26:15 Thadahpa in a khutin ankuang sawksuk a, a kamah a bahtoh kik ding nangawn gim zungzung kisa hi." 
Proverbs26:16 A kilawmin thu a dawngthei mihing sagih sangin mi thadahpa a ngaihsutna-ah pil kisa zaw hi. 
Proverbs26:17 Eite tawh a kisai lo kitotna sunga kiphumna pen ui ommuang khat a bil-in i kaihsak tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:18 A vengte a khem khit ciangin ka ciamnuihna hi, a ci pa pen" 
Proverbs26:19 sihtheihna gu a baang thaltang tawh a kap pa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:20 Sing om kei leh mei mit a, gensiatna om kei leh kitotna bei hi." 
Proverbs26:21 Meihol in mei-am ding piangsak a, sing in mei kuangsak a, migilo in kitotna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs26:22 Gensiatna pen a lim mahmah an tawh a kibang hi a, mihingte’ sungtawng pekah tumsuk pahpah hi." 
Proverbs26:23 Tungtham beka kam khum pauna pen cimbeng kizut leibeel tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:24 A simtat mi in a kampi bek tawh thuhoih gen a, a lungsimah zuauthu bek om hi." 
Proverbs26:25 A lungsimah a deihhuai lo thu sagih tak om ahih manin kam khum takin a pau manin umkha kei in. 
Proverbs26:26 Ama hoih lohna a ip nop hangin mi khempeuh in ama gitlohna thei veve hi. 
Proverbs26:27 Mi siahna-in gum a tote amau’ gum tawhna sung mahah lehkiat zawsop uh a, mi a dengkha dingin suang a khukte amau’ suang khuk mah in amau mah lehden kha zaw hi." 
Proverbs26:28 Zuaugenna in midik kimlai a mawh bangsak a, tungtham beka thugenna in siatna bek piangsak hi." 
Proverbs27:1 Zing ciang hun ading kima-sialh kei in. Tuhun le tua hun kikalah a piang ding thu bangmah na thei kei hi. 
Proverbs27:2 Midangte in hong phat lohbuang nangmah kiphattawm kei in. Khual mite in hong phat lohbuang nangma kamin kiphattawm kei in. 
Proverbs27:3 Suangtum le sehnel gik mahmah a, ahi zongin mihaite’ piansak lungkhamna gikzaw lai hi." 
Proverbs27:4 Hehna le sinsona siahuai a, ahi zongin hazatna siahuaizaw lai hi." 
Proverbs27:5 Itna i seel bawl sangin a langtangin taina hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs27:6 I lawmte in hong liamsak hangin i hoihna ding a hong deihsakna hizaw hi. I galte in hong ngawng kawina pen hong lehbawlna ahi hi. 
Proverbs27:7 A gilvah mipa in khuaizu nangawn duh nawn lo a, a gilkial mipa in a kha an nangawn limsa hi." 
Proverbs27:8 Inn panin gamlapi-ah a zinkhia mipa a bu panin a leengkhia vasa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs27:9 Sathau namtui le paknamtui in lung nuamsak a, lawmte’ limbawlna in tha hatsak hi." 
Proverbs27:10 Na lawmte daangkoih kei inla, na pa’ lawmte dong nangawn lawm bawl in. Na lungkham ciangin na sanggampa va ko kei in. A gamla-ah a om i sanggampa sangin a nai-ah a om i vengpa kimangzaw hi." 
Proverbs27:11 Ka ta aw, pil in; tua hileh ka lungdam ding a, kei hong mawhsak nuamte in bangmah hong cih thei lo ding hi." 
Proverbs27:12 Mipilte in a lauhuai thu muthei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs27:13 Mi khat in gamdang mi khat’ leiba a lohsak dingin kam a ciam leh a ciam bangin ama neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi. 
Proverbs27:14 Mi khat in a kituak lopi-in midang khat limbawl lualiang leh amah in a sia lamin na ngaihsun zaw hi. 
Proverbs27:15 Phun bekbek a thei zi pen theu hun mel a nei lo guahciin tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs27:16 Tua bang numeite kikho thei lo a, a kikham thei lo huihnung, le i khutin sathau i tawi nop tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs27:17 Sik in sik mah hiamsak thei a, mi in midang pilsak thei hi." 
Proverbs27:18 Theikung a cing pa in a theigah ne a, a tapa a kem pa in pahtakna ngah hi." 
Proverbs27:19 Tui sung en leeng eima maitang i muh bangin i lungsim en leeng eima pianzia kilang hi. 
Proverbs27:20 Mihingte’ lungsim pen misite’ gam tawh kibang a, tamlua cih hun nei thei lo hi." 
Proverbs27:21 Ngun le khamte meikhukah kize-et a, mihing ahihleh phatna tawh kize-et hi." 
Proverbs27:22 Mihai khat a sih dek dongin na satsat hangin a hai ngei mahin hai veve lai ding hi. 
Proverbs27:23 Na tuuhonte hoihtakin thei inla, na bawnghonte hoihtakin kem in." 
Proverbs27:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh neihsa kip tawntung lo a, hauhna pen a khangkhangin kizom suak lo hi." 
Proverbs27:25 Lopate ki-atmang khin a, ahi zongin a no hong selkik hi. Mualtungah a po lopa hing khempeuh ki-atin inn-ah kipua a," 
Proverbs27:26 tuute in na puan ding hong guan a, na keeltal mante lo ciing khat man tawh kikim hi." 
Proverbs27:27 Na keelnawite ahihleh na innkuan annek ding, le na nasem numeite’ nuntak nadingin kicing ding hi." 
Proverbs28:1 Kuama delh lohpi-in migilote taimang a, mithumante ahihleh humpinelkai bangin a hang uh hi." 
Proverbs28:2 Gam sung mite a hoih loh ciangin a banbanin gam uk kumpi tampi nei uh a, ahi zongin mipil thungaihsun theite in gam sung thahatsakin kipsak uh hi." 
Proverbs28:3 Mizawngte a bawlsia aana a nei mipa pen lo-a ante a susiagawp guahzu tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs28:4 Thukham a zui lo mite in migilote pakta uh a, thukham a zui mite ahihleh migilote tawh kilem lo uh hi." 
Proverbs28:5 Mi siahuaite in thutang cihmel thei lo uh a, Topa a biate in ahihleh a kicingin a thei uh hi." 
Proverbs28:6 Hau napi-in lungsimkawi mi hihna sangin zawng napi-in paubaan neih lohna hoihzaw hi. 
Proverbs28:7 Thuhilhna a mang mite ta pil hi a, lawm gilo tawh a kikhawl mi in a pa mindaisak hi." 
Proverbs28:8 A meet a pung lakna tawh a hau mipa pen mizawngte a hehpih mipa a dingin sum a zonsak hi lel hi. 
Proverbs28:9 Mi khat in thukham a zuihnop kei leh ama thungetna nangawn Pasian in zakthadahhuai sa hi. 
Proverbs28:10 A diktat mi khat siatsak ding a hanciam pa pen ama tawhsa gum sung mahah kia ding hi. A dik mipa in gamh hoih luah ding a, migilo pa in bangmah luah lo ding hi." 
Proverbs28:11 Mihau pa pen amah pil kisa a, ahi zongin a zawng mi pil pa in a hau pa’ haina phawkkhia veve hi." 
Proverbs28:12 Mihoihte in vangliatna a ngah ciangin mi khempeuh lungdam uh a, migilote a liat ciangin adangte in gimna thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs28:13 A khialhna a im mite a dau pai lo ding a, a mawhna pulakin a kikheel mite in hehpihna ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:14 Topa a zahtak tawntungte pen mi nuamsa hi a, a lungkhauh mite in lungkhamna tuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:15 Mizawngte a uk migilo pa pen humpinelkai gilkial le vompi halungvei tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs28:16 Ngaihsut siamna a nei lo gam ukpa a gilo kumpi hi ding a, thuman tawh ngah ding bek a deih mipa in sauveipi uk ding hi." 
Proverbs28:17 Mi thatin a khial pa in ama hankhuk ding a to ahi hi. Ama hankhuk tawh kho kei in. 
Proverbs28:18 Thumanin a gamta mite lungmuangin om ding uh a, a zuautat mite ahihleh puk ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:19 Nakpi takin lo a khopa hau mahmah a, bangmahin a kimang tum lo na a sempa zawng mahmah hi." 
Proverbs28:20 A citak mipa in thupha tampi ngah ding a, a hau baih nuam mipa in gim tuak pelmawh ding hi." 
Proverbs28:21 Mi langbawlna hoih lo a, ahi zongin letsong neucik khat hangin thukhente gamta khial thei zel hi." 
Proverbs28:22 A huaiham mi in a hauh nadingin huai mengmeng a, a tawpna-ah a zawn’ ding lamtak phawkkha lo hi." 
Proverbs28:23 Mi khat tai-in thuhilh lecin tungthama phatna sangin a tawpna-ah lungdamzaw ding hi. 
Proverbs28:24 A nu a pa’ neihsa laksakin, “Khialhna hi kei,” a ci pa pen guta mah hi veve hi." 
Proverbs28:25 A huaiham mi in kitotna piangsak a, Topa a muang mite mihau hi ding hi." 
Proverbs28:26 Ei le ei kimuanna haina hi a, mipilte’ hilhna zuihna pen lungmuanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs28:27 Mizawng a huhte cimawh ngei lo ding a, huhna a pia nuam lote in samsiatna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs28:28 Migilote a liat ciangin midangte bucip uh a, amaute a zakiat ciangin midikte in ukkik ding hi." 
Proverbs29:1 Kihilh napi-in a mang nuam lote bawlphat zawh nawn loh dongin kisia ding uh hi. 
Proverbs29:2 Midikte in gam a uk ciangin gammite lungdam uh a, migilote in a uk ciangin a gammite thum uh hi." 
Proverbs29:3 Pilna a deih mi in a pa lungdamsak a, numei paktat tawh a kikhawl mi in a neihsa teng lawnmang hi." 
Proverbs29:4 Thumanin a gamta kumpi in a gam kipsak a, sum bek a ngaihsun kumpi in a gam siasak hi." 
Proverbs29:5 A man lopi-in mi khat mawkphatna pen a awk nadingin thangsiahna ahi hi. 
Proverbs29:6 Migilote amau mawhna sungah awkcip a, midikte ahihleh suakta-in lungdam uh hi." 
Proverbs29:7 Midikte in mi cimawhte a’ ding thu khual uh a, migilote in tua bang thukhualna thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs29:8 Thu a khual lote in khua sungah buaina lianpi piangsak a, mipilte in tua buaina daisak thei hi." 
Proverbs29:9 Mipil khat in mihai khat tawh zumah thu nei leh mipil pa tungah hehin zahko a, phattuamna piang tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs29:10 Mi a that nuamte in a thuman mi mudah a, midikte in a thuman mi hu uh hi." 
Proverbs29:11 Mihai pa a hehna bangin kam pau-in gamta gawp a, mipil pa ahihleh ki-ipin a hehna damsak hi." 
Proverbs29:12 Kumpipa in zuauthu saangin na sem leh a nuai-a ulian khempeuh zong zuaugenin nitum ding uh hi. 
Proverbs29:13 Mizawng pa le mi bawlsia pa a kibatna uh khat om hi. Topa in a nih tuakun mittang guan hi. 
Proverbs29:14 Kumpipa in mizawngte’ thu a manin khensak leh a ukna kip tawntung ding hi. 
Proverbs29:15 Ciangduai le tai-na in pilna guan a, a kikhahkhong ta in a nu maizumsak hi." 
Proverbs29:16 Migilote ulian suak leh siatna khang semsem a, ahi zongin midikte in amau’ mit mahmah tawh a gilo uliante’ zakiatna mu ding uh hi." 
Proverbs29:17 Na ta thuhilhin tai lecin ama hangin na kipak ding a, na lung hong kimsak ding hi." 
Proverbs29:18 Pasian’ lamlahna a kizuih lohna gamah gam sung mite phengtat gawp uh hi. Pasian’ thukham a zui mite ahihleh a lungdam uh hi. 
Proverbs29:19 Kama hilh lel tawh silate pil zo lo a, a theih hangun hong mang tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs29:20 Thu ngaihsun loin a pheng paupau mipa sangin mihai pa a dingin lametna omzaw lai hi. 
Proverbs29:21 Sila khat a neu tung a kipan limtakin na khoi hangin a tawpna-ah nang hong hehsak veve ding hi. 
Proverbs29:22 A heh pahpahte in kitotna piangsak a, a heh baihte khial thei tawntung hi." 
Proverbs29:23 A kiphasakte in niamkhiatna thuak ding a, a kiniamkhiatte in pahtawina ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs29:24 Guktakna sungah a kipawl mipa ama a dingin thusia zongpa ahi hi. A guktakna pulak leh amah gim kipia ding a, genkhia kei leh lah Pasian in samsia veve ding hi." 
Proverbs29:25 Midangte kihtakna in hong lunghimawhsak a, Topa muanna in hong lungmuangsak hi." 
Proverbs29:26 Mi khempeuh in gam ukte’ maipha ngah ding hanciam ciat uh a, ahi zongin Topa’ kiang pan bekin thutang kingah hi." 
Proverbs29:27 Midikte in migilote mudah uh a, migilote in midikte mudah uh hi." 
Proverbs30:1 Jakeh’ tapa Agur’ thugente: Amah in, “Pasian aw, ka lunggim a, ka cih nading ka thei kei hi." 
Proverbs30:2 Ka hai lua a, mihing ka sun kei hi. Mihing bangin ngaihsut siamna ka nei kei hi." 
Proverbs30:3 Pilna thu ka thei kei a, Pasian’ thu ka theih om lo hi." 
Proverbs30:4 Vantungah kua kahto a, leitungah kua hong kumsuk kik ahi hiam? Kua in a khut sungah huihte lomcip a, puan tawh tuite tuncip ahi hiam? Kua in leitung bulpite phut kip ahi hiam? Tua bang mi na theih ngei leh a tapa’ min bang ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs30:5 “Pasian in a thugen khempeuh a manna laktel a, amah a belte a dingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
Proverbs30:6 Ama gen lohpi behlapsak kei in; na tua cih leh amah in nang hong tai-in zuau thugen na hihna hong kilang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs30:7 Pasian aw, thu nih kong ngen hi. Ka sih ma-in tuate hong pia in." 
Proverbs30:8 Zuauna le khemna ka zat loh nadingin hong huh inla, a haulua lo, a zawnglua loin hong bawl inla, ka khamkhop zah lian bek an hong pia in." 
Proverbs30:9 Haulua leng nang hong nialin, “ Topa i cih kua ahi hiam?” kong ci kha ding a, zawnglua leuleu leng mi’ na guksakin ka Pasian’ min kong daisak khazel ding hi." 
Proverbs30:10 Sila khat a topa kiangah gensia kei in; amah in nang hong gensia-in gimna na thuakkha ding hi. 
Proverbs30:11 A pate samsia-in a min a daisak, a nute a phat lo mi pawlkhat om hi." 
Proverbs30:12 Amaute a nin mahmah hinapi-in amau’ muhna-ah siang a kisa mahmah mi pawlkhat om hi. 
Proverbs30:13 Mihoih pha mahmahin a kingaihsun, a kiliansak mahmah mi pawlkhat om hi." 
Proverbs30:14 A ha uh namsau tawh a kibang gam sung mizawngte a netum, mi cimawhte a liaktum mi pawlkhat om hi." 
Proverbs30:15 Vot in tanu nih nei a, khat in, “Hong pia in,” ci a, a khat in zong, “Hong pia in,” mah ci veve hi. “Phazo ta,” a ci ngei lo nam thum om a, eh! li hi zaw:" 
Proverbs30:16 Han khuk, taciing numei, tui a deih tawntung lei keu, le a kisumit zo lo meikuang." 
Proverbs30:17 A pa a simmawh mipa, a nu’ thu a mang nuam lo mipa, va-ak in a mittang khelkhiat sakin musanete in a sa ne ding uh hi." 
Proverbs30:18 Ka theihzawh hetloh a lamdang mahmah thu thum om a, eh! li hi zaw:" 
Proverbs30:19 Vanah musane a leentheihna zia, suangpi tungah gul a pai theihna zia, tuipi tungah teembaw a pai theihna zia, le nungak tangval a kingaihna zia." 
Proverbs30:20 A citak lo zi hih bangin gamta hi: Midang tawh khialin tua ciangin kisilsiang a, “Khialhna bangmah gamta kei ing,” ci khem hi." 
Proverbs30:21 Leitung mi khempeuh in a thuakzawh loh thu thum, eh! thu li om a," 
Proverbs30:22 sila khat kumpi a suah ciang, mihai khat in a duh bangbang a nek zawh ciang," 
Proverbs30:23 a muhthadahhuai numei khat in pasal a neih ciang, nasem numeino in a tonu’ za a suan ciang." 
Proverbs30:24 A neu mahmah ganhing nam li leitungah om a, ahi zongin a pil penpente ahi hi." 
Proverbs30:25 Miksite: A hat het lo ganhing hinapi-in khuakhal sungin a nek ding uh kholzo uh hi. 
Proverbs30:26 Ngalvangte: A thahat lo ganhing hinapi-in suang lakah a kua ding bawl uh hi. 
Proverbs30:27 Kauphete: Kumpi nei lo napi-in a kituak diamdiamin hontat thei uh hi. 
Proverbs30:28 Innhikte: Khut sunga tawizawh ganhing hilel napi-in kumpi inn sungah tengzo uh hi. 
Proverbs30:29 A gamtatna i et ciangin a thupi suak mahmah thum, eh! li om hi." 
Proverbs30:30 Humpinelkai: Ganhing lak pan a hatpen kuamah a kihta lo. 
Proverbs30:31 Aklui: A kihisak pai kuankuan. Keeltal: A kihisak pai gangan. Kumpipa: A mite’ mai-ah a pai lanlan. 
Proverbs30:32 Kiphasakin na hai pau ngei a, thusia bawl ding na ngaihsut ngei khak leh limtakin thu ngaihsun pha in." 
Proverbs30:33 Bawngnawi toktok lehang thawhbat hong suak a, mi khat’ nak tupsak lehang si hong luang a, mi phin lehang kitotna hong piang hi." 
Proverbs31:1 Kumpipa Lemuel, a nu in a thuhilhna:" 
Proverbs31:2 Kong it mahmah ka ta aw, thu ngenngenin kong neih ka tapa na hi hi. Nangma tungah bang teng hong gen ding ka hi hiam?" 
Proverbs31:3 Na thatang teng numei tungah beisak kei inla, na sum khempeuh numei tungah zang kei in. Numei in kumpipa siasak thei hi." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuel aw, ka thugen hong ngai in. Kumpite in zu nek huai lo a, mi ukte in khamtheihzu a duh ding hi lo hi." 
Proverbs31:5 Zu ne le-uh, thukham mangngilh uh a, thukham hei-in mizawngte gim pia khathei uh hi." 
Proverbs31:6 A si dekdekte, khamtheihzu pia inla, a lungkham mahmahte, leenggahzu pia in." 
Proverbs31:7 Amaute nesak lecin a zawnna uh mangngilhin, a lungkhamna uh phawk nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Proverbs31:8 Thu a gen thei lo mite a dingin thu gensak inla, a huh ding a om lo mite panpih in." 
Proverbs31:9 Amau a’ ding thu genin thu a tangin khen inla, a zawng a cimawh mite amau a dingin a kilawm hamphatna ngahsak in." 
Proverbs31:10 Zi hoih pen suangmanpha sangin manphazaw pek a, ahi zongin zi hoih ngah ding haksa mahmah hi." 
Proverbs31:11 A pasal in muang mahmah a, a innsung uhah annek kitasam ngei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs31:12 Amah in a khan tawntungin a pasal tungah thupha bawl a, a pasal tungah thusia tun ngei lo hi." 
Proverbs31:13 Amah in samul le khau zongin thanuam takin na sem hi. 
Proverbs31:14 Amah in sumbukte’ van pua teembaw bangin gamlapi panin an hong ciahpih hi. 
Proverbs31:15 Phalvak tungin zingtho a, annek ding teng limtakin bawlin a nasem numeite’ sep dingteng a vaihawmsak hi." 
Proverbs31:16 Amah in leitang hoih penpen zong a, a thalawhsa sum tawh a leenggui lo ding a lei hi." 
Proverbs31:17 A nik singtenin a puanban zial a, thalawp takin na a sem hi." 
Proverbs31:18 Amah in a nasepte a manphatna thei a, zankim zankhang dongin nakpitakin na a sem hi." 
Proverbs31:19 Amah in khau kheekin a puan ding gantawm hi. 
Proverbs31:20 A zawng mite tungah amah cingh mahmah a, a cimawh mite tungah huhna a pia hi." 
Proverbs31:21 A innkuan buppi puanlum guanzo ahih manin phalbi tun ding lunghimawh lo hi. 
Proverbs31:22 Amah in a puan ding khuitawm a, saihadial puansan vive a silhzo hi." 
Proverbs31:23 Thukhen upate lakah a pasal a tut ciangin mite’ lakah a kitheikim mi khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs31:24 Amah in puan khui-in kawnggakte zong bawl a, sumbukte tungah tuate a zuak hi." 
Proverbs31:25 Amah a tha hatin zong kizahtak a, mailam hun ading a lung patau lo hi." 
Proverbs31:26 Amah in a pilna tawh thu gen a, kam khum takin pau hiathiat hi." 
Proverbs31:27 Amah in a innkuansung kisapna teng sem a, a tawntungin manlah den hi." 
Proverbs31:28 A tate in amah it mahmah uh a, a pasal in zong pakta mahmah a," 
Proverbs31:29 “Zi hoih tampi a om tei hangin nang kan-a hoih kuamah om kei,” ci-in a phat hi." 
Proverbs31:30 Ngaihbaanna pen zuaupi hithei a, melhoihna zong maimang thei hi. Ahi zongin Topa a zahtak numei a phattaak ahi hi." 
Proverbs31:31 A sepna khempeuh hangin amah phat un. Mi khempeuh in a zahtak dingin a kilawm ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem khua sungah kumpi a sem, David’ tapa, Thugen Siampa’ thugente:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Thugen Siampa in hih bangin ci hi: A mawknapi, a mawknapi, na khempeuh a mawknapi." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Gimpi-a nisa thuakin nasepna-ah mihing in bang noptuam ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Khang khat bei-in khang khat hong tung a, ahi zongin leitung kibangbang niloh hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ni hong suakin ni tum a, a suakkik dingin tum zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Leitaw lamah huih nungin leilu lamah nung leuleu a, a zuih ngeina teng mah zui-in nungnung niloh hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Lui khempeuh tuipi-ah luangsuk a, ahi zongin tuipi dim nai lo hi. Tuipi tuite a khu-in leengin tuinakah guahin zu a, a nak panin hong luangsuk kik zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Na khempeuh lunggimhuai a, kuama genzawh ding hi lo hi. Mit in a muh cim thei lo a, bil in a zak cim thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 A omsa mah bangin hong piang kik ding a, a kisemsa bangin hong kisem kik ding hi. Leitungah a thak na khat beek om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Hih pen a thak ahi hi, a kici thei ding khat beek om lo hi. Eite’ khan ma-in a omsa vive ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 A beisa nate kiphawkkha nawn lo a, hong tung lai ding thute zong a khangkikte in phawk nawn lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Thugen Siampa kei pen Jerusalem khua-ah Israel kumpipa ka hi ngei hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Hih leitungah a kisem na khempeuh entelin a thu kan ding ka ngaihsun hi. Pasian in tua bang nasep ei tungah hong guat pen a nuam het lo nasep khat ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Leitungah a kisem khempeuh ka mu khin a, tuate khempeuh a mawknapi na hi a, huihpi nung tawh kibang lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 A kawisate kimamsak thei lo a, a om lopi a omin kiseh thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 “Pilna sangpi ka nei a, keima mai-ah Jerusalem a uk dangte khempeuh sangin ka pilzaw hi. Pilna le theihna a kici khempeuh ka thei loh om lo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Pilna le haina, theihna le mawlna, a kilamdanna ka zong hi. Ahi zongin tua bang ka hahkatna zong a mawknapi ahihlam ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pil semsem lehang kilunghimawh semsem a, tam thei semsem lehang hong gimsak semsem zawsop hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Lungdamna zongin nuam ka sak bang bangin om ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun leuleu hi. Tua zong a mawknapi ahihna ka phawk zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nuihna pen haina ahihna, nopna pen bangmahin a kiman lohna ka mukhia hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Mihingte in leitungah tomno a nuntak sungin bangci om leh hoih ding ahi hiam, cih ka muh theih nadingin pilna ka deihna mah tawh, zunekna tawh ka lung nuamsakin, ka utut sep ding ka hanciam hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Na lian tampi tak mah ka sem zo hi. Keima a dingin inn tampi tak ka lam a, leenggui lo tampi tak mah ka nei hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Huan bawlin singno cinna lo zong ka nei a, ka huan sungah nektheih namkim kidim hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Tua singnote tui piak nadingin tuikhukpi zong ka bawl hi. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ka inn-ah a suak silate banah, sila a nu a pa-in tampi tak ka neithuah hi. Tuuhonte le bawnghonte zong tampi tak ka nei a, Jerusalem-a om ngei dangte khempeuh sangin ka hauzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ka zawhsa kumpite’ sumkholna panin keima a dingin ngun le kham zong ka la hi. Ka lungnop nadingin la a sa ding lasiam numei le pasal tampi ka nei a, ka deih zahzah zong ka neizo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Tua ahih ciangin keima hun ma-in Jerusalem-ah a om ngei mite khempeuh sangin ka lianzaw a, ka pilna zong bei tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ka deih khempeuh ka nei a, ka ut bangbangin omin ka gamta hi. Ka sepna khempeuhah nuam ka sa hi; tua nopsakna pen ka nasepna hangin ka phattuamna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tua ciangin ka sepsa na khempeuh, tua bangin haksapi a ka sepnate ka ngaihsut kik ciangin, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahihna, le leitungah bangmah phattuamna a om lohna ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 A hi-in ci lehang, kumpi khat in ama ma-a kumpipa’ hihsa teng mah a hih thei bek ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin pilna, haina, mawkna i cih bang ahi hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Tua banga ka ngaihsut ciangin, khuavak in khuamial a zawh bangin, pilna pen haina zawhna ahihlam ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mipilte in a pai nading mun mu thei a, mihaite in a pai nading mun mu thei lo hi. Ahi zongin a pil le a hai in a kibang khat a tuah tuak ding ka thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tua ciangin, “Mihaite tungah a piang ding thute kei’ tungah zong hong piang ding ahih manin, ka pil mahmah manin bang phattuamna ngah ka hi hiam?” ka ci a, “Bangmah ngah kei ing, themkhat zong ngah kei ing,” ci-in ka kidawng hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mihaite a kiphawkphawk loh mah bangin, mipilte zong kiphawkphawk tuan lo a, mailam hunah i vekpi-in hong kimangngilh lel ding ahi hi. A pil a hai-in, i vekpi-in i si ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Tua ahih ciangin hih leitung a sepna khempeuh in lungkhamna cih loh hong piaktheih dang bangmah om lo ahih manin, hih leitung a hinna pen kei a dingin a kimanna bangmah om lo hi. A mawknapi, huih hawmguak bang bek hi lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Keimah a hong laih ding pa tungah ka neih ka lam khempeuh ka nusiat ding thei ka hih manin, nakpitakin sem-a ka gimpih nate pen kei a dingin a phattuamna om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kei hong laih pa pil taleh hai taleh, ka pilna ka siamna khempeuh zanga ka sepsa nate luahin a ukpa hi ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Tua ahih ciangin hih leitungah nakpitakin na ka sepna ka kisik hi. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pilna, siamna, theihna siit loin na kisem a, themkhat zong a gimpih het lo mi khat a dingin nusiat ding hi zenzen hi. Hih thu a man het lo, a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mi khat in hih leitungah lunghimawhin thatang sanin na a sepna-ah bang phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Sepna bawlna khempeuhah lungkhamna le sinkhamna bekbek hi a, zan nangawnin a ihmut mawhpih hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mihing khat in a nasepna thamanin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om sangin a hoihzaw bangmah dang om lo hi. Ahi zongin tua nangawn zong, Pasian’ hang ahihna ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Pasian kihel loin kua in an ne-in nuamsa thei ding ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pasian in amah a lungdamsakte tungah pilna, theihna, le lungdamna pia a, ahi zongin a hehpihhuai mimawhte ahihleh a sep bek sisakin, amau’ thalawhsa khempeuh amah a lungdamsakte tungah a piaksak hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak, huihpi nungdelh bang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Hih leitungah a piang thu khempeuh, Pasian in ama pian’ hun dinga a sehsa hunin a piansak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Suah hun om a, sih hun om hi. Suan hun om a, bawhkhiat hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Gawh hun om a, khoi hun om hi. Phel hun om a, lam hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Kah hun om a, nuih hun om hi. Dah hun om a, laam hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Lupkhawm hun om a, tuamlup hun om hi. Kikawi hun om a, kikhah hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Zon’ hun om a, mansuah hun om hi. Kep hun om a, paihkhiat hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Balkek hun om a, phop hun om hi. Daih hun om a, pau hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 It hun om a, muhdah hun om hi. Kido hun om a, kilem hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Na a sem mipa in a sepsa khempeuh thamanin bang ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Pasian in eite’ manlahpih dingin hong piak nasep ka thei hi. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Amah in na khempeuh amau’ hun ciat tawh a kituak dingin a bawl hi. Amah in mailam thu theihnopna lungsim eite tungah hong guan a, ahi zongin ama sepnate a cing a theihzawhna ding hong guan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Tua ahih ciangin mihingte in a nuntak laiteng a siam tawpun gamta-in lungdamin a om ding a thupi pen ahihna ka phawk hi. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Eite khempeuh in an ne tui dawnin i sepna thaman tawh lungdamin i om ding kilawm a, tua pen Pasian’ hong piak letsong ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pasian’ sep khempeuh a kip tawntung ding ahihna ka thei hi. I behlap theih ding om lo a, i paihkhiat ding zong om lo hi. Amah i zahtak theih nadingin Pasian in tua bang ding mahin a bawl ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 A piang khat peuhpeuh pen a piang ngeisa mah na hi a, a piang lai ding khat peuhpeuh zong a piang ngeisa mah na hi lel hi. Pasian in ama hun hunin a piang ngeisa mah piangsakkik zelzel hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Tua tham loin, hih leitungah gitlohna in thuman thutang a suankhiatna zong ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Pasian in sepna bawlna le na khempeuh ama hun ding sehkhol khin ahih manin, midikte le migilote thu khen ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mihingte pen ganhing bang lel ahihna uh a lahtel nadingin Pasian in mihingte ze-et hi, ci-in ka lungsimah ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 A tawpna-ah ci lehang, mihingte le ganhingte in a tuah ding uh kibang a, ganhing mah bangin mihing zong a si ahi hi. Mihing le ganhing in a kibangin nuntakna hu nei a, mihing le ganhing nuntakna a kimanna bangmah om lo ahih manin, mihing pen ganhing sangin a hoihzawkna bangmah om tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 A nih tuakun mun khatah tung khawm ding uh a, leivui panin a piang uh ahih mah bangin leivui mah suakkik ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mihingte’ kha vanah kahto-in ganhingte’ kha lei-ah lutsuk hi, cih a thei zong kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Tua ahih ciangin mihingte in a sep thaman uh ne-in nuamsa-in a om ding uh a hoihpen ahihna ka phawk hi. Tua lo a hih theih ding uh bangmah dang om lo hi. I sih khit ciangin bang piang ding cih theihtheihna bangmah om lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tua ciangin leitungah thuman loin a kigamtatnate khempeuh ka ngaihsun kik leuleu hi. Nenniamna a thuak mite kap uh a, ahi zongin kuamah in amaute hehnem lo uh hi. A nengniam mite thahat lua uh ahih manin kuamah in thuk ngam lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 A hinglai mite sangin a si khinsa mite hamphazaw ka sa hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Mihing a hong piang nai lo, hih leitung gitlohna teng a mu nai lote hamphazaw lai sawnsawn uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Mi khatlekhat, hauhnop mana kidemna hangin nakpi taka na kisem ahihna ka mu hi. Hih zong a mawknapi hi a, huihpi nungdelh mah tawh kibang bek hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mihaite in na sem loin a khut zepin om uh a, a tawpna-ah gilkialin sihlawh uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Nakpi takin na sem a, a mawknapi ahi ding, khut nih dim sangin lungsim nuamin khut khat dim neihna hoihzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Nuntakna sungah a mawknapi ahi thudang khat ka mu leuleu hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi khat in tapa ahi a, sanggam ahi zongin nei lo napi-in, a tawntungin na semin a neihsa tawh lungkim hun nei thei lo hi. Kua a dingin gimpi-in na sem a, a ututin ta hoh lo ahi hiam? Hih zong a mawknapi mah, a dahhuai nuntakna khat ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Mi khat sangin mi nih hoihzaw hi; amau’ sepna thaman a tamzaw ngah uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh khat cimawh leh a khat in huh a, mi khat guak pen cimawh zenzen leh a huh ding om lo ahih manin a dahhuai pha mahmah ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Khua a dam ciangin mi nih lumkhawm leh khua lum hi; khat guak bangci khualum theih ding ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mi khat bek hileh zawhnop kisa a, nih pha leh kizo zo lo hi. Zang thum a kiheek khauhual bawhsat hak hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mi’ thugen a sang thei nawn lo, teek leh hai a thuah kumpipa sangin zawng napi-in a pil tangval khat hoihzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Mi khat pen thong panin suakta-in kumpi suak thei a, zawng napi-in ama gam sungah kumpi suak thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Hih leitungah mi khempeuh’ thu ka ngaihsun a, tua mite lak panin kumpipa’ za a luah ding khangno mi khat a omlam ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Kumpipa’ uk ding mite simzawh lohin tam a, ahi zongin amah a sih ciangin ama nasepna hangin a lungdam khat beek om lo hi. Hih pen a mawkna taktak, huihpi nungdelh bang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Biakinn-ah na pai ciangin limtakin kingaihsun in. A man le a man lo a khen thei lo mihaite’ biakpiaknate tawh a kibang piakna sangin thu ngai dingin biakinn-a paina hoihzaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Thu ngaihsun masa-in pau inla, Pasian’ tungah thu mawk ciampak kei in. Vantungah Pasian om a, leitungah nang om na hih manin na pau ding a kilawm zahval pau kei in." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Lunghimawh semsem lecin na mang sia semsem ding a, tam pau semsem lecin na haina kilang semsem ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pasian’ tungah thu na ciam ciangin manlangin tungsak pah in. Amah in mihaite diksa lo hi. Na thuciamna bangin tungsak in. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Na thuciamna bangin na tunsak kei ding le thu ciam vet kei zaw in. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Khialkha ing, ci-in Pasian’ siampipa’ mai-ah na gen ding kisam kha ding ahih manin na kampauna hangin khialkha kei in. Tua bangin gamta khial lecin nangma tungah Pasian heh ding a, na sepsa khempeuh hong suksiatsak ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mang tam man leeng a mawkna mah tam a, kam tam pau leeng zong a kituak mahin a mawkna thu mah kibehlap hi; bangbang ahi zongin Pasian zahtak lai veve in." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kumpite in mizawngte gim ngahsakin, thuman thutangin na a kisep kei leh lamdang sa kei in. Uliante pen amau’ tunga uliante in en uh a, tuate’ tungah a ensawn a lianzaw khat omlai hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Gam khat peuhpeuh in lo khawhna lamsang a lunghimawh kumpi khat kisam hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Sum deihna lungsim na neih leh lungkim hun cih na nei ngei kei ding hi. Na hauhnop hangin na deih khempeuh na ngah ngei kei ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Hau semsem lecin na vak ding mi tam semsem a, a hau zaw hi’ng, ci-a na theih bek cih simloh bangmah phattuamna na ngah kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Na a sem mipa pen a nek ding nei taleh nei ta kei leh lungnuam takin ihmu thei a, a haute ahihleh lungnuam takin ihmu thei lo uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 A hoih het lo na khat hih leitungah ka mu hi: Mite amau’ lunggim nadingin hau uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Na a sep khialh manun a neihsa teng uh suplawh uh a, a tu a tate’ luah ding bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 I nute’ sung panin bangmah nei loin guaktangin i suah mah bangin guaktang mahin i ciahkik hi. I sepsate i ciahpihkik theih bangmah om lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:16 A dahhuai mahmah thu in: I suah hun lai-a mah bang teekteekin i ciahkik ding hi. A mawknapi ding a i sepna-ah bang phattuamna ngah ihi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes5:17 I nuntak sungteng lungzinna, dahna, lunghihmawhna, natna satna le hehna bek tawh hun bei lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Keimah in ka phawkkhiat thu in: Pasian in tomkha nuntak hih leitungah hong piak sungin, i sep thaman ne-in dawnin i om ding a hoihpen ahi hi. Hih pen mihingte’ thumong ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Pasian in mi khat neihlelam guanin, a hauhna nuamtakin a neksak leh, amah lungdamin a sepna thaman ne-in a om ding hi. Tua nopsakna pen Pasian’ kiang pan ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pasian in lungdamin omsak ahih manin a nuntak tomlam phawkin nei kha lo ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hih leitung a mihingte tungah a man hetloin hong kibawlna ka phawk hi. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Pasian in mi khatpeuh tungah neihlelam, hauhna, le pahtawina pia-in, a deih khempeuh neisak napi-in, tua nate nuamtakin zangsak loin, midang khat in nopsaklawh laizang hi. Hih pen a mawknapi, a thuman het lo khat ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mi khat in ta zakhat nei-in kum saupi zong nungta thei kha ding hi. Bangzahin sauveipi a nungta ahi zongin leitungah nopsakna ngah loin, limtak a vuina a ngah kei leh, a sisa-a suak naungek hoihzaw lai hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 A sisa-a suak naungek a kimanna om lo hi. Khuamial sungah suakin, khuamial sung mahah mangthangin kiphawk nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Sun khuavak mukha loin, nuntakna bangci hiam, cih a theihkhak loh hangin tawlngakna a ngah hi buang hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Nuntakna-ah nopsakna a ngah lo mipa kum tulnih a hing zongin, a tawpna-ah a sisa-a suak naungek mah tawh a tunna mun kibang lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mihingte’ nasepna pen a nektawm ding bek a ngaihsutna hi lo napi-in, a khamkhop ngahzo tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Tua ahih manin mihai pa sangin mipil pa a hamphat zawkna bang om tuan ahi hiam? Mihai pa in nuntakna ding zia a theih hangin bang phatuam tuan ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Na dangdang deihthuah ngitngetna sangin i neihsa teng tawh lungkimna hoihzaw hi. Hih zong a mawknapi, huihpi nungdelh mah tawh a kibang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 A piang thu khempeuh, a tuaci mahin tangtawnga kisehsa hi a, mi khat in amah sangin a thahatzaw mi khat a nial zawh lohna thu i vekpi-in i thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Sauvei kinial lehang a mawkna hi semsem a, a phattuamna om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Niliim bangin a pai hanhan, a mawknapi hih nuntak tom sungah mihing a’ ding a hoihpen kua in thei ding ahi hiam? Ama sih khit ciangin leitungah bang piang ding cih kua in gen thei ahi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 A manpha paknamtui sangin minpha hoihzaw a, i suah ni sangin i sih ni hoihzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Pawisimna sangin sigalna hoihzaw hi. Sih ding bek a ngak ahihna mihing khempeuh in a phawk ding uh kilawm hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Nuihna sangin dahna hoihzaw hi; na mai hong gumsak zahin na thu theihna hong khangsak hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mipilte dahna lakah omtual a, mihaite nopna lakah omtual hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mihaite in pahtawina la hong sak sangin mipilte’ hong taina hoihzaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Mihaite’ nuihna pen meikuang sunga selkeu kikhul a puak zaizai tawh kibang a, khiatna nei lo, a mawknapi ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Mipil khat in midangte a khem ciangin mihai bangin a gamta ahi hi. Sumgolh lakna in a lapa’ gamtat hoihna siasak hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Thu khatpeuh a kipatna sangin a tawpna hoihzaw a, kiphatsakna sangin lungduaina hoihzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Heh pahpah kei in; hehna a haihuai ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 “Bang hangin nidang lai-in hih sangin hoihzaw tham ahi hiam?” ci-in dong kei in. Tua bangte pil thudotna hi lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Pilna pen hauhna zahin hoih a, mihingte a dingin phattuamna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Sum in hong lungmuansak bangin pilna in zong hong lungmuangsak hi. Pilna a manphatna, a pilte a nuntaksak theihna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pasian’ sepsate ngaihsun dih in. Pasian in a kawi-a a bawlsate kua in mamsakkik thei ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Nopna na ngah laitakin lungdam in; haksatna na tuah ciangin hih thu ngaihsun in: Lungdamna le lungkhamna hong piapa pen Pasian hi a, mai lamah bang piang ding cih kuamah in thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ka nuntakna a mawknapi hi a, ahi zongin ka nuntak sungin thu khempeuh ka thei hi. Mi khat hoih napi-in si a, mi khat siahuai napi-in a khansau hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Tua ahih ciangin hoihlua kei inla, lah sia lua kei in. Bang hangin nang kisiasak tawm ding na hi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Gilo lua, hau lua kei in. Bang hangin khansih laizang ding na hi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 A nih tuakin lenkip in. Pasian na zahtak nakleh khat peuhpeuh na zuihna-ah na maa vang ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Khuapi a uk mihing sawm sangin pilna in mi khat hatsak zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 A manin a gamta, a khial ngei het lo, leitungah mi khat zong om het lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mi’ gen khempeuh thudon kei in. Na nasempa’ hong samsiatna na zakha ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nang zong midang na samsiat zelzelna teltakin na kithei hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hihte khempeuh ka pilna tawh ka ze-et a, pil ding ka hahkat hangin kei’ batzawh ding hi lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mihing nuntakna kua in theikhia zo ding ahi hiam? Eite a dingin thuk lua a, telhak lua hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Keimah in pilna siamna ka theih nading, pilna mu-in thupiangte a hang ka theih nadingin nakpitakin hanciamin ka lungsim ka pia a, haina a hoih lohna le a haihuaina ka theikhia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Sihna sangin numei a siahuai zawkna ka theikhia hi. Ama hong piak itna in thang bangin hong tepcip a, ama hong kawina khut in sikkhau bangin hong hencip hi. Pasian’ deihna bangin a gamtate in tua bang numei pelhthei a, ahi zongin a mawh nuamte a thangah a awk uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Thugen siampa in hih bangin ci hi: Thu ka kan ciangin, a banbanin thu ka phawkkhia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 A thudang ka zonzon hangin bangmah ka muzo nawnkei hi. Pasal tulkhat sung pan khat bang bek a pil a omkhak theihna, ahi zongin numei lakah a pil cih bang a om lohna keimah in ka phawkkhia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Keima theihkhiat thu in: Pasian in eite a thuman dingin hong bawl hinapi-in, eite in paulap tuamtuam zongin, i kikai-awksak hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mipilte bek in na a khiatna taktak theithei uh hi. Pilna in mipilte maitaisak a, a hehmai a beisak hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kumpipa’ hong sawl bangin gamta inla, Pasian’ tungah thu mawk ciampak kei in." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kumpipa in a ut peuhpeuh hih thei ahih manin ama kiang panin paikhia in; ama lungkim lohna hih teitei kei in. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kumpipa aana neihna tawh gamta hi. Ama gen bangin gamta in; kuamah in amah nial zo lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ama thu a mangte in haksatna tuakkha lo ding hi. Mipilte in a gamtatna zia le a hun hoih thei uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Na khatpeuh i hih ding ciangin a kilawm hun, le a ngeina man om a, ahi zongin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 A hong piang ding thu i thei kei a, a hong gen thei zong kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 A sih ding a pelhthei, a sih ding hun a phiatthei kuamah om lo hi. Gal a om ciangin gallauna a pelhthei, siatna sungah a lut ciangin a pengthei kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Leitung a gamtatnate ka ngaihsut ciangin hih thute ka mukhia hi. Mi khat in midang tungah vangliatna nei-in, a uk sung mite a gimsak gawp hun a om hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Migilote si-in kivui a, a siat gamtatna khuasunga om mite mah in han panin a ciah ciangun amah a phat veve-na uh ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 A mawhte gim kipia pahpah lo ahih manin mihingte in khialh ding haksa sa lo uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mawhnei khat in zavei dong siatna bawl napi-in a khansau veve hi. Ahi zongin “Pasian a zahtakte a dingin thu khempeuh nuam ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Migilote a dingin thu nuam lo ding a, amaute in Pasian zahtak lo uh ahih manin a nuntak hun uh niliim bangin beipak ding a, khansih ding uh hi,” kici hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ahi zongin hih thugenna a mawknapi ahi hi. Leitung a thupiangte ngaihsun dih in: Khat veivei midikte in migilote’ gimthuak dingteng thuak zawsop a, migilote in midikte’ thaman ngah dingteng ngah zawsop uh hi. Hih thu pen a haivai, a mawkna taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tua ahih ciangin mihing in hih leitungah nuam a sak theih ding adang om lo ahih manin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om ding bek ahi hi. Pasian in hih leitungah nuntak a piak sungteng a sep thaman a ngah theih ding hih bek om hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pil ding hahkatin, leitung a thupiangte ka theih ciangin sun le zanin ihmu lo liangin i om hangin," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pasian’ nasepna i theihzawh lohna ka phawk hi. Mihingte in bangzahin i hahkat hangin kitheikhia zo lo hi. Mipilte in thei a kisak hangun bangmah thei lo uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nakpi takin sauveipi ngaihsunin ka phawk thu in: Mipilte le midikte’ gamtatna a vekpi-in Pasian in uk a, Pasian’ itna hang hizaw hiam, a muhdahna hang hizaw hiam kuamah in thei lo hi. Amau’ mailam thu khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a thumong kibang a, midikte le migilote, mihoihte le misiate, mi siangte le mi ninte, biakna piate le a pia lote, a thutawpna uh a vekpi-in kibang lel hi. Mawhnei pa sangin mihoih pa hamphazaw tuan lo a, thuciamna a bawl lopa sangin a bawl pa hamphazaw tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Mi khempeuh’ thumong kibang kim a, hih pen leitung a thupiang lakah a man het lo khat ahi hi. Mihingte a nuntak laiteng gitlohna le a mawkna thu tawh a lungsim uh kidim a, theihkholh lohin mihingte sipak uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ahi zongin a hing laite a’ ding lametna om thei a, a sisa humpinelkai sangin a hinglai ui hoihzaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 A hing laite in a si ding ahihlam uh thei a, a sisate in bangmah thei nawn lo uh hi. A sisate in thaman bangmah nei nawn lo uh a, amaute kiphawkkha nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Amau a dingin itna, muhdahna, hanciamna cihte om nawn lo a, leitung a om nate khat beek theikha kik nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 An ne-in lungdam inla, zu ne-in lungnuam in. Na gamtatna peuhpeuh Pasian in hoih a sa hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Na puante siangsakin paaksak tawntung inla, na sam gumsak ngei kei in." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Pasian in hih leitungah nang a hong piak, tomkha sung na nuntak laiteng, na it na zi tawh a nuam theithei-in om in. Leitung lungkhamna sungah na lawhtak, tua bek mah hi kha ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Na mai-ah sep ding a om khempeuh, na tha neihzah tawh sem in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na zuat ding sihna gam sungah nasepna le thungaihsutna, pilna le theihna cihte om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Hih leitungah ka phawk dang thu khat in: A taihat mite in tai kidemna-ah zo tawntung lo a, galhang thahatte in gal zo tawntung lo hi. A pilte in an a kham ngah tawntung lo a, a pilte hau tawntung lo hi. Hih theih siamna a neite milian suak tawntung lo hi. Mi khempeuh tungah kamsiatna vive tung hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mihing in ama hun ding thei ngei lo hi. Thangah a awk vasate le ngen-ah a awk ngasate tawh i kibang hi. Lamet loh hun laitak keekin hunsia sungah mihingte i tung hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Thudang khat zong ka mukhia hi: Hih leitungah pilna a hoihna gentehna a hoih khat om hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Mi tawmno bek a omna khua khat om a, a vanglian kumpi khat in tua khua a sim hi. Amah in tua khua umcihin a khuasung luhgawp dingin a ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tua khua sungah a zawng mipil khat om a, ama pilna tawh tua khua a huzo hi. Ahi zongin kuamah in tua mizawng pa phawkkha lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Thahatna sangin pilna hoihzaw ka ci hi; ahi zongin kuamah in mizawngte a pil dingin ngaihsun lo a, mizawngte’ thugen kuamah in thudonin nei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mihai hon lakah gam ukpa in thu a gen lualua sangin mipil pa in damtakin a gen hiathiat ngaihhuai zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Galhiamte sangin pilna hoihzaw a, ahi zongin khialhna khat in a hoih tampi susia thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 A sisa thote in paknamtui bung sungah a om paknamtui uihsak thei a, haitatna themno khat in pilna lianpen susia thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mipilte a manin a gamtat ding a ngeina hi a, mihaite a sia-in a gamtat ding a ngeina ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mihaite lampi-ah a paikawm nangawnin hai tat uh a, a haina uh mi khempeuh theisak uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Nang tungah gam ukpa a heh leh na nasep za taisan pah kei in. Dai tak-a om hithiatna in khialhna lianpi maisak thei hi. 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Hih leitungah a thuman lo gam ukte’ piansak ka muhte: 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mihaite, zalianpi kipia a, mihaute kiniamkoih suk hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Sakol tungah silate tuang a, miliante, sila bangin a khe-un pai uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Gum a tote gum sung mahah kia ding a, mi’ phung a phelsakte gul in tu ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Suang a tokhiate suang mah in liamsak ding a, sing a ekte sing ehna mahah liam ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 I hei mawlnapi-in i tat kei leh nakpitakin sat kul a, ngaihsut masak ding pilhuai zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Gul khimthei napi i khim kei leh a kimanna om tuan lo hi; gul in hong tu veve ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mipilte’ kampauna in pahtawina ngahsak a, mihaite’ kampauna in amau mah siasak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Thugen a kipat ciangun bangtumlo teng tawh kipan pah malam uh a, gitloh vai teng tawh a thugen a khum lel uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Mihaite in thu gengenin ciakciak uh hi. Mailam a thupiang ding kuamah in thei lo a, a sih khit-a thupiang ding a hong gen thei om lo hi."
