Ecclesiastes10:15 A inn zuatna ding lampi a thei lo mihai luate bek, a inn lam zonna-in gim ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 A kumpipa mi’ cih bangbangin gamta lel a, zankhuavak-in zune makai a a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh in lungkhamna thuak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 A kumpipa in lungsim khentatna nei thei a, a makaite in annek tuidawn a hun thei a, amau ki-uk thei-in zu a kham lo makai a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh a hampha gam ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Thadah lua-in a inn vang nangawn a hu nuam lo mipa, a inn keh ding a, a inn nangawn in puklawh ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 An in lung damsak a, zu in lung nuamsak hi. Sum in ahihleh na khempeuh a kicingsak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Na lungsim nangawnah kumpipa gensia kei in. Kuama zak lohna mun na lupna tung nangawnah mihaute samsia kei in. Thopi in na thugen teng na puakkha ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Sumbawl nadingin na sumte zang in. Ni khat ni peuh teh a meet na ngah ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Na sumbuk vante mun sagih-ah ahi a, mun giat-ah ahi zongin khen kawikawi in. Hih leitungah bang thusia hong piang ding cih na theikhol kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Meii sungah tui a tamluat ciangin leitungah guahin hong zusuk a, singkung khatpeuh a puk ciangin a pukna san sanah om paisuak hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Huih le guah ngakin khuahun hoih dong a ngak mi in khaici tuh ngei lo ding a, an zong la ngei lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nupi gai khat sungah nuntakna thak bangci kipat hiam, ci-in na theihzawh loh mah bangin na khempeuh a bawl Pasian’ nasepna na theizo ngei kei ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zingsang a kipan khaici tuh inla, nitak dong mateng khawl kei in. A vekpi-in a po kim ding ahi a, a khat sia-in, a khat a po ding ahi zongin na theihkholh bangmah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Khuavak hoih mahmah a, i mit in nitaang a muh ciangin nuam mahmah hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mi khat sauveipi a nuntak le a nuntak sung nuamtakin om tahen. Sauveipi tak a hing zongin a sih khit hun a sauvei zawkna phawk tahen. Mailamah a lamethuai bangmah a om kei hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Khangnote aw, na khangnona uh nuamsa unla, na khangno lai-un lungdam un. Na hihnop peuhpeuh uh hih unla, na ut bangbangun gamta un. Ahi zongin na gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in Pasian in thu hong khen ding phawk gige un." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Note kilunggimsak kei unla, na pumpi uh gentheisak kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khangno hunsung uh sauvei lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Na lungkham hun ding a hong tun ma, “Nuntak nuamsa kei ing,” na cih ma hun, na khangno lai-in nang hong Piangsak pa phawk in." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Lungkham hun i cih in: Nang a dingin nitaang, khataang, aksi taangte a dialh hun, meiipi kai a then’ nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:3 na muan na suan a thahat na khut, na baan, na khete, a thaneem hun, an hai nadingin na hatang tawmlua ta-in na mit maangin, limtakin khua na muh theih nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 khuasung gamlumnate na bil in za thei nawn loin, ansukna gingte na zak theih phat nawn loh hun, la kisate za thei nawn loin vasa ham nangawn in hong phawnzawh nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 keen sangte-ah pai ngam nawn loin, lam pai ding a haksat hun, na samte hong kangin, na khangno thahatna beita-in na tha a kiam hun ding ahi hi. Eite in a tawntung inn ding a zuan ding ihi a, khuasung lampi-ah kahna awging kiza ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 I ngun meivak khaina a khau kitatin, i kham meivak kia-in kitam ding a, i tuikhaina khau kitatin, i tuikhaina beel kitam ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 I pumpi, lei suakkik ding a, i nuntakna a hong pia Pasian’ kiangah i kha ciahkik ta ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Thugen Siampa in, “A kimanna a om lo, a mawknapi, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Thugen Siampa, mipil ahih banah, amah in ama theihteng mite tungah a hilh hi. Amah in paunakte limtakin sin a, a man ahihna thu hoihtakin entel hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thugen Siampa in a zaknophuai kammal khawm a, ama gelh kammalte a man taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mipilte’ thugente pen tuucingte in tuu hawlna-in a zat ciangkhut hiam tawh kibang hi. Tua thute pen eite khempeuh tuucin bangin a hong Cing Pasian’ piak ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ka ta aw, na phawk ding thudang khat omlai hi. Lai gelhin a bu-a bawlna in bei hun nei thei lo a, lai tam sin luatna in pumpi gimsak hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hih thute khempeuh banah gen ding thu khat bek om hi. Mihing hong kipiansakna a thu bulpi pen in: Pasian zahtakna le a thupiakte manna ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes12:14 A pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh a simthamin i hih simte nangawn i hihna khempeuhah Pasian in thu hong khen ding hi. 
SongOfSongs1:1 Solomon’ la ngaih pente: 
SongOfSongs1:2 Na muk tawh nong tawp a, na hong itna leenggahzu sangin khumzaw hi." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Na omna khempeuh nam vuauvuau a, na min kizaza a, nungak khempeuh in nang hong ngai hi." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Hong kai inla zawltai ni. Ka kumpi hong hi inla, na inn-ah hong ciahpih in. Nang tawh om leeng i lung dam hi; leenggahzu ne-in nuamsa ni. Nang kong ngaihkhak tuahpha ing." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Jerusalem nungakte aw, ka vom hangin ngaihbaang ing. Savun puanbuk bangin ang hiuhiau ing a, Solomon’ puankhaite tawh kei ka kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ka vom manin hong en neu kei un. Nisa ka thuakna hang ahi hi. Ka ute in kei hong gawtbawl uh a, lo hong kuansaksak uh a, ka pumpi ka don man kei hi." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngaihno aw, hong gen dih in. Koi lai-ah na tuu cing ding a, sunin koi lai-ah khawl ding na hi hiam? Bang hangin tuucing dangte lakah nang hong zong kawikawi masa se ding ka hi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Nungak khempeuh lakah a ngaihbaang pen nungak aw, a mun thei lo na hi hiam? Tuuhonte zui-in na keelte hong khah inla, tuucingpa’ puanbuk gei-ah hong cing in." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ngaihno aw, Faro’ sakoltal in sakolpite a delh bangin nang hong kidelh hi." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Na biang tuakah a kaisuk na samphekte ngaihbaang a, suangmanpha bangin na liangko tungah kinga hi." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nangma a dingin kham khainiang bawlin na kizepna ding zong ngun tawh bawl ni. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ka kumpipa a lupna tungah a om laitakin ka paknamtui hong kizel hi. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ka ang-ah ka ngaihno hong lup laitakin myrrh paknamtui bangin namtui viauviau hi. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ka ngaihno pen Engedi gam leenggui lo-ah a palh lihleh pak hoihte tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ngaihno aw, na mel hoih a, na mit zong ngaihbaang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ngaihno ngingei aw, na etlawm a, na ngaihhuai hi." 
SongOfSongs1:17 I lupna mun lopa tung hi ding a, taamtak kungte i inn khuam hi-in, taaksan hiangte i inn tungdap hi ding hi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Kei pen Sharon gam sunga a om gamlak pak, mualkuam sunga a om unok pak bang ka hi lel hi." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Tua bang hi lo a, ka ngaihno pen numei khempeuh lak panin ling lak a a om unok pak tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ka ngaihno tangval dang tawh teh lehang gamlak singkung lak a a om epel kung tawh kibang hi. Ama liimah ka tu nuam a, a gahte lim ka sa hi." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Annekna phualah hong paipih inla, itna mai tawh hong en in." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Lungzuang, duangvul ka hih manin leenggahkeu tawh hong vak inla, epel gah tawh hong thadimsak in." 
SongOfSongs2:6 A veilam baan hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin kei hong kawi hi." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko’ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun sakhi le sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ka ngaihno’ awging ka za hi. Mualtung tawnin hong tai a, mualte kantanin kei hong zuan hi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ka ngaihno sanang tawh kibang a, sakhitalno tawh zong a kibang hi. Ka inn pualam uhah ding a, tawlet-ah hong dak zialin kawmvang panin hong en giau hi." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ka ngaihno in ka kiangah thu hong gen a, “Hong pai in, ngaihno aw, hong zui in, itluat aw." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Phalbi veng ta a, guah zu nawn lo hi." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Gam sung tengah paakte palh a, lasak hun tung ta hi. Gam sung tengah vakhu hamte kiza ta hi." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Theite zong min ta a, leenggah pak gim namtui zong kiza ta hi. Hong pai in, ngaihno aw, hong zui in, itluat aw." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Suangheeng kawma vasa bangin nang na bu niloh hi. A ngaihbaang na mai hong musak inla, a lungzuanhuai na awging hong zasak in." 
SongOfSongs2:15 “I leengguite pak ta ahih manin ngiano hon in a suksiat ma-in tua ngiano honte man ni,” hong ci hi." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ka ngaihno keima a’ hi; kei zong ama a’ hi’ng. Amah in unok paakte lakah a tuu cing a," 
SongOfSongs2:17 nitak huih vot mateng nitak nitum mateng a cing hi. Sanang bangin mualtung a sakhitalno bangin itluat aw, hong paikik in." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Zan sialin ka lup kawmin, ka ngaihno ka lungngaingai a, amah ka zon hangin ka mu zo kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Tho-in khuasung tengah ka vak a, kongzing kawm tengah ka pai kawikawi a, ka ngaihno ka zong a, ka zonzon hangin ka mu zo kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Khuasung cingin a pai kawikawite ka tuak a, “Ka ngaihno na mu uh hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
SongOfSongs3:4 Khuasung cingte tawh ka kikhen khit phetin ka ngaihno tawh ka kimu hi. Amah kawi-in ka lencip a, ka pianna ka nu’ inndei sung, ka nu’ inn dong ka tunpih mateng ka khah kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko’ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun sakhi le sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Myrrh paknamtui le saledi pak namtui a kihel tawh a kibang, sumbuk a paknamtui om khempeuh a kihal khin a khu tawh a kibang, gamlak a hong khuto henhan bang ahi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 En un, Solomon kumpi luai-in hong kizawng! Israel gam sunga om galkap hoihpen galkap sawmguk in amah cing hi." 
SongOfSongs3:8 A vekpi-in namsau zat a siam vive hi a, galdo a siam vive hi khin uh hi. A vekpi-in namsau kuah kim uh a, mi’ hihkhak ding a cing uh hi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Sing hoihpen tawh a kibawl luai-in Kumpi Solomon hong kizawng hi. 
SongOfSongs3:10 A luai khuamte, ngun tawh kizut a, a tungah kham tawh a kizem puan a kilam hi. A tut nadingin puansan kibawl a, a sungah savun kidap hi." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Jerusalem nungakte aw, hong pai unla, Kumpi Solomon en dih ve un. A zi neih ni, a lungdam ni-a, a nu in amah a khuksak Kumpi lukhu hong khu hi." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Itluat aw, na ngaihbaang a, na lu khuhna puan vang panin a ngaihbaang na mit hong tee kelkel hi. Gilead mual tunga keelhon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Na ha pak singsengte zong a mul a kimet khin phet, a kisawpsiang tuute tawh kibang hi. Na ha khat zong tok lo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Na mukte puansan tawh kibang a, na kampau ngaihnop-huai hi. Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Na ngawng pen galhangte’ zat lum tangzang tulkhat a kikhai zeizaina David’ tausang tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs4:5 Na nawite unok pak lakah a ta khawm helhel sanang nih tawh ahi a, a ta khawm hialhial sakhi peeng tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Zingsang huih vot a nun’ mateng, zingsang khuavak hong tun mateng, myrrh paknamtui a omna mualtungah omsuakin, saledi paknamtui lakah ka bual ding hi." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ngaihno aw, na ngaihbaang mahmah a, kawkbaanna ding na nei kei hi." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ka lawm ngaih aw, Lebanon Mual-ah hong pai inla, Lebanon Mual panin kei hong zui in. Humpinelkaite le kamkeite a tenna, Amana Mual dawn panin hong taisuk inla, Senir Mual le Hermon Mual panin hong paisuk in." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, na mit hah in ka lung hong kuai a, na khi awh in ka lungsim hong zo hi." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, nang tawh kingaih nuam mahmah hi. Na itna leenggahzu sangin khumzaw a, na paknamtui paknamtui dang khempeuh sangin namtui zaw hi." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Lawm aw, na muk, khuaizu bangin khum a, na leii, bawngnawi le khuaizu bang hi. Na puante Lebanon Mual tunga paknamtui namkim a nam hi." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Ka lawmnu, ka naunu, a ki-umcip huan hi a, a kinei tuam tuinak ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Tua huan sungah singkungte hoihtakin khang a, mang kawlsing cinna huan tawh kibang hi. Singgah limci pente tua lai-ah gah a, henna leh nard sing namtuite tua lai-ah a po hi." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Nard sing le saffron sing, thalsing le sinnamon kung, a namtui a gah namkim kung po a, myrrh le aloes, a namtui namkim om hi." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Lebanon Mual tung panin tui hong luangsuk a, ciktui luangte, luitui luangte, tua huan sungah a tungsuk hi." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Saklam huih aw, hong nungsuk inla, khanglam huih aw, hong nungto in. Ka huan sungteng hong namtuisak un. Ka ngaihno, ka huanah hong paisak unla, a gah limci pente hong nesak un." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Itluat ka lawmnu aw, ka huansung hong tungzo ing. Ka paknamtuite ka kaikhawm hi. Ka khuaizu le ka khuailuzu ka ne a, ka leenggahzu le ka bawngnawite ka dawn hi. Nungak le tangval aw, na lungkim piikpeek dongun ne-in dawnin nuamsa un." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ka lup hangin ka lungsim ihmu lo a, ka ngaihno in ka kong hong kiuh ka za hi. Itluat ngaihno ka lungtup aw, kei hong tumsak in. Ka lu tungah daingo kia a, meiizun in ka sam kawtsak hi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ka puante suah khinzo ing. Ka puante silhkik ding ka hi hiam? Ka khete sil khinzo ing; ninsakkik ding ka hi hiam? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ka ngaihno in kongkhak hong len khin napi hong taisan kik hi. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ka ngaihno tumsak dingin ka kithawi a, ka khutte myrrh paknamtui tawh ka zut a, ka khutmete myrrh paknamtui ka nuh a, kong a hong dingin a honna ka len hi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ka ngaihno a lutsak dingin kong ka hon a, amah na taikhia khinta hi. Amah a taikhiat manin ka dah lua a, amah ka zon hangin ka mu kei a, amah ka sap hangin hong dawng lo hi." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Khuasung a cing mite tawh ka kituak a, kei hong satin hong liamsak uh a, kulhzang a a kileh den khuacingte in ka puantungsilh hawkkhia uh hi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Kong thum hi, Jerusalem nungakte aw, ka ngaihno na muh uhleh lungzuangin ka sih dekna na gensak un." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nungak lak a a hoihpen aw, na ngaihno a bangci hiam, hong gen dih in. Tua bangin kong gen liang ding uh bangzahtakin lamdang ahi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ka ngaihno a melhoih a, a thahat hi. Mi tul sawm lakah tehpih ding dang om lo hi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 A sam sau-in kil thiuhtheuh a, a sam hoihin vom dikdek a, kham sangin zong deihhuai zaw hi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 A mittangte ahihleh tuisiang phuan lakah a kisil siang kiuhkeuh, luitui luang gei-a a om vahuite tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs5:13 A biangte pen paknamtui a dimin a kithun thawl san kiuhkeuh tawh a kibang hi. A mukte pen myrrh paknamtui tawh a kidim unok pak tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs5:14 A khutte etlawmin hi linlian a, suangmanpha a kiphut zungbuhte a bulh hi. A pumpi pen suangmanpha a kiphut dimdiam saiha pak tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs5:15 A khete pen kham citak a kiphuh dimdiamna suangngo khuamte tawh kibang a, ama duang pen Lebanon mual sang, taamtak kung hoih bangin thupi suak mahmah hi." 
SongOfSongs5:16 A kampaute khum zungzung a, a vekin, deih loh ding khat zong om lo hi. Ka ngaihno, hih bang teng hi, Jerusalem nungakte aw." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Nungak lak a hoihpen nu aw, na ngaihno, koi-ah pai hiam? Na ngaihno koi lam pai hiam? Amah hong zonpih nung." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ka ngaihno, paknamtui kung a pona, a huan sungah pai hi. A huan sungah a tuu cing a, unok paakte a lo hi." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ka ngaihno kei a’ hi a, kei zong ama a’ hi’ng. Amah in unok pak lakah a tuute gamtasak hi." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ngaihno aw, Jerusalem khuapi bangin na etlawm mahmah a, Tirzah khuapi bangin na hoih mahmah a, vantung aksi bangin na deihhuai hi." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Keima lam hong nga kei in. Na mai in hong leng lua hi. Gilead mual tunga keelhon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Na hate zong, a kisil khin phet tuuhon bangin pak singseng hi. A tok khat zong om lo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kumpi-zi sawmguk, kumpi zineu sawmgiat, simzawh lohin nungak tampi om kha ding a," 
SongOfSongs6:9 ahi zongin khat bek ka ngai a, amah pen vahui bangin it-huai hi. Amah pen a nu’ tanu neihsun hi a, a nu’ ta it pen khat ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Zing khuavak tawh a kibang hih nungak kua ahi hiam? Amah melhoih mahmah a, nitaang, khataang, a bang hi." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Kuam sunga om singkungnote a en ding, leengguite a pak nai hiam a en ding, mang kawlsing a pak nai hiam a en dingin singno huanah ka paisuk hi." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Galdo dingin a kipan sakol hawlpa a lin’ bangin nang kong ngaihna hangin ka lingling hi. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in, Shulam numei aw. Nang kong muh theih nadingun hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in. Shulam nungak, khanglui lai-a a lamte bangin bang hangin hong mu nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kumpi mel a pua a ngaihbaang nungak aw, na khete le na khedap kilawm mahmah! Na phei le na tanzumte sing suih siamte’ suih bang hiuhiau!" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Na kalkawm pen leenggahzu lim tawh a kilawi lo hai bangin uk kiukeu hi. Na kawng pen unok pak tawh a ki-um buhlom hen tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Na nawite pen a takhawm helhel sakhi peeng, a omkhawm hialhial sanang nih tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Na ngawng, saiha tausang tawh kibang hi. Na mitte pen Heshbon khuapi kulh gei-a om tuilite tawh kibang hi. Na nak pen Damaskas khuapi lam a nga Lebanon tausang bangin hoih hiuhiau hi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Na lutang pen Karmel Mual bangin kitawito a, na samphekte san hiuhiau a, a etlawmna in kumpipa’ mit la vangvang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Itluat aw na ngaihbaang a, na mel kong muh nuam zungzung hi." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Tuum kung bangin na etlawm a, na nawite pen, nisuh gah a bawk pha mahmah tawh a kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Tuum kung tungah kahto-in a gah ka lo ding hi. Na nawite kei a dingin leenggah bawk tawh kibang a, na gimnam epel min bangin namtui hi." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Na kam, leenggahzu bangin khum zungzung hi. Ka ngaihno tungah leenggahzu khum luang hen la, a muk a ha tawk kim hen." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ka ngaihno a’ ka hi a, amah in kei hong deih hi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ngaihno aw, gamlakah paikhia-in leenggui lo-ah va giak ni." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Zingsangin tho baihin leengguite a sel nai hiam, leengguite a pak nai hiam, mang kawlsing kungte a pak nai hiam, i en ding hi. Tua lai munah kong itna letsong ka hong pia ding hi." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Tua lai-ah zawl-ai kung a namtui gim na za ding a, singgah lim namcin i kong gei-ah a om hi. Ngaihno aw, a gah a lui le a thak nang a dingin na duhduh kong koihsak hi." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ka nu’ sung pana piang ka sanggampa hi lecin kei ka ut hi. Tua hileh, lamkalah hong tuak taleng zong kong tawptawp ding a, kuamah in phamawh sa lo ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Keima pianna ka nu’ inndei sungah nang kong paipih ding a, tua lai-ah nong kawi ding hi. Tua lai-ah leenggahzu lim, mang kawlsing tui, kong tulh ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:3 A veilam khut hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin hong kawi hi." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko’ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Gamlak panin a lawmpa tawh khut kilensa-in a hong paikhia kua ahi hiam? Nangmah na pianna mun, na nu in hong neihna mun, epel kung nuai panin nang kong phong hi." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Kei simloh kuamah ngai kei inla, kei simloh kuamah kawi kei in. Itna zong sihna zahin thahat a, ngaihna zong sihna zahin khauh hi. Itna, mei bangin kuangkhia a, meikuang lianpen a suak hi." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Tui tampi nangawn tawh kisumit zo lo a, tui sungah i phumcip hangin mitzo tuan lo hi. Mi khat in a neihsa sum khempeuh tawh itna a lei dingin hong kithawi leh kinuihsan lel ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Sanggam numeino khat ka nei uh a, a nawite neu mahmah hi. Tangval khat in hong hel zenzen leh ka sanggamnu uh bangci huh ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Amah khua umna kulh hileh, ngun kibawl tausang tawh ka hu ding uh a, amah kulhkongpi hileh, taamtak singpekte tawh ka dal ding uh hi." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Kei, khuakulh ka hi a, ka nawite, a tausang ahi hi. Limtakin kei hong kihutna ka ngaihno in thei ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Baalhamon a kici munah Solomon in leenggui lo khat a nei hi. Amah in tua lo a kho dingin losapte sawl a, a lo-a piangte’ man dingin losapte khat in ngun dangka tulkhat ciat a piak ding uh ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Keimah in keima aituam leenggui lo khat ka nei hi. Solomon aw, na ngun dangka tulkhat la inla, lokhote’ tungah amau’ tanh ding a zah nih pia in." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Huan sunga om ka ngaihno aw, ka lawmte in hong ngai dide ahih manin nangma aw zong, hong gingsak dih in." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Ka ngaihno aw, sanang bangin, paknamtui kung a pona mun mualtung a om sakhitalno bangin kei kiangah hong pai in." 
Isaiah1:1 Judah gam kumpi ahi Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, le Hezekiah-te’ hun lai-in Amoz’ tapa Isaiah in Judah gam le Jerusalem khua tawh kisai a maangmuhnate:" 
Isaiah1:2 Vantungte aw, na za un; leitung aw, na ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu hong gen khinzo a, “Ka pattahsa ka tate in kei hong lehdo uh hi." 
Isaiah1:3 Bawng in amah a nei pa thei a, la in zong a topa’ an piakna mun thei buang hi. Ahih hangin Israel in bangmah thei lo a, keima mite in thei thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:4 Ah, a khial minam, mawhna in a nencip mite, siatna a bawlte’ suanlekhakte, a gamtatsia tapate! Amaute in Topa nusia khin uh a, amaute in Israel-te’ Siangtho Pasian simmawh khin uh hi. Amaute in lam khial khin taktak uh hi." 
Isaiah1:5 Bang hangin note hong kisat theih nadingin lehdo teitei na hi uh hiam? Israel aw, na lutang khempeuh liamma dim a, na lungsim le na ngaihsutna gim mahmah hi." 
Isaiah1:6 Khenuai a kipan luzang dong nangawnin a cidamna mun om lo a, sanim gawpnate, meimapite, le siluang liammate a om hi. Tuate pen a nai kisal lo, kitun lo, sathau tawh zong kinomsak lo hi." 
Isaiah1:7 Na gam uh khing a, na khuapite uh mei tawh kihal hi. Na muh tangpi mahun gamdang mite in na gam uh hong laksakin na khempeuh susia gawp hi." 
Isaiah1:8 Jerusalem khuapi bek omlai a, leenggui lo-a buk, tangmai lo sunga om hampheng bangin kuama don lohin kinusia a, a ki-umcip khuapi bangin kinusia hi." 
Isaiah1:9 Vanglian Topa in eite tawmno khat a nungta-in hong siit hikeileh, eite pen Sodom khua bang khinin Gomorrah khua i bang khinta ding hi." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom a uk mangte aw, Topa ’ thu na za un! No Gomorrah mite aw, i Pasian’ hihna na ngai un!" 
Isaiah1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note’ biakpiakna a tampite pen kei’ tungah bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Tuutalte le ganhing thaute’ sathau tawh meihal biaknate ka kham ta hi. Bawngtalte, tuunote, le keelte’ si tawh kei ka lungkim kei hi." 
Isaiah1:12 Kei’ mai-ah a kilaak dingin na hong pai uh ciangin hih bangin ka huangsung na tuatcil gawpna uh kua’n hong deih ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah1:13 Bangmahin a kimang lo piaknate hong paipih nawn kei un. Paknamtui halna ka kih hi. Khadet ni, Sabbath ni, le thupi takin na kikhopnate uh mawhna tawh kidim ahih manin ke’n ka thuakzo kei hi." 
Isaiah1:14 Note’ Khadet nite le na pawite uh ka mudah hi. Tuate pen kei a dingin vangikpi khat suakkhin a, tuate khempeuh ka puakna-in ka gim hi." 
Isaiah1:15 “Thungenin na khutte uh nong zaak uh ciangin note kong en kei ding a, thu tampi na nget uh hangin ke’n ka ngai tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sisan tawh note’ khut kidim hi." 
Isaiah1:16 Note kisil tawm unla, a siangtho-in kibawl un. Keima muhna-ah na gamtat siatnate uh paikhia-in, siatna na bawlte uh khawl un." 
Isaiah1:17 Gamtat hoih ding kisin un. Thumanin gamta unla, kinetniamna kheel un. Pa nei lote hu unla, meigong numei panpih un,” ci hi." 
Isaiah1:18 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu-in hong pai unla, thu kikumkhawm ni. Na mawhnate uh puansan a bat hangin vuk bangin hong ngo ding hi. Na mawhnate uh si bangin a san hangin tuumul bangin hong kang ding hi." 
Isaiah1:19 Note in utna lungsim nei-in thu na man’ nak-uhleh lei pana piang a gah hoihte na ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah1:20 Ahih hangin note in kei hong nialin na hong lehdo uhleh namsau in note hong vatmai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:21 A thutak, thutang tawh a kidim ngeisa khuapi, bangci-a a paktat numei tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Ama sungah thumanna om ngei napi-in tu-in mi thatte bek a om ta hi." 
Isaiah1:22 Jerusalem khuapi aw, nguntang na bang ngei a, tu-in ahihleh ngun-ek na suakta hi. Leenggahzu limci na bang ngei a, tu-in ahihleh tui mawkmawk na bangta hi." 
Isaiah1:23 Na uliante, mi lehdote hi a, gutate tawh a kikhawlte ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in sumgolh le letsong a deih uh hi. Amaute in pa nei lote panpih lo uh a, meigongnu’ thu amaute in sang lo uh hi." 
Isaiah1:24 Tua ahih ciangin, Topa, Vanglian Topa, Israel-te’ Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Ah, ka lang ahi note’ tungah ka hehna kong khahkhia ding a, ka gal ahi note tungah keimah in kong thuk ding hi." 
Isaiah1:25 Note tungah na kong sem ding a, meikhukah haltui bangin na saam-ek teng uh tuikhia sakin, na kihelpih na nin khempeuh uh ka lakhia ding hi." 
Isaiah1:26 A masa-a bangin na thukhente, a kipat cil-a bangin na upate ka koihkik ding hi. Tua khit ciangin nang pen thuman khuapi, thutak khuapi, hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:27 Topa thutang ahih manin Jerusalem khuapi honkhia ding a, a sungah a teng a kisik mi khempeuh zong a honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah1:28 Ahih hangin a lehdo mite le a khial mite kisusia khawmin Topa a nusiate pen kibeimangsak ding hi. 
Isaiah1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tawsaw kungte na biakna hangun note na maizum ding uh a, biakna huan na bawlna hangun zahhuai-in na mai uh san ding hi." 
Isaiah1:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen a teh a vul tawsaw kung le tui a ngah lo huan tawh na kibang ding uh hi. 
Isaiah1:31 A thahat mipa pen patlom tawh kibang ding a, ama nasepna pen mei-ek suak ding hi. Kuamah in phelhzo loin amau tegel kangtum khawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:1 Judah gam le Jerusalem tawh kisai thu Amoz’ tapa Isaiah’ muhna hih bang ahi hi: 
Isaiah2:2 Nidang ciangin Topa ’ inn a omna mual pen mual liante lakah a sangpenin kikipsak ding a, mual neute tungah kisangsak ding hi. Tua lai-ah minam khempeuh pai muamua ding uh a," 
Isaiah2:3 mi tampite hong pai-in, “Hong pai un, amah in ama zialetongte hong hilh theih nading le ama lampite i zuih theih nadingin Jakob’ Pasian’ inn, Topa ’ mualah paito ni,” a ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion panin thu hong gen ding a, Jerusalem khua panin Topa ’ thuhilhna hong paikhia ding hi." 
Isaiah2:4 Amah in minamte khatlekhat kikalah thu khenin, mi tampite’ thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in a seek ding uh hi. Minam khat le minam khat kido nawn lo ding uh a, galdo dingin kithawi nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:5 Jakob’ suanlekhakte aw, hong pai un; Topa ’ khuavak sungah gamta ni." 
Isaiah2:6 Amaute pen nisuahna lam gam a om khongkhaite le Filistia mite bangin aisante tawh kidim uh a, gamdang mite’ ngeina zui uh ahih manin Jakob suanlekhak, na mite nang na nial hi." 
Isaiah2:7 Amau’ gamah ngun le kham kidim a, amau’ sumte in bei hun cih nei lo hi. Amau’ gam pen sakolte tawh kidim a, amau’ leengte in bei hun cih nei lo hi." 
Isaiah2:8 Amau’ gam sung milimte tawh kidim a, amau’ khut tawh a bawlsate uh amaute in a bia uh hi." 
Isaiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin mite kiniamkhiat sukin, mite a niamin kikoih suk hi. Amaute’ mawhna maisak kei in." 
Isaiah2:10 Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sungah lut unla, leihawm sungah bu un." 
Isaiah2:11 Mite’ kiliatsakna pen kiniam koih ding a, mihingte’ kiphatsakna pen kiniamkhiat ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah2:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in a kiphasak le a kiliansak khempeuh, a kisangsak le a sangte khempeuh;" 
Isaiah2:13 a sang, a kilaamto, Lebanon mual taamtak kung khempeuh, Bashan mual tawsaw kung khempeuh;" 
Isaiah2:14 a lian mual sang khempeuh le a sang mualneu khempeuh; 
Isaiah2:15 tausang khempeuh le a muanhuai kulhte khempeuh; 
Isaiah2:16 Tarshish teembaw khempeuh le teembaw hoih khempeuh a niamkoih hun ding ni khat a nei hi. 
Isaiah2:17 Mite’ kiliatsakna kiniamkhiat ding a, mite’ kiphatsakna a niamin kikoihsuk ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah2:18 Milimte khempeuh mangthang khin ding hi. 
Isaiah2:19 Leitung a lingsakgawp dingin Topa a kipat ciangin amah kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sung le leihawm sungah mite bu ding uh hi. 
Isaiah2:20 Amah pen leitung a lingsakgawp dingin a hong kipat hun ciangin Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna vang panin suanghawmpite sung le keenhawmte sungah a buk theih nadingun amau’ bawltawm ngun le kham milimte, buite le bakte a paih ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:21  
Isaiah2:22 Mihingte muanin nei nawn kei un. Amaute leltak banga simtham ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah3:1 Topa, Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem khua le Judah gam panin nuntakna le luhinna, nuntakna an khempeuh le nuntakna tui khempeuh;" 
Isaiah3:2 mi vanglian pa le galkap pa, thukhen pa le kamsang pa, aisan pa le upa pa," 
Isaiah3:3 mi sawmnga a ukpa le zalian a nei pa, thu lamlak pa le mitphial siampa, le bum siamte a lakhia hi." 
Isaiah3:4 Amaute’ ulian dingin naupangte ka bawl ding a, naungekte in amaute uk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:5 Mite khatlekhat, mi khempeuh in a lawmte ciat, mi khempeuh in a vengte ciat, hihgawp ding uh hi. Khangnote pen uhamte tungah, mi ginalote pen miliante tungah kiphasak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:6 Mi khat in ama pa inn sungah a sanggampa lenin, “Nang in puan na nei hi; nang, kote’ makai pa nong hi ding a, hih a sialomtangte pen nangma khutsung hi ding hi,” a cih ciangin amah in," 
Isaiah3:7 “Bangmah hihzo kei ning. Ka inn sungah an le puan om lo hi. Mite a makai-in nong bawl kei ding hi,” ci-in a genkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah3:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute khempeuh le amau’ gamtatnate in Topa langpangin amah dem uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua kipukin Judah gam kia hi. 
Isaiah3:9 Amau’ maiput in amau’ langah teci pang hi. Sodom bangin amaute a langtangin gamta uh a, amaute in im lo uh hi. Amaute in gimna ngah ta hen! Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau’ tung mahah siatna kitun uh hi." 
Isaiah3:10 Amaute tungah thu hoih ding hi, ci-in thuman mite kiangah hih thu gen un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau’ gamtat hoih thaman ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:11 Migilo in gimna ngah ta hen! Midang tungah a gitloh gamtatna tawh kizui-in ama tungah kithukkik ding ahih manin ama tungah thu sia ding hi. 
Isaiah3:12 Keima mite ahihleh naupangte in bawlsia uh a, numeite in zong uk uh hi. Ka mite aw, na makaite un note lam hong lakkhial a, note’ lampi zuih pen hong siasak hi." 
Isaiah3:13 Topa in thupang dingin ama panmun hong la a, ama mite’ thu a khen dingin a ding hi." 
Isaiah3:14 Topa pen upate le ama mite’ uliante tawh thukhen dingin kipan a, “Leenggui lo a netumte, note na hi uh a, mizawngte’ na a kisutte note’ inn sungah om hi." 
Isaiah3:15 Ka mite sucipin mizawngte na gawina uh bang na cihnopna uh a hiam?” Vanglian Topa Pasian in ci hi. 
Isaiah3:16 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem numeite kiphasakin ngawng doksa-in lam pai uh a, kiphatsakna tawh a mit uh hei pampamin hi tuihtuihin lam pai uh a, a khe uh gingsak sualsual ahih ciangun" 
Isaiah3:17 Topa in Jerusalem numeite’ lutang meima sakin Topa in amau’ lutang kolhsak ding hi. 
Isaiah3:18 Tua ciangin Topa in khebuh hoihte, lutuam le khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate;" 
Isaiah3:19 bilbah tualte, taaute, le mai sitnate;" 
Isaiah3:20 lukhute, banbulhte, kawngtente, paknamtui bungte, le a kivom aite;" 
Isaiah3:21 min gelhna zungbuhte le nakbuhte; 
Isaiah3:22 pawipuante, puanza neute, puanpite le khutkhai ipte;" 
Isaiah3:23 puanza neu vang siseihte, saihadial puansungsilhte, dialkhipte, le kikhuhna puante lakhia ding hi." 
Isaiah3:24 Paknamtui tangin uihna, kawnggak tangin khauhualpi, limtak a kizem sam tangin lu kolhna, puan hoih tangin puanhampi, melhoihna tangin maizumna hun hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah3:25 Na mite, namsau tawh si ding uh a, a vanglian na mite, gal sungah kisia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:26 Khuapi kongpi tau-in thum ding hi. Khuapi, gamkhing suak ding a, a guaktanga om nupi leilakah a tucip tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah4:1 Tua ni ciangin nupi sagih in papi khat neikhawm ding uh a, “Kote in komau’ an ciat ne-in, komau’ puan ciat mah ka silh ding uh hi. Kote pen, nangma zi cih min bek hong puasak in; ka minsiatna teng uh hong hum in,” ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah4:2 Tua ni ciangin Topa ’ bulsel pen melhoihin minthang ding a, leitung panin a piang gahte pen, a suakta lai Israel mite’ kiphatsakna le minthanna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah4:3 Topa in thukhenna le meihalna tawh Zion mite’ mawhna teng siangsakin, Jerusalem khuasung panin mi thahna teng a beisak ciangin Zion-ah a omlai mi, Jerusalem-ah khang tawntungin a om dingin a kiciamtehsa mite khempeuh, a siangtho kici ding hi." 
Isaiah4:4  
Isaiah4:5 Tua ciangin Zion Mual tung, tua lai-a kikhawm mi khempeuh tungah, sunin meii sungah, zanin meikuang khu tawh Topa hong kilang ding a, Topa ’ minthanna vang in khuapi hu ding hi." 
Isaiah4:6 Tua minthanna vang pen sun ciangin nisa a liah ding le huihpi guahpi panin bukna le belhna zong hi ding hi. 
Isaiah5:1 Ka lawm it pa’ tangin a leenggui lo a itna la ke’n hong sa ning: Ka lawm it pa in leitang a hoih mahmahna mualtung khatah leenggui lo khat a nei hi. 
Isaiah5:2 Amah in lei to-in a suangte paikhia a, leenggui hoihte a suan hi. A laizangah tausang khat lam a, tua lo sungah leenggahsukna khuk khat a to hi. Amah in leenggah hoih a hong gah ding lamen a, ahih hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk hi." 
Isaiah5:3 Tu-in, Jerusalem khua-ah a tengte le Judah mite aw, kei le ka leenggui lo kikalah thu nong khenna ding uh ka hong thum hi." 
Isaiah5:4 Ka leenggui lo a dingin ka hih nai loh ka hih ding a kilawm bang omlai ahi hiam? Leenggah hoih gah ding ka lamet laitakin bang hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk ahi hiam? 
Isaiah5:5 Tu-in, ka leenggui lo tungah ka hih ding thu note tungah kong gen ding hi. A daai ka lakhia ding a, kinemang ding hi. A gawl ka susia ding a, kituancil ding hi." 
Isaiah5:6 Lokhulin ka bawl ding hi. Kipuah loin, kikho lo ding a, tua lo sungah lingkung le lingte a khang ding hi. Ama tungah meiite in zong guah a zuksak loh nadingin thu ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah5:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa ’ leenggui lo pen Israel mite hi a, Judah mite pen lungdamna tawh a suan kungte ahi hi. Amah in thutang lamen a, ahih hangin sisan luanna om hi. Thumanna lamen a, ahih hangin kahna om hi." 
Isaiah5:8 Leitang tungah amau guak a teng ding dong zahin midangte a dingin mun khempeuh a bei matengin inn khatlekhat, lo khatlekhat gawmin a la thuah tawntung mite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah5:9 Vanglian Topa in ka zakna-ah hih bangin kiciam a, “A mantakin inn tampi tak hawmsuak ding a, a lian a hoih innte-ah a teng om lo ding hi." 
Isaiah5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lo eka sawm in phelpi khat dim bek gah ding a, khaici beem khat in an seu khat bek piangsak ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah5:11 Zingsang tungin tho-in, khamtheihzu delhin, leenggahzu in amaute a satsak pialpual matengin nitakin a tutkho mite in gimna ngah ta hen!" 
Isaiah5:12 Amaute in a pawi sung uhah laiza lasakna le harp lasakna, khuang, tamngai, le leenggahzu, tampi a nei uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Topa ’ sepnate don lo uh a, a khut tawh a bawlte zong mu lo uh hi." 
Isaiah5:13 Tua hi a, thu theih lohna hangin ka mite sal suak uh hi. A miliante uh gilkialin si dek uh a, a mihonte uh dangtakin keu uh hi." 
Isaiah5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Leinuai in a duhna khangsakin bangmah tawh a kiteh thei lo zahin a kam ka beba a, Jerusalem’ hoihna teng, a mipite, a mihonte, ama sunga a lungdam mite, a nawmvalh hi." 
Isaiah5:15 Mi khempeuh a niamin kikoih suk hi. A kiphasak mite kiniamkhiat suk hi. 
Isaiah5:16 Ahih hangin thutang sepna tawh Vanglian Topa in a liatna hong kilangsak a, a Siangtho Pasian in a mite a thukhenna tawh ama sianthona hong kilangsak hi." 
Isaiah5:17 Tua ciangin tuunote in amau’ tatna gamlak mun bangin tua khua sungah lopa ne ding uh a, a thau ganhingte le keelnote a siasa khuapi sungah gamta ding uh hi." 
Isaiah5:18 Amaute in, “I muh theih nadingin amah manlang sakin, ama nasep khawlsak ni. Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ deihna i theih theih nadingin naisakin tungsak ni!” ci-in ganhing kaih bangin khauzen tawh mawhna kai-in, khauhualpi tawh khialhna kai uh ahih manin gimna ngah ta uh hen." 
Isaiah5:19  
Isaiah5:20 A phate sia ci-in, a siate pha ci a, khuavak dingin khuamial koihin, khuamial dingin khuavak koih a, a khum dingin a kha koihin, a kha dingin a khum a koihte in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah5:21 Amau’ mitah pil kisa a, amau’ muhna-ah siam a kisate in gimna ngah ta hen!" 
Isaiah5:22 Leenggahzu tampi a dawnte, khamtheih zunek a hatte," 
Isaiah5:23 mimawhte sumgolh tawh khah a, midikte a mawhsakte in gimna ngah ta hen!" 
Isaiah5:24 Tua ahih ciangin mei in buhkung keute kangtum a, meikuang sungah lopa keute a kattum bangin amaute’ zung pen muatgawp ding a, amaute’ pakpalhte leivui bangin vanah leengto ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Vanglian Topa ’ thu nialin Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ thu a simmawh uh hi." 
Isaiah5:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa ’ hehna ama mite tungah hong khangin, a khut zanin amaute vatgawp a, mualte a kiling hi. Amaute’ luanghawmte kongzing lampite-ah nin bangin a om hi. Hih bang teng hangin zong a hehna damzo nai loin ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah5:26 Amah in a gamlapi-a om minam khat a sapna-in lim khat lak a, leimong panin hong pai nadingin a sam hi. Manlang takin tua mite hong pai pah hi." 
Isaiah5:27 Tua a hong pai mite kuamah gim lo uh a, kuamah tuk lo uh hi. Kuamah lusu lo a, kuamah ihmu lo uh hi. Dialkaih khat zong kol lo a, khedap khau khat zong kitat lo hi." 
Isaiah5:28 Amau’ thaltangte hiam a, a thal khempeuh uh a kikeeksa ahi hi. Amau’ sakolte’ khecinte meisuang bangin sak a, a leengpeite uh pingpei bangin manlang hi." 
Isaiah5:29 Amaute’ kikona pen humpinelkai hawk bang a, humpinelkai khanglaite bangin amaute a hawk uh hi. Amaute humhamin a sa nek ding uh man uh a, amaute in puakhia-in kuamah in honkhia zo lo hi." 
Isaiah5:30 Tua ni ciangin amaute in tuipi ging bangin Israel ngik ding uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in hih gam sung en leh khuamial le lungzinna bek om a, meiite in khua a mialsak hi." 
Isaiah6:1 Kumpi Uzziah a sih kumin, a sang mahmah, a lian kumpi tokhom tungah Topa a tu ka mu hi. Ama kumpi puanpi pen biakinn sungteng a dim hi." 
Isaiah6:2 Ama kiimah serafim van mite a ding uh hi. Tuate in kha guk ciat nei uh hi; nih tawh a mai liahin, nih tawh a khe tuamin, nih tawh a leeng uh hi." 
Isaiah6:3 Amaute khatlekhat kisamin: “Vanglian Topa, siangtho, siangtho, siangtho; leitung khempeuh ama minthanna tawh kidim,” ci-in awng uh hi." 
Isaiah6:4 Tua kikona aw in biakinn kongkhak khuam bulpite kilingsak a, inn sungteng meikhu tawh a kidim hi." 
Isaiah6:5 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Gim ngah pa hi ta ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawknapi ka hi hi; ka kama ka thugen khempeuh a mawkna vive hi a, a thugen khempeuh uh mawhna le nitna ahi mite lakah ka tengkha hi. Vanglian Topa, Kumpipa ka mukha khinta hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah6:6 Tua ciangin serafim van mite khat, biakna tau panin taiteh tawh a teh mei-am khat a khutah tawi-in keima kiangah hong leeng hi." 
Isaiah6:7 Amah in ka muk hong bi a, “En in, hih in na muk sukha zo hi; na mawhna beita a, na khialhna kimaisak zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:8 Tua ciangin, “Kua sawl ding a, eite a dingin kua va pai ding ahi hiam?” Topa’ cihna aw ka za hi. Tua ciangin ke’n, “Hih lai-ah kei om ing! Kei hong sawl in,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah6:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai inla, hih mite tungah, ‘Zaza napi tel lo; mumu napi thei lo,’ va ci in." 
Isaiah6:10 Amaute in a mit uh tawh a muh loh nading, a bil uh tawh a zak loh nading, a lungsim uh tawh thu a theihtel loh nading, amaute kihei-in damna a ngah loh nadingun hih mite’ lungsim mawlsak inla, amau’ bil uh ngongsak inla, a mit uh va sisak in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:11 Tua ciangin keimah in, “ Topa aw, bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. Amah in, “Khuapi-ah a teng kuamah om loin hawm suakin, innte-ah kuamah om loin, leitang pen gamkhing suak kiuhkeuhin," 
Isaiah6:12 Topa in gamlapi-ah mite khinkhia-in, leitungah a kinusia mun tampi a om dong, hi ding hi." 
Isaiah6:13 Mi sawm ah khat bang a omlai tei hangin, taak kung le tawsaw kungte a kiphuk khit ciangin a bulsum a omlaite mei tawh a kihalkik bangin amaute zong kisusia ding hi,” hong ci hi. (A bulsum pen Pasian’ mite a kipatthakna ding lahna lim ahi hi.)" 
Isaiah7:1 Uzziah’ tapa Jotham, Jotham’ tapa Ahaz ahi Judah kumpipa’ hun laitakin, Syria kumpipa Rezin le Remaliah’ tapa Pekah ahi Israel kumpipa, Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin kuanto uh a, ahih hangin amaute in zo zo lo uh hi." 
Isaiah7:2 “Syria-te pen Efraim mite tawh kikop,” ci-in David’ innkuante tungah a kigen ciangin, huih in gamlak a singte a mut bangin amah le a mihingte’ lungsim kiling hi." 
Isaiah7:3 Topa in Isaiah tungah, “Ahaz tawh kimu dingin Puansawppa’ nasepna phual zuatna lampi kiangah a om, bual tungnung tuilakna mongah nang le na tapa Shearjashub pai-in" 
Isaiah7:4 ama tungah, ‘Kidawm inla, om khinkhian in. Lau kei in. Syria kumpipa Rezin le Remaliah’ tapa’ hehna pen, sing tumbang nih a khute tawh kibang lel ahih manin na lung gimsak kei in." 
Isaiah7:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpi a kipan Remaliah’ tapa le Efraim mite in nang hong sawm uh a," 
Isaiah7:6 “Judah gam a sim dingin pai-in va sugawp ni; eima a dingin va zo ni; tua gamah kumpi dingin Tabeel’ tapa va koih ni,” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah7:7 Ahi zongin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Tua thu pen kip lo ding a, hong tung lo ding hi." 
Isaiah7:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria’ lutang, Damaskas khuapi hi a, Damaskas’ lutang, Rezin ahi hi. (Kum sawmguk le kum nga sungin minam ahizo nawn lo zah dongin Efraim kitamzan gawp ding hi.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Efraim’ lutang, Samaria hi a, Samaria’ lutang, Remaliah’ tapa ahi hi. Hih thu upna kho na neih kei leh, nang na kip kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah7:10 Topa in Ahaz kiangah thu genkik a," 
Isaiah7:11 “ Topa na Pasian kiang panin lim khat ngen inla, a thuk Leinuai pan ahi a, a sang vantung panin ahi zongin ngen in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahih hangin Ahaz in, “Ka ngen kei ding hi; Topa ka ze-et kei ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah7:13 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “David’ innkuan aw, ngai un! Mite na lunggim sakna uh kicing sa lo a, ka Pasian zong lunggimsak lai na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah7:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa mahmah in note tungah lim khat hong pia ding hi. En un, nungak khat gai-in tapa khat nei ding a, ama min Immanuel kici ding hi." 
Isaiah7:15 Amah in a hoih lote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ciangin bawngnawi thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding hi. 
Isaiah7:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang in a hoih lote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ma-in na kihtak uh kumpi nihte’ gam kinusiacip ding hi. 
Isaiah7:17 Efraim mite pen Judah mite’ kiang panin a paikhiat hun a kipan nidangin a piang ngei lo thu, Assiria kumpipa pen nang le na mite le na pate’ inn-ah Topa in hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah7:18 “Tua ni ciangin Egypt luite’ nakah a om Egypt mite, thopi hon bangin hong pai nading le Assiria mite, a gam panun khuaipi hon bangin hong pai nadingun Topa in sam ding hi." 
Isaiah7:19 Tuate khempeuh hong pai-in, keenhawmte sung, suangpi heengte sung, lingkung kawmte, le ganhing tatna mun khempeuhah dim ding uh hi." 
Isaiah7:20 “Tua ni ciangin Topa in Gun gal khat panin a kikawm temta ahi Assiria kumpipa tawh sam le khemul mettol ding a, khamul zong metkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah7:21 “Tua ni ciangin mi khat in bawngla khat le tuu nih bang bek suahtakzo ding a," 
Isaiah7:22 ahi zongin tuate in nawi tampi a piakna hangin amah in bawngnawi thaukhal ne zo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah a omlai mi khempeuh in bawngnawi thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah7:23 “Tua ni ciangin nguntang tulkhat a man leenggui tulkhat a omna mun khempeuh pen lingkungte le lingte’ omna suak ding hi. 
Isaiah7:24 Gam khempeuh lingkungte le lingte tawh kidim ding ahih manin, thal le thaltangte tawh tua munah mihingte gam vak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah7:25 Lingkungte le lingte na kihtakna hangin tupeek tawh a kikho ngei mual neute-ah na pai ngam kei ding hi. Tua munte pen bawng khahna le tuute’ gamtatna mun suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Suangpek lianpi khat la inla, tua tungah mihingte’ theihkim lai tawh, ‘Mahershalahashbaz,’ ci-in gelh in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:2 Hih thu a thei dingin a muanhuai teci, siampi ahi Uriah le Jeberekhiah’ tapa Zekhariah ka nei hi, hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:3 Tua ciangin ka zi tawh ka lumkhawm a, amah gai-in tapa khat hong nei hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ka tungah, “Ama min pen Mahershalahashbaz, ci-in phuak in." 
Isaiah8:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh naungek in, ‘Nu aw, pa aw,’ a cih theih ma-in Damaskas khua’ hauhna le Samaria khuasunga a om a kisut vante, Assiria kumpipa in la-in masuan ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:5 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik leuleu a," 
Isaiah8:6 “Hih mite in damtakin a luang didi Shiloah tuite nial uh a, Rezin le Remaliah’ tapa’ mai-ah launa tawh lingliang uh hi." 
Isaiah8:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa le ama galkap honpite, a tam mahmah a piau dimletin a khang Gunpi tui bangin amaute a sim dingin hong luangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah8:8 Judah gam dong hong nawtsuk ding a, dimletin paisuakin, ngawng ciang dong tum ding hi,” hong ci hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in eite hong ompih a, a kizal ama khate in i gam hong hu ding hi." 
Isaiah8:9 No minam dangte aw, thei unla, lungkham un. Gamlapi-ah a om gamte khempeuh aw, ngai un. Kigalging un; ahih hangin lungkiatna na thuak veve ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:10 Note kikhawmin thu na vaihawm uh hangin a mawkna suak ding a, thu khat peuhpeuh na gen uh hangin kip lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote tawh Pasian hong omkhawm hi." 
Isaiah8:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama vangliatna tawh kei tungah thu hong gen a, hih mite’ lampi ka zuih loh nadingin hong hilhkhol a," 
Isaiah8:12 “Hih mite’ vaihawmna pawlpih kei un. Amau’ kihtakte kihta kei unla, lau kei un." 
Isaiah8:13 Ahih hangin Vanglian Topa pen a siangtho-in na ngaihsun ding uh hi. Amah pen note’ zahtak pa le note’ kihtak pa na hisak ding uh hi. 
Isaiah8:14 Amah pen, a lamdang mahmahin a siangtho’ luatna hangin mite’ puktheihna ding suangtum tawh kibang hi. Judah le Israel kumpi gammite le Jerusalem khua-a a teng mite a awkna ding thangzak tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah8:15 Mi tampi tak tuk ding uh hi. Amaute tukin kitamzan gawp ding uh a, amaute awkin kiman ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:16 Ka nungzuite aw, Pasian in kei tungah hong piak hih thute, limtakin kemin koihcing un." 
Isaiah8:17 Jakob’ innkuante’ kiang panin a maitang a seel Topa ngakin amah ka muang ding hi. 
Isaiah8:18 En un, Topa in kei hong piak ka tate le keima pumpi pen Zion Mual tungah a teng Vanglian Topa ’ tung panin Israel mite’ sungah lim le kihilna ka hi uh hi." 
Isaiah8:19 Amaute in note kiangah, “Phun suausuau-in a pau mualmual vankah theite le aisan theite kiangah thu dong un. Mite in amau’ pasian-te thu dongin, mihingte’ thu pen misite dot ding mah hi lo ahi hiam?” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:20 Tua ciangin note in, “ Topa in note hong hilh thute ngai un. Aisante’ thu ngai kei un. Amaute’ hong gen thute a kimanna om lo hi,” ci-in dawng un." 
Isaiah8:21 Mite pen gam sungah vak kawikawi-in, nakpitakin lungkhamin gilkial ding uh hi. A gil uh a kial ciangin amaute lungham gawp ding uh a, a kumpipa uh le a Pasian uh hamsiatin vandak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:22 Amaute in leilak a etsuk hangun, lungkhamna le khuamialna, lungzinga gimna bek om hi. Khuamial ngeungau sungah amaute kihawlkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah9:1 Zebulun minamte le Naftali minamte’ tenna gamte in mindaina thuak ngei uh a, ahi zongin mai lamah pahtawina ngahkik ding uh hi. Mediterranean tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam Jordan gun gal, minam dangte’ tenna Galilee gam sung minthang kik ding hi." 
Isaiah9:2 Khuamial sunga a pai mite in khuavak lianpi mu khinta a, khuamial thukna gam sungah a teng mite tungah khuavak taang khinzo hi." 
Isaiah9:3 Nangmah in amaute na pungsak a, a lungdamna uh na khangsak hi. Anlak hun ciangin lungdamna le mite in vankisutte a hawm ciangun a lungdam bangun nangma mai-ah amaute lungdam uh hi." 
Isaiah9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-te a kizawh ni-a bangin nangmah in amau’ vangik puakna hakkol le amaute a kisatna ciangkhut na kuaihtansak a, nangma mi a bawlsia minamte na zogawp hi." 
Isaiah9:5 Galkap hangte’ khedap khempeuh le si a baang puan khempeuh mei-in kicih ding hi. 
Isaiah9:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a dingin naungek khat hong suak a, eite’ tungah tapa khat hong kipia hi. Amah pen eite hong ukpa hi ding a, ama min pen “Lamdang Thulak pa, Vanglian Pasian, Tawntung Pa, Nopsakna Kumpi,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah9:7 Tuhun a kipanin a tawntungin David kumpi tokhom tung le ama gam sungah thutang le thuman phutin, a lian semsem ama ukna le nopsakna in mong nei lo ding hi. Vanglian Topa ’ deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah9:8 Topa in Jakob tungah thu khat khah a, Israel tungah thu hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah9:9 “Leiseekte kicim khin hi; ahih hangin suangseek tawh i lam ding hi. Theithek singte kisia khin hi; ahih hangin taamtak sing tawh i khek ding hi,” ci-a kiphasakin lungsim kihisak Efraim mite le Samaria gam sunga teng mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah9:10  
Isaiah9:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amaute do-in a langpang ding bawl a, amau’ galte a hanthawn hi." 
Isaiah9:12 Ama mai-a om Syria mite le a nunga om Filistia mite in kam ka-in Israel netum uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah9:13 Amaute a satpa’ lamah Israel mite kihei lo a, Vanglian Topa zong lo uh hi." 
Isaiah9:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel sung panin a makaite le a mihonte, a lu panin a mei dongin ni khat thu-in a vatmai hi." 
Isaiah9:15 Upa pa le a zahtakhuai mipa pen a lutang hi a, zuauthu a hilh kamsangpa pen a mei ahi hi." 
Isaiah9:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih minam a makaihte in lam khialsak a, amau’ makaih mite in siatna ngah uh hi." 
Isaiah9:17 Tua ahih ciangin amau’ tangvalte tungah Topa lungdam lo a, pa nei lote le a meigong numeite uh tungah hehpihna nei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh pen Pasian’ thu a khual om loin siatna a bawl vive hi a, kam khempeuh in haina thu a gen uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah9:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna mei bangin kuang a, lingkungte le lingte kangtum sak hi. Gamlak lopa phate kuangsak a, meikhu lomtangin van lamah kizialto uh hi." 
Isaiah9:19 Vanglian Topa ’ hehna hangin meikuang bangin gam sung kang a, mite pen mei a kicih sing tawh kibang uh hi. Kuamah in a sanggampa nangawn zah tuan lo hi." 
Isaiah9:20 Amaute in a taklama omte ne uh a, ahih hangin a gil uh kiallai veve hi. A veilama omte ne uh a, ahih hangin kham nai lo uh hi. Mite in amau’ vengte’ sa ne ciat uh hi." 
Isaiah9:21 Manasseh in Efraim, Efraim in Manasseh ne-in, tua tegel in Judah langpang khawm uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah10:1 A cimawhte’ thutang kimlai hei khiatsakin, keima mite sungah a zawngte’ thuman sutkhia-in, meigong numeite’ neihsa amau a’ ding a suahtheihna ding le pa nei lote’ neihsa amau’ nek dingin a bawl theih nadingun a man lo thukhensatna pia a, nenniamna thu a gelhte in gimna ngah ta uh hen!" 
Isaiah10:2  
Isaiah10:3 Gimpiak ni hun, gamlapi panin huihpi hong nun’ ciangin note in bangcih ding na hi uh hiam? Huhna ngenin kua kiangah tai ding a, na neihsa uh koi lai-ah koih ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah10:4 Thongkiate’ lakah tonbucipin om ding le a kithat mite lakah sih ding bek a om hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna damzo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah10:5 Assiria-te pen ka hehna mite gimpiak nadingin molhtum le ciangkhutin ka zat ahi hi. 
Isaiah10:6 Keima thu a ngaihsun lo minam le kei a hong hehsak mite’ neihsa sutin laksakin, amaute pen konglak buannawng bangin a tuancil dingin amaute sawlin thu ka pia hi." 
Isaiah10:7 Ahih hangin a kumpipa in tua bang bek sawm lo a, a lungsim in zong tua bang bek ngaihsun lo hi. Ama lungsim sungah minam tampi suksiat nopna thu om hi." 
Isaiah10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka galkapmangte, kumpi vive hikhin hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno khuapi pen Karkhemish khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? Hamath khuapi pen Arpad khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? Samaria khuapi pen Damaskas khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? 
Isaiah10:10 Jerusalem le Samaria milimte sangin milim lianzaw a nei milim kumpi gamte ka khut in ban khin ahih ciangin 
Isaiah10:11 Samaria le a milimte tungah ka bawl bangin Jerusalem le a milimte tungah bawl lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi. 
Isaiah10:12 Topa in Zion Mual le Jerusalem khua-ah ama nasep dingteng a zawh khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiphasakin a kisialhna le a kiphatsakna hangin gim a pia ding hi. 
Isaiah10:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keimah in thu theihtelna nei ka hih manin keima thahatna le keima pilna tawh ka hih khin hi. Mihingte’ gamgite lakhia-in amau’ sumte ka sut khin a, keimah in bawngtal bangin a gammite ka sugawp hi." 
Isaiah10:14 Vasa bumek bangin mihingte’ hauhna ka la ziau hi. A kinusia vasa tuite mite in a lak bangin leitung khempeuh ka la khin hi. A kha a zap, a kam a ka, a ham khat beek om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah10:15 Amah a likto pa pen molhtumin a zang ding bangkeek, sing ahi lo mipa pen ciangkhut bangin a likto ding bang keekin, phuk nadingin amah a zang pa tungah, hei, kihisak thei ding ahi hiam? Singat tem zong amah a zang pa tungah kiliansak thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah10:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in ama mi thaute lakah natna lianpi tungsak ding a, tua natna pen amaute sungah mei bangin kuang niloh ding hi." 
Isaiah10:17 Israel-te’ khuavak pen mei suakin, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa pen meikuang suak ding hi. Ni khat sungin ama lingkungte le lingte kangin beitum ding hi." 
Isaiah10:18 Gah tampi a piangsak ama leitang le ama gamlak a minthanna pen nuntakna le pumpi dong takin Topa in susia ding a, mi cina khat a si tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah10:19 A omlai gamlak singkungte tawm mahmah ta a, naupang khat nangawn in khat khatin sim khin thei hi." 
Isaiah10:20 Tua ni a kipan Israel a omlaite, Jakob innkuan a suakta laite in amau a sugawp pa suang nawn loin, Topa ahi, Israel Siangtho Pa pen thuman tawh suanin nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah10:21 Jakob innkuan a omlaite a vanglian Pasian kiangah ciahkik ding hi. 
Isaiah10:22 Na mi Israel-te, tuipi sehnel zah a phak hangin amaute tawmkhat bek hong ciahkik ding hi. Amaute’ thuak dingin a kilawm bangin thu a kikhen ahi hi." 
Isaiah10:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Vanglian Topa in a thukhennasa bangin leitung khempeuhah beisiangna a bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah10:24 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in thu gen a, “Zion-ah a teng ka mihingte aw, Egypt mite’ hih bangin amaute in molhtum tawh hong satin a ciangkhut uh hong liik ciangin Assiria mite kihta kei un." 
Isaiah10:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sawt loin note tungah ka thangpaihna bei ding a, ka hehna amaute’ tung tu-in, amaute sia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah10:26 Vanglian Topa in Oreb suangpi-ah Midian mite a sukgawp bangin, amah in amaute tungah gimpiakna zang ding a, Egypt mite a thuaksak bangin Assiria mite thuaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah10:27 Tua ni ciangin na liangko panun ama vangikpi kinkhia ding a, ama hakkol pen na ngawng panun bei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah10:28 Rimmon gam pan galte hong kipanin Aiath khua hong tung uh a, Migron khua kantanin hong pai uh a, Mikmash khua-ah a van uh hong seng uh hi." 
Isaiah10:29 Amaute in mualciang kantanin Geba khua-ah zan khat giak uh hi. Rama khuamite lau-in ling uh a, Saul’ tenna Gibeah khuamite a tai uh hi." 
Isaiah10:30 Gallim khuamite aw, nakpitakin kiko un! Laisah khuamite aw ngai un! Anathoth khuamite aw, amah dawng un!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmenah khuamite taikhia a, Gebim khua-a a teng mite a suakta dingin a tai uh hi." 
Isaiah10:32 Tuni mahmahin Nob khua-ah galte tungin khawl uh a, Zion Mual ahi Jerusalem khuapi a khuttum uh sinsan uh hi." 
Isaiah10:33 En un, Topa, Vanglian Topa in a kihtakhuai vangliatna tawh singhiangte heuh ding hi. A kung sangte kiphuk ding a, a kisangsakte a niamin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah10:34 Amah in tulak singte hei tawh phuk ding a, Lebanon mual a singkung liante tawh pukkhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah11:1 Jessi’ phung sung panin a sel khat hong khangkhia ding a, a zungte panin a no khat hong khang ding hi." 
Isaiah11:2 Topa ’ kha in ama tungah ama mite a ukna ding pilna, thutheihna, le siamna pia ding hi. Amah in Topa ’ deihna thei-in Topa zahtak ding hi." 
Isaiah11:3 Amah in Topa ’ nasep nuamsa ding hi. Amah in a tungtham bek muhna tawh thu khen lo ding a, kam lengsawn bek zakna tawh thu khentat lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:4 Thumanna tawh mizawngte’ thu khenin, lungsim nem mite’ thu ahi bangin khensak ding hi. Ama kam panin a thupiakna tawh leitung mite gim kipia ding a, a muk panin a thugenna tawh migilote si ding uh hi." 
Isaiah11:5 Amah in thuman le thutak tawh ama mite uk ding hi. 
Isaiah11:6 Keivom pen tuuno tawh omkhawm ding a, kamkei gialbem pen keelno tawh lumkhawm ding hi. Bawngno le humpinelkai le ganhing thaute omkhawm ding uh a, naupangno khat nangawn in tuate hawlzo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:7 Bawngpi le vompi in an nekhawm ding uh a, amau’ note lumkhawm ding uh hi. Humpinelkai in bawngtal mah bangin buhkung ne ding hi." 
Isaiah11:8 Nawine naungek, gul gilo’ kua vangah kimawl ding a, nawine nawn lo naupang in gul gunei’ bu a sawk hangin a gul in tu lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:9 Ka mual siangtho buppi tungah amaute khatlekhat kiliamsak lo ding uh a, kisusia lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuite in tuipi omna a tuamcip mah bangin leitungah Topa ’ thu theihna kidim ding hi." 
Isaiah11:10 Tua ni ciangin Jessi’ zung pen mihingte’ tungah lim khat hi ding hi. Minamte in amah zong ding uh a, ama omna mun minthang mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah11:11 Tua ni ciangin Topa in Assiria gam, Egypt gam, Pathros gam, Ethiopia gam, Elam gam, Shinar gam, Hamath gam, le tuipi gei-a gamte panin ama mi a omlaite a ngahkik nadingin a vangliatna zang kik ding hi." 
Isaiah11:12 Amah in minamte a dingin lim khat koih ding a, Israel mi a kihawlkhiate kaikhawmin, leitung kiu li panin Judah mi a kikhenthangte kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah11:13 Efraim in hazatna lungsim a neihnate bei ding a, Judah mi a galbawlte kisusia ding hi. Efraim in Judah haza nawn lo ding a, Judah in zong Efraim galbawl lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:14 Ahih hangin amaute in nitumna lama om Filistia mite simkhawm ding uh a, nisuahna lama om mite luhkhawm ding uh hi. Amaute in Edom mite le Moab mite zogawp ding uh a, Ammon mite in amau’ thu mang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah11:15 Topa in ama huihsa nungsakin Nail gunpi le Eufratis gunpi tuite kangsak ding a, mi khempeuh in nuamtakin a kantan zawh ding lui neu sagih bek sitlai ding hi." 
Isaiah11:16 Egypt gam panin Israel-te hong paitoh ciangin amau a dingin lam lianpi khat a om mah bangin, ama mi a omlaite a dingin Assiria gam panin zong lam lianpi khat om ding hi." 
Isaiah12:1 Ni khat ni ciangin mite in, “ Topa aw, kei tungah na heh hangin na hehna damta a, kei hong hehnem na hih manin nang tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi." 
Isaiah12:2 En in, Pasian pen kei a hong honkhia pa ahi hi. Amah ka muang ding a, ka lau kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in thahatna le vangliatna hong pia a, amah pen kei a hong honkhia pa ahi hi,” a cih hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah12:3 Tui siangtho in a dangtakte a lungdamsak mah bangin, Pasian’ hotkhiatna in a mite lungdamsak ding hi." 
Isaiah12:4 Ni khat ni ciangin mite in, “ Topa ’ tungah lungdam ko unla, ama hong huh ding ngen un. Minam khempeuh lakah ama septe kitheisak unla, ama min kiliansak hi, ci-in gen un." 
Isaiah12:5 Amah in minthang takin sem khin ahih manin Topa ’ tungah phatna la sa unla, leitung khempeuhah hih thu kitheisak un." 
Isaiah12:6 Zion-a teng mite aw, nomau’ lakah Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa lianin om ahih manin lungdamin awng unla, lungdamin la sa un,” a cih hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah13:1 Amoz’ tapa Isaiah in Babylon siatna ding tawh kisai a thumuhnate: 
Isaiah13:2 Mualkolh tungah lim khat lakto unla, galkapte tungah nakpitakin kiko un. Miliante’ kongpi-ah amaute va pai-in a sim nadingun amaute khut vaan un." 
Isaiah13:3 Keimah in ka tuamkoihsa mite thu pia khinin, ka hehna thu a semkhia dingin kiphatsakna tawh a lungdam ka mi thahatte ka sam khin hi." 
Isaiah13:4 Ngai un, mihonpi lungdam bangin mualtungte ah gamlumna! Ngai un, minamte’ kumpi gamte kikhawmin a gamlumna! Vanglian Topa in galdo dingin mihon khat kaikhawm hi." 
Isaiah13:5 Leitung buppi a susia dingin Topa le ama hehna galhiamte gamlapi van mong panin hong pai hi. 
Isaiah13:6 Topa ’ ni hong naita ahih manin nakpitakin kap un. Vanglianpa’ kiang panin suksiatna hong tung ta ding hi. 
Isaiah13:7 Tua ahih ciangin khut khempeuh zaw-in, mi khempeuh’ lungsim tuisuak ding a, amaute lungkia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:8 Amaute in gim mahmahna le nat velvalna thuak ding uh a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat lamdang sakna tawh ki-en ding uh a, a maitangte un gimna mel pua ding hi." 
Isaiah13:9 En un, leitung gamkhing suaksakin, leitung mawhneite a susia dingin hehna le sinsona tawh nasia takin Topa ’ ni hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah13:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung aksite le amau’ aksi honpite in khuavak piakhia lo ding hi. Ni a suahtung a kipan mial ding a, kha in zong khuavak taangkhiasak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah13:11 Leitung mite a tatsiatna hangun gim ka pia ding a, migilote a mawhna hangun gim ka thuaksak ding hi. Mi kihisakte’ kiphatsakna beisiang sakin, a kisatheite’ kiliatsakna ka niamkhiat ding hi." 
Isaiah13:12 Mihingte pen kham hoihte sangin a hoihzaw, minam pen Ofir gam khamte sangin a hoihzaw-in ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah13:13 Tua ahih ciangin ka sinso ni-in Vanglian Topa ka hehna hangin vantung lausakin ka lingsak ding a, ama omna panin leitung kisingkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah13:14 A kidelh sanang le a cing om lo tuu bangin mi khempeuh amau’ mite’ lam ciatah kihei-in, amau’ gam ciatah tai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:15 A kimu mi peuhmah kithat ding a, a kiman mi peuhmah namsau tawh si ding hi." 
Isaiah13:16 Amau’ muhna mahah a naungekte uh leilak kidengawpna ding hi. Amaute’ inn kiluhin, a zite uh kibuansak ding hi." 
Isaiah13:17 En un, ngun le khamte tawh a lungkim lo Media mite pen amaute a sim dingin ka hanthawn hi." 
Isaiah13:18 Amau’ thalte in tangvalte that ding hi. Amaute in gil sung pana piang naungekte hehpih lo ding uh hi. Amaute’ mit in naupangte khasiat lo ding hi. 
Isaiah13:19 Khaldea mite’ hoihna, a kiphatsakpih, kumpi gam a minthang bel Babylon khuapi pen Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah a siatsak lai hun bang ding hi." 
Isaiah13:20 Khang tawntungin tua lai-ah kuamah teng lo ding a, tua lai-ah kuamah om ngei nawn lo ding hi. Arabia mite kuamah in tua lai-ah a puanbuk lam lo ding a, tuucingte kuamah in tua lai-ah a tuute lumsak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah13:21 Tua munah gamsate lum ding uh a, tua mun a innte pen a hawk ganhingte tawh kidim ding hi. Tua munah vasa-kalaoh golpite tengin, tua munah keeldawite laam ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:22 Mihaute’ inn sungah ngiate, kumpi inn nuam sungah se-alte a ham ding uh hi. Babylon khuapi a siat ding hun hong naita a, a ni sawt nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah14:1 Topa in Jakob hehpihin Israel teelkik ding a, amaute pen a gam uhah koihkik ding hi. Khual mite in amaute pawlin Jakob innkuan bel ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:2 Israel mite in amaute manin amau’ gamah ciahpih ding uh a, Topa’ gam sungah amaute pen sila numei sila pasal dingin nei ding uh hi. Amaute a man ngei mite pen tu-in amaute in lehmat ding uh a, amaute a nengniam ngei mite tungah tu-in ukna nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:3 A haksa nasep hong kisepsakna, gimna le lungkhamna panin Topa in note tungah tawldamna hong piak ciangin," 
Isaiah14:4 Babylon kumpipa tungah hih zahkona kam na zang ding uh a, “Kumpi gilo pa pukta a, amah in kuamah nengniamzo nawn lo ding!" 
Isaiah14:5 Tawlnga loin mihingte satna-in a kizang, hehna tawh minamte ukin nakpitakin a bawlsia, migilote’ ciangkhut le gam ukte’ kumpi ciangkhut, Topa in kuaitan khinta hi." 
Isaiah14:6  
Isaiah14:7 Leitung khempeuh tawlnga-in gamdai takin omta uh a, amaute inla sa-in kiko uh hi." 
Isaiah14:8 Taksing kungte na tungah lungdamin, Lebanon mual taamtak singkungte in, ‘Nang hong kiniam koih khit a kipanin kote a phuk dingin kuamah hong pai nawn kei,’ ci uh hi." 
Isaiah14:9 “Nang na paisuk ciangin a hong dawntuah dingin Leinuai-a misite kihanthawn a, nangmah a hong hopih dingin leitungah a lian ngei misi uliante kipusuak sak hi. A minamte’ kumpite khempeuh amau’ kumpi tokhom panin hong ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:10 Amaute in nang hong hopihin, ‘Nang zong kote mah bangin na thahat kei hi. Kote mah na bangta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:11 Nangma harp lasakna awte, nangma liatna khempeuh Leinuai-ah kipaipih suk hi. Thante pen nangma delhphah hi a, thante pen nangma silh ahi hi." 
Isaiah14:12 “Nang Khuavak’ ta, Zingsol, Babylon kumpipa aw, vantung panin nang bangci kiat na hi hiam? Minamte a niam koihpa ahi nangmah leilak dongah hong bangci kiphukpai ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah14:13 Nang in na lungsim sungah, ‘Vantungah ka kahto ding hi. A sangna mun, Pasian’ aksite’ tung pekah ka kumpi tokhom ka koih ding a, leilu lam peka kikhopna mualtungah ka tu ding hi." 
Isaiah14:14 Meiite’ tung pekah ka kahto ding a, Sang Pen pa bangin ka kibawl ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Isaiah14:15 Ahih hangin nang pen Leinuai thuk penna Leihawm sungah hong kikoih suk ding hi. 
Isaiah14:16 “Nangmah hong mu mite in nang hong en gega-in, nangma thu lungngai dedu ding uh a, ‘Hih mipa pen leitung a lingsak pa, kumpi gamte a lokgawp pa," 
Isaiah14:17 leitung pen sehnel gam suaksakin, khuapite a susiapa, thong sungah a kikhum mite inn-ah a ciahsak lopa hih pa hi lo ahi hiam?’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:18 “Minam dangte’ kumpite khempeuh amau hankhuk sung ciat uhah a minthangin lum uh hi. 
Isaiah14:19 Ahih hangin nang pen namsau tawh a kithat misi a uihte, Suanghawmpi sunga a paisukte, khe tawh a kisikcip si luanghawmte bangin, na hankhuk pualamah hong kilawnkhia hi." 
Isaiah14:20 Nangmah in na gam susia-in, nangma mihingte that khin na hih manin, nang pen amaute tawh hong kivui khawm lo ding hi. Siatna a bawlpa’ suanlekhakte’ min kilo ngei nawn kei ta hen!" 
Isaiah14:21 Amaute khangto loin leitung a neih loh nading le leitung maitang teng khuapite tawh a kidimsak loh nadingin amau’ pate’ mawhna hangin a tate’ kithahna ding piang ta hen,” na ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:22 Vanglian Topa in, “Amaute’ langkhatah ka pang ding a, Babylon min le a omlai mite’ tate le suanlekhakte ka susia ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah14:23 Saphulipte’ om nadingin tua khuapi bawlin, bualtui ka suaksak ding a, siatna munphiah tawh ka phiatkhia siang ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah14:24 Vanglian Topa kiciam khin a, “Ka geelsa bangin piang ding a, ka ngimnasa bangin kip ding hi." 
Isaiah14:25 Keimah in ka gam sungah Assiria mite ka susia ding a, ka mual tungah ka sikcip ding hi. Ka mite’ tung panin Assiria-te’ hakkol amaute’ liangko panin Assiria-te’ vangik kiakhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah14:26 Hih ngimna pen leitung buppi a dingin a kingim ahi hi. Hih ka khut pen minam khempeuh gimpiak nadingin a kizan ahi hi. 
Isaiah14:27 Vanglian Topa in ngim khin ahih manin kua in phiatzo ding ahi hiam? Ama khut kizan khin ahih manin kua in kaiton kikzo ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah14:28 Kumpi Ahaz a sih kumin thu hong tung a," 
Isaiah14:29 “Filistia mi khempeuh aw, note hong kisatna ciangkhut a kitan manin lungdam kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh singbul panin a sel a om bangin, gulpi a sih khit ciangin a siahuaizaw gul gunei hong om ding a, tuate pen a leng thei gulpi hong hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:30 Mizawngte in keima gankhahna sungah an ne ding uh a, a cimawhte lungnuam takin lum hithiat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin no Filistia mite, kialpi tawh kong that ding a, a suaktakha a omlaite keimah in ka that ding hi." 
Isaiah14:31 “Filistia khuapi kongpite aw, nakpitakin kap un; khuapite aw, kiko un. Filistia mi khempeuh aw, lau-in ling un! Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin galkap honte’ hong paina leivui khu hong kitung a, tua galkapte a meidawi khat beek om lo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah14:32 Filistia mite in a hong sawl kamtaite mi khatpeuh in bangci dawn ding ahi hiam? “ Topa in Zion kipsak khin a, gimna a thuak ama mite in tua sungah bukna mu uh hi,” ci-in a dawng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab gam tawh kisai thu: Zan khat thu-in Ar khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei hi. Zan khat thu-in Kir khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a beita ahi hi. 
Isaiah15:2 A sangna munte-ah a kap dingin Dibon khuamite paito uh hi. Nebo le Medeba khuate’ hangin Moab mite nakpitakin kap uh hi. Dahna limin lu khempeuh kimettol a, khamul khempeuh zong kimetmai hi." 
Isaiah15:3 Kongzing lakah amaute in puanhampi silh uh hi. Innkhumzang le kongzing lampi kituahnate-ah mi khempeuh nakpi-in kapin khitui tawh a kawt uh hi. 
Isaiah15:4 Heshbon khua le Elealeh khua kiko uh a, amau’ kahna awging Jahaz khua dongah kiza hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moab mi galhiam tawite lau-in nakpitakin kiko uh a, amaute a ling uh hi." 
Isaiah15:5 Moab gam adingin ka lungsim kiko hi. A galtai ama mite Zoar khua le Eglathshelishiah khuate-ah a tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Luhith lampi-ah amaute a kapsa-in paito uh hi. Horonaim khua zuatna lampi-ah amaute in siatna a thuakna uh hangin nakpi-in kiko uh hi. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim luite kang hi. Lopa keu-in a selthak om lo a, lopa hing om nawn lo hi." 
Isaiah15:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a ngahsa uh le a kholsa uh na tampite pua-in Gialhek Lui-ah a paipih uh hi. 
Isaiah15:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gam kiim khempeuhah kahna aw a ging hi. Kahna in Eglaim khua ban a, kahna in Beerelim khua zong a ban hi." 
Isaiah15:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Dibon luituite sisan tawh kidim hi. Ahi zongin Dibon khua in a thuak ding a nasiazaw omlai a, Moab gam panin a suakta mi le gam sungah a omlai mite khempeuh kithat gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah16:1 Moab mite in Jerusalem-a om gam ukpa tungah sehnel gam Sela khua panin tuunote a puak uh hi. 
Isaiah16:2 A bu a kipaih khiatsak ciangin a cih nading thei loin a leng kawikawi vasate bangin Arnon guntui ngahmunah Moab mite om uh hi. 
Isaiah16:3 Amaute in Judah mite kiangah, “Kote tungah thuhoih hong lak unla, thutangin hong gamta un. Sunkim laitak a singliim bangin kote hong liah un. A kihawlkhia kote hong seel unla, galtai kote hong heek kei un." 
Isaiah16:4 A kihawlkhia ko Moab mite note lakah hong tengsak unla, kote hong susiate’ kiang panin kote’ belh hong hi un. A nengniam pa om nawn loin siatna hun beita a, a khe tawh a sik mipa gam sung panin a manthan ciangin," 
Isaiah16:5 itna kip tawh kumpi tokhom khat kiphut ding a, thuman sep ding a manlang, thutang zongin thu a khen mipa pen David’ buk sunga om tua tokhom tungah thuman tawh tu ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah16:6 Tua ciangin Judah mite in, “Moab’ kiphatsakna thu i za khinta hi. Amah kiphasak mahmah hi. A kiliatsakna, a kiphatsakna, a kihihsakna, ama kisialhnate khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah16:7 Tua ahih ciangin a thuakna uh hangin Moab mite kap hen la, mi khempeuh zong Moab mite’ hangin kap ta uh hen. Nakpi takin gimna a thuak laitakun Kirhareseth khua-ah a anlim nekte uh a phawkkhak uh ciangin khasia-in a kap uh hi." 
Isaiah16:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a hiang zaai-in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua banin sehnel gam dongah a zaam ama hiangte, minam dangte’ tote in sattan ahih manin Heshbon lolaite le Sibmah leengguite vul ta uh hi." 
Isaiah16:9 Tua ahih ciangin Jazer khua mite a kah bangin Sibmah leengguite’ hangin kei ka kap hi. Heshbon le Elealeh khuamite aw, ka khitui tawh note kong kawtsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh galkidona in note’ singgah le ante hong banzo hi." 
Isaiah16:10 An tampi a pian’ ngeina lolai-ah lungdamna le nuamna om nawn lo hi. Leenggui lote-ah lasakna om lo a, lungdam a kikona om nawn lo hi. Leenggah cilna-ah kuamah in leengtui suk nawn lo a, leenggah lawh cianga kikona aw kidaisak ta hi." 
Isaiah16:11 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam hangin laiza lasakna bangin ka lungsim kisat gaihgaih a, Kirhareseth khuapi hangin kei mahmah zong ka kisat gaihgaih hi." 
Isaiah16:12 Moab amahmah hong kilaakin, a sangna munah lungkhamin hong pai a, ama siangtho munah thu a nget ciangin bangmah ngah lo ding hi." 
Isaiah16:13 Hih bang thu pen Topa in a beisa hun lai-in Moab tawh kisai-in a gensa thu ahi hi. 
Isaiah16:14 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in, “Nasem dingin a kicial kum hunte sung bangin, kum thum sungin, ama mihon tampite om taseleh Moab’ minthanna in simmawhna thuak ding a, a suakta lai mite pen tawm mahmahin, thaneem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah17:1 Damaskas tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: En un, Damaskas pen khuapi hi nawn loin ninbulomtang suak ding hi." 
Isaiah17:2 Ama khuapite kinusiacip paisuak ding hi. Tuuhonte’ omna mun suak ding a, tua tuuhonte lum hithiatin bangmah in lausak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah17:3 Efraim gam panin kulhpi bei-in, Damaskas khua panin kumpi gam mangthang ding hi. Syria mi a suakta laite pen Israel mite mah bangin mindai ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah17:4 Tua ni ciangin Jakob’ liatna bei ding a, ama hauhna khempeuh mangthang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:5 An a la mi in ankung ding laite kaikhawmin ante a kilak khit ciangin leitang a hawm guakin a om tawh kibang ding a, mi khat in Refaim Kuam sungah ansang a kaihkhop khit ciangin lolai a hawm guakin a om tawh zong kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:6 Oliv kung a kisin’ khit ciangin a hiang sangpen dawnah pum nih pum thum singkung hiang dawnah pum li pum nga a omlai tawh kibang lel ding hi, Israel-te’ Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah17:7 Tua ni ciangin mite in amaute a Bawlpa pi ngaihsut ding uh a, amaute’ mit in Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa en ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:8 Amaute in amau khut tawh a bawlsa uh biakna taute don lo ding uh a, amau’ bawlsa Asherah milimte hitaleh paknamtui halna biakna taute hitaleh muanin nei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:9 Tua ni ciangin amau’ khuapi muanhuaite pen Hiv mite le Amor mite in Israel mite’ hangin a nusiat uh munte tawh kibang ding a, gamkhing a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah17:10 Nomau hong honkhia Pasian note in mangngilhin, nomau’ belh Suangpi phawk lo na hih manun note in biakna huan bawlin kung hoihte suan a, kung namdangte tawh pehin," 
Isaiah17:11 tuate na suan ni mahun thakhatin khang a, na tuh ni uh a zing ciang mahin a hong pak hangin note in a gah na lokha kei ding uh hi. Gimna le lungkhamna hong tun ni-in tuate maimang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:12 Ah, mi tampite’ kikona, tuipi ging bang! Ah, minamte’ otna, tui lianpi ging bang!" 
Isaiah17:13 Tui lianpi a ging bangin minamte awng uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in amaute tai ding a, gamlapi pekah amaute taikhia ding uh hi. Mualtung a huih mai-ah ansi leeng bang leh huihpi mai-a pingpei bangin leengkhia mang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:14 En un, nitakin hong lausak a, zingsang ma-in amaute beita! Hih bang thute pen eite hong susia-in eite a hong luhgawpte in a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah18:1 Ah, Ethiopia gunte’ galkhat, puankhai gunkuangpi a omna gamte in Nail gun tawnin tui tungah laisah tawh a kibawl gunkuangpite tungah tuangin taangmi hong sawl uh hi. No a zaptel makaite aw, amau’ gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla-ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cineel minamte kiangah va pai un." 
Isaiah18:2  
Isaiah18:3 Leitung a teng mi khempeuh, leitung a om mi khempeuh aw, mualte tungah lim khat hong kilah ciangin en un! Peengkul hong kimut ciangin ngai un!" 
Isaiah18:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah, “Nitaang sunga nisa silsel, anlak nisat hun sunga meiizun bangin, ka omna panin daitakin ka en ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah18:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lawh hun ma deuh, leenggui a pak khit, leenggah a puamcin laitakin, amah in singhiang heuhna temkawi tawh a selte atkhia ding a, a zaam zeizai a hiangte heuhkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah18:6 Tuate khempeuh mualtung a om vasate’ nek ding le leitung a ganhingte’ nek dingin kinusia ding hi. Khuakhal ciangin vasate in ne ding a, phalbi ciangin leitung a ganhingte in ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah18:7 Tua hun ciangin, amau’ gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla-ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cineel mite kiang panin Vanglian Topa ’ min omna Zion mual, Vanglian Topa ’ tungah letsong hong kipuak ding hi." 
Isaiah19:1 Egypt tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: A manlang mahmah meii tungah Topa tuangin Egypt gamah a pai hi. Ama mai-ah Egypt gam milimte lau-in ling ding uh a, Egypt mite’ hanna beita ding hi." 
Isaiah19:2 Egypt mite amau le amau ka kitawngsak ding hi. Mi kim in ama vengte ciat do ding a, khua khatlekhat kido-in, mi khatlekhat kumpi za kituh ding hi." 
Isaiah19:3 Egypt mite’ lungsim hawmsuak ding a, amau’ geelnate ka siasak ding hi. Amaute in milimte, vankah theite le aisan theite tungah thu dong ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:4 A thuakhak topa’ khut sungah Egypt mite ka pia ding a, a kihtakhuai mahmah a gilo kumpipa in amaute uk ding hi, Topa, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah19:5 Nail guntuite keu ding a, guntui kangcipin keu ding hi." 
Isaiah19:6 Lei zui-a tui kilate uihin, Egypt gam a om Nail gun hiangte kiamin keucip ding a, pumpeeng kung le phai kungte muat ding hi." 
Isaiah19:7 Nail gun gei, Nail gun kiang kolh ding a, Nail gun kiangah a kituh khempeuh keucipin huih in leenkhia-in om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah19:8 Nail gun sungah ngasiahna sikkawi a khia ngei, ngasa bengte thumin tau ding uh a, tui tungah ngen a pai ngei mite thaneem ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:9 Anthul khau ciingin na a semte le patpuan a gante lungkham ding uh hi. 
Isaiah19:10 Gam sung makaite kisusiacip ding a, a kicial nasemte dah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:11 Zoan uliante hai cihtakin hai uh a, Faro’ mipil thu lamlakte in thu haihuai gen uh hi. Nang in Faro’ tungah, “Mipil pa’ tapa ka hi hi; tanglai kumpite’ tapa ka hi hi,” bangci-in ci thei ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah19:12 Tua ahih kei leh Egypt kumpipa Faro aw, na mipilte koi-ah om ahi uh hiam? Vanglian Topa in Egypt gam gimpiak ding a ngimna thu, na mipilte in nangma tungah hong genthei kha ding hi." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan uliante mihai suak khin uh a, Memfis uliante zong hai khin uh hi. Minamte a makai dinga kineite in a mite uh lam khialhpih khin hi." 
Isaiah19:14 Topa in amaute’ lungsim kitukalhsak khinzo hi. Zukham pa ama luak lakah a puk bangin Egypt gam mite’ hihna khempeuh khialin hoimang khin hi. 
Isaiah19:15 A hau a zawng, a lian a neu, mi khat beek in Egypt a dingin a hihsak theih ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Isaiah19:16 Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite, numei bang ding uh a, Vanglian Topa in amaute a khut a sinsanna hangin lau-in ling ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:17 Judah gam pen Egypt mite’ kihtak hong suak ding hi. Vanglian Topa in amaute gimpiak ding a ngimna hangin, hih thu a kigenna mi khempeuh lau ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:18 Tua ni ciangin Egypt gam sungah khuapi nga in Kanaan mite’ kampau zangin Vanglian Topa ’ tungah thuman ding thu ciam ding uh hi. Hih khuapi khat pen, “Ni Khuapi,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah19:19 Tua ni ciangin Egypt gamah Topa a’ ding biakna tau khat, a gamgi-ah Topa a’ ding khuapi khat om ding hi." 
Isaiah19:20 Tua pen Vanglian Topa a dingin Egypt gam sungah lim le teci hi ding hi. A nengniam mite’ bawlsiatna hangin Topa tungah amaute a kiko ciangin, amah in amaute kiangah honpa khat sawl ding a, amaute hu-in khahkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah19:21 Topa in Egypt mite tungah amahmah kitheisak ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite in Topa thei-in biakpiakna le meihal biakna tawh bia ding uh a, amaute in Topa ’ tungah thuciamna bawlin, tua thuciamnate sem ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:22 Topa in Egypt mite sat ding a, ahi zongin damsakkik ding hi. Topa ’ lamah amaute kihei kik ding uh a, amah in amaute’ thumna donin amaute a damsak ding hi." 
Isaiah19:23 Tua ciangin Egypt gam panin Assiria gamah lam lianpi khat pai-in, Assiria mite Egypt gamah hong pai ding a, Egypt mite Assiria gam sungah pai-in, Egypt mite in Assiria mite tawh biakhawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:24 Tua ni ciangin Israel, Egypt, le Assiria, hih thumte pen leitung khempeuh a dingin thupha hi ding uh a,"
