Isaiah19:25 Vanglian Topa in, “Ka mihingte ahi Egypt, ka khut tawh ka bawlsa ahi Assiria, le keima luah ahi Israel mite in thupha ngah ta hen,” ci-in thupha a piakte hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah20:1 Assiria kumpipa Sargon in a sawl galkapmang lianpen pa, Filistia khuapi Ashdod-ah pai-in, tua khua va sim hi." 
Isaiah20:2 Tua hun ma kum thum laitakin Topa in Amoz’ tapa Isaiah tungtawnin thu genin, “Na puanhampi suah inla, na khe panin na khedapte suah in,” a ci hi. Amah zong tua mah bangin gamta-in, tangguak le kheguak tawh lam a pai hi." 
Isaiah20:3 Ashdod khua a kilak khit ciangin Topa in, “Egypt le Ethiopia langkhatah lim le siahil dingin ka nasempa Isaiah tangguak le kheguak tawh kum thum sung lam a pai mah bangin," 
Isaiah20:4 Assiria kumpipa in, Egypt gam mite’ maizumna ahi, a moi a hamin, tangguak kheguakin, tawbo dawksa-in, Egypt mite galin manin, Ethiopia mite salin manin paikhiatpih ding hi." 
Isaiah20:5 Tua ciangin amau’ lametna Ethiopia le amau’ kisialhpih Egypt’ hangin amaute lungkia-in a cih nading uh thei lo ding uh hi. 
Isaiah20:6 Tua ni ciangin hih tuipi gei-a teng mite in, ‘En un, eite’ lametna, Assiria kumpipa’ kiang panin eite hong honkhia dingin i belh mite’ tungah hih bang piang khinta hi. Eite bangci suahtak ding ihi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah21:1 Babylon gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Leitaw lam panin pingpei hong kipat mah bangin, a lauhuai gam panin siatna hong pai hi." 
Isaiah21:2 A kihtakhuai maangmuhna khat kei tungah hong kigen hi. A sutzo mipa in sut a, a susiazo mipa in susia hi. Elam galkapte aw, kuanto un. Media galkapte aw, umcih un. Babylon’ piansak khuisatnate khempeuh Pasian in beisak ta hi." 
Isaiah21:3 Tua ahih ciangin ka kawng na a, nausuak numei in na a sak bangin na ka sa hi. Khua a za thei lo zah dongin a kuncipin ka om a, khua a mu thei lo zah dongin lungkia-in ka om hi." 
Isaiah21:4 Ka lung vai a, launa in hong sidaangsak hi. Keima lunggulh zan khuamial pen keima linna a suak hi." 
Isaiah21:5 Amaute in sabuai phahin, sualpuante phah uh a, an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. Uliante aw, tho un; lum, sathau nuh un!" 
Isaiah21:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah: “Pai in; galvil khat koih inla, ama muh bangbang gensak in." 
Isaiah21:7 Amah in a kopkopin sakol tung tuang mite, la tunga a tuangte, kalaoh tunga a tuangte a muh ciangin limtak, phatakin encik hen,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:8 Tua ciangin a mu pa kiko a, “Topa aw, tausang tungah sun tawntung ka ding a, ka vilna munah zan khuavak ka om hi." 
Isaiah21:9 En in, sakol tung tuangte a kopkopin hong pai!” a ci hi. Adang khat in, “Babylon cim hi, cim hi. A milim pasian-te khempeuh leilak dongah amah in suksiatsak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Isaiah21:10 A kicilsa, a kiseepsa keima mite aw, Israel-te’ Pasian, Vanglian Topa ’ tung panin ka zaksa thu teng note tungah ka hong gen hi." 
Isaiah21:11 Edom gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Seir mual tung panin khat in kei hong sam a, “Galvil pa aw, tuzan bangci hiam? Galvil pa aw, tuzan bangci hiam?” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:12 Galvil pa keimah in, “Zing ni hong suak a, zan khua zong hong mial hi. Thukan nuam na hih leh hong paikik inla hong kan in,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabia gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Dedan mi khualzin honte aw, Arabia gamlakah na giak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah21:14 Tema gam a teng mite aw, a dangtakte tui puak unla, galtaite an tawh dawn un." 
Isaiah21:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, namsau, a kidoksa namsau, a kikeek thal le gal in a phutna panin a hong tai uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah21:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah, “Thacial kum hunte mah bangin kum khat sungin Kedar mite’ minthanna khempeuh bei ding hi." 
Isaiah21:17 Kedar mi thaltawi siam a omlaite tawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Israel Pasian in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:1 Maangmuhna Kuam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Kikona tawh a kidim, a gamlum khuapi, lungdamin a diang khua aw, note khempeuh, innkhumzangah na kah toh uh bang na cihnopna uh ahi hiam? A kithat nangma mite pen namsau tawh a kithat hi lo a, galsung a si hi lo uh hi." 
Isaiah22:2  
Isaiah22:3 Note hong uk mite tai uh a, thal zat kul loin amaute kiman hi. Gamlapi-ah na tai uh hangin hong kimu note khempeuh hong kiman hi." 
Isaiah22:4 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in, “Kei hong en kei unla, khitui tampi luangin hong kapkap sak un. Ka mi tampi a sihna hangin keimah hehnep ding hong hanciam kei un,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah22:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Maangmuhna Kuam sungah buaina le tuatcil gawpna, kitawhzauna, kulhte suksiat gawpna le mualte tungah kikona hong tungsak hi." 
Isaiah22:6 Sakol leengte le sakol tung tuangte tawh Elam galkapte in thallawng pua uh a, Kir galkapte in a lumte uh a baihsa-in nei uh hi." 
Isaiah22:7 Nomau’ teel Judah kuamte sakol leeng tawh kidim a, sakol tung tuangte in Jerusalem kulhkongpite-ah a pang uh hi." 
Isaiah22:8 Judah a kihutna teng khempeuh kicim khinta hi. Tua ni ciangin Tulak Inn sunga kikoih galhiamte na suang ding a," 
Isaiah22:9 David khuapi mun tampi tak a siatna mu-in, bual nuainung tuite na cingkik a," 
Isaiah22:10 nangmah in Jerusalem innte a phazah simin, kulhpi siate puahna dingin innte na phel hi." 
Isaiah22:11 Nangmah in, bual lui pana tuite khol nadingin kulhpi nih kikalah tuibempi khat na bawl hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in, tua na a na bawlpa phawk loin, sawtpekin a na geel pa na don kei hi." 
Isaiah22:12 Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in kahna le thumna, sam mettolna le puanhampi silhna a zang dingin thu hong pia hi." 
Isaiah22:13 Ahih hangin note in lungdamna le kipahna, bawngtalte le tuute gawhna, sa nekna le leenggahzu nekna na nei zawsop uh a, “Zing ciangin si ding ihih ciangin nene-in dawndawn ni,” na ci zawsop uh hi." 
Isaiah22:14 Vanglian Topa in keima tungah thu hong gen a, “Na sih matengun hih mawhna hong kimaisak het lo ding hi,” Vanglian Topa Pasian in hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:15 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Hong pai in. Innsung na teng a uk, neihsa kem pa Shebna kiangah pai inla ama tungah hih bangin gen in:" 
Isaiah22:16 Hih lai-ah nangma a’ ding hankhuk a to, a sangna munah hankhuk a bawl, na omna ding suang a khuak mipa aw, nang in hih lai-ah bang hih a, vui ding kua nei na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah22:17 En in, nang mi that pa aw, Topa in nang hong lawnkhia gawp ding hi. Amah in nakpitakin nang hong lenin," 
Isaiah22:18 hong pingpei ding a, lei tanzau munah bawlung bangin hong lawn ding hi. Na topa’ inn sunga dingin maizumna ahi nang pen tua munah si-in, na kisaktheihpih na sakol leengte lakah na tuk ding hi." 
Isaiah22:19 Na nasepna phual panin nang kong nawtkhia ding a, na omna panin nang hong kilawnkhia suk ding hi." 
Isaiah22:20 “Tua ni ciangin Hikiah’ tapa ahi ka nasempa Eliakim ka sam ding a," 
Isaiah22:21 nangma puantualpi amah silhsakin, nangma kawnggak tawh amah ka gak ding a, nangma ukna ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah pen Jerusalem khua-a teng mite le Judah mite tungah pa hi ding hi." 
Isaiah22:22 David’ suanlekhakte’ khutnuai-ah aana neihna tawhtang, ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah in hongin, kuamah in khak zo lo ding hi. Amah in khakin, kuamah in hong zo lo ding hi." 
Isaiah22:23 Amah pen a kician mun khatah vankhaina bangin ka khenkip ding a, ama beh sungah pahtawi ngahna phungpi a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah22:24 “Ahi zongin a beh a phung, a suan a khakte khempeuh ama a dingin van gikpi hi ding a, umlebeel, kuanglekeute, hai a kipan thawl dongin van khaina-ah a kikhai bangin ama tungah kibom ding uh hi." 
Isaiah22:25 Tua ni ciangin mun hoihna a a kikhen vankhai in lel ding hi. Topa in gen khin ahih ciangin, amah pen kitanin kia ding a, ama tunga vangik kikhai teng kisia ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in hong ci hi." 
Isaiah23:1 Taia khua tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, Taia khua kisia a, inn le khawlmunte om nawn lo ahih manin kap un! Saipras gam panin amaute in hih thu hong za uh hi." 
Isaiah23:2 Tuipi gei-a teng mite aw, thumin tau un. Sidon sumbukte aw, na sawltakte un tuipi kantanin tui lianpite tungah om uh hi." 
Isaiah23:3 Egypt gam a piang ante lei-in na zuak uh a, minam khempeuh tawh sum bawlin na kizom uh hi." 
Isaiah23:4 Sidon aw, maizum in; bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi in thu gen khin hi. Tua tuipi muanhuai in, “Keimah in naupaii-in na ka sa ngei kei a, nau ka nei ngei kei hi. Ta numei ka khoi ngei kei a, ta pasal zong ka khansuah ngei kei hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:5 Egypt gamah hih thu a kizak ciangin, Taia tawh kisai thu hangin amaute in na sa ding uh hi." 
Isaiah23:6 Tuipi gei-a teng mite aw, Tarshish khua-ah tai-in kap un!" 
Isaiah23:7 Tanglai pekin a piang, gamlapi pek panin a kiphut hih khuapi nomau’ lungdampih khuapi mah ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah23:8 Kumpi khuapi ahi, ama sumbukte ulian ahi, ama sumbawlte leitungah a kipahtawite ahi, Taia khuapi hih bang a pianna ding kua’ vaihawm ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah23:9 A Vanglian Topa ’ vaihawm ahi hi. Miliante’ kiphatsaknate a beisakna ding le a kipahtawi uliante a niamkhiat nadingin a bawl ahi hi. 
Isaiah23:10 Tarshish mite aw, tu-in kuankhia-in lo kho un. Na sumbawlna teng uh maimang khinta hi." 
Isaiah23:11 Topa in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, kumpi gamte lumlet gawp hi. Sumbawlna phualpite a kisuksiatna ding Topa in thu piazo hi." 
Isaiah23:12 Amah in, “Sidon khuapi aw, na lungdamna teng bei khinta hi. Na mite in nenniamna thuak uh a, Saipras tuikulh-ah a va tai uh hangin, tua lai nangawnah lungnopna hun nei lo ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:13 Taia khuapi, gamsate’ phualpi a suaksakte pen Assiria mite hi lo a, Babylon mite ahi hi. Babylon mite in khuapi luhna ding panmun bawl uh a, Taia khuapi kulhte susia-in, khuapi sung khempeuh a sia a suaksak uh hi." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, na muan uh khuapi kisia ta ahih manin thumin kap un." 
Isaiah23:15 Tua a siat hun a kipanin kumpi khat nuntak hunsung tan ahi, kum sawmsagih sung Taia khuapi kimangngilh ding hi. Kum sawmsagih a cin ciangin, paktat numei la sunga mah bangin Taia khuapi tungah piang ding hi. Tua la sungah," 
Isaiah23:16 “Kuama phawk loh numei paktat aw, harp lasakna khat la inla, khuapi kimkotah pai in! Nangmah hong kiphawk theih nadingin la ngaih phuak inla, la tampi sa in,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:17 Kum sawmsagih a cin ciangin Taia khuapi-ah Topa hawh ding a, Taia khuapi in ama sep ngei sem kikin, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh tawh kizomin sumbawlna sem ding hi." 
Isaiah23:18 Ama sumbuk vante le ama sepna panin a ngah nate pen Topa ’ tungah kipia ding hi. Ahih hangin tuate kikholcip mawk loin, Topa a bia mite’ an ding le puan hoihnono leina-in kizang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:1 En un, Topa in leitung hawmsuak sakin gamkhing suaksak ding a, amah in lei maitang huiheek gawpin, a tunga a teng mite thehthang gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah24:2 Mi khempeuhte’ thuakna kibang kim ding hi. Siampite le mi mawkmawkte silate le a tote, van leite le van zuakte, sumneite le leibate, a hau a zawng, a thuakna uh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:3 Leitung kihawmsuak sakin kisiacip ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi. 
Isaiah24:4 Leitung vulin keugaw a, leitung buppi thaneemin vulgawp hi. Vantung le leitung a nih tuakin vulkhawm hi." 
Isaiah24:5 Ama tunga a tengte in leitung ninsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukhamte khialin ngeina kipte palsat uh a, tawntung thuciamna peel uh hi." 
Isaiah24:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in leitung samsiatin susia a, a tunga a teng mite in amau’ mawhna hangun a thuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin leitungah a teng mite tawm semsem hi." 
Isaiah24:7 Leengguite keutumin leenggahzu tawm semsem a, a lungdam mi khempeuh khuisa ta uh hi." 
Isaiah24:8 Lungdamna khuang gingte dai-in lungdam a gamlumnate om nawn lo a, lungdam a laiza tawh lasaknate a dai ta hi." 
Isaiah24:9 Zu phungah lungdam a lasakna om nawn lo a, zu khempeuh kisia-in khagawp ta hi." 
Isaiah24:10 Khuapi hawmsuak pen kisiacip ta a, kuamah a tum theih loh nadingin inn khempeuh kikhakcip hi." 
Isaiah24:11 Leenggahzu a duh manun kongzingah mite kiko uh hi. Lungdamna khempeuh mangthang khinta a, leitung kipahna teng kibeisak ta hi." 
Isaiah24:12 Khuapi sungah gamkhinna bek om a, kongpite kisat khamin kisiamang khinta hi." 
Isaiah24:13 Hih bangmahin leitungah a om mi khempeuh tungah a hong tung ding ahi hi. Oliv kung a kisin’ khit ciang, leenggah kilo khinin a sangte a kikaihkhop khit ciangin a kinusia lo hawmte tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:14 A suaktasun mite in lungdamin la sa ding uh hi. Nitumna lama om mite in Topa a liat mahmahna thu gen ding uh hi. 
Isaiah24:15 Nisuahna lama om mite in Topa phat ding uh hi. Tuipi dunga teng mite in Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian phat ding uh hi." 
Isaiah24:16 Leimong a gamla pek pan nangawnin a thuman Israel minamte a kiphatna la i za ding hi. Ahih hangin keimah in, “Ka lungkham hi; ka lungkham hi. Gimna ngah hi ta ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khemte in khemkhem lai-in sia semsem uh a, khemzawh thu mah ciamciam lai uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah24:17 Leitung a a teng mite aw, note a dingin launa, gum le thangzakte om hi." 
Isaiah24:18 Lauhuaina panin a tai mipa gum sungah kia ding a, gum sung panin a taikhiat ciangin thangzak sungah awk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh van panin guahpi hong bua sukin leitung bulpite kiling ding hi." 
Isaiah24:19 Leitung khangkhamin kilokgawp ding a, kiphelkham ding hi." 
Isaiah24:20 Leitung pumpi zukham bangin hoi ding a, huihpi’ mutgawp buk bangin awn ding hi. Ama mawhnate in nengcip gawp ding a, amah pukin thokikzo ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah24:21 Tua ni ciangin Topa in vantung a om mihonpite le leitung kumpite gim pia ding hi. 
Isaiah24:22 Dum sunga om thongkiate bangin amaute khempeuh kikaikhawm ding hi. Thong sungah amaute kikhaknelh ding a, ni tampi khit ciangin amaute gim kipia pan ding hi." 
Isaiah24:23 Tua ciangin khapi mial ding a, ni taang nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in Zion Mual tung le Jerusalem khua sungah uk ding a, ama upate’ mai-ah ama minthanna vang kilangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah25:1 Topa aw, nang pen keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong liansak ding a, nangma min ka phat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang nate na sem khin a, tanglai peka na geelnate a kip a kho takpi ahi hi." 
Isaiah25:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in khuapi ninbulomtang na suah a, a muanhuai khuapi a sia na suaksak hi. Mi kiphasakte’ kumpi inn pen khua bang nawn lo a, cikmah hunin kilamkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah25:3 Tua ahih ciangin mi thahatte in nangma min hong thangsak ding a, thukhual lo minamte’ khuapite in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah25:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen mizawngte a dingin munmuanhuai, a cimawh mite a dingin a lungkhamna uhah munmuanhuai, huihpi panin bukna le nisa panin niliim na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukhual lo mite’ hihna pen huihpi in kulh a nawkgawp tawh kibang a," 
Isaiah25:5 mun keuna-ah nisa mahmah tawh kibang hi. Nang in mi kiphasakte’ gamlumna na daisak hi. Meii liim in nisa a votsak bangin thukhual lo mite’ lasakna kitawpsak ta hi. 
Isaiah25:6 Vanglian Topa in hih mual tungah mi khempeuh a dingin anlim nekna pawi, a ciil mahmah leenggahzu nekna pawi, guhngek tawh a kidim an nekna, a siangtho leenggahzu ciil nekna pawi bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah25:7 Amah in mi khempeuh’ khuk dahna puan le minam khempeuh’ silh dahna puante, hih mual tungah susia ding hi." 
Isaiah25:8 Amah in sihna beimangsak ding a, maitang khempeuh panin khitui nul ding hi. Leitung khempeuh panin ama mite a kizahkona lakhia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi." 
Isaiah25:9 Tua ni ciangin, “En un, amah pen eima Pasian ahi hi. Eite a hong hon dingin amah i ngak hi. Amah pen eima Topa ahi hi. Amah i ngak hi. Amah in eite hong honkhia ahih manin lungdamin kipak ni,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah25:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih Zion Mual hu ding a, ahi zongin Moab mite ahihleh ninkholna dum sungah buhkungte a kisikcip bangin kisikcip gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah25:11 Tuipeek pa in tui peek dingin a khutte a van bangin amaute in a khut uh vanvan ding uh a, ahih hangin a khut uh a van simin a kiphatsaknate uh a khut uh tawh bengtumsuk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah25:12 Amah in Moab mite’ kulh muanhuaite suksiat sakin leilak denna ding a, leivui suakmangkhin ding hi." 
Isaiah26:1 Tua ni ciangin Judah gam sungah hih la kisa ding hi: Khuapi muanhuai khat i nei a, Topa mahmah in i kulhte le i panmun kipte hong hutsak hi." 
Isaiah26:2 Upna-ah a kip thuman minamte a lut theih nadingin kulhkongpite hong ta un. 
Isaiah26:3 Topa aw, nang hong muang a, nangma tungah a lungsim khempeuh a koih mipa lungnopna kicing pia ta in." 
Isaiah26:4 Topa Pasian in eite khempeuh hong hu tawntung ahih manin Topa muang tawntung un. 
Isaiah26:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a kiphasak mite niamkhiat suk hi. Amau’ tenna khuapi muanhuai suksiatsak a, a kulhpite denkhap sakin leivui a suah hi." 
Isaiah26:6 A zawng a cimawh a kinengniam mite in tu-in tua khua tuancil uh hi. 
Isaiah26:7 Midik pa’ lampi tamkim a, nangmah in midik pa’ lampi na neelsak hi." 
Isaiah26:8 Topa aw, nangma deihna kong zui uh a, nang kong ngak uh hi. Nang pen kote’ deih kicinna na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:9 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh zanin nang kong deih a, zingsang khuavak ciangin lungsim tak tawh nang kong zong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung le a mite tungah thu na khen ciangin leitung a a teng mite in thuman i cih bang hiam, cih a phawk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah26:10 Migilote tungah nangmah na migit hangin a manin gamtat ding theithei tuan lo uh a, lungsim thutang mite’ gam sungah amaute in khialhna bawllai veve uh hi. Amaute in Topa ’ minliatna hong phawk nuam lo uh hi." 
Isaiah26:11 Topa aw, amaute gim na piak ding lamtak na galte in thei lo uh hi. Amaute maizumna thuaksak inla, amaute a dingin na geelsa gimnate amaute thuaksak in. Na mite na itna thu na galte tungah kilangsak in." 
Isaiah26:12 Topa aw, kote tungah maavanna hong pia in. Kote’ matut zawhna khempeuh nangmah in na hong sepsakna hang ahi hi." 
Isaiah26:13 Topa, kote’ Pasian aw, nang ahi lo to dangte in ko tungah hong uk hangin, nangmah bek mah kote’ Topa na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:14 Amaute si a, hingkik lo ding uh hi. Amaute mangthang ta uh a, omkik nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua bang a piantheih nadingin nangmah in amaute tungah siatna na tungsak a, amaute a kiphawkna khempeuh na beisak hi." 
Isaiah26:15 Ahih hangin nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak hi. Topa aw, nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak a, gamgi khempeuh na hong keeksak khin hi. Hih thu hangin nangma min a thang hi." 
Isaiah26:16 Topa aw, ka cihmawh uh ciangin nang kong zong uh a, nangma hong taina pen kote nong gimpiakna ahi hi." 
Isaiah26:17 Topa aw, nangma hangin kote pen naupaii numei a hun a nai ciangin na sa-in kiheek a, a kap tawh ka kibang uh hi." 
Isaiah26:18 Kote in naupaii-in ka kiheekheek uh a, huih bek a hingkhia tawh ka kibang uh hi. Kote in ka gam uh a’ ding bangmah ka suakkhiasak kei uh a, leitungah a teng ding mi kuamah ka hingkhia kei uh hi." 
Isaiah26:19 Nangma mi a sisate hingkik ding uh a, amau’ pumpi thokik ding hi. Han sungah a lum mite aw, tho-in lungdamin la sa un! Bang hang hiam cih leh zing daitui in leitung a nosakkik bangin sawtpi-a a sisa mite Topa in hingkiksak ding hi." 
Isaiah26:20 Ka mite aw, hong pai-in na innsung uhah tum unla, na kongte uh khak un. Hehna a dam matengin tawlkhat sung bu un." 
Isaiah26:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, amau’ mawhna hangin leitungah a teng mite gim a pia dingin ama omna panin Topa hong paikhia a, leitung in ama tunga a kithat mite lakkhia ding a, a kithat ama mite sincip nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah27:1 Tua ni ciangin Topa in a sak mahmah, a lian mahmah, a to mahmah namsau tawh, a taikhia gulpi ahi awle, a kikualvial gulpi ahi awle gim pia ding a, amah in tuipi sunga om tua gulpi a that ding hi." 
Isaiah27:2 Tua ni ciangin, “A deihhuai leenggah lo thu la-in sa un!" 
Isaiah27:3 Keimah, Topa, tua lo a hong pa ka hi a, a hunhunin tui ka buak hi. Khatpeuh in a suksiat loh nadingin sun le zanin ka hong ding hi." 
Isaiah27:4 Leenggui lo tungah ka heh nawn kei hi. Ling le lingkungte hong om leh keimah kuankhia-in tuate ka haltum ding hi. 
Isaiah27:5 Tua ahih kei leh keima hutna sungah amaute hong om hen la, amaute in kei tawh kilemna hong bawlin keimah tawh amaute hong kilem ta uh hen,” Topa in ci ding hi." 
Isaiah27:6 Hong tung ding hunah Jakob in zung kha ding a, Israel palhin dawnkhia ding a, leitung khempeuh a gah tawh kidimsak ding hi." 
Isaiah27:7 Pasian in Israel-te’ galte a vatgawp bangin Israel-te vatgawp ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amau a thatte a kithah bangin Israel-te kithat ahi hiam? 
Isaiah27:8 A kithukkim dingin amaute sal suahsakna tawh gim a pia hi. Nisuahna huihpi in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a khinkhia hi. 
Isaiah27:9 Israel in suang tawh a kibawl biakna tau khempeuh suangkang satvui a batsak ciangin Asherah milimte le paknamtui taute a dinglai om nawn lo hi. Hih thu hangin Jakob’ mawhna kimaisakin a mawhna kilakkhiatsak hi. 
Isaiah27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a muanhuai khuapi pen gamlak bangin amah guakin omin, mi’ tenna mun pen kitaisanin kinusia hi. Tua lai-ah bawngno gamta-in lum a, singhiangte a kheuh hi." 
Isaiah27:11 A hiangte a keu ciangin kitan hi. Nupite hong pai-in mei-in cih uh hi. Hih mite in khentel theihna nei lo ahih ciangin amaute a bawlpa in amaute hehpih lo ding a, amaute a piangsak pa in amaute tungah maipha lak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah27:12 Israel mite aw, tua ni ciangin Eufratis gunpi panin Egypt luipi dongin Topa in thu hong khen ding a, note khat khatin hong kikaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah27:13 Tua ni ciangin peengkul lianpi khat kitum ding a, Assiria gam sunga a mangthang mite le Egypt gam sunga a kihawlkhia mite hong pai-in Jerusalem mual siangtho tungah Topa hong bia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah28:1 Israel Kumpi gam in siatna a thuak ding hita hi. Zu a kham, a gam makaite’ lu tungah a om pak tawh a kibawl Kumpi lukhu bangin a minthanna maimangta hi. A lutang uh paknamtui kinuh napi-in zukhamin tukmangkhin uh hi." 
Isaiah28:2 En un, a vang a lian, a hat mahmah mi khat Topa in nei hi. A susia huihpi gialpi, tuikhang le a thahat huihpi bangin amah in leilak dengawpna ding hi." 
Isaiah28:3 Israel zukham makaite in a kiphatsakpih kumpi lukhu pen khenuai-ah kituancil ding hi. 
Isaiah28:4 Tua a kiphasak zukham makaite’ minthanna pen tuk tun ma-in a om theipal min tawh kibang ding a, mi khat in tua theigah a muh ciangin lo-in a nekpah bangin maimang lel ding hi." 
Isaiah28:5 Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa pen ama mi a omlaite a dingin minthanna kumpi lukhu le hoihna lukhu hi ding hi. 
Isaiah28:6 Thukhenin a tupa tungah thutang lungsim guan ding a, khuapikulh hong luh galte a notkhia ding mite tungah hanna lungsim guan ding hi." 
Isaiah28:7 Hih mite zong leenggahzu tawh hoi-in khamtheihzu tawh awn uh hi. Siampite le kamsangte nangawn zukhamin hoi uh hi. Kamsangte in zu kham lua uh ahih manin Pasian’ muhsak maangmuhnate theithei lo uh a, siampite in zong zu kham lua uh ahih manin a thukhen dingte uh khen thei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah28:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh sabuai tung khempeuh a luak uh tawh kidim a, a nit lohna mun om lo hi." 
Isaiah28:9 Amaute in kei hong phunsan uh a, “Amah in kua tungah hilh a, kua tungah thugen-a kinei ahi hiam? Angsung panin a kilakhia, nawi tawh a kikhen tung naungekte a hilha kinei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah28:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bang hilel hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Isaiah28:11 A mantakin, note in ka thugen na ngaih kei uhleh Topa in a pau na theih loh uh gamdang mite, note tungah thu hong hilhsak ding hi." 
Isaiah28:12 Topa in note tungah tawlngakna le lungnopna hong pia napi-in, note in ama thu na ngai kei uh hi." 
Isaiah28:13 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in note tungah, mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bangin hong hilh ding ahi hi. Tua ciangin na kalsuanna khempeuh uhah na puk ding uh a, note liamin, thangah awkin, salin hong kipaipih ding hi." 
Isaiah28:14 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua sungah hih mite a uk, a kiphasak no uliante aw, Topa ’ thu za un!" 
Isaiah28:15 “Eite in sihna tawh thuciamna khat i bawl khin a, Leinuai tawh thukimna khat i neizo hi. A tuumcip ding tuiciin hong tun ciangin eite hong ban lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zuauthu i bel a, zuauna-ah i bu hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Isaiah28:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, keimah in Zion sungah bulpi ding khat, suang, a kize-etsa suang, a manpha innkiu suang, bulpi muanhuai khat ka koih hi. Tua suang tungah, ‘Hih a um mi in lungkhamna tuaklo ding hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Isaiah28:17 Keimah in thutang pen khaukhai bangin ka bawl ding a, thuman pen khaukhai sikbawk bangin ka bawl ding hi. Gial in na zuau buk uh dengkhia ding a, tui in na bukna mun uh susia ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah28:18 Tua ciangin sihna tawh na thuciamna uh kiphiat ding a, Leinuai tawh na thukimna uh kip lo ding hi. A tuumcip ding tuiciin in a hong nawk ciangin note hong sugawp ding hi." 
Isaiah28:19 Hong nawk sialin note hong ban ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zingsang khat khit zingsang khat, sun le zanin hong nawk tawntung ding hi. Topa ’ tung panin na zak uh thute a banbanin launa lianpi vive hi ding hi." 
Isaiah28:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh puanbuk sungah khe khuan nadingin lupna tom lua a, silh dingin puanza neu lua hi, a cih tawh na kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah28:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang ama bawlte a bawl ding le a lamdang ama nasep a sem dingin Perazim Mual tungah a sep bangin Topa in hong sem ding a, Gibeon kuama a heh bangin amah hong heh ding hi." 
Isaiah28:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, note hong kikhihna a to mahmahin kibawl kha ding ahih manin thusim loin om kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonpite’ Topa Pasian ’ tung panin gambuppi-ah siatna ding thukhenna ka za khin hi." 
Isaiah28:23 Na bil uh hong ngat unla, ka aw hong za un. Ngai unla, ka thugenna hong za un." 
Isaiah28:24 Lokho pa in khaici tuhna ding a lo kho niloh ahi hiam? Amah in lei kalkhamin git niloh ahi hiam? 
Isaiah28:25 Amah in lei a zalhtam khit ciangin masala tang vawhin, kummin tang tuh a, mangbuhte a gualgualin tuhin, mangbuhham a omna ding sanah tuh a, mangbuhhamte a nawl hui-ah tuh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah28:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a manin kihilh a, ama Pasian in amah hilh hi." 
Isaiah28:27 Masalate buhcilna tawh kicil lo a, kummin tangte tungah buhcilna pei kihual lo hi. Ahih hangin masalate ciangkang tawh kisatkhia a, kumminte molhtum tawh kisat hi." 
Isaiah28:28 Mi khatpeuh in antang cilvui ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; amah in cil paisuak ngitnget lo hi. A sakol tawh buhcilna pei a kihualsak ciangin amah in kitamvuisak lo hi. 
Isaiah28:29 Hih zong Vanglian Topa ’ kiang pan a hong pai thu ahi hi. Amah pen thu lamlahna-ah lamdang mahmah a, pilna-ah lian mahmah hi." 
Isaiah29:1 Pasian’ biakna tau, Jerusalem khuapi, David in a sat khuapi, a sia ding hita hi. Kumte, a banbanin paipai sak unla, pawite zong a ngeina bangin kot paipai sak un." 
Isaiah29:2 Ahih hangin keimah in “Pasian biakna tau,” a kici tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Thumna le tauna om ding a, tua khuapi pen biakna halna biakna tau suak ding hi." 
Isaiah29:3 Na kimkotah hong umcihin tausangpite tawh kong um ding a, nangmah umcih nading dum ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah29:4 Tua ciangin leithuk sung panin nang na pau ding a, a niamna mun leisung panin nangma kammal hong ging ding hi. Nangma aw pen leisung panin sikha’ aw bangin hong ging ding a, na thugenna pen leisung panin hong phun suausuau ding hi." 
Isaiah29:5 Ahih hangin nangma gal honpite leivuineel leeng bang ding uh a, thukhual lo mihonpite ansi leeng bang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin tomkha sungin thakhat thu-in," 
Isaiah29:6 Vanglian Topa in vanging, zinling, a ging lianpi, pingpei le huihpi le, a kangtum thei meikuang tawh nang hong hon ding hi." 
Isaiah29:7 Tua ciangin Pasian biakna tau a do minam honpite khempeuh, tua khuapi le a kulhpi simin a lungkhamsakte khempeuh, zan a mangmat tawh kibangin maimang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:8 A gilkial mipa in a mangin an ne a, a khanlawh ciangin a gil a vah tuan lo, a dangtak mipa in a mangin tui dawn a, a dangtak pha tuan loin a gim mahmahin a khanlawh mah bangin Jerusalem khuapi a do mi khempeuh zong tuaci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:9 Lamdang kisasak unla lamdang a sa hi un! Kimittawsak unla a mittaw hi un! Leenggahzu a dawn lopi-in a zukham hi unla, khamtheihzu a ne lopi-in hoi un!" 
Isaiah29:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note’ sungah ihmut nopna lungsim hong guan a, amau’ mit ahi kamsangte mitsi sakin amau’ lutang ahi thu mutheite khuhcip hi." 
Isaiah29:11 Hih maangmuhnate khempeuh pen note a dingin ahihleh a kimatcip laibu sunga thu om tawh a kibang a suak hi. Mite in lai a sim thei pa khat tungah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Kimatcip ahih manin ka sim thei kei hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah29:12 Tua ciangin amaute in lai a sim thei lopa kiangah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih uh ciangin amah in, “Ka sim thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah29:13 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amaute’ lungsim kei tawh kigamla napi-in hih mite in a kam uh tawh kei kiangah hong pai uh a, a muk uh tawh kei hong pahtawi-in, amaute in kei hong kihtakna pen mihingte’ thupiak a zuihna uh ahi lel hi." 
Isaiah29:14 Tua ahih ciangin en un, hih mite tungah a tumdang le a lamdang ahi a lamdang nate ka bawlkik ding hi. Amau’ mipilte’ pilna kisia ding a, amau’ thu mutheite’ thu muhtel theihna kiseel ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah29:15 Topa ’ kiang panin amau’ thuvaihawmna a seelcip, khuamial sungah a gamta, “Kua in hong mu ding hiam? Kua in hong thei ding hiam?” a cite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah29:16 Note in na khempeuh a lehlamin na koih uh hi. Beelseek pa pen tungman bangin kingaihsun ding a, a kibawlsa na in a bawlpa tungah, “Amah in kei hong bawl lo hi,” ci ding ahi hiam? A kipiangsak na in a piangsak pa tungah, “Amah in theihna nei kei,” ci ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah29:17 Lebanon mual pen singno lo hoih suakin, singno lo hoih pen tulak a suahna ding hun tomno sung bek hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah29:18 Tua ni ciangin bilngongte in laibu sunga thute za ding a, lungzinna le khuamialna sung panin mittawte’ mit in mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:19 Mi’ nopnehte in Topa ’ sungah lungdamna thak ngah ding uh a, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ sungah mizawngte lungdam ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh kampauna tawh a khialh nadingun mite bawlin, kongpi sungah mi a thuhilhpa thang siahin, a thuman mipa pen zuauthu tawh a heikhia, thukhual lo mite a mawkna suakin, mi a thusim lo mite bei-in, siatna hih ding a sawm mite khempeuh kisusia ding hi." 
Isaiah29:21  
Isaiah29:22 Tua ahih ciangin Abraham a honkhia Topa in Jakob innkuan tawh kisai thu a genin-ah: “Jakob maizum nawn lo ding a, a mai khing nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah29:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima khut tawh ka bawlsa amau’ tate a muh uh ciangin amaute in keima min hong phat ding uh hi. Amaute in Jakob’ Siangtho Pa, a siangtho ahihna phawk ding uh a, Israel Pasian zahtakin kihta ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:24 Lungzingin a khial mite in thu theitel ta ding uh a, a phunphun mite in thuhilhna ngai ta ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:1 Topa in, “Kei’ ngimna hilopi-in thu vaihawmna a semkhia, kei’ lungsim lopi-in kipawlna dang a bawl manun khialhna a bawl thuahthuah; keimah thu hong dong lopi-in Faro’ hutna sung a bel ding le Egypt’ liahna a zong dingin Egypt gamah paisuk dingin a kuankhia, a lehdo mite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah30:2  
Isaiah30:3 Tua ahih ciangin Faro’ hutna pen na maizumna uh hi ding a, Egypt liahna sungah na bukna uh nomau’ zahhuaina hi ding hi." 
Isaiah30:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ uliante Zoan khua-ah va tung uh a, amau’ tangmite in Hanes khua a va phak uh hangin," 
Isaiah30:5 amaute tungah phattuamna a pia thei lo, maizumna le mindaina cih loh buang huhna le phattuamna bangmah a pia thei lo Egypt mite’ hangin Judah mi khempeuh in maizumna ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:6 Negeb gam a om ganhingte tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Amaute in humpinelkai nu le humpinelkai pa, gul gunei le a leeng thei gulpi a omna, lungkhamna le gimna gam nawkin, amau’ hauhnate la nungzangah amau’ sumte kalaoh tungah suanin, amaute tungah phattuamna bangmah a pia thei lo mite tungah a puak uh hi." 
Isaiah30:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt’ huhna bangmah man loin a hawmpi ahi hi. Tua ahih manin, “Taang loin a tu hithiat Egypt,” ci-in min ka phuah hi." 
Isaiah30:8 Tu-in pai inla, hong tung lai ding hunte-ah teci ahi ngitnget dingin amaute’ mai-ah suangpek tungah gelh inla, laibu khat sungah at in." 
Isaiah30:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen a lehdo mite, a zuauthei tapate, Topa ’ thuhilhna a ngai nuam lo mite ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah30:10 Amaute in thu mutheite tungah, “Mu kei un,” ci uh a, kamsangte tungah, “Kote’ tungah thuman hong gen kei un. Kote tungah thuzol bek hong gen unla, thutak ahi lote hong gen un." 
Isaiah30:11 Lampi nusia-in, lamzin panin pial unla, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ thu hong zasak kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah30:12 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa in, “Note in hih thu simmawhin, zawhthawhna le khemna suangin, tuate muang na hih manun," 
Isaiah30:13 hih mawhna pen note a dingin kulh sangpi khat khangkham a, lawtkhia-in a cim dektak, theihkholh lohin a cim vat tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:14 Tua cipna pen iplah ding om nawn loin a kidengkham beelseek pa’ beel themte meikhuka om meilakna ding ahi zongin, tuikhuka om tui dipna ding ahi zongin a om nawn het lo tawh kibang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, Topa Pasian in, “Kihei kikna le khawlna bek tawh note in suahtakna na ngah ding uh hi. Daitakin omna le muanna pen nomau’ thahatna hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin note na tuaci kei uh a," 
Isaiah30:16 “Hilo! Sakol tung tuangin manlang takin i tai ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note na taikhia ding uh hi. “Sakol zaptel tungah i tuang ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note hong delh mite zong zaptel ding hi." 
Isaiah30:17 Mual sang dawna om dial khuam ahi a, mualtung a limlahna tawh a kibangin ahi zongin, note hong kinusiat dong matengin, mi khat’ tawnna tawh mi tulkhat tai-in, mihing nga’ tawnna tawh note khempeuh na taimang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:18 Tua ahih ciangin note hong hehpih nuamin Topa in hong ngak a, note tungah hehpihna hong lah ding amah kipakta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thutang Pasian hi a, amah a muangte khempeuh thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Isaiah30:19 Jerusalem khuasunga a teng, Zion sunga om mite aw, note na kap nawn kei ding uh hi. Note’ kahna aw hangin Topa in hong hehpih taktak ding a, amah in a zak ciangin note hong dawng ding hi." 
Isaiah30:20 Topa in note tungah cihmawhna le gimna hong tunsak hangin amahmah in note hong hilh ding a, note in amah na mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:21 Taklamah na kihei ciang uh ahi a, veilamah na kihei ciang uh ahi zongin, “Hih pen lampi hi, hih tawn un,” cihna aw, na nunglam panun na bil un a za ding hi." 
Isaiah30:22 Tua ciangin note in ngun tawh a kizut na milimte uh le kham a kiluan, a kisung na milimte uh na ninsak ding uh hi. Nin bangin tuate na thehthang ding uh a, tuate tungah, “Beimang ta un!” na ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:23 Khaici na tuh nadingun amah in guah hong zusak ding a, lei panin a piang an hoih tampi tak hong pia ding hi. Tua ni ciangin gankhahna, mun zaina-ah na ganhingte un lopa ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:24 Lo a kho bawngtalte le late in kawbia le tu-ka tawh a kitoksa an al ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah30:25 Na galte uh’ tausangte pukin mi tampi a sih ni-in, mual sang le mual neute tung khempeuhah luitui luang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:26 Tua tham loin, Topa in ama mite’ liamma tuamin ama satna meimate a damsak ni ciangin, khataang pen nitaang bang ding a, nitaang pen ni sagih sunga taangzah bangin a zah sagihin a taang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:27 En un, Topa ’ vangliatna le a minthanna vang, gamlapi panin kimu thei hi. Meikuang le meikhu in ama hehna hong kilangsak a, ama kampaunate, mei bangin a kuang hi." 
Isaiah30:28 Na khempeuh a tai tuikhang bangin ama mai-ah huihpi nungsak a, minam dangte nawtin sugawp a, amau’ gitloh vaihawmnate a suksiatsak hi." 
Isaiah30:29 Ahi zongin no Pasian’ mite in ahihleh biakna pawi a kikham ni zan a bangin la na sa ding uh hi. Israel-te a hu Topa ’ biakinn-ah a pai dingin tamngai aw ginna zui-in a kuankhiate bangin na lungdam ding uh hi. 
Isaiah30:30 Topa in heh mahmahna le a kangtum thei meikuang sung panin vanging, huihpi, le gialpi tawh, ama liatna minthanna aw kizasakin, ama khut a vik sukna kimusak ding hi." 
Isaiah30:31 Amah in a ciangkhut tawh a sat ciangin, Assiria mite in Topa ’ aw kihta mahmah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:32 Topa in amaute gim pia-in ciang tawh a satna a gingte tawh kituakin khuang le laiza lasaknate tumin na gingsak ding uh hi. Amah in a khut vikin amaute a do ding hi. 
Isaiah30:33 Assiria kumpipa a kihalna ding mei phualpi mun, sawtpekin kibawl khinzo hi. Kumpipa a dingin a baihsa-in kikoih a, a mi halna pen lianin kisangsak a, sing a sangpi-in vum venvan hi. Topa in kaat kuang hu sangkhia ding a, tua mei phualpi tawhkuang ding hi." 
Isaiah31:1 Egypt gamah huhna ngen dingin paisuk a, sakol suanin nei-in leengte a tam manin muang a, sakol tung tuangte a hat mahmah manin muang napi-in Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa a suang lo, Topa thu a dong lote in gimna ngah ta hen!" 
Isaiah31:2 Ahih hangin amah pilin gimna tungsak a, thu a gensate dokkik loin, siatna a bawl mite le mawhna nasep a seppihte gim a pia hi." 
Isaiah31:3 Egypt mite mihing hi a, Pasian hi lo hi. Amau’ sakolte sa hi a, kha hi lo hi. Topa in a khut a zan ciangin a huhpa pukin, huhna a ngah pa tuk ding a, amaute khempeuh siakhawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah31:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: Humpinelkai ahi a, humpinelkai khanglai a hat mahmah in ahi zongin a sa nek ding a ngik ciangin tua humpi a do dingin tuucing honpi khat kikaikhawmin, amaute’ otna hangin lau tuan hetloin, amaute’ gamlumna hangin a sin a dawi tuan loh mah bangin Vanglian Topa zong Zion Mual tungah galdo dingin kuansuk ding hi." 
Isaiah31:5 A bu a hongin, a kot lamlam vasate bangin Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem dal ding hi. Amah in dalin khahkhia ding a, amah susia loin suaktasak ding hi." 
Isaiah31:6 Israel mite aw, nakpitakin na do pa uh’ lamah kihei kik un." 
Isaiah31:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in no a dingin na bawlsa uh, mawhna ahi na ngun milimte uh na paihkhiat hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah31:8 “Assiria pen mihing’ namsau ahi lo, namsau khat tawh puk ding a, mihing’ namsau ahi lo, namsau khat in susia ding hi. Namsau panin tai ding uh a, a tangvalte uh zawhthawh thu tawh nasem dingin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah31:9 Amau’ belh a kumpipa uh a launa hangin tai ding a, buaina hangin a uliante in a dialkhai uh taisan ding uh hi,” ama meikuang Zion-ah a om, ama meikhuk Jerusalem khua-ah a om Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah32:1 En un, ni khat ni ciangin thuman takin kumpi khat in hong uk ding a, uliante in thutang tawh hong uk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:2 Amaute pen huihpi panin belhna, guahpi panin bukna bang ding uh hi. Sehnel gam sungah a luang tui bang ding uh a, nisa gam sungah a om suangpi liim bang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:3 Tua ciangin amau’ mit in mi cimawhte’ kisapna mu ding uh a, amau’ bil in mi cimawhte’ thugen ngai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:4 Amaute lungtomin hi phangphang nawn lo ding uh a, deihsakna lungsim tawh a kitel takin thu gen hiathiat ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:5 Mihaite pen mi thupi kici nawn lo ding a, mi ginalote pen mi zahtakhuai kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah32:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihai in haina thu gen a, a hoihin gamtat loh ding, Topa ’ thu a hoih lopi-in gen ding, a gilkialte’ an duhna a phat loh nading le a dangtakte in tui dawn ding a neih theih loh nadingin, ama lungsim in mawhna bawl ding a sawm hi." 
Isaiah32:7 Mi ginalo’ ginat lohna siahuai mahmah hi. Zuauna kam tawh mizawngte a siasak ding le mi cimawhte’ thu a thuman ciang nangawnin a siasak dingin amah in gitloh nasepna a bawl hi. 
Isaiah32:8 Ahih hangin mipi lungsim a nei mi in na a hoihte geel a, thuhoih nate-ah a pang hi." 
Isaiah32:9 Nuamtakin a om hithiat numeite aw, tho unla, ka aw za un. Nomau’ tumtakin a lungkim tanute aw, ka thugenna na ngai un." 
Isaiah32:10 Nomau’ tumtakin a lungkim numeite aw, kum khat val zek khit ciangin na linglawng ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah kum hong sia ding a, singgah lawhna hun hong tung lo ding hi." 
Isaiah32:11 Nuamtakin a om hithiat numeite aw, ling un. Nomau tumtakin a lungkimte aw, linglawng un. Na puan uh hawkkhia-in na tangguakun om unla na kawng uhah puanhampi teng un." 
Isaiah32:12 A hoih mahmah lote le tampi a gah leengguite a siatna, keima mite’ leitangah ling le lingkungte a pona, lungdamna khuapi sungah lungdamna a omna innte a siatna hangin dahin na dip uh hum un." 
Isaiah32:13  
Isaiah32:14 Kumpi innte kinusia-in, mi tampi a omna kumpi khuapi kilawi ding hi. Mual le tausangte zong kisiagawp ding a, late le tuuhonte in gamtatna munin nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kha hong puak ding hi. Leitang siate lei hoih suakkik ding a, lo-a ante hoih mahmahin tulak bang ding hi." 
Isaiah32:16 Tua ciangin gam sung mun khempeuhah thutang om ding a, thu a manin kisem ding hi." 
Isaiah32:17 Tua ciangin thumanna hangin nopna om ding a, thumanna hangin daihna le lungmuan tawntungna om ding hi." 
Isaiah32:18 Ka mihingte pen kilem takin a tenna, lungmuang takin a omna, daitakin a tawlngakna munah om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:19 (Tua ciangin tulak kolhsiang ding a, a khuapi pen cimzan ding hi.)" 
Isaiah32:20 Tui tampi a omna-ah khai tuh a, bawngtal le late a ut utna-ah a tasak note pen mi nuamsa na hi uh hi." 
Isaiah33:1 Hong kisusia nai lo, mi a susiapa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hita hi. Kuamah in hong khem nai loh, mi khem pa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hita hi. Na suksiat nawn loh ciangin nang hong kisusia ding a, na khem nawn loh ciangin nang hong kikhem ding hi." 
Isaiah33:2 Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in; nang kong muang uh hi. A tawntungin kote hong hu inla, lungkham hunin hong honkhia in." 
Isaiah33:3 Nangma vanging hangin mite tai uh a, nangma thawhtohna hangin minamte kithehthang hi." 
Isaiah33:4 Tangngol in na a khop bangin amau van kinusiate kaikhawm a, kauphe honpi bangin van tawmin mite phe zaizai hi." 
Isaiah33:5 A sangna munah teng ahih manin Topa kipahtawi hi. Amah in thutang le thuman tawh Jerusalem dimsak ding hi. 
Isaiah33:6 Amah pen nangma hunte a kipna, hotkhiatna a kicinna, pilna le theihna hi ding hi. Topa kihtakna pen ama sumgum hi ding hi." 
Isaiah33:7 En un, galhangte huhna ngenin kiko uh a, kilemna ding palai semte nakpitakin kap uh hi." 
Isaiah33:8 Lam lianpite gambulak suak a, kuamah khualzinin pai ngam nawn lo uh hi. Thuciamnate kipeksatin, thukimnasate kipalsat a, khatlekhat kizahtakna om nawn lo hi." 
Isaiah33:9 Leitang kinusiacipin om mawk hi. Lebanon muala tulak singte vulgawp a, Sharon gam lei hoihpen sehnel gam bang ta hi. Bashan le Karmel muala singtehte pulhmang khinta hi." 
Isaiah33:10 Topa in minam dangte kiangah, “Tu-in ka gamtang ding a, ka vangliatna ka lak ding hi. Tu-in kei hong kipahtawi ta ding hi." 
Isaiah33:11 Na geelnate uh a kimanna om lo a, na nasepnate uh a mawkna ahi hi. No le no a kisusia na hi uh hi." 
Isaiah33:12 Leikang ngah nadingin suangkang a kihal bangin na vui suak ding uh a, meikhuk sunga a kihaltum lingkungte na bang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah33:13 Gamlapi-a a om mite aw, ka sepna thu za un. A nai-a a om mite aw, ka vangliatna thei un." 
Isaiah33:14 Zion-a a om mawhnei mite lau uh a, Pasian’ thu a ngaihsun lo mite lau-in lingcip uh hi. Amaute in, “Pasian’ thukhenna pen a kuang tawntung mei tawh kibang hi. Tua bang meikuang kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah33:15 Thumanin gamta-in thutang na gen uhleh na suakta ding uh hi. Na vangliatna uh mizawngte khemna-in zang kei unla, sumgolh deih kei un. Mi thah ding le siatna gamtat ding a vaihawmte tawh kipawl kei un." 
Isaiah33:16 Tua hileh na tangtung ding uh a, kulh muanhuai mahmah sungah a om bangin lungnuam takin na om ding uh hi. Annek tuidawn na kitasam kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:17 Tua ciangin a thupi mahmah kumpipa na mu ding uh a, a zai mahmah a gam zong na en ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:18 Nidangin na kihtak uh gamdangmi siahdongte, siahkhawmte, thukan mite, na phawk nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:19 Na theihtheih loh uh, a kitel lo kampau a zang, na teltheih lohun a pau bualbual, mi kihisakte na mu nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:20 Pawite i bawlna khuapi Zion en un! Daitakin a kitenna mun, a khetphimte kidokkhia ngei loin a khaute a tat ngei lo, a kikhin thei het lo puanbuk a bang, Jerusalem khuapi, na mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:21 Tua khua sungah Topa in ama minthanna vang hong langsak ding a, a zai gunte le a zai lui geite-ah i teng ding hi. Tua tuite tungah ei hong do ding gal gunkuang hong kihot nawn lo ding a, gal teembaw zong hong pai nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah33:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen eite’ thukhen, Topa pen eite hong ukpa, Topa pen eite’ kumpi ahi hi. Amah in eite hong honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah33:23 Gal teembaw khaute kol a, ama omna ding mun sanah gunkuang puan khuam lenkip zo lo a, gunkuang puan kizal thei lo hi. Tua ciangin galte’ neihsate kihawmkeek ding a, khebaite nangawn in van ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:24 I gamah a teng mite kuamah in, “Ka ci na hi,” ci nawn lo ding uh a, mawhna khempeuh kimaisak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:1 Minam khempeuhte aw, thu za dingin hong pai un. Mihingte aw, hong ngai un! Leitang le a tungah a om khempeuhte aw, ngai un. Leitung buppi le a tung panin a hong pai mi khempeuh in ngai un." 
Isaiah34:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam khempeuh tungah Topa lunghamin, amaute khempeuh tungah heh mahmah a, a simang dingin amaute koihin, thah dingin a pia khinta hi." 
Isaiah34:3 A kithat amau’ mite kilawnkhia ding a, a siluang hawmte uih semsem ding hi. Amau’ sisan in mual khempeuh sansak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:4 Vantunga a om khempeuh muatmang ding a, laidal bangin vantungte kizial ding hi. Leenggui panin a tehte pulhin, theikung panin a tehte a pulh bangin aksi hon khempeuh pulh ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka namsau in vantungah a sep ding khempeuh a zawh khit ciangin, en un, a siamang dinga ka sehsa Edom mite tungah thu a khen dingin hong kumsuk ding hi." 
Isaiah34:6 Topa in namsau khat nei hi. Sisan tawh kidim ding a, biakpiakna tuuno si le keel si, tuutalte’ kal thau tawh a kizolsak bang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Bozrah khua-ah hih biakpiakna nei ding a, Edom gamah hih bang tampi thahna omsak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:7 Gamsial talte amaute tawh tukkhawm ding a, bawngtalno gehsate le bawngtal hatte tukkhawm ding hi. Amau’ gam pen sisan tawh kidiah ding a, amau’ leitang pen sathau in nipsak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:8 Topa in Zion a hotkhiat ding, a galte a thuksak ding hun khat a nei hi." 
Isaiah34:9 Luitui khempeuh kultaltui suak ding a, leitang pen kaat suak ding hi. Gam sung khempeuh pen a kuang kultaltui a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:10 Sun le zanin mit lo ding a, vantung lamah a khu kahto ngitnget ding hi. Khang khat pan khang khat, a hawmguakin om ding a, kuamah in nawk ngei nawn het lo ding hi." 
Isaiah34:11 Ahih hangin mu le sakuh in gam sung teng luah ding uh a, keising le va-akte om ding uh hi. Tua gam pen gamsimtham suakin, hawmsuak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:12 Kumpi om lo Gam, ci-in amaute in min phuak ding uh a, a ulian khempeuhte a mawkna hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:13 Kumpi inn liante sungah lingkung po ding a, kulh a nei khua sungah laho le thangling kungte a po ding hi. Ngiate’ an zonna mun suakin, vasa-kalaohte’ omna mun hi ding hi." 
Isaiah34:14 Sangak le ngiate kikhawl ding uh a, keeldawi in a lawmte sam ding hi. Dawi zong hong tuaksukin ama omna ding mun a zong ding hi." 
Isaiah34:15 Tua munah keising in bu tomin, tua lai-ah tui-in keuh ding a, ama liimah a note huai ding hi. Musite zong kikhawm tuahin a nupa ciat un om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:16 Topa ’ laibu sung panin zong unla hih thu sim un. Hih ganhingte khempeuh khat beek zong mangthang lo ding a, lawm sam khat zong om lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu pia khinzo a, amahmah in amaute kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah34:17 Amah in amaute a dingin leitang hawmsak ding a, amau’ tanh ding ciat a pia ding hi. Amaute in tua gam nei tawntung ding uh a, khang khat pan khang khat dongin teng paisuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:1 Gamlak le lei keuna gam lungdam ding a, sehnel gam lungdamin palhkhia ding hi. Unok pak bangin" 
Isaiah35:2 tampi takin palhkhia ding a, lungnopna le lasakna tawh lungdam ding hi. Lebanon mual a minthanna, Karmel mual le Sharon mual a minliatna tua leitang in ngah ding hi. Mi khempeuh in Topa ’ minthanna, i Pasian’ liatna mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:3 A zaw khutte khauhsak unla, a no khukte kipsak un." 
Isaiah35:4 Lungsim patau-in, a lauthawng mite kiangah, “Thakhauh un, lau kei un! En un, na galte uh tungah phu hong laksak dingin Pasian hong pai ding a, amah in note hong honkhia ding hi,” ci un." 
Isaiah35:5 Tua ciangin mittawte’ mit kihong ding a, bilngongte’ bil kihong ding hi." 
Isaiah35:6 Tua ciangin khebai mipa diangin lam ding a, a pau thei lo mipa in lungdamin la sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlakah tui hong phulkhia ding a, sehnel gam sungah luitui hong luang ding hi." 
Isaiah35:7 A sa mahmah sehnelte bualtui hong suak ding a, a keugaw leitang pen ciktui tawh hong kidim ding hi. Ngiate’ omna ngei leitang pen nawngpi suakin, lopa, pumpeeng, le mau, a po ding hi." 
Isaiah35:8 Tua lai-ah lam lianpi khat om ding a, Lampi Siangtho kici ding hi. A siang lo mite in tua tung tawn ngei lo ding a, mihaite in tua lam a zui mite khialsak nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah35:9 Tua lai-ah humpinelkai om lo ding a, sasialne ganhing khat peuhpeuh hong pai lo ding hi. Tua lai-ah ganhing lauhuaite kimu lo ding hi. Topa ’ hotkhiatsa mite in tua lampi tawnin hong ciah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:10 Topa ’ hotkhiatsa mite hong ciahkikin, lungdam tawntungna mai pua-in la sa kawmin Jerusalem-ah hong tung ding uh hi. Amaute in lungdamna le kipakna ngah ding uh a, dahna le khuisatna om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah36:1 Kumpi Hezekiah in a uk zawh kum sawmli le ngana kumin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in Judah gam sunga khuapi muanhuai khempeuh simin a la hi. 
Isaiah36:2 Lakhish khua panin Assiria kumpipa in Jerusalem khua-a kumpi Hezekiah a lut ding a gen dingin ama nuai-a ulian khat le galkap honpi a sawl hi. Puansawppa’ nasepna phual zuatna lampi-a bual tungnung tui lampi gei-ah a ulianpa a khawl hi. 
Isaiah36:3 Tua ciangin amah tawh a kimu dingin Hilkiah’ tapa ahi kumpi innsung a saipa Eliakim le lai-at pa Shebna, le Asaf’ tapa ahi thuciamteh pa Joah hong paikhia uh hi." 
Isaiah36:4 Tua ciangin a ulianpa in amaute kiangah a genna panin, “Hezekiah kiangah, ‘Kumpi lian ahi Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih na lungmuanna uhah bang siksan na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah36:5 Kampau lel pen galdo nadingin vaihawmna le vangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Kei nong lehdo nadingun kua suang na hi uh hiam? 
Isaiah36:6 En un, ama tunga a kingam mipa’ khut a sun ding, a kikuaitansa pumpeeng ciangkhut tawh a kibang Egypt na suang uh hi. Amah a muang khempeuhte’ tungah Egypt kumpipa Faro, tua pumpeeng bang hi lel hi." 
Isaiah36:7 Ahih hangin note in, “ Topa ka Pasian uh ka suang uh hi,” a ci-a kinei na hih uhleh ama mun sangte le biakna taute Hezekiah in lakhia-in, Judah le Jerusalem tungah, “Hih biakna tau mai-ah na bia ding uh hi,” ci hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah36:8 Tu-in hong pai unla, ka topa Assiria kumpipa tawh kiciamna khat bawl un. A tungah a tuang ding mi na ngahzawh nak-uhleh sakol tulnih kong pia ding hi." 
Isaiah36:9 Egypt mite’ leengte le sakol galkapte muanna tawh ka topa’ nasemte lak panin a neupen khat ahi galkapmang khat bek nangawn bangci-in notzo ding na hi uh hiam? 
Isaiah36:10 Tua tham loin, hih gam a susia dingin Topa ’ thu loin hong pai ka hi hiam? Topa in kei kiangah, “Paito-in hih gam sim inla, susia in,” hong ci hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah36:11 Tua ciangin Eliakim, Shebna, le Joah in a ulianpa kiangah, “Kote in thei ngawn ka hih manun na nasemte tungah Aram pau tawh hong gen hoh in. Kulh tunga om mite’ zakna-ah Judah pau tawh thu nong gen loh nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah36:12 Ahih hangin a ulianpa in, “Hih thute na topa uh le note’ tung bekah gen ding a, amau’ ek mah ne-in amau’ zun mah dawnin note tawh a siakhawm ding kulh tunga a tu mite tungah a gen lo dingin ka topa in hong sawl sa na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Isaiah36:13 Tua ciangin a ulianpa dingto-in, Judah pau-in nakpitakin kiko a, “Assiria kumpi, kumpi lianpa’ thu za un!" 
Isaiah36:14 Kumpipa in, ‘Amah in note hong honkhia thei lo ding ahih manin Hezekiah’ khemsa-in om kei un." 
Isaiah36:15 “ Topa in eite hong honkhia taktak ding a, hih khuapi pen Assiria kumpipa khut sungah kipia lo ding hi,” ci-in Hezekiah in hong genna tawh na Topa uh muangkha kei un." 
Isaiah36:16 Hezekiah’ thu ngai kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: Kei tawh kilemna hong bawl unla kei kiangah hong pai un. Tua hileh kei hong pai-in, note’ gam tawh a kibang gam khat, an le leenggahzu gamah kong koih matengin note khempeuh in nomau’ leenggah ciat, nomau’ theigah ciat, na tuikhuk panun nomau tui ciat na ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah36:17  
Isaiah36:18 Hezekiah in, “ Topa in eite hong honkhia ding hi,” ci-in lam hong khialsak kha ding ahih ciangin kidawm un. Assiria kumpipa’ khutsung panin minam dangte’ pasian khatpeuh in ama gam honkhiazo ngei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamath gam le Arpad gam pasian-te koi-ah om ahi hiam? Sefarvaim gam pasian-te koi-ah om ahi hiam? Amaute in ka khutsung panin Samaria honkhiazo ahi hiam? 
Isaiah36:20 Topa in ka khutsung panin Jerusalem khua a hotkhiat nadingin, hih gamte khempeuh’ pasian lakah kua in ka khutsung panin a gam uh honkhiazo ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah36:21 Ahih hangin kumpipa in, “Dawng kei un,” ci-in thu piakhol ahih manin amaute daitakin om uh a, kam khat beek dawng lo uh hi." 
Isaiah36:22 Tua ciangin Hilkiah’ tapa ahi kumpi innsung a sai Eliakim, lai-at Shebna le Asaf’ tapa ahi thuciamteh pa Joah in a puan uh balkekin Hezekiah kiangah pai uh a, a ulianpa’ thugen teng a va gen uh hi." 
Isaiah37:1 Kumpi Hezekiah in a zak ciangin dahin ama puante balkek a, Topa ’ inn sungah a pai hi." 
Isaiah37:2 Tua ciangin amah in innsung saipa Eliakim, lai-at pa Shebna, le siampi khangham teng dahna limin puanhampi silh kawmin Amoz’ tapa kamsangpa Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi." 
Isaiah37:3 Amaute in Isaiah kiangah, “Hezekiah in, ‘Tuni pen lungkham ni, tai ngah ni, mindai ni ahi hi. Naungek a suah hun tung napi-in a hingkhia zo lo nupi tawh i kibang hi." 
Isaiah37:4 A nungta Pasian a zahko dingin ama topa, Assiria kumpipa in a sawl a ulianpa’ thugente, Topa na Pasian in za hen la, tua bang thu a gente gim pia tahen. Tua ahih ciangin a omlai i mite a dingin thu ngen in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Isaiah37:5 Kumpi Hezekiah’ nasemte Isaiah kiangah a tun uh ciangin 
Isaiah37:6 Isaiah in amaute tungah, “Na topa uh kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Assiria kumpipa’ nasemte in keimah a hong simmawhna na zaksa uh thute hangin lau kei un." 
Isaiah37:7 En un, amah in kam lengsawn khat za-in ama gamah a ciahkikna ding lungsim ka guan ding a, ama gam sungah namsau tawh amah ka tuksak ding hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:8 Tua ciangin a ulianpa ciahkik a, Assiria kumpipa in Libnah khua a simna-ah a va pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Lakhish khua a nusiat khitna thu zazo ahih manin tua lai a va zuanpah ahi hi." 
Isaiah37:9 Tu-in, Ethiopia kumpi Tirhakah in Assiria gam a sim dingin Egypt galkap honpi tawh a hong kuanna thu Assiria mite in a za uh hi. Hih thu a zak ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Hezekiah kiangah kamtaite sawl a," 
Isaiah37:10 “Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Assiria kumpipa’ khut sungah Jerusalem kipia lo ding hi, ci-a thu hong ciam na suan Pasian’ khemsa-in om kei in." 
Isaiah37:11 En in, Assiria kumpite in gam khempeuhah a bawlna, a suksiatmang khitna na zazo hi. Nang hong kisuaktasak tuan ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ka pu ka pate un a suksiat minamte, Gozan minam, Haran minam, Rezef minamte, le Telassar khua-a om Eden mite pen amau’ pasian-te in honkhiazo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sefarvaim khuapi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa ahih kei leh Ivvah kumpipate koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ va ci un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiah in kamtaite tung panin a lai puak uh sangin, a lai a sim hi. Topa ’ inn-ah Hezekiah paito-in, Topa ’ mai-ah a lai a zal hi." 
Isaiah37:15 Hezekiah in Topa ’ tungah thu ngenin," 
Isaiah37:16 “Vanglian Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian, Kherub-te tunga a tupa aw, nangmah bek, leitung kumpi gam khempeuhte’ Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah in vantung le leitung na bawl khin hi." 
Isaiah37:17 Topa aw, na bil hong ngat inla hong za in. Topa aw, na mit hak inla hong mu in. Sennakherib in a nungta Pasian a zahkona, hong khak hih thute khempeuh za in." 
Isaiah37:18 Topa aw, Assiria kumpite in mi khempeuh le a gam khempeuh susiamang khin taktak a," 
Isaiah37:19 amaute’ pasian-te pen meikhuk sungah paihsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen pasian hi loin mite’ khut tawh a kibawl sing le suangte ahi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuate kisusia hi. 
Isaiah37:20 Tua ahih ciangin Topa kote’ Pasian aw, nang bek Topa na hihna thu leitung kumpi gam khempeuh in a theih nadingin, tu-in ama khutsung panin kote hong honkhia in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:21 Tua ahih ciangin Amoz’ tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah tungah thu puak a, “Israel-te’ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai thu, kei kiangah thu hong ngen khin na hih ciangin," 
Isaiah37:22 amah tawh kisai-in Topa ’ thugen hih bang ahi hi: ‘Sennakherib aw, Jerusalem mite in nang hong simmawhin hong zahko uh hi. Jerusalem mite in na nungah a lu hong peisan lel uh hi." 
Isaiah37:23 Nang in kua zahko-in kua a simmawh na hi hiam? Nang in kua’ tungah na aw sangsakin kiphasak na hi hiam? Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, kei’ tungah a hong tuaci na hi hi." 
Isaiah37:24 Nangmah in na nasempa zangin Topa na zahko a, Lebanon mual dong pek, mual sangte tungah ka leeng tampite tawh ka pai khin hi. Taamtak sing a sangpente, taksing hoihpente ka phuk khin hi. A sangpen mun, tulak a thukpenna munah ka pai khin hi." 
Isaiah37:25 Tuikhuk to-in tui ka dawn a, Egypt luituite khempeuh ka galkapte’ khenuai tawh ka keusak hi, na ci hi." 
Isaiah37:26 “‘Sawt pek a kipan ka ngaihsutsa ahih lamtak za ngei nai lo na hi hiam? Nang in khuapi muanhuaite susia gawpin ninbulomtang na suahsakna ding, a sunga teng mite a thahatna uh bei-in, lungkia-in a ommawkna ding, amaute pen lolai-a om kungnote le lopa ngeekte, innkhum zangah a po, a khankhit ma-in a keutum lopate tawh a kibatna ding, tu-in ka tunsak ding thute pen tanglai pek panin ka ngaihsutsa thu ahi hi." 
Isaiah37:27  
Isaiah37:28 “‘Na omna mun, na vaksuk na vaktohna le keima tungah na hehna ka thei hi." 
Isaiah37:29 Keima tungah nang hehin, na kiphatsakna thu keima tungah a thu hong tung ahih manin, na nakah sikkawi bulhin, na kamah kamkaih hong bulhin, nong kuanna lampi lam mahah nang kong ciahkiksak ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Isaiah37:30 “Nang Hezekiah a dingin hih in lim hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin anli pote na ne ding uh a, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a pote na ne leuleu ding uh hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin an na la ding uh a, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah37:31 Tua ciangin, Judah minam sung panin a suaktalai mite in singkung bangin zung khasuk kikin, gah na gahto kik ding uh hi." 
Isaiah37:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh a omlaite, Jerusalem pan ahi zongin a suakta teng, Zion Mual panin ahi zongin paikhia ding uh hi. Vanglian Topa ’ deihluatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah37:33 “Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih khuapi sungah amah hong pai lo ding a, thaltang zong lawn lo ding hi. Lum tawh hong pai lo ding a, galsimna ding panmun zong hong bawl lo ding hi." 
Isaiah37:34 Hong kuanna lampi mahah amah ciahkik ding a, hih khuapi sungah hong pai lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah37:35 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah le ka nasempa David ka khualna-in hih khuapi a suahtak nadingin ka hu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:36 Tua ciangin Topa ’ vantungmi kuankhia-in Assiria mite’ giahphual ah mihing tul za le tul sawmgiat le tulnga a that hi. Zingsangin mite a thawh ciangin hihte khempeuh misi luang bekbek na hi hi. 
Isaiah37:37 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib taikhia a, a inn-ah ciahin Nineveh khua-ah a teng hi." 
Isaiah37:38 Amah in ama pasian Nisrok inn-ah bia-in a om laitakin, ama tate Adrammelek le Sharezer in namsau tawh amah that uh a, Ararat gamah a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Esarhaddon in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Isaiah38:1 Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah a ci na-in si dektak hi. Amoz’ tapa, kamsang Isaiah ama kiangah hong pai-in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na innsung thu ding vaihawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na damkikzo kei ding a, na si ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah38:2 Tua ciangin Hezekiah kawm lam nga-in Topa ’ tungah thu ngen a," 
Isaiah38:3 “ Topa aw, ka lungsim khempeuh le thuman tak tawh nangma mai-ah gamta-in, nangma muhna-ah a hoih nate ka sepna thu, tu-in nong phawk nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Hezekiah nakpitakin a kap hi." 
Isaiah38:4 Tua ciangin Isaiah tungah Topa ’ thu hong tung a," 
Isaiah38:5 “Pai inla Hezekiah kiangah gen in. Topa, na pa David’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na thungetna ka za khin a, na khitui ka mu khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nuntakna kum sawm le kum nga kong piak beh ding hi." 
Isaiah38:6 Assiria kumpipa’ khutsung panin nang le khuapi kong honkhia ding a, hih khuapi ka hu ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah38:7 Isaiah in, “Amah in hong ciamsa thu Topa in hong bawl nadingin, hih pen Topa’ tung panin nangma a dingin lim ahi hi:" 
Isaiah38:8 En in, Ahaz kumpipa’ ni-nai tungah nitum kuana liim pen kal sawm ka nungkiksak ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tum khinsa ni pen ni-nai tungah kal sawm a nungkik hi." 
Isaiah38:9 Judah kumpipa Hezekiah a ci na-in, a natna panin a damkik khit ciangin la phuakin a gelh lai in:" 
Isaiah38:10 Ka hat saan laitakin a si ding ka hita a, ka hun omlai khempeuh Leinuai-ah a om dingin hong kiseh hita hi, ka ci hi." 
Isaiah38:11 A hingte’ gam sungah Topa ka mu nawn kei ding a, leitung a a teng mite’ lakah mihing ka en nawn kei ding hi, ka ci hi." 
Isaiah38:12 Tuucingpa’ puanbuk bangin ka omna inn kibotkhia-in kei kiang panin kilakhia hi. Siamgante in a hial bangin ka nuntakna kihial khin a, amah in siambu panin kei hong atkhia hi. Sun le zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak a," 
Isaiah38:13 zingsang dong huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Humpinelkai bangin amah in ka guh khempeuh hong kuaihtansak a, sun le zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak hi." 
Isaiah38:14 Phialphiah ahi a, gun vapi bangin ahi zongin ka hamham a, vakhu bangin ka tautau hi. Vantung lam kong etetna-in ka mitte a gim hi. Topa aw, kei hong kinengniam hi; keima lungmuanna hong hi ta in!" 
Isaiah38:15 Ahih hangin keimah in bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei tungah hong gen khin a, amahmah in hih thu hong bawl hi. Ka lung gim lua a, ka ihmu thei kei hi." 
Isaiah38:16 Topa aw, nang a dingin kong nungta ding a, nang a’ ding bekbekin kong nungta ding hi. Ka ci hong damsakkik inla, hong nungtasak in!" 
Isaiah38:17 Gimna lianpi ka thuakna pen keima lungnopna hong suak ding hi. Lauhuaina khempeuh panin kei nong honkhia a, ka mawhna khempeuh na hong maisak hi." 
Isaiah38:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Leinuai-ah a om mite in nangma tungah lungdamna hong ko thei lo a, a sisa mite in nang hong phat thei lo uh hi. Gum sunga a paisukte in nangma thumanna hong muang thei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah38:19 Tuni-in keima hong gamtat bangin a hing mite bek in nang tungah lungdamna hong ko thei hi. Pate in tate tungah nangma thumanna gensawn uh hi. 
Isaiah38:20 Topa in kei hong hon ding a, Topa ’ inn sungah i nuntak sung tawntung khausai lasakna i tum ding hi." 
Isaiah38:21 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Theigah la sak inla, na damkik nadingin na meimate nuhsak in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiah in, “ Topa’ inn-ah ka paitoh zawhna ding a kitheih nadingin bang lim om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Isaiah39:1 Tua hun laitakin Baladan’ tapa, Babylon kumpi ahi Merodak-baladan in Hezekiah a ci na-in a damkikna thu za ahih manin ama kiangah laikhak le letsong tawh tangmite a sawl hi." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiah in amaute limtakin zin na do hi. Amah in ama dangka inn, ngun, kham, paknamtui, sathau manpha, a galvan koihna inn khempeuh, le a vankoihna sunga a kimu theite khempeuh amaute a na lak hi. Ama innsung hitaleh, ama gam sunga om khempeuh hitaleh Hezekiah in amaute a lah loh bangmah om lo hi." 
Isaiah39:3 Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiangah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in, “Hih mite in bang hong gen ahi uh hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute, a gamlapi, Babylon gam panin kei kiangah a hong pai uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah39:4 Amah in, “Amaute in na inn sungah bang teng mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute in ka innsunga a om khempeuh a vekin mu khin uh hi. Ka vankoihna innte sunga nate amau ka lah loh om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Isaiah39:5 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Vanglian Topa ’ thu ngai in:" 
Isaiah39:6 En in, na innsunga a omte khempeuh le na pu na pate in tuni donga a kholsate, Babylon-ah a kipuak ding ni hong tung ding hi; bangmah kinusia lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah39:7 Nang’ sung panin a suak, nangma tapate kimkhat kipaikhiatpih ding a, Babylon kumpipa’ inn sungah innsungmang nasep kisemsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah39:8 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Nong gensa Topa ’ thu a hoih ahi hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Kei’ nuntak hun sungin nopna le lungmuanna om buang ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah40:1 Ka mite hehnem un, hehnem un, na Pasian un ci hi." 
Isaiah40:2 Dam takin Jerusalem mite hopih un. Amau’ gimna hun beita a, amau’ mawhna kimaisakin, amau’ khialhnate hangin Topa in a kicingin gim pia khinzo ta hi, ci-in amau tungah gen un." 
Isaiah40:3 Awging khat in, “Gamlakah Topa ’ lampi sial unla, sehnel gam sungah i Pasian a’ ding lam lianpi khat a tangin bawl un." 
Isaiah40:4 Kuam khempeuh kivuk dim ding a, mual liante le mual neute kitotam ding hi. A tamkim lo munte kitamkim sak ding a, suanghum omna munte kizalhtam ding hi." 
Isaiah40:5 Topa ’ kam in gen khin ahih manin, Topa ’ minthanna vang hong kilang ding a, mi khempeuh in mukhawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah40:6 Awging khat in, “Kiko in!” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Bang thu kiko ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi. “Mi khempeuh, lopa bang hi a, ama hoihnate khempeuh gamlakah a om pak tawh kibang lel hi." 
Isaiah40:7 Topa ’ hu in a mut ciangin lopa vulin, pak a pulh hi. Mihingte lopa bang lel hi taktak hi." 
Isaiah40:8 Lopa vul a, pak a pulh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ thu kho tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah40:9 Jerusalem aw, mual sang dawnah kahto-in lungdamna thu kiko in. Zion aw, nakpitakin awng inla, lungdamna thu taangko in. Nakpi takin kiko inla, lau kei in. Judah gam khuapite tungah, “Na Pasian uh hong pai ta hi,” ci-in gen ta un." 
Isaiah40:10 Topa Pasian hong pai a, vangliatna tawh hong uk ding hi. Ama sep thamante hong pua a, a gualzawhna thamante hong masuan hi." 
Isaiah40:11 Amah in tuucingpa bangin ama tuuhonte an vak ding a, ama tuuhonte kaikhawmin a ang sungah pua ding a, no ngeklai a neite dam takin a paipih ding hi." 
Isaiah40:12 Kua in ama khutkuak sungah tuite tehin, ama khap tawh vantung teh a, leitung leivui khempeuh lawh khat sungah guangin, pongkhaina tawh mual liante khai a, tawitehna tawh mual neute teh ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:13 Kua in Topa ’ sep dingteng gen a, thu lamlak pa bangin kua in amah hilh ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:14 Thu a kicingin a muh nadingin amah in kua dong ngei a, kua in amah lampi man hilhin, ama tungah thutheihna hilh a, thu theihtelna lampi lak ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:15 En un, minamte pen phelkhai khat panin tuimal themkhat a taakkhia tawh kibang a, tawitehna tungah a om leivui nengbaang bangin kingaihsun lel hi. Amah in tuikulhte pen leivui them bangin tawmto lel hi." 
Isaiah40:16 I Topa biak nadingin Lebanon sing kicing lo ding a, a ganhingte zong meihal biak nadingin kicing lo ding hi." 
Isaiah40:17 Minam khempeuhte, ama mai-ah bangmah tham hi lo a, amaute pen bangmah a om lo le, a hawmguak sangin a tawmzaw-in amah in a ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah40:18 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian pen kua tawh tehkak ding a, amah pen bang lim tawh kibang ci ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah40:19 Milim tawh tehtheih ding hi lo hi. Milim a bawlpa in sungin, khamseek pa khat in tua milim kham tawh zut a, tua milim a dingin ngun khainiangte a sunsak hi." 
Isaiah40:20 Ngun le kham a nei zo lo mipa in biakna-in a zat dingin a muat lo ding sing teel a, a taang thei lo milim khat ama a dingin a bawlsak dingin khutsiam mi khat a zong hi." 
Isaiah40:21 Note in thei nai lo a, za nai lo na hi uh hiam? A kipat cil-in note tungah hong kigen khin hi lo ahi hiam? Leitung a pian a kipan thei khinta hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah40:22 Leitung a a teng mite kauphe tawh kibang lel hi. Leitung kimkot tungah a tupa, vantungte puan bangin zalin, a sungah a om theih nadingin puanbuk bangin a zal pa," 
Isaiah40:23 uliante a mawkna suaksakin, leitung ukte pen bangmah lo a suaksakpa amah ahi hi." 
Isaiah40:24 Amaute pen a gina-in kisuan lo a, a gina-in kivawh lo a, amau’ kungte in a gina-in lei sungah zung kha lo uh a, amah in a mut ciangin amaute vul a, huihpi in ham bangin amaute a lenkhiatpih hi." 
Isaiah40:25 Tua ahih ciangin kei kua tawh hong genteh ding na hi uh hiam, Siangtho Pa in ci hi." 
Isaiah40:26 A sangna lam ento unla mu un. Kua in hihte piangsak ahi hiam? Amau’ honpite khat khatin piangsakin, a lian ama thahatna tawh amaute khempeuh a minun a sampa ahi hi. Vangliatna-ah thahat ahih manin khat beek pelem lo hi." 
Isaiah40:27 “ Topa ’ kiang panin keima lampi kiliah a, keima Pasian in ka lungkhamna hong thudon lo hi,” Jakob aw, bang hangin ci a, Israel aw, bang hangin tuaci pau na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:28 Thei nai lo a, za nai lo na hi hiam? Topa pen tawntung Pasian hi a, leitung mong khempeuh dong a Piangsak pa ahi hi. Amah gim lo a, zong tawl lo hi. Ama thu theihtelna kigen zo lo hi." 
Isaiah40:29 Amah in a gim mi tungah vangliatna pia a, thahatna a nei lo mi a thahatna khangsak hi." 
Isaiah40:30 Khangnote nangawn gimin tawl ding a, khanglai mite a tha uh bei ding hi." 
Isaiah40:31 Ahih hangin Topa a muang mite a tha uh dimkik ding a, muvanlai bangin kha tawh leengto-in, amaute tai napi-un tawl lo ding uh a, amaute lam pai napi-un gim lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:1 Tuipi gei-a om gamte aw, gamdai takin ka thu ngai un. Na mite uh a tha uh dimsak unla, amaute a nai-ah hong paisak un. Amaute in thugen theih nading hun ngah ding uh hi. Thukhen zumah kei tawh kisi nu’ng." 
Isaiah41:2 A paina peuhah a gualzo, nisuahna panin a hong pai mipa kua in hanthawn ahi hiam? Amah in ama khut sungah minam dangte pia khin ahih manin amah in kumpite tuancil hi. Amah in a namsau tawh amaute leivui bangin bawl a, ama thal tawh buhkung leeng a bangsak hi." 
Isaiah41:3 Amah in amaute nawhdelh lua kisa-in, a khe in lei nangawn sik kha lo liang a, nuamtakin a paisuak hi." 
Isaiah41:4 A kipat cil a kipanin a khangkhangin mite a sam, hih nasep semin a bawl kua ahi hiam? Keimah Topa in, a masa le a nunung ka hi a, kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Isaiah41:5 Tuipi gei-a om gamte in mu khinin a lau uh hi. Leimong dongin mite lau-in ling uh a, amaute in hong nai-in hong pai uh hi." 
Isaiah41:6 Mi khempeuh in a vengte ciat huh a, a sanggamte ciat kiangah, “Lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah41:7 Khutsiam pa in khamseek pa hanthawnin, sek tawh milim a neel puah pa in sekpi tawh a sat pa hanthawn a, sumtui a luanna uh, “Hoih hi,” a ci uh hi. A ling thei nawn lo dingin amaute in tua milim siktukkilh tawh a khenkip uh hi." 
Isaiah41:8 Ahih hangin nang ka nasem pa Israel, ka lawm Abraham’ suanlekhak, ka hong teelsa Jakob aw," 
Isaiah41:9 leimong panin kong lakkhiat, leimong kiu a gamla pen mun panin ka hong sapkhiat, “Nang pen ka nasem pa na hi a, nangmah kong teel khinzo a, nangmah kong nilkhia kei hi,” ka hong cih pa aw," 
Isaiah41:10 nang hong ompih ka hih manin lau kei in. Na Pasian ka hih manin lungkia kei in. Nang hong thakhauhsakin ka hong huh ding a, nang hong huhin ka hong honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah41:11 Nangma tungah a heh mite khempeuh maizumna kithuaksakin kikoihkhong ding hi. Nangmah hong dem mite a mawkna suakin siatna thuak ding uh hi. 
Isaiah41:12 Nangmah hong langpangte na zon hangin amaute na mu nawn kei ding hi. Nangmah hong dote pen bangmah hi het lo ding uh hi. 
Isaiah41:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa na Pasian in na khut taklam ka len hi. “Lau kei in, nangmah kong huh ding hi,” nang tungah a hong ci pa keimah ka hi hi." 
Isaiah41:14 Lungno bang ahi lel Jakob, no Israel mite aw, lau kei un! Note kong huh ding hi, Topa in ci hi. Note hong honpa pen Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:15 Note pen, a thak, a hiam, ha a nei buhcilna bangin ka hong bawl ding hi. Note in mual liante cilin na suvui ding uh a, mual neute pen ansi bangin na gawizan ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:16 Amaute na haih ding uh a, huih in amaute mutkhia ding a, huihpi in amaute thehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ’ hangin na lungdam ding uh a, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ hangin na minthang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:17 Keima mite in tui duhin, tui zongin, a dang uh a taak ciangin amau’ hong thungetna ka pia ding a, Israel-te’ Pasian keimah in amaute ka nusia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah41:18 Bangmah a om lohna a sangna munte panin gunte ka luangsak ding a, kuamte’ laizangah tuikhukte ka omsak ding hi. Sehnel gam pen bualtui ka suaksak ding a, lei keuna mun pen ciktui ka suaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah41:19 Gamlakah taamtak sing, singkha sing, mui sing le oliv kungte ka posak ding hi. Sehnel gam sungah taaksan sing, hiangpa sing le tak sing ka suan khawm ding hi." 
Isaiah41:20 Topa ’ khut in hih nate bawl a, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa in hih nate piangsak hi, ci-in mite in mu-in a theih nading, a thu ngaihsunin a tel theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:21 Na thu uh sung un, Topa in ci hi. Na lahtel nop teng uh gen un, Jakob’ Kumpipa in ci hi." 
Isaiah41:22 Amaute in a thu uh hong paipih uh hen la, a piang ding thu hong gen uh hen. Eite in i ngaihsut theih nading, a hong piang ding thu i theih nadingin a beisa huna om nate bang teng hiam hong gen ta uh hen. Tua ahih kei leh zong, a hong piang ding thu eite tungah hong gen ta uh hen." 
Isaiah41:23 Note pen pasian-te na hihna uh ka theih nadingun tu khit ciangin a hong piang ding thute kote tungah hong gen un. Kote lungkia-in ka lau nadingun phatna ahi a, siatna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh hong bawl dih un." 
Isaiah41:24 A taktakin note bangmah na hi kei uh a, na nasepnate uh a mawkna ahi hi. Note a hong teelpa a etsathuai ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:25 Leilu lam gam panin mi khat ka hanthawn a, amah hong kuan khin hi. Nisuahna lam panin amah in ka min hong lo ding hi. Beelseek pa in buan a cil bang, sum sunga a kisugawp bangin, amah in gam ukte tuancil gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah41:26 Eite in i theih nadingin a kipat cil a kipan kua in hong genkhia a, “Amah man hi,” i cih theih nadingin a hun ma-in kua in gen ahi hiam? Kuamah in genkhia lo, kuamah in pulak lo a, kuamah in no’ thu za lo hi." 
Isaiah41:27 Topa ahi keimah in Zion tungah hih thu ka pulak masa a, Jerusalem tungah lungdamna thu ka gen hi." 
Isaiah41:28 Ahih hangin tua mun ka et ciangin kuamah om lo hi. Thu ka dot ciangin a hong dawng ding thulamlak amaute lakah om lo hi. 
Isaiah41:29 Amaute khempeuh zuaupi vive hi a, amau’ nasepnate a mawkna ahi hi. A kisung amau’ milimte pen huih hawmpi bang ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah42:1 Keimah in ka huh, ka teel, ka lungkimna ka nasempa en un. Ka kha tawh amah ka kidimsak a, amah in minam khempeuh tungah thuman tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:2 Amah kiko loin, a aw zong sangsak lo ding a, kongzing lakah zong thu gen zakzak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah42:3 Amah in a zawngkhal mite dop bawl ding a, a cimawh mite tungah migi ding hi. Amah in thumanna tawh mi khempeuh tungah thutang thu semkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah42:4 Amah in leitungah thutang thu a phuh khit matengin lungsi lo, lungkia lo ding hi. Tuipi gei-a om gamte in ama thu ngak uh hi." 
Isaiah42:5 Vantungte piangsakin a zal, leitung phahin, a tung panin a hong paikhia nate a piangsak, leitungah a om mite tungah husanna pia-in, leitungah a paite khempeuh husanna a guan Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, thumanna tawh nangmah hong samin, ka khut tawh hong lenin nang ka hong kem hi. Mittawte a vaksak ding, leinuai thong sung panin thongkiate a lakhia ding, thong sung a mialna munah a tu mite a lakhia ding, mite tungah thuciamna ahi ding, minam dangte tungah khuavak ahi dingin nang ka hong koih khin hi." 
Isaiah42:7  
Isaiah42:8 “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, Topa pen keima min ahi hi. Pasian dang’ tungah keima-a’ tawh a kibang minthanna ka pia kei a, a kisui milimte zong keimah hong kiphatnate pawl ka ngahsak kei hi." 
Isaiah42:9 En un, hun beisa-a nate in hong khengta a, tu-in a thak nate kong gen hi. Tuate a hong piankhiat ma-in note tungah a thute ka hong genkhol hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah42:10 Topa ’ tungah la thak sa unla, leimong panin amah phatna sa un! Tuipi le a sunga omte, tuipi gei-a om gamte le a tunga teng mite aw, la sa un." 
Isaiah42:11 Sehnel gam le a khuapite, Kedar mite’ tenna khuaneute a aw uh sangkhai sak un. Sela gam a teng mite lungdamna tawh la sasak unla, mual dawn panin amaute awngsak un." 
Isaiah42:12 Topa ’ minthanna gensak unla, tuipi gei-a gamte-ah amah phatna gensak un." 
Isaiah42:13 Mi thahatpa bangin Topa kuankhia a, gal a do mipa bangin ama hehna sosak hi. Amah kiko-in nakpitakin awngkhia a, ama hatna a galte tungah a lak hi." 
Isaiah42:14 Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Sauveipi sung bangmah hih loin ka om a, keimah le keimah kikhamcipin ka om hithiat hi. Tu-in ahihleh numei nausuak ding bangin ka kikokhia ding a, ka kam ka-in ka tungnak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:15 Mual liante le mual neute ka susia ding a, a po khempeuh ka keusak ding hi. Gunte pen tuikulh ka suaksak ding a, bualtuite ka kangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:16 “Amau’ theih loh lampi-ah mittawte ka paipih ding a, amau’ theih ngei loh sul zuihpihin ka kha ding hi. Amau’ mai-ah khuamial pen khuavak suaksakin, a phokna munte a tamin ka bawl ding hi. Hihte pen keima hih ding nate hi a, tuate sem loin ka nusia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah42:17 A kisui milimte muangin, a kisung milimte kiangah, ‘Note, komau’ pasian-te na hi uh hi,’ a ci mite kinolh ding a, maizum mahmahin ki-omsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:18 “Bilngongte aw, za un. Mittawte aw, na muh theih nadingun en un!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ka nasempa bangin kua a mit taw a, keima sawl ka kamtai pa bangin kua a bil ngong ahi hiam? Keima thuciampih pa bangin kua a mit taw a, Topa ’ nasempa bangin kua a mit taw ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah42:20 Israel in na tampi mu a, ahih hangin tuate encian lo hi. Ama bilte vang a, ahih hangin amah in khua za lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah42:21 Topa pen a honkhia nuam mahmah Pasian hi a, ama thuhilhnate limtakin a kizuih ding a deih hi." 
Isaiah42:22 Ahih hangin ama mite pen a kiluh, a kisut mite hi a, leihawm sungah amaute khempeuh kikhiasuk a, thonginn sungah kiseel hi. Amaute pen a hon ding a om lo, nek dingin a kiman ganhing suakmangkhin uh a, kuamah in, “Hong piakik in,” a cih loh vankinusiate a suak khinta uh hi." 
Isaiah42:23 Note lakah khat peuhpeuh in hih thu na ngai ding uh hiam? Tu a kipanin limtakin na ngai ding uh hiam? 
Isaiah42:24 Kua in a sutgawppa tungah Jakob pia a, a luhgawpte tungah Israel pia ahi hiam? Topa mahmah in a piak hi lo ahi hiam? Ama tungah eite i khial hi. Ama hong deih bangin i nungta kei a, ama hong thuhilhnate i mang kei hi." 
Isaiah42:25 Tua ahih ciangin amah in ama hehna so leh galkidonate eite tungah hong tungsak hi. Israel mi khempeuh lakah ama hehna mei bangin hong kuang a, ahih hangin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi. Tua bang i thuakna hangin eite in bangmah i phawk thei tuan kei hi."
