Isaiah43:1 Ahih hangin Jakob aw, nangmah hong piangsak pa, Israel aw, nangmah hong bawlpa, Topa in tu-in hih bang ci hi: “Hong honkhia khin ka hih manin lau kei in. Na min tawh kong sam khinzo a, nang pen kei-a’ na hi hi." 
Isaiah43:2 Tuite na kantan ciangin nang kong ompih ding a, gunte na kantan ciangin tui in hong tuum lo ding hi. Mei kantanin na pai ciangin na kang kei ding a, meikuangte in nang hong kangtum lo ding hi." 
Isaiah43:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong honpa ka hi hi. Nangmah tat nadingin Egypt ka pia a, nangmah khek nadingin Ethiopia le Seba ka pia hi." 
Isaiah43:4 Nang pen keima mitah manpha-in, pahtakhuai-in, nangmah hong it ka hih manin nangma tangin mite ka pia a, na nuntakna khek nadingin mihingte ka pia hi." 
Isaiah43:5 Nang hong ompih ka hih manin lau kei in. “Nisuahna lam panin na suanlekhakte kong paipih ding a, nitumna lam panin na mite kong kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah43:6 Keimah in leilu lam kiangah, ‘Piakhia in,’ leitaw lam kiangah, ‘Len nawn kei in; keima piansak ka bawlsa, keima minthan nadingin ka piansak, keima min tawh a kilote khempeuh ahi, ka tapate a gamlapi panin, ka tanute leimong panin hong paipih un,’ ka ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah43:7  
Isaiah43:8 Mit nei napi-in a mit a tawte, bil nei napi-in a bil a ngongte, hong paikhiatpih un." 
Isaiah43:9 Minamte khempeuh kikaikhawmsak unla, mihingte kikhawmsak un. Amaute’ lak panin kua in hih thu hong genkhia thei-in, a beisa huna nate kua in laktel thei ahi hiam? Amau’ dikna a langsak dingin a tecite uh hong paipihsak unla, amaute a thu zasakin, man mah hi, cisak un." 
Isaiah43:10 “Note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci a, “Kei pen Amah ka hihna thu, nangmah in thei-in keimah nong upna ding, nong theihtel nadingin kong teelsa ka nasempa na hi hi. Kei’ ma-in pasian om lo a, kei’ khitah zong kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Isaiah43:11 “Kei, keimah pen Topa ka hi a, kei simloh honpa dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah43:12 Note lakah pasian dang a om ma-in honkhia-in, pulakin, ka genkhol hi. Tua ahih ciangin note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah43:13 “Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, a kipat cil a kipanin zong kei pen Amah ka hi hi. Keima khutsung panin a lakhiazo kuamah om lo hi. Keima sepnate, a kua in hong khaktanzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Isaiah43:14 Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, note a hong hon Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note’ hangin Babylon-ah galkapte puakin, khua kongpi sikzawl khempeuh ka kuaitan ding a, Khaldea mite’ kikona pen tauna awging ka suaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah43:15 Kei pen Topa, note’ Siangtho Pa, Israel a Piangsak pa, note’ Kumpi ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah43:16 Tuipi sungah lampi bawlin, tui lianpi sungah pai nading sul bawl a, leeng le sakolte, galkapte le galhangte Egypt gam pan paikhiatpihin, a tho thei nawn lo dingin amaute a lumcipsak, amaute pen meivak khau kisumit bangin a mitsak Topa in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah43:17  
Isaiah43:18 “Masa lama nate ciamteh kei unla, a beisa hun nate ngaihsun kei un." 
Isaiah43:19 Tu-in a thak na khat ka bawl a, tu-in hong piangkhia hi. Note in thei lo na hi uh hiam? Gamlakah lam lianpi khat ka bawl ding a, sehnel gam sungah gunte ka luangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah43:20 Gamsate, ngiate, le vasa-kalaohte in kei hong pahtawi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima a dingin ka piansak mite in keimah hong phatna a genkhiat theih nadingun, keima teel mite’ dawn dingin gamlakah tui pia-in, sehnel gam sungah gun ka luangsak hi." 
Isaiah43:21  
Isaiah43:22 “Ahih hangin Jakob aw, ka min nong lo kei hi. Israel aw, kei nong cimtak hi." 
Isaiah43:23 Meihal biak nadingin kei kiangah na tuu nong paipih kei a, biakpiakna tawh kei nong pahtawi kei hi. Piakna tawh nang kong vangiksak nai kei a, paknamtui piakna tawh kong gimsak nai kei hi." 
Isaiah43:24 Kei a dingin paknamtui nong leisak nai kei a, nangmah in biakna sa a thaute tawh nong taiisak nai kei hi. Ahih hangin nang in na khialhna tawh kei tungah vangik na hong suan khin a, na mawhna tawh kei nong gimsak khin hi." 
Isaiah43:25 Na thupalsatnate hong paihkhiatsak pa pen keimah ka hi a, kei ka hih manin na khialhnate ka ciamteh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah43:26 “Thuman na hihna hong laktel inla, thu kikum khawm ni. Na dikna a kilat nadingin na thu hong sungkhia in." 
Isaiah43:27 Na pu na pa masate uh na khial uh a, na makaite uh zong kei tungah hong khial uh hi." 
Isaiah43:28 Na uliante un ka biakinn mindaisak uh ahih manin Israel tungah siatna ka tungsak a, Jakob ka mindaisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah44:1 Topa in, “Ka nasempa Jakob aw, ka teelsa Israel aw, tu-in za in." 
Isaiah44:2 Nangmah a hong bawl, gil sung panin nang a hong piangsak, nang a hong huh ding Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka nasempa Jakob aw, ka teelsa Israel aw, lau kei in." 
Isaiah44:3 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangtak leitang tungah tui ka sung ding a, lei keu tungah luitui ka luangsak ding hi. Na suanlekhakte tungah ka kha ka sung ding a, na tu na tate tungah ka thupha ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah44:4 Amaute pen tui sung panin a pokhia, luitui luang gei-ah a om, gialhek kungte bangin pokhia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah44:5 “Khat in, ‘Kei pen Topa ka hi hi,’ ci-in, adang khat in Jakob min tawh ama min lo ding a, adang khat leuleu in, ‘ Topa -a’, ci-in ama khut tungah gelhin, Israel min tawh amahmah kinophuah ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:6 Topa, Israel Kumpipa le amah Tan pa, Vanglian Topa in hih bangin gen a, “Kei pen a masa pen le a nunung pen ka hi hi. Kei simloh pasian dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah44:7 Kua pen kei tawh kibang ahi hiam? Amah gensakin pulaksak unla, keima mai-ah gensak un. A hong tung ding nate thu tanglai pek panin kua in thangko ahi hiam? Hong tung ding nate thu amaute gensak dih un." 
Isaiah44:8 Lau kei unla, kihta kei un. Tanglai pek panin note kiangah hong genin hong pulak khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Note khempeuh keima teci na hi uh hi. Kei simloh pasian dang om ahi hiam? Suangpi dang om lo hi. Khat beek ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah44:9 Milim a bawl mite khempeuh a mawkna hi a, amau’ deih milimte in phattuamna piangsak lo hi. Milim a biate in khua mu thei loin, thu theithei lo a, amaute in maizumna a thuak uh hi." 
Isaiah44:10 Bangmahin a kimang lo pasian kua in bawl a, milim kua in sung ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah44:11 Milim a bia mite khempeuh in maizumna ngah ding uh hi. Milim a bawl khutsiamte pen mi hilel uh hi. Amaute khempeuh kikhawm sakin dingsak un. Amaute nakpitakin kilausak ding a, a vekpi-un maizumin kikoih khawm ding hi." 
Isaiah44:12 Sikseekpa in seekin hol tawh na sem hi. Amah in sek tawh seekin a thahat a khut tawh a sat hi. Amah a gil kialin a tha zaw a, dangtakin a gim hi." 
Isaiah44:13 Sing nasep khutsiampa in khau khungin laikung tawh a ciamteh hi. Amah in singnawtna tawh nawt a, laikung tawh a kualin a ciamteh hi. Amah in, inn sungah a teng ding mihing melhoih lim khat bangin mihing limin a bawl hi." 
Isaiah44:14 Amah in taamtak singkungte a phuk hi. Tua ahih kei leh sesing kung khat ahi a, tawsaw kung khat ahi zongin tengkhia a, gamlak singte lakah khangsakin golsak hi. Amah in taamtak kung khat suan a, guah in khangsak hi." 
Isaiah44:15 Tua ciangin tua kung pen mi khat a dingin mei sing a suak hi. Amah in tua sing kimkhat la-in khua lum nadingin mei-in cih a, amah in mei tawhin moh a em hi. Amah in pasian khat zong bawlin bia a, amah in milim khat bawlin tua milim mai-ah a kun hi." 
Isaiah44:16 Amah in a sing kimkhat meikhukah cih hi. Adang kimkhat tawh an ne a, amah in sa hangin a gil vah hi. Amah in mei awi-in, “Ah, ka khua lumta, mei mu khin ing,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:17 Amah in a vallai teng, ama milim pasian khatin a bawl hi. Tua milim mai-ah kunin a bia hi. Amah in tua milim tungah thu ngen a, “Nang pen keima pasian na hih ciangin kei hong honkhia in,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:18 Amaute in bangmah thei lo a, amaute in bangmah khentel thei lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in bangmah a muh theih loh nadingun amah in a mit uh humsakin, bangmah a theih loh nadingun a lungsim uh khaksak hi." 
Isaiah44:19 A kimkhat meikhukah cihin, a aam tungah moh zong ka em a, sa hangin ka ne khinzo hi. A omlai teng a kihhuai-in bawl buang ding ka hi hiam? Sing bek khat mai-ah kun buang ding ka hi hiam, a ci ding, thu a ngaihsun, theihna le thumuhna a nei khat beek om lo hi." 
Isaiah44:20 Amah pen vut a nete tawh kibang lel hi. A lungsim haina in amah lam pialpih khin a, amah le amah kihonkhia thei loin, “Ka khut sungah ka tawi milim pen a zumhuai hi lo ahi hiam?” cih zong phawk thei lo hi." 
Isaiah44:21 Jakob aw, hih thu phawk in. Israel aw, ka nasempa na hi hi. Nang kong bawl a, nang pen keima nasem na hi hi. Israel aw, nang kong mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah44:22 Na thupalsatnate meiipi bangin na khialhnate meiilum bangin ka phiatkhia khinzo hi. Hong honkhia khin ka hih manin kei kiangah hong ciahkik in. 
Isaiah44:23 Vantungte aw, Topa in tua thu sem khin ahih manin la sa un. Lei thuknate aw, awng un. Mualte aw, la sa-in awngkhia un. Tulak le a sunga om sing khempeuh aw, awng un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jakob honkhia khin a, Israel sungah amah kiminthangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah44:24 Gil sung panin nangmah a hong piangsak, nangmah hong Honpa, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Keimah in na khempeuh bawlin, keimah guak in vantungte zalin, kuama seppih lohin leitung ka zal hi." 
Isaiah44:25 Zuau thugente’ hilhkholhna limte a siasak pa, aisante pen mihai a suaksak pa, mipilte lehhei kikin, amau’ thutheihte haina a suaksak pa;" 
Isaiah44:26 a nasempa’ thu kipsakin, a kamtaite’ thugente a sem pa, ‘Jerusalem khua-ah mi tengin, Judah khuapite kilamkik ding a, a kisia khuate ka lamkik ding hi,’ a ci pa;" 
Isaiah44:27 tui thukpi kiangah, ‘Keu in; na gunte ka keusak ding hi,’ a ci pa;" 
Isaiah44:28 ‘Sairas kumpipa pen ka tuucingpa hi a, ka deihna teng tungsak ding hi,’ a ci pa; ‘Jerusalem kilamkik ding a,’ biakinn pen, ‘Na bulpi kiphutkik ding hi,’ a ci Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:1 Kulhkongpi sungah a lut theih nadingin ama mai-ah kongkhakte a honsak ding, kumpite’ vangliatnate a lakkhiatsak ding, ama mai-ah minam dangte a zawhsak dingin, a taklam khutin a let, a sathau nilh pa Sairas tungah Topa in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Nangma min tawh nang a hong sampa pen Israel Pasian, Topa, keimah ka hihna thu na theih nadingin, nangma mai-ah kei pai-in mualte zalhmai-in, sumngo kongkhakte satzanin a sikzawlte ka sattan ding a, a mialna mun sunga om sum kikoihte, mun simthama sum kiseelte, nangma tungah kong pia ding hi." 
Isaiah45:3  
Isaiah45:4 Ka nasempa Jakob, ka teelsa Israel ka ngaihsutna-in nang pen na minin kong sam a, nong theih loh hangin min thak kong phuak hi." 
Isaiah45:5 “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Kuamah dang om lo a, keimah simloh Pasian dang om lo hi. Nisuahna lam pan hitaleh, nitumna lam pan hitaleh, kei simloh adang a om lohna thu mite in a theih nadingin, nong theih loh hangin a kisam thahatna nang ka hong guan hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi a, adang kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:6  
Isaiah45:7 Keimah in khuavak le khuamial piangsakin, a pha nate le a sia nate ka piangsak a, hih nate khempeuh a bawlpa, keimah Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:8 Vantungte aw, tunglam panin thuman zusak unla, vantungte in thumanna buasuk ta un. Hotkhiatna a pokhiat theih nadingin leitang kihongsak unla, thumanna zong pokhiato sak un. Keimah Topa in hih thu ka bawl khinzo hi." 
Isaiah45:9 Amah a Bawlpa tawh a kido mipa, beelseek pa tawh a kilehdo lei beel in gimna ngah ta hen! Tungman in amah a sek pa kiangah, “Nang in bang bawl na hi hiam, na na bawl in khutlet nei lo hi,” ci-in a thu sel ngam ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah45:10 A pa kiangah, “Nangmah in kua piangsak na hi hiam?” a ci pa hitaleh, a nu kiangah, “Nang in nausuak dingin kua gimpih na hi hiam?” a ci pa in gimna ngah ta hen!" 
Isaiah45:11 Amah a Bawlpa, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Nang in keima tate’ thu hong dongin, ka khut tawh ka bawlsa tawh kisaite-ah thu hong pia ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah45:12 Keimah in leitung ka bawl a, tua tungah mi ka piangsak hi. Keima khut in vantungte zal a, keimah in vantung na honpite khempeuh thu ka pia hi." 
Isaiah45:13 Thu a manin a sem dingin amah khua ka phawksak a, keimah in ama lampi khempeuh ka mamsak ding hi. Amah in nasep thaman ahi a, letsong ahi zongin ngaihsun loin keima khuapi lam ding a, salin a om ka mite a khahkhia ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah45:14 Topa in Israel tungah, “Egypt’ hauhna le Ethiopia sumbuk vante le a tun a sang Seba mite nangma kiangah hong pai-in nangma a’ hong hi ding uh a, amaute in nang hong zui ding uh hi. Amaute sikkhau kibulhsa-in hong pai ding uh a, nangma kiangah hong kun ding uh hi. Amaute in nangma kiangah thumna hong bawl ding uh a, ‘Nangmah bek tawh Pasian omkhawm a, kuamah dang om loin, amah simloh pasian dang om lo hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah45:15 A taktakin, Israel-te’ Pasian, Honpa pen, amahmah a bucip Pasian ahi hi." 
Isaiah45:16 Milim a bawl mite khempeuh in maizumna thuakin cih nading thei loin om ding uh hi. 
Isaiah45:17 Ahih hangin Topa in Israel-te honkhia hi. A tawntungin gualzo ding uh a, cikmah hunin maizumna thuak ngei lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:18 Vantungte a piangsak pa (amah Pasian!) Leitung piangsakin a bawl pa (a kipsak pa; a awngthawl dingin bawl loin, ten nadingin leitung a piangsak pa!) Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:19 Keimah in mun simtham, khuamialna gam sungah thu ka gen kei hi. Jakob suanlekhakte tungah, ‘A awngthawl mun sungah kei hong zong un,’ ka ci kei hi. Keimah Topa in thuman ka gen a, a man nate ka pulak hi." 
Isaiah45:20 “Minamte sung panin a suaktalai note aw, nomau kikaikhawmin hong pai unla, hong nai un! Sing milim a pua kawikawi mite in theihna nei lo uh a, a honkhia thei lo pasian tungah thu ngenngen uh hi." 
Isaiah45:21 Na thu uh sung unla, hong gen un. Na thu uh kikum khawm un! Hih thu sawtpekin kua in gen ahi hiam? Tanglai-in kua in pulak ahi hiam? Keimah Topa hi lo ka hi hiam? Thuman Pasian le Honpa ahi, kei simloh pasian dang om lo a, kei simloh kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:22 “Leitung mi khempeuhte aw, kei lamah hong kihei unla hotkhiatna ngah un! Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasian ka hi a, kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:23 Kei mahmah ka kiciam khin a, a kikhelkik ngei nawn lo ding thukip hih bang ahi hi: ‘Keima mai-ah mi khempeuh hong khukdin ding a, keima tungah thuman ding hong kiciam ding hi,’ cihna, kei’ kamsung panin thumanna tawh pusuakkhia khinzo hi." 
Isaiah45:24 Topa ’ hang bekin gualzawhna le thahatna kingah hi, hong kici ding hi. Kei hong mudahte khempeuh mindai-in maizum ding uh hi." 
Isaiah45:25 Israel suanlekhakte khempeuh, Topa ’ hangin gualzo-in a kisial ding uh hi." 
Isaiah46:1 “Bel pasian puksukin, Nebo pasian kunsuk a, tua milimte pen ganhing le bawngte tungah kipua hi. Note’ puak hih nate pen a gim mahmah ganhingte tungah a kisuan vangik bangin note tungah hong gik hi." 
Isaiah46:2 Amaute kunin, amaute puksuk khawm uh a, amaute in vangik pengsak thei lo uh a, amaute mahmah zong galte’ matna sungah tung uh hi." 
Isaiah46:3 “Na suah a kipan kong tawi, gil sung pana kong puak, Jakob innkuan, Israel innkuan a suakta laite khempeuh aw, keima thu hong ngai un." 
Isaiah46:4 Na teek dongun kei pen Amah ka hi a, na sam uh a kan’ hun dongin note kong kem ding hi. Ka hong bawlkhin a, ka hong don ding hi. Keimah in hong tawi-in ka hong honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah46:5 “Note in kei, kua tawh hong kibangsakin kua tawh hong kikimsak ding a, ka kibatpih dingin a kua tawh hong enteh ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah46:6 Sumbawm panin khamte uang zatin tawitehna tawh ngunte a tehkhiate in kham seekpa cial uh a, amah in tua nate pen pasian-in a seeksak hi. Tua ciangin amaute kunin tua milim a bia uh hi." 
Isaiah46:7 Amaute in tua pasian pen a liangko tung uhah ngato-in pua uh a, ama omna ding munah a koih uh hi. Tua a koihna-ah a milim om niloh hi. Ama omna panin kinkhia thei lo hi. Mi khatpeuh in amah sam le amah in dawng thei lo a, ama lungkhamna panin zong a honkhia thei kei hi." 
Isaiah46:8 “Thu a palsat mite aw, hih thu phawkin ngaihsun unla, lungngai pha un." 
Isaiah46:9 Hun lui thute phawk un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasian ka hi a, adang om lo hi. Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, kei tawh a kibang adang om lo hi." 
Isaiah46:10 A kipat cil-in a tawpna ding thu ka pulak a, tanglai pek panin a piang nai lo nate genin, ‘Ka thugen kip ding a, ka ngimna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Isaiah46:11 Nisuahna gam panin sasialne vasa khat samin, keima thu a semkhia dingin gamlapi panin mi khat ka sam hi. Thu ka gen khin a, ka tungsak ding hi. Ka geel khin a, ka sem ding hi." 
Isaiah46:12 “Suahtakna ding haksa mahmah ding hi, a ci lungsim khauh mite aw, ka thu ngai un:" 
Isaiah46:13 Suahtakna ding hun ka hong tungsak ta a, gamla nawn lo hi. Ka hong hotkhiat ding hun zekai nawn lo ding hi. Keima minthanna ahi Israel a dingin Jerusalem ka honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah47:1 Nungak a bang Babylon aw, hong paisuk inla, leivui lakah tu in. Nungak a bang Khaldea aw, tokhom om lohna leilakah hong tusuk in! Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen a moi milmel, a ngeek dikdek, hong kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah47:2 An gawina suangte hei inla, an gawi in. Na kikhuhna puan lakhia inla, na nik na puan suahin gunte kantan in." 
Isaiah47:3 Na seelsim teng kilang ding a, na zumhuaina teng kimu ding hi. Keimah in kong thukkik ding a, kuamah ka zah kei ding hi." 
Isaiah47:4 Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa in eite hong suaktasak a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Isaiah47:5 Babylon aw, gamdai takin tu inla, khuamialna sungah pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen kumpi gamte’ tonu, hong kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah47:6 Ka mite tungah ka heh a, ka luah gamh ka ninsak hi. Nangma khut sungah amaute kong pia a, nangmah in amaute na hehpih bawl kei hi. A khangham mite nangawn na ngong bawl mahmah hi." 
Isaiah47:7 Nangmah in, “Tonu ka hi tawntung ding hi,” ci na hih manin hih thute na lungsimah koih loin, a thumongte zong na phawkkha kei hi." 
Isaiah47:8 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, a nuam bek a ut, lungmuang takin a tu hithiat, na lungsimah, “Keimah hi’ng, kei simloh midang om kei; meigongin om ngei kei ning, ta-khuai cih zong sin kei ning,” a ci khuapi aw, hih thu za in:" 
Isaiah47:9 Aisan siamnate le mibum siamna vang lianpi na neih hangin ta khuaisuahna le meigonna, hih thu nihte thakhat thu-in ni khat sungin a kicing takin nangma tungah hong tung veve ding hi." 
Isaiah47:10 Na gitlohna-ah nang na lungmuang a, “Kuamah in kei hong mu kei hi,” na ci hi. Na pilna le na theihnate in lam hong pialsak a, na lungsim sungah, “Keimah hi’ng, kei simloh midang om kei,” na ci hi." 
Isaiah47:11 Ahih hangin nangmah in na beisak theih loh lungkhamna na tungah hong tung ding a, nangmah in maisakna na ngah theih loh gimna nang tungah hong tung ding hi. A thu na theih hetloh siatna na tungah hong tungvat ding hi." 
Isaiah47:12 Na neulai a kipan na sep na mibumna le na aisannate ah kiptakin om in. Phattuamna na ngah kha ding a, mite na lausakzo kha ding hi." 
Isaiah47:13 Nang tungah a hong kilak thu tampite hangin na gim hi. Vantungte a sehin khenin, aksite en a, khadet simin nang tunga thupiang ding a hong genkhol mite tu-in dingsak inla, nangmah kihonsak in." 
Isaiah47:14 En in, amaute pen buhkung tawh kibang uh a, mei in amaute kangtum hi. Meikuang’ vangliatna panin amau le amau kihontawm thei lo uh hi. Hih pen khua lumna ding mei-am hi lo a, awi ding mei zong hi lo hi." 
Isaiah47:15 Nang tawh na a semkhawm, na neu lai a kipan nang tawh na a semkhawmte tungah hih thute hong tung ding hi. Amaute pen amau’ tum ciatah zauvak uh a, nang a hong hon ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah48:1 Israel min tawh a kilo, Judah sung panin a piangkhia, Topa ’ min tawh thu ciam napi-in, thuman thutak tawh Israel Pasian a pulak lo Jakob innkuan aw, hih thu ngai un." 
Isaiah48:2 Note tua bang hinapi-in, khuapi siangtho sungah a teng mite ihi a, Israel Pasian i muang hi. Ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi, ci-in kisaktheihna-in na neizaw lai uh hi." 
Isaiah48:3 A masa lama nate thu tanglai-in ka gen a, keima kam panin tuate gingkhia-in ka kitheithangsak hi. Tua ciangin thakhat thu-in keimah in ka sem a, a hong piang hi." 
Isaiah48:4 Note pen paupeengin na ngawng uh sik thagui bang hi a, na thatang uh sumngo bangin a sakna thei khin ka hih manin," 
Isaiah48:5 note in, “Ka milim un hihte bawl a, a kisui ka milim uh le a kisung ka milim un thu pia hi,” na cih theih loh nadingun tanglai a kipanin note tungah hih thute kong gen a, tuate hong pian’ ma-in note tungah kong zasakkhol hi." 
Isaiah48:6 Ka gensa thu khempeuh hong tungta ahih manin, na gennate a man hi, na hong cih ding uh hita hi. Tu a kipanin na a thakte, na theih ngei loh uh hong tung ding a ki-im nate kong gen ding hi." 
Isaiah48:7 Hihte pen tuhunin a piangsak ka hi a, a beisa hunah hih bang piang nai lo hi. A piang khinsa thu hileh, ka theihsa uh thu hi, na ci kha ding uh hi." 
Isaiah48:8 Note pen muantheih ding na hihlohna uh, na suah tung uh a kipan mi lehdo thei na hihna uh ka hong thei hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute na za ngei kei uh a, zong na thei ngei kei uh hi." 
Isaiah48:9 Note khempeuh kong suksiat khak loh nadingin ka min ka ngaihsutna tawh ka hehna diahin, keimah hong kiphatna ka ngaihsutna-in note tungah ka ki-ip hi." 
Isaiah48:10 Meikhuk sungah ngun a kisiansak bangin gimna meikhuk sungah note kong ze-et hi. Ahi zongin note bangmahin a kimang lo na hihna uh hong kimu khin hi. 
Isaiah48:11 Keimah ka kikhualna, keimah ka kingaihsutna-in hih bangin kong hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min a siat ding kilawm ahi hiam? Midang khat tungah keima minthanna ka pia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah48:12 Jakob aw, ka thu ngai in. Kong sap Israel-te aw, ka thu hong ngai un! Kei pen amah ka hi a, kei pen a masa hi-in, kei pen a nunung zong ka hi hi." 
Isaiah48:13 Ka khut in leitung bulpi koih a, ka khut taklam in vantungte zal hi. Amaute ka sap ciangin amaute omkhawm pah uh hi." 
Isaiah48:14 Note khempeuh hong kikhawm unla hong za un! Amaute sung panin kua in hih ka sep ding nate genkhol thei ahi hiam? Ka teelsa mipa in Babylon tungah keima ngimna sem ding a, Khaldea mite’ langkhatah kei ka pang ding hi." 
Isaiah48:15 Kei, keimah in thu genin amah ka sam a, kei in amah ka panpih a, amah a dau pai ding hi." 
Isaiah48:16 Kei kiangah hong nai unla, hih thu hong za un. A kipat cil a kipanin a simthamin thu ka gen ngei kei a, tua thu a pian a kipanin kei ka om hi. (Tu-in Topa Pasian in kei tungah a vangliatna hong pia a, kei hong sawl hi.)" 
Isaiah48:17 Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong hon Topa in: Phattuamna na ngah nadingin nang a hong hilh, na zuih ding a kilawm lampi-ah a hong paipih Topa na Pasian ka hi hi." 
Isaiah48:18 Ka thupiakna a ngai hi hoh leteh! Nangma nopsakna gunpi bang ding a, na thumanna, tuihualte tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah48:19 Na tu le na tate sehnel zah pha ding a, na suanlekhakte sehnel vui zah pha ding hi. Keima mai-ah amaute’ min kiphiatkhia lo ding a, kisusia ngei lo ding hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah48:20 Babylon panin paikhia-in Khaldea gam panin tai inla, lungdamna tawh hih thu genin taangko inla, leimong dongin puak in. “ Topa in ama nasem Jakob honkhia khinzo!” ci-in gen kawikawi in." 
Isaiah48:21 Amah in sehnel gam kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin a dang uh taak lo hi. Suangpi panin amau a dingin amah in tui a luangsak hi. Amah in suangpi khangkhamsak a, tui a phulkhia hi." 
Isaiah48:22 Tua ahih ciangin migilote a dingin nopna om lo hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah49:1 Tuipi gei-a om gamte aw, ka thu ngai un. Gamlapi-a om mihingte aw, ka thu ngai un. Ka suah ma-in Topa in kei hong teel a, ka nu sungah ka om lai-in amah in keima min hong pulak khin hi." 
Isaiah49:2 Amah in ka thugente, namsau hiam bangsak a, ama khut tawh keimah hong hu hi. Amah in a kinawtngil thaltang bangin kei hong bawl a, a hiamsa-in zat pah dingin a thallawng sungah kei hong koih hi." 
Isaiah49:3 Amah in kei kiangah, “Nang pen keimah hong kiminthansakna ding ka nasempa Israel na hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:4 Ahih hangin keimah in, “Na ka sem a, ahi zongin a kimanna om lo hi. Ka thatang khempeuh ka beisak a, ahi zongin bangmah ka tangtun kei hi. Ahi zongin Topa in a manin na hong sem ding, ci-in ka muang a, ka sep thaman hong pia ding hi, ci-in ka um hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah49:5 Ama kiangah Jakob kipaipih kikin, ama kiangah Israel-te a kikaihkhop theih nadingin Topa ’ mai-ah kei hong kipahtawi a, Pasian pen keima thahatna suakin, ama nasem dingin ka nu sung panin keimah a hong piangsak Topa in tu-in thu hong gen hi." 
Isaiah49:6 Amah in, “Jakob minamte a laamto ding le a suaktalai Israel mite a ngei uh a bangsakkik dingin keima nasem na hihna pen a baih lua mahmah nasep ahi hi. Keima hotkhiatna in leimong dong a phak theih nadingin minam dangte tungah khuavak ahi dingin nang kong pia ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:7 Israel a honpa le ama Siangtho Pa ahi Topa in nakpitakin simmawhna a thuak, minamte in a muhdah, gam ukte’ nasempa tungah: “Nangmah a hong teel Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa, a thuman Topa ’ hangin mite na hotkhiatna thu kumpite in a muh uh ciangin zahtakna tawh na mai-ah hong ding ding uh a, na mai-ah uliante hong kun ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:8 Topa in ama mite kiangah, “Note hotkhiat ding hun a hong tun ciangin maipha kong pia ding a, huhna nong ngetna uh ka hong pia ding hi. Note hong kemin ka hong hu ding a, note’ tungtawnin mi khempeuh tawh thuciamna ka bawl ding hi. A kinusia na gam sung uhah note kong tengsakkik ding hi." 
Isaiah49:9 Thongkia mite tungah, ‘Hong paikhia un,’ ci-in, khuamial sunga om mite tungah, ‘Hong pusuak un,’ ka ci ding hi. Amaute pen lam tawntung ah an a ne, mual pawn a sang munte khempeuhah nuamtakin a gamta tuute tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:10 Amaute gilkial loin, dangtak lo ding uh a, huihsa le nisa in amaute sukha lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a hehpih pa in amaute lamkaih ding a, ciktui kiangah amaute paipih ding hi." 
Isaiah49:11 “Keimah in ka mite a dingin mual liante kantanin lampi ka ziksak ding a, ka lam lianpite-ah phung ka ciang ding hi." 
Isaiah49:12 Ka mite a gamlapi panin hong pai ding uh a, leilu lam gam le nitumna lam gamte panin amaute hong pai-in, pawlkhatte, leitaw lam Siene gam panin hong ciah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:13 Vantungte aw, lungdamin la sa un. Leitung aw, lungdamin diang in. Mual liante aw, lungdamin la sa-in awngkhia un! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite hehnem ta a, gimna a thuak ama mite hehpih ta ding hi." 
Isaiah49:14 Ahih hangin Jerusalem mite in, “ Topa in eite hong nusia khin a, hong mangngilh khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah49:15 Ahih hangin Topa in, “Ama sung panin a suak a tapa a hehpih lo ding zahin nupi khat in ama nawi a teep naungek mangngilh thei ding ahi hiam? Hihte nangawn in mangngilhkha thei ding a, ahi zongin keimah in kong mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah49:16 Jerusalem aw, ka khutpeek sungah nang kong gelh khinzo a, nang ka hong mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Isaiah49:17 “Nang a hong lam mite in nang a hong susiate nuaisiah khinta uh a, nang hong siasakte nang kiang panin taikhia khinta uh hi." 
Isaiah49:18 Na kimkotah khuadakto inla mu in. Na mi khempeuh hong kikhawm uh a, nangma kiangah amaute hong ciah uh hi. Kei pen a nungta Topa ka hih mah bangin, na mite khempeuh hangin nang na kisial ding a, mothak in kizepna-in a zat bangin amaute khempeuh na zang ding hi." 
Isaiah49:19 “A kisia, a kinusia khinsa nangma munte le a kisusia nangma gam pen nangma tungah a teng mite a dingin tu-in kawcik lua ta ding a, nang hong valhtum mite, gamlapi-ah om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:20 Na kikhen hun uh, salin a om sungun a suak mite in nangma kiangah, ‘Kote a dingin mun kawcik lua hi; ka omna ding uh mun hong bawlsak in,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:21 Tua ciangin na lungsimah, ‘Kua in keima a dingin hih mite hong hinkhiatsak ahi hiam? Kei hong kinusia-in tang-awlin ka om a, salin hong kikoihin hong kipaikhiatpih hi. Hihte kua in hong khoisak ahi hiam? Keimah guakin hong kinusia hi. Tua ahih manin koi lai panin hihte hong piang ahi hiam?’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:22 Topa Pasian in, “En in, minamte tungah ka khut ka laamto ding a, mite tungah ka lim ka lakto ding hi. Amaute in a angsung uhah na tapate tawi-in hong paipih ding uh a, a liangko tung uhah na tate hong pua ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:23 Kumpite pen nang hong kem na pate hong hi ding a, kumpinute pen nang hong khoi na nute hong hi ding hi. Amaute in a maitang uh leilak ngatin nang kiangah hong kun ding uh a, na khe-a leivui baangte a liak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa ka hihna na hong thei ding hi. Kei hong muangte maizum lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:24 A thahatpa’ kiang panin nate kilakhia zo ding a, thukhauh pa’ mat mite kihonkhia zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah49:25 Topa in, “A thahatpa’ mat salte kilakhia ding a, a thukhauh pa’ na kilakhia ding hi. Nang hong dem mite keimah in ka dem ding a, na tate ka honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah49:26 Nang hong nengniam mite pen amau’ satak mah ka nesak ding a, zukham bangin amau’ si mah a kham ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Jakob’ Vanglian Pa, nang hong Tankhiapa, nang hong Hon Topa ka hihna mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah50:1 Topa in, “Amah ka ciahsakna, na nu a kimakna lai koi-ah om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh nang kong zuakna ka leibatnate koi pan ahi hiam? Nomau mawhna hangin note hong kizuak a, nomau khialhna hangin na nu uh kipaikhiasak hi." 
Isaiah50:2 “Kong pai ciangin bang hangin mi khat zong om lo ahi hiam? Kong sap ciangin bang hangin hong dawng ding khat zong om lo ahi hiam? Hong hon zo lo zah dingin ka khut hat lo lua ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong note khahkhiatna ding vangliatna nei lo ka hi hiam? Keima taina tawh tuipi ka keusak a, gunte pen sehnel gam ka suaksak hi. Tui om loh manin a ngasate dangtakin si-in a uih gawp hi." 
Isaiah50:3 Vantungte khuamial ka silhsak a, amau’ kituam nadingin puanhampi ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah50:4 A lunggim mite ka thahatsak theih nadingin Topa Pasian in ka gen ding thu hong hilh khin hi. Ama hong hilhnate a ngai dingin zingsang simin lawpna hong guan hi. 
Isaiah50:5 Topa Pasian in thu theihtelna hong guan hi. Amah ka lehdo kei a, zong ka nungngat kei hi." 
Isaiah50:6 Hong satte, ka nung ka dawh a, ka khamul-in a hong kai mite, ka paang ka dawh hi. Maizumna le cilphihna panin ka maitang ka hei kei hi." 
Isaiah50:7 Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Tua ahih ciangin cih nading thei loin ka om kei hi. Tua ahih manin ka thuak tentan a, hong maizumsak lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Isaiah50:8 Ka thumanna a langsak Pasian a nai-ah hong om hi. Keima langkhatah kua hong pangzo ding ahi hiam? Thukhen zumah kikhia nu’ng. Thukhen zumah kua in hong khia nuam ahi hiam? Kei hong langpang dingin hong kuan tahen. 
Isaiah50:9 Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Kua in kei mawh hi, ci-in gen thei ding ahi hiam? Amaute khempeuh puan bangin paatkhia ding uh a, nget in amaute netum ding hi." 
Isaiah50:10 Topa kihta a, a nasempa’ thu a mangte khempeuh khuamial sungah na pai hangun Topa muang unla, Pasian suanin nei un." 
Isaiah50:11 Midang suksiat ding a sawm mite aw, note’ vaihawm siatna mah in note hong susia ding hi. Topa ’ khut tung panin gimna thuakin na lumsuk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:1 Topa in, “Hotkhiat ding a ut, Topa a zongte aw, ngai un. Note hong ki-eu khiatna suangpi, note hong kitawhkhiatna khuk en un." 
Isaiah51:2 Na pa uh Abraham le note’ pianna Sarah ngaihsun dih un. Bang hang hiam cih leh khat bek ahih laitakin amah ka samkhia a, amah thupha pia-in tampi ka phasak hi." 
Isaiah51:3 “Tu-in Zion ka hehnem ding hi. A kisia ama munte khempeuh puahpha-in, ama gamlakte Eden huansung ka bangsak ding a, ama sehnel gamte Topa ’ huan ka bangsak ding hi. Ama sungah lungdamna le kipahna, lungdamkohna le lasakna awging om ding hi." 
Isaiah51:4 “Ka mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. Minamte tungah thu ka hilh a, keima thukham in amaute tungah khuavak tun ding hi." 
Isaiah51:5 Manlangin hong pai-in amaute ka honkhia ding hi. Ka gualzawh ding hun hong naita hi. Keimah in minamte ka uk ding hi. Tuipi gei-a gamte in kei hong muang uh a, amaute in keima hotkhiat ding hong ngak uh hi." 
Isaiah51:6 Dakto-in vantungte en unla, leitung zong ensuk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh meikhu bangin vantungte mangthang hi. Puan bangin leitung paatkhia ding a, ama tunga tengte pen thokang bangin si ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keima hotkhiatna kip tawntung ding a, keima khahkhiatna bei ngei lo ding hi." 
Isaiah51:7 “Thuman a thei, na lungsim sung uhah keima thu a vom mite aw, ka thu ngai un. Mihingte’ kosiatna kihta kei unla, amaute’ hong simmawhna hangin lungkia kei un." 
Isaiah51:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh nget in puan a nektum bangin amaute beimang ding a, lungno in samul puan a pehtum bangin amaute maimang ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keima khahkhiatna om tawntung ding a, khang tawntungin ka hotkhiatna kip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah51:9 Khanglo in, khanglo in; thakhauh in, Topa aw. Khang sawtpi, hun lui lai-a bangin na vangliatna zangin hong huh in. Rahab a satzan gawp pa, gulpi a sunpa, nangmah hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tuipi, tuithukpite a keusak, a kihonkhia mite’ kantan dingin tuithukpite lampi-in a bawlpa nangmah hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:11 Topa ’ mi a kithehthangte hong ciahkik ding a, lasakna tawh Zion-ah hong pai ding uh hi. A tawntungin amaute lungdam ding uh a, amaute in lungdamna le kipakna ngahin, dahna le khuisatna nei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:12 Topa in, “Kei, keimah pen note hong hehnem pa ka hi hi. Lopa sangin sauvei a nungta zaw tuan lo, mihing lellelte, bang hangin kihta na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah51:13 Vantungte zalin, lei bulpite a koih, note a hong bawl Topa hong mangngilh khinta na hi uh hiam? Note susia dingin a kithawi, no a hong nengniamte’ hehna, bang hangin kihta-in lau tawntung na hi uh hiam? Amaute’ hehna in note hong susiazo het lo ding hi." 
Isaiah51:14 Thong sunga kikhum mite kikhah baih ding hi. Amaute sauveipi nungta ding uh a, annek tuidawn kitasam lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:15 “Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen tuipi tokgawpin tuihualte a hawksak Topa, note’ Pasian ka hi hi. Keima min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Isaiah51:16 Vantungte zalin lei bulpi ka phut a, Zion kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima mi na hi hi. Nang tungah thu kong hilh khin a, ka khut tawh nang ka hong hu hi,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah51:17 Topa ’ khutsung panin ama gimpiakna hai a dawn khin, hoina haipi a tawdat dongin a dawn khin Jerusalem aw, nangmah kisosuah tawm in. Nangmah kihanthawn tawm inla, dingtangto in." 
Isaiah51:18 Na mite khempeuh sung panin nang a hong makaih ding kuamah om lo a, na khoisa tapate khempeuh lak panin na khut a hong len ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah51:19 Nang tungah siatna le maimanna, kialpi le namsau, hih thu nih hong tungzo hi. Kua in nang hong dahpih ding ahi hiam? Kua in nang hong hehnem ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:20 Na mite gim khin a, ngenthang sungah a awk sanang bangin lam kiu khempeuhah amaute lum uh hi. Topa ’ hehna, na Pasian’ taina amaute in a thuak uh hi." 
Isaiah51:21 Tua ahih ciangin gimna a thuak, zu ne lopi-in zukham a bang note in hih thu za un." 
Isaiah51:22 Ama mite a dingin a thumsak Topa, Topa ahi note’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “En un, note’ khutsung panin hoina hai ka lakhia khin a, ka hehna haipi na dawn nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:23 Note kiangah, ‘Na tung uhah kong pai theih nadingun kunsuk un,’ a hong ci, no a hong bawlsiate’ khut sungah tua haipi ka koih ding hi. Note in na nungzang uh leilak bangin bawlin, amaute’ pai nadingin kongzing lampi bangin na bawl khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah52:1 Zion aw, khanglo in; khanglo inla na tha khauhsak in. Khuapi siangtho Jerusalem aw, na puan hoihte silh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh dawibia mite le a nin mite nang sungah hong pai nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah52:2 A kimancip Jerusalem mite aw, leivui panin kisingkhia unla dingto un. A kiman Zion mite aw, na ngawng panun hong kihenna khaute sutkhia un." 
Isaiah52:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Man nei loin note hong kizuak a, sum pia loin note hong kitankhia ding hi." 
Isaiah52:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Egypt gamah peemta dingin ka mite a masa-in pai uh a, tua banah thu om lopi-in Assiria in amaute nengniam uh hi." 
Isaiah52:5 Tu-in Babylon-ah tua bangmahin amaute tungah piang leuleu hi. Thu om lopi-in salin om uh hi. Amau a ukte, kihihsakna tawh awng uh a, sunthapai-in keima min kisimmawh hi." 
Isaiah52:6 Tua ahih ciangin ka mite in keima min hong thei ding uh a, thu a gen pa pen keimah ka hihna tua ni ciangin amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Keimah, hih lai-ah ka om hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah52:7 Thuhoih hong puak, kilemna thu a genzak, thuhoih thupha a hong puak, hotkhiatna thu a genzak, Zion tungah, “Na Pasian in uk hi,” ci-in mualte kantanin thu hong gen kamtai pa bangzahin hoih ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah52:8 Ngai un, na galvilte un a aw uh sangsak a, amaute in lungdamin la sa khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion-ah Topa hong paikikna amaute in maitang kituahin a mu uh hi." 
Isaiah52:9 A kisia Jerusalem munte aw, la sa-in kiko khawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite hehnemta a, Jerusalem honkhia khinta hi." 
Isaiah52:10 Topa in minam khempeuh mai-ah a vangliatna siangtho zangin ama mite honkhia hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in i Pasian’ hotkhiatna mu ding uh hi. 
Isaiah52:11 Kihem un, kihem un. Babylon panin paikhia unla, a nin nate lawng kei un. Topa ’ beellekuang a puate aw, khuasung panin paikhia unla, nomau kisiansuah tawm un." 
Isaiah52:12 Note’ mai-ah Topa pai ding a, Israel Pasian pen note’ nungah hong cing pa hi ding ahih manin note galtai-in paikhia loin, a kinawhsa-in na paikhia kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah52:13 Topa in, “En un; ka nasempa a dau pai-in, amah a lianin kikoihin kilaamto ding a, sang mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah52:14 Mi tampite in amah lamdang sa uh hi. Mihing a bang nawn lo zah dongin nakpitakin a mai sia a, mihing a sun nawn lo zah dongin a mel a sia hi." 
Isaiah52:15 Tua ahih ciangin amah in minam tampite dipkuasak ding a, ama hangin kumpite in a kam uh cih ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen ngei lo nate mu ding uh a, amaute in a zak ngei loh uh nate theitel ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah53:1 Tua ciangin mite in, “I zak thu kua in um thei ding ahi hiam? Hih bang thu-ah Topa ’ vangliatna khut kua in bangci muh theih ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah53:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen kungno khat ahi a, lei keu sungah a om singzung khat bangin ahi zongin ama mai-ah khangto lel hi. Eite’ et dingin amah in lim le deihhuaina mel bangmah nei lo a, eite’ deih dingin hoihna nei lo hi." 
Isaiah53:3 Amah pen mite in simmawhin nusia a, gimna le natna a thuak ahi hi. Mite in en nuam loin a mai uh a humsan uh mipa bangin amah kisimmawh a, eite in amah i thusim kei hi." 
Isaiah53:4 “Amah in eite’ natna teng thuakin, eite’ gimna teng pua khin taktak hi. Ahi zongin eite in amah pen ama mawhna hangin Pasian in a gimsak, gimna a thuak bangin i ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah53:5 Ahih hangin eite’ khialhna hangin amah kiliamsak a, eite’ mawhna hangin amah kisatnim hi. Ama gim thuakna hangin nopna i ngah a, ama liamna hangin damna i ngah hi." 
Isaiah53:6 Eite khempeuh in tuu bangin lam i khial khin a, eite khempeuh eimau san ciatah i pai khin hi. Topa in eite khempeuh’ mawhnate ama tungah a suan hi." 
Isaiah53:7 “Amah kinengniamin gimna a kithuaksak hangin amah kam khat beek pau lo hi. Sa gote kiangah a kipaipih tuuno le a mulmette mai-ah a kipaipih tuu a ham loh mah bangin amah kam khat beek pau lo hi. 
Isaiah53:8 Nenniamna le thukhenna tawh amah kipaikhiatpih hi. A hingte’ gam panin amah kikhenkhia-in, ama mite’ khialhna hangin amah in gimna thuak hi, ci-in ama khang mite kua in thei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah53:9 Amah in mawhna bawl lo, zuau gen ngei lo napi-in, amaute in migilote tawh sihna a kibang, mihaute tawh hankhuk a kibang a bawlsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah53:10 Ahih hangin amah a kisatnim ding pen Topa ’ deihna ahi hi. Amah in natna thuaksak hi. Mawhna hangin ama pumpi a kipiak ciangin amah in a suanlekhakte mu ding a, ama khan a sau ding hi. Topa ’ deihna ama khut sungah pung ding hi." 
Isaiah53:11 Amah in a gimna thaman mu-in a lungdam ding hi. A mawk thuak ahihlohna thei-in a thuman ka nasempa in mi tampi tak a dik suaksak ding a, amah in amaute’ mawhnate pua ding hi." 
Isaiah53:12 Tua ahih ciangin amah pen miliante tawh nate ka hawmsak ding a, amah in mihatte tawh nate a hawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sihna dongin a nuntakna piakhia a, khialhna a nei mite tawh a kisim khawm hi. Ahih hangin amah in mi tampi’ mawhna pua a, khialhna a neite a dingin a thumsak hi." 
Isaiah54:1 Ta a nei lo, a ciing mi aw, lungdamin la sa in. Nausuak natna a thuak ngei lo mi aw, la sa khia inla, a gingin kiko in! Bang hang hiam cih leh a kinusia numei’ tate pen a kitenpih numeite’ tate sangin tamzaw ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:2 Na bukmun khan inla, na tenna puanbukte kizalsak in. Cil bawl kei in. Na khaute sausak inla, na khetphimte khenkip in." 
Isaiah54:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh taklam le veilamah nangmah kizelin, na suanlekhakte in minam dangte’ leitang luah ding uh a, a kinusia khuapite mi tawh dimsak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah54:4 Lau kei in, maizumna na thuak kei ding hi. Cihna ding thei loin om kei in; maizumin nang hong kikoih lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khangno lai-in na zulhtatna le na meigonna hangin hong kikonate na phawkkha nawn kei ding hi." 
Isaiah54:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah hong Bawlpa pen nang a dingin na pasal bang hi ding a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi. Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa pen nang hong honkhia pa hi a, amah pen leitung buppi’ Pasian a kici hi." 
Isaiah54:6 Khangno lai-a zineih a kima, kinusia-in a dah mahmah zi a kisamkik bangin Topa in nang hong samkik hi, na Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:7 Tomno sung nang kong nusia pak a, ahih hangin hehpihna lianpi tawh nang kong lakik ding hi." 
Isaiah54:8 Hehluatna hangin tomno sung nang kiang panin ka maitang ka seel a, ahih hangin tawntung itna tawh nang kong hehpih kik ding hi, nangmah a hong honkhia Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen kei a dingin Noah’ hun mah tawh a kibang hi. Noah tuite leitungah hong pai nawn lo ding, ci-in ka kiciam mah bangin nang tungah heh nawn loin nang a hong tai nawn lo dingin ka kiciam hi." 
Isaiah54:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mual liante kihemin, mual neute a kikhin zongin nang kiang panin ka itna kip paikhia ngei lo ding a, na nopsakna ding ka thuciamna kinlo ding hi, nang a hong hehpih Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:11 “Gimna a thuak, huihpi’ nawkgawp, hehnepna a ngah lo khuapi aw, en in, na suangte, suangvui hoih tawh ka ciang ding a, na bulpite suangmanpha tawh ka hih ding hi." 
Isaiah54:12 Na khumdawnte suangmanpha tawh, na kulhkongpite suangsan tawh, na kulh khempeuh a manpha suang tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah54:13 “ Topa in na tapate khempeuh hoihtakin hilh ding a, na tapate daupai mahmah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah54:14 Thuman le thutang in nang hong thahatsak ding hi. Nenniamna tawh na kigamla ding a, nang na lau kei ding hi. Kihtakna tawh na kigamla ding a, nangma nai-ah tuate hong pai lo ding hi." 
Isaiah54:15 Mi khatpeuh in note tawh kidona a piansak leh tua pen keima kiang pan hi lo hi. Note tawh kidona a piangsak peuhmah note’ hangin puk ding uh hi. 
Isaiah54:16 “En un, pum zapin ama kizatna ding ciatin a seek dingin hiam a bawl sikseekpa ka piangsak khin hi. A susia dingin a susia gawp thei pa zong ka piangsak khin hi." 
Isaiah54:17 Nangmah do nadingin a kibawl hiam peuhmah maavang lo ding a, thukhenna sungah na langah a pang mi khempeuh na nialgawpzo ding hi. Hih thu pen Topa ’ nasemte’ gamhluah le keima kiang panin amaute’ dikna a kilahna ahi hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah55:1 A dangtak mi peuhmah tui phualah hong pai un. An nei lote aw, hong pai unla hong ne un! Hong pai un; a man ding bangmah piak kul loin leenggahzu le bawngnawi na duh zahzah uh hong ne un." 
Isaiah55:2 An ahi lo nate lei nadingin bang hangin na sum uh zang a, hong gilvahsak thei lo nate ngah nadingin bang hangin na sem na hi uh hiam? Keima thu limtakin ngai-in a limci an ne unla, anlimte ah nuamsa-in om un." 
Isaiah55:3 Ka mite aw, ka thu ngai unla, kei kiangah hong pai un. Na nuntak theih nadingun a thu hong za un. David ka it mah bangin keima itna kip, tawntung thuciamna note tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah55:4 David pen mite tungah teci ding, mite a makai ding le a ukpa dingin ka koih hi." 
Isaiah55:5 Tu-in note in na theih ngei loh uh minam dangte na sam ding uh a, amah in note hong minthangsak zo ahih manin, Topa note’ Pasian, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ hangin note hong thei lo minamte note kiangah hong tai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah55:6 A kimuh thei hun lai-in Topa zong unla amah a nai om lai-in thu ngen un. 
Isaiah55:7 Migilo in ama gitlohna nusia hen la, thuman lo mi in ama ngaihsutna nusia hen. Amah in a hehpih theih nadingin Topa eite’ Pasian’ kiangah amah paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawhna maisiangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah55:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima ngaihsutnate nomau’ ngaihsutna bang hi lo a, keima paiziate nomau’ paizia bang hi lo hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah55:9 Vantung pen leitung sangin a sanzawk mah bangin, keima paiziate zong, nomau paizia sangin sangzaw a, ka ngaihsutnate zong, nomau ngaihsutna sangin a sangzaw ahi hi." 
Isaiah55:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung panin guahtui le vuk hong pai-in, amaute ciahkik loin leitung kawtsakin, kungnote mengin selkhiasak a, khai vawhpa khaici pia-in a ne pa tungah an a piak mah bangin," 
Isaiah55:11 keima kam panin a paikhia ka thu zong tua mah bang ding hi. A hawmpi-in kei kiangah hong tungkik lo ding a, keima ngimnasa bangin tangtung sakin, amah ka sawlna thu tangtun ding hi." 
Isaiah55:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon panin lungdamna tawh na paikhia ding uh a, nopsakna tawh hong kipaikhiatpih ding hi. Note mai-a mual liante le mual neute inla sa-in awng ding uh a, gam sunga sing khempeuh in a khut uh beeng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah55:13 Ling tangin tak kung hong po ding a, lingkung tangin mui kung hong po ding hi. Tua pen Topa ’ nasepna phawk tawntungna, a kilakhia ngei lo ding, a tawntungin a om lim khat hi ding hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “A sawt loin note ka hong honkhia ding a, hong khahkhia ding ka hih manin thutang thumanin gamta un." 
Isaiah56:2 Hih banga a gamta mite, hih thu a lenkip mihingte, Sabbath tangin a siasak lote, siatna bawlna ding panin hoihtakin a kikemte, thupha ngah mi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:3 Topa pawlin a beel gamdang mipa in, “ Topa in ama mite kiang panin kei hong khenkhia taktak ding hi,” ci kei hen. A kiget mipa in, “En un, kei pen Pasian’ mite lakah a kihel thei ding ka hi kei hi,” ci kei hen." 
Isaiah56:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Keima Sabbath nite tangin, kei hong lungdamsak thei nate teel a, ka thuciamna a lenkip a kiget mite tungah" 
Isaiah56:5 ka innsung le ka huang sungah tanu le tapate sangin a hoihzaw phawkna le min ka pia ding a, a mang ngei nawn lo ding a kip tawntung min amaute tungah ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah56:6 “Ama na a sem ding, Topa ’ min a it ding, ama nasem a suak dingin Topa pawlin amah a beel gamdang mite, Sabbath ni tangin a siasak lo, ka thuciamna hoihtakin a lenkip mi peuhmah," 
Isaiah56:7 ka mual siangtho-ah paipihin keima thungetna inn sungah ka lungdamsak ding a, amaute’ meihal biakna le a biakpiaknate uh ka biakna tau tungah kisang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka inn pen mi khempeuh a dingin thungetna inn kici ding hi." 
Isaiah56:8 Israel a kikhenthangte a kaikhawm Topa Pasian in, a kikaikhawmsa mite banah midangte keima kiangah ka kaikhawm lai ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:9 Lo sungah a om ganhing khempeuhte, gamlakah a om ganhing khempeuhte aw, a netum dingin hong pai un." 
Isaiah56:10 Amau’ galvilte a mit uh taw a, amaute khempeuh in bangmah thei lo uh hi. Amaute khempeuh ui ham thei lo inncing tawh kibang uh a, amaute in tawng thei lo uh hi. Mot paupau, lumlum, lususu in om ding bek nuam a sa uh hi." 
Isaiah56:11 Uite in nakpitakin duh uh a, kham hun cih nei ngei lo uh hi. Tuucingte in zong thutheihna nei lo uh hi. Amaute khempeuh amau tum ciatin gamta uh a, a vekpi-un amau’ phattuamna ding bek a zong ciat uh hi." 
Isaiah56:12 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, leenggahzu nene ni; khamtheihzu dawndawn ni. Zing ciangin zong tuni sangin nuamzaw lai ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah57:1 Thuman mipa si a, kuamah in tua thu ngaihsutin nei nawn lo hi. Kuamah in a theih loh kalin thutak mite si uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuahsiatna panin thuman mipa kilakhia a, nopsakna sungah amah tum hi." 
Isaiah57:2 Thutangin a gamta mite in a sihna uhah nopna ngahin tawlnga uh hi. 
Isaiah57:3 No, aisan numeite’ tapate, numei tawh a mawh mite le numei pangtatte’ tuletate aw, hih lai-ah hong pai un." 
Isaiah57:4 Note in kua mawlpih gawpgawp na hi uh hiam? Kua’ tungah na kam uh ka beba-in na leii uh phen na hi uh hiam? Tawsaw kung lak singkung hing khempeuh nuai-ah pasian biakna-in nulepa mawhna a bawl, kuamsung, suanghawm sungah na tate uh a that note pen khialhna tate, zuauna’ tuletate hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah57:5  
Isaiah57:6 Kuam sunga om suangmaite na la uh a, tua suangmaite na bia uh hi. Tuate tungah tui tawh biakpiakna sungin, an tawh biakpiakna na paipih uh hi. Hih thute’ hangin kei lungdam ding ka hi hiam?" 
Isaiah57:7 A lian a sang mual tungah nulepa mawhna na bawl uh a, tua munah biakna pia dingin na paito uh hi." 
Isaiah57:8 Kongkhak le kongkhakmung nungah nangmah in na milimte na suang hi. Nangmah in kei hong nusia-in na puante na suah a, nang hong luppih dingin na cial mite tawh na lupna zai deda tungah kahto-in, tua lai-ah na hukna teng na kamsak hi." 
Isaiah57:9 Molek pasian kiangah a pai dingin sathau tawh khual na zin a, na paknamtuite tawh na siam tawpin na kipuah hi. Nang in gamlapi-ah na tangmite na sawl a, Leinuai dong nangawnah na paisak hi." 
Isaiah57:10 A gamla na khualzinna hangin nang na gim mahmah a, ahih hangin nangmah in, “Lametna om kei,” na ci kei hi." 
Isaiah57:11 Nang zuautatin kei na hong phawk kei hi. Kei na hong ngaihsut loh nading a piangsak zah dingin hih pasian-te bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Sauveipi sung pau loin ka om hithiat manin kei hong zahtak lo na hi hiam? 
Isaiah57:12 Nangma gamtatna a manin na ngaihsunkha hi. Ahih hangin na gamtatnate ka pholak ding a, na milimte in nang hong huh zo lo ding hi." 
Isaiah57:13 Nang cimawhin na kiko ciangin na milim kaihkhopte kihonsak in! Huih in amaute mutkhia-in, husanna in amaute seemkhia ding hi. Ahih hangin kei hong beel mi in leitang ngah ding a, ka mual siangtho a luah ding hi." 
Isaiah57:14 “Zik un, zik un, lampi bawl un; ka mite’ lampi a dongkhak thei ding na khempeuh lakhia un,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah57:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sang, a lian, a nungta tawntung Pa, ama min Siangtho ahipa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen a sangna mun le a siangtho munah ka om a, a kiniamkhiat mite’ lungsim le a kisik mite’ lungsim a thakhauhsakkik dingin kisikna le kiniamkhiatna lungsim a neite tawh zong kei ka omkhawm hi." 
Isaiah57:16 Ka mite tungah nuntakna ka pia hi. Amaute ka mawhsak paisuak kei ding a, amaute tungah ka heh tawntung kei ding hi." 
Isaiah57:17 Amau’ huaiham-mawhna hangin ka heh mahmah a, ka hehna lungsim tawh amaute gim pia-in ka nusia hi. Ahih hangin amaute a lungsim uh khauhin, a gamtat ngei bangun gamta lai veve uh hi." 
Isaiah57:18 “Amau’ mawh gamtatnate a vekin ka mu khin a, ahih hangin amaute ka damsak ding hi. Amaute makaihin ka hehnem ding a, a dah a kapte hehnemin ka lungdamsak ding hi." 
Isaiah57:19 Nopsakna, nopsakna, a gamla le a nai mi khempeuh tungah om tahen. Keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah57:20 Ahih hangin migilote pen a kilok tui tawh kibang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi khawlcip thei lo a, a tuite in buan le ninte laamto uh hi." 
Isaiah57:21 Migilote a dingin nopsakna om lo hi,” ka Pasian in a ci hi." 
Isaiah58:1 Na aw siit hetloin nakpitakin kiko inla, peengkul aw bangin gingsak in. Ka mihingte tungah amau’ khialhnate gen inla, Jakob innkuan tungah amau’ mawhnate gen in." 
Isaiah58:2 Amaute pen, thumanin a gamta, amau’ Pasian’ biakna ngeina kipte a nusia lo minam bang keekin nisimin amaute in kei hong zong uh a, keima lampi a thei nuam uh hi. Amaute in keima kiang panin thukhenna man hong ngen uh a, Pasian’ kiang hong nai nuam uh hi." 
Isaiah58:3 “Kote in an tang napi-in bang hangin kote hong phawk lo na hi hiam? Kote kiniamkhiatin om napi-in bang hangin kote hong thei kha lo na hi hiam?” hong ci uh hi. Note in an na tan’ uh ciangin nomau’ deihna na zong uh a, na nasemte uh na nengniam uh hi." 
Isaiah58:4 Note in a kitawng ding, a kilai ding, gitloh gamtatin, khuttum tawh a kitum ding bekin an na tang uh hi. Hih bang lelin antanna tawh na thungetna uh hong kingai ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah58:5 Maugua kun bangin na lu uh kunsukin, puanhampi le vut tungah lumin, nomau na kigimsak tawmnate uh kei’ deih antanna nam sa na hi uh hiam? Hih bang hihna pen antanna man le Topa’ santheih pawl hi, ci ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah58:6 Kei’ deih antanna hih bang pawl ahi hi: Gitlohna khaute phelin, hakkol savun khaute phel a, a kinengniam mite khahkhia-in thuman lohna hakkol khempeuh suktan ding ahi hi." 
Isaiah58:7 Na an uh a gilkialte tawh nekhawm unla, inn nei lo a zawngte na innsung uhah paipihin, tangguakin a om mite puan silhsakin, na mipihte uh kiang panin bu lo ding hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah58:8 Tua ciangin ka maipha pen phalvaktung hong bang ding a, note’ tungah hong taangkhia ding hi. Manlang takin na liammate uh hong dam ding hi. Note hong ompih tawntungin note kong hon ding a, na nung na mai uhah ka hong dal ding hi." 
Isaiah58:9 Tua ciangin nong thungetna uh ka hong pia ding a, nong sap uh ciangin ka hong dawng ding hi. Mi bawlsiatnate khawlin, mi simmawhna le kam gilo na paunate uh na khawl uh a," 
Isaiah58:10 gilkial mite an pia-in, kisapna a nei mite tungah a kisapnate na piak uhleh na kimkot uha khuamial pen khuavak hong suak ding a, na lungzinna uh nitaang hong bang ding hi." 
Isaiah58:11 Tua ciangin note lam kong lak tawntung ding a, na hoihte tawh kong lungkimsak ding hi. A cidam a thahatin kong omsak ding hi. Tui tampi a ngah tawntung huan, a kang ngei lo ciktui tawh na kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah58:12 Tanglai-in a kisia na munte uh na lamkik ding uh a, khang tampi sung a kisia bulpite na dingtosakkik ding uh hi. Note pen a sia a puahkik, ten nadingin mun siate a ngei a bangsakkikte hong kici ding hi." 
Isaiah58:13 Note in Sabbath siangtho sakin, keima ni siangtho ni-in na nasepna panun khawlin Sabbath ni pen deihhuai sa-in, Topa’ ni siangtho pen pahtawihuai na cih uh a, note in pahtawi-in note’ deih bang zui loin, note’ ut bang hi loin motpau loin na om uhleh," 
Isaiah58:14 keimah biakna hangin lungdamna na ngah ding uh a, leitung khempeuhah pahtawina kong ngahsak ding hi. Na pu uh Jakob tungah ka piak leitang luahin nuam na sa ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah59:1 A honkhia zo lo dingin Topa zawngkhal lo a, khua a za thei lo dingin a bil ngong lo hi." 
Isaiah59:2 Ahih hangin note’ mawhnate in note le na Pasian uh kikhenna hong piangsak a, amah in note’ aw hong zak theih loh nadingin na khialhnate un ama maitang liah hi." 
Isaiah59:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khutte uh mi thahna sisan tawh nin a, na khutmete uh mawhna tawh a nin hi. Na mukte un zuauthu gen a, na leiite un gitlohna thu a gen hi." 
Isaiah59:4 Kuamah in thutang tawh thu na nei kei uh a, thuman tak tawh thukhen zumah na pai kei uh hi. Note in bangmah lopi suanin nei-in zuauthu na gen uh a, siatna ding thu ngaihsunin buaina na piangsak uh hi." 
Isaiah59:5 Na ngaihsutnate uh gul gunei tui bangin gu a nei hi a, na vaihawmnate uh maimom khau puan tawh kibang lel hi. Gul gunei tui khat sukham lehang adang khat hong tui zel hi." 
Isaiah59:6 Na maimom khau puante uh kizang thei lo ding a, kuamah in silhlo ding uh hi. Na vaihawmnate uh tua maimom khau puan bangin a mawkna suak lel ding hi." 
Isaiah59:7 Siatna bekbek na geelgeel uh a, na sepkhiat ding uh na ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Mawhnei lo mite thah ding haksa na sa kei uh hi. Na paina khempeuh uhah siatna vive om kawikawi hi." 
Isaiah59:8 Note’ omna peuhah kuamah lungmuang thei lo a, note’ sepna khempeuhah thuman khat beek om lo hi. Na lungsim uh kawi mahmah a, hong zuikha mite in thunuam mu ngei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah59:9 Tua ahih ciangin ei a hong gimsakte kiang panin Pasian in a hong hotkhiat lohna a hang i thei hi. Eite in a nuam ding i lamen a, ahi zongin lungzinna bekbek i tuak hi." 
Isaiah59:10 Mittaw bangin kawm i zawt a, mit nei lote bangin i mai hi. Suntang laipi mahin khuamial lak bangin i tuk a, a hat mite lakah misi tawh i kibang hi." 
Isaiah59:11 Eite khempeuh vompi bangin i humham a, vakhu bangin i thumthum hi. Eite in thutang i zong a, ahi zongin khat zong i mu kei hi. Hong hotkhiat ding i ngen a, ahi zongin bangmah hong piang lo hi." 
Isaiah59:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah kote’ thupalsatna tampi tak pha a, ka mawhnate un kote’ langah teci hong pang hi. Kote’ thupalsatnate, ka mawhnate uh ka thei uh hi." 
Isaiah59:13 Nangmah hong lehdo-in nang kong nial uh a, na thu kong zui kei uh hi. Midangte nengniamin nang kong lehdo uh hi. Ka ngaihsutnate uh khial a, ka thugente uh zuauthu vive ahi hi." 
Isaiah59:14 Thutang kihawlkhia a, thuman in hong naih thei lo hi. Mihonpite’ kikhopna munah thuman kizang lo a, thutang tum thei lo hi." 
Isaiah59:15 Thuman om lo lua ahih manin siatna a pelh mipa pen mihai-in kingaihsun zawsop hi. Topa in hih thu mu a, thutang om lo ahih manin amah lungkim lo hi." 
Isaiah59:16 Amah in nenniamna a thuakte a huh ding mi khat beek a om lohna a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a honkhia ding le a gualzawh nadingin ama vangliatna a zang ding hi. 
Isaiah59:17 Amah in thumanna pen awmdal lum bangin silh ding a, gualzawhna pen sik lukhu bangin khu ding hi. Na khempeuh a manin bawlkik nopna, gimna a piangsakte gim pia-in thukkik nopna lungsim puan bangin a silh ding hi." 
Isaiah59:18 Amau’ gamtatna bangin amah in thukkik ding a, amah a langpangte gim pia ding hi. Ama galte a thukkik ding hi. A gamla pekah a om tuipi gei-a gamte zong a thukkik ding hi." 
Isaiah59:19 Tua ahih ciangin nisuahna le nitumna kikalah a om mi khempeuh in amah zahtakin, a vangliatna kihta ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi nung bang, tuipi khang bangin amah hong pai ding hi." 
Isaiah59:20 Topa in ama mite tungah, “Note a hong hu dingin Jerusalem-ah kong pai ding a, mawhna panin a kiheikhia mi peuhmah ka hong honkhia ding hi." 
Isaiah59:21 “Note tawh hih bangin thuciamna ka bawl hi: Keima vangliatna tawh keima thukhamte le ka thuhilhnate note tungah ka hong pia khin a, tu a kipanin a tawntungin note in tua thute zui-in na suanlekhakte uh na hilh ding uh a, a khang khangin na maimangsak kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah60:1 Jerusalem khuapi aw, tho-in sun nitaang bang in! Topa ’ minthanna in nangmah hong taanzo hi." 
Isaiah60:2 Minam dangte khuamial in tuamcip ding a, ahi zongin nangma tungah Topa ’ khuavak hong taang ding hi. Ama minthanna in nang hong ompih ding hi." 
Isaiah60:3 Nangma khuavak sungah minam dangte hong pai ding uh a, nangma taankhiatna sungah kumpite hong pai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:4 Na kimkotah khuadak inla mu in. Na mite kikaikhawmin nang kiangah a ciah dingin hong pai uh hi. Na tapate gamlapi panin hong ciah ding uh a, na tanute naungek bangin hong kipua ding hi." 
Isaiah60:5 Tua ciangin nangmah in mu-in na maitai ding a, na lungsim lingin na lungdam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi tawnin nangma kiangah van hong kipuak ding a, minamte’ hauhna khempeuh nangma kiangah hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah60:6 Midian mite le Efah mite’ kalaoh note, kalaoh honpite in nang hong tuam ding uh a, Sheba gam sunga om khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi. Amaute in kham le paknamtui hong paipih ding uh a, Topa phatna a taangko ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedar gam tuuhonte khempeuh nang kiangah hong kipua ding a, Nebaioth mite’ tuutalte nangma deih nana-ah kizang ding hi. Ka biakna tau tungah piak dingin tuate hong kipaipih ding a, keimah in a minthang ka biakinn ka minthangsak semsem ding hi." 
Isaiah60:8 Meiipi leeng bangin hong pai henhan hih teembawte, vakhute a bukah a leeng bangin a hong leeng henhante kuate ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah60:9 Hih teembawte pen tuipi gei le tuikulh-ah a om teembawte hi a, Tarshish teembaw lianpite in hong makaih hi. Topa in nangmah a minthang mahmahin hong bawlkhin ahih manin gamlapi panin tua teembawte in nangma mite hong puak uh a, a ngun a khamte uh tawh hong puakkhawm uh hi. Topa, na Pasian, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa a pahtawina-in a hong puak uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah60:10 Gamdang mite in na kulhte ciangkik ding uh a, amau’ kumpite in nangma na hong sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna tawh nang kong vatgawp khin a, ahih hangin tu-in keima maipha tawh nang tungah hehpihna kong nei khin hi." 
Isaiah60:11 Kigual deudau-in a hong paina uhah a kumpite uh hong makai-in, mite in minamte’ hauhna na kiang hong tuttheih nadingin na kulhkongpite kihong tawntung ding a, a sun a zanin kikhak ngei lo ding hi." 
Isaiah60:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma na hong sem lo minam le kumpi gam beimang ding a, tua minamte kisia-maimang ding hi." 
Isaiah60:13 Keima biakinn mun a mel a hoihsak dingin Lebanon mual minthanna ahi taaksan sing, hiangpa sing le taksingte na kiangah hong tung ding a, keima khengakna mun ka minthangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah60:14 Nang hong nengniamte’ tate na mai-ah a kunsa-in hong pai ding uh a, nang hong simmawh mi khempeuh na khe mai-ah hong bok ding uh hi. Amaute in nang pen Topa ’ khuapi, Israel-te’ Siangtho Pa’ Zion, hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:15 Hong kinusia, hong kimudah, kuama hong nawk loh nang pen a tawntungin lianin, khang khat pan khang khat lungdamna ahi dingin ka hong bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah60:16 Nupi khat in a ta nawi pia-in limtakin a kep bangin, minamte le kumpite in nang hong vakin hong kem ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa, nangmah a hong Honpa, nangmah a hong Tankhiapa, Jakob’ Vanglian Pa ka hihna na thei ding hi." 
Isaiah60:17 Sumngo tangin kham kong puak ding a, sik tangin ngun kong paipih ding hi. Sing tangin sumngo, suang tangin sik kong puak ding hi. Nuam na sak nadingin na mang liante uh bawlin na nasem ukte uh thuman thutang tawh na ka semsak ding hi." 
Isaiah60:18 Na gam sungah ngongtatna thu kiza nawn lo ding a, na gam sungah siatmaina le suksiatna om nawn lo ding hi. Nangmah in na kulhte pen Hotkhiatna, na kulhkongpite pen Phatna, na ci ding hi." 
Isaiah60:19 Sun hunin ni pen nangma khuavak hi lo ding a, zan hunin kha pen na khuavak hi nawn lo ding hi. Topa pen a tawntung nangma khuavak hi ding a, na Pasian pen na minthanna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah60:20 Na ni tum nawn lo ding a, na kha zong tumkik nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen nangma khuavak hi tawntung ding a, na thumna hunte beita ding hi." 
Isaiah60:21 Na mihingte khempeuh thuman ding uh hi. Keima min a than nadingin keima suansa kung, ka khut tawh ka sepsa gam pen amaute in nei paisuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:22 A ngekpen mipa minam khat suak ding a, a neupente milianpi suak ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. A hun a tun ciangin keimah in thakhatin hih thu ka tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah61:1 Gimna a thuak mite tungah thuhoih a puak dingin Topa in kei hong teelin hong sawl ahih manin keima sungah Topa Pasian ’ kha hong om hi. Lungsim kitamzante a damsak ding, salin a kimante tungah suahtakna thu a gen ding, a kikhum mite a dingin thong kong a hong ding," 
Isaiah61:2 Topa in a mite honkhia-in, a galte a guallelhsak ding hun a tunna thu a gen ding, a thum mi khempeuh a hehnem ding," 
Isaiah61:3 amaute pen a thuman mite kici-in, amah a kiminthansak theih nadingin Topa in a mite kem hi, a kicih theih nadingin Zion-ah a om a dah mite a lungdamna ding, a lungkham mite in phatna la a saktheihna ding, a lunggim mite in Pasian a phattheih nadingin amah in kei hong sawlzo hi." 
Isaiah61:4 Amaute in tanglai-a a siasate, lampha kik ding uh a, a kisiamaisate ding kiksak ding uh hi. Amaute in khang tampi sung a kisiamaisa khuapite puahkik ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:5 Gamdang mite in na tuuhonte uh hong kepsak ding a, khualmite pen note’ lo kho le leenggui puahte hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:6 Ahih hangin note pen Topa ’ siampite hong kici ding a, mihingte in note pen i Pasian’ nasemte, ci-in hong gen ding uh hi. Minamte’ hauhna teng note in na ne ding uh a, amau’ hauhna teng note in na kisaktheihpih ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:7 Note’ maizumna tangin nopsakna a zah nihin na ngah ding uh a, note’ mindaina tangin no’ ngahna sungah na lungdam ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin na gam sung uhah a zah nih na luah ding uh hi. Note-a’ pen tawntung lungdamna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah61:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa in thutang deihin, mi’ nate suhna le khialhna ka mudah hi. Amaute tungah amau’ thaman thuman takin ka pia ding a, tawntung thuciamna amaute tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah61:9 Amau’ suanlekhakte pen minamte lakah kithei ding a, amau’ tuletate pen mite laizangah kithei ding hi. Amaute pen Topa in thupha a piak mite hi, ci-in a mu mi khempeuhte in thei-in sang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:10 Topa ’ hangin nakpitakin ka lungdam ding a, ka Pasian’ hangin kipakin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh zipi pa puanhoih tawh kizemin, mothak nu a suangmanphate tawh a kizep mah bangin amah in hotkhiatna puan kei hong silhsakin, thumanna puanpi tawh kei hong tuam khin hi." 
Isaiah61:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung in a dawn meengsakin, huan in a kituhte a posak mah bangin Topa Pasian in minam khempeuh mai-ah thumanna le phatna a pokhia sak hi." 
Isaiah62:1 Zion a kihotkhiatna thu khuavak bangin a taankhiat mateng, ama gualzawhna thu meivak kuang bangin a taankhiat matengin, Zion ka ngaihsutna-in gamdai takin ka om mawk kei ding a, Jerusalem ka ngaihsutna-in ka khawl mawk kei ding hi." 
Isaiah62:2 Minamte in na gualzawhna mu ding uh a, kumpi khempeuh in na minthanna mu ding uh hi. Topa in nang a hong phuah min thak tawh nang hong kisam ding hi." 
Isaiah62:3 Nang pen Topa a dingin hotkhiatna lukhu, na Pasian a dingin kumpi lukhu tawh na kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah62:4 Nang pen a kinusia, hong kici nawn lo ding a, na leitang pen Gamkhing, kici nawn lo ding hi. Nang pen ama tungah ka lungkimna om, hong kici ding a, na leitang pen a Kitenpih, kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah Topa lungkim a, na leitang pen a kitenpih zi tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah62:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh tangval in nungak khat a tenpih mah bangin nang hong lam pa in nang hong tenpih ding a, zipi pa mothak nu tungah a lungdam mah bangin nang tungah na Pasian lungdam ding hi." 
Isaiah62:6 Jerusalem aw, na kulhte tungah galvilte ka koih khin a, sun tawntung le zan tawntungin amaute gamdai ngei lo ding uh hi. Amaute in a thuciamna Topa phawksak ding uh a, amah in Jerusalem kipsakin leitung mite’ phat dingin a bawlkik matengin amaute khawl lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah62:7  
Isaiah62:8 Topa in limtakin thuciamna bawl khinzo a, a vangliatna tawh tungsak ding hi. “Na galte’ an dingin na ante ka piakik nawn kei ding a, nangma sepsa leenggahzu gamdang mite in dawn nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah62:9 Ahih hangin an a kholte in ne-in Topa na phat ding uh a, a kaikhawmte in keima biakinn huang sungah a dawn ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah62:10 Jerusalem mite aw, kulhkongpite panin paikhia unla a hong ciahkik na mipihte uh a dingin lam bawlkhol un. Lam zik un; lam lianpi zikin suangtumte paikhia unla, mite’ muh dingin lim khat khaito un." 
Isaiah62:11 Leimong dongah Topa taangko khin hi. Jerusalem mite tungah, “En un, no hong honkhia pa hong pai hi. Ama sep thaman a mite hong pua a, a gualzawhna thaman a mite hong masuan hi,” ci un." 
Isaiah62:12 Amaute pen A Siangtho Mi, Topa ’ Hotkhiatte kici ding a, nang pen a Kizongkhia, a kinusia lo khuapi, hong kici ding hi." 
Isaiah63:1 Edom gam, Bozrah khua panin puan ausan silhin a hong pai, a puansilhna-ah minthanna mel nei-in, ama thahatna tawh a hong pai pa kua ahi hiam? A honkhiazo dingin hatna a nei, gualzawhna thu a zasak dingin a hong pai pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hi hi." 
Isaiah63:2 Bang hangin na puan san a, na puansilhte, leenggah cilna-ah leenggah a cil pa’ puan tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah63:3 Mite lak panin kuamah in kei hong huh lo a, keimah guak in leenggah cil bangin minam dangte ka cil hi. Sinsona tawh amaute ka cil a, hehna tawh amaute ka tuancil hi. Ka puan tungah amaute’ si hong kithehgawp a, ka puan khempeuh tungah sisan hong baang khin hi." 
Isaiah63:4 Ka mite ka hotkhiat ding hunta ka sa a, a galte uh gimpiak ding a hun hita hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah63:5 Hong huh ding mi ka zong a, ahi zongin kuamah om lo hi. Kei a hong huh ding a om loh ciangin lamdang ka sa hi. Ahi zongin ka hehna in hong thahatsak a, kei mahmah thahatna tawh ka gualzo hi." 
Isaiah63:6 Ka sinsona tawh minam dangte cilin, ka hehna hangin amaute zukham ka bangsak a, amaute’ sisan leilakah ka thehthang hi." 
Isaiah63:7 Topa ’ itna kip, Topa phatnate, Topa in eite tungah a hong piak khempeuh tawh a kizui leh, ama hehpihna le a lianpi ama itna kip tawh a kizui-in amaute tunga a piak, Israel innkuan tungah ama hoihna lianpite ka gengen ding hi." 
Isaiah63:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Amaute pen keima mi taktak hi a, amaute in kei hong khem lo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a lungkhamna panun amaute a honkhia hi." 
Isaiah63:9 Vantung mite’ hotkhiat hi loin, Topa mahmah in amaute honkhia hi. A itna le a hehpihna tawh amaute honkhia a, amah in a beisa hun khempeuhah amaute hoihtakin a kem hi." 
Isaiah63:10 Ahih hangin amaute in lehdo uh a, ama kha siangtho a dahsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen amaute’ gal suak a, amahmah in amaute a do hi." 
Isaiah63:11 Tua ciangin amaute in hun lui lai, ama nasem Moses’ hun a phawk uh hi. Ama mi a makaite honkhia-in, tuipi sung panin a paikhiatpih Topa koi-ah omta ahi hiam? Amaute’ tungah ama kha a piapa," 
Isaiah63:12 Moses tungtawnin a vangliatna zangin na lianpipi a sempa, ama mite’ mai-ah tuite khenkhamin, a minthan’ tawntung nadingin hih bang nate a sempa, tu-in koi-ah omta ahi hiam, ci uh hi." 
Isaiah63:13 Topa in tuithuk kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin leilak a sakol pai bangin kip mahmah uh a, amaute puk lo uh hi." 
Isaiah63:14 Lonona kuamsung a zuansuk bawngte bangin Topa in amaute tawldamna a pia hi. Tua bangin Topa in a mite lamlak ahih manin ama min thang tawntung hi. 
Isaiah63:15 A siangtho, a minthang, nangma omna vantung panin hong ensuk inla hong mu in. Nangma deihsakna le na vangliatna koi-ah omta ahi hiam? Na lungsim’ deihna le nangma hehpihna kote a dingin maimangta hi." 
Isaiah63:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Abraham in kote hong huh loin, Israel in kote hong phawk loh hangin nang pen kote’ Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, nang pen kote’ Pa na hi a, nangmah in tanglai pek pan kote a hong honkhia pa na hi hi." 
Isaiah63:17 Topa aw, kote in nang kong kihtak loh theih nadingun bang hangin na lampi panin kote hong pialsakin ka lungsim uh khauhsak na hi hiam? Nangma nasemte, nangma luah minamte na ngaihsutna-in hong kihei kik in." 
Isaiah63:18 Nangma mi siangthote in tawlkhat sung bek na biakinn nei a, ko hong langpangte in tua na biakinn pen tuancilgawp khinta hi." 
Isaiah63:19 Kote pen nangmah in cikmahin na uk ngei loh mite, nangma mi ahi ngei lo mite tawh a kibang ka suakkhin uh hi." 
Isaiah64:1 Nangma langte tungah na min na theihsakna ding le nangma omna-ah minamte lau-in a lin nadingin mei in selkeu kuangsakin mei in tui a sosak bangin nangma mai-ah mualte a lin nadingin bang hangin na vangliatna tawh vantung balkekin hong paisuk lo na hi hiam? 
Isaiah64:2  
Isaiah64:3 Kote’ lamet lohpi-in nang hong pai-in a lauhuai nate na bawl ngei a, na mai-ah mualte a ling hi." 
Isaiah64:4 Amah a ngakte a dingin na a sempa’ thu tanglai pek panin kuamah in thei ngei lo, kuama bil in za ngei lo a, kuama mit in nang simloh Pasian dang mu ngei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah64:5 Thuman nasep lungdam takin a semte, nangma deih bangin a nungtate, nangmah in na limbawl hi. Kote tungah nang na heh a, ahi zongin kote ka khial lai veve uh hi. Tanglai pek a kipanin ka mawh ngitnget uh hi. A tua bangpi mahin kote hong kihon ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah64:6 Kote khempeuh mawhnei mi ka hi khin uh a, ka gamtat hoih khempeuh uh zong puannin tawh kibanglai veve hi. Kote khempeuh singteh bangin ka vul uh a, ka mawhna hangun huih letkhiat nahthel keu ka bang uh hi." 
Isaiah64:7 Tua ahih ciangin nangmah a hong pom dingin a hanciam tawm, nangma min a lo kuamah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote kiang panin nang in na maitang na seel a, mawhna khut sungah kote na hong pia hi." 
Isaiah64:8 Ahi zongin Topa aw, nang pen kote’ Pa na hi hi. Kote pen tungman bang hi-in, nang pen beelseek pa bang na hi a, kote khempeuh nangma bawl mite ka hi uh hi." 
Isaiah64:9 Topa aw, nakpitakin sinso kei inla, mawhna ciamtehteh kei in. Kote khempeuh nangma mi ka hihna uh hong ngaihsun in." 
Isaiah64:10 Nangma khuapi siangthote gamlak suak khinta a, Zion zong gamlakpi suak a, Jerusalem khua gamkhing a suak hi." 
Isaiah64:11 Kote’ inn a siangtho le a hoihte, ka pate un nangmah hong phatna munte mei in kang khin a, kote’ mun nuam khempeuh a sia suak khinta hi." 
Isaiah64:12 Topa aw, hih thute-ah nangmah ki-ipcip niloh ding na hi hiam? Nang daitakin om dide-in nakpitakin kote hong gimsak ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah65:1 Keima mite’ thungetna a pia dingin a baihsa-in kei om napi-in, amaute in hong ngen lo uh hi. Amaute’ muh dingin kei om napi-in, amaute in hong zong beek lo uh hi. Minamte tungah, “Hih lai-ah om ing, hih lai-ah om ing,” ci-in a dawng pah dingin kiging napi-in, amaute in kei tungah thu hong ngen lo uh hi." 
Isaiah65:2 A hoih loin gamta-in, amau’ deih bang a zui teitei mite," 
Isaiah65:3 ka maitangah a tawntungin kei hong hehsak denin, biakna huan sungah biakpiakna bawlin dawibiakna tau tungah paknamtui a hal mite," 
Isaiah65:4 han sungah tu-in, mun simthamah zanin misite thu a dong mite, voksa ne-in amau’ beel sungah dawibiakna sa mehtui a koih mite," 
Isaiah65:5 “Note kiang panin kote hong kituamkoih ahih manin kihemkhia unla, ko kiangah hong pai kei un,” ci-in midangte tungah a gen mite - hih bang mite khempeuh a sang dingin a beisa hun sungah ka kiging tawntung hi. Hih bang mite ka thuakzo nawn kei hi. Amaute tungah ka hehna pen a mit ngei lo meikuang tawh kibang hi." 
Isaiah65:6 Tu-in amaute gimpiak ding ka khentat khin a, amaute’ thuak dingte lai sungah kiciamteh khin hi. Amau’ mawhnate ka mawk koih kei ding a, amau’ mawhna le a pu a pate uh mawhnate ka thukkik ding hi. Amaute in mual liante tungah paknamtui halin, mual neute tungah hong simmawh uh ahih manin amau’ gamtatna tawh kizui-in ka thuk ding hi, ci hi." 
Isaiah65:7  
Isaiah65:8 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Leenggahzu pen leenggah bom panin kingah a, mite in, ‘Tuate kimang thei ding ahih ciangin susia kei un,’ a cih mah bangun kei zong a minam bupun susia loin, keima na hong semte ka suaktasak ding hi." 
Isaiah65:9 Jakob sung panin Judah minamte thupha ka pia ding a, amau’ suanlekhakte in mualtung gam a luah ding uh hi. Keima na hong sem, keima teel mite, tua gamah teng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:10 Amaute in kei hong bia ding uh a, Sharon gam pen amau’ tuuhon gamtatna mun suaksak ding uh a, Akhor Kuam pen amau’ bawng honte’ lupna mun a suaksak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:11 “Ahih hangin kei a hong nusia, ka mual siangtho a mangngilh, Gad pasian a dingin sabuai phahin, Meni pasian a dingin zu helsa hai sungah a dim note pen," 
Isaiah65:12 namsau tawh a si dingin ka hong seh ding a, hong that dingte’ mai-ah na ngawng uh na dawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kong sap ciangin note in nong dawng kei uh a, thu ka gen ciangin nong ngai kei uh hi. Keima thu man loh ding mah na utzaw uh a, a sia na gamta uh hi." 
Isaiah65:13 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: En un, ka nasemte in ne ding uh a, ahih hangin note na gilkial ding uh hi. Ka nasemte in dawn ding uh a, ahih hangin note na dangtak ding uh hi. Ka nasemte lungdam ding uh a, ahih hangin note na maizum ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:14 Ka nasemte in lungdamin la sa ding uh a, note in lungsim na sa-in kiko-in, lungsim gimna hangin na tau ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:15 Keima teel mite in samsiatna-in na min uh zang ding uh a, Topa Pasian in note hong that ding hi. Ahih hangin ama nasemte pen min dang a phuah ding hi." 
Isaiah65:16 Leitungah thupha a kipiak ding a ngen pa in thuman Pasian min tawh thupha a kipiak ding ngen ding a, leitungah thuciamna a lapa in thuman Pasian min tawh a ciam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a beisa huna haksatnate khempeuh kimangngilh khinta a, tuate beimang khinta hi." 
Isaiah65:17 “Tu-in vantung thakte le leitung thak ka piangsak hi. A beisa thute kiciamteh nawn lo ding a, kiphawkkha nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah65:18 Keima piansaksa sungah lungdamin kipakin om tawntung un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khuapi lungdamna khua-in bawlin, a mite a lungnuam dingin ka bawl hi." 
Isaiah65:19 Jerusalem’ hangin ka lungdam ding a, ka mite’ hangin ka kipak ding hi. Tua khua sungah kahna aw le cimawhin kikona aw om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah65:20 Naupangte a ngeksih om lo ding a, sauveipipi kinungta ding hi. Kum za bek a nungtate a khansihin kingaihsun ding a, kum za cing loin a site, keima gimpiakna lim hi ding hi." 
Isaiah65:21 Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, a sungah teng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui lo bawl ding uh a, a gah ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:22 Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, tua inn-ah midang teng, cih om nawn lo ding hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin adang khat in ne, cih om lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima mite’ nuntak hun pen singkung khat nuntak tan bang sawt ding a, keima teel mite in amau’ khut tawh a sepsa nate lungdamin nesuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:23 Amaute in a mawk nadingin na sem lo ding uh a, lungkham nadingin ta nei lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa ’ thupha piak, suanlekhakte hi ding uh a, amau’ tate amaute tawh nungta khawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:24 Amaute in hong sap ma-in ke’n ka dawng ding a, amaute in thu a gen laitakin ke’n ka za ding hi." 
Isaiah65:25 Keivom le tuuno in an nekhawm ding uh a, humpinelkai in bawngtal bangin buhkung ne ding hi. Leivui pen gulpi’ an hita ding a, mite hong tu nawn lo ding hi. Keima mual siangtho tung tengah amaute kiliamsak lo ding uh a, kisusia lo ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung pen keima khengakna ahi hi. Kei a dingin koi lai-ah inn lam ding a, keima tawlngakna ding mun koi lai ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah66:2 Hih nate khempeuh keima bawlsa ahih manin hih nate khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi, Topa in ci hi. Ahih hangin kiniamkhiatin, lungsim a kitamzan mipa, keima thu-ah lau-in a ling kelkel pa, keima deih mipa ahi hi." 
Isaiah66:3 Biakna-in bawngtal a gopa in mihing zong that hi. Biakpiakna-in tuuno a gopa in ui ngawng zong at hi. An tawh biakpiakna a bawlpa in vok si zong pia hi. Paknamtui tawh phawkna biakpiakna a bawlpa in milim zong bia-in thupha a pia hi. Hih mite amau ut bang ciatin gamta uh a, amau’ kihhuai gamtatna uhah nuam a sa uh hi." 
Isaiah66:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak ding a, amau’ kihtak thute mah amau’ tungah ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sap ciangin kuamah in hong dawng lo uh a, thu ka gen ciangin kuamah in hong ngai lo uh hi. Keima thu man loh ding mah utzaw uh a, a sia-in gamta uh hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:5 Ama thu-ah lau-in a ling mite aw, Topa ’ thu za un: Keima tungah note nong cihtakna hangun na mipihte uh pawlkhat in note hong mudahin hong hawlkhia ding uh a, zahpihna tawh note hong hopihin, “Lungdamin na om ding uh hong deihsak ka hih manun, Topa in ama liatna hong lak hen la, note hong honkhia ta hen,” hong ci vial ding uh hi. Hih banga hong paute pen mindaina a thuak ding mite ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah66:6 Ngai un, khuapi sunga gamlumna! Biakinn sunga awging! Topa in a galte gim a piakna huging ahi hi." 
Isaiah66:7 Ka khuapi siangtho pen nausuak natna a thuak ma-in nau a suak nupi tawh kibang a, nausuak gimna a tun ma-in amah in tapa khat a nei hi."
