Isaiah66:8 A tuaci bang kua’n za ngei na hi uh hiam? A tuaci bang kua’n mu ngei na hi uh hiam? Ni khat thu-in gam khat piang ngei ahi hiam? Tomnokhat sungin minam khat piangkhia ngei ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion in nausuak gimna a thuak phetin a minamte suakkhia pah hi. 
Isaiah66:9 Nausuah hun tungsak napi-in suaksak lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in ci hi. Nau a suakkhiasak keimah in naugil khakcip ding ka hi hiam, na Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:10 Naungek in a nu’ nawi teepin nuam a sak mah bangin, Jerusalem in nuam a sakna ah nuam na sakkhawm theih nadingun amah a it khempeuhte aw, Jerusalem tawh lungdam unla, ama hangin kipak un. Ama hangin kapin a thum khempeuhte aw, ama lungdamna ah amah tawh lungdam khawm un, a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:11  
Isaiah66:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tu-in gunpi bangin nopsakna le tuiletkhia bangin minamte’ hauhna ama tungah ka tungsak ding hi. Note pen a nu’ nawi teepin, a ang-ah kipua a, a khuk tungah a diang naungek na bang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:13 A nu in a ta a hehnep bangin note kong hehnem ding a, note in Jerusalem khua sungah hehnepna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:14 Hih thu a hong piang na muh uh ciangin na lungdam ding uh hi. Note hong thahatsakin hong cidamsak ding hi. Tua ciangin ka thu hong mangte ka huhna, ka galte tungah ka hehna ka lahna thu na thei ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Isaiah66:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh heh mahmahna tawh ama sinsona le meikuang tawh gim a pia dingin meikuang sungah Topa hong pai ding a, huihpi bangin a leengte hong pai ding hi." 
Isaiah66:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in mei tawh thukhenna sem ding a, a mawh mi khempeuh tungah a namsau tawh thu khen ding a, Topa in a thah mite tam mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah66:17 Biakna huan sungah a pai dingin amaute kisiansuahin a kisiangthosak, a laizang a om pen a zuite, voksa le kihhuaina le zusa a nete beimang khawm ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ nasepnate le amau’ ngaihsutnate ka thei a, minam khempeuh a khawm dingin ka hong pai hi. Amaute hong pai-in ka minthanna mu ding uh a," 
Isaiah66:19 amaute’ lakah lim khat ka khai ding hi. Amau’ sung panin, minamte tung, Tarshish mite tung, Put mi le Lud mite tung, Meshek mite tung, Tubal mi le Javan mite tung, ka min hoihna a za ngei lo, ka minthanna a mu ngei lo tuipi gei-a om gam mite tungah a suakta lai mite ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in minamte lakah ka minthanna genthang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:20 Israel mite in beel siangtho sungah an tawh amau biakpiakna tawi-in Topa ’ biakinn-ah hong paipih uh mah bangin amaute in minam khempeuh lak panin Topa ’ tungah piak dingin na sanggamte khempeuh uh, sakolte, leengte, taalte, le late, kalaoh hatte tungah hong pua-in ka mual siangtho Jerusalem-ah hong paipih ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:21 Amaute kimkhat zong, siampite le Levi mite a suak dingin ka la ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:22 Ka bawl ding vantung thak le leitung thak pen ahihleh keima mai-ah kip ding hi. Tua mah bangin na suan na khakte uh le na min uh kip ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:23 Khadet khat pan Khadet khat, keimah bia dingin Jerusalem-ah mi khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:24 Amaute a ciah uh ciangin kei hong lehdo mite’ luanghawmte en ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau a ne thante si ngei loin, amau a kihalna mei mit ngei lo ding a, amaute pen mi khempeuh’ kih hi ding hi, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:1 Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a siampi khat ahi Hilkiah’ tapa Jeremiah’ thugente hih bang ahi hi. 
Jeremiah1:2 Amon’ tapa Josiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm le kum thum a cin kumin ‘ Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi." 
Jeremiah1:3 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah ciangin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih leuleu hi. Tua khit ciangin Josiah’ tapa Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak kum, a kha ngana, Jerusalem khua mite sal tang dingin a kipuakkhiat dong tam veipi a hopihpih hi." 
Jeremiah1:4 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Gil sungah kong bawl ma-in nang kong thei khinzo hi. Na suah ma-in nang kong teelkhia khinzo a, minam dangte tungah kamsang dingin kong koih khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:6 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, kei thugen ka siam kei a, naupang khat ka hi lel hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:7 Ahih hangin Topa in, “‘Naupang khat ka hi lel hi,’ ci kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kong puakna khempeuhte kiangah na pai ding a, kong sawl peuhpeuh na gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:8 Amaute kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:9 Tua ciangin Topa in a khut tawh hong zam phei-in ka muk hong lawnsakin hong hopih hi. “En in, ka thute na kam sungah kong koih khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah1:10 Gam khempeuh le kumpi khempeuhte’ tungah a botkhia ding le a phelkhia dingin ahi zongin, a susia ding le a lawnkhia dingin ahi zongin, a lam ding le a phut dingin ahi zongin, tuni-in za, nang kong piazo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Ngak, a kici almond singhiang khat ka mu hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Jeremiah1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na man hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka thugente ka tangtunsak nadingin kei zong ka ngak hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:13 Topa in a nihveina hong hopih leuleu a, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Beel a so khat ka mu a, leilu lam panin hong awnsuk hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:14 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Leilu lam panin hih gammi khempeuhte’ tungah siatna hong sosuk ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lamah a om gam khempeuh keimah in ka sam a, amaute hong pai-in Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah ahi zongin, khua kimkota kulh kiimte-ah ahi zongin, Judah gam khuapi khempeuh kiimte-ah ahi zongin a kumpi tokhomte uh hong phut ciat ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ka mite in kei hong taisan uh ahih manin a mawhna uh hangin amau’ tungah thu ka khen ding hi; pasian dangte tungah meihal biakna pia uh a, a khut uh tawh a bawlsa uh milimte a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, kithawi in. Pai inla kong sawl khempeuh amaute kiangah va gen in. Amaute kihta kei in; na kihtak leh amau’ mai-ah kong lausakzaw lai ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:18 En in, hih gambup langah a ding ding, Judah kumpite, uliante, siampite le hih gammi khempeuh langah a pang dingin tuni-in nang, khuapi muanhuai khat bang ahi zongin, sikkhuampi khat bangin ahi zongin, sumngo kulhpi khat bangin ahi zongin ka hong bawl hi." 
Jeremiah1:19 Amaute in nang’ langkhatah hong do ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Pai inla, Jerusalem khuamite’ zak dingin va taangko in. Topa in kong cihin-ah: Na khangno lai-a nong kipiakna, na mothak lai-a nong itna, a kikho nai lo gamlakah kei’ nung nong zuih lai hun ka phawk hi." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israel mite pen Topa a dingin a tuam om hi a, ama anlakna ah a anpalte ahi uh hi. Amaute a ne peuhpeuh a mawh suak uh a, gimna a thuak uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:4 Jakob suan le Israel innkuan khempeuhte aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah2:5 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na pute na pate uh kei kiang panin gamlapi-ah paikhia-in, bangmahin a kimang lo milim peuh bia-in, amau mahmah zong bangmahin a kimang lo a suah khit nadingun kei tungah bang mawhna hong mu uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Amaute in, ‘Egypt gam panin eite hong paikhiatpihin sehnel lak le dum lak, lei keu lak le a lauhuai khuamial bekbak lak, kuama pai ngei lohna mun, kuama ten lohna gamlakah a hong makaih Topa koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ ci beek lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:7 Singgah le a hoih nate na nek theih nadingun an tamna munah kong tunpih hi. Ahih hangin no nong pai uh ciangin ka gam na ninsak uh a, ka neihsa leitang a kihhuai mun na suaksak tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:8 Siampite in, ‘ Topa koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ ci-in dong lo uh hi. Thukham a theite nangawn in kei hong thei lo uh hi. Kei tungah kumpi uliante hong khial khin uh a, kamsangte in Baal min tawh thu genin kimanna a nei lo milimte a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah, note kong mawhsaklai ding a, na tate uh’ tate zong ka mawhsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah2:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh nitumna lamah Saipras tuikulh mong dong kantan unla va en dih un. Nisuahna lamah Kedar gamah mi sawl unla limtakin kan dih un; tua bang thu a piang ngei peuhmah hiam, en dih un." 
Jeremiah2:11 Gam khat peuhpeuh in pasian ahi taktak beek lo a pasian-te uh nangawn a khek ngei peuhmah uh hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in a minthanna uh ahi keimah, bangmahin a kimang lo na peuh tawh hong khek tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:12 Tua thu phawk unla lau un; vantungte aw, dah mahmah unla ling un, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in mawhna nam nih a bawlzo uh hi. Nuntakna ciktui ahi keimah a hong taisanzo uh hi. Tuikhuk totawm uh a, a tuikhuk tawh uh keu-in, tui a vung thei kei hi." 
Jeremiah2:14 “Israel sal ahi hiam? Sila namte ahi zenzen hiam? Hilo ahihleh bang hangin a galte in luhgawpzo ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah2:15 Humpinelkai bangin a galte in amah hawksan uh a, nakpitakin a hawkgawp uh hi. A gam uh gam simtham a suah uh a, a khuapite uh cimin kuamah teng lo hi." 
Jeremiah2:16 Tham loin, Memfis le Tahpanhes mite in zong a luguh a suktapsak zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:17 Israel aw, Topa na Pasian in lampi-ah hong makaih laitakin amah na nusiat manin nang tungah hih bang teng hong tung hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tu-in Egypt gamah nang na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Nail gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam? Assiria gamah na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Eufratis gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah2:19 Na gitlohna mah in nangmah hong thuhilh ding a, kei na hong up nawn lohna in nangmah hong mawhsak ding hi. Topa na Pasian nong nusia a, keimah nong kihtak nawn loh ciangin, nuam hetloin kha velval hi, cih thu thei inla mu in, Vanglian Topa Pasian in ka hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Sawtpek lai a kipanin ka hakkol kuaitanin ka ukna nong nial a, hong kihenna khau sutatin, ‘Na na ka sem kei ding hi,’ na hong ci hi. Numei paktatte na bang uh a, mual sang tung teng le sing liim nuai tengah milim na bia kawikawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:21 A kiteelteel leenggui ci hoihte bangin nang kong suankik zo a, ahih hangin nang kisia kikin bang hangin leenggah gui a hoih lote na suakkik na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Vuttui tawh kisilin satpiang tampi na zang zongin na mawhna nin ka mu lai veve hi, Topa Pasian in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:23 Bangci bangin nangmah in, ‘Kei ka nin kei hi. Baal pasian-te’ nung ka zui kei hi,’ bang hangin ci thei ding na hi hiam? Mualkuam zangah a om na lampi totte ento inla, na hihsate mu dih in. A suktai a totai kawikawi kalaoh huk na bang tazen hi." 
Jeremiah2:24 Gamlak nuam a sa, lano hukte na bang tazen hi. A huk laitakin kua in khamzo ding ahi hiam? Amah a hih nuam peuhpeuh in haksa loin, a ut hunhunin a ngah lel ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:25 Na khe guakin lam pai kei inla, na dang taaksak kei in, kong cih hangin, nangmah in, ‘Bang phamawh ahi hiam? Gamdang pasian-te ka it a, amau’ nung ka zui ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:26 “Guta khatpeuh a kimat ciangin a zum bangin, Israel mite, a kumpite, a uliante, a siampite, le a kamsangte uh zong a maizum ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:27 Amaute in singtawng khat kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka pasian na hi hi,’ ci uh a, suangtum khat kiangah, ‘Ka pianna ka nu na hi hi,’ peuh a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingat lo uh hi. Ahih hangin haksatna a tuah uh ciangin, ‘Tho inla hong hon in,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:28 “Note-a’ dinga na bawl uh na pasian-te uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Haksatna na tuah uh ciangin a hong hon thei ahihleh kihonsak ta un; bang hang hiam cih leh Judah gam aw, na khuapi zahzah uh pasian na nei tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:29 Kei na hong mawhsakna uh bang thu teng tawh ahi hiam? Na vekpi-un kei nong langpan’ khin uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:30 Na tate uh thuhilhin ka sat hangin a mawkna suakzo ta hi. Amaute kibawlpha tuan lo uh hi. Humpinelkai hawk bangin na namsaute un na kamsangte uh a that khinzo uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:31 No Israel mite aw, Topa’ kammal limtakin ngai dih un. Israel-te a dingin gamlak tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? A mial mahmah gam tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin ka mite in, ‘Ko ka suakta uh hi; nang kiangah kong pai nawn kei ding uh hi,’ ci uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nungak khat in a kizepnate mangngilh thei ahi hiam? A kipi mothak in a mothak puante mangngilh thei ahi hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in simzawh loh ni tampi sung a hong mangngilh uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:33 Na lawm ngaih ding na zon siam mahmah a, numei gilote nangawn a zia na hilh thei zen hi." 
Jeremiah2:34 Mawhnei lo mizawngte’ sisan na puan tungah baang hi. Amaute in na inn hong luhngei beek lo uh hi. “Tua bang teng hinapi-in 
Jeremiah2:35 nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi, kei tungah Pasian heh nawn lo hi,’ na ci hi. En in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi,’ na cih manin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah2:36 Bang hangin na lungsim kheel ziauziau na hi hiam? Assiria in nang hong maizumsak ngei bangin Egypt-te in zong nang hong maizumsak ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:37 Nangmah zong tua gam panin maizumna tawh na lu tungah vut khusa-in nong paikhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa in na muan mite ka nialzo hi; amaute’ hangin na gualzo ngei kei ding hi. 
Jeremiah3:1 “Mi khat in a zi ma hen la, tua nu in zong amah nusia-in, midang khat’ zi va suak leh, a pasal masa in tua nu lakik thei ding ahi hiam? Tua gamteng a ninsak khin suak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Nang pen numei paktat suakin mi tampi tak tawh kingai khinzo napi-in, tu-in kei kiang hong zuankik ding na hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:2 Khuadak inla mualsang dawnte en dih in. Hong kilup khoppih lohna mun koi laitakah om ahi hiam? Arab mite in a suam dingun gamlakah mi a ngak uh bangin lam gei-ah tu-in na luppih ding mi na ngak hi. Na paktatna le na gitlohna tawh hih gam na ninsakzo hi. 
Jeremiah3:3 Tua hang mahin guahtui kikangsak a, guah nunung hong zu lo hi. Ahi zongin numei paktatte tawh a kibang hinapi-in na maizum thei kei lailai hi." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Tumahin kei nong sam a, ‘Ka pa aw, ka neulai pek pan ka lawm na hi hi" 
Jeremiah3:5 nang keima tungah heh tawntung ding na hi hiam? A tawp dongin lungham den ding na hi hiam?’ na hong ci hi. En in, tua bang na cih hangin, siatna na hih theih khempeuh na hih khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:6 Kumpi Josiah in a uk laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “A zulhzau Israel, mualsang tung khempeuhah pai-in singliim nuai khempeuhah numei paktat bangin a om kawikawina na mu khinzo hiam?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Hih teng a hih khit ciangin kei kiangah hong kileh kik ngawn ding hi, ci-in ka up hangin amah hong kileh kik tuan lo hi. Tua bangin a gamtatna pen numei ginalo a sanggamnu Judah in zong a mu hi." 
Jeremiah3:8 A zulhzau Israel, midang tawh a khialhna hangin kimakna lai pia-in, ka hawlkhiat zong amah in a mu hi. Ahih hangin numei ginalo Judah lau tuan loin, amah zong numei paktat khat mah a va suak veve hi." 
Jeremiah3:9 Tua bang hih ding amah in baih ngaihsut lel ahih manin suangtum le singtawng peuh bia-in khial a, gam a ninsak hi." 
Jeremiah3:10 Hih bang teng hinapi a sanggamnu, numei ginalo Judah, a lungsim takpi tawh hong kilehkik loin, a kilehkik hong kineihkhem bek hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “A zulhzau Israel, numei ginalo Judah sangin a mawhna tamzaw hi." 
Jeremiah3:12 Pai inla leilu lam Israel gamah hih bangin va taangko in: ‘Hong kilehkik in, a zulhzau Israel aw, Topa in kong ci hi. Hehna tawh nang kong en kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a hehpih thei pa ka hi hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Ka heh tawntung kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Na mawhna na phawk ding bek kisam hi. Topa na Pasian na langpanna, singliim nuai khempeuhah gamdang pasian-te tawh na khialh kawikawina le ka thu nong man lohnate pulak in, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:14 Hong kileh kik un, a zulhzau ka tate aw, Topa in kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen keima mite na hi uh a, khuapi khat panin mi khat, beh khat sung panin nih cih bangin hong la-in, Zion khua-ah ka hong puak ding hi." 
Jeremiah3:15 “‘Ka thu a hong mang makaite ka hong pia ding a, amaute in pilna le siamna tawh note hong uk ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:16 Tua hun ciangin gam sungah note pungin na tam uh ciangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, mite in, “ Topa’ Thuciamna Singkuang,” ci-in genin a nei nawn kei ding uh hi. Amaute in ngaihsun kha lo ding uh a, phawkkha loin, zong a goih beek kei ding uh hi. Tham loin zong a bawlkik nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:17 Tua hun ciangin Jerusalem khua pen Topa’ kumpi tokhom kici ding a, Jerusalem khua Topa’ omna-ah gam khempeuh hong kikhawmin, amaute in amau’ mawhnopna lungsim uh a zui tentan nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Tua hun ciangin Judah mite in Israel mite hong pawlpih ding uh a, leilu lam gam salsuahna panin na pu na pate uh’ luah dingin ka piaksa gamah a paikhawm ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:19 “‘Israel aw, ka tapa bangin nang hong bawlin, gam khempeuh lakah a hoihpen gam nopci mahmah khat nang hong pia ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ahih hangin a thuman lo zi in a pasal a nusiat bangin Israel mite aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, no zong kei tungah nong thuman kei uh hi,’ ci-in va taangko in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:21 Mualtung panin awging khat hong kiza a, Israel mite’ kahna le tauna awging ahi hi. Lam a pialna hang uh le Topa a Pasian uh a mangngilhna hang uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah3:22 Topa in, “Hong kileh kik un, a zulhzau ka tate aw, na zulhzauna uh kong damsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong, “En in, nang kiang kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa kote’ Pasian na hi hi." 
Jeremiah3:23 Mualtungte le mualsangte’ tungah gamlum lialuanate zuaupi taktak hi a, Israel mite hotkhiatna ding Topa eite’ Pasian’ kiang bekah om takpi hi." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Ahih hangin i neu lai a kipan a zumhuai Baal pasian i biakna hangin i pu i pate’ biakna ahi tuulebawngte, a tapate le a tanute khempeuh uh i sum khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Tua ahih manin maizumin lum ni. I minsiatna silh ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh i neulai a kipan tuni ciang dong eite le i pu i pate pen Topa i Pasian’ tungah i mawh khinzo hi. Topa i Pasian’ thu i mang kei khinzo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:1 Topa in, “Israel mite aw, na kilehkik nop uhleh kei kiangah hong kilehkik un. Na kihhuainate uh kei kiang pan na paihkhiat uh a, na tai kawikawi kei uh a," 
Jeremiah4:2 ‘ Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in, thuman tak, kiptak, thutang takin thu na ciam nak-uhleh gam khempeuh in thupha ka piak ding hong ngen ding uh a, kei’ sungah amaute a lungdam ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:3 Judah gammite le Jerusalem khuamite tungah Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na lote uh kal unla, ling lakah khai vawh kei un." 
Jeremiah4:4 Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite aw, Topa’ thu zui unla, lungsim takpi tawh zui un. Na tuacih kei uhleh na bawl uh mawhnate hangin ka hehna mei bangin hong kuangkhia ding a, a phelhzo kuamah om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:5 Judah gamah va gen unla, Jerusalem khua-ah va taangko un. Gam sung khempeuhah peengkul mutin awng unla, va gen un. Hong kikhawm unla khuapi muanhuaite sungah va bu ni, va ci un." 
Jeremiah4:6 Zion paina lampi kihilh unla, na suahtak nadingun tai un; zekai kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin siatna lianpi ka hong puaksuk hi." 
Jeremiah4:7 Humpinelkai khat a bukna sawlkawm panin hong kuankhiazo a, gamte a susia ding pa hong paikhiazo hi. Na gam uh a kisiasak ding le na khuapite uhah kuamah a ten loh nadingin a susia dingin ama omna panin hong kuankhia khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Tua ahih manin puanhampi silhin tau-in kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ hehna lauhuaipi eite’ kiang panin kiheikhia nai lo hi. 
Jeremiah4:9 Topa in, “Tua ni ciangin kumpipa le kumpi uliante lungkia ding uh a, siampite lau mahmahin, kamsangte dipkua ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:10 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in hih mite le Jerusalem khuamite khem cih takin na khem khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau kiangah, ‘Nopna hong om ding hi,’ ci napi-in, amau a sunlum dingin namsau khat a om gige hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:11 Tua hun ciangin hih mite le Jerusalem khua mite kiangah, “A sa mahmah huih, sehnel gam a sang mun panin ka mite tungah hong nung ding a, tua huih pen anvaite a zapsiang dingin a nung huih bang hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:12 Ka sawl huih pen tua bang dingin hat lua ding hi. Tu-in Topa in amaute tungah thu khenin a gen hi,” kici ding hi." 
Jeremiah4:13 En un, meii bangin i gal pa hong pai a, a sakol leengte pingpei tawh kibang a, a sakolte muvanlai sangin manlang zaw hi. Gimna i thuak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal lel ding ihi ta hi." 
Jeremiah4:14 Jerusalem khua aw, nang hong kihotkhiat nadingin na lungsim sung panin gitlohna sawpkhia in. Na sungah gitlohna lungsim bang tanvei kemcip ding na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ngai un; Dan gam panin aw khat hong ging a, Efraim Mual panin kisiatna ding thu hong kitaangko hi." 
Jeremiah4:16 Minamte kiangah va gen unla, Jerusalem kiangah va taangko un. “Gamlapi panin mite hong pai uh a, Judah gam khuapite langpangin hong kiko uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:17 Judah gam in kei hong langpan’ ahih manin lohongte bangin a galte in a kimkotah a pang dimdiam uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:18 Na lungsim le na gamtatnate’ hangin nang’ tungah hih thu hong tung hi. Hih pen nangma gitlohna hang hi a, na lungtang pailetin hong sun hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:19 Aw, ka lungtang, ka lungtang! Na ka sa mahmah hi. Ka lungtang kisai vanvan a, ka om hithiat thei kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh peengkul mutna aw, gal kisimna aw ka za hi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Siatna khat khit ciangin adang khat hong tung a, gam sung khempeuh kisia khinta hi. Thakhat thu-in ka bukte hong kisuksiatsak a, ka puankhaite kikekgawp hi." 
Jeremiah4:21 Bang tanvei galkisimna mu lai ding ka hi hiam? Bang tanvei peengkul aw za lai ding ka hi hiam? 
Jeremiah4:22 Topa in, “Ka mite hai uh a, kei hong thei lo uh hi. Naupang haite bang uh a, bangmah thei lo uh hi. A sia bawl ding lamsang siam bek uh hi. A hoih bangmah bawl thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:23 Leitung ka et leh limlemel nei lo a, vantungah zong khuavak om lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:24 Mualte ka et leh kiling damdam uh a, mual neute kileh kawikawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ka khuadak leh mi khat beek ka mu kei a, vana vasate zong a leengmang khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ka et leh, logam leihoih teng sehnel gam suakkhin a, Topa’ mai, a hehna lianpi mai-ah, khuapi khempeuh kisia khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Gam buppi, gamlak suak ding a, ahih hangin ka susia sam kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah4:28 Tua thu hangin leitung kap ding a, vantung mial ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gensa, ka khensatsa hi a, ka kisik loh bangin ka lungsim zong ka kheelkik kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:29 Sakol tunga tuangte le thal tawite’ aw a kizak ciangin mi khempeuh galtai mang uh a, gamlakah tai-in suang lakah a kahto uh hi. Khuapi khempeuh kinusia khin a, kuamah teng nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:30 Jerusalem khuapi aw, a siacip ding na hita hi. Puansan silhin kham tawh na kizep liatluat hangin, na mitte zemin na golsak hangin, a mawkna-in a kizem na hita hi. Na lawm ngaihte in nang hong nusia ta uh a, tu-in hong that nuam ta uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:31 Nau a suak ding numei a kiko bang khat ka za a, tacil a suak numei’ tauna tawh kibang hi. Zion’ tanu husam liangin a kikona aw na hi a, a khut tegel zakin, “Gimna ka thuak ding hi. Kei hong that ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:1 Jerusalem khua sungah kileh kawikawi un. Khuadak unla en dih un! A thuman gamtat leh thuman a zong mi khat beek na mu uh hiam, zong dih un. Na muh uhleh tua khua’ mawhna ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:2 “ Topa a nuntak bangin,” ci-in a kiciam uh hangin a zuaupi uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah5:3 Topa aw, nangmah in thuman en gige hi lo na hi hiam? Nangmah in amaute na sat hangin a awlmawh tuan kei uh hi. Na sukgawp hangin na thuhilhna a ngai tuan kei uh hi. Amaute’ maitang suangtum sangin sakzaw a, a kisik nuam kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:4 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih mite mihai hi a, a hehpihhuai ahi hi. Topa’ lampi thei lo uh a, amau’ Pasian’ deihna a thei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:5 Miliante kiangah pai-in ka va kiho ding uh hi. Amaute in Topa’ lampi thei uh a, amau’ Pasian’ deihna thei uh hi,” ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a vekpi-un ka uk ding nial khin uh a, ka hakkol kuaitanin ka henna khaute sutat khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:6 Tua ahih manin tulak panin humpinelkai in amaute that ding a, sehnel gam panin keivom in amaute a petgawp ding hi. Kamkei in a khuapite uh limtakin vil gige a, a pusuakkhia peuhpeuh balzan gawp ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ mawhna tamlua a, hong taisan mun lua uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Na mawhnate uh hong koici maisak thei ding ka hi hiam? Na tate un kei hong nusiazo uh a, pasian ahi lopite peuh tawh kiciamzo uh hi. Amaute a gilvah dong uh an ka vak khit ciangin amaute in angkawmin, numei paktatte’ inn-ah a hon om uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Sakol gilvah a lante bangin a inn vengte’ zite uh nehin a tau huthut uh hi. 
Jeremiah5:9 Hih thute hangin amaute gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam? Topa in ka genin-ah, hici bang minam tungah thukkik lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah5:10 A gualin a kisuan a leenggah huan sungah pai inla, suksiat sak in; ahi zongin sukmai mangsak sam kei in. A hiangte heuhkhiatsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh tua a hiangte Topa a’ hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah5:11 Israel minamte le Judah minamte, Topa in ka cihin-ah, kei’ tungah hong thuman nawn het lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:12 “Amaute in Topa hong nial uh a, ‘Amah in bangmah hihlo ding hi. Eite tungah siatna hong tung lo ding a, gal ahi zongin kial ahi zongin i thuak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:13 Kamsangte lah huih bang hi lel uh a, a sung uhah thu teng lo hi. Amau’ gen bangun amau mah in a thuak ding uh hi,’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:14 Tua ahih manin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hong hopih a, “Amaute, tu-a bangin kampau uh ahih manin na kam sungah mei bangin ka kuansak ka thute in sing tawh kibang hih minamte kangtum gawp ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:15 “En un, Israel minamte aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, gamlapi panin note a hong sim dingin gam khat kong kuansak ding hi. Tua gam pen tanglai pekin a om khinsa, a hat mahmah, amaute’ pau na theih loh uh gam khat ahi hi." 
Jeremiah5:16 Thal tawh a kap uh teh kaplum lianlian uh a, a vekpi-un galhang kim uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:17 Amaute in lo-a na ante uh le na an huante uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na tapate uh le na tanute uh hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tuuhon, na bawnghonte uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na leenggah, na theigahte uh hong nek mangsak ding uh hi. Na muan mahmah uh kulhpi tawh a ki-um na khuapite uh namsau tawh hong suksiatsak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:18 “Ahih hangin tua bang hun ciang nangawnin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, note kong sumaimang khin sam kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:19 Na mipihte un, ‘Bang hangin Topa i Pasian in hih bangin ei’ tungah hong bawl ahi hiam?’ a cih uh ciangin nangmah in, ‘ Topa nusia-in na gam sung uhah gamdang pasian-te’ na na sep uh bangin, note’ gam ahi lo gam dangah, gamdang mite’ na na sem ding uh hi,’ na ci ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:20 Jakob’ suante’ tungah gen in. Judah mite’ tungah hih bangin ci in: 
Jeremiah5:21 “Ngai un, ngaihsutna a nei lo mihaite aw, mit nei napi-in a mu lote, bil nei napi-in a za lo mite aw," 
Jeremiah5:22 kei hong kihta lo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Keima mai-ah ling lo na hi uh hiam? Tuipi gei-a om sehnelte keima koih hi a, tui ka dalsak tawntung hi. Tuihualte in a lawhlawh hangin zo zo lo uh a, a gin’ zuazua uh hangin kantanzo tuan lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ahih hangin hih mite a lungsim uh khauhin kei hong langpan’ zen uh hi. Hong kiheisan uh a, hong paisan uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:24 A lungsim sung uhah, ‘A huna guah hong zusak a, tukguah, khalguah hong pia a, anlak hun ding a hong sehsak den Topa i Pasian zahtak ni,’ a ci kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:25 Na khialhnate un hih na hoihte khaktan a, na mawhnate uh hangin tuate na taanlawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Ka mite’ lakah migilote kihel uh a, vasa thangsiah bangin mite thangsiahin a man uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:27 Bawm sung dimin vasa a kikhum bangin khemna tawh a ngah uh vante tawh a inn uh a dim hi. Tua ahih manin amaute lianin hau mahmah uh a, thau-in a mai uh a zol hi." 
Jeremiah5:28 Gitlohna lamah a hun bek a theithei kei uh hi. Tagah mite’ phattuamna ding khual loin thu a man lopi-in khen uh a, mizawngte’ tungah thuman lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Hih thute hangin amaute gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in ka ci hi. Hih bang minam’ tungah thukkik lo ding ka hi hiam, ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:30 A dipkuathuai, a patauhhuai thu khat gam sungah a piang khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah5:31 Kamsangte in thuman gen lo uh a, siampite in zong amau’ ut bangun a uk uh hi. Ka mite in phamawh sa lo sawnsawn uh hi. A tawpna hun hong tun ciangin bang cih ding uh ahi hiam, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:1 Benjamin’ suante aw, na suahtak nadingun tai un. Jerusalem khua taisan un. Tekoa khua-ah peengkul tum unla, Bethlehem khua-ah theihsakna meikhu khusak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin gimna leh siatna lianpi a hong pai ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:2 A melhoih, a ngeek dikdek Zion tanu ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:3 Kumpite, a galkapte uh tawh ama kiang hong tung ding uh a, a kimkotah giahphual satin a deih peuhpeuh uh a la ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:4 Amaute in, “Jerusalem khua a sim dingin kisa un. Tho un, sun ciangin i sim ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amau mah in, “Citciat aw, zekai lua hang! Ni tum dektakta a, i liimte sau keei ta hi." 
Jeremiah6:5 Kithawi un, zan ciangin i sim ding a, a kumpi innte uh i susia ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in, “A singte phuksak unla, Jerusalem khua sim nadingin phungin ciang un. Hih khuapi gim piak kul hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kinetniamna bekbek tawh a kidim hi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Tuikhuk panin tuiphul a tawlngak loh bangin, Jerusalem khua panin siatna tawlnga lo hi. Khua sungah ngongtatna le suksiatna ka za ngitnget a, cinatna le liamna bekbek ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah6:8 Jerusalem khuapi aw, kidawm in. Na kidop kei leh nang kong taisan ding a, kuama ten lohna gam simtham na suakkha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:9 Vanglian Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Leenggah lo-ah a sangte a kilawh khit bangin Israel mi a omlai sunteng lo siang vet in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:10 Keimah in ka dawng kik a, “Amaute in a zak theih dingun kua kiangah va gen ding ka hi hiam? En in, a bil uh bing a, khua za thei lo uh hi. Topa’ thu simmawh uh a, lungdamna-in la lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, kei zong ka heh mahmah a, ka thuakzo nawn kei hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Kei’ tang dinga na hehna kongzing lak a naupangte tungah buakhia inla, tangvalte’ kikhopna-ah zong buakhia in. Papite le nupite zong kilakhia ding a, piteek puteekte zong kipaikhiatpih ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:12 A innte uh midangte in luah ding uh a, a lote le a zite uh a taan ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mite’ langkhatah ka khut zanin gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh a neupen pan a lianpen dongin, thuman lopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte a kipan siampite dongin thuman lo khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:14 Amaute in ka mite’ thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:15 Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beek lo uh a, kisuangthei beek lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site’ lak mahah amaute zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawnkhia ding uh hi,” Topa in hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:16 Topa in mite tungah, “Lam kabomah ding unla khuadak un. Lam hoih ahi lampi luite dong unla tawn un. Tua hileh na tawldam ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka tawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:17 Topa in, “Peengkul tumna awging a ngai dingin ‘Galvil ding mi ka koih hi,’ kong ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka ngai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:18 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Gamdangte aw, ngai un. Mite aw, amau’ tungah bang tung ding hiam cih thei un." 
Jeremiah6:19 Leitung aw, ngai in! En un, hih mite tungah a thuak ding mahun a kilawm siatna ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, ka thukhamte a nial uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:20 Bang deihna tawh Sheba gam panin paknamtuite hong pai a, gamlapi panin sing namtuite hong tung ahi hiam? Na meihal biaknate uh ka sang thei kei a, nong biaknate uh deihhuai ka sa kei hi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, hih mite a puk nadingin a mai uhah suangtum ka koih ding a, pate le tate, inn vengte le lawmte pukin a si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:22 Topa in, “En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, leimong gamla pen panin galsim dingin gam lian khat hong kithawithawi hi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Thal le teipi tawi uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, hehpihna lungsim nei loin a husa uh tuipi ging tawh kibang hi. Jerusalem aw, sakol tungah amaute tuangin, nangmah a hong sim dingin a kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:24 Tua thu i za a, bangmah i cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong lencip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na i sa hi." 
Jeremiah6:25 Gamlakah paikhia kei unla, lampi-ah zong pai dah un. Bang hang hiam cih leh i galte in namsau tawi uh a, i kimkot khempeuh a lauhuai hi." 
Jeremiah6:26 Topa in, “Ka mite’ tanu aw, puanhampi silh inla, vut lakah kikhuk in. Tapa khat neihsun a si bangin kap vangvang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong susia ding pa thakhatin hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:27 Jeremiah aw, ka mite a ze-et dingin nang kong koih hi. Ze-et inla, a om dan uh thei in." 
Jeremiah6:28 A vekpi-un kei hong langpan’ tentan uh a, zuauthu a gen kawikawi uh hi. Sumngo le sik bangin khauh mahmah uh a, a vekpi-un a siat gamtat khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:29 Nakpi takin pum a kizap hangin a ekte tui thei lo a, luangkhia thei lo hi. Pum a kizapzap hangin a mawkna a suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote omlai veve hi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Amaute, a kideih lo ngun-ek kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, ‘Amaute ka deih kei hi,’” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah7:1 Topa in Jeremiah kiangah hih bangin thu gen hi: 
Jeremiah7:2 “ Topa’ biakinn kongkhakpi kiangah ding inla, hih thuteng va taangko in: Topa a bia dingin kongkhak sunga hong tum Judah mite aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah7:3 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hih bangin hong ci hi. Na nuntak zia uh le na gamtatnate uh kipuah un. Tua hileh hih munah kong tengsak bek ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:4 ‘A muanhuai sungah i om hi. Hih pen Topa’ biakinn ahi hi, Topa’ biakinn ahi hi, Topa’ biakinn ahi hi,’ a kicici zuauthute um kei un." 
Jeremiah7:5 “Bang hang hiam na cih uhleh na nuntak zia uh le na gamtatnate uh na kipuah uh a, khatlekhat kikalah thuman le thutakin na vaihawm uh a," 
Jeremiah7:6 namdang mite, pa nei lote le meigongte na nuaisiah kei uh a, hih munah mawhnei lo mite that nawn loin, note’ gimna ding mah ahi pasian dang peuh na biak nawn kei uhleh," 
Jeremiah7:7 tanglai-a na pu na pate un a neih tawntung dingun ka piak hih gam sungah ka hong tengsak ding hi. 
Jeremiah7:8 “En un, phattuamna a om het lo zuauthu na um ta zen uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:9 Note in na gu-in, tual thatin, ang kawmin, ahi lopi kiciamin, Baal kiangah meihal biakna pia-in, na theih ngei loh uh pasian dangte delhin," 
Jeremiah7:10 tua ciangin ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinnsung ka mai-ah hong pai-in hong dingin, ‘Hong kihonkhiazo hi,’ na cih khit uh ciangin hih a muhthadahhuai nate khempeuh va hihkik zel ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinn no’ ngaihsutna-ah misuam mi buluhte’ bukna mun bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Keimah in note’ hih khempeuh kong mu khin hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah7:12 Ka min ka tensak masakna Shiloh khua-a biakinn-ah va pai unla ka mi Israel-te’ gitlohna hangin ka nasepna va en dih un. 
Jeremiah7:13 Tu-in zong hih nate khempeuh na hih uh a, kong gengen hangin hong ngai tuan loin kong sapsap hangin hong dawng lo na hih manun Topa in kong cihin-ah," 
Jeremiah7:14 ka min tawh a kilo, note in na muan uh hih Jerusalem biakinn le note le na pu na pate uh’ kiangah kong piak hih mun pen Shiloh-a biakinn tungah ka hih bangin ka hih ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:15 Efraim’ suanlekhak ahi leilu lama na behte khempeuh uh ka paihkhiat bangin note zong ka muhna panin kong paikhia ding hi. 
Jeremiah7:16 “Jeremiah aw, hih mite a dingin thu ngetsak kei in. Amau a dingin kapin kei’ tungah hong thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong thumna kong ngai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Judah gam khuapite sung le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah bang hih uh cih mu lo na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah7:18 Naupangte in sing tomin, a pate un mei tawh uh a, nupite in a nusian uh vantung kumpinu a’ ding moh bawlna ding annel meek uh a, kei hong hehsak nadingun, pasian dangte’ dawn dingin leenggahzu tawh biakna a pia tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:19 Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hangin gimna a thuak, kei hi zenzen ka hi hiam? Hilo hi. Amau’ zum nadingin amau mah in a thuak uh hizaw hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, ka hehna le ka thangpaihna hih munah ka bua ding a, mihingte’ tung le ganhingte’ tung, lo lai-a singkungte le leilak a singgahte tungah ka sung ding hi. Ka hehna mei bangin kuang ding a, kisumit lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:21 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hih bangin kong ci hi: Mei tawh haltum ding na meihal biaknate uh hal nawn loin, sa nektheih biakpiaknate tawh kibangin ne vet un." 
Jeremiah7:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin na pute na pate uh ka lakkhiat lai-in ka hopih kei a, meihal biakna pia ding le biakpiakna a bawl dingin thu ka pia kei hi." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ahih hangin, ‘Ka thu hong mang un; tua hileh note’ Pasian ka hi ding a, note pen ka mite na hi ding uh hi. Note a dingin a hoihzawk nadingin na khempeuhah kong thupiak bang na zui un,’ ci-in thu ka pia zaw hi." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang lo uh a, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh hi. Amau’ gitlohna lungsim uh zui-in amau’ thuthu-in a omzaw uh a, mainawt loin a nungkin zaw uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:25 Na pu na pate uh Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiat ni uh a kipan tuni ciang dong, ni khat khit ni khat, ka nasemte ahi kamsangte ka sawl tawntung a," 
Jeremiah7:26 ahih hangin amau in ka kamsangte’ thu ngai loin, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi. A pute a pate uh sangin a siazaw uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih thute amau kiangah na va gen ding a, ahih hangin amau in a hong ngai kei ding uh hi. Amaute na sap hangin a hong dawng kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘Hih gam pen, Topa amaute’ Pasian’ thu a mang lo gam hi a, thuhilhna sang loin, thuman om nawn lo a, thuman genin zong a nei nawn kei uh hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:29 “Jerusalem mite aw, na lu uh mettol un. Na sam uh paimang unla, mualtungah va kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih a gilo khang mite ka nialzo a, ka taisan khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Judah mite in hoih ka sak loh nate a hih khinzo uh hi. Ka min tawh a kilo ka biakinn a nitsak nadingun a kihhuai milimte a koih uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:31 Hinnom Kuam-ah a tapate a tanute uh mei sungah a hallupna ding uh Tofeth a kici biakna tau khat a bawl uh hi. Tua pen kei’ sawl lah hi loin, zong ka ngaihsunkha ngei beek kei hi." 
Jeremiah7:32 Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kici zaw ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Tofeth munah mun awng a om nawn lo zah dongin misite a kivui ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:33 Misi luangte huih lak a leeng vasate le leitungah a om ganhingte’ an a suak ding uh a, tuate a delhmang ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Tua ciangin Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah gualnopna le lungdamna awte le zinei thakte le mothakte’ awte ka gingsak nawn kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun kinusia ding hi. 
Jeremiah8:1 “Tua hun ciangin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Judah gam kumpite’ guhte, uliante’ guhte, siampite’ guhte, kamsangte’ guhte le Jerusalem khuamite’ guhte a han sung uh panin kilakhia ding hi." 
Jeremiah8:2 Amaute in a it uh, a na a sepsak uh, a delh uh, a zon uhleh a biak uh ahi ni le kha le vana om nate khempeuh mai-ah a kiphokhia ding hi. Tua guhte kikhawm nawn lo ding a, kiphum nawn lo ding hi. Leilak a ek kinusia bang ahi lel ding hi." 
Jeremiah8:3 Hih a gilo minamte’ lakah a omlai sunteng in ka hawlkhiatna munah nuntak ding sangin sih ding a teelzaw ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Jeremiah aw, Topa in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in amaute kiangah va gen in. Mi khat a puk ciangin thokik buang hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khat in lam a khialh ciangin hong kilehkik buang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Tua ahihleh bang hangin hih mite lam khialin hong kilehkik nawn lo ahi uh hiam? Zuau pasian milimte lenkip uh a, hong kilehkik nuam lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:6 Amau’ thugente ka ngaihsak a, kuamah in thuman gen lo uh hi. A gitlohna uh panin kuamah kisik lo a, ‘Bang hih ka hi hiam?’ ci lel uh hi. Sakol galsim ding a tai bangin amau’ tum ciatin a pai uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:7 Gun vapite nangawn in a lal hun ding thei uh a, sumkuangte, phialphiahte, le gun vapite zong a hun ciangin hong tung zel uh hi. Ahih hangin ka mite in Topa’ ngeina kipte a thei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:8 Bangci bangin note in, ‘Ko ka pil uh a, Topa’ thukham ka nei uh hi,’ ci thei ding na hi uh hiam? En un, thuman lo laitheite in tua thukham zuauthu a suah uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Na mipilte uh maizum ding uh a, lungmangin a cih nading a thei kei ding uh hi. En un, amaute in Topa’ thu nial uh hi. Bang pilna nei nawn ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Tua ahih manin a zite uh midangte ka piaksak ding a, a lote uh zong midangte ka luahsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neupen pan a lianpen dongin thuman lopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte a kipan siampite dongin thuman lo khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:11 Amaute in ka mite’ thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna a om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:12 Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beek lo uh a, kisuangthei beek lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site lak mahah amau zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawnkhia ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:13 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, amaute ka susia khin ding a, a lote uhah leenggah a om nawn kei ding hi. Thei in zong gah a nei nawn kei ding hi. A tehte nangawn keu ding a, amaute ka piaksa nate a bei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:14 “Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Bang hangin tutu lai ihi hiam? Kikaikhawm unla khuapi muanhuaite va beel ni; tua lai-ah va si ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ tungah i mawh manin Topa i Pasian in eite a si dingin hong seh khinzo a, i dawn dingin gu tui hong pia khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah8:15 Nopna i zong a, nopna i ngah kei hi. Cidamna i lamen a, siatna bek i ngah hi." 
Jeremiah8:16 Leilu lam Dan khua pek panin galte’ sakol nakging kiza hi. A sakol hatte’ hamna awging in gamlelei lingsak hi. Amaute in i gam le a sunga omteng, hong susia khin ding uh hi,’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:17 “Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, note lakah gul kong khah ding hi. A kikhim zo lo gul guneite kong khah ding a, note hong tu ding hi,” Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ka dahna dam thei lo a, ka lungsim na mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ngai un, gam sung mun khempeuhah ka mite’ tanute kap uh a, “Zion khua-ah Topa om nawn lo ahi hiam? A kumpipa uh om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in dawngkik a, “Bang hangin milim bawltawmte le a gamdang milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:20 Mite in, “An kila khinzo a, khuakhal hun zong beita napi-in, eite hong kihon nai lo lailai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ka mite’ thuakna hangin ka lungsim kisia a, lungkham lua-in ka kap hi." 
Jeremiah8:22 Gilead-ah zatui om lo ahi hiam? Zato siam om lo ahi hiam? Bang hangin ka mite dam thei lo ahi uh hiam? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ka lutang tuikhuk hong hithei hen la, ka mitte khitui nak hong hithei leh ka mite’ kithahlupna hangin a sun a zanin ka kapkap ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:2 Sehnel gamlakah khawlna ding bukno khat nei thei-in ka mite nusia-in a taisan thei hi leng ka ut hi. A vekpi-un angkawm hat hi khin uh a, thuman lo kim uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:3 A leii uh thalpeu bangin zang uh a, zuauthu bekbek a lawn khiakhia uh hi. Gam sungah thuman om loin zuauthu bekbek a dim hi. Siatna lam manawh tektek uh a, kei hong thei lo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mi khempeuh a inn vengte uh kidawm uh hen la, a sanggamte uh muang kei uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte khem hat ciat uh a, inn vengte khempeuh zong gensiat hat ciat uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mi khempeuh in a vengte uh khem ciat uh a, thuman gen kuamah om lo hi. A leii uh zuauthu gen dingin kisinsak uh a, mawhna a bawl manun tawllua uh a, kisikzo nawn lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:6 Siatna khat khit siatna khat, a banbanin gamta uh a, zuau zong a phuakphuak uh hi. Kei hong thei nuam lo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:7 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, “En un, amaute a siantho nadingun suangtui-in ka ze-et ding hi. Tua lo ka mite bangcih nawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah9:8 A leii uh thaltang lauhuai bang a, zuauthu a gen uh hi. A kam uh tawh a inn vengte kiangah a aw-zol uh hangin, a sih nading uh a lungsim sung uhah a ngaihsun veve mawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:9 Hih thute hangin gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Hih bang minam khat tungah ka phu la lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah9:10 “Mualte a dingin kapin tau unla, gamlak lonona munte a dingin thumin tau un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate keu gawp a, kuamah pai nawn lo hi. Bawng ham zong kiza nawn lo a, vana leeng vasate le gamsate a taimangta uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Jerusalem khuapi ninkholna ka bangsak ding a, se-alte’ tenna mun ka suaksak ding hi. Judah gam khuapite gamlak ka suaksak ding a, kuamah teng nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:12 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih thu a theitel ding mipil kua om ahi hiam? Hih thu a gentel theih nadingin Topa in kua tungah hilhtel na hi hiam? Kuamah in hih gam a kantan nawn loh nadingin bang hangin kisia-in gamlak tawh kibang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Jeremiah9:13 Topa in, “Amaute in a mai uha ka lah ka thukham nusia uh a, ka thu hong mang loin ka cih bangin ta lo uh a," 
Jeremiah9:14 amau’ lungsim deihna zui tentanin a pu a pate uh hilhna bangin Baal nung a zuih man uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah9:15 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: En in, hih mite gamsai-in ka vak ding a, gutui ka dawnsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:16 Amaute le a pute a pate’ theih ngei lohna gam dangah ka kithehthangsak ding a, a sih khit dong uh namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:17 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, “Ngaihsun unla, numei kapte a hong pai dingin va sam unla, a kah siam tata vaikhak un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:18 Mite in, “Va kinawhsak unla, i khitui a luantheihna ding, i mitkhu a kawt theih nadingin eite hong kah uh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Zion khua panin a kiza kahna awging in, “I kisia khinzo a, i zumhuai mahmah khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in i innte hong suksiatsak uh ahih manin i gam i nusia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:20 Tua ciangin keimah in, “No numeite aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih un. A kam pana hong gingkhia thu na bil uhah lutsak un. Na tanute uh a kah dan ding hilh unla, na inn vengte ciat uh kah la hilh un." 
Jeremiah9:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh tawlet vang panin sihna hong lut a, kumpipa’ inn sungah zong sihna hong lut hi. Kongzing a naupangte vatmang a, sumbuk a tangvalte vatlum hi." 
Jeremiah9:22 Gamlak a ki-tha ek bangin misi luang kipaithang ding a, buhlom atsa kinusia bangin kuamah in a khawm kei ding hi, ci-in a gen dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:23 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mipilte in a pilna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen la, mi hatte in a hatna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen. Mihaute in zong a hauhna uh kisaktheihpih kei uh hen." 
Jeremiah9:24 A kisatheite in, keimah, leitungah migitna, thuman le thutang a zang ka hihna le tuate sungah nuam a sapa ka hihna thu hong theihna uhah kisathei uh hen. Topa in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:25 Topa in, “Vun ki-at hinapi-in vun ki-at mite’ gamtat bangin a gamta lote gimpiak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:26 Egypt mite, Judah mite, Edom mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite le a sam uh a mettom sehnel gam a omte khempeuh zong gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih gamte khempeuh in a vun uh at lo uh a, Israel mi khempeuh zong a lungsim sung uhah vun at lohpi ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:1 Israel mite aw, note hong hopihna Topa’ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah10:2 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Gamdangte’ omdan ciing kei unla, vantung a lim lamdangte lunghihmawhna-in ngaihsun kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamdang mite in tuate a lunghihmawhpih uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:3 Hih mite’ ngeinate a kimanna om lo hi. Gamlakah sing khat kiphuk a, khutsiampa in a hei tawh milimin a bawl hi." 
Jeremiah10:4 Mite in tua pen kham le ngun tawh zem uh a, a kilakkhiat theih loh nadingin sik tawh a kilh uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:5 A milimte uh, tangmai huanah vasate’ lau nadingin a kikhai milimte tawh kibangin pau thei lo uh a, lam pai thei lo uh ahih manin puak a kul hi. Tuate kihta kei un; siatna bawl thei lo uh a, phatna zong bangmah bawl thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:6 Topa aw, nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi. Nang na lian a, na min vanglian mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah10:7 Gam khempeuhte’ Kumpipa aw, nang a hong kihta lo ding kua om ahi hiam? Nang, kihtak ding mah na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mipil khempeuhte le amau’ gam sung khempeuh lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:8 A mipilte uh mihai mimawl ahi uh hi. Sing milim in amaute bangci-in hilh thei mah ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah10:9 Tarshish khua panin ngun seksa va la uh a, Ufaz khua panin kham va la uh hi. Khutsiamte le kham seekte in milimin bawl uh a, siamgat siamte’ gat ahi, puan engdup le puan sandup tawh a zem uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ahih hangin Topa pen Pasian man hi a, amah pen a nungta Pasian le tawntung kumpipa ahi hi. A heh ciangin lei kiling a, gamte in a hehna nang zo lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:11 Amaute’ tungah, “Vantungte le leitung a bawl lo pasian-te, leitung mun khempeuh panin a mangthang ding uh hi,” ci-in na gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah10:12 Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh leitung bawl a, ama pilna tawh leitung piangsakin, ama siamna tawh vantung a zal hi." 
Jeremiah10:13 Amah a pau ciangin vantungah tuite ging hunhun a, leimong panin tuikhu a suaksak hi. Guahzuk nadingin khua phiasak a, huihkua panin huih a nungsak hi." 
Jeremiah10:14 Mi khempeuh hai-in pilna nei lo khin uh a, kham seekte khempeuh in a milimte uh a maizumlawh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a milimte uh zuau hi lel a, nak thei lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:15 Kimanna a nei lo, a haihuaipi hi a, gim a kipiak ni ciangin a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jakob’ Pasian tua bang hi lo a, amah pen na khempeuh a piangsak pa ahi hi. Ama mi dingin Israel mite teel a, ama min, Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah10:17 Galte’ umcih a thuak mite aw, na puanlom uh zial un!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “En un, tu-in hih gam sungah a teng mite ka lawnkhia ding a, a theih nadingun a tung uhah lungkhamna ka tungsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ka thuakna hangin ka gim a, ka liamna nasia mahmah hi. Ahih hangin, “Hih gimna ka thuak ding mah hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:20 Ka puanbuk hong kisuksiat sak a, a kikanna khau khempeuh kitat mangkhin hi. Ka tate in hong taisan uh a, tu-in om nawn lo uh hi. Ka puanbuk a hong lamsak ding leh ka kongkhak puante a hong khaisak ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh makaite hai khin uh a, Topa’ deihna dong lo uh hi. Tua thu hangin amaute mapai lo uh a, a mite uh kithehthang mang hi." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ngai dih un, thu khat kigen hi. Judah khuapite gamlak a suaksak ding le se-alte’ khua a suaksak dingin leilu lam gam panin buaina lianpi khat hong pai hi." 
Jeremiah10:23 Topa aw, mihing’ omdan ama uk theih ahih lohna ka theita a, ama kalsuanna ding ama geeltheih hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:24 Topa aw, a hoihbek takin, hehlua loin kei hong hilh in. Hong hehlua lecin kei ka si ding hi." 
Jeremiah10:25 Nangmah a hong thei lo gamte tung le nangma min a hong lo ngei lo mite tungah na hehna sungsuk in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jakob’ suanlekhakte thatmang khinin amau’ tenna a susia khin uh hi. 
Jeremiah11:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Hih thuciamna thute ngai inla, Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite kiangah va gen in." 
Jeremiah11:3 Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah, hih thuciamna a mang lo mi peuhmah in hamsiatna thuak ta hen, ci-in va gen in." 
Jeremiah11:4 Tua pen na pute na pate uh, sik haltuina meikhuk tawh a kibang Egypt gam pana ka lakkhiat ni-a ka thuciamna ahi hi. Tua ni-in, ka thu hong ngai-in kong thupiakna bangin na sep uhleh, note ka mi na hi ding uh a, kei pen note’ Pasian hi-in," 
Jeremiah11:5 tua bang na hih uhleh na pute na pate uh tungah ka ciamsa, tu-a na neih uh bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam kong pia ding hi, ci-in thu ka pia hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hi ta hen, Topa aw,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah11:6 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih thuciamna thute ngai-in a sep nadingun Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah va taangko in." 
Jeremiah11:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiat pan a kipan tuni ciang dong ka thu hong mang un, ci-in na pute na pate uh tungah tam veipi nakpitakin ka hilh ngitnget hi." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang loin a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a gitlohna lungsim uh a zui tentan uh hi. Hih thuciamna a zuih ding uh thu ka piak hangin hong nial veve uh ahih manin tua sunga thute a vekpi-in ka tungsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah11:9 Tua ciangin Topa in hong hopih leuleu a, “Judah minamte le Jerusalem khuamite in kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:10 Ka thu a ngai nuam lo a pu a pate uh’ mawhna lamah kilehhei khinzo uh a, pasian dangte’ na a sem dingin a zui khinzo uh hi. Israel mite le Judah mite in a pu a pate uh tawh ka bawlsa uh thuciamna a palsat khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, en un, a pelh theih loh uh gimna amau’ tungah ka tungsak ding a, kei kiangah a hong kap liang uh zongin ka dawng nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite in meihal biakna tawh a biak uh a pasian-te uh’ kiangah pai-in a va thum ding uh hi. Ahih hangin hih gimna hong tun ciangin a honkhia thei tuan kei ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah11:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Judah aw, na khua om zahzah uh pasian na nei uh a, Jerusalem khua kongzing om zahzah mah, meihal biakna tawh Baal biakna ding a zumhuai biakna taute na bawl tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih mite a’ ding thu ngetsak kei in la, amau’ tangin thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in gim ngahin hong sap uh ciangin ka ngai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:15 Ka itte in siatna a bawl khit uh ciangin ka biakinn sungah bang thu nei thei nawn ding ahi uh hiam? Nong kamkhapte uh le na biakpiakna sate un na kisiatna ding uh hong kipelhsak thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ciangin note na lungdam thei ding uh hiam? 
Jeremiah11:16 Nidang lai-in Topa in note, a hing dikdek a gahpha oliv kung tawh kong genteh ngei hi. Ahih hangin kong hal ding a, na hiangte uh kangtumin ging huhu ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:17 Israel mite le Judah mite in meihalna tawh Baal bia-in hong hehsak uh a, hih bang siatna bawl uh ahih manin, amaute a phut keimah Vanglian Topa in amaute’ tungah siatna a tunna ding thu ka piazo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah11:18 Ka galte in kei a hong sawmna uh Topa in nong hilh ciangin ke’n ka thei pan hi. 
Jeremiah11:19 A kigo dingin a kipaipih mawhna a nei lo tuuno bang ka hi hi. Amaute in, “Singkung a gahphat hun laitakin phuktan ni. Ama min a kiphawk nawn loh nadingin amah thatlum ni,” ci-in a gen uh a, kei hong sawmna uh ahihlam ka thei kei kha hi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ahih hangin thu a mantakin khenin, mihingte’ lungsim le a ngaihsutna uh a entel a Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thuhkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka thu kong ap khin hi." 
Jeremiah11:21 Tua ahih manin kei hong that nuamin, “ Topa’ min tawh thu hilh kei in. Na hilh leh kote’ khutlumin na si ding hi,” a hong ci Anathoth khuamite tawh kisai-in" 
Jeremiah11:22 Vanglian Topa in, “En un, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. A tangvalte uh namsau-in si ding uh a, a tapate le a tanute uh kialin a puksi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:23 Anathoth khuamite tungah siatna tungsakin gim ka piak hun ciangin a suakta kuamah a om nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah12:1 Topa aw, nang tawh thu i kisel ciangin nang a tawntungin na man den hi. Ahih hangin thu khat ka hong dongnuam lai hi. Bang hangin migilote daupai uh a, mikhem hatte gualzo sese ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Nangmah in amaute na suan a, amaute in zong zung kha-in, khangin, gah hong gah uh hi. A kam uh tawh hong phat khem uh a, a lungsim uh nang tawh kigamla hi." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah in kei nong thei hi. Ka gamtatnate nong mu a, nang ka hong itna thu na hong thei hi. Amaute pen gawh dingin a kikoih tuu bangin kaikhia inla, a kigawh ni hun ding a tun mateng tuamkoih in." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ka gam sung bang tanvei keucip ding ahi hiam? Mun khempeuhah lopate bang tanvei vulcip ding ahi hiam? A teng mite’ gitlohna hangin gamsate le vasate a mangthang khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I gamtatnate Pasian in hong mu kei ngawn,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:5 Topa in, “Jeremiah aw, mite tawh tai kidem a, nangmah hong gimsakzo uh ahihleh, sakol bangci demzawh ding na hiam? A nopna munah tuk lailai na hih leh Jordan gun gei sing kawm lakah bangcih ding na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggamte le na innkuanpihte nangawn in nang hong zuak uh a, nang a hong do ding mihonpi a kaikhawm uh hi. Kam khum tawh nang a hong zol uh hangin um kei in,” ci-in hong dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah12:7 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka inn ka nusia khin a, ka luahsa mite ka paimangta hi. Ka it mahmah ka mite, a galte uh’ khut sungah ka piata hi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Ka luah dingin ka teelsa mite in gamlak a humpinelkai bangin kei’ langkhatah pangin hong hawksan uh ahih manin amaute ka mudah hi. 
Jeremiah12:9 Ka mite pen, sasialne vasa gial khat, sasialne vasa dangte in a kimkot panin a tuk huan nainai uh tawh a kibang uh hi. Gamsate aw, hong kikhawm unla, pawi hong siim un." 
Jeremiah12:10 Tuucing dang tampi in ka leenggah lo hong suksiatsak uh a, kei a’ teng hong tuatcilsak uh hi. A hoih mahmah ka leenggah lo pawnlak, gamlak, a suaksak uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:11 Pawn lak hong suahsak uh a, dahin ka kap hi. Gam sung khempeuh a kisiat khit hangin kuamah in phamawh sa lo sawnsawn uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:12 Sehnel gam mualsang panin a susia dingte hong paizo uh hi. Gammong khat panin gammong khat dongah a lungmuang kuamah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ namsau in mi khempeuh a vattuk hi. 
Jeremiah12:13 Amaute in mangbuh tuh uh a, ahi zongin kiak bek a ngah uh hi. Nasep a hahkat mahmah hangun bangmah a ngah kei uh hi. A kihtakhuai Topa’ hehna hangin anlak hun ciangin a maizum ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah12:14 Ka mi Israel-te’ luah dingin ka piak gamh a susia nuam a gilo a vengte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cihin-ah, “En un, a gam uh panin amaute ka botkhia ding a, amau’ khutsung panin Judah mite ka suaktasak ding hi." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ahih hangin amaute ka lakkhiat khit ciangin ka hehpihkik ding a, amau’ luah ding amau’ gam ciatciat uhah ka koihkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah12:16 Tua ciangin, ka mite’ omdan hoihtakin a sin uh a, Baal min tawh a kiciam dingin ka mite a sinsak mah bangun, ‘ Topa a nuntak mah bangin,’ ci-in keima min tawh kiciam ding a sin uhleh ka mite lakah kiptakin a om ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh in ka thu hong ngaih kei leh tua gam botkhia-in ka susia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:1 Topa in kei tungah, “Pai inla patpuan dialkaih khat na lei khit ciangin kawtsak loin teeng in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Tua ciangin kei zong Topa’ hong gen mah bangin dialkaih khat lei-in ka teeng hi. 
Jeremiah13:3 Topa in a nih veina hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Na kawngah na teen, na dialkaih lei la in. Tho inla Eufratis gun-ah pai in. Tua lai-ah suanghawm sungah va seel in,” hong ci leuleu hi." 
Jeremiah13:5 Kei zong pai-in Topa’ hong sawlna bangin Eufratis gun gei-ah ka seel hi. 
Jeremiah13:6 Tua zawh ni tampi khit ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Eufratis gun-ah va pai inla, na seel dingin ka hong sawl na dialkaih va lakik in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:7 Tua ciangin kei zong Eufratis gun-ah pai-in dialkaih ka seelna mun khuat kikin ka la hi. Dialkaih na ngotgawp khin a, zattheih ding hi nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah13:8 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah13:9 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih bangmahin Judah mite’ kisaktheihna le Jerusalem khuate’ ki-uatsaknate ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:10 Ka thu hong ngai nuam loin amau’ ngaihsutna bang bekin a pai tentan nuam, pasian dangte’ na a sem ding le a bia dingin a nung a zui hih migilote pen zattheih ding ahi nawn lo, hih dialkaih bang ahi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh dialkaih, mite’ kawng tungah a belh cinten mah bangin Israel mi khempeuh le Judah mi khempeuh kei’ tungah a hong belh cinten dingin ka bawl hi. Tua hileh amaute ka mi hi ding uh a, ka minthanna, ka hoihna, le ka vangliatna ding ahi ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang lo uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:12 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Jeremiah aw, amau’ kiangah, ‘ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a hong genin-ah, “Zubeel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh a kidim ding hi,” hong ci hi,’ va ci in. Amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Beel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh kidim ding cih kote in thei lo ka hi uh hiam?’ hong ci kik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:13 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in hong cihin-ah: En un, David’ tokhom tungah a tu kumpite, siampite, kamsangte, le Jerusalem khua-a a teng mi khempeuh a kipan gam sungah a om mi khempeuh zu tawh kidim sakin ka khamsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:14 Pate le tate a kipan amaute khatlekhat ka kiphusak ding a, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hehpih lo, lainat lo, it loin ka sisak ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ngai-in na bil uh ngat un; kisathei kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu a genzo hi. 
Jeremiah13:16 Topa in khua mialsak a, khuamialna mualtungah na tuk ma un, na lamet uh khuavak pen khuamial bikbek a suah ma-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawi un." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uhleh na kisaktheihna uh hangin ka kapsim ding a, khitui luangin nakpitakin ka kidik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ tuuhonte sal dingin kikaikhia zo hi." 
Jeremiah13:18 Topa in kei kiangah, “Kumpipa le a nu kiangah, ‘Na kumpi tokhomte tung panun hong tuaksuk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na kumpi lukhute uh na lu tung uh panin kia khinzo hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah13:19 Negeb gam a om khua kongpite lah kikhak a, kuamah lut thei nawn lo hi. Judah mite zong salin kikai a, a vekun sal suak khin uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:20 Jerusalem khua aw, khuadak inla, leilu lam panin a hong paite en dih in. Nangmah a hong kipia a hoih mahmah na tuuhonte koi-ah om ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Nangma lawm dingin na bawl mite teekteek in nang hong uk ni ciangin bang na ci ding hiam? Numei nausuakte in na a sak velval uh bangin nang zong na na sa ding hi. 
Jeremiah13:22 Bang hangin hih thute kei tungah hong tung ahi hiam, ci-in na ngaihsut leh na mawhna a liatluatna hang ahi hi. Tua thu hangin na nik hong kihawkgawp a, a hong kibuan gawp ahi hi." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ethiopia mivomte in a vun uh khek thei a, kamkei in a gial khek thei ahi hiam? A khek theih uhleh siatna bawl ding a zongsang khin note in zong a hoih na bawl thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Sehnel gam panin a hong nung huih in buhvai a mut bangin note kong thehthang ding hi. 
Jeremiah13:25 Hih pen nangma ngah dingin ka hong sehsak ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei na hong mangngilh a, pasian zuau peuh na um hi." 
Jeremiah13:26 Kei mahmah in na nik kong hawksak ding a, kong maizumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:27 Na kihhuainate, na angkawmna, na hukna le gamlak mualtungah numei paktat bangin milim pasian peuh na biak kawikawinate ka muzo hi. Jerusalem aw, gimna ngah ta in. Na siantho nadingin bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:1 Guah zu loin khua keuna tawh kisai-in Topa in Jerusalem kiangah hih bangin a gen hi: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Judah gam kap a, a khuapite maimang dekdek hi. A mite in puan vom khu-in leilakah bok uh a, Jerusalem khua-a om mite’ kahna aw ging hi." 
Jeremiah14:3 Uliante in a nasemte uh tuitawi dingin sawl uh a, tuikhuk a zuat uhleh tui na om lo hi. A beel hawm uh tawh hong kilehkik uh a, lungkhamin cih nading thei loin a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:4 Lokhote lungmang uh a, a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh guah zu lo ahih manin lei a keugawp hi." 
Jeremiah14:5 Lopa om lo lua ahih manin sazuk in gamlakah a no a nusia liang hi. 
Jeremiah14:6 Gam sakolte, bangmah om lohna mualtungah se-alte bangin a nak huhu uh hi. Lopa om lo ahih manin a hakzo kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:7 Ka mite in kei tungah, ‘ Topa aw, ka mawhna uh kote’ langkhatah hong pang ahi ta zongin nangma min hangin kote hong hehpih in. Kote in tam veipi nang kong nungngat uh a, nangma tungah ka hong khial khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:8 Israel mite’ lamet pa aw, haksat hun ciangin ko a hong honkhia pa na hi hi. Bang hangin ka gam sung uhah khualmi bangin nang omin khualzin zan khat bek a taam bangin hong om na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Bang hangin mi lungkiagawp bangin omin, a honkhia thei lo galkap pa bangin om na hi hiam? Ahih hangin Topa aw, kote’ laizangah nang na om a, nangma minin kote hong kisam hi. Kote hong nusia kei in,’ hong ci uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:10 Hih mite tawh kisai-in Topa in thu gen a, “Kei kiang panin amaute vakkhia kawikawi nuam uh a, a kideek kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa keimah in amaute ka sang kei a, a khialhnate uh phawkin, a mawhnate uh hangin gim ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:11 Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih mite in thupha a ngah nadingin thu hong ngen nawn kei in." 
Jeremiah14:12 An a tan’ uh hangin amau’ thumna ka ngai kei ding a, meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate hong piak uh hangin ka sang kei ding hi. Amaute namsau tawh ahi zongin, kial tawh ahi zongin, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin ka sisakzaw ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:13 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, en dih in. Kamsangte in amaute kiangah, ‘Note in namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin na mukha ngei kei ding uh a, hih munah Pasian in lungnopna kip hong pia ding hi,’ a ci uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:14 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Tua kamsangte in kei’ min suangin zuauthu hong gen uh hi. Amaute ka sawl kei a, thu ka pia kei a, zong ka hopih kei hi. Note kiangah hong gen uh thute a man lo maangmuhna, bangmahin a kimang lo aisanna, le amau’ ngaihsuttawm thute ahi hi." 
Jeremiah14:15 Tua ahih ciangin ka sawl lohpi, ‘Hih gam sungah namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin hong tung lo ding hi,’ ci-in keima min suangin thu a gen kamsangte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cihin-ah, namsau le kial tawh hih kamsangte a si khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:16 A hilh uh mite in zong kial le namsau thuakin amaute a kipan a zite uh, a tapate uh, le a tanute uh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah kipaithang ding a, kuamah in a vui kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gitlohna amau’ tung mahah ka buaksuk ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:17 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Jeremiah aw, amaute kiangah, ‘Sun le zanin ka khitui luangluang hen la, kang ngei kei tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima mite in nakpitakin liamna thuak uh a, nakpitakin a kisat uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:18 Lolai-ah paikhia leng, namsau tawh a kithat mi bekbek ka mu a, khuapi sungah lut leng, kialin a puksite bekbek ka mu hi. Kamsangte le siampite in koi-ah pai ding cih thei lopi-in gam sungah an ngenin a vak kawikawi uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:19 Topa aw, nangmah in Judah gam nialsiang khinzo na hi hiam? Zion khua kihhuai sa na hi hiam? Bang hangin kote liamna hong thuaksak a, hong damsak nawn lo na hi hiam? Lungnopna ka lamen uh a, hoihna bangmah a hong tung kei hi. Damna ding hun ka lamen uh a, lauhuaina bekbek ka mu uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:20 Topa aw, ka gitlohna uh le ka pute ka pate uh gitlohnate ka hong pulak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka hong mawh khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:21 Nangma min na khualna-in kote hong nolh kei inla, a vanglian na tokhom mindaisak kei ta in. Kote tawh nong thuciamna hong phawk inla, hong ciampel kei ta in." 
Jeremiah14:22 Gamdang pasian zuaute’ lakah guah a zusak thei om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong vantungmi in ama thu-in guah zu tawmsak thei ahi hiam? Tua bang a hih thei nang bek hi lo na hi hiam? Topa kote’ Pasian aw, nangmah in tuate khempeuh hih na hih manin nangma sungah lametna kong nei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Moses le Samuel nangawn ka mai-ah hong dingin hong thum uh zongin hih mite ka hehpih tuan kei ding hi. Ka muhna panin hawlkhia unla, paikhia sak un." 
Jeremiah15:2 Amaute in, ‘Koi-ah pai ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uhleh hih bangin genkik in: ‘ Topa in, “Pulnatna tawh a si dingte pul-in si ding uh a, namsau tawh a si dingte namsau-in si ding uh hi. Kial tawh a puksi dingte kialin si ding uh a, sala kikai dingte zong salin kikai ding uh hi,” a ci hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah15:3 “Amaute’ sih nadingin gimna nam li ka tungsak ding hi. A kithahna ding uh namsau, a keizan gawp dingin ui, a valhtum ding le a susiagawp dingin huih lak a vasate le leilak a ganhingte ka koih ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:4 Judah kumpi Hezekiah’ tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem khua-ah hih bangin a bawl thu leitung gam khempeuhte in mu-in a lau ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah15:5 “Kua in nang hong hehpih ding ahi hiam? Jerusalem aw, kua in nang hong kah ding ahi hiam? Kua, hong lambaangin, damlenat kitheihsakna-in hong hawh ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Nangmah in kei nong taisanzo hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Kei nong nungngat niloh hi. Tua ahih manin ka khut zanin nang kong susia hi. Ka hehna ka ki-ipzo nawn kei hi." 
Jeremiah15:7 Na gam sung khua kongpite-ah huihpi’ mut bangin note kong mutmang ding hi. Na tate uh ka beisak ding a, ka mite ka susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna uh le na omdan hoih lo panun na kiheikik kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Tuipi a sehnel omzah sangin nupi meigong ka tamsakzaw ding hi. Na tangvalte uh a khan laitakin ka that ding a, a nute uh ka lunggimsak ding hi. Note’ tungah thakhat thu-in lungkhamna le launa ka hong tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:9 Ta sagih a nei nupi khakham vei-in a sibup hi. Sunkimlai hinapi ama a dingin khuamial bang a, maizumna le mindaina a thuak hi. No a nungta laite na galte un namsau tawh a hong satlup dingun ka hong pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:10 Gimna ka thuak hi; ka nu aw, gam sung khempeuh a mite tawh a kitawng a kisel dingin kei nong suaksak hi. Ka sumte kuamah lah leitawisak loin kuama-a’ lah leitawi la lo napi, a vekpi-un kei hong hamsiat teitei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:11 Topa aw, amaute’ hoih nadingin nang tungah kong thumsak kei a, gimna le haksatna hun ciangin ka galte a dingin nang’ tungah kong ngetsak kei leh tua amau’ hong hamsiatnate kei’ tungah hong tung ta hen!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Mi khat in sik kuaitan zo lo ding ahihleh leilu lama sik le sumngo kihel khawm kuaitan zozaw ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah15:13 Topa in, “Na gam sung tenga na bawl uh mawhna khempeuhte’ hangin na neih na lam uh le na sum na paite uh man ngah loin na galte uh ka tuahsakmang ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:14 Na theih ngei loh uh gam khatah na galte uh’ na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna mei bangin kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:15 Tua ciangin keimah in: Topa aw, nang na thei hi. Hong phawk inla hong veh in. Kei a hong bawlsiate tungah phu hong laksak in. Ka galte tungah na lungduaina hangin kei’ sih nading piangsak kei in. Nangma hangin minsiatna a thuak ka hihlam hong thei in." 
Jeremiah15:16 Na thute in kei hong kem a, an bangin ka ne hi. Na thute kei a dingin kipahna le lungdamna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma minin kei hong kilo hi, aw, Topa, Vanglian Pasian aw." 
Jeremiah15:17 Mi gualnuam mawkmawkte tawh ka kikhawl kei a, zong ka lungdam khawm kei hi. Nangma thu kong manna hangin kei tangkai ka hih manin a hehin ka omden hi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Bang hangin ka natna dai thei lo a, ka liamna dam thei lo a, dam nuam het lo ahi hiam? Tui a kang lui tawh kibangin lungkiatna hong thuaksak ding na hi hiam, ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:19 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Na hong kilehkik leh kong koihna ngei-ah kong koihkik ding a, ka na na sem kik ding hi. Thu manpha lo gen loin thu manpha bek na gen leh, ka kamsang dingin ka hong zang ding hi. Nang kiangah amaute hong pai ding uh a, nang na hih leh amau’ kiangah na pai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:20 Hih mite tungah sumngo a kibawl khuakulhpi kong bangsak ding a, amaute in a hong sim uh hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong honkhia ding le a hong suaktasak dingin nang ka hong ompih hi, Topa in ka hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:21 Migilote’ khutsung panin nang kong suaktasak ding a, mi lauhuaite’ khutsung panin nang kong honkhia ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Hih bang munah zi nei kei inla, tanu tapa zong nei kei in." 
Jeremiah16:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mun a suak tanu tapate le a nute uh tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cihin-ah: 
Jeremiah16:4 Natna lian tawh si ding uh a, kuamah in kah loin kuamah in zong a vui kei ding uh hi. Leilak a ek ki-tha a bang lel ding uh hi. Namsau le kial tawh a si ding uh a, a luanghawmte uh huihlaka a leeng vasate le leilaka ganhingte in a ne ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, mi’ kahna inn sungah lut kei unla, thumin kuamah va kah se kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh lungnopna, itna lianpi, le ka hehpihna hih mite kiang panin ka lakhia khinzo hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:6 Hih gamah miliante le mineute si ding uh a, kivui loin, amau’ hangin kuamah kap loin, kuamah in a pumpi uh kuiliam loin a sam uh zong a met kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:7 Misi hangin a kapte hehnep nadingin kuamah in anletui a lui kei ding uh a, a nu ahih kei leh a pa a site nangawn kuamah in a hehnem kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:8 Pawi kibawlna inn-ah na pai kei ding uh a, amaute tawh a ne a dawnkhawm dingin na tu kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hih bangin kong ci hi: En un, hih mun panin note’ muh teekteekin, note’ theih hunsung mahin gualnopna, lungdamna awte le zinei thakte, pasalnei thakte’ awte ka gingsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Hih thuteng hih mite tungah na gen ciangin amaute in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih gimna lianpi eite tungah hong tungsak ahi hiam? I khialhna bang ahi hiam? Topa i Pasian’ tungah bang mawhna bawl ihi hiam?’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:11 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in, “Na pu na pate un kei hong taisan khin uh a, kei hong nusia-in ka thukham a zui kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:12 Note, na pu na pate sangun na siahuaizaw uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, note’ utna bang ciat na zui tentan uh a, ka thu nong ngai nuam kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:13 Tua ahih manin hih gam panin note le na pu na pate un na theih ngei loh uh gamah kong notkhia ding hi. Tua lai-ah sun le zanin pasian dangte’ na na sem niloh ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note kong angvan nawn kei ding hi,” ci hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:14 “Tua ahih manin, en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, kuamah in, ‘Egypt gam panin Israel mite a hong lakhia Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in kei’ minin a kiciam nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:15 Amaute in, ‘Leilu lam gam le eite hong hawlkhiatna gam khempeuh panin Israel mite a hong kaikhawm Topa a nuntak bangin,’ a cizaw ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh ka piaksa, amau’ neihsa gamah amaute ka paipih ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:16 “En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, ngabeng tampi ka khah ding a, amaute ka mansak ding hi. Tua khit ciangin sabeng tampi ka khah ding a, amaute in mualtung khempeuh le suanghawmte lakah amaute a beng ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a omdan khempeuh uh ka mitin ka mu a, kei’ kiang panin a kiseel bangmah om lo hi. A khialhna khempeuh uh zong ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah16:18 Amaute’ khialhna le a mawhnate uh a zah nihin ka thuk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a muhthadahhuai siluang hawmte tawh a kibang milimte tawh ka gam a ninsak uh a, kihhuaina tawh ka gamh a dimsak uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:19 Aw Topa, ka hatna le ka kulhpi, lungkham hun ciangin ka bukna pa aw, leimong panin gamdang mite nangma kiangah hong pai ding uh a, “Ka pu ka pate un zuauthu le bangmahin a kimang lo milimte longal bangmah dang a luah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:20 Mi in ama pasian ding bawltawm thei ahi hiam? Tuate pasian hi lo hi,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:21 “Tua ahih manin amaute ka hilh ding hi. Tutung peuhmahin Topa ka hihna thu a hong theih nadingun ka vangliatna le ka hatna ka theisak ding hi,” ci-in Topa in a gen hi." 
Jeremiah17:1 Topa in a genna-ah, “Judah mite’ mawhna sik laikung khat tawh kigelh hi. Suangmanpha mukzum tawh amaute’ lungtang peek tung le biakna tau kite tungah khuakin ki-at hi." 
Jeremiah17:2 A tate un singniim nuai khempeuh le mualsangte’ tunga a biakna taute uh le a nusian uh Asherah milimte phawk veve uh a," 
Jeremiah17:3 zanglei-a om mualte tungah zong tua mawhna a kilang hi. Na gam sung khempeuh uhah na bawl uh mawhnate hangin na neih na lam uh le na sum na paite uh, na galte uh ka tuahmangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:4 Note kong piak na gam uh zong na taan ding uh a, na theih ngei loh uh gam khatah na galte uh’ na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah17:5 Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Mi bek muangin mi’ hatna bek suang a, Topa tawh a lungsim a kilehngat mi in hamsiatna a ngah ahi hi." 
Jeremiah17:6 Amah pen sehnel gamah a po sawlbawk bang hi a, khangin a bawk a phazo kei ding hi. Kuama ten lohna ci gam, keugaw gamah amah a teng ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:7 “ Topa muangin amah a beel mi in thupha a ngah ahi hi. 
Jeremiah17:8 Amah, gun gei-a a kisuan singkung bang hi a, lui gei-ah a zung a kha hi. A tehte hing den ahih manin nisa kihta lo hi. Tatsat loin gah den ahih manin guah zuk loh kum ciangin zong lungkham tuan lo hi." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Na khempeuh lakah lungsim a khem hatpen hi a, a kisia pha mahmah ahi hi. Kua in lungsim theizo ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Keimah Topa in mi khempeuh’ nuntakzia le a gamtatna tawh kizui-in a piakhia dingin ngaihsutna ka entel a, lungsim ka sittel hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah17:11 Thuman lopi tawh a hau mi pen ama tui lopi a keuhsak dingin a opsim vasa tawh kibang hi. A khanlai-in a neihsa teng taan ding a, a tawpna-ah mihaipi a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:12 I biakinnpi pen a kipat cil-in mualtungah a om a minthang mahmah kumpi tokhom tawh kibang hi. 
Jeremiah17:13 Aw Topa, Israel mite’ lamet pa aw, nang a hong taisan mite a zahhuai ding uh hi. Nang a hong lehngatsan mite leivui lak a min gelh bangin a mangthang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna ciktui ahi Topa a hong taisanzo uh hi."
