Jeremiah17:14 Topa aw, hong damsak lecin ka natna teng bei ding a, hong honkhia lecin kei ka suakta ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong phatpa na hi hi." 
Jeremiah17:15 En in, amaute in, “ Topa’ hong tawnnate koi lai takah om ahi hiam? Tu-in hong tungta hen!” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:16 Ahih hangin amaute tungah gimna na tunsak ding kong ngen kei a, siatna ni hong tun ding ka deihsak lohlam zong na hong thei hi. Ka kam panin a gingkhia thu khempeuh na thei khin hi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Kei hong lausak kei in. Gimna hong tun ciangin kong belh pa na hi hi. 
Jeremiah17:18 Kei hong bawlsiate na zahhuaisak inla, ahih hangin kei hong zahhuaisak kei in. Amaute lung-amsak inla, ahih hangin kei hong lung-amsak kei in. Amaute tungah siatna ni tungsak inla, a zah nihin susia in!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Topa in kei kiangah, “Va pai inla, Judah gam kumpite’ lutna le pusuahna Mite’ Kongpi le Jerusalem khua kongpite khempeuhah va ding inla, hih bangin va gen in:" 
Jeremiah17:20 ‘Hih kongpi sunga hong lut no Judah gam kumpite, Judah mi khempeuh, le Jerusalem khuami khempeuhte aw, Topa’ kammal ngai un." 
Jeremiah17:21 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na nuntak nop lai uhleh kidawm unla, Sabbath ni-in van pua kei un. Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah bangmah hong lutpih kei un." 
Jeremiah17:22 Sabbath ni-in na inn uhah bangmah sem kei un. Na pu na pate uh ka thupiak mah bangin Sabbath ni siangthosak un. 
Jeremiah17:23 Ahih hangin na pu na pate un ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh hi. Ka thu hong mang lo uh a, ka hilhna a theih loh nadingun a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:24 “‘Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in ka thu nong ngaih uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih khua kongpite-ah bangmah hong lutpih loin, Sabbath ni siangthosakin, na na sep kei uhleh," 
Jeremiah17:25 na kumpite uh le na uliante un David’ neih bang kumpi vangliatna a nei ding uh hi. Amaute in Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite tawh sakol leeng le sakolte tungah tuangin hih khua kongpite-ah hong lut ding uh a, hih khuapi-ah zong mi teng tawntung ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Mite in Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kiim panin ahi zongin, Benjamin gam, Shefelah zanglei gam, mualtung gam, le leitaw lam Negeb gamte panin ahi zongin meihal biakna le biakpiaknate, an tawh biakna, paknamtui le lungdam biakpiaknate, Topa’ biakinn-ah hong pia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uh a, Sabbath ni siangthosak loin, Jerusalem khua kongpite-ah van pua-in nong lutpih uhleh, tua kongpite ka hal ding hi. A mei in Jerusalem khua kumpi innte lawhin kangtum ding a, a mei a kiphelhzo kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tho in. Beelseek pa’ inn-ah paisuk inla, tua lai-ah ka thute kong hilh ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:3 Tua ciangin kei zong beelseek pa’ inn-ah ka paisuk leh beel a sek laitak ka va tuakkha hi. 
Jeremiah18:4 Buan tawh a bawl a beel ama khut sungah kisia ahih manin beelseek pa in hoih a sak bangin beel dang khatin a sek pha hi. 
Jeremiah18:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Israel mite aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih beelseek pa’ hih bangin note zong hong hih thei lo ding ka hi hiam? En un, beelseek pa’ khutsunga buan tawh kibangin, Israel mite aw, kei’ khut sungah note na om uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin botkhia-in, khenkhamin, ka suksiatna ding thu, hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin" 
Jeremiah18:8 tua ka gensa minam le gam a siatna panin a kiheikik leh, ama tungah siatna tunsak dingin ka sehsa pen ka kisikkik ding a, ka tungsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah18:9 Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi a, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin lam ding le phut dingin hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin," 
Jeremiah18:10 amah in ka thu hong ngai loin, hoih ka sak lohte a bawl teitei leh, ama tungah hoihna bawl ding ka sehsa pen ka kisikkik ding a, ka bawl nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah18:11 Tua ahih manin tu-in, Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite’ kiangah Topa in a cihin-ah, ‘En un, note’ siatna ding ka geel a, note’ langkhatah ngimna khat ka nei hi. Na vekpi-un na siatna uh pan kilehkik unla, na omdan uh le na nasepnate uh bawlpha un,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah18:12 Amaute in, ‘Tua bang gen kullo hi. Ko’ ngimna bangin ka gamta ding uh a, mi khempeuh ama lungsim sia’ deihna bangin a gamta ding uh hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:13 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Minam dangte’ lakah hih bang thu a kiza ngei hiam, dong dih un. Keima mituam Israel in a mulkimhuai mahmah na khat a hihzo hi." 
Jeremiah18:14 Lebanon mualtung vuk in susia ngei ahi hiam? Mualtung panin a hong luang a vot kilkel luite kang ngei ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ahih hangin ka mite in kei hong mangngilh khin uh a, milim pasian-te kiangah paknamtui a hal uh hi. Amau’ tot ding lampi-ah tuk uh ahih manin a tot ngei uh lampi lui zui nawn loin, lampi lopi a tawn uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:16 Amaute’ gam pen a mulkimhuai le simmawhna tawh a kiphitsan den ding gam a suaksak uh hi. Tua gam a kantan khempeuh mulkim mahmah uh a, lamdangsa-in a lu uh a pei uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nisuahna lam huih in nin a mutmang bangin a galte uh mai-ah amaute ka thehthang ding hi. Haksatna a tuah ni-un amaute ka nungngat ding a, ka maingat kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:18 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hong pai un, Jeremiah sawm ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a hong hilh dingin siampite ahi zongin, i dot ding mipilte ahi zongin, Pasian’ thu a hong gen dingin kamsangte ahi zongin i nei hi. Hong pai un, amah mawhsakin ama thu peuhmah mal khat zong i mang kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:19 Hong en in, Topa aw, keima hong thugennate le ka galte in keima thu a gennate hong ngai in." 
Jeremiah18:20 Hoihna pen siatna tawh a kituak ding mah ahi hiam? Keimah hong siahna-in gum a to uh hi. Nangma mai-ah kong ding a, amau a’ ding thuhoih kong gen hi. Na hehna amaute tungah na tunsak loh nadingin ka hong ngetnate hong phawk in." 
Jeremiah18:21 Tua ahih manin a tate uh kial tawh puksisak inla, amaute namsau-in sisak in. A zite uh ta neisak kei inla, meigong suaksak in. A pasalte uh pulnatna tawh sisak inla, a tangvalte uh gal sungah namsau tawh kithatlum sak in." 
Jeremiah18:22 Amau a thatlum ding galkapte thakhat thu-in paisak inla, amau’ innte panin kahna aw kizasak in! Bang hang hiam cih leh ka kiat nadingin gum to uh a, ka khete a awk nadingin thang a hong siah uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ahih hangin Topa aw, amaute in thah dingin kei a hong sawmna uh nang na thei hi. Amau’ khialhnate na maisak kei inla, nangma muhna panin amau’ mawhnate phiatmangsak kei in. Nangma mai-ah amaute guallelsak inla, na heh ni mahin hih ek in." 
Jeremiah19:1 Topa in hong hopih a, “Beelseek pa kiangah pai inla, leibeel khat va lei in. Mite’ lakah upa pawlkhat le siampi upa pawlkhat tonpih in la," 
Jeremiah19:2 nisuahna lam kongpi gei, Hinnom kuam-ah pai-in, kong gen thute tua lai-ah va taangko in." 
Jeremiah19:3 Nangmah in, ‘Judah kumpite le Jerusalem khuamite aw, Topa’ kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong cihin-ah: En un, hih munah kong tunsak ding siatna lianlua ahih manin a za mi khempeuhte’ bil sungah ging den ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite in kei hong taisan khinzo uh a, amaute a kipanin a pu a pate uh le Judah kumpite’ theih ngei loh pasian dangte’ kiangah paknamtui halin, hih mun a ninsak uh hi. Hih mun pen mawhna nei lo mite thahna sisan tawh dimsak uh a," 
Jeremiah19:5 ka thupiak ahi lo, ka ngaihsutkhak beek zong ahi lo, a tate uh meihal biakna tawh Baal biak nadingin Baal biakna tau sangte a lam khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:6 Tua ahih manin, en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kicizaw ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:7 Hih munah Judah mite le Jerusalem mite’ ngimna ka tangtungsak kei ding a, a galte uh’ namsau le a thatnuamte’ khutlumin amaute ka sisak ding hi. Amau’ luanghawmte huihlaka leeng vasate le leilak ganhingte’ an dingin ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Hih khuapi a mulkimhuai le a simmawhhuai ka suaksak ding a, a kantan mi khempeuh in khuapi siatna hangin lamdangsa-in zahpihin a phitsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:9 A galte uh le a that nuam mite in, amaute sim ding uh a, nek ding om lo lua ahih manin a tapate le a tanute uh’ sa ka nesak ding a, mi khempeuh in a vengte’ sa a ne ding uh hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah19:10 “Tua ciangin na tonpihte’ muhin na beel sukham inla," 
Jeremiah19:11 amaute kiangah, Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, hih beelseek pa’ beel kisukham a, a kibawlphat kik theih nawn loh bangmahin hih mite le hih khuapi ka sukham ding hi. Mun dangah si vuina ding mun om nawn lo ding ahih manin Tofeth nangawnah a kivui ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:12 Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mun le hih mun a teng mite tungah tu-a bangin ka hih ding a, hih khuapi Tofeth ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:13 Jerusalem khua-a innte le Judah kumpite’ innte a kipan, innkhum zangah vantung a aksite khempeuh tungah paknamtui hal biakna a kipiakna innte le pasian dangte tungah dawn ding biakna a kibuakna innte khempeuh a vekin Tofeth mun bangin a nin a suak ding hi, ci hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah19:14 Tua ciangin Topa in thu gen dinga hong sawlna Tofeth panin ka ciahkik a, Topa’ biakinn sungah dingin mi khempeuh kiangah thu ka gen a," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a cihin-ah: En un, hih khuapi le a kiima khuaneute tungah ka gensa siatna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh a, ka thute a ngai nuam kei uh hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah20:1 Jeremiah in a gen hih thute, Immer’ tapa, Topa’ biakinn ukpa ahi siampi Pashhur in a za hi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Tua ciangin Pashhur in kamsang Jeremiah sat a, Benjamin Kongpi saknung gei, Topa’ biakinn sungah kol a bulh hi." 
Jeremiah20:3 A zing ciangin Pashhur in a kolbulhna panin Jeremiah a khah khit ciangin Jeremiah in, “ Topa in nang, Pashhur ci-in hong sam nawn lo a, ‘Mun Khempeuhah Launa,’ ci-in hong samta hi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong cihin-ah, ‘En in, keimah in nang le na lawmte’ lau nadingin nang kong bawl ding hi. Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah Judah gam khempeuh ka pia ding hi. Amah in sal dingin amaute Babylon khua-ah paipih ding a, namsau tawh a thatlum ding hi." 
Jeremiah20:5 Tua tham loin khuapi sunga hauhna khempeuh, a nasepsa uh khempeuh, a neih a lam a thupiteng khempeuh uh le Judah kumpite’ sumlepai khempeuhte a galte’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, amaute in sutin, manin, Babylon khua-ah a paipih ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:6 Pashhur aw, nang le na innsung uha omte khempeuh sal dingin Babylon khua-ah na pai ding uh a, tua lai munah nang na si ding hi. Nang a kipan a man lopi a na thuhilh a ngai na lawmte khempeuh hong kivui ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah20:7 Topa aw, kei nong khem a, khemna ka thuak takpi hi. Kei sangin nang na hatzaw a, keimah nong zo hi. Nisimin mite’ nuihsat lel ka suak a, mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu ka gen simin, “Ngongtatna le kisiatna!” ci-in ka kiko den hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ kammal ka gen khiatna hangin nisimin simmawhna le zahpihna ka thuaklawh hi." 
Jeremiah20:9 Keimah in, “Ama thu ka gen kei ding a, ama min ka lo kei ding hi,” ci mah leng zong, ama thu ka lungsim sungah mei bangin hong kuang a, ka guh ka tang sungah kikhumcip ahih manin ka ki-ipipna-in ka gimlua a, gen loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mite’ kihuau simna thu tampi ka za a, mun khempeuh lauhuai hi. Ka lawm itte khempeuh in ka cihmawh ding hong ngak gige uh a, “A mawhna pulak ni! A mawhna pulak ni! Amah i khemzo kha ding hi. Tua hileh i zo kha ding a, tua ciangin i thukkik ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ahih hangin Topa pen a kihtakhuai galhang pa bangin kei tawh hong omkhawm gige hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong bawlsiate tuk ding uh a, kei hong zo lo ding uh hi. A tawntung a a mindaina uh kimangngilh ngei lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah20:12 A thuman mite a entel, lungsim le ngaihsutna a mu Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thukkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma khut sungah ka thu kong ap khin hi." 
Jeremiah20:13 Topa’ tungah la sa unla, Topa phat un! Migilote’ khutsung panin amah in mi cimawhte a honkhia hi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Keima suah ni in gimna thuak ta hen! Ka nu in kei a hong suahsak ni in thupha ngah kei ta hen! 
Jeremiah20:15 Ka pa kiangah, “Tapa khat na nei hi,” ci-in va ko-in a lungdamsak pa in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah20:16 Topa in hehpih loin a lumlet khuapite tawh tua pa kibang tahen. Zingsangin kahna aw za hen la, sun ciangin patauhna aw za tahen." 
Jeremiah20:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ka nu’ gil sungah kei hong that lo hi. Hong that hileh ka nu’ gil sung ka han suakpah ding hi. 
Jeremiah20:18 Gimna le dahna a mu ding le nisima maizum den dingin bang hangin a gil sung panin suakkhia sese ka hi hiam? 
Jeremiah21:1 Zedekiah kumpipa in Malkhiah’ tapa Pashhur le Maaseiah’ tapa Zefaniah-te, Jeremiah kiangah sawl a," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Kote a dingin Topa’ kiangah thu hong dotsak in. Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a sim dingin hong umcih hi. Topa in a na lamdangte khat kei’ tungah hong zang leh amah kilehkiksak thei kha ding hi,” ci-in a dongsak hi." 
Jeremiah21:3 Tua ciangin Jeremiah in dawngkik a," 
Jeremiah21:4 “Zedekiah kiangah hih bangin na genkik un, ‘ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a genin-ah: En un, khuakulhpi pualamah a hong umcih Babylon kumpipa le Khaldea mite na dona uh ahi, na khutsung uha na kep na galhiamte uh bangmahin a kimang lo ka suaksak ding a, amaute khempeuh hih khuapi laizangah kong paipih ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:5 Kei mahmah in hehna le thangpaihna lianpi tawh ka khut zanin, a hat mahmah ka khut tawh note kong do ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Hih khuapi sungah a tengte a mi a sa ci loin ka thatlum ding a, pulnatna tawh a bei khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah21:7 Tua khit ciangin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le a nasemte, le pulnatna, namsau, le kialin a si lo a nungta laiteng pen, amau’ galte le amaute a thatnuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah ka pia ding hi. Amah in amaute namsau tawh that ding a, hehpih loin, zong a maap kei ding a, itna lungsim a nei kei ding hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Topa in Jeremiah hopih a, “Jeremiah aw, hih mite kiangah, ‘ Topa in a cihin-ah: En un, na mai uhah nuntakna lampi le sihna lampi ka khung hi." 
Jeremiah21:9 Hih khuapi sunga om mi peuhmah namsau tawh ahi a, kial tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Ahi zongin pusuak khia-in note a hong sim Khaldea mite kiangah a lut peuhmah suakta liailiai ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih khuapi hoihna ding hi lo, a siatna dingin ka lungsim ka khensat khinzo hi. Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, amah in mei tawh a hal ding hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:11 “Judah kumpite’ innkuan tungah hih bangin va gen in: David’ suante aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih un. Topa in a cihin-ah: Zingsang simin mantakin thu khen unla, mi bawlsia pa’ khutsung pan a bawlsiat pa honkhia un. Tua bang na hih kei uhleh siatna na bawlnate hangun mei bangin ka hehna hong kuang ding a, kuamah in a phelhzo kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:12  
Jeremiah21:13 Mualkuam zang pan kilaamto a, zanglei lak a suangtum bangin a sangto Jerusalem aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, na langkhatah ka pang ding hi. Nangmah in, ‘Kua in kei hong simsuk ding a, ka omna-ah kua hong lut ding ahi hiam?’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah21:14 Na gamtatna tawh kizui-in gimna ka hong pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Tulaka sing hoihte tawh a kilam na kumpi innte uh mei tawh kihal ding a, a kimkot khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Judah kumpipa’ inn-ah va paisuk inla, hih bangin va gen in." 
Jeremiah22:2 David tokhom tungah a tu Judah kumpipa aw, nang le na nasemte a kipan hih kongpi-ah a hong lut na gammite khempeuh in Topa’ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah22:3 Topa in a cihin-ah, thumanin diktat unla, a bawlsiate’ khutsung panin bawlsiatna a thuak mite honkhia un. Minam dangte, pa nei lote le meigongte simmawhbawl kha loin amau’ tungah ngongtat kei unla, hih munah zong mawhna nei lo mite that kei un." 
Jeremiah22:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in hih thute na zuih takpi uhleh David’ suante kumpi suak tawntung ding uh a, amaute a kipan a nasemte uh le a mite uh sakol leeng le sakol tungah tuangin hih inn kongpite-ah hong lut ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ahih hangin note in hih thute na zuih kei uhleh keimah Topa in kong genin-ah, hih inn gamlak a suaksak dingin ka kiciam hi." 
Jeremiah22:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpi inn tawh kisai-in Topa in kong cihin-ah: Nang pen Gilead gam ahi a, Lebanon mual bangin ahi zongin na hoih mahmah hi. Ahih hangin nang sehnel gam kong suaksak ding a, kuamah a ten lohna khua kong suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nang’ langkhatah a hong susia ding mi ka kithawisak ding a, a hei uh hong keng ding uh hi. Amaute in na sidar khuam hoihpente hong phuksakin mei-ah hong khulsak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Tua ciangin minam dang tampi in hih khuapi kantan ding uh a, a innsak a innkhangte’ kiangah, ‘Bang hangin hih khuapi lian hici bawl ahi hiam,’ ci-in khatlekhat a kidong ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:9 Tua ciangin, ‘A Pasian uh Topa’ thuciamna taisan uh a, pasian dang peuh bia-in a na a sepsak man uh ahi hi,’ ci-in a kidawngkik ding uh hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:10 Judah mite aw, misi pa Josiah kah kei unla, khasiat kei un. A kipaikhiatpih Shallum hangin nakpitakin kapzaw un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pianna gam a mu dingin amah hong kilehkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Josiah’ za a luah a tapa, hih mun panin a paikhia pa Shallum thu tawh kisai-in Topa in, “Amah hong kilehkik nawn lo ding a," 
Jeremiah22:12 salin a kikaihna munah a si ding hi. Hih gam a mukik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Thuman lopi-in inn lam a, zuauthu tawh inndei tungnung a lam mi, ama na a mawkna-in a inn vengte a semsak mi, thaman a pia lo mi in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah22:14 “Inndei tungnung zapi a awng inn gol khat ka lam ding hi,” ci-in tawlet vangte bawl a, taamtak singpeek tawh thuap sawm a, za san a zut mi in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah22:15 Taamtak sing tawh inn na lam manin kumpi kisa na hi hiam? Na pa in an ne tui dawn a, thumanna le diktatna tawh na a sep manin a maa pai hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Amah in mizawngte le mi cimawhte thuman tawh thu khen a, na khempeuh a hoih a suak pah hi. Tu-a banga hihna pen kei nong theihna uh hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:17 Ahih hangin note in thuman lo tawh ngahna ding ahi zongin, mimawh lote’ sisan luanna ding ahi zongin, mi nuaisiahna le ngongtatna ding ahi zongin, na mitte uh le na lungsim uh na zang uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:18 Tua ahih manin Judah kumpipa Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim thu tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kong ci hi: “Amaute in, ‘Sanggampa aw,’ ‘Sanggamnu aw,’ ci-in a sih ciangun a kikah bangun amah a sih ciangin a kah kei ding uh a, ‘ Topa aw, kumpipa aw,’ ci-in zong a kah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:19 La si a kiphum bang lelin amah kivui ding a, Jerusalem kongpi pualamah kikai talin kipaai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:20 Jerusalem khua mite aw, Lebanon Mual tungah kahto-in awng unla, Bashan gamah va kiko un. Abarim mualtungah va kiko un; bang hang hiam cih leh na pawlte un gal lel khin hi." 
Jeremiah22:21 Na daupai laitakun kong hopih hangin na hong ngai nuam kei uh hi. Na neu tung uh a kipan nong tuacih ngitnget uh a, keima thu nong mang ngei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:22 Na makaite uh huih in hong mut mangsak ding a, na pawlte uh salin kiman ding uh hi. Tua ciangin na gitlohna uh hangin maizumin na lung-am ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:23 Lebanon gam panin a kila taamtak inn sungah nuamtakin na teng uh hi. Ahih hangin gimna hong tun ciangin bangzah takin na tau ding uh hiam? Numei nausuak dingte tawh na kibang ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah22:24 Topa in Jehoiakim tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin tungah, “Kei a nungta Pasian ka hih mah bangin, nangmah in ka taklam khutah a om ka letmatthuhna tawh a kibang na hih hangin nang kong lakhia ding a," 
Jeremiah22:25 na kihtak, nang hong thatnuamte’ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le Khaldea mite’ khut sungah nang kong pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:26 Nangmah le nang hong paii na nu, na suahna mun uh ahi lo gam dangah kong lawnkhia ding a, tua laitakah na si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:27 Na ciahkik nopna gam uhah na ciahkik thei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:28 Jehoiakhin, kuama deih loh a kipaimang beel kitam tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Bang hangin amah le a tate kilawnkhia a, a theih loh uh gamah kipaimang ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Aw ka gam, ka gam aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih ve’n!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih pa, ta nei lopa, a khan tawntungin a gualzo ngei lopa, ci-in ciamteh un. Ama suanlekhakte khat beek in David’ tokhom luah lo ding a, Judah gam a uk kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:1 Topa in thu gen a, “Ka mite sisakin, a kikhenthangsak gam ukte in gimna ngah ta hen!” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:2 Tua ahih manin ka mipihte a kem gam ukte tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah, “Note in ka mite kikhenthang sakin na hawlkhiamang uh a, amaute na don kei uh hi. En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, na gamtatsiate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ka mite a omlai sunteng, ka hawlkhiatna ding gamte panin ka kaikhawmkik ding a, a gam uhah ka ciahsakkik ding hi. Amaute pungin a khang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:4 Amaute a don ding makaite ka koih ding a, lau nawn lo, lungkham nawn loin khat beek a mangthang nawn kei ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:5 “En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, keimah in David’ suan lak panin kumpi dingin a diktat mi khat ka khankhiatsak ni hong tung ding hi. Amah gam uk siam mahmah ding a, gam sungah thuman thutang tawh thu hong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ama hun hong tun ciangin Judah mite kihonkhia ding a, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teng ding uh hi. Amah a kilawh nadingin a min, ‘ Topa, Eite’ Diktanna,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:7 “Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, mite in, ‘Egypt gam panin Israel mite a hong paikhiatpih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciam nawn kei ding uh a," 
Jeremiah23:8 ‘A hawlkhiatna leilu lam gam le gamdangte khempeuh panin Israel mite’ suanlekhakte kaikhawmin a makaih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciamzaw ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute amau’ gam sung mahah a teng ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:9 Kamsangte tawh kisai-in: Topa’ hang le ama thugen kammal siangthote’ hangin keima sungah ka lungsim hong kitamkham a, ka guh ka taang a ling hi. Zu tam ne lua-in a kham mipa tawh ka kibang hi." 
Jeremiah23:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mun khempeuhah angkawmte a dim hi. Topa’ hamsiatna hangin gam sung tengah kahna dim a, gamlak lonona munte a keu mang hi. Amaute gamtatsia uh a, a vangliatna uh a man lopi-in a zang uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:11 Topa in a cihin-ah, “Kamsangte le siampite in Pasian a zahtak kei uh hi. Ka biakinnsung nangawnah amau’ gitlohna ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah23:12 Tua ahih manin amaute’ lampi pen khuamial lak lamnal hi ding a, amaute kinotkhia gawpin a tuk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute’ gimthuak ding hun hong tun ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:13 Samaria kamsangte sungah a muhthadahhuai mahmah na khat ka mu hi. Baal min suangin thu hilh uh a, ka mi Israel-te lam a pialpih uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ahih hangin Jerusalem khuasunga om kamsangte’ sungah a mulkimhuaizaw na khat ke’n ka mu hi. Angkawmin zuauthu gen uh a, mite a gitlohna uh pan a kikhel loh nadingin mi hoih lote a hanthawn zawlai uh hi. A vekpi-un kei’ muhna-ah Sodom khuamite tawh kibang khin ka sa a, Gomorrah khuamite tawh zong kilamdang lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Tua ahih manin tua kamsangte tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in kong genin-ah: En un, keimah in gamsai teh tawh amaute ka vak ding a, gu kisawh tui amaute ka dawnsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khua-a om kamsangte’ kiang panin gam sung mun khempeuhah Pasian zahtak lohna hong kizel hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:16 Vanglian Topa in, “Note kiangah thu hong hilh a, a hong lamen khialsak kamsangte’ thugennate na ngai kei un. Amaute in a lungsim uhah a geeltawm uh thu hong gen uh hi a, keima kiang pana hong pai thu ahi kei hi." 
Jeremiah23:17 Keimah Topa’ thugennna a hong ngai lo mite kiangah, hong hoih na ve, ci-in a gen tawntung uh hi. Amau’ lungsim’ deihna bang ciat bek a zui tentan mi khempeuhte kiangah zong, gimna hong tung zenzen lo ding hi, ci-in a gen uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:18 Amaute’ lakah kua pen Topa tawh thu kikum khawm ngei a, a thugennate va thei ngei, va za ngei ahi uh hiam? Kua in ama kammal va ngai ngei a, va thupi ngaihsut ngei ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah23:19 En un, Topa’ hehna huihpi hong nung hi. A hehna huihpi hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilo pa’ lutang hong kidenna ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:20 A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtunsak matengin Topa’ hehna damkik lo ding hi. Hong pai lai ding hunte-ah note in siangtakin na telzaw semsem ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah23:21 Topa in, “Keimah in sawlkhia lo napi-in tua kamsangte kuankhia teitei uh hi. Thu bangmah ka gen lohpi, kei’ min paulamin thu a gen mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ahih hangin amaute in keima lungsim tawng hong thei uh hileh keima thugente ka mite tungah taangko ding uh a, a nuntakna uh a hoih lote panin kikhelsakin, a gamtat hoih lote uh panin zong kikhelsak khinzo ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Kei pen mun khat bekah a om Pasian ka hi hiam? Mun khempeuhah a om Pasian hi lo ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:24 Mi khat peuhpeuh kei’ muh loh dingin busim thei ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Leitung, vantung, mun khempeuhah ka om lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:25 Ka min tawh zuau phuakin, ‘Mang man zo ing, mang man zo ing,’ ci-in a gen kamsang zuau theite’ thuhilhnate zong ka za khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah23:26 Zuauthu tawh thu hilh a, a phuahtawm uh thu a hilh kamsangte’ lungsim sungah zuauthu bang tanvei tenglai ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah23:27 A pute a pate un kei’ min hong mangngilhin Baal a biak uh bangin a mangmat uh a gen kawikawina uh tawh ka mite in ka min hong mangngilh ding uh hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:28 Kamsangpa in mang a mat leh a mang bek mah gen hen la, ahih hangin ka thugenna a za mipa in ka thugente mah mantakin gen tahen. Buhtu le buhtang bangci kibat theih ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ka kammal pen mei tawh ahi a, suangtum a satnenzo sek tawh ahi zongin kibang hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:30 Tua ahih ciangin en un, Topa in kong genin-ah, kamsangte in amau khatlekhat tung panin a theih uh thute kei’ thugen bangin a genkhiatna uh ka deih kei hi." 
Jeremiah23:31 En un, Topa in kong genin-ah, amau’ ngaihsuttawm thu gen napi-in, ‘ Topa in ci hi,’ a ci khem kamsangte’ langkhatah kei ka pang hi." 
Jeremiah23:32 En un, Topa in kong genin-ah, ka sawl lohpi zuau mang manin tua thu hilh a, a zuauthu uh le a kiphatsakna uh tawh ka mite lam a khialhpih mite’ langkhatah kei ka pang hi. Ka mite a dingin amaute a kimanna uh themkha beek om lo hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Jeremiah aw, ka mite khat peuhpeuh in ahi a, kamsang khat ahih kei leh siampi khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin, ‘ Topa’ thugen bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot leh nangmah in, ‘ Topa’ thugen nangmah na hi a, nang pen vangik khat na hi hi. Topa in nang, kong paaikhia ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kamsang khat, ahih kei leh siampi khat, ahih kei leh ka mite khat peuhpeuh in, ‘ Topa’ thugen pen vangik khat ahi hi,’ a cih leh tua mipa le a innkuanpihte khempeuh gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:35 Mi khempeuh in a lawmte kiangah ahi a, a sanggamte kiangah ahi zongin, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in na kidongzaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:36 ‘ Topa’ thugen pen vangik khat ahi hi,’ ci-in na gen nawn kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ thugente, note’ vangik ahi zaw hi. Note in eite’ Pasian ahi a nungta Pasian, Vanglian Topa’ thugennate na lumletgawp uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:37 Kamsangpa kiangah, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in dongzaw un." 
Jeremiah23:38 Ahih hangin note in, ‘ Topa’ thugen pen vangik ahi hi,’ na cih peuhmah uhleh Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in na cih loh dingun kong hilh pen ci teitei na hih manun" 
Jeremiah23:39 keimah in note le na pu na pate uh ka piaksa khuapi ka domto ding a, ka omna panin ka lawnkhia taktak ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:40 A tawntungin simmawhna le maizumna kong thuaksak ding a, cikmah hunin na mangngilh ngei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah24:1 Babylon Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khua panin Jehoiakim’ tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin le Judah kumpi uliante, khutsiamte le sikseek siamte, Babylon khua-ah sal dingin a paikhiatpih khit ciangin Topa in hih maang hong musak hi. Topa’ biakinn mai-ah theigah bawm nih dim ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah24:2 Bawm khat sunga theigahte, a min masate tawh kibangin limci mahmah hi. Ahih hangin a bawm khat pen sunga theigahte limci hetloin nektheih ding bang hi dek lo hi." 
Jeremiah24:3 Topa in hong hopih a, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Theigah ka mu hi. A limcite limci mahmah a, a limci lote limci lo lua ahih manin nektheih ding bang hi lo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah24:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah:" 
Jeremiah24:5 Hih mun panin Khaldea mite’ gam a ka puakkhiat Judah mi saltangte hih theigah hoihte bangin a hoihin ka ngaihsun ding hi. 
Jeremiah24:6 Amaute limtakin ka kem ding a, hih gamah ka lakik ding hi. Amaute ka khangtosak ding a, ka susia kei ding hi; ka suan ding a, ka botkhia kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:7 Keimah Topa ka hihlam theihtheihna lungsim ka pia ding hi. A lungsim khempeuh uh tawh kei kiangah hong kileh ding uh ahih manin amaute ka mi ahi ding uh a, kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le ama gam uk uliante a kipan hih gamah a omsuak Jerusalem khuasunga a omlai sunteng le Egypt gamah a tengte limci lo lua ahih manin a kine thei lo theigahte bangin ka bawl ding hi. 
Jeremiah24:9 Amaute ka hawlkhiatna ding mun khempeuhah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna le zahkonate ka thuaksak ding a, amaute’ thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:10 Namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi, le pulnatnate ka tungsak ding a, amaute le a pu a pate’ kiangah ka piaksa gam sungah khat beek ka nungtasak nawn kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:1 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawmli a cin kumin Judah mite tawh kisai-in Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi. (Hih hun pen Babylon-ah Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suah kum ahi hi.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Kamsangpa Jeremiah in zong Judah gammi khempeuh le Jerusalem khuami khempeuhte’ tungah hih bangin a gensawn hi: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Amon’ tapa Josiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh a kum sawm le thum pan tu ciang dong kum sawmnih le kum thum sung Topa in kei hong hopih a, ke’n zong note kiangah kong gensawn tawntung hangin note in na ngai kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:4 Topa in ama nasem ahi kamsangte khempeuh hong sawl tawntung hinapi-in note in ngai loin na bil uh na ngat kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah25:5 Amaute in, ‘Tu-in na vekpi-un na gitlohna uh le na gamtat khialhnate uh panin na kihei uhleh Topa in note le tanglai-a na pu na pate uh tungah na neih tawntung dingun a hong piak gam sungah na teng thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:6 Pasian dangte’ nung delh loin, a na sem loin na biak kei uh a, na khut uh tawh na bawl uh milimte peuh bia-in na hehsak kei nak-uhleh, note bangmah hong cih kei ding hi,’ ci-in hong gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in ka thu nong ngai kei uh a, note’ gim ngahna ding mahin na khut uh tawh milim bawlin nong hehsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in ka thu hong mang lo na hih uh ciangin" 
Jeremiah25:9 en un, leilu lama om minam khempeuhte le ka nasempa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar ka vaikhak ding a, hih gam le a sunga a teng mi khempeuh le hih kiima om gam khempeuh a sim dingin ka va la ding hi. Keimah in amaute ka susia mangkhin ding a, amaute a tawntungin siacipin simmawhna ka thuaksak ding hi, ci-in Topa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah25:10 Tua tham loin lungdamna le kipahna awte, zinei thak pa le mothak nu’ awte, le an gawina suang gingte ka gingsak nawn kei ding a, meivak taangte ka sumit ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:11 Gam sung khempeuh kisia-in, gam simtham suak ding a, hih mite khempeuh kum sawmsagih sung Babylon kumpipa’ salin a om ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:12 Kum sawmsagih a cin khit ciangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, Babylon kumpipa le a gam amau’ mawhna hangin gim ka pia ding a, tua gam a tawntungin gam simtham ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Tua gam a siatna ding ka gensa thute khempeuh hih laibu sungah kigelh a, Jeremiah in gam khempeuhte’ kiangah a gen hi. Tuate khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam tampi le kumpi liante in amaute salin man ding uh a, amau’ gamtatna amau’ tungah ka thukkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:15 Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kei hong hopih a, “Ka khuttung panin hehna tawh a kidim hih leenggahzu hai la inla, kong sawlna gamte khempeuh dawnsak in." 
Jeremiah25:16 Amaute in dawn ding uh a, amaute’ kianga ka sawl namsau hangin hoi dangdangin a hailawh ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tua ahih manin kei zong Topa’ khuttung panin tua hai ka la a, Topa’ hong sawlna gamte khempeuh ka dawnsak hi." 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerusalem le Judah gam a khuapite, a kumpite uh le a gam uliante uh ka dawnsak a, tuni dongin gam simtham suakin, mite’ simmawhna thuakin, a min uh hamsiat nadingin a kizang hi. Tua hai panin a dawn a dangte:" 
Jeremiah25:19 Egypt kumpipa Faro le a nasemte, a kumpi uliante;" 
Jeremiah25:20 Egypt mite le amau’ lakah a teng gamdang mite khempeuh; Uz gam sunga kumpite khempeuh le Filistia gam sunga om Ashkelon, Gaza, Ekron khuapite, le Ashdod khuapi-ah a omlai sunte’ kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, Moab, le Ammon mite;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Taia kumpite khempeuh, Sidon kumpite khempeuh; tuipi gei-a kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, Buz khuapite; a sam uh a tommet khempeuhte;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia kumpite khempeuh; sehnel gam sunga teng minam kigawm khawmte’ kumpite khempeuh; 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri kumpite khempeuh, Elam kumpite khempeuh, le Media kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:26 le a gamla hitaleh a nai hitaleh leilu lama a om kumpite khempeuh khat khit ciangin khat ka dawnsak hi. Tua ciangin leitung a om gam khempeuh ka dawnsak hi. A tawpna-ah Babylon kumpipa in a dawn ding hi. 
Jeremiah25:27 Tua ciangin Topa in hong hopih a, “Amaute kiangah, Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Dawn un. Kham unla lua un. Note kiangah namsau hong paisak ding ka hih manin tuk unla, thozo nawn kei un,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah25:28 “Amaute in na khuttung panin hai la-in dawn ding uh a, hong nial uhleh amaute kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa in hong genin-ah: Na dawn uh kul ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, ka min tawh a kilo khuapi sungah suksiatna ka pan ding hi. Note in bangmah a thuak lo ding kisa na hi uh hiam? Gim thuak loin na om kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, leitung a teng mite khempeuh a that dingin namsau khat ka sawl hi,’ ci in." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Tua ahih ciangin nangmah in amaute thu na va hilh ding a, hih bangin na va gen ding hi: ‘A sang vantung panin Topa hong hawk ding a, a tenna a siangtho panin hong paukhia ding hi. Ama mite’ langkhatah nasia takin hong hawkgawp ding a, leenggah cil mite bangin leitung mi khempeuhte a langpangin hong kiko ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:31 A awging, leimong dongah kithawn ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gamte’ langkhatah Topa pang hi. Amah in mi khempeuh thu sit ding a, namsau tawh migilote a thatlum ding hi, Topa in ci hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:32 “Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah: En un, gam khat pan gam khatah siatna a paipai hi. Leitung a gamla pen mun panin huihpi hong nung hi." 
Jeremiah25:33 “Tua ni-a Topa’ thahlup mite’ luanghawmte leimong khat panin mong khat dongah a kithehthang ding uh hi. Amaute kuamah in a kah kei ding uh a, kikaikhawm loin, kiphum lo ding uh ahih manin leilakah ek nusiatin a kinusia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:34 “No makaite aw, tau unla, kap un; vut lakah kikhuk un, no uliante aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh hong kithahlup ni ding le na kikhenthang ni ding uh hong tungzo hi; tuutal teelte bangin hong kithatlum ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:35 Makaite a dingin bukna ding om lo ding a, uliante a dingin suahtak theih nading om lo hi." 
Jeremiah25:36 Ngai dih un, makaite’ kahna aw le uliante’ tauna aw kiza hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a gam uh suksiatsak hi." 
Jeremiah25:37 A lauhuai mahmah Topa’ hehna hangin a nop mahmah a gam uh kisia gawp hi. 
Jeremiah25:38 Topa’ namsau hang ahi a, a lauhuai ama hehna hang ahi zongin, amau’ gam pen gam simtham suakkhin ahih manin humpinelkai in a kua a nusiat bangin Topa in a mite nusiazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:1 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gam kumpi a suah tungin Topa in hih bangin Jeremiah hopih a," 
Jeremiah26:2 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, Topa’ biakinnpi huang sungah va ding inla, Topa’ biakinnpi sungah a bia dinga a hong pai Judah gam khuapite khempeuh kiangah gen dinga kong sawl khempeuh va gen in. Kam khat beek im kei in." 
Jeremiah26:3 Amaute in na thugen hong ngai-in, a gitlohna uh pan kihei khathei ding uh hi. Tua hileh amau’ gitlohna hanga amaute suksiat dingin ka ngaihsutsa ka kheelkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah26:4 Nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Note in ka thu hong ngai loin, note mai-a kong lahsa ka thukham bangin na gamtat kei uh a," 
Jeremiah26:5 note in a thu na man’ ngei loh uh ahi, kong sawl zelzel ka nasem kamsangte’ thu na thupi sim kei uhleh" 
Jeremiah26:6 hih Jerusalem biakinnpi Shiloh khua-a biakinn ka bawl bangin ka bawl ding a, hih khuapi pen leitung gam khempeuhte’ kihamsiatna-in ka zangsak ding hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Siampite, kamsangte le mi khempeuh in hih thu a gen teng a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:8 Mi khempeuh tungah Topa in gen dingin a sawlteng Jeremiah in a gen khit ciangin siampite, kamsangte, le mi khempeuhte in amah man uh a, “Nang na sih ding kilawm hi." 
Jeremiah26:9 Bang hangin, ‘Hih biakinnpi pen Shiloh tawh kibang ding a, hih khuapi-ah a teng om loin gam simtham suak ding hi,’ ci-in Topa’ minin thu hilh ngam na hi hiam?” ci-in a gen uh hi. Topa’ biakinnpi sungah a om mi khempeuh in Jeremiah a umcih uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:10 Judah gam uk uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin kumpipa’ innsung pan Topa’ biakinnpi-ah hong paito uh a, Topa’ biakinnpi lutna Kongpi Thak-ah a tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tua ciangin siampite le kamsangte in kumpi uliante le mi khempeuhte’ kiangah, “Note in na bil uh tawh na zak ciat uh mah bangin hih pa in hih Jerusalem khuapi langpangin thu hilh ahih manin thah ding kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:12 Tua ciangin Jeremiah in kumpi ulian khempeuhte le mi khempeuhte’ kiangah, “ Topa in na zaksa uh ahi hih biakinnpi le hih khuapi langkhatah ka gen thu khempeuh a gen dingin kei hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in na nuntak dante uh le na gamtatziate uh kheel unla, Topa na Pasian uh thu ngai un. Tua hileh Topa in note’ kisiatna ding a gensa thu a kheelkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah26:14 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh, en un, note’ khut sungah ka om hi. Note in hoih na sak uh bangin kei tungah hong bawl un." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kei nong thah uhleh bel, mawh nei lo mi khat na thah manun note mahmah a kipan hih khuapi le a sunga tengte in na thuak ding uh thei ta un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ bil mahmahin na zak dingun hih thute a gen dingin Topa’ hong sawl taktak ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:16 Tua ciangin kumpi uliante le mi khempeuhte in siampite le kamsangte tungah, “Hih pa in eite’ Topa Pasian’ min tawh thu hong gen ahih manin thah ding kilawm lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:17 Gam sung upa pawlkhat in zong, dingin tua a kikhawm mi khempeuhte’ kiangah," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in a uk laitakin Moresheth khuami Mikah in Judah mi khempeuhte’ kiangah, ‘Lo dingin Zion mual a kikho ding hi. Jerusalem khua kisia zan ding a, biakinn mual, gamlak a suak ding hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa in gen hi,’ ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:19 “Tua hinapi, Judah kumpipa Hezekiah le Judah mi khempeuhte in amah that zenzen uh ahi hiam? Kumpipa in Topa zahtakin, Topa’ pahtak ding a nget ciangin Topa in zong amau’ tungah siatna tunsak dingin a gensa khelkikzaw hi lo ahi hiam? Ahih hangin eite in eite’ tungah siatna lianpi khat i tungsak dektak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:20 Kiriathjearim khua panin zong Topa’ min tawh thu a hilh Shemaiah’ tapa Uriah a kici midang khat a omlai hi. Jeremiah’ gen bangmahin amah in zong hih Jerusalem khuapi le hih gam langkhatah thu a gen hi. 
Jeremiah26:21 Kumpi Jehoiakim le a galkapmang khempeuh le kumpi ulian khempeuhte in ama thugente a zak uh ciangin kumpipa in thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Uriah in tua thu a zak ciangin lau-in Egypt gamah a taisim hi. 
Jeremiah26:22 Tua ciangin kumpi Jehoiakim in Akbor’ tapa Elnathan le midang pawlkhat Egypt gamah sawl a," 
Jeremiah26:23 amau in zong Egypt gam panin Uriah manin kumpi Jehoiakim kiangah a puak uh hi. Amah in tua pa namsau tawh thatin a luanghawm mi mawkmawkte’ kivuina munah a paai hi. 
Jeremiah26:24 Ahih hangin Shafan’ tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah hu ahih manin thah dingin mite’ khut sungah kipia lo hi. 
Jeremiah27:1 Josiah’ tapa Zedekiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suah tungin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:2 Topa in kei tungah, “Savun khau tawh a kithuah hakkol bawl in la, na ngawngah thuah in." 
Jeremiah27:3 Edom kumpipa tung, Moab kumpipa tung, Taia kumpipa tung, le Sidon kumpipa tungah, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah tawh kimu dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai a kumpi taangmite’ tungtawnin thu zasak in." 
Jeremiah27:4 Amaute in a kumpite uh tungah, Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen uh hen." 
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Keimah in a lian mahmah ka vangliatna tawh ka khut zanin, leitung le leitung a om mite le ganhingte ka bawl a, piak tuak ka sakte tungah ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah27:6 Tu-in hih gamte, ka nasempa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah ka pia khinzo hi. Gamsate nangawn ama nasem dingin ka pia lai hi." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ama gam a kisiat hun a tun mateng gam khempeuh in amah a kipan a tapa le a tupa’ na a sepsak ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin gam tampi le kumpi liante in amah salin a lehneih kik ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah27:8 “‘Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh ahih kei leh kumpi khat peuhpeuh in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ na sem loin, Babylon kumpipa’ hakkol a ngawngah a puak kei leh, amah ka ukcipsak mateng namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh tua gam gim ka pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah27:9 Tua ahih manin Babylon kumpipa’ na sem kei un, ci-a note kiangah a hong gen na kamsangte uh, na aisan theite uh, na mang man theite uh, le na mangsan theite uh’ thugennate um kei un." 
Jeremiah27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ kianga hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu hi a, tua hangin na gam uh panin gamlapi-ah note hong kipaikhiatpih ding hi. Keimah in note kong hawlkhia ding a, note na si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa’ hakkol pua a, ama na a sem gam pen, lo kho-in a tentheih nadingin ama gam sung mahah ka omsak ding hi, ci-in Topa in hong gen hi,’ ci-in gen uh hen,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah27:12 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiangah zong tua bangmahin ka gen a, “Na nuntak theih nadingin Babylon kumpipa’ hakkol pua in." 
Jeremiah27:13 Bang hangin namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh nang le na mite si ding uh ahi hiam? Babylon kumpipa’ na a sem lo gam khat peuhpeuh tuaci sih ding, ci-in Topa in a gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:14 Babylon kumpipa’ na sem kei un, ci-in note’ kianga hong gen kamsangte’ thugennate um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ kianga hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah27:15 Topa in kong cihin-ah, ‘Keimah in amaute ka sawl kei hi. Ahih hangin amaute in kei’ min tawh a man lopi-in thu hilh uh a, tua hangin note le note’ kiangah thu hong hilh kamsangte kong sawlkhia khawm ding a, na si ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:16 Tua ciangin siampite le hih mi khempeuhte’ kiangah, “ Topa in hong genin-ah, ‘En un, Babylon khua panin Topa’ biakinn beelte kila kik baih ta ding hi,’ ci-in note’ kiangah na kamsangte uh’ hong thugente um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amau’ thu na mang kei un. Na nuntak theih nadingun Babylon kumpipa’ na na semzaw un. Bang hangin hih khuapi gam simtham suak laizang ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah27:18 Amaute kamsang taktak ahih uh a, Topa in ka hopih taktak ahih uhleh, Topa’ biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipa’ innsung, le Jerusalem khua sungah a kinusia lai beelte Babylon khua-ah a kipuakkhiat nawn lohna dingin Vanglian Topa kiangah hong thum uh hen." 
Jeremiah27:19 “Bang hang hiam cih leh, Jehoiakim’ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin le, Judah gam le Jerusalem khua-a kumpi ulian khempeuh Jerusalem khua pan Babylon khua-ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paikhiatpih laitakin, a nusiatlai khuampite, tuikuangpite, a kingaknate, le hih khuapi sungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi a," 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 Topa’ biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipa’ innsung, le Jerusalem khua sungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi zongin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a genin-ah:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Tuate Babylon khua-ah kipuakhia ding a, ka kankik mateng tua lai-ah a omsuak ding hi. Tua khit ciangin tuate ka lakik ding a, hih munah ka koihkik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tua kum mahin (Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum li le kha nga a phak kum) Gibeon khua panin a hong pai Azzur’ tapa kamsang Hananiah in Topa’ biakinnpi sungah siampite le mi khempeuh a omkim laitakin hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: Babylon kumpipa’ vangliatna ka susia khin hi." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kum nih sungin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih mun pan lakhia-in Babylon khua-ah a puak, Topa’ biakinnpi sunga beelte hih munah ka lakik ding hi." 
Jeremiah28:4 Jehoiakim’ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin le Judah gam panin Babylon-ah salin a paite khempeuh zong hih munah ka lakik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon kumpipa’ vangliatna ka susia ding hi, ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:5 Tua ciangin Topa’ biakinnpi sungah dingin a om siampite le mi khempeuhte a omkim laitakin keimah Jeremiah in Hananiah ka hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:6 “Amen! Topa in tua na gen bangin hong sem tahen. Topa in na thugenkholhna bangin hong tungsak hen la, Babylon khua panin Topa’ biakinnpi sunga beelte le salin a kimante khempeuh hih lai munah hong lakik tapeuh hen!" 
Jeremiah28:7 Ahi zongin tu-in nang le mi khempeuhte’ zakin kong gen ding hih thu na ngai ta un. 
Jeremiah28:8 Nang le kei’ ma-in a om, tanglai-a kamsangte in gam tampi le gam liante’ tungah gal ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin, pulnatna ahi zongin hong tung ding hi, ci-in a genkholzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ahi zongin, nopna hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen kamsangpa pen Topa’ hong sawl kamsangpa hi taktak hiam, cih kamsangpa’ gen bang hong tun ciangin a kithei pan ding ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tua ciangin kamsangpa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol hong lakkhiat sakin hong kuaihtansak hi. 
Jeremiah28:11 Hananiah in zong mi khempeuh a om laitakin thu gen a, “ Topa in, tu-a bangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ vangliatna kum nih sungin gam khempeuhte’ tung panin ka beisak ding hi, ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin kei ka paikhia hi." 
Jeremiah28:12 Kamsangpa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol lakhia a, hong kuaihtansak zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Pai inla Hananiah kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: Nangmah in sing tawh kibawl hakkol na kuaitanzo hi. Ahih hangin keimah in sik tawh kibawl hakkol khat tawh ka laih ding hi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: Hih gam khempeuhte’ ngawngah sik hakkol ka thuah khinzo a, amaute in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ na a sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamsate nangawn ama tungah ka pia khinzo hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:15 Tua ciangin kei zong kamsang Hananiah’ kiangah, “Na ngai in, Hananiah! Topa in nang hong sawl lohpi, hih mite zuauthu na umsak hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Tua ahih manin Topa in a hong genin-ah: ‘En in, hih leitung panin nangmah hong lakhia ding hi. Topa langpanna thu gen na hih manin tu kum sung mahin na si ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tua kum mah a kha sagih kha-in kamsangpa Hananiah a si ta hi. 
Jeremiah29:1 Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in Babylon khua-ah salin a paikhiatpih uliante, siampite, kamsangte, le mi khempeuhte’ tungah lai khat ka khak hi." 
Jeremiah29:2 Tua hunin kumpi Jehoiakhin le a nu, a kumpi innsungmangte, Judah gam le Jerusalem khua-a makai upate, khutsiamte le sikseekte, Jerusalem khua panin kipai khiatpih khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah29:3 Tua laikhak pen Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babylon khua Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa kiangah kumpi taangmi dingin a puak Shafan’ tapa Elasah le Hilkiah’ tapa Gemariah-te ka puasak hi. Tua sungah: 
Jeremiah29:4 “Jerusalem panin Babylon-ah a hong kipuakkhia saltang mi khempeuhte’ tungah Vanglian Topa, Pasian in hih bangin hong ci hi:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Inn lam unla, a sungah teng un. Huan bawl unla, a sungah na cinte uh ne un." 
Jeremiah29:6 Zi pi unla tanu tapa nei un. Na tapate a’ ding mo la unla, na tanute uh mo kha un; tua hileh amau in zong tanu tapa hong nei ding uh hi. Kiam kei unla, pungzaw un." 
Jeremiah29:7 Note salin kong koihna khuapi’ phattuamna ding bawl unla, tua khuapi a dingin Topa’ tungah thu ngetsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua khuapi in phattuamna ngah leh no zong phattuamna a ngah mah na hi uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah: Note’ lakah a om na kamsangte uh le na aisan theite uh’ khemsa-in ta kei unla, a mangmat hong gente uh na ngai kei un." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min tawh no tungah hong gen uh thute zuauthu hi a, ka sawl lohpi ahi uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:10 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Babylon khua-ah kum sawmsagih na om khit uh ciangin, note kong kan kik ding a, kong kamciamnasa hong tangtung sakin hih munah kong lakik ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, mai lamah lametna note kong piakkik ding, na siatna ding uh hi loin na phattuamna ding uh geelna ka neihte kei bek in ka thei hi." 
Jeremiah29:12 Tua hun ciangin note in kei hong samin, hong pai-in thu nong ngen ding uh a, ke’n zong kong dawng ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:13 Note in kei nong zong ding uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh nong zon uh ciangin nong mu ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:14 Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in nong mu ding uh a, na saltanna uh hong beisakin, kong hawlkhiatna gam khempeuh le mun khempeuh panin kong kaikhawm kik ding a, note kong lakkhiatna gam mahah kong tunpih kik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Note in, ‘Eite a dingin Topa in Babylon khua-ah kamsang hong koihsak hi,’ ci-in gen na hih manun" 
Jeremiah29:16 David kumpi tokhom tunga tu kumpipa le hih khuapi sunga om, note tawh saltang dingin a paikhawm lo na behte khempeuh uh tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin-ah:" 
Jeremiah29:17 En un, amaute tungah namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi le pulnatna ka tungsak ding a, amaute, a kine thei lo theigah muat ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:18 Amaute, namsau, kialpi, le pulnatna tawh ka nungdelh ding a, ka hawlkhiatna ding mun khempeuhah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna le zahkonate ka thuaksak ding a, amaute’ thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka nasem ka kamsangte’ tungtawnin kong puak ngitnget thute amaute in thupisim loin a hong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:20 Jerusalem khua panin Babylon khua-ah kong puakkhiat, no saltangte khempeuh aw, Topa’ kammal ngai dih un:" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in, kei’ min tawh note kiangah zuauthu a hong hilh Kolaiah’ tapa Ahab le Maaseiah’ tapa Zedekiah-te tawh kisai-in kong genin-ah: En un, keimah in amaute Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, amah in note’ muhin amaute a thatlum ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:22 Amaute’ hangin Judah gam panin Babylon khua-ah saltang mi khempeuh in, ‘Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah le Ahab, a hingtangin mei sungah a hal bangin Topa in nang hong hal ta hen,’ ci-in kihamsiatna-in a zang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Israel gamah hai gamtat uh hi: A innvengte’ zite mawhpih uh a, thu ka piak lohpi ka min tawh zuauthu a gen uh hi. Keimah Topa in ka mu a, teci ka hi hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gelh hi." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelam khuami Shemaiah kiangah thugen dingin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. Shemaiah in ama min tawh Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuhte’ kiang le siampi Maaseiah’ tapa Zefaniah le siampi khempeuhte kiangah lai na khak hi. Tua a lai sungah Shemaiah in Zefaniah’ kiangah," 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “ Topa in siampi Jehoiada tangin nangmah siampi-in hong koih khinzo a, Topa’ biakinnpi sungah a ukpi ding na hi ta hi. Tua ahih manin thu a hilh mawkmawk mihaite thong kia sakin kol na bulh ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Bang hangin note kiangah thu a hong hilh Anathoth khuami Jeremiah tai lo na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah29:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Babylon khua-ate lai hong khakin, sawt veipi sal tang ding na hih manun, inn lamin a sungah teng unla, huan bawlin a sunga na cinte uh ne un, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gelh hi. Hih bangin Zefaniah’ kiangah a laikhakna thu tawh kisai Shemaiah kiangah a gen dingin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah29:29 Siampipa Zefaniah in hih laikhak kei kiangah hong simkhia hi. 
Jeremiah29:30 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Saltang mi khempeuhte’ kiangah Nehelam khuami Shemaiah tawh kisai-in Topa’ thugenna hih bangin zasak in: Kong sawl lohpi Shemaiah in note kiangah thu hong gen a, zuauthu hong umsak ahih manin," 
Jeremiah29:32 Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, keimah in Nehelam khuami Shemaiah le a suan a khakte gim ka pia ding hi. Amah in keimah hong langpanna ding thu gen ahih manin ka mite a dingin a hoih ka bawl ding nate, amah le a suan a khakte khat beek in a mu kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:1 Topa in hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah30:2 “ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah: Kong gensa thute khempeuh laibu khat sungah khum in." 
Jeremiah30:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka mi Israel le Judah-te a saltanna uh ka beisakkik ni a hong tung ding hi. A pu a pate uh tungah ka piaksa gamah ka tunpihkik ding a, amaute in tua gam a tangkik ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:4 Israel le Judah mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin a gen hi: 
Jeremiah30:5 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Launa le patauhna aw ka za a, lungnopna aw ka za kei hi." 
Jeremiah30:6 Tu-in ngaihsun dih un. Pasalte nau a suak ngei uh hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin pasal khempeuh in numei nausuak dingte bangin a tai uh hum ahi uh hiam? Bang hangin a mai uhah si teng lo ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah30:7 Nu e! Tua ni lianpi hong tung ding a, nidang tawh tehtheih ding hi lo hi. Jakob suante’ gimhun hi ding a, ahih hangin amaute suakta veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:8 “Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni ciangin amau’ ngawng panin a hakkolte uh ka kuaihtansak ding a, a khaute ka sutat ding hi. Amaute, gamdang mite’ salin a om nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:9 Topa, amau’ Pasian’ na ahi a, amaute’ kumpipa-in ka koih ding David’ na ahi zongin a semzaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Ka nasempa Jakob’ suante aw, lau kei un. Israel mite aw, patau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi gam panin no kong honkhia ding a, na suan na khakte uh a saltanna uh panin ka honkhia ding hi. Jakob’ suante hong ciah ding uh a, nuamtakin a tengkik ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, a hong honkhia dingin note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia ding a, ahih hangin note kong susia kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh ding a, gim pia loin kong mawk nusiat kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah: Na liamma uh dam thei lo a, na meima uh nasia mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah30:13 Note a hong don ding kuamah om lo a, na liamma uh a’ ding zatui om lo a, note’ lungdamna ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Jeremiah30:14 Na lawm ngaihte un hong mangngilh khin uh a, hong don nawn lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin, galte bangin note kong bawl a, nasia takin gim kong thuaksak hi." 
Jeremiah30:15 Bang hangin na sa-in kapkap na hi uh hiam? Na natna uh a dam thei ding hi lo hi. Na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin hih bangin note ka hong thuaksak hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Tua ahih manin no hong thatte kithat ding a, na galte khempeuh uh salin kiman kik ding hi. No hong buluhte kibuluh ding a, no a hong mante, matin omzaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, na galte un note, pampaih mi pawl, hong ci-in, ‘Kuama don loh Zion na hi hi,’ hong cih uh hangin note kong cidamsakkik ding a, na liammate uh ka damsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:18 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, keimah in Jakob suante’ bukte ka lamkik ding a, a tenna uh ka hehpih ding hi. Khuapi zong a omnasa mualtung mahah kilamkik ding a, kumpipa’ inn zong a omnasa mahah omkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:19 Tuate sung panin lungdamna la kisa ding a, gualnopna aw kiza ding hi. Amaute ka pungsak ding a, tawmkha bek hi lo ding uh hi. Amaute ka kipahtawisak ding a, ka neusak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:20 A tate uh nidang bangmahin a omkik ding uh a, a mite uh zong kiptakin ka mai-ah ka phut ding a, amau a bawlsiate gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:21 A kumpi ding uh amaute khat mah hi ding a, amaute a uk ding amau’ sung mah panin a piang ding hi. Keimah in amah ka kai ding a, kei kiangah amah hong pai ding hi. Tua hikeileh ama thu-in kei a hong zuan ngam ding kua om ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:22 Tua ciangin note, ka mite na hi ding uh a, kei pen note’ Pasian ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:23 En un, Topa’ huihpi nung! A hehna hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilo pa’ lutang hong kidenna ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:24 A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtunsak matengin, Topa’ hehna a lauhuaipi kilehkik lo ding hi. Hong pai ding hunte-ah note in na telzaw semsem ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:1 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hun ciangin kei pen Israel mi khempeuhte’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:2 Topa in hong genin-ah: “Namsau tawh thahna a thuak lote in gamlakah hehpihna a mu ding uh hi. Israel mite in tawldamna ding a zon laitakun," 
Jeremiah31:3 gamlapi pek panin Topa ka kilang hi. Keimah in nang kong it tawntung a, tua ahih manin nang’ tungah kong thuman tawntung hi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Aw, nungak siangtho Israel aw, nang kong bawlpha kik ding hi. Na khuangte na man kik ding a, a gualnuamte’ lamna-ah na va kihel ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:5 Samaria gam mualtung tengah leenggah na suankik ding a, huan bawlte in suanin a gah ne-in nuam a sa ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Efraim mualtung panin galvilte in, ‘Tho un! Topa i Pasian kiang Zion khua-ah va pai ni,’ ci-in a hong kiko hun uh hong tung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Jakob a dingin lungdamna tawh ngaih takin la sa unla, gam khempeuh lakah gam lian pen a dingin kiko-in awng un. ‘ Topa in Israel mi a omlaite, ama mite hong honkhia khinzo hi,’ ci-in taangko unla phat un." 
Jeremiah31:8 En un, keimah in leilu lam gam panin amaute ka la ding a, leitung a gamla pen mun panin ka kaikhawm ding hi. Mittawte le khebaite zong hong kihel ding uh a, nupi gaite le nausuak ding numeite a kipan hih lai munah mihonpi hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Amaute a kap kawmin hong pai ding uh a, keimah in hehnemin amaute ka pi kik ding hi. Tui omna lui gei-ah amaute ka paipihkik ding a, lam nuamah paipihin a tuk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite’ pa ka hi a, Efraim, ka ta upa pen ahi hi." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Aw, gamdangte aw, Topa’ kammal ngai unla, gamlapi, tuipi gei-a omte kiangah va gensawn un. ‘Israel mite a kithehthang sakpa in kaikhawm kik ding a, tuucingpa in a tuute a kep bangin a kem ding hi,’ va ci un." 
Jeremiah31:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jakob ka suaktasak khinzo a, a zawhzawh loh khutte’ sung pan ka honkhiazo hi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Amaute hong pai-in Zion mual tungah ngaihtakin la sa ding uh a, Topa’ hehpihna ahi, buh, leenggahzu, sathau le tuuno, bawngnote’ hangin amaute a lungdam mahmah ding uh hi. A nuntakna uh, tui a kibuak huan bang ding a, lungkham nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tua ciangin nungakte lamin lungdam ding uh a, tangvalte le papite zong nuam ding uh hi. Amau’ kahnate lungdamna ka suaksak ding a, amaute hehpihin a dahnate uh kipahna ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:14 An lim pen tawh siampite ka vak ding a, keima hoihna hangin ka mite a lungkim ding uh hi, Topa in ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:15 Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Ramah khua-ah aw khat kiza a, tauna le kah ngutngutna awging ahi hi. Rachel, a tate a dingin a kap hi. A tate om nawn lo ahih manin kinem zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Topa in kong cihin-ah: “Kap nawn kei unla, na khitui uh nul un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, na nasep thaman uh na ngah uh hi. Amaute galte’ gam panin hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Na mailam uh a dingin lametna a om hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Na tate uh zong na gam mah uhah hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:18 Efraim’ kahna aw ka zazo a, ‘ Topa aw, bawngtal sin loh bangin kei nong thuhilh khinzo hi. Kong ciahkik theih nadingin hong lakik in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Topa ka Pasian na hi hi." 
Jeremiah31:19 Nangma kiang panin ka paikhiat khit phetin ka kisikkik a, nong thuhilh khit ciangin dahin ka kun hi. Ka neu laitak a ka minsiatna teng pua niloh ka hih manin maizumin ka lung-am hi,’ a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:20 “Efraim, ka it ka tapa hi lo ahi hiam? Amah keima ngaihno hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu ka gen simin amah ka phawk lailai hi. Tua ahih manin amah ka ngaihsun tawntung a, ka hehpih taktak ding hi, Topa in ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lampi-ah ciamtehnate bawl unla, lamlahnate phut un. Na paikhiatna uh lampi mah limtakin zongkik un. Nungak siangtho tawh a kibang Israel mite aw, hong kilehkik unla, na khuapite uh hong zuankik un." 
Jeremiah31:22 Bang tanvei lungka ding na hi hiam, a zulhzau ka tanu aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitungah na thak khat bawl a, numei in pasal a honzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:23 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: “Keimah in amaute a gam uhah ka omsakkik ciangin, Judah gam le a khuapite uhah amaute in, ‘Thuman thutak a tenna mual siangtho aw, Topa in thupha hong pia ta hen,’ ci-in a genkik leuleu ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Judah gam le a khuapite sungah lokhote le tuucing a a vak kawikawi mite a tengkhawm ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah31:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh a gim mite ka tawldamsak ding a, gilkialin a thazawm mite khempeuh an ka vak kham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:26 Tua khit ciangin ka khanglo a, ka khuadak hi. Ka khanlawh nuam ka sa mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah31:27 Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Israel gam le Judah gam, mihing le ganhing tawh ka dimsak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:28 Amaute a kibetkhiatna ding le a kitapzanna ding ahi zongin, a kisuankhiatna ding le a kisiatna ding ahi zongin ka vaihawm mah bangin, Topa in ka cihin-ah, amaute a kilamna ding le a kiphuh nadingin ka vaihawm ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Tua ni ciangin amaute in: “‘Pate in leenggah thuk ne uh a, a tate uh’ ha a kim hi,’ a kici paunak a zang nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:30 Mi khempeuh amau’ mawhna ciat uh hang bekin a si ding uh hi. Leenggah thuk a nete’ ha bek a kim ding hi. 
Jeremiah31:31 “En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel minamte le Judah minamte tawh thuciamna thak khat ka bawl ni hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:32 Tua pen, a pu a pate uh, Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiat nadingin a khut uh tawh ka kaihkhiat huna ka bawl uh thuciamna tawh kibang lo ding hi. Tua hun lai-in kei amaute’ pasal hinapi-in ka thuciamna a hong palsat uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hun hong tun ciangin Israel minamte tawh hih bangin thuciamna ka bawl ding hi: Amaute’ sungah ka thukham ka koih ding a, amaute’ lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi. Kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kuamah in midangte le a sanggamte uh kiangah, ‘ Topa thei in,’ ci-in a kihilh nawn kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, amaute in a neupen panin a lianpen dongin, a vekpi-un kei a hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ khialhnate ka maisak ding a, amaute’ mawhnate zong phawkin ka nei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Topa in sun-a khuavak dingin ni hong pia a, zan a khuavak dingin a kikheel ngei lo kha le aksite hong pia hi. Tuipi a lawh ciangin tuihualte ging zuazua a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa kici hi." 
Jeremiah31:36 Amah in, “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih a kip mahmah leitung le vantung ngeinate a kikheel hun ciang bekin, Israel mite’ suanlekhakte in gam nei loin a om pan bek ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Topa in hong genin-ah, “Vantung a kiteh theih ciang le leinuai-a leitung bulpite a kivel theih ciang bekin Israel-te’ suanlekhakte khempeuh a mawhna uh hangin ka lawnkhiamang pan ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:38 Topa in kong cihin-ah, “Hananel Tausangpi panin khuakulh Kiu Kongpi dongin khuapi a kibawlphat hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Tua lai panin khuapi huang dingin nitumna lamah Gareb mual dong kiteh suak ding a, Goah lamah a kihei ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:40 Misi luanghawmte le vutte a kibuakna kuam buppi le Kidron lui phak ma-a loteng khempeuh tawh, tua panin nisuahna lama Sakol Kongpi kiu ciang dong, Topa a dingin mun siangtho a suak ding hi. Cikmah ciangin tua khuapi kisusia nawn lo ding a, a kisuankhia ngei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum giat a phak kumin, Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm pha ta a, tua kumin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi." 
Jeremiah32:2 Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipa’ galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak hi a, kamsangpa Jeremiah zong Judah kumpipa’ inn huang sunga thong sungah a kikhumcip laitak ahi hi." 
Jeremiah32:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangmah in thu genkhol a, ‘ Topa in a cihin-ah: En un, hih khuapi, Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, amah in a la ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah zong Khaldea mite’ khutsung pan a suakta kei ding a, Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah a kipia taktak ding hi. Amah tawh maitang kimu-in a ki-en ding uh a, a kiho ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:5 Amah in Babylon khua-ah Zedekiah la ding a, ama tungah na ka sep mateng tua lai-ah om ding hi. Khaldea mite na do uh hangin na zo kei ding uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi,’ ci-in bang hangin thu hilh na hi hiam?” ci-in thong sungah a khum hi." 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiah in zong, “ Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah32:7 En in, na pano Shullam’ tapa Hananel nang kiangah hong pai ding a, ‘Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lei thei ding lak panin ka kinaipih pen nangmah na om hi,’ ci-in hong gen ding hi, hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tua ciangin Topa’ hong cihna bangmahin thong sungah ka innlak sanggampa hong pai takpi-in hong hopih a, ‘Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, i ngeina bangin a nei ding le a tankhia ding nangmah na hi hi. Nang a dingin lei in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Topa’ hong hopihna taktak hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Jeremiah32:9 “Keimah in zong ka innlak sanggampa Hananel’ kiang panin Anathoth khua-a lo ka lei a, ama a dingin ngun shekel sawm le sagih ka tehkhia hi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Thukimna lai bawlin, min gelhin, gip khenin, a hong theihpih ding mite zong ka sap khit ciangin tawi khaina-ah sum ka teh hi." 
Jeremiah32:11 Tua ciangin ka kithukimna teng uh a ki-atna, gip a kikhen lai pen le gip a kikhen lo lai pen ka la a," 
Jeremiah32:12 Neriah’ tapa ahi, Mahseiah’ tupa Baruk kiangah ka pia hi. Tua laite, ka innlak sanggampa Hananel tawh, tua kileina laite tunga a min uh a gelh a hong theihpih mite tawh thong huang sunga a tu Judah mite tawh a omkim laitakun ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Amaute’ om laitakin Baruk kiangah," 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a hong genin-ah: Hih gip a kikhen lai le a kikhen lo lai tegel la inla, sia loin sawtveipi a kikep theih nadingin leibeel khat sungah koih in." 
Jeremiah32:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a hong genin-ah: Hih gamah innte, lote le leenggah lote mite in a leikikta ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah32:16 “Neriah’ tapa Baruk kiangah kileina lai ka piak khit ciangin Topa’ kiangah thu ka ngen a," 
Jeremiah32:17 ‘Topa Pasian! Nangma vangpi le na khut tawh vantung le leitung na bawl khinzo hi. Nang a dingin a haksalua khat beek om lo hi. 
Jeremiah32:18 Nangmah in a kikheel ngei lo itna mi tul tampite’ tungah na lak a, ahih hangin pate’ mawhnate tate’ tungah na thuk hi. Vanglian Topa a kici a lian mahmah, a hat mahmah Pasian aw," 
Jeremiah32:19 na ngimnate lian mahmah a, na sepnate thupi mahmah hi. Mite’ nuntak zia khempeuh na mu a, amau’ nuntak dan le a sepna tawh kizui-in mi khempeuh tungah thaman na pia kim hi." 
Jeremiah32:20 Egypt gamah lim le na lamdangte na lak a, tu-in zong Israel gam le minam dangte khempeuh tungah lakin, tu-in mun khempeuhah na min thang mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Na mi Israel-te Egypt gam panin lim le nalamdang tawh ahi a, a khauh mahmah a kizan na khut tawh ahi a, lauhuaina lianpi tawh ahi zongin na lakhia a," 
Jeremiah32:22 a pute a pate uh tungah piak dingin na ciamsa, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna hih gam na pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Amau zong lutin a luahpah uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in na thu hong mang loin, thukham hong zui lo uh a, hih dinga na thupiakte khat beek a hih kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute tungah hih siatna khempeuh na tungsak hi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “‘En in, khuapi lak nadingin kan a to khinzo uh hi. Namsau tawh kithahna hang, kialpi hang, le pulnatna hangin amaute a sim Khaldea mite’ khut sungah khuapi a kipia ding hi. Nong gensa bangin hong tun loh phamawh ahih manin en in, nang’ na mu ta hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, hih khuapi Khaldea mite’ khutsung a tung ding hinapi, nangmah in, “A hong theihpih ding mi sam inla, tua lo lei in,” ci-in nong sawl teitei hi,’ ci-in thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:26 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah32:27 “En in, kei pen Topa ka hi a, mi khempeuhte’ Pasian zong ka hi hi. Kei a dingin a haksa lua bang om ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Tua ahih manin, Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, hih khuapi Khaldea mite’ khutsung le Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, amah in a la ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:29 Hih khuapi a sim Khaldea mite hong pai-in mei tawh khuapi a hal ding uh a, ka heh nadingin innkhum tungah Baal milimte paknamtui halna tawh a biakna innte uh le pasian dangte’ kiangah tuidawn biakna a piakna uh innte zong a haltum ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite le Judah mite in a neulai pek uh a kipan ka muhna-ah a sia bekbek a gamta uh hi. Keimah Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel mite in a khut uh tawh milim a bawlna uh hangin kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:31 Hih khuapi in, a kisat cil a kipan tuni ciang dong hong hehsakin hong thangpaisak ahih manin ka muhna panin ka hemkhia ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite le Judah mite, a kumpite uh le a kumpi uliante uh, a siampite uh le a kamsangte uh a kipan Judah mite le Jerusalem khuamite khempeuh in kei hong hehsak nadingin siatna a bawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:33 Amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingat lo uh a, ka hilh tawntung hangin ka hilhna a hong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:34 Amaute in ka min tawh a kilo biakinnsung nangawnah a kihhuai milimte a koih uh a, a ninsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:35 Hinnom Kuam-ah a tapate le a tanute uh tawh Molek pasian a biak nadingun Baal a’ ding biakna tau sangte a bawl uh hi. Hih a kihhuai na semin, Judah mite mawhna a bawlsak nadingun amaute ka sawl kei a, zong ka ngaihsunkha ngei beek kei hi." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Jeremiah aw, nangmah in hih khuapi, namsau tawh thahna, kialpi tunna le pulnatna tawh Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah kipia ding hi, na ci hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang na cihna hih khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah:" 
Jeremiah32:37 En in, ka hehna, ka thangpaihna le ka lungkim lohna lianpi tawh ka hawlkhiatna gam khempeuh panin amaute ka kaikhawm kik ding a, hih munah tunpih kikin, lungmuang takin ka omsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:38 Amaute keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:39 Amaute’ hoihna ding le amaute’ nunga a tu a tate uh a hoih nadingin a tawntungin kei hong zahtak nadingun a lungsim uh kikhat sakin, a nuntak dan uh zong ka kikhatsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Amaute tungah a tawntungin hoihna ka bawl den nadingin amaute tawh tawntung thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Kei kiang panin a kiheikhiat loh nadingun amaute sungah kei hong zahtakna ding uh lungsim ka guan ding hi. 
Jeremiah32:41 Amaute tungah hoihna ka bawl manin ka lungdam ding a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh thuman takin hih gamah amaute ka phut ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih siatna khempeuh hih mite tungah ka tunsak mah bangin, amaute’ tunga ka khapsa a hoih khempeuh zong ka tungsak pelmawh ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:43 Nangmah in, hih gam pen mihing le ganhing a ten lohna gam simtham hi ding a, Khaldea mite’ khut sungah kipia ding hi, ci-in na gen hangin tu-in hih gamah lo kileikik ta ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot le Judah gam khuapite a kipan mualtung a khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite le leitaw lam Negeb gam a khuapite-ah sum tawh lo kilei ding a, a theihpih mite tawh thukimna min gelhin gip tawh kikhen ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in amaute a gam mah uhah ka omsakkik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:1 Thong huang sungah Jeremiah a kikhumcip laitak mahin Topa in a nihveina hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Leitung bawlin a kipsak Topa, a min Topa a kici Topa in kong genin-ah:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Kei nong sap leh kong dawngkik ding a, na theih ngei nai loh a ki-imcip thu lianpite kong gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh galte’ kan tawhna le galkidona hangin a kisusiagawp ding hih khuapi sunga innte le Judah kumpite’ innte tawh kisai-in, Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Ka hehna le ka thangpaihna tawh ka thahlup ding misi luangte tawh a kidimsak dingin Khaldea mite in a hong sim ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuapi sunga a om mite’ gitlohna hangin hih khuapi panin ka mai ka seel hi. 
Jeremiah33:6 Ahih hangin tu-in, keimah in hih khuapi ka damsak ding a, cidamin ka omsak ding hi. A mite cidamsakin hauhna le lungmuanna a kicing ka lak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Judah mite le Israel mite ka hausakkik ding a, a nidanga a om ngei bangun ka omsakkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:8 Kei tungah hong bawl uh mawhna khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak ding a, kei tungah a hong mawhnate uh le a hong langpanna khempeuhte uh ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:9 Jerusalem khuapi pen kei a dingin lungdamna, minphatna, le minthanna ahi hi. A sunga om mite tungah hoihna le hauhna ka tunsakna thu a za minam dangte lau-in a ling ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:10 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, note in, ‘Hih munah mihing, ganhing om loin mundai suak hi,’ ci-in na gen uh mah bangin Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzingte awng a, mihing ganhing kuamah a teng kei hi." 
Jeremiah33:11 Ahih hangin lungdamna aw le kipahna awte, zinei thakte le mothakte’ awte kiza kik ding hi. Topa’ biakinn-ah mite hong pai-in lungdam kohna-in: ‘Vanglian Topa’ tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi,’ ci-in a lasakna awte uh a kiza kik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, a masa-a mah bangin hih gam ka hausakkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, mihing ganhing om loin mun awng ahi mun le a khuapi khempeuhte-ah tuucingte in tuu cingin a tentheihna ding mun hong om ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mualtung a khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite le leitaw lam Negeb gam a khuapite, Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot le Judah gam khuapite-ah, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tuucingte in a tuute uh a phazah a sim ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:14 “En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah: Israel mite le Judah mite tungah ka khapsa thu ka tangtunsak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:15 Tua hun ciangin David’ suan lak panin kumpi dingin a diktat mi khat ka khangsak ding a, amah in gam sungah thuman tawh thu hong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Tua ni ciangin Judah mite kihonkhia ding a, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teng ding uh hi. Amah a kisap nadingin a min ‘ Topa, Eite’ Diktanna,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:17 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah: Israel mite’ kumpi dingin David’ suan sung panin mi kitasam ngei lo ding hi. 
Jeremiah33:18 Levi minam lak panin zong meihal biaknate, an tawh biakna le biakpiaknate a pia tawntung dingin ka mai-ah a ding ding siampi kitasam ngei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:19 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:20 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah: Sun hun le zan hun a manmanin a hong tun loh theih nadingin sun tawh ka thuciamna le zan tawh ka thuciamna na siatsakzawh ciang bekin," 
Jeremiah33:21 keimah le ka nasempa David tawh ka thuciamna kisia pan ding a, amah in a kumpi tokhom luah ding tapa nei loin, ka na a sem ding siampi Levi minamte tawh ka thuciamna zong a kisia hi pan ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:22 Vana aksite kisim zo loin, tuipi a sehnelte a kiteh zawh loh bangin keimah in ka nasempa David’ suanlekhakte ahi a, siampi Levi minamte ahi zongin ka pungsak den ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:23 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Hih mite in, Topa in a teelsa Israel le Judah minam tegel a nusia ta hi, ci-in a gen uh thei kha lo na hi hiam? Tua bangin amaute in ka mite simmawh uh a, amau’ muhna-ah minam khatin a sim nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:25 Topa in kong genin-ah: Sun le zan tawh ka thuciamna ahi a, vantung le leitung ngeina kipte ahi zongin a kipsak khin nai lo hi leng" 
Jeremiah33:26 Jakob le ka nasempa David’ suante ka nial ding a, Abraham, Isaac, le Jakob’ suante a uk dingin amaute’ lakah mi khat zong a teello ding mah ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang hi loin amaute ka hausakkik ding a, ka hehpih ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a galkapte khempeuh, a ukna gam khempeuh le a mi khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua le a kiima khuapite a sim laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah34:2 “ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiangah pai inla, hih bangin va gen in: ‘ Topa in hong genin-ah: En in, keimah in Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah hih khuapi ka pia ding a, amah in mei tawh a hal ding hi."
