Jeremiah34:3 Ama khutsung panin na suakta kei ding a, hong kimanin ama khut sungah nang hong kipia taktak ding hi. Nang le Babylon kumpipa maitang kimu-in na kiho ding uh a, Babylon khua-ah na pai ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah aw, Topa’ kammal ngai lai dih in. Topa in nangmah tawh kisai-in a hong genin-ah, nang in namsau tawh thahna na thuak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:5 Nuamtakin na si ding a, nang’ ma-a kumpi a suak na pu na pate-a’ dingin paknamtui a kihal mah bangin nang a dingin zong paknamtui hong kihal ding a, “Aw, topa aw,” ci-in hong kah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong gen khinzo hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah34:6 Kei zong hih thuteng khempeuh Jerusalem khua-a Judah kumpi Zedekiah kiangah ka gen hi. 
Jeremiah34:7 Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipa’ galkapte in Jerusalem khuapi le Judah gam a khuapi muanhuai lakah a omlai Lakhish khua le Azekah khuate gel zong a sim laitak uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah34:8 Zedekiah kumpipa in numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin Hebru mipih silate khahkhia-in, kuamah in a Jew mipihte sila-in khawi thei lo ding hi, ci-in suahtakna ding thu zasak a, Jerusalem khua-a mi khempeuh tawh thuciamna a bawl hi." 
Jeremiah34:9  
Jeremiah34:10 Mi khempeuh in a silate uh numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin khahkhia-in sila-in khawikik thei nawn lo ding hi, ci-in thuciamna a nei kumpi uliante a kipan mi khempeuh in mang uh a, a khahkhia uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:11 Ahih hangin tua nung ciangin a lungsim uh khelkikin a khahkhiatsa uh numei le pasal silate lakik uh a, sila mahin a zang kik mawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah34:13 “ Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah, keimah in na pu na pate uh koltanna Egypt gam pan ka lakkhiat laitakin amau tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl a," 
Jeremiah34:14 note kiangah nasem dinga hong kizuak na Hebru mipihte uh in note a dingin kum guk, na hong sepsak khit a kum sagihna sungin na khahkhia ding uh a, na na uh na semsak nawn kei ding uh hi, ka ci hi. Ahih hangin na pu na pate un ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, hong mang lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:15 Zan diakin no na kisik kik uh a, na mipihte ciat uh suahtakna ding taangko-in, ka min tawh a kilo biakinnsung ka mai-ah thuciamna na bawl uh a, ka muhna-ah a kilawm na khat na sem khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:16 Ahih hangin na lungsim uh na kheelkik leuleu uh a, amau’ utna banga na khahkhiatsa uh sila numei le pasalte na lakik uh a, na na uh sem sakin ka min nong daisak uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:17 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: Mi khempeuh in na sanggam na mipihte uh khahkhia loin, suahtakna pia loin ka thu hong mang lo na hih uhleh, en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, note hong khahkhia-in suahtakna kong pia ta hi. Namsau tawh kithahna, pulnatna le kialpite tawh na sih nadingun note kong khahkhia a, kong suaktasak hi. Leitung gam khempeuhte’ hong lipkhap dingin kong bawl hi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Mite in kei’ mai-ah thuciamna a bawl uh ciangin bawngno phel nih suahin a kikalah a pai uh hi. Judah gam kumpi uliante, kumpi innsungmangte, siampite a kipan bawngno phel nih kikalah a pai khinsa gam sunga ka mite khempeuh in ka thuciamna hong mang loin, thuciamna sunga om thute a zuih kei uhleh amaute tua bawngno ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 A galte’ khut sungah amaute ka pia ding a, a thatnuam mite’ khut sungah ka pia ding hi. A luanghawmte uh vana vasate le leitung a gamsate’ an a suak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:21 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le a kumpi uliante, a galte uh’ khut sungah pia-in, amaute a that nuam mite le note’ kiang panin a kilehkik khinzo Babylon kumpipa’ galkapte’ khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:22 En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, keimah in thu ka pia ding a, hih khuapi-ah hong paikik ding uh hi. Amaute in hih khuapi hong simin, hong la-in mei tawh hong halsak ding uh hi. Judah gam khuapite kuama’ ten lohna mun awng ka suaksak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:1 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Rekhab behte kiangah pai inla, amau tawh na kiho khit ciangin Topa’ biakinn-ah hong pai inla, inndei khat sungah tumpihin, tua ciangin a dawn dingin leenggahzu pia in,” ci-in a hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tua ciangin Habazziniah’ tupa ahi Jeremiah dang khat’ tapa, Jaazaniah le a sanggamte, a tate khempeuh le Rekhab behte khempeuh ka sam hi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Amaute, Topa’ biakinnsung, kumpi uliante’ inndei gei, Shallum’ tapa, kongpi uk biakinn upa lian Maaseiah’ inndei tung sanah a om, Igdaliah’ tapa, Pasian’ mi ahi Hanan’ tate’ inndei sungah ka lutpih hi." 
Jeremiah35:5 Tua ciangin Rekhab behte’ mai-ah leenggahzu a dimin a kikoih hai le keute ka pia a, leenggahzu dawn un, ci-in ka sawl hi." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote in leenggahzu ka ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Rekhab’ tapa, ka pu uh Jonadab in thu hong pia a, ‘Note a kipan na ta na tute un leenggahzu na ne ngei peuhmah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:7 Inn na lam kei ding uh a, khai na tuh kei ding uh hi. Singno na suan kei ding uh a, leenggah lo na bawl kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na tenpakna uh gam sungah sawtveipi na tentheih nadingun na nuntak hun sungteng uh puanbuk sungah na teng ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:8 Kote in Rekhab’ tapa ka pu uh Jonadab’ hong thupiak khempeuh ka mang uh a, ka nuntak hun sungteng uh ko a kipan ka zite uh, ka tapate uh le ka tanute uh in leenggahzu dawn loin," 
Jeremiah35:9 tenna ding inn ka lam kei uh hi. Leenggah huan, lo le khaici bangmah ka nei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ka pu uh Jonadab’ hong sawl bangbangin ka mang uh a, puanbuk sungah ka teng den uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:11 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih gam hong sim ciangin kote in, ‘Hong pai un. Khaldea galkapte le Syria galkapte kihta ihih manin Jerusalem khua-ah pai ni,’ ka kici uh a, tua mah bangin tu-in Jerusalem khua-ah ka teng uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Pai inla Judah mite kiang le Jerusalem khua-a teng mite’ kiangah, Topa in: Ka thuhilhna hong sang loin ka thu hong ngai lo ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Rekhab’ tapa Jonadab in a suanlekhakte tungah leenggahzu a dawn loh nading uh a thupiakna amaute in zui uh a, tuni ciang dong bangmah a dawn kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a pu uh’ thupiakna a mang uh hi. Keimah in note kong hopih tawntung hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka nasem ahi kamsangte khempeuh note kiangah hong sawl tawntungin, ‘Tu-in note khempeuh na hoih lohna uh panin kihei unla, na gamtat hoih lote uh kipuahpha un. Pasian dangte nung delh loin a na na sep kei nak-uhleh note le na pu na pate uh kiangah ka piak gam sungah na teng ding uh hi,’ ci-in note tungah hong gen uh hi. Ahih hangin note in na bil uh nong ngat kei uh a, ka thu nong ngai kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekhab’ tapa Jonadab’ suante in a pu uh thupiakna a man’ uh hangin hih mite in ka thu hong mang lo uh hi. 
Jeremiah35:17 Tua ahih manin keimah Topa Vanglian Pasian in kong genin-ah: En un, Judah mite le Jerusalem khua-ah a teng mi khempeuh tungah a tung dingin ka gen khiatsa khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau tungah ka gen hangin amaute in ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, amaute ka sap hangin hong dawngkik lo uh hi, ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tua ciangin kei zong Rekhab behte kiangah, “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: Na pu uh Jonadab’ hong thupiakna mangin, a hong thuhilhna bangin zui-in, a hong sawl khempeuh sem khin na hih manun" 
Jeremiah35:19 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong cihin-ah: Rekhab’ tapa Jonadab’ suante’ lak panin ka mai-a ding ka nasem ding pasal khat beek a kitasam ngei kei ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah36:1 Josiah’ tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a ukzawh kum li a phakna kumin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Laizial khat la inla, tua sungah Josiah kumpi a suah kum, nang kong hopih masak hun a kipan tuni ciang dong Israel gam le gamdang khempeuhte’ langkhatah ka thugente khempeuh gelh in." 
Jeremiah36:3 Judah mite in amau’ tungah tunsak dingin ka ngaihsut siatna khempeuh za-in, mi khempeuh in a siatna uh panin kiheina-in nei khathei ding uh a, keimah in zong amau’ khialhna le amau’ mawhnate ka maisak thei kha ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tua ciangin kei zong Neriah’ tapa Baruk ka sam a, Topa in keima tungah a hong gen khitsa thu khempeuh sitin Baruk in laizial khat tungah a gelh hi." 
Jeremiah36:5 Tua ciangin Baruk ka sawl a, “ Topa’ biakinn-ah a pai dingin kei hong kiphal nawn lo ahih manin" 
Jeremiah36:6 nang va pai inla, an tan’ ni ciangin Topa’ biakinn sungah a om mi khempeuhte’ zak dingin ka hong sit hih laizial sungah na at Topa’ kammalte na va sim ding hi. Amau’ khuapite pana hong paikhia Judah mi khempeuhte’ zakin zong na sim ding hi." 
Jeremiah36:7 Topa’ tungah amaute thumin a vekpi-un a hoih lohna uh panin a kihei thei kha ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite’ tungah Topa in tunsak dingin a gensa a hehna le a thangpaihna lian mahmah hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah36:8 Topa’ biakinn sungah laizial sunga Topa’ kammal simkhiat dingin ka sawl bangbangin Neriah’ tapa Baruk in zong a hih hi. 
Jeremiah36:9 Josiah’ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakim in a ukzawh kum nga a phak kum, a kha kuana kha-in Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuh le Judah gam khuapite panin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai mi khempeuh in Topa’ maipha ngah nadingin an a tang uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:10 Tua ciangin Topa’ biakinnsung, a Kongpi Thak tumna gei, a dei tungnunga Shafan’ tapa thuvanpi pa Gemariah’ inndei sungah mi khempeuh’ zakin Baruk in laizial sunga ka gelhsak kammalte a simkhia hi." 
Jeremiah36:11 Gemariah’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa ahi Mikaiah in laizial sunga thu teng khempeuh a zak ciangin" 
Jeremiah36:12 kumpipa’ innsung, thuvanpi pa’ inndei sungah paisuk a, tua lai munah thuvanpi pa Elishama, Shemaiah’ tapa Delaiah, Akbor’ tapa Elnathan, Shafan’ tapa Gemariah, le Hananiah’ tapa Zedekiah-te a kipan kumpi ulian khempeuh tu-in na om uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:13 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, mi khempeuh’ zakin Baruk in a sim a zaksa thu teng khempeuh a gen hi." 
Jeremiah36:14 Tua ciangin kumpi ulian khempeuh in, Kushi’ tusawn ahi, Shelemiah’ tupa, Nethaniah’ tapa Jehudi, Baruk kiangah sawl uh a, “Mite kiangah na sim na laizial hong la inla hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi. Tua ciangin Neriah’ tapa Baruk in zong tua laizial la-in amaute kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Jeremiah36:15 Amaute in, “Tu inla hong sim dih in,” ci-in a gen uh hi. Baruk in zong amaute kiangah a sim hi." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tua thute khempeuh a zak khit uh ciangin lau-in khatlekhat ki-en gapgap uh a, Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah i koh kul ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:17 Tua ciangin Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh bangci at na hi hiam? Jeremiah in hong sit ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruk in zong, “Amah in hih thu khempeuh hong sit a, ke’n zong laizial sungah laitui tawh ka at hi,” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tua ciangin kumpi uliante in Baruk kiangah, “Pai inla, nang le Jeremiah va bu un. Na omna mun uh kuamah theisak kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tua ciangin amaute in thuvanpi pa Elishama’ inndei sungah tua laizial koih uh a, kumpipa’ omna inndei sungah a lut khit uh ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua thu khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Kumpipa in zong tua laizial a la dingin Jehudi sawl a, amah in thuvanpi pa Elishama’ inndei sung pan a va lakhia hi. Kumpipa le kumpipa kiangah a ding ulian khempeuhte’ zakin Jehudi in a sim hi." 
Jeremiah36:22 Kha kua kha pen phalbi laitak ahih manin kumpipa zong a phalbi inn sungah tu-in, meikhuka meikuang a awi hi." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi in khawk thum khawk li bang a sim khit ciangin kumpipa in temta neu khat tawh atkhia a, meikhuk sungah a khul hi. Tua bangin laizial buppi a kattum dong meikhuk sungah a paipai hi." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ahih hangin kumpipa ahi a, hih thute a za khin a nasemte khat beek ahi zongin lau tuan loin, kisik kik lo uh ahih manin a puan uh a balkek kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:25 Elnathan, Delaiah, le Gemariah in kumpipa in laizial a hal loh nading a khoh uh hangin amah in a mang kei hi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Tua ciangin kumpipa in kumpipa’ tapa Jerahmeel pen Azriel’ tapa Seraiah le Abdeel’ tapa Shelemiah tawh, ka lai-at Baruk le keimah a man dingin thu a pia hi. Ahih hangin Topa in ko tegel a hong seelsim hi." 
Jeremiah36:27 Keima sit bangin Baruk in a at laizial kumpipa in a haltum khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Laizial dang khat la inla tua tungah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a haltum a masa laizial sunga thu omteng khempeuh atkik in." 
Jeremiah36:29 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim’ thu tawh kisai-in hih bangin ama kiangah va gen in: ‘ Topa in hong genin-ah: Nangmah in, “Jeremiah aw, bang hangin Babylon kumpipa hong pai taktakin hih gam hong susia ding a, mihing le ganhing a tengsak nawn kei ding hi, ci-in hih lai sungah at na hi hiam?” ci-in na gen a, tua laizial na haltum hi." 
Jeremiah36:30 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim’ thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin-ah, amah in David tokhom tunga tu ding suanlekhak a nei kei ding a, ama luanghawm pen sun laitakin nisa’ kap ding le zan laitakin vukngo’ tuam dingin kipaidak ding hi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Amah le a suanlekhakte le a nasemte a mawhna uh hangin gim ka pia ding a, ama tung le Jerusalem khua-a tengte tung a kipan Judah mite’ tungah amau’ tungah tunsak dingin ka gensa gimna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thu hong ngai lo uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” ci-in kei a hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah36:32 Tua ciangin kei zong laizial dang khat la leuleu-in Neriah’ tapa lai-at Baruk ka pia hi. Amah in zong Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in meikhuk sungah a khul tumsa laizial sunga thu ki-at khempeuh, keima sit bangbangin a at hi. A thu kibang tampi zong ka gelhbehsak hi." 
Jeremiah37:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jehoiakim’ tapa Jehoiakhin’ tangin Judah gam a uk dingin Josiah’ tapa Zedekiah a koih hi. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ahih hangin amahmah a kipan a nasemte le a gam sung mite in keima tung tawna Topa’ thugennate a ngai kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah37:3 Kumpi Zedekiah in Shelemiah’ tapa Jehukal le Maaseiah’ tapa siampipa Zefaniah keima kiangah hong sawl a, “ Topa i Pasian’ kiangah kote a dingin thu hong ngetsak in,” ci-in a hong gensak hi." 
Jeremiah37:4 Hih hunin thong kia nai lo ka hih manin mi lakah ka ut utin ka vak kawikawi hi. 
Jeremiah37:5 Tua hun laitak pen Babylon galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak uh hi a, tua hun laitak mahin Faro kumpipa’ galkapte, galsim dingin Egypt gam panin hong kuankhia hi, cih thu a zak uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a nungkik uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:6 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah37:7 “ Topa ahi Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Kei’ tungah thu a hong dongsak Judah kumpipa kiangah hih bangin na va gen ding hi: ‘En in, nang hong huh dingin a hong pai Faro kumpipa’ galkapte a gam uhah ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:8 Tua ciangin Babylon-te hong kileh kikin hih khuapi hong sim ding uh a, khuapi la-in mei tawh a hal ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:9 Topa in kong cihin-ah, nang le nang kikhemin, “Babylon-te hong kilehkik nawn lo taktak ding uh hi,” cikha kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute hong kilehkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangmah in na gal Babylon galkap khempeuh zolua kisa-in buk sunga mi liam teng bek na suaktasak khaphial ahi zongin, amaute hong thokik teitei ding uh a, hih khuapi hong halsak veve ding uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:11 Faro’ galkapte Jerusalem khua a hong naih ciangun Babylon galkapte a nungkik uh hi. 
Jeremiah37:12 Tua laitakin kei zong Jerusalem khua panin ka behte kiangah ka gamhluah teng a la dingin Benjamin gamah a pai dingin ka ding khia hi. 
Jeremiah37:13 Benjamin Kongpi ka tun ciangin Shelemiah’ tapa, Hananiah’ tupa Irijah a kici kongcing pa in kei kiangah, “Nang Babylon mite’ lamah a taisim ding na hi hi,” ci-in a hong man hi." 
Jeremiah37:14 Tua ciangin kei zong, “Hilo hi’ng; Babylon mite’ lamah ka taisim kei ding hi,” ka ci hi. Ahih hangin Irijah in ka thugen hong ngai loin kei hong man a, kumpi uliante kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Kumpi uliante zong kei tungah heh mahmah uh a, hong sat khit uh ciangin thong dingin a kizangsa, kumpi thuvanpi pa Jonathan’ inn-ah thong hong kiasak uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:16 Leisung thongmial-ah ni tampi ka om khit ciangin 
Jeremiah37:17 kumpi Zedekiah in kei hong samsak hi. Kumpipa in a inn sungah, “ Topa’ hong thugen kam khat beek om lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a hong dongsim hi. Kei zong, “Om mah hi,” ka cih khit ciangin, “Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah nang hong kipia taktak ding hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah37:18 Tua ciangin kei zong kumpi Zedekiah’ kiangah, “Kei thong nong kiatsak nadingin nang’ tungah ahi a, na nasemte tung le hih mite’ tungah ahi zongin bang khialhna hong bawl ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Nang’ kiangah, ‘Babylon kumpipa in nang le hih gam hong sim lo ding hi,’ ci-in thu a hong genkhol, na kamsangte tu-in koi-ah om ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Tu-in ka to kumpipa aw, ka thugen nong ngaih nadingin kong thum hi. Kumpi thuvanpi pa Jonathan’ inn-ah nong puak kik nawn loh nadingin na mai nuai-ah kiniamkhiatna tawh kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong puakkik leh tua lai-ah ka si taktak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tua ahih manin kumpipa Zedekiah in kumpi thonginn sungah ka kiat zawkna ding thu pia a, khuasunga anlum a bei matengin anlum sai panin nisimin anlum khat ta hong piasak den hi. Tua ahih manin kumpipa’ thong sungah a om ka suak hi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Mattan’ tapa Shefatiah, Pashhur’ tapa Gedaliah, Shelemiah’ tapa Jehukal, le Malkhiah’ tapa Pashhur-te in mi khempeuh tungah keima thugenna a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:2 Keimah in mite kiangah, “ Topa in hong cihin-ah: Hih khuapi sungah a om mi peuhmah namsau tawh ahi a, kial tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Ahih hangin pusuak khia-in Babylon mite a beel peuhmah nungta ding a, suakta liailiai ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:3 Topa in hong cihin-ah, Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah hih khuapi kipia taktak ding a, a kila ta ding ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ uliante in kumpipa kiangah, “Hih mipa i thatlum ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thute a gen manin hih khuapi sungah a omlai galkapte le mi khempeuhte lungkia sakin thazawsak hi. Hih mipa in i gam mite’ phattuamna ding zong loin a gim ngah nading uh a zongzaw ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Kumpipa Zedekiah in, “En un, note’ khut sungah amah om hi. Keimah in note kong kho thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tua ciangin amaute in kei hong man uh a, thong huang sunga om kumpipa’ tapa Malkhiah’ tuikhuk sungah khau tawh hong khiasuk uh hi. Tuikhuk sungah tui om loin buan bek om a, buan sungah ka tumsuk hi." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kumpipa’ inn sungah na a sem kumpi ulian khat ahi Ethiopia mi Ebedmelek in tuikhuk sungah kei hong kikhiatlam a za hi. Tua laitakin Benjamin Kongpi-ah kumpipa tu-in a om hi. 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedmelek zong kumpi inn panin hong paikhia-in kumpipa kiangah," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ka to kumpipa aw, hih mite in kamsangpa Jeremiah, tuikhuk sungah a khiatsuk uh a khial uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khua sungah anlum om nawn lo ahih manin an ngawlin a puksi veve ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ethiopia mipa Ebedmelek sawl a, “Hih lai panin mi thum tonpih inla, kamsangpa Jeremiah a sih ma-in tuikhuk sung pan va kaikhia un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:11 Tua ciangin Ebedmelek in zong a mite tonpih a, kumpipa’ inn-ah pai-in vankoihna sungah a lut khit uh ciangin tuikhuk sung pan khau tawh kei hong kaihkhiatna ding uh puansiasa le puan lui pawlkhat a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:12 Tua ciangin Ethiopia mipa Ebedmelek in keima kiangah, “Na lenuai le khau kikalah puansiate dap in,” ci-in hong sawl hi. Kei zong tua mah bangin ka hih hi." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tua ciangin amaute in tuikhuk sung panin khau tawh kei a hong kaikhiato uh hi. Ahi zongin thong huangsung mahah ka omlai hi. 
Jeremiah38:14 Kumpi Zedekiah in kei hong vaikhak a, Topa’ biakinn kongkhak tumna-ah a hong sam hi. Kumpipa in kei kiangah, “Thu khat kong dong ding hi; bangmah hong im kei in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:15 Kei zong Zedekiah kiangah, “Thuman bangin hong gen leng kei nong that taktak ding hi. Ka ngaihsutna hong pia taleng zong nong mang nuam kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Eite nuntakna a hong pia Topa a nuntak bangin kong sisak kei ding a, nang a hong thatnuam hih mite’ khut sungah zong kong pia kei ding hi,” ci-in kiciamna a hong piasim hi." 
Jeremiah38:17 Tua ciangin keimah in Zedekiah kiangah, “ Topa, Vanglian Pasian, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah, Babylon kumpipa’ uliante na belh leh na nuntakna hong kimap ding a, hih khuapi in zong mei tawh haltumna thuak loin nang le na innkuanpihte na nungta ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa’ uliante na belh kei leh Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah hih khuapi kipia ding a, amau in mei tawh halin amaute’ khutsung pan na suakta kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:19 Kumpipa Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Babylon mite’ kiangah a tai Judah mite ka kihta hi. Amaute’ khut sungah kei hong kipia leh amaute in kei hong bawlsia ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:20 Kei zong, “Amaute’ kiangah nang hong kipia lo ding hi. Tu-a kong gen bangin Topa’ thu mang in. Tua hileh nang a dingin hoih ding a, na nuntakna hong kimap ding hi." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ahih hangin na lut nop kei leh, Topa in ka maangmuhna sungah hih bangin hong lak hi:" 
Jeremiah38:22 En in, Judah kumpipa’ inn sungah a kinusia numei khempeuh Babylon kumpipa’ uliante kiangah kipaipih a, tua numeite in Zedekiah kiangah, ‘Na lawm muante in nang hong khem uh a, nang hong zo ta uh hi. Buan sungah na khe tum ahih manin nang hong nungngat ta uh hi,’ ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:23 Na nupite le na tate khempeuh Babylon mite kiangah kipaipih ding a, nangmahmah zong amaute’ khutsung panin na suakta kei ding hi. Babylon kumpipa in hong man ding a, hih khuapi mei tawh a kangtum ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:24 Tua ciangin Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Hih thute kuamah theisak kei in. Tua hileh na si kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ahih hangin kumpi uliante in nang kong hopihlam a zakkhak uh a, nang kiangah hong pai-in hong hopihin, ‘Kumpipa kiangah na gen thute le kumpipa in nang kiangah hong gen thute hong gen in. Bangmah hong im kei lecin kong that kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in a hong genkhak uhleh" 
Jeremiah38:26 amaute kiangah, ‘Kumpipa in kei, Jonathan’ inn-ah a si dingin a hong puakkik nawn loh nadingin a thum hi ing,’ ci-in dawng in,” ci-in a hong gen hi." 
Jeremiah38:27 Kumpi ulian khempeuh ka kiangah hong pai takpi uh a, thu a hong dong uh hi. Kei zong kumpipa’ hong vaikhakna bangin ka dawngkik hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a gen ding uh om nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa tawh ka kihona uh a hong zasim kuamah a om kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:28 Tua hi a, Jerusalem khua a kilak ciang dong kei zong thong huangsung mahah ka omlai hi." 
Jeremiah39:1 Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum kua le kha sawm a phak laitakin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le a galkap khempeuh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin a hong kuan uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekiah in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum khat, a kha lina, a ni kua ni-in, kumpipa’ khuapi kulh a hong phulet uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:3 Jerusalem khua a kilak laitakin Nergalsharezer, Samgarnebo, galkapbu Sarsekhim le sakol galkapmang Nergalsharezer te a kipan Babylon kumpi uliante khempeuh hong pai-in kongpi laita penah hong tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le galkap khempeuh in amaute a muh uh ciangin a taisim uh hi. Zan laitakin kumpipa’ huansung tawnin kulh tegel kikal-a kongpi kantanin khuapisung pan paikhia uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ahih hangin Babylon galkapte in nungdelh uh a, Jerikho zanglei-ah Zedekiah a pha uh hi. A mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ kiangah paipih uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah39:6 Riblah khua-ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah’ muh mahin a tapate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a thatlum hi." 
Jeremiah39:7 Zedekiah’ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon-ah a ciahpih hi." 
Jeremiah39:8 Babylon mite in kumpipa’ inn le midangte’ innte hal uh a, Jerusalem khua kulhpi a susia uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:9 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia lai mite pen ama kiangah a tai mite tawh, Babylon-ah sal dingin a paipih hi." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in bangmah a nei lo mizawng pawlkhat Judah gamah nusia a, leenggah huan le lo a pia hi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in kei tawh kisai-in kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan thu pia a," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Jeremiah la un. Limtakin kem unla bawlsia kei un. Ama deih bangbangin na bawl un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkapmang Nebuzaradan tawh, galkapbu Nebushazban le sakol galkapmang Nergalsharezer te a kipan Babylon kumpipa’ uliante khempeuh in" 
Jeremiah39:14 thong huangsung panin kei a hong lakhia uh hi. Ahikam’ tapa ahi, Shafan’ tupa Gedaliah in hong kemin inn-ah a hong ciahpih dingin kei a hong ap uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka mipihte’ lak mahah ka om hi." 
Jeremiah39:15 Thong huang sungah kikhumcipin ka om laitakin Topa in hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Ethiopia mi Ebedmelek kiangah pai inla, ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: En in, hih khuapi hoihna ding hi lo, a siatna ding ka gensate ka tungsak ding a, tua ni a hong tun ciangin nangmah in zong na mu ding hi." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni ciangin nang kong honkhia ding a, na kihtak mite’ khut sungah hong kipia lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah39:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong honkhia taktak ding a, namsau tawh thahna na thuak kei ding hi. Topa in kong cihin-ah, kei hong muang na hih manin na nuntakna na suahtak liailiai ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:1 Kol kibulhin Jerusalem khua le Judah gam a saltangte khempeuh tawh Babylon khua-ah hong kipuak khit ciangin Ramah khua panin kumpi cing galkapmang Nebuzaradan in hong khahkhia kik hi. Tua khit ciangin Topa in kei a hong hopih hi. 
Jeremiah40:2 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in kei hong samkhia-in hong hopih a, “ Topa na Pasian in hih mun a siatna ding thu gen khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah40:3 Ama gen bangmahin Topa in tu-in zong a hih khinzo hi. Note in Topa’ thu mang loin a tungah mawh na hih manun, note tungah hih bang thu a hong tung ahi hi." 
Jeremiah40:4 Tu-in en in, na khuta kibulh kolte tuni-in kong sutkhiatsak a, kong khahkhia ta hi. Babylon khua-ah kei tawh pai ding hoih na sak leh hong pai in. Keimah in limtakin nang kong kem ding hi. Ahih hangin Babylon khua-ah kei tawh pai ding hoih na sak kei leh hong pai kei in. Gam khempeuh na mai-ah om a, na painopna peuhpeuhah na pai thei hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kei ka pau loh ciangin Nebuzaradan in, “Babylon kumpipa in Judah gam khuapite a uk dingin a koih Ahikam’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa Gedaliah kiangah paikik in. Amah tawh na mipihte lakah na teng in. Na ten nop kei leh lah na pai nopna peuhpeuhah pai in,” a hong ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa in an le letsong hong pia-in kei a hong paisak hi." 
Jeremiah40:6 Tua ciangin kei zong Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah’ omna Mizpah khua-ah ka pai a, gam sungah a omlai ka mipihte tawh ka omkhawm hi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah koih a, Babylon khua-ah sal dingin a kipaipih lo gam sungah mizawng pente ahi papi, nupi, le naupangte a en dingin a koihna thu, Babylon-te’ khut sungah a lut nai lo, gam sung khuaneu-a om galkapbute le a galkapte un a zak uh ciangin" 
Jeremiah40:8 Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah a pai uh hi. Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael, Kareah’ tapa Johanan, Tanhumeth’ tapa Seraiah, Netofah khuami Efai’ tate, le Maakath mi Jezaniah-te in a galkapte hong paipih uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ahikam’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa Gedaliah in zong amaute kiangah kiciamin gen a, “Babylon mite’ khutnuai-ah na om ding uh kihta tuan kei un. Hih gam sung mahah om unla, Babylon kumpipa’ na sepsak le-uhcin note tungah thusia bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kei ka hih leh Mizpah khua mahah ka om ding a, ei kiangah hong pai ding Babylon mite kiangah note’ tangin ka ding ding hi. No na hih uhleh leenggahzu, khuakhal ante, le sathaute khawm unla, na beel sung uhah koih un. Na laksa uh khua ciat mahah na teng un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:11 Tua mah bangin Moab gam, Ammon gam, Edom gam, le gamdang a teng Judah mi khempeuh in, Babylon kumpipa in Judah gamah mi pawlkhat omsak lai a, tuate a uk dingin Ahikam’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa Gedaliah koih hi, cih thu a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:12 Tua ciangin Jew mi khempeuh a kithehthangna mun khempeuh panin Judah gamah hong ciahkik uh a, Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh hi. Leenggahzu le khuakhal an tampi a kaikhawm uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Tua ciangin Kareah’ tapa Johanan le gam sung khuaneu-a om galkapbute khempeuh Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Jeremiah40:14 “Ammon kumpipa Baalis in nang a hong suam dingin Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael a sawllam na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Ahih hangin Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah in amau’ thugen a um kei hi. 
Jeremiah40:15 Tua ciangin Kareah’ tapa Johanan in Mizpah khua-a Gedaliah’ kiangah, “Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael hong thatsak in. Kuamah in hong thei lo ding uh hi. Nang hong kithat leh nang a hong beel Jew mite kikhenthang ding a, Judah gamah mi a omlai sunteng in zong beilawh ding uh ahih manin bang hangin amah in nang hong that laizang ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a hopihsim hi." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahih hangin Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah in Kareah’ tapa Johanan’ kiangah, “Tua bangin hih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Ishmael’ thu na genna man lo hi,” a ci kik hi." 
Jeremiah41:1 Kha sagih kha hong tun ciangin Nethaniah’ tapa, Elishama’ tupa, kumpi nam le kumpipa’ ulian pente khat ahi Ishmael, mi sawm tawh Mizpah khua Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah’ kiangah hong hawh uh hi. Mizpah khua-ah amaute in an a nekkhawm laitakun," 
Jeremiah41:2 Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael le tua mi sawmte in, Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin a koih Ahikam’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa Gedaliah pen namsau tawh satin a thatlum uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmael in Mizpah khua-ah Gedaliah tawh a omkhawm Jew mi khempeuh le tua laitakin a om Babylon galkapte zong a that hi. 
Jeremiah41:4 Gedaliah a kisuam ni a zing ciang, kuama theih ma-in" 
Jeremiah41:5 Shekhem, Shiloh, le Samaria khuate panin mi sawmgiat hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a khamul uh metin a puan uh balkekin, a pumpi uh a kikui gawpsa-in Topa’ biakinn-ah an tawh biakna le paknamtui tawh biakna a piak ding uh hong tawi khawm uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael zong Mizpah khua panin kap kawmin hong paikhia a, amau hong dawntuah hi. Amau tawh a kimuh ciangin amah in, “Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah hong en dih un,” ci-in a sam hi." 
Jeremiah41:7 Khuapi sung a tun uh ciangin Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael le a mi sawmte in amaute thatin a luang uh tuikhuk sung khatah a paai uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:8 Ahih hangin amaute’ lakah mi sawm in Ishmael’ kiangah, “Ko hong that kei in. Mangbuh, mangbuhham, sathau le khuaizu ka seelsim uh lolai-ah tampi a om hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin amah le a lawmte in amaute a that kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ishmael in a thahsa misi luanghawm khempeuh a paihna tuikhuk pen a gol khat hi a, kumpipa Asa in Israel kumpipa Baasha a nan nadingin a bawl ahi hi. Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael in a thahsa misi luanghawmte tua tuikhuk a dimsak hi." 
Jeremiah41:10 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkapmang Nebuzaradan in, Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah’ uk dingin a piak kumpipa’ tanute le Mizpah khua-a a kinusia mi khempeuh a kipan Mizpah khua-ah a omlai mi khempeuh Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael in man a, Ammon gam lam zuanin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah41:11 Ahih hangin Kareah’ tapa Johanan le amah tawh a omkhawm galkapmang khempeuh in Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael’ tatsiatnate a zak uh ciangin 
Jeremiah41:12 a galkap khempeuh uh tawh Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael a sim dingin a kuankhia uh hi. Gibeon tuikhukpi a tun uh ciangin a pha uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:13 Ishmael’ mat mi khempeuh in Kareah’ tapa Johanan le a hong tonpih galkapmangte a muh uh ciangin a nuam uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:14 Tua ahih manin Mizpah khua panin Ishmael in manin a paikhiatpihte khempeuh hong kilehhei kikin Kareah’ tapa Johanan a beel uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:15 Ahih hangin Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael le mihing giat Johanan’ khutsung panin suakta uh a, Ammon gamah a tai uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:16 Tua ciangin Kareah’ tapa Johanan le a paipih galkapmangte khempeuh in, Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael in Mizpah khua-ah Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah a thah khit ciangin manin a paikhiatpih galkapte, nupite, naupangte le kumpi innsung mangte a kipan a omlai mi khempeuh Gibeon khua panin a ciahpih kik uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:17 Egypt gam a zuan dingin amaute pai uh a, Bethlehem khua gei Khimham Khawlmun-ah a khawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon mite a kihta uh hi. Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin a koih Ahikam’ tapa Gedaliah pen Nethaniah’ tapa Ishmael in suamlum ahih manin a kihta uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah42:1 Tua ciangin galkapmangte khempeuh, Kareah’ tapa Johanan, Hoshaiah’ tapa Azariah, le a neupen pan a kipan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh hong paikhawmin" 
Jeremiah42:2 kei kiangah, “Kong thumna uh hong ngai inla, a hong kinusia ko teng a dingin Topa na Pasian kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatvei lai-in mi tampi ka hih uh hangin tu-in nong muh bangin mi tawmno khat bek ka hita uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:3 Topa na Pasian in ka lam pai nading uh ahi a, ka na sepna ding uh ahi zongin a hong lah nadingin thu hong ngetsak in,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:4 Kei zong amaute kiangah, “Nong genna uh ka thei khinzo hi. En un, nong ngetna bangun Topa na Pasian uh kiangah thu ka ngen ding a, Topa’ hong dawnkikna bangbang ka hong gen ding hi. Bangmah kong im kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:5 Tua ciangin amaute in kei kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian in kote a dingin nang tungah a hong gen bangbang ka zuih kei tak mah uh leh Topa in mantakin thei tahen." 
Jeremiah42:6 Nang kong sawlna uh Topa i Pasian’ hong gen bangbang hoih taleh sia taleh ka mang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa i Pasian’ thu mang leeng, ei a dingin na hong hoih ding hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:7 Tua zawh ni sawm khit ciangin Topa in kei a hong hopih hi. 
Jeremiah42:8 Tua ciangin keimah in Kareah’ tapa Johanan, amah tawh a omkhawm galkapmangte khempeuh, le a neupen a kipan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh ka sam a," 
Jeremiah42:9 “Na deihna uh kong thumsak nadingin nong sawlna uh Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a hong genin-ah:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Hih gamah note na omsuak uhleh note kong lam ding a, kong phel kei ding hi. Kong phut ding a, kong botkhia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note’ tungah siatna kong tunsak manin ka dah hi." 
Jeremiah42:11 Na kihtak uh Babylon kumpipa kihta nawn kei un. Topa in kong cihin-ah, lau nawn kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama khutsung pan a hong honkhia ding le a hong lakhia dingin keimah in note kong ompih hi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Amah in note hong hehpihin na gam mah uhah na tensuak theihna dingun keimah in note kong hehpih ding hi. 
Jeremiah42:13 “Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uh’ thu mang loin, ‘Hih gam sungah ka teng nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:14 Gal om lohna, peengkul kitum lohna, anduh gilkial lohna Egypt gamah pai-in tua lai-ah ka teng ding uh hi,’ na cih uhleh" 
Jeremiah42:15 Judah gamah a omlai mite aw, Topa’ kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Egypt gamah a teng dingin na pai teitei uh a, na ten teitei uhleh" 
Jeremiah42:16 na kihtaktak uh namsau in Egypt gamah note hong that veve ding a, na kihtaktak uh kialpi in zong Egypt gamah note hong nungdelh veve-in, tua lai munah na si veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:17 Egypt gamah pai-in a teng khempeuh namsau tawh ahi a, kialpi tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Amaute’ tungah ka tunsak ding gimna panin kuamah a suakta kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:18 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Jerusalem khua-ah a teng mite’ tungah ka hehna le ka thangpaihna a kibuak bangmahin Egypt gamah na pai uhleh note tungah ka hehna hong kibua ding hi. Mite in note hong lipkhap ding a, kihamsiatna-in hong zangin hong zahko ding uh hi. Note in hih mun na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Tua ciangin Judah gamah a omlai sunte kiangah, “ Topa in note kiangah, Egypt gamah pai kei un, hong ci hi. Tuni-in note kong hilhkholhnate teltakin thei un." 
Jeremiah42:20 Na sih nadingun lam na pial khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh kiangah kei nong paisak uh a, ‘Ko a dingin Topa i Pasian’ kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Topa i Pasian in a hong gen peuhpeuh ko kiangah hong gen in. Ko zong ka mang ding uh hi,’ na hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:21 Topa na Pasian un note’ kiangah gen dingin a hong sawl tu-in kong gen khinzo hi. Ahih hangin note in khat beek na mang kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah42:22 Tua ahih manin na tennopna mun uhah namsau tawh thahna, kial le pulnatna tawh sihna na thuak ding uh hi, ci-in tu-in teltakpi-in thei ta un,” ka cithuah lai hi." 
Jeremiah43:1 Topa Pasian in mi khempeuh kiangah a hong sawl hih thuteng ka gen khit ciangin 
Jeremiah43:2 Hoshaiah’ tapa Azariah le Kareah’ tapa Johanan a kipan migilo dangte khempeuh in kei kiangah, “Nang in zuau na phuak hi. Topa i Pasian in, ‘Egypt gamah a teng dingin pai kei un,’ ci-in a gen dingin nang hong sawl lo hi." 
Jeremiah43:3 Neriah’ tapa Baruk in Babylon mite’ khut sungah kote hong pia nuamin, hong kithahna ding ahih kei leh Babylon-ah saltang dingin hong kilak theih nading deih ahih manin ko a hong langpang dingin nang a hong zang ahi zaw hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:4 Tua ahih manin Kareah’ tapa Johanan le galkapmangte khempeuh a kipan mi khempeuh in Judah gamah omsuakna ding Topa’ thugenna a mang kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah43:5 Tua ciangin Kareah’ tapa Johanan le galkapmangte khempeuh in, a kihawlkhiatna uh gam khempeuh panin a hong ciahkik mite le Judah gamah a omlaisun teng Egypt gamah a paipih uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:6 Papi, nupi, naupang, kumpipa’ tanute a kipan kumpi cing galkapmang Nebuzaradan in Ahikam’ tapa, Shafan’ tupa ahi Gedaliah’ kep dingin a nusiat mi khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Neriah’ tapa Baruk le kei zong a hong kipaipih hi." 
Jeremiah43:7 Amaute in Topa’ thu mang lo uh a, Egypt gamah pai-in Tahpanhes khua dong kitung hi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Tua ciangin Tahpanhes khua-ah Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Suangtum gol pawlkhat la inla, Tahpanhes khua Faro kumpi inn lutna suangphah nuai-ah phum in. Na phumlam Judah mi khempeuh musak in." 
Jeremiah43:10 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: En un, keimah in ka nasempa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar ka la ding a, hih ka suang phumte tungah ama kumpi tokhom hong phut ding a, tuate tungah a kumpi puanbuk a lam ding hi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Amah hong pai-in Egypt gam hong simgawp ding a, pulnatna tawh a si ding mite pulnatna tawh si-in, sala mat dingte salin kimanin, namsau a si ding mite namsau tawh kithat ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:12 Egypt pasian-te a kibiakna biakinnte hal ding a, a pasian-te uh halin a puakhia ding hi. Tuucingte in a puan tung uha om khahte paai-in a siansak uh bangin amah in Egypt gam siangsak ding a, tua khit ciangin ngaihmuang takin a ciahkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah43:13 Amah in Egypt gam Heliopolis khua-a mual suangte susia ding a, Egypt pasian-te a kibiakna innte mei tawh a halsak ding hi, ci hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:1 Egypt gam Migdol khua, Tahpanhes khua, Memfis khua, le leitaw lama teng Jew mite tawh kisai-in Topa in thu hong gen a," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah: Note in Jerusalem khua le Judah gam khuapi khempeuh tungah ka tunsak gimna na muzo uh hi. En un, tuni-in tua khuate a siasa mahin omlai a, kuamah teng lo hi." 
Jeremiah44:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka heh nadingin gitlohna bawl uh a, amaute a kipan note le na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh uh pasian-te’ na semin paknamtui halin a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ahih hangin note kiangah ka nasem kamsangte khempeuh kong sawl a, ‘Ka muhdah hih a kihhuai na na gamta nawn kei un,’ ci-in kong gensak tawntung hi." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong ngai loin a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a gitlohna uh panin kihei loin, pasian dangte kiangah paknamtui hal veve uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:6 Tua ahih manin Judah gam khuapite sung le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah ka hehna le ka thangpaihna ka bua a, ka kuangsak hi. Tuni-a na muh uh bangin tuate kisia-in gamlak suak khinta hi." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Tu-in Vanglian Topa Pasian, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah: Bang hangin note in hih bangin note’ siat nadingin mawhna lianpi bawl na hi uh hiam? Judah gam sungah papi, nupi, naupang, le naungek a kipan a nungtalai kuamah om nawn kei hen, cih na deihna uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Note si-in, leitung a minam dang khempeuhte in hamsiatna-in a hong zat ding uh le hong simmawh nadingun bang hangin na khut uh tawh milim bawlin, na ten nadingun na zuat uh Egypt gamah pasian dangte’ kiangah paknamtui halin kei hong hehsak na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Judah gam le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah na pute na pate uh’ gitlohna, Judah kumpite’ gitlohna, a zite uh’ gitlohna, note mahmah’ gitlohna, le na zite uh’ gitlohnate mangngilh khin na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Tuni ciang dong note na kiniamkhiat kei uh a, kei hong zahtak loin, note le na pute na pate uh tungah kong piak ka thukhamte le ka ngeinate na zui kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong genin-ah: En un, note a susia dingin na langkhat uhah kei ka ding a, Judah gam khempeuh ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah44:12 Egypt gamah a teng dingin a lungsim a khensat khin Judah mi a omlaite, a vekpi-un ka sisak khin ding hi. Egypt gamah namsau tawh kithat sakin kial tawh ka puksisak ding hi. A neupen a kipan a golpen dongin namsau le kialpi tawh a si ding uh a, mite’ lipkhap, mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat leh mite’ simmawh ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem khua ka siatsak bangin Egypt gam a teng mite namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh sihna ka thuaksak ding a," 
Jeremiah44:14 Egypt gamah pai-in a teng Judah mi a omlaite in a zuatkik nop uh ahi Judah gamah ciahkik thei nawn loin, khat beek suakta loin, zong a nungta suak kei ding uh hi. Galtai pawlkhat longal khat beek a suakta kei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:15 Tua ciangin a zite un pasian dangte kiangah paknamtui a hallam a thei papi khempeuh le tua lai-ah a ding nupi khempeuh a kipan Egypt gam leitaw lamah a teng mi khempeuh, a vekpi-in mi tampi tak in kei kiangah," 
Jeremiah44:16 “ Topa’ mina nong gen thute kong mang kei ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ahih hangin ka ciamsa uh bangin kote, ka pute ka pate, ka kumpite uh le kumpi uliante in Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah ka hih ngei uh bangin vantung kumpinu kiangah paknamtui halin tuidawn biakna ka hihzaw ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka tuacih uh ciangin an tampi ka nei uh a, hau-in gimna zong ka thuak kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ahih hangin vantung kumpinu kiangah paknamtui halna le tuidawn biakna ka hih nawn loh uh a kipan bangmah ka nei nawn kei uh a, namsau le kial in hong thatlum zawsop hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:19 Nupite in zong, “Vantung kumpinu’ lim a sun dingin moh bawlin paknamtui halna le tuidawn biakna ka bawl uh ciangin ka pasalte uh’ thukim lohpi-in a bawl ka hi zenzen uh hiam?” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:20 Tua ciangin tua bangin a hong dawngkik papi, nupi a kipan mi khempeuhte kiangah," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah note, na pute na pate uh, na kumpite uh, le na kumpi uliante uh a kipan gam sung mi khempeuh in paknamtui halna na bawl uh ciangin Topa in tua pen a phawk lo sa na hi uh hiam? A ngaihsun lo sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Topa in na hoih lohnate uh le na bawl uh kihhuainate hangin note hong thuakzo nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tuni mahmahin zong na gam uh gamlak suakkhin a, mite’ kihamsiatna suakin kuamah teng nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Note in paknamtui halin, Topa’ tungah mawh tham loin, Topa’ thu mang loin ama thukhamte, a ngeinate, le a hong thupiakte zui lo na hih manun tuni mahmahin zong hih gimna note tungah hong tung ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:24 Tua ciangin mi khempeuhte kiang le a diakdiakin nupi khempeuhte kiangah, “ Topa’ kammal ngai dih un. Egypt gamah a om no Judah mite khempeuh aw," 
Jeremiah44:25 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in hong genin-ah: Note le na zite un na khut bek uh tawh na sep uh hi loin na kam mahmah uh tawh, ‘Vantung kumpinu’ tungah paknamtui hal ding le tuidawn biakna piak dingin ka kiciamnasa uh bangin ka sem taktak ding uh hi,’ ci-in na gen khinzo uh hi. Tua ahihleh na kiciamna uh kipsak ta unla, na kiciamna uh bangin sem dih un!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ahih hangin Egypt gamah a om no Judah mite aw, Topa’ thugenna hong ngai un. En un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Egypt gamah a om Judah mi khat beek in, ‘ Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in ka min zangin a kiciam nawn loh nadingun ka min lianpi tawh ka kiciam khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah44:27 En un, amaute tungah hoihna tung loin siatna a tun nadingin keimah in ka bawl ding hi. Egypt gamah a om Judah mi khempeuh namsau le kialpi tawh si ding uh a, khat beek a suakta kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:28 Namsau tawh thahna a thuak kha lo mi tawmkhate, Egypt gam panin Judah gamah hong ciahkik ding uh a, Egypt gamah a teng dingin a pai a nungtalai sunte in kei’ kammal le amau’ kammal koizaw a manin tung, cih a thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:29 Note’ siatna ding ka gensa thute a hong tung takpi ding ahihna thu na theih nadingun Topa in kong cihin-ah, note tungah hih lim kong pia ding a, hih munah note kong thuaksak ding hi:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Topa in kong genin-ah: ‘En un, Judah kumpi Zedekiah, a gal pa ahi amah a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ khut sungah ka piak mah bangin Egypt kumpipa Faro Hofra, a galte’ khutsung, amah a thatnuam mite’ khut sungah ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ka cithuah lai hi." 
Jeremiah45:1 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum li a cin ciangin Neriah’ tapa Baruk in laibu khat sungah keima gen bangbang a gelh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Baruk kiangah," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Baruk aw, Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in nang hong hopih hi." 
Jeremiah45:3 Nangmah in, ‘Gimna thuak ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka dahna le ka natna hong behlap hi. Ka tautauna-in ka gim khinzo a, ka tawlnga thei kei hi,’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah45:4 “ Topa in nang tungah hih bang a gen dingin hong sawl hi: En in, keimah in ka lamsate ka phelkik a, ka phuhsate ka botkhia kik hi. Keimah in leitung buppi tua bangin ka hih ding hi." 
Jeremiah45:5 Tua sung panin nang a pengthei tuam dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam? Tua bangin kingaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh en in, Topa in kong cihin-ah, mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Ahih hangin nang pen na paina mun khempeuhah kong suaktasak liailiai ding hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:1 Gamdangte’ thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah46:2 Josiah’ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suahzawh kum li a phak hunin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Eufratis gun gei Karkhemish khua-ah Egypt kumpipa Faro Neko simin a zo hi. Egypt kumpipa’ galkapte tawh kisai-in hih bangin a hong gen hi:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Na lumte uh la unla galsim dingin kuankhia un! 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakol vante vawh unla, tuang ta un, sakol galkapte aw. Na sik lukhute uh khu unla, na teipite uh tat hiamin, na sik puante uh silh un." 
Jeremiah46:5 “A bangci mawk ahi hiam? Amaute lungmangin a nungkik ta uh hi. A galkapte uh kilehhawl a, lau-in taikekmang mawk uh hi. Kinungleh hei kik lo uh hi; mun khempeuhah launa vive!" 
Jeremiah46:6 A manlang pente zong paikhia thei tuan lo uh a, galkapte zong suakta lo uh hi. Leilu lam Eufratis gun gei-ah hoi-in a tuk uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nail gunpi bangin a hong khang, guntui khang a bang kua ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Nail gunpi bangin Egypt gam hong khang a, guntui khang hong bang hi. Amah in, kei ka khang ding a, leitung khempeuh ka tuam ding hi. Khuapite le a sunga teng mite ka susia ding hi, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:9 Sakolte aw, mai nawt un; sakol leengte aw, hat un! Lum a tawi Ethiopia mite le Put mite aw, thal tawi a siam Lud mite aw, na galkapte uh kuansak un." 
Jeremiah46:10 “Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni pen Vanglian Topa Pasian’ ni hi a, phu a lakkik ni, a galte a thuk ni ahi hi. Namsau in amaute that ding a, a kham mateng a si uh a dawn ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Eufratis gun gei leilu lamah amaute biakna-in a nei hi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Egypt nungakte aw, Gilead gamah pai unla, damna zatui va la un. Zatui tampi na zat khit uh hangin damna na ngah tuan kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:12 Gamdangte in na zumhuaina uh hong za khin uh a, leitung bupah na kahna aw uh kiza hi. Na galkapte uh khatlekhat kiphukha-in, a nihun a pukkhawm uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Egypt gam a sim dingin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar’ hong paina tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei kiangah a hong gen hi: 
Jeremiah46:14 “Egypt gam le Migdol khua-ah va gen in. Memfis khua le Tahpanhes khua-ah va taangko in: ‘Kigingsa le kithawisa-in om un; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau tawh note hong kithat khin ding hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah46:15 Bang hangin na bawngtal pasian uh Apis guallelin taimang ahi hiam? Topa in amah a vattuk hang ahi hi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Na mite uh tampi tak hoi-in tuk uh a, amaute in khatlekhat kiangah, ‘Kithawi dih un; i mipihte kiang, i suahna gamah va ciahkik ni; tua hileh hih namsau tawh sihna pan i suakta ding hi,’ a kici uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:17 “Egypt kumpipa Faro, min thak khat pia unla, ‘Kam si bekin hun mawk beisak pa,’ ci ta un." 
Jeremiah46:18 Vanglian Topa keimah Kumpipa ka hi hi. Taber mual, mual khempeuh sangin sangzaw-in, Karmel mual, tuipi tungah sangpi-in a dawktoh bangin, no hong sim pa’ thahatna a lian mahmah ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:19 Egypt gamah a tengte aw, note salin a hong kipaipih cianga ding na puanlomte uh zialkhol un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Memfis khua gamlak suak ding a, kisia gawpin, kuamah teng lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egypt gam, bawngla hoih mahmah tawh a kibang hi. Leilu lam panin a hong leeng cippi in amah a pet hi." 
Jeremiah46:21 A galkap cialte nangawn amaute’ lakah bawngno hat lote a bang lel uh hi. Pang loin, do tentan lo uh a, nungkikin a taikeek uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ kisiat ding ni, amau’ gimthuak ding ni, hong tungzo hi." 
Jeremiah46:22 A galte uh hong kuan uh ahih manin Egypt mite gul tai bangin zutkhat a kisuah uh hi. A galte uh sing phuk bangin hei tawh hong kuan uh hi. 
Jeremiah46:23 Gam pha lua-in a kiphut zawh loh hangin a galte un a singte uh a phukmaisak teitei ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kauphe sangin tamzaw uh a, simzawh loh zahin a tam uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Egypt nungakte a maizum ding uh hi. Leilu lam panin a hong pai mite’ khut sungah amaute a kipia ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:25 Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in, “En un: Keimah in Thebes khua-a Amon pasian le Faro kumpipa a kipan a pasian-te uh le a kumpite uh, Egypt kumpipa le amah a muang mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:26 Amaute a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le a uliante’ khut sungah amaute ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Topa in kong cihin-ah, nidang lai bangin Egypt gamah mi a tengkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ahih hangin lau kei un, ka nasempa Jakob’ suante aw. Patau kei un, Israel mite aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi panin note kong honkhia ding a, na suanlekhakte uh saltanna gam panin kong honkhia ding hi. Jakob’ suante hong ciahkik ding uh a, nuamtakin a om ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:28 Topa in kong cihin-ah, ka nasem Jakob’ suante aw, lau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia khin ding a, ahih hangin note kong susia khin kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh ding a, gim pia loin kong mawk koih kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah47:1 Faro kumpipa in Gaza khua a sim ma-in Filistia mite tawh kisai-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah47:2 Topa in a hong genin-ah, “En un, leilu lam panin tui hong khang ding a, hong letkhia-in hong luang ding hi. Gam sung le gam sunga om khempeuh hong tum ding a, khuapi le a sunga teng khempeuh hong tum ding hi. Mite kiko ding uh a, gam sunga om mi khempeuh a kap ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Sakol khegingte za-in, sakol leeng gingte le a pei kigawite a zak uh ciangin, a khut uh zaw luata ahih manin pate in a tate uh a donzo nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:4 Filistia mi khempeuh kisia-in, Taia le Sidon panin huhnate khaktanin, suksiat ding ni hong tungta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah in Filistia mite le Kaftor tuipi gei-ah a omlaite ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza khuate maizum ta uh a, Ashkelon khua kisia ta hi. Aw, no Anak mi a omlaite aw, bang tanvei noleno kisuliam ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Note in, ‘ Topa’ namsau aw, tawlnga nai lo ding na hi hiam? Na paai sungah lutkik inla, taang loin khawl dide in,’ na ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:7 Topa in ka sawl nakleh bang ci-in khawl dide thei ding ahi hiam? Ashkelon khua le tuipi gei teng a sim dingin ka sawlsa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in a genin-ah: “Nebo mite in gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gam uh a kisia ding hi. Kiriathaim khua kila khinzo a, a kulhpite uh cim khinta hi. A mite in maizumna thuak uh a," 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab gam a minthanna beita hi. Heshbon khua-ah a galte un a simna ding uh vaihawm uh a, ‘Hong pai un, Moab gam i beimangsak ding hi,’ a ci uh hi. Madmen khua aw, nang zong na gamdai ta ding hi. Namsau in nang hong nungdelh ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ngai dih un! Horonaim khua-ah mi kiko a, ‘Ngongtatna le siatna lianpi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:4 “Moab gam kisusia khinta a, a kahna aw uh Zoar khua dongin a kiza hi." 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith mual kahtohna lampi-ah a paikawmun a kap uh hi. Horonaim khua-ah a tuahsuk laitakun khuapi siatna hangin a kikona aw uh a za uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Tai un! Na suahtak nadingun tai un! Sehnel gam a gamlak late bangin taimang un!’ a ci uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:7 “Na hatnate uh le na neihsate uh na suan manun note zong hong kipai khiatpih ding hi. Na pasian uh Khemosh zong a siampi teng le a ulian teng tawh, kipai khiatpih ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khua khempeuh kisia khin ding a, khat beek a suakta kei ding hi. Topa in ka gensa bangin mualkuam le zangleite a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Moab mite a leenkhiat theih nadingun a kha ding uh pia un. A khuapite uh gamlak suak ding a, kuamah a teng kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:10 “ Topa’ na citakin a sem lopa in kamsiatna thuak tahen. Thah nadingin a namsau a dok lopa in hamsiatna thuak tahen. 
Jeremiah48:11 Moab gam a neu lai a kipanin nuamtakin a om den ahi hi. Gamdangah kipaikhiatpih ngei lo a, thawl khat pan thawl khatah a kitei kawikawi leenggahzu tawh kibang lo hi. A limna kilamdang ngei lo a, a gimnam zong kikheel ngei lo hi." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Moab mite leenggahzu buak bangin a buakhia ding mi kong paisak hun hong tung ding hi. Amaute in a thawl a hawm dong bungkhia-in, tua khit ciangin a thawl sukhamzan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:13 Tua ciangin Israel mite, a muan uh Bethel pasian in a maizumsak mah bangin Moab mite, a biak uh Khemosh pasian in a maizumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:14 Note in bang hangin, ‘Galhangte ka hi uh a, galsim hatte ka hi uh hi,’ ci thei na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab gam le a khuapite a susia ding pa hong paito ta hi. A tangval hoihpente uh thahlup dingin kipaipih khinzo hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa a kici keimah Kumpipa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab gam a kisiat ding sawt nawn lo a, a gimna ding hong naita hi." 
Jeremiah48:17 “A kiima tengte le a min a thei mite aw, Moab gam kah un. ‘A minthanna bei khinta a, a vangliatna kumpi ciangkhut kitan ta hi,’ ci un." 
Jeremiah48:18 Dibon khua-a teng mite aw, na minthanna uh mun sang panin hong kumsuk unla, leivui lakah hong tu un! Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab hong sim dingte hong paita a, na kulhte uh hong suksiatsak zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aroer khua-a teng mite aw, lam gei-ah dingin na en un! A hong galtai numei le pasalte kiangah, ‘Bang thu piang ahi hiam?’ ci-in dong un." 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab gam kisia khinzo a, zumhuaina thuak khinzo hi. Thum unla kah un! Arnon gun dungah, Moab gam kisiatna thu va gen un." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Pasian’ thukhenna, mualtung gamteng le Holon khua, Jahzah khua, Mefaath khua," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon khua, Nebo khua, Bethdiblathaim khua," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim khua, Bethgamul khua, Bethmeon khua," 
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioth khua, le Bozrah khua a kipan Moab gam sung a gamla, a nai-a om khuapi khempeuhah hong tungzo hi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Topa in kong cihin-ah, Moab gam’ hatna teng bei khinta hi. A hatna le a vangliatna teng kisuksiatsak hi." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Moab, zu khamsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa langpangin kiliansak hi. Tua ahih manin ama luak mahah amah bual ding a, mi khempeuh in awi-in a nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:27 Moab aw, nang zong Israel mite nuihsan hi lo na hi hiam? Ama thu na gen simin lungdamin na lu na sinsin’, amah guta sa na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Moab gam a teng mite aw, khuapite nusia unla, kawl lakah teng un! Keen pangah vakhu bu bawl bangin va om un." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moab’ kiphatsakna ka za khinzo a, kiphasak pha mahmah hi. Kiliansakin kisathei a, kuamah thusim loin mite a neu-et hi." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ama hehna ka thei a, a kisialhna teng zuaupi hi-in, a sepna teng zong zuaupi mah ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:31 Tua ahih manin Moab a dingin ka tau hi. Moab gammi khempeuh a dingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua a dingin zong ka thum hi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Sibmah khua aw, Jazer khua a’ ding sangin nang a dingin ka nak kahzaw hi. Nang pen leenggah gui zaam bangin na hiangte in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua dongah na zaam suak hi. Na khuakhal ante le na leenggahte hong kisuksiatsak ta hi." 
Jeremiah48:33 Leihoih mahmah Moab gamah lungdamna le kipahna a beita hi. Leenggah cilna panin leenggahzu ka luangkhiasak nawn kei a, leenggah cilin lungdamin kuamah a kiko nawn kei a, a kikona uh lungdam kikona hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Heshbon khua panin Elealeh khua le Jahaz dongah, Zoar khua panin Horonaim khua le Eglathshelishiah khua dongah mite’ kahna aw kiza hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Nimrim tui nangawn keu ta a, kisusia ta hi." 
Jeremiah48:35 Moab gam mualsang tungah biakna pia a, milim pasian-te tungah paknamtui a hal mite, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua bang ka hihsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:36 Tua ahih manin Moab a dingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua mite a dingin misi vuina tamngai kitum bangin ka kapkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neih a lam khempeuh uh kisiamang khinta hi." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Mi khempeuh in a lu uh mettol uh a, a khamul uh kiatsiang uh hi. A khutte uh kuikek uh a, a kawng uhah puanhampi a teng uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab gam innkhum khempeuh le lam lianpi khempeuhah kahna bekbek a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, leibeel suktap bangin Moab gam ka sutam a, kuamah in phamawh a sa kei hi." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moab gam kitam ta! A mite kap! Maizumin hong nungngat ta! Tua ahih manin amah pen mite’ nuihsat ding le lipkhap ding a suakzo hi. 
Jeremiah48:40 Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, muvanlai leeng bangin manlang takin gam khat hong leeng ding a, Moab gam a sim dingin a kha hong zal ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:41 A khuapite kila-in a kulhpite zong kila ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Moab galkapte nupi nausuak ding bangin a lau ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab kisusia ding a, a minamin a om nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa demin a kiliansak uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:43 Moab gam a teng mite aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, launa, dum le thangte in note hong pang!" 
Jeremiah48:44 Lauhuaina pan a taisim mite dum sungah a kia ding hi. Dum sung panin a hong kahkhiato mite, thangah a awk veve ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gim ka piak ni-in hih thute ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:45 A bahgawp galtaite in Heshbon khua hong beel uh hi. Ahih hangin Sihon kumpipa a maanna ngei Heshbon khua panin meikuang hong kipankhia veve hi. Gal a simnuam mite’ tenna Moab gam, a gammong dongin mualsangte zong a kangtum hi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Moab aw, gimna na thuak ding hi. Khemosh pasian a bia mite si khinta uh hi. Na tapate uh sal dingin kipaipih khin a, na tanute uh zong thongkia dingin kipaipih hi." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, nidang ciangin Moab gam a ngei bangsakin ka hausakkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Moab tungah thukhenna tu-a zah ahi hi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ammon mite tawh kisai-in Topa in a genin-ah: “Israel mite in tapa nei lo ahi uh hiam? Innluah ding nei lo ahi uh hiam? Bang hangin Milkom pasian biate in Gad gam la-in a khuapite sungah teng ahi uh hiam? 
Jeremiah49:2 Tua ahih manin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Ammon gam Rabbah khua kisimin, galdona aw a kizak hun ka tungsak ding hi. Tua khuapi kisusiamang ding a, a khuaneute a kihaltum ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel mite in a gam uh a laksakte’ kiang panin a gam uh a ngahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:3 Heshbon khuamite aw, kap un! Ai khua kisia khinta! Rabbah khua numeite aw, kap un! Puanhampi silh unla kap un. Khua lakah lung-amin kawi taitai un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na Milkom pasian uh le a siampite le a uliante hong kilak khiatsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:4 A citak lo mite aw, bang hangin na hatna uh kisaktheihpih na hi uh hiam? ‘Kua in eite hong simzo ding ahi hiam?’ ci-in bang hangin na hauhna uh suang na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Vanglian Topa Pasian in kong genin-ah, na kiim na pamte uh kiang panin note tungah gimna kong tungsak ding hi. Note hong kihawlkhia ding a, mi khempeuh amau tum ciatin taikeek ding uh a, a hong kaikhawm kik ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, nidang ciangin Ammon mite a ngei bangsakin ka hausakkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in a genin-ah: “Teman gamah a pil om nawn lo ahi hiam? Thu ngaihsut siamte in ngaihsun thei nawn loin a pilna uh beita ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan gamah a tengte aw, kihei unla galtai un; guam sungah bu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gim ka piak ni ciangin Esau’ suanlekhakte tungah siatna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Mite in leenggah a lawh uh ciangin a gui tungah tawm a nusia lai uh hi. Zanin gutate in na a guk uh ciangin a deih teng bek uh a gu uh hi. 
Jeremiah49:10 Ahih hangin Esau’ suanlekhakte khempeuh ka guaksuaksak a, a bukna munte uh ka kilangkhia sak hi. Tua ahih manin a bu thei nawn kei uh hi. A tate uh, a sanggamte uh, le a vengte uh si khin uh a, khat beek a suakta kei hi." 
Jeremiah49:11 A tagah na tate uh ka kiangah hong koih un; ke’n amaute ka kem ding hi. Na meigong numeite uh zong kei hong muangsak un. 
Jeremiah49:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah: Gim a thuak dingin a kilawm lo mite nangawn in thuak veve uh ahihleh note in zong thuak loin om ding na hi uh hiam? Note in gim thuak loin na om kei ding uh a, na thuak veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, Bozrah khua pen mite’ lipkhap ding, zahpih ding, nusiat ding le kihamsiatna-in a zat ding uh a suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:14 Topa kiang pan thu ka za a, gam khempeuhah thugen dingin mi khat kisawl hi: “Hong kikaikhawm unla, Edom gam a sim dingin hong kithawi un." 
Jeremiah49:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in gamdangte sangin nang hong neusak zaw-in mite kong simmawhsak ding hi. 
Jeremiah49:16 Na kisaktheihna in nang hong khem a, na ngaihsut bangin mite in nang hong kihta lo hi. Suangkeen dawnah na teng a, mualsang tungah na teng hi. Muvanlai bu zahin sangpi-in na ten hangin tua lai mun panin kong lakhiasuk veve ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edom gam pen a mulkimhuai gam suak ding a, a kantan mi khempeuh in a siatgawpna hangin lamdangsa-in a mulkim ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Topa in kong cihin-ah, Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua, le a kiima khuate a kisiatgawp bangin, tua lai munah kuamah teng lo ding a, kuamah a peem kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:19 En un, lonona-ah nuamtakin a om tuute, Jordan gam tulak panin a hong paito humpinelkai in a delhmang bangin, a gam uh nusia-in thakhat thu-in ka taimangsak ding a, a gam uh a uk dingin ka deih peuhpeuh ka seh ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei bang mi kua om ahi hiam? Keima to ahi ding kua omlai ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ka mai-ah kua kumpi hong ding ngam ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Edom mite’ thuak ding le Teman gam a teng mite’ gim nadingin Topa’ geelna le ngimnate ngai dih un. A ta ngeekte nangawn uh kikaikhia ding hi. Mi khempeuh lau taktak ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah49:21 A pukna uh gin’ ngaih lua ahih manin leitung a kiling ding hi. A kahna uh San Tuipi dongah kiza ding hi. 
Jeremiah49:22 En un, muvanlai bangin manlang takin galte hong leengin Bozrah khua a sim dingin tua khua tungah a kha hong zal ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin Edom galkapte pen nupi nausuak dingte bangin a lau ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damaskas khua tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in a genin-ah: “Hamath khua le Arpad khuate in thusia za uh ahih manin lungmangin a om uh hi. Tuipi dai thei lo bangin a launa uh dai thei lo hi. 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaskas khuamite thazaw mahmah uh a, a taimang dingin a kithawi uh hi. Lungkhamna, dahna, le launa in amaute lencip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin a om uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:25 Tua khuapi minthang, lungdamna khuapi, tu-in kinusia ta!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni ciangin khuapi laizangah tangvalte si ding uh a, galkap khempeuh zong a kithat khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:27 Damaskas khua kulhpi mei tawh kihal ding a, Benhadad kumpipa’ inn zong a kangtum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawh Kedar minamte le Hazor khua ukte tawh kisai-in Topa in a cihin-ah: “Kisa un, Kedar mite va sim un! Nisuahna lamah a om amaute va thatlum un!" 
Jeremiah49:29 A puanbukte uh le a tuuhonte uh a kipan a buk kongkhak puante uh le a nate khempeuh uh kilaksak ding hi. A kalaohte uh kipaikhiatpih ding a, ‘Mun khempeuhah launa!’ ci-in a kiko ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:30 “Hazor khua-ah a teng mi khempeuhte aw, Topa in kong cihin-ah, gamlapi-ah taimang unla, guam thuk sungah bu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in note a hong langpang dingin geelna le ngimna a nei khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah49:31 Babylon kumpipa aw, tho in. Nuamtak, ngaihmuang takin a om gam va sim in. Tua khuapite in kongpi lah nei lo a, a kalhna sik tawn zong bangmah nei lo uh a, a tuaci ommawk uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah49:32 “A kalaohte uh kisuh khiatsak ding a, a bawnghonte uh kilaksakmang ding hi. A sam uh a mettom amaute mun khempeuhah ka kithehthangsak ding hi. Mun khempeuh panin amaute tungah siatna ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor khua pen se-alte’ tenna suak ding a, a tawntungin a kisia den khua a suak ding hi. Kuamah teng lo ding a, tawmvei beek zong a va zin kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:34 Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah tungin Elam gam tawh kisai-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah49:35 Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah: “En in, Elam gam’ hatna bulpi ahi a thalpite ka kuaitan ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Vantung mun li panin huihpi ka mutmangsak ding a, Elam gam panin ka hawlkhiatte mun khempeuhah kithehthang sakin a tun lohna uh gam khat beek ka omsak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:37 Amaute a that nuam, a galte uh mai-ah Elam mite ka lausak ding hi. Amaute ka thahsiang mateng namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:38 Topa in ka cihin-ah, Elam gamah a kumpipa uh le kumpi uliante thatin ka kumpi tokhom ka phut ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Ahih hangin nidang ciangin Elam gam nidanga a ngei bangin omsakin ka hausakkik ding hi, Topa in ka ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:1 Khaldea mite’ gam sungah a om Babylon khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei tungah a hong gen hi: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Gam khempeuhah genin taangko unla, dial khai unla im kei un. ‘Babylon khuapi kia ta hi. Bel pasian maizum ta a, Merodak pasian kitan gawpta hi. A milimte uh maizum ta a, a pasian-te uh kisiagawp ta hi,’ ci-in taangko un." 
Jeremiah50:3 “Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin Babylon gam a sim ding le gamlak a suaksak dingin gam khat hong pai ding hi. Gam sungah kuamah teng lo ding a, a mihing a ganhingin a taimang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:4 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni tua hun ciangin Israel mite le Judah mite kap kawmin hong paikhawm ding uh a, Topa a Pasian uh hong zong ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:5 Zion khua lampi a dong ding uh a, tua khua lam maingatin, ‘Hong pai un. A kimangngilh ngei nawn lo ding tawntung thuciamna khat Topa’ tungah ciamkhawm dih ni,’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Ka mite tuu mangthang bang ahi khin uh hi. Makai tuucingte in mualtung tengah lamkhialin a gammanpih uh hi. Mual khat panin mual khatah a pai kawikawi uh a, a giahna inn uh a thei nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:7 Amau a mute in na ne gawp uh hi. A galte un, ‘Ko bangmah khialhna ka nei kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pute a pate un a muan leh a lametna uh Topa’ tungah amaute a khial uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Israel mite aw, Babylon khuapi pan taikhia un. Khaldea gam panin paikhia un. Keelhon lak a keeltal bangin a paikhia masa ding kituh un." 
Jeremiah50:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, keimah in leilu lam panin gam pawlkhat ka hanthawn ding a, Babylon ka simsak ding hi. Amaute in Babylon khua kimkotah gal pangin tua khua a la ding uh hi. Galkap siamte’ lot bangin a thaltangte un khak loh a nei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:10 Khaldea gam kiluhgawp ding a, Topa in kong cihin-ah, a luh khempeuh in a lungkim dong uh a la ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Babylon mite aw, note in keima gamh Israel mite na luhgawp uh hi. Lungdamin kipakin, lopa kham bawngno bangin omin sakol bangin na ham uh hangin," 
Jeremiah50:12 na nu uh Babylon khuapi maizum ding a, note’ pianna na nu uh a mindai ding hi. En un, na gam uh gam khempeuh lakah a ginalo pen hi ding a, lei keu, gamlak, sehnel gam a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Topa’ hehna hangin kuamah teng lo ding a, gamlakpi a suak ding hi. Babylon khua a kantan mi khempeuh in lamdangsa-in khuapi siatna hangin zahko-in a phitsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:14 “No thal tawite khempeuh aw, Babylon khua a sim dingin a kimkotah gal pang un. Thaltang khat beek siit loin kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ tungah a khialzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:15 Khuapi a sim dingin a kimkotah awng un. Babylon khuapi in note hong lel khinzo hi. A galdalte uh cim khin a, a kulhte uh puk khinta hi. Hih pen Topa’ phulakna ahih manin, amau’ tungah phu la un. Midangte tungah a bawl bangin amau’ tungah zong bawl un." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babylon khua-ah khaici tuhte thatlum unla, anla dingin phiaukawi a tawite beisak un. Galte’ namsau kihta-in mi khempeuh in a mipihte’ lak mah uh zuankik ciatin a gam mah uhah a taikik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israel mite, humpinelkai in a delhmang tuu tawh a kibang uh hi. A masa-in Assiria kumpipa in ne a, tu-in a tawpna-ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a guh dongin a teeptum hi." 
Jeremiah50:18 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite’ Pasian in kong cihin-ah: En un, Assiria kumpipa gim ka piak bangmahin Babylon kumpipa le a gam ka thuaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:19 Israel mite a omnasa mun mahah ka omsakkik ding a, Karmel le Bashan mual, Efraim mual le Gilead mualah a piang ante lungkim takin a ne ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Tua ni hun ciangin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel gamah khialhna kizong ding a, a kimu kei ding hi. Judah gamah mawhna kizong ding a, a kimu tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntaksak, ka nusiatlai mite a mawhna uh ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Merathaim gam a sim dingin pai unla, Pekod mite zong va sim un. That unla a vekpi-in sumang un, Topa in kong ci hi. Kong sawl khempeuh hih un." 
Jeremiah50:22 Gam sungah galsimna aw kiza a, na tampi kisia hi." 
Jeremiah50:23 Leitung khempeuh sekpi bangin a satkham Babylon khuapi, tu-in tua sekpi kitanin kitamta hi. Gamdangte’ lakah tu-in Babylon khuapi a mulkimhuai a suak ta hi." 
Jeremiah50:24 Babylon khua aw, nang thang kong siah a, thei lo na hih manin na awk pah hi. Topa langpang na hih manin nang hong kimu-in hong kiman hi." 
Jeremiah50:25 Topa in a galhiam koihna hongkhiazo a, a hehna galhiamte a lakhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon gamah Vanglian Topa Pasian in sep ding khat a nei hi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mun khempeuh panin hong sim unla, a ansal uh honsak un. An cian’ bangin amaute ciang un. A vekpi-in susia unla, bangmah nusiat kei un." 
Jeremiah50:27 A galkap hangte khempeuh uh thahsak un. Amaute in gimna thuak ding uh a, a thuak ni ding uh hong tungzo ta!”" 
Jeremiah50:28 (Ngai dih un. Topa i Pasian’ thuhkikna, ama biakinnpi hangin a phulakna thu Zion khua-ah a taangko dingin Babylon gam panin ka mite suakta-in a tai uh hi.)" 
Jeremiah50:29 “Babylon khua a sim dingin thalkap siam, thaltawi theite va sam un. Khuapi umcih unla, kuamah suaktasak kei un. Ama hihna tawh kituakin ama tungah hih un. Ama hih ngei bangmahin ama tungah bawl un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kisathei-in Topa ahi, Israel mite’ Siangtho Pa a simmawh hi." 
Jeremiah50:30 Tua ahih manin khuasung laizangah a tangvalte uh si ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin a galkapte uh a beimang khin ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:31 En in, a Vanglian Topa Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Nang a kisathei Babylon aw, nang kong langpan’ hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang gim kong piak hun ding na ni hong tungzo ta hi." 
Jeremiah50:32 A kisathei gam hoi-in tuk ding a, kuamah in a phongto kei ding hi. A khuapite mei tawh ka hal ding a, a kiima om khempeuh a kangtum ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Vanglian Topa in kong genin-ah: Israel mite le Judah mite in netniamna thuak uh a, sal dingin a paipih mite in lencipin a ciahsakkik nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ahih hangin amaute a honkhia pa hat mahmah a, Vanglian Topa kici hi. Amah in leitungah kilemna a omna ding le Babylon mite in gimna a ngah nadingin, amaute a dingin a sem ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:35 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, Khaldea gammite, Babylon khua-ah a tengte, a kumpi uliante le a mipilte namsau tawh kithat ta hen!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Kamsang zuau mihaite namsau tawh kithat ta hen! A meidawi a galkapte namsau tawh kithat ta hen! 
Jeremiah50:37 Sakolte le sakol leengte, numei tawh a kibang lel a galkap cialte uh, namsau tawh kithat ta hen! A sum a pai khempeuh uh, kituahmang ta hen!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Guah zu kei hen la, a gunte uh kang ta hen! Bang hang hiam cih leh milim biakna gam hi a, milimte a hailawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Tua ahih manin gamsate le se-alte Babylon khua-ah teng ding uh a, vasa-kalaohte zong a teng ding uh hi. A khang a khangin, a tawntungin mi kuamah a teng ngei nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:40 Topa in kong cihin-ah, Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua, le a kiima khuate, Pasian in a suksiat bangin tua lai-ah kuamah a teng kei ding a, kuamah zong a va baang pak beek kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:41 “En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, gam lian khat le kumpi tampi leimong gamla pek panin galsim dingin kithawithawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:42 A thal uh le a teipi uh tawi uh a, gilo mahmahin hehpihna lungsim nei lo uh hi. A husa uh tuipi ging bang a, sakol tungah tuang uh hi. Babylon mite aw, note a hong simgawp dingin hong kithawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babylon kumpipa in tua thu za khinzo a, bangmah a cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamin lumcip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na a sa hi." 
Jeremiah50:44 “En un, lonona-ah nuamtakin a om tuute, Jordan gam tulak panin a hong paito humpinelkai in a delhmang bangin a gam uh nusia-in thakhat thu-in amaute ka taimangsak ding a, a gam uh a uk dingin ka deih peuhpeuh ka seh ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei bang mi kua om ahi hiam? Ka to ding kua omlai ahi hiam? Ka mai-ah kua kumpi hong ding ngam ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Tua ahih manin Babylon khuapi’ thuak ding le Khaldea gam’ gim nadingin Topa’ geelna le ngimnate ngai dih un. A ta ngeekte nangawn uh kikaikhia takpi ding a, mi khempeuh a lau taktak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:46 A pukna uh gin’ ngaihlua ahih manin leitung a kiling ding hi. A kahna aw uh gam khempeuhah a kiza ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:1 Topa in a cihin-ah: “En un, Babylon khuapi le Khaldea mite a susia dingin keimah in huih ka nungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:2 A zapsiang ding mi Babylon-ah ka sawl ding a, amaute in tua gam a zapsiang ding uh hi. Gimna ni hong tun ciangin amah a sim dingin mun khempeuh panin hong pai ding uh a, gam sungah bangmah a omsak nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Thaltawite a thal uh lawnsak man kei unla, sik puan silhte dingsak man kei un. A tangvalte uh maap kei unla, a galkap honpi khempeuh uh nuaimang khin un." 
Jeremiah51:4 Khaldea gam kongzing lakah liamgawp ding uh a, a si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel le Judah mite Israel mite’ Siangtho Pa tungah a khialh uh hangin, amaute’ Pasian, Vanglian Topa in amaute taisan nai lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:6 Babylon khuapi sung panin taikhia un. Mi khempeuh kisuahtak ciat un. Babylon’ mawhna sihpih kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawhna bangun a thuak nadingun Topa’ thuhkik hun ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babylon khuapi, Topa’ khut sungah a om kham hai tawh kibang a, leitung buppi zu a khamsak hi. Gamdangte in a zu a dawn manun a hai khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:8 Thakhat thu-in Babylon puk a, kisiagawp hi. Ama a dingin kap un. A liammate a dingin zatui la un, damzo khathei lai ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:9 Ahi zongin midangte in, ‘Babylon khua i damsak nop hangin a damzo ding hi nawn lo hi. Nusia ta unla, i gam ciat zuanin ciah ni. Ama tunga thukhenna in vantung dong ban khinta a, van dawn dong a paito hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Keima mite in, ‘ Topa in thuman ihihna hong kilang khiasakzo hi. Hong pai un, Topa Pasian’ nasepna Zion khua-ah va taangko ni,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:11 Thaltangte hiam un. Lumte la un. “ Topa in Babylon khua susia nuam ahih manin Media kumpite a hanthawn hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen a biakinnpi hangin Topa’ thukkikna ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:12 Babylon khuakulhpi tungah dial khai unla, galvil ding tampi koih un. Cingsak unla, galte a buksim dingin kithawi un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon khua mite tawh kisai-in Topa in a gensa teng a geel khinzo a, a sem khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah51:13 Aw, tui tamna gei-ah a teng mite, sum a hau note aw, na hun uh beita a, na nuntakna khau uh kitat ta hi." 
Jeremiah51:14 Vanglian Topa in, ‘Kauphe zahin a tam mite kong simsak ding a, amaute in note hong zo-in a kiko ding uh hi,’ ci-in keima min tawh ka kiciam khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah51:15 “Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh leitung bawl a, ama pilna tawh leitung piangsakin, ama siamna tawh vantung a zal hi." 
Jeremiah51:16 Amah a pau ciangin vantungah tuite ging huhu a, leimong panin tuikhu a suaksak hi. Guah zuk nadingin khua phiasak a, a saal sung panin huih a nungsak hi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Mi khempeuh hai-in pilna nei lo hi khin uh a, kham seekte khempeuh in a milim uh a maizumlawh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a milim uh zuau hi lel a, nak thei lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Kimanna a nei lo, a haihuaipi hi a, gim a kipiak ni ciangin a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakob’ Pasian tua bang hi lo a, na khempeuh a piangsak pa ahi hi. Ama a dingin Israel mite teel a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Babylon aw, nang pen ka sekpi le ka galhiam na hi a, nang hong zangin gamdangte ka satnen a, kumpi gamte ka susia hi." 
Jeremiah51:21 Nang hong zangin sakolte le a tunga a tuangte, sakol leengte le a hawlte,"
