Jeremiah51:22 papite le nupite, khanghamte le khangnote, tangvalte le nungakte," 
Jeremiah51:23 tuucingte le a tuute, lokhote le a tute, kumpite le ukpite ka satnen hi." 
Jeremiah51:24 “ Topa in kong cihin-ah, Babylon khua le Khaldea gamah a tengte khempeuh in Zion khua-ah siatna a bawl manun note’ muhna-ah ka thuk ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:25 “En in, mualpi bangin lian a, leitung khempeuh a susiazo Babylon aw, nang kong langpan’ hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Keimah in nang’ langkhatah ka khut ka zan ding a, mual dawn panin nang hong khukkhia-in, kong kangtumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:26 Na suangte innkiu suangin a kiciang kei ding a, innbul suang nuaiphahin a kizang kei ding hi. A tawntungin gam simtham na suak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Gal a sim dingin leitung bup thu pia unla, gamdangte kiangah peengkul mut un. Amah a sim dingin kithawisak un; Ararat, Minni, le Ashkenaz gamte simsak un. Makai khat teel unla, kauphe honpi zahin a tam sakolte va la un." 
Jeremiah51:28 Amah a sim dingin gamdangte kithawisak un. Media kumpipa, a makaite, le a ukna gam khempeuh kithawisak un." 
Jeremiah51:29 Babylon gam in na sa-in, kitomin a ling hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama tungah Topa’ ngimna tangtung a, Babylon gam gamsimtham suaksak a, kuamah a tengsak kei hi." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babylon galkapte in do nawn lo uh a, a phualpi uhah a khawl uh hi. A tha uh om nawn lo a, numei tawh a kibang uh hi. A innte uh kihalsak a, a khuakongpi a kikalhna siktawnte a kitan hi." 
Jeremiah51:31 Babylon kumpipa kiangah thu a ko dingin a hong pai kamtaite a ciah leh a kuan kiphamat uh a, ‘Mun khempeuh panin galte in Babylon khua hong simin," 
Jeremiah51:32 gun-a ngahmun teng la khinmang uh a, galpanna teng mei tawh kihalin, galkapte lau mahmah uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:33 Vanglian Topa, Israel-te’ Pasian in ka hong genin-ah, Babylon mite tawlkhat khit ciangin anlak bangin kila ding a, sual tunga ancil bangin a kicilgawp ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:34 “Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khua hong valhtumin, hong sukham gawp hi. Beel hawm bangin a hawmin hong koih a, gulpi’ valh bangin hong nawmvalh hi. Ka neihsa a limnono tawh amah kivak kham a, kei a hong hawlkhia hi." 
Jeremiah51:35 Kei’ tung le ka mipihte tungah hong kibawl ngongtatna Babylon mite tungah tung ta hen, ci-in Zion khua-ah a tengte in gen ta uh hen. Khaldea mite in ka thuakna teng thei ta hen, ci-in Jerusalem khua in gen tahen." 
Jeremiah51:36 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, na thu uh ka hong sepsak ding a, note a dingin ka hong thuksak ding hi. A bual ka keusak ding a, a ciktui ka kangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Tua ciangin Babylon khuapi innsia losia suakgawp ding a, se-alte’ tenna mun suakin, a lipkhaphuai, simmawhna tawh a kiphitsan, kuamah a ten lohna gamkhing a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Babylon mite humpinelkai bangin a hawk khawm ding uh a, humpinelkai no bangin a ciak lualua ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:39 A duh mahmah laitakun amaute ka vak ding a, khua a phawk nawn loh dong uh zu ka khamsak ding hi. A tawntungin ihmu paisuak ding uh a, a khanglo nawn kei ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:40 Gawh dingin a kipaipih tuuno bangin ahi a, tuutal le keeltal bangin ahi zongin amaute ka paipihsuk ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Leitung bup in a pahtawi Babylon khuapi kila ta hi. Gamdangte’ lakah Babylon khua, a mulkimhuai a suak ta hi." 
Jeremiah51:42 Babylon gamah tuipi hong kahto a, tuihual lauhuaite in a tum ta hi." 
Jeremiah51:43 A khuapite a mulkimhuai suak a, lei keuna sehnel gam a suak khinta hi. Gam sungah kuamah teng lo a, kuamah in kantan ngei lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:44 Babylon khuate’ pasian Bel zong gim ka pia ding a, a na guksa teng ka lakkhiatsakkik ding hi. Gamdangte in amah bia nuam nawn lo ding uh hi. Babylon khuakulhpi kicim khinta hi." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ka mite aw, amaute lak pan hong paikhia un. A lauhuai Topa’ hehna panin mi khempeuh kisuahtak ciat un." 
Jeremiah51:46 Gam sungah kamdawn a kigen sawnte hangin lungkia kei un; lau kei un. Kum khatin thu khat kigen a, a kum kik ciangin thudang khat kigen lel hi. Gam sungah ngongtatna thu om a, kumpi khat le kumpi khat kidona thu kigen thei hi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Tua ahih manin en un, Babylon khua-a milimte gim ka piak hun hong tung ding hi. A gam buppi ka zumhuaisak ding a, khua sungah kithatin a tuk ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:48 Tua ciangin vantung, leitung, le a sunga om nate khempeuh in Babylon’ hangin lungdamin la a sa ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin amaute a susia ding mi hong pai ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon khua in leitung khempeuhah mite a sihsak mah bangin tu-in amah in sihna a thuak ding hi. 
Jeremiah51:50 “Namsau in a hong thah khak loh a nungtalai note aw, pai un; dingding kei un. Gamlapi pek panin Topa hong phawk unla, Jerusalem khua zong mangngilh kei un." 
Jeremiah51:51 Note in, ‘Kote in maizumna ka thuak uh a, simmawhna kam ka za khin uh hi. Minsiatna in ka maitang uh hong tuam khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ biakinn siangtho gamdang mite in a hong laksak uh hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:52 Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Babylon khua-ah a om a milimte uh tungah thu ka khen ni hun hong tung ding a, gam sung khempeuhah a liamte a tau ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon khua vantungah kahto thei a, a sangpi-ah kiptakin galdalna a bawl thei ahi zongin, Topa in kong cihin-ah, kei’ kiang panin amah a suankhia ding mi a hong pai teitei ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Ngai un! Babylon khua-ah mi kiko hi. Khaldea gam sung mite a kisuksiatna kahna awging ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Babylon khua maimangsak a, a gamlumna zong a daisak hi. Galte, tuihual lum henhan bangin hong lut uh a, awng gawpin, a gamlum henhan uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:56 Babylon khua a susia ding mi khat hong pai khinzo hi. A galkapte uh kiman khin a, a thalte uh a tum a tel suak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a thukkik thei Pasian hi a, a thukkik taktak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:57 A kumpi uliante le a mipilte uh a kipan ukpite, uliante, le galkapte, zu ka khamsak ding a, a tawntungin ihmu-in a khanglo nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa a kici kumpipa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah51:58 Vanglian Topa in ka hong genin-ah: Babylon khuakulhpi sah mahmahin a muanhuai mahmah leilakah cimsuk ding a, a sang mahmah khuakongpite zong mei tawh kihaltum ding hi. Mite’ nasepna a mawkna suak a, minamte’ hanciamnate vutlevai a suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:59 Neriah’ tapa, Mahseiah’ tupa Seraiah pen Zedekiah kumpipa’ thuvan pa ahi hi. Kumpi Zedekiah in Judah gamah a ukzawh kum li ciangin Seraiah le kumpipa Babylon-ah a pai uh hi. Tua hun laitakin keimah in Seraiah thu ka vaikhak hi." 
Jeremiah51:60 Keimah in Babylon khua tawh kisai-in Babylon khua-ah a tung ding gimna khempeuh laibu khat sungah ka gelh hi. 
Jeremiah51:61 Seraiah kiangah, “Babylon khua na tun ciangin hih thute khempeuh na sim ding a," 
Jeremiah51:62 tua khit ciangin, ‘ Topa aw, hih munah mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh bangmah teng loin, a tawntungin a kinusia a suah nadingin na suksiatna ding na gen khinzo hi,’ ci-in thu ngen in." 
Jeremiah51:63 Hih laibu sunga thute mite’ zakin na sim khit ciangin suang khat tawh henkhawm inla, Eufratis gun sungah paai in. Tua khit ciangin," 
Jeremiah51:64 ‘Babylon khuapi’ gitlohna hangin a tungah gimna ka tungsak ding a, tu-a bangin Babylon khuapi zong tumsukin a hong dawkkikto nawn kei ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” ka ci hi. Jeremiah’ thugenna tu-a ciang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawmnih le kum khat pha a, Jerusalem khua-ah kum sawm le kum khat sung a uk hi. A nu’ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khua-a teng Jeremiah’ tanu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:2 Amah in kumpi Jehoiakim bangmahin Pasian’ hoihsak lohte hong sem hi. 
Jeremiah52:3 Topa in Jerusalem khuamite le Judah gam mite ama kiang panin a hawlkhiatna zah dong dingin a hehna a lian hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa langpan’ hi. 
Jeremiah52:4 Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suahzawh a kum kua kum, a kha sawmna, a ni sawm ni-in, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a galkap khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin hong kuan uh a, khuapi kimkotah galdalna a phut uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekiah in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong khuapi a kisim hi. 
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a kha lina, a ni kua ni ciangin khuapi sungah kial nasia lua ahih manin, mite in annek ding a nei nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:7 Tua ciangin khuakulhpi kiphulet a, khuapi kimkotah Khaldea mite om napi-in, zan laitakin kumpipa’ huan gei-a kulh tegel kikal-a kongpi tawnin galkapte taikhiasim uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ahih hangin Khaldea galkapte in kumpi Zedekiah nungdelh uh a, Jerikho zanglei-ah a phak uh ciangin a galkap khempeuh kithehthangin amah a taisan uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:9 Amaute in kumpipa a mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah puak uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah khua-ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah’ muh mahin a tate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a thatlum hi." 
Jeremiah52:11 Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah’ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon khuapi-ah paipihin a sih mateng thong sungah a koih hi." 
Jeremiah52:12 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh kum sawm le kum kua a phak kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Babylon kumpipa a cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan, Jerusalem khua sungah hong lut hi." 
Jeremiah52:13 Amah in Topa’ biakinnpi a kipan kumpipa’ inn le Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi. 
Jeremiah52:14 Amah tawh a omkhawm a galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkota kulh khempeuh a susia hi. 
Jeremiah52:15 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in mi zawngpen pawlkhat, khuapi sunga a kinusialai mite, Babylon kumpipa’ lamah a tai mite, le khutsiam mi a omlai teng, sal dingin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ahih hangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in leenggah lo a cing ding le lo a kho dingin gam sunga a zawngpente pawlkhat a nusialai hi. 
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon mite in Topa’ biakinnpi sungah a om sumngo khuamte, sumngo tuikuang le a ngaknate suzan gawp uh a, sumngo khempeuh Babylon-ah a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:18 Tua banah, biakpiakna a kizang beelte, vutluahnate, taitehte, kuangte, sikkeute, le biakinn kikhopna-a kizang sumngo tawh a kibawl kuangte khempeuh zong a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:19 Biakpiakna a kizang keuneute, mei-am luahna kuangdaite, kuangte, beelte, khuai meivakkhuamte, sikkeute, le tuibuahna dinga kizang keute zong a la uh hi. Kham tawh a kibawl nate kham dingin ahi zongin, ngun tawh a kibawl nate ngun dingin ahi zongin kumpi cing galkap mangpa in a lakhia hi." 
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa in Topa’ biakinn a dingin a bawl khuampi nih, tuikuangpi khat le tua nuai-a a pua sumngo bawngtal sawm le nih le a kingaknate, sumngote a gihna kiteh zo lo hi." 
Jeremiah52:21 Tua khuamte khat ciangin pi sawmnih le pi sagih sang a, a kimkot pi sawm le giat pha a, a sahna zung li pha-in a sung a hawm ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:22 A tunglam pi sagih le alang ciang sumngo hi-in, tua mun teng a kimkotah sumngo tawh a kibawl mang kawlsing lim kisuai hi." 
Jeremiah52:23 Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkotah zakhat om a, sawmkua le guk bek a kilang hi." 
Jeremiah52:24 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in siampi lianpen pa Seraiah, siampi lian a nihna Zefaniah, le kongpi uk biakinn upa thum a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:25 Tua banah khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkapmang khat le khuasunga a kimu kumpipa’ uliante sagih, galkap zumlai a kem galkap mangpa’ lai-at pa le khuasunga a kimu midang sawmguk, khuasung panin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah a tunpih hi. 
Jeremiah52:27 Babylon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah amaute satin a thatlum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kilakhia hi. 
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paipih mi phazah hih bang ahi hi: Kumpi a suahzawh a kum sagih kumin Judah mi tulthum sawmnih thum," 
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le giat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in mi zagiat sawmthum nih sal dingin a paipih hi. 
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhadnezzar in a ukzawh a kum sawmnih le thum kumin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in a sal dingin Judah mi zasagih sawmli nga a paikhiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tulli le zaguk a pha hi. 
Jeremiah52:31 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin sal a suahzawh kum sawmthum le kum sagih a cin ciangin Babylon-ah Evilmerodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a, tua kum kha sawm le kha nihna a ni sawmnih le ni nga ni ciangin thong sung panin a suaktasak hi." 
Jeremiah52:32 Hoihtakin hopih a, Babylon khua-a a ompih kumpi dangte sangin a sangzaw tutna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suahkhia hi. A nuntak sungteng khempeuh kumpipa’ sabuai-ah nisimin an a ne hi. 
Jeremiah52:34 A sih mateng a nuntak hun sungteng nisimin a kisap khempeuh kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi. 
Lamentations1:1 Khatvei lai-in mi a dimtakin a tenna Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai ahi hiam? Leitung bup in a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibang ta hi. Leitung a om khuapi khempeuhte’ lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a kiman khinzo hi. 
Lamentations1:2 Amah zan khuavakin kap a, a khitui a biang tungah a tak kauhkauh hi. Amah a it ngeite khempeuh a hehnem ding khat beek a om nawn kei hi. A kipawlpihte khempeuh in amah khemin, tu-in a langpan’ khinta uh hi." 
Lamentations1:3 Judah mite, a huh ding a nei lo silate bangin a inn panun kihawlkhia hi. Amaute gam dangah teng uh a, amau’ gam ding a om kei hi. Galte in umcih uh a, a suahtak theih nading uh lampi a om kei hi." 
Lamentations1:4 Ni siangtho ni ciangin Pasian a bia dingin Biakinnpi-ah kuamah a pai nawn kei hi. Tua lai-a lasa numeite in gimna thuak uh a, siampite a tau uh hi. Khua kongpi-ah kuamah om nawn lo a, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna a thuak hi." 
Lamentations1:5 A galte gualzo uh a, amaute a nuaisiah gawp uh hi. Mawhna tampi a neih manun, Topa in tua bangin gimna a thuaksak hi. A mite khempeuh sila dingin a kipuakhia hi." 
Lamentations1:6 Jerusalem a minthanna teng a maimang zota hi. A makaite uh, lonona mun mu loin a vak kawikawi, sabengte a muh ciangin tailahpi-in a tai teitei sazuk tawh kibang hi." 
Lamentations1:7 Tu-in Jerusalem kisiazo ta a, nidanga a thupinate a nung phawkkik hi. Galte in a sim laitakin a huh ding khat beek a om kei hi. Guallel ahih manin a galte in a nuihsan uh hi." 
Lamentations1:8 A minthanna teng a beita hi. A guaktangin om ahih manin a maizum hi. Thumin tau a, a zum manin a mai a hum hi. Jerusalem in mawhna lian bawl ahih manin a kihhuai mahmah hi." 
Lamentations1:9 A kihhuaina teng kimukhia pah hinapi, gimna thuak ding ahihlam a awlmawh tuan kei hi. Tua ahih manin gimna a thuakna lian lua mahmah a, kuamah in a hehnem zo kei hi. A galte in zo ahih manin Topa kiangah hehpihna a ngen hi." 
Lamentations1:10 A galte in a neih a lam khempeuh a laksak khinmang hi. Biakinnpi sungah lut uh a, Topa in Gentail-te a pai ding a phal lohna munah a lut uh a mu hi." 
Lamentations1:11 Amaute, a thum kawmsa-in annek zong dingin a paikhia uh hi. A nuntak theih nadingun a sum a pai uh tawh an a khek uh hi. Khuapi in, “Hong en in Topa aw, ka thuakna teng hong mu in,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Lamentations1:12 A kiim a pamah a pai mi khempeuh kiangah, “Hong en in, kei’ thuak zahin gimna a thuak, Topa in a heh laitakin a hong thuaksak gimna a thuak kei longal, midang kuamah om lo hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Lamentations1:13 Amah in vantung panin meikuang hong khiasuk a, ka sunglam a hong kang hi. Amah in thang hong siah a, awkin leilakah ka kipuk hi. Tua bangin natna ka thuak tawntung hi." 
Lamentations1:14 Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh a vekpi-in ciamteh a, tuate henin lomkhat suahin ka ngawngzangah hong khih a, gik lua mahmah ahih manin ka taangzo peuhmah kei hi. Topa in ka galte’ khut sungah hong pia ahih manin a cimawh ta ka hi hi." 
Lamentations1:15 Topa in ka galkap a thahat pente nuihsan lel a, amah in kei a hong sim ding, ka tangvalte a susia dingin galkap honpi a hong kuansak hi. Amah in ka nungakte leenggah gawizan bangin a hong gawizansak hi." 
Lamentations1:16 Tua ahih manin ka mit pan khitui a dimletin a luang hi. Hong hehnem ding le a hong hanthawn ding kuamah om lo hi. Galte in hong zo khin a, ka mite a cimawh uh hi." 
Lamentations1:17 Hong huh un, ci-in ka khut ka vanvan hangin kuamah in a hong huh nuam kei hi. Topa in mun khempeuh panin galte hong paisak a, amaute in a kihhuai na khat bangin kei a hong gimneih uh hi." 
Lamentations1:18 Topa a thutang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in ama thu a mang lo ka hi hi. Mun khempeuhah a om mite aw, ka thugenna hong ngai un. Ka thuaknate hong mu dih un. Ka khangno numei le pasalte salin a kipuakhia hi." 
Lamentations1:19 Ka kipawlpihte ka sapsap hangin a hong huh nuam kei uh hi. A nuntakna ding uh an a zonna lamun siampite le makaite kongzing lakah a si uh hi. 
Lamentations1:20 Topa aw, ka thuaknate, ka lunggimnate hong en in. Ka mawhna hangin dah mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a kitam hi. Kongzing lakah kithahna om a, inn sungah zong sihna mah a om hi." 
Lamentations1:21 Ka tauna hong ngai in; kei a hong hehnem ding kuamah dang om nawn lo hi. Gimna nong thuaksak manin ka galte lungdam lua uh hi. Na ni ciam ni hong tungsak inla, kei’ thuak bangin ka galte zong thuaksak in." 
Lamentations1:22 A gitlohna hangun amaute tungah thu khen in. Ka mawhna hangin gim nong piak mah bangin amaute zong gim pia in. Gimna ka thuak manin ka tautau a, ka lungsim a gim mahmah hi." 
Lamentations2:1 Topa in a heh manin Jerusalem khuapi a mialcipsak hi. A vantung minthanna teng uh kisiatna a suaksak hi. Amah in a heh ni-in a Biakinnpi nangawn a susia hi. 
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah gam a om khuate khempeuh hehpih loin a susia hi. Amah in a galdalna kulhpite khempeuh balzan gawpin a gam le a gam ukte a maizumsak hi. 
Lamentations2:3 A hehna tawh Israel-te’ thahatnate hong suksiatsak gawp a, gal in a hong sim ciangin amah in eite a hong huh nuam kei hi. Meikuang tawh kibangin eite’ langah hong pang a, na khempeuh a susia hi." 
Lamentations2:4 Amah in galte bangin a thalpi tawh hong ngim a, i lungdamna teng le i kisaktheihna teng a hong thah khit sak hi. I innsung ciatah a hehna meikuang i mu thei hi." 
Lamentations2:5 Topa in galte bangin Israel-te a susia hi. Amah in kulhpite le a kumpi innte a siasa-in a nusia hi. Amah in a bei thei lo dahna Judah gam sungah a tungsak hi. 
Lamentations2:6 Amah in biakna Biakinnpi a zan gawpsak hi. Amah in biakna ni siangtho nite le Sabbath nite a beisak hi. Kumpite le siampite in a nasia ama hehna a thuakkhawm uh hi. 
Lamentations2:7 Topa in a siangtho biakinnpi le a biakna tau deih nawn lo a, biakinn kulhpi, galte a susiasak hi. Lungdamna tawh amah i biakna munah, amaute gualzo-in a kiko uh hi." 
Lamentations2:8 Jerusalem kulhpi a kipuk ding Topa in a ngaihsutsa ahi hi. A vekpi-in a kisia khin dingin amah in a sehsa ahi hi. Tausangte le kulhpite tu-in kisia khin piikpeek ta hi. 
Lamentations2:9 Kulhkongpite cim gawpin lei in vukcip a, kongpi kalhna zawlte a kitan gawp hi. Kumpipa le miliante salin a om khin uh hi. Thukham kihilh nawn lo a, kamsangte in Pasian kiang pan maang a mu nawn kei uh hi." 
Lamentations2:10 Jerusalem puteekte pau loin leilakah tu uh a, dahna lim lahna-in puanhampi silhin a lu zang uh leivui a buak uh hi. Jerusalem nungaknote a kun ngelhngalh uh hi." 
Lamentations2:11 Ka kahkahna-in ka mit paatgawp ta a, ka lungsim gim lua mahmah hi. Ka mite a kisiatna hangin dahin husamin ka bahgawp hi. Naupangte le nungakte kongzing lakah sibup uh hi." 
Lamentations2:12 Gilkial dangtakin nu aw, ci-in kapkap uh a, a liam a bai bangin kongzing tengah a tuk pekpak uh hi. Tua bangin damdamin a nute uh ang-ah a si uh hi." 
Lamentations2:13 Ka it Jerusalem khuapi aw, bangci ding ka hi hiam? Hong bangci hehnep ding ka hi hiam? Nang thuak bangin a thuak kuamah om lo hi. Na tuahsiatna tuipi cia pha a, a lamethuai bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Lamentations2:14 Na kamsangte un zuauthu longal thudang gen ding nei lo uh a, a thuhilhna uh khemna thu bek ahih manin, a khial na hihlam uh a hong hilhtel kei uh hi. Amaute in lam hong lakkhial uh a, kisikkik theih nading hun a hong pia kei uh hi." 
Lamentations2:15 Tua khuapi a siatna a mu mi peuhmah in awi-in a khut a betsan uh hi. A kisia Jerusalem khuapi a muh uh ciangin awi-in a lu uh pei-in a nuihsan uh hi. “Khuapi it-huai i cih hih maw, leitung bup in a kisaktheihpih hih khua maw,” ci-in a nui uh hi." 
Lamentations2:16 Na galte in nang hong simmawh uh a, muhdahna tawh a hong sik-et uh hi. “Khuapi susiazo ta hang! I suksiatzawh mateng i cihcih niloh mah hi,” ci-in a hagawi uh hi." 
Lamentations2:17 Topa in a sehsa bangin a tawpkhakna-ah a hong bawl hi. Sauveipi lai-in a hong hilhkholhna bangin hong hehpih nawn loin a hong susia hi. Galte gualzo a, ei hong guallelsak a, amaute a lungdamsak hi." 
Lamentations2:18 Jerusalem aw, na kulhpite mahmah Topa tungah kikosak in! Sun le zanin na khitui gun tuiluang bangsak in. Dahna le kahna tawh na hun beisak in." 
Lamentations2:19 Zanin tho zelzel inla, Pasian tungah kiko in. Na tate in hehpihna a ngah nadingin na lungsim khempeuh pia in. Kongzing khempeuhah naupangte puksi khin dektak uh hi." 
Lamentations2:20 Topa aw hong en in. Na bawlsiat mite hong en dih in. Nupite in a it mahmah uh a tate uh’ sa ne tanghial uh hi. Siampite le kamsangte in biakinnpi sung mahmahah thahna thuak uh hi. 
Lamentations2:21 Khangno le khanghamte kongzing tengah si uh hi. Galte in nungak le tangvalte namsau tawh a thatlum uh hi. Amaute hehpih loin na heh ni-in na thatlumsak hi. 
Lamentations2:22 Kei a hong dipkuasak dingin ka galte pen pawi siim ding bangin na sam a, amaute in hong umcih uh hi. Nangma heh ni-in a suaktazo khat beek a om kei hi. Ka hawmthawh ka it ka tate a hong thahsak uh hi." 
Lamentations3:1 Pasian in gim hong piakna zia a thuakkhin pa kei ka hi hi. 
Lamentations3:2 Amah in a thuk mahmah khuamial sungah a hong hawlkhia hi. 
Lamentations3:3 Hong hehpih hetloin a khut tawh a hong tum niloh hi. 
Lamentations3:4 Amah in a liam a bai guh kitansa-in a hong nusia hi. 
Lamentations3:5 Amah in lunggimna le gentheihna thonginn sungah a hong khumcip hi. 
Lamentations3:6 Amah in sihna khuamial uih sungah a teng dingin aana tawh thu a hong pia hi. 
Lamentations3:7 Amah in kol hong bulh a, taikhiatzawh hetlohna kulhpi sungah hong koih hi." 
Lamentations3:8 Hong huh un, ci-in ka kiko hangin ka kikona aw a pualamah a kizazo kei hi." 
Lamentations3:9 Hoi dangdang ka hih manin suang kulhpite ka kantanzo kei hi. 
Lamentations3:10 Amah in vompi bangin kei hong buksim a, humpinelkai bangin a hong bawh hi." 
Lamentations3:11 Amah in lam pamah hong delhkhia a, a hong balnen khit ciangin a hong nusia hi." 
Lamentations3:12 Amah in a thalpi keek a, thal tawh kap dingin a hong ngim hi." 
Lamentations3:13 Amah in a thaltang a thuktum theithei dingin a hong kap hi. 
Lamentations3:14 Mite in sun tawntung hong nuihsan niloh uh a, leitung bup in ciamnuihna-in a hong nei uh hi." 
Lamentations3:15 Amah in ka ut lohpipi-in tuikha hong dawnsak a, ka duh lohpipi-in an kha a hong nesak hi." 
Lamentations3:16 Amah in ka maitang lei-ah hong hiat a, suang tungah ka ha a hong tahtansak hi." 
Lamentations3:17 Lungnopna, cidamna, kipahna cihte bang ahi hiam, cih mel ka thei nawn kei hi." 
Lamentations3:18 Sauveipi ka nungta nawn kei ding hi. Topa’ tung pan ka lametna teng a beita hi. 
Lamentations3:19 Gimna ka thuaknate le innlelo nei loin ka omna pen gu-kha bang hi a," 
Lamentations3:20 tua pen a tawntungin lungkiatna ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:21 Ahi zongin ka phawk giugiau thu khat in lametna khat hong nei theisak hi. 
Lamentations3:22 A bei thei lo Topa’ hong itna le a hehpihna a kizom paisuak hi a," 
Lamentations3:23 zing nisuak bangin thaksuak tawntung a, ni a hong suah pelmawh mah tawh a kibang ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:24 Topa longal neihdang nei lo ka hih manin ama tung bekah lametna ka nei hi. 
Lamentations3:25 Amah a muangte a dingin Topa a hoih hi. 
Lamentations3:26 Tua ahih ciangin thuakzawhna tawh ngak kenkanzo lehang a hoihpen ahi hi. A hong hotkhiat ding amah ngak ni. 
Lamentations3:27 Na khangno lai-in thuakzawh hat ding kisin leteh hoihpen hi. 
Lamentations3:28 Gimna i thuak ciangin damtakin tu hithiatin i thuakzo ding hi. 
Lamentations3:29 Lametna ding om thei lai ahih manin phunphun huai dek lo hi. 
Lamentations3:30 Guallelin bawlsiatna thuak ta lehang tua banga om lel ding ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:31 Topa in hehpihna nei ahih manin hong nial paisuak lo ding hi. 
Lamentations3:32 Dahna hong thuaksak thei ding a, ahih hangin eite a hong itna muanhuai-in kip tawntung hi." 
Lamentations3:33 Dahna le gimna a hong thuaksak ciangin amah lungdampah sam lo hi. 
Lamentations3:34 Topa in thong sungah i thuak i lunggimnate a hong thei hi. 
Lamentations3:35 Mite in Pasian thusim loin, i hamphatnate hong paihkhiat sakin," 
Lamentations3:36 zum thukhenna-ah a manin thu a kikhen loh ciangin, amah in a hong thei veve hi." 
Lamentations3:37 Topa’ deihna bang bekin na khempeuh a piang ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:38 Ama thupiakna bangin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a piang ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:39 I mawhna hangin gim i thuak ciangin bang hangin phunphun ding ihi hiam? 
Lamentations3:40 I gamtatnasate limtakin ki-enpha kikin Topa’ lamah kiheikik ni. 
Lamentations3:41 Vantunga om Pasian tungah i lungsim pia-in thu ngen ni. 
Lamentations3:42 “ Topa aw, nang tungah kong khial uh a, hong lehdokha ka hih manun ka mawhna uh na hong maisak nai kei hi." 
Lamentations3:43 “Kote nong nungdelh a, na hong that khinzo hi. Heh na hih manin na hehpihna a kiseelcip hi." 
Lamentations3:44 Na hehna, meiipi zahin sah mahmah ahih manin ka thungetna uh na kiang a hong tungzo kei hi." 
Lamentations3:45 Hih leitungah kote a kihhuai nahteh muat bangin na hong bawl hi. 
Lamentations3:46 “Ka galte khempeuh un hong simmawhin a hong zahpih uh hi. 
Lamentations3:47 Siatna bekbek tawh kidimin, kihtakna le launa tawh ka nungta uh hi." 
Lamentations3:48 Ka mite a kisiat manin ka khitui hawktui luang a bang hi. 
Lamentations3:49 “Ka khitui kang thei loin luitui bangin luang tawntung a," 
Lamentations3:50 vantung panin Topa in hong ensukin a hong muh ciangin," 
Lamentations3:51 ka khuapi kisiatna in ka lungsim hong kitamsak hi. 
Lamentations3:52 “A thu om lopi-in ka galte in hong mudah uh a, vasa siah bangin thang a hong siah uh hi." 
Lamentations3:53 Leihawm thukpi kawt sungah hong hing khiat uh a, suangtumpi tawh a hong sincip uh hi." 
Lamentations3:54 Tui in hong tuumcip gawp ahih manin a si khinta-in ka kingaihsun hi. 
Lamentations3:55 “ Topa aw, leihawm thukpi taw panin ka hong kikoto hi." 
Lamentations3:56 Kong thumna hong ngai in, ci-in ka hong thum ciangin na hong za hi." 
Lamentations3:57 Na hong dawng a, a lau lo dingin thu nong pia hi." 
Lamentations3:58 “Topa aw, nangmah in na hong huh a, na hong nungtasak hi." 
Lamentations3:59 A mawkna-in kei hong kimawhsaknate thei khin na hih ciangin thu hong khen inla, kei hong khahkhia in." 
Lamentations3:60 Ka galte’ hong muhdahna le a vaihawm simna thute uh na thei khinzo hi. 
Lamentations3:61 “ Topa aw, amau’ hong simmawhnate na thei khinzo a, a ngimnate khempeuh uh zong na theizo hi." 
Lamentations3:62 Sun tawntung keimah bawlsiat ding bekbek kikumin a vaihawm tawntung uh hi. 
Lamentations3:63 Zingsang a kipan nitak dong a hong zahpih uh hi. 
Lamentations3:64 “ Topa aw, amau’ gamtatna bangin thukkik in." 
Lamentations3:65 Amaute phuisam inla, a cimawh dingin hawlkhia in." 
Lamentations3:66 Amaute delhkek inla, leitung panin nuaimang gawp in,” ci ni." 
Lamentations4:1 Biakinnpi kisia ta a, suang kiciangte kongzing lakah a kithehthang hi. Khamtui tawh a kizut a tee daldalte mualmang khinzo ta hi." 
Lamentations4:2 Kham bangin a manpha Jerusalem tangvalnote, leibeel bang lelin kibawl khinta hi." 
Lamentations4:3 Keivom nangawn in zong a note itin a nawi pia thei buang napi, ka mite in vasa-kalaoh bangin a tanote a sugawp hi." 
Lamentations4:4 Amaute in a ta ngeekte uh gilkial dangtakin sisak uh a, naupangnote an ngen dingin vaksak uh a, kuamah in an a pia kei hi." 
Lamentations4:5 An lim pen a ne ngeite kongzing lakah puksi uh a, nuamsa-in a khangkhia mite in ninbuakna lak thai-in an a zong uh hi." 
Lamentations4:6 Jerusalem’ mawhna Sodom khuapi’ mawhna sangin lianzaw ahih manin, thakhatin Pasian’ khutsung pan kisiatna a ngah uh hi." 
Lamentations4:7 Pasian’ mi dingin a kipia Nazir-te pen amau’ pumpi uh a siasak lo, vuk bangin a ngo, a cidam, a thahat mite ahi uh hi." 
Lamentations4:8 Tu-in amaute kuama theih lohin kongzing lakah tuk pekpak uh a, a si dingin a mai uh dup khin a, a vun uh sing bangin keugaw-in, a guhguakin a om uh hi." 
Lamentations4:9 Nek ding nei loin puksih sangin gal sungah a site hamphazaw lai hi. Annek ding nei loin a site a puksi ahi uh hi. 
Lamentations4:10 Ka mite a cihmawh laitakun, itna a nei nupite nangawn in, a tanote uh go-in beel sungah a huan uh hi." 
Lamentations4:11 Topa in a hehna khempeuh siit nawn loin hong buakhia a, meikuang tawh Jerusalem hong hal ahih manin a kangtum hi." 
Lamentations4:12 Namdangte’ gam ukte le mi khempeuh Jerusalem a simzo ding kuamah om lo ding hi, ci-in a up laitakun hih thu hong piang hi." 
Lamentations4:13 Kamsangte le siampite in mawhna a bawl manun mi siangtho midikte’ sihna a hong piang ahi hi. 
Lamentations4:14 Amaute mittaw bangin kongzing lakah vak uh a, kuama lawn ngam loh dingin silenai tawh a dim uh hi." 
Lamentations4:15 Mite in, “Paikhia un, mi ninte aw, hong lawngkha kei un,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Tua bangin minam khat khit nam khat kiangah pai kawikawi uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in amaute a ngai kei uh hi." 
Lamentations4:16 Topa in amaute a zat nopna om nawn lo ahih manin amaute a thehthang hi. Amah in i makaite le i siampite a awlmawh nawn kei hi. 
Lamentations4:17 Huhna a ngenin ka khuadakdak uh a, khuadakzo nawn lo zah dongin ka om uh hangin bangmah ka ngah kei uh hi. A hong pia zo lo ding minamte tungah huhna ka ngenngenkha uh hi." 
Lamentations4:18 Galte in hong vilsim uh ahih manin ka vakkhia ngam kei uh hi. Ka hun uh a beita hi a, a beina hun a tungzo ahi hi." 
Lamentations4:19 Mu ak bawh sangin a manlang zaw-in amaute in a hong delh uh hi. Amaute in mualtung panin hong delhsuk uh a, theihkholh lohin a hong man khin uh hi." 
Lamentations4:20 Amaute in galte’ khutsung panin a hong huhzo dingin ka up uh, Pasian’ teel a muanhuai kumpi a hong matsak uh hi." 
Lamentations4:21 Edom le Uz mite aw, tu-in nuinui mai unla, ahih theih laiteng kipak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh siatna hun hong tung ding a, a hong tun ciangin na guaktangun omin, maizumin na om ding uh hi." 
Lamentations4:22 Jerusalem in a mawhna thaman a sang khinzo ta ahi hi. Ka thuak ding uh a nasia penpen teng ka thuak khinzo ta uh hi. Ahi zongin Edom aw, Topa in nang gim hong pia ding a, na mawhna khempeuh a hong pholak ding hi." 
Lamentations5:1 Topa aw, kote tunga thupiangte hong phawk in. Hong en inla, ka maizumna uh hong mu in." 
Lamentations5:2 Ka neihsa teng uh gamdang mite’ khut sungah tung mangkhin a, ka innsung uhah gamdang mite teng ta uh hi." 
Lamentations5:3 Ka pate uh gal in hong thahsak khin a, ka nute uh meigong suak khin uh hi." 
Lamentations5:4 Ka tuidawn tawm ding uh lei ding kul ta a, ka sing cihtawm ding uh lei ding kul ta hi." 
Lamentations5:5 Kalaoh van pua le la van pua bangin nakpitakin a hong kihawl gawpgawp hi. Gim mahmah hinapi tawlngakna ding hun a hong kipia kei hi. 
Lamentations5:6 Ka nuntak theih nadingun Assiria le Egypt-te kiangah an ngen dingin ka pai uh hi. 
Lamentations5:7 Ka pu ka pate un mawhna a bawl manun a si khin uh hi. Amaute’ mawhna kote in ka thuak uh hi. 
Lamentations5:8 Silate sangin a zahpihhuai zaw mite in kote hong uk tazen uh a, amaute’ khutsung panin kuamah in a hong honkhiazo kei hi." 
Lamentations5:9 Gam sung khempeuhah misuamte dim ahih manin, luangkham zen mahin an zong dingin ka pai uh hi." 
Lamentations5:10 Gilkial luat manin cisa-in ka nattun uh a, ka pumpi uh mei-am sa a bang hi." 
Lamentations5:11 Zion mual le Judah gam sung khempeuhah ka zite uh le ka nungakte uh hong kibuansak hi. 
Lamentations5:12 Makaite khempeuh hong kikhailupsak a, ka puteekte uh a hong kithusimsak kei hi." 
Lamentations5:13 Tangvalte sila bangin aana tawh an kigawisak a, naupangnote sing kitomsakin a lelh pipi uh a kipuasak hi." 
Lamentations5:14 Puteekte khuapi kongpi-ah tu nawn lo uh a, khangnote inla a sa nawn kei uh hi." 
Lamentations5:15 Lungnopna khempeuh bei mangkhin ta a, lungdamna khempeuh lungkhamna a suak ta hi." 
Lamentations5:16 Kisaktheihna ding bangmah om nawn lo a, mawh ihih manin gimna a thuak ihi hi." 
Lamentations5:17 I lungsim mahmah cina a, i khitui luangte in khua hong musak thei kei hi." 
Lamentations5:18 Zion mual gamdai ta a, kinusia khin ahih manin se-alte a kawi vak ta hi." 
Lamentations5:19 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na hih leh a tawntungin kumpi na hi a, hun tawp dongin na uk paisuak ding hi." 
Lamentations5:20 Bang hangin sauveipi hong pampaih na hi hiam? Kote hong phawkkik nawn lo takpi ding na hi hiam? 
Lamentations5:21 Topa aw, kote hong kaikhawm kik in! Hong kaikhawm kik in! A beisa sauveipi lai mah bangin hong thaksuaksakkik in." 
Lamentations5:22 Kote hong nial tawntung takpi ding na hi hiam? Na hehna in ciangtan hun nei thei lo ding ahi hiam? 
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawmthum ka phak kum, a kha lina, a ni nga ni-in Babylon gam a om Khebar Gun gei-ah sala om Jew midangte tawh ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. Tua ka maangmuhna ah van hong kihong a, Pasian ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel1:2 Tua hun pen Kumpi Jehoiakhin salin a kimat zawh a kum ngana, tua kha sungah a ni nga ni mah ahi hi." 
Ezekiel1:3 Tua Babylon gam Khebar Gun gei-ah ka om laitakin siampi Buzi’ tapa keimah Ezekiel in Topa’ hong thugenna ka za a, ama vangliatna zong kei tungah a hong tunna ka phawk hi." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ka khuadak leh leilu lam panin huihpi a hong nung ka mu hi. Tua huihpi tawh a hong ton meiipi lak panin khua hong phia a, ka kimkotteng taang pempam hi. Tua khuaphiatna mun pen sumngo tawh kibangin a taang hi." 
Ezekiel1:5 Tua huihpi laizangah ganhing li a om tawh a kibang pian ka mu hi. Tua ka muhte in mihing lim pua napi-in," 
Ezekiel1:6 maitang li le kha li ciat a nei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:7 A khete uh mam zeza a, ahi zongin a khepekte uh bawng khe tawh kibang hi. Tua ganhingte pen a kinawtngil sumngo tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:8 Maitang li le kha li ciat a neih ban uhah, a khaphung nuai a pangpi uh panin a meengkhia mihing khut tawh a kibang li ciat mah nei lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:9 Tua ganhing lite in a kha nih ciat uh zalin, a mong le a mong kimatsak uh a, ki-umcihin sikli nei-in kimu hi. Amaute a gamtat uh ciangin a li-in tatkhatin tang uh ahih manin a pumpi uh kituam hei lo hi." 
Ezekiel1:10 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. Maitang ngeina lamah mihing mai, taklam pangah humpinelkai mai, veilam pangah bawngtal mai, a dek lamah muvanlai mai nei ciat uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Tua ganhingte in a kha nih ciat uh zalin a zom a omte’ kha mong dawn tawh kimatsak uh a, a omlai a kha nih tegel ciat uh khupin a pumpi uh a tuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei-in mun khempeuh a maingat suak uh ahih manin a painop uh ciangin a pumpi uh kihei kul loin a utna peuh uhah pai thei pahpah uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:13 Tua ganhingte lakah meikuang tawh a kibang a phia niloh om hi. Tua meikuang pen kuang pha mahmah a, khua phiasak zaizai hi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Tua ganhingte khuaphia mah bangin kin zalzal kawikawi uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:15 Tua ganhing lite ka et laitakin amaute in leengpei khat ciat a neihlam uh ka mu a, a leengpeite leilakah kinga hi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tua leengpeite a vekpi-in kibang kim a, suangmanpha bangin tee uh hi. Tua leengpeite in a kikantan lamin pei khat ciat nei thuah uh ahih manin," 
Ezekiel1:17 a utna lam peuhpeuhah pai thei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tua leengpei kualte tungah mittang vive a dimin om hi. 
Ezekiel1:19 Tua ganhingte a kin ciangin leengpeite tawh kin khawm a, leilak panin tua ganhingte van lamah kangin a kahtoh ciangin a leengpeite tawh zong kangto khawm hi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Amau’ utna peuhpeuh uhah tua ganhingte pai uh a, tua leengpeite pen a ganhingte’ khutnuai ahih manin, ganhingte’ paina peuhpeuhah a pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tua leengpeite pen ganhingte’ khutnuai-a om ahih manin ganhingte pai leh pai-in, ganhingte khawl leh khawlin, vanah kahto leh kahto-in, a ganhingte’ tat bang teekteekin a ta uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:22 Tua ganhingte’ lu tung sanah limlang tawh a kibawl a kuum kiukiau pian khat om hi. 
Ezekiel1:23 Tua a kuum nuai-ah, ganhingte in a kizompih ciatte’ lamah a kha nihte ciat zal uh a, a kha nih ciat uh tawh amau’ pumpi ciat a tuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:24 Tua ciangin amaute’ leenna a khaging uh ka za hi. Tua a khaging pen tuipi ging, galkap honpi huging, le Vanglian Pasian’ awgingte tawh kibang hi. A leen nawn loh uh ciangin a kha uh khup a," 
Ezekiel1:25 ahi zongin amaute’ lu tung sana om a kuum tung san panin awging kiza lai hi. 
Ezekiel1:26 Tua kuum tungzangah, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat om a, tua tokhom tungah mi tawh a kibang pian lim khat a tu hi." 
Ezekiel1:27 Tua tokhom tungah a tu ka muh pen meikhuk sunga kihalsan sumngo bangin taang heuhau a, a kimkot khempeuh zong tua mah bangin taang pempam hi." 
Ezekiel1:28 Tua a taang khuavak in meii lakah sakhituihup a kai ciangin a neih mel nam tuamtuam khempeuh a nei kim hi. Topa’ vangliatna lim pen tu-a ka gen bang ahi hi. Hih bang ka muh ciangin leilakah ka boksuk a, tua ciangin awging khat ka za hi." 
Ezekiel2:1 Tua awging in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, dingto in. Nang tungah thu kong gen nuam hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tua bangin thu hong gen laitakin ka sungah Pasian’ kha hong lutin ka khe-in hong dingtosak hi. Tua ciangin a awging kizom lai-in kei kiangah," 
Ezekiel2:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, kei hong langpangin a hong lehdo Israel minamte kiangah nang a hong sawl ka hi hi. A pu a pate uh mah bangin amaute in tu dongin kei hong lehdo lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Amaute a lungsim uh khauhin paupeeng uh hi. Keimah Topa Pasian in amaute tungah ka gen ding thute a va gen dingin a hong sawl ka hi hi. 
Ezekiel2:5 Amaute in nangma thu hong mang a, hong mang kei zongin, amaute lakah kamsang khat a omkhit lamtak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Ahi zongin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute ahi a, a thugente uh ahi zongin na kihta kei ding hi. Amaute in nang ling hong kaihnelh ding uh a, momai lak a om na bang ding hi. Tua bang hitaseleh, hih a lehdo thei mite’ maipuak zia le amaute’ kampaunate hangin lau tuan kei in." 
Ezekiel2:7 Amaute in hong mang a, hong mang kei zongin, nang tungah kong gen khempeuh amaute tungah va gen in. Amaute pen a lehdo thei mi ahihna uh phawk in." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah kong gen thute ngai in. Amaute bangin hong langpang kei in. Na kam ka inla, tu-in ka hong piak ding na ne in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel2:9 Tua ciangin kei lamah khut khat hong kizan a, tua khut in laizial tawn khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel2:10 Tua ciangin tua khut in tua lai kizial hong phel a, a lang nih tuakah lai kigelhin, dahlekah thu le thumletau thute vive a kigelh ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel3:1 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah ka hong piak hih laizial ne in. Tua ciangin va pai inla, Israel mite kiangah thu va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:2 Tua ahih manin kei zong ka kam ka ka a, ka nek dingin a laizial hong pia hi." 
Ezekiel3:3 Amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, ka hong piak laizial ne inla, na gilpi dimtakin ne in,” a hong ci hi. Kei zong tua laizial ka ne a, khuaizu tawh kibangin khum ka sa mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite kiangah pai inla, nang tungah kong gen peuhpeuh, amaute tungah va gen in." 
Ezekiel3:5 A pau na theih loh minam dangte kiangah a hong sawl ka hi kei hi. Na mipih Israel-te kiangah a hong sawl ka hi hi. 
Ezekiel3:6 A pau na theih loh, pau haksa a zang minam liante kiangah nang hong sawl hi leng, amaute in na thugen hong mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ahi zongin Israel mite khat beek in na thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi. Keima kam teekteek nangawn ngai lo ding uh hi. Amaute a lungsim uh khauh a, demnopna lungsim nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tu-in amaute mah bangin a khauh mahmah, a duai mahmahin nang kong bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Suang khempeuh sangin a sakzaw, diamond suang zahin a sakin na lungsim kong bawl ding hi. Tua ahih manin hih a lehdo thei mite kihta kei in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:10 Tua khit ciangin amah in thu hong genthuah lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah kong thugen khempeuh limtakin ngai inla ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel3:11 Tua ciangin amaute in na thu hong ngai a, hong ngai kei zongin, salin a om na mipihte kiangah va pai inla, nang tungah kong thugen khempeuh amaute tungah va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tua ciangin Pasian’ kha in hong paipihto a, zinling zahin a gin’ ngaih awging khat ka nungah ka za a, “Vantungah a om Topa, ama minthanna hangin phat un,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Ezekiel3:13 Ganhingte in huihlakah a khazapna le leengpei gingte ka za a, zinling zahin gin’ ngaih mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel3:14 Pasian’ kha in hong paikhiatpih laitakin lungkim hetloin ka heh suak mahmah hi. Ahi zongin Topa’ vangliatna in kei hong zozaw hi. 
Ezekiel3:15 Tua ahih manin ka mipih salte’ omna, Khebar Gun gei-a a om Telabib munah ka va tung a, ka muhsa thute ngaihsunin tua lai-a amaute lakah ni sagih sung ka om hi." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ni sagih a cin khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel minamte’ galvil pa dingin nang kong koih hi. Nangma tungah ka hong gen hilhkholhnate khempeuh amaute tungah na gensawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:18 Migilo pa khat pen si ding hi, ci-in kong gen ciangin, amah kikheelin a nuntak theih nadingin thu na hilhkholh kei leh, tua mipa pen mawhnei mahin si ding a, ahi zongin ama sihna thu ahihleh nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:19 Migilo khat hilhkhol napi-in a mawh bawlna a tawp kei leh, a mawhnei mahin si ding a, ahi zongin nangma nuntakna suakta ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Mihoih mahmah khat gamtatsiat ding hong kipan leh a lauhuaina munah amah ka koih ding hi. Amah hilhkhol kei lecin si ding hi. Ama mawhna hangin si ding a, ama gamtat hoihsate phawkin ka nei kei ding hi. Ama sihna thu-ah nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:21 Ahi zongin a khialhloh nadingin mihoih khat na hilh a, na thu hong mangin mawhna a bawl kei leh amah nungta ding hi. Nang zong na suakta ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ka sungah Topa’ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka phawk a, amah in kei kiangah, “Ding inla, kuam sungah va pai in. Tua lai mun panin nang kiangah thu kong gen ding hi,” hong cihna ka za hi." 
Ezekiel3:23 Tua ahih manin kei zong kuam sungah ka va pai a, Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh bang teek mahin tua lai-ah Topa’ minthanna vang ka mu hi. Kei zong lei-ah ka boksuk a," 
Ezekiel3:24 ahi zongin ka sungah Pasian’ kha hong lutin ka khe-in hong dingsak hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Inn-ah ciah inla, inn kikhaknelh in." 
Ezekiel3:25 Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khauhual tawh nang hong kikhih ding a, mite kiangah na paikhia thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:26 Na leii ka zawsak ding a, hih a lehdo thei mite na thuhilh thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ahi zongin nang kong hopih kik ciangin kong pau theisakkik ding a, amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi,’ na ci ding hi. Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat in na thu hong ngai ding uh a, ahi zongin amaute pen a lehdo thei minam ahih uh manin pawlkhat in na thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:1 Tua khit ciangin, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leiseek khat la-in na mai-ah koih inla, Jerusalem khuapi lahna-in tua leiseek tung git in." 
Ezekiel4:2 Tua ciangin tua khuapi a ki-umcihna lah nadingin na kiimah dumte, phungte, galpanna phualte, le kulh sukkhapna ding molhtumte bawl in." 
Ezekiel4:3 Tua ciangin sikpeek khat la inla, nang le khuapi kikalah kulh lim dingin koih in. Tua ciangin khuapi lam en in. Tua khuapi a ki-umcih hi-in, nang pen a umcihte’ lim ding na hi hi. Hih pen Israel mite a dingin lim hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Tua ciangin na veilam pang delhphahin lum in. Israel mite’ mawhna hanga gimna nangma tungah kong nga ding hi. Tua lai munah lumin amaute’ mawhna 
Ezekiel4:5 ni zathum le ni sawmkua sung na thuak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gimthuak ding kum khat sung dingin ni khat, amau’ thuak ding kum zah nangmah in a ni-in na thuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:6 Hih bangin na gamtat khit ciangin na taklam delhphahin na kihei leuleu ding a, Judah mite’ mawhna ni sawmli sung gim na thuak leuleu ding hi. Nangma thuak ni khat pen amau’ thuak ding kum khat tang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a ki-umcihna sal gega in. Na puanak ban zialto inla, tua khuapi siatna ding thu gen in." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nang pen khauhual tawh kong hencip ding a, tua khuapi umcihna a kiman mateng na kihei thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Tu-in mangbuh, mangbuhham, belawi, taang, le mangbuhman pawlkhat la inla, tuate hel khawmin anlumin bawl in. Na veilam delhphahin na lup hun ni zathum le ni sawmkua sung tua na bawl anlum na ne ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:10 Nek khatin anlum shekel sawmnih gik bek na ne ding a, ni khatin khatvei bek na ne ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Tui zong duh zahzah hi loin, ni khatin thawl khat bek na dawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Na nek ding anlum pen mite’ muhin mihing ekkeu khawmin tuate mei-in na cih khit ciangin tua sungah na em ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:13 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel mite, gam dangah ka thehthang hun ciangin thukham in nek dingin a kham an ninte tu-a mah bangin ne ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:14 Ahi zongin kei zong ka dawngkik a, “Topa Pasian aw, cikmahin kei ka kininsak ngei kei hi. Ka neu tung a kipan tu dongin ama thu-in a sitawm ganhing sa ahi a, gamsate’ nek baang ahi zongin ka ne ngei kei hi. A ninin a kiseh an khat peuhpeuh ka ne ngei nai kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua ahihleh pha hi. Mihing ek tangin bawng-ek na zang ding a, tua bawng-ek am sungah na em ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:16 Tua ciangin amah in thu hong genthuah lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi sungah an ka beisak ding a, mite in lunghihmawhna tawh a annek a tuidawnte uh ciangtan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel4:17 An le tui loin amaute om ding uh a, amaute lunggimin, a tawpna-ah a mawhna hangun beimang ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel5:1 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, namsau hiam khat la inla, na sam le na khamul ki-atkhia in. Tua ciangin a multe tawi tehin seh thum suah in." 
Ezekiel5:2 Umcihna lim na man ciangin khuapi lim sungah seh khat haltum in. Tua ciangin seh khat la leuleu inla, khuapi kiimah na paikawmin na namsau tawh satnen in. A omlai seh khat pen huihlakah lawn in. Keimah in ka namsau tawh tuate ka sat ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:3 Tua ciangin a multe tawmno khat la inla, na puanmongteep-ah tun in." 
Ezekiel5:4 Tua ciangin na tunsate sung panin tawmcikkhat la leuleu inla, meikuang sungah lawnin kangtumsak in. Tua sung panin mei hong kuangin Israel minam buppi hong lawh ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel5:5 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Hih Jerusalem khuapi lim en in. Leitung laizangah ka koih a, a kimkotah gamdang khempeuh ka omsak hi." 
Ezekiel5:6 Ahi zongin Jerusalem in ka thupiakna lehdo-in, minam dangte sangin a gilo zaw hong suak a, a kiima om gamdangte sangin a thumang lo zaw hong suak hi. Jerusalem in ka thupiakte nialin, ka thukhamte zui nuam lo hi." 
Ezekiel5:7 Jerusalem aw, tu-in Topa Pasian ahi keima thugente ngai in. Ka thukhamte zui loin, ka thupiakte ngai lo na hih manin na kiima om minam dangte sangin siatna tamzaw na piangsak hi. Minam dangte’ gamtat ngeinate na zui hi." 
Ezekiel5:8 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang kong langpanna thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Minam dang khempeuhte’ muhin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi. 
Ezekiel5:9 Ka deih loh hih nate khempeuh na gamtatna hangin cikmahin ka hih ngei nai loh, cikmah ciangin zong ka hih nawn loh ding thu tawh nang Jerusalem gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:10 Tua kong gimpiakna hangin nang Jerusalem khuapi sungah papite in a tapate’ sa ne-in, tapate in a pate uh’ sa ne ding uh hi. No a mite gim kong pia ding a, a suaktakha sunsunte nangawn mun khempeuhah kong thehthang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah a nungta ka hih mah bangin, note in siatna nam khempeuh le a muhdahhuai gamtatna tawh ka biakinn ninsak na hih manun cikze hetloin note kong sukmang taak kei leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel5:12 Note seh thum suah seh khat pen cina le gilkialin khuapi sungah na si ding uh hi. Seh thum suah seh khat, khuapi kiimah namsau-in na si ding uh hi. A omlai seh thum suah seh khat ahihleh mun khempeuhah hong thehthangin namsau tawh kong delh ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ka lung a kim dongin kong hih ding a, ka hehna le ka sinsona teng na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah hih thute hong tun ciangin, note’ cihtak lohna hangin deihsak luatna tawh a hong heh pau ka hihna na phawk ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Na kiim uhah a om minamte in note hong muhkhak uh ciangin hong phitsanin hong pelh ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:15 Note tungah hehin sinsona tawh gim kong piak ciangin na kim uha a om minam dangte khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong muhdah et-in hong simmawhbawl ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:16 Na annek ding uh hong khaktan sakin note kong puksisak ding hi. Note a hong susia ding gilkialna pen thaltang’ kapkhak bangin na na sa velval ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:17 Na tate uh a sisak dingin kialpi hong tungsakin, a that dingin gamsate kong paisak ding hi. Natna, gal kidona, le gal kikapnate in note hong sisak ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel6:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mualsang dawnte en inla, amaute tungah kong thupiak gen in." 
Ezekiel6:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual liante, mual neute, guam thukte, kuampite kiangah ka gen ding thute, Israel minamte in a ngaihna ding uh gen in. Mite in milim a biakna munte a vatgawp dingin namsau khat kong kuansak ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:4 Biakna taute kiphelkek ding a, paknamtui taute kisatkham ding hi. Tua lai-ah a om mi khempeuh kithatin, a milimte uh’ mai-ah kipaithang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:5 Israel misi luanghawmte ka thehthang gawp ding a, a guhte uh biakna tau kiimah ka lawnthang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:6 Israel khuapite khempeuh beimang ding a, milim a biakna uh mun khempeuh kisusia ding hi. Tua ahih manin a biakna taute uh le a milimte uh vutlevai suakin, a paknamtui taute uh kisatvui gawp ding ahih manin, milim biak nadingin a bawlsa khempeuh uh maimang ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:7 Mun citengah mi kithatlum ding a, a suakta sunsunte in kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong phawk ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Tua banga kihonthahna panin pawlkhat ka suaktasak ding a, minam dangte lakah kithehthangin," 
Ezekiel6:9 salin a om ding uh hi. Tua bangin salin a omna uh mun panin, amau’ lungsim cihtak lohna uh hangin kei hong nusiatna uh le keimah sangin milim a deihzawkna uh hangin a maizum nadingun gim a pia ding ka hih lamtak thei-in kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amau’ gitlohna le a haitatnasate uh hangin amau mahmah kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:10 Tua ciangin kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong thei ding uh a, amaute gimpiak ding ka genkholhnate a mawkpau ka hihlohlam a phawk ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel6:11 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Israel mite’ gitlohna le a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh hangin na khut singin lei tuan inla, a dahin kap in. Amaute galkidona, kial, le natna hangin si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:12 A gamla a om mite cina-in si ding uh a, a nai-a omte gal sungah si ding uh hi. A omlai sunte gilkialin puksi ding uh hi. Amaute in keima hehna thuak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:13 Milimte’ lak le biakna tau kiimah si luanghawm kithehthang ding a, mual sang tungteng, mual dawnzangteng, singniim nuai citeng, tawsaw kung lian nuai khempeuh, le milim biakna-in paknamtui a halna uh mun khempeuhah si luanghawm om ziazua kawikawi ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:14 Keimah in ka khut zanin a gam khempeuh uh ka susia ding hi. Leitaw lam sehnel gam pan a kipanin leilu lam Riblah khuapi dongin, Israel mite’ omna mun khempeuh, siit nei loin ka vatmai ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel7:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel leitang tawh kisai-in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: A beina hita! Gam buppi a beina hita hi." 
Ezekiel7:3 Israel-te aw, tu-in na beina ding uh hong tungta a, note in ka hehna tu-in na thuakta ding uh hi. Na gamtatnasa uh tawh kizui-in thu kong khen ding a, na gamtatsiatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:4 Note kong zah kei ding a, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatnasate uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel7:5 Topa Pasian in a gen thu in: “Note’ tungah haksatna khat khit khat a banbanin hong tung thuahthuah ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:6 A beina hong tungta hi. Note a man na hita uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:7 Israel gam sungah a teng note’ beina ding hong tungta ding hi. Mualsang dawn citeng a biakna munte-ah lungdamna om nawn loin buaina bek a omna ding hong naita hi. 
Ezekiel7:8 A sawt loin ka hehna thu na thuak ding uh a, na gamtatnasate uh hangin thu hong khenin, a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:9 Note kong zah kei ding a, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatnasate uh hangin gim a hong pia ding ka hi hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna le note tungah gim a hong piapa ka hihna na thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Siatna ding hun hong tungta hi. Na ngongtatna uh khang a, na kiphatsakna uh lian hi." 
Ezekiel7:11 Migilote’ hauhna le lungmuannate haksa loin beimang ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:12 A hun hong tungta a, a ni hong naita hi. Mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna hong tungta ding ahih manin sumlei sumzuak nasepnate a kimanna om nawn lo hi." 
Ezekiel7:13 A neihsa a zuakkhia pa in a nuntak sungin a zuaksa van ngahkik lo ding hi. Mi khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung ahih manin a mawhna hangun kuamah nungta lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:14 “Amaute in gal peengkul tum uh a, a vekpi-un kiging uh hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna tungkim ding ahih manin galsim dingin kuamah kuankhia zo lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:15 Khua pualamah galkidona om a, khua sungah cinatna le gilkialna om hi. Gamlak a om khempeuh gal sungah si ding uh a, khuasunga om khempeuh cina le gilkialin si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:16 Vakhu lau bangin mi pawlkhatte in mualtung tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin amau’ mawhna hangin si veve ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Mi khempeuh’ khut zaw dakdakin, a khuk uh ling kelkel ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Amaute in dahna limin puanhampi silh ding uh a, pumlingawp ding uh hi. A sam uh kimettolsak ding a, a mindai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:19 Topa’ hehna amau’ tungah a tun ni ciangin, a ngun a khamte un amaute suahtak thei lo ahih manin, a ngun a khamte uh nin bangin kongzing lakah paai ding uh hi. A gilkial uh ciangin zong an bangin tuate ne thei lo uh hi. Ngun le khamte in mawhna sungah amaute tumpihzaw hi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Amaute in a kiphatsakpih uh kizepna a manphate, a muhdahhuai milim dingin a bawl uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute’ hauhna pen amau mah in a kih dingin ka bawl hi." 
Ezekiel7:21 Amau’ nate, gamdang mite ka sutsak ding a, a neihsa khempeuh uh migilote sutsakin, ka ninsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ka biakinn a kinitsak ciangin ka kho kei ding hi. Gutate in ka biakinn luhin ninsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:23 “Na khuttum uh zial un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah mi kithahna dim a, khua sungah ngongtatna dim hi." 
Ezekiel7:24 Minam gilo pente hong paipihin na innte uh ka luahsak ding hi. Minam dangte in na biakna mun ngeite uh a nitsak ciangin mi thahat-a a kineite’ kimuanna beita ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:25 Lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin lungnopna na zong ding uh a, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:26 Lungkhamna khat khit khat a banbanin na tuak ding uh a, thusia bekbek na zaza ding uh hi. Kamsangte kiangah thu na dong ding uh hi. Siampite in mite tungah hong hilh ding thu thei lo ding uh a, upate in hong gen ding mel thei lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kumpipa dahin thum ding a, ulian pen pa a cih nading thei loin omcipin, mi khempeuh lau-in ling ding uh hi. Na gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding a, midangte tungah thu na khen bangun note tungah thu kong khen ding hi. Hih bangin kong hih ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na thei ding uh hi,” cihna thu ahi hi." 
Ezekiel8:1 Salin ka om uh kum guk a phak kum, a kha gukna, a ni nga ni-in sala om Judah makaite tawh ka inn sungah thu genin ka tut laitakun, thakhatin Topa Pasian’ vangliatna ka sungah hong tum hi." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ka khuadak leh, mihing tawh a kibang pian khat ka mu hi. A kawng nuaisiah ding teng meikuang tawh kibang a, a kawng tungsiah ding teng sumsan kinawtngil tawh kibangin san heuhau hi." 
Ezekiel8:3 A khut ding tawh a kibang pian khat in hong sawkin ka samin hong man hi. Tua ciangin hih ka maang sungin Pasian’ kha in vanah hong lenpihto-in Jerusalem khuapi hong tunpih hi. Tua lai panin, Pasian a hehsuahna ahi milim a omna mun, biakinn tual sungnung lutna, leilu lam kongpi-ah hong paipih hi." 
Ezekiel8:4 Kuam sungah ka maang a ka muh bang teekin tua sanah Pasian’ minthanna vang ka mu hi. 
Ezekiel8:5 Amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leilu lamah khuadak in,” hong ci hi. Kei zong ka khuadak leh, kongpi kianga biakna tau kiangah, Pasian’ hehsuahna milim ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute’ gamtatnate na mu hiam? Israel mite in a bawl uh a muhdahhuai gamtatnate, ka mun siangtho panin a gamla semsemah kei hong nawhkhiatnate en in. Hihte sangin a mindaihuai zaw nangawn na mu lai ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:7 Tua ciangin biakinn tual puanung lutna gei-ah hong paipih a, tua lai-ah kulh a vanna mun khat hong lak hi." 
Ezekiel8:8 Amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih kulhpi tovang in,” a hong ci hi. Kei zong kulh ka tovang a, kongkhak khat ka tuak hi." 
Ezekiel8:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “A sungah tum inla, a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate uh va en in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:10 Kei zong a sungah tumin ka khuadak hi. Kawm tung khempeuhah gul lim, adang ganhing ninte lim, le Israel mite’ biak ganhing khempeuh a kisuai ziazua ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel8:11 Tua lai-ah Israel minam makai sawmsagih na om a, tuate’ lakah Shafan’ tapa Jaazaniah zong na om hi. Amaute in paknamtui halna kuang khat ciat tawi uh a, paknamtui a kihalna khute van lamah kahto biaibuai hi." 
Ezekiel8:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite a kimu lo munah a gamtatnate uh tu-in na mu hiam? Amaute in milim a dimna inn sungah biakna a bawl uh hi. Amaute in, ‘ Topa in hong mu lo hi. Topa in hih gam nusia khinta hi,’ ci-in paulap zong uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:13 Tua ciangin, “Hihte sangin a muhdahhuai zaw a gamtatna uh zong na mu lai ding hi,” hong cithuah lai hi." 
Ezekiel8:14 Tua ciangin leilu lama om biakinn kongpi-ah hong paipih a, Tammuz a cih uh pasian a sihna hangin dahin a kapin a om numeite a hong lak hi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na mu hiam? Hihte sangin a muhdahhuai zaw na mu lai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Tua ciangin biakinn tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. Tua lai-ah biakinn kongkhak gei, biakna taute le innliim kikal sanah mihing sawmnih le nga khawng na om a, biakna tau nungngatin nisuahna lam nga-in nisuak tung na bia uh hi." 
Ezekiel8:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, huate na mu hiam? Hih Judah gammite in na muhsa a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate uh tawh lungkim nai lo lai uh a, gam sung khempeuhah ngongtatna dimsak uh hi. Tua banah ka heh semsem nadingin hih bangin gamta uh hi. A siathei tawpin hih bangin kei hong simmawh bawlna hong thei in." 
Ezekiel8:18 Tua ahih manin amaute in ka heh mahmahna thuak ding uh a, amaute zah loin, zong ka khasiat kei ding hi. Amaute in a thaneih tawpun kei kiangah thu hong nget uh hangin amaute’ thungetna ka ngai kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel9:1 Tua ciangin Pasian hong kiko a, “Hih khuapi a susia ding no mihingte hong pai unla, na hiam zat ciat ding uh zong hong keng un,” ci-in a sam hi." 
Ezekiel9:2 Leilu lam biakinn kongpi pualam panin thakhatin mihing guk hong pai-in hiam khat ciat hong tawi uh hi. Saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawi mi khat tawh zong hong paikhawm uh hi. A vekpi-un sumngo biakna tau gei-ah hong ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:3 Tua ciangin ama omnasa kherub-te’ tung panin Israel-te’ Pasian’ minthanna vang hong pai-in biakinn kongah hong om hi. Tua ciangin amah in saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawipa samin," 
Ezekiel9:4 “Jerusalem khuasung khempeuhah pai kawikawi inla, hih khuapi sungah a muhdahhuai gamtatnate a kisepna hangin dahin a lungkham mi khempeuhte’ taltangah ciaptehna va bawl in,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Ezekiel9:5 Tua ciangin Pasian in a midangte kiangah, “Khuasung khempeuhah amah va zui unla, mi va that un. Kuamah hinkhawi kei unla, kuamah khasiat kei un." 
Ezekiel9:6 Puteek, nungak, tangval, numei, naupang dong takin va thatlum un la, ahi zongin a taltangah ciaptehna a nei peuhmah su kei un. Hih ka biakinn mahmah panin kipan pah un,” a cihna ka za hi. Tua ahih manin tua biakinn sungah a ding Israel makaite, kipatna-in a nei pah uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:7 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Biakinn ninsak un. A tualtengah misi luanghawm dimsak un. Tu-in kipan un,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuankhia-in khua sungah mi thah ding a kipan uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:8 Tua bangin mi a kithah laitakin keimah guak ka om hi. Kei zong lei-ah bokin, “Topa Pasian aw, Jerusalem tungah na hehna hangin Israel mi a omlaisun khempeuh that mangkhin ding na hi hiam?” ci-in ka kiko hi." 
Ezekiel9:9 Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Israel mite le Judah mite’ mawhna nak liat mahmah hi. Gam sung khempeuh mi thahna tawh kidimsak uh a, Jerusalem khuapi, siatna namkim tawh kidimsak uh hi. Amaute in, ‘ Topa in i gam susia khin a, Topa in eite hong mu lo hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:10 Tua ahih manin amaute ka zah kei ding a, kuamah ka khasiat kei ding hi. Amaute’ gamtatna, amaute’ tung mah ka tusak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel9:11 Tua ciangin saihadial puan silhin lai gelhna a tawi mipa in Topa’ kiangah thu hong zasakkik a, “Nong sawl bangin ka sem khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel10:1 Tua ciangin kherub-te’ lu tung sanah a om a kuum ka et leh sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat, tua a kuum tungah a om hi." 
Ezekiel10:2 Tua ciangin Pasian in saihadial puan a silhpa kiangah, “Na khut dimin mei-am tawi inla, kherub nuai-a om leengpeite kikalah va om in. Tua ciangin khuapi tungah a mei-amte theh in,” ci-in a sawl hi. Kei zong ama pai ka en gige hi." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tua ciangin mipa a pai laitakin kherub-te pen biakinn leitaw lamah na ding uh a, biakinn tual sungnungteng dimin meiipi a kai hi." 
Ezekiel10:4 Kherub-te’ tung panin Topa’ minthanna vang hong paikhia-in biakinn kongah va om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah meiipi hong kai a, biakinn tualah Topa’ minthanna vang taang zeizai hi." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kherub-te’ khazap ging pen biakinn tual puanung ciang dongah kiza a, Vanglian Pasian a pau ciangin a awging tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel10:6 Kherub-te’ nuai-a om leengpeite’ kikal panin mei a la dingin Topa in saihadial puan silhpa a sawl ciangin, tua mipa zong va pai-in leengpei khat gei-ah a va ding hi." 
Ezekiel10:7 Tua ciangin kherub khat in a khut zanin amau’ kikal-a om meikhuk sawkin mei-am pawlkhat la a, saihadial puan a silhpa’ khut sungah a koih hi. Saihadial puan a silhpa zong tua mei-amte tawi-in a paikhia hi." 
Ezekiel10:8 Tua kherub-te in a kha nuai ciat uhah mihing khut tawh a kibang nei ciat uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:9 Tua kherub-te’ gei-ah leengpei khat ciat omin, tua leengpeite suangmanpha bangin tee hi." 
Ezekiel10:10 Tua leengpeite a pianzia kibang kim a, leengpei khat in a kikantanin pei dang khat ciat nei thuah uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Tua kherub-te a pai ciangin kihei kul loin a utna lam peuhpeuh uhah pai thei uh hi. A pai nading lam a nga a pei paina-ah adangte in zui-in kihei tuan lo uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:12 A leengpei kualte a pei kanna khaute le a pei buppi dimin mittang om hi. 
Ezekiel10:13 Hih leengpeite pen maang ka muh masakna sungate mah tawh a kibang ahi hi. 
Ezekiel10:14 Tua kherub-te in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. A maitang khatna bawngtal maitang, a nihna mihing maitang, a thumna humpinelkai maitang, a lina muvanlai maitang tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Hih kherub-te pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh ganhingte mah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih kherub-te leengto uh a," 
Ezekiel10:16 amau a kin uh ciangin a leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. A leeng dingin a kha a zal uh ciangin zong leengpeite in zui lai uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:17 Kherub-te a khawl ciangin leengpeite khawl a, kherub-te a leen ciangin leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua leengpeite pen kherub-te’ khutnuai-ah a om ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:18 Tua ciangin biakinn kong panin Topa’ minthanna vang paikhia-in kherub-te’ tung sanah va om hi. 
Ezekiel10:19 Tua bangin ka et laitakin kherub-te in zong a kha uh zalin leilak panin leengto uh a, leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Biakinn nisuahna lam kongpi-ah khawl uh a, amaute’ tung sanah Israel Pasian’ minthanna vang zong a khawl hi." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hih kherub-te pen, Israel Pasian a kumpi tokhom tawh a pua, Khebar Gun gei-a ka muhte mah hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Amaute in maitang li, kha li, le a kha nuai ciat uhah mihing khut tawh a kibang khut nei ciat uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:22 Amaute’ maitang pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muhsa maitangte mah tawh kibang teekteek a, a pai uh ciangin a mailam ciat mahah tang takin a pai thei uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:1 Tua ciangin Pasian’ kha in biakinn nisuahna lam kongpi-ah hong paipih hi. Tua kongpi gei-ah mihing sawmnih le nga na om a, tuate lakah minam makai ahi nihte, Azzur’ tapa Jaazaniah le Benaiah’ tapa Pelatiah-te zong na kihel uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:2 Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih mite pen khuapi sungah thu hoih lo a gen migilote ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:3 Amaute in, ‘Inn lam ding hun nai lo hi. Hih khuapi pen an huanna beel tawh kibang hi. Eite pen beel sunga kihuan sa tawh i kibang hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:4 Tua ahih ciangin Ezekiel aw, hih mite tungah thukhenna thu gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:5 Ka sungah Topa’ kha hong lutin mite tungah hih bangin thugen dingin hong sawl hi: “Israel mite aw, na thugente uh le na ngaihsutnate khempeuh uh ka thei hi." 
Ezekiel11:6 Hih khua sungah mi tampi tak that na hih manun kongzing khempeuhah si luanghawm kidim hi. 
Ezekiel11:7 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in note kiangah kong gen thu in: Hih khuapi, an huanna beel tawh kibang hi, na cih uh man hi. Beel sunga om sa pen na thahsa uh misi luanghawmte ahi hi. Ahi zongin note ahihleh khuapi sung panin kong lawnkhia ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:8 Note in namsau na kihta uh hi. Ahi zongin namsau tawh note a hong sat ding mi kong paisak ding hi. 
Ezekiel11:9 Khuapi sung panin note hong lakhia-in gamdang mite’ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Note a si dingin thu kong khen khin hi. 
Ezekiel11:10 Na gam sung uhah galin na si ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel11:11 Note, beel sunga a om sa bang na hi kei uh hi. Hih khuapi in note hong hu lo ding hi. Israel gam sung na omna peuhpeuh uhah gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:12 Note’ kiima om minam dangte’ ngeinate zui-in na om laitakun kei pen Topa ka hihna thu, na palsat uh thukhamte keima thukham ahihna, le na zuih loh uh thupiaknate keima thupiak ahihna na thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:13 Tua bangin thu genin ka om laitakin Benaiah’ tapa Pelatiah hong dinsih hi. Kei zong leilakah boksukin ka kiko a, “Topa Pasian aw, Israel gam sungah a omlai mi khempeuh thah khit sawm na hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:14 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuasunga teng mite in nang le salin a om na mipihte’ thu gen uh a, ‘Salin a om mite pen Topa tawh kigamla om lua khinta uh hi. Amah in eima luah dingin hih gam hong pia khinta hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:16 Tua ahih ciangin na salpihte kiangah hih bangin keima thugente va gensawn in: A gamlapi gamah a teng dingin puakhia-in, gam dangah a thehthang pa pen keimah ka hi hi. Ahi zongin amaute’ omna gam dangah tawlkhat sung bek kei a hong bia dingin ka omsak hi." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Tua ahih manin Topa ahi keimah in amaute kiangah ka gen thu va gen in. Amaute ka thehthangna gam panin khawmkikin, amaute tungah Israel gam ka piakik ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:18 Amaute hong ciahkik ciangin a nin nate khempeuh le a muhdahhuai milimte khempeuh a nilkhia ding uh ahi hi. 
Ezekiel11:19 Amaute tungah lungsim thak le ngaihsutna thak ka pia ding hi. Amaute’ suang lungtang paihkhiat sakin mihing lungtang ka guan ding hi. 
Ezekiel11:20 Tua ciangin amaute in ka thukhamte zui-in ka thupiak khempeuh citakin mang ding uh hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi-in, kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ahi zongin a nin a muhdahhuai milim a bia nuamte ahihleh gim ka pia ding hi. Amau’ gamtatna tawh a kizui-in gim ka pia ding hi, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka hong gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:22 Tua ciangin a leeng dingin kherub-te in a kha uh zal a, a leengpeite in zong a zui hi. Israel-te’ Pasian’ minthanna vang amaute’ tung sanah a om hi." 
Ezekiel11:23 Tua ciangin Topa’ minthanna vang zong khuapi sung panin paikhia-in khuapi nisuahna lamah a om mualtungah a om hi. 
Ezekiel11:24 Tua ciangin ka maang sung mahin Pasian’ kha in hong leenpihin Babylon gamah salin a omte kiang hong tunpih hi. Tua ciangin ka maangmuhna hong beita a," 
Ezekiel11:25 Topa in kei hong muhsaksa thute khempeuh, salin a om mite kiangah ka gen hi." 
Ezekiel12:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lehdo thei mite lakah a teng na hi hi. Amaute in mit nei napi-in khua mu lo uh hi. Amaute pen a lehdo thei mite ahihna hang uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ezekiel aw, tu-in galtai dingte’ gamtat bangin na van puak ding guang inla, suntangpi-in paikhia in. Na omna panin na paikhiatlam mi khempeuh musak in. A lehdo thei mi ahih tei hangun a thu theithei kha ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:4 Khuavak lai-in mite’ muhin salin a pai dingin na van guang inla, nitak ciangin salin a pai ding bangin na paikhiatna mite musak in." 
Ezekiel12:5 Tua bangin amaute in hong et laitakin na kawm sulet inla, tua vang panin na van lakhia in." 
Ezekiel12:6 Amaute’ muhin na van na liangko-ah kisuanto inla, na pai nading mun na muh theih loh nadingin na mit tunsa-in khuamial lakah paikhia in. Hih bangin na gamtatna pen Israel mite a dingin hilhkholhna khat hi ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:7 Kei zong Topa’ hong sawl bangin ka gamta hi. Galtaite’ hih ding bang teekin tua sunin ka van guangin, tua nitak khuamial ciangin ka khut tawh kawm ka sulet hi. Amaute’ muh mahin ka liangko-ah van kisuanin ka paikhia hi." 
Ezekiel12:8 A zingsang ciangin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lehdo thei Israel mite in na gamtatna thu nang hong dot uh ciangin," 
Ezekiel12:10 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute kiangah ka gen thu tu-in gen in. Tua thu pen Jerusalem khuasung a uk ulianpa le Jerusalem khua sungah a teng mi khempeuhte a’ ding ahi hi. 
Ezekiel12:11 Na gamtatnasate pen amaute tungah a thupiang ding lahna lim ahihna thu gen in. Amaute pen a kiman, sal a suak ding mi ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:12 Amaute a uk ulianpa in khuamial lakah a liangko-in ama van pua-in paikhia ding hi. Ama paikhiat nadingin amaute in kulh tawhvang sakin tua panin amah suakta ding hi. Amah in a mai humcip ding ahih manin a paina ding mun mu thei lo ding hi. 
Ezekiel12:13 Ama pai nading munah ka ngenthang ka zak ding a, amah awk ding hi. Tua ciangin Babylon khuapi-ah amah ka paipih ding a, a khuapi a mu lopi-in tua lai-ah a si ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:14 A ulianpihte, a thulamlakte, le amah a cingte, mun citengah ka thehthang ding a, amaute a that dingin namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:15 Minam dangte’ lak gam dangah amaute ka thehthang ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong phawk ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel12:16 Ahi zongin galsung, kialpi, le natna sung panin tawmkhat ka suaktasak ding a, minam dangte’ lakah a omna mun panun a gamtatnasate uh a muhdahhuaina phawkin, kei pen Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:17 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, lau mahmahna tawh a ling kawmsa-in an ne-in tui dawn in." 
Ezekiel12:19 Hih bangin na gamtatna pen, amaute’ gam a omlai ahi Jerusalem khuamite tungah Topa Pasian’ thugenna ahihna thu va gen in. Amaute in launa linna tawh an ne-in tui dawn ding uh hi. Amau’ gam sungah a tengte a hoih gamtat khat beek om lo ahih manin, a gam sung uhah a om mi khempeuh kipai khiatpihmang ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:20 Mihing a dimna khuapite kisusia ding a, gam sung khempeuh gamkhing suak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:21 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, bang hangin, ‘Hun beibei a, genkholhnate a tung om lo hi,’ cih paunak pen Israel mite’ lakah zat belin kinei ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in tua thu tawh kisai-in ka thugenna amaute kiangah va gen in. Hih paunak ka beisakta ding a, Israel mite in genin a nei nawn kei ding uh hi. Tu-in a hun a naina le genkholhnate a manin a tunna ding thu amaute kiangah va gen in." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israel mite lakah maangmuhna man lo ahi a, genkholhna man lo ahi zongin om nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:25 Topa ahi keimah in amaute tungah thu ka gen ding a, ka gen bangin tung takpi ding hi. Tu-in zekai nawn lo ding hi. A lehdo thei mihingte aw, hih dingin ka gen bangin nomau’ nuntak sung mahmahin ka tungsak ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in thu ka gen khinzo hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:26 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na maangmuhnate le na thugen kholhnate pen mailam hun saupi ciangin a hong piang pan dingin Israel mite in ngaihsunkha uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugenna: ‘Zekai cih om nawn lo ding a, ka gensa bangin tung ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen khinzo hi, ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel kamsangte mawhsakna gen in. ‘ Topa’ thugen ngai in,’ ci khemin amau’ lungsim bangin thu a gente’ tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel13:3 Topa Pasian’ thugen hih bang ahi hi: Hih kamsang haite in gimna thuak ding uh hi. Amaute in amau’ lungsim bangin thu gentawmin, maangmu kineih uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:4 Israel mite aw, na kamsangte uh ahihleh innsia lakah a om ngiate tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:5 Amaute in kulh a kicipna munte cing lo uh a, a kicimte ciangkik lo uh ahih manin Topa’ ni-in gal hong tun ciangin Israel-te hu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:6 Amaute’ maangmuhnate zuaupi hi a, a thugen kholhnate uh zong zuauthu ahi hi. Keimah in amaute sawl lo napi-in amaute in, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi,’ ci khem uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in amaute’ thugente ka tunsak ding a lamen lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:7 Tua ahih manin amaute kiangah ka gen thu in: ‘Na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi hi a, na thugen kholhnate uh zuauthu ahi hi. Note kiangah keimah in thu hong gen lo napi-in keima gen bangin na gen uh hi,’ ka ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:8 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in amaute kiangah, “Na thugente uh zuaupi hi a, na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi ahi hi. Tua ahih manin note kong langpan’ hi." 
Ezekiel13:9 Zuauthu tawh maangmu kineihin, mite a khialh theih nadingin zuauthu a genkhol no kamsangte gim a hong pia ding ka hita hi. Ka mite a kikhop uh ciangin tuate lakah na kihel kei ding uh a, Israel mite’ min a kigelhna lakah note’ min kigelh lo ding hi. Na gam uhah na ciahkik ngei nawn kei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu hoih lo napi-in hoih hi, ci khemin ka mite na makaih khial uh hi. Ka mite in kulh dingin suang a cian uh ciangin no kamsangte in a tungtham buan tawh na zut uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:11 Tu-in na kulh zut uh kicim hi. Tu-in guahpi ka zusak ding a, gialpite in tua kulh kha-in huihpi hat in mutgawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:12 Tua bangin kulh a kicip ciangin na kulh zut uh bang phattuamna om ahi hiam, ci-in mite in hong dong ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:13 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Ka hehna tawh huihpi nungsakin, guahpi zusakin, gialpi kiasakin, tua kulhpi ka susia ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:14 A tungtham na zut uh kulh sukhamin, thehthangin, a bul dawksak ding a sawm ka hi hi. Tua bangin ka suksiat ciangin note a hong denglum ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:15 Tua bangin kulh le tua kulh a zut note in ka hehna na thuak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, ‘Tu-in kulh maimangta a, tua mah bangin kulh a zut mite -" 
Ezekiel13:16 thu hoih lo napi-in thu hoih hi, ci-in Jerusalem a lungmuan nadingin thu a gen kamsangte zong bei khinta hi,’ ka ci ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:17 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na mite’ lakah a om, a thugen ding uh a phuaktawm numeite en in. Amaute’ gamtatna hangin mawhsakna thu gen inla," 
Ezekiel13:18 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: No numeite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Mi khempeuh in a khutah a bulh ding uhleh a lu tungah a khip ding uh aite na bawl uh a, tua nate in mite’ lungsim uk hi. Note’ phattuam nadingin sih nading le hinna ding vangliatna thu, ka mihingte tungah na zang nuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:19 Mangbuhham khut khat dim le anlum them tawmkhat na ngah theih nadingun ka mite’ mai-ah kei nong minsiasak uh hi. A si dingin a kilawm lopite na that nuam uh a, a hing dingin a kilawm lopite na hingsak nuam uh hi. Tua bangin ka mite tungah zuauthu genin, amaute in note’ thugen hong um uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu in: Sihna le hinna ukna-in na zat uh na aite uh ka deih kei hi. Note’ khut panin tuate hong bawhkhiat sakin, ukcip dingin na hanciam uh mite ka khahkhia ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Na ai khipte uh zong hong hawkkhiat sakin note’ khutsung panin ka mite ka suaktasak paisuak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel13:22 Keima gen hi lo napi-in na thuzuau genteng uh tawh mihoihte na lunggimsak uh a, migilote a sihtheih nadingun hong kihei loh nading lamah na lehhanthot zawsop uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na zuau maangmuhnate uh le mi lam a khialsak thei na thugen kholhnate uh beita ding hi. Note’ khutsung panin ka mite ka honkhia ta ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:1 Tua ciangin Israel mi makai pawlkhat kei kiangah hong pai-in Pasian’ deihna bang ahi hiam, ci-in hong dong uh hi." 
Ezekiel14:2 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih mite in milim bia uh a, milim in mawhna sungah amaute tunpih hi. Amaute’ thu theihnopte a gen dingin hong um uh ahi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Milim bia-in mawhna sungah milimte kitunsak a, tua khit ciangin kamsangte tungah thu a dong dingin a hong pai Israel mi peuhmah in keima thudawnna kam ngah ding uh hi. Tua thudawnna pen a milim tampite uh in a zak dingun a kilawm dawnna hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:5 Tua milimte in keima kiang panin Israel mite paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin tua bangin ka dawnna tawh kei lamah ka mite ngahkik dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hong kihei kik unla, na milimte uh nusia un."
