Ezekiel14:7 Israel mite khat peuhpeuh ahi a, Israel mite lakah a om gamdang mi khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, kei kiang panin paikhia-in milim bia a, milim in mawhna sungah a tunpih khit ciangin kamsangpa tungah thu a dong dingin a pai leh, Topa ahi keimah in ama thudotna ka dawng ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:8 Amah nialin, midangte’ etteh dingin ka bawl ding hi. Keima mite lak panin amah ka lakhia ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel14:9 Kamsang khat peuhpeuh in khemna tawh a man loin thu hong dawn leh, Topa ahi keima khem hi ding hi. Israel mite lak panin tua kamsangpa ka lakhia ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:10 Kamsangpa le kamsang thu a dong pa a gim thuakna uh kibang ding hi. 
Ezekiel14:11 Israel mite in kei hong nusiat loh nading le a mawhna uh tawh a kinitsak loh nadingun hih bangin ka hih ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:12 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khat peuhpeuh in khialhna bawlin kei tungah hong thuman kei leh keimah in a annek dingteng uh ka susia ding hi. Kialpi tungsakin a mihing a ganhingin ka siasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel, le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amaute’ lakah a om hileh, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel, le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amaute’ lakah a om hileh, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel, le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amaute’ lakah a om hileh, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:15 Mite a that dingin gamsa kihtakhuaite khahkhia-in, kuamah khual a zin ngam lo dingin tua gam sung a lauhuai-in om leh," 
Ezekiel14:16 tua gam sungah hih mihing thumte nangawn a om bang hileh, amaute’ tanute le tapate nangawn uh suahtak zo loin, amaute’ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtakzo ding uh a, tua gam pen gamkhing suak takpi ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:17 Tua gam sungah gal tungsakin, mihing ganhing a siaksiang dingin a husia galhiamte kizang leh," 
Ezekiel14:18 tua sungah hih mihing thumte a om hangin amau’ pumpi ciat simloh, amau’ tate nangawn suahtakzo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:19 Tua gamah pulpi tungsakin, ka hehna tawh mihing ganhing sisak leng," 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel, le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek a hutzawh cih loh, amaute’ tate nangawn huzo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel, le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek a hutzawh cih loh, amaute’ tate nangawn huzo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel, le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amaute’ hoihna in amau’ nuntakna ciat bek a hutzawh cih loh, amaute’ tate nangawn huzo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Topa Pasian’ thugen hih bang ahi hi: Mihing ganhing a sumai dingin gimna nasia pen li ahi gal, kialpi, a kihtakhuai gamsate, le natna, Jerusalem-ah ka tungsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:22 A tanute a tapate a paikhiatpih dingin mi khat peuhpeuh a suaktazo kha a om a, nang kiangah hong pai leh, amaute’ omzia na en in. Amaute’ gitlohna zia na mu ding a, Jerusalem gim ka piakna a kilawm a thuman mah ahihna na phawk ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:23 Amaute’ gitlohna zia na muh ciangin ka hihnate khempeuh a kilawm mah ahihna na phawk ding hi. Topa Pasian in thu hong gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel15:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leenggui pen singkung tawh bangci kiteh ding ahi hiam? Tulaka om singkungte tawh tehna-in leenggui hiangte banga kimang ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Leengguite na-in kizang thei ahi hiam? Vankhaina-a zat ding singzum khet dingin kimang thei ahi hiam? 
Ezekiel15:4 Meitawhna ding bekin kimang hi. A mong tuak a kattum khit ciangin a omlai a zulkatteng, bangin kimang nawn ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel15:5 A kat ma-in zong bangmahin kimang lo ahih manin, kangin a vom khit ciangin a kimanna om lo semsem hi." 
Ezekiel15:6 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Tulaka om singte in kimanna nei hi. Ahi zongin leengguite kila-in a kihaltum mah bangin Jerusalem-a teng mite lakhia-in 
Ezekiel15:7 gim ka pia ding hi. Mei panin khatvei a suahtak khit hangun tu-in mei in amaute kangtum ding hi. Amaute gim ka piak ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi. 
Ezekiel15:8 Kei’ tungah amaute hong citak lo uh ahih manin gam sung khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a muhdahhuai-in a gamtatna thu Jerusalem’ tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel16:3 Topa Pasian in Jerusalem tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Jerusalem aw, nang pen Kanaan gam panin a piang na hi hi. Na pa pen Amor mite hi a, na nu pen Hit mite ahi hi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Nang na suah lai-in kuamah in hong don lo hi. Na lai hong kitansak lo a, hong kisil lo a, ci tawh zong hong kizut lo a, puan tawh zong hong kitun lo hi." 
Ezekiel16:5 Hihte khempeuh a hong hih dingin kuamah in nang hehpihna lungsim hong nei lo hi. Na suah lai-in kuamah in nang hong it lo ahih manin gamlakah nang hong kipaidak lel hi. 
Ezekiel16:6 “Tua ciangin na kiangah kong paikha a, sisan naisan lakah na kitomtom kong mu hi. Tua bangin na om laitakin na sih loh nadingin thu kong pia hi." 
Ezekiel16:7 Singkung hoih bangin nang kong khangtosak hi. Nang cidamin nong khangto a, nungak nong suak hi. Na nawite zong hoihtak mahin hong bawk a, na mul zong hong po ta hi; ahi zongin guaktangin na om hi." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Nang kong muhkhak kik ciangin pasal nei thei ding hun na hita hi. Na pum guakin a om kimlai, ka puan tawh kong khuh a, na zumhuaina-teng hong seelsakin, tenpih dingin kam kong ciam hi. Kong kamciamna tangtung sakin nang pen keima-a’ nong suak hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:9 Kei zong tui la-in na tunga si baangteng kong sawpkhiatsak a, oliv thau tawh kong zut zol hi." 
Ezekiel16:10 Puanphan kizem hoihte tawh nang hong zemin, savun hoihpen tawh a kibawl khedap hong bulhsakin, saihadial puan hong khimsakin, nai puantungsilh kong silhsak hi." 
Ezekiel16:11 Kizepna a manphate nang kong pia a, tau hong butsakin khainiang kong oksak hi." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nakbahte, bilbahte, le na khuk ding kumpi lukhu hoih kong guan hi." 
Ezekiel16:13 Tua bangin kham le ngun kibawl kizepnate tawh na kizem a, saihadial puan, nai puan, le a kiphan a kizem puante bek na silh tawntung hi. Annel hoihpen pawl a kibawl anlum ne-in, nek ding khuaizu le oliv thaute na kitasam ngei kei hi. Na hoihna a kigen thei lo zahin hong om a, kumpinu na suak hi." 
Ezekiel16:14 A paubaang het lo dingin nang hong bawl ka hih manin gam khempeuhah na melhoihna kithang kawikawi hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Ahi zongin na melhoihna le na minthanna a sia lamin zangin, na tuah peuhpeuh luppih ding zolna-in na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Na puan pawlkhatte, na biakna mun zep nadingin na zang a, numei paktat bangin mi citeng tungah na pumpi na pia hi." 
Ezekiel16:17 Nang kong piaksa kham le ngun kibawl kizepnate, pasal limin na bawl a, tuate tawh paktatna na gamta hi." 
Ezekiel16:18 Nang ka hong piak, a kizem a kiphan puan hoihte la-in milimte na silhsak a, nang ka hong piak oliv thau le paknamtuite, milim biakna-in na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:19 Na nek dingin a limci pen annel, oliv thau, le khuaizu kong pia a, ahi zongin milim maipha zon nadingin biakna-in tuate na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Tua ciangin kei tawh na neih na tanute le tapate la-in milim biakna-in haltum dingin na pia hi. Kei tungah na cihtak lohna thuneu lua sa a," 
Ezekiel16:21 milim biak nadingin ka tate piathuah lai na hi hiam? 
Ezekiel16:22 Hih bangin numei paktat nuntakna tawh a mindaihuai-in na om laitakin na neulai thu, guaktangin na omlai, sisan naisan lakah na kitomtom lai thu na phawkkha kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gimna na thuak ding hi. Hih bang siatna nam khempeuh na gamta khin a," 
Ezekiel16:24 lam gei khempeuhah milim biakna ding mun bawlin, paktatna na gamta hi." 
Ezekiel16:25 Na melhoihna beelmang na kizutnelh hi. Na kimuhpih peuhpeuh tungah na pumpi na kipia a, a ni ni-in na paktatna na khan semsem hi." 
Ezekiel16:26 A lan mahmah na veng Egypt mite na luppih a, na paktatna tawh kei nong hehsak hi." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Tu-in nangmah gim a pia ding le na nopsaknateng a lakhia dingin ka khut ka liik khin hi. Nang hong mudahin, na gamtat hoih lohna hangin nang a hong hua Filistia mite’ khut sungah nang kong piazo hi." 
Ezekiel16:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangte tawh lungkimzo nai lo na hih manin Assiria mite na nungdelh lai hi. Tuate tawh na paktat a, ahi zongin na lungkimzo nai sam kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Sumbawl Babylon mite tawh na paktat a, ahi zongin tuate tawh zong na lungkimzo tuan nai sam kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:30 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: A bangci lawmlawm na hi hiam? Zumna mel thei loin hih bangin na paktat hi. 
Ezekiel16:31 Kongzing citengah milim biakna ding mun na bawl a, paktatna na gamta hi. Ahi zongin numei paktat dangte bangin sum a ngah zong na hi kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:32 A pasal itzaw loin, gamdang mite tawh mawhna a bawl numei tawh na kibang hi." 
Ezekiel16:33 Numei paktatte sum tawh kiguai a, ahi zongin nang in na lunggulhte tungah letsong pia zawsopin, nang a hong luppih dingin mun khempeuh panin mi na guaizaw hi." 
Ezekiel16:34 Nang pen a tuampian numei paktat na hi hi. Kuamah in na tuaci gamtat nadingin hong zol lo hi. Nang tungah sum tawh guaihna hong kipia loin nang in na pia zawsop hi. Tua ahih manin a tuampian mahmah na hi hi. 
Ezekiel16:35 “Tua ahih ciangin a paktat Jerusalem aw, Topa’ thu ngai in." 
Ezekiel16:36 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in na puante suahkhia-in, numei paktat bangin na pumpi, na lunggulh mite le na milimte tungah kipia-in, milim biakna-in na tate that na hih manin" 
Ezekiel16:37 na lawm luite khempeuh - na it hitaleh na muhdahte hitaleh a vekpi-in ka kaikhawm ding hi. Na kimkotah amaute omsakin, tua ciangin na puanteng kong hawkkhiatsak ding a, na guaktangin na omna ka ensak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Midangte tawh na mawhna hang le na mi thahna hangin thu kong khen ding a, ka hehna tawh sihna kong thuaksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:39 Na lunggulh mite’ khut sungah kong pia ding a, na paktat gamtatna munte le na milim biakna munte, amaute in susiagawp ding uh hi. Na puante le a manpha na kizepnate hong lakkhiat sakin, na guaktangin hong koih ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Amaute in mihonte hanthawnin, tua mihonte in suang tawh nang hong dengin, a namsau uh tawh hong satzan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:41 Amaute in na innte hong haltum sakin, na gimthuakna, numei honpi ensak ding uh hi. Numei paktat na hihna kong khawlsak ding a, na mawhpih ding pasalte sum tawh na guaihna kong khawlsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:42 Tua ciangin ka hehna dam ding a, daitakin ka om ding hi. Na tungah ka heh nawn kei ding a, zong kong aam nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Na neu lai-a kong bawlna na mangngilh a, hih bang tengin na gamtatnate tawh kei nong hehsak hi. Tua ahih manin na gamtatna tawh kizui-in kong thuk hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtat dangte banah bang hangin hih paktatna gamta thuah na hi hiam?” Topa in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:44 Topa in, “Jerusalem aw, ‘Tanu in a nu sun,’ cih paunak pen mite in nang tungah hong zang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:45 Nang pen na nu’ ta taktak na hi hi. Na nu in a pasal le a tate mudah hi. A pasalte uh le a tate uh a mudah na sanggam numeite mah tawh na kibang hi. Nang le na sanggam numei ahi khuapi dangte in nu-in Hit mi nei-in, pa-in Amor mi na nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:46 Na unu pen leilu lama om Samaria le a khuaneute ahi hi. 
Ezekiel16:47 Amaute’ khekhap zui-in a muhdahhuai amaute’ gamtatnate bek tawh na lungkimzo nai kei lai a, tawmvei sungin na gamtatnate khempeuhah amaute sangin na siazaw hi." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin kong cihin-ah: Nang le na khuaneute’ gamtatsiat zahin na sanggamnu Sodom le a khuaneute gamtatsia ngei nai lo hi. 
Ezekiel16:49 Na sanggamnu’ mawhna pen: Amah le a tanute in nek ding tampi nei-in nuamsa mahmahin, daitakin om uh ahih manin amaute kiphasak uh a, a zawng a cimawhte don lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:50 Amaute kihisakin ka deih loh nate gamta uh ahih manin, na theih mah bangin amaute ka nusia hi." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria in nangma gamtatsiat zah lang gamta lo hi. Na sanggamnu sangin gamtat siazaw mahmah na hih manin, nang le na sanggam numei dangte i etkak ciangin, amaute a mawh mahmah hinapi-in a mawh lo zah phialin hong kimu hi." 
Ezekiel16:52 Tu-in na mindainateng na thuak kul hi. Na sanggam numeite’ mawhna sangin nangma mawhnate naksiatzaw lua ahih manin nang kiang panin amaute a mawh lo tawh kibang phial hi. Na sanggam numeite a siangtho bangsak phial na hih manin zahla inla maizum in. 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ahi zongin, Sodom le a khuaneute, le Samaria le a khuaneute a cithei-in ka bawlkik ding hi. Tua mah bangin nang Jerusalem zong kong citheisakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:54 Na gamtatnasate hangin na maizum ding a, tua na maizumna in na sanggam numei dangte maingalsak tuam ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Na sanggam numei Sodom le a khuaneute, le Samaria le a khuaneute cithei kikin a ngei uh bangkik ding a, nang le na khuaneute zong na cithei kik ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:56 Nangma siatnateng hong kipholak ma, na kiphatsak om hun laitakin na sanggamnu Sodom simmawhbawl hi lo na hi hiam? Tu-in na simmawh ngei na sanggamnu mah na bang teekteek hi. Edom mite, Filistia mite, le na kiima om nang hong mudahte in hong simmawhbawl hi." 
Ezekiel16:57  
Ezekiel16:58 Na gamtat hoih lohna, na zumhuai gamtatnateng na thuak kul hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi. Nang in i kamciamna le i thuciamna don lo na hih manin nangma gamtatna bangin nang tungah kong gamta hi. 
Ezekiel16:60 Ahi zongin na neu lai-a nang tawh i thuciamna lenkipin, a kimang tawntung ding thuciamna nang tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:61 Na unu le na naunu na ngahkik ciangin na gamtatnasa teng phawkkikin na mai a zum ding hi. Nang tawh i thuciamna sungah a kihel loh hangin amaute pen nangma tanu bangin hong om ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel16:62 Nang tawh ka thuciamna ka bawlpha ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:63 Na gamtatnasa khempeuh kong maisak khit ciangin na gamtatnasa khempeuh na phawkkik ding a, maizum lua-in cih nading mel thei loin na om ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel17:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite kiangah thugentehna khat gen inla," 
Ezekiel17:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Muvanlai a gol mahmah, a khate zong golin a kizal deda khat om hi. Tua muvanlai in khaveng hoih mahmah nei hi. Lebanon Mual tungah va leengin taamtak kung khat a dawn va kuaitan a," 
Ezekiel17:4 sumbawlte’ omna gamah pua-in sumbuk bawlte’ khuapi sungah va koih hi. 
Ezekiel17:5 Tua ciangin Israel gam panin leengguino khat la-in, a khan theih nadingin tui a om tawntungna leihoih mun khatah a suan hi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Tua leengguino hong khangin a hiangpha leengguipi hong suak hi. A hiangte pen muvanlai lamah zaam a, a zungte in leisung thukpi-ah zung kha hi. Tua leenggui in hiang le teh tampi tak nei hi." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Tua ciangin a gol mahmah, a khate golin a mul a pha mahmah muvanlai dang khat a om hi. Tua ahih manin tua leenggui in, ama kisuannasa mun a tui a ngah sangin tui a tamzaw piazo ding, ci-in lametna tawh tua muvanlai lamah a zung kha-in a tehte zong tua lam mah a ngasak hi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Ahi zongin tua leenggui pen, a teh no-in, a gah gah thei-in leenggui lianpi a suah theih nadingin limtakin tui a ngah theihna mun leihoihna sungah a kisuan khinsa ahi hi." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka dotnop thu pen: ‘Hih leenggui hingin hoihtakin khangzo ding ahi hiam? Muvanlai masa pen in zungbawhin, a gahte zutkhia-in, a hiangte kuaitanin, keutumsak ding hi lo ahi hiam?’ cihna ahi hi. Tua leenggui bawhkhiat nadingin thahatna ahi a, minam lianpi ahi zongin kisam lo hi." 
Ezekiel17:10 Hih leenggui pen a kisuan hi mah hi. Ahi zongin hingin khangzo ding ahi hiam? Nisuahna huihpi in a mutkhiat ciangin keutum ding hi lo ahi hiam? Tua a kisuanna munah keutum lel ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a hong ci hi. 
Ezekiel17:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Hih a lehdo thei mite in hih thugentehna a khiatna a thei uh hiam, dong in. Jerusalem khua-ah Babylon kumpipa hong pai-in a kumpipa le a uliante manin Babylon-ah a ciahpihna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel17:13 Amah in kumpipa’ innkuanpih mite khat la-in, amah tawh thuciamna khat bawl a, ama tungah a thuman taktak nadingin kiciamna bawlsak hi. Tua gam a miliante ciahpih hi." 
Ezekiel17:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua minamte in lehdokik nawn loin, a thuciam bawlna uh a kizuihna ding a deihna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ahi zongin Judah Kumpipa in amah lehdo veve a, sakol galkap honpite a ngen dingin Egypt gamah mi paisim sak hi. A deihna bangin tangtung ding ahi hiam? Tua bangin a gamtatna tawh suaktazo ding ahi hiam? A thuciamna palsat napi-in gimthuak loin om thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, kumpi tokhom tungah a tusak, Babylon kumpipa tawh a thuciamna palsat ahih manin Babylon gamah hih kumpipa si ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:17 Babylon mite in mi tampi a thah theih nadingun kan bawlin dum a tawh uh ciangin a thahat Faro’ galkap honpite nangawn in amah huh zo lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel17:18 Amah in a kiciamna le a thuciamna palsatin hih bangin gamta khin ahih manin, amah suakta ngei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:19 “Tua ahih ciangin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin a zuih dingin keima min tawh a kiciam thukimna palsat ahih manin gim ka pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel17:20 Amah a awk theih nadingin ngenthang ka zak ding a, amah ka awksak ding hi. Kei tungah amah hong thutak lo ahih manin Babylon-ah paipihin tua lai-ah gim ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:21 A galkap muanhuai pente, gal sungah si ding a, a suakta sunte zong mun citengah kithehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ahi keimah in thu a gen ka hihlam na phawk ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel17:22 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Keimah in taamtak sangpi a dawn khat la-in, a dawnngek khat ka satkhia ding a, mual sangpi dawn khatah ka suan ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel mual sangpen dawnah suanin, a hiang zaai-in a gah luai ding a, taamtak lianpi khat suak ding hi. Tua tungah vasa nam khempeuh tawlnga ding a, bu bawlna munin a nei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel17:24 Tua ciangin singkung sangte phukin, singkung neute a liansak pa, singkung hingte keusakin, singkung keute a hingkiksak Topa ka hihna thu gam sunga om singkung khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin a, hih dingin ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel18:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Israel gam sungah mite in zat belin a neih paunak, ‘A pate in leenggah thuk ne a, a tate’ ha kim,’ cihna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin kong genin-ah: Israel gam sungah hih paunak na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel18:4 Mi khempeuh keima a’ hi a, pate ahi a, tate ahi zongin keima-a’ ahi hi. A mawh mipa bek si ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Gentehna-in mi a hoih mahmah, a thuman, a diktat mi khat om hi." 
Ezekiel18:6 Amah in Israel mite’ milim biakte biakpih lo a, milim biakna pia lo ding, ci-in a kikhamna munah milim biakna sate zong ne lo hi. Midangte’ zi zong luppih dingin zol lo a, numei in nin a neih laitakin zong luppih lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Kuamah khem lo a, kuama na zong sut lo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vakin, puan nei lote puan guan hi." 
Ezekiel18:8 A meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia lo hi. Gamtatsiat ding ut lo a, mite’ thu a manin khensak hi." 
Ezekiel18:9 Amah in ka thupiakte mangin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui hi. Tua bang mi pen mihoih ahih manin nungta ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Tua ciangin gentehna-in hih mihoih pa in tapa khat nei a, tua tapa in mi’ na gu-in mi that a, a pa’ gamtat ngei loh a siateng gamta hi." 
Ezekiel18:11 Amah in milim biakna pia lo ding a kici munah a kipia biakna sate ne a, midangte’ zite zolin luppih hi." 
Ezekiel18:12 Mizawng mi cimawhte khemin, mi’ na sut a, sum leitawi a lapa in khapna-in a piak nate piakik loin kemsuak hi. Milim bia-in a zumhuai-in gamta hi." 
Ezekiel18:13 A meet lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia a, a meet zong a kilawm loin tampi tak la hi. Hih bang mipa nungta ding ahi hiam? Nungta het lo ding hi. Hih bangin a mindaihuaite khempeuh gamta ahih manin tuate’ hangin amah si ding hi. Ama sihna pen ama mawhna hang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Gentehna-in hih mihoih lopa in tapa khat hong nei hi. Tua a tapa in a pa’ gamtat hoih lohna teng mu a, a pa’ gamtat bangin gamta lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:15 Israel mite’ milim biakte biakpih lo a, a kikhamna munah biakna-in a kipia biakna sa zong ne lo hi. Midangte’ zi zol lo a, zong luppih lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:16 Kuamah bawlsia lo a, kuama na zong sut lo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in a khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vak a, puan nei lote puan guan hi." 
Ezekiel18:17 Gamtatsiat ding ut lo a, a meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia lo hi. Ka thukhamte zui-in ka thupiakte mang hi. Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen nungta ding a, a pa’ mawhna hangin si het lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:18 A pa in ahihleh mi’ na sutin, mite tungah a sia gamta tawntung hi. Tua ahih manin ama mawhna hangin amahmah si hi." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Ahi zongin, ‘Bang hangin a pa’ mawhna a tapa in thuak lo ding ahi hiam?’ nong ci kha ding uh hi. A tapa a hoih a manin a gamtatna hang ahi hi. Amah in ka thukhamte kemin hoihtakin zui hi. Tua ahih manin pel loin amah nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:20 A si ding pa pen a mawh mipa ahi hi. Ta in pa’ mawhna thuak lo ding a, tua mah bangin pa in ta’ mawhna thuak lo ding hi. Mihoih pa in a hoihna thaman ngah ding a, migilo pa in a gitlohna thaman thuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Migilo khat in a mawh bawlna khawlin ka thukham zui hen la, a hoih a manin gamta leh, tua mipa si lo ding a, pel loin nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ama mawhnasa khempeuh kimaisak ding a, amah a manin a gamtat manin nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:23 Migilo khat a si ka muh ciangin a lungdam dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Ka lung dam het lo hi. Amah hong kisikin a nuntak ding pen keima deih ahi zaw hi. 
Ezekiel18:24 Ahi zongin mihoih khat in a gamtat hoihnateng khawlin, migilote’ gamtat bangin a mindaihuai gamtatsiate gamtat ding hong kipan leh, amah nungta paisuak ding ahi hiam? Nungta het lo ding hi. A hoih ama gamtatnasate kiphawksak lo ding hi. Ama cihtak lohna le ama mawhna hangin si ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Ahi zongin note in, ‘ Topa’ hihna zia man lo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. Keima hihna zia a man loin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? A man lo pen nomau’ ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel18:26 Mihoih khat a gamtat hoih khawlin mawhna a bawl ciangin si ding hi. Ama sihna pen a gamtatsiatna hang ahi hi. 
Ezekiel18:27 Migilo khat a gitlohna panin khawlin a hoih a manin gamta leh ama nuntakna a suahtak ahi hi. 
Ezekiel18:28 Amah in a gamtatna phawkin a mawh bawlna khawl hi. Tua ahih manin amah si het lo ding a, nungta paisuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Ahi zongin no Israel mite in, ‘ Topa’ hihna zia man lo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, keima hihna zia man lo ahi zenzen hiam? A man lo pen nomau’ ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in note kiangah kong genin-ah: Israel mite aw, na gamtatnasa bang ciat un thu kong khen ding hi. Kisik kikin na gamtatsiatna khempeuh panun khawl unla, na mawhna hangun kisisak kei un." 
Ezekiel18:31 Na gamtatnasa uh mawhna khempeuh nusia unla, na lungsim uh le na ngaihsutna uh thaksuaksak un. Bang hangin no Israel mite si nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Kuama sih ding ka deih kei hi. Tua ahih manin na mawh gamtatna uh khawlin nungta un, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel19:1 Israel uliante hih bangin tamlawh in hong ci hi: 
Ezekiel19:2 Na nu uh humpinelkai tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai dangte tawh kikhawlin, a note a khoi hi." 
Ezekiel19:3 A note khat thuhilh a, hong khangcing hi. Sabet zong hong siam a, mi hong ne hi." 
Ezekiel19:4 Mite in tua thu za uh a, gum sungah awksak uh hi. Bawm sungah khum uh a, Egypt gamah paipih uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:5 A pi’ lametnateng beita hi. A no dang khat pantah leuleu a, a khangcing khat a suah hi." 
Ezekiel19:6 Amah hong khangcing a, a dangte tawh kikhawl hi. Sabet zong hong siam a, mi hong ne hi." 
Ezekiel19:7 Kulhpite sugawp a, khuapite siasak hi. Hawk zelzel a, a za mite lau mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel19:8 Amah a hih dingin mite kikaikhawm uh a, mun khempeuh panin hong kuan uh hi. A ngenthang uh zak uh a, thangah a awksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bawm sungah khum uh a, Babylon kumpipa kiang a tunpih uh hi. Israel mualtung tengah ama hawkna a kizak nawn loh nadingin a khumcip uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:10 Na nu uh, luitui gei-ah a kisuan leenggui tawh kibang hi. Tui tampi ngah a, a teh, a gah, a pha hi." 
Ezekiel19:11 A gui hiangte hong lian a, kumpi ciangkhut hong suak hi. Leenggui hong khang a, van hong ban hi. A teh pha-in sang mahmah a, mi khempeuh in mu kim hi." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ahi zongin hehna tawh leenggui kizungbawh a, leilak kidenna hi. Nisuahna huihpi hong nung a, a gahteng keutumsak hi. A hiangte kikuaitan a, keu-in kihaltum hi." 
Ezekiel19:13 Tui om lohna lei keu gamah tu-in hih leenggui kituah hi. 
Ezekiel19:14 Hih leenggui mei in kang a, a hiang a gah kangtummang hi. A hiangte liankik nawn lo ding a, kumpi ciangkhut suakkik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Hih a tunga pen tamlawhna hi a, a kisa zelzel ngei khat ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:1 Sal ka suah uh a kum sagih kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Topa’ kiang panin thu a dong dingin Israel makai pawlkhat ka kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:2 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen, ‘Kei tungah thu a dong dingin hong pai na hi uh hiam? Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin note’ thudotin ka om het kei ding hi, ci-in gen in,’ hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute tungah thu a khen dingin na kiging nai hiam? Na kigin’ khit leh amaute tungah thu khen in. A pu a pate uh’ gamtat hoih lohna teng amaute phawksak in." 
Ezekiel20:5 Amaute tungah keima thugente gen in. Israel mite ka teel laitakin amaute tungah thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Egypt gam sungah amaute tungah ka kilang a, kei pen Topa note’ Pasian ka hi hi, ci-in ka kigen hi." 
Ezekiel20:6 Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiatpihin, amaute a dingin ka zonkhiatsak, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam ahi, gam sung khempeuh panin a hoihpenna munah amaute ka tunpih ding ni teek mahin ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel20:7 Kei pen Topa amaute’ Pasian ka hih manin a muhdahhuai a milim itte uh paikhia-in, Egypt mite’ pasian man lote tawh a kinitsak loh nading uh ka gen hi." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong demin, ka thugen hong ngai lo uh hi. A muhdahhuai a milimte uh paikhia tuan lo uh a, Egypt pasian-te zong nusia lo uh hi. Tua hi a, ka heh mahmahna teng Egypt gam sungah thuaksakgawp ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin no Israel mite kong paikhiatpih ding hi, ci-in amau’ ompih mite’ zakin gen khin ka hih manin, tua bangin gim thuaksak leng keima min a daisak suak ding, cih ngaihsutna hangin gim ka pia kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiatpihin gamlak ka tunpih a," 
Ezekiel20:11 a zui peuhpeuh a nuntak theih nading ka thukhamte le ka thupiaknate ka hilh hi. 
Ezekiel20:12 Topa ahi keimah in amaute pen mi siangtho-in ka bawlna thu a phawk nadingun kote’ kikalah thukimna limin Sabbath tan’ ding thu ka pia hi. 
Ezekiel20:13 Ahi zongin Israel mite in gamlak nangawnah kei hong dem uh a, a zui peuhpeuh in nuntakna a ngahna ding uh ahi keima thukhamte le ka thupiaknate a nial uh hi. Ka Sabbath-te zong nakpitakin siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute a maiman nadingin ka hehnateng gamlakah a thuaksakgawp dingin ka kithawi hi." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpihna minam dangte in hong mu khin ahih manin tua bangin gamta leng, keima mindaina ding mah hi zel ahih manin amaute bangmah ka cih kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:15 Tua ahih manin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna, gam hoihpen ahi, amaute tungah ka piaksa gamah amaute ka paipih loh nading thu, gamlakah ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel20:16 Tua bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zui lo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Amaute in kei hong biak ding uh sangin milim biak ding utzaw uh ahihna hang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Ahi zongin amaute ka khasiat a, gamlakah amaute ka susia kei a, ka maimangsak kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:18 A tate uh kiangah, ‘Na pu na pate un a bawl thukhamte zui kei unla, amaute’ tat ngeinate zui kei un. A milim biakte uh tawh zong kininsak kei un." 
Ezekiel20:19 Kei pen Topa ahi note’ Pasian ka hi hi. Ka thukhamte zui unla, ka thupiaknate bangin gamta un." 
Ezekiel20:20 Kei pen Topa ahi note’ Pasian ka hihna na phawkna ding uh le note tawh i bawlsa thukimna lim dingin Sabbath-te na siangthosak un,’ ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Ahi zongin a tate nangawn un kei hong dem uh hi. A zuite in nuntakna a ngahna ding ahi ka thukhamte palsatin ka thupiaknate mang lo uh a, Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin, ka hehnateng gamlakah thuaksak gawpin, amaute a sumai dingin ka kithawi hi." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ahi zongin tua bangin hih leng, Egypt gam panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih hong mu mite’ lakah ka min daii ding ahih manin amaute ka susia kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:23 Tua ahih manin leitung gam khempeuhah amaute ka thehthang gawpna ding thu, amaute tungah kiciamna dang khat tua gamlakah ka bawl leuleu hi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Hih bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zui lo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua banah a pu a pate un a biak milimte mah a biakna hang uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Tua ahih manin kei zong amaute a dingin nuntakna a piangsak lo thukhamte le thupiaknate amaute tungah ka pia hi. 
Ezekiel20:26 Amaute’ biakpiaknate mah tawh amau mah kininsakin, a tapa upa pente uh zong biakna-in ka piasak hi. Hih bangin ka hihna pen amaute gimpiakna le kei pen Topa ka hihna thu a hong theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A cihtak lohna uh tawh na pu na pate un ka min hong daisakin kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:28 Amaute tungah piak dingin ka ciamna gamah amaute ka paipih hi. Amaute in mual sang ahi a, singniim khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a muh uh ciangin tua bang mun khempeuhah biakna a pia uh hi. Meihal biakna a piakna uh le tuiphih biakna a piaknate uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:29 Amaute kiangah, ‘Na paina uh mun sangte bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in ka dong hi. Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin tua munte pen ‘Mun Sangte,’ kici hi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin gen in: Na pu na pate un a bawl mawhnate mah note in zong bawlin a milimte mah uh sulzuih ding na hi uh hiam? 
Ezekiel20:31 Tuni ciang dongin note in a kipia ngei letsongte mah puakin, tua milimte mah biakna-in na tate uh na hal uh ciangin noleno a kininsaktawm na hi uh hi. Tua bangin na gamtat khit uh ciangin no Israel mite, kei kiangah thu a dong dingin nong pai lai uh hi. Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, note’ thudotin ka om het kei taktak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:32 Note in na lungsim ngaihsutna uh khentat khinin, gam dangah a teng minam dangte mah bangin sing le suang na bia nuam uh hi. Ahi zongin note’ utbang hithei ngei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khut khauh tak le ka vangliatna le ka hehna tawh note kong ukgawp taktak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:34 Gam khempeuhah note kong thehthangna panin kong kaihkhopkik ciangin note tungah ka vangliatna le ka hehna kong lak ding hi. 
Ezekiel20:35 Note pen minam tuamtuamte’ gamah kong paipih ding a, tua munah maitang kituahin note tungah thu kong khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:36 Egypt gam sung Sinai gamlakah na pu na pate uh tungah thu ka khen mah bangin tu-in note’ tungah kong khen ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Note khauhtakin kong uk ding a, thuciamna kong zuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:38 Note lak panin a lehdo thei mite le kei tungah hong mawh mite ka lakhia ding hi. Tu laitakin a ompakna uh gam panin ka lakhia ding a, ahi zongin Israel gamah ka ciahsakkik kei ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:39 Topa Pasian in, “Israel mite khempeuh aw, na milimte uh biabia un! Ahih hangin tu a kipanin keima thu nong man’ uh kul ding a, na milimte uh letsong piakna tawh ka min siangtho na daisak nawn kei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:40 Topa Pasian in, “Ka mual siangtho, Israel mual sang tungah Israel mite khempeuh in kei nong bia ding uh hi. Note tungah kong lungdam ta ding a, biakpiaknate, a limcipen piaknate, le na letsong siangthote uh kong lamen ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:41 Na kithehthangna uh gam tuamtuam panin note hong paikhiatpihin mun khatah note kong kaihkhop khit ciangin a namtui na biakpiaknate uh kong sang ding hi. Note in kei nong biak manun minam dangte in a siangtho ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel20:42 Na pu na pate uh tungah piak dingin ka ciam Israel gam sungah note kong tunpih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel20:43 Tua hun ciangin, a kilawm loin na gamtatnate khempeuh uh le nomau mah na kinitsak tawmna thute uh na phawk ding uh a, na gamtat siatnasate uh hangin nomau mah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:44 Na gitlohna, na gamtatsiatna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong bawl loin, ka min a daikhak ding khualna tawh note tungah hong gamta ka hih manin kei pen Topa ka hihna thu no Israel mite in na hong thei ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:45 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leitaw lam gam en inla, leitaw lam gam siatna ding thu genin, leitaw lam gam tulakte a siatna ding thu genkhol in." 
Ezekiel20:47 Leitaw lam tulakte kiangah thu gen inla, Topa’ thugen ngai un. Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En un, tu-in gamhal a kipan ding ka hi a, na sunga om singkung a hing, a keu-in kangtummang ding hi. Kuamah in tua meikuang phelh zo lo ding hi. A taw panin a khung dongin kangtummang ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:48 Hih gam sung a hal pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu le kuamah in a phelh zawh lohna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:49 Tua ciangin kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, kei hong sawl kei in. Mi khempeuh in kei pen khiatna nei-a thugen thei pa hi, ci-in a hong ngaihsut uh ka hi hi,” ci-in ka nial hi." 
Ezekiel21:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi, le mite in biakna a piakna uh mun tuamtuamte mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel21:3 Israel gammite tungah Topa ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: ‘Note ka hong langpan’ hi. Ka namsau dokin note a sia a pha a kibangin kong thatmang khin ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Tua bangin kong thah nadingin leitaw lam pan leilu lam dongin mi khempeuh tungah ka namsau ka zang ding hi. 
Ezekiel21:5 Topa ahi keimah in namsau ka dawh khitna le a paai-ah ka siatkik loh nading thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lungkham mahmah bangin khuisa inla, mi khempeuh’ muh dingin thumin tau in." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tua bangin na omna thu mite in hong dot ciangin mailam a thupiang ding hangin a tuaci om na hihna thu gen in. Tua hun ciangin a lungsim uh launa tawh kidimin, launa hangin a khut uh lingcipin, a hanna lungsim uh bei-in, lau-in a khuk uh a lin’ kelkelna ding thu le, tua hun ding pen tu-in a hong tungta ahihna thu gen in,” Topa Pasian in a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:8 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu ding genkhol inla, Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Namsau khat kitat hiam a, hoihtakin kipuah kilkel hi." 
Ezekiel21:10 Mi thah nadingin kitat hiam sitset a, khuaphia bangin a tee zialzial dingin a kipuah hi. Note in thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih manun, kuamah in tua namsau kho thei lo hi." 
Ezekiel21:11 Tua namsau limtakin kipuah a, zat pah lian dingin kikoih hi. Mi that ding pa’ zat dingin kitat hiamin kipuahsiang hi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, awng inla kiko in. Hih namsau pen ka mihingte le Israel makai khempeuh a kisawmna ahi hi. Amaute pen ka mite khempeuh tawh a kithat khawm ding ahi hi. Dahna tawh na dip hum in." 
Ezekiel21:13 Note hong kize-et ahi hi. Note in thuhilhna nial lailai le-uhcin, hih thu khempeuh piang loin om ding ahi hiam, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in mailam thu ding genkhol in. Na khut beeng in. Namsau in satsat ding hi. Tua namsau pen mi a that namsau, mi a lausak namsau, mi a lomlomin a that namsau ahi hi." 
Ezekiel21:15 Tua namsau in ka mite meidawi sakin puksak hi. Khuaphia bangin a tee zalzal, mi that dingin a kithawi ka namsau tawh a khuapi uh ka ngim hi." 
Ezekiel21:16 A hiam namsau aw, na ziat na vei vatgawp in! Na ngatna san peuhpeuh vatgawp in." 
Ezekiel21:17 Kei zong ka khut ka beeng ding a, tua ciangin ka hehna dam ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:18 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa a namsau tawh hong kuan theih nading lampi nih ciaptehna bawl in. Tua lampi nihte pen gam khat panin a kipan khawm ding ahi hi. Tua lampi a katna munah ciaptehna khat phut in." 
Ezekiel21:20 Tua lamka khat in Ammon mite’ khuapi Rabbah-ah kumpipa a tun theih nadingin lak ding a, a khat pen in Judah gam sunga om Jerusalem khuapi sung teek a tun nadingin lak ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:21 Lamka a tun ciangin Babylon kumpipa khawl phot ding hi. A tot ding lampi a theih nadingin ai nam tuamtuam san ding a, a thaltangte sing seuhseuhin, innsung pasian milimte thu dongin, biakna-in a gawh ganhingte’ sin a vel ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Jerusalem-ah a pai ding ai a phatna a lak a thaltangte a taklam khutah a tawi hi. Tua ai in Jerusalem-ah a pai nading, galnanna ding phung a cianna ding, galsim nadingin a kikona ding, kulhpite satkhapna ding molhtumte a bawlna ding, kidalna ding phung bawlin dumte a tawhna ding a gen hi." 
Ezekiel21:23 Jerusalem khuamite in khatlekhat a kihuhna ding uh midangte tawh thukimna nei khin uh ahih manin hih bangin amau’ khuapi a kisawmna thu um lo uh hi. Ahi zongin hih bangin ai a kisanna pen amau’ mawhna a phawktheihna ding uh le amaute a kiman ding ahihlam a theih nading uh lim khat ahi hi. 
Ezekiel21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu pen: Na mawhnateng uh tu-in hong kipholak hi. Na mawhna uh mi khempeuh in thei hi. Na gamtatna panun na mawhna uh kilang hi. Mawhsakna a thuak ding na hita uh a, na galte uh khut sungah a hong pia ding ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel21:25 “A gilo, a siangtho lo, Israel gam uk migilo pa aw, nang’ hun zong hong tungta a, gim na tuah ding ni hita hi." 
Ezekiel21:26 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na kumpi lukhu le na dialkhip lakhia in. Nidang bang nawn lo ding hi. Mineute hong lian ding a, miliante hong neuta ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Siacip! Siacip! Hih khuapi ka siacimitsak ding a, a mel a mang zong kimu nawn lo ding hi. A uk dingin a kilawm mipa hong om ciang bekin ama khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel mite a simmawhbawl Ammon mite tawh kisai-in ka thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: A vatlum dingin namsau khat a baihsa-in om a, mi thah nadingin kinawtngil a, khuaphia bangin a tee zialzial dingin a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel21:29 No Ammon mite aw, a siangtho lo, migilote, gim a tuahna ding uh a hun tungta ahih manin sumaigawp un, ci-in a hong hanthawn, na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi hi a, na ai phate uh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel21:30 “A do dingin kithawi vet kei unla na namsau uh a paai-ah siatkik zaw un. Note na pianna gam, na suahna mun uhah, thu a hong khen ding ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel21:31 Note tungah ka hehna kong khah ding a, mei-am kuang hong bang ding hi. Mi thah a siam, migilote’ khut sungah note kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:32 Mei in note hong kangtum ding a, note’ gam mahah na sisan uh luangin, kuamah in note hong phawkkha nawn lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tungah thukhen dingin na kiging nai hiam? A gamtat hoih lohna khempeuh tua khuapi kiangah gen in." 
Ezekiel22:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Nangma mite mahmah tampi tak thatin, milim biakna tawh nangmah kininsaktawm na hih manin, tu-in na hun hong tungta hi." 
Ezekiel22:4 Na mi thahna hang le na milim bawlna hangin a mawh suak na hih manin tu-in nang a dingin a ni cingin, a kha cingta hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte’ simmawhbawl, gamdang khempeuh’ hih thopthopin nang kong koih hi." 
Ezekiel22:5 A nai, a gamla-ah a om mi khempeuh in na gamtat hoih lohna hangin nang hong simmawh uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:6 Na sunga om Israel ulian khempeuh in amau’ thatang muang uh a, mi that uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:7 A nu a pa a zahtakbawl kuamah om lo hi. Pemtate kikhemgawp a, meigong le tagahte zong kihih thopthop hi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Mun siangthote zong zahtakna mel kinei loin, Sabbath-te zong kitang lo hi." 
Ezekiel22:9 Mi pawlkhatte in midangte a sih theih nadingin zuauthu phuak uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in milim biakna sa ne uh hi. Pawlkhatte amau’ lanna tawh kizui-in gamta tawntung hi. 
Ezekiel22:10 Pawlkhatte in a pa’ zi mawhpih uh a, pawlkhatte in numei ninnei kimlaipi buan uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Pawlkhat in midangte’ zi tawh nulepa mawhna bawl uh a, pawlkhat in a mote mawhpihin, pawlkhat in a sanggamnu ahi a pa’ tanu mawhpih hi." 
Ezekiel22:12 Pawlkhat in sum deih manin mi that uh hi. Pawlkhatte in a Israel mipih sum leitawi a late tungah nuamtak sa-in a meet lakna tawh hauhlawh uh hi. Amaute in kei hong mangngilh uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:13 “A man loin mi’ na na suhna le mi na thahna hangin ka khuttum ka zial ding hi. 
Ezekiel22:14 Tua bangin kong hih ciangin hang nawn dingin ki-um a, na khuttum likngam lai dingin ki-um na hi hiam? Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:15 Gam khempeuh le minam dang khempeuh lakah na mite ka thehthang gawp ding a, na gamtat hoih lohna teng ka beisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:16 Tua ahih ciangin minam dangte in nang hong mindaisak ding a, ahi zongin nang Jerusalem in Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:17 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, kei a dingin Israel mite a kimanna om nawn lo hi. Amaute pen sumngo, dal, sik, hak, le ngun a kihelkhawm sung panin meikhuk sungah kihalin a ngunteng a kilak khit ciangin a omlai ngun-ek tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin-ah: Note, tua ngun-ek bangin na kimanna uh om nawn lo ahih manin Jerusalem-ah kong kaikhawm ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:20 Mite in ngun, sumngo, sik, hak, le dalte kaikhawmin a tuisak dingun meikhuk sungah a khul bangin ka hehna tawh note hong kaikhawmin kong tuisuaksak mang ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:21 Jerusalem-ah note hong khawm takpi-in na nuai uhah mei tawhin, ka hehna tawh kong haltui ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:22 Meiphual sungah ngunte a kituisak bangin Jerusalem-ah note hong kibawl ding hi. Tua ciangin keima hehna a thuak na hihlam uh na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:23 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen ka hehna hangin puah loin, a tungah guah ka zuksak lohna leitang tawh a kibatna uh amaute kiangah gen in." 
Ezekiel22:25 A uliante uh, ganhing a that humpinelkai hawk tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in mi thatin, a sum le a neihsa khempeuh laksak uh a, a mi thahna hangun numei tampi tak meigong suaksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:26 A siampite un ka thukham palsatin, a siangtho biakna nate ninsak uh hi. A siangtho biakna nate le a mawkmawk nate khenna mel nei lo uh a, a tate uh tungah a siang le a nin a kilamdanna zong hilh lo uh hi. Sabbath-te zong donin nei lo uh hi. Tuate khempeuh hangin Israel mite in kei hong zahtak lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:27 A kumpi uliante uh, a sa matsa uh a bal gawpgawp ngiahon tawh kibang uh hi. Sum ngahtheih nadingin mi that uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:28 Kulh nin kimlai leikang tui tawh a kizut kang bangin a kamsangte un hih bang mawhnate imcip uh hi. A man lopi maang mu uh a, a man lopi-in mailam thu gen uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in amaute tungah thu gen lo napi-in, Topa Pasian in hih bangin thu gen hi, ci-in zuau phuakin mite tungah thu gen uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:29 Mi cithei a kineite in mi khemin a na sut uh hi. Mizawng mi cimawhte bawlsia-in, pemtate tungah nuamtak sa-in khualna mel nei loin a ututun gamta uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:30 Keimah in ka hehna tawh ka suksiat ding hun ciangin kulh a ciangzo ding, kulh a kicipna munah a cingzo ding, le gam sung a huzo ding mi khat amaute lakah ka zong a, ahi zongin tua bang ding mi khat beek ka muzo kei hi." 
Ezekiel22:31 Tua ahih ciangin amaute’ gamtatna tawh kizui-in gimpiakna-in amaute tungah ka hehna khahin, mei in a kat bangin amaute ka maimangsak ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khatvei lai-in unau numei nih om hi." 
Ezekiel23:3 Amaute Egypt-ah a omlai, a khangno laitakun, a nungakna lim uh bei-in numei paktat a suak uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:4 A unu’ min Oholah hi a, Samaria khuapi tawh kibang a cihnopna ahi hi. A naunu’ min Oholibah hi a, Jerusalem khuapi tawh kibang a cihnopna ahi hi. Hih numei nihte ka tenpih a, a nihun kei tawh ta nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:5 Keima zi hinapi-in Oholah pen numei paktatte mah bangin gamta lailai a, Assiria gam pana a lawm ngaihte lunggulh mahmah hi. Tua a lawm ngaihte pen" 
Ezekiel23:6 puansan a silh galkap hangte, gam uk mangte, le galkapmang liante hi a, a vekpi-un a ngaihhuai, sakol tung tuang galkapmang liante ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Amah pen Assiria uliante khempeuh tawh a mawhsa khat hi a, ama huk luatna hangin Assiria milimte nangawn va bia hi." 
Ezekiel23:8 A nungakna beisakin, Egypt gam a a paktat mah zom lailai hi. A nungak tung a kipanin mite in luppihin numei paktatte bangin bawlin a ututun hih uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Tua ahih ciangin a lunggulh mahmah, a it Assiria mite’ khut sungah amah ka pia hi." 
Ezekiel23:10 Assiria mite in a puan hawkkhiatsak uh a, a tanu le a tapate matsakin, tua ciangin namsau tawh amah that uh hi. Mun khempeuha numeite in amah gentehna khatin nei uh a, ama tungah thu kikhen hi." 
Ezekiel23:11 “A naunu Oholibah in hih thu thei napi-in, a unu Oholah sangin zong a siazaw, a sukzaw-in paktat lai hi." 
Ezekiel23:12 Amah in a vekpi-in a ngaihbaang Assiria mi tangval ahi gam ukte le galkapmangte, puansan a silh galkapte, le sakol tung tuang uliante nak lunggulh mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Hih a naunu zong a u zah mahin sia taktak hi, ci-in ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel23:14 “A paktatna nakpitakin hong sia semsem hi. Amah in Babylon uliante’ limte, kawm tungah a san zeza-in a kizut, a kawngten puan le a dialkhip kaite tawh cingtakin a kibawl limte a muh ciangin hoihsa mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel23:15  
Ezekiel23:16 Amah in tua limte a muh phetin amaute lunggulh mahmah pah a, a sam dingin Babylon gamah kamtai a paisak pah hi." 
Ezekiel23:17 Babylon mite zong amah tawh a mawh dingin hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a lungkim dongun tua nu hih nilohin ninsak uh a, a tawpna-ah amaute a ngaih gen loh a kihzah ciang dongin a bawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:18 Amah numei paktat ahihna mi khempeuh theisakin, tua bangin amah le amah a kipholak ciangin a unu ka muhdah zah mah bangin amah zong ka mudah hi." 
Ezekiel23:19 A paktatna uang semsem a, a nungak lai-in Egypt gamah a paktat mah bangin gamta niloh hi." 
Ezekiel23:20 Sakoltal lan bangin a zang a gol, a lan mahmah mi khempeuh ngai pahpah hi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Tua hi a, Oholibah aw, Egypt gamah nungakin na omlai-in na nawi hong kinuaigawp sakin, na nungakna na beisak huna na gamtat hoih lote mah a gamtakik nuam na hi hi." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Oholibah aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima hong gen thu in: Tu-in nang in hih na lunggulh mite na cimtakta hi. Ahi zongin nangma tungah amaute ka hehsak ding a, nang a hong umcih dingin kong paipih ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:23 Babylon khuamite, Khaldea gammite, Pekod mite, Shoa mite, Koa mite, le Assiria mite khempeuh kong paipih ding hi. Amaute a vekpi-in tangval melhoih, a ngaihbaang gam ukte le galkapmangte hi a, a vekpi-un ulianpipi, sakol tung tuang galkapmang liante vive ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Amaute in leilu lam panin nang hong sim ding uh a, leeng galkap le vanpua leeng tampi hong kengin galkap tampi tak tawh hong kuan ding uh hi. Lumte le siklukhute tawh kidalin amaute in nang hong umcih ding uh hi. Amaute’ khut sungah nang kong ap ding a, amaute’ ngeina om bangin nang’ tungah thu hong khen ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nangma tungah kei heh ka hih manin nangma tungah amaute hong heh gamtat ding uh hi. Na nakleh na bilte hong atkhiatsakin na tate hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tanu le na tapate na kiang panin hong sutin a hingtangun hallum ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:26 Na puante hong hawkkhiatsakin, a manpha na kizepnate zong hong laksak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:27 Na huknate le Egypt gam a kipan na gamtat hoih lohnate ka beisak ding hi. Milimte et-in na nei nawn kei ding a, Egypt-te zong na ngaihsun nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na muhdah na etsat mite’ khut sungah nang kong pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel23:29 Amaute zong nangma tungah hong muhdah gamtat ding uh a, na thalawhsa na khempeuh hong laksakin na hawmguakin hong nusia ding uh hi. Na paktat gamtatnateng hong kipholak ding hi. Na hukna le na paktat gamtatna in" 
Ezekiel23:30 nangma tungah hih bangteng hong tungsak hi. Minam dangte tawh na paktat a, a milimte uh tawh na kininsak hi." 
Ezekiel23:31 Na unu’ khekhapteng mah tawn na hih manin amah gim ka piak bangin nang zong gim ka hong pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel23:32 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na unu’ hai mah na dawn ding a, tua hai golin thuk mahmah hi. A hai dim sitset ahih manin mi khempeuh in hong simmawhin hong nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Na unu Samaria’ hai pen launa le siatna hai hi a, hong amsakin hong lungkhamsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:34 Tua hai a tawdat nangawn na dawn kang ding a, a hai na petkham ding hi. A hai kitam themte tawh na nawi na kuikham ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Tu-in Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nangmah in kei hong mangngilhin hong nungngat na hih manin na hukna le na paktatna hangin na thuak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:36 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Oholah le Oholibah tungah thukhen dingin na kithawi nai hiam? A gamtat hoih lohna teng uh amaute tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amaute in milim biakna tawh nulepa mawhna bawlin mi zong that lai uh hi. Milimte tawh mawhna gamta-in, kei tawh a neih a tapate uh that uh hi. A tapate uh milim biakna-in go uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:38 Amaute’ gamtatna tu-a bangteng bek hi lo lai hi. Ka biakinn ninsak uh a, ka Sabbath-te zong palsat lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:39 Milim biakna-in ka tate a gawh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin ka biakinn-ah pai-in ninsak uh hi. Ka biakinn sungah hih bangin gamta tazen uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:40 “Amaute in gamlapi-a a om mite a sam dingin kamtai sawl uh a, a sap mite hong pai uh hi. Hih numeite kisilin, a mit uh zemin, kizepna a manpha a tuamtuamte tawh kizemin kipuah uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:41 Lupna hoih mahmah tungah tu-in a mai uhah sabuai limtakin koih uh hi. Tua sabuai tungah keima piaksa paknamtui le oliv thaute koih uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:42 Lungnuamin a om mihonte’ gamlumna kiza a, gamlak panin mihon mawkmawk pawlkhat zong hong kitunpih hi. Amaute in tua numeite’ khutah tau butsak uh a, a lu tung uhah kumpi lukhu hoihte khusak uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:43 Nulepa mawhna bawlin a paat ngingeisa numei khat, numei paktatte khat mah bangin a hih lailai uh hi tah a, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel23:44 Numei paktatte kianga a hawh bangin amaute pai niloh uh hi. Tu-a bangin a gamtat hoih lo Oholah le Oholibah-te kiangah a paktat dingin amaute a pai uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:45 Amaute in nulepa mawhna bawlin mi thahna tawh zong kipelh lo uh ahih manin midikte in nulepa mawhna bawlna hang le mi thahna hangin a mawhsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:46 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Amaute lausak gawpin a nate uh a sutgawp dingin mihon khat paisak in. 
Ezekiel23:47 Tua mihonte in amaute suang tawh dengin, namsau tawh amaute sugawp hen la, a tate uh thatin, a innte uh halsak hen." 
Ezekiel23:48 Amaute’ gamtat bangin kuamah a gamtat loh nadingun gam sunga a om numei khempeuh hilhkholhna limin hih bang gamtat hoih lohnate, gam sung khempeuhah ka beisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:49 No unau numei nihte ahihleh, na paktatna uh le na milim biakna hangun gim kong pia ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum kua kum, a kha sawmna sung a ni sagih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tuni pen Babylon kumpipa in Jerusalem khuapi a umcih ni ding ahih manin lai sungah tuni limtakin ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel24:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute a dingin gentehna-in ka gen ahi hih thugentehna pen a lehdo thei ka mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mei tungah beel suang unla a sungah tui a dimin buk un. 
Ezekiel24:4 Sa a phei, a liang, a limci pente khah unla, a guh limcite tawh zong dimsak un." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tuu limci pente’ sa zang unla, beel nuai-ah mei cih un. A tui sosak unla, a guh le a sate sosak un." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Amah pen a kang-op a kinawtkhia ngei lo beel tawh kibang hi. Beel sunga sate khat khatin kilakhia a, a vekpi-in bei khinta hi." 
Ezekiel24:7 Khuapi sungah mi kithahna om a, a sisante, leivui in a vuh theih nading leilakah taaksak loin, suang tungah taaksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ka heh suakin a phu a kilak theih nadingin a manthan’ theih loh nading munah a sisante a tua ci-in ka omsak hi. 
Ezekiel24:9 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi pen tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Kei mahmah in a mei ka cih ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:10 Sing hong cih beh un! A mei sem un! A sa huan un! A tui kangsak un! A saguhte kangtumsak un! 
Ezekiel24:11 Tua ciangin a taubeel hawm mei-am tungah suangin sansak veva un. Tua hileh a kang-op ninteng kangtumin hong siangkik ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:12 Ahi zongin bangzahin hanciamin a kisep hangin, a kang-op in bun lua ahih manin siang zo lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:13 Jerusalem aw, na gamtat hoih lohnate in nang hong ninsak khin hi. A siansuah dingin kong hanciamciam hangin a nin mahin na omlai veve hi. Ka heh mahmahna na thuak khit matengin na siangkik ngei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:14 Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin hi. Tu-in ka gamtat hun ding hong tungta hi. Kong kiphawkmawh bawl nawn kei ding a, ki-ip nawn loin, zong kong khasiat ngaihsut kei ding hi. Na gamtatna bangin gim hong kipia ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:15 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na it penpen mi khat thakhatin a hong laksak ding ka hi hi. Na thum na tau kei ding a, zong kap loin, na khitui zong na luangsak kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Mite’ zakin zong na kidik kei ding a, dahna limin lukhu khu lo, khedap bulh lo, cih bangin zong na om kei ding hi. Na mai zong na khuh kei ding a, a dahte’ annekte pawl zong na ne kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:18 A zingsang lamin mite kiangah thugenin ka om a, a nitak ciangin ka zi hong si hi. Kei zong a zing ciangin Topa’ hong sawl bang teekteekin ka gamta hi." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tua ciangin mite in, “Bang hangin hici gamtat na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:20 Kei zong amaute kiangah, “ Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:21 Israel mite kiangah hih bangin thu gen in hong ci hi. Ama cihna-ah: Note in na kisaktheihpih uh, a sungah paipai-in na etet nop uh ka biakinn pen a ninsak ding ka hi hi. Tua ciangin note’ nungah a omlai na tate uh, namsau-in si ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:22 Tua ciangin keima gamtat bangin note gamta-in, na mai uh na khuh kei ding uh a, a dahte’ annekte pawl zong na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:23 Lukhu khu-in khedap na bulh ding uh a, thum lo, tau loin na om ding uh hi. Note’ gitlohna hangin note maimangin, a taukhawm litlit ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:24 Tua ciangin kei pen note a dingin lim ka hi ding hi. Keima gamtat bangbangin a gamta ding na hihna uh hong gen hi. Hih bangin thu hong pian’ ciangin, kei pen Topa Pasian ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Ezekiel24:25 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute in a kisaktheihpih, a lungdampih, paipai-in a etet nop uh biakinnpi ka lakhia ding a, a tanu a tapate uh zong ka laksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:26 Tua bangin ka hih ni ciangin tua siatna panin a suakta mi khat hong tai-in nangma kiangah a thu hong ko ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:27 Tua ni ciangin nang na pauthei kik ding a, amah tawh na kihokhawm thei ding hi. Tu-a bangin nang pen mite a dingin lim khat na hi ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Ammon mite’ lam nga inla, amaute mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel25:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Ka biakinn kininsakin, Israel gam kisusia-in, Judah mite salin a pai na muh uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam se uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:4 Tua ahih manin nisuahna lam panin a hong pai mite’ khut sungah note ka hong pia ding a, amaute in note’ gam sungah phual hong satin hong teng ding uh hi. Note’ nek ding singgahte le note’ dawn ding bawngnawite hong gaihsakmang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabbah khuapi pen kalaoh khua ka suaksak ding a, Ammon khuapi dangte zong tuukhawk ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:6 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin-ah: Note lungdamin khut bengin, kipakin na diang uh a, Israel gam na simmawhbawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:7 Hih bangin gamta se na hih manun note’ nate hong sutgawp ding minamte’ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Note hong sumaimang ding ka hih manin a minamin ahi a, a gamin ahi zongin na dingzo nawn kei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:8 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Moab mite in a thugenna uhah, Judah gammite pen minam dangte bangmah hi lel uh hi, ci se uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:9 Tua ahih manin Moab gam hutna-in a kiphut a kiima om khuapite le a khuapi minthang pente ahi Bethjeshimoth, Baalmeon, le Kiriathaim khuapite, midangte ka simsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ammon mite a zawhgawp mah bangin, Moab mite zong, nisuahna lam mite ka zogawpsak ding a, Moab mite pen minamin dingzo nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:11 Tua bangin Moab mite gim ka pia ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:12 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Edom mite in Judah mite tungah a phulakna uh nasia lua ahih manin tua a phulakna hangun Edom mite tungah mawhna om hi." 
Ezekiel25:13 Tua ahih ciangin Edom mite gim pia-in, a mihing a ganhingin ka thahmangna ding thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Teman khuapi pan a kipan Dedan khuapi dongin a gam sung khempeuh uh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, a mite khempeuh uh gal sungah si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:14 Keima mi Israel-te in Edom mite tungah phu hong laksak ding uh a, ka heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in Edom mite thuaksak ding uh hi. Keima phulakna zia Edom mite in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in thu gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:15 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Filistia mite in galin a neih tawntung mite uh tungah phu nasia lakin hehna tawh susiagawp uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:16 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite simin ka beimangsakna ding thu a hong genkhia ta ka hi hi. Filistia Zanglei a a omlai mi khempeuh ka susiamang ding hi. 
Ezekiel25:17 Amaute nakpitakin gim pia-in, a kicing zah dongin amaute tungah phu ka la ding a, ka hehna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel26:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le khat kum, tua kha a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi mite awngin hih bangin kiko uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Sumbawlna lama i kidempih Jerusalem khuapi zancip gawp hi. A kulhpite tu-in kihongkek a, amaute’ guallelhna tu-in eima hauhna suak ding hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin-ah: Taia khuapi aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nangmah a sim dingin minam tampi kong paipih ding a, tuipi hualte bangin hong kuan henhan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:4 Na kulhpite susia-in, na tausangte supai ding uh hi. Tua ciangin leitang khempeuh kiatkhia-in a suangtumte bek omlai ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:5 Nidangin tuipi in a tup ngei suangte tungah tu-in ngasa bengte in a ngen uh pho ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin hi. Minam dangte in nang Taia khuapi hong luhgawp ding uh a," 
Ezekiel26:6 na gam sunga khuapi dangte sungah a teng mi khempeuh, a namsau uh tawh that khin ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nang Taia khuapi in na hong thei ding hi, ci hi." 
Ezekiel26:7 “Tua ciangin kumpi khempeuh lak panin a lianpen ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar, nang Taia khuapi a sim dingin kong paipih ding hi. Amah leilu lam gam pan hong kipanin galkap honpi, sakolte le a leengte, le sakol galkap honte hong tonpih ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Gam sunga om khuapi-a teng mi khempeuh galkidona sungah si ding uh hi. Note hong sim nadingun galte in dum to-in, phung ciangin, a kidalna dingun kulh muanhuai bawl ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Amaute in molhtum tawh na kulhpite satkham ding uh a, na tausangte uh zong hei tawh phukgawp ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:10 A sakolte uh a paina leivui khute in khuapi tuamcip ding hi. Van pua leeng le leeng galkapte’ ginna in khuapi kulhte cimsak ding a, a kisusiasa kulhkongpi-a pai bangin hong lut lel ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:11 Sakol galkapte in kongzing khempeuh tuancilgawp ding uh a, a namsau uh tawh mi khempeuh vatlum ding uh hi. Innkhuam lianpipite leilak kidenna ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Note’ neihsa na hoih khempeuh, na galte un a ututin zang ding uh hi. Kulhte supai-in inn hoihpipite satthanggawp ding uh hi. Inn-a kizang sing le suang, le na khempeuh la-in tuipi sung denna ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Khuapi sungah lasakna awging ka beisak ding a, tumtheih awgingte khempeuh zong kiza nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Khuapi sungah bangmah om nawn loin, ngasa bengte in a ngen uh a pho theih nading suangtumte bek ka omsak lai ding hi. Nang Taia khuapi hong kilamkik nawn lo ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel26:15 Topa Pasian in Taia khuapi tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: “Nang hong kisimin hong kilak ni ciangin na sunga kithat mite’ kut vengvangna in tuipi dunga teng mite lau-in patausak ding hi. 
Ezekiel26:16 Tuipi a zang minamte’ kumpite, a kumpi tokhom tung uh panin kumkhia ding uh a, a kumpi puante uh le a puan hoih silhte uh suahkhia-in, leilakah tu-in, lau-in a ling ding uh hi. Nangma thuakna hong muh manun lau mahmah ding uh a, a ci-lin uh pha thei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:17 Tua ciangin nang tawh kisai-in hih bangin dah la hong phuah ding uh hi: A minthang khuapi kisia ta a, a teembawte tuipi panin maimangta hi. Hih khuapi mite in tuipi uk ngei uh a, tuipi gei-ah a teng mi khempeuh’ kihtak hi ngei hi." 
Ezekiel26:18 Tu-in hih khuapi kia ta a, tuikulh khempeuh lau-in ling uh hi. Tua bang siatna hangin tuikulh-ah a teng mite, lau-in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:19 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Kuamah a ten lohna a kisia khuapi bangin a gamkhing khuapi-in kong bawl ding hi. Tuipi tuite kong tumsak ding hi. 
Ezekiel26:20 Tanglai-a a sisa mite tawh a tengkhawm dingin misite’ khua Leinuai-ah kong puak ding hi. Siatna a thuak tawntung leinuai-a omte lakah kong koih ding a, a sisate tawh na om ding hi. A hingte lakah a omkik dingin tua lai panin nong kilehkik nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nang pen mite’ etteh dingin a lauhuai mahmahin kong bawl ding a, tua pen nang a dingin a beina hita ding hi. Mite in nang hong zonzon hangun hong muzo nawn lo ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel27:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi tamlawhna kah la khat sa in." 
Ezekiel27:3 Tuipi gei-ah omin tuipi dunga mite tawh sumlei sumzuakna a nei khuapi tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute hih bangin gen in: “Taia khuapi aw, na melhoihna na kisaktheihpih hi." 
Ezekiel27:4 Nangma inn pen tuipi hi a, nang hong lamte in teembaw hoih bangin hong bawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:5 A sing zat dingun Senir Mual a om taksingte zang uh a, na puankhai khuam dingin Labanon a om taamtak singte zang uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:6 Nangmah hawh nadingin Bashan tawsaw singte la uh a, Grik tuikulh panin a kila taaksante tawh na sual ding bawl uh a, saiha pak tawh nang hong zem uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:7 Egypt gam saihadial puan a kizemte tawh na puankhai kibawl a, gamlapi pek panin zong kithei thei hi. Saipras tuikulh panin a kingah puan hoihpente, kumpi mel puante tawh na tungkhuh kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel27:8 Sidon le Arvad khuapi mite in nang hong hot uh a, misiam mahmahte in nang hong hawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:9 Nang hong lem lettamate pen Gebal khuapi mi khutsiam mahmahte ahi uh hi. Tuipi tungah a pai teembaw nasemte khempeuh in na sumbuk hong zuan uh hi. 
Ezekiel27:10 “Persia gam, Lud gam, le Put gammite in nangma galkap hong sem uh a, na sungah a lumte uh le a siklukhute uh a khai uh hi. Amaute in nangma tungah minthanna hong tunpih uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvad gam galkapte in na kulh cing uh a, Gamad gammite in na tausangte cing uh hi. Amaute in na kulh tungah a lum uh a khai uh hi. Nang a hong etlawmsak mite pen amaute ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tarshish gammite tawh sumlei sumzuakna-ah na kizom uh a, na van tampite hong lei-in ngun, sik, dal, le haknawte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan gammite, Tubal mite, le Meshek mite in zong sumlei sumzuakna-ah nang tawh kizopna nei uh a, na vante hong leina-in sila dingin mite, le sumngo beelte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:14 Bethtogarmah gammite in zong vante hong leina-in vanpua sakolte, sakol galkapte, le late hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:15 Rods gammite in zong nang tawh sumzuakna-ah kizopna nei uh a, tuipi gei-a om gam khempeuhte in na van hong leina-in saiha le ningsing hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:16 Edom mite in zong na van tampi hong lei uh hi. Van leina-in emerald suangmanpha, puansan, a kizem puante, saihadial puan hoihte, suangkhi, le ruby suangmanphate hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judah le Israel gammite in zong na van leina-in mangbuh, oliv thau, le theipal, khuaizu le sing namtui tuamtuamte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damaskas khuapi in zong na vante tampi tak hong lei a, a man dingin Helbon gam a piang leenggahzu, tuumul kang, a kihuansa sik, taksing, le thalsingte hong pia hi." 
Ezekiel27:19  
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan mite in na van hong leina-in sakol dapphahte hong pia uh hi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia mite le Kedar gam ukte in tuuno, tuutal, le keeltal tawh na van hong lei uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Sheba le Raamah sumbukte in na van leina-in singnamtui hoihpente, suangmanphate, le kham hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanneh, Eden, Asshur, le Khilmad khuapite in zong nang tawh sumlei sumzuakna-ah kizopna hong nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Amaute in nang kiangah puan manpha mahmahte, puansan, a kizem puante, sualphah puante, le limtakin a kiheek khauhual hoih nam khempeuh hong zuak uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:25 Nangma vante ahihleh teembaw lianpente pawl in a honhonin hong pua uh hi. “Nang pen van a dim pua-in tuipi tungah a pai teembaw lianpi tawh na kibang hi. 
Ezekiel27:26 Nang hong hotte in tuipi thukna gamlapi-ah hong hot uh a, nisuahna huihpi in tuipi laizangah nang hong mutsia hi." 
Ezekiel27:27 Tua bangin nang na siat ni ciangin a tam mahmah na van khempeuh na sungah a om teembaw nasemte khempeuh, na lettamate le na sumbuk mite khempeuh, na sungah a om na galkap khempeuh, a vekpi-in nang tawh tuipi sungah tuummang khin uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:28 Teembaw nasem tuikiate’ kikona in tuipi geiteng a thawn hi. 
Ezekiel27:29 “Teembaw dangah a tuang mi khempeuh kumkhia uh a, a vekpi-un tuipi gei-ah pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:30 Nangma hangin nakpitakin kap uh a, a lu uh leivui thehin vut lakah a bual uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:31 Nangma hangin a lu uh mettol uh a, dahna limin puanhampi silh uh a, na sa lua-in a kap uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:32 Amaute in nang hong tamlawh uh a, ‘Tuipi sungah a daicipsuak Taia khuapi, kua dang tawh kitehthei ding a, ama thuak bang kua in thuak ngei ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Na sumbuk vante tuipi tungah a pai ciangin minam khempeuh’ tangsapna na cingsak hi. Nangma van hauhna in kumpi dangte hauhlawh hi. 
Ezekiel27:34 Tu-in tuipi tungah na sia a, tuipi thuk sungah na kiasuk hi. Na vante le na mi khempeuh tuipi sungah nang tawh maimangta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:35 “Tuipi gei-ah a teng mi khempeuh in lamdang hong sa ding uh hi. A kumpite uh zong lau mahmah ding uh a, a maiput uh laumai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:36 Tu-in nang a maimang paisuak na hita a, nangma tuah bang a tuahkhak ding uh leitungah a om sumbuk dang khempeuh lau-in ling uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi a ukpa kiangah Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gennop thu, ama tungah hih bangin gen in: “Kisaktheihna lungsim lianpi nangmah in na nei a, kei, pasian khat ka hi hi, na ci hi. Nang pen pasian bangin pil na kisak hangin mihing na hi lel bek hi." 
Ezekiel28:3 Danel sangin pil na kisa zaw a, theih loh a nei loin na kingaihsun kha hi." 
Ezekiel28:4 Na pilna le na siamna tawh ngun le kham tampi na nei hi. 
Ezekiel28:5 Sumbawl na siamna tawh na hauhna na behlap a, na hauhna na kisaktheihpih hi." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka hong genin-ah: Nang pen pasian zahin a pil kisa na hih manin 
Ezekiel28:7 thukhualna a nei het lo galte, nang ka hong simsak ding hi. Na pilna le na siamna tawh na lamsa na khempeuh amaute in hong vatmaisak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:8 Amaute in nang hong that ding uh a, na hankhuk ding tuipi sungah hong khia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:9 Nang a hong that ding a hong kuan ciangun, kei pasian bang hi ing, na ci lailai diam? Nang hong thatte na tuah ciangin mihing na hih lelna hong kilang ding hi." 
Ezekiel28:10 Gamdang mite’ khut sungah ui bang lelin na si ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:11 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia kumpipa in a thuak ding tawh kisai-in tamlawh inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: “Nidang lai-in mi kicing etteh pha khat na hi a, pilna le hoihna tawh a kidim na hi hi." 
Ezekiel28:13 Pasian’ Eden huan sungah nang na teng a, suangmanpha nam khempeuh tawh na kizem hi. Karnelian, topaz, le jasper, khrisolait, beryl, le onik, sapfaia, karbankel, le emerald suangmanphate, nangma kizepna hi a, kham tawh kibawl kizepna tampi tak zong na nei lai hi. Hihte khempeuh nangma a dingin na suah ni-in a hong kibawlsak ahi hi." 
Ezekiel28:14 Sathau a kinilh kherub-te nang ka hong cingsak a, ka mual siangtho tungah nang na teng a, a tee zaizai suangmanphate lakah na vak kawikawi hi." 
Ezekiel28:15 Gamtatsiat ding na kipat ma hun ciang dong, na suah tung a kipanin na gamtatna khempeuh paubaanna khat beek om lo hi." 
Ezekiel28:16 Na sumbawl luatna hangin mi ngongtat na suak a, mawhna sungah na tungkha hi. Tua ahih manin ka mual siangtho panin nang ka hong hawlkhia a, a tee zaizai suangmanphate lak panin nang a hong cing kherub-te in a hong hawlkhia uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:17 Na melhoihna na kisaktheihpih kha a, na minthanna in nang hong haitatsak hi. Leilak ka hong denna a, kumpi dangte hilhkholhna-in nang ka hong koih hi." 
Ezekiel28:18 A man loin sum na bawl luatna hang, tua bang na mawhna hangin na biakna munte na siasak hi. Tua ahih manin khuapi sung ka hal a, a vekpi-in kangtummang hi. Nangmah a hong en mi khempeuh’ muhna-ah vutlevai ka hong suah hi." 
Ezekiel28:19 Tu-in nang a maimang paisuak na hita a, nangma tuah bang a tuahkhak ding uh nang hong theisa minam khempeuhte lau-in a ling uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:20 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Sidon lam nga inla, a siatna ding thu genkhol in." 
Ezekiel28:22 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu, amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: “Sidon khuapi aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi a, nangma tungah ka hong bawlna hangin mite in kei hong phat ding uh hi. Nangma sungah a teng mite gimpiakna tawh ka sianthona ka lah ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:23 Nangma sungah cinatna ka tungsak ding a, na kongzing khempeuhah sisan ka luangsak ding hi. Na kimkot khempeuh panin nang hong kisim ding a, na mi khempeuh kithatlum mang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:24 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “A kimkota om Israel mi a simmawh minam dangte in tu-in simmawh nawn lo ding uh a, Israel mite sunin a nasak thei ding ling le lingkung tawh kibang nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:25 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Minam tuamtuamte lakah ka thehthangna panin Israel mite ka kaikhawm kik ding a, kei pen a siangthopa ka hihna thu minam khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin ka nasempa Jakob ka piak leitang ahi amaute’ gam sungah Israel mite a teng ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:26 Tua gam sungah lungmuang takin teng ding uh a, amaute in inn lamin, leenggui suan ding uh hi. Israel mite a simmawh minam dangte gim ka pia ding a, Israel mite ahihleh lungmuang takin om hithiat ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa amau’ Pasian ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel29:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmna, a kha sawm, a ni sawm le nih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro’ lam nga inla, amah le Egypt gam khempeuh gim a kipiakna ding thu genkhol in." 
Ezekiel29:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah gen in: “Gun sungah a om awle lianpi ahi, nang Egypt kumpipa aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nail Gunpi, nangma a’ in na gen a, nangma bawlsa-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel29:4 Na khaguh-ah sikkawi ka bulh ding a, na gun sunga om ngasa khempeuh nangma tungah ka belhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin nangma tungah a belh ngasa khempeuh tawh Nail gun sung panin nang kong kaikhia ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:5 Nang le na ngasa khempeuh gamlakah kong paai ding hi. Leilakah na pumpi kiphah ding a, phum lohin hong kikoih ding hi. Ganhingte le vasate’ an dingin nang ka hong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Israel mite’ muan le suan khat na hi ngei a, ahi zongin nang pen a khauh lo pumpeeng kung khat bang na hi lel hi." 
Ezekiel29:7 Nangma tungah amaute hong kingap uh ciangin nang na kitan a, amaute sunin na puksak hi." 
Ezekiel29:8 Tu-in Topa Pasian in nang kiangah kong genin-ah: Namsau tawh mi kong simsak ding a, na mite le na ganhingte thatlummang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:9 Egypt gam khempeuh a kinusia gam simtham suak ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi. Nangmah in Nail Gunpi pen keima a’ hi a, keima bawlsa hi, ci na hih manin," 
Ezekiel29:10 nangmah le Nail Gunpi langah keimah ka pang hi. Egypt gam khempeuh, leilu lam Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi, Ethiopia gamgi dong, a kinusia gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Na gam sungteng, mihing in ahi a, ganhing in ahi zongin sik nawn lo ding hi. Kum sawmli sung bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:12 Leitung gam khempeuh lakah Egypt gam pen a gamkhing penin ka bawl ding hi. Kum sawmli sung khuapi sia dang khempeuh sangin a siazaw-in Egypt khuapite ka bawl ding hi. Egypt mite galtai-in ka bawl ding a, gam khempeuh le minam dang khempeuh kiangah taisakin ka kithehthangsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Kum sawmli khit ciangin a kithehthangna minamte lak panin Egypt mite ka kaikhawmkik ding a," 
Ezekiel29:14 amaute’ piancilna mun Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gamah ka tengsak ding hi. Tua lai-ah kumpi gam ginaloin om ding uh a," 
Ezekiel29:15 kumpi gam khempeuh lakah a ginalo pen suak ding uh a, minam dang kuamah ukzo nawn lo ding uh hi. A ginalo mahmahin bawl ding ka hih manin amau’ deih bangin minam dang khat beek tasak zo lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israel mite in muan le suanin amaute neikik ngei nawn lo ding uh hi. Egypt-te a tuahsiat ciangin a suang khialkha ahih lamtak uh Israel mite in a phawk ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu Israel mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel29:17 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmnih le sagih kum, a kha masa a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Taia khuapi sim hi. A galkapte, nakpitakin hanciamsak lua ahih manin a sam nangawn uh pulhmangin, a liangkote uh a sa nangawn lengkhiamang a, ahi zongin tua bangin amau’ gim thamanin kumpipa le a galkapte in bangmah phattuamna ngah lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin thu kong gen hi: Tu-in Taia khuapi a simna hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar tungah Egypt gam ka pia ding hi. Amah in Egypt gam luhin a nate uh sut ding a, galkapte’ thaman dingin Egypt-te’ neihsa khempeuh puakhiamang ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:20 A galkapte in keima a dingin na hong sepsak uh ahih manin, ama hong nasepsak ka thuhna-in ama tungah Egypt gam a pia ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Hih thu hong tun ciangin Israel mite a thahat minamin ka bawlkik ding a, mi khempeuh’ zakna ding munah nang thu kong gensak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel30:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: “‘A lauhuai ni,’ ci-in awng in." 
Ezekiel30:3 Minamte’ siatna ding hun Topa’ ni hong naita hi. 
Ezekiel30:4 Egypt gamah galpi tung ding a, Ethiopia gamah lungkhamna lianpi om ding hi. Egypt gamah mi tampi kithat ding a, a neihsa khempeuh uh kipuakhia-in, gam hawmguakin kinusia ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Tua galpi in Ethiopia gam, Put gam, Lud gam, Arabia gam, le Libya gam panin a kicial galkap khempeuh that ding a, keima mite’ lak pana galkapte nangawn si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Leilu lama om Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi dong, Egypt gam a hute khempeuh gal sungah simang ding uh a, Egypt’ kiphatsakpih a galkapteng simang ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi."
