Ezekiel30:7 Egypt gam, leitung gam khempeuhah a gamkhing pen suak ding a, khuapi dang a siate khempeuh sangin a khuapite siazaw ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:8 Keimah in Egypt gam haltumin, a gam sung a hute khempeuh ka beisak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Tua bangin Egypt gam a siat ni hun hong tun ciangin bangmah khuaphawk loin a om Ethiopia mite kiangah kamtaite ka sawl ding a, amaute lau mahmah ding uh hi. Tua hun ding tu-in hong tungta hi." 
Ezekiel30:10 “Egypt’ hauhnateng a sumai dingin Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar ka zang ding hi. 
Ezekiel30:11 Amah le a kihtakhuai a galkapte hong pai ding a, gam sung khempeuh susia ding hi. Namsau tawh Egypt mite vatlum ding a, gam sung khempeuhah misi luanghawm dim ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nail Gun a tui ka kangsak ding a, migilote’ khut sungah Egypt ka koih ding hi. Gamdang mite in susia gawpin, gamkhing suaksak ding uh hi, Topa ahi keimah in ka ci khin hi." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Milim khempeuh ka susia ding a, Memfis khuapi-ah a om pasian man lote ka beisak ding hi. Egypt gam a uk ding kuamah om nawn lo ding a, mi khempeuh lausakin ka lingsakgawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:14 Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gamteng gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, Egypt gam saklamah a om Zoan khuapi ka hal ding a, kumpi khua ahi Thebes, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Egypt gam sungah khuapi muanhuai pen Pelusium khuapi, ka hehna ka thuaksak ding a, Thebes khuapi mi khempeuh ka sumai ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Egypt gam sung khempeuh ka haltum ding a, Pelusium khuapi in gimna lianpi thuak ding hi. Thebes khuapikulh khempeuh kicimgawp ding a, tui in a khuapi tuum ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:17 On khuapi le Pibeseth khuapi tangvalte, gal sungah si khin ding uh a, adangteng salin kiman ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:18 Egypt’ vangliatna ka suksiat ciangin Tahpanhes khuapi-ah khim zinggawp ding a, a kisaktheihpihna teng uh a beita ding hi. Egypt gam sung meiipi in khuhcip ding a, a mi khempeuh salin pai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:19 Tu-a bangin Egypt tungah gim ka piak ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel30:20 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le khat kum, a kha masa a ni sagih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro’ khut ka kuaihtansak zo hi. A khut damkikin namsau a tawizawh nadingin kuamah in a khut tuamsak lo hi." 
Ezekiel30:22 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Kei pen Egypt kumpipa Faro’ lang ka hi hi. A khut a damlai pen le a kitansa zong, a lang nihin ka kuaihtansak ding a, a khut panin namsau ka kiasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Egypt mite pen, gam khempeuh le minam khempeuhte lakah ka thehthang ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa’ khut ka khauhsak ding a, ama khut sungah ka namsau ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa Faro’ khut ka kuaihtansak ding a, a langte’ mai-ah tai-in a si ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:25 Amah ka thaneemsak ding a, Babylon kumpipa ka thakhauhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Babylon kumpipa’ khut sungah ka namsau ka piak ciangin amah in Egypt lam a ngat ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:26 Tua ciangin gam khempeuh le minam tuamtuamte lakah Egypt mite ka thehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel31:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le khat kum, a kha thumna a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro le ama mite’ kiangah hih bangin gen in: “Na lian mahmah uh a, kong tehpihtheih ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Ezekiel31:3 A hiangte hoihin pha mahmah a, a kung sang mahmahin meii lak a ban, Lebanon-a a po taamtak tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:4 A khangsak ding tui om a, leisung panin an a pia ding tui om hi. Tua sing a pona mun tui kawt a, gam sung sing khempeuh in zong tui a ngah uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:5 Limtakin tui ngah ahih manin singkung dang khempeuh sangin a sangzaw hi. A hiangte golin sau mahmah hi. 
Ezekiel31:6 Vasa nam khempeuh in a hiang tungah bu tom uh a, ganhing nam khempeuh in a liimnuai, tasuahna-in a nei uh hi. Leitung minam khempeuh in zong a liimnuai belhin a nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:7 Tua singkung hoih mahmah a, a kung sangin, a hiang zau a, a zung in tui omna lei thukpi sung a ban hi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pasian’ huanah a om taamtak hoihte tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a, taksing kung in tua bang hiang hoih nei ngei lo a, hiangpa kung in zong tua bang hiang hoih nei ngei lo hi. Pasian’ huana singkungte zong tua zahin hoih ngei lo hi." 
Ezekiel31:9 A melhoihin ka bawl a, a hiang ka zausak hi. Pasian’ huan sunga a po singkung khempeuhte’ enin ka bawl hi." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Tua sing in meiipi a bat dongin khangto a, ahi zongin a san semsemna tawh kizui-in kiphasak semsem hi." 
Ezekiel31:11 Tua ahih manin tua singkung ka deih nawn kei hi. Gamdang kumpi khat’ khut sungah ka pia ding a, ama thuak dingin a kilawm bangin tua kumpipa in a bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel31:12 Thukhualna a nei lo gamdang mite in tua singkung phukin a nusiacip ding uh hi. Mual khempeuh le guam khempeuhah a hiang kitante a kia ding uh hi. A lim a bel minam khempeuh in taisanta ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel31:13 Vasate hong leengin tua sing puk tungah tuang ding uh a, gamsate in a hiangte tuancil ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:14 Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin singkung khat beek, bangzahin tui a ngah hangin tua zahin khangin, a dawn in meiipi banin sangzo ngei nawn lo ding hi. Misite’ omna Leinuai khua a zuan ding, a si thei mihingte mah bangin singkung khempeuh a si ding ahi ta hi." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Topa Pasian in ka cihin-ah: Tua singkung in misite’ khua Leinuai a zuat ciangin, leinuai-a tuite tuumsakin ka thuumsak ding hi. Guntuite le luituite ka luangsak nawn kei ding a, Lebanon Mual maikhingin, gamlak sing khempeuh a keutum ding hi." 
Ezekiel31:16 Misite’ omna Leinuai khua-ah tua singkung ka khiatsuk ciangin, a kiatna ging in minam khempeuh lokgawp ding hi. Tua singkung a kiat manin Eden singkung khempeuh, le a hoihpen, limtakin tui a ngah Lebanon singkungte khempeuh in zong Leinuai-ah nuamtuam na sa ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sisate a zuan dingin misite’ omna Leinuai-ah amah tawh a paikhawm ding uh hi. Ama liimnuai a belte khempeuh, minam dangte’ lakah kithehthang khin uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Tua singkung pen Egypt kumpipa Faro le ama mite ahi hi. Eden huana singkungte nangawn tua zahin lianin hoih zo lo hi. Ahi zongin, Eden huana singkungte mah bangin, Pasian’ thu a ngaihsun lo, galsung a a site’ omna a zuan dingin, misite’ omna Leinuai a manawh ta ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le nih kum, a kha sawm le nih a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro tamlawh inla, hih bangin ci in: “Minam dangte lakah, humpinelkai bangin na kingaihsun hi. Ahi zongin nang pen gunsung tokgawpin a ninsak, awle tawh na kibangzaw hi." 
Ezekiel32:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong cihin-ah: Minam tampi hong kuansakin, ka ngen kong khuhsak ding a, tui gei-ah kong kaisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:4 Leilakah nang hong kaikhia-in, leilak kong denna ding a, vasate le ganhingte, a kham takun kong nesak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:5 Mualteng guamteng, na sa ka dimsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:6 Na sisan tawh leitung khempeuh ka kawtsak ding a, mualteng guamteng na sisan tawh kidim ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:7 Nang kong suksiat ni ciangin vanpi ka khuhcip ding a, aksi ka mialsak ding hi. Ni, meiipi ka liahsak ding a, kha, ka mialsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:8 Vantung khuavak khempeuh ka mialsak ding a, na gam khempeuh khim zing ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Na theih ngei loh gamdangte-ah salin kong omsak ciangin minam tampite lunggim ding hi. 
Ezekiel32:10 Nang tunga kong bawlna thu minam tampite in lamdangsa ding uh hi. Ka namsau ka vik ciangin kumpite lau-in kigaih ding uh hi. Nang na puk ni ciangin a sihkhak ding uh lau-in mi khempeuh ling kelkel ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel32:11 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Babylon kumpipa’ namsau na thuak ding hi. 
Ezekiel32:12 Minam dang a gilo pente sung panin a galkapte uh a namsau uh doksakin, na mihonpite ka thatsak ding hi. “Na kisaktheihpih teng vatmai ding uh a, na minam khempeuh thatmang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:13 A tui nekna mun a omna khempeuh uhah, na gan khawite ka that khin ding hi. Tui a siknin ding mihing ganhing khat zong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:14 Bangmah in su nawn lo ding ahih manin, tuite ciim sitset ding a, gunte zong dum dide ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel32:15 Egypt gam gamkhing suaksakin, a gam sunga omteng ka suksiat ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Hih pen kah la-in a kisa ding tamlawhna hi a, Egypt le a mite tamlawhna-in minam dang numeite in nei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:17 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le nih kum, a kha masa a ni sawm le nga ni-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt mi tampite’ hangin kapin thum in. Misite’ omna Leinuai gamah a vanglian minam dangte tawh amaute paisak in. Amaute kiangah hih bangin ci in:" 
Ezekiel32:19 “Midang khempeuh sangin melhoihzaw hi lo na hi uh hiam? Ahi zongin pai unla, Pasian a thei lo mite’ han sungah va lum un, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel32:20 “Galsung a a kithatte tawh si khawm ding uh hi. Egypt gam sunga om mi khempeuh a vatlum dingin namsau khat a baihsa-in om hi. 
Ezekiel32:21 Egypt mite a panpih galhang pente in misite’ gam Leinuai panin amaute na dawn ding uh a, ‘Pasian a thei lo, galsung a si mite hong paisuk uh a, hih lai-ah lumta uh hi,’ ci-in kiko ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Assiria zong, a kimkotah a galkapte’ han tawh, tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute khempeuh zong gal sungah a si uh hi a," 
Ezekiel32:23 Leinuai a thukpenna munah amaute’ han om hi. A galkap khempeuh gal sungah a si hi a, a hante uh ama kimkotah om hi. Ahi zongin amaute pen nidangin minam dangte a linglawngsak zo ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elam zong, a kimkotah a galkapte’ han tawh, tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute khempeuh gal sungah a si uh hi a, misite’ gam Leinuai-ah Pasian a thei loin paisuk uh hi. A hin lai-un mi khempeuh a lausak ngeite hi uh a, ahi zongin tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in a om uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:25 Galsung a a site lak mahah Elam lum a, ama kimkotah a galkapte’ han om hi. Amaute, Pasian a thei loin, gal sungah si uh hi. A hin lai-un mite a lausak ngeite hi uh a, ahi zongin tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in om uh a, galsung a site mah tawh a kibangin gimna a thuak uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Meshek le Tubal zong tua lai mahah om uh a, a kimkot uhah a galkapte uh’ han om hi. Amaute khempeuh zong Pasian a thei lo, galsung a a si ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a hin lai-un midangte a lausakzo ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Hih mite pen misite’ omna Leinuai-ah a galvanteng uh tawh pai-in, a namsau uh kilukham sakin, a lum uh a awm tung uhah a kikoihsak kawmin limtakin a kivui tanglai galkapte bangin pahtawi a vuina ngah lo uh hi. Ahi zongin hih mite pen midang a lausakzo dingin a vanglian ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:28 Tua mah bangin nang Faro zong Pasian a thei lo, galsung a site lakah na om ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edom zong a kumpite le a gam ukte tawh tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute pen a thahat galkapte hi a, ahi zongin tu-in Pasian a thei loin galsung a a site lak, misite’ gam Leinuai-ah a lum uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Leilu lam uliante le Sidon mite zong tua lai mahah om uh hi. Amaute’ vangliatna in midangte lausak ngei a, ahi zongin tu-in galsung a si mite tawh mindai-in paisuk uh a, Pasian a thei loin kivui uh hi. Misite’ gam Leinuai-a a paisukte tawh a mindaina uh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Egypt kumpipa Faro in hih mite khempeuh a muh ciangin ama sihna le a galkapte gal sungah a sihna thu tawh kisai-in a lung nuamtuam ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in midangte lausak gawp ahih manin amah le a galkapte khempeuh kithatin, Pasian a thei loin galsung a a si mite tawh kivui khawm ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khatpeuhah gal ka tunsak ciangin a thupiangteng na mipihte tungah gen in. Tua gal tunna ding gammite in amaute lak panin galvil dingin mi khat seh uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Galvil pa in galte hong pai a muh ciangin mi khempeuh a theihsak nadingin pataukohna peengkul tum hi. 
Ezekiel33:4 Mi khatpeuh in tua pataukohna za napi-in don loin a ommawk a, a galte hong pai-in tua mipa a thah leh, ama sihna pen amahmah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel33:5 Amah in pataukohna za napi-in don lo ahih manin, ama sihna pen ama khialhna hang ahi hi. Thudon hileh amah a suakta ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ahi zongin galvil pa in galte hong pai mu napi-in pataukohna peengkul a tum kei a, galte hong pai-in mi a thah leh, tua a site amau’ mawhna hangin a si hitaseleh galvil pa ka ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel minam khempeuhte’ galvil pa dingin nang kong koih hi. Nang tungah kong piak hilhkholhna khempeuh amaute tungah na gensawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Migilo pa khat pen si ding hi, ci-in kong gen ciangin amah a nuntak theih nadingin na hilh kei leh, tua mipa pen a mawhnei-in si ding a, ahi zongin ama sihna nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:9 Nangmah in migilo pa khat hilhkhol napi-in a mawh gamtatna a khawl kei leh, tua mipa a mawhnei mahin si ding a, ahi zongin nang na suakta ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:10 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in, ‘Ka mawhna uh le ka khialhnate un hong hencipin ka tha uh beita ahih manin, bangci nuntak zawh ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:11 Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin mawhnei mi khat a si ka muh ciangin nuam ka sa het kei hi. A mawh gamtatna khawlin a nuntak ding ka deih hizaw hi. Israel mite aw, na mawh gamtatnate uh khawl un. Bang hangin si nuam se na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Midik khat in mawhna a bawl leh, a beisa-a ama hoihna in amah suaktasak thei lo hi. Migilo khat a gitlohna khawl leh gim kipia lo ding a, midik khat in mawhna bawl leh nungtasuak tuan lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:13 Midik khat tungah nuntakna ding kam ka ciam hangin, a beisa-a ama hoihna suangin mawh gamtat ding hong kipan leh, ama gamtat hoihnasate ka phawk kei ding hi. Ama mawh gamtatna hangin si veve ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:14 Migilo khat kiangah, na si taktak ding hi, ci-in ka hilhkholh hangin, a mawh gamtatna khawlin a man a hoihin hong gamtakik hen la," 
Ezekiel33:15 gentehna-in, leitawi lapa in ama tungah a ap khapna vante pia kikin, a guksa nate pia kikin, a mawh bawlnate khawlin, nuntakna a pia thei thukhamte a zuih leh, amah nungta taktak ding a, si het lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ama gamtatnasa mawhnate kimaisak ding hi. A man a hoihin amah gamta ahih manin nungta ding hi. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Ahi zongin na mipihte in, ‘ Topa’ hihna zia thutang lo hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua bang hi lozaw a, amau’ ngaihsutna zia a man lohna hang hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mihoih khat in a gamtat hoih khawlin gamtatsiat ding hong kipan leh, tua a gamtatsiatna hangin amah si ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:19 Migilo khat in a gitlohna khawlin a man a hoihin gamta leh, tua thu hangin amah suakta ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ahi zongin Israel mite in keima hihna zia a thutang loin a gen uh hi. Keimah in amaute’ gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu a khen ding ka hi bek hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:21 Salin ka omzawh uh a kum sawm le nih kum, a kha sawmna a ni masa ni-in Jerusalem panin a hong suakta mi khat kei kiangah hong pai-in, “Jerusalem khuapi kila khinta hi,” ci-in thu hong ko hi." 
Ezekiel33:22 Tua ama hong tun ni ding a zan nitakin Topa’ vangliatna ka sungah hong omlam ka kiphawk a, tua mipa hong tun ni zingsangin Topa in kei hong pau theisakkik hi." 
Ezekiel33:23 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel gam khuapi siate sungah a teng mite in, ‘Abraham, mi khat bek hinapi-in gambup kipia hi. Tu-in eite a tampi ihih ciangin hih gam pen eima a’ hi taktak hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: Note in sasi, a sa tawh na nekhawm uh a, milim zong na bia uh hi. Mi zong na that lai uh hi. Tua ahih manin bangci-in hih gam pen kote a’ hi, ci thei na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Note in namsau suanin na nei uh a, na gamtatnate uh kihhuai mahmah hi. Mi khempeuh in nulepa mawhna na gamta uh hi. Tua bangpi-in hih gam luah thei ding na hi uh hiam, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel33:27 Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khuapi siate sungah a teng mite galin si ding uh a, khuaneu-ah a teng mite khempeuh gamsate in ne ding uh hi. Dum muanhuai sung leh leihawm sungah a bute khempeuh zong pulnatna tawh si veve ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:28 Gam sung khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, amaute’ kisaktheihpih vangliatna teng bei ding hi. Israel mualtungte gamkhing suak ding ahih manin kuamah in kantan ngam lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:29 A mawhna hangun a mite gim pia-in, a gam uh gamkhing ka suahsak ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khuapi kulh gei-ah ahi a, a inn kong gei uhah ahi zongin na mipihte a kimuh uh ciangin nangma thu tawh kisai thu gen uh a, ‘Pai un, Topa in bang thu gen hiam, va ngai ni,’ ci-in khatlekhat kizawn uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:31 Tua ciangin nangma thugen a za dingin ka mite hong kisutuah uh a, ahi zongin nangma gen bangin amaute gamta lo uh hi. Amaute a kamun hoih khem napi-in, a lungsim uhah amau’ meetna ding bek ngaihsun uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Amaute a dingin nang pen mite’ lungnop nadingin zawl la sa-in lasaknate a tum mipa tawh na kibang lel hi. Na thugen khempeuh hong ngai napi uh, khat beek zui lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ahi zongin a tung takpi ding ahih mah bangin, na thugente a tun ciangin amaute lakah kamsang khat omngei ahihlam hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel34:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, keima tuuhon ahi Israel mi a cingte mawhsakna thu gen in. Amaute kiangah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mi a cing note aw, gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Nomau mahmah na kivak uh a, tuute na don kei uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:3 Tuunawi ne-in, tuumul silhin, tuu thaute go-in a sa na ne uh hi. Ahi zongin tuute na vak kei uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Tuu zawngkhalte na khoi kei uh a, a cinate damsak loin, a liamnate na tuamsak kei uh hi. A lampialte na khiang kei uh a, a mangte na zong kei uh hi. Tua bang bek hi loin, ngong bawlin na ukgawp zawsop uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:5 Tua tuute in a cing ding nei lo uh ahih manin kithehthang gawp uh a, gamsate’ an a suak lel uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:6 Tua ahih manin ka tuute kithehthang gawp uh a, mualtungte le mual sang tung khempeuhah vakmang uh hi. Leitung gam khempeuhah ka tuute kithehthang uh a, kuamah in zon ding kan dingin ngaihsun lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, Topa ahi keima thugen ngai un:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, keima thu nong ngaihzawk ding uh hinapi-in, tu-in a cing om lo ahih manin gamsate in ka tuute manin thatin a ne uh hi. Ka tuu a cingte in a tuu uh zong lo uh a, amau pumpi bek mah kivakin ka tuute vak lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:9 Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, keima thugen ngai un." 
Ezekiel34:10 Topa Pasian ahi keimah, note’ lang ka hihna thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Note’ khutsung panin ka tuute ka la ding a, tuute don loin note bek a kidon no tuucingte’ khut sungah ka tuute ka omsakkik nawn kei ding hi. Note’ khutsung panin ka tuute ka honkhia ding a, ka tuute, note’ nekin ka omsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Topa Pasian keimah in note kiangah kong genin-ah: Kei mahmah in ka tuute zongin ka kem ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:12 Tuucingte in a kithehthang tuute kaikhawmin a kep bangin keimah in donin ka kem ding hi. Tua bang a lauhuai siatna ding hun laitakin a kithehthangna uh mun khempeuh panin ka kaikhawm ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:13 Gamdang panin amaute lakhia-in ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute’ leitangah ka tunpihkik ding hi. Israel mualtungte, lui geite, le mite’ tenna mun khempeuhah amaute ka gamtasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:14 Lungmuang takin Israel mualtung lonona le guam sung munnuamte le Israel gam lonona mun khempeuhah ka gamtasak ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:15 Kei mahmah in ka tuute ka cing ding a, nuamtakin a omna ding uh mun ka zonsak ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel34:16 Keimah in a mangte zongin, a lampialte kaikhawmin, a liamte a liamma tuamsakin, a cinate damsakin, a cidam a thahatte zong a kibangin ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen a manin a gamta tuucingpa ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel34:17 “No ka tuuhonte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen ngai un: Note a tuamtuam ciatin thu kong khen ding a, note sung panin a hoih le a hoih lo hong khenin, tuu le keel zong kong khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Note pawlkhat, lopa limci na nek bek uh tawh na lungkim kei uh a, na nek lohte nangawn uh na tuancilgawp uh hi. Tui a siang na dawn uh a, na dawn lohteng uh na siknin uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka tuu dangte in na tuatcilsa uh lopa ne-in na sikninsa uh tuite a dawn uh kul hi. 
Ezekiel34:20 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in ka thugen ngai un: No tuu thaute le tuu gawngte kong khen ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:21 Note in a cidam lote na ki uh tawh si gawpin, a hon lak panin na nawtkhia uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:22 Keimah in ka tuuhonte ka hon ding a, a dangte ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi. Ka tuute khatlekhat kikalah thu ka khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:23 Amaute a cing dingin ka nasempa David ka koih ding a, amah in amaute hoihtakin an vakin a kem ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:24 Topa ahi keimah, amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, ka nasempa David, amaute a ukpa hi ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel34:25 Amaute lungmuang takin a om theih nadingun amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Gam sung panin a lauhuai gamsa khempeuh ka beisak ding a, gamlakah nuamtakin gamta-in a lum thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Amaute thupha pia-in ka mual siangtho kiimah ka omsak ding hi. A kisap hunhunin thupha guahtui ka zusak ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:27 Singkungte tampi tak gahin, lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, mi khempeuh a leitang ciat uhah nuamtakin teng ding uh hi. Sal ahihna panun ka mite suakta sakin, a kikhihna kolte uh ka sutsak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:28 Gamdang mite in hih gawpgawp nawn lo ding uh a, gamsate in thatin ne nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute lungmuang takin om ding uh a, kuamah in lausak nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:29 Amaute tungah logam hoih pia ding ka hih manin gam sungah gilkial dangtak om nawn lo ding hi. Minam dangte in amaute simmawhbawl nawn lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel34:30 Israel mite ka hutna le amaute pen keima mi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel34:31 “No ka ta ahi tuute aw, an ka hong vak tuuhon ahi keima mite na hi uh a, kei pen note’ Pasian ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel35:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Seir Mual lam nga inla, Edom mite mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel35:3 Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: “Seir Mualtung gam aw, kei, nangma lang ka hi hi. Nang a gamkhingin ka hong bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:4 Na khuapite ka siasak ding a, na gam sungteng gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Nang pen Israel mite’ gal na hi tawntung a, a mawhna hangun gim a tuah ni a nunung pen, a lungkham thuak hun laitakun Israel mite na siasakmang hi." 
Ezekiel35:6 Tua ahih ciangin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, nangma sih nading ka bawl ding a, na si takpi ding hi. Nangmah in mi sisak na hih manin nangma tungah sihna hong tung ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:7 Seir Mualtung gam khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, tua gam sunga a vak mi khempeuh ka that ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:8 Mualtung khempeuh si luanghawm tawh ka kidimsak ding a, mual le guam khempeuh dimin galsung a a site’ luanghawm a om ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:9 A gamkhingin kong bawl paisuak ding a, na khuapite sungah kuamah tengkik nawn lo ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Kei pen Israel le Judah mite’ Topa Pasian hinapi-in, hih minam nihte nangma a’ in ngaihsunin a luah dingin na kigen hi." 
Ezekiel35:11 Tua ahih manin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, hih ka minam nihte tungah na heh gamtatna, na muhdah bawlna, le na hazat bawlna tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong thukkik ding hi. Amaute tungah na gamtatnasa hangin gim hong pia ka hihna thu amaute in thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Israel mualtungte gamkhing suak ta a, keima a’ ding hita hi,’ ci-in simmawhna tawh na kampaunate, Topa ahi keimah in a za ka hihlam na thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kei hong gensia-in na kiphatsak paunate khempeuh a vekin ka za khin hi. 
Ezekiel35:14 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Leitung buppi a lungdam theih nadingin nang a gamkhing pha mahmahin kong bawl ding a," 
Ezekiel35:15 keima mi Israel-te a siatgawp manin na lungdamna zah tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong bawl ding hi. Seir Mualtung gam ahi Edom leitang khempeuh, gamkhing suak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel36:1 Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mualte tungah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah gen ding ka neih thute hih bangin gen in:" 
Ezekiel36:2 Israel-te’ galte in, ‘Hih tangtawng mualtung gamte tu-in eima a’ hita hi,’ ci vial uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:3 Tua ahih ciangin mailam thu ding gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: Na kimkot uhah a om minam dangte in no Israel mualtung gamte hong la-in na neihsate uh a hong suh uh ciangin, mite khempeuh in no Israel mite hong simmawh bawlin hong ciamnuihbawl lel uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:4 Tua ahih manin no Israel mualtung gamte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual lian le mual neute, lui le guamte, a kisia-in a kinusia munte, le a kiima minam dangte in luhgawpin a ciamnuihbawl khuapite tungah ka gen thute ngai un." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkotah a om minam dangte, le a diakdiakin Edom mite tungah ka hehluatna tawh thu ka gen hi. Amaute in lungdamin nuihna le simmawhna tawh keima leitang la-in a tang uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel gam tawh kisai-in mailam thu genkhol inla, a kimkotah a om minam dangte in a simmawh bawlna hangun Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hehna tawh ka thugente, mual lian, mual neu, lui le guamte tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel36:7 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkotah a om minam dangte ka mindaisak ding khauhtakin ka kiciam hi. 
Ezekiel36:8 Ahi zongin Israel mualtung gamte-ah no ka mi Israel-te a dingin singkungte in teh le gah hong neikik ding uh a, a sawt loin note, inn-ah a hong ciahkik ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:9 Kei pen note’ lamah kong pang ding a, pel loin na gam uh lo-in kikho kikin khaici kituhkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:10 A mi-in zong kong pungsak ding a, khuapite sungah tengkikin a sia khempeuh na puahkik ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:11 A mihing a ganhingin kong pungsak ding a, a nidang sangin tam na phazaw ding uh hi. Ta tampi tak na nei ding uh hi. Nidangin na om ngei bangun kong omsakkik ding a, a nidang sangin a cithei zaw-in kong bawl ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:12 No ka mi Israel-te, na leitang uhah kong gamtangsakkik ding hi. Note’ leitang suak ding a, tua leitang in na tate uh gilkialin puksisak nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin-ah: Israel mualtung gamte, mihing sane hi a, tua mualtung gamte in a gam sung mite’ tate laksak hi, ci-in a beisa hunah hong kigennate a man ahi hi." 
Ezekiel36:14 Ahi zongin tu a kipanin mihing sa a ne, gam sung mite’ tate a laksak gam hi nawn lo ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel36:15 Minam dangte’ hong kobawlna za nawn loin, a hong mindaisakna uh na thuak nawn kei ding uh a, na sung uhah a teng mite’ tate zong no Israel mualtung gamte in na laksak nawn kei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel36:16 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite amaute’ gamah a ten lai-un amaute’ gamtatna le a sepnate uh tawh tua gam ninsak uh hi. Amaute’ gamtatnate pen numeite’ neih nin zahin a ninin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Tua ahih manin gam sungah amaute’ mi thahna le a milimte uh tawh gam sungteng a nitsakna hangun ka hehnateng ka thuaksak hi. 
Ezekiel36:19 Amaute’ nuntakna zia le a gamtatna ziate uh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu ka khen a, gamdang mun citengah amaute ka thehthang hi." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ahi zongin midangte in, ‘Hih mite pen Topa’ mite hinapi-in, Pasian in amaute’ tungah a piak gam panin taikhia uh hi,’ ci-in a paina peuhpeuh uhah na kigen ahih manin, ka min siangtho hong daisak uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:21 Israel mite in a paina peuhpeuh uh gamdang mite lakah ka min siangtho hong daisak kawikawi uh ahih manin tua thu in ka lung hong himawhsak hi. 
Ezekiel36:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in Israel mite tungah ka gen ding thute hih bangin gen in: Israel mite aw, tu-a ka sep ding thu pen note kong khualna hang hi loin, minam dang khempeuhte’ lakah na daisak kawikawi uh ka min siangtho ka khualna hang hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel36:23 Note in minam dangte’ lakah na daisaksa uh a lian ka min siangtho pen tu-in minam dangte’ lakah a sianthona ka langsak ding hi. Keimah in minam dangte’ lakah ka sianthona ka lah nadingin note kong zang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel36:24 Gam khempeuh le minam khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawm kikin na gam uhah kong tunpih kik ding hi. 
Ezekiel36:25 Note tungah tui siangtho kong theh ding a, na milim biakna uh le note hong ninsak na dang khempeuh panin kong siangsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:26 Note sungah lungtang thak le lungsim thak kong guan ding a, na suang lungtang uh hong lakkhiatsakin mihing lungtang kong guan ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:27 Note sungah keima kha kong guang ding a, note tungah kong piak ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte limtakin kong zuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:28 Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh tungah ka piaksa gamah na teng ding uh a, note pen keima mi hi-in, kei pen note’ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:29 Note hong ninsak thei ding na khempeuh panin kong hu ding hi. An tampi ka piangsak ding a, gilkial na thuakkha nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:30 Na singgah kungte uh le na lolai ante uh tampi tak ka phasak ding a, minam dangte lakah gilkial a mindaina na thuakkha nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Na gamtatnasa uh na gitlohnate uh le na hoih lohnate uh na phawk kik ding uh a, na mawhna uh le na khialhnate uh hangin nomau mahmah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:32 Israel mite aw, hih thute khempeuh, note’ lungdam nadingin a bawl ding ka hihlohna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi. Na gamtatnasate uh hangin maizumin na mindai ding uh ka deihna hizaw hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Na mawhna khempeuh panun note kong siansak khit ciangin na khuapite uh sungah hong tengsakkikin, a sia khempeuh kong puahsakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:34 Na lote uh a nawkkha ngei mite’ muhna-ah gammang tulak a bat ngei hangin, tu-in tua lote kho-in note kong puahsakkik ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:35 Hih leitang pen gammang tulak a bang ngei hinapi-in tu-in Eden Huan a batna le a kisusia, a kiluhgawp, a kinusiacip khuapite pen tu-in a muanhuai kulh tawh ki-umin a sungah mi a tenna thu mi khempeuh in gen belin nei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:36 Tua ciangin note’ kimkotah a om a suakta lai minam dangte in a siasa khuapite lamkikin, a kinusia lote a puahkik pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Tu-a tengbek hi loin adang zong ka hih lai ding hi. Keima tung pan Israel mite huhna ka ngensak ding a, tuuhonpi bangin Israel mite ka tamsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:38 Tuhunin a sia-in a omcip khuapite pen a kiseh pawi hun ciangin biak nadingin a kipaipih, Jerusalem-a tuuhonpi om muamua bangin, mi tampi tawh kidim ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:1 Ka sungah Topa’ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, ama kha in kei hong paipihin, misi guh tawh a kidimin a om kuampi khatah hong koih hi." 
Ezekiel37:2 Tua guhte lakah hong vakpih kawikawi a, tua guhte a tam mahmahna le a keu mahmahna ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel37:3 Amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih misi guhte a nungtakik thei ding hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, hih thu nang bek in na thei ding hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Ezekiel37:4 Tua ciangin amah in, “Hih guhte tungah thu hilh inla, hih guhkeute in Topa’ thu a ngaih nadingun gen in." 
Ezekiel37:5 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Note sungah hu kong guan ding a, note kong nungtasakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Thagui le sazang kong guan ding a, vun tawh kong tuam ding hi. Tua ciangin na sung uhah hu hong guan in kong nungtasakkik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna nong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:7 Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin thu ka gen hi. Tua bangin thu ka gen laitakin a kigawi zuazua a ging ka za a, tua guhte khatlekhat kizomkik uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Tua bangin ka et laitakin thagui le sazang in tua guhte tuam a, tua ciangin a vun in zong hong tuam hi. Ahi zongin tua pumpite sungah hintheihna hu om nai lo hi." 
Ezekiel37:9 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, huihte tungah thu gen inla, hih a sisa pumpite sungah hu sangin a hingkiksak dingin mun khempeuh panin hong pai un, ci-in Topa Pasian in thu hong pia hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:10 Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin ka gen hi. Tua pumpite sungah hintheihna hu hong lut a, tua ciangin amaute hingin a khe-un hong ding uh hi. Galkap honpi khat zah pha-in tam mahmah uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:11 Tua ciangin Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen hih guhte tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in, ‘I keucip a, i lamet ding bangmah om nawn loin i nuntakna guipi beita hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka mi Israel-te tungah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Ka mite aw, tu-in note’ hankhuk kong honsak ding a, note hong paikhiatpihin, Israel gam kong tunpihkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:13 Note na kiphumna uh hankhuk hong honsakin kong paikhiatpih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel37:14 Note sungah keima nuntakna hu kong guan ding a, note hong hingsakkikin, na gam uhah kong tengsakkik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi. Hih bangin kong hihna ding thu ka kiciamzo a, ka kiciam bangin kong hih ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinzo hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:15 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, sing ciangkhut khat la inla a tungah, ‘Judah kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh in. Tua ciangin adang khat la leuleu inla a tungah, ‘Israel kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh leuleu in." 
Ezekiel37:17 Tua ciangin tua ciangkhut tegel ciangkhut khat a battheihna dingin na khut sungah tawikhawm in. 
Ezekiel37:18 Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in na mipihte in hong dot uh ciangin" 
Ezekiel37:19 amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel ciangkhut la-in Judah ciangkhut tawh ka koihkhawm ding hi. Tua ciangkhut nihte ciangkhut khatin ka bawl ding a, ka khut sungah ka tawi ding hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Tua na gelh ciangkhut nihte mite’ muhin na khut sungah tawi-in 
Ezekiel37:21 amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Amaute’ omna minam dangte’ lak panin Israel mite la-in ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute’ gamah ka paipihkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:22 Israel mualtung gamah, amaute minam khatin ka gawmkik ding hi. Amaute a uk ding kumpi khat nei ding uh a, amaute minam nihin kikhen nawn lo ding uh a, kumpi gam nihin zong kikhen nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:23 Amaute pen a muhdahhuai milimte tawh kininsak nawn lo ding uh a, mawhnate tawh zong kininsak nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute’ mawhna le kei hong lehheknate panin ka suaktasak ding hi. Amaute a siangtho mi-in ka bawl ding a, amaute keima mi hi-in, kei, amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ka nasempa David pen amaute’ kumpi hi ding a, mi khat’ ukna nuai-ah amaute kigawmin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:25 A pu a pate uh a tennasa ahi ka nasempa Jakob tungah ka piak leitangah amaute teng ding uh a, amaute bek hi loin a suan a khak dongun tengsuak ding uh hi. Ka nasempa David in amaute uk tawntung ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:26 Amaute lungmuangin a om tawntungna ding uh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding a, amaute thupha pia-in a mi ka pungsak ding hi. Amaute’ lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka phut ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:27 Amaute tawh tengkhawmin, amaute’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amaute pen keima mite hi ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:28 Amaute’ lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka koih ciangin, Topa ahi keimah in keima mi dingin Israel mite ka bawl khitna thu, minam dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel38:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Magog gam a om Gog kumpipa mawhsakna thu gen in. Amah pen Meshek minamte le Tubal minamte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah mawhsakna thu gen inla," 
Ezekiel38:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Meshek le Tubal minamte a ukpipa Gog aw, kei pen nangma langah ka pang hi." 
Ezekiel38:4 Nang hong lehhei-in, na khaguh-ah sikkawi kong bulh ding a, na galkap honpite khempeuh tawh kong kaikhia ding hi. Na galkap honpite pen a sakolte uh le a sakol tung tuangte uh tawh tam mahmah a, na galkap khempeuh in lum le namsau nei kim uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:5 Persia gam, Kush gam, le Put gammite in zong nang hong panpih uh a, amaute in lum le siklukhu nei kim uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:6 Leilu lam gam peka om Gomer gam a galkapte khempeuh le Bethtogarmah gam a galkapte khempeuh in nang hong panpih uh a, minam dang tampite in zong nang hong pawlpih uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:7 Tua ahih manin tu-in nang le na pawlte khempeuh a kigalging sa-in om unla, na thupiakna bangin a gamtang pah lian dingin na galkapte khempeuh omsak in." 
Ezekiel38:8 Minam tuamtuamte lak panin kikaikhawm kikin a gam uh a kitutkik zawh gallauna nei loin a om Israel mite’ gam a sim dingin kum tampi khit ciangin kong sawl ding hi. Sauveipi sung kinusia-in gamkhing a suak ngei hinapi-in, tu-in a mite khempeuh lungmuang takin a omna Israel mualtung gamte a sim ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel38:9 Nang le na galkap honpite le nang hong pawlpih minam tampite in khuapi huih bangin na simgawp ding uh a, meiipi bangin a gam sung khempeuh na tuamcip ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang Gog tungah kong genin-ah: Tua hun ding hong tun ciangin na lungsim sungah gitloh gamtat ding ngaihsut na kipan ding hi. 
Ezekiel38:11 A khuapite in galnanna ding kulh nei loin, lungmuang takin a om hithiat, a kihutawm zo lo ding gam khat, simgawp ding na ngaihsun ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:12 A sia ngeisa khuapite sungah a teng mite luhin a nate uh na sutgawp ding hi. Tua mite pen minam tuamtuamte lak panin a kikaikhawm kik, tu-in ganhing le neihsa van zong nei kikin, leitung lam khempeuh a kituahna lamkabom sanah a teng mite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba mite le Dedan mite, le Tarshish khuapite-ah a teng sumbukte in nang kiangah, ‘Ngun le khamte, ganhingte le vante na ngah nadingin luhgawpin a sutgawp ding le genzawh loh van tampi tawh a ciahkhia dingin galsim dingin na galkapte na kaikhawm nai hiam?’ ci-in hong dong ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel38:14 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih bangin thu gen in hong ci hi: Keima mi Israel-te lungmuang takin a om hun laitakin nangmah na kihanthawntawm ding a," 
Ezekiel38:15 leilu lam peka na omna gam panin sakol tung vive-ah a tuang, minam tampite kiang panin na kaihkhop a thahat galkap hon tampite masuanin na kuankhia ding a," 
Ezekiel38:16 khuapi huih in gam sung a nawkgawp bangin keima mi Israel-te na sim ding hi. A hun a tun ciangin, nangmah zangin na ka sepna tawh minamte lakah ka sianthona ka lahtheih nadingin keima gam a sim dingin kong sawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:17 Ni khat ni ciangin Israel mite a sim dingin mi khat ka sawl ding hi, ci-in keima nasem Israel kamsangte tungtawnin, sawtpek lai-in ka gengen niloh mipa pen nang na hi hi. Hih thu Topa Pasian in gen khinzo hi." 
Ezekiel38:18 “Ahi zongin Gog in Israel gam a sim ni ciangin ka heh suak mahmah ding hi. 
Ezekiel38:19 Tua ni ciangin ka hehluatna tawh Israel gamah nakpitakin zin ling hen, ka ci ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ngasate le vasate, ganhing a neu a lian, le leitung a om mi khempeuh, keimah kihtakna hangin lau-in ling ding uh hi. Mualte pukin, keente cimin, kulh le phung khempeuh kicimmang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Gimna a tuamtuamte tawh Gog ka lausakgawp ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. Ama mite khatlekhat namsau tawh kisatgawp ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel38:22 Pulnatna le sisan luanna tawh amah gim ka pia ding hi. Amah le a galkap honte le amah a panpih minam tampite tungah guahpi, gialpi, meikuang le kaat kuang, ka zusak ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:23 Hih bangin hihna tawh a lian a siangtho ka hihna thu, keimah in minam khempeuh tungah ka langsak ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:1 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Gog mawhsakna thu gen inla, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Meshek le Tubal minamte a ukpipa Gog aw, kei pen nangma langkhatah a pang ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel39:2 Mundang khatah nang kong paisak ding a, leilu lam gam pek panin Israel mualtung gamah kong tunpih ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:3 Tua lai mun panin na veilam khutah na tawi na thal hong betkhiatsakin, na taklam khutah na tawi na thaltangte zong kong betkhiatsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nang le na galkap honte le nang hong panpih minam khempeuhte pen Israel mualtung gamah na simang ding uh a, vasa nam khempeuh le gamsate in na sa uh ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:5 Topa Pasian in hih thu gen khin ka hih manin gamlakah na tuk zeizai ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel39:6 Kuamah in nawngkaisak loin nuamtakin mite a om hithiatna Magog gam sung le tuipi gei-a gamte ka hal ding a, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:7 Keima mi Israel-te lakah ka min siangtho ka kitheisak ding a, keima min a daii dingin ka omsak nawn kei ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah pen a Siangtho, Israel-te’ Pasian ahi Topa ka hihna thu minam khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:8 Topa Pasian in, “Tua ka gengen ni hong tung takpi ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:9 Israel gam khuapite-ah a teng mite kuankhia-in, tua a kinusia galhiamte ansing dingin khawm ding uh hi. Tua a kinusia lumte, thal le thaltangte, molhtumte le teipite, mei-in cih ding uh a, kum sagih sung kikhom ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:10 Amaute in mei cih dingin a kinusia galhiamte nei uh ahih manin gamlakah sing tom kullo ding a, tulakah sing phuk ding zong kisam lo ding hi. Amaute in amau’ na a sutte’ na sutin, a suksiatsakte’ na suksiatsak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:11 Topa in, “Hih thu hong pian’ ni ciangin Israel gam sung Si Tuipi nisuahna lamah a om Khualzin Mite’ Kuam a cihna sungteng, a kivui nadingun Gog ka pia ding hi. Gog le a galkap honpite, tua lai munah kivui ding ahih manin khualzin mite’ lampi khaktan ding a, tua mun pen, ‘Gog Galkapte’ Kuam,’ kici ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Israel mite in a gam sung uh a siansakkik nadingin misi vuina-in kha sagih sung hun bei ding hi. 
Ezekiel39:13 Gam sunga om mi khempeuh in misi vuina-ah huh ding uh a, tua bangin a huhna hangun ka gualzawh ni-in pahtawina ngah ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel39:14 Kha sagih a cin khit ciangin, a gam sungteng uh a siangthosak theih nadingun a kimangngilhkha siluanghawmte zongin a phum dingin gam sungteng a zong kawikawi ding mi pawlkhat a seh ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:15 Gam sungteng a zon kawikawina uhah misi guh a muh simun, misi vuite in hong tawmin Gog Galkapte’ Kuam-ah a vui hun ma sungteng uh a kitheih nadingin a gei-ah ciaptehna khat bawl pahpah uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Tua galkap honpite’ min tamin a gei-ah khuapi khat om hi.) Tua bangin gam sung siangsak ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:17 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute a dingin ka bawlsak biakpiakna sa a ne dingin mun khempeuh panin vasa khempeuh le ganhing khempeuh hong pai nadingun sam in. Israel mualtung gamah pawi lianpi khat om ding a, a duh zahzahun sa ne-in si dawn ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Tuutalte, tuunote, keelte le bawngtal thaute a kigawh bangin a kigo ahi galkapte’ sate ne-in, leitung gam ukte’ site a dawn ding uh ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:19 Biakna dinga gawh bangin hih mite ka gawh ciangin vasate le ganhingte in a nekzawh zahzah uh a thaute ne ding uh a, a kham dongun a si dawn ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:20 Amaute in ka sabuai tungah, sakolte le a tunga tuangte, galkapte le galkapmangte’ sa, a nekzawh zahzah uh ne ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:21 Topa in kei kiangah, “Minamte lakah ka minthanna ka lak ding a, thu a tangin ka khennate ka sepkhiat theih nadingin ka vangliatna ka zatna dan amaute tungah ka lak ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:22 Tua khit a kipanin amaute’ Topa Pasian ka hihna thu, Israel mite in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Tua ciangin kei tungah hong khialhna uh hangin Israel mite sal suak uh a, amaute nungngatin, a galte uh khut sungah pia-in gal sungah a vekun a sisak ka hihna," 
Ezekiel39:24 le amaute’ nitna le a gitlohna uh tawh kituakin amaute tungah bawlin, amaute a nungngat ka hihna thu, minam dangte in thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:25 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Tu-in Jakob suanlekhak Israel mite ka hehpih ding a, amaute a cithei-in ka bawlkik ding hi. Keima min siangtho ka hu ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:26 Amaute’ gam sungah kuamah in su loin lungmuangin a omkik uh hun ciangin, kei hong lehbawlnate uh le a mindainate uh mangngilh theita ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:27 Kei a siangtho ka hihna thu, minam tampite tungah ka lah nadingin a galte uh a omna gamdang khempeuh panin amaute lakhia-in ka kaikhawm kik ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Tua ciangin, minam dangte’ khut sungah salin amaute puakin, tua khit ciangin amaute khat zong siit loin kaikhawm kikin a gam sung uh ka tunpih kimna hangin amaute’ Topa Pasian ka hihna thu, keima mite in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:29 Israel mite tungah ka kha ka sung ding a, amaute ka nungngat nawn kei ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:1 Jerusalem khuapi a kilak zawh a kum sawm le lina kum, salin hong kipaipih zawh a kum sawmnih le ngana, a kha masa a ni sawm ni-in ka sungah Topa’ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, amah in kei hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Ezekiel40:2 Ka maang sungah, Pasian in Israel gamah hong paipih a, mual sang khat tungah hong koih hi. Khuapi tawh a kibang inn honpi bang khat ka mai-ah ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Amah in tua khuapi nai-ah hong paipih a, sumngo bangin a tee mi khat ka mu hi. Tua mipa in pikhau khat le piciang khat tawi a, kongpi gei-ah a ding hi." 
Ezekiel40:4 Tua mipa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-a kong lah ding nate, na mit tawh limtakin enin, na bil tawh limtakin ngai inla, limtakin ngaihsun in. Hih lai-ah nang kong paipihna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi. Na muh na khempeuhte, Israel mite tungah a gen ding na hi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ka muh pen biakinn na hi a, a kimkotah kulh om hi. A mipa in pi sawm a pha tehna piciang la-in a kulh a teh hi. A teh ciangin pi sawm sahin, pi sawm mah sang hi." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tua ciangin nisuahna lama om kulhkongpi-ah amah pai a, a kahlei-ah kahto-in a khung a tun ciangin kulh kongvang teh a, pi sawm mah sang hi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Tua banah lampi khat om a, a lampi pang tuakah galvilna inndei neu thum tuak om hi. Inndei neute a dung a vai kikim a, pi sawm mah ahi hi. Inndei neu khatlekhat kikal pi giat sah hi. Tua galvilna inndei neute banah pi sawm mah a sau lampi khat om a, biakinnpi lam a maingat inndei golzaw sung a tung hi." 
Ezekiel40:8 Hih inndei golzaw a teh ciangin pi sawm le li pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:9 Hih inndei pen biakinn tunna ding lampi tawpna hi a, a biakinn lam neh pena om kawm pen pi li a sah hi." 
Ezekiel40:10 (Hih lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inndei neute pen a golna kikim a, a kikal-a kawmte zong a sahna kikim hi.)" 
Ezekiel40:11 Tua ciangin a mipa in a lampi teh a, pi sawm le guk zai-in pi sawmnih le nih a sau hi." 
Ezekiel40:12 Tua galvilna inndei neu mai ciatah letmat sawmnih sangin letmat sawmnih a sah kidalna khat a om hi. (Hih galvilna inndei neute pen a dung a vai pi sawm tuak ahi hi.) 
Ezekiel40:13 Tua ciangin inndei neu kawm nung panin lampi kantanin a gal sana inndei neu kawm nung dong teh a, pi sawm le nih a pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Inndei nunung pen zomah biakinn tual om a, tua tual a teh ciangin pi sawmthum le li a pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kulhkong pua panin inndei nawlnung kawm pua dong lampi sauna pi sawmgiat le li a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:16 Hih inndei neute’ kawm a pualam pangah tawlet neu om a, inndei kikal-a om kawm tungah zong a vang neu om hi. Lampi omna lampang, inndei kikal-a kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Tua ciangin a mipa in kongpi tawnin a tualah hong paipih hi. A tual pualam kawm tawh kizomin inndei sawmthum om a, tua inndeite mai-ah suang a kiphah lampi om hi." 
Ezekiel40:18 Hih suangphah pen a tual kimkotah om a, hih a pualama tual pen a sunglam a om tual sangin niamzaw hi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Tua ciangin a sunglam tual lut nadingin a sangzaw-ah kongpi khat om hi. A mipa in hih kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi zakhat sawmguk giat a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:20 Tua ciangin a mipa in a pualam tual paina ahi, leilu lampangah a om kongpi lampi hong teh hi." 
Ezekiel40:21 Tua bangin a teh ciangin lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inndei neu thumte, a kikal-a om kawmte, le a inndei golzaw pen, nisuahna kongpi-ate mah bangin a dung a vai kikim ciat hi. Tua kongpi lampi pen pi sawmgiat le li sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:22 A inndei golzaw, a tawlette, le nisuh kung lim a kibawlte pen nisuahna lam kongpi-a omte mah tawh kibangin kikim hi. Hih lai-ah zong kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei dawl sagih om a, a nawlnung a om a inndei golzaw pen in a tual lam maingat hi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Nisuahna lampang a om bang teek mahin, leilu lam kongpi pana lutna-a a tual galkhatah tual sungnung lutna kongpi lampi khat mah a om hi. Tua kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi za le sawmguk giat a sau hi." 
Ezekiel40:24 Tua ciangin a mipa in leitaw lampangah hong paipih a, tua lai-ah kongpi lampi khat mah na om leuleu hi. A teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Kongpi dang a omte mah bangin hih lai-ah zong inndeite in tawlet nei uh hi. A kongpi lampi pen pi sawmgiat le li sau-in pi sawmlinih zai hi. 
Ezekiel40:26 Tua kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a, a inndei golzaw pen a nawlnung mahah omin a tual lam a nga hi. Lampi omna lampang, kawm sungnungte’ tungah nisuh kung lim mah kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Hih lai-ah zong tual sungnung paina kongpi lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in konglekong kikal a teh ciangin pi za le sawmguk giat a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:28 Tua ciangin leitaw lam kongpi tawnin tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi. 
Ezekiel40:29 A galvilna inndei neute, a inndei golzaw, le kawm sungnungte pen, kongpi dangate mah tawh kibang hi. Hih kongpi lama om inndei neute-ah zong tawlet om hi. A lampi pi sawmgiat le li sau-in, pi sawmlinih zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:30  
Ezekiel40:31 A inndei golzaw pen tual puanung lam a nga hi. Lampi pang tuak a kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:32 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin a tual sungnungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi. 
Ezekiel40:33 A galvilna inndei neute, a inndei golzaw, le a kawm sungnungte zong, kongpi dangate mah tawh kikim hi. A kimkotah tawlette om a, a inndei golzaw-ah zong a om hi. A lampi, pi sawmgiat le li sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:34 A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tunna dingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:35 Tua ciangin leilu lam kongpi lampi-ah hong paipih a, a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel40:36 A dangte mah bangin hih in zong galvilna inndei neute, kawmsung lam tung kizemte, inndei golzaw pen, le a kimkotah tawlette a nei hi. A lampi pi sawmgiat le li sau a, pi sawmlinih zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:37 A inndei golzaw pen a tual puanung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tunna dingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:38 Tual puanung sungah lampi tawh a kimatin inndei gol khat om a, a inndei pen a tual lam a nga hi. Hih lai munah, biakna-in a pum-a a hal ding uh ganhing luangte silsiang uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:39 Hih inndei gol sungah sabuai li om a, a lang tuakah nih tuakin kikoih hi. Meihal biakna-a piak ding ahi a, mawhna le khialhna hanga biakna-in piak ding ganhingte ahi zongin, hih sabuaite tungah go uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Hih inndei pualam, leilu lam kongpi lutna pang tuakah zong sabuai nih tuak, a vekin sabuai li mah om hi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Tua ahih manin inndei sungah sabuai li, a pua-ah sabuai li, a vekpi-in giat om a, hih sabuaite pen, biakna-in piak ding ganhingte gawhna-in a kizang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel40:42 Meihal biakna-in piak ding ganhingte bawl nadingin a kizang sabuai lite pen suang a kiseek ahi hi. Tua sabuaite letmat sawmnih sang a, a dung a vai letmat sawmthum tuak ahi hi. Biakna-in piak ding gan gawhna-in a zat uh na khempeuh, hih sabuaite tungah koih uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Hih sabuaite’ kimkotah khutpeek cia bang a zai geihual kibawl hi. Biakna-in piak ding sa khempeuh hih sabuaite tungah kikoih hi. 
Ezekiel40:44 Tua ciangin a pualam panin a tual sungnungah hong paipih a, a tual sungnungah inndei nih na om hi. Khat pen leilu lam kongpi lampangah omin leitaw lam nga a, a khat pen leitaw lam kongpi lampangah omin leilu lam nga hi." 
Ezekiel40:45 A mipa in kei kiangah hih bangin hong gen hi: Leitaw lam a nga inndei pen biakinn sungah na a sem siampite a’ ding hi a," 
Ezekiel40:46 leilu lam a nga inndei pen biakna tau-ah na a sem siampite-a’ ding ahi hi. Tua siampite khempeuh pen Zadok’ suan Levi mite vive ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin Topa’ omna-ah amaute bek kipaisak hi, hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:47 A mipa in hih tual sungnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi zakhat sawmguk giat tuak a pha hi. A biakinn mai-ah biakna tau khat a om hi. 
Ezekiel40:48 Tua ciangin biakinn sung lutna inndei-ah hong paipih hi. Amah in a sung lutna lampi teh a, pi kua sau-in pi sawmnih le li zai a, a pang tuak a kawmte pi nga tuak a sah hi." 
Ezekiel40:49 Innsung lutna inndei pen pi sawmthum le li sau a, pi sawmnih zai a, tua lai tun nadingin kahlei cial sawm a om hi. Innsung lutna inndei pang tuakah khuampi khat tuak a om hi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in a laizang a om inndei-ah hong paipih hi. Tua inndei lutna lampi teh a," 
Ezekiel41:2 pi sawm le giat zai a, a pang tuak a om kawmte pi giat tuak a sah hi. A laizang a om inndei sung a teh ciangin pi sawmguk giat sau a, pi sawmthum le li zai hi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Tua ciangin inndei sungnungah amah pai a, tua sung lutna lampi a teh ciangin pi thum sau-in pi sawm zai a, a pang tuak a om kawmte pi sawm le nih tuak a sah hi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Tua inndei sungnung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi sawmthum le li tuak a pha hi. Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Hih lai pen Siangtho Pen Mun ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn kawm puanung teh a, pi sawm tak a sah hi. Hih kawm tawh a kimatin biakinn kimkotah inndei neuneu om a, tuate pi sagih vive a zai hi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Hih inndei neute dawl thum pha a, dawl khat gual paiphei suakah inndei neu sawmthum om hi. Tua inndei neute a dawl sanna tawh kizui-in a biakinn kawm pa to tektek a, tua inndei neute a nang dingin khuam a tuamin kul loin a biakinn kawm kimang toto hi." 
Ezekiel41:7 Tua biakinn kawm pang bela kibawl inndei neute sungah kahlei omto a, a dawl nuainung panin a tungnung dongin kizomto hi. A inndei neute a dawl sanna lamah a biakinn kawm a pat tektek mah bangin a sang lama om inndei neute a sung zai semsem hi." 
Ezekiel41:8 Biakinn kimkotteng a lei kitawito a, a mundangte sangin pi sawmin sangtozaw hi. Tua mun panin biakinn kawm le a kimkota inndei neute kipanto pan hi." 
Ezekiel41:9 Inndei neute a kawm sahna pi giat pha a," 
Ezekiel41:10 biakinn kimkotah suangphah bangin a kitawito-in a kibawl a zaina pi sawmthum le li ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:11 Biakinn kimkotah a om inndei neute-ah pai nading kongvang, leilu lamah khat omin, leitaw lamah khat om hi. Tua biakinn kimkotah pi giat paisuak a zai cial khat a om leuleu hi." 
Ezekiel41:12 Tua ciangin nitumna lamah biakinn lam a nga inn khat om hi. A inn dung pi zakhat sawmnga hi a, a vai pi zakhat sawm le guk hi a, a kimkota a kawm pi kua a sah hi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Tua ciangin mipa in biakinn teh a, pi zakhat sawmguk giat a pha hi. A kimkota mun awng, a innsung le a kawm tawh kigawmin pi zakhat sawmguk giat ahi hi." 
Ezekiel41:14 Nisuahna lampang biakinn mailam a vailam zong a mun awng tawh kigawmin pi zakhat sawmguk giat mah ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:15 Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lampangah a om, a tual lam a nga inn a sauna teh a, a kawm tegel tawh kigawmin pi zakhat sawmguk giat mah a pha hi. Biakinnsung lutna ding inndei, le a inndeipi, le Siangtho Pen Mun sungte pen" 
Ezekiel41:16 a sual panin a kongvangneute ciang dong singpeek tawh kidap hi. A tawlette pen a pualam a kihui-in a kibawl ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:17 Biakinn sunglam kawmte pen kongkhak zang ciang dong lim kibawlte tawh kidim a," 
Ezekiel41:18 nisuh kungte le kherub limte vive ahi hi. A masa-in nisuh kung, tua ciangin kherub, nisuh kung, kherub cih bangin a kimkot khempeuhah kihelhto dimdiam hi. Tua kherub-te in maitang nih ciat nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel41:19 A mihing maitang pen a pangkhat lama om nisuh kung lam nga a, a humpinelkai maitang pen a pang langkhat lama om nisuh kung lam a nga hi. A biakinnsung kimkotah hih bangin kibawl a," 
Ezekiel41:20 sual panin kongkhak zang kikal sung khempeuhah a dimin a om hi. 
Ezekiel41:21 Biakinn deipi kongkhak khuamte pen a siik kikim vive ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:22 Tua ciangin Siangtho Pen Mun mai-ah sing tawh a kibawl biakna tau bang pian khat a om hi. Pi nga sang a, a dung a vai pi li ahi hi. A khete, a kingaknate, le a zawlte sing tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A mipa in kei kiangah, “Hih pen Topa’ mai-ah a kikoih sabuai ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:23 Inndeipi sung lutna ding le Siangtho Pen Mun lutna dingah kongkhak a om hi. 
Ezekiel41:24 Tua kongkhakte pen a laizangah a kituah, kongkhak peek nih nei-in a kibawl ahi hi." 
Ezekiel41:25 Biakinnsung kawmte tungah a kibawl mah bangin hih biakinn deipi sung lutna-a kongkhakte tungah zong nisuh kung le kherub mah a kibawl hi. Kongkhak pualam, innsung lutna ding inndei sanah singpeek tawh liimsun khat a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel41:26 Hih inndeipi sung kawmte tungah a pualam a kihui tawlette om a, nisuh kungte tawh zepna zong a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Tua ciangin mipa in a tual puanungah hong paipih a, biakinn nitumna lam mongah a om inn tawh a kigamla lo, biakinn leilu lama om inn khatah hong tunpih hi." 
Ezekiel42:2 Leilu lampang hih inn dung pi zakhat sawmguk giat hi a, a vai pi sawmgiat le li ahi hi." 
Ezekiel42:3 Tua inn pangkhat pen biakinn gei-a mun awng pi sawmthum le li a zai a omna lam nga a, a pang langkhat pen tual puanunga suangphah lam a nga hi. Tua inn pen cial thum a pha a kitawito tungah kilam a, a tunga a cialte pen a nuai-ate sangin neuto zaw tektek hi." 
Ezekiel42:4 Hih inn leilu lampangah pi sawm le guk zai-in, pi zakhat sawmguk giat a sau lampi khat tung a, a lutna kong zong tua lam mahah a om hi." 
Ezekiel42:5 A cial tungnungah a om inndeite pen a nuai-ate sangin neuzaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a sangto zaw, a kawcik zaw-ah om uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:6 Biakinn tuala a inn dangte mah bangin tua inndei dawl thumte pen a cial tungah kinga uh a, a tuamin khuam nei lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:7 A cial nuainung a om inndeite pen pi sawmgiat le li sau a, tua lai panin tua inngualte tawh a paikhawm hilhel pi sawmgiat le li mah a sau kulh khat a om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn galkhat lama om kulh pen pi zakhat sawmguk giat sau hi." 
Ezekiel42:8  
Ezekiel42:9 Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lama om ahi, kulh a kipatna mun a inn nisuahna lam mongah kongkhakte a om hi." 
Ezekiel42:10  
Ezekiel42:11 Leilu lampang a om mah bangin hih inndeite mai-ah zong lampi khat a om hi. A sauna, a pianzia le a kongte zong leilu lama om mah tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel42:12 Nisuahna lampang a kulh a kipatna mun a inn leitaw lamah kongkhakte a om hi. 
Ezekiel42:13 Tua ciangin a mipa in kei kiangah, “Leilu lama om leh leitaw lama om hih inn nihte pen biakna inn siangtho ahi hi. Topa’ omna-ah a lut siampite in biakna-in a kipia a siangtho pente, hih innte sungah ne uh hi. Hih inndeite a siangtho ahih manin, a kipia nate an tawh biaknate le mawhna le khialhna hangin biakna-in a kipia sate, a sungah koih uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:14 Siampite in Topa tungah biakna pia-in biakinn sungah a lut khit uh ciangin a pualamah a pusuah nop uhleh, Topa tungah biakna a piak laitakun a silh uh puante suahin hih inndeite sungah koih ding uh hi. Tua lai panin puan dang silhin midangte omna-ah pai thei pan uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel42:15 A mipa in biakinn sunglamteng a teh a zawh khit ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin hong pusuahpih a, biakinn pualamteng a teh hi." 
Ezekiel42:16 Amah in a tehna piciang la-in nisuahna lampang teh a, pi zagiat sawmli a pha hi." 
Ezekiel42:17 Tua ciangin leilu lampang, leitaw lampang, le nitumna lampang teh a, a thumin a sauna kikimin pi zagiat sawmli ciat a pha hi." 
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 Tua ahih manin a umna kulh a pang li-in a teh ciangin a pang li mahin kikim a, pang khat ciangin pi zagiat sawmli vive pha a, tua deina kulh pen biakna-a a siangtho le a mawkmawkte a kikhenna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tua khit ciangin a mipa in biakinn nisuahna lama om kongpi-ah hong paipih a," 
Ezekiel43:2 nisuahna lam panin Israel-te’ Pasian’ minthanna vang hong pai ka mu hi. Pasian’ awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a, ama minthanna vang in leitung taangsak lela hi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Hih ka maangmuhna pen, Pasian in Jerusalem khuapi a susia dingin a pailai a ka muh leh Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh tawh kibang hi. Tua ciangin thakhatin leilak kidenna-in ka boksuk hi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Topa’ minthanna vang in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah a lut hi. 
Ezekiel43:5 Tua ciangin Topa’ kha in hong la-in a tual sungnungah hong paipih a, tua lai panin, Topa’ minthanna vang tawh biakinnsung a kidimna ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Tua lai mun panin kei kiangah a mipa a din laitakin biakinnsung panin Topa in kei hong hopihna ka za a," 
Ezekiel43:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih lai munah ka kumpi tokhom om hi. Israel mite lak hih lai munah ka teng ding a, amaute ka uk tawntung ding hi. Israel mite le a kumpite un pasian dang biakna tawh ahi a, a kumpi sisate uh phawkna ding mual bawlna tawh ahi zongin ka min siangtho daisak ngei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kumpite un a kongkhuam uh le a kongzawlte uh keima biakinn kongkhuam le kongzawlte tawh kimatin bawl uh a, ka kikal uh kawm bek in hong hal hi. A muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh tawh ka min siangtho hong daisak uh a, kei zong ka heh manin amaute ka susiamang hi." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawn loin, a kumpi sisate uh phawkna a mual uh a phiat ding uh ahi hi. Tua bangin a gamtat nak-uhleh amaute lakah ka teng paisuak tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zomlai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah biakinn thu le a geelna khempeuh cingtakin lak inla, amaute’ mawh gamtatna hangin maizumsak in." 
Ezekiel43:11 Amaute a gamtatnasate uh hangin hong maizum theih uhleh, biakinn geelna, a lim, a lutna le a pusuahna, a buppi lim, a na khempeuh a kigeelna, le a zat dan ding khempeuh a cingtakin amaute tungah laktel in la, amaute in a kigelnate thei-in a zat dan ding bangin a zuih theihna dingun amaute a dingin lai-in gelhsak in." 
Ezekiel43:12 Biakinn tawh kisai ngeina in: Mualtung a om biakinn kimkot mun khempeuh pen biakna tawh kisai-in a siangtho ahi hi. 
Ezekiel43:13 “Biakna tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A teh nadingin biakinn tehna a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biakna tau bul kimkot pen letmat sawmnih sangin, letmat sawmnih mah zai ding a, a tau kimkotah letmat sawm a sangin geivial nei ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:14 A tau bul panin a tau zawl nuainung ciang pi li hi ding a, a sahna letmat sawmnih hi ding hi. Tua ban siah pi sagih sangto ding a, letmat sawmnih sah ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:15 A tungnung pen, ganhing kihalna mun pi sagih sang ding a, a kiu li-ah letmat sawmnih a sang ki om ciat ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:16 A biakna tau dawnzang pen a dung a vai a kikim hi ding a, pi sawmnih sau-in pi sawmnih mah zai ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:17 Biakna tau a paito a laizang santeng pen a dung a vai a kikim, pi sawmnih le li hi ding a, a nuai dawl sangin letmat sawm pai-in neuzaw ding hi. Tua a dinna a nuai gual kimkot letmat sawmnih pai-in zai ding hi. Biakna tau tung kahna ding kahlei pen nisuahna lampangah om ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih biakna tau zatna ding ngeinate hih bang hi ding hi: Biakna tau a kizawh khit ciangin a tungah meihal biakpiakna le biakpiakna ganhing site thehna tawh apna a bawl ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Zadok’ suanlekhak Levi siampite pen keima na a sem dingin ka omna-ah a hong pai dingte ahi uh hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong pia hi. Mawhna hangin biakna-a piak dingin amaute tungah bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel43:20 Nangmah in a sisan pawlkhat la-in biakna tau kiu li-a om ki lite, biakna tau paito a laizang kiute, le a kimkotah a om a geihualte na nuh ding a, hih bangin hihna tawh biakna tau siansuahin na ap ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:21 Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam, a mun hong kigenna sanah a hal ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na siansuah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na siansuah ding hi. 
Ezekiel43:23 Hih bangin siansuahna na man khit ciangin, paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat le tuutal khat na la ding a," 
Ezekiel43:24 Topa ahi keima kiangah nong paipih ding hi. Siampite in tua ganhingte tungah ci thehin, keimah hong biakna-in tua ganhingte hal ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Mawhna hangin biakpiakna-in ni sagih sung nisimin, paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat, bawngtal khat, le tuutal khat a pia ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:26 Siampite in ni sagih sung biakna tau apna bawlin zattheih dingin a baihsa-in omsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel43:27 Hih bangin ni sagih sung a hih khit uh ciangin, a ni giat ni-a kipanin siampite in meihal biakna le thunuama biakpiaknate, biakna tau tungah piak ding kipan ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note tungah kei ka lungkim ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in nisuahna lam biakinn huang kongpi pua-ah hong paipih a, a kongpi na kikhak hi." 
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih kongpi kikhak paisuak ding a, kihong kik ngei lo ding hi. Israel-te’ Topa Pasian keimah in hih kongpi tawn khin ka hih manin kuamah dang in tawn thei nawn lo ding a, a kikhak den ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ahi zongin hih lai-ah gam uk na a sem laitak ulianpa pen keima omna-ah biakna an siangtho a ne dingin hong pai thei ding hi. Amah hong pai ciangin inndeipi tawnin inndei sungnung kongvangah hong lutin tua lai mahah pusuak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin biakinn mai-ah hong paipih a, ka khuadak leh, Topa’ biakinnsung khempeuh ama minthanna vang tawh na kidim hi. Kei zong leilak kidenna-in ka boksuk hi." 
Ezekiel44:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-a na muh ding nate le na zak ding thute khempeuh hoihtakin ciamteh in. Ka biakinn a zatna ding ngeina om khempeuh tu-in a hong gen ding ka hi hi. Biakinn sungah a pai thei dingte le Siangtho Pen Munah a pai thei lo dingte khempeuh limtakin ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel44:6 A lehdo thei hih Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute, hih bangin gen in: No Israel mite aw, a beisa huna a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate khempeuh uh khawl un." 
Ezekiel44:7 Keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite nong piak uh ciangin, keima thu a mang lo, vun a ki-at lo gamdang mite a sungah na lutsak uh a, ka biakinn na ninsak uh hi. Tua bangin a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate uh tawh ka thuciamna na siasak uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ka biakinn sungah biakna ngeinate na zui kei uh a, ka biakinn sungah gamdang mite peuh na na semsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in tu-in kong genin-ah: Vun ki-at lo gamdang mite peuhmah ka biakinn sungah lut lo ding uh a, note lakah a teng gamdang mite nangawn lut lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:10 No Israel midangte bangin kei hong nusia-in milim a bia Levi mite in zong gim thuak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:11 Amaute in biakinn kongcin, biakinnsung nasepte sem thei ding uh hi. Meihal biakna-a kipia ganhingte le mite in biakna-in a piak ganhingte go thei ding uh a, mite’ na a sepsak dingin tavuan la ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ahi zongin amaute in milim biakna lamah Israel mite makai-in mawhna sungah Israel mite tunpih uh ahih ciangin, amaute gim ka piak ding, Topa Pasian keimah nakpitakin ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel44:13 Amaute in keima siampi na sem loin, keima biakna na a siangtho nate nai-ah pai thei loin, Siangtho Pen Munah zong lut thei lo ding uh hi. Hihte pen, a muhdahhuai a gamtatnasate uh hangin a hamsiatna uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:14 Ahi zongin biakinn sunga nasep a kisam dangte a sem dingin amaute ka seh thei ding hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:15 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in keima kiangah, “Zadok’ suanlekhak Levi mi siampite ahihleh, Israel mi adangte in kei hong nusiat laitakun, amaute in citakin biakinn sungah keima na hong sem uh ahih manin, tu-in amaute in keima na hong semin, keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite keima kiangah hong pia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ka biakinn sungah amaute lutin, ka biakna tau-ah na semin, biakinn sunga biaknate-ah makai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:17 A tual sungnung paina kongpi-ah a lut uh ciangin saihadial puan silh ding uh hi. Tual sungnung sung le biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun samul puan peuhmah silhlo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:18 Amaute in saiha dial puan khimin, saihadial puan tengin, khua-ul a suaksak thei kawnggak gak lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Midangte a omna biakinntual puanungah a pusuah ma-un, biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun a zat uh puante suahin inndei siangtho sungah nusia ding uh hi. Tua lai panin amaute in puan dangte silhin pusuak ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh a biakna puan siangthote un midangte lawhkha ding hi." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Amaute in a sam uh mettol lo ding uh a, a saulua-in zong hawi lo ding uh hi. A kilawm ciang bekin met ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:21 Biakinntual sungnungah a lut ma-un siampite in leenggahzu ne lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:22 Meigong numei ahi a, a kimasa numei ahi zongin zi-in nei lo ding uh a, Israel nungak, ahih kei leh siampite’ zi meigongte bek tenpih thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Amaute in ka mite tungah, biakna na a siangtho le a mawkmawk nate, le a nin le a siang nate a kilamdanna hilh ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:24 Thunei khat peuhpeuh a om ciangin, keima ngeina omsa tawh kizui-in thu khen ding uh hi. A kiseh pawite a ngeina omsa bangin bawl ding uh a, Sabbath-te siangthosak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:25 Siampite pen misi lawnna tawh kininsak lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin, a nu uh ahi a, a pa uh ahi a, a sanggam pasal uh ahih kei leh pasal a nei nai lo a sanggam numeite uh hangin kininsak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:26 Amaute a kisiansuah khit uh nipikal khat ciang bekin," 
Ezekiel44:27 biakinntual sungnungah pai-in biakinn sungah na a sepkik theih nadingun kisiansuahna biakna pia ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel44:28 “Israel mite tungah ka piak, khang khat pan khang khatah a kiluah suksuk ding sung panin siampite’ tanh pen siampi nasep za ahi hi. Amaute in Israel mite lakah neihsa gamh nei lo ding uh hi. Amaute’ kisapna khempeuhah kei a kicing khin ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel44:29 An tawh biakna, mawhna le khialhna hanga biakna, le Israel mite lak panin keima a dingin a kipiakhiate khempeuh amaute in ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Anpal sung panin a limci penteng le kei tungah hong kipia na khempeuh, amaute in tang ding uh hi. Israel mite’ inn sungah ka thupha a tuntheih nadingin amaute in anlum a em simun, biakna-in siampite tungah a em masak penpen uh pia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:31 Siampite in vasa ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin, sa’ nek baang hitaleh ama thu-in a sitawm mawkte hitaleh, ne lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin, Topa’ tanh dingin seh khat kituamkoih ding hi. Tua a kituamkoih leitang pen a dung tai sawm hi ding a, a vai tai giat hi ding hi. Tua sung khempeuh a siangtho biakna leitang hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hih leitang sung panin biakinn ding tawh kisai-in a dung pi zagiat sawmli, a vai pi zagiat sawmli mah kisehin, tua banah a kimkot pi sawmgiat le li paisuak mun awng tawh hi lai ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:3 Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangtho pen mun le biakinn mun dingin a saulam tai sawm, a zailam tai li kisehkhia ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:4 Hih a kisehkhia mun sungteng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi ding a, Topa’ biakinn sungah na a sem siampite a’ ding hi ding hi. Hih mun sungteng pen siampite’ inn lamna ding mun le biakinn lamna ding mun siangtho hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:5 Hih banah, a dung tai sawm, a vai tai li a pha sehkhat kibawl leuleu ding a, biakinn sungah na a sem Levi mite a’ ding hi ding hi. Tua sungtengah amaute’ tenna ding khua om ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:6 Khuapi huangsung dingin a dung tai sawm, a vai tai nih a pha leitang khat kisehkhia ding hi. Hih mun pen a siangtho leitang tawh kizom pah ding a, Israel mite khempeuh a’ ding hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Gam sung a uk uliante a dingin zong leitang kisehkhia ding hi. A siangtho leitang le khuapi huang panin kipanin nitumna lamah a gamgi ciang, nisuahna lamah zong a gamgi ciang mah hi ding a, nitumna pan nisuahna gamgi pen Israel minamte khat in a ngahzah tan mah hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:8 Hih munteng pen Israel gam sung panin Israel uliante’ neih hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in Israel mite bawlsia nawn lo ding uh a, mun a omlaiteng khempeuh, a minam zui-in Israel minamte a tangsak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:9 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel a uk uliante aw, na mawh gamtatna uh sauveizo lua ta hi. Na ngongtatnate uh le mi na nenniamnate uh khawl unla, thuman thutangin na sem un. Amau’ leitang panun ka mite notkhia nawn kei un. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong gen hi." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Mi khempeuh in tawisuang man le tehna man zang ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel45:11 An tehna bung le tui tehna bung kikim ding a, a kizang ding etkakna pen beem hi ding hi. Beem khatah an bung sawm, tui bung sawm mah hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:12 A gik tehna pen, gerah sawmnih ciang shekel khat, shekel sawmguk ciangin mina khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Biakna na piakna ding zia uh pen, mangbuh na neihzah uh pan sawmguk-ah khat, mangbuhham zong sawmguk-ah khat mah," 
Ezekiel45:14 sathau na neihzah uh sung pan seh za-ah khat (bung tawh tehin bung sawm ciangin beem khat-a seh)," 
Ezekiel45:15 tuu na neih sung uh panin zanih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna, meihal biakna, thunuama biakpiaknate hi a, na mawhnate uh a maitheihna ding ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong pia hi." 
Ezekiel45:16 Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-in a piak dingin, amau a uk ulianpa tungah puak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:17 Gam uk ulianpa in biakna-in piak ding ganhingte, an tawh biakna-in zat dingte, le pawi khempeuh, Khadet ni, Sabbath nite-in Israel mibuppite a dingin tuiphih biaknate a piak ding ama nasep ahi hi. Israel mite’ mawhna a maitheih nadingin mawhna hanga biakna, an tawh biakna, meihal biakna, le thunuama biakpiakna-in a zat dingte khempeuh amah in a si ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Kha khatna a ni masa ni-in paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat biakna-in pia-in biakinn a siangsak ding na hi uh hi. 
Ezekiel45:19 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakpiakna ganhing si pawlkhat la-in biakinn kongkhuamte, biakna tau ki lite, le tual sungnung lutna kong khuamte nuh ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:20 Tua bangmahin tua kha a ni sagih ni-in zong, tup lohpi le theih lohna hangin a khialkha mite a dingin siansuahna a bawl ding na hi uh hi. Tu-a bang danin biakinn a siangthosak ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:21 “A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi na kipan ding uh a, mi khempeuh in ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:22 Tua pawi bawl a kipat ni-in gam uk ulianpa in amah le mi khempeuh a dingin mawhna hanga biakpiakna-in bawngtal khat pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel45:23 Tua pawi ni sagih sung nisimin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia ding a, tua banah mawhna hanga biakna-in nisimin keeltal khat zong a pia ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel45:24 Bawngtal le tuutal a kipiazah tawh kizui-in an tawh biak nadingin an bung khat pai le sathau biing khat pai tawh piakhawm ding hi. 
Ezekiel45:25 “A kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni-in nipikal khat sung a kibawl ding Buk Pawi kipan ding a, mawhna hanga biakpiakna, meihal biakna, le an tawh biakna-in piak dingin an le sathaute, nisimin a kisamzah, gam uk ulianpa in pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:1 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lama om, tual sungnung kongpi pen nasep ni guk sung kikhakcip ding a, ahi zongin Sabbath ni le Khadet ni-in kihong ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Siampite in meihal biakna le thunuama biakna a piak laitakun, gam uk ulianpa pen tual puanung lam panin inndei lianpi kongpi-ah pai-in kongpi khuamte gei-ah ding ding a, tua kongpi-ah bia-in tua khit ciangin pusuak kik ding hi. Nitak mateng tua kongpi kikhak lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath ni le Khadet nisimin mi khempeuh in zong tua kongpi mai-ah Topa bia-in kun ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Gam uk ulianpa in Sabbath ni-in meihal biak nadingin paubaanna a om lo tuuno guk le tuutal khat pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel46:5 Tua ganhingte tawh a piakkhawm ding an tawh biakpiak nadingin zong, tuutal khat ciangin an bung khat kizuisak ding a, tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna-ah sathau biing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:6 Khadet ni ciangin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat, tuuno guk, le tuutal khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Tuate tawh piakkhop dingin an tawh biakpiak nadingin bawngtal le tuutalte khat ciangin an bung khat pai, le tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna-ah sathau biing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi."
