Ezekiel46:8 Gam uk ulianpa in a kuanlamin a tot lampiteng mah a ciah ciangin tawnin, inndeipi kongpi mahah pusuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:9 “A kiseh pawi hunte-ah Topa a bia dingin a hong pai mite khempeuh pen a hong lutna kongpi zui-in kileh kik lo ding uh a, tangtakin paisuak ding uh hi. Leilu lam kongpi panin a lutte, leitaw lam kongpi-ah ciah ding uh a, leitaw lam kongpi panin a lutte, leilu lam kongpi-ah ciah ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Gam uk ulianpa zong mihonte mah tawh lutin, amaute mah tawh pusuak khawm ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:11 Pawi nite le a kiseh pawi hunte-ah an tawh biakna-in piak ding pen, bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin khat ciangin an bung khat in zui ding a, tuunote tawh piakkhawm ding pen a mite’ piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a kipiak ciangin sathau biing dim khat in zui ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:12 Gam uk ulianpa in ama utthu-in biakpiakna, meihal biakna ahi a, thunuama biakna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh a piak ciangin, ama lut nadingin nisuahna lama om tual sungnung kongpi kihonsak ding hi. Amah in Sabbath ni-in biakpiakna a bawl mah bangin pia ding hi. Amah a ciahkik khit ciangin a kongpi kikhak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Gam uk ulianpa in meihal biakna-in piak dingin paubaanna a om lo kum khat a pha tuuno khat, zingsang simin Topa’ tungah biakna-in pia ding hi. Hih pen nisimin a kipia ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:14 Mangbuhnel lawh dim khat le a meek khoppih ding sathau hai khat tawh, an tawh biakna-in zong, nisimin pia ding hi. Hih meihal biakpiakna ngeina pen a kip paisuak ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Tua bangin tuuno, mangbuhnel, le sathau, zingsang simin Topa tungah a kipia ngitnget ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gam uk ulianpa in ama neihsa leitang mun khat peuhpeuh, a tapate khat peuhpeuh tungah a piak leh, tua leitang a ngah a tapa in a luah gamh-in nei paisuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ahi zongin gam uk ulianpa in ama nasemte khat peuhpeuh tungah leitang a piak leh, suahtakna kum a tun ciangin tua leitang pen a pia gam ukpa’ neihsa suakkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua leitang pen ama neihsa hi a, amah le a tapate bek in nei paisuak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel46:18 Gam uk ulianpa in midangte’ neihsa leitang laksak ngei lo ding hi. Ama tungah a kipia leitang sung panin a tapate khenkhia bek ding hi. Ka mite’ leitang laksakin, bawlsia lo ding hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tua ciangin a mipa in biakinntual sungnung leitaw lamah a om kongpi gei-a inndeite-ah hong paipih hi. Hih inndeite pen siampite’ zat ding a siangtho inndeite ahi hi. Amah in tua inndeite’ omna nitumna lampang mong hong kawk a," 
Ezekiel46:20 “Hih mun pen, siampite in mawhna le khialhna hangin biakna-in a kipia sate a huanna mun le an tawh biakpiaknate a emna ding mun ahi hi. Hih pen, tual puanungah biakna sa le ante paipihkha loin, tua a siangtho nate tawh tual puanunga om mite a lawhsakkhak loh nading uh ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:21 Tua ciangin tual puanungah hong pusuahpih a, a tual kiu lite hong lak hi. Tua tual kiu lite’ kiu-ah tualno khat ciat na om hi." 
Ezekiel46:22 Tua tualnote pi sawmguk giat sau-in pi sawmli le giat zai a, a vekin a golna kikim hi." 
Ezekiel46:23 Tua tualno lite a umna kawm dingin suang kiciang ciat a, tua a kawmte belin meikhuk a om hi." 
Ezekiel46:24 A mipa in, “Hihte pen, mite in biakna-in a piak sate, biakinnsung nasemte in a huanna anbuk ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tua ciangin biakinn lutna kongkhakah hong paipih kik hi. Biakinn kongkhak sangkil nuai panin tui luang a, biakinn ngatna nisuahna lamah luang sukin, biakna tau leitaw lampang tawn suk hi." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin hong pusuahpih a, nisuahna lam kongpi pualamah hong paipih hi. Leitaw lam kulhkongpi-ah a tui hong luangkhia hi." 
Ezekiel47:3 A mipa in a tehna piciang tawi-in a tui luanna nisuahna lam pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang dong tehsuk a, a tui kei hong ngaptansak hi. A tui pen siakmit ciang bek thuk hi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tua ciangin pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang tehsuk leuleu a, tua lai-ah a tui hong ngaptansak a, khuk ciang tum hi. Tua ciangin pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang tehsuk leuleu-in a tui hong ngaptansak a, ka kawng ciang tum hi." 
Ezekiel47:5 Tua ciangin pi tulkhat zaguk sawmgiat ciang mah tehsuk lai leuleu a, a tui thuklua ta ahih manin ka ngapzo kei hi. Thuklua ahih manin a tui i peek loh buangin a kikantan zo ding hi lo hi." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hihte khempeuh hoihtakin ciamteh in,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin a mipa in tua gun gei mahah hong paipih kik a," 
Ezekiel47:7 tua lai mun ka tun ciangin a gun lang nih tuakah singkung tampi tak a po ka mu hi. 
Ezekiel47:8 Amah in kei kiangah, “Hih tui pen nisuahna lam manawhin gam sung nawkin Jordan Kuam-ah luangsukin Si Tuipi sungah tung hi. Si Tuipi a tun ciangin hih tui in tuipi tui pen, tuisiang suaksakkik hi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Hih tui a luanna mun peuhpeuhah ganhing namkim le ngasa tampi om hi. Hih tui in Si Tuipi tui siangsakkikin, a luanna peuhpeuhah nuntakna omsakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi khua panin Eneglaim khua ciang dong tuipi dungah ngasa bengte omin, tua dungah a ngen uh zalin phokeu ding uh hi. Mediterranean Tuipi sungah ngasa a omzah mah bangin ngasa nam tampi om ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ahi zongin tuipi dunga om nawnglakte le bualte-a om tuite siang lo ding a, cikhuk dingin a tuaci mahin omlai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:12 Hih gun pang tuakah a gah nek dingin singkung nam khempeuh po ding hi. A tehte pulh ngei lo ding a, a gah tawh zong kilawi ngei lo ding hi. Biakinn panin a luangkhia tui ngah ding uh ahih manin khasimin a gah thak gah tawntung ding uh hi. A singgahte an ding hi ding a, a tehte zatui-in kizang ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:13 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Israel minam sawm le nihte’ gamh dingin leitang hawm ding a gamgi ding hih bang hi ding hi. Josef minamte in a dangte’ ngahzah nih ngah ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:14 Hih gam na pu na pate uh tanh dingin ka piakna ding thu, amaute tungah thupi takin ka kiciam khinzo hi. Tua ahih manin tu-in note’ lakah a kikim dimdiamin hawm un." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Leilu lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi panin kipanin Hethlon khuapi-ah, Hamath khua lutna-ah, Zedad khuapi-ah," 
Ezekiel47:16 tua panin Berothah le Sibraim khuapite-ah (hih khuate pen Damaskas kumpi gam le Hamath kumpi gam kikalah om hi), tua panin Hazerhattikon khuapi (Hauran kumpi gamgi gei-a om) hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:17 Leilu lam gamgi pen Mediterranean Tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam manawhin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi a om Hazarenan khuapi ciang hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuahna lam gamgi pen, Damaskas le Hauran gamgi kituahna panin hong kipan sukin, Jordan Gun zuisuk a, Jordan Gun nitumna lampangteng Israel gam hi-in, nisuahna lampangteng Gilead gam hi a, tua panin Si Tuipi kimang sukin Tamar khuapi ciang hisuk ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Leitaw lam gamgi pen, Tamar khuapi panin hong kipanin Meribathkadesh bual hong nawkin, tua panin sak nitumna lam manawhin Egypt gamgi zuito-in Mediterranean Tuipi sun ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi hito-in, Hamath khualutna tawh a kitang ciang hito ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Tua ahih ciangin hih gam sungteng, no Israel minamte lakah hawm un." 
Ezekiel47:22 Note a dingin na neih kip tawntung ding uh gamh hi ding hi. Hih leitang na hawm uh ciangin note lakah hong tengin ta a nei khinsa minam dangte zong note mah bangin tanh na pia ding uh hi. Amaute pen Israel minam taktakte mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a, Israel minam dangte mah bangin leitang hawmna-ah ai sawk thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:23 Note’ lakah a teng gamdang mite in amau’ tenna minamte tawh leitang ngahkhawm ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel48:1 “Leilu lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi panin kipanin Hethlon khuapi-ah, Hamath khua lutna-ah, tua panin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi kituahna sana om Hazarenan khuapi ciang sun ding hi. Minam khat in leitang khen khat ciat ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi ding a, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung penah Dan minamte," 
Ezekiel48:2 a zomah Asher Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:3 a zomah Naftali Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:4 a zomah Manasseh Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:5 a zomah Efraim Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:6 a zomah Reuben Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:7 a zomah Judah Minamte hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Tuate zomah Pasian a dingin a kipia leitang hi ding a, a zaina pen leilu lam panin a kipan leitaw lam tai sawm hi ding hi. A dunglam pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi dong, minam dangte’ ngahzah tan mah hi ding a, a laizang sanah biakinn om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Topa a dingin a kipia leitang a sauna tai sawm hi ding a, a zaina tai giat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Siampite in hih a siangtho leitang sung panin tanh ngah ding uh a, leilu lampang le leitaw lampang tai sawm tuak hi-in, nisuahna lam le nitumna lampang tai li tuak hi ding hi. Siampite’ ngahna sung hih leitang laizangah Topa’ biakinn om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:11 Hih munteng pen Zadok’ suanlekhak siampite a’ ding ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel midangte a gamtat khialh uh ciangin Levi midangte bangin va zui lo uh a, hih mite in citakin keima na hong sem uh hi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Tua ahih manin Levi midangte zomah hih bangin a mun tuam diak khat nei ding uh a, tua mun a siangtho pen mun khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Hih siampite’ zomah Levi mite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a sauna tai sawm hi-in, a zaina tai li hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Topa tungah a kipia hih leitang siangtho pen, leitang khempeuh panin a hoihpen mun hi a, hih leitang sung panin mun khat peuhpeuh, kizuak thei lo, adang tawh zong kikhek thei lo, midang tungah zong kipia thei lo ding hi. Hih leitang pen a siangtho leitang hi a, Topa -a’ ahi hi." 
Ezekiel48:15 “A omlai leitang, a sauna tai sawm le a zaina tai nih pen a siangtho leitang hi loin a mawkmawk leitang hi ding a, mite’ taang zat ding mun hi ding hi. Tenna ding le a mun awngthawl hi ding a, a laizangah khuapi om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:16 A khuapi golna a dung a vai-in a kikim hi ding a, a pang li-in pang khat ciangin pi tulsagih zanga sawmguk hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:17 Khuapi kimkot paisuakah pi zali sawmnih paisuak a zai mun awng om ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:18 Khuapi a kilam khit ciangin a siangtho leitang lamah a awng lai, nisuahna lam tai li, nitumna lam tai li a omlaiteng pen khuapi sungah a teng mite in a khawh ding leitang hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Khuapi sungah nasemin a om mi peuhmah in Israel minam sung panin kuamah kideidanna om loin hih leitang kho thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel48:20 Hih a kisehkhia leitang buppi pen a pang li-in tai sawm pai hi ding a, hih pen leitang siangtho le khuapihuam sung kigawm hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:21 “A pang li-in tai sawm paisuak a pha, Topa a dingin a kipia leitang le khuapi huamteng a kilakkhiat khit ciangin, a pang tuakah a omlai leitang, nitumna lamah tuipi dong, nisuahna lamah gambup gamgi dong, gam uk uliante a’ ding hi ding hi. Hih leitang a kipia kikal sungah, biakinn, Topa’ tungah a kipia leitang, Levi mite a kipia leitang, le khuapihuam leitangte om ding a, gam uk uliante’ leitang in hihte laitaak ding hi. Hih gam uk uliante’ leitang pen leilu lamah Judah Minamte a’ le leitaw lamah Benjamin Minamte a’ kikalah om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 “Hih leitang panin leitaw lampangah, Israel minam a omlaite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi ding a, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung penah a ngah ding Benjamin Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:24 a zomah Simeon Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:25 a zomah Issakhar Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:26 a zomah Zebulun Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:27 a zomah Gad Minamte hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:28 “Leitaw lam panin Gad Minamte a kipia leitang banah gambup gamgi om ding a, Tamar khuapi panin kipanin Meribathkadesh bual nawk ding a, tua panin sak nitumna lam manawhin Egypt-te’ gamgi zui ding a, Mediterranean Tuipi-ah tawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:29 Tu-a ka gen bangin Israel minamte in a khang a khangin a luah suksuk ding uh leitang dingin amaute tungah a kipia ding leitang ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel48:30 “A khuapi sungah lutna ding kulhkongpite om hi. A khuapikulh pang lite, pang khat ciangin pi tulsagih zanga sawmguk sau hi. A pang khatah kulhkongpi thum ciat om a, Israel minamte khat ciat tam hi. Leilu lampang a om kulhkongpi thumte in Reuben, Judah, le Levi tam hi. Nisuahna lampang a omte in Josef, Benjamin, le Dan tam hi. Leitaw lampang a omte in Simeon, Issakhar, le Zebulun tam hi. Nitumna lampang a omte in Gad, Asher, le Naftali tam uh hi." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32  
Ezekiel48:33  
Ezekiel48:34  
Ezekiel48:35 Khuapi kimkot a sauna pi tul sawmthum zanih sawmli pha a, tu a kipanin hih khuapi min pen, ‘Hih lai-ah Topa om hi,’ kici ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel1:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suahzawh a kum thumna kumin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khuapi simin a umcih hi." 
Daniel1:2 Topa in kumpi Jehoiakim le biakinnpi na manphate kumpi Nebukhadnezzar a mansak hi. Amah in a mi matte Babylon gam ama pasian biakinn-ah paipih a, na manpha a matte sumkoihna inn-ah a koih hi." 
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam le milian namte lak pan mi pawlkhat a teelkhia dingin innsungmang lian pen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi. 
Daniel1:4 Tua mite, kumpi innsunga nasem siamte a suahtheih nadingun a melhoih, pumpi tung poina a nei lo, a navak, hoihtakin pilna a kisinsak, na a thei baih, a lungsim navak ngentang ding ahi hi. Ashpenaz in amaute Babylon lai le a pau a hilh ding ahi hi." 
Daniel1:5 Amaute pen kumpi innsunga nasem dangte mah bangin nisimin an le leenggahzu tawh a vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua bangin kum thum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin kumpipa mai-ah amaute a kilak kik ding uh ahi hi. 
Daniel1:6 Tua bangin a kiteelte, Judah mite vive hi a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, le Azariah-te ahi uh hi." 
Daniel1:7 Innsungmang lianpen pa in amaute min thak phuah a, Daniel’ min dingin Belteshazzar, Hananiah’ min dingin Shadrak, Mishael’ min dingin Meshak, Azariah’ min dingin Abednego a phuak hi." 
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi innsunga an le leenggahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuaisak loh nadingin a lungsim a khensat hi. Amah in innsungmang lianpen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiak loh nadingin a ngen zaw hi. 
Daniel1:9 Tua ciangin Pasian in Daniel tungah Ashpenaz in ngaihsut siamna a neih theih nadingin a bawlsak hi. 
Daniel1:10 Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah, “Kumpipa in na annek ding uhleh na dawn ding uh sehsa-in nei khinzo ahih ciangin, khangno dangte banzo kei kha zenzen leteh a hong thah ding ka lau hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel1:11 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Ashpenaz in amah le adang thumte a cing dingin a koihpa kiangah a pai hi. 
Daniel1:12 Amah in, “Ni sawm sung hong ze-etin, anteh bek hong nesak inla, tui bek hong dawnsak in." 
Daniel1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa’ an a ne khangnote tawh hong enkak khawm in la, nong muhna bangbangin thu khenta in,” a ci hi." 
Daniel1:14 Amah in amau’ ngetna bang mangin ni sawm sung ze-et dingin a thukim hi. 
Daniel1:15 Ni sawm a cin khit ciangin amaute pen kumpi an nete sangin cidamzaw uh a, a ci a sa uh a hoihzaw hi." 
Daniel1:16 Tua ciangin a cing pa in kumpi an le leenggahzu pia loin amaute anteh an a pia hi. 
Daniel1:17 Pasian in tua khangno lite laitheih siamna le pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen maangmuhna le mangkhiat siamna a pia hi. 
Daniel1:18 Kumpipa’ sehsa kum thum a cin khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi. 
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael, le Azariah-te adangteng khempeuh sangin a hoihzawk tuanlam uh a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn-a vaihawm ulian pawl a suak uh hi." 
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in bangbang thuhaksa nono a dot hangin, hih mi lite pen ama gam sung khempeuha mitphial siamte le aisan theite khempeuh sangin a zah sawmin a siamzawklam uh a mu hi." 
Daniel1:21 Sairas, Babylon kumpi a suah hun dong, kumpi inn-ah Daniel omto paisuak hi." 
Daniel2:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suahzawh a kum nihna kumin mang khat a man hi. A lungsim pataulua mahmah ahih manin a ihmu thei kei hi. 
Daniel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin bang mang man cih a hilh dingin mitphial siamte, mibum theite, le khongkhai siamte a samsak hi." 
Daniel2:3 Amaute hong pai-in kumpipa mai-ah a din uh ciangin kumpipa in, “Mang khat ka man a, tua ka mang pen bang hiam cih theinuam ka hih manin ka lungsim a patau mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:4 Amaute in Aram pau tawh, “Kumpipa aw, na khansau hen! Na mang hong gen leteh a khiatna zong kong gen ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in, “Ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih kei uhleh note kong semnengawp ding a, na inn uh suksiatgawp dingin ka ngaihsun khinzo hi." 
Daniel2:6 Ahi zongin ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih uhleh, letsong le minphatna lianpi ka hong pia ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka mangmat bang hi a, a khiatna bang ahi hiam cih hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:7 Amaute in, “Kumpipa aw, na mang hong gen phot leteh a khiatna ka hong gen thei pan ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Daniel2:8 Kumpipa in, “Ka ngaihsutsa teng hong zasak khinzo ka hih manin hun sau theihtheihna ding a zong na hihlam uh teltakin kithei hi." 
Daniel2:9 Ka mangmat nong gen theih kei uhleh note khempeuh thukhenna khat bek ka hong pia ding hi. Noteng khempeuh in lungsim kikhatin zuauthu gengen leeng a ngaihsutna hong kikheel ding hi, a ci nuam na hi tazen uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka mangmat hong gen phot un. Tua hileh a khiatna zong hong gen thei ding ci-in ka hong muang pan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:10 Khongkhai theite in, “Kumpipa aw, na deihna bang a hong gen thei ding hih leitungah mihing khat beek om lo ding hi. Kumpi gen loh milian pen le mi thupi pen khat beek in, a aisan theite, a mitphial siamte, le a khongkhai theite tungah tua bang thu a dong ngei kuamah om nai lo hi." 
Daniel2:11 Kumpipa’ thudotna pen haksa lua mahmah ahih manin, mihing ahi lo pasian-te longal a gen thei ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel2:12 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a, Babylon sunga kumpi’ thudot mipilte khempeuh thahlup khit dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel2:13 Tua ahih ciangin mipilte khempeuh thahlup khitna ding thu kipia a, tua thahlup dingte sungah Daniel le a lawmte zong a kihel uh ahi hi." 
Daniel2:14 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Babylon gam sunga mipilteng a thatlum dingin a kisawl kumpi cing a ukpa Ariok kiangah kampau kidawm takin a va pai hi. 
Daniel2:15 Amah in Ariok kiangah, “Bang dingin kumpipa in hih zahtakin thukhauh suaksak ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ariok in a thupiang khempeuh a gen hi." 
Daniel2:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Daniel pai a, a mangmat a khiatna a hilh theih nadingin hun tawmvei sung a kingak lai nadingin phalna a ngen hi." 
Daniel2:17 Tua ciangin Daniel a inn-ah ciah a, a thupiangteng khempeuh a lawmte Hananiah, Mishael, le Azariah-te kiangah a ko hi." 
Daniel2:18 Amah in, vantung Pasian in eite hong hehpihin, tua thuthukpi genkhia thei-in, Babylon gam sunga mipil dangte tawh thahna i thuakkhawm loh nadingin thu i ngen ding hi, ci-in a gen hi." 
Daniel2:19 Tua ciangin tua zan sungin maangmuhna tawh tua thuthukpi Daniel’ tungah kihilh a, amah in vantung Pasian’ min a phat hi." 
Daniel2:20 “Pasian’ min kiphat tawntung ta hen; amah pilin a vanglian hi. 
Daniel2:21 Amah in hun le khuahunte kheel a, kumpite koihin lah a lakhia hi. Amah in mite tungah pilna le theihna a pia hi." 
Daniel2:22 Amah in thuthukpite le thusimte a lakkhia hi. Amah in khuamial sunga kiseelte thei a, khuavak in amah a umcih hi." 
Daniel2:23 Nang pen ka pu ka pate’ Pasian na hi a, ka hong phat a, ka hong zahtak hi. Nangmah in pilna le thahatna na hong piazo hi. Ka thungetna nong za a, kumpipa kianga ka gen ding thu nong lakzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:24 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Babylon mipilte a that dingin a sawl pa Ariok kiangah Daniel pai a, “Babylon gam sunga mipilte that kei in. Kumpipa kiangah hong paipih in; tu-in a mangmat a khiatna ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:25 Tua ciangin Ariok in thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel paipih pah a, “Kumpipa aw, na mangmat a khiatna a hong gen thei ding Jew mi salte khat ka va mu hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in Belteshazzar a kici Daniel kiangah, “Ka mangmat bang hi a, a khiatna bang hiam cih hong gen thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel2:27 Daniel in, “Kumpipa aw, tua na theihnop thu a hong gen thei ding khongkhai thei, mitphial siam, aisan siam kuamah om lo hi." 
Daniel2:28 Ahih hangin thusim a lak thei vantungah Pasian khat a om hi. Amah in mai lamah bang thu hong piang ding cih nangmah Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa tungah a hong hilhzo hi. 
Daniel2:29 Kumpipa na ihmut laitakin mailam a hong piang ding mang khat na man a, thuthukpi a lakkhia Pasian in a piang ding thu a hong lakkholzo hi." 
Daniel2:30 Tu-in midangte sangin ka pilzawk manin kei tungah tua thu a hong kilak hi loin, Kumpipa in na mangmat a khiatna le na ngaihsut thu na theih nadingin a hong kilak ahi zaw hi." 
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa aw, na mangin a tee daldal milim lian mahmah khat na mu a, kihtakhuai mahmahin na mai-ah a ding hi." 
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang pen kham hoih mahmah tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A awm le a bante ngun tawh kibawl a, a gil le a pheite sumngo tawh kibawl hi." 
Daniel2:33 A khete sik tawh kibawl a, a khepekte khen khat sik, khen khat tungman kigawm ahi hi." 
Daniel2:34 Tua banga na et laitakin mualtung panin suangtumpi khat kuama khuk lohin hong tuk a, sik le tungman kigawm milim khete dengtanin a kithehthang hi." 
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin sik, tungman, sumngo, ngun le khamte kitamnen gawp a, khuakhal lai-a ansi zap bangin a leengmang hi. Huih in leenmang khin ahih manin themkha beek a kimu nawn kei hi. Ahih hangin tua suangtum hong khangkhang a, mual cia hong pha-in leitung khempeuh a dim hi." 
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat pen tu-a teng ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna ka hong gen ding hi. 
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa aw, kumpi khempeuh lak pan nang a lianpen na hi hi. Vantung Pasian in kumpi-in nang hong koih a, vangliatna, thahatna, le zahtakna a hong pia hi." 
Daniel2:38 Amah in mi’ tenna leitungteng, ganhingteng le vasate a uk dingin nang a hong koih hi. Tua kham lutang pen nangmah na hi hi." 
Daniel2:39 Nang’ khit ciangin nang’ kumpi gam sangin a neuzaw kumpi gam adang khat hong piang ding a, tua khit ciangin sumngo ahi kumpi gam a thumna in leitung khempeuh uk ding hi." 
Daniel2:40 Tua khit ciangin kumpi gam lina hong piang ding a, sik bangin a khauh ding hi. Sik in na khempeuh satnenin a gawivui bangin, a masa kumpi gamteng khempeuh a sukham ding hi." 
Daniel2:41 A khepek le a khemete khen khat sik le khen khat tungman kigawm ahi na mu hi. Tua pen kumpi gam kikhenthang ding hi, cihna ahi hi. Tungman le sik kigawm ahih mah bangin sik bangin a hoih khopkhat ciang khauhna a nei ding hi." 
Daniel2:42 A khemete khenkhat sik hi a, a khenkhat tungman ahih mah bangin kumpi gam khenkhat thahatin khenkhat a thahat kei ding hi." 
Daniel2:43 Sik le tungman kigawm na muh mah bangin tua kumpi gam ukte in kigawm ding hanciamin zileta-in a kimat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin sik le tungman a kimat theih loh mah bangin a kigawm thei kei ding uh hi. 
Daniel2:44 Tua kumpite a maan laitakun vantung Pasian in a bei thei ngei lo ding kumpi gam a hong phut ding hi. Tua kumpi gam kuamah in zo zo lo ding a, tua gam in gamdang khempeuhte zogawpin a kip tawntung ding hi." 
Daniel2:45 Kuama lawn lohpi-in mualtung pan hong tuksuk suangtum in sik, sumngo, tungman, ngun, le kham tawh kibawl milim a denpaih na mu hi. A lian Pasian in mai lamah bang hong piang ding cih Kumpipa tungah a hong hilh ahi hi. Na mangmat pen ahi bang teekteekin kong gen a, a khiatna zong a man bangin kong genzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:46 Tua ciangin kumpi Nebukhadnezzar zong Daniel’ mai leilakah kunsukin, Daniel tungah sagawh biakna le a namtui biakpiakna bawl dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel2:47 Kumpipa in, “Hih thuthukpi hong genthei na hih manin na Pasian pen thuthuk a lak, pasian khempeuh sung pan a lianpen, kumpite’ tunga Topa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:48 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Daniel letsong hoih tampi pia a, a za liansak a, Babylon gamteng uksakin, Babylon mipil thudotte a ukpipa dingin a koih hi." 
Daniel2:49 Kumpipa in Daniel’ ngetna mah bangin Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te Babylon gam khen tuamtuamte a uk dingin koih a, Daniel pen kumpi inn sungah a omsak hi." 
Daniel3:1 Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a tun pi sawmkua a sang, a vailam pi kua a gol kham milim golpi khat bawlsak a, Babylon gam sung Dura zanglei-ah a koih hi." 
Daniel3:2 Kumpipa in a milian khempeuh, kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, mangpite, sumkem mangte, thukhen mangte, khuapi uk mangte le milian dangte khempeuh, kumpipa’ milim bawl apna ah a paikim ciat dingin sapna thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:3 Tua ahih ciangin tua mangliante khempeuh milim ap nadingin milim mai-ah a ding uh hi. 
Daniel3:4 Tua ciangin nakpitakin taangkona khat kibawl a, “Minam tuamtuamte le paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh aw!" 
Daniel3:5 Peengkul ging na za ding uh a, tua khit ciangin tamngaite, laiza lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsemte, le tumtheih a tuamtuamte a hong kitum ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar’ koih kham milim mai-ah kunin na bia ding uh hi." 
Daniel3:6 A kun lo, a bia lo peuhmah thakhat thu-in mei phualpi sungah kikhul pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:7 Tua mah bangin minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte le paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh in tumtheih gingte a zak phetun kunsukin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar’ kham milim koih a bia uh hi." 
Daniel3:8 Tua ciangin Babylon mite pawlkhat pai-in Jew mite a heksim uh hi. 
Daniel3:9 Amaute in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar’ kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, na khansau hen!" 
Daniel3:10 Kumpipa in, tumtheihte a hong kitum khit phetin mi khempeuh kham milim mai-ah kunin bia ding uh hi, ci-in thu na pia khinzo hi." 
Daniel3:11 Tua milim mai-ah kun loin, a bia lo khempeuh mei phualpi sungah a kikhul ding ahi hi." 
Daniel3:12 Babylon gam a khen liante a uk dingin na koih Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego a kici Jew mi pawlkhat a om uh hi. Amaute in kumpipa’ thupiakna a mang kei uh hi. Amaute in na pasian bia nuam loin, na milim koih mai-ah a kun nuam kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel3:13 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a, tua mi thumte ama mai-ah a kipaipihna ding thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:14 Amah in, “Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te aw, ka pasian bianuam loin, ka kham milim koih mai-ah kun nuam lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Daniel3:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in peengkulte, tamngaite, laiza lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsem, le tumtheih dang a gingte na zak khit phet uh ciangin kunin milim na bia ding uh hi. Na biak kei uhleh thakhatin mei phualpi sungah hong kikhul ding ahih ciangin a hong honkhiazo ding pasian omin um na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:16 Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, hih thu kong dawng kei ding uh hi." 
Daniel3:17 Mei phualpi sung panin a hong honkhia thei pasian a om leh ka biak ka Pasian uh hi ding a, na khutsung panin a hong honkhia ding hi." 
Daniel3:18 Kumpipa aw, a hong hotkhiat kei zenzen leh zong, na pasian lah ka bia tuan kei ding uh a, na kham milim mai-ah zong ka kun kei ding uh hi, ci-in theita in,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel3:19 Tua ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar pen Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te tungah heh mahmah ahih manin a mai a san pempam hi. A sat ngeinazah sangin a zah sagihvei a sazaw mei phualpi a cih dingin a mite thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:20 Tua ciangin Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te a hencip ding le mei phualpi sungah a khul dingin galkap thahat khempeuh thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:21 Tua ciangin amaute puanak le puantualpi silhsa le lukhu khusa-in hencip uh a, mei phualpi sungah a khul uh hi." 
Daniel3:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa’ thupiakna kinawh lua mahmah a, mei phualpi lah sa lua mahmah ahih manin a khulte nangawn meikuang in hullum hi." 
Daniel3:23 Tua ahih ciangin Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te hencipsa-in meikuangpi laizangah a kiasuk uh hi." 
Daniel3:24 Tua ciangin Nebukhadnezzar in lamdangsa mahmahin a ding vat hi. Amah in a thudotte kiangah, “Mihing thum hencipsa-in mei phualpi sungah khul hi lo ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Hi mah hi, Kumpipa aw,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Daniel3:25 “Tua ahihleh bang hangin meikuang sungah mihing li a kawi paipai mu ka hi hiam? Amaute lah kihencip lo a, liam zong liam tuak beek lo uh hi. A lina pen pa hoh pasian-te khat tawh a kibang hi,” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel3:26 Tua ahih ciangin Nebukhadnezzar zong mei phualpi kong gei-ah paito a, “Shadrak! Meshak! Abednego! A lianpen Pasian’ nasemte hong paikhia un,” ci-in a sam hi. Tua ciangin amaute zong thakhatin a hong paikhia pah uh hi." 
Daniel3:27 Kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, le kumpipa’ thudotte khempeuh kikhawm uh a, mei in a kat loh mite a en uh hi. A sam uh zang khat beek mei in kanghul lo a, a puan uh zong kang loin meikhu gim zong a nam beek kei uh hi." 
Daniel3:28 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te’ Pasian phat un. Amah in a vantung mite sawl a, amah a muang ama nasem hih mite a honkhia hi. Amaute in ka thupiakna mang loin, amau’ Pasian longal pasian dang’ mai-ah kun nuam lo, bia nuam lo uh ahih manin mei phualpi sungah khul ding a utzaw uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:29 “Tu-in minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte, mi khat peuhpeuh in Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te’ Pasian gensiatna kampau a om leh kibalnengawp ding a, a inn uh kisuksiatsak ding hi, ci-in thukham ka bawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin a hon thei pasian dang om peuhmah lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:30 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shadrak, Meshak, le Abednego-te Babylon gam khen liante-ah a golzaw ukna za a pia hi." 
Daniel4:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in leitung a om minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh tungah a nuai-a thute hih bangin a khak hi: “Note tungah nopna om ta hen!" 
Daniel4:2 A Lianpen Pasian in kei tungah lim le nalamdang a hong lahna thute ka hong gen nuam hi. 
Daniel4:3 “Pasian’ hong lah na lamdangte, bangzahin lian ahi hiam? A bawl na lamdangte, bangzahin vanglian ahi hiam? A tawntungin Pasian kumpi hi ding a, amah in a tawntungin a uk paisuak ding hi." 
Daniel4:4 “Keimah Nebukhadnezzar lungnuam takin kumpi inn-ah ka teng a, nuamsa mahmahin ka om hi." 
Daniel4:5 Ahih hangin ka ihmut laitakin a lauhuai mang khat ka man a, a dipkuathuai maang ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:6 Ka mangmat a khiatna a hong hilh dingin Babylon gam kumpi thudotte khempeuh a hong pai nadingun thu ka pia hi. 
Daniel4:7 Tua ciangin aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai theite, aksi et siamte khempeuh hong pai uh a, amaute kiangah ka mang ka gen hi. Ahih hangin a khiatna a hong gen thei kei uh hi." 
Daniel4:8 Tua ciangin Daniel (a min ding Betashazzar, ka pasian’ min tamin a kiphuak pa) a hong pai hi. Pasian’ kha ama sungah om ahih ciangin ama kiangah ka mangmat ka gen hi." 
Daniel4:9 Ama kiangah, aisan theite lak a a lianpen Betashazzar aw, Pasian’ kha na sungah om ahih manin thuthuk khempeuh na theih theihlam ka thei hi. Hih ka mang a khiatna hong gen in, ka ci hi." 
Daniel4:10 “Ka ihmut laitakin maangmuhna khat ka nei a, leitung laizangah a po singkung sang mahmah khat ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:11 Tua singkung pen khangkhangin gol semsem a, vantung dong banto ahih ciangin leitung mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi." 
Daniel4:12 A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup khamkhop ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate in a liim beel uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu bawl uh a, a nungta thei khempeuh in a gah a ne uh hi." 
Daniel4:13 “Ka maangmuhna ngaihsunin ka om laitakin ka khuadak leh a vil, a patau vantungmi khat vantung pan a hong tuaksuk ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:14 Amah nakpi-in kiko-in, ‘A singkung phuk inla, a hiangteng sattan in. A tehteng heuhsiang inla, a gahteng thehthang in. A nuai-a ganhingteng le a hiang tunga vasateng hawlkhia in." 
Daniel4:15 Ahih hangin a bul le leisung a a zungte nusia in. Sik le sumngo kual tawh vial inla, gamlak lopate tawh nusia khawm in. Hih mipa tungah daitui kai hen la, ganhingte le lopate tawh omkhawm hen." 
Daniel4:16 Amah in mihing lungsim nei nawn loin, kum sagih sung ganhing lungsim a nei ding hi." 
Daniel4:17 Hih pen a vil, a patau vantungmi’ thukhenna ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin mun khempeuhah a om mi khempeuhte in, a Lian Pasian in mite’ kumpi gamah vai a hawm hi, cih a thei ding uh hi. Amah in a teel peuhpeuh a neupente nangawn kumpi a suaksak thei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Daniel4:18 “Beltashazzar aw, keimah Nebukhadnezzar Kumpipa in ka mangmat pen hih bang ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna hong gen in. Ka thudot mite khat beek a khiatna a hong gen thei a om kei uh hi. Ahi zongin nang’ sungah Pasian’ kha om ahih manin na hong gen thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:19 Tua ciangin Beltashazzar zong a kici Daniel lungmang lua ahih manin tawmvei sung bangmah gen thei loin a om hi. Kumpipa in, Beltashazzar aw, mang le a khiatna huhau-in na lung mangsak zenzen kei in, a ci hi. Beltashazzar in, Kumpipa aw, nang mangmat le a khiatna pen na galte tungah tungzaw hen, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:20 Singkung sang mahmah na muh pen hong khangkhang a, khauh mahmah a, vantung dong banto a, leitungah a teng mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi." 
Daniel4:21 A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup a vakzo ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate, a nuai-ah tawlnga uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu a bawl uh hi." 
Daniel4:22 Kumpipa aw, nang pen tua singkung na hi hi. Nang na lian a, na thahat hi. Nakpi takin khangin lian mahmah na hih manin vantung dong na banto a, leitung khempeuhah na vangliatna kizel hi." 
Daniel4:23 Kumpipa in na et laitakin, vantungmi khat vantung panin hong paisuk a, “A singkung phuk inla susia in; ahih hangin lei sungah a bul le a zungte nusia in. A bulah sik le sumngo kual vial inla, gamlak lopate tawh nusiakhawm in. A tungah daitui kia hen la, kum sagih sung ganhingte tawh omkhawm ta hen,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:24 Kumpipa aw, a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi. A Lian Pasian in nang tungah a hong tung ding a thukhennasa a hong lak ahi hi." 
Daniel4:25 Mite sung panin hong kihawlkhia ding a, gamsate tawh na tengkhawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin lopa na ne ding a, a pualamah lumin, kum sagih sung na tungah daitui a hong kia ding hi. Tua ciangin a Lian Pasian in mihingte’ kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi." 
Daniel4:26 Vantung mi in singbul le a zungte lei sungah nusiat dingin thu a pia hi. Tua pen, Pasian in leitung khempeuh uk hi, cih na theih ciangin kumpi na suakkik ding hi, a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Daniel4:27 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw, kong thuhilhna hong mang in. Mawhna bawl nawn kei inla, diktakin gamta in. Mizawngte hehpih leteh, tua in a sia-a na gamtatnasate hong puahsak ding a, na nuamsa toto ding hi, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:28 Hih thuteng khempeuh kumpi Nebukhadnezzar’ tungah hong tung hi. 
Daniel4:29 Tua zawh kha sawm le nih khit ciangin kumpipa zong Babylon khua kumpi innkhumzang huan sungah vak a," 
Daniel4:30 Babylon khua bangzah takin lian ahi hiam? Kumpi khuapi ding le, ka vangliatna ka thahatna a kilat nadingin ka lam ahi hi, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:31 Tua thute a kamsung pan a pusuah ma-in vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar aw, ka thugen na ngai in. Na kumpi gam hong kilakkhiatsak zo hi." 
Daniel4:32 Mite lak pan hong kihawlkhia ding a, gamsate tawh na tengkhawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin kum sagih sung lopa na ne ding hi. Tua ciangin, Pasian in mihingte’ kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi a suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:33 Tua hun lianin Nebukhadnezzar’ tungah tua thukhenna a hong tung hi. Mite lak panin Nebukhadnezzar kihawlkhia a, bawngtal bangin lopa a ne takpi hi. A pumpi tungah daitui kia a, a pumpi tunga a multe keelmul bangin sau a, a khutcinte muvanlai khecin bangin a hong sau hi." 
Daniel4:34 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “A kisehsa hun a cin ciangin keimah Nebukhadnezzar in vantung lam ka ento a, ka khuatheihna a hong tungkik hi. A nungta tawntung a Lianpen Pasian’ min phatin, zahtakna le minthanna ka pia hi. “Amah in a tawntungin uk ding a, ama gam kip tawntung ding hi." 
Daniel4:35 Amah in leitung mite bangmahin a sim kei a, vantung mite le leitung mite ama khutnuai ahi hi. Ama deihna kuamah in nial thei lo a, a bawlnate kuamah in a hang a kan thei kei hi." 
Daniel4:36 “Ka khuatheihna a hong tunkik ciangin ka kumpi za, ka minthanna, le ka gam minthannate a hong kipia kik hi. Ka miliante le ka thudot mite in hong muak uh a, nidang sangin a lianzaw minthanna le ka kumpi za a hong kipia kik hi." 
Daniel4:37 Tu-in keimah Nebukhadnezzar in Vantung Kumpipa phatin, zahtakin a min ka thangsak hi. Ama bawlna khempeuh a man hi. Amah a tawntungin thuman a, a kiphasakin a gamtate a neusak hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:1 Kumpi a suah ciangin Belshazzar in pawi lianpi khat bawl a, a mi liante tulkhat samin amaute tawh zu a ne uh hi." 
Daniel5:2 Zu a nek laitakun, Belshazzar in a pa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinnpi panin a puakkhiat ngun hai, kham hai, le kuangte a va la dingin thu a pia hi. Kumpipa in a miliante le a zite le a zineute in tua haite tawh zu a nektheih nadingun hai la dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel5:3 Thakhatin kham haite, kuangte hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-un tua haite tawh zu a ne uh hi." 
Daniel5:4 Amaute in zu ne uh a, kham tawh, ngun tawh, sumngo tawh, sik tawh, sing tawh, suang tawh a kibawl pasian-te a phat uh hi." 
Daniel5:5 Thakhat thu-in kumpi innsung meivak a taan penna lam kawm tungah mihing khut khat hong kilangin lai a hong gelh hi. Tua khut in lai a gelh laitak kumpipa in a mu hi. 
Daniel5:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa lau lua mahmah a, a mai daang gawpin a khut a ling kauhkauh hi." 
Daniel5:7 Amah in mitphial siamte, aisan siamte, aksi et siamte va sam pak un, ci-in a kiko hi. Tua mite a hong tun uh ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih lai kigelh a sim thei, a khiatna a hong gen thei peuhmah kumpi puanpi silhsakin, minphatna khamkhi a ngawngah ka oksak ding a, kumpi gam sungah a za lian a thumna-in ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:8 Kumpipa’ thudot mite hong tung uh a, ahih hangin tua lai a sim thei le kumpipa tungah a khiatna a gen thei kuamah a om kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:9 Tua tak ciangin kumpi Belshazzar lungkham mahmahin a mel daang semsem a, a miliante in a cih nading mel a thei kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:10 Kumpipa le a miliante gamlum ngeingai-in a om laitakun, pawi inn sungah kumpinu hong lut a, “Kumpipa aw, sauveipi nungta in. Bang hangin lungkham lua-in na mai daangsak zenzen na hi hiam?" 
Daniel5:11 Na gam sungah Pasian’ kha a nei mi khat a om hi. Na pa kumpi ahih laitakin, tua mipa in pasian-te’ pilna tawh a kibang pilna, theihna le lungsim navakna a nei hi. Tua hi a, kumpi ahi na pa Nebukhadnezzar in tua pa pen aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai siamte, le aksi et siamte’ ukpi dingin a koih hi." 
Daniel5:12 Amah in a kanzaw siamna nei a, mangkhiat siamna, thudotna haksa nonote dawntheihna, le thuthukpite gentel theihna a nei hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Beteshazzar ci-in a min a phuah Daniel samsak in. Tua hileh amah in a hong gen thei pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:13 Tua ciangin thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel a paipih uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Nang Daniel pen kumpi ahi ka pa in Judah gam panin a hong lakkhiat Jew mi salte khat hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Daniel5:14 Nangma sungah Pasian’ kha om ahih manin siamna nei-in, lungpilna le theihna na neihlam ka thei hi." 
Daniel5:15 Ka thudot mite le mitphial siamte, hih lai kigelh a sim ding le a khiatna a gen dingin a hong pai uh hinapi, a khiatna a theizo kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:16 Ahih hangin nangmah in thuthukpi le kuama theih zawh loh thute gen thei hi, ci-in kong zazo hi. Hih lai kigelh sim thei-in a khiatna nong gen theih leh kumpi puansan kong silhsak ding a, minphatna khamkhi na ngawngah hong oksakin, kumpi gam sungah a za lian thumna-in ka hong koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:17 Daniel in kumpipa kiangah, “Letsong pen kei hong pia kei inla, midang khatpeuh piazaw in. Ahi zongin tua lai kigelh hong simsakin a khiatna kumpipa kong hilh ding hi." 
Daniel5:18 A Lianpen Pasian in na pa Nebukhadnezzar kumpi lianin koih a, zahtakna le vangliatna a pia hi." 
Daniel5:19 Amah lianlua mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuh, nam khempeuh, pau khempeuhte in kihta-in a ling uh hi. Mi khatpeuh a thahnop leh that a, a nuntaksaknop leh a nungtasak hi. A ut leh mi khatpeuh pahtawi-in, a ut leh a daisak thei hi." 
Daniel5:20 Ahih hangin amah a lung khauhin kiphasak a, gilo lua ahih manin a kumpi tokhom panin kilakhia a, a minthanna a taan hi." 
Daniel5:21 Mihingte lak panin amah kihawlkhia a, ganhing lungsim a nei hi. Gam sakolte tawh tengkhawmin, bawngtal bangin lopa ne a, daitui dal ding nei loin a pualamah a lum hi. A tawpkhakna-ah a Lianpen Pasian in mihingte’ kumpi gamte uk a, a teel peuhpeuh kumpi suak hi, ci-in a phawk thei hi." 
Daniel5:22 “Ahih hangin a tapa ahi nangmah Belshazzar in hih thu khempeuh na theih hangin na kiniamkhiat tuan kei hi. 
Daniel5:23 Vantung Topa’ langah na pang hi. A biakinnpi hai le kuangte la-in sabuai tungah nangmah tawh, na miliante tawh a zineute le na zite uh tawh zunekna-in na zang uh hi. Theihna a nei lo, a mu thei lo, khua a za thei lo ngun, kham, sumngo, sik, sing, le suang tawh a kibawl pasian-te’ min na phat uh hi. Na nuntakna le na hihna khempeuh a hong uk Pasian na zahtak kei hi." 
Daniel5:24 “Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in hih laimalte tua khut a hong gelh sak hi. 
Daniel5:25 Tua a kigelh laimal pen hih bang ahi hi: Mene, Mene, Tekel, Parsin." 
Daniel5:26 A khiatna zong hih bang ahi hi: Mene pen kisim a cihna hi a, Pasian in na gam ukna hong simsak a, a beisak ta hi, cihna ahi hi." 
Daniel5:27 Tekel pen kitawikhai a cihna hi a, nang hong kitawikhai-in na lek zo kei hi, a cihna ahi hi." 
Daniel5:28 Parsin pen kikhen cihna hi a, na gam kikhen khamin Media le Persia-te a kipiazo hi, a cihna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:29 Tua ciangin Belshazzar in Daniel pen kumpi puansan a silhsak dingin thu pia pah a, minphatna khamkhi a ngawngah a oksak hi. A gam sungah a za lian thum nadingin a koih hi." 
Daniel5:30 Tua zan mahmahin Babylon kumpipa Belshazzar kithat a," 
Daniel5:31 Media mi Darias kumpi a suak hi. (Tua laitakin Darias kum sawmguk le kum nih a pha hi.) 
Daniel6:1 Darias in gam sung khempeuh a uksawn dingin gam ukpi za le sawmnih dingin a ngaihsun hi. 
Daniel6:2 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua gam ukpite tungah a vaihawmpi ding le kumpi deih bang a sem dingin Daniel le adang mi nih a teel hi. 
Daniel6:3 Gam ukpi dangte le vaihawmpi dangte sangin Daniel nasep siamzaw diak se hi. Tua bangin siamzaw diak se ahih manin kumpipa in gam buppi ukin koih ding a ngaihsun hi. 
Daniel6:4 Tua ahih ciangin vaihawmpi dangte le gam ukpite in Daniel’ nasepna encikin a mawhna zon ding a hanciam uh hi. Ahih hangin Daniel pen a thuman le a citak khat ahih manin a mawhna le a simtatna a muzo kei uh hi. 
Daniel6:5 Tua banga nasep kizen lohna le a tatkhialhna a muh loh uh ciangin, “Hih Daniel pen a biakna tawh kisai-in thu i muh kei ngal leh mawhsakna ding dang i mu kei ding hi,” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
Daniel6:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah amaute pai uh a, “Darias kumpipa aw, sauveipi nungta in!" 
Daniel6:7 Ngattakin zuih ding thukham khat kumpipa in na bawl ding, gam sung nasem ko vaihawmpite, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, le kumpipa’ thudot mite khempeuh ka thukim uh hi. Tuzawh ni sawmthum sungin nang kumpipa kiang longal, pasian kiang ahi a, midang khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin thungen om thei lo ding hi, ci-in na kham ding hi. Hih na thupiakna a mang lo peuhmah humpinelkai kikhumna sungah kikhia ding hi." 
Daniel6:8 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw, thupiakna lai hawmkhia-in a tungah na min gelh in. Tua hileh Media-te le Persia-te upadi pen kikheel thei lo ding a, ngattakin a kizuih kul ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:9 Tua mah bangin kumpi Darias in a min gelhin thupiakna lai a hawmkhia hi. 
Daniel6:10 Tua bang thupiakna lai kihawmkhia khinzo ta hi, ci-in Daniel in a theih ciangin a inn-ah a ciah hi. A inn dawl tungnungah Jerusalem lam a nga tawlet thum a om hi. Tua laitakah tawlet honsa-in a hih ngei bangin khukdinin ni khatin thumvei ta Pasian kiangah thu a ngen hi." 
Daniel6:11 Tua ciangin amah a encik mite in Daniel in Pasian kiangah thu a nget a mu uh hi. 
Daniel6:12 Amaute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah Daniel a heek dingin a pai uh hi. Amaute in, “Kumpipa aw, tuzawh ni sawmthum sungin kumpipa kiang longal, pasian kiang ahi a, mi khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin thungen a om leh humpinelkai kikhumna sungah kikhia ding hi, ci-in thupiakna lai hawmkhia-in na min gelh hi lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Hi mah hi; Media-te le Persia-te’ upadi bangin a kikheel thei lo ding a ngat thupiakna ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:13 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Judah gam panin a hong pai Jew mi salte khat ahi Daniel in kumpipa hong zahtak lo a, na thupiakna a mang nuam kei hi. Nisimin thumveita thu a ngen tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:14 Kumpipa in hih thu a zak ciangin lungmang a, Daniel a suahtak theih nading lampi hanciamin nitum dong a ngaihsun hi." 
Daniel6:15 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua mite hong paikik uh a, “Kumpipa aw, Media le Persia-te’ upadi bangin kumpipa in a hawmkhiatsa thupiakna kikhelkik thei lo hi, cih na thei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa in humpinelkai kikhumna sungah Daniel a khiat dingun thu a pia hi. Amah in Daniel kiangah, “Thuman takin na biak tawntung na Pasian in hong honkhia ta hen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin humpinelkai kikhumna sungah Daniel a khia uh hi." 
Daniel6:17 Amaute in suangtum khat la uh a, humpinelkai kikhumna gong a hu uh hi. Kuamah in Daniel a hotkhiat theih loh nadingin kumpipa in ama ciaptehna le a miliante’ ciaptehna tawh a ciamteh hi." 
Daniel6:18 Kumpipa a inn-ah ciahkik a, tua zan tawntung an ngawlin gualnopna zong a bawl kei hi. Tua zanin a ihmu thei peuhmah kei hi." 
Daniel6:19 Zingsang khuavaktung phetin kumpipa tho-in humpinelkai kikhumna-ah a va paipah hi. 
Daniel6:20 Humpinelkai kikhumna a tun dektak laitakin aw ling kawmin, “Daniel, a nungta Pasian’ nasempa! Thuman takin na biak tawntung na Pasian in humpinelkai kamsung panin a hong honkhia thei hiam,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Daniel6:21 Daniel in, “Kumpipa aw, sauveipi nungta in." 
Daniel6:22 Pasian in a vantungmi hong sawl a, ka liam loh nadingin humpinelkaite’ kam a humcipsak hi. Kumpipa aw, mawhna ka bawl lohlam leh, nang tungah zong khialhna ka bawl lohna amah in hong thei ahih manin tua bangin a hong bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:23 Kumpipa lungdam mahmah a, humpinelkai kikhumna sung pan Daniel kaihkhiat dingin thu a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Daniel kaikhiato uh a, liamna themcik zong a neih lohlam a mu uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Pasian muang hi." 
Daniel6:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Daniel a hekteng khempeuh a zi a ta ciat uh tawh humpinelkai kikhumna sungah khiat dingin thu a pia hi. Amaute humpinelkai kikhumna taw a tun ma-un humpinelkaite in bakkhat suahin a guh a tangin a balzan gawp uh hi. 
Daniel6:25 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in leitung a om minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, le paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh tungah hih bangin lai a khak hi: “Note tungah nopsakna thupha om tahen." 
Daniel6:26 Ka gam sunga om mi khempeuh in Daniel’ Pasian kihta-in a zahtak nadingun thu ka pia hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a nungta Pasian hi a, a tawntungin a uk ding hi. Ama gam kisia ngei lo ding a, a vangliatna a bei ngei kei ding hi." 
Daniel6:27 Amah pen a honkhia pa le a suaktasak pa hi a, vantung le leitungah lim le na lamdangte a bawl hi. Humpinelkaite’ thahatna panin Daniel a suaktasak hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:28 Tua ahih manin Darias kumpi ahih laitak leh Persia mi Sairas kumpi ahih laitakin Daniel nuamsa-in a om hi. 
Daniel7:1 Belshazzar, Babylon kumpi a suahzawh a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in mang khat ka man a, zanin maang ka mu hi. Ka mangmat lai-in ka gelh a, tua zan a ka maangmuhnate ka ciaptehna hih bang ahi hi:" 
Daniel7:2 Mun khempeuh panin huihpi hong nungin tuipi tung a seemgawp hi. 
Daniel7:3 Tua ciangin tuipi sung panin a kibang lo sa golpi li hong pusuakto uh hi. 
Daniel7:4 A masa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, ahi zongin muvanlai kha tawh a kibang kha a nei hi. Ka et laitakin a kha tegel a hong kibotkhia hi. Leitung panin tua ganhing kidomkaang to-in, mihing bangin a khe nihin kidingsak a, mihing lungsim ama tungah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:5 Tua ciangin a nihna sapi vompi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi. A nunglam khe tawh dingin a ha tawh nakguh thum pet a, “Na duh zahzah sa tampi ne in,” cihna aw khat a hong ging hi." 
Daniel7:6 Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzangah vasa kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a, ukna aana ama tungah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:7 Ka et lai leh sapi lina ka mu hi. Tua sapi kihtakhuai mahmah a, lipkhaphuai-in a thupi mahmah hi. Amah in a gol mahmah sik-ha a nei hi. Amah in nene-in a nek valteng a khe tawh a tuancilgawp hi. Sapi dangte tawh kibang loin amah in ki sawm a nei hi." 
Daniel7:8 Tua kite ka et laitakin tuate’ lakah adang ki neu khat hong po a, a omsa sung pan ki thumte a botkhia hi. Tua ki’ tungah mihing mittang tawh a kibang mittang le kam om a, kiphatsakna kam tampi a pau hi." 
Daniel7:9 Ka et laitakin kumpi tokhomte a hong kikoih hi. A nungta tawntung mipa tua tokhomte khat tungah a tu hi. A puante vuk bangin ngo a, a samte tuumul hoih tawh a kibang hi. A tokhom pen meikuang leengpei tungah kinga-in mei kuang zuazua a," 
Daniel7:10 tua sung panin meikuang a hong leengkhia niloh hi. Ama nasem ding mihing tul za tampi om a, a mai-ah mihing tul za sawm tampi a ding uh hi. Thukhenna ding hun kipan a, laibute a kiphen hi." 
Daniel7:11 Ka et laitakin tua ki neu in kiphatsakna kamsia a pau ka za hi. Ka et lailai leh tua sapi lian a lina kithat a, a pumpi meikuang sungah kikhulin a kisusia hi." 
Daniel7:12 Sapi dangte ahihleh a vangliatna uh kilak khiatsak a, ahih hangin a nuntak laina ding uh hun ciangtan khat a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:13 Zan ka maangmuh hun sungin ka khuadak leh mihing tawh a kibang mi khat meii tungah a hong pai ka mu hi. A nungta tawntung mipa kiangah pai-in, ama kiangah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:14 Amah in vangliatna, minthanna, le kumpi za ngah ahih manin minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh in ama na a sem ding uh ahi hi. Amah in a tawntungin uk ding a, a kumpi gam a bei ngei kei ding hi." 
Daniel7:15 Ka maangmuhnate in hong linglawng sakin a hong patausak mahmah hi. 
Daniel7:16 Ka pama ding mite khat kiangah pai-in hihte khempeuh a khiatna hong hilh in, ci-in ka thum hi. Tua ciangin amah in a khiatna a hong hilh hi." 
Daniel7:17 “Hih sapi lite pen leitung panin a hong khangkhia ding kumpi gam li ahi hi. 
Daniel7:18 Ahih hangin a Lianpen Pasian’ mite in kumpi za ngah ding uh a, a tawntungin a nei paisuak ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel7:19 Tua ciangin a dangte tawh a kibang lo a kihtakhuai sik-ha le sumngo khecin a nei sapi lina thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in nene-in na khempeuh tuancilgawp hi. 
Daniel7:20 Tua ciangin a lu tungah ki sawm le, a nung ciangin ki khat hong po a, a omsa kite sung pan ki thum a kitanna thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in mittang le kiphatsakna kamsia pauna ding kam a nei hi. A dangte sangin nakpitakin kihtakhuai zaw hi." 
Daniel7:21 Ka et laitakin, tua ki in Pasian’ mite galin do a, amaute a zogawp hi." 
Daniel7:22 Tua ciangin a nungta tawntung mipa hong pai a, a Lianpen Pasian’ mite a’ ding a hoih thukhenna a hong gen hi. Pasian’ mite in kumpi za a ngahna ding uh hun a hong tung hi." 
Daniel7:23 Hih bangin hilhtelna kei a hong kipia hi: “Sapi lina pen leitung a hong om ding kumpi gam lina ding hi a, kumpi gamdangte tawh kilamdang mahmah ding hi. Amah in leitung buppi valhtum ding a, tuancil gawpin a sukham ding hi." 
Daniel7:24 “Ki sawmte pen tua kumpi gam sung panin a hong piang ding kumpi sawmte ahi uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat hong piang leuleu ding a, amah in a omsate tawh a kilamdang mahmahin kumpi thum a nuaisiah ding hi." 
Daniel7:25 “Amah in a Lianpen Pasian langpangin thu gen ding a, Pasian’ mite a bawlsia ding hi. Amah in amaute’ biakna tawh kipawl thukhamte le pawi bawlna hunte kheelsak ding hanciam ding a, ama khut sungah kum thum le alang sung Pasian’ mite a om ding uh hi." 
Daniel7:26 “Tua ciangin thukhenna hun hong kipan ding a, ama vangliatna lakkhiat sakin, amah a kisusia maimang ding hi." 
Daniel7:27 “Hih leitung kumpi gam, vangliatna, le liatna khempeuh a Lianpen Pasian’ mite tungah a kipia ding hi. Amau’ kumpi za cikmah hunin bei ngei lo ding a, leitung ukna za a nei khempeuhte in a thu uh mangin amaute’ na a sem ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel7:28 Hih tangthu a beina hita hi. Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciangin keimah Daniel ka lau mahmah a, ka mel a daanggawp hi. Ahih hangin hih thu keima lungsim sung bekah ka koih hi." 
Daniel8:1 Belshazzar kumpi a suahzawh a kum thumna kumin keimah Daniel in a nihveina maang ka mu hi. 
Daniel8:2 Ka maangmuhna ah thakhatin Elam gam sunga om Susa khuapi kulh sungah a omin ka kingaihsun a, Ulai gun gei-ah ka ding hi." 
Daniel8:3 Ka khuadaktoh leh gun gei-ah tuutal khat a dingin a om ka mu hi. Amah in a sau mahmah ki nih nei a, a ki po nunung pen a po masa sangin a sauzaw hi." 
Daniel8:4 Tua tuutal in a ki tawh nitumna lam, saklam, le khanglam a si kawikawi ka mu hi. Ama ut bangin kiphasakin gamta ahih manin amah a khozo ding le a thahatna pan a suaktazo ding ganhing khat beek a om kei hi." 
Daniel8:5 A bangci hi ding hiam, ci-in ngaihsun thei loin ka om laitakin nitumna lam panin keeltal khat a hong tai veva hi. Hat lua mahmah ahih manin a khe in lei a sukha kei hi. A mit tegel kikalah a tuampian ki lamdang khat a nei hi." 
Daniel8:6 Ki nih a nei gun gei-a a ding ka muh tuutal kiang a hong phak ciangin a thaneih zahin a si hi. 
Daniel8:7 Hehlua mahmah ahih manin tua tuutal laigawp a, a ki tegel a suktansak hi. Tuutal in nang zo lo ahih manin lei kidenna a, a huhzo ding kuamah a om kei hi." 
Daniel8:8 Tua keeltal a thahatna hong khangto semsem a, ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a ki a kitan hi. Tua a ki pona munah a lamdang ki li hong poto kik a, mun tuamtuam a kawk hi." 
Daniel8:9 Tua ki lite lak pan khat’ tungah ki neu dang khat hong po a, khanglam, nisuahna lam, le Thuciamna Gam lamah a vangliatna a lak hi." 
Daniel8:10 Vantung galkapte nangawn a dozo zah dong dingin a thahatna hong khangto a, aksi pawlkhatte leitungah lawnkhia-in, a tuancilgawp hi." 
Daniel8:11 Amah in vantung galkap kumpipa nangawn do-in, ama tunga kipia tawntung biakpiaknate nangawn khawlsakin, biakinnpi biaknate a beisak hi." 
Daniel8:12 Nisim biakpiaknate ah mawhna dim a, biakna man pen leilakah a kipaikhia hi. A sepna peuhpeuhah tua ki thahat mahmah hi." 
Daniel8:13 Vantung mi khat in adang vantungmi khat kiangah thu a dot ka za a, “Hih maangmuhna bang tanvei sawt ding a, a muhdahhuai mawhna in nisim biakpiakna bang tanvei khaktan ding ahi hiam? Vantung galkapte le biakinnpi bang tanvei kituancil ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Daniel8:14 Amah in, “Zingsang le nitak biakpiakna tulnih le zathum vei a cin khit ciangin biakinnpi kipuahkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel8:15 Keimah Daniel in maangmuhna a khatna thei nuamin ka hanciam hi. Thakhat thu-in mihing mel tawh a kibang khat ka mai-ah a hong ding hi. 
Daniel8:16 Ulai gungal panin mihing’ aw khat hong ging a, “Gabriel aw, a muh nate ama kiangah a khiatna hilh in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Daniel8:17 Gabriel hong pai-in ka kiangah hong ding a, laulua mahmah ka hih manin leitungah ka puk hi. Amah in, “Leitung mi aw, a khiatna thei in. Maangmuhna pen hun beina ding lahna ahi hi,” ci-in ka kiangah a hong gen hi." 
Daniel8:18 Amah in thu a hong gen laitakin sibupin leilakah ka tuk hi. Ahih hangin amah in hong domto-in a hong dingsak hi. 
Daniel8:19 Amah in, “Pasian’ hehna hangin thupiang dingte ka hong lak ding hi. Na maangmuh pen hun beina ding lahna ahi hi." 
Daniel8:20 Na muh ki nih a nei tuutal pen Media le Persia gam kumpite a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Daniel8:21 Keeltal pen Grik kumpi gam hi a, a mit kikal-a a po ki pen kumpi masa pen a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Daniel8:22 Ki po masa pen a kitan khit ciangin a nunga hong po ki lite pen tua gam panin kumpi gam li hong piang ding a cihnopna ahi hi. Ahih hangin tua gamte ahihleh a masa pen kumpi gam zahin a thahat kei ding uh hi. 
Daniel8:23 “Tua kumpi gamte a bei ding hun a nai ciangin gilo lua mahmah ding uh ahih manin gim a kipia ding hi. Tua ciangin ama thu bek thu a sa, mawhna pawlpawl tawh a kidim, zuauphuah hat kumpi khat a hong om ding hi." 
Daniel8:24 Amah thahat mahmah ding a, ahih hangin ama thahatna ahi kei ding hi. Amah in a dipkuathuai siatna piangsak ding a, a hihna khempeuhah a thahat mahmah ding hi. Amah in mi thahatte le Pasian’ mite a susia ding hi." 
Daniel8:25 A lungsim daplan lua ahih manin zuauphuah siamna tawh a hih khempeuh a tangtun ding hi. Amah kiliansak lua-in theihkholh lohin mi tampi susia-in, a lianpen kumpite’ kumpipa nangawn a langpan’ ding hi. Ahih hangin mihing thahatna kizang loin amah a kisusia ding hi." 
Daniel8:26 Hih zingsang le nitak biakpiakna maangmuhna thu a hong kihilh telna pen a man ahi hi. Tu-in hih maangmuhna thu a hong tun ding hun sawtpi hi lai ding ahih manin imcip phot in,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel8:27 Keimah Daniel, ni tawmvei sung thazaw gawpin ka ci a na hi. Tua ciangin tho-in ka nasep ngei a semkik dingin kumpi inn-ah ka pai hi. Ka maangmuhna thu thei zo lo ka hih manin cih nading mel thei loin daptakin ka om hi." 
Daniel9:1 Media mi ahi Ahasueras’ tapa Darias in Babylon gamteng a uk hi. 
Daniel9:2 Amah kumpi a suah a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in, Topa in kamsang Jeremiah tungah Jerusalem kum sawmsagih sung kisia ding hi, ci-in a genna thu ngaihsunin biakna laibute ka sim hi." 
Daniel9:2 Amah kumpi a suah a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in, Topa in kamsang Jeremiah tungah Jerusalem kum sawmsagih sung kisia ding hi, ci-in a genna thu ngaihsunin biakna laibute ka sim hi." 
Daniel9:3 An ngawlin, puanhampi silhin, vut lakah tu-in, Topa’ kiangah deih takin thu ka ngen hi." 
Daniel9:4 Topa ka Pasian’ kiangah thu ngenin ka mite’ mawhna ka pulak hi. Keimah in, “Topa Pasian aw, nang na lian a, ka hong zahtak uh hi. Nang na thuman a, na thuciamna le na thupiakna a mangte le a hong itte a tawntungin na it hi." 
Daniel9:5 “Kote ka hih uhleh ka gilo uh a, mawh khinin ka khial khin uh hi. Na hong sawlna bang ka mang kei uh a, na thupiakna le na thukhamte ka taisan khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:6 Ka kumpite uh, ko hong ukte, ka pu ka pate uh, le minam khempeuh tungah na min tawh thu a hong gen na nasem kamsangte’ thu ka ngai kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:7 Topa, nang na hih leh na siangtho a, ahih hangin kote ka hih uhleh a zumhuai-in ka gamta uh hi. Judah gam le Jerusalem khuasunga teng Israel mite khempeuh thuman lo uh ahih manin, a nai a gamla gam tuamtuamah na thehthangzo hi." 
Daniel9:8 Ka kumpite uh, ko hong ukte, le ka pu ka pate uh a zumhuai-in gamta uh a, a hong uk Topa nangma tungah hong khial khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:9 Nang pen hehpihna tawh kidimin mawhna na maisak a, ahih hangin kote in nang ka hong langpan’ uh hi." 
Daniel9:10 Topa Pasian aw, na nasem kamsangte tungtawnin kote’ zuih ding thukhamte nong piak hangin, tua thu ka mang tuan kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:11 Israel-te khempeuh in na gensa thute le na thukhamte khempeuh a palsat khinzo uh hi. Na tungah khialhna ka hong bawl manun, na nasem Moses’ thukham sunga kigelh bangin kote’ tungah samsiatna a hong tung hi." 
Daniel9:12 Na gensa bangin kote tung le ko hong ukte tungah na hong bawlzo hi. Leitung a om khuapi dang khatpeuh sangin Jerusalem khuapi a nasia zaw-in gim na pia hi. 
Daniel9:13 Moses’ thukham sunga kigen gimna khempeuh ka thuak uh hi. Topa Pasian aw, tu nangawnin zong nang kong lungdamsakna ding uh hanciam loin, na thuman ka zuih theih nadingun mawhna ka kisik kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:14 Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in kote gim a pia dingin nong kithawi a, na hong pia takpi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na hihna khempeuh a thuman hi a, kote in na thu ka hong mang kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:15 “Kote’ Topa Pasian aw, na mihingte Egypt gam panin na hong lakhia a, na vangliatna tu dongin kiphawk lai hi. Ka mawh khin uh a, ka khial khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:16 Nang na siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem tungah hong heh nawn peuhmah kei in. Tua pen na khuapi hi a, na mual siangtho ahi hi. Kote le ka pate uh khialhna le gitlohna hangin, ka kiim ka pam uha mite khempeuh in Jerusalem le na mite a hong simmawh uh hi." 
Daniel9:17 Pasian aw, kong thungetna le kong thumna hong za in. A kisiasa na biakinnpi hong puahkik in. Mi khempeuh in nangmah Pasian na hihlam a theihtheih nadingun hong puahkik in." 
Daniel9:18 Pasian aw, kong thungetnate uh hong ngai inla hong za in. Hong en inla, kote’ siatna le na min a pua khuapi a siatna hong mu in. Kote’ gamtatna pha a suang hi loin nangma migitna suangin thu ka hong ngen uh hi." 
Daniel9:19 Topa aw, kong thungetna uh hong za inla, ka mawhna uh hong maisak in. Topa aw, hong ngai inla hong sem in! Mi khempeuh in Pasian na hihlam a hong theih nadingun hong zekai kei in. Hih khuapi le hih mite na neihsa ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel9:20 Keima mawhna le ka mipih Israel-te’ mawhna pulakin, ka Topa Pasian kiangah a biakinn siangtho a hong puahkik nadingin thumin ka ngenngen hi." 
Daniel9:21 Thu ka nget laitakin ka maangmuh masak sunga ka muh mipa Gabriel, ka omna munah a hong leengsuk hi. Tua hun pen nitak lam biakpiak hun laitak ahi hi." 
Daniel9:22 Amah in, “Daniel aw, hilhkholhna thu a theisak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi." 
Daniel9:23 Pasian tungah thum dingin na kisak laitakin amah in a hong zazo hi. Pasian in nang hong it ahih manin, tua thu a gen dingin ka hong pai hi. Tu-in, tua maangmuhna thu ka hong hilhtel laitakin ciamteh in." 
Daniel9:24 “Na mite le khuapi siangtho, a mawhna le a gamtat khialhnate a beina ding hun kum sawmsagih mun sagih sung a kisehzo hi. Tua ciangin mawhna kimaisak ding a, a tawntung thutang thu a hong tung ding hi. Genkholhna le maangmuhna thu a mantakin hong tangtung ding a, a Siangtho Pen Mun biakinnpi kisiansuah ding hi." 
Daniel9:25 Hih thu ciamteh inla thei in: Jerusalem lamkikna ding thu a kipiak hun a kipan sathau kinilh pa hong pai dong kum sagih mun sagih sung hi ding hi. Jerusalem kongzing lampi nei le kulhpi nei-in kilamkik ding a, kum sawmguk le nih mun sagih sung kip ding a, ahih hangin buai hun sung ahi ding hi." 
Daniel9:26 Tua hun a bei khit ciangin sathau kinilh pa thuman lopi-in a kithat ding hi. Galsim dingin a hong pai galkapmang lianpa in khuapi le biakinnpi a susia ding hi. A beina pen tuiciin tun bang hi ding a, a tawp dongin galdona le kisiatna vive ahi dingin Pasian in thu a khenzo hi." 
Daniel9:27 Tua makai pa in mi tampite tawh kum sagih sung thuciamna kip bawl ding uh hi. Gangawh biakna le biakpiakna, hih hunlang sung a khawlsak ding hi. Biakinn dawn sangpen munah a Lipkhaphuai na kikoih ding hi; ahi zongin Pasian in tua a koihpa’ thuak dingin a geelsa thu a koihpa in a thuak hun ciang dong, a Lipkhaphuai na pen a koihna mun mahah omlai phot ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel10:1 Sairas, Persia gam kumpi a suahzawh kum thum a phak laitakin Beteshazzar zong a kici Daniel tungah thu khat a kipia hi. Tua thu pen theihtelhak mahmah ahih manin maangmuhna tawh teltakin a kilak hi." 
Daniel10:2 Tua hun laitakin keimah Daniel, nipikal thum sung khakunin dahin ka om hi." 
Daniel10:3 Zu le sa ahi a, anlim ahi zongin bangmah ka ne kei a, nipikal thum a bei mateng ka sam zong ka hiat kei hi." 
Daniel10:4 Tua kum a kha masa, ni sawmnih le li ni-in Tigris gunpi gei-ah ka ding hi." 
Daniel10:5 Ka nunglam ka ettoh leh puanpak silhin kham kawnggak tawh a kawng a gak mi khat ka mu hi. 
Daniel10:6 A pumpi, suangmanpha tawh kibangin a taang hi. A maitang, khuaphialep bangin taang a, a mittangte mei bangin a kuang zalzal hi. A ban le a khete sumngo zutsiang bangin tee daldal hi. A aw, mihonpi kiko tawh kibangin a ging zuazua hi." 
Daniel10:7 Tua maangmuhna keimah bek in ka mu hi. Ka gei-a om midangte in bangmah a mu kei uh hi. Amaute lau uh ahih manin taimangin a bu uh hi. 
Daniel10:8 Kei guak bek hong kinusia ahih manin tua a lamdang maangmuhna keimah guak bek mah in ka mu hi. Ka thaneihteng beikhin a, ka mel kikhelgawp ahih manin kei ka hihlam mel kuamah in a hong thei nawn kei uh hi." 
Daniel10:9 Tua mipa’ kampau ka zak ciangin ka khuplamin leilakah tuksukin khua ka phawk nawn kei hi. 
Daniel10:10 Tua laitakin ka khut khatin hong phongto a, ka khut le ka khukin ka thoto a, ling kankan kawmin ka om hi." 
Daniel10:11 Amah in, “Daniel aw, Pasian in nang hong it hi. Ding inla kong thugente limtakin ciamteh in. Na kiangah thu a gen dingin kei hong kisawlzo hi,” a hong ci hi. Amah in hih thuteng a hong gen khit ciangin ling kankan kawmin ka ding hi." 
Daniel10:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “Daniel aw, lau kei in. Kiniamkhiat dingin na lungsim na khensat masak pen ni a kipan, tua thu na theihtheih nadingin Pasian in na thungetna a hong zazo hi. Na thungetna bang a hong pia dingin ka hong pai hi." 
Daniel10:13 Persia gam a cing vantungmi in ni sawmnih le khat sung kei a hong nial hi. Tua ciangin kei a hong huh dingin vantungmi thupite khat ahi Mikhael a hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Persia gam sungah keimah guak bek ka om hi. 
Daniel10:14 Mailam hunah na mipihte’ tunga hong tung ding thu a hilhkhol dingin a hong pai ka hi hi. Hih pen mailam a hong piang lai ding maangmuhna ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel10:15 Amah in hih thu a hong gen ciangin kei bangmah pau thei loin lei ka ensuk gega mawk hi. 
Daniel10:16 Tua ciangin pasal mel tawh a kibang mi khat thakhatin ka mai-ah hong om a, ka muk a hong lawnsak hi. Tua ciangin thugen dingin ka kisa hi. Ka mai-a a ding pa kiangah, “Topa aw, ka maangmuhna in ka tha hong zawsak lua ahih manin ka ci-lin a pha thei kei hi." 
Daniel10:17 A topa’ mai-ah a ding sila khat tawh ka kibang hi. Bangci bangin thu hong gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Husan’ zawhna ding thatang nangawn ka nei kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel10:18 Ahih hangin khatvei hong lenkik leuleu a, ka tha a hong khauhkik zawdeuh hi." 
Daniel10:19 Amah in, “Lunghimawh kei inla, lau kei in. Kihangsak in. Pasian in nang hong it hi,” a hong ci hi. Tuateng a hong gen khit ciangin ka tha hong khauhzaw a, “Topa aw, na gen ding peuhpeuh hong gen in; tu-in ka ci a hong damzaw diak hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel10:20 Amah in, “Bang hangin na kiangah hong pai ka hi hiam, cih na thei hiam? Thuman Laibu sungah a kigelh thute a lak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi. Tu-in ciahkikin, Persia gam a cing vantungmi tawh ka kido ding hi. Tua khit ciangin Grik gam a cing vantungmi a hong kilang ding hi. Mikhael longal kei a hong huh ding kuamah a om kei hi." 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 Israel a cing vantungmi pen kei hong huhpa le a hong dal pa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel11:2 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-a na tunga kong gen ding thu, a thuman ahi hi. Kumpi thum in Persia gam uk lai ding a, tua banah a lina hong khang ding hi. Tua pa, a dangteng sangin a hauzaw ding hi. Amah in a hauh penpen laitak le a thahat pen laitakin Grik kumpi a to ding hi." 
Daniel11:3 Tua ciangin a minthang kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zaipi tak uk ding a, ama thuthu-in a gamta ding hi." 
Daniel11:4 Ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a gam hong kitam ding a, khen li a kisuah ding hi. A suan a khakte in ama gam a ukkha kei ding uh hi. Midangte in uk ding uh a, ahi zongin amah zahin vang a neizo kei ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:5 “Egypt kumpipa a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkapmang lianpente khat thahat pen ding a, gam lianzaw a uk ding hi." 
Daniel11:6 Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa in a kipawlkhawm theih nadingin Syria kumpipa le ama tanu a kitengsak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawlkhawmna kip lo ding a, tua numei le a tonpih a silate le a ta le a pasal a kithatlum ding hi." 
Daniel11:7 “A sawt loin tua numei’ behte khat in Syria kumpi sim ding a, a kulhpi sungah tumin amaute a zogawp ding hi." 
Daniel11:8 Amah in amaute’ milim pasian-te le a na manpha ngun le khamte Egypt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawmvei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi. 
Daniel11:9 Syria kumpipa in Egypt gam sim ding a, ahih hangin zo zo loin a nungkik ding hi." 
Daniel11:10 “Syria kumpipa’ tate, galsim dingin kithawi-in galkap ding mi tampi a kaikhawm ding uh hi. Tua galkapmangte khat thahat diakin tuikhang bang ding a, galte’ kulhpi a luhzo ding hi." 
Daniel11:11 Egypt kumpipa zong heh mahmahin Syria kumpipa simgawp ding a, a galkapte tampi tak a matsak ding hi." 
Daniel11:12 A galhatna hang le galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisathei mahmah ding a, ahih hangin a gualzo tawntung kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:13 Syria kumpipa khatvei kuankikin a masa sangin galkap a tamzaw a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicingta a sak ciangin galkap tampi le galhiam kicing piikpeek tawh a kuankhia ding hi. 
Daniel11:14 “Tua hun ciangin mi tampi tak in Egypt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Daniel’ mipihte ahi, mihoih lo pawlkhat in zong a muhsa uh maangmuhna hangin a lehdo ding uh a, ahih hangin a guallel ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin Syria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a ki-umcih khuapite luhzo-in a la khin ding hi. Egypt galkapte in gal dosuakzo nawn lo ding uh a, galkap thahat pente a thaneem ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:16 Galdo zo ding om nawn lo uh ahih manin a galte uh a ututin a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khut sungah tua gam a om ding hi. 
Daniel11:17 “Syria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno takin a gualzawh theih nadingin a tanu le a galte tensak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a tangtungzo kei veve ding hi. 
Daniel11:18 Tua khit ciangin tuipi tungtawnin minam dangte sim ding a, tampi tak mah a zo ding hi. Ahih hangin gamdang makai khat in amah zogawp ding a, a minthanna teng a beisak ding hi." 
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa a kulhpi a zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah ding a, ahih hangin gal lel khinta ahih manin amah a beita ding ahi hi." 
Daniel11:20 “Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu ding a, a gam sung khantoh nadingin phiangsiah tampi a dong dingin mi khat a sawl ding hi. Tawlno khat khit ciangin tua kumpipa kithatlum ding a, ahih hangin galsung a si ahi kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:21 “Ama zomah Syria kumpi ding pen migilo, kumpi dingin a kilawm lo mi khat ahi ding hi. Ahih hangin amah pen thakhat thu-in zuausiamna tawh kumpi a hong suakvat ding hi." 
Daniel11:22 Ama thu a nial galkap honpite le Pasian’ siampi liante khempeuh a mangthangsak ding hi. 
Daniel11:23 Zuaugen siamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi. 
Daniel11:24 Amah in a pu a pate’ hih ngei loh, gam hau, gam kilemte nangawn a sim ding hi. Tua ciangin galsung a a lak vante le nate a nungzuite tawh a hawm ding uh hi. Amah in galdalna kulhpite khempeuh luh ding hanciam ding a, ahih hangin tawmvei sung bek hun a nei ding hi." 
Daniel11:25 “Egypt gam hangtakin a sim theih nadingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Egypt-te in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa in khemna thuak ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi. 
Daniel11:26 Ama muan pen a thudot mipilte in amah lehbawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi. 
Daniel11:27 Tua kumpi tegel in sabuai khat tungah tu-in an a nekhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a ngaihsutna uh a hoih zawsang om tuan lo ahih manin a kikhem tuak ding uh hi. A hun tung nai lo ahih manin a deih bang uh a ngahzo kei uh hi. 
Daniel11:28 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa, a galvan lakteng tawh a gamah ciahkik ding a, Pasian mite’ biakna suksiatsak ding a lungngai ding hi. A utbang peuhin gamta ding a, tua ciangin a gam lamah a ciahkik ding hi." 
Daniel11:29 “Tua nung ciangin Egypt gam simkik leuleu ding a, ahih hangin a masa-a bangin a piang kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:30 Rom mite, teembaw tawh hong pai-in amah do ding uh ahih manin a lau ding hi. Tua ciangin amah kilehkik ding a, a thangpaihna tawh Pasian’ mite’ biakna suksiat ding a hanciam ding hi. Amah in tua biakna a nusia mite’ zolsimna a mang ding hi." 
Daniel11:31 A galkapte pawlkhat in biakinnpi le biakinnpi huang a ninsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biakpiaknate khawlsak ding uh a, a Lipkhaphuai na a suang ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:32 Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia mite a thuzawh theih nadingin zuaugen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasian’ nung a zui mite ahih uhleh thahatin a gualzo ding uh hi. 
Daniel11:33 Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite tawh a neikhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawlkhat sung mi pawlkhat in galsung a sihna le meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte in lawkgawpna le thongkiatna a thuak ding uh hi. 
Daniel11:34 Tua bangin thahna a thuak laitakun, pawlkhat in huhna a ngah ding uh hi. Mi tampi in huhna a piak uh hangin amau’ meetna ding ngaihsutna bek ahi hi." 
Daniel11:35 Mi pawlkhat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua bangin a pianna thu pen beina a tun mateng sianthosakna le mipha le misia khentelna, Pasian’ sehsa hun a tunna ahi hi." 
Daniel11:36 “Syria kumpipa a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in, pasian-te sangin ka lianzaw a, a Lianpen Pasian sangin zong ka thupizaw lai hi, ci-in a kisathei ding hi. Pasian in amah gim a piak mateng tua bangin a om ding hi." 
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a pu a pate’ biak pasian le numeite in a it pasian a thusim kei ding hi. Pasian a kici peuhmah khat beek a thusim kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate sangin amah a lianzaw-in a kingaihsun hi. 
Daniel11:38 Tua pasian-te sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupisim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham, ngun, suangmanpha, le a thupi letsongte, a pu a pate’ biak ngei loh pasian kiangah a pia ding hi." 
Daniel11:39 Amah in a kulhpi a ciang dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-in a sang mite minphatna, zaliatna pia-in, leitang nangawn letsongin a pia ding hi." 
Daniel11:40 “Syria kumpipa’ hun a bei dektak ciangin, Egypt kumpipa in amah a sim ding hi. Syria kumpipa in a thaneihteng siit loin tuikhang bangin sakol tawh, sakol galkapte tawh, teembaw tampi tawh Egypt a do ding hi." 
Daniel11:41 Amah in Thuciamna Gam zong sim ding a, mi tul tampi tak a that ding hi. Ahih hangin Edom gam, Moab gam, le Ammon gam sungah a omlai sunteng a suakta ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:42 Amah in gam tampi tak sim ding a, Egypt nangawn zong a suakta kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:43 Amah in Egypt gam sunga kiseel ngun le kham le a neihsa uh na manphateng khempeuh a la ding hi. Amah in Libya le Ethiopia gam zong a zo ding hi. 
Daniel11:44 Tua ciangin, nisuahna lam le saklam panin thupiang in amah patausak ding a, thangpaihna tawh galdo-in mi tampi tak a that ding hi." 
Daniel11:45 Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn dinna mualtung le tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel12:1 Tua ciangin saihadial puan a silh vantungmi in, “Na mite a cing, a lian vantungmi Mikhael hong kilang ding hi. Tua ciangin leitungah mihing a pianzawh a kipan a nasia penpen gimna hun hong tung ding hi. Tua hun a hong tun ciangin Pasian’ laibu sungah a min a kigelh na mite khempeuh kihonkhia ding hi." 
Daniel12:2 A sisa mi tampite in nuntakna a ngahkik ding uh hi. Pawlkhatte nungta tawntung ding uh a, pawlkhatte in a tawntung zumna le minsiatna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Daniel12:3 A pilte ahih uhleh vantung khuavak tawh a taangkhawm ding uh hi. A pha-in gamtat ding mi tampi a hilhte pen aksi bangin a taang tawntung ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:4 Tu-in Daniel aw, beina hun a tun mateng laibu khupcip inla, a tungah ciaptehna koih in. A kallakah mi tampite in bang thu piang hiam cih theitel nuamin a hanciam ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel12:5 Tua ciangin keimah Daniel in gun pang tuak a ding mi nih ka mu hi. 
Daniel12:6 Tua mite khat in puanpak silh a, gungal a gamlazaw deuhin a ding pa kiangah, “Hih na lamdangte a beina ding bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel12:7 Puanpak silhpa in a khut tegel vantung lamah laamto-in, Tawntung Pasian’ min tawh thuciamna a bawl hi. Amah in, “Kum thum le alang hi ding hi. Pasian’ mite a kibawlsiatna a bei ciangin hih thute khempeuh hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a gen ka za hi." 
Daniel12:8 A thugen za napi-in teltakin ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Topa aw, bangci bangin beina hong piang ding ahi hiam,” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Daniel12:9 Amah in, “Daniel aw, tu-in ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thute pen beina hun a tun mateng selcipin ipcip ding ahi hi." 
Daniel12:10 Mi tampite kisiansuahin a hoih le a hoih lo a kikhentel ding uh hi. Migilote in bangmah theitel thei lo uh ahih manin a gilo semsem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin mipilte in theihtel theihna a nei ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:11 Amaute in nisim biakpiakna a khawlsak, a Lipkhaphuai na a hong pian’ ciangin ni tulkhat zanih sawmkua sung a sawt ding hi." 
Daniel12:12 Ni tulkhat zathum sawmthum le nga sung muanhuai takin a ngakzo kenkante in thupha a ngah ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:13 Nang Daniel na hih leh a tawp dong muanhuai takin om in. Tua ciangin na si ding a, ahi zongin hun a bei ciangin thaman a sang dingin na hingkik ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Hosea1:1 Judah kumpite Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah, le Israel kumpi Joash’ tapa Jeroboam’ hun lai-in Beeri’ tapa Hosea tungah Topa in thu na gen hi." 
Hosea1:2 Topa in Hosea tungtawnin Israel-te tungah thu a na gen cil lai-in, amah in Hosea kiangah, “Hih gammite kei tungah citak loin pasian dangte bia uh ahih manin, nang zong hong tulpih lo ding numei paktat khat tenpih inla, tua nu tawh ta nei in,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:3 Tua ahih ciangin Hosea in zong Diblaim’ tanu Gomer tenpih a, tua nu hong gai-in tapa khat hong nei hi." 
Hosea1:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Hosea kiangah, “Na tapa’ min dingin Jezreel phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama pute Jehu in Jezreel khua-ah a mi thahna hangin Israel kumpipa tungah gim ka pia baih ding a, Israel mite tungah Jehu’ suanlekhakte’ ukna ka beisak ding hi." 
Hosea1:5 Tua ciangin Jezreel kuam-ah Israel mite’ galhiam khempeuh ka sumai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:6 Tua ciangin Gomer gaikikin tanu khat nei hi. Topa in zong Hosea kiangah, “Na tanu’ min dingin hehpih loh, a cihnopna Loruhamah phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite ka hehpih nawn kei ding a, a mawhna uh ka maisak het kei ding hi." 
Hosea1:7 Ahi zongin Judah mite ka hehpih ding a, namsau le thal, sakol le sakol tung tuangte, le galsimna tawh hi loin, amaute’ Topa Pasian ahi kei mahmah in amaute ka honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:8 Loruhamah a tei khit ciangin Gomer gai-in tapa khat nei leuleu hi. 
Hosea1:9 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na tapa’ min dingin ka mi hi lo a cihnopna Loammi phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh no Israel mite, ka mi na hi nawn kei uh a, kei zong note’ Pasian ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:10 Ahi zongin, tehzawh loh, simzawh loh zah dongin tuipi sehnel bangin Israel mite tampi pha ding uh a, tua hunin, “Note ka mi hi lo,” a kicih hangin ni khat ni ciangin, “A nungta Pasian’ tate,” kici ding hi." 
Hosea1:11 Judah mite le Israel mite kigawmkik ding uh a, amaute a makai dingin mi khat a seh ding uh hi. Amaute khangin citheikik ding uh a, tua Jezreel hun pen a nuam mahmah hun hi ding hi." 
Hosea2:1 Tua ahih ciangin na Israel mipihte, “Pasian’ mi,” ci inla, “ Topa in a hehpih mite,” zong ci in." 
Hosea2:2 Tate aw, na nu uh zolbawl un. Amah ka zi hi nawn lo a, kei zong ama pasal ka hih nawn loh hangin a paktatna le midang tawh a mawhnate a khawl nadingin zol un." 
Hosea2:3 A gamtat hoih lohna a khawl kei leh, a nu sung pan a suah laitakin a guaktangin a ommah bangin, a puanteng hawkkhiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak ding a, a keu, bangmah a po zawh lohna gamlak bangin ka bawl ding a, dangtakin a si ding hi." 
Hosea2:4 Ama tate, paktatna panin a piang tate ahih manin, tua a tate zong ka hehpih kei ding hi." 
Hosea2:5 A nu uh a paktat hi a, tua ahih manin amaute a paii numei, zumna mel thei loin a gamta ahi hi. Amah in, “Ka it pasal dangte kiangah ka pai ding hi. Amaute in anletui, samul puan le saihadial puan, oliv thau le zu hong pia uh hi,” a cizaw lai hi."
