Hosea2:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah a paikhiat zawh loh nadingin ling ka kaihnelh ding a, a kimkotah kulh ka ciang ding hi." 
Hosea2:7 Amah in a pasal dangte delh ding a, ahi zongin amaute kiang tung zo lo ding hi. Amah in amaute zong niloh ding a, ahi zongin mu zo lo ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka pasal masa kiangah ciahkik ning; tu-a bangin ka om sangin ama kiang nuamzaw ding hi,” a ci ding hi." 
Hosea2:8 Ama tungah an, leenggahzu, le oliv thau ka piakna, le Baal pasian biak nadingin a zat ngun le kham tampi tak a piapa ka hihlam hong phawkkha lo hi." 
Hosea2:9 Tua ahih manin anlak hun ciangin ama tungah ka piak ngei an le leenggahzute ka pia nawn kei ding a, a silh dingin ka piak samul puan le saihadial puante ka pia nawn kei ding hi." 
Hosea2:10 Tua ciangin ama it pasal dangte’ muhna-ah a puante hawkkhiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak ding a, kuamah in kei’ khutsung panin honkhia zo lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:11 Ama lungdam theihna, a kumsim pawite, a khasim pawite, a nipisim pawite, a biakna kikhop khempeuh ka beisak ding hi." 
Hosea2:12 Ka pasal it dangte in thamanin hong piak hi, ci-in a gen a leengguite le a theikungte ka susia ding a, gamsate in tuate suksiatsakin gamlakpi a suak ding hi." 
Hosea2:13 Kei hong mangngilh tanvei sung, Baal pasian tungah paknamtui a hal tanvei sung, le a pasal it dangte tawh a kikhawl dingin a manpha kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a kizep hun tanvei sungzah mah gim ka pia ding hi." 
Hosea2:14 Tua ahih ciangin sehnel gamah amah ka paipihkik ding a, itna kam tawh hopihin ka zolkik ding hi." 
Hosea2:15 Tua lai panin a leenggui lote ka piakik ding a, Lungkhamna Kuam a cihnopna Akhor Kuam pen lametna kongpi ka suaksak ding hi. Egypt panin a paikhiat, a nungakno hun lai mah bangin ka thugennate hong ngai ding hi." 
Hosea2:16 Tua ciangin kei pen, ka pasal, hong ci kik ding a, kei pen, ka Baal pasian, hong ci nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:17 Ama kam panin Baal pasian min ka pulaksak nawn kei ding a, a min kilokha nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:18 Tua ciangin, ka mite a suksiat loh nadingun gamlak a om gamsate, huih lak a leeng vasate le leitungah a bokvak ganhingte tawh thuciamna ka bawl ding a, thalte, namsaute, galhiam khempeuh, leitung panin ka phiatkhia ding hi. A lungmuang hithiatin ka mite ka omsak ding hi." 
Hosea2:19 Israel aw, nang, zi-in kong neikik ding a, nang tungah thuman thutangin kong gamta kik ding hi. Nang hong itin kong hehpih tawntung ding a, keima-a’ na hi tawntung ding hi." 
Hosea2:20 Kei-a’ ahi tawntung dingin nang kong la ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak nong thei ding hi. 
Hosea2:21 Tua ni ciangin keima mi Jezreel-te’ thungetna ka pia ding a, leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi." 
Hosea2:22 Leitung in an, leenggahzu le sathaute piangsak ding hi." 
Hosea2:23 Leitungah ka mite kipsakin a cithei-in ka bawl ding a, hehpih loh, a kici mite ka hehpih ding a, ka mi hi lo, a kici mite, ka mi na hi uh hi, ka ci ding a, amaute in, “Nang pen kote’ Pasian na hi hi,” hong ci ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Hosea3:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a, “Lawm a ngai khinsa, pasal tawh a lumkhawmsa numei khat tawh va kingai in. Israel mite, pasian dangte kiangah pai uh a, leenggahphehkeu tawh a va biak uh hangin, amaute ka it lai veve mah bangin tua numei va it in,” hong ci hi." 
Hosea3:2 Tua ahih ciangin ngun shekel sawm le nga le mangbuhham seu sawm le nga tawh zi lei-in 
Hosea3:3 ama kiangah, “Sauveipi sung keima zi bangin na om ding a, midang tawh na paktat nawn kei ding hi. Midang tawh na lupkhop loh mah bangin kei nangawn tawh zong i lumkhawm kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Hosea3:4 Hih pen kumpi ahi a, makai ahi zongin, biakpiakna le biakpiakna khuampite ahi zongin, siampi puanpi le milim pasian-te nei loin hun saupi sung Israel mite om ding a cihna ahi hi." 
Hosea3:5 Tua khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa amau’ Pasian le a kumpipa uh David lamah hong kiheikik ding uh hi. Tua hun ciangin amaute in Topa zahtakin, ama letsongte a ngah ding uh hi." 
Hosea4:1 Israel mite aw, Topa’ thugen ngai un. Hih gam sungah a teng mite tungah Topa lungkim lo ahih manin hih bangin mawhsak hi: Hih gam sungah cihtakna ahi a, itna ahi zongin om lo a, mite in kei pen Pasian-in hong ngaihsun lo uh hi." 
Hosea4:2 Mite in thuciamna bawl napi-in a thuciamte uh palsat uh hi. Zuau genin, mi thatin, guta-in, nulepa mawhna bawl uh hi. A sia khat khit a sia khat a banbanin gamta-in a mawhna uh behlaplap uh hi." 
Hosea4:3 Tua ahih ciangin leitang keugaw-in a tunga teng khempeuh si ding a, leitung a om gamsa khempeuh le huihlaka leeng vasa khempeuh tawh si mang ding uh a, tuipi sunga om ngasate nangawn si mang ding hi." 
Hosea4:4 Kuamah in mihonte mawhsak kei hen la, mihonte taii kei hen. Kei’ lungkim lohna no siampite’ tung ahi hi." 
Hosea4:5 A sun a zan cih om loin na nasepnate uh a kimanna mel om lo hi; kamsangte zong note bangmah hi lel hi. Na nu uh Israel ka susia ding hi. 
Hosea4:6 Ka mite in kei hong phawk lo uh ahih manin ka susia ding hi. No siampite in kei hong phawknuam loin, ka thuhilhnate nial na hih manun ka siampi dingin kong deih nawn kei a, na tate uh zong siampi-in ka zang kei ding hi." 
Hosea4:7 Siampi tam semsem leh kei tungah a khialhna uh tam semsem hi. Amau’ minthanna pen mindaina ka suaksak ding hi. 
Hosea4:8 Ka mite’ mawhna amaute in hauhlawh uh a, ka mite a mawh semsem ding uh a ut uh hi." 
Hosea4:9 Mite’ thuak dingin a kilawm gimna mah siampite in zong thuak ding uh a, amau’ gamtatna bangin gim pia-in amau’ siatna bangin ka thukkik ding hi." 
Hosea4:10 Amaute, pasian dangte a bia dingin kei kiang panin kiheikhia uh ahih manin biakpiakna a sa tanhte uh a nek hangun a gil uh vah tuan lo ding hi. Mi punna ding deihna-in biakpiakna-in numei tawh mawhna a bawl uh hangin mi pung tuan lo ding hi." 
Hosea4:11 Leenggahzu in ka mite’ thungaihsut theihna beisak hi. 
Hosea4:12 Ka mite in aisanin singthem peuh thudotin nei uh a, amau’ thu theihnopte, ciangkang peuh in gen tazen hi. Amaute in kei hong taisan uh a, a paktat numei bangin pasian dangte a zuan uh hi." 
Hosea4:13 Amaute in mualsangte dawna biakna munte-ah biakna pia uh a, a nuai liim hoih ahih manin mual neute tungah a po tawsaw kung, poplar kung, le terebinth kungte nuai-ah paknamtui halin a bia uh hi. Tua thu hangin na tanute uh numei paktat suak uh a, na mote un midang tawh mawhna a bawl uh hi." 
Hosea4:14 Na tanute uh a paktat manin gim ka pia kei ding a, na mote uh midang tawh a mawh manin zong gim ka pia tuan kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note mahmah numei paktatte tawh na mawh uh a, biakinn numeite tawh nulepa mawhna biakna na bawl uh hi. Paunak-ah, “Thuhoih phawktheihna a nei lo mite in siatna thuak ding hi,” kici hi." 
Hosea4:15 Kei tungah no Israel mite citak loin nong taisan hangun, note bangin Judah mite khial kei tahen. Gilgal-ah ahi a, Bethaven-ah ahi zongin pai kei unla, tua lai munah Topa’ min tawh na kiciam kei un." 
Hosea4:16 A kizualsak zo lo bawngla bangin Israel mite phengphi uh ahih manin, lonona munah tuunote anvak bangin amaute bangci vak ding ka hi hiam?" 
Hosea4:17 Israel mite, milim biak uuklua uh a, cihtheih hi lo hi." 
Hosea4:18 Amaute, zukham honpi hi uh a, nulepa mawhna a bawlbawl uh hi. Minphat ding sangin minsiat ding utzaw uh hi." 
Hosea4:19 Huihpi nung in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a phiatkhiamang ding lungsim a nei uh hi. Amau’ biak pasian-te in amaute huh lo ding hi. 
Hosea5:1 No siampite aw, hih thu ngai un! No Israel mite aw, thudon un. Kumpipa’ innkuante aw, ngai un! Note in midangte tungah thu a khen ding hinapi-in, note tungah thukhenna hong tung ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih le note in mite’ awk nadingin Mizpah mualah thang na siah uh a, mite’ awk nadingin Tabor mualah ngenthang na hi uh hi." 
Hosea5:2 Note in mite’ kiat nadingin Shittim-ah gum a thukpi-in na to uh hi; hih thu hangin note kong thuhilh ding hi. 
Hosea5:3 Israel-te’ gamtatna khempeuh ka thei khin a, kei tungah bangmah hong im thei lo ding uh hi. Kei tungah hong citak lo uh a, amaute, misia a suak khinta uh hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea5:4 Amaute’ gamtatna in a Pasian kiang uh zuansak thei lo hi. Amaute in nakpitakin milim biaknopna lungsim nei uh ahih manin Topa phawk kha lo uh hi. 
Hosea5:5 Israel-te’ kiphatsakna pen amau mah’ siatna ding ahi hi. Amau’ mawhna in amaute puksak ding a, Judah mite in zong pukpih ding uh hi." 
Hosea5:6 Topa tungah biakna-in piak dingin a tuute uh le a bawngte uh paipih ding uh a, ahi zongin a mawkna suak ding hi. Topa in amaute nusia khin ahih manin amah mu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Hosea5:7 Topa’ tungah amaute citak lo uh a, midangte tawh zawlta nei uh hi. Tu-in amaute le a neihsa khempeuh uh kisusia ding hi." 
Hosea5:8 Galdona ding zaksakna-in Gibeah khua-ah tuutal ki tum unla, Ramah khua-ah peengkul tum un. Bethaven khua-ah pataukohna gingsak un. Benjamin mite aw, kithawi un!" 
Hosea5:9 Gimthuak ni hun hong tun ciangin Israel mite in siatna thuak ding uh hi. A tung taktak ding thu, Israel mite lakah a gen ka hi hi." 
Hosea5:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mi uliante in gisuang khinin midangte’ leitang keeksak uh ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, amaute tungah tuikhang bangin gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Hosea5:11 Israel in zong gimna thuakin a cimawh hita hi; bang hang hiam cih le kei kiangah hong pai nuam loin piak ding bangmah a nei lote kiangah huhna ngen dingin pai hamtang hi. 
Hosea5:12 Tua ahih manin Israel ka beitumsak ding a, Judah ka beimangsak ding hi." 
Hosea5:13 Israel in ama cinatna kithei-in, Judah in ama liamna a kimuh ciangin kumpi lianpa kiangah huh ngen dingin Assiria gamah Israel va pai hi. Ahi zongin amah in amau’ natna damsak thei lo a, a liamna uh zong na damsak thei tuan lo hi." 
Hosea5:14 Humpinelkai’ sukgawp bangin Israel le Judah ka sugawp ding hi. Keimah teekteek in amaute balgawpin ka paisan ding hi. Amaute ka talkaihgawp ding a, kuamah in hon zo lo ding hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea5:15 Ka mite in a mawhna hangun gimna thuakin kei hong zonkik mateng ka tuaci nusiat phot ding hi. A lungkham uh ciangin kei hong zong ding uh hi. 
Hosea6:1 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, Topa kiangah ciahkik ni; amah in eite hong balgawp hangin hong damsakkik ding a, eite hong liamsak hangin i liammate hong tunsakkik ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Hosea6:2 Ni nih sungin eite hong thahatsak ding a, ni thum sungin i ngei hong bangsak ding hi. Tua ciangin amah tawh i kikhawl ding hi." 
Hosea6:3 Topa i theihzawh nadingin hanciam ni. Zingsang sialin pel loin khua a vak mah bangin pel loin eite kiangah amah hong pai ding a, lei a kawtsak khuapi guah pel loin hong zuk bangin eite kiangah amah hong pai hamtang ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea6:4 Israel le Judah aw, note bang hong cih thei nawn ding ka hi hiam? Note’ hong itna pen zingsang meiilum bangin thengpak a, a mangthangpak daitui tawh kibang lel hi." 
Hosea6:5 Tua ahih manin note a hong thuhilh ding le note a hong taii dingin ka kamsangte kong sawl hi. No ka mite’ gamtat ding ka deih zia kitel sinsen hi. 
Hosea6:6 Keima deih pen nong it tawntung ding uh hizaw a, gan tawh nong biakna uh ka deih pen hi lo zaw hi. Gan tawh nong biakna uh sangin kei nong theih ding uh ka deihzaw hi." 
Hosea6:7 Ahi zongin ka ciamna gam a tun uh ciangin amaute in Adam khua-ah ka thuciamna palsat uh a, kei tungah hong thuman lo uh hi." 
Hosea6:8 Gilead pen migilo hontangte’ omna khuapi hi a, mi thahna sisan luang tawh amau’ sul a kidim hi." 
Hosea6:9 Zawhthawh thu-in mi’ na a sut dingin a pangsim mite bangin siampite gamta uh a, biakna a pia dingin Shekhem khua-ah a pai mite nangawn, lamkalah a that uh hi. Amau gamtatna siahuai mahmah hi." 
Hosea6:10 Israel mite lakah siatna lianpi khat ka mu hi. Milim biakna tawh amaute kininsak uh hi. 
Hosea6:11 No Judah mite zong gim kong piak ding hun kiseh khinzo hi. Ka mihingte a ngei uh bangsakkik ning," 
Hosea7:1 Israel-te a ci uh damsakkik ning, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin, amau’ mawhna le amau’ siatna bekbek kimu thei hi. Amaute in mi khemin, inn luhin na gu uh a, konglak nangawnah mi’ na sut uh hi." 
Hosea7:2 Amau’ gamtatsiatna khempeuh ka phawk lamtak amaute in ngaihsutin neikha lo uh hi. Amau’ mawhna in amaute gakcip a, ka muhna mahmahah om gige uh hi." 
Hosea7:3 Amaute in a zuaupiteng uh tawh kumpipa lungdamsak uh a, a khemnateng uh tawh a uliante uh nuamsak uh hi." 
Hosea7:4 Amaute zuautatin citak lo uh hi. Amaute pen, mohbawl pa in a anlom meek a pawm mateng, moh emna meikhuk sunga a tawhsa, mut loh seem lohin a koih phot mei tawh kibang uh hi." 
Hosea7:5 Kumpipa in pawi a Sbawl ni-in amaute in uliante zu khamsakin haisak uh a, amau’ ngimna a thei lopi-in kumpipa zong tua lakah hong kihel hi." 
Hosea7:6 Tua bangin amau’ sawmsimna mei bangin hong kuang hi. Zanthapai-in a hehna uh mei bangin khukhu a, zingsangin mei bangin hong kuangkhia hi." 
Hosea7:7 A hehluatna uh tawh amau a ukte a thatlum uh hi. A kumpite uh khat khit khat a banbanin kithat a, ahi zongin kuamah in kei kiangah huhna hong ngen lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:8 Israel, a kiima om minam dangte tawh kipawlin tua mite muanin nei a, a kihei lo moh ki-em tawh kibang uh hi." 
Hosea7:9 A kipawlpih minam dangte in a thahatnateng uh teeptum a, ahi zongin a kiteeptumlam phawkkha lo uh hi. A lu tung uha om a sam uh a kanlam nangawn phawkkha lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:10 Israel mite’ kiphatsakna in amau’ langkhatah teci pang hi. Ahi zongin hih thu khempeuhah zong, amau’ Topa Pasian ahi kei’ lamah hong kihei tuan lo uh a, kei hong zong lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:11 Israel pen a khemnop kawl vakhu hai tawh kibang hi. Egypt-te kiangah huhna va ngen masa uh a, tua ciangin Assiria-te kiangah a va tai uh hi." 
Hosea7:12 Amaute a va pai laitakun ka ngen tawh amaute ka na siah ding a, vasa mat bangin ka ngen tawh amaute ka man ding hi. Amau’ gamtatsiatna hangin gim ka pia ding hi." 
Hosea7:13 Amaute in kei hong taisanin hong lehdo uh ahih manin gimna ngahin siatna tuak ding uh hi. Amaute ka hotkhiat nop hangin amaute in kei hong lehgen zawsop uh hi. 
Hosea7:14 Amaute in lungsim takpi tawh kei tungah huhna hong ngen lo uh a, dawibia mite bang lelin a gamta uh hi. An le leenggahzu a nget uh ciangin zong lawkite bangin a ngen uh hi. Amaute in kei hong lehdo uh hi." 
Hosea7:15 Amaute khoi-in a thahat mite suaksak napi-in, amaute in kei hong lehsawm zawsop uh hi." 
Hosea7:16 Amaute, kei’ lam hong nga loin, Baal pasian’ lam nga tawntung uh hi. A khakna ding san a kha thei lo thalpeu tel tawh kibang uh hi. Amau’ kiphatsak pauna hangun a uliante uh namsau-in si ding uh a, Egypt mite in amaute nuihsan lel ding uh hi." 
Hosea8:1 Pataukohna peengkul tum in. Galte in muvanlai bangin ka gam a leenlak dingin hong kithawi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in ka thuciamna uh pelhin, ka thuhilhnate hong nial uh hi." 
Hosea8:2 Amaute in kei pen amau’ Pasian, hong ci-in, nangma mite hi ung, hong ci napi-in," 
Hosea8:3 amaute in a hoih nate paaikhia uh ahih manin a galte un delh ding uh hi. 
Hosea8:4 Amaute in kei hong dong loin kumpi ding vaihawm uh a, kei’ theihpih lohin ulian koih uh hi. A ngun a khamte uh tawh amau’ siatna ding milim a bawl uh hi." 
Hosea8:5 Samaria khuapi mite in a biak kham bawngno ka deih kei hi. Tua a bia mite tungah ka heh hi. Amaute in mihoih a suahna ding uh bang tanvei ngak lai ding ahi uh hiam? 
Hosea8:6 Israel sunga om mi khat in tua milim bawl a, tua milim pen Pasian hi lo hi. Samaria mite in a biak milim kisuzan ding hi." 
Hosea8:7 Paunak-ah, Huih a tuhte in huih ngahkik ding a, a vui om lo an kung in annek ding piangsak lo hi, kici hi. A vui om lo an kung panin an kingah mah taleh zong gamdang mite in netum ding hi." 
Hosea8:8 Israel khempeuh kinawmvalhin kisusia ding a, tu nangawnin minam dangte in bangmahin ngaihsun nawn lo uh hi." 
Hosea8:9 A hon lak panin a taikhia, a thumang lo gam la bangin Assiria mite tung panin huhna a ngen dingin va tai uh hi. A huh ding uh a deihna-in midangte tungah amau pumpi a va zuak uh hi." 
Hosea8:10 Tua bangin minam dangte a cial hangun keimah in amaute kaikhawmin gim ka pia veve ding hi. Assiria kumpipa’ bawlsiatna tawh a sawt loin gimna a ngah ding uh hi. 
Hosea8:11 Israel mite in mawhmaisakna ding mun biakna tau tam bawl semsem leh mawhna ding mun tam a behlap semsem a suak zawsop uh hi. 
Hosea8:12 Amaute hilhna ding simzawh loh thukham tampi gelh taleng zong, amaute in don loin thu lamdangpi khatin ngaihsun lel uh hi." 
Hosea8:13 Amaute in gan tawh biak ding utin, a biakna sate ne nuam uh hi. Ahi zongin Topa ahi keimah ka hih leh amaute tungah ka lungkim kei a, amaute’ mawhnate phawkin tua mawhnate hangin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Egypt-ah amaute ka sawlkik ding hi." 
Hosea8:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in amau a Piangsak pa mangngilh uh a, inn lianpipite a lam uh hi. Judah mite in zong kulhnei khuapi tampi a lamthuah uh hi. Keimah in tua khuapite mei tawh halin a inn lianpite uh ka kangtumsak ding hi, ci hi." 
Hosea9:1 Israel mite aw, midangte bangin lungdamin kipak kei un. Na Pasian uh na nusia uh a, ama tungah na citak kei uh hi. Numei paktatte bangin mun citengah Baal tungah na kizuak uh a, a hong leina ante hangin na lungdam uh hi." 
Hosea9:2 Ahi zongin tua ante, oliv thaute, le leenggahzute na khamtakun na nekha kei ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ gam sungah na omsuak kei ding uh a, Egypt gamah paikikin, Assiria gam sungah an siang lo na ne ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:4 Gamdangah na om laitakun Topa tungah leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia kei ding uh a, gan gawh biakna zong na bawl kei ding uh hi. Sihna phuala annek bangin, na annekte un zong a neteng hong ninsak ding hi. Na ante uh zong na gilvahna ding bek uh hi ding a, Topa’ inn-ah khat zong na tun kei ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:5 A kiseh pawi hunte le Topa’ pawi hun hong tun ciangin bangcih ding na hi uh hiam? 
Hosea9:6 Lungkhamna hun hong tungin, mite na kithehthang uh ciangin, Egypt mite in note hong kaikhawm ding a, amau gam Memfis khuapi-ah vui ding bek na hi uh hi. Na inn na lote uh, kiak le lopa in khuhcip lel ding hi." 
Hosea9:7 Gimthuakna hun hong tungta a, thukkikna hun hong tungta hi. Tua hun ciangin Israel mite in na thei ding uh hi. Note’ mawhna hang le note in kei nong muhdahluat manun, “Hih kamsangpa mihai hi; hih thumu pa lungsim kicing lo hi,” nong ci uh hi." 
Hosea9:8 Ama mi Israel-te a vil dingin kamsang nasemin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi napi-in, ka paina khempeuhah vasa bangin thang nong siah uh a, Pasian’ gam sung teekteek mahah mite pen kamsangpa’ gal a suak mawk hi." 
Hosea9:9 A gamtatna uh gentheih lohin siahuai uh a, Gibeah khua-a a gamtat ngeite uh tawh kibang hi. Pasian in amau’ mawhnate thei-in gim a pia ding hi." 
Hosea9:10 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Israel kong muh cil-in hoih mahmah a, sehnel gam sunga a gah a zun kiuhkeuh leenggah tawh kibang hi. Na pu na pate uh ka muh cil-in hoih mahmah a, a hun ciangin a min a zun sitset theigah muh tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin Baalpeor a tun uh ciangin amaute in Baal milim bia pah uh ahih manin, amau’ biak milimte ka muhdah zahin amaute nangawn ka mudah pah hi." 
Hosea9:11 Israel-te’ minliatna teng vasa bangin leengmang ding a, amau’ sung panin ta suak nawn loin, nupi gai, naupaii cih zong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea9:12 Amaute in ta khoi mah ta le-uh zong, suanlekhak a neihtheih ma-un ka khansihsak khin ding hi. Hih mite ka nungngat ciangin amaute tungah a lungkhamhuai lianpite a tung ding hi." 
Hosea9:13 Tu-in ka mukhol khin hi. Mite in sabet-a a bet ding le, a thah ding bekin, Israel mite in a naupangte uh khahkhia ding uh hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea9:14 Topa aw, hih mite tungah na piak ding bang hong ngen ding ka hi hiam? Amaute tatolhsak inla, a nawizu uh kangsak in." 
Hosea9:15 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Amau’ gamtatsia khempeuh Gilgal phual pan a kipan hi a, tua mun a kipanin amaute ka muhdah a kipan ahi hi. Amaute’ gamtatsiatna hangin gam sung panin ka hawlkhia ding hi. Amaute ka it nawn kei ding hi. A uliante un kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Hosea9:16 Israel mite ahihleh a zung a keu, gah a gah lo ding singkung tawh kibang hi. Amaute in ta nei ta mah le-uh zong, amau’ it mahmah tua a tate uh ka thahsak veve ding hi, ci hi." 
Hosea9:17 Amaute in a thu ngai lo uh ahih manin ka Pasian in a mite a nial ding hi. Minam dangte lakah a vakvai mite a suak ding uh hi. 
Hosea10:1 Israel mite ahihleh a gahpha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang hi. Cithei semsem leh biakna tau tam lam semsem uh hi. A gam sung uh cithei semsem leh biakna song a hoihbawl semsem uh hi. 
Hosea10:2 A lungsim uh man lo ahih manin tu-in a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in amau’ biakna taute suzanin, a biakna songte uh suksiatsak ding hi." 
Hosea10:3 A sawt loin hih mite in, “ Topa kihta lo ihih manin kumpi i nei kei hi. Kumpi khat lel in eite a’ ding bang hong hihsak thei ding ahi hiam?” ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:4 Amaute a kampi bek uh hi a, a kampi bekun thu genin thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Lolai-a tu-ma-kuakte sungah gunei kiak a po mah bangin thusia neihna hong khang hi." 
Hosea10:5 Bethaven khua-a bawngno milim a taanna uh hangin Samaria khuapi sunga a teng mite lau-in ling ding uh a, amaute le tua milim na a sem siampite a thum ding uh hi. A etlawmna teng a maiman’ ciangin a tau ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria gam a kumpi lianpa tungah siah a piak dingin tua milim kipuakhia ding hi. Thu kigen zui-in milim a biakna hangun Israel-te mindai-in maizum ding uh hi. 
Hosea10:7 Tui tunga tuiphuan laam bangin a kumpite uh maimang ding hi. 
Hosea10:8 Israel-te in milim bia-in mawhna a bawlna munte kisusia ding a, a biakna taute uh tungah ling le kiak a po ding hi. Tua ciangin mite in mual liante kiangah, “Hong vukcip un,” ci ding uh a, mual neute kiangah, “Hong dengcip un,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:9 Gibeah khua-ah a khialh uh a kipanin kei tungah hong khialhna uh Israel mite tawp nai lo hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeah khua-ah gal in amaute pha ding hi. 
Hosea10:10 Hih mimawhte thuhilh nadingin gim ka pia ding a, a thuapthuapin a mawhna hangun thuhilh nadingin minam dangte in amaute hong sim ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:11 Israel pen limtakin a kihilhsa, an a cil nuam bawngla tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin a etlawm a ngawngzangah kol bulhin lo khawhsak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Lokhawhna leeng, Judah ka kaisak a, lei kalhkhapna singka, Israel ka kaisak hi." 
Hosea10:12 Khai tuh bangin thuman tuhin, kei nong itna hangun a piang thuphate at un. Note’ Topa keima lamah nong kihei ding uh a hun hita ahih manin lo thak lei kalkham un. Tua hileh kei hong pai-in note tungah thupha kong pia ding hi, ka ci hi." 
Hosea10:13 Ahi zongin note in thusia na tuh zawsop uh a, thusia gah na at uh hi. Na zuauna uh hangin a piang gahte na ne uh hi. Note in na sakol leengte uh le na galkap tamna uh muangkha na hih manun," 
Hosea10:14 gal in na mite uh hong sim ding a, na kulh muanhuaite uh kisusia ding hi. Kumpi Shalman in a galsimna ah Betharbel khua sugawpin, nupite le a tate leilak denna-in a sih mangsak hun lai mah a bang ding hi." 
Hosea10:15 Israel mite aw, note’ gamtat hoih lohna hangin tu-a bang teekin note tungah thu hong piang ding hi. Galdo a kipat phetin Israel kumpipa si pah ding hi." 
Hosea11:1 Israel a neu lai-in ka it mahmah a, Egypt gam panin ka tapa ka samkhia hi." 
Hosea11:2 Ahi zongin limsap semsem leng gamla pai semsem hi. Ka mite in Baal tungah biakna pia uh a, milim biakna-in paknamtui a hal uh hi." 
Hosea11:3 Ahi zongin Israel mite lam a paitheihna ding a hilh pa keimah ka hi a, ka ang sungah amaute ka tawi hi. Ahi zongin amaute ka don lamtak phawkkha lo uh hi." 
Hosea11:4 Amaute, itna le hehpihna tawh ka len a, domto-in ka biang ciangah ka tawi a, awn sukin an ka pia hi." 
Hosea11:5 Tua bang hinapi, kei lamah amaute hong kihei nuam lo uh ahih manin Egypt gamah paikik ding uh a, Assiria mite, amau’ kumpi hi ding hi." 
Hosea11:6 Galte in a khuapi sung uh luhin, a khuapi kulhkongpi zawlte uh suktansak ding hi. Ka mite in thu hoih lo zuikha uh ahih manin gal in susiamang ding hi." 
Hosea11:7 Ka mite in kei kiang panin pial ding ngaihsun tawntung uh ahih manin amaute in kolbulhna thuak ding uh a, kuamah in a kol sutsak lo ding hi." 
Hosea11:8 Israel mite aw, bangci-a hong nusia thei ding a, bangci-a hong paidak thei ding ka hi hiam? Admah khua ka suksiat bangin kong susia nuam kei a, Zeboiim khua ka bawl bangin kong bawl nuam kei hi. Note hong khasiat mahmah ka hih manin tua banga hih ding ka lungsimah om lo hi." 
Hosea11:9 Ka heh manin gim kong pia kei ding a, no Israel-te kong susia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah, mihing hi loin, Pasian ka hi hi. Kei a Siangtho Pa, note tawh kong omkhawm a, a hehsa-in note kiangah kong pai kei ding hi." 
Hosea11:10 Humpinelkai bangin a galte uh ka hawksan gawp ding a, tua ciangin ka mite in kei hong zui ding uh hi. Nitumna lam gam panin kei kiangah hong nawhtai ding uh hi." 
Hosea11:11 Egypt gam panin vasa bangin lawptakin hong leeng ding uh a, Assiria gam panin vakhu bangin hong leeng ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in amaute’ inn ngeisa-ah ka tunpih kik ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Hosea11:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite in zuauna le khemna bekbek tawh kei hong khuhcip uh hi. Judah mite in zong a citak a Siangtho Pa keimah hong langpang lai uh hi. 
Hosea12:1 Israel mite, a nung kawikawi huih tawh kibang a, sun thapai a a nasepna uh a mawkna ahi hi. Zuauna le siatna lamsang bekbek khangsak uh hi. Assiria-te tawh kipawlna bawl uh a, Egypt-te tawh kizopna nei uh hi." 
Hosea12:2 Topa in Israel mite a mawhsakna ding a thu om hi. Jakob a gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim pia ding a, ama gamtatna bangin thukkik ding hi." 
Hosea12:3 Jakob in a nu sung nangawn pek panin a sanggampa sawk pah a, a khangham ciangin zong Pasian tawh kilai hi." 
Hosea12:4 Vantung mi tawh kilai-in a lel hi. Tua ciangin Jakob zong kapin ama tung panin hehpihna a ngen hi. Pasian in Bethel munah amah mu-in a hopih hi. 
Hosea12:5 Ama min pen Topa, Vanglian Topa Pasian ahi hi." 
Hosea12:6 Pasian’ huhna tawh note khempeuh kiheikik unla, thuman thutangin gamta un. Pasian muang tawntung un." 
Hosea12:7 Sumbukte in tawitehna man lo zang uh a, amaute in mi khem ding nuam a sa uh hi." 
Hosea12:8 Israel mite in, “Tu-in ka hau uh a, kote a dingin neihsa tampi ka ngah uh hi,” ci uh hi. Ahi zongin a hauhnateng un a mawhnateng uh loh zo lo hi." 
Hosea12:9 Egypt gamah na omlai pek uh a kipanin kei pen note’ Topa Pasian ka hi a, ahi zongin tu-in tanglai hun bangin puanbuk sungah note kong tengsakkik ding hi." 
Hosea12:10 Kamsangte tungah thu ka gen hi. Maangmuhna a banbanin pia-in, kamsangte tungah thugentehna tawh thu a gen pa zong keimah ka hi hi." 
Hosea12:11 Gilead gamah milim biakna om a, tuate a kimanna om lo hi. Gilgal gamah bawngtal tawh bia uh a, lokhote in a suang deih lohteng uh a phualphualin a cian kawikawi tawh kibangin, a biakna taute uh bangmahin kimang lo ding hi." 
Hosea12:12 Aram gamah Jakob tai a, Israel in tua lai-ah zi khat thalawhin na sem a, zi thalawhna-in tuu a cing hi." 
Hosea12:13 Topa in kamsang khat zangin Egypt panin Israel-te paikhiatpih a, kamsang khat’ nasepna tawh amaute suakta-in a nungta uh hi." 
Hosea12:14 Heh mahmah theih nadingin Israel mite gamta uh ahih manin amaute’ Topa in amau’ tung mahah a mawhna uh tungsak ding a, amaute’ mawhna mah a thuaksak ding hi." 
Hosea13:1 Efraim-te beh in thu a gen ciangin a dangte lau uh a, Israel minam beh dangte in Efraim-te beh tung et uh hi. Ahi zongin Baal milim biakna hangin amaute khial uh hi; tua thu hangin si ding uh hi." 
Hosea13:2 Tua hinapi-in amaute khialthuah semsem uh a, a biak ding uh milim a bawl uh hi. Amau’ ngunte milimin bawl uh a, a hoihtakin khutsiamte a bawlsak uh hi. Tua ciangin, “Hihte tungah biakna pia un,” a ci uh hi. Mihing in milim bia-in nam tazen uh hi." 
Hosea13:3 Tua ciangin amaute pen zingsang a kaai meiilum, a maimangpak daitui, ancilna panin huih in a letkhiat ansi, meikhu suahna-a a pai meikhu bangin a maimang ding uh hi." 
Hosea13:4 Kei pen Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih note’ Topa Pasian ka hi hi. Tua hun lai-in kei simloh Pasian dang na thei kei uh a, note a hong honkhia pa kei bek ka hi hi." 
Hosea13:5 Sehnel gam keuna sungah note a hong kem pa keimah ka hi hi. 
Hosea13:6 Ahi zongin gam hoihna mun tungin na gil uh a vah ciangin na lungsim uh kiphasakin kei nong mangngilh uh hi. 
Hosea13:7 Tua ahih manin humpinelkai bangin note hong sugawpin, kamkei bangin na pai nading uh lampi-ah kong pang hi." 
Hosea13:8 A no a kilaksak vompi bangin note hong sugawpin kong balgawp ding hi. Humpinelkai bangin hong phualnek pahin, gamsate bangin kong balthanggawp ding hi." 
Hosea13:9 No Israel-te kong sugawp ding hi. Kua in note hong huhzo ding ahi hiam? 
Hosea13:10 Na kumpi ding uh le na makai dingte uh nong ngen uh hi. Tu-in note hong hon dingin na hong nget uh na kumpipa uh koi-ah om a, note hong hu ding na makaite uh koi lai tung khin ahi hiam?" 
Hosea13:11 Na kumpi dingte uh kong ngawhpiak a, ka hehluatna hangin amaute ka lakhiakik khin hi." 
Hosea13:12 Israel mite’ mawhna le a khialhnateng uh limtakin kiciamteh a, tua ciamtehnate limtakin kikem hi." 
Hosea13:13 Israel mite, naungek bangin a suahkhiat hun tung napi-in, a hailuat manun suakkhia loin a nu uh sung mahah omom lai uh hi." 
Hosea13:14 Leinuai-a misite’ omna-ah a pai nading uh panin honin, sih nading panin suaktasak ding ka hi hiam? Sihna aw, gimna na piakna-ah amaute ka hehpih kei hi. Leinuai-a misite’ gam aw, na suksiatna-ah amaute ka khasiat kei hi." 
Hosea13:15 Israel mite kiak bangin a pung ahi zongin sehnel gam panin nisuahna huih sa mahmah ka nungsak ding a, a tuikhukte uh le a tuinakte uh a kangsak ding hi. Tua huih in a manpha nate le deih theih peuhpeuh leenmang ding hi." 
Hosea13:16 Israel-te in a Pasian uh lehdo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Gal sungah amaute si ding uh a, a naungekte uh lei kidenna ding a, a nupi naupaiite uh kikuikham ding hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea14:1 Israel-te aw, note’ Topa Pasian’ lamah kihei kik un. Na mawhna hangun note na puk khin uh hi." 
Hosea14:2 Topa’ lamah kihei unla, “Ka mawhna khempeuh uh hong maisak inla, kong thumna uh hong ngai in. Ka kampauna bangun kong gamta ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:3 Assiria mite in hong honkhiazo ngei lo ding a, sakol galkapte in zong hong huzo ngei lo ding uh hi. Kote’ bawlsa milimte pen Pasian hi, ka ci nawn kei ding uh hi. A cimawh mite in nangma tung panin hehpihna a ngah lamtak uh ka thei uh hi,” ci-in thu ngen un." 
Hosea14:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka mite tungah heh nawn lo ka hih manin ka kiangah ka mite ka samkik ding a, lungsim takpi tawh amaute ka it ding hi." 
Hosea14:5 Gam keuna mun a guahzu bangin Israel mite tungah nuntakna guah ka hi ding hi. Paak bangin amaute palh ding uh a, Lebanon gam a singkungte bangin zung thuk khakin a kip ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:6 Amaute meeng thakin oliv kung bangin melhoih ding uh a, Lebanon Mual bangin namtui ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:7 Keima liim nuai-ah khatvei hong omkik ding uh hi. Huan hoih sunga a po ankung hoihte bang ding uh a, leenggui gahpha bangin tampi a pha ding uh hi. Lebanon gam leenggahzu bangin minthang ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:8 Israel mite in milim biakha nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute’ thungetna pia-in amaute ka kem ding hi. Amaute, a hing tawntung singkung kep bangin ka kem ding hi; amaute’ thupha ngah khempeuh keima kiang pan ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea14:9 Mipil, thu ngaihsun theite in hih thute theitelin limtakin ciamteh tahen. Topa’ lampi tang mahmah a, a thutang mite in tua lampi a tawn uh hi. Mawhneite in tua lampi tawn lo ahih manin a puk uh hi." 
Joel1:1 Pethuel’ tapa Joel tungah hih bangin Topa’ thu hong tung hi: 
Joel1:2 No khangham zawdiakte aw, ngai un; Judah gammi khempeuh aw, na bil uh ngat un. Note’ khansung ahi a, na pu na pate uh khansung ahi zongin, hih bang thu piang ngei peuhmah ahi hiam?" 
Joel1:3 Hih thute khempeuh na tate uh kiangah gen unla, na tate un amau’ tate’ tungah na gensawn uh hen la, amaute in a khangsawnte tungah na gensawn leuleu uh hen." 
Joel1:4 A pettan kauphete’ nek bangteng, kauphe honte in netum a, kauphe honte’ nek bangteng, a tuan kauphete in netum a, a tuan kauphete’ nek bangteng, a susia kauphete in nemang khin uh hi." 
Joel1:5 No zukhamte aw, tho unla kap un. No leenggahzu nete aw, thumin tau un. Na zunek ding teng uh beimang khinta hi." 
Joel1:6 Kauphe honpi in i gam hong sim a, amaute tam mahmah uh a, hat mahmah uh hi. A ha uh humpinelkai ha bangin hiam a, humpinelkaipi ha bangin gupha mahmah hi." 
Joel1:7 Amaute in i leengguiteng susiamang khin a, i theikungteng khempeuh netummang khin uh hi. A hawng khempeuh netum uh a, a hiangte kang sengsang hi." 
Joel1:8 Nungak khat, a tenpih ding a lawmpa in a sihsan ciangin a kah bangin note zong kapin thum un." 
Joel1:9 Topa’ biakinn-ah biakna-in piak ding an le leenggahzu om nawn lo a, Topa’ na a sem siampite thumin a tau uh hi." 
Joel1:10 Lo ante kisusia a, leengguite keutum hi. Oliv kungte keugaw a, lolai-ah bangmah om nawn lo ahih manin leitang lungzuangin a thum hi." 
Joel1:11 Lokhote aw, dah un; leenggui ciingte aw, kap un; mangbuh le mangbuhham, lo an khempeuh a beita hi." 
Joel1:12 Leengguite keu a, theikungte vuai ta hi. Mang kawlsingte, nisuhte, epel kungte a kipan singkung khempeuh keumang khin hi. Mihingte a lungdamna dingteng zong a maimang ta hi." 
Joel1:13 Siampite aw, puanhampi silhin kap un; biakna tau-a nasemte aw, thumin tau un. Ka Pasian’ na a semte aw, biakinn sungah tum unla, zanthapai-in dahna lim puanhampi silh un. Note’ Pasian’ biakinn sungah piak ding an le leenggahzu khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Joel1:14 An tan’ ding thu pia unla, a thupi biak kikhopna bawl un. Note’ Topa Pasian’ biakinn sungah makaite le gammi khempeuh kaikhawm unla, Topa’ tungah kiko-in thum un." 
Joel1:15 Kalai! A hun hong naita! Topa’ ni hong naita a, Vanglianpa’ suksiatna hun hong naita hi." 
Joel1:16 Eima muh mahmahin lo ante kisusia a, eite’ Pasian’ biakinn sungah lungdamna a beita hi." 
Joel1:17 Guahtui om lo ahih manin khai kituhte khempeuh lei sungah keucip a, an khol ding bangmah om nawn lo ahih manin ansalte khempeuh a vekin kisia khinta hi." 
Joel1:18 A gilkial tuu le bawngte cimawhin tau uh a, lonona mun om nawn het lo ahih manin ganhing honte cimawh uh a, tuuhonte in zong haksatna thuak uh hi." 
Joel1:19 Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei in a kattum tawh kibangin, lonona leitang khempeuh le singkung khempeuh keumang khinta hi." 
Joel1:20 Luitui luang khempeuh kangcip khinta a, mei’ kattum bangin lonona khempeuh keucip khin ahih manin nangma tungah gamsate nangawn hong kiko uh hi." 
Joel2:1 Zion mualtungah peengkul tum unla, Pasian’ mual siangtho tungah pataukohna tum un. Topa ni hong naita ahih manin gam sung mi khempeuh lau ta uh hen." 
Joel2:2 Tua ni pen a mial, a lungzinhuai, meii kai-in khuazin’ ni ahi ding hi. Mualtung a meiipi kai bangin simzawh lohin kauphe honpi hong leeng muaimuai hi. Cikmahin hih bang thu omngei nai lo a, cikmah ciangin zong omkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:3 A madawkte, a haltum thei meikuang bang a, a nungdalte, mei-am alh tawh kibang hi. Amau hong tun ma-in gam sung teng khempeuh Eden huan a bang hi a, amau’ khit ciangin a kinusiacip keugaw gam tawh kibang hi. Amaute kiang pan a suakta bangmah om lo hi." 
Joel2:4 Amaute’ mel sakolte tawh kibang a, sakol galkapte bangin a tai uh hi." 
Joel2:5 Mualtung tengah a tuan zuazua laitakun sakol leeng ging zuazuate le gamlak a lopa omte kangin a puak ziazua tawh kibang uh a, galsim dingin a kithawi, galkap honpi tawh kibang uh hi." 
Joel2:6 Amaute hong pai ciangin mi khempeuh lau uh a, a maitang uh daanggawp hi." 
Joel2:7 Galte bangin hong sim uh a, galkapte bangin kulh tungah hong kah uh hi. A vekpi-in tangtakin mai hong nawt uh a, a hong heempai kuamah om lo hi." 
Joel2:8 Amau’ lampi san ciat hong tawn uh a, a kiphukha kuamah om lo uh hi. Amau mah dal nadingin a kibawlte hong phugawp uh a, khawl hetloin hong paisuak uh hi." 
Joel2:9 Khuapi sung hong kidenna uh a, kulh tung khawngah tai zaizai uh hi. Inn tung khawngah kahto ngeingai uh a, gutate bangin tawlet-ah hong lut uh hi." 
Joel2:10 Amau’ mai-ah leipi ling a, vanpi nangawn ling damdam hi. Ni le kha zong mialta a, aksite zong taang nawn lo hi." 
Joel2:11 Ama mihonpite tam mahmah uh ahih manin amaute thu pia-in a mai uhah Topa awng a, ama thupiakna bangin a semte hat mahmah uh hi. Topa’ ni ding kihtakhuai mahmah ahih manin a thuakzo ding kua om ding ahi hiam?" 
Joel2:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu mahmah nangawnin lungsim tak tawh kisik kikin, an tangin, kapin, thumna tawh kei kiangah hong paikik un." 
Joel2:13 Na dah taktakna uh lungkhamna tawh langsak unla, na puante uh a balkek bek hi kei un,” hong ci hi. Topa, note’ Pasian kiangah ciahkik un. Amah migi mahmahin hehpihna a nei hi a, a lungduai-in hong huh nuam tawntung a, gim hong pia loin hong maisak nuam tawntung hi." 
Joel2:14 Topa, eite’ Pasian in a lungsim hong kheelin an hauhsakna tawh thupha hong piakha ding hi. Tua hileh ama tungah an le leenggahzu tawh biakna i pia thei ding hi." 
Joel2:15 Zion mual tungah peengkul tumin an tanna ding thu pia unla, biak kikhopna khat nei un." 
Joel2:16 Mite kaikhawm unla, amaute siansuah un. A khangham mite sam unla, naupangte zong kaikhawm un. Nawine lai naungekte zong paipih un. A kiteng cil nungak le tangvalte nangawn in a omna uh nusia-in hong pai uh hen." 
Joel2:17 Topa’ na a sem siampite, biakinn sung innliim le biakna tau kikalah kapin thu ngen uh hen la, “ Topa aw, na mite hong hehpih in. Minam dangte in, ‘Na Pasian uh koi-ah om ahi hiam,’ ci-in kote hong simmawhsak kei in. Amaute’ nuihsatin kote hong omsak kei in,” ci uh hen." 
Joel2:18 Tua ciangin Topa in ama leitang hong donin, ama mite hong hehpih hi." 
Joel2:19 Topa in ama mite’ thungetna dawng a, “Tu-in note tungah an, leenggahzu le sathau ka hong pia a, na kham takun na ne ding uh hi. Minam dangte’ simmawhin na om nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Joel2:20 Leilu lam gam panin a hong pai mite, note kiang panin sehnel gamah ka hawlkhia ding a, a madawkte uh nisuahna tuipi sungah khia-in, a nungdalte uh nitumna tuipi sungah ka khia ding a, amaute in note tungah hong bawlna hangin a luanghawmte uh uihgawp ding hi." 
Joel2:21 “Lote aw, lau nawn kei unla, lungdam kipakin om un. Topa in note a dingin a lianpi hong bawlsak zo hi." 
Joel2:22 Ganhingte aw, lau nawn kei un. Gam sung tengah lo nota a, singkungte gahta-in, theigah le leenggah tampi a om hi." 
Joel2:23 “Zion mite aw, kipak unla, Topa na Pasian uh tungah lungdam ta un. Note in an na hauh theih nadingun nidanga bangin khuapi guah, tuk guah le phalbi guah, a hoihbekzah hong zusak hi." 
Joel2:24 Na ancilna phual uh an tawh kidim ding a, na koihna uh umlebeel khempeuh leenggahzu le sathau tawh kidim ding hi." 
Joel2:25 Note a hong sim dingin ka hong sawl kauphe honpi, a tuan kauphe, a susia kauphe, a pettan kauphe, hih ka galkap honte in a hong neksak kum sungin a piang ding teng tang kong piakik ding hi." 
Joel2:26 Tu-in nek ding tampi nei-in na gil uh vah ding a, note a dingin a lamdang nate a hong bawlsak Topa na Pasian uh na phat ding uh hi. Tua ciangin ka mite hong kisimmawh nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:27 Tua ciangin no Israel mite lakah kei ka omna thu, keimah Topa pen note’ Pasian ka hihna thu, kei simloh kuamah dang a om lohna na thei ding uh hi. Ka mite hong kisimmawh nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:28 “Tua khit ciangin mi khempeuh tungah ka kha ka sung ding a, na puteekte un mang manin na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh hi." 
Joel2:29 Tua hun ciangin nasem numei le nasem pasalte tung nangawnah ka kha ka sung ding hi. 
Joel2:30 “Tua ciangin vantung le leitungah hilhkholhna lim ahi, sisan kiluansakna, meikatna le meikhu lompi hong om ding hi." 
Joel2:31 Topa’ ni, tua a lauhuai hun a hong tun ma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi." 
Joel2:32 Ahi zongin Topa’ tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. Topa’ gensa bangmahin Zion Mual le Jerusalem khua sungah a suakta mi om ding uh hi. Topa in a teel mite, suakta ding uh hi." 
Joel3:1 “Tua hun ciangin Judah le Jerusalem, a nidang hun lai mah uh ka bangsakkik ding hi." 
Joel3:2 Minam dang khempeuh kaikhawmin Jehoshafat Kuam-ah ka paipih ding hi. Ka mihingte tungah a bawlnasa uh hangin tua munah amaute thu ka khen ding hi. Amaute in Israel mite, gam dangah thehthang uh a, ka gam sung teng phelhawm mangkhin uh hi." 
Joel3:3 A galmatte uh kua in ngah ding, ci-in ai san uh a, zu le numei lei nadingin numeino le naupangnote sila-in a zuak uh hi." 
Joel3:4 “Taia khua, Sidon khua, le Filistia gam khempeuh aw, kei bang hong cih nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Bang khat peuhpeuh hangin hong thukkik nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Kei a hong thukkik na hih uhleh, kei zong manlang takin kong thukkik pah ding hi." 
Joel3:5 Ka ngun, ka kham, le ka na manpha tampite la-in, na biakinn sung uhah na puak uh hi." 
Joel3:6 Judah le Jerusalem mite, amau’ gam panin gamlapi-ah paipihin, Grik mite tungah na zuak uh hi." 
Joel3:7 Tu-in amaute na zuakna uh mun panin a lakhia kik ding ka hi a, amaute tungah na bawl bangun note tungah kong bawl ding hi." 
Joel3:8 Na tanute uh le na tapate uh Judah mite tungah ka zuak ding a, amaute in a gamlapi-a om Seba minamte tungah zuaksawn ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in gen khinzo hi." 
Joel3:9 “Minam dangte tungah hih bangin thuzaksakna bawl in: Galhang mite sam unla, galdo dingin kithawi un. Galkap khempeuh kaikhawmin hong kuan un!" 
Joel3:10 Lokhawhna tute namsau-in seek unla, singhiang heuhna temkawite teipi-in seek un. A thahat lote nangawn in do uh hen." 
Joel3:11 Kimkotah a om minam dang khempeuh aw, manlangin hong kuan unla, tua kuamah hong kikhawm un. Topa aw, na galhangte hong paipih suk in." 
Joel3:12 “Minam dangte hong kithawi hen la, Jehoshafat Kuam-ah hong kuan suk uh hen. Kimkotah a om minam dang khempeuh’ thu a khen dingin Topa ahi keimah, tua munah ka tu ding hi." 
Joel3:13 Amaute gilo mahmah uh ahih manin anlak huna buhsi bangin at gawp unla, leenggahtui dawhna a dim letin a luang, leenggah cilna kuang sunga om leenggah bangin tuancil gawp un,” a ci hi." 
Joel3:14 Thukhenna Kuam-ah a tul a thenin om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai munah Topa’ ni hong tung baih ding hi. 
Joel3:15 Ni le kha mialta a, aksite zong taang nawn lo hi." 
Joel3:16 Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawksuk a, Jerusalem panin hong awngkek a, vanpi le leipi a ling damdam hi. Ahi zongin Topa pen ama mite’ belh pa hi a, Israel mite a hu ding hi." 
Joel3:17 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel-te aw, ka mual siangtho Zion tungah a teng keimah pen Topa note’ Pasian ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi. Jerusalem pen a siangtho biakna khuapi hi ding a, gamdang mite in zokik nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Joel3:18 Tua hun ciangin mualtung khempeuh leenggui lo hi ding a, mual neute khempeuh tungah bawnghon dim ding a, Judah gam sung khempeuhah tui tampi om ding hi. Topa’ biakinn panin luitui khat hong luangkhia ding a, Shitthim kuamsung khempeuh a kawtsak ding hi." 
Joel3:19 “Amaute in Judah gam simin, mawhnei lo mite that uh ahih manin, Egypt gam, sehnel gam suakin, Edom gam, gam sia suak ding hi." 
Joel3:20 A kithat mite’ phu keimah in ka la ding a, a mawhte ka khahkhong kei ding hi. Judah gamah mi teng tawntung ta ding a, Jerusalem-ah a khangkhangin mi om tawntung ding a, Zion Mual-ah Topa a teng ding hi.” a ci hi." 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Tekoa khua-a a teng tuucingte lakah Amos a kici mi khat om hi. Uzziah pen Judah kumpi hi-in Joash’ tapa Jeroboam in Israel kumpi a sep laitak, zinlin’ ma kum nih hun laitakin Pasian in Amos tungah hih thute kilangsak hi." 
Amos1:2 Amos in, “Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawksuk a, Jerusalem khua panin hong awngkek hi. Tua ahih manin lonona gamteng keugawp a, Karmel mualdawn dum dide teng kausan ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos1:3 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Damaskas khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in an gawina suang tawh gawizan bangin, Gilead gammite gawigawp uh hi." 
Amos1:4 Tua ahih manin Hazael innkuante mei tawh ka hal ding a, a meikuang in Kumpi Benhadad’ munmuanhuaite kangtum ding hi." 
Amos1:5 Damaskas khuakulhpi zawlte ka sutan ding a, Aven Kuama teng mi khempeuh le Betheden Kuam sungah a om gam ukte khempeuh keimah in ka susia ding a, Syria mite ahihleh Kir gamah salin kipaipih ding hi." 
Amos1:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gaza khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minambup khat sal dingin manin, Edom mite tungah ap uh hi." 
Amos1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gaza khuapikulh ka kangsak ding a, a munmuanhuai teng a kangtummang ding hi." 
Amos1:8 Ashdod khuapi-ah a teng mite ka lakhia ding a, Ashkelon khuapi ukte ka beisak ding hi. Ekron khuapi ka sugawp ding a, Filistia mi a omlaite si ding uh hi." 
Amos1:9 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Taia khuamite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minambup khat Edom mite tungah ap uh a, lawmta dinga a thuciamna uh zui lo uh hi." 
Amos1:10 Tua ahih ciangin Taia khuapikulh ka kangtumsak ding a, a munmuanhuai teng kangtummang ding hi." 
Amos1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Edom mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a sanggam uh Israel-te namsau tawh delh uh a, hehpihna lungsim nei lo uh hi. A hehna uh damsak ngei lo uh a, a tawntungin heh niloh uh hi." 
Amos1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Teman gam sung khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding a, Bozrah khuapi munmuanhuai teng kangtum ding hi." 
Amos1:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ammon mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in huaihamin gam a deihthuah manun Gilead gam simgawp uh hi." 
Amos1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Rabbah khuapikulh ka haltum ding a, a munmuanhuai teng khempeuh kangtum ding hi. Galdo a kikona aw ging ding a, tua kidona awging khuapi huihnung bang ding hi." 
Amos1:15 A kumpipa uhleh a uliante uh salin kiman ding hi. 
Amos2:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Moab mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leiseek cianna-ah a kizang leikang a zat dingin Edom kumpipa’ guhte a hal uh hi." 
Amos2:2 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam sung khempeuh ka kangtumsak ding a, Kerioth khuapi munmuanhuai teng a kangtum ding hi. Galkapte’ otna le peengkul kitumna lak, galkidona gamlum sungah Moab mite si ding uh hi." 
Amos2:3 Tuate lakah Moab gam ukte ka sisak ding a, a uliante ka that ding hi." 
Amos2:4 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thukhamte nialin ka thuhilhnate zui lo uh hi. A pu a pate un a na biaksa pasian man lote mah in amaute lam pialsak uh hi." 
Amos2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam sung teng ka kangtumsak ding a, Jerusalem munmuanhuai teng a kangtum ding hi." 
Amos2:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite thumvei a khialh khit, a liveina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in leiba a loh zawh loh man bekun midik kimlai zuak uh a, khedap bu khat man a loh zawh loh man bekun mi cimawhte sila-in a zuak uh hi." 
Amos2:7 Amaute in mizawngte’ lutang leivui lakah tuancil uh a, keima min siangtho a ninsak dingin biakinn-a numei paktatte kiangah tangvalte le papite a pai uh hi." 
Amos2:8 Biakna tau gei khempeuhah amaute lum uh a, sum leitawina hangin a puan kepsakte uh a phah uh hi. Amaute in a Pasian uh’ biakinn sungah leibate kiang pan a laksak uh leenggahzu a dawn uh hi." 
Amos2:9 Ahi zongin amaute ka khualna hangin taamtak sing bangin a sang mahmah, tawsaw kung bangin a khauhtuak mahmah Amor mite amau a dingin ka suksiatsak a, a dawn pan a kipan a zung dongin ka sukmaisak hi." 
Amos2:10 No ka mihingte, Egypt gam pek panin hong paikhiatpihin, gamlakah kum sawmli sung kong makaih a, note a dingin Amor mite’ gam kong pia hi." 
Amos2:11 Na tapate uh pawlkhat kamsang dingin ka teel a, na tangvalte uh pawlkhat Nazir mi dingin ka teel hi. Israel aw, tu-a ka gen bangmah hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci khin hi." 
Amos2:12 Ahi zongin note in Nazir mite leenggahzu na dawnsak uh a, kamsangte in ka thu a gen lohna dingun thu na pia uh hi." 
Amos2:13 Tu-in buhlomte in a pua bawngleeng a netcipsuk bangin note na omna mun uhah kong nengcipsuk ding hi. 
Amos2:14 A tai hatte nangawn suakta zo lo ding a, a thahatte a hatna bei ding a, galhangte in amau’ nuntakna hu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Amos2:15 Thaltawite nangawn in do zo lo ding a, a tai hatte nangawn kisuahtak zo lo ding a, sakol tung tuangte nangawn in a nuntakna suahtak zo lo ding hi." 
Amos2:16 Tua ni ciangin galhang pente nangawn taimang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos3:1 Israel mite aw, note’ langkhat a Topa’ thugen, hih thu limtakin ngai un: Egypt gam panin na minam bupun note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Amos3:2 Leitung minam khempeuh lakah note bek hong thei-in, note bek ka hong don hi. Tua ahih manin na khialhna khempeuh uh hangin note gim ka hong pia ding hi." 
Amos3:3 Mi nih, thukimna om masa lopi-in lampi-ah tonkhawm thei uh ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:4 A samat ding mu lopi-in, gamlakah humpinelkai mawk hawk ahi hiam? Samat nei lopi-in, a kua sungah humpinelkai khanglai mawk hawk ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:5 Thang antah om lopi-in leilaka thangah vasa mawk awk ahi hiam? A su khat om lopi-in, thang kimawksai ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:6 Khuapi sungah pataukohna gal peengkul a kitum ciangin mite lau loin ommawk thei ahi hiam? Topa’ tunsak lohpi-in khuapi sungah lauhuaina mawk tun ahi hiam? 
Amos3:7 Topa Pasian in ama nasem kamsangte tungah ama geelna theisak masa lopi-in bangmah hih het lo hi. 
Amos3:8 Humpinelkai a hawk ciangin lau loin ki-om thei ahi hiam? Topa Pasian in thu a gen ciangin kua in ama thu gen loin om thei ding ahi hiam? 
Amos3:9 Samaria gam munmuanhuai-ah a om mite le Egypt gam munmuanhuai-ah a om mite tungah thu zasak unla, “Samaria-ah hong kikhawm unla, tua lai-a buaina lianpite le kinenniamnate hong mu un,” ci un." 
Amos3:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih mite in a manin gamtat ding thei lo uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, mi’ na a suh uh vante tawh a inn lianpipite uh kidimsak uh hi." 
Amos3:11 Tua ahih ciangin galte in a gam uh umcihin, a panmun muanhuai teng uh susiagawp ding a, a inn lianpipite uh luhgawp ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos3:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Humpinelkai’ nek baang tuu khebom nih ahi a, a bil themkhat bek ahi zongin tuucingpa in a ngah tei mah bangin, tutphah nip kiu khat le lupna themkhat tawh a kibang, Samaria sungah a om Israel mi tawmno khat suakta tei ding hi." 
Amos3:13 Tu-in ngai un: Jakob’ suanlekhakte hilhkhol un, Vanglian Pasian ahi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Amos3:14 Amau’ khialhna hangin Israel gim ka piak ni ciangin, Bethel-a biakna taute zong ka susia ding a, biakna tau kite kitanin leilakah kia ding hi." 
Amos3:15 Keimah in phalbi le khuakhal innte ka susia ding a, saiha tawh a kibawl inn hoihte zong kisia-in, inn lian khempeuh beimang ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:1 Bashan gam bawngpi bangin a thau mahmah, mizawngte nengniamin mi cimawhte a sugawp, na pasalte uh kiangah, “Ka dawn ding bang khatpeuh hong puak in,” ci-in a vaikhak no Samaria numeite aw, hih thu limtakin ngai un:" 
Amos4:2 Topa Pasian a siangtho ahih mah bangin, amah in kamciamna khat bawlkhin a, “Amaute in sikkawi tawh note hong kaihkhiat hun ding, ni khat ni ciangin hong tung taktak ding a, note khempeuh sikkawi-ah a awk ngasa na bang ding uh hi." 
Amos4:3 Na omna uh tawh a kinai pen kulhvang tawnin, ganhing sisa kaihkhiat bangin hong kikaikhia ding a, ninlom lakah hong kilawnkhia ding hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:4 Israel mite aw, Bethel-a mun siangtho-ah va pai unla, tua lai-ah khialhna va bawl un. Gilgal-ah va pai unla, va khial semsem un. Zingsang simin biakna va pia unla, ni thum simin sawm-ah-khat pia un." 
Amos4:5 Lungdam kohna-in silngo sawh anlum va pia unla, utthu-a biakpiaknate va pia-in va kisial un. Hihte pawl pen note’ hihnop pawl ahi hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:6 Na khuapi khempeuh uhah kial tungsakin, annek ding nei loin note a hong koihpa pen keimah hinapi-in, keima lamah nong kihei tuan kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:7 Tua ahih manin anlak hun ding kha thum bek in a sap laitak, lolai-a om ante in guahtui a sap mahmah laitakin guah ka zusak kei a, khuapi khat bekah zusakin a dangte-ah ka zusak kei hi. Lo khat bekah guah zu a, a zuk lohna lote a keutum hi." 
Amos4:8 Dangtak manin thaneemin khuapi nih khuapi thum mite tui zong dingin a khuavengte kiangah pai uh a, ahi zongin tuidawn tawm ding nangawn a kicing om lo hi. Tua hinapi-in kei kiangah nong kihei tuan kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:9 Na ankungte uh lung nesakin ka vulsak a, na ankungte uh cinasakin a kang dikdekin ka bawl hi. Na huante uh le na leenggui lote uh a hawmguakin ka koih hi. Na theikungte uh le na oliv kungte uh kauphe in gai khin hi. Tua bang hinapi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:10 Egypt gamah ka hong tunsak bangin note lakah gimna kong tungsak hi. Gal sungah na tangvalteng uh ka sisak a, na sakolte uh kong paihkhiatsak hi. Na giahphual sungte uh a uih mahmahna tawh na nakngek uh kong zensak hi. Tua bang hinapi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:11 Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite ka suksiat bangin note pawlkhat kong susia hi. Meikhuk panin a kiteenkhia singkhuah khat tawh na kibang uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:12 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite aw, hih bangin note tungah kong bawl ding hi. Hih bangin hong hih ding ka hih manin Pasian’ thukhenna a thuak dingin kiging un." 
Amos4:13 Bang hiam cih leh mualte bawlin huihte a piangsak pa, ama ngaihsutna mihingte tungah kilang sakin, sun nitaang kimlai zanin a bawlpa, leitung khempeuh a ukpa’ min, Topa, Vanglian Pasian ahi hi." 
Amos5:1 Israel mite aw, kap kawmin kong thugenna, limtakin ngai un:" 
Amos5:2 Nungak Israel puk khin a, thokik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Leilakah lum dildel a, a phongto ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Amos5:3 Tua ahih manin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel khuapi khat in galkap tulkhat kuankhiasak a, ahi zongin zakhat bek hong ciahkik hi. Khuapi dang khat in galkap zakhat kuankhiasak a, ahi zongin sawmkhat bek hong ciahkik hi." 
Amos5:4 Tua ahih manin Topa in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ci hi: Kei hong zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. 
Amos5:5 A bia dingin Beersheba-ah pai kei un. Bethel-ah kei hong zong kei un; a mawkna suak ding hi. Gilgal-ah zong lut kei un; Gilgal mite, sal a suak ding hi lel hi." 
Amos5:6 Topa zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. Amah na zon kei uhleh Josef mite tungah meikuang bangin amah hong kuang ding a, tua mei in Bethel-a om mite kangtumin, tua mei a phelh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Amos5:7 Thutang lumletin thuman mite lei a denna, note a dingin bangzahin nasia ding ahi hiam?" 
Amos5:8 Vana om aksi Seguk le Zawlzawngte bawlin, khuamial pen khuavak suaksak a, sun pen zan suaksakin, tuipi panin tuite samkhia a, leitungah tua tui a buakhia pa a min pen Topa ahi hi." 
Amos5:9 Amah in kulh muanhuaite le munmuanhuaite thakhatin susia thei hi. 
Amos5:10 Note in thukhen zumah thutang a deih pa na mudah uh a, thuman a gen pa na hua uh hi." 
Amos5:11 Note in mizawngte tuancilin, a an neihteng khempeuh uh laksak na hih manun, suangseek inn na lam hangun tua suang inn sungah na tengkha kei ding uh a, leenggui lo hoih na neih hangun a leenggahzu na dawnkha kei ding uh hi." 
Amos5:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhna tampite uh le na mawhna tampite uh a vekin ka thei khin hi. Thuman mite gimsakin, sumgolh na la uh a, thukhenna zumah mizawngte’ thu a manin na khen kei uh hi." 
Amos5:13 Tua ahih manin hih bang hunsiat hun laitakin thu ngaihsun thei mite, pau loin a om khikhe, lamdang sak ding hi lo hi." 
Amos5:14 Note na nuntak theih nadingun siatna gamta loin, thumanin gamtat ding hanciam un. Tua hileh na gensa uh mah bangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi." 
Amos5:15 Thusia mudahin thupha deih unla, thukhen zumah a manin thu khen un. Tua hileh Josef minam a suakta sunte tungah Topa, Vanglian Pasian hong thunuam khathei ding hi." 
Amos5:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Mihon omna lamkabom khempeuhah mite in na sa-in thumin tau ding uh a, kongzing khempeuhah kap ding uh hi. Khuaneu a mite a thum dingin kisam ding a, a kah siam mite a kap dingin kicial ding hi." 
Amos5:17 Note gim a pia dingin hong pai ding ka hih manin leenggui lo khempeuhah kahna aw ging ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos5:18 Topa’ ni hong tun ding a ngaklah note a dingin bangzah takin lauhuai ding ahi hiam? Note a dingin tua ni a hoihna hong om ding ahi hiam? Tua ni pen lungzin’ ni hi a, lungtaii ni hi lo hi." 
Amos5:19 Humpinelkai kihta-in vompi a tuakpa tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh mi khat a inn-ah hong tai a, a kawmah a khut a ngak ciangin gul in a tuk tawh kibang ding hi." 
Amos5:20 Topa’ ni pen khuavak ni hi loin khuamial ni hi a, maitaina a om lo lungzin’ ni ahi hi." 
Amos5:21 Na biakna pawite uh mudahin ka deih kei a, na biak kikhopnate uhah ka lung a kim kei hi." 
Amos5:22 Meihal biakna le an tawh biakna nong paipih uh hangin tuate kong sang kei ding hi. Thunuama biakpiak nadingin na hong paipih uh a thau mahmah ganhingte zong et-in ka nei vet kei ding hi. 
Amos5:23 La sa-in na gamlumnate uh khawl un; na lasakna uh a gingte ka za nuam kei hi. 
Amos5:24 Thutang, tui bangin luangkhiasak unla, thuman, a kang ngei lo tui bangin luangsak un." 
Amos5:25 Israel mite aw, gamlakah kum sawmli na om sungun gan go-a biakna le keima tungah piakna bangmah nong bawl kei uh hi." 
Amos5:26 Tua hinapi tu-in note a dingin na bawltawm uh aksi pasian-te ahi Sakkuth le Kaivuan milimte na biak manun 
Amos5:27 Damaskas khengin gamdang khatah sal dingin note kong paisak ding hi, Vanglian Pasian min a nei Topa in ci hi." 
Amos6:1 Israel minamte in muanin a hong neih, i minam lakah ulian ahi, Zion-ah nuamtakin a om hithiat, Samaria-ah lungmuang takin a om note a dingin zumhuai mahmah hi." 
Amos6:2 Kalneh khua-ah pai unla limtakin va en un. Tua ciangin Hamath khuapi lian ah va paisuak unla, Filistia-te’ khuapi Gath khua dong va paisuk un. Judah le Israel kumpi gamte sangin hoihzaw tuan a, amaute’ gam pen note’ gam sangin lianzaw tuan ahi hiam?" 
Amos6:3 Note’ tungah siatna hong tun ni ding, a kipelh theih nading na hanciam uh a, ahi zongin tua bang na hihnate un, siatna khangsak semsem zawsop hi." 
Amos6:4 Saiha kibawl lupna tungah a lum hithiat, tutphah nip tungah a kizia hiathiat, tuuno sa le bawngno sa, duhduhin a ne note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Amos6:5 David bangin la phuah nuam na sa uh a, lasaknate na tum nuam uh hi." 
Amos6:6 Leenggahzu hai lianpipi-in na dawn uh a, sathau hoihpente tawh na kizut uh hi. Ahi zongin Josef minamte’ siatna hangin themkhat zong na dah het kei uh hi." 
Amos6:7 Tua ahih ciangin note pen salin a pai masa pente na hi ding uh a, na nopsakna teng uh a beita ding ahi hi." 
Amos6:8 Topa Pasian thupi takin kiciam khin a, Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-te’ kiphatsakna ka hua a, a munmuanhuaite uh ka mu nuam kei hi. Tua ahih manin a khuapi le a sunga a omteng, galte’ khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Amos6:9 Inn khat sungah mi sawm bek nangawn a suakta a om laina a om leh, tuate khempeuh zong a si khin veve ding hi." 
Amos6:10 Mi khatpeuh a sihna inn panin a vui dingin a si puakhia-in, a behte khatpeuh hong pai ciangin, innsung tawngah a bu mi khatpeuh kiangah, “Hih lai-ah a si dang a om hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Om lo hi; pau kei in. Topa’ min na lawhkhak ding kidawm in,” ci-in kidawngkik ding hi." 
Amos6:11 Topa in thu a piak ciangin inn liante kisatzanin inn neute kisatnen ding hi. 
Amos6:12 Sakolte, suangkeen tungah tai thei ngei a, bawngtalte tawh tuipi tung kikho thei ahi hiam? Tua hinapi-in note in thutang, gu na suaksak uh a, thuman, a khial na suaksak uh hi." 
Amos6:13 Lodebar khua bang lel na lakzawhna uhah na lungdam uh a, “Eima thahatna tawh Karnaim khua i lazo hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Amos6:14 Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel mite a do dingin minam khat ka khangsak ding a, leilu lamah, Hamath khua lutna ciangka panin, leitaw lamah Arabah lui kikal dong, note hong nuaigawp ding uh hi, a ci hi." 
Amos7:1 Topa Pasian in hih bangin hong musak hi: Kumpipa’ gan an ding lopa a ki-at khit phet, selkik dingin a kisak laitakin Topa in kauphe honpi a piangsak hi." 
Amos7:2 Kauphe in gam sung lopate a gaih khit ciangin, keimah in Topa tungah ka thum a, “Topa Pasian aw, na mihingte’ mawhna maisak in. Amaute minam tawm hi a, zawngkhal uh ahih manin bangci-in thuakzo ding ahi uh hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Amos7:3 Topa in zong a lungsim hong kheelkik a, “Tua na muh bangin hong piang nawn lo ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Amos7:4 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin hong musak leuleu hi: Meikuang tawh a mite gim a pia dingin amah hong kithawi a, tuipite keutum sakin leitung zong a haltum dingin a hong kipan hi." 
Amos7:5 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian kiangah ka thum a, “ Topa aw, khawl dih in. Na mite, minam tawm hi a, zawngkhal mahmah uh ahih manin bangci-in thuakzo ding uh ahi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Amos7:6 Tua ciangin Topa in zong a lungsim hong kheelkik a, “Na muh bangin hih zong hong piang nawn lo ding hi,” Topa Pasian in hong ci hi." 
Amos7:7 Tua ciangin Topa in hih bangin hong musak hi: Khaukhai zangin a kiciang kulh gei khatah, Topa a ding ka mu a, a khut sungah khaukhai khat a tawi hi." 
Amos7:8 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Amos aw, bang na mu hiam?” hong ci hi. Kei zong dawngin, “Khaukhai khat mu ing,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “En in, ka mi Israel-te a khialhna uh a kitheih nadingin hih khaukhai tawh ka en hi. Amaute gim ka piak ding ka khiakik nawn kei ding hi." 
Amos7:9 Isaac’ suanlekhakte’ biakna munte kinusiacipin, Israel mite’ siangtho munte kisusia ding a, Kumpi Jeroboam’ innkuante a simgawp dingin gal ka kuansak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Amos7:10 Bethel-ah a om siampi nasem Amaziah in Israel Kumpi Jeroboam kiangah thu puak a, “Amos in Israel mite lakah nang hong sawm hi. Ama thugen in i gam sung siasak ding hi." 
Amos7:11 Amah in hih bangin thu gen a, ‘Gal sungah Jeroboam si ding a, Israel mite amau’ gam panin salin kipaikhiatpih ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a khia hi." 
Amos7:12 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Amos kiangah, “Kamsang kineih pa aw, na Judah gamah ciah inla, tua lai-ah na nuntakna ding na semin, thu va gen in." 
Amos7:13 Hih lai pen kumpipa’ biakinn mun, minam bup biakinn mun ahih manin Bethel-ah thu hong gen nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
Amos7:14 Amos in Amaziah dawng a, “Kei pen kamsang ka hi kei a, kamsangte’ ta zong ka hi beek kei hi. Kei pen tuucing ka hi a, theithek huan puah tawh a thuahkhawm ka hi hi." 
Amos7:15 Ka tuucinna panin Topa in kei hong samkhia a, ama mi Israel-te tungah thugen dingin a hong sawl hi." 
Amos7:16 Tu-in Topa’ thugen ngai in. Israel mite’ langkhatah thu ka gen ding na hong kho a, Isaac’ suanlekhakte’ langkhatah thu ka gen ding na hong kham hi." 
Amos7:17 Amaziah aw, tua bangin kampau na hih manin Topa in nang kiangah, ‘Na zi pen khua sungah numei paktat suak ding a, gal sungah na tate si ding uh hi. Na gam kiphelkhamin midang tungah kipia ding a, lawkite’ gam sungah nang na si ding hi. Israel mite, galmatin kipaipih ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos8:1 Topa in hih bangin hong musak hi: Seeng sunga kikoih singgah min ka mu hi. 
Amos8:2 Topa in, “Amos aw, bang na mu hiam?” hong ci hi. “Seeng sunga kikoih singgah min ka mu hi,” ci-in kei zong ka dawng hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka mi Israel-te a dingin a bei hun uh tungta hi. Amaute gim ka piak ding ka khawl nawn kei ding hi." 
Amos8:3 Tua ni ciangin kumpi inn-ah lungdam lasakna awgingte, kahna awging suak ding hi. Mun khempeuhah misi dim ding a, mun citengah kipaithangin gamdai ding hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Amos8:4 Mi cimawhte tuancil gawpin, gam sung mizawngte a susiagawp mite aw, hih thu ngai un:" 
Amos8:5 Note in na lungsim sung uhah, “I ante i zuak theih nadingin zumkhak hun bei ding i ngaklah hi. I mangbuhte i zuaktheih nadingin cik ciangin Sabbath ni bei ding ahi hiam? I antehna seu neuseekin sum tampi i ngen nuam a, tawikhaina man lo zangin a hong leite i khem nuam hi." 
Amos8:6 Khedap bu khat man dingin mizawngte sila-in i zuak nuam a, i mangbuh hoih lote sum tampi i khawng nuam hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Amos8:7 Topa, Israel Pasian kiciam a, “Na gamtatsiatnate uh ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Amos8:8 Tua ahih manin zin hong ling ding a, leitung a om mi khempeuh a kap ding uh hi. Nail Gunpi bangin leitung khempeuh khangto-in kiamsuk ding hi." 
Amos8:9 Tua ni ciangin sunkim laipi mahin ni ka tumsak ding a, sunkim laipi mahin leitung khempeuhah khua ka mialsak ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Amos8:10 Na lungdam pawite uh dahna ka suaksak ding a, na lasaknate uh kahna awging ka suaksak ding hi. Dahna limin puanhampi na silh ding uh a, na sam uh zong na mettol ding uh hi. A tapa khat neihsun a sihsuah nupa na bang ding uh hi. Tua hun pen a tawp dongin nasia semsem ding hi." 
Amos8:11 “Keimah in leitungah kialpi kong tunsak hun hong tung ding hi. Tua kialpi pen anletui duhna kialpi hi lo ding a, Topa’ thu zaknop mahmahna kialpi hi ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Amos8:12 Mihingte, leilu pan leitaw dong, Topa’ thu kanin vak kawikawi ding uh a, ahi zongin mu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Amos8:13 Tua ni ciangin nungakte le tangvalte dangtakin puk ding uh hi. 
Amos8:14 Samaria milim pasian Ashimah min tawh kiciam a, ‘Dan khuapi pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin,’ le ‘Beersheba khuapi pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin,’ a ci mite pukin thokik nawn lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos9:1 Biakna tau gei-ah Topa a ding ka mu a, hih bangin thu hong pia hi: “Biakinn bulpi khempeuh a kilin’ theih nadingin biakinn khuampiluzang nakpitakin satgawp in. Tuate satkham inla, mite’ luzang tusak in. Tua lai panin a suakta teng gal sungah ka sisak ding hi. A taikhia, a suakta, kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Amos9:2 Lei tosukin misite’ omna Leinuai-ah a va tun uh hangin tua lai-ah amaute ka su ding a, vantungah a kahtoh uh hangin zong, tua lai mahah amaute ka su veve ding hi." 
Amos9:3 Karmel mual dawnah a buk uh hangin, amaute zongin ka mankhia ding a, keima kiang panin tuipi tawng sungah bu ta le-uh zong, tuipi gulpite in a tukna ding thu ka pia ding hi." 
Amos9:4 Galte in a sal dingin hingmat ta le-uh zong, namsau tawh a thah nadingun thu ka pia ding hi. Amaute’ hoihna ding ngaihsun hetloin, amaute suksiat ding ka sawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos9:5 Vanglian Topa Pasian in leitung a lawn’ ciangin tuisuak a, leitung a om mi khempeuh a kap uh hi. Nail Gunpi bangin leitung buppi khangto-in kiamsuk ding hi." 
Amos9:6 Topa in vantungah a inndeite bawl a, van kuumpi tawh leitung a khuhsuk hi. Amah in tuipi panin tuite samkhia a, leitung khempeuhah tua tuite a sung hi. Hih bangin a bawlpa’ min pen Topa ahi hi." 
Amos9:7 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite aw, Ethiopia mite tawh a kibangin note ka hong bawl a, Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih bangin, Kaftor gam panin Filistia mite ka paikhiatpih a, Kir gam panin Syria mite ka paikhiatpih hi." 
Amos9:8 Keimah in hih a khial Israel kumpi gam ka encik a, hih leitung panin amaute ka susia ding hi. Ahi zongin a vekpi-un susiamang loin pawlkhat ka sitlai ding hi." 
Amos9:9 Keimah in thu ka pia ding a, anhaihna ciang tawh an a kihaih mah bangin keimah in Israel mite ka lok niloh ding hi. A hoih lo teng a kipaihkhiat theih nadingin minam dangte lakah ka haih ding hi." 
Amos9:10 Keima mite’ sung panin, “I tungah siatna hong tung ngei lo ding hi,” a ci mawhneite khempeuh, gal sungah si ding uh hi." 
Amos9:11 Tua ciangin inn tawh kibangin a siasa David ukna gam keimah in ka puahkik ding a, a vang teng hu-in, a sia teng ka puahkik ding a, a nidanga a ngeina lui mah uh ka bangsakkik ding hi." 
Amos9:12 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Edom gam a omlaiteng le keima mi ahi ngei minam khempeuh zo-in ngahkik ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos9:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: An a kihauh luat manin, anlak a kizawh ma-in lo khawhkik hun tungin, leenggahte, leenggahzu a bawl a kizawh ma-in a suankik hun hong tun ding, hun nuam hong tungta ding hi. Mual lian khempeuh panin leenggahzu khum hong taakkhia-in, mual neu khempeuh tungah leenggahzu a luang ding hi." 
Amos9:14 Ka mi Israel-te, amau’ gam ka tunkik ding a, a kisia a khuapite uh hoihtakin lampha kikin a sungah a teng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin, huan bawlin, a sunga piangte a ne ding uh hi." 
Amos9:15 Amaute a dingin ka piak gam sungah amaute ka koihkik ding a, tua ka piaksa gam panin kuamah in amaute lakhia kik nawn lo ding hi, Topa, note’ Pasian in ci hi, a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:1 Obadiah’ genkholhna: Edom gam tawh kisai-in Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Minamte lakah kamtai khat kisawlzo a, “Kithawi un! Edom mite a simgawp dingin kuankhia ni,” a cihna thu ka zazo hi." 
Obadiah1:2 En un, minamte lakah note kong neusak ding a, nakpitakin hong kisimmawh ding hi." 
Obadiah1:3 Na lungsim kiphatsakna un note a hong khemzo hi. Note in suang kulhpi beelin mual dawnah na ten manun, “Kua in eite hong puksakzo ding ahi hiam?” ci-in na ngaihsun uh hi." 
Obadiah1:4 Muvanlai bangin sangpi-ah leengin, aksite lakah bu na bawl hangun no kong khiasuk veve ding hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:5 Zanin na kiangah gutate le misuamte hong pai-in supna tampi na thuak hangin a deihteng bek uh hong guksak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Leenggah late in lolai-ah a sangte nusia laitei hi lo ahi uh hiam? 
Obadiah1:6 Ahih hangin Esau kibuluh khinzo a, a sum a pai khempeuh a kilaksak zo hi." 
Obadiah1:7 Na pawl teng in nang hong khemzo uh a, gamgi ciang dong hong hawlkhiazo uh a, na pawl teng in a hong zo khinta uh hi. Na ankuang umpihte in na nuai-ah thang hong siah khin uh a, “A pilna koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a hong ci uh hi." 
Obadiah1:8 Topa in: “Tua ni ciangin Edom sung pan a mipilte ka susia ding a, Esau’ gamah pilna ka beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:9 Teman khua aw, Esau’ gamah mi khempeuh a kithahlup khit nadingin na galhangte a meidawi ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Jakob bawlsia-in na thahna hangin maizumna in nang hong khuh ding a, na khantawnin na mangthang ding hi." 
Obadiah1:11 Namdangte in a neihsateng a puakkhiat ni-in gamdang mite a kongpi sungah a lut ni-in, Jerusalem-a vante hawmna ding ai a san ni-in, nangmah in gal et bek na hih manin nang zong a thukimpih na hi hi." 
Obadiah1:12 Na sanggamte uh a tuahsiat ni-in mu nuam dah hoh un. Judah mite a kisiat ni-in lungdamin nuam kei un. A kisiat ni-in lungdam kei un. A cihmawh ni-in nuihsan kei un. 
Obadiah1:13 Ka mite in haksatna a tuah ni-in a kongpi sungah tum kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a thuaknate uh mu nuam kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a sum a paite uh laksak kei un. 
Obadiah1:14 A suakta sunte a khaktan dingin na ding kei ding uh hi. A cihmawh ni-in a hinglai sunteng, a galte’ khut sungah na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam kimte tungah ka thukhenna ding ni a naizo hi. Nang bawl bangin nangma tungah hong kibawl ding hi. Na hih bangin na lu bukah hong tukik ding hi. 
Obadiah1:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mual siangtho tungah na thuak mah bangun, na kiim na pama om minamte khempeuh in zong ka gimpiakna a thuak ding uh hi. Thuak tawntung ding uh a, maimang ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:17 Ahih hangin Zion mualah pawlkhat va tai ding uh a, tua mun pen a siangtho suak ding hi. Jakob innkuante in amau’ gam mah luahkik ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:18 Tua ciangin Jakob innkuante mei bang ding uh a, Josef innkuante meikuang bang ding uh hi. Esau innkuante ninpa bang hi ding uh a, amaute in a hal ding uh hi. Amaute kangtum khin ding uh a, Esau innkuante khat zong a suakta kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a genzo hi." 
Obadiah1:19 Negeb gammite in Esau’ gam luah ding uh a, Shefelah mite in Filistia gam luah ding uh hi. Amaute in Efraim gam le Samaria gam luah ding uh a, Benjamin in Gilead gam luah ding hi." 
Obadiah1:20 Israel mi salin a omte in Kanaan gam Zarefat ciang dong luah ding uh a, Jerusalem mi, Sardis khua-ah salin a omte in Negeb gam khuapite a la ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:21 A gualzo Jerusalem khuamite in Esau’ gam simin uk ding uh a, tua gam pen Topa’ gam ahi ding hi." 
Jonah1:1 Topa in Amittai’ tapa Jonah tungah," 
Jonah1:2 “Kithawi inla, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi-ah va pai-in thu va hilh in; bang hang hiam cih leh amau’ gitlohna thu ka za khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:3 Ahih hangin Topa’ kiang pan Jonah taikhia-in Tarshish khua lamah a taisim dingin a kithawi zawsop hi. Joppa khua-ah paisuk a, Tarshish khua a zuan ding teembaw khat a mu hi. A sap man ding pia-in a tungah kah a, Topa’ kiang pan a taikhia dingin teembaw hawlte tawh Tarshish khua-ah a pai hi." 
Jonah1:4 Ahih hangin Topa in tuipi tungah huih nakpi-in nungsak a, huihpi hatlua ahih manin teembaw a kisia dekdek hi." 
Jonah1:5 Tua ciangin teembaw hawlte lau uh a, a pasian ciat uh’ kiangah a kiko ciat uh hi. Teembaw a zantuam nadingin a sunga vante tuipi sungah a paai uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in teembaw sungtawng lamah Jonah na lutsukin a na ihmu hithiat hi." 
Jonah1:6 Teembaw ukpa in amah a muh ciangin, “Ihmu pa aw, bang na cihna ahi hiam? Tho inla na pasian kiangah thu ngen in. I sih loh nadingin amah in eite hong ngaihsun khathei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:7 Tua khit ciangin teembaw hawlte in, “Hong pai dih un. Kua’ hangin hih bang gimna ei’ tungah hong tung ahi hiam, cih i theih nadingin ai san dih ni,” ci-in khatlekhat a kikum uh hi. Ai a san uhleh Jonah tung a tu hi." 
Jonah1:8 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Bang hangin hih gimna ei’ tungah hong tung ahi hiam, hong gen in. Na nasep bang ahi hiam? Koi lai pana hong pai na hi hiam? Na gam bang ahi hiam? Kua minam na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Jonah1:9 Amah in, “Kei pen Hebru mi ka hi hi; tuipi le leitang a bawl, vantungte’ Pasian ahi Topa ka bia hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:10 Tua ciangin tua mite lau mahmah uh a, “Bang hangin hih bangin gamta mawk na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa’ kiang pan amah a taikhiasim ahihlam a gen khitsa ahih manin a thei khinzo uh hi." 
Jonah1:11 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Ei a dingin tuipi a hong daihtheih nadingin nang bang kong cih ding uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi lauhuai semsem hi." 
Jonah1:12 Amah in, “Hong domto unla, tuipi sungah hong khia un; tua hileh no a dingin tuipi a hong dai ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih huihpi na thuakna uh keima hang ahi hi, cih ka thei hi,” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Jonah1:13 Tua bang a cih hangin amaute in teembaw a khawlsak dingin hahkatin lei lamah a hot teitei uh hi. Ahih hangin a hihzo kei uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi a hat semsem hi. 
Jonah1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ kiangah amaute kiko-in, “ Topa aw, hih mipa ka sihsak manun kote hong sisak kei inla, mi that hi, ci-in hong ngawh kei ta in, ci-in kong thum uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah in pha na sak banga na bawl ahi hi,” ci-in thu a ngen uh hi." 
Jonah1:15 Tua ciangin Jonah domto-in tuipi sungah a khiat uhleh tuipi a dai pah hi. 
Jonah1:16 Tua ciangin tua mite in Topa kihta mahmah uh a, Topa’ tungah biakna pia-in thuciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Jonah1:17 Ahih hangin Jonah a nawmvalh dingin Topa in ngapi khat a geelkholhsa hi a, tua ngapi’ gil sungah Jonah sun thum le zan thum sung a om hi." 
Jonah2:1 Tua ciangin Jonah in tua ngapi’ gil sung panin Topa a Pasian kiangah thu ngen a," 
Jonah2:2 “Ka cihmawhna panin Topa ka sam a, amah in kei hong dawng hi. Sihna gam Sheol panin kong kiko a, nangmah in ka aw nong za hi." 
Jonah2:3 Tuipi thuk sungah kei nong khia a, tui in kei hong tuumcip hi. Na tuihualte khempeuh in kei hong tum hi." 
Jonah2:4 Tua ciangin keimah in, ‘Na omna panin kei hong kihawlkhia hi. Na biakinn siangtho hong koici et kik thei ding ka hi hiam?’ ka ci hi." 
Jonah2:5 Tui in kei hong tuamcip a, ka kimkotah hong umcih hi. Tuipi tunga lopate in ka lu hong vialcip hi." 
Jonah2:6 Mualte’ bul tuipi taw dong ka va paisuk a, kong hong kikhaknelh tawntungna mun ka tun hangin tua Leihawmpi sung panin a nungta-in nong lato veve hi, Topa ka Pasian aw." 
Jonah2:7 Kei ka lung a kiat ciangin Topa kong phawk a, ka thungetna, na biakinn siangtho sung, nangma kiang hong tung hi." 
Jonah2:8 Kimanna a nei lo milim a biate in nangmah hong taisan uh hi. 
Jonah2:9 Ahih hangin ke’n ahihleh lungdamna aw tawh biakna kong pia ding a, ka ciamsa thu ka tangtungsak ding hi. Topa’ kiang pan hotkhiatna hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah2:10 Tua ciangin Topa in tua ngapi sawl a, amah in lei keu tungah Jonah a luakhia hi." 
Jonah3:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Jonah tungah a nihveina thu gen a," 
Jonah3:2 “Kithawi inla, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi-ah va pai-in kong gensa thu taangko in,” a ci hi." 
Jonah3:3 Jonah zong kithawi pah a, Topa’ cih bangin Nineveh khua-ah a pai hi. Nineveh khua pen khuapi lian mahmah khat hi a, ni thum sung tak kikantan hi." 
Jonah3:4 Jonah zong khuasung lam manawhin kipan a, ni khat sung lam a pai khit ciangin, “Ni sawmli khit ciangin hih Nineveh khuapi kisusia ding hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Jonah3:5 Nineveh khuamite kisikin Pasian um uh a, antan’ ding thu thangsakin, a golpen pan a kipan a neupen dongin puanhampi a silh uh hi." 
Jonah3:6 Nineveh khua kumpipa in tua thu a zak ciangin a kumpi tokhom tung pan dingkhia-in a kumpi puan suahkhia a, puanhampi silhin vut lakah a tu hi." 
Jonah3:7 Tua ciangin amah in Nineveh khuasung khempeuhah thu thangsakin taangkosak a, “Kumpipa le uliante’ thu tawh: Mihing ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin, bawnghon ahi a, tuuhon ahi zongin, kuamah in bangmah ciam thei lo ding, an ne thei lo ding, tui dawn thei lo ding uh hi." 
Jonah3:8 Mihing le ganhingte in puanhampi silhin Pasian’ tungah nakpi-in kiko ta uh hen. Mi khempeuh, a khialhnate uh le a gitlohnate uh panin kihei ta uh hen." 
Jonah3:9 Eite i sih loh nadingin Pasian kisikin a hehna damsak lo ding hi, kua in ci thei na hi uh hiam?” a cisak hi." 
Jonah3:10 Pasian in amau’ hihnate mu a, a khialhna uh panin a kihei uh a muh ciangin kisik a, amau tungah hih dingin a cihsa siatna a tungsak nawn kei hi." 
Jonah4:1 Ahih hangin tua thu hangin Jonah lungkim hetloin a heh hi. 
Jonah4:2 Topa’ kiangah thu ngen a, “Kong thum hi, Topa aw; ka gam sungah ka omlai pekin hici mah in teh, ci hi lo ka hi hiam? Hanciamin Tarshish khua-ah ka taisimna zong tua hang mah ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen a hehpih thei Pasian, a hehhak, a migi mahmah, siatna tunsak ding a kisiknuam Pasian na hihna kong thei hi." 
Jonah4:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, tu-in ka nuntakna hong la in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntak sangin sileng kei a dingin a hoihzaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:4 Topa in zong, “Na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:5 Tua ciangin khuapi pualamah Jonah paikhia a, nisuahna lamah ama a’ ding bukno khat lamin tua lai-ah a tu hi. Tua khuapi bang hong ci ding hiam, cih a en dingin a buk liim nuai-ah tu-in a ngak hi." 
Jonah4:6 Topa Pasian in zong Jonah a liah ding le a lungkhamna a tawldamsak dingin umgui khat a tungah a zaamsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua umgui hangin Jonah lungdam mahmah hi. 
Jonah4:7 Ahih hangin a zingsang khuavak ciangin Pasian in tua umgui lungno khat nesak ahih manin a keu hi. 
Jonah4:8 Ni hong suah ciangin Pasian in nisuahna lam panin huih a sa mahmah nungsak a, ni in zong Jonah’ luzang kapsuk veva ahih manin a gim mahmah hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nuntak sangin si leng kei a dingin hoihzaw hi,” ci-in a sih nading thu a ngen hi." 
Jonah4:9 Ahih hangin Pasian in Jonah kiangah, “Tua umgui hangin na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Jonah in, “Ka heh ding kilawm sa tham loin hehlua-in ka si zongin kilawm ka sa veve hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:10 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nang in na gimpih lohpi, na khansak lohpi, zan khat thu-in hong piangin zan khat thu mahin a si tua umgui pammaih na sa hi." 
Jonah4:11 Tua ahihleh keimah in ganhing tampi tham lo, a taklam khut le a veilam khut nangawn a khenthei nai lo naupang tul za le tul sawmnih sangin a tamzawte’ tenna, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi pammaih sa lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Micah1:1 Judah gam kumpi Jotham, Ahaz, le Hezekiah-te’ hun laitakin, Moresheth khuami Mikah tungah Topa in thu a pia hi. Samaria le Jerusalem tawh kisai-in Topa in Mikah tungah hih thute a lak hi." 
Micah1:2 No minam khempeuhte aw, hih thu za un: Leitungah a teng mi khempeuhte aw, hih thu ngai un: Note’ langkhatah Topa Pasian in teci pang a, a vantung biakinn panin thu hong gen hi."
