Micah1:3 Ama mun siangtho panin Topa hong pai a, amah in leitung mualsang dawnte hong siksuk ding hi." 
Micah1:4 Meikhuk sungah khuainun a kikoih bangin ama khenuai-ah mualliante tuisuak ding a, mualtung panin tui a luangsuk bangin, guam sungah tua mualte luangsuk ding hi." 
Micah1:5 Pasian’ tungah Israel-te’ mawhna le a khialhnate uh hangin hih thute khempeuh a piang ahi hi. Israel-te’ khialhna kua ngawh ding ihi hiam? Samaria mite ngawh ding ihi hiam? Judah gam sungah milim bia-in a khial kua ahi hiam? Jerusalem mite ahi hi. 
Micah1:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Samaria khuapi, gamlak a ninkholna mun, leenggui suanna mun lel dingin ka bawl ding hi. A khuasunga suangte zong guam sungah ka nilsuk ding a, a khuapi bulpite ka dawksak ding hi." 
Micah1:7 A milim manphate khempeuh kisuzan gawp ding a, mei tawh kisusia ding hi. Pasian’ tungah a thuman lohna hangun mihingte in hih milimte nei uh ahih manin, a thuman lohna uh tawh kizui-in tu-in thuakkik ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Micah1:8 Tua ahih manin kei kapin ka thum ding a, ka dahna thu ka lah nadingin khe guak le guaktangin ka vak ding hi. Gam-ui bangin ka ham ding a, vasa-kalaoh bangin ka tau ding hi." 
Micah1:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Samaria’ meima kidamsak thei lo hi; Judah in zong tua bangmah a thuak ding ahi ta hi. Ka mite’ tenna Jerusalem khua mahmah, tua siatna in hong ban ta hi." 
Micah1:10 I guallelhna thu Gath khuamite theisak kei unla, na kahna uh amaute musak kei un. Bethleafrah khua sungah na lungkhamna uh langsakin, leivui lakah kikhuk un." 
Micah1:11 Shafir khua-ah a teng mite aw, guaktangin maizumna tawh salin pai un. Zanaan khua-a teng mite, a hingin paikhia ngei lo ding hi. Bethezel khuamite’ kahna le thumna na zak uh ciangin, tua khua sungah belh ding munmuanhuai a om lohna na thei ding uh hi." 
Micah1:12 Topa in Jerusalem kulhpi dongah gimna lianpi tungsak ta ahih manin Maroth khuamite nakpitakin patau uh hi. 
Micah1:13 Lakhish khua-ah a teng mite aw, na sakol galkapte uh a leeng bulh pak un. Note in Israel-te’ khialhnateng zuikha na hih manun, Jerusalem zong a khialsakte na hi uh hi." 
Micah1:14 Tu-in no Judah mite aw, Moresethgath khua, mangpha khak un. Israel kumpite in Akzib khua panin huhna ngah lo ding hi." 
Micah1:15 Mareshah khuamite aw, note a hong zong ding pa ka hong paisak ding hi, Topa in ci hi. Adullam leihawm sungah Israel kumpipa bu ding hi." 
Micah1:16 Judah mite aw, na it mahmah na tate uh, sal a suak dingin hong kilaksak ding ahih manin, amaute’ hangin na dahna limun na sam uh met unla, musane bangin na lu uh tolsak un." 
Micah2:1 A lupna tungah lumin gitlohna a geelgeelte in gimna ngah tahen. Zingsang khua a vak ciangin, hihtheih ding hun a ngah phetun, a ngaihsutsa uh gitlohna a semkhia uh hi." 
Micah2:2 Lo deih le-uh, mi-a’ sut uh a, inn deih le-uh, mi-a’ mah sut uh hi. Mite bawlsia-in, a inn le a neihsa uh a sut uh hi." 
Micah2:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Note’ tungah gimna tunsak ding ka ngaihsun a, tua gimna tawh na kipelh thei kei ding uh hi. Note a dingin hun hoih lo hi ding ahih manin kiphatsakna tawh na gamta nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Micah2:4 Tua bang hun hong tun ciangin mite in note’ gim ngahna thugentehna-in zangin, dah la phuakin sa ding uh a, “Eite i sia khin taktak hi. Topa in i gam hong laksak a, ei a hong mante tungah hong piaksak hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Micah2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa’ mite lakah leitang a kihawm ciangin, kuamah in leitang na ngah kei ding uh hi." 
Micah2:6 Amaute in kei kiangah, “Tua bang thu hong gen kei in. Tua bang thu gen dingin kilawm lo hi. Tua bangin Pasian in hong minsiasak lo ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Micah2:7 Israel mite aw, “ Topa a lung tom ta a, hihte khempeuh, ama hong bawl mah ahi hiam?” na cih ding uh kilawm lo hi. Ka thugenna kammalte, a thuman mite a dingin a hoih hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Micah2:8 Ahi zongin Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: Note pen ka mite’ gal na suak uh a, galsung panin a hong ciahkik, lungmuang a a inn-ah a om mite’ puantualpi ngahte na sut uh hi." 
Micah2:9 Ka mihingte’ numeite, amau’ inn nuam panin na hawlkhia uh a, a tate un a ngah ding keima thuphate na taansak paisuak uh hi." 
Micah2:10 Tu-in ding unla paikhia un. Na khialhna hangun a lauhuai suksiatna tuak ding na hih manun, hih lai mun pen note a dingin mun nuam hi lo hi." 
Micah2:11 Zuau genin khemna tawh thu gen kawikawi a, “Note a dingin leenggahzu le khamtheihzu tampi tak hong om ding hi,” a hong ci kamsangte pawl, note’ deih kamsangte ahi hi." 
Micah2:12 Ahi zongin no Israel mi a omlaite khempeuh pel hetloin kong kaikhawm kik ding hi. Tuubuk sunga tuu khum bangin, gankhawk sungah tuuhon kaihkhop bangin note kong kaikhawm kik ding a, na gam sung uh, mi tampite’ husa tawh kidimkik ding hi, ci hi." 
Micah2:13 Pasian in note a’ ding lampi hong honsakin hong paikhiatpih ding hi. Salsuahna khuapikulh panin paikhia-in na suakta ding uh hi. Kumpi ahi Topa mahmah in note hong makai ding hi. 
Micah3:1 Israel a uk makaite aw, hih thu ngai un: Note in thutang thuman a deih dingin a kilawm hinapi-in," 
Micah3:2 thuhoih deih loin thusia na deih zawsop uh hi. Note in mite’ vun na hing hawkkhiat uh a, a guh uh na hing kheuh uh hi." 
Micah3:3 Ka mite’ sa na netum uh hi. A vun uh hawkin, a guh uh na satkham uh a, beel-a meh huan ding bangin na satnen gawp uh hi." 
Micah3:4 Topa’ tungah huhna ngenin na kiko hun uh hong tung ding a, ahi zongin amah in note hong dawng lo ding hi. Note gamtatsia na hih manun, na ngetna uh hong ngai lo ding hi." 
Micah3:5 Sum a piazo mite kiangah thunuam gen a, a pia lo mite kiangah gal tuah ding a gen kamsangte in mite lam a khialsak uh hi. Topa in tua bang kamsangte kiangah," 
Micah3:6 “Keima mite lam khialsak na hih manun mailam thu gentheihna maang na mu nawn kei ding uh a, mailam thu peuhmah na gen thei nawn kei ding uh hi. Kamsangte aw, note’ hun beita ding a, ni in hong tumsan ta ding hi,” ci hi." 
Micah3:7 Hih bang thugen kamsangte, a thugen kholhna uh Pasian in a tunsak loh manin maizumin mindai ding uh hi." 
Micah3:8 Ahi zongin kei ahihleh, Israel mite tungah a mawhna uh a genkhia dingin Topa’ kha le a vang tawh ka kidim a, thutang gen ngamna ding lungsim ka nei hi." 
Micah3:9 Ngai un! Israel a uk makaite aw. Note in thutang deih loin, thuman kimlai a khialin na hei uh hi." 
Micah3:10 Mi thahna le thuman lohna tawh, Pasian’ khuapi, Jerusalem na lam uh hi." 
Micah3:11 Khuapi ukte in sumgolh ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek tawh thu khen a, siampite in sum ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek tawh thu gen a, kamsangte in zong sum ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek mah tawh mailam thu genkhol uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in amaute in Topa, muanin nei uh a, “ Topa in eite hong ompih a, eite tungah siatna hong tung lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Micah3:12 Tua ahih manin note’ hangin lo khawh bangin Zion kikho-in, Jerusalem, nin kipaihna phualpi hong suak ding a, biakinn omna mual, gamlak a suak ding hi." 
Micah4:1 Mailam hunah Topa’ biakinn a omna mual, a sangpen mual hong suak ding a, minam tampi in hong zuan ding uh hi." 
Micah4:2 Minam tampite hong pai-in, “Israel mite’ Pasian’ biakinn, Topa’ mualah va paito ni. Tua lai-ah ama deihna hong hilh ding a, ama deihna bangin i gamta ding hi,” ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion panin thuhilhna hong gingkhia a, Jerusalem panin Topa’ thu hong paikhia hi." 
Micah4:3 Amah in minam tampite’ thu khensak ding a, Israel gam panin a gamla pekah a om, minam vangliante’ thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu-in seek ding uh a, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in seek ding uh hi. Minam khatlekhat kido nawn lo ding uh a, galkidona theikha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Micah4:4 A kuamah peuh lungnuamin a leenggui phung le a theikung nuai-ah tu hithiat ding a, kuamah in patausak nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa mahmah in hih thu hong gen khinta hi." 
Micah4:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte in amau’ pasian ciat bia-in a thu mang ding uh a, ahi zongin eite in ahihleh eima Topa Pasian mah a tawntungin bia-in ama thu i mang ding hi." 
Micah4:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Keimah in gim ka piak ahi, sala om gimna a thuak mite, ka kaihkhop kik hun hong tung ding hi." 
Micah4:7 Amaute, a cimawhin gamlapi-ah om uh a, ahi zongin keimah in amaute pansa kikin, minam vanglian khatin ka bawlkik ding hi. Tua hun a kipan a tawntungin Zion mual panin amaute ka uk paisuak ding hi." 
Micah4:8 Pasian in a mite a etna Jerusalem khuapi aw, nidanga na vangliatna na ngahkik ding a, kumpi khuapi na suakkik ding hi." 
Micah4:9 Bang hangin tu-in nakpitakin kap a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa na hi hiam? Kumpi nei lo a, na thulamlakte si ahi hiam?" 
Micah4:10 Jerusalem khuamite aw, numei nausuak ding bangin na tha uh san un. Tu-in kumpi khuapi nusia-in, gam sung khua-ah a teng ding na hita uh a, Babylon khuapi a zuan ta ding na hi uh hi. Ahi zongin tua lai panin note hong kihonkhia-in, na galte uh khutsung panin Topa in hong khahkhia ding hi." 
Micah4:11 Note a hong sim dingin minam tampi hong kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in, “Jerusalem kisusia ding a, i mit in hih khuapi a siasa-in mu ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Micah4:12 Ahi zongin hih minamte in Topa’ lungsim tawng thei lo uh a, ancilna phualah anphalte kaihkhop bangin amaute kaikhawmin, a cilgawp ding ahihlam phawk lo uh hi." 
Micah4:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem khuamite aw, kipan unla, na galte uh sugawp un. Sumngo khe le sik ki a nei bawngtal bangin note kong thahatsak ding hi. Minam tampite na sugawpzo ding uh a, amau’ neihsa teng keima-a’ na suaksak ding uh a, amau’ hauhna teng leitung buppi’ Topa’ neihsa na suaksak ding uh hi." 
Micah5:1 Jerusalem khuamite aw, na kulh sung uhah lut un. Eite hong ki-umcih a, Israel makai pa a hong sim uh ahi hi." 
Micah5:2 Bethlehem Efrathah khua aw, nang pen Judah gamah khua neupen khat na hi a, ahi zongin nang sung panin Israel-te a uk ding khat ka piangsak ding hi. Ama gui pen tangtawng pek tawh kizom hi." 
Micah5:3 Tua ahih ciangin, numei naupaii nu, a nau a suah khit mateng, amau’ galte’ khut sungah Topa in a mite a pia phot hi. Ama hong khan ciangin sala a om a gammite a mipihte uh tawh hong kigawmkik ding hi." 
Micah5:4 Amah in Topa’ thahatna tawh a mite uk ding a, Topa ama Pasian’ vangliatna tawh a uk ding hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in ama liatna phawk ding uh ahih manin ama mite lungmuang takin om thei ding uh hi." 
Micah5:5 Amah in lungnopna hong omsak ding hi. Assiria mite in i gam hong simin i galdalna teng hong suk ciangin, amaute a do dingin i makai hatpen teng i sawl ding hi." 
Micah5:6 A namsau uh tawh Nimrod’ gam ahi, Assiria gam zo ding uh a, Assiria mite in i gam hong sim ciangin amaute’ kiang panin eite hong honkhia ding uh hi." 
Micah5:7 Tua ciangin a omlai Israel mite pen Topa in minam tampite a dingin a piak, lopate a nosak zing daitui, lopate a khangsak guahtui, a bang ding uh hi. Amaute in mihingte muanin nei loin Pasian bek a muang ding uh hi." 
Micah5:8 A omlai Israel mite pen minam dangte’ lakah, gamlakah sa a beng, tuute a tuah ciangin manin balnen gawp a, a kam sung pan a honkhiazo a om lo, humpinelkai a bang ding uh hi." 
Micah5:9 Israel-te in a gal khempeuh uh zogawpin a susiamang ding uh hi. 
Micah5:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tua hun ciangin na sakolte uh hong paihkhiat sakin, na leengte uh ka susia ding hi." 
Micah5:11 Na gam sung uha om khuapite susia-in, na galpanna munte uh ka phelkhia ding hi." 
Micah5:12 Na mitphial siamte uh susia gawpin, ai a san thei mi kong omsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Micah5:13 Note’ biak milimte le na biakna songte uh ka susia gawp ding a, note’ bawlsa nate na bia nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Micah5:14 Na gam sung uha a om Asherah nusian milimte hong bawhkhiat sakin, na khuapite uh ka susia ding hi." 
Micah5:15 Keima thu a hong mang lo minamte tungah hehna tawh phu ka la ding hi. 
Micah6:1 Topa le Israel a kitotna ngai un. Topa aw, kipan inla, mual liante le mual neute mai-ah na thu sung in." 
Micah6:2 No mual liante le a kip tawntung leitung bulpite aw, Topa’ thu ngai un. Topa in ama mite tawh thu nei a, Israel tawh thu kisel ding hi." 
Micah6:3 Topa in hih bangin thu sung a, “Ka mite aw, note bang hong cihkha ka hi hiam? Tu-in hong dawng dih un!" 
Micah6:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih a, salsuahna panin ka hong honkhia hi. Note a hong makai dingin Moses, Aaron, le Miriam ka hong sawl hi." 
Micah6:5 Ka mite aw, Moab Kumpi Balak in note sukna ding a vaihawmna teng, Beor’ tapa Balaam in ama nget bangin a sepna teng limtakin phawkkik un. Note hotkhiat nadingin ka sepna thu na theih nadingun Shittim le Gilgal kikal-a thupiangte ngaihsun kik un,” a ci hi." 
Micah6:6 Vantung Pasian, Topa biak nadingin bang va keng ding ka hi hiam? Amah biakna-in hal dingin bawngno thaute va paipih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:7 Topa kiangah tuu a tul tulin va puakin, guntui bangin sathau va luangsak leng, tuate tawh amah lungdam ding ahi hiam? Ka mawhnate maisak nadingin ka ta upa pen tawh va bia ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:8 Mun khempeuhah a om no mihingte aw, Topa in a hoih nate hong gen khinzo hi. Topa in note tung panin hong kalh thu in: Thuman thutang sem ding a, itna kip nei tawntungin, kiniamkhiatna tawh Pasian’ thu man’ ding ahi hi." 
Micah6:9 Topa, zahtak ding kilawm hi. Khua sungah amah hong kiko a, “Ngai un, khuapi sungah a hong kikhawm mite aw." 
Micah6:10 Thuman lopi-in a ngah uh, migilote’ innsunga van omte, keima deih loh tawitehna man lo zatnate, mangngilh thei ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:11 Tawikhaina man lo le tawisuang man lo a zangte, khahkhong ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:12 Na mihaute uh mizawngte tungah tatsia mahmahin, na khuasung mi khempeuh uh zuaugen vive ahi uh a, a kam un khemna thu bekbek gen hi." 
Micah6:13 Tua ahih ciangin na mawhna hangun note suksiat ding ka kipan ta hi. 
Micah6:14 An na nek hangun na kham kei ding uh a, na gil uh kiallai veve ding hi. Na na koihcing uh hangin phatuam lo ding hi. Galte in tua na koihcing uh nate susia veve ding hi." 
Micah6:15 Khai na tuh uh hangin an na la kei ding uh hi. Oliv gah na cil uh hangin a thau na zangkha kei ding uh a, leenggah na cil uh hangin a zu na dawnkha kei ding uh hi." 
Micah6:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Omri’ gamtatna zui-in, ama tapa Kumpi Ahab’ sep khempeuh na sem uh a, amau’ gamtat khempeuh na zui uh hi. Tua ahih manin note kong susia ding hi. Minam dangte in note hong nuihsanin, amaute’ simmawhna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Micah7:1 Kei a kamsia hi’ng! Singgah le leenggah a heu hun laitakin a gilkial mipa tawh ka kibang hi. Leenggah nek ding om nawn lo a, ka lunggulhgulh theigah beita hi." 
Micah7:2 Leitungah mihoihteng bei khinta a, Pasian’ tungah a thuman mi kuamah om nawn lo hi. Mihoihteng si khinta hi. Mi khempeuh in mi thah ding bek ngaihsun uh a, a kuamah peuh in a mipihte thah ding bek hanciam uh hi." 
Micah7:3 A sia lama gamtat ding siam mahmah uh a, uliante le thukhente in sumgolh ngenin, miliante in amau’ deihteng pulak uh a, kipawlin vaihawm khawm uh hi." 
Micah7:4 Amaute lakah a hoihpenin a kineite, lingkung bang hi a, a thutang pena kineite, ling hiam bang hi lel uh hi. Pasian in amaute a hilhkholh bangin, gim a piak ding hun hong tungta a, a lungman’ hun ding uh hong hita hi." 
Micah7:5 Na vengte’ thu upin nei kei inla, na lawmte zong muanin nei kei in. Na ang a lum na zi kiang nangawnah thu na gen ding kidawm in." 
Micah7:6 Tuhun ciangin tapate in a pate haibawl a, tanute in a nute langpan’ uh a, mote in a teeknu uh langneih uh hi. Mi khat a dingin ama innkuanpihte mah a gal a suak mawk hi." 
Micah7:7 Ahi zongin ke’n ahihleh Topa mah ka en ding a, kei hong suaktasak Pasian ka ngak ding hi. Ka Pasian in ka thu hong ngai ding hi." 
Micah7:8 Ka galte aw, kei tungah lungdam kei un. Ka puk hangin ka thokik veve ding hi. Khuamial sungah ka om hangin Topa in khuavak hong pia ding hi." 
Micah7:9 Topa tungah khialkhin ka hih manin ama hehna tawlkhat ka thuak ding hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah kei hong huh ding a, a man lopi-in a hong kibawlna teng hong bawlphat sakin, amah in hong honkhia ding hi." 
Micah7:10 Tua hun ciangin ka galte in hih thu hong mu ding uh a, “Na Topa Pasian, koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a hong tawng ka galte a maizum ding uh hi. Amaute guallel ding uh a, kongzing buannawng bangin a kisikgawp mu-in, kei ka nuam ding hi." 
Micah7:11 Jerusalem khuamite aw, na khuapi kulh uh a kiciankik ding hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin na gamgi uh nakpitakin kikhan ding hi." 
Micah7:12 Nisuahna lam Assiria gam pan hitaleh, leitaw lam Egypt gam pan hitaleh, a gamlapi tuipi khen’ pan le a gamlapi mualte- mun khempeuh panin na mite uh hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Micah7:13 Ahi zongin a tungah a teng mite’ gitlohna hangin, leitung pen sehnel gamkhing a suak ding hi." 
Micah7:14 Topa aw, nangma tuu ahi na mite hong cing in. Gamnuam leihoihna sungah amau guakin om uh hi. Tanglai huna mah bangin, Bashan le Gilead gam nuamah amaute gamtasak in." 
Micah7:15 Egypt gam pan na paikhiat hun lai uh bangin, amau a dingin a lamdang nate ka bawl ding hi." 
Micah7:16 Minam dangte in hih thu mu ding uh a, minam thahat hinapi-in a maizum ding uh hi. Lamdang sa-in kam khat zong pau lo ding uh a, hih thu a zakzakna-un a bil uh ngong liang ding hi." 
Micah7:17 Amaute in gul bangin leivui namin, a bokvak ganhingte bangin hong awmtal ding uh a, a bukna uh munmuanhuaite panin lau-in a lingsa-in hong pusuak ding uh a, Topa Pasian hong kihta ding uh hi." 
Micah7:18 Topa aw, nang tawh a kibang Pasian dang om lo a, a omlai na mite’ mawhna nangmah in na maisak hi. Nang na heh paisuak kei a, na itna kip nong lak hi." 
Micah7:19 Kote nong khasiat kik ding a, ka mawhnate uh hong sawpkhiat sakin, tuipi taw-ah nong paihsak ding hi." 
Micah7:20 Ka pu ka pate uh tungah na ciamsa bangin, Abraham’ suanlekhakte ahi nangma mite tungah na cihtakna le nong itna kip nong lak ding hi." 
Nahum1:1 Hih pen Nineveh khua tawh kisai thu genna hi a, Elkosh khuami Nahum’ maangmuhna a kiciamtehna lai ahi hi." 
Nahum1:2 Topa Pasian in amah a demte koihkhong lo a, amah a langpangte gim pia-in a galte thukkik hi." 
Nahum1:3 Topa lungduai mahmah a, a vang zong lian mahmah a, ahih hangin mimawhte khahkhong ngei lo hi. A paina peuhpeuhah huihpi nungin pingpei kipei a, ama paina hanga leivui leeng meiipi kai tawh kibang hi." 
Nahum1:4 Amah in tuipi a tai ciangin tuipi kangcip pah a, gunpite zong kangcipsak hi. Bashan gam keugawpin Karmel Mual kausan a, Lebanon Mual a om pakpalhte a vul hi." 
Nahum1:5 Ama mai-ah mual liante ling a, mual neute a tuisuak hi. Ama mai-ah leitang kicim a, leitung le a tunga om khempeuh a ling uh hi." 
Nahum1:6 Ama hehna kua in nangzo ding a, ama lunghamna kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam? A hehna, meikuang bangin hong khahkhia a, ama mai-ah suangtumpite kitamzan hi." 
Nahum1:7 Topa hoih hi; lungkham hunin a mite huh a, amah a beel mite limtakin a kem hi." 
Nahum1:8 Tuikhang in a suksiat bangin a langte susiagawp a, a galte khempeuh khuamial sungah a nawtkhia hi." 
Nahum1:9 Bang hangin Topa sawm ngam na hi hiam? Amah in nang hong susia ding hi. Amah a su peuhpeuh a dingkikzo om ngei lo hi. 
Nahum1:10 Amaute, linglom bangin om uh a, zulesa tawh kidiahin a om laitakun ham bangin kihaltum ding hi." 
Nahum1:11 Nineveh khuapi aw, gitlohna tawh thu vaihawmin, Topa a sawm mite, nang’ sungah om hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Nahum1:12 Topa in ama mite tungah hih bangin thu gen a, “Assiria mite thahatin a tam mahmah hangin, amaute kisusia-in maimang ding uh hi. No ka mite na hih uhleh, khatvei lai-in kong gimsak khit hangin tu-in note kong gimsakkik nawn kei ding hi." 
Nahum1:13 Note’ tungah Assiria mite’ aana neihna ka beisak ding a, note hong khihna sikkhaute ka sutat ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum1:14 Topa in Assiria mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin thu pia hi: “Note na cimang ding uh a, na pasian-te uh biakinn sunga om milimte ka susia ding hi. Note siahuai lua na hih manun na hankhuk ding uh a bawlbawl ka hi ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Nahum1:15 En un, mualtungah kamtai pa hong tai a, gualzawhna ding thupha hong gen ding ahi hi. Judah mite aw, pawi bawl unla, Pasian’ tungah na ciam bangun gamta un. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kisusiacip khin a, na gam uh hong simkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Nahum2:1 Nineveh khuapi aw, nang hong kisim ta a, nang hong sugawp ding pa hong tungta hi. Na kan uhah pang unla, lampi vil un. Kithawi unla, galdo dingin kiging un." 
Nahum2:2 (Israel mite, a galte’ sukgawp ma, a nidang ngeina bangun Topa in a omsakkik ding a kipan ahi hi.)" 
Nahum2:3 A galkapte in lum san hong keng uh a, puan zong a san mah hong silh uh hi. A sim dingin hong kipan uh a, a sakol leengte uh khuaphia bang a, a sakolte uh hong koplen’ uh hi." 
Nahum2:4 Sakol leengte kongzing lakah kilehsuk kilehto uh a, lamkabom khempeuh nawkin leeng kawikawi uh hi. Meikuang bangin kikhawh uh a, khuaphia bangin leeng uh hi." 
Nahum2:5 Galkap mangte kikaikhawm a, a galkapte uh thu pia uh hi. Amaute, kan phung lam kidenna uh a, a lum uh tawh kidal uh hi." 
Nahum2:6 Tui luanna gei-ah a om kulhkongpite kisatkham a, kumpi inn sungah patauhna om hi." 
Nahum2:7 Kumpinu kimanin kipuakhia a, a nasemte thumin kap uh a, dahin dip hum uh hi." 
Nahum2:8 Tuibeem kitam panin tui a kikhawhkhia bangin, Nineveh khuapi panin mite a taikhia uh hi. “Khawl un, khawl un,” a kicih hangin khat beek nunghei lo uh hi." 
Nahum2:9 Ngunte la un! Khamte la un! Khua sungah sum manpha bei cih om thei lo a, van manpha zong bei cih om thei lo hi." 
Nahum2:10 Nineveh khuapi kisusia a, kinusiacipin gamkhing suak hi. Launa lungsim tawh kidimin khukte ling kelkel a, mi khempeuh lunggimin a mai-ah sisan teng lo hi." 
Nahum2:11 Humpinelkai note an a kivakna mun, humpinelkai le a note lungmuang a a omna mun, humpinelkaite’ kua tawh a kibang koi-ah omta ahi hiam?" 
Nahum2:12 Humpinelkai in sa manin a zi le a tate a dingin a sa balnensak a, a kua sung khempeuh sa tawh kidimsak ngei hi." 
Nahum2:13 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen note’ gal ka hi a, na sakol leengte uh ka haltum ding hi. Na humpinelkai note uh namsau in vatmai ding a, midangte’ na na suh teng uh ka susiamang khin ding hi. Na tangmite uh’ awging koi mahah kiza nawn lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum3:1 Zuauna le mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi, van top ding tampi a omna khuapi, tu-in a siacip ding hita hi." 
Nahum3:2 Ngai un! Sakol kisatna a ging, leengpei kigawi, sakol koplenna kheging, sakol leeng a tuan lauhlauh gingte!" 
Nahum3:3 Sakol tung tuangte’ galsimna, namsau phia zalzal! Teipi tee zalzal! Misi luanghawmte simzawh ding hi lo, kiciangin vum venvan! Tuate tung mah tawnin gal kido!" 
Nahum3:4 Nineveh khuapi in a paktatna hangin gim thuak hi. Ngaihbaang mel pua-in bum siamna nei a, minamte zolin a khem hi." 
Nahum3:5 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Nineveh khuapi aw, gim kong pia ding hi. Na nik kong hawkkhiatsak ding a, minamte in na guak omna hong mu ding uh a, na zumhuaina teng hong mu ding uh hi." 
Nahum3:6 Nang hong huatbawlin ninbulom tawh kong kidimsak ding a, mite in lamdangsakna tawh nang hong en ding uh hi." 
Nahum3:7 Nang hong mu khempeuh nungkik gaihin, ‘Nineveh khuapi siacip ta hi; kua in khasiat ding ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang a hong hehnem nuam kuamah om lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum3:8 Nineveh aw, Thebes khuapi sangin a ginazaw kisa zenzen na hi hiam? Amah zong, a kimkotah tui in umcih a, amah a dal ding nei a, a kulh dingin a kimkotah tui om hi." 
Nahum3:9 Nail Gun dung, gam khempeuh uk khin ahih manin genzawh lohin a vang lian hi. Put mite le Libya mite zong ama pawl ahi hi." 
Nahum3:10 Tua bang hinapi-in, Thebes khuamite kipuakhia-in sal a suak uh hi. Konglak mun citengah a tate uh kisatlum hi. A miliante, sikkol kibulhin kipuakhia a, amau a man a galte un amaute a hawm uh hi." 
Nahum3:11 Nineveh khuapi aw, nang zong zukham bangin khua na phawk kei ding a, na galte kiang panin tai-in bukna na zong ding hi." 
Nahum3:12 Na kulh muanhuaite pen theigah min zun mahmah tawh kibang ding a, a kung sing lecin a gah na kamsung a hong tu tawh kibang ding hi." 
Nahum3:13 Na galkapte, numei bang hi lel ding a, na galte a lut zawh loh nadingin na gam sung kihu zo lo ding hi. Na kulhkongpi zawlte mei in kangtum ding hi." 
Nahum3:14 Hong ki-umcihna na nan nadingin tui tawi-in na kulhte ciang beh inla, leiseek-a seek dingin buan cilin, leiseekna kuang a baihsa-in nei talecin zong," 
Nahum3:15 tua bang na hih laitakin mei in hong kangtumin galte in hong vatlum ding hi. Kauphe honpite in an a nektum bangin nang na beimang ding hi. Kauphe bangin tampi tak na pha khin uh hi. 
Nahum3:16 Vana aksi sangin a tamzaw sumbawl mi na om khinta uh hi. A kha zalin a leengmang kauphe honpi bangin tu-in amaute om nawn lo uh hi. 
Nahum3:17 Na uliante uh ahihleh, phalbi hun lai-in kulh tungah a bawm miamua, ni a suah ciangin leengkhia mangin, a omna mel a kithei nawn lo kauphe hon tawh kibang uh hi." 
Nahum3:18 Assiria kumpipa aw, na gam sung a ukte si ta a, na uliante ihmu paisuak uh hi. Na mite, mualtung tengah kithehthang a, inn-ah a kaikhawm ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Nahum3:19 Na liammate, a dam theih nading om lo a, na meimate a dam thei lo pawl ahi hi. Na thuakna thu a za mi khempeuh in lungdamin a khut uh beeng ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna a thuak kha lo kuamah om lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:1 Hih pen kamsang Habakkuk tungah Topa in maangmuhna sungah a gen thu ahi hi. 
Habakkuk1:2 Topa aw, bang tanvei huhna hong ngen ding a, hong za loin om niloh ding na hi hiam? Gimna thuak ung, ci-in bang tanvei hong kiko ding a, hong hon loin, om niloh ding na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Bang hangin hih bang siatnate le lungkhamnate hong musak na hi hiam? Kisuksiatna le kisukgawpna in hong umcih a, kitotna le kiselna, mun citengah om hi." 
Habakkuk1:4 Thukham in thu neizo loin a mawkna suak a, thu a manin kisem ngei lo hi. Thutang thute kilehhei-in, migilote in thuman mite zo zawsop hi." 
Habakkuk1:5 Tua ciangin Topa in a mite kiangah thu gen a, “No, a thuman lo ka minamte aw, na kiim uha a om minam dangte en dih un; lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi. Note kiangah thu hong kigen ciangin na up zawh hetloh ding uh thu lamdang khat tu-in a bawl ding ka hi hi." 
Habakkuk1:6 A omkhong thei lo, a kihtakhuai Khaldea mite, a vang ka liansak ding a, leitung khempeuhah amaute pai-in gam khempeuh a zo mangkhin ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Amaute lauhuai-in, kihtakhuai mahmah uh a, a gen khempeuh uh nial theih hi lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:8 “A sakolte uh kamkei sangin tai hatzaw a, keivom gilkial sangin kihtakhuai zaw hi. Gamlapi pek panin a sakol tung tuangte hong kipan uh a, a sakolte un lei-ah a khe phut uh hi. Muvanlai in sa a bawh bangin a galte a leenlak uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:9 “A susiagawp dingin hong kuankhia uh a, a sukkhak ding uh mi khempeuh lau mahmah uh hi. A galmatte uh tam mahmah a, sehnel zahin kisim zo lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:10 Kumpite, simmawhbawl uh a, uliante nuihsan lel uh hi. Kulh muanhuaite zong nuihsan lel uh a, a kulhpua-ah lei sungvumin tua tungtawnin khuapi a la uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:11 Tua ciangin huihnung bangin paisuak uh a, amau’ hatna bek a suang uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Topa aw, a cil pek a kipan a tawntungin Pasian na hi a, nang pen a tawntungin keima Pasian, a Siangtho Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, kote gim a hong pia dingin amaute na seh hi bek hi. Ka belh Suangpi aw, kote nong thuhilhna ding bekin amaute’ tungah vang a pia bek na hi hi." 
Habakkuk1:13 Ahi zongin hih a gilo a zuautat mite bangci thuakzawh na hi hiam? Hih bang siatna a mu dingin na mit siangtho lua a, a gamtatsia mite na thuakzo kei hi. Tua ahih manin amaute sangin a dikzaw mite a suksiatna-ah bang hangin daicip na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Bang hangin tuipi ngasa bang lelin mihingte bawl a, a uk ding a om lo ganhing note bangin omsak na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Amaute in ngasa mat bangin sikkawi tawh mite man uh a, a ngen uh tawh khuhin manin a ngenpi uh tawh kaikhia a, tua bangin a matna hangun lungdamin a awng uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:16 A ngente un amau’ deih peuhpeuh ngahsak ahih manin, amaute in a ngente uh bia-in biakpiakna zong a pia uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:17 Amaute in a namsau uh zangin, hehpihna mel nei loin mi that ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ka khuadakna tausang tungah kahto-in, Topa in kei tungah bang hong gen ding a, ka lungkim lohna teng hong bangci dawn hiam, cih ka ngak hi." 
Habakkuk2:2 Tua ciangin Topa in hih bangin hong dawng a, “Nangmah ka hong muhsak thu khempeuh a simnop mahmah dingin tungman peek tungah gelh in." 
Habakkuk2:3 Hih thu a tunna ding hun hi pah nai lo ahih manin lai-in ciamteh in. Ahi zongin hong tung baihta ding a, kong lah khempeuh a manin hong tung ding hi. A tung hak tawh a kibangkha ahi zongin ngak keikai in. Ka seh hun a cin ciangin hong tung takpi ding a, zekai lua nawn lo ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:4 Tua a hong tung ding thu pen ‘A gilo mite suakta lo ding a, thuman mite ahihleh Pasian tungah a cihtak manun nungta ding hi,’” a hong ci hi." 
Habakkuk2:5 Hauhna pen zuaupi hi a, a huaiham mite kiphasakin omkhong thei lo uh a, hankhuk mah bangin, phazo, cih omsak thei lo uh a, lungkim hun cih nei thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte a ban banin simin a uk uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:6 A zawhna gammite in amau a zo mite simmawh bawlin, “No a’ ahi lopi kimlai no a dingin na la uh a, ahi zongin tu-in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah lei hong bate khem bawlin, bang tanvei na hauhna uh behlap nuam lailai na hi uh hiam?” ci ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:7 Note in na phawk ma-un note mahmah leiba neite na suak ding uh a, na leiba uh a meet hong kisungsak ding hi. Galte in note hong lingsak keuhkeuh ding a, na nate uh hong laksakmang khin ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:8 Note in minam dang tampite’ na na sut uh a, tu-in a omlai mite in note’ na hong sut ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in mi thatin, khuapite le a sunga teng mite na bawlsia uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:9 Mi’ van na suhna uh tawh na mite uh hausakin, lauhuaina le siatna a ngah loh nadingin na innkuan uh bawl na hih manun gim na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:10 Note’ vaihawmna mah in na mite uh tungah maizumna hong tun a, minam dangte na suksiatna uh tawh, note mahmah’ siatna ding a bawl na hi uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:11 Note a hong langpan’ dingin kulh suangte nangawn hong kiko ding a, innkamte in zong kikopih ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:12 Note in mi thahna tawh khuapi satin, mawhna tawh khuapi phut na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:13 Na zawh uh minamte’ nasepnate a mawkna suakin, amau’ sepsateng khempeuh a khu-in leengmang hi. Hih thu pen Vanglian Topa in a piansak ahi hi." 
Habakkuk2:14 Tuipi, tui tawh a kidim mah bangin Topa ’ minthanna theihna tawh leitung kidim ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:15 Na hehna uh tawh na gamvengte uh niamkhiatin na mindaisak uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoisak na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:16 Tua ahih manin note in zong minthanna ngah loin maizumin mindaina tawh na kidiah ding uh hi. Note mahmah in na hoi dongun na dawn ding uh hi. Topa in gimpiakna hai, note hong dawnsak ding a, na minthanna uh mindaina a suak ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:17 Note in Lebanon gam singkungte phuk na hih manun note zong hong kiphuk ding a, a ganhingte zong that na hih manun tu-in ganhingte in note hong lausak ding uh hi. Gam sung khempeuhah mi thatin na bawlsiatna hang uh le khuapite le a sunga tengte na suksiatna hangun note tungah hih bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi." 
Habakkuk2:18 Milim, banga kimang ahi hiam? Mihingte’ bawltawm na khat hi lel a, thuman hong gen thei lo hi. Tua bangin a pau thei beek lo pasian a bawlpa in muanin a neih bang phatuam ahi hiam?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Sing khatpeuh a kibawl na khat kiangah, “Khanglo in,” ci-in, a pau thei lo suangtum kiangah, “Tho in,” ci na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Hih bang milim in note hong hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Ngun le kham tawh limtakin a kizut hangin a sungah nuntakna om lo hi." 
Habakkuk2:20 Topa, a biakinn siangtho sungah om hi; leitung mi khempeuh ama mai-ah dai dide-in om ta uh hen." 
Habakkuk3:1 Kamsang Habakkuk in hih bangin thu ngen hi: 
Habakkuk3:2 Topa aw, nangma sepsa thute ka za a, lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. Na hih ngeisa na liante, kote’ hunin zong hong hih kik in. Na heh hun ciang nangawnin zong hehpihna lungsim hong nei in." 
Habakkuk3:3 Teman khua panin Pasian hong pai a, Paran Mual panin Siangtho Pa hong pai hi. Ama minthanna vang in vanpi tuam a, leitung khempeuh, amah phatna tawh kidim hi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Khuaphialep taang bangin amah hong pai a, a khutsung panin khuavak taangkhia a, tua pen a vangliatna a koihna mun ahi hi." 
Habakkuk3:5 Ama mai-ah cinatna tungsak a, tua nungah sihna zuisak pah hi." 
Habakkuk3:6 Amah a khawl ciangin leitung ling a, amah in a et ciangin minam khempeuh ling uh hi. Tangtawng lai-in a totsa, tanglai mual liante kitam kham a, a om tawntung mual neute kimetcip hi." 
Habakkuk3:7 Kush gammite a lau mahmahna, Midian gammite a linna ka mu hi." 
Habakkuk3:8 Topa aw, na sakolte tungah nang hong tuangin, na gualzawhna leengte tawh nong pai nadingin, gunpite tungah na heh suak a, tuipi tungah thangpai na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Na thal a lawn dingin na kithawi a, na thallawng sungah na thaltang a dimin om a, na keek in leitung kapkham hi." 
Habakkuk3:10 Mual liante in nang hong muh ciangin ling uh a, van panin guah tampi hong zu hi. Leinuai-a om tuite ging zuazua a, tuihualte in a sangpipi banto hi." 
Habakkuk3:11 Na thaltang leeng a muh ciang, na teipi tee zalzal a muh ciangin, ni le kha a omna sanah a khawlcip uh hi." 
Habakkuk3:12 A hehsa-in leitungah na pai a, a sinso sa-in minamte na tuancil hi." 
Habakkuk3:13 Na mite a honkhia dingin na paikhia a, na teel kumpipa, a honkhia dingin na kuankhia hi. Migilote’ makai pa na sugawp a, a nungzui khempeuh tawh zong na sumai hi." 
Habakkuk3:14 Mi cimawhte, mun simthamah a sukgawp bangin, kote a hong suthang dingin huihpi bangin hong pai laitakin na thal tawh a galkap mangpa na kaplet hi." 
Habakkuk3:15 Nangmah in na sakolte tawh tuipi na tuancil a, tui lianpite phuan zuazua hi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Hih thute khempeuh ka zak ciangin ka pumlin’ a, lau lua-in ka muk ling sapsap hi. Ka guh ka taang hong zen a, guh nei lo bangin ka pukcipsuk hi. Ko hong simgawp mite Pasian in gim a piak ding hun daitakin ka ngak khikhe ding hi." 
Habakkuk3:17 Theigahte a hut khin a, leengguite a gah kei zongin, oliv kungte gah lo a, lo-ah an a piang kei zongin, tuu khempeuh a si khin a, ganbuk khempeuh a hawm khin zongin," 
Habakkuk3:18 Topa Pasian pen hong honkhia pa ahih manin lungdamin ka kipak lai veve ding hi. 
Habakkuk3:19 Topa Pasian, keima thahatna ahi hi; sakhi khe bangin ka khe hong zaptelsak a, mun sangna-ah lungmuang takin kei hong paisak hi." 
Zephaniah1:1 Amon’ tapa Josiah, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin, Topa in Zefaniah’ tungah hih thu a pia hi. Zefaniah’ pa Kushi hi a, Kushi’ pa Gedaliah hi a, Gedaliah’ pa Amariah hi a, Amariah’ pa pen Kumpi Hezekiah ahi hi" 
Zephaniah1:2 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Leitung a om na khempeuh ka susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:3 Mihing le ganhing, vana leeng vasa le tui sunga ngasa, a vekpi-in ka susia ding hi. Migilote ka susia ding a, leitung a om mihing khempeuh ka susia ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Judah gammi khempeuh susia mangin, Jerusalem khuami khempeuh ka sumai ding hi. Baal milim biakna a them banglai khempeuh le tua milim na a sem siampite ahi a, keima siampite ahi zongin, a vekpi-in ka sumai ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:5 Innkhum zangah kahto-in, ni, kha, le aksi a bia mi khempeuh ka susia ding a, keimah hong bia-in, keima tungah thuman ding gen napi-in, Milkom pasian’ min tawh a kiciam teiteite zong, ka susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:6 Lam pialin, kei hong zui nawn lote, thudong dingin kei kiangah hong pai nawn lote, ka susia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:7 Topa Pasian’ mai-ah gamdai takin om un! Topa’ ni hong naita hi. Topa in biakna-a sa gawh bangin a mite a go dingin kithawi a, a gawh ding mite siansuah khin hi." 
Zephaniah1:8 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua bangin mite a kigawh ni-in, uliante le kumpipa’ tapate, le gamdangte’ ngeina a zuite khempeuh, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:9 Lawki mite bangin biakinn sungah a lamte, khemna le thahna tawh a ngah uh vante tawh, a topa uh’ inn a dimsakte khempeuh, tua ni mahin gim ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:10 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Jerusalem khua-a om Ngasa Kulh kongpi-ah mite’ kikona na za ding uh a, tua khuapi Veng Nihna sungah mite’ kahna le mual neute tungah a puak zaizai na za ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Khuapi Veng Nuainung sungah a teng mite aw, hih bang gamlumna na zak uh ciangin kapin thum un. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumbukte khempeuh si ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Tua laitakin Jerusalem khuasung meivak tawh ka zong ding a, thuphawk loin, a ngeina bangun omcip a, ‘ Topa in a pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh bangmah bawl ngei lo hi,’ a ci mite, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:13 Amau’ neihsa khempeuh kisut ding a, a innte uh kisuksiatsak ding hi. Inn a lam hangun a sungah teng kha lo ding uh a, leenggui a suan hangun a leenggahzu dawn kha lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:14 Topa’ ni hong naita a, nai mahmahin hong tung hathat hi. Tua Topa’ ni hong tun ciangin galhang pente nangawn cimawhin kap ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:15 Tua ni pen heh mahmah ni, lungkham sinkham ni, tuahsia-in kisuksiat gawp ni, khua zingin mai mial ni, meiipi kai-in huihpi nun’ ni," 
Zephaniah1:16 galdona ding peengkul a kitum ni, kulhnei khuapite le a tausangte a kisimna-in galkapte a kiko ni hi ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:17 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Mihingte tungah lungkhamna lianpi ka tungsak ding a, amaute in mittaw bangin khua a zawt ding uh hi. Keima tungah amaute hong khial uh ahih manin, a sisan uh tui bangin kithehthang ding a, a luanghawm uh leilakah muatcip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Topa’ heh thuk ni hong tun ciangin a ngun le a khamte un amaute honkhia zo lo ding hi. Ama hehna meikuang in leitung khempeuh kangtum ding a, thakhat thu-in leitung a teng mi khempeuh a sumai ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:1 A maizum thei lo minam aw, hoihtakin thu ngaihsun in." 
Zephaniah2:2 Ansi bangin hong kizapkhiat ma, Topa’ hehna na tungah hong tuk ma, Topa in a hehna hong lah hun a tun ma-in thu ngaihsunin kikheel in." 
Zephaniah2:3 Kiniamkhiatin, Topa’ thupiakna a mang Judah gammi khempeuh aw, Topa’ kiang zuan un. A manin gamta unla, kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh Topa’ hehna hong kilat ciangin, tua hehna hangin gimna panin na peng khathei ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaza khuapi-ah kuamah om nawn lo ding a, Ashkelon khuapi kisusia ding hi. Ashdod khuamite suntangpi-in kihawlkhia ding a, Ekron khuamite kipaikhiatpih mang ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:5 Tuipi gei-ah a gual ten, no Filistia gammite aw, gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Filistia mite’ tenna Kanaan leitang aw, Topa in nang tungah thu hong khenzo hi. Mi khempeuh a beimang dongin hong susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:6 Tuipi gei-a om leitang aw, tuute’ gamtatna mun, gamlak na suak lel ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:7 Judah mi a omlaite in na gam sung luah ding uh a, amaute in tuucinna-in nei-in, Ashkelon khuasunga om innte sungah zanin lum ding uh hi. Topa ahi amaute’ Pasian in amaute ompih ding a, citheisakkik ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:8 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Moab mite in ka mite a simmawhna, Ammon mite in ka mite a zahkona le ka mite’ gam a sutgawp dingin, a kisaktheih paunate uh ka za khin hi." 
Zephaniah2:9 Kei pen a nungta Israel Pasian ka hih mah bangin, Moab mite, Sodom mite bangin kisusia-in, Ammon mite, Gomorrah mite bangin kisusia-in, a gam sung uhah lingkung bek pozo-in, a gam uh cikhuk tawh kidimin a sia tawntung suakin, a suaktalai ka mite in a neihsa uh sutin, a gam uh a laksak tak kei leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah2:10 Amaute in Vanglian Topa’ mite simmawhin kihisak uh ahih manin, a kiphatsakna hangun Moab mite le Ammon mite in hih bangin gim thuak ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Topa in amaute lausakgawp ding a, leitung pasian-te, neubawl gawp ding hi. Tua ciangin minam khempeuh in amau’ gam ciat panun amah bia ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:12 No Ethiopia mite zong, Topa in hong that ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:13 Topa in leilu lamah a khut hong zanin Assiria gam susia ding a, Nineveh khuapi susia gawpin sehnel gam a suaksak ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:14 Tuu le bawnghonte tua khua sungah lumin, gan namkim khawk a suak ding hi. Gunva le gunvapite bangtung zawlah tuangin, tawlet-ah keising khuangin, sangkil tungah va-ak ham ding hi. Taamtak sing tawh a kilam innte maimang ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:15 A vangliatna a kisaktheihpih, lungmuang takin a om khuapi, tu-a bangin piang ding hi. Leitungah amau’ khuapi a lian penin ngaihsun uh hi. Tua hinapi-in gamlak suakin, gamsate’ omna suak ta hi. A mu mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in kigaih ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Ama mite mah nengniamin, thumang loin a tatsia, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna ngah ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:2 Topa’ thu ngai nuam lo a, a thuhilhna sang nuam lo hi. Topa muang nuam lo a, a Pasian naih nuam lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:3 A uliante, humpinelkai gilkial bang a, a thukhente, keivom gilkial bang uh hi. Zingsang khuavak mateng a saguh nek a nusia nuam lo, a huaiham gamsate tawh kibang uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:4 A kamsangte kihisak uh a, kamsang citak hi lo uh hi. A siampite in a siangtho nate ninsak uh a, amau angsung ding bek a khualna-un Pasian’ thukham lehhei uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:5 Ahi zongin tua khuapi sungah Topa omin, a thuman na bek sem a, a khialin gamta ngei lo hi. Zingsang simin mihingte tungah pelh ngei loin thutang lak hi. Ahi zongin tua lai-a mihing thuman lote, a sia-in gamta teitei uh a, maizumna mel theithei lo uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “A kiphasak mite ka nilkhia a, a gal panmunte uh ka susia hi. A kongzing lampite uh ka kinusiacipsak a, tua lampi kuamah in tawn nawn lo hi. A khuapi uh kisia gawpin kinusia a, a sungah kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:7 Tua ahih manin ka mite in kei hong zahtakin ka thuhilhna ngai ding uh a, mangngilh lo ding uh hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahi zongin a gamtatsiat ngei bangun gamtalai veve uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah3:8 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua ahih ciangin minamte ka mawhsak ni hun dong kei hong ngak phot dih un. Minamte le kumpi gamte kaikhawmin, ka hehna ka thuaksak ding, ka lungsim ka khensat khin hi. Ka hehluatna meikuang tawh leitung khempeuh kangtum ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Tua ciangin minamte’ lungsim ka hei ding a, amaute in keima tung bekah thu hong ngenin, lungsim kikhatin ka na hong sem ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:10 A gamlapi Ethiopia gam pekah a om, a kithehthang ka mite nangawn in biakna hong puak ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:11 Tua hun ciangin ka mite in kei nong lehdona hangun maizumna ding bangmah om nawn lo ding hi. Note lak panin a kiphasak, a kihisak mite ka hawlkhia ding a, Jerusalem khua-a ka mual siangtho tungah kei nong lehdo nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:12 Note lakah a kiniamkhiat, mineute bek, ka suaktasak lai ding a, keima tungah huhna hong ngen ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:13 Israel mi a omlai sunte, midangte tungah gilo nawn lo ding uh a, zuauthu gen nawn loin, mi khem ding zong ngaihsun nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute cithei-in lungmuangin om ding uh a, kuamah kihta nawn loin om ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah3:14 Zion tanu aw, nakpitakin la sa inla, Israel aw, lungdamin kiko in. Jerusalem tanu aw, na lungsim khempeuh tawh lungdam in." 
Zephaniah3:15 Topa in na galte hong phiatkhiatsak khin a, hong langpang khempeuh hong hawlkhiatsak khin hi. Topa ahi Israel kumpipa nang tawh hong om a, na launa ding bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Tua ni ciangin Jerusalem khuapi kiangah, “Zion khuapi aw, lau kei in. Na khut thazawsak kei in,” kici ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:17 Topa na Pasian un note hong ompih a, ama vangliatna in hong gualzosak hi. Note tungah Topa lungkim ding a, ama hong itna tawh hong thakbawl ding hi. Note’ hangin Topa lungdamin la sa ding a," 
Zephaniah3:18 pawi hun sungah mi a lungdamte bang ding hi. Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Note a dingin a lauhuai thu ka beisak khin a, na mindaina teng uh kong paihkhiatsak khin hi." 
Zephaniah3:19 En un, tua hun ciangin no a hong bawlsiate gim ka pia ding a, a khebaite honkhia-in, a kipaikhiatpih mite ka ciahpihkik ding hi. Amau’ maizumna uh minthanna ka suaksak ding a, mi khempeuh in amaute a phat ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:20 Tua hun ciangin, a kithehthang na mite uh kong kaikhawm ding a, leitung mi khempeuh in note hong phat ding uh hi. A tawpna-ah note na cithei kik ding uh hi,” Topa in ci hi, a ci hi." 
Haggai1:1 Persia gam uk kumpi Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni masa ni-in, kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen hi. Tua a thugen pen, Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel, Judah gam ukpa le Jehozadak’ tapa Joshua, siampi lianpen pa tungah gen ding ahi hi." 
Haggai1:1 Persia gam uk kumpi Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni masa ni-in, kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen hi. Tua a thugen pen, Shealtiel’ tapa Zerubbabel, Judah gam ukpa le Jehozadak’ tapa Joshua, siampi lianpen pa tungah gen ding ahi hi." 
Haggai1:2 Vanglian Topa in thu gen a, “Hih mite in, biakinn lamkik ding hun nai lo hi, ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai1:3 Tua ciangin kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in hih bangin thu gen a," 
Haggai1:4 “Ka mite aw, ka biakinn a siacipin a om laitakin, inn hoihpipi sungah note na om ding uh kilawm sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Haggai1:5 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in ka hong cihin-ah: Tu laitak a na omzia uh limtakin ngaihsun un. 
Haggai1:6 Khaici tampi na tuh uh hangin an tawm bek na la uh a, annek ding na neih tei uh hangin na kham ding uh na nei kei uh hi. Dawn ding leenggahzu na neih tei uh hangin na kham ding uh na nei kei uh hi. Puansilh ding na neih tei uh hangin a lumkhop ding na nei kei uh hi. Sum thalawhte in zong a khamkhop ding uh thalawh zo lo uh hi." 
Haggai1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in ka hong cihin-ah: Tu laitak a na omzia uh limtakin ngaihsun un. 
Haggai1:8 Tu-in mualtungah kuanto unla, sing sui un. Tua singte tawh biakinn lamkik le-uhcin kei ka lungkim ding a, nong biak ding uha kilawm bangin kei nong bia thei ding uh hi." 
Haggai1:9 “An hau dingin na kilamet uh hangin tawmcik bek na nei uh hi. Na neihsunte nangawn uh inn na tunpih uh hangin kong mutkhiatsak mang khin hi. Bang hangin tuacih ka hi hiam? Note khempeuh, nomau’ inn ding ciat lamin na manlah uh a, ka biakinn a siapi-in na koihdakna hang uh ahi hi." 
Haggai1:10 Tua thu hangin guah zu lo a, leitang panin bangmah khangkhia zo lo hi." 
Haggai1:11 Keimah in gam sung teng, mualtung khempeuh, leitang pana a piang kung khempeuh, mihing, ganhing, le mite’ nasepna khempeuhah keuna ka tungsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai1:12 Tua ciangin Sheatiel’ tapa Zerubbabel, Jehozadak’ tapa Joshua ahi siampi lianpen pa, le salsuahna panin hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in Topa ahi amau’ Pasian’ thu mang uh a, Topa Pasian’ kamtai ahi kamsang Haggai’ gen bangin gamta-in, Topa zahtakin a lau uh hi." 
Haggai1:12 Tua ciangin Sheatiel’ tapa Zerubbabel, Jehozadak’ tapa Joshua ahi siampi lianpen pa, le salsuahna panin hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in Topa ahi amau’ Pasian’ thu mang uh a, Topa Pasian’ kamtai ahi kamsang Haggai’ gen bangin gamta-in, Topa zahtakin a lau uh hi." 
Haggai1:13 Tua ciangin Topa’ kamtai Haggai in mite tungah Topa’ thugente gensawn a, “ Topa in note kong ompih hi,” ci hi, ci-in a gen hi." 
Haggai1:14 Tua hi a, Topa in Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua, le salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mi khempeuh’ sungah biakinn lamnopna lungsim a guan hi. Vanglian Topa, amau’ Pasian’ biakinn a lam dingin hong kithawi uh a," 
Haggai1:14 Tua hi a, Topa in Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua, le salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mi khempeuh’ sungah biakinn lamnopna lungsim a guan hi. Vanglian Topa, amau’ Pasian’ biakinn a lam dingin hong kithawi uh a," 
Haggai1:15 Darias in kumpi a sep a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni sawmnih le ni li ni-in biakinn lam hong kipan uh hi." 
Haggai2:1 Tua kum mah, a kha sagihna, a ni sawmnih le ni khat ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen a," 
Haggai2:2 Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua, le mi khempeuh tungah thu a gen dingin sawl a," 
Haggai2:2 Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua, le mi khempeuh tungah thu a gen dingin sawl a," 
Haggai2:3 “Nidanga biakinn a hoihna dan a ciamteh theilai na om uh hiam? Tu-in bangci na sa uh hiam? Note’ muhna-ah a gen taak het lo tawh kibang ding hi. 
Haggai2:4 Tu-in note kuamah lungkia kei un. Note tawh hong omkhawm ka hih manin nasep kipan un. 
Haggai2:5 Egypt gam panin na paikhiat lai-un, note kong ompih tawntungna ding thu kong ciam hi. Tu-in zong note hong ompihlai ka hih manin lau kei un." 
Haggai2:6 “A sawt loin vanpi le leipi, tuipi le leitung ka lokgawp ding hi." 
Haggai2:7 Minam dang khempeuh lokgawp ding ka hih manin a neihsa uh sum le paite, hih munah hong kipuak ding a, biakinn sungah a dimin van hong om ding hi." 
Haggai2:8 Leitung a a om ngun le kham khempeuh keima-a’ ahi hi. 
Haggai2:9 Biakinn thak pen a lui sangin hoihzaw-in thupizaw ding hi. Hih biakinn-ah cihtheihna le nopsakna kong pia ding hi,” cisak hi." 
Haggai2:10 Gam uk kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna mah, a kha kuana a ni sawmnih le ni li ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen leuleu a," 
Haggai2:11 “Hih thu tawh kisai-in siampite’ ngaihsutna dong in: 
Haggai2:12 Mi khatpeuh in biakna-a a kipia sa siangtho themkhat, a puantualpi thep kawmah puakha hen la, tua a puantualpi tawh anlum khat peuhpeuh ahi a, a kihuan an khat peuhpeuh ahi a, leenggahzu, ahih kei le oliv thau, ahih kei leh an nam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin sukha leh, tua a sukkhak an pen biakna an siangtho a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi. Tua bangin a kidot ciangin siampite in, “Tua puantualpi in a sukkhak ante, biakna an siangtho suak tuan lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Haggai2:13 Tua ciangin Haggai in, “Mi khat in, misi tawh a kisukkhak manin mi nin a suah khit ciangin hih ante khat peuhpeuh lawngkha leh tua a lawnkhak ante a nin a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Siampite in, “A nin suak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Haggai2:14 Tua ciangin Haggai in thu gen a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tu-a nong dawnna uh mah bangin hih minam dangte’ sepna khempeuhah tua bangin piang ahih manin, biakna tau tungah a piak uh na khempeuh a nin suak hi." 
Haggai2:15 “Note tungah a piangsa thute limtakin ngaihsun un. Topa’ biakinn lam ding na kipat ma-un bangci na hi uh hiam? 
Haggai2:16 An seu sawmnih pha ding ci-in ansal-ah na pai uh ciangin seu sawm bek na pha a, leenggahzu thawlpi sawmnga pha ding ci-in leenggahzu kholna beelpi-ah na pai uh ciangin thawlpi sawmnih dim bek a na pha hi." 
Haggai2:17 Na an ciin khempeuh uh cingteek sakin ka kausansak a, tuate nangawn a susia dingin gialpi ka kiatsak hangin note na kisik nuam kei lailai uh hi." 
Haggai2:18 Tu-in, kha kuana a ni sawmnih le ni li ni, biakinn bulpi a kiphuh khit, tuni a kipanin limtakin ngaihsun un." 
Haggai2:19 Na ansal uhah na upmawhzah sangun an na tawmzaw lai ding ahi hiam? Leenggui le theikung, mang kawlsing le oliv kungte gah nai lo lai ding ahi hiam? Tua bang hi nawn lo ding a, tuni a kipanin note thupha kong pia ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai2:20 Tua kha a ni sawmnih le ni li ni mahin Topa in Haggai tungah a nihveina thu genkik a," 
Haggai2:21 “Vanpi le leipi a lokgawp ding ka hihna thu, Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel kiangah gen in." 
Haggai2:22 Kumpipa’ gam khempeuh lumletin a vangliatna uh a beisak ding ka hi hi. Leengte le leeng hawlte ka lawnthal ding a, sakol leengte le a tung tuangte puk ding uh a, amaute khatlekhat kithatlum ding uh hi." 
Haggai2:23 Ka nasem Zerubbabel aw, tua ni ciangin nang hong la-in ka mite’ kumpi dingin kong bawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong teelpa na hi hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah1:1 Persia gam uk Kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna, a kha giatna sungin Topa in kamsang Zekhariah tungah thu a gen hi. Zekhariah pen Berekhiah’ tapa hi a, ama pu Iddo ahi hi." 
Zechariah1:2 Topa in Zekhariah kiangah, “Mite tungah hih bangin thu gen in: ‘Na pu na pate uh tungah Topa ahi keimah ka heh mahmah hi." 
Zechariah1:3 Ahi zongin tu-in kei kiangah hong ciahkik le-uhcin, kei zong note kiangah kong paikik ding hi." 
Zechariah1:4 Na pu na pate uh bang nawn kei un. Nidanga kamsangte in amaute kiangah ka thu gen uh a, gamtatsia gamta loin, a mawh nawn loh nading hilh uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka thu ngainuam loin, ka thu hong mang lo uh hi." 
Zechariah1:5 Tu-in na pu na pate uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Tua kamsangte nungtalai sa na hi uh hiam? 
Zechariah1:6 Ahi zongin ka nasem ahi kamsangte’ tungtawnin ka hilhkholhna le ka thupiaknate in note dongin hong sukhalo ding sa na hi uh hiam, ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tawpna-ah amaute kisik uh a, hih dinga ka lungsimah ka geelsa bangin amau’ gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim a pia ka hihna thu a phawk uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah1:7 Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, kha sawm le khatna ahi Shebat kha ni sawmnih le ni li ni-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, zanin maang hong musak hi." 
Zechariah1:8 Topa’ vantungmi khat sakol san khat tungah a tuang ka mu hi. Kuam sunga a om mui singkungte lakah amah khawl a, ama nungah sakol dang a san, a gial, a kang om hi." 
Zechariah1:9 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Sia aw, hih sakolte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Bang a cihnopna hiam cih kong lak ding hi." 
Zechariah1:10 Hih sakol tung tuangte pai kawikawi-in leitung a en dingin Topa in a sawl ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:11 Tua ciangin mui kung lakah a khawl Topa’ vantung mite kiangah amaute in, “Leitung khempeuh ka en kawikawi khin uh a, leitung khempeuh khuaphawk loin nuamtakin om uh hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi." 
Zechariah1:12 Tua ciangin Topa’ vantungmi in, “Vanglian Topa aw, Jerusalem khuapi le Judah gam khuapite tungah kum sawmsagih sung na heh khinta hi. Amaute hehpih loin bang tanvei omlai ding na hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Zechariah1:13 Tua ciangin Topa in dikna le hehnepna kam tawh vantung mite dawng a," 
Zechariah1:14 Vanglian Topa in ama tungah a gensa thute khempeuh keimah in ka taangko sawn nadingin tua vantungmi in kei hong sawl a, “Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem, nakpitakin itin ka lunghimawh hi." 
Zechariah1:15 Tua bangin nuamtakin a om hithiat minamte tungah ka heh mahmah hi. Ka mite tungah ka hehna ki-ip tentanin ka om laitakin, hih minam dangte in ka mite’ gimna nasiasak semsem uh hi." 
Zechariah1:16 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khuapi tungah ka hehpihna a lak dingin ka hong paikik hi. Tua khuapi sungah ka biakinn kilamkik ding a, khuapikulh zong kiciangkik ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:17 Tua ciangin vantungmi in ka taangkona ding hong genkik leuleu a, “Ama khuapite nakpitakin cithei kikin, Jerusalem khuapi a hehnep kikna ding, le ama khuapi-in a neihkikna ding, Vanglian Topa in gen hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:18 Ka khuadak leh saki li ka mu hi. 
Zechariah1:19 Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in vantungmi kiangah ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Judah mite le Jerusalem mite a thehthang gawp leitung vangliatnate a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:20 Tua ciangin Topa in sek tawi mihing li hong lak hi. 
Zechariah1:21 Hih mite, bang hih ding ahi hiam, ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Hih saki lite in Judah mite thehthang gawp a, a lang uhah kuamah pang ngam lo ahih manin, Judah gam sugawpin a mite a thehthang gawp minamte, tu-in hih sek tawi lite in lausakin a lawnthal ding ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah2:1 Ka muhna dang khat leuleu-ah, a khut sungah tehna khau a tawi mi khat ka mu hi." 
Zechariah2:2 Koi-a pai ding na hi hiam, ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, “Jerusalem khuapi a sauna ka theih nadingin a teh dingin a pai ding ka hi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah2:3 Tua ciangin vantung mipa hong paikhia a, vantung midang khat in amah na dawntuah hi." 
Zechariah2:4 Tua ciangin vantungmi a masa pa in a dawntuah pa kiangah, “Va tai inla, tehna khau a tawi tangvalpa kiangah hih thu va gen in. Jerusalem khua sungah mihing le ganhing tam mahmah ding ahih manin Jerusalem kulhhuam sungah ta zo lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:5 Tua khuapi a hu dingin meikulh bangin Topa mahmah a omna ding, le tua khua sungah a minthanna tawh a tenna ding thu, Topa in kam ciamzo hi, ci-in va gen in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah2:6 Topa in ama mite kiangah, “Mun khempeuhah note kong thehthang khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in Babylon panin taikhia-in Jerusalem-ah ciahkik un." 
Zechariah2:7 Babylon-ah a om mite aw, Zion-ah tai un,” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:8 Hih bangin maang ka muh khit ciangin, ama mite’ na a sutgawp minam dangte kiangah thu a gen dingin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl a, Topa’ mite a su mi peuhpeuh in a mit nauta bangin a manphapen khat a su ahi hi." 
Zechariah2:9 Topa mahmah in note hong su ding a, nidanga note’ na hong sepsak mite in tu-in note’ nate hong lehsuh kik ding uh hi, hong cisak hi. Hih bangin thu hong pian’ ciangin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl ahih lamtak na thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:10 Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: “Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin la sa un. Note tawh a hong omkhawm ta ding ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:11 Tua hun ciangin Topa kiangah minam tampi hong pai ding uh a, ama mite a suak ding uh hi. Topa in note hong ompih ding a, tua ciangin note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:12 Judah mite pen gam siangtho sungah Topa’ neihtuam hong suakkik ding a, Jerusalem khua pen ama it penpen khuapi hong hi kik ding hi." 
Zechariah2:13 Mi khempeuh aw, Topa’ mai-ah gamdai-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama omna mun panin amah hong paikhia ta hi." 
Zechariah3:1 Topa in maang hong musak a, Topa’ vantungmi mai-ah siampi lianpen pa Joshua’ mawhna a zong dingin a kiangah Satan zong a om ka mu hi." 
Zechariah3:1 Topa in maang hong musak a, Topa’ vantungmi mai-ah siampi lianpen pa Joshua’ mawhna a zong dingin a kiangah Satan zong a om ka mu hi." 
Zechariah3:2 Topa’ vantungmi in Satan kiangah, “Satan aw, Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Jerusalem a it Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Hih Joshua pen meikhuk sung panin a kiteenkhia singkhuah tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:2 Topa’ vantungmi in Satan kiangah, “Satan aw, Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Jerusalem a it Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Hih Joshua pen meikhuk sung panin a kiteenkhia singkhuah tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua ahihleh vantungmi mai-ah ding a, puan a nin mahmah a silh hi." 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua ahihleh vantungmi mai-ah ding a, puan a nin mahmah a silh hi." 
Zechariah3:4 Vantung mi in ama sawltak van midangte kiangah, “Hih mipa’ silh a puan ninte suahkhiatsak un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in Joshua kiangah, “Na mawhna teng kong paihkhiatsak khin a, tu-in na silh dingin puan thak ka hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:4 Vantung mi in ama sawltak van midangte kiangah, “Hih mipa’ silh a puan ninte suahkhiatsak un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in Joshua kiangah, “Na mawhna teng kong paihkhiatsak khin a, tu-in na silh dingin puan thak ka hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Tua ciangin a sawltak van mite thu pia a, Joshua’ lu tungah dial siangtho a khipsak ding uh a sawl hi. Topa’ vantungmi tua munah a din sung mahin, amaute in zong Joshua, dial siangtho khimsakin, tua khit ciangin puan siangtho zong a silhsak uh hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Tua ciangin a sawltak van mite thu pia a, Joshua’ lu tungah dial siangtho a khipsak ding uh a sawl hi. Topa’ vantungmi tua munah a din sung mahin, amaute in zong Joshua, dial siangtho khimsakin, tua khit ciangin puan siangtho zong a silhsak uh hi." 
Zechariah3:6 Tua ciangin Topa’ vantungmi in Joshua kiangah limtakin thu gen a," 
Zechariah3:6 Tua ciangin Topa’ vantungmi in Joshua kiangah limtakin thu gen a," 
Zechariah3:7 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Ka thukhamte zui-in kong sawl thute na sep leh, ka biakinn sung le biakinn huang sungteng na uk ding a, hih ka kianga om vantung mite’ thu ka ngaih bangin nangma thu zong ka hong ngai ding hi." 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahih ciangin siampi lianpen pa Joshua aw ngai in: Ama siampipih ahi no a dangte in zong ngai un. Note pen mailam thuhoihna ding lim na hi uh hi. Sing bangin A Sel a kici min nei khat kong paisak ding hi. 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahih ciangin siampi lianpen pa Joshua aw ngai in: Ama siampipih ahi no a dangte in zong ngai un. Note pen mailam thuhoihna ding lim na hi uh hi. Sing bangin A Sel a kici min nei khat kong paisak ding hi. 
Zechariah3:9 Joshua’ omna mai-ah, mai sagih a nei suang khat ka koih hi; tua suang tungah lai ka gelh ding a, ni khat sungin hih gammite’ mawhna ka paihkhiatsak ding hi." 
Zechariah3:9 Joshua’ omna mai-ah, mai sagih a nei suang khat ka koih hi; tua suang tungah lai ka gelh ding a, ni khat sungin hih gammite’ mawhna ka paihkhiatsak ding hi." 
Zechariah3:10 Tua ni ciangin note khempeuh in leenggui le theikungte hau-in nuam na sa ding uh a, na vengte ciat un hong nekpihin hong lungdampihna dingun na sam ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah4:1 Kei tawh a kiho vantungmi mah hong paikik a, a ihmu kimlai a kiphong bang keekin kei hong khanglosak hi." 
Zechariah4:2 Amah in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Kham tawh a kibawl meivakkhuam khat ka mu hi. Tua meivakkhuam in meivak sagih nei a, meivaktui koihna ding hai khat zong a khuam dawnah om hi. Tua meivak sagihte in meivakkhau nei ciat uh hi." 
Zechariah4:3 Meivakkhuam gei-ah oliv kung nih zong om a, meivakkhuam lang tuakah om uh hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah4:4 Tua ciangin kei zong vantungmi kiangah, “Sia aw, hihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dot ciangin" 
Zechariah4:5 amah in, “A cihnopna thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dawng a, kei zong, “Sia aw, ka thei kei hi,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi." 
Zechariah4:6 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “ Topa in Zerubbabel tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: Galkap tam neihna hang hi lo, nangma vangliatna hang zong hi lo, keima tung panin na ngah vangliatna bek tawh na ma na tunzo ding hi." 
Zechariah4:7 Thuhaksa pente nangawn in na ma hong khaktan zo lo ding hi. Biakinn na lamkik ding a, mite in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi,’ ci-in a ot ngeingai laitakin a khupna suang na ciang ding hi, hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah4:8 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Zechariah4:9 Amah in, “Zerubbabel in biakinn bulpi phut khin a, biakinn lam zong a zo ding hi. Tua ciangin ka mite in, amaute kiangah nang kong sawlna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah4:10 A maa uh a telh loh manun ka mite lungkia uh a, ahi zongin Zerubbabel in biakinn lam nasep a makaihna a muh uh ciangin a lung uh damkik ding hi,” hong ci hi. Vantung mi in, “Meivak sagihte pen, leitung khempeuh a etna Topa’ mittang sagih ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah4:11 Tua ciangin kei zong ama kiangah, “Meivakkhuam pang tuak a om oliv kung nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Zechariah4:12 Oliv thau a luankhiatna kham tuizawl nihte’ gei-a om oliv hiang nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. 
Zechariah4:13 Amah in, “Thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Sia aw, thei kei ing,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah4:14 Tua ciangin amah in, “Leitung khempeuh’ Topa’ na a sem dingin Pasian in teelin sathau a nilh mi nihte a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:1 Ka khuadak kik leh huihlakah a leeng laizial khat ka mu hi. 
Zechariah5:2 Vantung mi in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Laizial a leeng khat ka mu a, a dung pi sawmthum pha-in, a vai pi sawm le pi nga pha hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah5:3 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Leitung gam khempeuhah a tung ding hamsiatnate, hih lai tungah kigelh hi. Guta khempeuh, gam sung panin kisiakmang ding hi, ci-in laizial dal lang khatah kigelh a, a man lopi-in ka min tawh thuciam mi khempeuh zong kisiakkhia mang ding hi, ci-in a lang khatah kigelh hi." 
Zechariah5:4 Vanglian Topa in hih samsiatna a khahkhiatna ding thu gen a, guta mite khempeuh le a man loin ka min tawh thuciam mite khempeuh’ inn sungah lut ding hi. Tua bang mite’ inn sungah a tawntungin hamsiatna omin, amaute a kipan a sing a suang, a vekpi-in sumai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:5 Tua ciangin vantungmi hong kilang kikin kei kiangah, “Tu-a a hong pai ding en in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:6 Kei zong, “Bang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Tua pen ciangpi hi a, gam sung khempeuh’ mawhna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:7 Tua ciangpi siin pen haknaw tawh a kibawl ahi hi. Tua bangin ka et laitakin haknaw kibawl tua ciangpi siin pen kidomto a, tua ciangpi sungah numei khat a tu hi." 
Zechariah5:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Hih numei pen gitlohna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in ciangpi sungah tua numei hensuk kik a, a siin tawh tua ciangpi a siinkik hi." 
Zechariah5:9 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh numei nih ka mu a, gun vapi bangin kha nei-in, keima lamah hong leeng uh hi. Van lamah tua ciangpi a leenpihto uh hi." 
Zechariah5:10 Tua ciangin vantungmi kiangah, “Koi lai-ah leenpih ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in ka dot leh" 
Zechariah5:11 amah in, “Biakinn khat a lamsak dingin Babylon gamah a leenpih ding ahi uh hi. Biakinn a lamsak uh a zawh uh ciangin, biak dingin tua ciangpi kikoih ding hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi." 
Zechariah6:1 Tua ciangin maang adang khat ka mu leuleu hi. Sumngo mual nih kikal panin sakolleeng li hong paikhia ka mu hi. 
Zechariah6:2 A leeng masa pen sakol san in kai a, a nihna, sakol vom in kai a," 
Zechariah6:3 a thumna, sakol kang in kai a, a lina, sakol gial in kai hi." 
Zechariah6:4 Tua ciangin vantungmi kiangah, “Sia aw, hih sakolleengte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Zechariah6:5 Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Hihte pen huihleeng li a cihnopna hi a, leitung khempeuhte’ Topa’ kiang panin a hong paikhia ahi uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:6 Sakol vomte in a kaih leeng pen leilu lam Babylon-ah a pai ding hi a, sakol kangte, nitumna lam, sakol gialte, leitaw lam, sakol sante, nisuahna lam gamah a pai ding ahi hi." 
Zechariah6:7 Tua sakolte, paikhia-in leitung teng a et ding uh ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih manin vantungmi in, “Pai unla, leitungteng va en un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amaute zong pai-in va en uh hi." 
Zechariah6:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei hong otsan a, “Leilu lam Babylon gamah a paite in Topa’ hehna damsak hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:9 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Zechariah6:10 Amah in, “Babylon gam salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik Heldai, Tobijah, le Jedaiah te’ hong piak leengte la inla, tua na lak ni mahin Zefaniah’ tapa Josiah’ inn-ah paipih in." 
Zechariah6:11 Amaute’ hong piak ngun le khamte zangin kumpi lukhu khat bawl in la, Jehozadak’ tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in." 
Zechariah6:11 Amaute’ hong piak ngun le khamte zangin kumpi lukhu khat bawl in la, Jehozadak’ tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in." 
Zechariah6:12 Ama kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih mipa pen sing bangin A Sel a kici mipa ahi hi. A omna peuhpeuhah amah cithei ding a, Topa’ biakinn lamkik ding hi." 
Zechariah6:13 Amah pen Topa’ biakinn a lam ding pa hi a, kumpite’ ngah theih minliatna ngahin, ama mite uk ding hi. Ama kumpi tokhom gei-ah siampi khat om ding a, kithutuakin, kilemin na semkhawm ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ va ci in." 
Zechariah6:14 Tua kumpi lukhu pen Heldai, Tobijah, Jedaiah, le Josiah-te pahtawi-in phawk nadingin biakinn sungah om ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:15 Gamlapi-a a teng mite hong pai-in Topa’ innlam nasep hong huh ding uh hi. Tua biakinn a kilamkik ciangin Vanglian Topa in note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh’ thupiaknate cingtakin na zuih nak-uhleh tu-a ka gen bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi. 
Zechariah7:1 Kumpi Darias in a uk a kum lina, a kha kuana Khislev kha a ni li ni-in Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen hi." 
Zechariah7:2 Bethel khuamite in, Topa’ tung panin thupha a ngen ding, le Vanglian Topa’ biakinn sunga a om siampite le kamsangte tungah, “A beisa kum tampi sung ka hihsa uh mah bangin biakinn siatna hangin kapkap lai-in, kha ngana sungin an na tangtanglai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong dingin Sharezer le Regemmelek, le a mite uh na sawl uh hi."
