Zechariah7:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Zechariah7:5 “Gam sung mi khempeuh le siampite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in a beisa kum sawmsagih sung kha ngana le kha sagihna sungin an tangin a kahna uh, kei hong pahtawina uh hi lo hi." 
Zechariah7:6 A annek a tuidawnte uh zong, amau’ duh man bek ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusalem cithei-in a khua sungah mi tampi om a, leitaw lam gam, nitumna lam gam, a kiim a pam khuapite-ah mi tampi tengin a om hun laitakin, tu-a bangmahin Topa in a kamsang masate’ tungtawnin a gensa thu ahi hi." 
Zechariah7:8 Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen a," 
Zechariah7:9 “Note in thu a tangin khenin, khatlekhat tungah itna le hehpihna kilakin," 
Zechariah7:10 note lakah a om meigong, tagah, gamdang mite, ahih kei leh mizawngte gim pia loin, khatlekhat kiliatsakna ding na ngaihsut lohna ding uh thu ka hong piazo hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah7:11 Ahi zongin amaute in mang nuam het lo uh a, hih thute ngaihsutin zong nei nuam lo uh hi." 
Zechariah7:12 Amaute in a lungsim uh suangtum bangin saksak uh a, Vanglian Topa in tanglai kamsangte’ tungtawnin a gen thuhilhnate ngai nuam lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa heh mahmah hi." 
Zechariah7:13 Amaute ka hopih ciangin hong ngai nuam lo uh hi; kei zong amaute’ hong thungetna ka ngai kei ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Zechariah7:14 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Huihpi’ mutkhiat bangin amaute thehthang gawpin, a theihngei nai lohna uh gam dangah amaute teng ding uh hi. Amau’ nusiat leitang hoih zong gamkhing suak ding a, a tungah kuamah om nawn loin daicip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah8:1 Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin 
Zechariah8:2 amah in, “Jerusalem mite ka itluatna hangin Jerusalem khuapi ka huh nuam mahmah a, hih banga ka itluatna in a galte tungah ka heh hong suaksak hi." 
Zechariah8:3 Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem-ah ciahkikin ka teng ding hi. A citak khuapi, ci-in minthang ding a, Vanglian Topa’ mual pen mual siangtho kici ding hi." 
Zechariah8:4 Jerusalem khuapi kongzing le lamkabomte-ah a tu dingin puteekte omkik ding a, teeklua kisa-in ciangkhut khunin pai ding uh hi." 
Zechariah8:5 Kongzing khempeuhah numei naupang kimawlin phezaizai ding uh hi. 
Zechariah8:6 “Tu-a a omlai note a dingin hih thu ahi thei lo ding tawh a kibat hangin kei a dingin ahi mawh ding thu hi lo hi. 
Zechariah8:7 Nisuahna le nitumna gamte panin ka mite ka honkhia ding a," 
Zechariah8:8 Jerusalem khua sungah ka tunpihkik ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi-in, kei zong amau’ Pasian ka hi ding a, amau tawh ka thuciamnate limtakin ka zui ding hi." 
Zechariah8:9 “Thakhauhin lungsim hang un. Ka biakinn a kilamkikna ding a bul a kiphuh laitakin kamsangte in a gen thute mah a za na hi uh hi. 
Zechariah8:10 Tua hun ma-in mi ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin na a sem dingin kuamah in cial zo lo a, galte kihtakna hangin kuamah a ututin om thei lo hi. Mi khatlekhat ka kidosak hi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a suaktalai hih minamte, nidang ate ka bangsak kei ding hi." 
Zechariah8:12 Lungnuam takin lokho singpua-in nuam a sa ding uh hi. Leengguite gahpha ding a, guah tampi zu-in lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, a suaktalai ka minamte tungah hih bang thupha khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi." 
Zechariah8:13 A beisa hunah, Judah gammite le Israel gammite pen, minam dangte in kihamsiatna-in zang uh a, ‘Judah le Israel-te’ thuak bangin thuak un,’ kici uh hi. Ahi zongin note kong honkhia ding a, tu-in midangte in, ‘Judah le Israel bangin thupha ngah un,’ ci-in thupha kipiakna-in zang ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh hangsak unla lau kei un." 
Zechariah8:14 “Na pu na pate un kei hong hehsak ciangin amaute tungah siatna tunsak ding ka ngaihsun a, ka lungsim ka khiam het kei hi." 
Zechariah8:15 Ahi zongin tu-in Jerusalem khua mite le Judah gammite tungah thupha piak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin lunghimawh kei un. 
Zechariah8:16 Hih bangin note gamta un: Note khatlekhat tungah thuman thutak kam kipau un. Thukhenna zumah, kilemna a piangsak ding thutang zang un." 
Zechariah8:17 Khatlekhat kisiatsakna ding vaihawm kei unla, a man lopi-in teci pangin kiciam kei un. Zuauna, thuman lohna, le kibawlsiatnate ka deih kei hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah8:18 Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin 
Zechariah8:19 amah in, “Kha lina, kha ngana, kha sagihna, le kha sawmna sunga antannate pen, Judah gammite a dingin lungdamin kipakin pawi bawlna hun suak ta ding hi. Tua ahih manin thuman le kilemna deih pha un,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah8:20 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Minam liante le khuapi liante panin Jerusalem-ah mi hong pai hun hong tung ding hi. 
Zechariah8:21 Khuapi khat-a om mite in khuapi dang a om mite kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa bia-in ama tung panin thupha ka ngen ding uh hi. Hong zui un,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Zechariah8:22 A vanglian a thahat minamte zong Vanglian Topa a bia ding le ama tung panin thupha a ngen dingin Jerusalem-ah hong pai ding uh hi. 
Zechariah8:23 Tua hun ciangin minam tuamtuamte sung panin mi sawm, Jew mi khat kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Pasian in nang hong ompihna thu za ka hih manun na nung hong zuisak in,’ ci-in thum ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah9:1 Topa’ thugenna: Hadrak gammite’ gimtuahna ding Topa in thu khenzo a, Damaskas khuapi in zong tuak ding hi. Israel minam khempeuh, Topa -a’ ahih mah bangin leitung minam khempeuh zong Topa -a’ mah ahi hi." 
Zechariah9:2 Hadrak tawh a kigizawng Hamath zong, Topa -a’ mah hi a, siamna a nei Taia khuapi le Sidon khuapite zong, ama a’ mah ahi hi." 
Zechariah9:3 Taia khuapi in galnanna kulh bawl a, leivui zahin ngun le kham hau a, kongzing nin zahin kiciang venvan hi." 
Zechariah9:4 Ahi zongin Topa in a neih khempeuh laksakin tuipi sungah paihsak ding a, a khuapi a haltumsak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashkelon khuapi in hih thu mu-in lau ding a, Gaza khuapi in zong gimlawh ding hi. A lametna teng bei ding ahih manin Ekron khuapi in zong gimlawh ding hi. Gaza khuapi in a kumpipa taan ding a, Ashkelon khuapi kinusiacip ding hi." 
Zechariah9:6 Ashdod khuapi-ah minam dangte zong teng ding a, a kiphasak Filistia mite ka beisak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:7 Amaute in sa, a si tawh ne nawn lo ding uh a, a kikham ante zong tang ding uh hi. A suakta sunteng, keima mite suak ding uh a, Judah mite lakah beh khat bang ding uh hi. Jebus mite mah bangin Ekron khua mite zong keima mi suak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:8 Tua ciangin ka gam sung ka hu ding a, galte ka nawksak nawn kei ding hi. Ka mihingte’ thuakna mu khin ka hih manin migilote, ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi." 
Zechariah9:9 Zion mite aw, nakpitakin lungdam un. Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin awng un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai hi. Amah, gualzawhna tawh hong pai hi. Ahi zongin kiniamkhiatna tawh hong pai a, sin nai loh lano tungah hong tuang hi." 
Zechariah9:10 Galkidona leengte Israel gam pan beisakin, sakol galkapte, Judah gam pan ka lakhia ding a, galdona a kizang thalte kisusia ding hi. Na kumpipa un minam dangte lakah kilemna thu gen ding a, amah in tuipi mong khat pan tuipi mong khat dong, Eufratis Gunpi panin leimong dongin a uk ding hi." 
Zechariah9:11 Sisan tawh a kikipsak, note tawh ka thuciamna hangin na salsuahna uh keugaw gam panin note ka hong suaktasak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:12 Lametna a om no salte aw, ciahkik unla, a muanhuai mahmah na mun ngei uh zuankik un. Note’ thuaknasa a zah nihin thupha ka hong piakna ding tuni-in note kiangah ka hong gen hi." 
Zechariah9:13 Grik mite, sim nadingin Judah, thal bangin keekin, Israel thaltangin ka zang ding a, Zion mite, namsau-in ka zang ding hi." 
Zechariah9:14 Ama mite tungah Topa kilang ding a, a thaltang lotte khuaphia bang ding hi. Topa Pasian in peengkul tum ding a, leitaw lam panin a hong pai huihpi tawh a va kuankhia ding hi." 
Zechariah9:15 Vanglian Topa in ama mite hu ding a, ama mite in a galte uh susia ding hi. Galdona sungah zukham bangin awng gawp ding uh a, a galte uh’ sisan luangsakgawp ding uh hi. Biakna site, biakna tau tungah hai a sun tawh kibangin a luangsak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:16 Tuucingpa in a tuuhonte lauhuaina panin a hotkhiat bangin, tua ni ciangin Topa, amau’ Pasian in a mite a honkhia ding hi. Kumpi lukhu tungah a om suangmanphate bangin ama gam sungah a mite taang ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:17 Tua thu bangzah takin hoihin nuam ding ahi hiam? Anlim nekna in tangvalte thahatsak ding a, zulim nekna in nungakte thadimsak ding hi." 
Zechariah10:1 Singkung lopa a sel hunin Topa kiang pan guah ngen un. Meii kaisakin, guah zusak a, ankung khempeuh a dumsak pa, Topa ahi hi." 
Zechariah10:2 Mihingte in milim peuh thudotin nei uh a, a thu ngahte uh zuauthu le a mawkna hi lel hi. Mang khiathei-a kineite in lam lakkhial uh a, amau’ hehnepnate a mawknapi hi lel hi. Tua ahih manin tuu bangin mite mangthang uh a, makai a neih loh manun gimna a ngah uh hi." 
Zechariah10:3 Ka mi a makaite tungah ka heh suak mahmah a, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Judah mite pen Vanglian Topa ahi keima a’ hi a, amaute limtakin kemin, ka sakol galkap thahatte a suak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:4 Amaute sung pan mi makaite, galkapmangte, gam ukte, hong khangkhia ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:5 Kongzing buannawng lakah a galte uh a tuancilgawp galkapte bangin amaute gualzo ding uh a, Topa in a ompih manin amaute in gal a sim uh ciangin a galte’ sakol galkapte zogawp ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:6 Judah mite ka thahatsak ding a, Israel mite ka honkhia ding hi. Amaute ka khasiat ding a, inn-ah ka ciahpih ding hi. Amaute cikmah hunin ka nial ngei loh bang keekin nuamtakin a om ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa, amau’ Pasian ka hi a, amau’ thungetnate ka pia ding hi." 
Zechariah10:7 Israel mite, galkap hatte bang ding uh a, zukham lungnuam, bang ding uh hi. A suan a khakte un hih gualzawhna phawkin lungdam ding uh a, Topa’ bawlna hangin kipak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:8 Amaute samin ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute honkhia-in a nidang zahin mi tampi ka phasak ding hi." 
Zechariah10:9 Minam dangte lakah amaute ka thehthang hangin a gamlapi panin kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amaute le a tate uh suakta-in, a vekpi-un inn zuanin hong ciahkhawm ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:10 Egypt le Assiria gam panin amaute ka ciahpih kik ding a, a gam a lei uhah ka tengsak ding hi. Gilead gam le Lebanon gamah zong ka tengsak ding a, gam khempeuhah mi a dim ding hi." 
Zechariah10:11 Amaute in lungkhamna tuipi a phutkhak uh ciangin keimah in tuihualte ka vatmai ding a, Nail gun tuithukte kangcip ding hi. Assiria mite ka niamkhiat ding a, Egypt in a vangliatna taan ding hi." 
Zechariah10:12 Ka mite ka thahatsak ding a, amaute in kei hong bia-in ka thu hong mang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Zechariah11:1 Lebanon aw, mei in na taamtak kungte a kattheih nadingin na kongpite hong in." 
Zechariah11:2 Taaksan kungte aw, kapin thum un. Taamtak kungte puk khin a, a minthang singkungte kisia ta hi. Bashan tawsaw kungte aw, kapin thum un; gammang tupi singteng kiphukmang khinta hi." 
Zechariah11:3 Tuucingte a minthanna uh bei khinta ahih manin dahin a kap uh hi. A tuulak inn uh kisusia khin ahih manin humpinelkaite’ hawkna za un. 
Zechariah11:4 Topa ka Pasian in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Gawh dingin a kikoih tuuhonte va cing in." 
Zechariah11:5 Tuu neite in a tuute go uh a, ahi zongin amaute gim kipia lo hi. Amaute in a tuusa zuak uh a, ‘ Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Tu-in i hauta hi,’ ci uh hi. A tuucingte mahmah in a tuute uh hehpihna nei lo uh hi." 
Zechariah11:6 Tua ahih ciangin hih gamah a teng mite ka hehpih nawn kei ding hi. Amaute a ukpa le a kumpipa’ khutnuai-ah mi khempeuh ka koih ding hi. Gam uk mite in gam sungteng susiagawp ding a, amau’ suksiatna panin kuamah ka honkhia kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah11:7 Tuu summeet bawlte in kei hong cial uh a, a kigo ding tuute a cing pa ka suak hi. Kei zong ciangkhut nih la-in khat pen “Hehpihna” ci-in min ka phuak a, a khat pen “Kipawlna” ci-in min ka phuak hi. Tua hi a, tuute a cingin kei ka om hi." 
Zechariah11:8 Kha khat sungin tuucing adang thumte ka notkhia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah ka lungduaizo nawn kei a, amaute in kei hong mudah uh hi." 
Zechariah11:9 Tua ciangin kei zong tuuhonte kiangah, “Note ka hong cing nawn kei ding hi. A si dingteng si unla, a kisusia dingteng siacip un. A omlaisun teng khatlekhat kisanek un,” ka ci hi." 
Zechariah11:10 Tua ciangin “Hehpihna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan a, minam khempeuh tawh ka bawl thuciamna ka phiat hi." 
Zechariah11:11 Tua ahih manin tua ni-in thuciamna kiphiat hi. Tuu summeet bawlte in hong en giaugiau uh a, hih banga ka gamtatna panin Topa’ thugen ahihlam a phawk uh hi." 
Zechariah11:12 Tua ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah, “Hoih na sak uhleh ka tuucin thaman hong pia un. Hoih na sak kei uhleh lah tang lel un,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka thaman dingin ngun shekel sawmthum hong pia uh hi." 
Zechariah11:13 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Biakinn sumkoihna sungah tuate koih in,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin kei zong, kei tawh kituakin tam a sak mahmah uh tua dangka sawmthum la-in biakinn sumkoihna sungah ka koih hi." 
Zechariah11:14 Tua ciangin “Kipawlna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan leuleu a, Judah le Israel a kipawlna kiphiat hi." 
Zechariah11:15 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Khatvei tuucing nasep semkik inla, tutungin kimanna a nei lo tuucing nasep sem in." 
Zechariah11:16 Ka tuuhonte a cing dingin tuucing khat ka koih a, ahi zongin ka tuu a sia dingte huh loin, a mangthangte zong loin, a liamte bawl loin, a cidamte zong an vak lo hi. Amah in tua tuu thau pente’ sate ne-in a khecinte nangawn hawkkhiatsak zawsop hi." 
Zechariah11:17 “Kimanna a nei lo tuucingpa, a tuuhonte a nusia pa in gimna ngah ta hen! Namsau in a khut bantan hen la, a taklam mit satkham hen. A khut beimang hen la, a taklam mit tawcip hen!” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah12:1 Vanpi zalin leitung piangsak a, mihingte tungah nuntakna a pia Topa in Israel mite tawh kisai-in thu gen a," 
Zechariah12:2 “Leenggahzu bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl ding a, a kiima om minam dangte in a nek ciangin khamin a hoi ding uh hi. Jerusalem khuapi a umcih uh ciangin Judah gam khuapi dangte zong umcih ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:3 Tua hun hong tun ciangin suangtumpi gik mahmah bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl ding a, likkhiat a sawm minam khat peuhpeuh in liamlawh ding hi. Leitung minamdang khempeuh kipawlin Jerusalem a sim ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:4 Tua ni ciangin a sakolte uh ka lausak ding a, a sakol tung tuangte uh ka haisak ding hi. Ahi zongin Judah mite ka kem ding a, a galte uh’ sakolte, a mit ka tawsak ding hi." 
Zechariah12:5 Tua ciangin Judah minamte in, ‘Jerusalem-a a teng mite, Vanglian Topa ahi amau’ Pasian’ hangin thahat uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:6 “Tua ni ciangin Judah minamte, tulak kang le buhphual kang ka bangsak ding a, a kiima om minamdangte khempeuh a susia ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem mite, a khuapi sungah lungmuangin a om hithiat ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:7 “Tua ciangin Judah galkapte tungah gualzawhna ka pia masa ding a, David’ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khuamite’ minthanna pen Judah midangte’ minthanna sangin lianzaw tuan lo ding hi." 
Zechariah12:8 Tua ni ciangin Topa in Jerusalem-a a teng mite hu ding a, a ginalo pente nangawn David zahin thahat ding hi. David’ suanlekhakte in Topa’ vantungmi le Pasian mahmah bangin amaute a makai ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:9 Jerusalem sim ding a hanciam minam khempeuh tua ni ciangin ka susia ding hi. 
Zechariah12:10 “David’ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khuamite’ tungah hehpihna lungsim le thungetna lungsim ka guan ding hi. Amaute in a sutlup uh mipa enin, ta khat neihsun a sihsuah mite bangin kap ding uh a, tacil a khuaisuahte bangin nakpitakin kapin thum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:11 Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem khua sungah kapin thumna pen Megiddo zanglei-a Hadadrimmon pasian’ sihna hangin kahna le thumna zah mahin nasia ding hi. 
Zechariah12:12 Gam sung khempeuhah a innkuankuanin dahin kap ding uh hi. David’ suanlekhakte sung panin a innkuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi. Nathan’ suanlekhakte zong a innkuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:13 Levi’ suanlekhakte le a zite, Shimei’ suanlekhakte le a zite," 
Zechariah12:14 le beh dang khempeuhte zong a behbehin, a zite uh tawh a tuam ciatin kapin a thum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:1 “Tua ni hong tun ciangin David’ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khuamite’ mawhna le nitnateng khempeuh a silsiang dingin tuinak khat hong phul ding hi. 
Zechariah13:2 Tua ni ciangin gam sung panin milim khempeuh ka phiatsiang ding a, kuamah in a milim min nangawn uh phawkkha nawn lo ding uh hi. Kamsang zuautheite zong phiatin, milim biaknopna lungsim ka beisak ding hi." 
Zechariah13:3 Mi khatpeuh kamsang a kineihlai teitei leh, a pianna a nu le a pa mahmah in kho ding uh a, ‘ Topa’ min paulamin zuauthu gen na hih manin na si ding hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua bangin thu a gen teitei le, a nu le a pa mahmah in tem tawh sunlum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:4 Tua ni hong tun ciangin kamsangte in a maangmuh theihna uh kisialhpih ngam nawn loin, kamsangte bangin zong puan silh ngam nawn loin, kamsang zong kineih ngam nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:5 Kamsang ka hi kei hi; lokho mi ka hi a, ka khan tawnin lokho-in a om ka hi hi, ci zawsop ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:6 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Na awm a na liammate bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin, ‘Ka lawmte’ inn khatah zukham sulin kitotna-a a liam ka hi hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Zechariah13:7 “Namsau aw, ka tuucingpa a su dingin kipan inla, kei tawh nasem khawm pa langpang in. Tuucingpa sat in. Tuute kithehthang ding a, ka tuute gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zechariah13:8 Leitung khempeuhah, sehthum suah sehnih si ding a, seh khat bek suaktalai ding hi." 
Zechariah13:9 Tua a suakta sehkhatte pen meikhukah ngun a kisiansak bangin, meikhukah kham a kize-et bangin, meikhukah ze-etin ka siangsak ding hi. Amaute in kei tungah thu hong ngenin, kei zong amau’ thungetna ka pia ding hi. Keima mi ahihna uh amaute tungah ka gen ding a, amaute in kei pen amau’ Pasian ka hihna thu a kam uh tawh pulak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah14:1 Topa in na hong sep hun hong tung ding hi. Jerusalem khuapi kiluh gawpin, note’ muh mahmahin a na lakte uh hawm ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:2 Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin Topa in minam khempeuh kaikhawm ding hi. A khuapi kila-in, a innte kiluh gawpin, a numeite zong kibuan gawp ding hi. Mi alang bang salin kipaikhiatpih ding a, adangte ahihleh kipaikhiatpih lo ding hi." 
Zechariah14:3 Tua ciangin Topa hong kuankhia ding a, a beisa hunah a sim ngei bangin hih minam dangte hong sim ding hi." 
Zechariah14:4 Tua ciangin Jerusalem nisuahna lamah a om Oliv Mual tungah Topa a ding ding hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam pan nitumna lamah Oliv Mual kitamin phel nih suak ding a, a kikalah kuampi om ding hi. A mual kimkhat leilu lamah kikhinin, kimkhat leitaw lamah kikhin ding hi." 
Zechariah14:5 Hinnom kuam sung kivukcip ding a, Judah kumpi Uzzah’ hun lai-in zinlinna-a a kivukcip mah bang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka Pasian hong pai ding a, a mi siangthote khempeuh hong tonpih ding hi." 
Zechariah14:6 Tua ni hong tun ciangin khuadam, vukkiat cihte om nawn lo ding a," 
Zechariah14:7 khuamial hun cih zong om lo ding hi. Zan hun nangawnin sun khuavak bek om ding hi. Hih thu a pian’ ding hun, Topa bek in a thei hi." 
Zechariah14:8 Tua ni hong tun ciangin Jerusalem khua panin tuicim hong luangkhia ding a, kimkhat, nisuahna lamah a om Si Tuipi-ah luang ding a, kimkhat, nitumna lamah a om Mediterranean Tuipi-ah luang ding hi. Tua tui in kan’ hun cih nei loin luang tawntung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:9 Tua ciangin Topa pen leitung khempeuh’ kumpi suak ding a, mi khempeuh in amah bek thei-in bia ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:10 Leilu lam Geba khua panin leitaw lam Rimmon khua dong, leitung khempeuh, zanglei suak ding hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem khuapi pen bangmah ci loin a sangpi-in om ding a, Benjamin Kongpi pan a kipan nidanga kongpi a omnasa Kiu Kongpi dong, le Hananel Tausang panin kumpipa’ leenggah cilna phual ciang dong a ban ding hi." 
Zechariah14:11 Tua khuapi sungah lungmuang takin mi teng ding uh a, lauhuaina tuakkha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a sim minam dang khempeuhte tungah Topa in gimna lianpi tungsak ding hi. A khe-un a ding thei kimlai mahin a sa uh muatmang ding a, a mitkua sung uhah a mittangte uh muatin, a kam sung uhah a leiite uh muat ding hi." 
Zechariah14:13 Tua ni ciangin Topa in amaute amkhamsak gawp ding a, mite in a gei-a a matkhak mite manin khatlekhat kilaithang gawp ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:14 Judah mite in Jerusalem khuapi hutna-in galte do ding uh a, minam dang khempeuhte’ neihsa kham, ngun, le puante tampi tak a laksak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:15 Galte’ phuala om sakolte, la-sakolte, kalaohte, late, le ganhing om khempeuh tungah gimna lianpi a tung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:16 Tua bangin galte a kizawhgawp khit ciangin, galte sung panin a nungtalai mite in Vanglian Topa, kumpi ahihna hangin a bia ding le ama gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin kumsimin Jerusalem-ah pai tawntung ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:17 Minam khat peuhpeuh, Vanglian Topa ahi kumpipa a bia dingin Jerusalem-ah a painop kei leh amau’ gam sungah guah zu lo ding hi." 
Zechariah14:18 Tua gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin Egypt mite a painop kei leh, tua bangin a pai nuam lo minamte’ thuak ding gimnate mah, amau’ tungah a tung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:19 Gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin a pai nuam lo Egypt mite le minam dang khempeuhte tungah a tung ding gimna pen tu-a bang ahi hi. 
Zechariah14:20 Tua ni ciangin sakol khilongte khempeuh tungah, “ Topa -a’ dingin A Kipia,” ci-in ciaptehna kibawl ding hi. Biakinn sunga a om beelte khempeuh pen biakna tau mai-ah a kikoih kuangte mah bangin a siangtho-in kinei ding hi." 
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem khuasung le Judah gam sungah a om beelte khempeuh, Vanglian Topa biakna-in zat dingin a tuamin kikoih ding hi. Biakna a pia dingin a hong pai mi khempeuh in tua beelte zangin, biakna sa huanna-in a nei ding uh hi. Tua ni hong tun ciangin Vanglian Topa’ biakinn-ah sumzuak vanzuak cihte om nawn lo ding hi." 
Malachi1:1 Topa in Malakhi tungtawnin Israel-te tungah thu gen hi. 
Malachi1:2 Topa in, “Note kong it hi,” ci hi. Ahi zongin note in, “Kote hong bangci it na hi hiam?” na ci uh hi. Topa in hong dawng a, “Esau le Jakob unau hi a, ahi zongin Jakob le a suan a khakte itin," 
Malachi1:3 Esau le a suan a khakte ka mudah hi. Esau’ neih mualtung gamte ka susia a, gamsate tungah ka pia hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi1:4 Esau’ suanlekhak Edom mite in, “I khuapite a kisiat khit hangin i lamkik ding hi,” ci le-uh, Topa in, “A ut uhleh lam uh hen; ahi zongin ka susia kik veve ding hi. Midangte in, ‘Gam gilo, Topa’ heh tawntungna minamte,’ ci-in ko ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Malachi1:5 Note’ mit mahmah tawh hih thupiang na mu ding uh a, “Israel gam pualam nangawnah Topa in vangliatna nei hi,” na ci ding uh hi." 
Malachi1:6 Vanglian Topa in siampite tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: “Tapa in a pa zahtak a, nasempa in a topa kihta hi. Kei pen na pa uh hinapi, bang hangin hong zahtak lo a, na topa uh hinapi, bang hangin hong kihta lo na hi uh hiam? No siampite in kei hong simmawh napi-in, ‘Bang hong ci simmawh ka hi uh hiam?’ na cilai uh hi." 
Malachi1:7 Note in ka biakna tau tungah keimah biakna-in an ginalopite hong pia hinapi-in, ‘Kong zahtak bawl lohna uh bang om ahi hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Ka biakna tau simmawhbawl na hih manun hong zahtak bawl lo na hi uh hi." 
Malachi1:8 Ganhing a mittawpite tawh kei nong biak uh ciangin, a hoihmahin kingaihsun na hi uh hiam? A khebai, a cina ganhingte tawh nong biak uh ciangin, a hoihmah kisa na hi uh hiam? Tua bang ganhing khat peuhpeuh, note hong ukpa kiangah va puak dih un. Note tungah nuamin hong pakta ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Malachi1:9 Tua ahih ciangin no siampite aw, Pasian in eite hong hehpih theih nadingin ama kiangah thum un. Na hih ngeisa bangun na nget uh hangin na ngetnate uh hong pia lo ding hi; tua pen nomau’ khialhna ahi hi." 
Malachi1:10 Vanglian Topa in, “Ka biakna tau tungah, bangmah-a kimang lo mei na tawh mawkmawk theih loh nadingun, note khatpeuh in biakinn kongkhakte khak le-uh cin ka ut hi. Note tungah ka lungkim kei a, nong piak uh biakpiaknate kong sang kei ding hi." 
Malachi1:11 Leitung khempeuhah a om minam khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh a, kei a dingin mun khempeuhah paknamtui halin, a kisangthei ding biakpiakna hong pia uh hi. Mi khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh hi." 
Malachi1:12 Ahi zongin note in keima biakna tau bangmah a man nei loin genin, tua biakna tau tunga na piak uh ante na thupi ngaihsut loh uh ciangin, keimah a hong simmawh na hi uh hi." 
Malachi1:13 Note in, ‘Hihte cimtak khin hang,’ ci-in nong nap nitsan lel uh hi. Keimah biak nadingin a kigu ganhing khatpeuh ahi a, a liam a bai, ahih kei leh a cina peuh nong paipih uh hi. Tua bangte, a sang dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Malachi1:14 A tuuhon lakah tuutal cidam nei napi-in, a kamciamsa bangin kei tungah hong piak ciangin, a sitbaang ganhing a hong pia mi khempeuh in samsiatna thuak tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen a lian mahmah Kumpipa ka hi a, minam khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi2:1 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Siampite aw, note a dingin hih lai-ah thupiakna khat om hi." 
Malachi2:2 Na gamtatna uh tawh kei nong zahtak ding uh hi. Ka thugente ngai loin, thupi takin na lak kei uhleh note tungah samsiatna ka hong tungsak ding a, siampi hihna tawh na ngah uh thuphate tungah samsiatna ka tungsak ding hi. A taktakin ci lehang, note in ka thupiaknate thupi lak lo na hih manun na thupha ngahte uh tungah samsiatna ka tungsakzo hi." 
Malachi2:3 Na suanlekhakte uh nakpitakin ka thuhilh ding a, note ahihleh, na biakpiakna ganhing uh a ekte tawh na maitang uh hong zut gawpin tuate tawh kong lawnkhia khawm ding hi." 
Malachi2:4 Tua ciangin Levi’ suanlekhakte ahi siampite tawh ka thuciamna a kip nawn lo ahihna thu, hih thu kong genna-ah na thei ding uh hi." 
Malachi2:5 “Amaute a nuntakna ding le a nopsakna ding thu ka ciam a, amaute in kei hong zahtak theih nadingun hih ka thuciamte khempeuh ka pia hi. Amaute in kei hong zahtakin hong kihta takpi uh hi." 
Malachi2:6 Amaute in thuman taktakte mah hilhin gen uh a, amaute’ kam panin zuauthu gingkhia lo hi. Ka deihna bangin amaute gamta uh a, a khial ding mi tampite, thuman lamah a paisak uh hi." 
Malachi2:7 Siampite’ nasep pen Pasian a manin theih nading a hilh ding uh ahi hi. Amaute pen, Vanglian Topa’ kamtaite ahih manun, mite in keima deihna a theih nadingun amaute’ tungah thu a dot ding uh ahi hi." 
Malachi2:8 “Ahi zongin, no siampite na hih uhleh lampi man panin na pial khin uh hi. Na thuhilhnate un mi tampi tak khialsak hi. Note tawh ka bawl thuciamna na palsat khin uh hi." 
Malachi2:9 Tua ahih manin, note in ka thuhilhna zui loin, keima thu na hilh uh ciangin zong a kibangin hilh loin mi na deidan mah uh bangin, kei zong mi khempeuh mai-ah simmawhna le niamkhiatna kong ngahsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi2:10 Eite khempeuh in, eite a hong piangsak Pasian ahi Pa khat bek nei hi lo ihi hiam? Tua hinapi-in bang hangin eite khatlekhat tungah citak loin, i pu i pate tawh a bawl, Pasian’ thuciamna palsat ihi hiam?" 
Malachi2:11 Judah mite citak loin, Pasian tungah a thuciamna uh palsat uh a, Israel mite’ lak le Jerusalem khua sungah siatna tampi gamta uh hi. Topa in a it mahmah biakinn ninsak uh hi. Topa ahi lo, pasian dang a bia numeite, zi-in la-in a tenpih uh hi." 
Malachi2:12 Hih bangin a gamta mi peuhmah, a kua a kua hitaleh, Topa in sugawp hen la, Vanglian Topa tungah biakna a paipih ei minamte tawh hong kigawmsak nawn kei hen." 
Malachi2:13 Note’ gamtatna adang khat omlai hi. Tua pen, note’ paipih biaknate hong sang nawn lo ahih manin Topa’ biakna tau, khitui tawh na kawtsak uh a, kapin thumin na om uh hi." 
Malachi2:14 Bang hangin hong sang lo hiam, na ci uh hi. Na khangnolai uha na tenpih na zite uh tungah na cihtak lohna uh amah in hong thei a, na zite uh tungah na cihtak tawntungna ding uh Pasian tungah thu ciamin, na zite uh zong na lawmnu mah uh hinapi-in amaute tawh na thuciamna uh na pelhna hang uh ahi hi." 
Malachi2:15 Pasian in na zite uh tawh pumkhat, lungsim khat ahi dingin hong bawl hi lo ahi hiam? Hih bangin a hong bawlna pen bang a deihna ahi hiam? Pasian’ mi taktak ahi ding tate i neih theih nading ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na khangno lai-un na tenpih na zi uh tawh na thuciamna uh na palsatkhak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Malachi2:16 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Zi makna ka deih kei a, mi khatpeuh in a khangno lai-a a tenpih a zi tungah tua bang gitlohna a gamtatna ka mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kidawm unla, a citak dingin na zite uh tungah na thuciamna uh palsat kei un,” ci hi, a ci hi." 
Malachi2:17 Thu na gengenna uh tawh Topa na gimsak uh hi. Note in, “Bangci gimsak ka hi uh hiam?” na ci uh hi. “ Topa in a sia-in a gamtate a hoihin ngaihsun a, zong itin amaute tungah lungkim takpi hi,” na cihna khawng uhleh, “Thutang a gen Pasian koi lai-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in na dotnate uh tawh na gimsak uh hi." 
Malachi3:1 Hih bangin na thugenna uh tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in hong dawng a, “Ka pai nading lampi a bawlkhol dingin ka kamtai pa ka sawl ding hi. Tua ciangin na ngakngak uh Topa a biakinn sungah thakhat thu-in hong pai ding hi. Na muhnop uh kamtai pa hong pai-in ka thuciamna hong taangko ding hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi3:2 Ahi zongin ama hong pai ni ciangin kua in thuakzo ding a, amah hong kilaak ciangin kua nungtazo ding ahi hiam? Amah pen, sikte a siangthosak mei, le puante a siangthosak satpiang tawh kibang hi." 
Malachi3:3 A ninte kangtumsakin, ngunte a siangsak pa bangin thukhen dingin hong pai ding hi. Ngun le khamte a kisiansak bangin amah in Levi suanlekhak ahi siampite siangsak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa’ tungah a kilawm biakna a pia ding uh hi." 
Malachi3:4 Tua ciangin Judah mite le Jerusalem mite’ piak biaknate pen nidang ate mah bangin Topa’ mai-ah a lungkimhuai hi ding hi. 
Malachi3:5 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note tungah thukhen dingin ka hong pai ding hi; ai tawite, numei tawh a mawhte, a man lopi a teci pangte, numeite’ thaman piakna-ah khemna a zangte; meigong, tagah, le gamdang mite a zawhthawh bawlte, le kei hong zahtak lo mi khempeuhte’ langkhatah thakhatin teci pangin thu ka khen ding hi." 
Malachi3:6 “Kei, Topa ka hi a, lungsim a kheel lo mi ka hi hi. No Jakob suanlekhakte aw, a siacimit na hi nai kei uh hi." 
Malachi3:7 Na pu na pate uh mah bangin ka thukhamte panin note na pialkhia uh a, ka thukhamte na zui kei uh hi. Ahi zongin keima lamah hong kihei kik un; kei zong note lamah kong kihei ding hi. Ahi zongin note in, ‘Nang lamah hong bangci kihei ding ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi." 
Malachi3:8 Keimah in note kong dotnop thu pen, mi khatpeuh in Pasian’ na guksak ding kilawm ahi hiam? Kilawm lo hinapi-in note in nong guksak uh hi. Ahi zongin note in, ‘Bang hong guksak ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Sawm-ah-khat piakna le biakpiaknate ah nong guksak uh hi." 
Malachi3:9 Na minam bupun keima neihsa hong guksak na hih manun note khempeuh tungah samsiatna hong tung hi. 
Malachi3:10 Ka biakinn-ah an a om theih nadingin sawm-ah-khat a kimin hong paipih un. Kei hong ze-et un; vantung kongkhakte hongin, note a dingin na hoih tampi kong piakna na mu ding uh hi." 
Malachi3:11 Lo panin a piang na ante uh, kauphe ka nesak nawn kei ding a, na leenggui uh gahpha mahmah ding hi." 
Malachi3:12 Tua ciangin na gam uh, ten nadingin a hoih mahmah leitang hong suak ding ahih manin, minam dang khempeuh in note pen a nuamsa minam hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi3:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei tawh kisai-in na kampaunate uh khauh mahmah hi. Note in, ‘Bang kam pau ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi." 
Malachi3:14 Note in, ‘Pasian’ na i sep a mawkna hi. Ama hong sawl bangin i sep hangin bang a kimanna om a, i gamtatnasate hangin i dahna lim, Vanglian Topa’ mai-ah i lah hangin bang phattuamna om ahi hiam?" 
Malachi3:15 I muhna bang leh, mi kiphasakteng mah in thupha ngahin nuamsa uh hi. Mi gamtatsiate ahihleh citheibek loin, a gamtatsiatnate uh tawh Pasian ze-et napi-un bangmah tuak se lo uh hi,’ na ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi3:16 Topa a zahtak mite khatlekhat tua bangin thu kigen uh a, amaute’ thugennate, Topa in ngai-in za hi. Topa in laibu khat nei a, amah zahtakin a thupi ngaihsut mite khempeuh tua sungah kiciamteh hi." 
Malachi3:17 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tua a kiciamteh mite pen keima mite hi ding uh hi. Keimah in na ka sep ni ciangin amaute pen keima neihtuam taktak mite hi ding uh hi. Pa in ama thu a mang a tapa a hehpih mah bangin kei zong amaute ka hehpih ding hi. 
Malachi3:18 Tua ciangin midikte le migilote, le keima na hong semte le hong sem lote a kilamdanna na mukik ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi4:1 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “En un, mi kiphasak khempeuh le migilo khempeuh, a zung a hiang cih om loin buhtu bangin a kattum ding hun hong tung ding hi. Tua ni ciangin khat zong suakta loin a vekpi-in kangtum khin ding uh hi." 
Malachi4:2 Ahi zongin ka thu a hong mang note tungah dikna ni hong taang ding a, tua in nizang bangin note tungah cidamna hong tun ding hi. Bawng khumna panin a kikhah bawngnote bangin suakta-in nuam na sa ding uh hi." 
Malachi4:3 Keimah in na kong sep ni ciangin note in migilote nuaisiahin leivui bangin na tuancil ding uh hi. 
Malachi4:4 “Israel mite khempeuh in a zuih dingin Horeb Mual panin ka nasem Moses tungah ka piak ahi, Moses’ thukhamte, ngeinate, le biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh limtakin phawk un." 
Malachi4:5 “Ahi zongin tua a lauhuai lian mahmah Topa’ ni hong tun ma-in note kiangah kamsang Elijah kong paisak ding hi. 
Malachi4:6 Amah in pate le tate lemtuahin a kilemsakkik ding hi. Tua bang hikeileh keimah hong pai-in na gam khempeuh uh ka susiagawp ding hi,” ci hi, a ci hi." 
Matthew1:5 Salmon ta Boaz, Rahab tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Boaz ta Obed, Ruth tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Obed ta Jessi," 
Matthew2:17 Hih bangin thu hong pian’ ciangin kamsangpa Jeremiah in," 
Matthew3:3 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa’ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin hih Johan’ thu a gen ahi hi." 
Matthew4:14 Tua bangin a va tenna pen kamsangpa Isaiah thugen a tun nading ahi hi. Tua a genna-ah," 
Matthew8:17 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Amah in eite’ natna teng thuakin, eite’ gimna teng puakhia hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun nadingin hih bang a piang ahi hi." 
Matthew12:16 Pasian in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin a gen thu a tuntheih nadingin, kuama kiangah ama thu a gen loh nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua a genna-ah," 
Matthew12:39 Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Tuhuna mite bangzahin giloin, Pasian’ thu thei lo ahi uh hiam? Na lamdang ka bawl ding na hong ngen tazen uh hi. Jonah thu tawh kisai nalamdang longal adang hong kilaklo ding hi." 
Matthew12:40 Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum le zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum le zan thum sung mah lei sungah om ding hi. 
Matthew12:41 Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khuamite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tu mahmahin note kiangah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat a om hi. 
Matthew13:14 Kamsang Isaiah’ thugenkholhna, hih thu tawh kisai-ah amau a dingin tung taktak hi. Tua a genna-ah, ‘Na zakzak uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew13:35 Hih bangin thugentehna a zatna pen kamsang Isaiah in, “Thugentehna zangin thu ka gen ding a, leitung piancil a kipan a kithei lo thute ka gen ding hi,” ci-in a genkholhsakna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
Matthew15:7 Na tungthamun mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, Isaiah in note’ thu a genna man mahmah hi. Tua a genna-ah," 
Matthew16:4 Tulai hun mite giloin, Pasian tawh kipawl lo uh hi. Lim a nget uh hangin Jonah lim simloh a dang kilaklo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ahih manin amaute nusia-in a paisan hi." 
Matthew16:14 Amaute in, “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi; pawlkhat in Elijah hi, hong ci uh hi; pawlkhat in Jeremiah ahih kei leh kamsang khat peuhpeuh hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew16:17 Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Jonah’ tapa Simon aw, hoih mahmah hi. Hih thu, leitung pilna tawh na theihtawm hi lo a, vantungah a om ka Pa in nangma tungah hong hilh ahi hi." 
Matthew24:15 “Tua ciangin kamsang Daniel in, ‘A lipkhaphuai zehphitna,’ ci-in a gen pen a siangtho munah hong om ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuh’ cihnopna thei ta un)," 
Matthew27:9 Tua ahih manin kamsang Jeremiah in, “Israel mite pawlkhat in ama man dingin a seh tua ngun peek sawmthum la uh a," 
Mark1:2 Kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangma mai-ah ka kamtai pa ka sawl a, amah in na pai nading lampi a bawlkhol ding hi." 
Mark7:6 Jesuh in amaute dawng a, “A tungthama a hoihin a kilangkhem note’ thu, Isaiah in a genkholhna man mahmah hi. Ama genna-ah, ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtakbawl uh a, a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi." 
Luke3:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan Gun kiim gam khempeuhah Johan pai kawikawi a, kamsang Isaiah in Lai Siangtho sungah a gelh mah bangin, “Na mawhna panun kisik unla tui kiphum un. Tua hileh Pasian in na mawhnate uh hong maisak ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke3:4 Isaiah in hih bangin na gelh hi: “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topa’ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un." 
Luke3:25 Josef’ pa Mattathias, Mattathias’ pa Amos, Amos’ pa Nahum, Nahum’ pa Esli, Esli’ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:25 Josef’ pa Mattathias, Mattathias’ pa Amos, Amos’ pa Nahum, Nahum’ pa Esli, Esli’ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:29 Er’ pa Joshua, Joshua’ pa Eliezer, Eliezer’ pa Jorim, Jorim’ pa Matthat, Matthat’ pa Levi," 
Luke4:17 a nget bangin a sim dingin kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho bu a kipia hi. A laibu lemin a simnopna mun a zon ciangin a nuai-a bangin a kigelhna mun mu-in a sim hi. Tua munah," 
Luke11:29 Mihonte in Jesuh hong neh semsem uh a, Jesuh in zong a thugen zomlai-in, “Tuhun mite gilo mahmah uh hi. Amaute in lim lamdang ngen uh a, ahi zongin Jonah lim simloh a dang kipia lo ding hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite a dingin kamsang Jonah pen lim khat ahih mah bangin tuhun mite a dingin Mihing Tapa zong, lim ahi ding hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhen Ni ciangin Nineveh khuamite hong dingin note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jonah’ thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a mawhnate uh kisik uh a, ahi zongin Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat hih lai-ah a om hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:23 Johan in, “Kamsang Isaiah in a na gen mah bangin, ‘Topa’ tot ding lampi na tangsak un,’ ci-in gam sungah a kikopa ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John12:38 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kua in ka thugente um a, Topa’ vangliatna kua tungah kilak ahi hiam?” ci-in a genna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John12:39 Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuam lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in," 
John12:41 Isaiah in Jesuh’ neih Pasian’ pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi. 
Acts2:16 Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gensa thu hi a, tua sungah," 
Acts8:28 inn zuan dingin leeng sungah a tuan kawmin kamsang Isaiah laibu a sim hi. 
Acts8:30 Filip zong ama kiangah va tai a, kamsang Isaiah laibu a simna za ahih manin, “Na laisim a khiatna na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin na pu na pate uh tungah a thugen man mahmah hi. Tua a genna-ah, ‘Pai inla, hih mite tungah hih bangin va gen in: Thu na ngaihngaih uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite lungsim mawk a, a bil uh humcip uh a, mitsicip uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le-uh, a mit un khua mu ding a, a bil un khua za ding a, a lungsim un thu mu thei ding hi. Tua bang hileh kei lamah hong kihei ding uh a, keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi,’ ci-in a gen hi,” a cih khit ciangin amaute khatlekhat kithutuak loin a paikhia uh hi." 
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keima mi a hilote, ‘Keima mi,’ ka ci ding a, ka it loh mite, ‘Ka itte,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel mite’ thu a genna-ah, “Israel mite, tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hangin mi tawmno khat bek suakta ding uh hi." 
Romans9:29 Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in, “Vanglian Topa in eite’ suanlekhak ding hong siitsak lo hileh Sodom khua le Gomorrah khuamite i bang ding hi,” ci-in a genkholhsa thu ahi hi." 
Romans10:16 Ahi zongin Isaiah in, “Topa aw, ka thugente uh kua in um ahi hiam?” a cih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a za mi khempeuh in um kim lo uh hi." 
Romans10:20 Tua banah Isaiah in Pasian’ min tawh hangtakin thu na gen a, “Kei hong zong lo mite in kei hong mu uh a, kei hong kan lo mite tungah ka kilak hi,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Romans15:12 tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Jessi’ suante khat hong khang ding a, Gentail mite a uk dingin milian hong suak ding a, ama hangin Gentail mite in lamet lungmuanna nei ding uh hi,” cihnate a kigelh hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasian’ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nunggen nawn lo ding hi. 
James5:11 Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi, i ci hi. Job in a thuakna-ah a lungduaina na thei uh a, Topa in dikna le hehpihna nei ahih manin a tawpna-ah Job tungah a piak thuphate na thei uh hi."
